dvitīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 |
prāpnuyuḥ prāpsyāmaḥ || 111 ||

atha tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca - sarvajñānamahānidhe |
bhagavan bhūtabhavyeśa
avāpya kāśīṃ gīrvāṇaiḥ kimakāri vadācyuta || 1 ||
adhītyemāṃ kathāṃ divyāṃ na tṛptimadhiyāmyaham |
śevadhistapasāṃ devairagastiḥ prārthitaḥ katham || 2 ||
kathaṃ vindhyo'pyavāpa svāṃ prakṛti tādṛgunnataḥ |
tava vāgamṛtāmbhodhau mano me snātumutsukam || 3 ||
iti kṛtsnaṃ samākarṇya vyāsaḥ pārāśaro muniḥ |
śraddhāvate svaśiṣyāya vaktuṃ samupacakrame || 4 |
agasterāśramapade devatānāṃ samāgamaḥ |
tasya cāśramamāhātmyaṃ tṛtīye'dhyāya īyate ||
evaṃ vadanto hṛṣṭāsyāḥ surāḥ kāśīṃ samāyayurityuktaṃ tatra pṛcchati | bhagavanniti |
acyuta nirvikāra he viṣṇo ' iti vā || 1 |
na tṛptimadhiyāmi alaṃ pratyayaṃ nādhigacchāmi | tapasāṃ śevadhirnidhiḥ | yathā padmādi-
nidhirdhanānāmāśrayaḥ , tathā tapāsāmāśrayaḥ khanirityarthaḥ || 2 |
vāgamṛtāmbhodhau vāksudhāsamudre | utsukamutkaṇṭhitam || 3 ||

uvāca- 73
pārāśara
śṛṇu sūta mahābuddhe bhaktiśraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
śukavaiśampāyanādyāḥ śṛṇvantvete ca bālakāḥ || 5 |
tato vārāṇasīṃ prāpya gīrvāṇāḥ samaharṣayaḥ |
avilambaṃ prathamato maṇikarṇyā . vidhānataḥ || 6 |
sacailamabhimajjyātha kṛtasandhyādisatkriyāḥ |
santarpya tarvyādipi na n kuśagandhatilodakaiḥ || 7 ||
torthavāsārthinaḥ sarvān santarpya ca pṛthak pṛthak |
ratnai hiraṇyavāsobhiraśvābharaṇadhenubhiḥ
saṃsārāṅgāre vipacyamānān saṃsāriṇo'jñān karuṇayā śocatīti śukaḥ | taduktaṃ
bhāgavate - ' saṃsāriṇāṃ karuṇayā ha purāṇaguhyamiti ' | yadvā śukavanmanojñaṃ vacanaṃ vaktīti
śukaḥ |
tathā ca brahmavetrartte vyāsaṃ prati bhagavadvacanam - vyāsa ! tvadīyatanayaḥ śukavanmanojñaṃ brūte
vacaḥ , bhavatu tacchuka eva nāmnā | māyayā'sau |
harmye na vatsyati tavāpi na
spṛṣṭo yato mama kathā hṛdi māsya śokam || iti |
tathā vigataṃ nāmoccāraṇādeva śampāyāḥ śatahradāyā ayanaṃ patanaṃ yasya , sa
viśampāyanaḥ , sa eva vaiśampāyanaḥ | svārthe taddhitaḥ | uktañca -
śampāṃ śatahradāmāhurayanaṃ patanaṃ yataḥ |
vigataṃ patanaṃ yasmādvaiśampāyana ityuta || iti |
tau śuka - vaiśampāyanā vādya yeṣāṃ te tathā | ādyapadena jātūkarṇya jaiminipailasumantūnāṃ

vicitraiśca tathā pātraiḥ svarṇaraupyādinirmitaiḥ |
amṛtasvādupakvānnaiḥ pāyasaiśca saśarkaraiḥ || 9 |
sagorasairannadānaidhanyidānairanekadhā
gandhacandana karpūraistāmbūlaiścārucāmaraiḥ ||10 ||
satumaṃdupayrvīpikādarpaṇāsanaiḥ
śivikādāsadāsībhirvimānaiḥ paśubhirgṛhaiḥ ||| 11 |
citradhvajapatākābhirullocaiścandra cārubhiḥ
varṣāśanapradānaiśca gṛhopaskarasaṃyutaiḥ || 12 |
upānatpāṭukābhiśca yatinaśca tapasvinaḥ |
yogyaiḥ paṭadukūlaiśca vividhaiśvitrarallakaiḥ || 13 ||
daṇḍaiḥ kamaṇḍaluyutairajinairmṛgasambhavaiḥ
kaupīnairuccamañcaiśva paricārakakāñcanaiḥ || 14 |

maṭhaividyārthināmannairatithyarthaṃ mahādhanaiḥ |
mahāpustakasambhārairlekhakānāca jīvanaiḥ || 15 |
bahudhauṣadhadānaiśca satradānairanekaśaḥ |
grīṣme prapārthadraviṇairhemante'gniṣṭikendhanaiḥ || 16 ||
chatrācchādanikādyarthe varṣākālocitairbahu |
rātrau pāṭhapradīpaiśca pādābhyañjanakādibhiḥ || 17 ||
purāṇapāṭhakāṃścāpi pratidevālayaṃ dhanaiḥ |
devālaye nṛtyagītakaraṇārthairanekaśaḥ || 18 ||
devālayasudhākāryejarṇoddhārairanekadhā
citralekhanamūlyaiśva raṅgamālādimaṇḍanaiḥ || 16 ||
nīrājanairguggulubhirdaśāṅgāvisudhūpakaiḥ |
karpūravattakādyaiśca devārcārthairanekaśaḥ || 20 |
mahāpustakasambhārairanekaiḥ pustakasamūhaiḥ | nānāpustakasāmagrībhiriti vā || 15 ||
satradānairvastradānairyajñadānairdhanadānairiti vā | ' satramācchādane yajñe sadā dāne
dhane'pi ca ' ityamaraḥ | hemante'gniṣṭikendhanaiḥ śiśirartau śītāpanodāya lohamṛdādi -
nirmitānyagnyādhārapātrāṇi agniṣṭikāstāśca tāsvagnikaraṇārthānīndhanāni kāṣṭhāni ca
taiḥ || 16 ||
ācchādanikaṃ chadigṛhādikam || 17 ||
devālayasudhākāryaiḥ devaprasādacūrṇadānaiḥ | raṅgamālādimaṇḍanaiḥ , raṅgamālā raṅgasamūhāḥ ,
ādiśabdena sammārjanādīni gṛhyante | tairyāni maṇḍanāni , tānyeva vā maṇḍanāni , taiḥ |
maṇḍalairiti pāṭhe maṇḍalaṃ sarvatobhadrādi ||| 1 9 |
nīrājanaiḥ ārātikaḥ bahuvatiyuktadīpairityarthaḥ | taduktaṃ viṣṇubhaktirahasye-
bahuvartisamāyuktaṃ jvalantaṃ keśavopari |
kuryādārātikaṃ yastu kalpakoṭidivaṃ vaset || iti |

pañcāmṛtānāṃ snapanaiḥ sugandhasnapanairapi | |
devārthaṃ mukhavāsaiśva devodyānairanekaśaḥ || 21 |
mahāpūjārthamālyādigumphanārthaistrikālataḥ
śaṅkhabherīmṛdaṅgādivādyanādaiḥ śivālaye || 22 |
ghaṇṭāgaḍukakumbhādisnānopaskarabhājanaiḥ
śvetai marjinavastraiśca sugandhairyakṣakardamaiḥ || 23 ||
japahomaiḥ stotrapāṭhaḥ śivanāmoccabhāṣaṇaiḥ |
rāsakrīḍādisaṃyuktaṃścalanaiḥ sapradakṣiṇaiḥ || 24 |
ārātikairiti vā pāṭhaḥ | daśāṅgādisudhūpakairiti-
ṣaḍbhāgakuṣṭho dviguṇo guḍaśca lākṣātrayaṃ pañcanakhasya bhāgāḥ |
harītakī sarjarasaśca māṃsaṃ bhāgatrayaṃ caiva tu śailajasya ||
ghanasya catvāri purasya caiko daśāṅgadhūpaḥ kathito munīndreḥ ||
ityanenoko daśāṅgadhūpa ādiryeṣāṃ te ca te sudhūpāśca taiḥ | karpūravatikādyairiti |
karpūraṃ vartikā yasya sa karpūravartikaḥ , ādī bhava ādyaḥ , karpūravartiko dīpa ādyo yeṣāṃ
te dīpāstathā taiḥ | karpūravartikārthairiti kvacitpāṭhaḥ | devārcārthairdevapūjānimittai-
dhanaiḥ || 20 ||
pañcāmṛtānāṃ snapanairghṛtadugdhadadhimadhuśarkarāṇāṃ snānaiḥ || 21 ||
gumphanārthaiḥ granthanārthadraviṇaiḥ | ' gumphanaṃ granthasandarbhe darpe gumphanamiṣyate ' iti
medinīkāraḥ || 22 ||
gaḍukaṃ bhṛṅgāram aṅgulīyakaṃ vā | ' gaḍukaṃ tvaṅgulīyakam ' ityutpalinī |
maḍḍuketi pāṭhe maḍḍuko vādyabhedaḥ | tathā ca māghe - ' jagmurjalāni jalamaḍḍukavādya valgu
valagadghanastanataṭaskhalitāni mandam ' iti | ' vādyaprabhedā ḍamarumaḍḍuḍiṇḍimajharjharāḥ ' iti

evamādibhiruddaṇḍaḥ kriyākāṇḍairanekaśaḥ |
paścarātramuṣitvā tu kṛtvā tīrthānyanekaśaḥ || 25 |
dīnānāthāṃśca santarpya natvā viśveśvaraṃ vibhum |
brahmacaryādiniyamaistīrthamevaṃ prasādhya ca || 26 ||
punaḥ punaviśvanāthaṃ dṛṣṭvā stutvā praṇamya ca |
jagmuḥ paropakārārthamagastiryatra tiṣṭhati || 27 |
svanāmnā liṅgamāsthāpya kuṇḍaṃ kṛtvā tadagrataḥ |
śatarudriyasūktena japanniścalamānasaḥ || 28 |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā dūrato devā dvitīyamiva bhāskaram |
jvalajjvalanasaṃkāśairaṅgaḥ sarvatra sojjvalam || 26 ||

sākṣātki vāḍavāgnirvā mūrtyā vai tapyate tapaḥ |
sthāṇuvanniścalataraṃ nirmalaṃ sanmano yathā || 30 |
athavā sarvatejāṃsi śritvemāṃ brāhmaṇīṃ tanum |
śīlayanti paraṃ dhāma śāntaṃ śāntapadāptaye || 31 |
tapanastapyate'tyarthe dahano'pi hi dahyate |
yattīvratapasādyāpi capalā'capalā'bhavat || 32 |
yasyāśrame'tra dṛśyante hissrā api samantataḥ |
sattvarūpā amī sattvāstyaktvā vairaṃ svabhāvajam ||| 33 |
śuṇḍādaṇḍena karaṭiḥ siṃhaṃ kaṇḍūyate'bhayaḥ |
aṣṭāpadāṅka svapiti kesarī kesarodbhaṭaḥ || 34 |
āgāmyaṣṭatriṃśacchlokasthiteti śabdaparāmṛṣṭaṃ karmāhuḥ | sākṣādityādi | tatra

vihāya nijayūthakam |
caredvanaśunāṃ madhye mustānyastekṣaṇo balī || 35 ||
bhūdāro'pi na bhūdāraṃ tathā kuryādyathā'nyataḥ |
sarvā liṅgamayī kāśī yatastaddbhītiyantritaḥ || 36 ||
kroḍīkṛtya kroḍapotaṃ tarakṣuḥ krīḍayatyaho |
śārdūlabālānutsārya śārdūlīmeṇapotakaḥ || 37 |

calatpuccho'tha pibati phenilenānanena vai |
svapantaṃ lomaśaṃ bhallaṃ vānaraścaladaṅguliḥ || 38 |
yūkāṃ saṃvīkṣya vīkṣyaiva bhakṣayeddantakoṭibhiḥ |
golāṅgalāraktamukhā nīlāṅgā yūthanāyakāḥ || 36 |
jātisvabhāvamātsaryaṃ tyaktvaikatra ramanti ca |
śaśāḥ krīḍanti ca vṛkaistaiḥ pṛṣṭhaluṇṭhanairmuhuḥ ||| 40 |
ākhuścākhubhujaḥ karṇaṃ kaṇḍūyeta calānanaḥ |
mayūrapucchapuṭago nidrātyotuḥ sukhādhikam ||| 41 |
calatpucchaṃ yasya sa tathā | pibati paya iti śeṣaḥ | pibatiratra dvikarmakaḥ |
lakṣaṇayā vā śārdū lyāḥ stanaṃ pibatītyarthaḥ | phenilena phenayuktena | svapantaṃ śayānaṃ bhalluṃ

svakaṇṭhaṃ gharṣayatyeva kekikaṇṭhe bhujaṅgamaḥ |
bhujaṅgamaphaṭāpṛṣṭhe nakulaḥ svakulocitam || 42 |
vairaṃ parityajya luṭhedutplutyotplutya līlayā |
ālokya mūṣakaṃ sarpaścarantaṃ vadanāgrataḥ || 43 ||
kṣudhāndho'pi na gṛhṇāti so'pi tasmādvibheti no |
prasūyamānāṃ hariṇīṃ dṛṣṭrā kāruṇyapūrṇadṛk || 44 |
taddṛṣṭipātaṃ muñcan vai vyāghro dūraṃ vrajatyaho |
vyāghrī vyāghrasya caritaṃ mṛgī mṛgaviceṣṭitam |
ubhe kathayato'nyonyaṃ sakhyāviva mudānvite || 45 ||
dṛṣṭrāpyuddaṇḍakodaṇḍaṃ śabaraṃ śambaro mṛgaḥ |
dhṛṣṭo na vartma tyajapi so'pi kaṇḍūyate'pi tam || 46 |

rohito'raṇyamahiṣamuddharṣati nirākulaḥ |
camarī śabarī keśaiḥ saṃmimīte svabāladhim || 47 ||
gavayaḥ śalyakaścāyamubhāvekatra tiṣṭhataḥ |
tīvramātsaryamutsṛjya munitejo niyantritau || 48 ||
huṇḍau ca muṇḍayuddhāya na sajjete jayaiṣiṇau |
eṇaśāvaṃ śṛgālo'pi mṛdu spṛśati pāṇinā || 46 ||
rohito mṛgagāvāntarajātibhedaḥ | ' kṛṣṇasārarurunyaṅkuraṅkuśambararohiṣāḥ | gokarṇa-
pṛṣataiṇarṣyarohitāścamaro mṛgāḥ ' ityamaraḥ | uddharṣati saṃspṛśati saṃluṇṭhati , na gaṇayatītyarthaḥ |

tṛṇvanti tṛṇagulmādīn śvāpadāstvāpadāspadam |
lokadvaye duḥkhadaṃ hi dhik tanmāṃsasya bhakṣaṇam || 50 ||
yaḥ svārtha māṃsapacanaṃ kurute pāpamohitaḥ |
yāvantyasya tu romaṇi tāvat sa narake vaset || 51 ||
paraprāṇaistu ye prāṇān svān puṣṇanti hi dudhiyaḥ |
ākalpaṃ narakān bhuktvā te bhujyante'tra taiḥ punaḥ || 52 ||
jātu māṃsaṃ na bhoktavyaṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatairapi |
bhoktavyaṃ tarhi bhoktavyaṃ svamāṃsaṃ netarasya ca || 53 ||

varamete śvāpadā vai maitrāvaruṇisevayā |
yeṣāṃ na hiṃsane buddhirna tu hiṃsāparā narāḥ || 54 ||
bako'pi palvale matsyānnāśnātyagrecarānapi |
na mahānto'pyamahato matsyā matsyānadanti vai || 55 ||
ekataḥ sarvamāṃsāni matsyasāṃsaṃ tathaikataḥ |
smṛtiḥ smṛteti kintvebhirato matsyāñjahatyamī || 56 |
śyeno'pi vartikāṃ dṛṣṭrā bhavatyeṣa parāṅmukhaḥ |
citramatrāpi madhupā bhramanti malināśayāḥ || 57 ||
varaṃ śreṣṭhāḥ || 54 |

suciraṃ narakān bhuktvā madirāpānalampaṭāḥ |
madhupā eva jāyante bhrāntibhājaḥ punaḥ punaḥ || 58 |
ata eva purāṇeṣu gātheti parigīyate |
sphuṭārthātra purāṇajñairjñātvā tattvaṃ pinākinaḥ || 56 ||
kva māṃsaṃ kva śive bhaktiḥ kva madyaṃ kva śivārcanam |
madyamāṃsaratānāṃ ca dūre tiṣṭhati śaṅkaraḥ || 60 |
vinā śivaprasādaṃ hi bhrāntiḥ kvāpi na naśyati |
ata eva bhramantyete bhramarāḥ śivavarjitāḥ || 61 ||

ityāśramacarān dṛṣṭā tiryañco'pi munīniva |
abodhi vibudhairitthaṃ prabhāvaḥ kṣetrajastvayam || 62 |
yato viśveśvareṇaite tiryañco'pyatra vāsinaḥ |
nidhanāvasare mocyāstārakasyopadeśataḥ || 63 |
jñātvā kṣetrasya māhātmyaṃ yo vaset kṛtaniścayaḥ |
taṃ tārayati viśveśo jīvantamathavā mṛtam || 64 | ||
avimuktarahasyajñā mucyante jñānino narāḥ |
ajñānino'pi tiryañco mucyante gatakilbiṣāḥ ' || 65
ityāścaryaparā devā yāvadyāntyāśramaṃ muneḥ |
tāvat pakṣikulaṃ dṛṣṭvā bhṛśaṃ mumudire punaḥ || 66 ||

sāraso lakṣmaṇākaṇṭhe kaṇṭhamādhāya niścalaḥ |
manyāmahe na nidrāti dhyāyedviśveśvaraṃ kila || 67 ||
kaṇḍūyamānā varaṭā svacañcupuṭakoṭibhiḥ |
haṃsaṃ kāmayamānantu vārayet pakṣadhūnaneḥ || 68 ||
nirudhyamānā cakreṇa cakrī kreṅkitabhāṣaṇaiḥ |
vadatīti kimatrāpi kāmitā kāmināṃ vara ! || 66 ||
kalakaṇṭhaḥ kilotkaṇṭhaṃ mañju guñjati kuñjagaḥ |
dhyānasthaḥ śroṣyati muniḥ pārāvatyeti vāryate || 70 |

kekī kekāṃ parityajya maunaṃ tiṣṭhati tadbhayāt |
cakoracandrikābhoktā naktavratamivāsthitaḥ | 71 |
paṭhantī sārikā sāraṃ śukaṃ sambodhayatyaho |
apārāvārasaṃsārasindhupārapradaḥ śivaḥ || 72 |
kokilaḥ komalālāpaiḥ kalayan kila kākalīm |
kalikālau kalayataḥ kāśisthānneti bhāṣate || 73 ||

mṛgāṇāṃ pakṣiṇāmittthaṃ dṛṣṭrā ceṣṭāṃ triviṣṭapam |
akāṇḍapātasaṅkaṣṭaṃ ninindustridaśā bahu || 74 ||
varamete pakṣimṛgāḥ paśavaḥ phāśivāsinaḥ |
yeṣāṃ na punarāvṛttinaṃ devā na punarbhavāḥ || 75 |
kāśīsthaiḥ patitaistulyā na vayaṃ svargiṇaḥ kvacit |
kāśyāṃ pātād bhayaṃ nāsti svarge pātādbhayaṃ mahat || 76 ||
varaṃ kāśīpurīvāso māsopavasanādibhiḥ |
vicitracchatra sañchāyaṃ rājyaṃ nānyatra nīripuḥ || 77 |

śaśakairmaśakaiḥ kāśyāṃ kāśyāṃ yatpadaṃ helayāpyate |
tatpadaṃ nāpyate'nyatra yogayuktyāpi yogibhiḥ || 78 |
varaṃ vārāṇasī raṅko niśśaṅko yo yamādapi |
na vayaṃ tridaśāṃ yeṣāṃ girito'pīdṛśī daśā || 76 ||
brahmaṇo divasāṣṭāṃśe padamaindraṃ vinaśyati |
salokapālaṃ sārkañca sacandragrahatāra kam || 80 ||
parārdhadrayanāśe'pi kāśīstho yo na naśyati |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena kāśyāṃ śreyaḥ samācaret || 81 ||

na tadbrahmāṇḍamaṇḍape |
asti cettatkathaṃ sarve kāśīvāsābhilāṣukāḥ || 82 ||
janmāntara sahasreṣu yatpuṇyaṃ samupārjitam |
tatpuṇyaparivartena kāśyāṃ vāso'tra labhyate || 83 ||
labdho'pi siddhi no yāyādyadi krudhyettrilocanaḥ |
tasmādviśveśvaraṃ nityaṃ śaraṇyaṃ śaraṇaṃ vrajet || 84 ||
dharmārthakāmamokṣākhyaṃ puruṣārthacatuṣṭayam |
akhaṇḍaṃ hi yathā kāśyāṃ na tathānyatra kutracit || 85 |
ālasyenāpi yo yāyād gṛhādviśveśvarālayam |
aśvamedhādhiko dharmastasya syācca pade pade || 86 |
śaṭhāśca mūrkhāḥ kurvanti pāpānyaviśaṅkamāyeṃ | teṣāmanantaṃ bhavatīha duḥkhamācandratāraṃ na hi
saṃśayo'tra ' , ' labdho'pi siddhi no yāyādyadi kruddhayettrilocanaḥ ' ityādi || 81 ||

yaḥ snātvottaravāhinyāṃ yāti viśveśadarśane |
śraddhayā parayā tasya śreyaso'nto na vidyate || 87 |
svardhunī darśanātsparśāt snānādācamanādapi |
sandhyopāsanato japyāttarpaṇāddeva pūjanāt || 88 |
pañcatīrthāvalokācca tato viśveśvarekṣaṇāt |
śraddhāsparśanapūjābhyāṃ dhūpadīpādidānataḥ || 86 |
pradakṣiṇaiḥ stotrajapairnamaskāraistu narttanaiḥ |
deva deva mahādeva śambho śiva śiveti ca || 60 ||
dhūrjaṭe nīlakaṇṭheśa pinākin pinākin śaśiśekhara |
triśūlapāṇe viśveśa rakṣa rakṣeti bhāṣaṇaiḥ || 61 |
svardhunīdarśanādityārabhya pañcamyantānāṃ padānāṃ tṛtīyāntānāṃ ca dharmaḥ syāduttaro-
tara ityagrimeṇa sambandhaḥ || 88 ||

muktimaṇḍapikāyāṃ ca nimeṣārdhopaveśanāt |
tatra dharmakathālāpāta purāṇaśravaṇādapi || 62 |
nityādikarmakaraṇāttathā'tithisamarcanaiḥ
paropakaraṇādyaiśva dharmaḥ syāduttarottaraḥ | 63 |
śuklapakṣe yathā candraḥ kalayā kalayedhate |
evaṃ kāśyāṃ nivasatāṃ dharmarāśiḥ pade pade || 64 ||
śraddhābījo viprapādāmbusiktaḥ
śākhāvidyāstāścatasro daśāpi |
puṣpāṇyarthā dve phale sthūlasūkṣme
mokṣaḥ kāmo dharmavṛkṣo'yamīḍyaḥ || 65 |
uttarottara uparyupari śreṣṭho vā | ' uparyudīcyaśreṣṭheṣvapyuttaraḥ syāt ' ityamaraḥ |

sarvārthānāmatra dātrī bhavānī
sarvān kāmān pūrayedatra duṇḍhiḥ |
sarvān jantūn mocayedantakāle
viśveśo'tra śrotramantropadeśāt || 66 |
kāśyāṃ dharmastaccatuṣpādarūpaḥ
kāśyāmarthaḥ so'pyanekaprakāraḥ |
kāśyāṃ kāmaḥ sarvasaukhyaika bhūmiḥ
kāśyāṃ śreyastattu kiṃ nātra yacca || 67 ||
viśveśvaro yatra na tatra citraṃ
dharmārthakāmāmṛtarūparūpaḥ
svarūparūpaḥ sa hi viśvarūpa-
stasmānna kāśīsadṛśī trilokī || 68 |
punaḥ kīdṛśaḥ ? yasya dharmavṛkṣasyārthā nyāyopārjitadhanāni puṣpāṇi kusumāni saḥ |

iti bruvāṇā gīrvāṇā dadṛśustūṭajaṃ muneḥ |
homadhūpa sugandhāḍhyaṃ vaṭubhirbahubhirvṛtam || 66 |
śyāmākāñjaliyācñārthasṛṣikanyānuyāyibhiḥ |
dhṛtopagrahadarbhāsyairmṛgaśāvairalaṅkṛtam || 100 ||
yadvā dharmārthakāmāmṛtānāṃ bhaktebhyo rūpāya nirūpaṇāya dānāya rūpaṃ śarīraṃ līlā-
vigraho yasya saḥ | tarhi śarīrasambandhāt prāptā saṃsāritā , tatrāha | svarūparūpaḥ svarūpama-
khaṇḍasaccidānandalakṣaṇaṃ rūpaṃ svarūpaṃ yasya saḥ |
nanu tasya prapañcena saha bhedapratīteḥ kathamakhaṇḍasaccidānandātmakatvam , tatrāha | sa hi

sārdravalkalakaupīnairvṛkṣaśākhāvalambibhiḥ
baddha ṃ vighnamṛgān dikṣu vāgurābhirivāvṛtam ||| 101 |
pativratāśiroratnalopāmudrāṅghrimudrayā
mudritaṃ vīkṣya sannemuḥ parṇaśālāṅgaṇaṃ surāḥ || 102 |
visarjitasamādhi ca dhṛtakarṇākṣamālikam |
adhiṣṭhita bṛsīpṛṣṭhaṃ parameṣṭhivadutkaṭam || 103 |
puro'gastyaṃ samālokya sarve devāḥ savāsavāḥ |
prahṛṣṭavadanāḥ procuḥ proccairjaya jayeti ca || 104 |
munirutthāya tān sarvānupāveśya yathocitam |
āśībhirabhinandyātha papracchāgamakāraṇam || 105 |
sārdravalkalānyeva kaupīnāni terāvṛtamityanvayaḥ | kathambhūtairvṛkṣaśākhā'valambibhiḥ

vyāsa uvāca -
idaṃ puṇyatamākhyānaṃ śrutvā bhaktisamanvitaḥ |
paṭhitvā pāṭhayitvā ca vrataśraddhāvatāṃ puraḥ || 106
vidhūya sarvapāpāni jñātvā'jñātvā |
kṛtānyapi |
haṃsavarṇena yānena gacchecchivapuraṃ dhruvam || 107 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe agastyāśramavarṇanaṃ
nāma tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ tṛtīyo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 ||

atha caturtho'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca -
munipṛṣṭāstadā devā bhagavaṃste kimabruvan |
sarvalokahitārthāya tadākhyāhi mahāmune || 1 |
vyāsa uvāca ---
agastivacanaṃ śrutvā bahumānapurassaram |
dhiṣaṇādhipaterāsyaṃ vibudhā vyālulokire || 2 |
vākpatiruvāca-
śṛṇvagaste mahābhāga devāgamanakāraṇam |
dhanyo'si kṛtakṛtyo'si mānyo'si mahatāmapi || 3 ||
pativratāśiroratnalopāmudrānuvarṇanam |
caturthe varṇyate śeṣapāparāśipraṇāśanam ||1 ||
munirutthāya tān sarvānupaveśya yathocitam |
āśībhirabhinandyātha papracchāgamakāraṇam || 2 |
ityuktam , tatra pṛcchati | munipṛṣṭā iti || 1 ||

pratyāśramaṃ pratinagaṃ pratyaraṇyaṃ tapodhanāḥ |
kiṃ na santi muniśreṣṭha kācidanyaiva te sthitiḥ || 4 ||
tapo lakṣmīstvayīhāsti brāhmaṃ tejastvayi sthiram |
puṇyalakṣmostvayi parā tvayyaudāyaṃ manastvayi || 5 |
pativrateyaṃ kalyāṇī lopāmudrā sardhārmaṇī |
tavāṅgacchāyayā tulyā yatkathā puṇyakāriṇī || 6 |
pativratāsvarundhatyā sāvitryāpyanasūyayā |
śāṇḍilyayā ca satyā ca lakṣmyā ca śatarūpayā || 7 |
menayā ca sunītyā ca saṃjñayā svāyā tathā |
yathaiṣā varṇyate śra eṣṭhā na tathā'nyeti niścitam || 8 |

bhuṅkte bhukte tvayi mune tiṣṭhati tvayi tiṣṭhati |
vinidrite ca nidrāti prathamaṃ pratibudhyate || 6 |
analaṅkṛtamātmānaṃ tava no darśayet kvacit |
kāryārthaṃ proṣite kvāpi sarvamaṇḍanavarjitā || 10 ||
na ca te nāma gṛhṇīyāttavāyuṣyavivṛddhaye |
puruṣāntaranāmāpi na gṛhṇāti kadācana ||| 11 |
ānuṣṭā'pi na cākrośettāḍitā'pi prasīdati |
idaṃ kuru kṛtaṃ svāmin manyatāmiti vakti ca || 12 ||
āhūtā gṛhakāryāṇi tyaktvā gacchati satvaram |
kimarthaṃ vyāhṛtā nātha saprasādo vidhīyatām || 13 ||

na ciraṃ tiṣṭhati dvāri na dvāramupasevate |
adāpitaṃ tvayā kiñcit kasmaicinna dadātyapi || 14 ||
pūjopakaraṇaṃ sarvamanuktā sādhayet svayam |
niyamodaka bahaṣi patrapuṣpākṣatādikam || 15 ||
pratīkṣamāṇāvasaraṃ yathākālocitaṃ hi yat |
tadupasthāpayetsarvamanudvignātihṛṣṭavat || 16 ||
sevate bharturucchiṣṭamiṣṭamannaṃ phalādikam |
mahāprasāda ityuktvā patidattaṃ pratīcchati || 17 ||
avibhajya na cāśnīyāddevapitrātithiṣvapi |
paricārakavargeṣu goṣu bhikṣukuleṣu ca || 18 |
saṃyatopaskarādakṣā hṛṣṭā vyayaparāṅmukhī |
kuryāttvayānanujñātā nopavāsavratādikam || 16 ||
na dvāramupasevate śayanādineti śeṣaḥ ||14 ||
pratīcchati gṛhṇāti ||17 ||
saṃyatopaskarā sunirṇitālaṅkārā || 1 9 |

dūrato varjayedeṣā samājotsavadarśanam |
na gacchettīrthayātrādi vivāhaprekṣaṇādiṣu || 20 ||
sukhasuptaṃ sukhāsīnaṃ ramamāṇaṃ yadṛcchayā |
āntareṣvapi kāryeṣu pati notthāpayetkvacit || 21 |
strīdharmiṇī trirātrantu svamukhaṃ naiva darśayet |
svavākyaṃ śrāvayenāpi yāvatsnātā na śuddhitaḥ || 22 ||
susnātā bhartṛvadanamīkṣate'nyasya na kvacit |
athavā manasi dhyātvā patiṃ bhānuṃ vilokayet || 23 ||
haridrāṃ kuṅkumaṃ caiva sindūraṃ kajjalaṃ tathā |
kūrpāsakaṃ ca tāmbūlaṃ māṅgalyābharaṇaṃ śubham || 24 ||
keśasaṃskārakabarīkarakarṇādibhūṣaṇam
bhartturāyuṣyamicchantī dūrayenna pativratā ||| 25 |
samājotsavadarśanaṃ samājaśca utsavaśca tayordarśanam | darśanābhāvamuktvā

na rajakyā na haitukyā tathā śramaṇayā na ca |
na ca durbhagayā kvāpi sakhitvaṃ kurute satī || 26 ||
bhartṛvidveṣiṇīṃ nāroṃ naiṣā sambhāṣate kvacit |
naikākinī kvacidbhūyānna nagnā snāti ca kvacit || 27 ||
nolūkhale na musale na varddhanyāṃ dṛṣadyapi |
na yantrake na dehalyāṃ satī copaviśet kvacit || 28 ||
vinā vyavāyasamayaṃ prāgalbhyaṃ na kvaciccaret |
yatra yatra rucirbhartustatra premavatī sadā || 26 ||
idameva vrataṃ strīṇāmayameva paro vṛṣaḥ |
iyamekā devapūjā bharturvākyaṃ na laṅghayet || 30 ||
rajakyā vastranirṇejakapatnyā udakyayā vā |
prathame'hani cāṇḍālī dvitīye brahmaghātinī |
tṛtīye rajakī proktā caturthe'hani śuddhayati || iti vacanāt |
yāvadrajo'nuvarttate , tāvattayā sakhitvaṃ nācaredityarthaḥ | haitukyā satkamaṃsuhetubhiḥ

klībaṃ vā duravasthaṃ vā vyādhitaṃ vṛddhameva vā |
susthitaṃ duḥsthitaṃ vāpi patimekaṃ na laṅghayet || 31 |
hṛṣṭā hṛṣṭe viṣaṇṇāsyā viṣaṇṇāsye priye sadā |
ekarūpā bhavet puṇyā sampatsu ca vipatsu ca || 32 ||
sapilavaṇatailādikṣaye'pi ca pativratā |
pati nāstīti na brūyādāyāseṣu na yojayet || 33 |
tīrthasnānārthinī nārī patipādodakaṃ pibet |
śaṅkarādapi viṣṇorvā patireko'dhikaḥ striyaḥ || 34 ||
vratopavāsaniyamaṃ patimullaṅghaya yā caret |
āyuṣyaṃ harate bhartturmṛtā nirayamṛcchati || 35 |
uktā pratyuttaraṃ dadyādyā nārī krodhatatparā |
saramā jāyate grāme śṛgālī nirjane vane || 36 ||
klībaṃ vīryahīnam || 31 | saramā śunī | ' saramā śunī ' ityamaraḥ || 36 |

strīṇāṃ hi paramaścaiko niyamaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ |
abhyarcya caraṇau bharturbhoktavyaṃ kṛtaniścayam || 37 ||
uccāsanaṃ na seveta na vrajetparaveśmasu |
na trapākaravākyāni vaktavyāni kadācana || 38 ||
apavādo na vaktavyaḥ kalahaṃ dūratastyajet |
gurūṇāṃ sannidhau kvāpi noccairbrūyānna vā haset || 36 |
yā bharttāraṃ parityajya rahaśvarati durmatiḥ |
ulūkī jāyate krūrā vṛkṣakoṭaraśāyinī ||| 40 |
tāḍitā tāḍituṃ cecchetsā vyāghrī vṛṣadaṃśikā |
kaṭākṣayati yā'nyaṃ vai kekarākṣī tu sā bhavet || 41 ||
yā bharttāraṃ parityajya miṣṭamaśnāti kevalam |
grāme vā sūkarī bhṛyādvalgurvāpi svaviḍbhujā || 42 |
raho grāmyadharmaṃ carani ācarati | jāreṇa sārdhamiti śeṣaḥ | ulūko pecikā |
' ulūkastu vāyasārātipecakī ' ityamaraḥ || 40 |
vṛṣadeśikā mārjārī ca | vyāghro vṛṣadaṃśiketyekaṃ padaṃ vā | kekarākṣī tiryaṅanetrā -
vakranayaneti yāvat ||41 ||
valgurnāmordhvacaraṇo'dhaḥśirāvṛkṣāvalambī pakṣiviśeṣaḥ | svaviḍbhujā svaviṣṭhā-

yā tvaṃkṛtvā priyaṃ brūte mūkā sā jāyate khalu |
yā sapatnīṃ sadeyeta durbhagā sā punaḥ punaḥ || 43 ||
dṛṣṭi vilupya bharturyā kañcidanyaṃ samīkṣate |
kāṇā ca vimukhī cāpi kurūpā cāpi jāyate || 44 ||
bāhyādāyāntamālokya tvaritā ca jalāśanaiḥ |
tāmbūlairvyajaneścaiva pādasaṃvāhanādibhiḥ || 45 |
tathaiva cāṭuvacanaiḥ cāṭuvacanaiḥ khedasannodanaiḥ khedasannodanaiḥ paraiḥ |
yā priyaṃ prīṇayet prītā trilokī prīṇitā tayā || 46 ||
mitaṃ dadāti hi pitā mitaṃ bhrātā mitaṃ sutaḥ |
amitasya hi dātāraṃ bhartāraṃ pūjayetsadā ||| 47 |
tvaṅkṛtya tvaṅkāraṃ kṛtvā | huṅkṛtyeti kvacitpāṭhaḥ ||43 ||
vilupya vastrādinācchādya vyavadhāyetyetat | bhartṛsambandhinīṃ dṛṣṭiṃ tyaktveti
vā || 44 | bāhyād gṛhabāhyapradeśāt || 45 || khedasannodanairduḥkhāpanodanakartṛbhiḥ parairanyeḥ |
paraiḥ śreṣṭhervā ||46 ||

bhartā devo gururbhartā dharmatīrthavratāni ca |
tasmātsarvaṃ parityajya ' patimekaṃ samarcayet || 48 ||
jīvahīno yathā dehaḥ kṣaṇādaśucitāṃ vrajet |
bhartṛhīnā tathā yoṣit susnātāpyaśuciḥ sadā || 46 ||
amaṅgalebhyaḥ sarvebhyo vidhavā tyaktamaṅgalā |
vidhavā darśanātsiddhiḥ kvāpi jātu na jāyate || 50 ||
vihāya mātaraṃ caikāṃ sarvāmaṅgalavajitām |
tadāśiṣamapi prājñastyajedāśīviṣopamām || 51 |
kanyāvivāhasamaye vācayeyuriti dvijāḥ |
bhartuḥ sahacaro bhūyājjīvato'jīvato'pi vā || 52 ||
bhartā sadānuyātavyo dehavacchāyayā striyā |
candramājyotsnayā yadvadvidyutvān vidyutā yathā || 53 |
tadāśiṣamityatra tacchabdo mātṛvyatiriktaraṇḍāviṣayaḥ |
saṃnyastā'khilakarmā'pi piturvandyo hi maskarī |
sarvavandyena yatinā prasūrvandyā prayatnataḥ ||

anuvrajati bhartāraṃ gṛhāt pitṛvanaṃ mudā |
pade pade'śvamedhasya phalaṃ prāpnotyasaṃśayam || 54 |
vyālagrāhī yathā vyālaṃ balāduddharate bilāt |
evamutkramya dūtebhyaḥ pati svargaṃ nayetsatī ||| 55 |
yamadūtāḥ palāyante satīmālokya dūrataḥ |
api duṣkṛtakarmāṇaṃ samutsṛjya ca tatpatim || 56 |
na tathā bibhīmo vahnarna tathā vidyuto yathā |
āpatantīṃ samālokya vayaṃ dūtāḥ pativratām || 57 ||
tapanastapyate'tyantaṃ dahano'pi ca dahyate |
kampante sarvatejāṃsi dṛṣṭrā pātivrataṃ mahaḥ || 58 |
patimanuvrajantyagucchanto citā''rohārthamiti śeṣaḥ | pitṛvanaṃ śmaśānam | mudeti
balātkāreṇa manaṃ vāryate ||54 |

yāvatsvaloma saṃkhyā'sti tāvatkoṭayayutāni ca |
bhartrā svargasukhaṃ bhuṅkte ramamāṇā pativratā || 56 |
dhanyā sā jananī loke dhanyo'sau janakaḥ punaḥ |
dhanyaḥ sa ca patiḥ śrīmān yeṣāṃ gehe pativratā || 60 |
pitṛvaṃśyā mātṛvaṃśyāḥ pativaṃśyāstrayastrayaḥ |
pativratāyāḥ puṇyena svargasaukhyāni bhuñjate || 61 ||
śīlabhaṅgena durvṛttāḥ pātayanti kulatrayam |
piturmātustathā patyurihāmutra ca duḥkhitāḥ || 62 ||
pativratāyāścaraṇo yatra yatra spṛśedbhuvam |
tatreti bhūmirmanyeta nātra bhāro'sti pāvanī || 63 ||
bhartrā saha ramamāṇā bhartrā kartrā krīḍamānā iti vā | uktañca-
tisraḥ koṭyo'rdhakoṭī ca yāni lomāni mānave |
tāvatkālaṃ vasetsvarge bhartāraṃ yā'nugacchati || iti | 5 9 ||

bibhyatpativratāsparśaṃ kurute bhānumānapi |
somo gandhavahaśvāpi svapāvitryāya nānyathā || 64 |
āpaḥ pativratāsparśamabhilaṣyanti sarvadā |
adya jāḍyavināśo no jātāstvadyānyapāvanāḥ || 65 |
gṛhe gṛhe na kiṃ nāryo rūpalāvaṇyagarvitāḥ |
paraṃ viśveśabhaktyaiva labhyate strī pativratā || 66 ||
bhāryā mūlaṃ gṛhasthasya bhāryā mūlaṃ sukhasya ca |
bhāryā dharmaphalāvāptyai bhāryā santānavṛddhaye || 67 ||
paralokastvayaṃ loko jīyate bhāryayā dvayam |
devapitra tithījyādi nābhāryaḥ karma cārhati || 68 ||
bibhyad bhayaṃ kurvāṇaḥ | arthātpāpebhya iti trayāṇāṃ viśeṣaṇam || 64 |
jāḍyaṃ jaḍatvam , ajñānaṃ vā | tuśabdo'vadhāraṇārthaḥ | anyapāvanā anyeṣāṃ pāvana-
karbhyaḥ ||65 ||
evaṃ bhūtā tu bhāryā durlabhetyāha | gṛhe gṛhe iti | rūpalāvaṇyagarvitāḥ | rūpama-
ṅgasauṣṭhavam , lāvaṇyaṃ kāntiḥ , tābhyāṃ garvitāḥ || 66-67 |

gṛhasthaḥ sa hi vijñeyo yasya gehe pativratā |
grasate'nyā pratipadaṃ rākṣasyā jarayā'thavā || 66 ||
yathā gaṅgāvagāhena śarīraṃ pāvanaṃ bhavet |
tathā pativratā dṛṣṭyā śubhayā pāvanaṃ bhavet || 70 ||
anuyāti na bhartāraṃ yadi daivātkathañcana |
tatrāpi śīlaṃ saṃrakṣyaṃ śīlabhaṅgātpatatyadhaḥ || 71 ||
tadvaiguṇyādapi svargātpatiḥ patati nānyathā |
tasyāḥ pitā ca mātā ca bhrātṛvargastathaiva ca || 72 ||
patyau mṛte ca yā yoṣidvaidhavyaṃ pālayetkvacit |
sā punaḥ prāpya bhartāraṃ svargabhogān samaśnute || 73 ||

vidhavākabarībandho bhartṛbandhāya jāyate |
śiraso vapanaṃ tasmātkāryaṃ vidhavayā sadā || 74 ||
ekāhāraḥ sadā kāryo na dvitīyaḥ kadācana |
trirātraṃ pañcarātraṃ vā pakṣavratamathā'pi vā || 75 |
māsopavāsaṃ vā kuryāccāndrāyaṇamathā'pi vā |
kṛcchra ṃ parākaṃ vā kuryāttaptakṛcchramathāpi vā || 76 ||
yavānnairvā phalāhāraiḥ śākāhāraiḥ payovrataiḥ |
prāṇayātrāṃ prakurvīta yāvat prāṇaḥ svayaṃ vrajet || 77 ||

paryaṅkaśāyinī nārī vidhavā pātayet patim |
tasmād bhūśayanaṃ kāryaṃ patisaukhyasamīhayā || 78 ||
na cāṅgodvartanaṃ kāryaṃ striyā vidhavayā kvacit |
gandhadravyasya saṃyogo naiva kāryastayā punaḥ || 76 ||
tarpaṇaṃ pratyahaṃ kāryaṃ bhartuḥ kuśatilodakaiḥ |
tatpitustatpituścāpi nāmagotrādipūrvakam || 80 ||
viṣṇostu pūjanaṃ kāryaṃ patibuddhayā na cānyathā |
patimeva sadā dhyāyedviṣṇurūpadharaṃ harim || 81 ||
yadyadiṣṭatamaṃ loke yacca patyuḥ samīhitam |
tattadguṇavate deyaṃ patiprīṇanakāmyayā || 82 ||
vaiśākhe kārtike māghe viśeṣaniyamāṃścaret |
snānaṃ dānaṃ tīrthayātrāṃ viṣṇornāmagrahaṃ muhuḥ || 83 ||
vaiśākhe jalakumbhāśca kārtike ghṛtadīpakāḥ |
māghe dhānyatilotsargaḥ svargaloke viśiṣyate ||| 84 |

prapā kāryā ca vaiśākhe deve deyā galantikā |
upānadvyajanaṃ chatraṃ sūkṣmavāsāṃsi candanam || 85 |
sakarpūraṃ ca tāmbūlaṃ puṣpadānaṃ tathaiva ca |
jalapātrāṇyanekāni tathā puṣpagṛhāṇi ca || 86 ||
pānāni ca vicitrāṇi drākṣārambhāphalāni ca |
deyāni dvijamukhyebhyaḥ patirme prīyatāmiti || 87 |
ūrja yavānnamaśnīyādekānnamathavā punaḥ |
vṛntākaṃ sūraṇaṃ caiva śukaśimbī ca varjayet || 88 |
kārtike varjayettailaṃ kārtike varjayenmadhu |
kārtike varjayetkāṃsyaṃ kārtike cāpi sandhitam || 86 |
kārtike maunaniyame ghaṇṭāṃ cāru pradāpayet |
patrabhojī kāṃsyapātraṃ ghṛtapūrṇa prayacchati || 60 |

bhūmiśayyā vrate deyā śayyāślakṣṇā satūlikā |
phalatyāge phalaṃ deyaṃ rasatyāge ca tadrasam || 61 |
dhānyatyāge ca taddhānyamathavā śālayaḥ smṛtāḥ |
dhenūrdadyātprayatnena sālaṅkārāḥ sakāśvanāḥ ||| 62 |
ekataḥ sarvadānāni dīpadānaṃ tathaikataḥ | |
kārtike dīpadānasya kalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm || 63 ||
kiñcidabhyudite sūrye māghasnānaṃ samācaret |
yathāśaktyā ca niyamān māghasnāyī samācaret || 64 ||
pakvānnairbhojayedviprān yatino'pi tapasvinaḥ |
laḍḍukaiḥ pheṇikābhiśca vaṭakeṇḍarikādibhiḥ || 65 |
ghṛtapakvaiḥ samaricaiḥ śucikarpūravāsitaiḥ |
garbhe śarkarayā pūrṇairnetrānandaiḥ sugandhibhiḥ || 66 ||
śuṣkendhanānāṃ bhārāṃśca dadyācchītāpanuttaye |
kañcukaṃ tūlagarbhaṃ ca tūlikāṃ sūpavītikām || 67 ||

mañjiṣṭhāraktavāsāṃsi tathā tūlavatīṃ paṭīm |
jātīphalalavaṅgeśva tāmbūlāni bahūnyapi || 68 |
kambalāni vicitrāṇi nirvātāni gṛhāṇi ca |
mṛdulāḥ pādarakṣāśca sagandhyudvartanāni ca || īrda |
ghṛtakambalapūjābhirmahāsnānapurassaram
kṛṣṇāguruprabhṛtibhirgarbhāgāre pradhūpanaiḥ || 100 |
sthūlavartipradīpaiśca naivedyavividhastathā |
bhartṛsvarūpo bhagavān prīyatāmiti coccaret || 101 |
evaṃvidhaiśca vidhavā vividhainiyamairvataiḥ |
vaiśākhān kārtikān māghānevamevātivāhayet || 102 |
nādhirohedanaḍvāhaṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatairapi |
kañcukaṃ na parīdadhyādvāso na vikṛtaṃ nyaset || 103 ||
apṛṣṭā tu sutān kiñcinna kuryādbhutatparā |
evaṃ caryāparā nityaṃ vidhavā'pi śubhā matā || 104 ||
mañjiṣṭhāraktavāsāṃsi mañjiṣṭhayā raktavastrāṇi ||9 8 || prasiddhābhiḥ |
ghṛtakambalapūjābhiḥ ghṛtanirmitakambalapūjābhirvadarikāśrame śrīnārāyaṇe
karmadhārayo dvandvo vā | garbhāgāregārasya garbha garbhāgāram , tasmin devālayamadhye

evaṃ dharmasamāyuktā vidhavā'pi pativratā |
patilokānavāpnoti na bhavet kvāpi duḥkhabhāk || 105 ||
na gaṅgayā tayā bhedo yā nārī patidevatā |
umāśivasamā sākṣāt tasmāttāṃ pūjayedbudhaḥ || 106 ||
bṛhaspatiruvāca—
gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ tvetadyajjātaṃ tava darśanam |
lopāmudre mahāmātarbhartṛpādāmbujekṣaṇe || 107 ||
iti stutvā mahābhāgāṃ rājaputrīṃ pativratām |
praṇamya ca guruḥ prāha muni sarvārthakovidaḥ || 108 |
praṇavaṃstvaṃ śrutiriyaṃ kṣamaiṣā tvaṃ svayaṃ tapaḥ |
satkriyeyaṃ phalaṃ tvaṃ hi dhanyo'sīti mahāmune || 106 ||

idaṃ pātivrataṃ tejo brahmatejo bhavān param |
tatrā'pyetattapastejaḥ kimasādhyatamaṃ tava || 110 |
tava nāviditaṃ kiśvittathāpi ca vadāmyaham |
yadarthamāgatā devāstanmune'tra niśāmaya || 111 ||
ayaṃ śatamakhaḥ śrīmān vṛtrahā kuliśāyudhaḥ |
siddhayaṣṭakaṃ hi yadvāri dṛk prasādaṃ samīkṣate || 112 ||
yasya puryāḥ parisare kāmadhenuvrajaścaret |
yatpaurāḥ kalpavṛkṣāṇāṃ nityaṃ chāyā suśerate || 113 ||
yadrathyāsu ca tiṣṭhanti te cintāmaṇikarkarāḥ |
ayamagnirjagadyonirdharmarājastvayaṃ punaḥ || 114 |
kāryaṃ vijñāpayituṃ tasya kimapyasādhyaṃ nāstītyāha | idamiti | tejo viśeṣaṇa-

nirṛtirvaruṇo vāyuḥ śrīdarudrādayastvamī |
ārādhyante ca cāritraḥ sarvakāmārthamīśvarāḥ ||| 115 |
samabhyarthayitāro'mī tvaṃ yācyastu jagatkṛte |
vāṅmātrodyamasādhyaṃ tat tava viśvopakārakam || 116 ||
kaścicchelo vindhyanāmā bhānurmārgāvarodhakaḥ |
badhitaḥ spardhayā merostadvṛddhitvaṃ nivāraya ||| 117 |
ye ca svabhāvakaṭhinā ye ca mārgāvarodhakāḥ |
ye spardhayā vṛddhimantastadvṛddhirvadhitā'śubhā || 118 ||
iti śrutvā gurorvākyamavicārya mahāmuniḥ |
kṣaṇaṃ muniḥ samādhāya tatheti pratyuvāca ha || 116 ||

visarjyoti divaukasaḥ |
sādhayiṣyāmi vaḥ kāryaṃ 120 |
punaścintāparo bhūtvā'gastirdhyānaparo'bhavat ||
vedavyāsa uvāca- pativratā'dhyāyaṃ śrutvā strīpuruṣo'pi vā |
imaṃ prayāsyati || 121 |
pāpakañcukamutsṛjya śakralokaṃ |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe pativratākhyānaṃ nāma
caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||
iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ caturtho'dhyāyaḥ || 4 ||

atha pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ
pārāśara uvāca -
tato dhyānena viśveśamālokya sa munīśvaraḥ |
sūta provāca tāṃ puṇyāṃ lopāmudrāmidaṃ vacaḥ || 1 |
ayi paśya varārohe kimetatsamupasthitam |
kva tatkāryaṃ kva ca vayaṃ munimārgānusāriṇaḥ || 2 ||
yena gotrabhidā gotrā vipakṣā helayā kṛtāḥ |
bhavet kuṇṭhitasāmarthyaḥ sa kathaṃ girimātrake || 3 |
kalpavṛkṣo'ṅgaṇe yasya kuliśaṃ yasya cāyudham |
siddhayaṣṭakaṃ hi yadvāri sa siddhayaṃ prārthayedvijam || 4 ||
pañcame varṇyate devairindrādyaḥ svārthasādhakaiḥ |
agastyasya sabhāryasya prasthānamavimuktataḥ || 1 ||
agastirdhyānaparo'bhavadityuktam , tataḥ paraṃ kiṃ jātamityākāṅkṣāyāmāha | tata

dāvāgninā'pi ye |
kriyante vyākulāḥ śailā aho
tadvṛddhistambhane śaktiḥ kva gatā sā''śuśukṣaṇeḥ || 5 |
niyantā sarvabhūtānāṃ yo'sau daṇḍadharaḥ prabhuḥ |
sa kiṃ daṇḍayituṃ nālamekaṃ taṃ grāsamātrakam || 6 |
ādityā vasavo rudrāstuṣitāḥ samarudgaṇāḥ |
viśvedevāstathā dastrau ye cānye'pi divaukasaḥ || 7 |
yeṣāṃ dṛkpātamātreṇa patanti bhuvanānyapi |
te ki samarthā no kānte nagavṛddhi niṣedhane || 8 |
ājñātaṃ kāraṇaṃ tacca smṛtaṃ vākyaṃ subhāṣitam |
kāśīmuddiśya yadgītaṃ munibhistattvadarśibhiḥ || 9 |
dāvāgninā vanavahninā pralayavahninā vā vyākulīkriyanta eva | dāvāgninā'pi

avimuktaṃ na moktavyaṃ sarvathaiva mumukṣubhiḥ |
kintu vighnā bhaviṣyanti kāśyāṃ nivasatāṃ satām || 10 ||
upasthito'yaṃ kalyāṇi so'ntarāyo mahāniha |
na śakyate'nyathā kartuṃ viśveśo vimukho yataḥ || 11 ||
kāśīdvijāśīrbhiraho yadāptā kastāṃ mumukṣuryadi vā mumukṣuḥ |
grāsaṃ karasthaṃ sa visṛjya hṛdyaṃ svakūrparaṃ leḍhi vimūḍhacetāḥ || 12 |

janā bāliśavatkimetāṃ kāśīṃ tyajeyuḥ sukṛtaikarāśim |
aho tadvatsulabhā kimeṣā || 13 ||
śālūkakandaḥ pratimajjanaṃ kiṃ labheta ||
bhavāntarāvajitapuṇyarāśi kucchre rmahadbhirhya vagamya kāśīm |
prāpyā'pi kiṃ mūḍhadhiyo'nyato vai yiyāsavo durgatimudhiyāsavaḥ || 14 |
yadvā yadā dvijāśībhiḥ kāśīprāptā labdhā , tadā tāṃ mumukṣuramumukṣurvā saṃsārā-
dvirakto'virakto vā yadyastyajet parityajet ityagrimaślokasthakriyāvacanaṃ vipariṇamayyā-

fa kāśikā viśvapadaprakāśikā kva kāryamanyatparito'tiduḥkham |
tatpaṇḍito'nyatra kutaḥ prayāti ki yāti kūṣmāṇḍaphalaṃ jāsye || 15 |
svapnāntare brahman mayā dṛṣṭau harācyutāvityādiharivaṃśādī prasiddham | āvarjitaḥ arpitaḥ
puṇyānāṃ rāśiryasyāṃ sā tathā tām | atratyairjanaiḥ puṇyarāśirapi viśveśvare arpyate ,
kṣudraphalāśayā tadanuṣṭhānaṃ tattyāgaśca dūra iti bhāvaḥ |
yadvā bhavāntaṃ bhavasyāntam | antaśabdasya svarūpavācitvāt | rāti dadātīti
bhavāntarā avidyā , tayā varjitāḥ puṇyarāśayaḥ puṇyapuñjāḥ puṇyānāṃ vā rāśiryeṣām , te tathā
sukṛtina iti vā yasyāṃ sa tathoktā tām | avidyāvināśakatvātteṣāmiti bhāvaḥ | yadvā
bhavāntareṣu āvarjitāni sampāditāni puṇyāni teṣāṃ rāśi rāśibhūtām , anekajanmānta-
rājitasukṛtaikapuṇyāmityarthaḥ |
evambhūtāṃ kāśīṃ vai prasiddhāṃ śāstravidvajjanamukhādavagamya jñātvā paścānmahadbhiḥ
kṛcchrervaṃrtmaśramaśaulkikataskarajanitavividhairduḥkhaiḥ prāpyā'pi mūḍhadhiyo luptavivekāḥ santo
durgatimudyiyāsavo duḥkhaṃ prāptumicchavo'nyatra ki yiyāsavo gantumicchavaḥ syuḥ ; api tu na

śīghranāśī visṛjennaraḥ kim |
kāśīṃ prakāśīkṛtapuṇyarāśi hā
sukṛtaṃ tadīyaṃ madīyamevaṃ vivṛṇoti cetaḥ || 16 ||
nūnaṃ svanūnaṃ
mātīti pāṭhe sa evārthaḥ | yathā kūṣmāṇḍaphalasyājamukhe praveśo na sambhavati , tathā
kiṃ gamanamapīti bhāvaḥ |
viduṣaḥ kāśīṃ vihāya ajāvadalpa-
yadvā nanu prāptā'pi kāśī tyaktā kaiścidṛśyate tatrāha | kiṃ yātīti |
bhāgyasya mukhe kiṃ praviśati ? śeṣaṃ samānam || 15 |

naro na rogī yadihāvihāya sahāyabhūtāṃ sakalasya jantoḥ |
kāśīmanāśīḥ sukṛtaikarāśimanyatra yātuṃ yatatāṃ na cānyaḥ || 17 |
vitrastapāpāṃ tridaśairdurāpāṃ gaṅgā sadāpāṃ bhavapāśaśāpām |
śivāvimuktāmamṛtaikaśukti muktā vimuktāṃ na parityajanti || 18 ||
naro na rogīti | asyāyamarthaḥ - anyatra yātuṃ gantu kāśīta ityarthād yatatāṃ
yatnaṃ kurvatāṃ janānāṃ madhye yadi yadā heti harṣe yadyadā iha jagatīti vā , kāśīmavihāya
yo'nāśīrbhavati na vidyate āśiṣaḥ kāmā yasya sa tathā | indriyacāñcalyaṃ parityajya

baṃhīyasāyāsabhareṇa kāśīm |
haṃ ho kiho nicitāḥ pralabdhā
prabhūtapuṇyadraviṇaikapaṇyāṃ prāpyā'pi hitvā kva ca gantumudyatāḥ || 16 |
janānāṃ jaḍatā vihāya kāśīṃ yadanyatra nayanti cetaḥ |
aho laye'pi || 20 ||
parisphuradgāṅgajalābhirāmāṃ kāmāriśūlāgradhṛtāṃ
yo'sau nirañjano devaścitsvarūpī janārdanaḥ |
sa eva dravarūpeṇa gaṅgāmbho nātra saṃśayaḥ || iti vacanāt ||
gaṅgāyāḥ satya ā samantāt āpo yasyāmiti vā | bhavaḥ saṃsāraḥ , sa eva pāśo
bandhanarajjuḥ , tasya śāpāṃ śastrīṃ chettrīmityarthaḥ | bhavapāśapāśāmiti pāṭhe bhavapāśasya pāśāṃ
pratibandhikāṃ nāśikāmityarthaḥ |

re re bhave śokajalekapūrṇe pāpe sma lokāḥ patitābdhimadhye |
vidrāṇanirvāṇavirodhipāpāṃ kāśīṃ parityajya tāraṃ kimartham || 21 ||
na satpathenāpi na yogayuktyā dānairna vā naiva tapobhirugraiḥ |
kāśī dvijāśībhiraho sulabhyā kiṃ vā prasādena ca viśvabhartuḥ || 22 ||
dharmastu sampattibharaiḥ kilohyate'tyartho hi kāmairbahudānabhogakaiḥ |
atyatra sarvaṃ sa ca mokṣa ekaḥ kāśyāṃ na cānyatra tathā yathā'tra || 23 |

kṣetraṃ pavitraṃ hi yathā'vimuktaṃ nānyattathā yacchu tibhiḥ prayuktam |
dharmaśāstrairna ca taiḥ purāṇaistasmāccharaṇyaṃ hi sadā'vimuktam || 24 |
na
sa hovāceti jābālirāruṇo'siriḍā matā |
varaṇāpiṅgalānāḍī tadantastvavimuktakam || 25 ||
sā suṣumnā parā nāḍī trayaṃ vārāṇasī tvasau |
tadatrotkramaṇe sarvajantūnāṃ hi śrutau haraḥ || 26 ||
kāśyāṃ yathā dharmādikam , tathā'nyatra netyatra hetumāha | kṣetraṃ pavitramiti |
asyāyamarthaḥ– hi yasmāt yathā'vimuktaṃ kṣetraṃ pavitraṃ pavitrayatyavidyā , tat kāryān
mocayatīti tathā tathā nānyat | anyatra kṣetrāntaraṃ tathā netyarthaḥ | tatra hetumāha |
yacchrutibhiḥ prayuktam , yadyasmācchrutibhirvedaireva prayuktaṃ sarvakṣetrebhyo'vimuktamadhikaṃ pratipā-

tārakaṃ brahma vyācaṣṭe tena brahma bhavanti hi |
evaṃ śloko bhavatyeṣa āhurvai vedavādinaḥ || 27 ||
bhagavānantakāle'tra tārakasyopadeśataḥ |
avimukte sthitān jantūn mocayennātra saṃśayaḥ || 28 ||
śaraṇe tviyaṃ purīti ca sthalatraye ' pāṭhāntare'yamarthaḥ | śīryate naśyatīti śaraṇam ,
śaroram , tasmin śaraṇe śarīre'dhyātme'siriḍetyādipūrvavat | adhidaive tu punariyaṃ purī
vārāṇasīti viśeṣaḥ |
ayambhāvaḥ - adhyātme tāvadiḍāpiṅgalāsuṣumnetyetattrayamavimuktaṃ vārāṇasī |
ādhidaive'sivaraṇāvimuktamityetattrayaṃ vārāṇasī avimuktamiti | śrutau dakṣiṇe karṇe |
kāśīsthāni bhūtamātrāṇyantakāle bhagavān mocayatītyatra brahmavidāṃ sammatimāha |
evaṃ śloka iti | evamuktārthapratipādaka eṣa vakṣyamāṇaślokaḥ padyaṃ bhavatīti vedavādino
vedanaṃ vedaḥ , svaprakāśaścidātmā , tadvādinaḥ paramārthanirūpakā āhuruktavanta ityarthaḥ || 27 |

nāvimuktasamā gatiḥ |
nāvimuktasamaṃ kṣetraṃ
nāvimuktasamaṃ liṅgaṃ satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ punaḥ || 26 |
avimuktaṃ parityajya yo'nyatra kurute ratim |
karatalān muktvā so'nyāṃ siddhi gaveṣayet || 30 ||
mukti śrutitaḥ purāṇāt |
ittthaṃ suniścitya munirmahātmā kṣetraprabhāvaṃ
samaṃ na liṅgaṃ purī na kāśī sadṛśī trikoṭayām ||| 31 |
śrīviśvanāthena munīśavaryaḥ |
śrīkālarājañca tataḥ praṇamya vijñāpayāmāsa
āpṛcchanāyāhamihāgato'smi śrīkāśipuryāstu yataḥ prabhustvam || 32 |
gatirāśrayaḥ || 2 9 | anyāṃ kṣudrām | gaveṣayedanveṣayetprārthayedityarthaḥ || 30 | ittyamiti

hā kālarāja pratibhūtamantra pratyaṣṭami pratyavatīsutārkam |
nārādhaye mūlaphalaprasūnaiḥ kiṃ mayyanāgasyaparādhabuk syāḥ ||| 33 |
hā kālabhairava bhavānabhito bhayārtān
mā bhaiṣṭa ceti bhaṇanaiḥ svakaraṃ prasārya |
mūrti vidhāya vikaṭāṃ kaṭupāpabhoktrīṃ
vārāṇasī sthitajanān paripāti kiṃ na || 34 ||
he yakṣarāja rajanīkara cārumūrte
śrīpūrṇabhadra sutanāyaka daṇḍapāṇe |
tvaṃ vai tapojanitaduḥkhamavaiṣi sarva
kiṃ māṃ bahirnayasi kāśinivāsirakṣin || 35 |

jñānadastvaṃ kila mokṣado s pi |
tvamannadastvaṃ kila jīvadātā tvaṃ jaṭākalāpairuragendrahāraiḥ || 36 |
tvamantyabhūṣāṃ kuruṣe janānāṃ sambhramodbhramāvatrasthavṛttāntavicārakovidau |
gaṇau tvadīyau kila dūrayatastvamuṣmāt || 37 ||
sambhrāntimutpādya parāmasādhūn kṣetrāt kṣaṇaṃ
śṛṇu prabho ḍhuṇḍivināyaka tvaṃ vācaṃ madīyāntu raṭāmyanāthavat |
tvatsthāḥ samastāḥ kila vighnapūgāḥ kimatra durvṛttavadāsthito'ham || 38 ||
śṛṇvantvamī pañcavināyakāśca cintāmaṇiśvāpi karpādanāmā |
āśāgajākhyau ca vināyakau tau śṛṇotvasau siddhivināyakaśca || 36 |

parāpavādo na mayā kiloktaḥ parāpakāro'pi mayā kṛto na |
parasvabuddhiḥ paradārabuddhiḥ kṛtā mayā nātra ka eṣa pākaḥ ||| 40 |
gaṅgā trikālaṃ parisevitā mayā śrīviśvanātho'pi sadā vilokitaḥ |
yātrāḥ kṛtāstāḥ pratiparva sarvataḥ ko'yaṃ vipāko mama vighnahetuḥ || 41 ||
mātaviśālākṣi bhavāni maṅgale jyeṣṭheśisaubhāgyavidhānasundari |
viśve vidhe viśvabhuje namo'stu te śrīcitraghaṇṭe vikaṭe ca durgike || 42 ||

sākṣiṇya etāḥ kila kāśidevatāḥ śṛṇvantu na svārthamahaṃ vrajāmyataḥ |
ardhyāthato devagaṇaiḥ karomi kiṃ paropakārāya na kiṃ vidhīyate ||| 43 |
dadhīcirasthīni na kiṃ purā dadau
jagattrayaṃ kiṃ na dade'thine baliḥ |
dattaḥ sma kiṃ no madhukaiṭabhau śiro
babhūva tārkṣyo'pi ca viṣṇuvāhanam || 44 ||
āpṛcchya sarvān samunīn munīśvaraḥ
sabālavṛddhānapi tatra vāsinaḥ |
tṛṇāni vṛkṣāṃśca latāḥ samastāḥ
purīṃ parikramya ca niryayau ca || 45 ||
nāsti kimiti tarhi gacchasi tatrāha | arthata iti | nanvayathitenāpi kiṃ kāśī
tyājyā ? tatrāha | paropakārāyeti || 43 | dadhīciriti | yadvā kāśīto
paropakārārthamakartavyamapi kriyata ityatra dṛṣṭāntamāha |
vrajane hetudvayam — abhyarthaṃnāparopakāraśca tatrobhayatrākaraṇīyasyāpi karaṇe dṛṣṭāntamāha |

proṣitasya parito'pi lakṣaṇairnīcavartma parivartano'pi vā |
candramaulimavalokya yāsyataḥ kasya siddhiriha no parisphuret || 46 |
varaṃ hi kāśyāṃ tṛṇavṛkṣagulma kāścaranti pāpaṃ na caranti nānyataḥ |
vayaṃ carāṇāṃ prathamā dhigastu no vārāṇasīṃ hādya vihāya gacchataḥ || 47 ||
asi hyupaspṛśya punaḥ punarmuniḥ prāsādamālāḥ parito vilokayan |
uvāca netre sarale prapaśyataṃ kāśīṃ yuvāṃ kva kva purī tviyaṃ bata ||48 |
pradakṣiṇīkṛtya purīṃ pūjyāvimuktakeśavī | |
lolaṃ divākaraṃ dṛṣṭvā tato madhupurīṃ yayau || iti ||
cakārādantargṛhayātrāṃ vidhāyetyarthaḥ | antimaścakāraḥ samuccayārthaṃ āha ceti samucci -

tālikāṃ mithaḥ kareṇāpi karaṃ pragṛhya |
svairaṃ hasantvadya vidhāya sukṛtaikarāśim || 46 |
sīmācarābhūtagaṇā vrajāmyahaṃ vihāya kāśīṃ
itthaṃ vilapya bahuśaḥ sa munistvagastya-
statkrauñścayugmavadaho abalāsahāyaḥ |
mūrcchāmavāpa mahatīṃ virahīva jalpan
hā kāśi kāśi punarehi ca dehi dṛṣṭim ||50 ||

sthitvā kṣaṇaṃ śiva śiveti śiveti coktvā
yā vaḥ priyeti kaṭhinā hi divaukasaste |
kiṃ na smarestrijagatī sukhadānadakṣaṃ
tryakṣaṃ prahitya madanaṃ yadakāri testu || 51 |
yāvadvrajettricaturāṇi padāni khedāt
svedodabindukaṇikāñcitabhāladeśaḥ
pratyudgamā'karaṇataḥ kila me vināśa-
stāvaddharābhayabharādiva sañcukoca || 52 |
tapoyānamivāruhya nimeṣārdhena vai muniḥ |
agre dadarśa taṃ vindhyaṃ ruddhāmbaramathonnatam || 53 |

cakampe cācalastūrṇaṃ dṛṣṭ vāgrasthitaṃ munim |
tamagastyaṃ sapatnīkaṃ vātāpīlvalavairiṇam || 54 ||
tapaḥ krodhasamutthābhyāṃ kāśīvirahajanmanā |
pralayānalavattīvraṃ jvalantaṃ tribhiragnibhiḥ || 55 | |
giriḥ kharvataro bhūtvā vivikṣuravanīmiva |
ājñāprasādaḥ kriyatāṃ kiṃkaro'smīti cābravīt || 56 |
agastya uvāca - tattvataḥ |
vindhya sādhurasi prājña māṃca jānāsi
punarāgamanaṃ cenme tāvat kharvataro bhava || 57 |
ityuktvā dakṣiṇāmāśāṃ sanāthāmakaronmuniḥ |
nirjeśvaraṇavinyāsaistayā sādhdhyā taponidhiḥ || 58 ||
gate tasmin munivare vepamānastadā giriḥ |
paśyatyutkaṇṭhamiva ca gataścetsādhvabhūttataḥ || 56 |
cakampe ca svedaromodgamādikaṃ ca dadhāviti cakārasyārthaḥ ||54 ||

adya jātaḥ punarahaṃ na śapto yadagastinā |
na mayā sadṛśo dhanya iti mene sa vai giriḥ || 60 |
aruṇo'pi ca tatkāle kālajño'śvānakālayat |
jagatsvāsthyamavāpoccaiḥ pūrvavadbhānusañcaraiḥ || 61 |
adya śvo vā paraśvo vā'pyāgamiṣyati vai muniḥ |
iti cintāmahābhāraigirirākrāntavat sthitaḥ || 62 ||
nādyāpi munirāyāti nādyāpi giriredhate |
yathā khalajanānāṃ hi manorathamahīruhaḥ || 63 ||
vivardhiṣati yo nīcaḥ parāsūyāṃ samudvahan |
dūre tadvṛddhivārtā ss stāṃ prāgvṛddherapi saṃśayaḥ || 64 ||
manorathāna siddhayeyuḥ siddhā naśyantyapi dhruvam |
khalānāṃ tena kuśali viśvaṃ viśveśarakṣitam || 65 ||

vidhavānāṃ stanā yadvaddhṛdyeva vilayanti ca |
unnamyonnamya tatroccaistadvatkhala manorathāḥ || 66 |
bhavetkulaṅkaṣā yadvadalpavarṣeṇa kannadī |
khaladharalpavarṣeṇa tadvatsyāt svakulaṅkaṣā || 67 ||
avijñāyā'nyasāmathyaṃ svasāmathyaṃ pradarśayet |
upahāsa mavāpnoti tathaivāyamihācalaḥ || 68 |
vyāsa uvāca - godāvarītaṭaṃ ramyaṃ vicarannapi vai muniḥ |
na tatyāja ca taṃ tāpaṃ kāśīvirahajaṃ param || 66 ||
udīcī dik spṛśamapi sa munirmātariśvanam |
prasārya bāhū saṃśliṣya kāśyāḥ pṛcchedanāmayam || 70 |
pūrvokamarthaṃ sadṛṣṭāntaṃ kathayan prakṛtaṃ nigamayati | vidhavānāmiti trayeṇa | yathā
vigatabhartṛkāṇāṃ kucā uccairyathā syāttathā hṛdi vardhitvā , tatraiva hṛdi vilayanti vilīyanta
yathā kannadī kutsitā nadī alpavṛṣṭyā kūlaṅkaṣā svatīrabhañjikā bhavati , tathā
khalasyālpavarṣeṇālpakāmavṛṣṭyā yā ṛddhiḥ samṛddhiḥ sampattiriti yāvat sā svakūlaṅkaṣā

lopāmudrena sāmudrā kāpīha jagatītale |
vārāṇasyāḥ pradṛśyeta tatkartā na yato vidhiḥ | 71 |
kvacittiṣṭhan kvacijjalpan kvaciddhāvan kvacitskhalan |
kvaciccopaviśaṃśceti babhrāmetastato muniḥ || 72 |
tato vrajan dadarśā'gre puṇyarāśistapodhanaḥ |
cañcaccandraśatābhāsāṃ bhāgyavāniva suśriyam || 73 ||
he lopāmudre vārāṇasyāḥ sā prasiddhā mudrā mudaṃ harṣa rātoti mudrā , racanāparipā-

vijitya bhānunā bhānuṃ divāpi samuditvarām |
nirvāpayantīmiva tāṃ svacetastāpasantatim || 74 ||
tatrāgastyo mahālakṣmīṃ dadṛśe suciraṃ sthitām || 75 |
rātrāvabjeṣu saṅkoco darśeṣvabjaḥ kvacidvrajet |
kṣīrode mandaratrāsāttadatrādhyuṣitāmiva || 76 |
yadārabhya dadhāraināṃ mādhavo mānataḥ kila |
tadārabhya sthitāṃ nūnaṃ sapatnīrṣyāvaśādiva || 77 ||

trailokyaṃ 145
kolarūpeṇa trāsayantaṃ mahāsuram |
vinihatya sthitāṃ tatra ramye kolāpure pure || 78 ||
samprāpyā'tha mahālakṣmīṃ munivaryaḥ praṇamya ca |
tuṣṭāva vāgbhiriṣṭābhiriṣṭavāṃ hṛṣṭamānasaḥ || 76 ||
agastiruvāca- -
mātarnamāmi kamale kamalāyatākṣi
śrīviṣṇuhṛtka malavāsini viśvamātaḥ |
kṣīrodaje kamalakomalagarbhagauri
lakṣmi prasīda satataṃ namatāṃ śaraṇye || 80 ||
nārāyaṇamahaṃ vande garuḍo yasya vāhanam |
śaṅkhacakragadāhaste yasya bhāryā sarasvatī || iti vacanāt |
' protplaṣṭājñānakūṭe harinijadayite devi saṃsārasāre ' iti sarasvatīstotre pādmavaca-

tvaṃ śrīrupendrasadane madanaikamāta-
jyotsnāsi candramasi candra manoharāsye |
sūrye prabhāsi ca jagattritaye prabhāsi
lakṣmi prasīda satataṃ namatāṃ śaraṇye ||| 81 |
tvaṃ jātavedasi sadā dahanātmaśakti-
vaidhāstvayā jagadidaṃ vividhaṃ vidadhyāt |
viśvambharo'pi bibhṛyādakhilaṃ bhavatyā
lakṣmi prasīda satataṃ namatāṃ śaraṇye || 82 ||
śrīviṣṇuhṛtkamalavāsini śrīnārāyaṇahṛdayapadme vasituṃ śīlaṃ yasyāstatsambodhanaṃ tathā |
taduktaṃ vaiṣṇave – ' viṣṇorvakṣaḥsthalābhaye ' iti | he viśvamātaḥ , he kṣīrodaje , he kamala-
komalagarbhagauri , he lakṣmi , satataṃ namatāṃ śaraṇye āśrayayogye prasīda prasannā bhava , prasādaṃ
kurviti ||80 ||
nikhilaprapañcasya tatpāratantryaṃ vadan paradevatātvena stauti | tvaṃ śroriti

svatyaktametadamale harate haro'pi
tvaṃ pāsi haṃsi vidadhāsi parāvarāsi |
īḍayo babhūva harirapyamale tvadāptyā
lakṣmi prasīda satataṃ namatāṃ śaraṇye || 83 ||
śūraḥ sa eva sa guṇī sa budhaḥ sa dhanyo
mānyaḥ sa eva kulaśīlakalākalāpaiḥ |
ekaḥ śuciḥ sa hi pumān sakale'pi loke
yatrāpatettava śubhe karuṇākaṭākṣaḥ || 84 |

yasmin vaseḥ kṣaṇamaho puruṣa gaje'śve
straiṇe tṛṇe sarasi devakule gṛhe'nne |
ratne patattriṇi paśau śayane dharāyāṃ
sabhīkameva sakale tadihāsti nānyat || 85 |
tvatspṛṣṭameva sakalaṃ śucitāṃ labheta
tvatyaktameva sakalaṃ tvaśucīha lakṣmi |
tvannāma yatra ca sumaṅgalameva tatra
śrīviṣṇupatni kamale kamalālaye'pi || 86 |
lakṣmīṃ śriyaśva kamalāṃ kamalālayāśca
padmāṃramāṃ nalinayugmakarāśca māśva |
kṣīrodajāmamṛtakumbhakarāmirāñca
viṣṇupriyāmiti sadā japatāṃ kva duḥkham || 87 ||

praṇanāma sapatnīkaḥ sāṣṭāṅga daṇḍavanmuniḥ || 88 ||
śrīruvāca- uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha
bhadrante mitrāvaruṇasambhava |
pativrate tvamuttiṣṭha lopāmudre śubhavate || 86 |
stutyā'nayā prasannāhaṃ vriyatāṃ yaddhadīpsitam |
rājaputri mahābhāge tvamihopaviśāmale || 60 |
tvadaṅgalakṣaṇairebhiḥ supavitraiśca te vrataiḥ |
nirvāpayitumicchāmi daityāstrestāpitāṃ tanum || 61 |
ityuktvā munipatnīṃ tāṃ samāliṅgaya haripriyā |
alañcakāra ca prītyā bahusaubhāgyamaṇḍaneḥ || 62 ||
yugmakarāṃ kamaladvayahastāṃ māṃ kṣīrodajāmamṛtakumbhakarāmirām | amṛtakumbhakarondirāmiti

punarāha mune jāne tava hṛttāpakāraṇam |
sacetanaṃ dunotyeva kāśīviśleṣajo'nalaḥ || 63 |
yadā sa devo viśveśo mandaraṃ gatavān purā |
tadā kāśīviyogena jātā tasyedṛśī daśā ||| 64 |
tatpravṛtti punarjñātuṃ brahmāṇaṃ keśavaṃ gaṇān |
gaṇeśvaraśva devāṃśca preṣayāmāsa śūladhṛk || 65 ||
te ca kāśīguṇān sarve vicārya ca punaḥ punaḥ |
vrajantyadyāpi na kvāpi tādṛgasti kva vā purī || 66 ||
iti śrutvā'tha sa muniḥ pratyuvāca śriyaṃ tataḥ |
praṇipatya mahābhāgo bhaktigarbhamidaṃ vacaḥ || 67 ||
yadi deyo varo mahyaṃ varayogyo'smyahaṃ yadi |
tadā vārāṇasīprāptiḥ punarastveṣa me varaḥ || 68 |
dunoti vyathate || 9 3 || devān sūryādīn dvādaśādityabhedena bahuvacanam | devīriti
pāṭhe mātṛgaṇamityarthaḥ ||9 5 ||

ye paṭhiṣyanti ca stotraṃ tvadbhaktyā matkṛtaṃ sadā |
teṣāṃ kadācit santāpo māstu māstu daridratā || 66 ||
mā'stu ceṣṭaviyogaśca mā'stu sampattisaṃkṣayaḥ |
sarvatra vijayaścāstu vicchedo mā'stu santateḥ || 100 |
śrīruvāca-
evamastu mune savaṃ yattvayā paribhāṣitam |
etatstotrasya paṭhanaṃ mama sānnidhyakāraṇam || 101 ||
alakṣmīḥ kālakarṇī ca tadgehe na viśetkvacit |
gajāśvapaśuśāntyarthametatstotraṃ sadā japet || 102 |
bālagrahābhibhūtānāṃ bālānāṃ śāntikṛtparam |
bhūrjapatre likhitvā tu badhnīyātkaṇṭhadeśataḥ || 103 ||
idaṃ bījarahasyaṃ me rakṣaṇīyaṃ prayatnataḥ |
śraddhāhīne na dātavyaṃ na deyaṃ cāśucau kvacit || 104 ||
santatervaṃśasya ||100 || kālakarṇī rākṣasīviśeṣaḥ kākaviṣṭhā vā || 102 || bhūrjapatre
carmapatre || 103 | idamiti | bojarahasyaṃ bījaṃ śrībījaṃ tato'pi rahasyaṃ gopyam , atimahatta-
ramityarthaḥ || 104 ||

anyacca śṛṇu viprendra bhaviṣye dvāpare bhavān |
ekonatriṃśake brahman satyaṃ vyāso bhaviṣyati || 105 ||
tadā vārāṇasīṃ prāpya siddhi prāpsyasya bhīpsitām |
vyasya vedān purāṇāni dharmānsamupadiśya ca || 106 ||
hitaṃ ca te vadāmyekaṃ sāmprataṃ tatsamācara |
paśya kiñcidito gatvā skandamagresthitaṃ prabhum || 107 |
vārāṇasyā rahasyaṃ ca yathāvacchvibhāṣitam |
tava tuṣṭikaraṃ brahman kathayiṣyati ṣaṇmukhaḥ || 108 ||
iti labdhvā varaṃ so'tha mahālakṣmīṃ praṇamya ca |
yayāvagastiryatrāsti kumāraḥ śikhivāhanaḥ || 106 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśokhaṇḍe'gastyaprasthānaṃ nāma pañcamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 |

atha ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ
pārāśarya uvāca-
śṛṇu sūta mahābhāga kathāṃ śrutisahodarām |
yāṃ vai hṛdi nidhāyeha puruṣaḥ puruṣārthabhāk || 1 |
tataḥ śrīdarśanānandasudhādhārādhunīṃ muniḥ |
avagāhya sapatnīkaḥ paraṃ mudamavāpa saḥ || 2 ||
vahnikuṇḍasamudbhūta sūta nirmalamānasa |
śṛṇuṣvaikaṃ purāvidbhirbhāṣitaṃ yatsubhāṣitam || 3 ||
ṣaṣṭhe tīrthapraśaṃsāñca bhāryayā nodito muniḥ |
kathayāmāsa kārtsnyena mānasādivibhāgataḥ ||

paropakaraṇaṃ yeṣāṃ jārgāta hṛdaye satām |
naśyanti vipadasteṣāṃ sampadaḥ syuḥ pade pade || 4 ||
tīrthasnānairna sā śuddhirbahudānairna tatphalam |
tapobhirugraistannāpyamupakṛtyā yadāpyate || 5 |
paropakṛtyā yo dharmo dharmo dānādisambhavaḥ |
ekatra tulitau dhātrā tatra pūrvo'bhavadguruḥ || 6 |
parinirmathya vāgjālaṃ nirṇītamidameva hi |
nopakārātparo dharmo nāpakārādadhaṃ param || 7 ||
upakarturagastyasya jātametannidarśanam |
kva tāvṛkkāśijaṃ duḥkhaṃ kva tādṛk śrīmukhekṣaṇam || 8 ||

karikarṇāgracapalaṃ jīvitaṃ vividhaṃ vasu |
tasmātparopakaraṇaṃ kāryamekaṃ vipaścitā || 9 ||
yallakṣmīnāmamātrāptyā naro no māti kutracit |
sākṣātsamīkṣya tāṃ lakṣmīṃ kṛtakṛtyo'bhavanmuniḥ || 10 ||
gacchan yadṛcchayā so'tha dūrācchrīśailamaikṣata |
yatra sākṣānnivasati devaḥ śrītripurāntakaḥ || 11 ||
uvāca vacanaṃ patnīṃ tadā prītamanā muniḥ |
iha sthitaiva paśya tvaṃ kānte kāntataraṃ param || 12 |
śrīśailaśikharaṃ śrīmadidaṃ tadya dvilokanāt |
punarbhavo manuṣyāṇāṃ bhave'tra na bhavet kvacit || 13 ||
giriścaturaśītyāyaṃ yojanānāṃ hi vistṛtaḥ |
sarvaliṅgamayo yasmādataḥ kuryātpradakṣiṇam || 14 ||
ṛrikarṇāgracapalaṃ hastikarṇāgracapalam || 9 |

lopāmudrovāca- svāmino bhavet |
kiñcidvijñaptumicchāmi yadyājñā
brūte hi yā'nanujñātā patyā sā patitā bhavet || 15 ||
agastya uvāca - vaktukāmā devi tvaṃ brūhi tattvamaśaṅkitā |
kiṃ
na tvādṛśīnāṃ vākyaṃ hi patyuḥ khedāya jāyate || 16 ||
tataḥ prapaccha sā devī praṇamya munimānatā |
sarveṣāṃ ca hitārthāya svasandehāpanuttaye || 17 ||
lopāmudrovāca-
śrīśailaśikharaṃ dṛṣṭvā punarjanma na vidyate |
idameva hi satyaṃ cet kimarthaṃ kāśiriṣyate || 18 ||
agastiruvāca - —
ākarṇaya varārohe satyaṃ pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā'male |
nirṇītamasa kṛccaitanmunibhistattvacintakaiḥ || 1 9 |
patyā ananujñātā bhartrā'dattā'bhyanujñetyarthaḥ || 15 ||
iṣyate vāñchayate svāmineti śeṣaḥ || 18 |
varārohe varau śreṣṭhī ārohī jaghane yasyāḥ , sā , tathā tasyāḥ sambodhanaṃ he
lopāmudrā bolīṃ-
he nātha ! yadi āpakī ājñā ho to maiṃ kucha pūchanā cāhatī hū~ ; kyoṃki jo strī

muktisthānānyanekāni kṛtastatrāpi nirṇayaḥ |
tāni te kathayāmyatra dattacittā bhava kṣaṇam || 20 ||
prathamaṃ tīrtharājantu prayāgākhyaṃ suviśrutam |
kāmikaṃ sarvatīrthānāṃ dharmakāmārthamokṣadam || || 21 ||
naimiṣañca kurukṣetraṃ gaṅgādvāramavantikā |
ayodhyā mathurā caiva dvārakā'pyamarāvatī || 22 ||
sarasvatī sindhusaṅgo gaṅgāsāgarasaṅgamaḥ |
kāntī ca tryambakaśvāpi saptagodāvarītaṭam || 23 ||
kālañjaraṃ prabhāsaśca tathā badarikāśramaḥ |
mahālayastayoṅkārakṣetraṃ vai pauruṣottamam || 24 |
sarvatīrthānāṃ kāmikaṃ kāmāya hitam | saṃvatsarārjitapāpanāśakāmanāviṣayatvāt

gokarṇo bhṛgukacchaśca bhṛgutuṅgaśca puṣkaram |
śrīparvatāditīrthāni dhārātīrthaṃ tathaiva ca || 25 ||
mānasānyapi tīrthāni satyādīni ca vai priye |
etāni muktidānyeva nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 26 ||
gayā tīrthaśca yatproktaṃ tatpitṝṇāṃ hi muktidam |
pitāmahānāmṛṇato muktāstattanayā api || 27 ||
sadharmiṇyuvāca -
mānasānyapi tīrthāni yānyuktāni mahāmate |
kāni kāni ca tānīha hya tadākhyātumarhasi || 28 ||
dhārā nāma mahāprājña sarvapāpapraṇāśinī |
tatra snātvā naravyāghra na śocita naraḥ kvacit || iti |
dhārātīrthaṃ yuddhamiti kecit || 25 ||
mānasāni manaḥsambhavāni mānasāni brahmātmaikatvalakṣaṇāni jñānāni | bahuvaca-
nantu saguṇanirguṇabhedābhiprāyeṇa | kathambhūtāni tīrthāni ? avidyātatkāryayornāśakānīti

agastya uvāca -
śṛṇu tīrthāni gadato mānasāni mamānaghe |
yeṣu samyaṅnaraḥ snātvā prayāti paramāṃ gatim ||| 2 9 |
satyaṃ tīrthaṃ kṣamā tīrthaṃ tīrthamindriyanigrahaḥ |
sarvabhūtadayātīrthaṃ tīrthamārjavameva ca || 30 ||
dānaṃ tīrthaṃ damastīrthaṃ santoṣastīrthamucyate |
brahmacayaṃ paraṃ tīrthaṃ tīrthaśca priyavāditā || 31 |
jñānaṃ tīrthaṃ dhṛtistīrthaṃ tapastīrthamudāhṛtam |
tīrthānāmapi tattīrthaṃ viśuddhirmanasaḥ parā || 32 |
na jalāplutadehasya snānamitya midhīyate |
sa snāto yo damasnātaḥ śuciḥ śuddhamanomalaḥ || 33 ||
api tajjñānāpekṣatvāt sadharmiṇītyuktam | cakārāt satyādīni ca kāni kāni - iti
boddhavyam || 28-29 |
mānasāni tīrthāni śṛṇviti pratijñāya sūcīkaṭāhanyāyena tāni vihāya

yo lubdhaḥ piśunaḥ krūro dāmbhiko viṣayātmakaḥ |
sarvatīrtheṣvapi snātaḥ pāpo malina eva saḥ || 34 ||
na śarīramalatyāgānnaro bhavati nirmalaḥ |
mānase tu male tyakte bhavatyantaḥ sunirmalaḥ || 35 |
jāyante ca mriyante ca jaleṣveva jalaukasaḥ |
na ca gacchanti te svargamaviśuddhamano malāḥ || 36 |
viṣayeṣvatisaṃrāgo mānaso mala ucyate |
teṣveva hi virāgo'sya nairmalyaṃ samudāhṛtam || 37 ||
cittamantargataṃ duṣṭaṃ tīrthasnānānna śuddhayati |
śataśo'ya jalaidhataṃ surābhāṇḍamivā'śuciḥ || 38 ||

dānamijyātapaḥ 161
śaucaṃ tīrthasevā śrutaṃ tathā |
sarvāṇyetāni tīrthāni yadi bhāvo na nirmalaḥ || 36
nigṛhītendriyagrāmo yatraiva ca vasennaraḥ |
tatra tasya kurukṣetraṃ naimiṣaṃ puṣkarāṇi ca || 40 ||
jñānapūte jñānajale rāgadveṣamalāpahe |
yaḥ snāti mānase tīrthe sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 41 ||
anvayavyatirekābhyāṃ siddhaṃ mano viśuddheḥ 9 paratīrthatvamupasaṃharati | dānamiti

etatte kathitaṃ devi mānasaṃ tīrthalakṣaṇam |
bhaumānāmapi tīrthānāṃ puṇyatve kāraṇaṃ śṛṇu || 42 ||
yathā śarīrasyoddeśāḥ kecinmedhyatamāḥ smṛtāḥ |
tathā pṛthivyāmuddeśāḥ kecitpuṇyatamāḥ smṛtāḥ || 43 ||
prabhāvādadbhutādbhūmeḥ salilasya ca tejasā |
parigrahānmunīnāśva tīrthānāṃ puṇyatā smṛtā || 44 ||
tasmādbhaumeṣu tīrtheṣu mānaseṣu ca nityaśaḥ |
ubhayeṣvapi yaḥ snāti sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 45 ||
anupoṣya trirātrāṇi tīrthānyanabhigamya ca |
adatvā kāśvanaṃ gāca daridro nāma jāyate || 46 |
bhagavacchaṅkarācāryasya ca— pavitraṃ kṛtsnamekatām |
yasmin vedāśca devāśca iti |
vrajettanmānasaṃ tīrthaṃ yasmin snātvā'mṛto bhavet ||
ekavacanamekajīvā'bhiprāyaṃ jātyabhiprāyaṃ vā || 41 |

agniṣṭomādibhiryajñairiṣṭrā 163
vipuladakṣiṇaiḥ |
na tatphalamavāpnoti tīrthābhigamanena yat || 47 |
yasya hastau ca pādau ca manaścaiva susaṃyatam |
vidyā tapaśca kīrtiśca sa tīrthaphalamaśnute || 48 ||
pratigrahādupāvṛttaḥ santuṣṭo yena kenacit |
ahaṅkāravimuktaśca sa tīrthaphalamaśnute ||| 4 9 |
adambhako nirārambho laghvāhāro jitendriyaḥ |
vimuktaḥ sarvasaṅgeryaḥ sa tīrthaphalamaśnute || 50 |
akopano'malamatiḥ satyavādī dṛḍhavrataḥ |
ātmopamaśca bhūteṣu sa tīrthaphalamaśnute || 51 ||
tīrthānyanusaran dhīraḥ śraddadhānaḥ samāhitaḥ |
kṛtapāpo viśuddhayeta kiṃ punaḥ śuddhakarmakṛt || 52 |
manaḥ saṃyamo'niṣṭacintanā'bhāvaḥ | vidyāmantropāsanādilakṣaṇā | tapaḥ svadharmādacyutiḥ |
kotiḥ paraiḥ sādhutayā varṇanam | etattritayañca yasya syāditi || 48-49 |
dambho dharmadhvajitvam , na vidyate dambho yasya sa tathā | svārthe kaḥ | adāmbhika
iti kacitpāṭhaḥ || 50-51 |
tīrthānyanusaran dhīra iti | dhīraḥ dharmādharṣo vidvān || 52 ||

tiryagyoniṃ na vai gacchet kudeśe naiva jāyate |
na duḥkhī syāt svargabhāk ca mokṣopāyaśca vindati || 53 |
aśraddadhānaḥ pāpātmā nāstiko'cchinnasaṃśayaḥ |
hetuniṣṭhaśca pañcate na tīrthaphalabhāginaḥ || 54 |
tīrthāni ca yathoktena vidhinā sañcaranti ye |
sarvadvandvasahā dhīrāste narāḥ svargabhāginaḥ || 55 |
tīrthayātrāṃ cikīrṣuḥ prāgvidhāyopoṣaṇaṃ gṛhe |
gaṇeśaṃ ca pitan viprān sādhūñchaktyā prapūjya ca || 56 |
kṛtapāraṇako hṛṣṭo gacchenniyamadhṛk punaḥ |
āgatyā'bhyarcya ca pitṝn yathoktaphalabhāgbhavet || 57 |

bhojya eva ca |
saktubhiḥ piṇḍadānava caruṇā pāyasena ca || 58 |
kartavyamṛṣibhirdṛṣṭaṃ piṇyākena guḍena ca |
śrāddhaṃ tatra prakartavyamarghyāvāhanavajitam |
akāle'pyathavā || 56 |
kāle tīrthe śrāddhaśca tarpaṇam |
avilambena kartavyaṃ naiva vighnaṃ samācaret || 60 |
tīrthaṃ prāpya prasaṅgena snānaṃ tīrthe samācaret |
snānajaṃ phalamāpnoti tīrthayātrāśritaṃ na ca || 61 ||
nṛṇāṃ pāpakṛtāṃ tīrthe pāpasya śamanaṃ bhavet |
yathoktaphaladaṃ tīrthaṃ bhavecchuddhātmanāṃ nṛṇām || 62 ||
ṣoḍaśāṃśaṃ sa labhate yaḥ parārthaśca gacchati |
ardha tīrthaphalaṃ tasya yaḥ prasaṅgena gacchati || 63 ||
beḍālavratikādīnāñcedaṃ lakṣaṇam-
yasya dharmadhvajo nityaṃ surādhvaja ivocchritaḥ |
pracchannāni ca pāpāni baiḍālaṃ nāma tadvratam ||
bhraṣṭaḥ svadharmāt pākhaṇḍo vikarmastho niṣiddhakṛt
sandehakṛddhetubhiryaḥ satkarmasu sahaitukaḥ || ityādi || 54 ||
maṇḍarahitaṃ bhaktaṃ caruḥ || 58 | piṇyākamatra tilapiṣṭam || 5 9 || prasaṅgena kāryā-
ntarāṇyuddiśyetyarthaḥ || 63 |

kuśapratikṛti kṛtvā tīrthavāriṇi majjayet |
majjayecca yamuddiśya so'ṣṭamāṃśaṃ labheta vai || 64 |
tīrthopavāsaḥ kartavyaḥ śiraso muṇḍanantathā |
śirogatāni pāpāni yānti muṇḍanato yataḥ || 65 |
yadahni tīrthaprāptiḥ syāt tato'hnaḥ pūrvavāsare |
upavāsastu kartavyaḥ prāptāhi śrāddhado bhavet || 66 ||
tīrthaprasaṅgāttīrthāṅgamapyuktaṃ tvatpuro mayā |
svargasādhanamevaitanmokṣopāyaśca vai bhavet || 67 ||
kāśī kāntī ca māyākhyā tvayodhyā dvāravatyapi |
mathurā'vantikā caitāḥ saptapuryo'tra mokṣadāḥ || 68 |
śrīśailo mokṣadaḥ sarvaḥ kedāro'pi tato'dhikaḥ |
śrīśailāccāpi kedārāt prayāgaṃ mokṣadaṃ param || 6 9 ||
kuśapratikṛtimiti jīvatāṃ dūradeśasthānāṃ mṛtānāntu tarpaṇādinā kṛtārtha-
tvāt || 64 ||

prayāgādapi 167
tīrthāgyādavimuktaṃ viśiṣyate |
yathā'vimukte nirvāṇaṃ na tathā kvāpyasaṃśayam || 70 |
anyāni muktikṣetrāṇi kāśīprāptikarāṇi ca |
kāśīṃ prāpyā'pi mucyeta nānyathā tīrthakoṭibhiḥ || 71 ||
annārthe kathayiṣyehamitihāsaṃ purātanam |
yathā viṣṇugaṇairuktaṃ dvijāya śivaśarmaṇe || 72 ||
tīrthādhyāyamimaṃ śrutvā naro niyatamānasaḥ |
śrāvayitvā dvijāṃścāpi śraddhābhaktisamanvitān || 73 ||
kṣatriyān dharmaniratān vaiśyān sanmārgavartinaḥ |
śūdrān dvijeṣu bhaktāṃśca niṣpāpo jāyate dvijaḥ || 74 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe tīrthādhyāyo nāma ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ || 6 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ ṣaṣṭho'dhyāyaḥ || 6 |

atha saptamo'dhyāyaḥ
agastiruvāca-
mathurāyāṃ dvijaḥ kaścidasūd bhūdevasattamaḥ |
tasya putro mahātejāḥ śivaśarmeti viśrutaḥ || 1 |
adhītya vedān vidhivadathaṃ vijñāya tattvataḥ |
paṭhitvā dharmaśāstrāṇi purāṇānyadhigamya ca || 2 |
aṅgānabhyasya tarkāṃca pariloḍya samantataḥ |
mīmāṃsādvayamālokya dhanurvedaṃ vigāhya ca || 3 ||
āyurvedaṃ vicāryāpi nāṭyavede kṛtaśramaḥ |
arthaśāstrāṇyanekāni prāpyāśvagajaceṣṭitam || 4 ||
kāśyayodhyā dvārakā ca māyākāntyāvavantikā |
mathurā ca praśasyante puraḥ saptātra saptame || 1 ||

ca kṛtābhyāso mantraśāstravicakṣaṇaḥ |
bhāṣāśca nānādeśānāṃ liporjñātvā videśajāḥ || 5 |
arthānupāyaṃ dharmeṇa bhuktvā bhogān yadṛcchayā |
utpādya putrān suguṇāṃstebhyo hyathaṃ vibhajya ca || 6 ||
yauvanaṃ gatvaraṃ jñātvā jarāṃ dṛṣṭvā śritāṃ śrutim |
cintāmavāpa mahatīṃ śivaśarmā dvijottamaḥ || 7 ||
paṭhato me gataḥ kālastathopārjayato dhanam |
nārādhito maheśānaḥ karmanirmūlanakṣamaḥ || 8 |
na mayā toṣito viṣṇuḥ sarvapāpaharo hariḥ |
sarvakāmaprado naṇāṃ gaṇeśo nācito mayā || 9 |
kalāsu catuḥṣaṣṭikalānāṃ madhye uktāvaśiṣṭāsu | mantraśāstraṃ gāruḍādiśāstramāgama-

tamastomaharaḥ sūryo nācito vai mayā kvacit |
mahāmāyā jagaddhātrī na dhyātā bhavabandhahṛt || 10 ||
na prīṇitā mayā devā yajñaiḥ sarvaiḥ samṛddhidāḥ |
tulasīvanaśuśrūṣā na kṛtā pāpaśāntaye || 11 |
na mayā tarpitā viprā mṛṣṭānnairmadhurai raseḥ |
ihāpi ca paratrāpi vipadāmanutārakāḥ || 12 |
bahupuṣpa bahupuṣpaphalopetāḥ phalopetāḥ succhāyāḥ snigdhapallavāḥ |
pathi nāropitā vṛkṣā ihāmutra phalapradāḥ || 13 ||
dukūlaiḥ svānukūleśca coleḥ pratyaṅgabhūṣaṇaiḥ |
nālaṅkatāḥ suvāsinya ihāmutra suvāsadāḥ || 14 |
tamastomaharo'jñānapūgaharo'ndhakārasamūhaharo vā | bhavabandhahṛt saṃsārabandhana-

dvijāya norvarā 171
dattā yamalokanivāriṇī |
suvaṇaṃ na suvarṇāya dattaṃ duritahṛtparam ||
nālaṅkṛtā savatsā gauḥ pātrāya pratipāditā |
iha pāpāpahantryāśu saptajanmasukhāvahā || 16 |
ṛṇāpanuttaye mātuḥ kārito na jalāśayaḥ |
nātithistoṣitaḥ kvāpi svargamārgapradarśakaḥ ||| 17
chatropānatkuṇḍikāśca nādhvagāya samarpitāḥ |
yāsyataḥ saṃyaminyāṃ hi svargamārgasukhapradāḥ || 18 |
na ca kanyāvivāhārthaṃ vasu kvāpi mayāpitam |
iha saukhyasamṛddhayarthaṃ divyakanyāpakaṃ divi || 1 9 |
na vājapeyā vabhṛthe snāto lobhavaśādaham |
iha janmani cānyasmin bahumṛṣṭānnapānade || 20 ||
uvaṃrā sarvaṃsasyāḍhyā bhūmiriti śeṣaḥ | ' urvarā sarvasasyāḍhayā ' ityamaraḥ || 15
jalāśayaḥ jalānyā śerate'sminniti jalāśayo vāpīkūpataḍāgādiḥ |
kuṇḍikā kuṇḍo kamaṇḍalurityarthaḥ | || 17 |
' astrī kamaṇḍaluḥ kuṇḍī ' ityamaraḥ || 18 ||

na mayā sthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ kṛtvā devālayaṃ śubham |
yasmin saṃsthāpite liṅge viśvaṃ saṃsthāpitaṃ bhavet || 21 ||
viṣṇorāyatanaṃ naiva naiva kṛtaṃ kṛtaṃ sarvasamṛddhidam |
na ca sūryagaṇeśānāṃ pratimāḥ kāritā mayā || 22 ||
na gaurī na mahālakṣmīcitre'pi parilekhite |
pratimākaraṇe caiṣāṃ na kurūpo na durbhagaḥ || 23 |

samarpitāni viprebhyo divyāmbarasamṛddhaye || 24 |
na tilāśca ghṛtenāktāḥ susamiddhe hutāśane |
hutā vai mantrapūtāśca sarvapāpāpanuttaye || 25 |
śrīsūktaṃ pāvamānī ca brāhmaṇo maṇḍalāni ca |
japtaṃ puruṣasūktaṃ na pāpāriśatarudriyam || 26 ||
śrīsūktaṃ hiraṇyavarṇāṃ hariṇīṃ suvarṇarajatasrajāmityādi | pāvamānī , svādiṣṭhayāma-
diṣṭhayāpavasvasomadhārayetyādyā | brāhmaṇo brāhmaṇaṃ agnirvai devānāmavamo viṣṇuḥ parama

aśvatthasevā 173
na kṛtā tyaktvā cākaṃ trayodaśīm |

na yamaṃ yamadūtāṃśca na yāmīrapi yātanāḥ |

tatrā'kṣayyavaṭo'pyasti saptapātālamūlavān |

hiraṇyagarbho vijñeyaḥ sa sākṣādvaṭarūpadhṛk |

paraṃ padaṃ kaivalyam || 53 |

sarve svarlokavāsinaḥ |

kāśīti

idānīṃ prayāgamārabhya kāśyāḥ sīmānaṃ vadan strīrūpākāreṇa kāśīṃ nirūpayati |

pāpināṃ yāni pāpāni prasahya kṣālitānyaho |
tacchuddhayaṃ sevyate tīrthaiḥ prayāgamadhikaṃ tataḥ || 68 |
prayāgasya guṇān jñātvā śivaśarmā dvijaḥ sudhī |

praveśa eva saṃvīkṣya sadehalivināyakam |

nivedya modakān pañca vañcayantaṃ nijaṃ janam |

āgatya dṛṣṭvā 183
maṇikarṇikāyāmudagvahāṃ svargataraṅgiṇīṃ saḥ |

sacailamāplutya jale'male'vilambamālambita śuddha buddhiḥ

sa hi pañcatīrthikāṃ viśveśamārādhya tato yathāsvam |
punaḥ punarvīkṣya purīṃ purāreridaṃ yamāloki na veti vismitaḥ || 74 |

na svaḥ purī sātvanayā purā samaṃ samañjasāpi pratisāmyamāvahet |
prabandhabhedād vyatiriktapustakapratiryathā sallipibhedabhaṅgataḥ || 75 |
paścādavalokitamiti nirdhāryaṃ kāśīṃ varṇayati | na svaḥ purotyaṣṭabhiḥ | sā sva :
purī amarāvatī tu niścitamanayā kāśyāḥ puryāḥ samaṃ sārdhaṃ samañjasāpi samyaka
tattvadṛśā vicāreṇāpi apiśabdād vyavahāradṛśā vicāreṇāpi pratisāmyaṃ samasya bhāvaḥ
sāmyaṃ sāmyaṃ sāmyaṃ prati prati sāmyaṃ na āvahet nāpnuyādityanvayaḥ | ubhayadṛśā vicāre
sāmyābhāvapradarśanārthaṃ vīpsāntargabhitapratisāmyaśabdaprayogaḥ |
ubhayadṛśāvicāreṇa sāmyābhāvāya tantreṇa ubhayaniṣṭhahetumāha | prabandhabhedāditi |
prabandhanaṃ prabandho racanā , paripāṭī , tasya bhedāt | amarāvatī hi brahmaṇā pratidinaṃ
racyate , iyantu sakṛdeveti | | tatrāpi sā brahmaṇā racyate , iyantu svayamīśvareṇa | | sā ca
kṣudraratnanicayakhacitālpotsedhā ceyaṃ cānarghya ratnapracayanirmitā gaganotsedhā ca | athavā
prabandhabhedāt prabandhayorbhedāt | svaḥ puryāṃ sthitānāṃ hi prakṛṣṭo bandhaḥ prabandhaḥ , punaḥ
punarjanmamaraṇādirūpaḥ saṃsāraḥ syāt , kāśyāṃ sthitānāṃ tu tu pragato bandhaḥ prabandho bhavedi-
tyevaṃ prabandhayorbhedādityarthaḥ | athavā prakṛṣṭo bandhaḥ prabandhaḥ , tasya bhedād bāhulyāda-
marāvatīsthitānāṃ prakṛṣṭo bandhaḥ prabandhastasya bhedād vidāraṇāt kāśīsthānāmityarthaḥ |
amarāvatī kāśyāḥ sāmyaṃ naiva āvahedityatra dṛṣṭāntamāha |

payo'pi yatratyamacintyavaibhavaṃ divi sthitā sādhu 185
' sudhāpyate mudhā |

anāmayāścintanayānaye śiturjanā manāgyatra vinā pinākinā |

muktilakṣmīmahāpīṭhamaṇistaccaraṇābjayoḥ
kaṇikeyaṃ tataḥ prāhuryāṃ janā maṇikarṇikām || 80 |

maṇirityadhyāhāro vā || 7 9 ||
prakārāntareṇa maṇikarṇikāśabdavyutpattimāha | muktilakṣmīti | tato janā yāṃ
maṇikarṇikāṃ prāhuḥ , sā'sāvityadhyāhṛtya yojanā | tataḥ kutaḥ ? yato muktilakṣmī-
rmokṣalakṣmīḥ , tasyā mahāpīṭhaṃ mahatsahāsanaṃ mahatsthānaṃ vā tadrūpo maṇiḥ , sarvotkṛṣṭatvānmaṇi-

mama janma vṛthā jātaṃ durvṛttasya jaḍātmanaḥ |
nādya yāvanmaye kṣiṣṭa kāśikā muktikāśikā || 82 |

tathāpi na catastro'nyā mayā dṛggocarī kṛtāḥ |

tīrthayātrāṃ pratidinaṃ kurvannūnaṃ savatsaram | |
na prāpa sarvatīrthāni tīrthaṃ kāśyāṃ tile tile || 86 ||
kāśīṃ dṛṣṭvā etāvān kālo mama vṛthā yāta ityanutapati | mama janmeti |
yāvanmayā kāśikā naikṣiṣṭa , nekṣi , nādarśīti yāvat , tāvanmama janma vṛthā jātamitya-

jānannapi guṇān devi kṣetrasyāya parān dvijaḥ |

kiṃ kurvanti hiśāstrāṇi sapramāṇāni sundari |

kalpe kalpe'khilaṃ viśvaṃ kālayedyaḥ svalīlayā |
taṃ kālaṃ kalayitvā yo mahākālo'bhavat kila || 9 1 ||
pāpādavantī sā viśvamavantīti nigadyate |
yuye yuge'nyanāmnī sā kalāvujjayinīti ca || 9 2 |

hāṭakeśo mahākālastārakeśastathaiva ca |

antakaḥ ||
