tulasīvanapālā ye te tyājyā dūrato bhaṭāḥ || 10 9 ||
yuge yuge dvāravatyā ratnāni parito muṣan | |
andhī ratnākaro'dyāpi lokeṣu parigīyate ||| 110 |
dvāravatyāṃ striyante ye jantavaḥ kālanoditāḥ |
caturbhujāḥ syurvaikuṇṭhe te pītāmbaradhāriṇaḥ || 111 |
tatrāpi santarpya pitan sa sadevarṣimānavān |
tatra teṣu ca tīrtheṣu sasno sarveṣvatandritaḥ || 112 |
tato māyāpurīṃ prāpto duṣprāpāṃ pāpakāribhiḥ |
yatra sā vaiṣṇavī māyā māyāpārśarna pāśayet || 113 |
jvaladiṅgavat pradīptāgnivat | jvaladaṅgāravaditi kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 108 || prasaṅgā-

kecidūcurharidvāraṃ mokṣadvārantataḥ pare |

vaideśikastathaikākī tathā'tijvarapīḍitaḥ |
cintāmavāpa mahatīṃ kimetat samupasthitam || 11 9 ||
cintārṇave nimagno'bhūttyaktāśo jīvite dhane |
sāṃyātrika ivā'gādhe bhinnapoto mahārṇave || 120 | |
kva kṣetraṃ kva kalatraṃ me kva putrāḥ kva ca tadvasu |
kva tadvicitraṃ vai hamyaṃ kva sā pustakasambhṛtiḥ || 121 |
adyāpi nāyuḥ paryāptaṃ palitaṃ na tathā mayi |
jvaro'yaṃ dāruṇaḥ prāptaḥ kālajñaścātidāruṇaḥ || 122 |
mṛtyurmūni kṛtāvāso vāso dūre vyavasthitaḥ |
agnau gṛhopari prāpte kūpantu khanayediha || 123 |

kimebhiścinta nairvyarthairatitāpakarairmama
cintayāmi hṛṣīkeśaṃ śivadaṃ śivameva ca || 124 |
athavā muktyupāyo vai mayekaḥ sadanuṣṭhitaḥ |
muktipuryastu saptaitāḥ svanetraviṣayīkṛtāḥ || 125 |
svargāpavargayorekaḥ sādhyo hi viduṣā dhruvam |
tayorasādhane paścāt santāpena ca tapyate || 126 ||
athavā cintayā ki me tvanayā duravasthayā |
raṇe vā maraṇaṃ śreyastīrthe vātra yathā mama || 127 |
kimahaṃ mandabhāgīva rathyāṃ kvāpi striye'dhunā |

carmāsthisañcayenāhamanena vapuṣā dhruvam |
prāpsyāmi nidhanādatra siddhi naiḥśreyasī dhruvam || 12 9 |
evaṃ cintayatastasya pīḍā''sodatidāruṇā |
koṭivṛścikadaṣṭasya yāvasthā tāmavāpa saḥ || 130 |
smartavyaṃ vismṛtaṃ sarvaṃ kvāhaṃ ko'haṃ na vetti ca |
dināni sapta sapteti sthitvā pañcatvamāgataḥ || 131 |
tāvadvaikuṇṭhabhuvanād vimānaṃ samupasthitam |
tārkṣyopalakṣito yatra dhvajaścātisamucchritaḥ || 132 |
adhiṣṭhitaṃ sukanyānāṃ svarṇakauśeyavāsasām | |
cāmaravyagrahastānāṃ sahasreṇātivistṛtam ||| 133 |

puṇyaśīlasuśīlābhyāṃ gaṇābhyāṃ ca virājitam |
caturbhujābhyāṃ svāsyābhyāṃ kiṅkiṇījālamālitam || 134 |
tadvimānamathāruhya pītavāsāścaturbhujaḥ |
alañcakre nabho vartma sa dvijo divyabhūṣaṇaḥ || 135 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe saptapurīvarṇanaṃ nāma saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 ||
kiṅkiṇījālamālitaṃ kṣudraghaṇṭikāsamūhena sañjātamālamityarthaḥ || 134 ||
|| iti śrī rāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 |

athāṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ
lopāmudrovāca - -
jīviteśa kathāmetāṃ puṇyāṃ puṇyapurīśritām |
na tṛptimadhigacchāmi śrutvā svacchromukheritām || 1 ||
māyāpuryāṃ muktipuryāṃ śivaśarmā dvijottamaḥ |
mṛto'pi mokṣaṃ naivāpa brūhi tatkāraṇaṃ vibho | 2 |
agastya uvāca - priyabhāṣiṇi |
sākṣānmokṣo na caitāsu purīṣu
puroddiśyāmumevārthamitihāso mayā śrutaḥ || 3 |
piśācaguhyagandharvaṃ vidyādharaprajāhṛtām
ākhyāyante'ṣṭame pañca lokāḥ saṃyaminīmukhāḥ || 1 |
pūrvādhyāyānte tadvimānamāruhyetyanena śivaśamaṃṇaḥ sārūpyamuktiruktā , sā'ghaṭamāneti
tadukkāyāmākhyāyikāyāmātmanastṛptyabhāvamāvedayantī tatkāraṇaṃ pṛcchati | jīviteśeti
dvayena || 1 | mokṣaṃ sāyujyam || 2 ||

śṛṇu kānte vicitrārthaṃ kathāṃ pāpapraṇāśinīm |
puṇyaśīlasuśīlābhyāṃ kathitāṃ śivaśarmaṇe || 4 ||
śivaśarmovāca -
ayi viṣṇugaṇau puṇyau puṇḍarīkadalekṣaṇau |
kiśvidvijñatukāmo'haṃ prabaddhakara sampuṭaḥ || 5 |
na nāma yuvayorvedmi vedmacākṛtyā ca kiścana |
puṣyaśīlasuśīlārūpau yuvāṃ bhavitumarhathaḥ || 6 ||
gaṇāvūcatuḥ— |
bhagavadbhaktiyuktānāṃ kimajñātaṃ bhavādṛśām |
etadeva hi nau nāma yaduktaṃ śrīmatā tvayā || 7 |

yadanyadapi te citte praṣṭavyaṃ tadaśaṅkitam |
saṃpṛcchasva mahāprājña prītyā tatprabravāvahe || 8 |
iti śrutvā sa vacanaṃ bhagavadgaṇabhāṣitam |
atiprītikaraṃ hṛdyaṃ tatastau pratyuvāca ha || 9 ||
divyadvija uvāca -
ka eṣa loko'lpaśrīkaḥ svalpapuṇyajanākṛtiḥ |
ka ime vikṛtākārā brūtametanmamāgrataḥ || 10 |
gaṇāvūcatuḥ -
ayaṃ piśācaloko'tra vasanti piśitāśanāḥ |
datvā'nutāpabhājo no no kṛtvā dadatyapi || 11 |
śivaṃ prasaṅgato'bhyarcya sakṛttva śucicetasaḥ |
alpapuṇyātpalakṣmīkāḥ piśācāsta ime sakhe || 12 |

tato gacchan 203
dadarśāne hṛṣṭapuṣṭajanāvṛtam |
picaṇḍilaiḥ sthūlavalairmeghagambhīraniḥsvanaiḥ
lokairadhyuṣitaṃ || 13 ||
lokaṃ śyāmalāṅgeśva lomaśaiḥ |

ekameva hi jānanti kulapūjyo hi yo dvijaḥ |
tasmai gāḥ samprayacchanti manyante tadvacaḥ sphuṭam || 18 |
samṛddhibhājo hyatrāpi tena puṇyena guhyakāḥ |
bhuñjate svargasaukhyāni devavaccākutobhayāḥ || 1 9 |
tato vilokayāmāsa lokaṃ locanaśarmadam |
keḍamī janāstvasau lokaḥ kiṃ nāmā vadatāṃ gaṇau || 20 |
gaṇāvūcatu : -- gāndharvastveṣa loko'mī gandharvāśca śubhavratāḥ |
devānāṃ gāyanā hyete cāraṇāḥ stutipāṭhakāḥ || 21 ||
gītajñā atigītena toṣayanti narādhipān |
stuvanti ca dhanāḍhyāṃśca dhanalobhena mohitāḥ || 22 ||
rājñāṃ prasādalabdhāni suvāsāṃsi dhanānyapi |
dravyāṇyapi " sugandhīni karpūrāṇyanekaśaḥ || 23 |

brāhmaṇebhyaḥ 205
prayacchanti gītaṃ gāyantyahaniśam |
śrutāveva manasteṣāṃ nāṭyaśāstrakṛtaśramāḥ || 24
tena puṇyena gāndharvo lokastveṣāṃ viśiṣyate |
brāhmaṇāstoṣitā yadvai gītavidyājitairdhanaiḥ || 25 |
gītavidyāprabhāveṇa |
devarṣirnārado mahān |
mānyo vaiṣṇavaloke vaṃ śrīśambhoścātivallabhaḥ || 26 |
tumbururnāradaśvobhau devānāmatidurlabho |
nādarūpīśivaḥ sākṣānnādatattvavidau hi tau || 27 |
yadi gītaṃ kvacidgītaṃ śrīmaddhariharāntike |
mokṣastu tatphalaṃ prāhuḥ sānnidhyamathavā tayoḥ || 28 ||
nāṭyaśāstreṣu kṛtaḥ śramo yaiste tathā || 24 ||

gītajño yadi gītena nāpnoti paramaṃ padam |
rudrasyānucaro bhūtvā tenaiva saha modate ||| 2 9 |
asmi~lloke sadākālaṃ smṛtireṣā pragīyate |
tadgītamālayā pūjyau devau hariharau sadā ||| 30 |
iti śṛṇvan kṣaṇāt prāpa punaranyanmanoharam |
śivaśarmā'tha papraccha ki saṃjñaṃ nagaraṃ tvidam || 31 |
gaṇāvūcatu : - loko nānāvidyāviśāradāḥ |
asau vaidyādharo
ete vidyārthināmannamupānadvastrakambalam ||| 32 |
auṣadhānyapi yacchanti tatpīḍāśamanāni hi |
nānākalā : śikṣayanti vidyāgarva virvājitāḥ || 33 |
dvitīyaṃ pakṣaṃ spaṣṭayati | gītajña iti | rudrasyeti viṣṇorapyupalakṣaṇam || 2 9 ||

śiṣyaṃ putreṇa 207
paśyanti vastratāmbūlabhojanaiḥ |
alaṅkṛtāśca satkanyā dharmādudvāhayanti ca || 34 ||
abhilāṣadhiyā nityaṃ pūjayantīṣṭadevatāḥ |
etaiḥ puṇyairvasantīha vidyādharavarā ime ||| 35 |
yāvaditthaṃ kathāśvastāvat saṃyaminīpatiḥ |
dharmarājo'bhisamprāpto devadundubhiniḥśvanaiḥ || 36 |
saumyamūrti vimānastho dharmajñaiḥ parivāritaḥ |
sevākarmasu caturaṃ bhṛtyaistricaturaiḥ saha || 37 |
dharmarāja uvāca -
sādhu sādhu mahābuddhe śivaśarman dvijottama |
kulocitaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ bhavatā pratipāditam || 38 ||
vedābhyāsaḥ kṛtaḥ pūrvaṃ guravaścāpi toṣitāḥ |
dharmaśāstrapurāṇeṣu dṛṣṭoṃ dharmastvayā''dṛtaḥ || 3 9 |
dharmāt dharmanimittāt dharmamuddiśyetyarthaḥ || 34 | abhilāṣadhiyā kāma-

muktipuryadbhirāśugantṛśarīrakam |
kṣālitaṃ |
kovido'sti bhavāneva jīvite jīvitetare || 40 |
kalevaraṃ pūrtigandhi sadaivāśucibhājanam |
sutīrtha puṇyapaṇyena samyagvinimitaṃ tvayā ||| 41 |
ata eva hi paṇḍityamādriyante vicakṣaṇāḥ |
ahaḥkṣepaṃ na kṣipanti kṣaṇamekaṃ hi te budhāḥ || 42 |
nimeṣān paścaṣān martye prāṇanti prāṇino dhruvam |
tatrāpi na pravarteyuradhakarmaṇi gahite

sthirāpāyaḥ sadā kāyo na dhanaṃ nidhane'vati |
tanmūḍhaḥ prauḍhakārye kiṃ na yateta bhavāniva || 44 ||
satvaraṃ ||
gatvaraṃ cāyurlokaḥ śokasamākulaḥ |
tasmāddharme matiḥ kāryā bhavateva sudhārmikaḥ || 45 |
satkarmaṇo vipāko'yaṃ tava vandyau mamāpyaho |
yadetau bhagavadbhaktau sakhitvaṃ bhavato gatau || 46 |
mamājñā dīyatāṃ tasmāt sāhāyyaṃ karavāṇi kim |
yatkartavyaṃ mādṛśaiste tatkṛtaṃ bhavataiva hi || 47 ||
adya dhanyataro'smīha yad dṛṣṭo bhagavadgaṇau |
sevā sadaiva me jñāpyā śrīmaccaraṇasannidhau ||| 48 |

tataḥ prasthāpitastābhyāṃ prāviśat svapurīṃ yamaḥ |
aprākṣīcca tato viprastau gaṇau prasthite yame || 4 9 |
śivaśarmovāca- saumyatarā''kṛtiḥ |
sākṣādayaṃ dharmarājo nanu
dharmāṇyeva vacasyasya manaḥ prītikarāṇi ca || 50 |
purī saṃyamanī seyamatīva śubhalakṣaṇā |
ākarṇya yasya nāmā'pi pāpino'tīva bibhyati || 51 |
yamarūpaṃ varṇayanti martyaloke'nyathā janāḥ |
anyathā'yaṃ mayā dṛṣṭo brūtaṃ tatkāraṇaṃ gaṇau || 52 ||

gaṇāvūcatu : -
śṛṇu saumya susomyo'sau dṛśyate'tra bhavādṛśaiḥ |
dharmamūrtiḥ prakṛtyaiva niḥśaṅkaḥ puṇyarāśibhiḥ || 54 |
ayameva hi piṅgākṣaḥ krodharaktāntalocanaḥ |
daṃṣṭrākarālavadano vidyullalana bhīṣaṇaḥ || 55
ūrdhvakeśo'tikṛṣṇāṅgaḥ |
pralayāmbudaniḥsvanaḥ |
kāladaṇḍodyatakaro bhrukuṭīkuṭilānanaḥ || 56 |
ānayainaṃ pātayainaṃ baghānā'muñca durdama
ghātayainaṃ sudurvṛttaṃ mūni tīvramayodhanaṃḥ || 57 |
ātāḍayainaṃ durvṛttaṃ dhṛtvā pādau śilātale |
utpāṭayāsya netre tvaṃ nidhāya caraṇaṃ gale || 58 |
prathama praśnasyottaraṃ vadantau caramapraśnasyottaramāhatuḥ | śṛṇu somyetyādinā || 54 |
ayameva hi yama ityādi jalpan durvṛttairdūrataḥ śrūyate dṛśyate ceti pañcatriṃśa-

vipāṭaya |
etasya gallāvutphullo kṣureṇāśu
pāśena kaṇṭhaṃ baddhvā'sya samullambaya bhūruhe || 5 9 |
vidārayāsya mūrdhānaṃ karapatreṇa dāruvat |
pāṇighātaitāsyāsyaṃ samuccūrṇaya dāruṇaiḥ || 60 |
paradāraprasṛmaraṃ karaṃ chindhyasya pāpinaḥ |
paradāragṛhaṃ yātuḥ pādau cāsya vikhaṇḍaya || 61 |
sūcībhī romakūpeṣu tanuṃ vyadhihi sarvataḥ |
dātuḥ parakalatrāṅge nakhapaṅktīrdurātmanaḥ || 62 |
paradāramukhāghrāturmukhe niṣṭhīvayāsya hi |
vaktuḥ parāpavādasya kīlaṃ tīkṣṇaṃ mukhe kṣipa || 63 ||
gallau kapolādhobhāgau gaṇḍāviti yāvat | samullambaya sparśo yathā na bhavati ,
tathā amuṃ pāśayetyarthaḥ || 5 9 ||

bharjayainaṃ caṇakavattaptavālukakarparaiḥ |
bhrāṣṭre vikaṭavaktratvaṃ parasantāpakāriṇam || 64 |
doṣāropaṃ sadā karturadoṣe krūralocana |
timajjayāsya vadanaṃ pūyaśoṇitakardame || 65 |
adattaparavastūnāṃ gṛhṇataḥ karapallavam |
āplutyāplutya tailena taptāṅgāre pacotkaṭa || 66 |
apavādaṃ gurorvanindākartuḥ suparvaṇām |
tapta lohaśalākāśca mukhe bhīṣaṇa nikṣipa || ||| 67 ||
caṇakavat caṇakāḥ prasiddhāstadvat | taptavālukakarparaiḥ saha | tatra karparāḥ kākara
he vikaṭavaktreti dūtasambodhanam || 64 |
krūralocaneti dūtasambodhanam || 65 |
adattaparavastūnāmiti karmaṇi ṣaṣṭhī | utkaṭa he utkaṭa | utkaṭamiti pāṭhe kriyā-

paramarmaspṛśaścāsya paracchidraṃ prakāśituḥ |
sutaptāyomayān śaṅkan sarvasandhiṣu ropaya || 68 | |
anyena dīyamāne sve niṣeddhaḥ pāpakāriṇaḥ |
ācchettuḥ paravṛttīnāṃ jihvāṃ chindhyasya durmukha || 6 9 |
devasvabhoktuḥ kroḍāsya brāhmaṇastrasya bhojinaḥ |
vidāryodaramasyāśu viṭkīṭaḥ paripūraya || 70 |
na devārthe na viprārthe nātithyarthe pacetkvacit |
tamamuṃ svārthapattāraṃ kumbhīpāke pacāndhaka || 71 ||
ugrāsya śiśuhantāramamuṃ viśrambhaghātinam |
kṛtaghnaṃ naya vegena mahārauravarauravam || 72 |
sutaptāyomayān atitaptalohamayān śaṅkan ropaya nirvāpaya || 68 |
durmukheti dūtasambodhanam || 6 9 |
kroḍāsya he kroḍāsya viṭkī viṣṭhākṛmibhiḥ || 70 |
andhaketi dūtasambodhanam || 71 ||
ugrāsya he ugrāsya ! mahārīravaroravamiti dvandvaikavadbhāvaḥ || 72 |

brahmaghnaṃ cāndhatāmitre 215
surāpaṃ pūyaśoṇite |
kālasūtre hemacauramavīcau gurutalpagam || 73 |
tatsaṃsargiṇamā varṣamasipatravane tathā
etān mahāpātakinastaptatailakaṭāhake |

jvālākole mahāghore narake'muṃ nipātaya |
yo vahninā dāhayati parakṣetra parālayam || 78 ||
kālakūṭe ca garavaṃ kūṭasākṣyābhivādinam |
mānakūṭaṃ tulākūṭaṃ kaṇṭhamoṭe nipātaya || 7 9 | |
lālāpibe ca duṣprekṣya tīrthāpsu ṣṭhīvinaṃ naya |
āmapāke ca garbhanaṃ śūlapāke'nyatāpinam || 80 ||
rasavikrayiṇaṃ vipramikṣuyantre prapīḍaya
prajāpīḍākaraṃ bhūpamandhakape nipātaya ||| 81 |
gotilāṃśca turaṅgāṃśca vikretāraṃ dvijādhamam |
mātulānyāḥ surāyāśca vikretāraṃ halāyudha || 82 |
kaṭasākṣyābhivādinaṃ mithyāsākṣitvavadanaśīlam | kūṭasākṣitvavādinamiti

musalolūkhale vaiśyaṃ kaṇḍayainaṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
śūdraṃ dvijāvamantāraṃ dvijāgre mañcasevinam || 83 |
adhomukhe ca narake dīrghagrīva prapīḍaya || 84 |
śūdraṃ brāhmaṇajetāraṃ vaiśyaṃ brāhmaṇamāninam |
kṣatriyaṃ yājakañcāpi vipraṃ vedavivarjitam || 85 |
lākṣālavaṇamāṃsānāṃ satailaviṣasarpiṣām |
āyudhekṣuvikārāṇāṃ vikretāraṃ dvijādhamam || 86 |
pāśapāṇe kaśāpāṇe baddhavaitāṃścaraṇe dṛḍham |
ghātayantau kaśāghātairnayataṃ taptakardame || 87 |
imāṃstriyaṃ śleṣayāśu puṃścalīṃ kulakalmaṣām |
tenopapatinā sādhaṃ taptāyasamayena ca || 88 ||
viprāṇāmadhamaṃ viprādhamaṃ vā | mātulānyā bhaṅgākhyāyā latāyāḥ | mātulānī tu bhaṅgāyā-

svayaṃ gṛhītvā niyamaṃ yastyajeda jitendriyaḥ |
taṃ prāpaya durādharṣaṃ bahubhramaradaṃśake || 8 9 |
ityādi jalpan durvṛttaiḥ śrūyate dūrato yamaḥ |
svakarmaśaṅkitaiḥ pāpairdṛśyate'tibhayaṅkaraḥ || 9 0 |
ye prajāḥ pālayantīha putrāneva nijaurasān |
daṇḍayanti ca dharmeṇa bhūpāste'sya sabhāsadaḥ || 9 1 |
varṇāśramāśca yadrāṣṭre'nutiṣṭhanti nijāṃ kriyām |
kālenāpannanidhanā bhūpāste'sya sabhāsadaḥ || 9 2 |
naiva dīno na durvṛtto nāpadgrasto na śokabhāk |
yeṣāṃ rāṣṭre pradṛśyante bhūpāste'sya sabhāsadaḥ || 9 3 |

brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā 31 9
vaiśyāḥ svadharmaniratāḥ sadā |
anye'pi ye saṃyaminaḥ saṃyaminyāṃ vasanti te ||
uśīnaraḥ 9 4 ||
sudhanvā ca vṛṣaparvā jayadrathaḥ |
rajiḥ sahasrajit |
kukṣirdṛḍhadhanvā ripuñjayaḥ || 9 5 |
yuvanāśvo dantavakko nābhāgo ripumaṅgalaḥ |
karandhamo dharmasenaḥ paramardaḥ parāntakaḥ

śaśiśekharaśūlapāṇe |
govinda mādhava mukunda hare murāre śambho śiveśa
dāmodarācyuta janārdana vāsudeva tyājyā bhaṭā ya iti santatamāmananti || 99 |
gaṅgādharāndhakaripo hara nīlakaṇṭha vaikuṇṭhakaiṭabharipo kamaṭhābjapāṇe | |
bhūteśakhaṇḍaparaśo mṛḍacaṇḍikeśa tyājyā bhaṭā ya iti santatamāmananti || 100 |
govindetyādyekādaśaślokānāṃ itthaṃ dharmarājaḥ svabhṛtyagaṇān sadaiva saṃśikṣayet
saṃśikṣayatīti dvādaśenānvayaḥ | iti sarvatra
he bhaṭā iti ye santatamāmamanti , te tyājyā bhavadbhiriti śeṣaḥ |

viṣṇo nṛsiṃha madhusūdana cakrapāṇe gaurīpate giriśa śaṅkaracandracūḍa |
nārāyaṇāsuranibarhaṇaśārṅgapāṇe tyājyā bhaṭāya iti santatamāmananti || 101 |
mṛtyuñjayogra viṣamekṣaṇakāmaśatro śrīkāntapītavasanāmbudanīlaśaure |
īśāna kṛttivasana tridaśaikanātha tyājyābhaṭā ya iti santatamāmananti | | 102 |
lakṣmīpate madhuripo puruṣottamādya śrīkaṇṭhadigvasanaśāntapinākapāṇe |
ānandakandadharaṇīdhara padmanābha tyājyā bhaṭā ya iti santatamāmananti || 103 ||

sarveśvara tripurasūdana devadeva brahmaṇyadeva garuḍadhvaja śaṅkhapāṇe |
tryakṣoragābharaṇabālamṛgāṅkamaule tyājyā bhaṭā ya iti santata māmananti || 104 |
śrīrāma rāghava rameśvara rāvaṇāre bhūteśa manmatharipo pramathādhinātha |
cāṇūramardanahṛṣīkapate murāre tyājyā bhaṭā ya iti santatamāmananti || 105 |
śūlin girośa rajanīśa kalāvataṃsa kaṃsapraṇāśana sanātana keśināśa |
bhargatrinetra bhava bhūtapate purāre tyājyā bhaṭā ya iti santatamāmananti || 106 |

gopīpate yadupate vasudevasūno .223
karpūragauravṛṣabhadhvaja bhālanetra |
govardhanoddharaṇadharmadhurīṇagopa tyājyā bhaṭā ya iti santatamāmananti
sthāṇo trilocana || 107 |
pinākadharasmarāre kṛṣṇā'niruddha kamalākara kalmabāre |
viśveśvara tripathagārdra jaṭākalāpa tyājyā bhaṭā ya iti santatamāmananti
smāditi bhavaḥ sarvopādānetyarthaḥ | bhūtapate ākāśādibhūtasraṣṭaḥ | ' tasmādvā etasmādā-

aṣṭottarādhikaśatena sucāranāmnāṃ sandarbhitāṃ kalita ratna kadambakena |
sannāyakāṃ dṛḍhaguṇāṃ dvijakaṇṭhagāṃ yaḥ kuryādimāṃtrajamaho sa yamaṃ na paśyet || 10 9 |
itthaṃ dvijendra nijabhṛtyagaṇān sadaiva saṃ śikṣayedava nigān sa hi dharmarājaḥ |
anye'pi ye hariharāṅkadharādharāyāṃ te dūrataḥ punaraho parivarjanīyāḥ || 110 ||
agastiruvāca— sakalakalmaṣabījahantrīm |
yo dharmarājaracitāṃ lalitaprabandhāṃ nāmāvalīṃ
dhīro'tra kaustubhabhṛtaḥ śaśibhūṣaṇasya nityaṃ japet stana ra saṃsa pibena mātuḥ || 111 ||

iti śṛṇvan kathāṃ ramyāṃ śivaśarmā priye'nadhām |
prahṛṣṭavaktraḥ purato vavarśāpsarasāṃ purīm || 112 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe yamalokavarṇanaṃ nāmāṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||
pāpānāṃ bījaṃ padajñānaṃ vāsanā vā tasya hantrīm , chettrīm , yo dhīro japet , sa mātuḥ stanaṃ
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 ||

atha navamo'dhyāyaḥ
śivaśarmovāca-

nānādeśaviśeṣajñā nānābhāṣāsu kovidāḥ |
saṅketodanta nipuṇā naikāḥ svairacarā mudā || 4 |
līlānamaṃsu sābhijñāḥ supralāpeṣu paṇḍitāḥ |
yūnāṃ manāṃsi satataṃ svairhāve ramayantyaḥ || 5 |
nirmathyamānātkṣīrodāt pūrvamapsarasastvamūḥ |
niḥsṛtāstrijagajjeturmohanāstraṃ manobhuvaḥ
saṅketodantanipuṇāḥ rahasyavṛttāntadakṣāḥ | vārtāpravṛttirvṛttānta udantaḥ syādathā-

urvaśī menakā rambhā candralekhā tilottamā |
vapuṣmatī kāntimatī līlāvatyutpalāvatī || 7 |
alambuṣā guṇavatī sthūlakeśī kalāvatī |
kalānidhirguṇanidhiḥ karpūratilakorvarā || 8 |
anaṅgalatikā cāpi tathā madanamohinī |
cakorākṣī candrakalā tathā munimanoharā || 9 |
grāvadrāvā tapodveṣṭrī cārunāsā sukaṇikā |
dārusañjīvinī suśrīḥ kratuśulkā śubhānanā || 10 |
tapaḥśulkā tīrthaśulkā dānaśulkā himāvatī |
paścāśvamedhikā caiva rājasūyārthinī tathā || 11 ||
aṣṭāgnihomikā tadvadvājapeyaśatodbhavā
ityādyapsarasāṃ śraṃṣṭhaṃ sahasraṃ ṣaṣṭisammitam || 12 |
urvaśī nārāyaṇorumaśnāti svotpattyarthaṃ bhinattīti tathā | tathoktaṃ harivaṃśe-
nārāyaṇoruṃ nirbhidya sambhūtā varavarṇinī |
ailasya dayitā devī yoṣidratnaṃ kimuvaṃśīti ||
na cobhayatrotpattī virodhaḥ | kenacinnimittena vasiṣṭhasyeva tadupapatteḥ | rūpa-
lāvaṇyasaubhāgyādibhirmenakorvaśī ityabhimānau yasyāḥ sā menakā | rūpalāvaṇyādibhirjaṃga-
brambhati mohayatīti rambhā | candravadardhacandravallalāṭe lekhā tilakaṃ yasyāḥ sā candralekhā |
ratnānāṃ tilaṃ tilaṃ samānīya nirmiteti tilottamā | taduktamādiparvaṇi-
tilaṃ tilaṃ samānīya ratnānāṃ yadvinirmitā |
tilottameti tattasyā nāma cakre pitāmahaḥ || iti |
anyāsāmapi yathāyathaṃ vyutpattirjñeyā || 7 |
alamatyarthaṃ busamiva busamatinikṛṣṭā yasyāḥ , arthādanyastrī sālambuṣā || 8 |

ki vā prativyatīpāta mekasaṃvatsarāvadhi |

ccīyante || 24 |

gaṇāvūcatuḥ -

paraḥ śivaḥ |

śruti

gabhastihastastīvrāṃśustaraṇiḥ sumahoraṇiḥ || 80 ||

chando'śvo vedavedyaśca bhāsvān pūṣā vṛṣākapiḥ || 81 ||
acetane'ṇḍe vairājarūpeṇa praviṣṭatvādvā mārtaṇḍaḥ , taduktaṃ bhāgavate - " mṛte'ṇḍa eṣa
etasmin yadabhūttato mārtaṇḍa : " iti | vyapadeśa iti | 13 | mihi mihikāṃ rāti gṛhṇāti
nāśayatīti mihiraḥ 14 | aṃśumān raśmimān 15 | aditeḥ putraḥ ādityaḥ 16 | |

ekacakraratho mitro mandehāristamitrahā |
daityahā pāpahartā ca gharmo dharmaprakāśakaḥ || 82 |
helikaścitrabhānuśca kalighnastārkṣyavāhanaḥ | |

gharmaraśmirdurnirīkṣyaścaṇḍāṃśuḥ kaśyapātmajaḥ |

praṇavādicaturthyantairnamaskārasamanvitaiḥ

vigṛhya pāṇiyugmena tāmrapātraṃ sunirmalam |
jānubhyāmavanīṃ gatvā paripūrya jalena ca || 86 |

karavīrādikusumai 245
raktacandanamiśritaiḥ |
dūrvāṅkurairakṣataiśca nikṣiptaiḥ pātramadhyataḥ || 87
dadyādarghyamanardhyāya |
savitre dhyānapūrvakam |
upamaulisamānīya tatpātraṃ nānyadṛṅmanāḥ
pratimantraṃ || 88 |
namaskuryādudayāstamaye ravim | |
anayā nāmasaptatyā mahāmantrarahasyayā || 8 9 |
evaṃ kurvannaro jātu na daridro na duḥkhabhāk |
vyādhibhirmucyate ghorairapi janmāntarājitaḥ || 9 0 |
vinauṣadhaivinā vaidyairvināṃ pathyaparigrahaiḥ |
kālena nidhanaṃ prāptaḥ sūryaloke mahīyate || 9 1
ityekadeśaḥ kathito bhānulokasya sattama |

svakarṇa viṣayīkurvanniti puṇyakathāmimām |

agastiruvāca- kathāmetāmapsarālokasaṃyutām |
śrutvā saurīṃ
na daridro bhavet kvāpi nādharmeṣu pravartate || 9 4 |

nayanānandasandohadāyinī |
pūranuttamā || 1 |
gaṇāvūcatuḥ -
śivaśarman mahābhāga sutīrthaphalitadruma
loko'tra ramate vipra sahasrākṣapuro sviyam || 2 ||
sahasrākṣasya vahneśva lokāvatyantasundarī |
manaḥ prītikāro hṛdyo varṇyete daśame'dbhutau ||

tapobalena mahatā vihitā viśvakarmaṇā |
divāpi kaumudī yasyāḥ saudhaśreṇīśriyaṃ śrayet || 3 |
yadā kalānidhiḥ kvāpi darśe dṛśyatvamāvahet |
tadā svapreyasīṃ jyotsnāṃ saudheṣveṣu nigūhayet || 4 ||
yadacchabhittau vīkṣya svamanyayoṣidviśaṅkitā |
sugdhā nāśu viśeccitramapi svāṃ citrasālikām || 5 |
harmyeṣu nīlamaṇibhirnirmiteṣvatra nirbhayam |
svanīlimānamādhāya tamohaḥsvapi tiṣṭhati || 6 ||

candrakānta śilājālasrutamātrāmalañjalam 24 9
tatra cādāya kalaśairtecchantyanyajjalaṃ |
janāḥ || 7 |
kuvindā na ca santyatra na ca te paśyatoharāḥ |
cailānyalaṅkṛtīratra yataḥ kalpadrumo'rpayet
gaṇakā || 8 |
nātra vidyante cintā vidyāviśāradāḥ |
yataściketi sarveṣāṃ cintāṃ cintāmaṇirvratam
sūpakārā na santyatra rasakarmavicakṣaṇāḥ |
dugdhe sarvarasānekā kāmadhenurato yataḥ

taruratnaṃ pārijātaḥ strīratnaṃ sorvaśī tviha |
nandanaṃ vanaratnaśca ratnaṃ mandākinī pām ||| 13 |
trayastraśat surāṇāṃ yā koṭiḥ śrutisamīritā |
pratīkṣate sā'vasaraṃ sevāyeṃ pratyahaṃ tviha || 14 |
svargeṣvindrapadādanyanna viśiṣyeta kiścana |
yadyastrilokyāmaiśvayaṃ na tattulyamanena hi || 15 |
aśvamedhasahastrasya labhyaṃ vinimaye na yat |
kiṃ tena tulyamanyatsyāt pavitramathavā mahat || 16 ||
pauruṣādhikaḥ puruṣasyedaṃ pauruṣam , balaṃ tenādhikaḥ | yadvā puruṣo viṣṇustasyāṃśaḥ pauruṣo

arciṣmatī 251
saṃyaminī puṇyavatyamalāvatī |
gandhavatyalakeśī ca netattutyā maharṣibhiḥ ||
ayameva sahasrākṣastvayameva divaspatiḥ |
śatamanyurayaṃ devo nāmānyetāni nāmataḥ || 18 |
saptā'pi lokapālā ye ta enaṃ samupāsate |
nāradādyairmunivarairayamāśībhirīḍayate
etat sthairyeṇa sarveṣāṃ || 1 9 |
lokānāṃ sthairyamiṣyate |
parājayān mahendrasya trailokyaṃ syāt parājitam || 20 |
danujā manujā ' vaityāstapasyantyugrasaṃyamāḥ |
gandharvayakṣarakṣāṃsi mahendrapadalipsavaḥ || 21 |

sagarādyā mahīpālā vājimedhavidhāyakāḥ |
kṛtavanto mahāyatnaṃ śanaiśvaryaṃ jighṛkṣavaḥ || 22 |
niṣpratyūhaṃ kratuśataṃ yaḥ kaścit kurute'vanau |
jitendriyo'marāvatyāṃ sa prāpnoti pulomajām || 23 ||
asamāptakratuśatā vasantyatra mahībhujaḥ |
jyotiṣṭomādibhiryāgairye yajantyapi te dvijāḥ || 24 |
tulā puruṣadānādimahādānāni ṣoḍaśa |
ye yacchantyamalātmānaste labhante'marāvatīm || 25 |
śakreśvaryajighṛkṣavaḥ indraśriyaṃ labdhumicchavaḥ || 22 ||
tahi kimiti nāgṛhaṃstatrāha | niṣpratyūham iti || 23 | tahi savighnakratuśatānāṃ
tadanuṣṭhānaṃ niṣphalameva netyāha | asamāpteti || 24 ||

saṃgrāmeṣvaparāṅmukhāḥ |
vikrāntā vīraśayane te'tra tiṣṭhanti

śīte śītāpanutyai yastvidhmabhārān prayacchati |
kuryādagniṣṭikāṃ vā'tha sa vasedagnisannidhau | 31 |
anāthasyāgnisaṃskāraṃ yaḥ kuryācchraddhayānvitaḥ |
aśaktaḥ prerayedanyaṃ so'gniloke mahīyate || 32 |
jaṭharāgnivivṛddhaye yo dadyādāgneyamauṣadham |
mandāgnaye sapuṇyātyā vahniloke vasecciram || 33 |
yajñopaskaravastūni yajñārthaṃ draviṇantu vā |
yathāśakti pradadyādyo hyaciṣmatyāṃ vaset sa vai || 34 |
agnireko dvijātīnāṃ niḥsayakaraḥ paraḥ |
gururdevo vrataṃ tīrthaṃ sarvamagniviniścitam || 35 |

apāvanāni sarvāṇi vahnisaṃsargataḥ 255
kṣaṇāt |
pāvanāni bhavantyeva tasmādyaḥ pāvakaḥ smṛtaḥ
api vedaṃ viditvā || 36 |
yastyaktvā vai jātavedasam |
anyatra badhnāti rati brāhmaṇo na sa vedavit || 37
antarātmā |
hyayaṃ sākṣānniściṃto hyāśuśukṣaṇiḥ |
māṃsagrāsān pacetkukṣau strīṇāṃ no māṃsapeśikām || 38 |
taijasī śāmbhavī mūrtiḥ pratyakṣā vahanātmikā |
katra hantrī pālayitrī vinenāṃ ki vilokyate || 3 9 |
citrabhānurayaṃ sākṣānnetraṃ tribhuvane śituḥ |
andhantamomaye loke vinainaṃ kaḥ prakāśakaḥ ||| 40 |
dhūpapradīpanaivedyaṃ payodadhighṛtaikṣavam |
etadbhuktaṃ niṣevante sarve divi divaukasaḥ | 41 |
antarātmā'ntaḥ sākṣī | hi niścaye | māṃsapeśikāṃ māṃsamayajarāyujāṃ garbhasthabāla-
tanumiti yāvat || 38 |
tejasa iyaṃ taijasī | śambhoriyaṃ śāmbhavī | aṣṭamūrtitvādīśvarasya || 3 9 |
andhantamomaye loka iti cchāndasam || 40 | aikṣavamikṣuvikāram || 41 ||

śivaśarmovāca- sūnuḥ kathamidaṃ padam |
ko'yaṃ kṛśānuḥ kasyā'yaṃ
āgneyaṃ labdhametena brūta me tanmamāgrataḥ || 42 |
` gaṇāvūcatuḥ— ākarṇaya mahāprājña varṇayāvo yathātatham |
yo'yaṃ yasya yathā'nena prāpi jyotiṣmatī purī || 43 |
narmadāyāstaṭe ramye pure narmapure purā |
purāribhaktaḥ puṇyātmā'bhavad viśvānaro muniḥ | 44 |
brahmacaryāśrame niṣṭho brahmayajñarata : sadā |
śāṇḍilyagotraḥ śucimān brahmatejonidhirvaśī || 45 |
vijñātā'khilaśāstrārtho laukikācāracañcuraḥ |
kadāciccintayāmāsa hṛvi dhyātvā maheśvaram ||| 46 |
caturṇāmapyāśramāṇāṃ ko'tīva śreyase satām |

kalpanayojjhitam |
brahmacaryaṃ hi gārhasthye yādṛk
svabhāvacapale citte kva tādṛg brahmacāriṇi || 53 |

saṅkalpayati citte cet kṛtamapyakṛtaṃ tadā || 54 |

ayācitopasthitāyā yo vṛttyā varttate gṛhī |
yena kenāpi santuṣṭo bhikṣukāt sa viśiṣyate || 58 |
prārthayedyatkvacitkiñcid duṣprāpaṃ vā bhaviṣyati |
aśaneṣu na santuṣṭaḥ sa yatiḥ patito bhavet || 5 9 |
guṇāguṇaṃ vicāryetthaṃ sa vai viśvānaro dvijaḥ |
udvavāha vidhānena svocitāṃ kulakanyakām || 60 |
agniśuśrūṣaṇarataḥ pañcayajñaparāyaṇaḥ
ṣaṭkarmanirato nityaṃ devapitryatithipriyaḥ || 61 |
dharmārthakāmān yuktātmā so'rjayan svasvakālataḥ |
parasparamasaṅkocaṃ dampatyorānukūlyataḥ || 62 |
pūrvāhṇe daivikaṃ karma so'karot karmakāṇḍavit |

evaṃ bahutithe kāle gate tasyāgrajanmanaḥ |
bhāryā śuciṣmatī nāma kāmapatnova suvratā || 64 |
apaśyantyaṅkuramapi santateḥ svargasādhanam |
vijñāya śaṅkaraṃ kāntaṃ praṇipatya vyajijñapat | 65 |
śuciṣmatyuvāca- priyavrata
āryaputrāryadhiṣaṇa prāṇanātha |
na durlabhaṃ mamāstīha kiñcitvaccaraṇā'rcanāt || 66 |
ye vaṃ bhogāḥ samucitāḥ strīṇāṃ te tvatprasādataḥ |
alaṅkṛtya mayā bhuktāḥ prasaṅgād vacmi tānyapi || 67 ||
suvāsāṃsi suvāsāśca suśayyāsu nitambino |
sraktāmbulānnapānāśca aṣṭau bhogāḥ svadharmaṇām || 68 |
kāmapatnī ratistadvadiva || 64 | aṅkuraṃ kāraṇaṃ putramātramityarthaḥ || 65 |
alaṅkṛtya atiśayaṃ kṛtvā | tānyapi tānapi | tānapīti vā pāṭha : | alaṅkṛteti
alaṅkarotītyalaṅkṛt pāṭhe tayā mayetyarthaḥ || 67 |

ekaṃ me prārthitaṃ nātha cirāya yahṛdi saṃsthitam |
gṛhasthānāṃ samucitaṃ tattvaṃ dātumihārhasi || 6 9 |
viśvānara uvācaṃ-
kimadeyaṃ hi suśroṇi tava priyahitaiṣiṇi |
tatprārthaya mahābhāge prayacchāmyavilambitam || 70 |
maheśituḥ prasādena mama kiñcinna durlabham |
ihāmutra ca kalyāṇi sarvakalyāṇakāriṇaḥ || 71 |
iti śrutvā vacaḥ patyustasya sā patidevatā |
uvāca hṛṣṭavadanā yadi deyo varo mama || 72 |
varayogyā'smi cennātha nānyaṃ varamahaṃ vṛṇe |
maheśasadṛśaṃ putraṃ dehi dehi māheśvarā'nagha || 73 |
iti tasyā vacaḥ śrutvā śuciṣmatyāḥ śucivrataḥ |
kṣaṇaṃ samādhimādhāya hṛdye tatsamacintayat || 74 ||
samucitaṃ yogyam || 6 9 | sulabhatvaṃ bhāvayati | astviti | yataḥ sa eva viśveśvara
eva sarvakṛt sarvakartā , atastena vyāhṛtaṃ bhaved bhaviṣyatītyanvayaḥ || 75-76 |

aho kimetayā tanvyā prārthitaṃ hyatidurlabham |
manorathapathāddūramastu vā sa hi sarvakṛt || 75 |
tenaivāsyā mukhe sthitvā vāgurūpeṇa śambhunā |
vyāhṛtaṃ ko'nyathākartumutsaheta bhavedidam || 76 |
tataḥ provāca tāṃ patnīmekapatnīvrate sthitaḥ |
viśvānaramuniḥ śrīmāniti kānte bhaviṣyati || 77 |
itthamāśvāsya tāṃ patnīṃ jagāma tapase muniḥ |
yatra viśveśvaraḥ sākṣāt kāśīnātho'dhitiṣṭhati || 78 ||
prāpya vārāṇasīṃ tūrṇaṃ dṛṣṭvā'tha maṇikarṇikām |
tatyāja tāpatritayamapi janmaśatārjitam || 7 9 |
dṛṣṭvā sarvāṇi liṅgāni viśveśvarapramukhāni ca |
snātvā sarveṣu kuṇḍeṣu vāpīkūpasaraḥsu ca || 80 ||
natvā vināyakān sarvān gaurīḥ sarvāḥ praṇamya ca |
sampūjya kālarājaśva bhairavaṃ pāpabhakṣaṇam ||| 81 |

daṇḍanāyaka mukhyāṃśca gaṇān stutvā prayatnataḥ |
ādikeśava mukhyāṃśca keśavān paritoṣya ca || || 82 ||
lolārka mukhyasūryāṃśca praṇamya ca punaḥ punaḥ |
kṛtvā piṇḍapradānāni sarvatīrtheṣvatandritaḥ || 83 |
sahasrabhojanādyaiśca yatīn viprān pratayaṃ ca |
mahāpūjopacāreśva ' liṅgānyabhyacyaṃ bhaktitaḥ || 84 |
asakṛccintayāmāsa ki liṅgaṃ triprasiddhidam |
yatra niścalatāmeti tapastanayakāmyayā || 85 |
śrīmadoṅkāranāthaṃ vā kṛttivāseśvaraṃ kimu |
kāleśaṃ vṛddhakāleśaṃ kalaśeśvarameva ca || 86 |
kedāreśaṃ tu kāmeśaṃ candreśaṃ vā trilocanam |
jyeṣṭheśaṃ jambukeśaṃ vā jaigīṣavyeśvaraṃ tu vā || 87 |
daśāśvamedhamośānaṃ drumicaṇḍeśameva ca |
dakkeśaṃ garuḍeśaṃ ca gokarṇeśaṃ gaṇeśvaram || 88 |
kṛttivāseśvaramityārṣam || 86 |
drumotyatra dumītyapi dṛśyate || 88 |

ḍhuṇḍhyāśāgaja siddhākhyaṃ dharmeśaṃ tārakeśvaram |
nandikeśaṃ nivāseśaṃ patrīśaṃ prītikeśvaram ||| 8 9 |
parvateśaṃ paśupata brahmeśaṃ madhyameśvaram |
bṛhaspatīśvaraṃ vā'tha vibhāṇḍeśvarameva ca || 9 0 |
bhārabhūteśvaraṃ kiṃ vā mahālakṣmīśvaraṃ tu vā |
marutteśaṃ tu mokṣeśaṃ gaṅgeśaṃ narmadeśvaram || 9 1 |
mārkaṇḍaṃ maṇikarṇīśaṃ ratneśvaramathāpi vā |
athavā yoginīpīṭhaṃ sādhakasyaiva siddhidam || 9 2 |
yamuneśaṃ lāṅgalīśaṃ śrīmadviśveśvaraṃ vibhum |
avimukteśvaraṃ vā'tha viśālākṣīśameva ca || 9 3 |
vyāghreśvaraṃ varāheśaṃ vyāseśaṃ vṛṣabhadhvajam |
varuṇeśaṃ vidhīśaṃ vā vasiṣṭheśaṃ śanīśvaram || 9 4 |
someśvaraṃ kimindreśaṃ svarlonaṃ saṅgameśvaram |
hariścandreśvaraṃ kiṃ vā harikeśeśvaraṃ tu vā || 9 5 |
trisandhyeśaṃ mahādevamupaśāntiśivaṃ tathā |
bhavānīśaṃ kapardīśaṃ kandukeśaṃ makheśvaram || 9 6 |
vibhāṇḍeśvaraḥ tilabhāṇḍeśvaraḥ || 9 0 |
makheśvaramitmatrājeśvaramiti vā || 9 6 |

mitrāvaruṇasaṃjñaṃ 265
vā kimeṣāmāśu putradam |
kṣaṇaṃ vicārya sa muniriti viśvānaraḥ sudhīḥ

paraṃ vīreśasadṛśaṃ na liṅgantvāśu siddhidam |
dharmadaṃ cārthadaṃ samyak kāmadaṃ mokṣadaṃ tathā || 104 |
yathā vīreśvaraṃ liṅga kāśyāṃ nānyattathā dhruvam |
pañcasvaro'tra gandharvaḥ parāṃ siddhimagāt purā || 105 |
vidyādharaḥ svacchavidyo vasupūrṇaśca yakṣarāṭ |
nṛtyantī nijabhāvena purā hyatrā'psaro varā || 106 |
sadehā kokilālāpā liṅgamadhye layaṃ gatā |
ṛṣirvedaśirā nāma japan vai śatarudriyam || 107 |
mantrajyotirmaye liṅge saśaroro'viśatpurā |
candramauli bharadvājāvubhau pāśupatottamau || 108 ||
vīreśvaraṃ samabhyarcya gāyamāno layaṃ gatau |
śaṅkhacūḍo hi nāgendraḥ svaphaṇāmaṇibhirniśi || 10 9 |
ṣaṇmāsāt siddhimagamad bahunīrājanairiha |
kinnarī haṃsapadyatra bhartrā veṇupriyeṇa vai || 110 |
svaphaṇāmaṇibhiḥ bahunīrājanairiti sambandhaḥ | 110 |

gāyantī susvaraṃ 267

ekāhāro'bhavanmāsaṃ māsaṃ nakkāśano'bhavat |

puṣpe gandho dugdhamadhye'pi sarpiryattacchambho tvaṃ tatastvāṃ prapadye || 12 ||
dekasya bahudhā bhāne dṛṣṭāntamāha | yadvaviti | apopaḥ | prati pratyap , tāsu pratyapsu | chānda-

hi jighrera ghrāṇastvaṃ vyaṅghrirāyāsi dūrāt |

no vedastvāmīśa prapadye ||130 ||

śṛṇu suśroṇi subhage vaiśvānarasamudbhavam |

sa rurodha tamadhvānamagre gatvā'tigūḍhavat || 27 ||
tadāyuṣyasya śeṣeṇa piṅgākṣo mṛgayāṃ gataḥ |

paraprāṇaguhāṃ puṃsā na siddhayeyurmanorathāḥ |

vayaṃ pānthā anāthāḥ smo viśvanāthaparāyaṇāḥ |
sanāthāstena dūraṃ sanāthatāṃ pathiko'paraḥ || 34 |

yātāyātaṃ sadā kurmaḥ sa ca dūra ito vanāt || 35 |
iti śrutvā'tha piṅgākṣo bhaṭaḥ kārpeṭikeritam |
dūrānmā bhaiṣṭa mā bhaiṣṭa bruvanniti samāgataḥ || 36 ||
tatkarmasūtrairākṛṣṭo bhillaḥ kārpaṭikapriyaḥ |
tūrṇaṃ tadāyuṣyamiva tatropasthitavān kṣaṇāt || 37 ||
ko'yaṃ ko'yaṃ durācāraḥ piṅgākṣe mayi jīvati |
ulluluṇṭhayiṣuḥ pānthān prāṇaliṅgasamānmama || 38 |

kiñca vayamiti || 35 |

tārākṣastatpitṛvyakaḥ |

gaṇāvūcatu : -
imāṃ gandhavatīṃ puṇyāṃ purīṃ vāyovilokaya |

āsīt kāmpilyanagare somayājikulodbhavaḥ |

vedavedāṅgavedārthān vedoktācāracañcuraḥ |
rājamānyo bahudhano vadānyaḥ kīrtibhājanam || 38 ||
agniśuśrūṣaṇarato vedādhyayanatatparaḥ |
tasya putro guṇanidhiścandrabimba samākṛtiḥ || || 3 9 ||
kṛtopanayanaḥ so'tha vidyāṃ jagrāha bhūriśaḥ |
atha pitrānabhijñāto dyūtakarmarato'bhavat || 40 ||
anudyamakathanīyas || 36 |
vedavedāṅgavedārthān veda jānātītyarthaḥ | aikapadyapāṭhe'rthaḥ ' spaṣṭa eva | uktācāra-
cañcuraḥ śāstroktācāreṣu dakṣaḥ | vadānyo dātā | kīrtibhājanaṃ pātram || 38 |

ādāyādāya 343
bahuśo dhanaṃ mātuḥ sakāśataḥ |
dadāti dyūtakārebhyo maitrīṃ taiśca cakāra saḥ |||

nindako vedaśāstrāṇāṃ devabrāhmaṇanindakaḥ || 42 ||
smṛtyācāravihīnastu gītavādyavinodabhāk |
naṭapākhaṇḍibhaṇḍeśva baddhapremaparamparaḥ
prerito'pi || 43 ||
jananyā sa na yāti piturantikam |

yadā yadaiva tāṃ pṛcchedaye guṇanidhiḥ sutaḥ |
na dṛśyate mayā gehe kva yāti vidadhāti kim || 45 |
tadā tadeti sā brūyādidānīṃ sa bahirgataḥ |
snātvā samarcya vai devānetāvantamanehasam || 46 ||

eka putreti tanmātā pratārayati dīkṣitam || 47 ||

na tatkarma ca tadvṛttaṃ kiśvidvetti sa dīkṣitaḥ |
sa ca keśāntakarmā'sya kṛtvā varṣe'tha ṣoḍaśe || 48 ||
gṛhyeoktena vidhānena pāṇigrāhamakārayat |
pratyahaṃ tasya jananī sutaṃ guṇanidhi mṛdu || 46 ||

ācchādayāmi te nityaṃ piturane kuceṣṭitam |
lokamānyo'sti te tātaḥ sadācārairna vai dhanaiḥ || 51 |

brāhmaṇānāṃ dhanaṃ putra sadvidyā 345
sacchrotriyāstvanūcānā sādhusaṅgamaḥ |
dīkṣitāḥ somayājinaḥ || 52 |

ūnaviṃśatiko'si 54 |
tvameṣā ṣoḍaśavārṣikī |

etāṃ 55 |
saṃvṛṇu sadvṛttāṃ pitṛbhaktiyuto bhava |

yajamānaśca sasomavatidīkṣita ityamaraḥ || 52-53 |
saṃvṛṇu varaya bhajasvetyarthaḥ || 56 | apatrapase lajjase ||| 57 |

tebhyo'pi na bibheṣi tvaṃ śuddho'syubhayavaṃśataḥ |
paśyaitān prativeśmasthān brāhmaṇānāṃ kumārakān || 58 ||
gṛhe'pi śiṣyān paśyaitān pituste vinayocitān |
rājā'pi śroṣyati yadā tava duśceṣṭitaṃ suta || 56 |
śraddhāṃ vihāya te tāteṃ vṛttilopaṃ kariṣyati |
bālaceṣṭitamevaitad vadantyadyā'pi te janāḥ || 60 |
anantaraṃ hasiṣyanti yuktaṃ dīkṣitatāstviti |
sarve'pyākṣārayiṣyanti tava vipraṃ ca māṃ ca vai || 61 ||
mātuścaritraṃ tanayo dhatte durbhāṣaṇairiti |
pitā'pi tena pāpīyān śrutismṛtipathī na kim || 62 ||

tadaṅghrilīnamanaso mama sākṣī maheśvaraḥ |
na cartusnātayā'pīha mukhaṃ dṛṣṭasya vīkṣitam || 63 |
aho balīyān sa vidhiryena jāto bhavāniti |
pratikṣaṇaṃ jananyeti śikṣyamāṇo'tidurmadaḥ || 64 ||
na tatyāja ca taddhamaṃ durbodho vyasanī yataḥ |
mṛgayāmadyapaiśunyaveśyā cauryadurodaraiḥ || 65 ||
sa pāradārairvyasanairebhiḥ ko'tra na khaṇḍitaḥ |
yadyanmadhye gṛhe paśyettattannītvā sudurmatiḥ || 66 |
arpayed dyūtakārāṇāṃ sakupyaṃ vasanādikam |
navaratnamayīṃ mātuḥ karataḥ piturūmikām || 67 ||

svapantyāstvekadā''dāya durodarikare'rpayat |
ekadā gacchatā rājabhavanānnijamudrikā || 68 |
dīkṣitena parijñātā devād dyūtakṛtaḥ kare |
uvāca dīkṣitastaṃ ca kuto labdhā tvayomikā |

mamākṣipasi viproccaiḥ kiṃ mayā cauryakarmaṇā |

na kevalaṃ mamāpyetadaṅgulīyaṃ samarpitam || 71 |
anyeṣāṃ dyūtakartṛṇāṃ bhūri tenāpitaṃ vasu |

sadṛśaḥ kaścidākṣiko bhūmimaṇḍale |

tvatputreṇa sadṛśo dyūtakāro nā'bhūdastīti cediti śeṣaḥ | ato durodaraśiromaṇirdyūta-

vyagrā'smi devapūjārthamupahārādikarmaṇi |

dīkṣita uvāca -
haṃho satputrajanani nityaṃ satyaprabhāṣiṇi |

kva yāmi karavāṇi kim |

naivedyaṃ sa tadā''dātuṃ garbhāgāraṃ viśeśa ha | 102 |

tataḥ pakvānnamādāya tvaritaṃ gacchato bahiḥ |

tāvat pāriṣadāḥ prāptāḥ kiṅkirṇījālamālitam |
divyaṃ vimānamādāya taṃ netuṃ śūlapāṇayaḥ || 108 ||

avādi praṇatairitthaṃ durvṛtto'yaṃ gaṇā dvijaḥ || 106 ||

āstāṃ dūre'sya karmāṇi śivanirmālyahārakaḥ |

śivanirmālyabhoktāraḥ śivanirmālyalaṅghakāḥ |

kiṅkiṇījālamālitam kṣudraghaṇṭikānivahajātamālamityarthaḥ | śūlapāṇayaḥ rudra-

viṣamāloḍya vā peyaṃ śreyo vā'naśanaṃ param |
sevitavyaṃ śivasvaṃ na prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatairapi || 113 ||

asti ceddharmaleśo'sya gaṇāstacchṛṇumo vayam || 114 ||
itthaṃ tadvākyamākarṇya procuḥ pāriṣadāstataḥ |

sthūlalakṣyaiḥ kathaṃ lakṣyā'lakṣyā ye sūkṣmadṛṣṭibhiḥ |

tatrttāhi || 114 ||

aparo'pi paro dharmo jātastatrā'sya kiṅkarāḥ |

upoṣitena bhūtāyāmanena sthiracetasā || 116 ||

eṣa dvijavaro dūtā yūyaṃ yāta yathāgatāḥ || 120 |

arindamasya tanayaḥ kaliṅgādhipaterdamaḥ || 121 |

śivālayeṣu sarveṣu dīpadānādṛte dvija |
grāmādhīśān samāhūya sarvān svaviṣayasthitān || 123 ||

bhaktena vihitā pūjā anena nirīkṣitā bhūtāyāṃ caturdaśyām || 11 9 |

itthamājñāpayāmāsa sa me daṇḍyo bhaviṣyati |
yasya yasyābhito grāmaṃ yāvantaśca śivālayāḥ ||| 124 |

purā vipra brahmaṇo mānasātsutāt |

bhaktiprabhāvaṃ vijñāya śambhostaddīpamātrataḥ |

śivaikadaśamudbodhya cittaratnapradīpakam |

yadvā bhaktānāṃ phalasecanānmegho vṛṣastadvāhanatvād | yadvā secanatṛpti sāmyānmegho
varastaṃ prāpayatīti meghavāhanaḥ | yadvā aṣṭamūrtitvātsūryarūpeṇāvahādimeghān prāpayatīti |
yadvā meghavāhana iti brahmaṇaḥ kalpaviśeṣasya nāma | tathā coktaṃ leṅge– -
bhavodbhavastapaścaiva bhavyārambhaḥ punaḥ punaḥ |
ṛturvahnirhavyavāhaḥ sāvitrastuta eva ca ||

ṛṣabhaśca tathā padmo gāndhārī yaśca madhyagaḥ ||
verājo ve niṣādaśca mukhyo vai meghavāhanaḥ |
pañcamaścitrakaścaiva ākṛtistāna eva ca ||
manaśca darśo bṛṃhaśca tathā vai śvetalohitaḥ |
raktaśca pītavāsāśva asitaḥ sarvarūpakaḥ ||
evaṃ kalpāstu saṃkhyātā brahmaṇo vyaktajanmanaḥ | iti |
yajñadattasyāpatyaṃ yājñadattirgaṇa nidhirityarthaḥ | śrīdo nidhipatitvāt sampattitvāt

tapo'gniparibṛṃhitam |

mayā sakhyaṃ ca te nityaṃ vatsyāmi ca tavāntike |
alakāṃ niṣakā mitra tava prītivivṛddhaye || 157 ||
āgaccha pādayorasyāḥ pata te jananī tviyam |
iti dattvā varān devaḥ punarāha śivāṃ śivaḥ |
prasādaṃ kuru deveśi tapasvinyaṅgaje'tra vai || 158 |
devyuvāca -
vatsa te niścalā bhaktirbhave bhavatu sarvadā |
bhavaikapiṅgo netreṇa vāmena sphuṭitena ha || 156 ||
devena dattā ye tubhyaṃ varāḥ santu tathaiva te |
kubero bhava nāmnā tvaṃ mama rūperṣyayā suta || 160 |
tvayedaṃ sthāpitaṃ liṅga tava nāmnā bhaviṣyati |
siddhidaṃ sādhakānāṃ ca sarvapāpaharaṃ param || 161 |
nikaṣāmitra nikaṣā rākṣasajātīnāṃ mātā , tasyā mitra | yadvā alakā nikaṣā ,
alakāyāḥ samīpe prītivivṛddhaye prītyatiśayārtham | prīti vivardhayanniti kvacit || 157 ||
ekapiṅgaḥ ekaṃ netraṃ piṅgaṃ sphuṭitaṃ yasya saḥ || 15 9 |
kutsito beraḥ śarīraṃ yasyeti kuberaḥ || 160 |

na dhanena viyujyeta na saṃkhyā na ca bāndhavaiḥ |
kubereśvaraliṅgasya kuryādyo darśanaṃ naraḥ ||162 ||
viśveśādakṣiṇe bhāge kubereśaṃ samarcayet |
naro lipyeta no pāpairna dāridrayeṇa no'sukhaiḥ ||163 ||
iti datvā varān devo devyā saha maheśvaraḥ |
dhanadāyāviveśā'tha dhāma vaiśveśvaraṃ param ||164 ||
gaṇāvūcatuḥ -
itthaṃ sakhitvaṃ śrīśambhoḥ prāpaiṣa dhanadaḥ param |
alakāṃ nikaṣā caiva kailāsaḥ śaṅkarālayaḥ ||165 ||
sakhyā mitreṇa || 162 |
veśveśvaraṃ svasvarūpamānandavanaṃ vā kailāsaṃ vā || 164 ||

yacchrutvā sarvapāpebhyo naro mucyedasaṃśayam ||166 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe gandhavatyalakāvarṇanaṃ nāma trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||13 ||
yakṣeśvarāṇāmiti pūjāyāṃ bahuvacanam | yakṣāśca tadīśvarāśca teṣāmiti vā |
kalpabhedāpekṣayā vā || 166 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ trayodaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 13 |

atha caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ
gaṇāvūcatuḥ— mahodayā |
alakāyāḥ puro bhāge pureśānī
asyāṃ vasanti satataṃ rudrabhaktāstapodhanāḥ ||1 ||
śivasmaraṇasaṃsaktāḥ śivavrataparāyaṇāḥ |
śivasātkṛtakarmāṇaḥ śivapūjāratāḥ sadā ||2 ||
sābhilāṣāstapasyanti svarga bhogo'stvitīha naḥ |
te'tra rudrapure ramye rudrarūpadharā narāḥ ||3 ||
ajaikapādahirbudhnyamukhyā ekādaśā'pi vai |
rudrāḥ parivṛḍhāścātra triśūlodyatapāṇayaḥ ||4 ||
caturdaśe'tra varṇyate loko dvāvati sundarī |
īśānasya tathā tathā caiva caiva candrasyā'mṛtadīdhiteḥ || 1 |
kramaprāptāmaiśānīṃ purīṃ darśayato'lakāyā iti || 1 |
śivasātkṛtaṃ śive samarpitaṃ sakalaṃ karma yaiste śivasātkṛtakarmāṇaḥ | śivasatkṛta-
karmāṇa iti pāṭhe'pi sa evārthaḥ || 2 |

puryaṣṭakaṃ ca duṣṭebhyo devadhrugbhyo hyavanti te |
prayacchanti varānnityaṃ śivabhaktajane varāḥ ||5 ||
etairapi tapastaptaṃ prāpya vārāṇasīṃ purīm |
īśāneśaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ paristhāpya subhapradam || 6 |
īśāneśaprasādena diśyeśyāṃ hi digīśvarāḥ |
ekādaśāpyekacarā jaṭāmukuṭamaṇḍitāḥ ||7 ||
bhālanetrā nīlagalāḥ śuddhāṅgā vṛṣabhadhvajāḥ |
asaṃkhyātāḥ sahasrāṇi ye rudrā adhibhūtalam || 8 |
te'syāṃ puri vasantyaiśyāṃ sarvabhogasamṛddhayaḥ |
īśāneśaṃ samabhyarcya kāśyāṃ deśāntareṣvapi || 6 ||
vipannāstena puṇyena jāyante'tra purohitāḥ |
aṣṭamyāṃ ca caturdaśyāmīśāneśaṃ yajanti ye ||10 ||
devebhyo druhyanti ye devadruhastebhyo devadhrugbhyaḥ | varāḥ śreṣṭhāḥ | janāvanā iti

ta eva rudrā vijñeyā ihāmutrā'pyasaṃśayam |
kṛtvā jāgaraṇaṃ rātrāvīśāneśvarasannidhau ||11 ||
upoṣya bhūtāṃ yāṃ kāśvina naro garbhabhāk punaḥ |
svargamārge kathāmitthaṃ śṛṇvan viṣṇugaṇoditām ||12 ||
śivaśarmā divā'pyuccairapaśyaccandracandrikām |
āhlādayantīṃ bahuśaḥ samaṃ sarvendriyairmanaḥ ||13 ||
camatkṛtya camatkṛtya ko'yaṃ loko harergaṇau |
papraccha śivaśarmā tau procatustaṃ ca tau dvijam ||14 |
gaṇāvūcatuḥ - - kalānidheḥ |
śivaśarman mahābhāga loka eṣa
pīyūṣavarṣibhiryasya karairāpyāyyate jagat ||15 ||
pitā somasya bho vipra jajñe'trirbhagavānṛṣiḥ |
brahmaṇo mānasāt pūrvaṃ prajāsagaṃ vidhitsataḥ ||16
bhūtāṃ caturdaśīm || 12 |

anuttaraṃ nāma tapo yena taptaṃ hi tatpurā |
trīṇi varṣasahasrāṇi divyānītīha nau śrutam ||17 ||
ūrdhvamācakrame tasya retaḥ somatvamīyivat |
netrābhyāṃ tacca susrāva daśadhādyotayaddiśaḥ || 18 |
taṃ garbhaṃ vidhinādiṣṭā daśa devyo dadhustataḥ |
sametya dhārayāmāsurnaiva tāḥ samaśaknuvan ||16 ||
yadā na dhāraṇe śaktāstasya garbhasya tā viśaḥ |
tatastābhiḥ sajūḥ somo nipapāta vasundharām ||20
patitaṃ somamālokya brahmā lokapitāmahaḥ |
rathamāropayāmāsa lokānāṃ hitakāmyayā ||21 ||
tadanuttaraṃ tapa ini sambandhaḥ | na vidyate uttaramadhikaṃ yasmāttadanuttaraṃ sarvotkṛṣṭa-

sa tena rathamukhyena sāgarāntāṃ vasundharām |
triḥsaptakṛtvo duhiṇaśvakārāmuṃ pradakṣiṇam ||22 ||
tasya yasskhalitaṃ tejaḥ pṛthivīmanvapadyata |
tathaiauṣadhyaḥ samudbhūtā yābhiḥ sandhāryate jagat ||23 ||
sa labdhatejā bhagavān brahmaṇā vadhitaḥ svayam |
tapastepe mahābhāga padmānāṃ daśatīrdaśa ||24 ||
avimuktaṃ samāsādya kṣetraṃ paramapāvanam |
saṃsthāpya liṅgamamṛtaṃ candraśākhyaṃ svanāmataḥ || 25
bījauṣadhīnāṃ toyānāṃ rājā'bhūdagrajanmanām |
' prasādāddevadevasya viśveśasya pinākinaḥ || 26 ||
tatra kūpaṃ vidhāyaikamamṛtodamiti smṛtam |
yasyāmbupānasnānābhyāṃ naro'jñānātpramucyate ||27 ||

yo dhṛtaḥ svayam |
ādāya tāṃ kalāmekāṃ jagatsaṃjīvanīṃ parām
paścāddakṣeṇa śapto'pi || 28 |
māsone kṣayamāpya ca |
āpyāyyate'sau kalayā punareva tayā śaśī
sa tatprāpya mahārājyaṃ somaḥ somavatāṃ varaḥ |
rājasūyaṃ samāja he sahasraśatadakṣiṇam || 30 |
dakṣiṇāmadadat somastron lokāniti nau śrutam |
tebhyo brahmaṣamukhyebhyaḥ sadasyebhyaśca bho dvija ||31 ||
hiraṇyagarbho brahmā'trirbhṛguryatratvijo'bhavan |
sabasyo'bhūddharistatra munibhirbahubhirvṛtaḥ || 32 ||

taṃ sinī ca kuścaiva dyutiḥ puṣṭiḥ prabhāvasuḥ |
kīrtirdhṛtiśca lakṣmīśca navadevyaḥ siṣevire ||33 ||
umayā sahitaṃ rudraṃ santarpyāvarakarmaṇā |
prāpa soma iti khyāti dattāṃ somena śambhunā || 34 ||
tatraiva taptavān somastapaḥ paramaduṣkaram |
tatraiva rājasūyaṃ ca cakre candreśvarāgrataḥ || 35 ||
tatraiva brāhmaṇaiḥ prītairityukto'sau kalānidhiḥ |
somo'smākaṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ rājā trailokyadakṣiṇaḥ | 36 |
tatraiva devadevasya vilocanapadaṃ gataḥ |
devena prītamanasā trailokyāhlādahetave ||37 ||
tvaṃ mamāsya parāmūrtirityuktastattapobalāt |
jagattavodayaṃ prāpya bhaviṣyati sukhodayam || 38 |
sinī sinīvālī || 33 | somanāma nirvakti | umayeti | 34 | tatraivā'vimukte

tvatpīyūṣa mayairhastaiḥ 377
spṛṣṭametaccarācaram |
bhānutāpaparītaṃ ca parāṃ glāni vihāsyati ||36
etaduktvā ' maheśāno varānanyānadānmudā
dvijarājatapastaptaṃ |
yadatyugraṃ tvayā'tra vai || 40 ||
yacca kratukriyotsargastvayā mahyaṃ niveditaḥ |
sthāpitaṃ yattvidaṃ liṅgaṃ mama candreśvarābhidham ||41 ||
tato'tra liṅga tvannāmni soma somārdharūpadhṛk |
pratimāsaṃ pañcadaśyāṃ śuklāyāṃ sarvago'pyaham ||42 ||
ahorātraṃ vasiṣyāmi trailokyaiśvaryasaṃyutaḥ |
tato'tra pūrṇimāyāntu kṛtā svalpā'pi satkriyā ||43 ||
tvattava | hasteḥ kare raśmibhiriti yāvat | parītaṃ vyāptam || 3 9 | yadyataḥ |
evamagre'pi || 40 ||
yaccetyatra yatreti kvacit pāṭho dṛśyate , tadā tvayā'tra tapastaptamityuktam | atra

japahomārcana dhyānadāna brāhmaṇabhojanam
mahāpūjā ca sā nūnaṃ mama prītyai bhaviṣyati ||44 ||
jīrṇoddhārādikaraṇaṃ nṛtyavādyādikārpaṇam |
dhvajāropaṇakarmādi tapasviyatitarpaṇam ||45 ||
candreśvare kṛtaṃ sarvaṃ tadānantyāya jāyate |
anyacca te pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu guhyaṃ kalānidhe || 46 ||
abhaktāya ca nākhyeyaṃ nāstikāya śrutidruhe |
amāvāsyā yadā soma jāyate somavāsare ||47 ||
tadopavāsaḥ kartavyo bhūtāyāṃ sadbhirādarāt |
kṛtanityakriyaḥ soma trayodaśyāṃ niśāmaya ||48 |
śanipradoṣe sampūjya liṅgaṃ candreśvarāhvayam |
naktaṃ kṛtvā trayodaśyāṃ niyamaṃ parigṛhya ca ||4 9 ||
satkriyāmeva darśayati japahometi || 44 |
arpaṇaṃ viśveśvare samarpaṇam | kāraṇamiti pāṭhe karaṇamityarthaḥ || 45 ||
śruti vedanindakāya || 47 ||
bhūtāyāṃ caturdaśyām || 48 ||

kṛtvā jāgaraṇaṃ niśi |
prātaḥ somakuhūyoge snātvā candrodavāribhiḥ || 50
upāsya sandhyāṃ vidhivat kṛtasarvodakakriyaḥ |
upacandrodatīrtheṣu śrāddhaṃ vidhivadācaret || 51 |
āvāhanārghyarahitaṃ piṇḍān dadyātprayatnataḥ |
vasurudrāditisutasvarūpapuruṣatrayam
mātāmahāṃstathoddiśya ||52 |
tathā'nyānapi gotrajān |
guruśvaśurabandhūnāṃ nāmānyuccārya piṇḍadaḥ || 53 ||
kurvañchrāddhaṃ ca tīrthe'smin śraddhayoddharate'khilān |
gayāyāṃ piṇḍadānena yathā tuṣyanti pūrvajāḥ ||54 ||
tathā candrodakuṇḍe'tra śrāddhaistṛpyanti pūrvajāḥ |
gayāyāṃ ca yathā mucyet sarvarṇāt pitṛjānnaraḥ ||55 |
vasurudrāditi suteti aśraddhāmalakṣālanāya pitrāditrayāṇāṃ vasvādirūpa -
kathanam || 52 ||
sarvarṇāt sampūrṇādṛṇāt | kṣaṇātpitṛkṛtāditi kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 55 |

tathā pramucyate carṇāccandrode piṇḍadānataḥ |
yadā candreśvaraṃ draṣṭuṃ yāyāt ko'pi narottamaḥ ||56 ||
tadā nṛtyanti muditāstatpūrva prapitāmahāḥ |
ayaṃ candrodatorthe'smistarpaṇaṃ naḥ kariṣyati ||57 ||
asmākaṃ mandabhāgyatvād yadi naiva kariṣyati |
tadā tattīrtha saṃsparśādasmattṛptirbhaviṣyati ||58 ||
spṛśenāpi yadā mandastadā drakṣyati tṛptaye |
evaṃ śrāddhaṃ vidhāyā'tha spṛṣṭrā candreśvaraṃ vratī |
santarpya viprāṃśva yatīn kuryādvai pāraṇaṃ tataḥ ||56 |
evaṃ vrate kṛte kāśyāṃ sadarśe somavāsare |
bhavedṛṇatrayānmukto mṛgāṅka madanugrahāt ||60 ||
spṛṣṭvā sparśanaṃ kṛtvā | dṛṣṭveti kecit || 5 9 |

atra yātrā mahācaitryāṃ kāryā kṣetranivāsibhiḥ
tārakajñānalābhāya kṣetra vighnanivartanī ||61
candreśvaraṃ samabhyarcya yadyanyatrā'pi saṃsthitaḥ |
aghaughapaṭaloṃ bhittvā somalokamavāpsyati || 62 ||
kalau candreśamahimā nābhāgyairavagamyate |
anyacca te pravakṣyāmi paraṃ guhyaṃ niśāpate || 63 ||
siddhayogīśvaraṃ poṭhametatsādhakasiddhidam |
surāsureṣu gandharvanāgavidyādhareṣvapi || 64 ||
rakṣoguhyakayakṣeṣu kinnareṣu nareṣu ca |
saptakoṭyastu siddhānāmatra siddhā mamāprataḥ || 65 ||
ṣaṇmāsaṃ niyatāhāro dhyāyan viśveśvarīmiha |
candreśvarārcanāyātān siddhān paśyati so'gragān ||66 ||
mahācaitryāṃ caitramāsodbhavāyāṃ mahāpūrṇimāyāṃ citrānakṣatrayuktāyāmityarthaḥ || 61 ||

siddhayogīśvarī sākṣādvaradā tasya jāyate |
tavā'pi mahatī siddhiḥ siddhayogīśvarīkṣaṇāt || 67 ||
santi pīṭhānyanekāni kṣitau sādhakasiddhaye |
paraṃ yogīśvarīpīṭhād bhūpṛṣṭhe nāśu siddhidam || 68 |
yatra candreśvaraṃ liṅga tvayedaṃ sthāpitaṃ śaśin |
idameva hi tatpīṭhamadṛśyamakṛtātmabhiḥ || 66 ||
jitakāmā jitakrodhā jitalobhaspṛhāsmitāḥ |
yogośvarīṃ prapaśyanti mama śakti parāṃ hitām ||70 ||
ye tu pratyaṣṭami janāstathā praticaturdaśi |
siddha yogīśvarīpīṭhe pūjayiṣyanti bhāvitāḥ || 71 ||
adṛṣṭarūpāṃ subhagāṃ piṅgalāṃ sarvasiddhidām |
dhūpanaivedya dīpādyaisteṣāmāvirbhaviṣyati ||72 ||

iti datvā varān śambhustasmai 383
candramase dvija |
antarhito maheśānastatra vaiśveśvare pure
tadārabhya ||73 ||
ca loke'smin dvijarājo'dhipo'bhavat |
diśo vitimirāḥ kurvannijeḥ prasṛmaraiḥ karaiḥ ||74
somavāravratakṛtaḥ somapānaratā narāḥ |
somaprabheṇa yānena somalokaṃ vasanti hi ||75 ||
candreśvarasamutpatti tathā cāndramasaṃ tapaḥ |
yaḥ śroṣyati naro bhaktyā candraloke sa ijyate ||76 ||
agastiruvāca -
śivaśarmaṇi śarmakāriṇīṃ pathi divye śramahāriṇīṃ gaṇau |
kathayantau ' tu kathāmimāṃ śubhāmuḍulokaṃ parijagmatustataḥ ||77 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe somalokavarṇanaṃ
nāma caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 14 ||
śreṣṭhaḥ || 74 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ caturdaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 14 ||

agastya bole- kalyāṇakāriṇī saphala-

atha pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ
agastiruvāca—
śṛṇu patni mahābhāge lopāmudre sadharmiṇi |
kathāṃ viṣṇugaṇābhyāṃ ca kathitāṃ śivaśamaṃṇe || 1 ||
śivaśarmovāca-
aho gaṇau vicitreyaṃ śrutā cāndramasī kathā |
uḍulokakathāṃ khyātaṃ viṣvagākhyānakovidau || 2 ||
gaṇāvūcatu : -
purā sisṛkṣataḥ sṛṣṭi sraṣṭuraṅguṣṭhapṛṣṭhataḥ |
dakṣaḥ prajāvinirmāṇe dakṣo jātaḥ prajāpatiḥ || 3 |
pañcādhike daśe cātra loko nākṣatrasaṃjñakaḥ |
tathā'tiramyo loko'tra budhasyāpi nigadyate || 1 ||
uḍulokakathāṃ kathayituṃ bhāryāṃ sāvadhānayati | śṛṇu patnīti || 1 |

ṣaṣṭirduhitarastasya tapolāvaṇyabhūṣaṇāḥ |
sarvalāvaṇyarohiṇyo rohiṇīpramukhāḥ śubhāḥ || 4 ||
tābhistaptvā tapastīvraṃ prāpya vaiśveśvarīṃ purīm |
ārādhito mahādevaḥ somaḥ somavibhūṣaṇaḥ || 5 |
yadā tuṣṭo'yamīśāno ' dātuṃ varamathāyayau |
uvāca ca prasannātmā yācadhvaṃ varamuttamam || 6 ||
śambhorvākyamathākarṇya ūcustāśca kumārikāḥ |
yadi deyo varo'smākaṃ varayogyāḥ sma śaṅkara || 7 |
bhavato'pi mahādeva bhavatāpaharo hi yaḥ |
rūpeṇa bhavatā tulyaḥ sa no bhartā bhavatviti || 8 |
tapo viṣaye yallāvaṇyaṃ prāvīṇyaṃ sabhūṣaṇaṃ yāsāṃ tāstathā | rūpalāvaṇyeti

sumahanakṣatreśvarasaṃjñitam |
varaṇāyāstaṭe ramye saṅgameśvarasannidhau || 6 |
divyaṃ varṣasahasrantu puruṣāyitasaṃjñitam |
tapastaptaṃ mahattābhiḥ puruṣairapi duṣkaram || 10 ||
tatastuṣṭo hi viśveśo vyataradvaramuttamam |
sarvāsāmekapatnīnāmekatra sthiracetasām || 11 |
śrīviśveśvara uvāca—
na kṣāntaṃ hi tapo'tyugrametadanyābhirīdṛśam |
purā'balābhistasmādvo nāma nakṣatramatra vai || 12 ||
puruṣātisaṃjñena taptaṃ yattapasā'dhunā |
bhavatībhistataḥ puṃstvamicchayā vo bhaviṣyati || 13 ||
puruṣāyita saṃjñitaṃ puruṣavadācaritaṃ puruṣāyitaṃ puruṣeryādṛśaṃ tapo'nuṣṭhīyate , tādṛśa-

jyotiścakre samaste'sminnagragaṇyā bhaviṣyatha |
meṣādīnāṃ ca rāśīnāṃ yonayo yūyamuttamāḥ || 14 ||
oṣadhīnāṃ sudhāyāśca brāhmaṇānāṃ ca yaḥ patiḥ |
patimatyo bhavatyo'pi tena patyā śubhānanāḥ || 15 |
bhavatīnāmidaṃ liṅga nakṣatreśvarasaṃjñitam |
pūjayitvā naro gantā bhavatīlokamuttamam ||| 16 |
upariṣṭānmṛgāṅkasya loko vastu bhaviṣyati |
sarvāsāṃ tārakāṇāṃ ca madhye mānyā bhaviṣyatha ||| 17 |
nakṣatrapūjakā ye ca nakṣatravratacāriṇaḥ |
te vo loke vasiṣyanti nakṣatrasadṛśaprabhāḥ || 18 |
sakṣatragraharāśīnāṃ bādhāsteṣāṃ kadācana |
na bhaviṣyanti ye kāśyāṃ nakṣatreśvaravīkṣakāḥ || 1 9 |

agastya uvāca --
atithitvamavāpa netrayorbudhalokaḥ śivaśarmaṇastvatha |
gaṇayorbhagaṇasya saṃkathāṃ kathayitroriti viṣṇucetasoḥ
śivaśarmovāca- || 20 ||
kasya loko'yamatulo brūtaṃ śrībhagavadgaṇau |
pīyūṣabhānoriva me manaḥ prīṇayatetarām || 21 ||
gaṇāvūcatuḥ --
śivaśarman śṛṇu kathāmetāṃ pāpāpahāriṇīm |
svargamārgavinodāya tāpatrayavināśinīm || 22 |
yo'sau pūrvaṃ mahākāntirāvābhyāṃ parirvāṇataḥ |
sāmrājyapadamāpanno dvijarājastavāgrataḥ || 23 ||

dakṣiṇā rājasūyasya yena tribhuvanaṃ kṛtā | |
tapastatāpa yo'tyugraṃ padmānāṃ daśatīrdaśa || 24 ||
atrinetrasamudbhūtaḥ pautro vai druhiṇasya yaḥ |
nāthaḥ sarvoṣadhīnāṃ ca jyotiṣāṃ patireva ca || 25 |
nirmalānāṃ kalānāṃ ca śevadhiryaśva gīyate |
udyan paropatāpaṃ yaḥ svakarairgalahastayet || 26 |
mudaṃ kumudinīnāṃ yastanoti jagatā saha |
digvadhūcāruśṛṅgāradarśanādarśamaṇḍalaḥ ||| 27 |
kimanyairguṇasambhārairato'pi na samaṃ vidhoḥ |
nijottamāṅga sarvajñaḥ kalāṃ yasyāvataṃsayet || 28 ||
druhiṇasya brahmaṇaḥ || 25 |

purohitasyāpi |
gurorbhrāturāṅgirasasya vai || 26 ||
jahāra tarasā tārāṃ rūpavān rūpaśālinīm |
vāryamāṇo'pi gīrvāṇairbahudevarṣibhiḥ
nā'yaṃ punaḥ || 30 ||
kalānidherdoṣo dvijarājasya tasya vai |
hitvā trinetraṃ kāmena kasya no khaṇḍitaṃ manaḥ || 31 |
dhvāntametadabhitaḥ prasāri yattacchamāya vidhinā vinirmitam
dīpabhāskarakarā |
mahauṣadhaṃ nādhipatyatamasastu kiśvana ||32 ||

ādhipatyamadamohitaṃ hitaṃ śaṃsitaṃ spṛśati no harehitam |
durjanaṃ vihitatīrthamajjaneḥ śuddhadhīriva viruddhamānasam || 33 |
dhigdhigetadadhikaddhiceṣṭitaṃ caṃkramekṣaṇavilakṣitaṃ yataḥ |

tacchamāya nāśāya vidhinā mahad auṣadhaṃ vinirmitam | kiṃ tanmahauṣadhamityākāṅkṣāyā-

mahātmanā |
tena brahmaśiro nāma paramāstraṃ
utsṛṣṭaṃ devadevāya tena tannāśitaṃ tataḥ || 38 |
tayostadyuddhamabhavad ghoraṃ vai tārakāmayam |
tatastvakāṇḍabrahmāṇḍabhaṅgād bhīto'bhavad vidhiḥ || 3 9 ||
nivārya rudraṃ samarāt saṃvartānalavarcasam |
dadāvāṅgirase tārāṃ svayameva pitāmahaḥ || 40 |
athā'ntargarbhamālokya tārāṃ prāha bṛhaspatiḥ |
madīyāyāṃ na te yonau garbho dhāryaḥ kathañcana || 41 ||

garbhaṃ sā cotsasarja ha |
jātamātraḥ sa bhagavān devānāmākṣipad vapuḥ || 42
tataḥ saṃśayamāpannāstārāmūcuḥ surottamāḥ |
satyaṃ brūhi sutaḥ kasya somasyā'tha bṛhaspateḥ || 43 ||
pṛcchamānā yadā devairnāha tārā'ti satrapā |
tadā sā śaptumārabdhā kumāreṇā'titejasā || 44 |
taṃ nivārya tadā brahmā tārāṃ prapaccha saṃśayam |
provāca prāñjaliḥ sā taṃ somasyeti pitāmaham || 45
tadā sa mūrkyupāghrāya rājā garbha prajāpatiḥ |
budha ityakaronnāma tasya bālasya dhīmataḥ || 46 ||
iṣīkāstambamatyucchritatṛṇa viśeṣaguccham | aiṣīkāstramathādāyeti pāṭha-

tataśva sarvadevebhyastejorūpabalādhikaḥ |
budhaḥ somaṃ samāpṛcchya tapase kṛtaniścayaḥ || 47 ||
jagāmakāśīṃ nirvāṇarāśi viśveśapālitām |
tatra liṅgaṃ pratiṣṭhāpya sa svanāmnā budheśvaram || 48 ||
tapaścacāra cātyugramugraṃ saṃśīlayan hṛdi |
varṣāṇāmayutaṃ bālo bālendutilakaṃ śivam ||| 46 |
tato viśvapatiḥ śrīmān viśveśo viśvabhāvanaḥ |
budheśvarānmahāliṅgādāvirāsīnmahodayaḥ || 50 ||
uvāca ca prasannātmā jyotīrūpo maheśvaraḥ |
varaṃ brūhi mahābuddhe budhānyavibudhottamaḥ || 51 |
tavā'nenā'titapasā liṅgasaṃśīlanena ca |
prasanno'smi mahāsaumya nādeyaṃ tvayi vidyate || 52 |
nirvāṇarāśi kevalyapuñjām || 48 |
ugraṃ viśveśvaraṃ saṃśīlayan cintayan | ayutaṃ daśasahasram || 4 9 ||

avagrahaparimlānasasyasañjīvanopamam
unmīlya locane yāvat || 53 |
puraḥ paśyati bālakaḥ |
tāvalliṅge dadarśātha tryambakaṃ śaśiśekharam || 54 |
budha uvāca-
namaḥ pūtātmane tubhyaṃ jyotīrūpa namo'stu te |
viśvarūpa namastubhyaṃ rūpātītāya te namaḥ || 55 |
namaḥ sarvārtināśāya praṇatānāṃ śivātmane |
sarvajñāya namastubhyaṃ sarvakartre namo'stu te || 56 |

kṛpālave namastubhyaṃ bhaktigamyāya te namaḥ |
phaladātre ca tapasāṃ taporūpāya te namaḥ ||| 57 |
śambho śiva śivākānta śānta śrīkaṇṭha śūlabhṛt |
śaśiśekhara śarveśa śaṅkareśvara dhūrjaṭe || 58 | ||
miti smṛteḥ sarvaṃ jānātīti sarvaśvāsau jñaśceti vā sarvajñaḥ svādhyastaṃ sarvamavabhāsaya-

śitikaṇṭha sadāśiva |
mahādeva namastubhyaṃ devadeva namo'stu te || 56 |
stuti katu na jānāmi stutipriya maheśvara |
tava pādāmbujadvandve nirdvandvā bhaktirastu me || 60 |
ayameva varo nātha prasanno'si yadīśvara |
nā'nyaṃ varaṃ vṛṇe tvattaḥ karuṇā'mṛtavāridhe ||| 61
tataḥ prāha maheśānastatstutyā paritoṣitaḥ |
rohiṇeya mahābhāga saumyasaumyavaconidhe || 62 ||
nakṣatralokādupari tava loko bhaviṣyati |
madhye sarvagrahāṇāṃ ca saparyāṃ lapsyase parām || 63 ||

tvayedaṃ sthāpitaṃ liṅga sarveṣāṃ buddhidāyakam |
durbuddhiharaṇaṃ saumya tvallokavasatipradam ||| 64 |
ityuktvā bhagavān śambhustatraivāntaradhīyata |
budhaḥ svarloka magamaddevadevaprasādataḥ || 65 |
gaṇāvūcatu : -
kāśyāṃ budheśvarasamarca nalabdhabuddhiḥ
saṃsārasindhumadhigamya naro hyagādham |
majjenna sajjanavilocanacandrakāntiḥ
kāntānanastvadhivasecca budhe'tra loke || 66 |
candreśvarāt pūrvabhāge dṛṣṭvā liṅga budheśvaram |
na buddhayā hīyate janturantakāle'pi jātucit || 67 |
buddhidāyakaṃ jñānakārakam | buddhivardhanamiti kvacit || 64 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 15 ||

gaṇau yāvatkathāmitthaṃ 401
cakrāte budhalokagām |
tāvadvimānaṃ samprāptaṃ śukralokamanuttamam

nāma pañcadaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 15 ||

|| atha ṣoḍaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
gaṇāvūcatuḥ - śukraloko'yamadbhutaḥ |
śivaśarman mahābuddhe
dānavānāṃ ca daityānāṃ gururatra vasetkaviḥ || 1 |
potvā varṣasahasraṃ vai kaṇadhūmaṃ suduḥsaham |
yaḥ prāptavān mahāvidyāṃ mṛtyusañjīvanīṃ harāt || 2 ||
imāṃ vidyāṃ na jānāti devācāryo'tiduṣkarām |
ṛte mṛtyuñjayāt skandāt pārvatyā gajavaktrataḥ ||3 ||
śivaśarmovāca-
ko'sau śukra iti khyāto yasyā'yaṃ loka uttamaḥ |
kathaṃ tena ca vidyāptā mṛtyusañjīvanī harāt || 4 ||
ṣoḍaśe jīvasadratnaṃ puravayaṃ nirūpyate |
bhārgavasyāsurendrāṇāṃ guroratulatejasaḥ || 1 |
kramaprāptaṃ bhṛgulokaṃ varṇayataḥ | śivaśamaṃtriti || 1 | kaṇāḥ kaṇḍitāstandulatuṣā-
stajjanyaṃ dhūmaṃ kaṇadhūmam || 2 | duṣkarāṃ duṣprāpyām | vākpatiśceti kacit || 3-4 |

tatastau smāhaturdevī |
śukrasya paramāṃ kathām || 5 ||
yāṃ śrutvā cā s pamṛtyubhyo hoyante śraddhayā yutāḥ |
bhūtapretapiśācebhyo na bhayaṃ cāpi jāyate ' || 6 |
ājau pravartamānāyāmandhakāndhakavairiṇoḥ |
anirbhedya girivyūhavajjravyūhādhināthayoḥ || 7 |
apasṛtya tato yuddhādandhakaḥ śukrasannidhim |
adhigamya babhāṣedamavaruhya rathāttataḥ
bhagavaṃstvāmupāśritya || 8 |
vayaṃ devāṃśca sānugān |
manyāmahe tṛṇaistulyān rudropendrādikānapi || 6
ācakhyātāṃ kathayatām || 5 | apamṛtyubhyo'pamaraṇebhyaḥ | pāpamṛtyubhya

kuñjarā iva siṃhebhyo garuḍebhya ivoragāḥ |
asmatto bibhyati surā guro yuṣmadanugrahāt || 10 ||
vajravyūhamanirbhedyaṃ viviśurdaityadānavāḥ |
vidhūya pramathānokaṃ hṛdaṃ tāpāditā iva || 11 |
vayaṃ tvaccharaṇaṃ bhūtvā parvatā iva niścalāḥ |
sthitvā carāma niḥśaṅkā brahmaṇendramahāhave || 12 |
āptabhāvena na vayaṃ pādau tava sukhapradau |
sadārāḥ sasutāścaiva śuśrūṣāmo divāniśam || 13 ||
abhirakṣā'bhimato vipra prasannaḥ śaraṇāgatān |
paśya huṇḍaṃ tuhuṇḍaṃ ca kujambhaṃ jaṃbhameva ca || 14 ||
pārka kārtasvanaṃ caiva vipākaṃ pākahāriṇam |
taṃ candradamanaṃ śūraṃ śūrāmaravidāraṇam || 15 ||

sūditān patitāṃścaiva drāviḍairiva candanān
yā pītvā || 16 |
kaṇadhūmaṃ vai sahasraṃ śaradāṃ purā |
varā vidyā tvayā prāptā tasyāḥ kālo'yamāgataḥ || 17
atha vidyāphalaṃ ||
tatte daityān sañjīvayiṣyataḥ |
paśyantu pramathāḥ sarve tvayā sañjīvitānimān || 18 ||
ityandhakavacaḥ śrutvā sthiradhīrbhārgavo muniḥ |
kiñcitsmitaṃ tadā kṛtvā dānavādhipamabravīt ||
dānavādhipate 16 ||
savaṃ tathyaṃ yadbhāṣitaṃ tvayā |
vidyopārjanametaddhi dānavāthaṃ mayā kṛtam
drāviḍaiḥ draviḍadeśodbhaverjanaiḥ || 16 ||
evaṃ sati kiṃ mayā katu śakyata iti cedata āha | yā poveti | śaradā saṃvatsa-

pītvā varṣasahasraṃ ve kaṇadhūmaṃ suduḥsaham |
eṣā prāpteśvarādvidyā bāndhavānāṃ sukhāvahā || 21 ||
etayā vidyayā so'haṃ pramathairmathitān raṇe |
utthāpayiṣye glānāni dhānyānyambudharo yathā || 22 ||
nirvraṇānnīrujaḥ svasthān suptveva punarutthitān |
asmin muhūrte draṣṭāsi dānavānutthitānnṛpa || 23 |
ityuktvā dānavapati vidyāmāvartayat kaviḥ |
ekaikaṃ vaityamuddiśya ta uttasthurdhṛtāyudhāḥ || 24 ||
vedā iva sadabhyastāḥ samaye vā yathā'mbudāḥ |
brāhmaṇebhyo yathā dattāḥ śraddhayā'rthā mahāpadi ||| 25 |
glānāni śuṣkāṇi || 22 |

ujjīvitāṃstu 407
tān dṛṣṭvā tuhuṇḍādyānmahāsurān |
vineduḥ pūrvadevāste jalapūrṇā ivāmbudāḥ || 26
śukreṇojjīvitān dṛṣṭvā dānavāṃstān gaṇeśvarāḥ |
vijñāpyamevaṃ deveśe hyevaṃ te'nyo'nyamabruvan || 27 ||
āścaryarūpe pramatheśvarāṇāṃ tasmiṃstathā vartati yuddhayajñe |
amarṣito bhārgavakarma dṛṣṭvā śila | daputro'bhyagamanmaheśam || 28 |
jayeti coktvā jayayonimugramuvāca nandī kanakāvadātam |
gaṇeśvarāṇāṃ raṇakarmadevadevaiśca sendrairapi duṣkaraṃ yat || 26 |
yathā meghāḥ prāvṛṣaḥ pūrvaṃ naṣṭāḥ santaḥ prāvṛṛtau parjanyena niyuktā gagane uttiṣṭhanti ,
yathā brāhmaṇebhyaḥ śraddhayā dattā arthā mahāpadi dātṝṇāṃ phaladānāya uttiṣṭhanti | mahāpadi
dattā iti vā , tadvadityarthaḥ || 25 ||
pūrvadevā asurāḥ || 26 ||
vijñāpyamevamevaṃprakāraṃ vijñāpanīyam | vijñāpyametaditi kvacit | evamabruvanni-
tyanvayabhedānna paunaruktyam || 27 ||

tadbhārgaveṇādya kṛtaṃ vṛthā naḥ sañjīvyatānājimṛtān vipakṣān |
āvartya vidyāṃ mṛtajīvadātrī mekaikamuddiśya sahelamīśa || 30 |
tuhuṇḍahuṇḍādikujambhajambhavipākapākāvimahāsurendrāḥ
yamālayādadya punarnavṛttā vidrāvayantaḥ pramathāṃścaranti || 31 |
yadi hyasau daityavarānnirastān sañjīvayedatra punaḥ punastān |
jayaḥ kuto no bhavitā maheśa gaṇeśvarāṇāṃ kuta eva śānti || 32 |
ityevamuktaḥ pramatheśvareṇa sanandinā vai pramatheśvareśaḥ |
uvāca devaḥ prahasaṃstadānīṃ taṃ nandinaṃ sarvagaṇeśarājam || || 33 ||
nandin prayāhi tvarito'timātraṃ dvijendravayaṃ ditinandanānām |
madhyātsamuddhṛtya tathānayāśu śyeno yathā lāvakamaṇḍajātam || 34 ||
sahelaṃ salīlaṃ yathā syāt || 30 ||

jagāma tūrṇaṃ ca vigāhya senāṃ yātrābhavadbhārgavavaṃśadīpaḥ || 35 |
taṃ rakṣyamāṇaṃ ditijaiḥ samastaiḥ pāśāsivṛkṣopalaśailahastaiḥ |
vikṣobhya daityān balavān jahāra kāvyaṃ sa nando śarabho yathebham || 36 |
strastāmbaraṃ vicyutabhūṣaṇaṃ ca vimuktakeśaṃ balinā gṛhītam |
vimocayiṣyanta ivā'nujagmuḥ surārayaḥ siṃharavān sṛjantaḥ || 37 ||
dambholiśūlāsiparaśvadhānāmuddaṇḍacakropalakampanānām
nandīśvarasyopari dānavendrā varṣaṃ vavarṣurjaladā ivogram || 38 ||
vṛrṣāṃsaṃhanādaḥ śreṣṭhasaṃhaśabda : || 35 | vikṣobhya vicālya | śarabho'ṣṭāpadaḥ |
ibhaṃ gajam || 36 |

taṃ bhārgavaṃ prāpya gaṇādhirājo mukhāgninā śastraśatāni dagdhvā |
āyātpravṛddhe'suradevayuddhe bhavasya pārśve vyāthitārisainyaḥ || 36 |
ayaṃ sa śukro bhagavannitīdaṃ nivedayāmāsa bhavāya śīghram |
jagrāha śukra sa ca devadevo yathopahāraṃ śucinā pradattam || 40 ||
na kiñciduktvā sa hi bhūtagoptā cikṣepa vaktre phalavat kavīndram |
hāhāravaistairasuraiḥ samastairuccairvimukto hahaheti bhūri || 41 ||
kāvye nigīrṇe girijeśvareṇa daityā jayāśārahitā babhūvuḥ |
hastairvimuktā iva vāraṇendrāḥ bhṛṅgaivihonā iva govṛṣāśca ||| 42 |

nirudyamāḥ sattvaguṇā yathā vai yathodyamā bhāgyavivajitāśca ||| 43 |
patyā vihīnāśca yathaiva yoṣā yathā vipakṣā iva mārgaṇaughāḥ |
āyuṣi honāni yathaiva puṇyairvṛttena hīnāni yathā śrutāni || 44 ||
vinā yathā vaibhavaśaktimekāṃ bhavanti honāḥ svaphalaiḥ kriyaughāḥ |
tathā vinā taṃ dvijavaryamekaṃ daityā jayāśāvimukhā babhūvuḥ || 45 |
nandinā'pahṛte śukre gilite ca viṣādinā |
viṣādamagaman daityā hīyamānaraṇotsavāḥ || 46 |
tān vīkṣya vigatotsāhānandhakaḥ pratyabhāṣata |
kavi vikramya nayatā nandinā vaśvitā vayam || 47 ||
tanūvinā hṛtāḥ prāṇāḥ sarveṣāmadya tena naḥ |
dhairya voyaṃ gatiḥ kīrtiḥ sattvaṃ tejaḥ parākramaḥ || 48 ||

yugapanno hṛtaṃ sarvamekasmin bhārgave hṛte |
dhigasmān kulapūjyo yaireko'pi kulasattamaḥ |
guruḥ sarvasamarthaśca trātā trāto na cāpadi ||| 4 9 |
taddhairyamavalambyeha yudhyadhvamaribhiḥ saha | |
sūdayiṣyāmyahaṃ sarvān pramathān saha nandinā || 50 ||
adyaitān vivaśān hatvā saha devaiḥ savāsavaiḥ |
bhārgavaṃ mocayiṣyāmi jīvaṃ yogova karmataḥ || 51 |
sa cā'pi yogī yogena yadi nāma svayaṃ prabhuḥ |
śarīrāttasya nirgacchedasmākaṃ śeṣapālitā || 52 |

śrutvā dānavā meghaniḥsvanāḥ |
prathamānarvayāmāsurmartavye kṛtaniścayāḥ || 53
satyāyuṣi na |
no jātu śaktāḥ syuḥ pramathā balāt |
asatyāyuṣi kiṃ gatvā tyaktvā svāminamāhave || 54 |
ye svāminaṃ vihāyājau bahumānadhanā janāḥ |
yānti te yānti niyatamandhatāmisramālayam || 55
ayaśastamasākhyāti |
malinīkṛtya bhūriśaḥ |
ihāmutrā'pi sukhino na syurbhagnā raṇājirāt || 56 |
ki dāne : ki tapobhiśca ki torthaparimajjanaiḥ |
dharātīrthe yadi snātaṃ punarbhavamalāpahe || 57 |

aśaya eva tamo'ndhakārastena aśayastamasā | khyāti kīrtim | bhagnāḥ

sampradhāryeti te'nyo'nyaṃ daityāste danujāstathā |
mamanthuḥ pramathānājau raṇabherīninādya ca || 58 |
tatra bāṇā'sivajraughaiḥ kaṭaṃkaṭaśilāmayaiḥ |
bhuśuṇḍībhindipālaiśca śaktibhallaparaśvadhaiḥ || 56 |
khaṭvāṅgaḥ paṭṭiśaiḥ śūlailaṃ kuṭairmusaleralam |
parasparamabhighnantaḥ pracakruḥ kadanaṃ mahat || 60 |
kārmukāṇāṃ vikṛṣṭānāṃ patatāṃ ca patatriṇām |
bhindipālabhuśuṇḍīnāṃ kṣveḍitānāṃ ravo'bhavat || 61 |
raṇatūryaninādaiśva gajānāṃ bahubṛṃhitaiḥ |
heṣāraverhayānāṃ ca mahāt kolāhalo'bhavat || 62 |
kaṭaṃkaṭaśilāmayaiḥ kaṭaṃkaṭaśabdayuktayantrapāṣāṇaiḥ | bhuśuṇḍoti | bhuśuṇḍayaśca
bhindipālāśca bhuśuṇḍībhindipālāstaiḥ | tatra bhuśuṇḍayaḥ sarvatra lohakaṃṭakavyāptā adhaḥ-

dyāvābhūmyoryadantaram |
abhīrūṇāṃ ca bhīrūṇāṃ mahāromodgamo'bhavat

bhagnadhvajapatākāni ca |

vināyakena skandena nandinā somanandinā |
naigameyena śākhena viśākhena balīyasā || 66 |
ityādyaistu gaṇairuyairandhako'pyandhakīkṛtaḥ |
triśūlaśaktibāṇaughadhārāsampātapātibhiḥ || 70 |
tataḥ kolāhalo jātaḥ pramathā'surasainyayoḥ |
tena śabdena mahatā śukraḥ śambhūdare sthitaḥ || 71 |
kṣidrānveṣo bhraman so'tha viniketo yathānilaḥ |
saptalokān sapātālān rudradehe vyalokayat || 72 ||
brahmanārāyaṇendrāṇāmādityā'psarasāṃ tathā |
bhuvanāni vicitrāṇi yuddhaṃ ca pramathā'suram || 73 ||

śataṃ kukṣau bhavasya parito bhraman |
na tasya dadṛśe randhraṃ śuce randhaṃ khalo yathā || 74 |
śāmbhavenā'tha yogena śukrarūpeṇa bhārgavaḥ |
caskandā'tha nanāmā'pi tato devena bhāṣitaḥ || 75 |
śukravanniḥsṛto yasmāttasmāttvaṃ bhṛgunandana |
karmaṇā'nena śukrastvaṃ mama putro'si gamyatām || 76 ||
' jaṭharānnirgate śukre devo'pi mumudetarām |
bhraman śreyo'bhavadyanme na mṛto jaṭhare dvijaḥ || 77 ||
ityevamukto devena śukro'rkasadṛśadyutiḥ |
viveśa dānavānīkaṃ meghamālāṃ yathā śaśī | 78 |
śukrodayānmudaṃ lebhe sa dānavamahārṇavaḥ |
yathā candrodaye harṣamūrmimālīmahodadhiḥ || 76 |
randhaṃ chidram || 74 |
śāmbhavena śambhuprasādalabdhena yogenopāyena | śukrarūpeṇa vīryarūpeṇa | śukraṃ yatho-
pathacchidreṇa bahirniḥsarati , tena prakāreṇetyarthaḥ | caskanda jagāma bahirnirgata

andhakā'ndhakahantrorvai vartamāne vartamāne mahāhave |
itthaṃ nāmnā'bhavacchukraḥ sa vai bhārgavanandanaḥ || 80 ||
yathā ca vidyāṃ tāṃ prāpa mṛtasañjīvanīṃ parām |
śambhoranugrahāt kāvyastanniśāmaya suvrata | 81 |
gaṇāvūcatuḥ - purīm |
purā'sau bhṛgudāyādo gatvā vārāṇasīṃ
aṇḍajasvedajodbhijjajarāyujajagati pradām || 82 ||
saṃsthāpya liṅgaṃ śrīśambhoḥ kūpaṃ kṛtvā tadagrataḥ |
bahukālaṃ tapastepe dhyāyan viśveśvaraṃ prabhum || 83 ||
rājacampakadhattūrakaravīrakuśeśayaiḥ
mālatīkaṇikāraiśva kadambaibaṃkulotpalaiḥ || 84 ||

kathaṃ tena ca vidyā prāpteti praśnasyānuvādapūrvakaṃ pratyuttaramanujānāti | yathā ca

mālatī jāti : kaṇikāro drumotpalaḥ | kadambo halipriyaḥ | baṃkulaḥ kesaraḥ |

kāñcanāraiḥ kurubakairdūrvāṅkurakuraṇṭakaiḥ |

snapayāmāsa deveśaṃ sugandhasnapanairbahu |

gaṇāvūcatuḥ - śivaśarmannibodha ha |
lohitāṅgasya loko'yaṃ

apunarbhavadehāste ye'vimukte tanutyajaḥ |

paṭṭikāvetrabāṇavikalpāḥ ' × , tarkakarmāṇi 5 , takṣaṇam 6 , vāstuvidyā 17 , rūpyaratna-

prasanno'smi varaṃ brūhi yatte manasi varttate |

āṅgirasa uvāca- sarvaśuce |

kṛtivihitamanoratha pannagabhṛt |
nagabhartṛsutāpitavāmavapuḥ svavapuḥ paripūritasarvajagat ||
trijaganmayarūpa 36 ||
virūpa sudṛkdagudaścanakuścanakṛta hutabhuk |
bhava bhūtapate pramathaikapate patiteṣvapi dattakaraprasṛte || 37 |
ryasya tatsambodhanaṃ tathā | tata vividhacaritratano iti kacit | pavitratano iti cānyatra
sutano he śobhanatano | tanūni komalāni puṣpāṇītyetat | viśikhā bāṇā yasya sa
kandarpastathā taṃ viśoṣayati nāśayati viśoṣaṇaṃ yasmāditi vā tatsambodhanaṃ tathā |
he dhairyaṃnidhe dhairyasamudra | tanuviśikhena yadviśoṣaṇaṃ dāhastatra dhairyaṃnidhe ityekaṃ vā padam |
jayetyanuṣajjate evamuttaratrāpi || 35 |

prasṛtā'khilabhūtalasaṃvaraṇa praṇavadhvanisaudha sudhāṃśudhara |
dhararājakumārikayā parayā paritaḥ parituṣṭa nato'smi śiva || 38 ||
śiva deva girośa maheśa vibho vibhavaprada giriśa śiveśa mṛḍa |
mṛḍayoḍupati jagattritayaṃ kṛtayantraṇa bhaktividhātakṛtām ||36 ||
indrādirūpeṇa carupuroḍāśādibhuk | kṛtabhugiti pāṭhe jīvarūpeṇa kṛtasvargādiphalabhuk |
pāṭhadvaye'pi tatsambodhanaṃ tathā | dṛgudañcanakuñcane kṛtaḥ hutabhug yenetyekaṃ vā padam |
bhavatyasmāditi bhava he sarvotpādaka | bhūtaviśeṣāṇāṃ prāṇimātrāṇāṃ vā pate bhūtapate |
pramathānāṃ gaṇaviśeṣāṇāṃ mukhyasvāmin pramathaikapate | atra bhūtapramathānāmavāntarabhedo

na kṛtāntata eṣa bibhemi hara 441
praharāśu mahāghamamodhamate |
na matāntaramanyadavaimi śivaṃ śivapādanateḥ praṇato'smi
vitate'tra jagatyakhile'ghaharaṃ tataḥ || 40 ||
haratoṣaṇameva paraṃ guṇavat |
guṇahonamahona mahāvalayaṃ pralayāntakamośa nato'smi nataḥ || 41 ||
iti stutvā mahādevaṃ virarāmā'ṅgiraḥ sutaḥ |
vyataracca maheśānaḥ stutyā tuṣṭo varān bahūn ||
śirobhūṣatvena svīkarotīti yāvattatsambodhanaṃ tathā | dhātūnāmanekārthatvāt | kṛtā
yantraṇā pīḍāṃ yena tatsambodhanaṃ tathā | keṣāmityākāṅkṣāyāmāha dattā
kāmakrodhalobhādīnāṃ tripurāndhakajalandharādīnāṃ | bhaktivighātakṛtāṃ
asmin śloke dvitīyapāde cetyarthaḥ | jagattritayaṃ mṛḍaya sukhaya |
chandobhaṅgo'kṣarādhikyaṃ cārṣam || 3 9 |

śrīmahādeva uvāca-
bṛhatā tapasā'nena bṛhatāṃ patiredhyaho |
nāmnā bṛhaspatiriti graheṣvaryo bhava dvija || 43 ||
asmālliṅgārcanānnityaṃ jīvabhūto'si me yataḥ |
ato jīva iti khyātiṃ triṣu lokeṣu yāsyasi || 44 ||
vācāṃ prapañcaiścaturainiṣprapañco yataḥ stutaḥ |
ato vācāṃ prapañcasya patirvācaspatirbhava || 45 |
asya stotrasya paṭhanādapi vāgudiyācca yam |
tasya syātsaṃskṛtā vāṇī tribhirvarṣaistrikālataḥ || 46 ||
varān prayacchannāma tritayaṃ nirvakti | bṛhateti ślokatrayeṇa | bṛhatāṃ patiredhi
indrādīnāṃ devānāṃ gururbhavetyarthaḥ || 43 ||
prapañcaivistāraiścaturainipuṇaiḥ suśrāvyairityarthaḥ bhava syāḥ | bhavāniti
kvacit || 45 ||

ya paṭhiṣyatyadaḥ stotraṃ vāyavyākhyaṃ dine dine || 47 ||
asya stotrasya paṭhanānniyataṃ mama sannidhau |
na durvṛttau pravṛttiḥ syādavivekavatāṃ nṛṇām || 48 ||
adaḥ stotraṃ paṭhan janturjātu pīḍāṃ prahodbhavām |
na prāpsyati tato japyamidaṃ stotraṃ mamāgrataḥ || 4 9 |
nityaṃ prātaḥ samutthāya yaḥ paṭhiṣyati mānavaḥ |
imāṃ stuti hariṣye'haṃ tasya bādhāḥ sudāruṇāḥ || 50 ||
tvatpratiṣṭhitaliṅgasya pūjāṃ kṛtvā prayatnataḥ |
imāṃ stutimadhīyāno manovāñchāmavāpsyati || 51 ||
vāyavyākhyaṃ vāyuḥ sūtrātmā | vāyurvai gautamatatsūtramiti śruteḥ | tatprāpakaṃ vāyavyaṃ
hiraṇyagarbhapadaprāpakamityarthaḥ | vāyupurāṇe proktaṃ vāyunā vā proktaṃ vāyavyam | yadvā vāyu-

iti datvā varān śambhuḥ punarbrahmāṇamāhvayat |
sendrān devagaṇān sarvān sayakṣoragakinnarān || 52 |
tānāgatān samālokya śivo brahmāṇamabravīt |
vidhe vidhehi madvākyādamuṃ vācaspati munim || 53 |
guruṃ sarvasurendrāṇāṃ paritaḥ svaguṇairgurum |
abhiṣiñca vidhānena devācāryapade mude || 54 ||
atīva dhiṣaṇādhīśo mama prīto bhaviṣyati | |
mahāprasāda ityājñāṃ śirasyādhāya tatkṣaṇāt || 55 |
surajyeṣṭhaḥ ' surācāyaṃ cakārā'ṅgirasaṃ tadā |
devadundubhayo nedurnanṛtuścāpsarogaṇāḥ
gurupūjāṃ vyadhuḥ sarve gīrvāṇāṃ muditānanāḥ |
abhiṣikto vasiṣṭhādyairmantrapūtena vāriṇā || 57 ||
mude sarveṣāṃ prītaye || 54 |

śṛṇvā'ṅgirasa dharmātman devejyakulanandana
bhavatā sthāpitaṃ || 58 |
liṅgaṃ subuddhiparivardhanam |
bṛhaspatīśvara iti khyātaṃ kāśyāṃ bhaviṣyati || 56 |
gurupuṣyasamāyoge liṅgametatsamarcya ca
yatkariṣyanti |
manujāstatsiddhimadhiyāsyati || 60 |
bṛhaspatīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ mayā gopyaṃ kalau yuge |
asya sandarśanādeva pratibhā pratilabhyate || 61 ||
candreśvarāddakṣiṇato vīreśānnairṛte sthitam |
ārādhya dhiṣaṇeśaṃ vai
guruloke mahīyate || 62 ||
gurvaṅganāgamanajaṃ pāpaṃ ṣaṇmāsasevanāt |
avaśyaṃ vilayaṃ yāti tamaḥ sūryodayādyathā || 63 |
subuddhiparivardhanaṃ śobhanajñānajanakam || 5 9 |
yatkarmaṃ tatkartṛbhūtam || 60 |

ata eva hi goptavyaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam |
bṛhaspatīśvaraṃ liṅga nākhyeyaṃ yasya kasyacit || 64 ||
devastatraivā'ntarhito'bhavat |
iti datvā varān
bruhiṇo guruṇā sādhaṃ sendropendro bṛhaspatim || 65 ||
asminpure'bhiṣicyā'ya visṛjyendrādikān surān |
alañcakāra svaṃ lokaṃ viṣṇunā'numato dvija || 66 ||
agastya uvāca- dadarśa saḥ |
atikramya gurorlokaṃ lopāmudre
śivaśarmā purīṃ saureḥ prabhāmaṇḍalamaṇḍitām || 67 ||
pṛṣṭau tena ca tau tatra tāṃ purīṃ pradadarśatuḥ |
dvijena dvijavaryāya gaṇavaryo śucismite || 68 |

gaṇāvūcatu : - 447
mārīcaḥ kaśyapājjajñe dākṣāyaṇyāṃ dvijoṣṇaguḥ
tasya bhāryā'bhavat |
saṃjñā putrī tvaṣṭuḥ prajāpateḥ || 6 9 |
bharturiṣṭā tatastasmādrūpayauvanaśālinī |
saṃjñā babhūva tapasā sudīptena samanvitā || 70 |
ādityasya hi tadrūpaṃ maṇḍalasya tu tejasā |
gātreṣu paridadhyau vai nātikāntamivā'bhavat || 71
na khalvayaṃ |
mṛto'ṇḍastha iti snehādabhāṣata |
tadāprabhṛti loke'yaṃ mārtaṇḍa iti cocyate || 72 |
dākṣāyaṇyāṃ dakṣakanyāyāmadityāmiti yāvat | uṣṇaguḥ uṣṇā gāvo raśmayo yasya
sa sūryastathā || 6 9 |

tejastvabhyadhikaṃ tasya sā'sahiṣṇuvivasvataḥ |
yenā'titāpayāmāsa trailokyaṃ tigmaraśmibhṛt || 73 ||
trīṇyapatyāni bho brahman saṃjñāyāṃ mahasāṃ nidhiḥ |
ādityo janayāmāsa kanyāṃ dvau ca prajāpato || 74 ||
vaivasvataṃ manuṃ jyeṣṭhaṃ yamaṃ ca yamunāṃ tataḥ |
nātitejomayaṃ rūpaṃ soḍhuṃ sā'laṃ vivasvataḥ || 75 ||
māyāmayīṃ tataśchāyāṃ savarṇāṃ nirmame svataḥ |
prāñjaliḥ praṇatā bhūtvā saṃjñāṃ chāyā tadā'bravīt || 76 ||
tavājñākāriṇīṃ devi śādhi māṃ karavāṇi kim |
saṃjñovāca tataśchāyāṃ savarṇe śṛṇu sundari || 77 ||
ahaṃ yāsyāmi sadanaṃ tvaṣṭustvaṃ punaratra me |
bhavane vasa kalyāṇi nirviśaṅkaṃ mamājñayā || 78 ||

yamunāyamasaṃjñako |
svāpatyadṛṣṭyā draṣṭavyametadbālatrayaṃ tvayā || 76 ||
anārakhyeyamidaṃ vṛttaṃ tvayā patyau śucismite |
ityākarṇyā'tha sā tvāṣṭroṃ devīṃ chāyā jagāda ha ||
ā kacagrahaṇānnāhamā śāpācca kadācana |
ākhyāsyāmi caritraṃ te yāhi devi yathāsukham
ityādiśya savarṇāṃ sā tathetyuktā savarṇayā |
piturantikamāsādya natvā tvaṣṭāramabravīt || 82 ||
pitaḥ soḍhuṃ na śaknomi tejastejonidheraham |
tovraṃ tasyāryaputrasya kāśyapasya mahātmanaḥ || 83
niśamyodīritaṃ |
tasyāḥ pitrā nirbhatsatā bahu |
bhartuḥ samīpaṃ yāhīti niyuktā sā punaḥ punaḥ || 84 ||

cintāmavāpa mahatīṃ strīṇāṃ dhik ceṣṭitantviti |
nininda bahudhātmānaṃ strītvaṃ cātinininda sā || 85 |
svātantryaṃ na kvacit strīṇāṃ dhigasvātantryajīvitam |
śaiśave yauvane prānte pitṛbhartṛsutādbhayam || 86 |
tyaktaṃ bhartṛgṛhaṃ maugdhyāddhanta durvṛttayā mayā |
avijñātā'pi cedyāyāmatha patyuniketanam || 87 |
tatrā'sti sā savarṇā vai paripūrṇamanorathā |
athā'vatiṣṭhe sā'traiva pitrā nirbhatsatā'pyaham || 88 |
tato'ticaṇḍaścaṇḍāṃśuḥ pitroratibhayaṅkaraḥ |
aho yaducyate lokaṃrupākhyānamidaṃ hi tat || 86 |
sphuṭaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ mayā'dyeti svakarāṅgārakarṣaṇam |
naṣṭaṃ bhartṛgṛhaṃ maugdhyācchu yo vā na piturgṛham || 60 |

sarvābhibhavanaṃ strītvaṃ kulaṃ cātīva nirmalam
patiśca tādṛk sarvajño lokacakṣustamopahaḥ |
sarveṣāṃ karmaṇāṃ sākṣī sarvaḥ sarvatra sañcaraḥ || 62 ||
mahyaṃ śreyaḥ kathaṃ vā syāditi sā paricintya ca |
agacchadvaḍavā bhūtvā tapase paryaninditā || 63 ||
uttarāṃśca kurūn prāpa carantī nīrasaṃ tṛṇam |
vyuttepe ca tapastīvraṃ patimādhāya cetasi |
tapobalena tatpatyuḥ sahiṣye teja ityalam || 64 ||
piturgṛhaṃ śreyo heturna bhavatītyarthaḥ | vāśabdo vitarke | gṛhe iti kacit || 9 0 - 9 1 |

manyamāno'tha tāṃ saṃjñāṃ savarṇāyāṃ tadā raviḥ |
sārvāṇi janayāmāsa manumaṣṭamamuttamam || 65 |
śanaiścaraṃ dvitīyaṃ ca sutāṃ bhadrāṃ tṛtīyikām |
savarṇā sveṣvapatyeṣu sāpatnyāt strīsvabhāvataḥ || 66 ||
cakārā'bhyadhikaṃ snehaṃ na tathā pūrvajeṣvatha |
manustatkṣāntavān jyeṣṭho bhakṣyālaṅkāralālane ||67 |
kaniṣṭheṣvadhikaṃ dṛṣṭrā sāvarṇyādiṣu no yamaḥ |
kadācidroṣato bālyād bhāvino'rthasya gauravāt || 68 |
padā saṃtarjayāmāsa yamaḥ saṃjñāsarūpiṇīm |
taṃ śaśāpa ca sā krodhāt sāvarṇerjananī tadā || 66 |
jighāṃsatā tvayā pāpa māṃ yadaṅghriḥ samudyataḥ |
acirāttatpatatveṣa taveti bhṛśaduḥkhitā || 100 |
jñātavyam , tādṛganirvacanīyamatimahattaramiti yāvat | tadalamatiśayitaṃ tejaḥ | tattejo'laṃ
sahiṣye iti vā || 9 4 - 9 5 |
bhadrāmiti tapatyā nāmāntaram | yadvā bhadrāṃ sadvṛtāṃ nāmnā tapatīmiti
purāṇāntarādavagantavyam || 9 6 - 9 7 | gauravād gurutvāt || 9 8 |

śaśaṃsa sarva tadvṛttaṃ rakṣa rakṣetyuvāca ca || 101
suteṣu sarveṣu |
mātrā vartanīyaṃ samaṃ yataḥ |
tasyāṃ mayodyataḥ pādo na dehe paripātitaḥ || 12
bālyādvā ||
yadi vā mohāttadbhavān kṣantumarhasi |
gopate śāpato māturmāpatatvadhireṣa me ||
vivasvānuvāca-
aparādhasahasre'pi jananī na śapetsutam |
tasmātkimapi bho bāla bhaviṣyatyatra kāraṇam ||
yena tvāṃ sā'śapat krodhāddharmajñaṃ satyavādinam |
mātṛśāpo'nyathā karttuṃ na śakyaḥ kenacit kvacit || 105 ||
kṛmayo māṃsamādāya yāsyantyasmānmahītalam |
itthaṃ tu caritārthaḥ syācchāstrāto bhavānapi || 106 |
asmāt padāt || 106 |

iti putraṃ samāśvāsya ravirantaḥpuraṃ yayau |
ciramālokya tāṃ bhāryāmuvāca savitā vacaḥ || 107 |
ayi bhāmini bāleṣu sameṣvapi kutastvayā |
vidhīyate'dhikaḥ snehaḥ sāvarṇyādiṣvanādiṣu || 108 |
nā'cacakṣe yadā sā'tha bhāsvate paripṛcchate |
tadātmānaṃ samādhāya so'jñāsītsarvameva hi || 106 |
tato bhagavate śaptumudyate sā śaśaṃsa ha |
yathāvṛttaṃ tathātathyaṃ tutoṣa bhagavānapi ||| 110 |
tathyabhāṣaṇatastāṃ tu ravirjñātvā nirāgasam |
na śaśāpa ca saṃkruddho yayau ca tvaṣṭurantikam || 111 ||
tvaṣṭā'pi ca yathānyāyaṃ sānvayaṃ tigmatejasam |
nirdagdhukāmaṃ kopena prāgānarca sudā tadā |
vijñāya tadabhiprāyaṃ tvaṣṭovācā'śu taṃ ravim || 112 ||

tavā'titejaso bhītā prāpyottarakurūn rave |
vaḍavārūpamāsthāya vane carati śādvale || 113 ||
draṣṭā |||
hi tāṃ bhavānadya svāṃ bhāryāmāryacāriṇīm |
adhṛṣyāṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tejasāṃ niyamena ca || 114 ||
tvaṣṭā yattakṣitaḥ sūryastasyaivā'numatena ca |
bhramimāropya yatnena so'tikāntataro'bhavat || 115
labdhā'nujño'tha |
savitā gatvottarakurūnaram |
sākṣāttapomayīṃ lakṣmīṃ carantīṃ ca tapo mahat || 116 ||
dadarśa vaḍavārūpāṃ vāḍavā'nalatejasam |
nīrasāni tṛṇānyeva vṛṇvantīṃ yogamāyayā || 117 ||

anenasaṃ sa vijñāya tāṃ tvāṣṭrīmaśvarūpiṇīm |
sa harirharirūpeṇa mukhena samabhāvayat || 118 ||
tvaramāṇā ca paritaḥ parapuruṣaśaṅkayā |
sā tanniravamacchukraṃ nāsikābhyāṃ vivasvataḥ || 11 9 |
devau tasmādajāyetāmaśvinau bhiṣajāṃ varau |
svarūpamanurūpaṃ ca ghumaṇistāmadarśayat || 120 |
tutoṣa sā'pi taṃ dṛṣṭrā mitraṃ netramudāvaham |
pati pativratā kāntaṃ svāntasantāpahāriṇam || 121 |
nirvṛtti ca parāṃ prāpa duṣprāpaṃ tapasā'tha kim |
tapa eva paraṃ śreyaḥ tapa eva paraṃ dhanam ||| 122 |
tapa eva hi devatve kāraṇaṃ paramaṃ matam |
śivaśarman yadetadvaṃ dṛśyate cā'tidīptimat || 123 |

vyomnyuparyaṃdha eva ca |
tatsarvamiha jānīhi sumahattāpasaṃ mahaḥ
evaṃ śanaiśvaro jajñe savarṇāyāṃ vivasvataḥ |
so'tha vārāṇasīṃ gatvā sarvatridaśavanditām ||
taptvā tapo'tivipulaṃ liṅgaṃ saṃsthāpya śāṅkaram |
imaṃ lokamavāpoccairgrahatvaṃ ca harā'rcanāt || 126
śanaiścareśvaraṃ dṛṣṭrā vārāṇasyāṃ suśobhanam |
śanibādhā na jāyeta śanivāre tadarcanāt || 127 ||
viśveśāddakṣiṇe bhāge śukreśāduttareṇa hi |
śanaiścareśamabhyarcya loke'tra parimodate || 128 ||
maho jyotiḥ ||| 124 |

śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ grahapīḍā na jāyate |
nopasargabhayaṃ tasya kāśyāṃ nivasataḥ sataḥ || 126 |

|| athāṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastiruvāca—
iti śṛṇvan kathāṃ ramyāṃ śivaśarmā'tha māthuraḥ |
muktipuryāṃ susaṃsnāto māyāpuryāṃ gatāsukaḥ
netrayoḥ || 1 |
prāghuṇīcakne tataḥ saptarṣimaṇḍalam |
vrajan sa vaiṣṇavaṃ lokamante viṣṇupurīṃ kṣaṇāt || 2 |
uvāca ca prasannātmā stutaścāraṇamāgadhaḥ |
prārthito devakanyābhistiṣṭha tiṣṭheti ca kṣaṇam || 3
sthitāsu tāsu niḥśvasya mandabhāgyā vayantviti |
gataḥ puṇyatamāṃllokānasau yatpuṇyavattamaḥ || 4 ||
aṣṭādaśe marīcyatripulastya pulahakratuḥ |
vasiṣṭhā'ṅgirasāṃ loko varṇyate'tyanta ujjvalaḥ || 1 ||

iti śṛṇvan mukhāttāsāṃ vacanāni vimānagaḥ |
devau kasyā'yamatulo lokastejomayaḥ śubhaḥ || 5 |
iti dvijavacaḥ śrutvā procaturgaṇasattamau |
śivaśarman śivamate sadā saptarṣayo'malāḥ || 6 ||
vasantoha prajāḥ sraṣṭuṃ viniyuktāḥ prajāsṛjā |
marīciratriḥ pulahaḥ pulastyaḥ kraturaṅgirāḥ || 7 ||
vasiṣṭhaśca mahābhāgo brahmaṇo mānasāḥ sutāḥ |
saptabrahmāṇa ityete purāṇe niścayaṃ gatāḥ || 8 ||
sambhūtiranasūyā ca kṣamā prītiśca sannatiḥ |
smṛtirūrjākramādeṣāṃ patnyo lokasya mātaraḥ || 6 |

bhuvanatrayam |
utpādya brahmaṇā pūrvamete proktā maharṣayaḥ || 10
prajā sṛjata ||
re putrā nānārūpāḥ prayatnataḥ |
tataḥ praṇamya brahmāṇaṃ tapase kṛtaniścayāḥ || 11 ||
avimuktaṃ samāsādya kṣetraṃ kṣetrajñadhiṣṭhitam |
muktaye sarvajantūnāmavimuktaṃ śivena yat || 12 ||
pratiṣṭhāpya ca liṅgāni te svanāmnāṅkitānica |
śiveti parayā bhaktyā tepurugrantapo bhṛśam || 13 ||
tuṣṭastattapasā śambhuḥ prājāpatyapadaṃ dadau |
liṅgānyatrīśvarādīni dṛṣṭvā kāśyāṃ prayatnataḥ || 14 ||
prājāpatye'tra te loke vasantyujjvalatejasaḥ |
gokarṇeśasya sarasaḥ pratyaktīre pratiṣṭhitam || 15 ||

liṅgamatrīśvaraṃ dṛṣṭrā brahmatejo'bhivardhate |
karkoṭavāpyā īśāne marīceḥ kuṇḍamuttamam || 16 || |
tatra snātvā naro bhaktyā bhrājate bhāskaro yathā |
marīcīśvarasaṃjñaṃ tu tatra liṅgaṃ pratiṣṭhitam || 17 |
talliṅgadarśanādvipra mārīcaṃ lokamāpnuyāt |
kāntyā marocimālīva śobhate puruṣarṣabhaḥ || 18 |
pulaheśapulastyeśau svargadvārasya paścime |
tau dṛṣṭṭā manujo loke prājāpatye mahoyate || 16 ||
harikeśavane ramye dṛṣṭvaivāṅgiraseśvaram |
iha loke vasedvipra tejasā paribṛṃhitaḥ || 20 |
varaṇāyāstaṭe ramye dṛṣṭā vāsiṣṭhamīśvaram |
kratvīśvaraṃ ca tatraiva labhate vasatintviha | 21 |
marīcimālī sūryaḥ || 18 |
iha vārāṇasyāṃ saptarṣimaṇḍale vā || 21 |

mano'bhivāñchitaṃ śubhaiṣibhiḥ |
dadyurihaloke paratra ca || 22 ||
gaṇāvūcatuḥ -
śivaśarman mahābhāga tiṣṭhate sā'tra sundarī
arundhato |
mahāpuṇyā pativrataparāyaṇā || 23 |
yasyāḥ smaraṇamātreṇa gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ labhet
antaḥpuracaraidvitraiḥ |
pavitraiḥ sahito vibhuḥ || 24 ||
sadā nārāyaṇo devo yasyāścakre kathāṃ mudā
kamalāyāḥ |
purobhāge pātivratyasutoṣitaḥ || 25 |
pativratāsvarundhatyāḥ kamale vimalāśayaḥ |
yathā'sti na tathā'nyasyāḥ kasyāścitkvāpi bhāmini ||26 ||
śubhaiṣibhiḥ kaivalyepsubhiḥ || 22 ||
vasiṣṭhasyāpyarundhatīmiti bhāgavatokterapiśabdāvasiṣṭhasyānyā patnyasti

na tadrūpaṃ na tacchīlaṃ na tatkaulīnyameva ca |
na tatkalāsu kauśalyaṃ patyuḥ śuśrūṣaṇaṃ na tat || 27 ||
na mādhuyaṃ na gāmbhīyaṃ na cāryaparitoṣaṇam |
arundhatyā yathā devi tathā'nyāsāṃ kvacitpriye || 28 |
dhanyāstā yoṣito loke sabhāgyāḥ śuddhabuddhayaḥ |
arundhatyāḥ prasaṅge yā nāmā'pi parigṛhṛte || 26 |
yadā pativratānāṃ tu kathā'smadbhavane bhavet |
tadā prāthamiko rekhāmeṣā'laṅkurute satī || 30 |
na taditi ślokadvayaṃ vākyam | he devi he priye arundhatyāṃ yathā rūpādīni
tathā'nyāsāṃ na santītyarthaḥ | tat prasiddham | śuśrūṣaṇaṃ na veti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 27 ||
āryaparitoṣaṇaṃ śvaśurādīnāṃ śuśrūṣaṇam || 28 |

dhruvaloka |
upāgatastato nayanātithyamatathyavarjitaḥ || 31 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe saptaṣilokavarṇanaṃ nāmā'ṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭādaśo'dhyāyaḥ || 18 ||
isa prakāra harṣaprada kathanopakathana karate hue ve donoṃ vaiṣṇavagaṇa ākalpa satya-

|| athaikonaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
śivaśarmovāca-
tiṣṭhannekena pādena ko'yaṃ bhramati sattamo |
anekara sanāvya prahastāgro vyagralocanaḥ || 1 |
trilokīmaṇḍapastambhasannibhobhābhirāvṛtaḥ
atulaṃ jyotiṣāṃ rāśi tulayā tulayanniva || 2 ||
sūtradhāra iva vyomavyāyāmaparimāpakaḥ |
traivikramoṃghridaṇḍo vā proddaṇḍo gaganāṅgaṇe || 3 |
ekonaviṃśake'dhyāya upariṣṭāttrilokataḥ |
varṇyate'tyadbhutākāro dhruvaloko dhruvaḥ paraḥ || 1 |
dhruvaloka upāgatastato nayanātithyamityuktaṃ tatra tiṣṭhanniti prathamaślokena
sandigdhatvenānūdya trilokītyādinā sārdhadvayena madhye caturdhotprekṣya paścāt ko'yamityardhena

ko'yaṃ kathayatāṃ devau kṛpayā parayā mama
niśamyeti vacastasya vayasyasya vimānagau |
' praṇayādāhatustasmai dhruvāṃ dhruvakathāṃ gaṇau || 5 |
gaṇāvūcatu : -
manoḥ svāyambhuvasyāsīduttānacaraṇaḥ sutaḥ |
tasya kṣitipateva dvau sutau saṃbabhūvatuḥ || 6 ||
surucyāmuttamo jyeṣṭhaḥ sunītyāṃ tu dhruvo'paraḥ |
madhyesabhaṃ narapaterupaviṣṭasya caikadā || 7 |
parimāpayati , tadvadityarthaḥ | parimāṇaka iti pāṭhe'pi sa evārthaḥ | trivikramo vāmanaḥ
