gaganamevā'ṅgaṇaṃ prāṅgaṇaṃ tasmin || 3 |
athavā'mbaramākāśameva kāsāraḥ sarastatra sārayūpasvarūpadhṛk yūpasvarūpabhṛt |
tadevaṃ caturdhotprekṣya pṛcchati | ko'yamiti || 4 |

sunītyā rājasevāyeṃ niyukto'laṅkṛto'rbhakaḥ |
dhruvo dhātreyikāputraiḥ samaṃ vinayatatparaḥ || 8 |
sa gatvottānacaraṇaṃ kṣoṇośaṃ praṇanāma ha |
dṛṣṭrottamaṃ tadutsaṅge niviṣṭaṃ janakasya vai || 6 |
procca siṃhāsanasthasya nṛpaterbālyacāpalāt |
āroḍhukāmastvabhavatsaunīteyastadā dhruvaḥ ||| 10 |
ārurukṣu mavekṣyā'muṃ surucirdhruvamabravīt |
daurbhageya kimāroḍhumiccheraṅkaṃ mahīpateḥ || 11 |
bālabāliśabuddhitvādabhāgyā jaṭharodbhava |
asmin siṃhāsane sthātuṃ na tvayā sukṛtaṃ kṛtam || 12 ||
yadi syātsukṛtaṃ tatki durbhagodarago'bhavaḥ |
anenaivā'numānena budhyasva svā'lpapuṇyatām || 13 ||

sukukṣijamamuṃ paśya tvamuttamamanuttamam
adhijānu dharājānermānena || 14 ||
paribṛṃhitam |
prāṃśoḥ siṃhāsanasyāsya ruciścedadhirohaṇe
kukṣi hitvā || 15 ||
kimavasaḥ suruceśca surociṣam |
madhye bhūpasabhaṃ bālastayeti paribhatsitaḥ || 16
patannipītabāṣpāmbudhairyāt ||
kiñcinna coktavān |
ucitā'nucitaṃ kiñcinnocivān so'pi pārthivaḥ || 17 ||
niyantrito mahiṣyāśca tasyāḥ saubhāgyagauravāt |
visṛjya ca sabhālokaṃ śokaṃ saṃsṛjya ceṣṭitaiḥ || 18 ||

śaiśavaiḥ sa śiśurnatvā nṛpaṃ svasadanaṃ yayau |
sunītirnoti nilayamavalokyā'tha bālakam || 1 9 |
mukhalakṣyaiva cājñāsīt dhruvaṃ samavamānitam |
abhisṛtya ca taṃ bālaṃ mūrkyupāghrāya sā'sakṛt || 20 ||
kiñcitparimlānamiva sasāntvaṃ pariṣasvaje |
atha dṛṣṭrā sunīti sa raho'ntaḥ puravāsinīm || 21 ||
dīrghaṃ niḥśvasya bahuśo māturane ruroda ha |
sāntvayitvā'śrunayanā vadanaṃ parimārjyaṃ ca || 22 ||
dukūlāñcala samparka rmṛdulairmṛdupāṇinā
papraccha tanayaṃ mātā vada rodanakāraṇam |
vidyamāne narapatau śiśuḥ kenā'pamānitaḥ || 23 ||
śaiśaveḥ śiśusambandhibhiśceṣṭitaiḥ | śokaṃ saṃmṛjya prakaṭamakṛtvā sa dhruvaḥ śiśu-
bala : | śiśubhiḥ saha saśiśuriti vā || 1 9 |
mukhalakṣmyā mukhaśobhayā mlānamukhaśriyetyarthaḥ | samavamānitaṃ samyagava -
jñātam || 20 ||
kiñcitparimlānamiva manāk glānamiva | sasāntvanasahitaṃ yathā syāt
pariṣasvaje āliṅgitavatī || 21 ||
dukūlāñcalasamparkaiḥ paṭṭavastrāntasaṃgharṣaṇaiḥ | kathambhūtaiḥ ? mṛdulaiḥ komalaiḥ || 23 |

tāmbūlaṃ parigṛhya ca |
mātrā pṛṣṭaḥ soparodhaṃ dhruvastāṃ paryabhāṣata || 24
saṃpṛcche janani |
tvā'haṃ samyak śaṃsa mamā'grataḥ |
bhāryātve'pi ca sāmānye kathaṃ sā suruciḥ priyā

svabhāvamadhurāṃ vāṇīṃ vaktuṃ samupacakrame |
sāpatnaṃ pratighaṃ tyaktvā rājanītividāṃvarā ||| 30 |
sunītiruvāca-
ayi tāta mahābuddhe viśuddhenāntarātmanā |
nivedayāmi te savaṃ mā'pamāne mata kṛthāḥ || 31 |
tayā yaduktaṃ tatsarvaṃ tathyameva na cā'nyathā |
sā patyurmahiṣī rājño rājñīnāmativallabhā || 32 ||
tayā janmāntare tāta yatpuṇyaṃ samupārjitam |
tatpuṇyopacayādrājā surucyāṃ surucirbhṛśam || 33 |
mādṛśyo mandabhāgyāyāḥ pramadā supratiṣṭhitāḥ |
kevalaṃ rājapatnītvavādastāsu na tadruciḥ || 34 ||
sāpatnaṃ sapatnīviṣayaṃ pratighaṃ pratikūlaṃ pratipakṣamiti yāvat || 30 ||
ayoti sānukampasambodhane | kṛthāḥ kuru || 31 |

uvāsa tasyāḥ puṇyāyā nṛpasaṃhāsanocitaḥ
ātapatraṃ ca || 35 ||
candrābhaṃ śubhe cāpi ca cāmare |
bhadrāsanaṃ tathoccaṃ ca sindhurāśca
madoddhurāḥ || 36 ||
turaṅgamāśca turagāstvanādhivyādhijīvitam |
niḥsapatnaṃ śubhaṃ rājyaṃ prājyaṃ hariharārcanam
vipulaṃ || 37 ||
ca kalājñānamadhītamaparājitam |
tathā jayo'riṣaḍvarge svabhāvātsāttvikī matiḥ || 38
dṛṣṭi : ||
kāruṇyasampūrṇā vāṇī madhurabhāṣiṇī |
anālasya ca kāryeṣu tathā gurujane natiḥ || 36
sarvatra ||
śucitā tāta sā paropakṛtiḥ sadā |
aurjasvalā manovṛttiḥ sadaivādīnavāditā || 40
ātapātraṃ cetyādyānāṃ niyamairyamairityantānāṃ dvādaśaślokānāmetairmanorathaphalaista-
podrumāḥ tapāṃsyeva drumaḥ vṛkṣāḥ phalantyeveti trayodaśenā'nvayaḥ | bhadrāsanaṃ rājasiṃhāsanam

sado'jire ca pāṇḍityaṃ prāgalbhyaṃ ca raṇāṅgaṇe |
ārjavaṃ bandhuvargeṣu kāṭhinyaṃ krayavikraye || 41 |
mārdavaṃ strīprayogeṣu vatsalatvaṃ prajāsu ca |
brāhmaṇebhyo bhayaṃ nityaṃ vṛddhavṛttyupajīvanam ||| 42 |
vāso bhāgīrathītare torthe vā maraṇaṃ raṇe |
aparāṅmukhatā'thibhyaḥ pratyarthibhyo viśeṣataḥ || 43 |
bhogaḥ parijanaiḥ sārdhaṃ dānāvandhyadināgamaḥ |
vidyāvyasanitā nityaṃ nityaṃ pitrorupasthitiḥ || 44 ||
yaśasaḥ sañcayo nityaṃ nityaṃ dharmasya sañcayaḥ |
svargāpavargayoḥ siddhiḥ sadā śīlasya maṇḍanam ||| 45 |
sadbhiśca saṅgatinityaṃ maitrī ca pitṛmitrakaiḥ |
itihāsapurāṇānāmutkaṇṭhā śravaṇe sadā || 46 ||
sado'jire sabhāṅgaṇe || 41 ||
strīprayogeṣu strīviṣayavyavahāreṣu | vṛddhānāṃ sadācārāṇāṃ yā vṛttirvartanaṃ

sampatsamāgame |
gāmbhīyaṃ vāgvilāseṣu audāyaṃ pātrapāṇiṣu
dehe paraikā || 47 ||
kṛśatā tapobhiniyamairyamaiḥ |
etairmanorathaphalaiḥ phalantyeva tapodrumāḥ ||
tasmādalpatapastvādvai 48 ||
tvaṃ cāhaṃ ca mahāmate |
prāpyā'pi rājasānnidhyaṃ rājalakṣmyā
na bhājanam ||46 ||
mānā'pamānayostasmāt svakṛtaṃ kāraṇaṃ param |
sraṣṭā'pi nāpamāṇuṃ tat parīṣṭe svakṛtāṃ kṛtim |
mā śocastvamataḥ putra diṣṭamiṣṭaṃ samarpayet || 50
ityākarṇya sunītyāstanmahāvākyaṃ |
sunotimat |
saunīteyo dhruvovācamādade vaktumuttaram ||

dhruva uvāca-
janayitri sunīte me śṛṇu vākyamanākulam |
mā bāla iti matvā māmavamaṃsthāstapasvini || 52 ||
yadyahaṃ mānave vaṃśe jāto'smyatyantapāvane |
uttānapādatanayastvadīyodarasambhavaḥ || 53 |
tapa eva hi cenmātaḥ kāraṇaṃ sarvasampadām |
tattadāsāditaṃ viddhi padamanyairdurāsadam || 54 ||
ekameva hi sāhāyyaṃ kuru mātaratandritā |
anujñādānamātraṃ ca āśībhirabhinandaya || 55 |
sā'pi jñātvā mahāvīryaṃ kumāraṃ kukṣisambhavam |
mahatyotsāhasampattyā rājamānamuvāca tam || 56 ||
anyairdurāsadaṃ yatpadaṃ tadāsahitaṃ viddhītyanvayaḥ || 54 ||
anujñādānamātraṃ ceti cakāro bhinnakrame | anujñādānamātraṃ kuru āśībhirabhi -
nandaya cetyarthaḥ || 55 ||
rājamānaṃ bhrājamānam || 56 ||
dhruva vole-
mujhe lar̤akā jānakara apamāna mata karo || 52 |

sāṣṭakavarṣadeśīyaṃ tathāpi kathayāmyaham
sapatnīvākyabhallībhibhinne || 57 |
mahati me hṛdi |
tava vāṣpaughavārīṇi na tiṣṭhanti karomi kim || 58 |
tāni manye'tra mārgeṇa sravantyavirataṃ śiśo |
sravantīśca cikīrṣayanti pratikūlajalāḥ kila || 5 9 |
śayyate'neneti śayaḥ pādaḥ | pādaprasāraṇapūrvakaṃ hi sarve śerata iti sarveṣāmanubhava-

tvadekatanayā tāta tvadādhāraikajīvitā |
tvamajjayaṣṭirasi me tvanmukhāsaktalocanā | 60 |
labdho'si katibhiḥ kaṣṭairiṣṭāḥ samprārthya devatāḥ |
tvanmukhendūdaye tāta manmanaḥ kṣīranīradhiḥ || 61 ||
ānandapayamāpūrya kucāvudvelito bhavet |
tvadaṅgasaṅgasambhūtasukhasandohaśītalā || 62 ||
sukhaṃ śaye suśayane prāvṛtya pulakāmbaram |
apo'tha samupaspṛśya tāmbūlaṃ parigṛhya ca || 63 ||
svadāsyasyauṣṭhapuṭakadugdhavādhivirvādhitām
sudhāṃ sudhāṃśuvadanadhayantyapi dhinomi na ||| 64 |
evaṃ kathañciddāsyamānā'nujñāyāḥ putraviśleṣajanitakhedāyā vilāpamāhaturathetyataḥ

prāpa śrutipathaṃ yadā |
sapatnīvākyadavathustadaiva syāt savepathuḥ
yadaṅga nidrāsi || 65 |
ciraṃ dhyāyantyasmi tadetyaham
kadā nidrādaridro'sau bhavitā'rkodaye'bjavat |
yadopeyā gṛhān vatsa khelitvā bālakhelanaiḥ |
tadā'nardhyārghyaṃ puttraṣṭuṃ stanau syātāmivonmukhau ||
yadā saudhādviniryāyāḥ 67 ||
padamarekhāṅkitaṃ padam |
prāṇānāṃ te yiyāsūnāṃ tadā tadavalambanam || 68

yadā yadā bahiryāsi putra tricaturaṃ padam |
tadā tadā mama prāṇaḥ kaṇṭhaprāghuṇikī bhavet || 6 9 |
citraṃ putra tvarayati yātuṃ me mānasāṇḍajaḥ |
sudhādhārādhara iva bahiścirayati tvayi || 70 |
atha tiṣṭhantu kaṭhināḥ prāṇāḥ kaṇṭhāṭavītaṭe |
tapasyanto'tisantaptāstapase tvayi yāsyati || 71 |
ityanujñāmanuprāpya jananīcaraṇāmbujau |
kṣaṇaṃ maulijajambālajaḍau kṛtvā dhruvo yayau || 72 |

parigumpaya ca |
netrendovarajāmālānuvasyopāyanī
mātrā tanmārgarakṣārthaṃ kṛtā || 73 |
tadā tadanugīkṛtāḥ |
parairavārya prasarāḥ svāśīrvādāḥ paraḥśatāḥ
svasaudhāt || 74 ||
sa vinirgatya bālo'bālaparākramaḥ |
anukūlena marutā darśitā'dhvā'viśadvanam || 75
sa'maruttaruśākhāgra |
prasāraṇamiṣeṇa saḥ
kṛtāhūtiriva premṇā vanena vanamāviśat || 76 ||
sa mātṛdaivatobhijñaḥ kevalaṃ rājavartmani |
na veda kānanādhvānaṃ kṣaṇaṃ dadhyau nṛpātmajaḥ || 77
tayā ||

yāvadunmīlya nayane puraḥ paśyati sa dhruvaḥ |
tābaddadarśa saptarṣīnata kitagatīna vane || 78 ||
bāliśeṣvasahāyeṣu bhavedbhāgyaṃ sahāyakṛt |
araṇyānyāṃ raṇe gehe tato bhāgyaṃ hi kāraṇam || 7 9 |
kva rājatanayo bālo - gahanaṃ kva ca tadvanam |
balātsvasātprakurvatyai namaste bhavitavyate || 80 |
yatra yasya hi yadbhāvyaṃ śubhaṃ vā'śubhameva ca |
ākṛṣya bhāvinī rajjustatra tasya hi dāpayet || 81 ||
anyathā vidadhātyeṣa mānavo buddhivaibhavāt |
bhagavatyā bhavitryā'sau vidadhyādvidhiranyathāṃ ||| 82 |
na vayo na ca vaicitryaṃ na citraṃ vidadhe hitam |
na balaṃ nodyamaḥ puṃsāṃ kāraṇaṃ prākkṛtaṃ kṛtam || 83 ||
araṇyānyāṃ mahāraṇye || 7 9 |
vaicitryaṃ vividhacitrīkaraṇam | citraṃ citrīkaraṇamātram | cittamiti vā pāṭhaḥ |

bhāgyasūtrairivākṛṣyopanītān titejasaḥ
tilakāṅkitasadbhālān pramumoda ha || 84 ||
kuśopagrahitāṅgulon |
kṛṣṇājinopaviṣṭāṃśca yajñasūtrairalaṅkṛtān
sākṣasūtrakarān kiñcidvinimīlitalocanān |
sudhautasūkṣma kāṣāyavāsaḥ prāvaraṇānvitān || 86
akāṇḍe'pi |
mahābhāgān militān saptanīradhīn |
citraṃ vipadvinirmagnānuddidhīrṣūniva prajāḥ
upagamya vinamrāṃsa : pravaddhakarasampuṭaḥ
dhruvo vijñāpayāñcakre praṇamya |
lalitaṃ vacaḥ || 88 |
dhruva uvāca-
avaita māṃ munivarā : sunītyudarasambhavam |
uttānapādatanayaṃ dhruvaṃ dhruvaṃ nirviṇṇamānasam ||| 8 9 |
iti sa dhruvaḥ saptarṣīn dṛṣṭvā pramumoda ha | anantaraṃ praṇamya lalitaṃ vaco vijñāpayāñcakra

idaṃ vanamanuprāptaṃ sanāthaṃ yuṣmadaṅghribhiḥ |
prāyo'nabhijñaṃ sarvatra mahaddharyuṣitamānasam || 9 0 |
te dṛṣṭrorjasvalaṃ bālaṃ svabhāvamadhurākṛtim |
anarghya nayanepathyaṃ mṛdugambhīrabhāṣiṇam || 9 1 ||
upopaveśya śiśukaṃ procurve vismitā bhṛśam |
aho bāla viśālākṣa mahārājakumāraka || 9 2 ||
vicāryā'pi na jānomo vada nirvedakāraṇam |
adya te hyarthacintā no kvā'pamānaḥ prasūrgṛhe || 63 ||
nīrukśarorasampattinirvede kiṃ nu kāraṇam |
anavāptā'bhilāṣāṇāṃ vairāgyaṃ jāyate nṛṇām || 9 4 |
mahatyā ṛddhayā uṣitamadhyuṣitamāśritaṃ mānasaṃ yasya sa tathā tam || 9 0 |

kumārastvaṃ tathā katham |
svabhāvabhinnaprakṛtau loke'sminna manogatam ||| 65 |
avagantuṃ hi śakyeta yūno vṛddhasya vā śiśoḥ |
iti śrutvā vacasteṣāṃ sahajapremanirbharam || 66 |
dhruva uvāca-
vācaṃ jagrāha sa tadā śiśuḥ prāṃśumanorathaḥ |
preṣito rājasevāthaṃ jananyā'haṃ sunīśvarāḥ || 67 ||
rājā'ṅkamārurukṣuhi surucyā paribhatsitaḥ |
uttamaṃ cottamīkṛtya māṃ ca manmātaraṃ tathā || 68 |
dhikkṛtya praśaśaṃsa svaṃ nirvede kāraṇantvidam |
niśamyeti śiśorvākyaṃ parasparamavekṣyate || 66 |
kṣātrameva śaśaṃsustadaho bāle'pi na kṣamā || 100 |

ṛṣaya ūcu : - kastavā'sti manorathaḥ |
kimasmābhiraho kāryaṃ
jñāto bhavatu tāvat sa naḥ śravogocarī kuru || 101 ||
dhruva uvāca- bandhuruttamaścottamottamaḥ |
munayo mama yo
pitrā dattaṃ ca so'dhyāstāṃ tadbhadrāsanamuttamam || 102 |
bhavatkṛtaṃ hi sāhāyyametadicchāmi suvratāḥ |
prāyo jāne na bālatvādupadeśastaducyatām || 103 ||
ananyanṛpabhuktaṃ tadyadanyebhyaḥ tadyadanyebhyaḥ samucchritam |
indrādiduravāpaṃ yatkathaṃ labhyaṃ durāsadam || 104 ||
śravaḥ śravaṇendriyaṃ tadgocarī kuru || 101 ||

svabhujārjitam |
manorathapathātītaṃ bhavedyatpiturapyaho

atriruvāca-
anāsvāditagovindapadāmbujarajo rasaḥ |
manorathapathātītaṃ sphītaṃ nākalayetpadam ||| 110 |
aṅgirā uvāca- sampadāmiha |
adavīyaḥ padaṃ tasya sarvāsāṃ
kamalākāntakāntāṃghri kamale yaḥ suśīlayet || 111 |
pulastya uvāca-
yasya smaraṇamātreṇa mahāpātakasantatiḥ | |
paramāntamavāpnoti sa viṣṇuḥ sarvado dhruva ||| 112 |
dhyāhartavyo yattadornityasambandhāt || 10 9 ||
marīcyanurūpamupadeśamatriruvāca | anāsvāditeti | padaṃ sthānam | phalamiti

yadāhuḥ paramaṃ brahma pradhānapuruṣātparam
yanmāyayā tataṃ |
sarvaṃ sarvaṃ dāsyati so'cyutaḥ || 113 ||
kraturuvāca-
yo yajñapuruṣo viṣṇurvedavedyo ' janārdanaḥ |
antarātmā'sya jagataḥ sa tuṣṭaḥ kiṃ na yacchati || 114 ||
vasiṣṭha uvāca —
yadbhūnartanarvātanyaḥ siddhayo'ṣṭau nṛpātmaja |
tamārādhya hṛṣīkeśamapavargo'pyadūrataḥ || 115 ||

dhruva uvāca - prati |
satyamuktaṃ munīśānā viṣṇorārādhanaṃ
kathaṃ vā bhagavānijyaḥ sa vidhiścopadiśyatām || 116 ||
munaya ūcu : - jāgratā tathā |
tiṣṭhatā gacchatā vāpi svapatā
śayānenopaviṣṭena japyo nārāyaṇaḥ sadā || 117 ||
dvādaśākṣara mantreṇa vāsudevātmakena ca |

pītavāsasamacyutam |

tvamapyetena mantreṇa vāsudevaparo bhava |
yathā'bhilaṣitāmṛddhi kṣipramāpnuhi sattama || 123 ||
ityuktvā'ntarhitāḥ sarve mahātmāno munīśvarāḥ |
vāsudevamanā bhūtvā dhruvo'pi tapase gataḥ || 124 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dhruvalokavarṇane dhruvopadeśonāmaikona-
viśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 1 9 ||

|| atha viṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
gaṇāvūcatu : - -
auttānapādinirgatya tataḥ kānanato dvija |
ramyaṃ madhuvanaṃ prāpa yamunāyāstaṭe mahat || 1 ||
ādyaṃ bhagavataḥ sthānaṃ tatpuṇyaṃ harimedhasaḥ |
pāpo'pi jantustatprāpya niṣpāpo jāyate dhruvam || 2 ||
japan vāsudevākhyaṃ paraṃ brahma nirāmayam |
apaśyattanmayaṃ viśvaṃ dhyānastimitalocanaḥ || 3 ||
saptarṣyādiṣṭamārgasya dhruvasyāmitatejasaḥ |
varṇyate viṃśatitame'dhyāye caryātapaḥ sthiteḥ ||
dhruvo'pi tapase gata ityuktaṃ tataḥ paraṃ kiṃ vṛttamityākāṅkṣāyāmāhatuḥ |

hariharisu sarvāsu harirharimarīciṣu |
śivāmṛgamṛgendrādirūpaḥ kānanago hariḥ || 4 ||
jale śālūrakūrmādirūpeṇa bhagavān hariḥ |
hariraśvādirūpeṇa mandurāsvapi bhūbhujām || 5 |
anantarūpaḥ pātāle gagane'nantasaṃjñakaḥ |
eko'pyanantatāṃ yāto rūpabhedairanantakaiḥ || 6 ||
deveṣu yo vasennityaṃ devānāṃ vasatihi yaḥ |
sa vāsudevaḥ sarvatra dīvyedyadvāsanāvaśāt || 7 ||
vāsudevamayatvaṃ prapañcayato harirityādinā tasyekṣaṇe ityataḥ prāktanena granthena |

sārthakatāṃ gataḥ |
viṣṇunāmasvarūpe hi sarvavyāpanaśīlini

tasyekṣaṇe samīkṣete nānyadviṣṇupadādṛte |
nirīkṣyaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣo nānyo niyamato hyataḥ || 12 ||
nānyaśabdagrahau tasya jātau śabdagrahāvapi |
vinā mukundagovindadāmodaracaturbhuja || 13 ||
govindacaraṇārthāca tatpriyaṃ karma vai vinā |
śaṅkhacakrāṅkitau tasya nā'nyakarmakarau karau || 14 ||
nirdvandvacaraṇadvandvaṃ tanmano manute hareḥ |
niścalatvamavāpa ha || 15 ||
hitvā'nyanmanaṃ sarvaṃ

tasya nārāyaṇāṅgaṇam |
no carato'nyatra carato vipulaṃ tapaḥ
vāṇī pramāṇīkriyate || 16 ||
govindaguṇavarṇane |
joṣaṃ samāsatā tena mahāsāraṃ tapasyatā
nitāntakamalākāntanāmadheyasudhārasam || 17 ||
rasayantī na
rasanā tasyānyarasasaspṛhā || 18 |
śrīmukundapadadvandvapadma āmodapramoditam
gandhāntaraṃ na taghrāṇaṃ parijighratyaśīghragam |

tvagindriyaṃ madhuripoḥ parispṛśya padadvayam |
sarvasparśasukhaṃ prāpa tasya bhūjānijanmanaḥ || 20 ||
śabdādiviṣayādhāraṃ sāraṃ dāmodaraṃ param |
dhruvendriyāṇi samprāpya kṛtārthānyabhavaṃstadā || 21 ||
luptāni sarvatejāṃsi tattapastapanodaye |
candrasūryānalakṣaṇāṃ pradīpitajagattraye || 22 ||
indracandrāgnivaruṇasamoraṇadhanādhipāḥ
yamanairṛtamukhyāśca jātāḥ svapadaśaṅkitāḥ || 23 ||

tato dhruvāt samuttresuḥ |
svādhikāraidhitādhayaḥ || 24 ||
yatra yatra dhruvaḥ pādaṃ minoti pṛthivītale
dharā tasya bharākrāntā |
vinamettatra tatra vai || 25 |
aho tadaṅgasaṅgāni tyaktvā jāḍyaṃ jalānyapi |
rasavanti padasthāni sphurantyanyatra tadbhayāt
yāvanti viṣvaktejāṃsi || 26 ||
siddharūpaguṇāni ca |
netrātithoni tāvanti tattapastejasā'bhavan
vimānaiścarantīti || 27 ||
svādhikāranimitte vaimānikāḥ | samuttresuratiśayena trāsaṃ prāpuḥ | 1 svādhikāre
edhito vardhita ādhirmānasī vyathā yeṣāṃ te tathā || 24 |
minoti prakṣipati || 25 ||

aho nijaguṇasparśaḥ satataṃ mātariśvanā |
dūradeśāntarastho'pi tattvaco viṣayīkṛtaḥ || 28 ||
vyomnā'pi śabdaguṇinā dhruvārādhanabuddhinā |
śabdajātastvaśeṣo'pi tatkarṇaśaraṇīkṛtaḥ || 26 |
ārādhito'nudivasaṃ sabhūtairapi pañcabhiḥ | |
tapa eva paraṃ mene govindārpitamānasaḥ || 30 |
kaustubhodbhāsitahṛdaḥ pītakauśeyavāsasaḥ |
dhyānāttejomayaṃ viśvaṃ tenaikṣi nṛpasūnunā || 31 ||
marutvatvātimahatī cintā''ptā tattapo bhayāt |
matpadaṃ cedākākṣiṣyadaha riṣyat dhrubaṃ dhruvaḥ || 32 |

niyantuṃ yamināṃ yamān |
sa tu yūni prabhavati nā'trabāle karomi kim
tapasvināṃ || 33 ||
tato hantuṃ dvau matsāhāyyakāriṇau |
kāmakrodhau na tāvasmin prabhavetāṃ śiśau dhruve
eka eva || 34 ||
kilopāyo bāle me prabhaviṣyati |
bhūtālīṃ bhīṣaṇākārāṃ prahiṇomoha tadbhiye || 35
bālatvād |
bhīṣito bhūtaistapastyakṣyatyasau dhruvam |
iti niścitya bhūtāloṃ preṣayāmāsa vāsavaḥ || 36
bhallūkākārasarvāṅga uṣṭralamba śirodharaḥ |
kaściddurvarśadaśanastvabhyadhāvattamarbhakam || 37
niyantuṃ nirākartuṃ nāśayitumiti yāvat | apsarovargo'psaraḥsamūhaḥ | yūni

taṃ vyāghravadanaḥ kaścid vyādāya vikaṭānanam |
dvipoccadehasaṃsthāno muhurgarjan samabhyagāt || 38 ||
rayāttu māṃsakaṃ bhuñjan kaścidvikadaṃṣṭrakaḥ |
roṣāttamabhidudrāva dṛṣṭvā santarjayanniva || 3 9 |
atitīkṣṇaviṣāṇāgraistaṭānuccān vidārayan |
khurāgraidalayan bhūmi mahokṣo'bhijagarja tam ||| 40 |
kaściddhi pannagībhūya phaṭāṭopabhayānakaḥ |
atiloladvirasanaḥ pusphūrja nikaṣā ca tam || 41 |
kaścicca mahiṣākāraḥ kṣipan śṛṅkhāgrato girīn |
lāṅgūlatāḍitadharaḥ śvasan vegāttamāptavān || 42 ||
dvipo hastī || 38 ||

bibhradrudvayaṃ bhūto vyāttāsyastamabhīṣayat

ulūkākāratāṃ dhṛtvā phūtkārairatidāruṇaiḥ |
hṛdaya | kampanaiḥ kaścid bhoṣayāmāsa taṃ dhruvam || 48 ||
yakṣiṇī kācidānīya rudantaṃ kasyacicchiśum |
apibadrudhiraṃ koṣṭhāccakhādāsthimṛṇālavat || 4 9 ||
pipāsitādya rudhiraṃ te pipāsyāmyahaṃ dhruva |
yathā'sya bālasya tathā cavitvāsthīni vādinī || 50 |
ānīya tṛṇadārūṇi paristīrya samantataḥ |
dāvāgni jvālayāmāsa kācid vātyā virvādhatam || 51 |
vetālīrūpamāsthāya bhaṅktā kācittarūn girīn |
rurodha gaganādhvānaṃ kampayanto ca taṃ bhṛśam || 52 |
anyā sunītirūpeṇa tamabhiprekṣya dūrataḥ |
rurodātīva duḥkhārtā vakṣoghātaṃ muhurmuhuḥ || 53 |
ulūkākāratāṃ pecakaveṣam ||| 48 |
mṛṇālavat padmanālavat || 4 9 ||

kāruṇyapūrṇavātsalyamatīvātanvatī satī

na nidrāmi na jāgama nā'śnāmi na pibāmyaham |
dhyāyāmi kevalaṃ tvā'haṃ yoginova viyogino || 56 |
nidrādaridranayanā svapne'pi na tavānanam |
ānandi sarvathā yanme mandabhāgyā vilokaye || 60 |
tvadānanapratinidhividhavidhurayā mayā
uditvaro'pi nāloki tāpaṃ vai tyaktukāmayā || 61 ||
tvadālāpasamālāpaṃ kalayan kila kākalīm |
kokilo s pi mayāṇi nālakākorṇakarṇayā ||| 62 |

nā'nilo'pi mayāliṅgi |
kvacidviśrāntayā bhṛśam ||| 63 |

anena vayasā bāla khelanīyaṃ tvayā'niśam |
bālakrīḍanakairanyaiḥ savayaḥ śiśubhiḥ samam || 68 |
tataḥ kaumāramāsādya vayo'bhidhyānaśīlinā |
bhavatā sarvavidyānāṃ bhāvyaṃ vai pāradṛśvanā || 66 |
vayo'tha caturaṃ prāpya yoṣāstrakcandanādikān |
nirvekṣyasi bahūn bhogānindriyārthān kṛtārthayan || 70 ||
utpādyā'tha bahūnputrān guṇino dharmavatsalān |
parisaṃkrāmitaśrī kasteṣvatho tvaṃ tapaśvara || 71 |
idānīmeva tapasi bālye vayasi kaḥ śramaḥ |
pādāṅguṣṭhakaroṣāgniḥ kadā maulimavāpsyati || 72 ||
śīlinā anusandhānaśīlinetyarthaḥ | adhyayanaśīlineti kacit | pāradṛśvanā
pāragena || 6 9 || vaya
caturaṃ dakṣaṃ yauvanam | yadvā kaumārapogaṇḍakiśorāpekṣayā caturaṃ caturthaṃ

hṛtamānena kenacit |
paribhraṣṭaśriyā vā'pi taptavyaṃ teṣu

sā'pi pratyutabhītā taṃ dhruvaṃ dhruvaviniścayam |
namaskṛtya yathāyātaṃ yātā vyarthamanorathā || 80 |
garjatkādambinījālaṃ vyomni vai vyākulaṃ yathā |
vṛthā bhavati samprāpya manāganilalolatām || 81 ||
atha jambhāriṇā sādhaṃ bhītāḥ sarve divaukasaḥ |
saṃmantrya tvaritā jagmurbrahmāṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ dvija || 82 ||
natvā vijñāpayāmāsuḥ pariṣṭutya pitāmaham |
vaco'vasaramālokya pṛṣṭāgamanakāraṇāḥ || 83 ||
devā ūcu : -
dhātaruttānapādasya tanayena suvarcasā |
tapatā tāpitāḥ sarve trilokītalavāsinaḥ ||| 84 |
samyak saṃvidmahe tāta dhruvasya na manīṣitam |
padaṃ parijihīrṣuḥ sa kasyāsmāsu mahātapāḥ || 85 |

pratyuvācā'tha caturānanaḥ |
tān sarvān dhruvato bhotamānasān || 86 |
brahmovāca-
na bhetavyaṃ surāstasmād dhruvād dhruvapadaiṣiṇaḥ |
vrajantu vijvarāḥ sarve na sa vaḥ padamicchati || 87 |
na tasmād bhagavadbhaktād bhetavyaṃ kenacit kvacit |
niścitaṃ viṣṇubhaktā ye na te syuḥ paratāpinaḥ || 88
ārādhya |
viṣṇuṃ deveśaṃ labdhvā tasmāt svakāṃkṣitam |
bhavatāmapi sarveṣāṃ padāni sthirayiṣyati ||| 8 9 |
niśasyeti ca gīrvāṇāḥ praṇotaṃ brahmaṇā vacaḥ |
praṇipatya svadhiṣṇyāni prahṛṣṭāḥ parivavrajuḥ || 60
atha nārāyaṇo devaḥ taṃ dṛṣṭvā dṛḍhamānasam |
ananyaśaraṇaṃ bālaṃ gatvā tārkṣyaratho'bravīt || 61 ||
surucyāḥ kuceṣṭitaṃ jñātvā vihasya || 86 |

śrīviṣṇuruvāca-
prasanno'smi mahābhāga varaṃ varaya suvrata |
tapaso'smānnivartasva ciraṃ khinno s si bālaka ||| 62 |
vaco'mṛtaṃ samākarṇya paryunmīlya vilocane | |
indranīlamaṇijyotiḥ paṭalīṃ paryalokayat || 63 ||
pratyagravikasannīlotpalānāṃ nikurambake : |
protphullitāṃ samantācca rodaso sarasomiva || 64 ||
lakṣmīdevīkaṭākṣaughaiḥ kaṭākṣitamivā'khilam |
dhruvastadā nirekṣiṣṭa dyāvābhūmyoryadantaram || 65 ||
prodyatkādambinīmadhya vidyuddāmasamānaruk
puraḥ pītāmbaraḥ kṛṣṇaḥ tena netrātithīkṛtaḥ || 66 ||

yathā |
tathā dhruveṇaikṣi tadā garuḍavāhanaḥ ||
sunīlagaganaṃ 67 ||
yadvad bhūṣitaṃ tu kalāvatā |
pītena vāsasā yuktaṃ sa dadarśa hari tadā
daṇḍavat || 68 ||
praṇipatyā'tha paritaḥ pariluṇṭhya ca |
ruroda dṛṣṭveva ciraṃ pitaraṃ duḥkhitaḥ śiśuḥ ||
nāradena sanandena sanakena susaṃstutaḥ |
anyaiḥ sanatkumārādyairyogibhiryogināṃ varaḥ || 100 |
kāruṇyavāṣpanīrārdrapuṇḍarīkavilocanaḥ
dhruvamutthāpayāñcakre cakrī dhṛtvā kareṇa tam || 101 ||
nabha ākāśa eva nikaṣapāṣāṇa . svarṇaparīkṣāpāṣāṇa , sa cāsau merureva kāñcanaṃ
svarṇaṃ tena rekhito'ṅkitaśca sa yathā dṛśyate , tathā tadā garuḍavāhano hariḥ dhruveṇa aikṣi

haristu paripasparśa tadaṅgaṃ dhūlidhūsaram |
karābhyāṃ sukaṭhorābhyāṃ nityaṃ śastraparigrahāt || 102 ||
sparśanāddevadevasya susaṃskṛtamayī śubhā |
vāṇo pravṛttā tasyā syāt tuṣṭāvā'tha dhruvo harim ||103 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dhruvākhyāne bhagavaddarśanaṃ nāma
viśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 20 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ viśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 20 ||

|| athaikaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
dhruva uvāca-
namo hiraṇyagarbhāya sarvasṛṣṭividhāyine |
hiraṇyaretase tubhyaṃ suhiraṇyapradāyine ||
namo 1 |
harasvarūpāya bhūtasaṃhārakāriṇe |
mahābhūtātmabhūtāya bhūtānāṃ pataye namaḥ || 2 |
ekādhikatame viśe'dhyāye bālo mahāmanāḥ |
tuṣṭāva jagadīśānaṃ lokāptistasya vaṇyate || 1 ||
saguṇāguṇabhedena tathā viśvamayātmanā |
astāvītparamānandaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ hṛṣṭamanā dhruvaḥ || 2 ||
tatra prathamato brahmarudraviṣṇurūpeṇa praṇamati | namo hiraṇyagarbhāyetyādinā |
hiraṇyagarbhāya hiraṇyavarṇāṇḍādhārāya | sṛṣṭiviṣayaṃ vijñānasāmarthyaṃ vā hiraṇyaṃ
yasya tasyā iti vā | sarvasṛṣṭividhāyine ādhyātmikādhibhūtādhidaivikasakalaprapañca- tadgarbhe

namaḥ sthitikṛte tubhyaṃ viṣṇave prabhaviṣṇave |
tṛṣṇāharāya kṛṣṇāya mahābhārasahiṣṇave || 3
namo daityamahāraṇyadāvavahnisvarūpiṇe |
daityadrumakuṭhārāya namaste śārṅgapāṇaye || 4 |
namaḥ kaumodakī vyagrakarāgrāya gadādhara |
mahādanujanāśāya namo nandakadhāriṇe || 5 |
vyāpakāya viśate praviśata iti vā | prabhaviṣṇave bhavanaśīlāya | tṛṣṇā tarṣo viṣaya-
vāsanā vā taddharāya | kṛṣṇāya sadānandarūpāyeti puruṣārthatā darśitā |
kṛṣirbhūvācakaḥ śabdo ṇaśca nirvṛtivācakaḥ |
tayoraikyaṃ paraṃ brahma kṛṣṇa ityabhidhīyate || iti smṛteḥ |
mahābhārasahiṣṇave varāharūpeṇa kūrmarūpeṇa śeṣarūpeṇa vā || 3 |
viṣṇutvaṃ prapañcayanpraṇamati | namo detyetyārabhya jarāyujetyantena | daityā eva
mahāraṇyāni teṣu dāvāgnisvarūpiṇe vanāgnirūpāya | diteḥ putrāḥ daityāsta eva
sa tasmai || 4 ||
kumudākhyasya daityasyeyaṃ kaumodakī gadā , tasyā dhāraṇārthaṃ vyagrāṇi udyuktāni
karāgrāṇyaṅgulayo yasya tasmai | gadāṃ kaumodakīṃ dharatīti gadādharaḥ | mahādanujāḥ danoḥ
kaśyapabhāryāyā jātā vipracittipramukhāsteṣāṃ nāśāya | nandakastannāmā khaḍga-
staddhāriṇe || 5 |

namaścakradharāya ca |
dharādharāya vārāharūpiṇe paramātmane ||
namaḥ kamalahastāya 6 |
namo kamalāvallabhāya te |
matsyādirūpāya namaḥ kaustubhavakṣase
namo vedāntavedyāya || 7 ||
namaḥ śrīvatsadhāriṇe |
namo guṇasvarūpāya guṇine guṇavarjite
namaste || 8 |
padmanābhāya pāñcajanyadharāya ca
vāsudeva namastubhyaṃ |
devakīnandanāya ca || 9 ||
śrayantyetāṃ yogino'yogino veti śrībrahmavidyā'vidyā vā tayoḥ pataye'dhiṣṭhātre

pradyumnāya namastubhyamaniruddhāya te namaḥ |
kaṃsavināśāya namaścāṇūramardine ||| 10 |
namaḥ
dāmodara hṛṣīkeśa govindā'cyuta mādhava |
upendra kaiṭabhā'rāte madhuhantaradhokṣaja ||| 11 |
sarvatrā'sau samastaṃ ca vasatyatreti vai yataḥ |
tataḥ sa vāsudeveti vidvadbhiḥ paripaṭhyate || iti |
vasudevasyā'patyaṃ vāsudeva iti vā tatsambodhanaṃ tathā | devakīnandanāya dīvyati
sukhātmanā saṃsāracakreṇa vā krīḍatīti vidyā devakaputrī vā devakī , tāṃ nandayatīti
tathā || 9 || kenā'pyavatārādau ruddha ityaniruddha-
pradyumnāya prakṛṣṭaṃ dyumnaṃ tejo yasya tasmai | na

vāmanāya pāpahāriṇe |
namastubhyaṃ haraye śauraye namaḥ ||
anantāya namastubhyamanantaśayanāya
rukmiṇīpataye tubhyaṃ ca |
rukmipramathanāya ca || 13 ||
caidyahantre namastubhyaṃ dānavāre'surāraye
mukunda paramānanda nandagopapriyāya ca || 14 ||

namaste puṇḍarīkākṣa danujendraniṣūdana |
namo gopālarūpāya veṇuvādanakāriṇe ||| 15 |
gopīpriyāya keśighne govardhanadharāya ca |
rāmāya raghunāthāya rāghavāya namo namaḥ || 16 ||
rāvaṇāre namastubhyaṃ vibhīṣaṇaśaraṇyada |
ajāya jayarūpāya raṇāṅgaṇavicakṣaṇa || 17 |
mahādevārādhanakāle puṇḍarīkīkṛtamakṣi netraṃ yena mahādevāt puṇḍarīkatulyanetra-
prāptatvādvā puṇḍarīkākṣastatsambodhanaṃ tathā | tathā cādityapurāṇe - " evamuktvā dadau cakra-
mityupakramya netraṃ ca padmasadṛśaṃ viṣṇave prabhaviṣṇave " iti | yadvā puṇḍarīke ivākṣiṇī
yasya sa tathā tatsambodhanaṃ tathā | yadvā puṇḍarīkākṣa he akṣayaparamadhāma | ' puṇḍarīkaṃ paraṃ
dhāmākṣayamavyayamucyata ' iti vacanāt | danujendrāḥ hiraṇyakaśipuprabhutayasteṣāṃ niṣūdana

nānārūpāya śāṅgiṇe |
gadine cakriṇe tubhyaṃ daityacakkavimardine
balāya balabhadrāya balārātipriyāya ca |
baliyajñapramathana namo
hiraṇyakaśiporvakṣo bhaktavaraprada || 16 |
vidāraṇa raṇapriya |
namo brahmaṇyadevāya gobrāhmaṇahitāya
namaste ca || 20 ||
dharmarūpāya namaḥ sattvaguṇāya ca
namaḥ sahasraśirase |
puruṣāya parāya ca || 21 ||
kṣaṇa ādiryasya sa kṣaṇādiḥ , kālastadrūpāya | nānārūpāya prapañcātmane
dhanuḥ vartante yasya tasmai śāṅgiṇe | gadā kaumodakyākhyā'syāstīti gadī | śāṅgaṃ
cakraṃ sudarśanākhyaṃ vartate'syeti cakrī tasmai | daityānāṃ tasmai gadine |
tasmai daityacakravimardine || 18 || cakraṃ samūhaṃ vimadatuṃ śīlaṃ yasya
balā'dhikyādbalaḥ saṅkarṣaṇastasmai balāya | balocchrayād balabhadraḥ , sa

sahasrākṣa sahasrāṃtre sahasrakiraṇāya ca |
sahasramūrte śrīkānta namaste yajñapuruṣa || 22 ||
vedavedyasvarūpāya namo vedapriyāya ca |
vedāya vedagadine sadācārādhvagāmine || 23 ||
vaikuṇṭhāya namastubhyaṃ namo vaikuṇṭhavāsine |
viṣṭaratravase tubhyaṃ namo garuḍagāmine || 24 ||
sahasraśirāṃsyasya tasmai sahasraśīrṣetyādi śruteḥ | pūrṇatvātpuruṣaḥ , puri śayanādvā puruṣaḥ |
' navadvāre pure śete puruṣastena cocyate ' | kārye kāraṇatayā pūrvamapi sthitatvādvā puruṣaḥ |
tathā ca śrutiḥ - pūrvamevāhamihāsaṃ tatpuruṣasya puruṣatvamiti | tadrūpāya | parāya parame-

jaganmaya janārdana |
trivikramāya satyāya namaḥ satyapriyāya
keśavāya ca || 25 ||
namastubhyaṃ māyine brahmagāyine |
taporūpāya tapasāṃ namaste |
phaladāyine || 26 ||
stutyāya stutirūpāya bhaktastutiratāya ca |
namaste śrutirūpāya śrutyācārapriyāya
ca || 27 ||
viṣvaksena viṣvagañcati palāyante daityasenā yasyodyogamātreṇa
gañcatī sarvataḥ prasarpantī kaiścidapyanivāritā senā , yasya | yadvā viṣva-
prapañcarūpa | ' idaṃ sarvaṃ yadayamātmeti śruteḥ | virodhilakṣaṇayā tatsambodhanaṃ tathā | jaganmaya
stānardayatīti dāśarathirūpeṇa janamātraṃ vā ardayati janāḥ puṇyajanā rākṣasā-
janārdana | trivikramāyeti || 25 pralayakāla iti tatsambodhanaṃ he
keśavāya keśināmānaṃ daityaṃ hatavāniti keśavastasmai | tathā ca harivaṃśe-
yasmāttvayā hataḥ keśī tasmānmacchāsanaṃ śṛṇu |
keśavo nāma nāmnā tvaṃ khyāto loke bhaviṣyasi || iti |
keśasaṃjñitāḥ sūryādisaṅkrāntā aṃśavastadvattayā vā keśavaḥ |
aṃśavo ye prakāśante mama te keśasaṃjñitāḥ |
sarvajñāḥ keśavaṃ tasmānmāmāhurdvijasattamāḥ | iti mahābhārate
' brahmaviṣṇuśivākhyātāḥ śaktayaḥ keśasaṃjñitāḥ ' ityādau keśaśabdaḥ śaktiparyāyaḥ |

aṇḍajāya namastubhyaṃ svedajāya namo'stu te |
jarāyujasvarūpāya nama udbhijjarūpiṇe || 28 |
devānāmindrarūpo'si grahāṇāmasi bhānumān |
lokānāṃ satyaloko'si sindhūnāṃ kṣīrasāgaraḥ || 26 ||
surā'pagā'si saritāṃ sarasāṃ mānasaṃ saraḥ |
himavānasi śailānāṃ dhenūnāṃ kāmadhug bhavān || 30 |

sphaṭikaścopaleṣvasi |
nīlotpalaṃ prasūneṣu vṛkṣeṣu tulasī
sarvapūjyaśilānāṃ bhavān || 31 |
vai śālagrāmaśilā bhavān |
muktikṣetreṣu kāśī tvaṃ prayāgastīrthapaṅktiṣu
varṇeṣu śvetavarṇo'si || 32 |
dvipadāṃ brāhmaṇo bhavān |
garuḍo'syaṇḍajeṣvīśa vyavahāreṣu vāg

pratāpināmagnirasi kṣamā'si tvaṃ kṣamāvatām |
dātṛṇāmasi parjanyaḥ pavitrāṇāṃ paro hyasi || 35 |
cāpo'si sarvaśastrāṇāṃ vāto vegavatāmasi |
mano'sīndriyavaryeṣu nirbhayāṇāṃ karo hyasi || 36 |
vyomavyāptimatāṃ tvaṃ vai paramātmā'si cātmanām |
sandhyopāstirbhavān deva sarva nityeṣu karmasu || 37 ||
pratāpināṃ pratāpavatāṃ madhye'gnirasi | ' vasūnāṃ pāvakaścāsmīti ' bhagavadvacanāt | |
kṣamāvatāṃ sahanaśaktimatāṃ kṣamāsahanaśaktirasi | dātṝṇāṃ dānakartṝṇāṃ madhye parjanyo

lābhānāṃ bhavān |
putralābho'si vasantastvamṛtuṣvaho
yugānāṃ || 38 ||
prathamo'si tvaṃ tithīnāṃ tvaṃ kuhū hyati
puṣyo'si nakṣatragaṇe |
saṃkramaḥ sarvaparvasu || 36 ||
yogeṣu vyatipātastvaṃ tṛṇeṣu hi kuśo
udyamānāṃ bhavān |
hi sarveṣāṃ nirvāṇaṃ tvamasi prabho || 40 ||
kratūnāṃ yāgānāṃ madhye'śvamedho'si | dānānāṃ tulāpuruṣādīnāṃ

sarvāsāmiha buddhonāṃ dharmabuddhirbhavānaja | |
aśvatthaḥ sarvavṛkṣeṣu somavallī latāsu ca ||| 41 |
prāṇāyāmo'si sarveṣu sādhaneṣu śuciṣvaho |
sarvadaḥ sarvaliṅgeṣu śrīmān viśveśvaro bhavān || 42 ||
mitrāṇāṃ hi kalatraṃ tvaṃ dharmastvaṃ sarvabandhuṣu |
tvatto nānyajjagatyasminnārāyaṇa carācare ||| 43 |
tvameva mātā tvaṃ tātastvaṃ suhṛttvaṃ mahādhanam |
tvameva saukhya sampattistvamāyurjīvaneśvaraḥ || 44 ||
sarvāsāṃ kāmādibuddhīnāṃ madhye iha jagati he aja dharmabuddhirbhavānasi | sarvavṛkṣeṣu

tatkarma yattvadarpitam |
yattvadarthaṃ vai tattapo yad bhavatsmṛtiḥ
taddhanaṃ dhanināṃ śuddhaṃ || 45 |
yattvadarthe vyayīkṛtam |
sa eva sakalaḥ kālo yasmin jiṣṇo tvamarcyase || 46
tāvacca jīvitaṃ |
śreyo yāvattvaṃ hṛdi vartase |
rogāḥ praśamamāyānti tvatpādodakasevanāt
mahāpāpāni || 47 ||
govinda bahujanmārjitānyapi |
sadyo vilayamāyānti vāsudeveti kīrtanāt
aho puṃsāṃ mahāmohastvaho puṃsāṃ pramādatā |
vāsudevamanādṛtya yadanyatra kṛtaśramāḥ || 46

idameva hi māṅgalyamidameva dhanārjanam |
jīvitasya phalaṃ caitadyaddāmodarakīrtanam || 50 |
adhokṣajātparo dharmo nārtho nārāyaṇātparaḥ |
na kāmaḥ keśavādanyo nāpavargoṃ hari binā ||| 51 |
iyameva parā hānirupasargo'yameva hi |
abhāgyaṃ paramaṃ caitadvāsudevaṃ na yatsmaret || 52 |
harerārādhanaṃ puṃsāṃ kiṃ kiṃ na kurute bata |
putramitrakalatrārtha rājyasvargāpavargadam || 53 |
haratyadhaṃ dhvaṃsayati vyādhīnādhīnniyacchati |
dharmaṃ vivardhayet kṣipraṃ prayacchati manoratham || 54 ||
nārthaṃ iti nakāraḥ kākākṣinyāyenobhayatra sambadhyate | nādhokṣajāditi vā pāṭhaḥ |
apavargo mokṣaḥ || 51 ||

pāpinā'pi prasaṅgena vihitaṃ
pāpināṃ svahitaṃ param || 55 |
yāni pāpāni mahopapadabhāṃjyapi
sulonadhyānasampanno |
nāmoccāro harerharet || 56 |
pramādādapi saṃspṛṣṭo yathā'nalakaṇo

nitāntaṃ kamalākānte śāntaṃ cittaṃ vidhāya yaḥ |
saṃśīlayet kṣaṇaṃ nūnaṃ kamalā tatra niścalā || 58 |
ayameva paro dharmastvidamevaṃ paraṃ tapaḥ |
idameva paraṃ tīrthaṃ viṣṇupādāmbu yatpibet || 5 9 |
tavopahāraṃ bhaktyā yaḥ sevate yajñapuruṣa |
sevitastena niyataṃ puroḍāśo mahādhiyā || 60 |
sa caivāvabhṛthasnātaḥ sa ca gaṅgājalāplutaḥ |
viṣṇupādodakaṃ kṛtvā śaṅkha yaḥ snāti mānavaḥ || 61 |
śālaprāmaśilā yena pūjitā tulasīdalaiḥ |
sa pārijātamālābhiḥ pūjyate surasadmani || 62 ||
atrā'pi vakṣyati -
yadi jātu cidandhakadviṣastava nāmauṣṭhapuṭādviniḥsṛtam |
śivaśaṅkaracandraśekharetyasakṛttasya na saṃsṛtiḥ punaḥ || iti || 57 ||

vā yadi vetaraḥ |
viṣṇubhaktisamāyukto jñeyaḥ sarvottamaśca saḥ
śaṅkhacakrāṅkitatanuḥ śirasā mañjarīdharaḥ |
gopīcandanaliptāṅgī dṛṣṭaścettadaghaṃ
kutaḥ || 64 ||
śaṅkhacakrāṅkitatanuriti gopīcandanādinā , na tu dāhena | bṛhannāradīye dāhena
śaṅkhacakradhāraṇasya niṣiddhatvāt | tathāhi-
yastu santaptaśaṅkhādiliṅgacihnatanurnaraḥ |
sa sarvayātanābhogī cāṇḍālo janmakoṭibhiḥ ||
taṃ dvijaṃ taptaśaṅkhādiliṅgāṅkitatanuṃ naraḥ |
saṃbhāṣya rauravaṃ yāti yāvadindrāścaturdaśa ||
cakrāṅkitatanuryatra tatra ko'pi na saṃvaset |
yadi tiṣṭhenmahāpāpī sahasrabrahmahā bhavet ||
gaṅgāsnānarato vāpi aśvamedharato'pi vā |
cakrāṅkitatanuṃ dṛṣṭvā paśyetsūryaṃ japannaraḥ ||
japecca śatarudrīyamanyathā rauravaṃ vrajet |
brāhmaṇasya tanurjñeyā sarvadevasamāśritā ||
sā cet santāpitā rājan kimu vakṣyāmahe tataḥ |
cakrāṅkitatanurvāpi rāja~lliṅgānvito'pi vā ||
nādhikārī parijñeyaḥ śrautasmārteṣu karmasviti ||
' na ca ataptatanurnatadāmo'śnuta ' iti śrutivirodhena smṛteraprāmāṇyam | śruterarthānta-

pratyahaṃ dvādaśaśilāḥ śālagrāmasya yo'rcayet |
dvāravatyāḥ śilāyuktāḥ sa vaikuṇṭhe mahīyate || 65 |
tulasī yasya bhavane pratyahaṃ paripūjyate |
tadgṛhaṃ nopasarpanti kadācidyamakiṅkarāḥ || 66 |
harināmākṣaramukhaṃ bhāle gopīmṛbāṅkitam | |
tulasīmā litoraskaṃ spṛśeyurna yamānugāḥ || 67 |
gopīmṛttulasīśaṅkhaḥ śālaggrāmaḥ sacakrakaḥ |
gṛhe'pi yasya pañcaite tasya pāpabhayaṃ kutaḥ || 68 |
ye muhūrtāḥ kṣaṇā ye ca yāḥ kāṣṭhā ye nimeṣakāḥ |
ṛte viṣṇusmṛteryātāsteṣu muṣṭo yamena saḥ || 6 9 ||
kva dvayakṣaraṃ harernāma sphuliṅgasadṛśaṃ jvalat |
mahatī ' pātakānāṃ ca rāśistalopamā kva ca || 70 ||
śālagrāmasya campakāraṇyāntargatacakratīrthasya | śālagrāmasya śālagrāmāṇāṃ dvādaśa-
śilā iti vā | dvāravatyāḥ śilā dvārakācakram || 65 ||

tvaktvā'nyaṃ madhusūdanam |
naiva jānāmi na bhajāmi smarāmina ||
na namāmi 71 ||
na ca staumi na paśyāmoha cakṣuṣā
na spṛśāmi na |
vā yāmi gāyāmi na hari vinā || 72 ||
jale sthale ca pātāle'pyanile cānale'cale |
vidyādharā'surasure kinnare vānare nare || 73 ||
tṛṇe streṇe ca pāṣāṇe tarugulmalatāsu
ca |
sarvatra śyāmalatanuṃ bīkṣe śrīvatsavakṣasam || 74 |
sarveṣāṃ hṛdayāvāsaḥ sākṣātsākṣī tvameva hi |
bahirantavinā tvāṃ tu na hyanyaṃ vedmi sarvagam || 75 |
gāyāmi gānaṃ karomi | śrayāmīti kacit || 72 ||

ityuktvā virarāmā'sau śivaśarman dhruvastadā |
devo'pi bhagavān viṣṇustamuvāca prasannadṛk || 76 ||
śrībhagavānuvāca -
ayi bāla viśālākṣa dhruva dhruvamate'nagha |
parijñāto mayā samyak tava hṛtstho manorathaḥ || 77 |
annād bhavanti bhūtāni vṛṣṭerannasamudbhavaḥ |
taddṛṣṭeḥ kāraṇaṃ sūryaḥ sūryādhāro dhruvaidhi bhoḥ || 78 ||
jyotiścakrasya sarvasya graharkṣādeḥ samantataḥ |
gagane bhramato nityaṃ tvamādhāro bhaviṣyasi || 76 |
meḍhībhūtastu vai sarvān vāyupāśairniyantritān |
ākalpaṃ tatpadaṃ tiṣṭha bhrāmayan jyotiṣāṃ gaṇān || 80 ||

āsādi yattadetatte mayā | |
tapasā pratipāditam || 81
keciccaturyugaṃ yāvat kecinmanvantaraṃ ||
tiṣṭhanti dhruva |
tvaṃ tu vaikalpaṃ padametat praśāsyasi
manunā'pi na || 82 ||
yatprāpi kimanyairmānavairdhruva |
tatpadaṃ vihitaṃ tvatsācchukrādyairapi durlabham
anyān varān prayacchāmi stavenā'nena toṣitaḥ |
sunītirapi te mātā tvatsamīpe cariṣyati || 84
idaṃ stotravaraṃ ||
yastu paṭhiṣyati samāhitaḥ |
trisandhyaṃ manujastasya pāpaṃ yāsyati saṃkṣayam || 85
na tasya |
sadanaṃ lakṣmīḥ parityakṣyatyasaṃśayam |
na jananyā viyogaśca na bandhukalahodayaḥ || 86 |

dhruva - stutiriyaṃ puṇyā mahāpātakanāśinī |

nirdhano dhanamāpnuyāt |
abhakto bhaktimāpnoti kīrtanācca
datvā dhruvastuteḥ || 63 ||
dānānyanekāni kṛtvā nānāvratāni ca
yathā lābhānavāpnoti |
tathā stutyā'nayā naraḥ || 64 |
tyaktvā sarvāṇi kāryāṇi tyaktvā japyānyanekaśaḥ
dhruvastutiriyaṃ |
japyā sarvakāmapradāyinī ||| 65
śrībhagavānuvāca — |
dhruvā'vadhehi vakṣyāmi hitaṃ tava mahāmate |
yena te niścalaṃ samyak pakṣametad bhaviṣyati
ahaṃ jigāmiṣustvāsaṃ || 66 |
purīṃ vārāṇasīṃ śubhām |
sākṣādviśveśvaro yatra tiṣṭhate mokṣakāraṇam ||
anekāni dānāni datvā nānāvratāni ca kṛtvā yathā lābhānavāpnoti , tathā'-
nayā stutyā'vāpnoti sarvairdānavratādibhiryatphalaṃ labhyate tatsarvamanayā stutyā prāpyata

vipannānāṃ ca jantūnāṃ yatra viśveśvaraḥ svayam |
karṇe jāpaṃ prakurute karmanirmūlanakṣamam || 68 |
asya saṃsāraduḥkhasya sarvopadravadāyinaḥ |

vaikuṇṭhanagarāt kāśīṃ nityaṃ 541
ahamāyāmi viśveśarmācatum
niyamājjagadacyaṃ tadacatām
mayi yā paramā śaktistrilokyārakṣaṇakṣamā || 104 |
tana heturmaheśānaḥ |
sa sudarśanacakradaḥ || 105
purā jālandharaṃ daityaṃ mamā'pi parikampanam |
pādāṅguṣṭhāgrarekhotthaṃ |
cakraṃ sṛṣṭvā haro'harat || 106 |
tacca cakraṃ mayā labdhaṃ netrapadmā'rcanādvibhoḥ

tanmayā tava rakṣārthaṃ bhūtavidrāvaṇaṃ param |
tāvat praṇunnaṃ puratastataścāhamihāgataḥ || 108 ||
kāśīmidānīṃ yāsyāmi viśveśvaravilokane |
adya yātrā'sti mahatī kārtikyāṃ bahupuṇyadā || 106 |
kārtikasya caturdaśyāṃ viśveśaṃ yo vilokayet |
snātvā cottaravāhinyāṃ na tasya punarāgatiḥ || 110 ||
ityuktvā tārkṣyamāropya dhruvamānandameduram |
kṣaṇādvārāṇasīṃ prāpa hariḥ smaraharoṣitām || 111 ||
pañcakrośyāśca sīmānaṃ prāpya devo janārdanaḥ |
vainateyādavāruhya kare dhṛtvā dhruvaṃ tataḥ || 112 |
tatastenaiva santuṣṭasya viśveśvarasya vākyam-
divyaṃ dadāmi te cakramadbhutaṃ tatsudarśanam |
prītyarthaṃ sarvadevānāṃ nirmitaṃ yanmayā purā ||
gṛhītvā tadraṇe daityān jahi viṣṇo mamājñayā |
evamuktvā dadau cakraṃ sūryā'yutasamaprabhamiti || ||
netrameva padmaṃ netrapadma tenā'rcanāt pūjanāt || 107 |

viśveśamabhipūjya ca |
dhruvaṃ babhāṣe bhagavān hitaṃ tasya cikīrṣayan
liṅgaṃ sthāpaya || 113 ||
yatnena kṣetre'traivā'vimuktake
trailokyasthāpanaṃ puṇyaṃ yathā
bhavati te'kṣayam ||| 114 |
niyutaṃ yatparisthāpya liṅgāni phalamāpyate |
anyatra tadihaikena liṅgena parilabhyate
kālena || 115 ||
bhaṅgamāpanaṃ jīrṇoddhāraṃ karoti yaḥ |
iha tasya phalasyāntaḥ pralaye'pi na jāyate || 116
vittaśāṭhyaṃ parityajya ||
prāsādaṃ yo'tra kārayet |
tena datto bhavetsarvo merunayutayojanaḥ
kūpavāpītaḍāgāni || 117 ||
śaktyā yo'tra tu kārayet |
anyatra kāraṇāttasya puṇyaṃ koṭiguṇādhikam || 118 |
prasaṅgājjīrṇoddhārādīnāṃ phalamāha | kālenetyādinā || 116 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekaviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 21 ||

ijyārthamatra yaḥ kuryāt suramyāṃ puṣpavāṭikām |
puṣpe puṣpe phalaṃ tasya suvarṇakusumādhikam || 11 9 |
atra brahmapurīṃ kṛtvā yo viprebhyaḥ prayacchati |
varṣāśanena saṃyuktāṃ tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 120 |
kṣīyante salilānyabdhabhauṃ māśca trasareṇavaḥ |
kṣayo na tasya puṇyasya śivaloke samāsataḥ || 121 |
maṭhānapi tapasvibhyaḥ kārayitvā'tra yo'rpayet |
jīvanopāyasaṃyuktān so'pi so'pi pūrvaphalāśrayaḥ || 122 ||
kṛtvā mahānti puṇyāni yo'tra viśveśvare'rpayet |
na tasya punarāvṛttirghore saṃsārasāgare || 123 |
ananta iti vādoyaṃ mayi loke'tra gīyate |
paraṃ kāśoguṇānāṃ hi mayā'pyanto na labhyate || 124 |
tasmāt prayatnataḥ kāśyāṃ dhruva śreyaḥ samāśrayet |
kāśīśreyaḥ phalaṃ puṃsāmakṣayāyopajāyate || 125 |

gaṇāvūcatu : - 545
dhruvamityupadiśyā'tha jagāma
dhruvo'pi liṅgaṃ garur̤adhvajaḥ |
saṃsthāpya vaidyanāthasamīpataḥ || 126 |
prāsādaṃ sumahatkṛtvā kṛtvā kuṇḍaṃ tadagrataḥ
viśveśvaraṃ samabhyarcya |
kṛtakṛtyo gṛhaṃ yayau || 127 |
dhruveśvaraṃ samabhyarcya dhruvakuṇḍe kṛtodakaḥ
dhruvalokamavāpnoti |
naro bhogasamanvitaḥ || 128 |
dhruvasya paramākhyānaṃ yaḥ paṭhet pāṭhayedapi |
sa viṣṇulokamāsādya jāyata viṣṇuvallabhaḥ
naro dhruvasya caritaṃ prasaṅgena smarannapi |
na pāpairabhibhūyeta mahatpuṇyamavāpnuyāt
iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dhruvastutirnāmekaviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 11

stuti pavitra jimi lahehu , dhruva dhruvapada adhikāra |

|| atha dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
śivaśarmovāca-
dhruvākhyānamidaṃ ramyaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam
mahāścaryakaraṃ |
puṇyaṃ śrutvā tṛpto'smi bhogaṇau || 1 |
agastya uvāca --
itthaṃ yāvad dvijo brūte vimānaṃ vāyuvegagam |
tāvatprāpa maharlokaṃ svarlokātparamādbhutam ||
dvijo'tha 2
lokaṃ saṃvokṣya sarvato mahasāvṛtam |
tau gaṇau pratyuvācedaṃ ko'yaṃ loko manoharaḥ || 3 ||
maharjanastapaḥ satyalokāḥ kāśyāḥ stutistathā |
dvāviṃśatitame'dhyāye varṇyate'maradurlabhā || 1 |
dhruvākhyānamabhinandaṃstasminnātmano'laṃ pratyayābhāvamāha | dhruvākhyānamityanena || 1 ||
mahasā tejasā || 3 |

tāvūcatustato vipraṃ vipraṃ niśāmaya niśāmaya mahāmate |
ayaṃ sa hi maharlokaḥ svarlokātparamādbhutaḥ || 4 ||
kalpāyuṣo vasantyatra tapasā dhūtakalmaṣāḥ |
viṣṇusmaraṇasaṃkṣīṇasamastakleśasañcayāḥ || 5 |
nirvyājapraṇidhānena dṛṣṭvā tejomayaṃ jagat |
mahāyogasamāyuktā vasantyatra surottamāḥ || 6 ||
itthaṃ kathāṃ kathayatorbhagavadgaṇayoḥ priye |
kṣaṇārdhena vimānaṃ tajjanalokaṃ nināya tān || 7 ||
nivasantyamalā yatra mānasā brahmaṇaḥ sutāḥ |
sanandanādyā yogīndrāḥ sarve te hyūrdhvaretasaḥ || 8 |
samastāḥ savāsanāḥ kleśānāṃ avidyāsmitā rāgadveṣābhiniveśānāṃ saṃcayāḥ samūhā yeṣāṃ
te tathā || 5 |
nirvyājapraṇidhānena niṣkapaṭasamādhinā | tejomayaṃ brahmātmakam | ' mahāyogo'tra
jīvaparayoraikyacintanam || 6 ||
itthaṃ pūrvoktāṃ kathāṃ kathayatoḥ satoḥ | tatprasiddham | nināya prāpayāmāsa || 7 |

sarvadvandvavinirmuktāste brahmacāriṇaḥ |
janalokāttapo vasantyatinirmalāḥ || 9 ||
lokasteṣāṃ locanagocaraḥ |
kṛtastena vimānena manovegena
vairājā gacchatā || 10 ||
yatra te devā vaseyurdāhavarjitāḥ
vāsudeve mano |
yeṣāṃ vāsudevāpitakriyāḥ || 11 |
tapasā toṣya govindamabhilāṣavivarjitāḥ
tapolokamimaṃ |
prāpya vasanti vijitendriyāḥ || 12 ||
śiloñchavṛttayo ye vai dantolūkhalikāśca ye
aśmakuṭṭāśca munayaḥ śīrṇaparṇāśinaśca ye || 13 |
dvandvāni śītoṣṇādīni || 9 ||
virājā hiraṇyagarbheṇotpāditā verājāḥ | kiñca | vāsudeve
śilocchetyādīnāṃ prathamāntānāṃ iti || 11 ||

grīṣme pañcāgnitapaso varṣāsu sthaṇḍileśayāḥ |
hemanta śiśirādhe ye ' kṣapanti salile kṣapāḥ || 14 ||
kuśāgranīravibhūṣastṛṣitā yatayo'piban
vātāśino'tikṣudhitāḥ pādāgrāṅguṣṭhabhūspṛśaḥ || 15 |
ūrdhvadoṣo ravidṛśastvekā ṅghristhāṇuniścalāḥ |
ye vai divā nirucchvāsā māsocchvāsāśca ye punaḥ||16 |
māsopavāsavratinaścāturmāsyavratāca ye
ṛtvantatoyapānā ye ye ṣaṇmāsopavāsakāḥ || 17 |
sūryeṇa saha caturdikṣu catubhiragnibhistapo yeṣāṃ te pañcāgnitapasaḥ | sthāṇḍile-

varṣadhārāmbutarṣakāḥ |
ye ca sthāṇūpamāṃ prāptā mṛgakaṇḍūtisaukhyadāḥ

yāvaditthaṃ sa puṇyātmā śṛṇoti gaṇayormukhāt |
tāvannetrātithībhūtaḥ satyaloko mahojjvalaḥ || 22 ||
tvarāvantau gaṇau tatra vimānādavaruhya tau |
sraṣṭāraṃ sarvalokānāṃ tena sādhaṃ praṇematuḥ || 23 ||
brahmovāca - —
gaṇāvasau dvijo dhomān vedavedāṅgapāragaḥ |
smṛtyuktācāracañcuśca pratīpaḥ pāpakarmasu || 24 |
ayi dvija mahāprājña jāne tvāṃ śivaśarmaka |
sādhūkṛtaṃ tvayā vatsa sutorthaprāṇamokṣaṇāt || 25 |
śṛṇoti kathāmiti śeṣaḥ || 22 ||
tena śivaśarmaṇā || 23 |
haṃsasādṛśyavyākhyāpanārtham | sa yathā kṣīranīre vivecayati vivicya ca kṣīraṃ pibati
tathā'yamapi pāpapuṇye vivicya pāpaṃ vihāya puṇyamanutiṣṭhatītyarthaḥ | yadvā smṛtyuktācāreṇa
caryate jñāyata iti smṛtyuktācāracañcuḥ | pratīpo vimukhaḥ || 24 ||
brahmā śivaśarmāṇaṃ sambodhayati | ayoti | apīti pāṭhe niśvaye apiśabdaḥ | he
śivaśarmaka | dayāyāṃ kaḥ || 25 ||

dainandinapralayataḥ bhavatekṣitam
sṛjāmi ca punaḥ punaḥ ||
āverājaṃ pratipadamupasaṃharate 26 ||

capalāni vinirjityendriyāṇi manasā saha |
vihāya vairiṇaṃ lobhaṃ viṣvagguṇagaṇasya ca || 26 ||
dharmavaṃśaharaṃ kāmamartha sañcayahāriṇam |
jarāpalitakartāraṃ viniṣkṛtya vicārataḥ || 30 |
jitvā krodharipuṃ dhairyāttapaso yaśasaḥ śriyaḥ |
śarīrasyāpi hartāraṃ netāraṃ tāmasīṃ gatim || 31 ||
sadā madaṃ parityajya pramādaikapadapradam | |
pramādaikaśaraṇyaṃ ca sampadāṃ vinivartakam || 32 ||
sarvatra laghutāhetumahaṅkāraṃ vihāya ca |
dūṣaṇāropaṇe yatnaṃ kurvāṇaṃ sajjaneṣvapi || 33 ||
kaiḥ sādhanairyāntītyākāṅkṣāyāṃ sādhanānyāha | capalānīti | capalānīndriyāṇī-

mohaṃ mahādroharopaṇaṃ matighātinam |
atyantamandhīkaraṇamandhatāmistradarśakam |

svarlokādadhikaṃ ramyaṃ nahi brahmāṇḍagolake |
sarve yatante svargāya tapodānavratādibhiḥ || 3 9 |
svarlokādapi ramyāṇi pātālānīti nāradaḥ |
prāha svargasadāṃ madhye pātālebhyaḥ samāgataḥ || 40 ||
āhlādakāriṇaḥ śubhrā maṇayo yatra suprabhāḥ |
nāgāṅgābharaṇaprotāḥ pātālaṃ kena tatsamam || 41 |
daityadānavakanyābhiritaścetaśca śobhite |
pātāle kasya na prītirvimuktasyāpi jāyate || 42 ||
divārkaraśmayastatra prabhāṃ tanvati nātapam |
śaśinaśca na śītāya niśi dyotāya kevalam || 43 ||
svarlokādadhikaṃ ramyaṃ sundaraṃ nāstītyatra hetumāha | sarve iti || 3 9 ||
svargasadāṃ devānāṃ madhye || 40 ||
nāgāṅgābharaṇaprotā : nāgānāmaṅgābha raṇalakṣaṇā'laṅkāreṣu protā grathitā maṇayo
yatra pātāle vartante , tatpātālaṃ kena samaṃ na kenā'pi | sarvottamatvāt | nāgābharaṇabhūṣā-
sviti pāṭhe'pi sa evā'rthaḥ || 41 |

vanāni |
nadyo ramyāṇi sadambhāṃsi sarāṃsi ca || 44 ||
kalāḥ puṃskokilālāpāḥ sucailāni śucīni ca |
bhūṣaṇānyatiramyāṇi gandhādyamanulepanam || 45 |
vīṇāveṇumṛdaṅgādiniḥsvanāḥ śrutihāriṇaḥ |
hāṭakeśaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ yatra vai sarvakāmadam ||| 46 |
etānyanyāni ramyāṇi bhogayogyāni dānavaiḥ |
detyorageśca bhujyante pātālāntaragocaraiḥ || 47 ||
pātālebhyo'pi ve ramyaṃ dvija varṣamilāvṛtam |
ratnasānuṃ samāśritya paritaḥ parisaṃsthitam || 48 ||
sūryo gobhirjagat sarvamādīpayati sarvaśaḥ |
trīṇi raśmiśatānyasya bhūrlokaṃ dyotayanti vai ||
trīṇi trīṇi tathā cānyau dvau lokau bhāsayantyuta |
śatañcā'pi adhastāttu pātālaṃ tāpayantyuteti ||
sūryācandramasāvetau gṛhītadehāntarau tatra sta iti kecid vyācakṣate || 43 ||
kalā vidyāḥ || 45 ||
bhogyayogyāni bhogyārhāṇi | bhogayogyānīti kacit || 47 ||

sadā sukṛtino yatra sarvabhogabhujo dvija |
navayauvanasampannā nityaṃ yatra mṛgodṛśaḥ || 46 |
bhogabhūmiriyaṃ proktā śreyo vinimayājitā |
bhujyate tvadvidhairlokaistīrthābhityaktadehakaiḥ || 50 |
aklībabhāṣibhiścāpi . putrakṣetrādyahīnakaiḥ |
paropakārasaṃkṣīṇasukhāyurdhanasañcayaiḥ ||51 ||
santi dvīpā hyanekā vai pārāvārāntarasthitāḥ |
jambūdvīpasamo dvīpo na kvāpi jagatītale || 52 |
tatrāpi navavarṣāṇi bhārataṃ tatra cottamam |
karmabhūmiriyaṃ proktā devānāmapi durlabhā || 53 |
mṛgīdṛśo hariṇīnayanāḥ || 4 9 ||
yo vinimayājitā puṇyaparivartanena sampāditā || 50 |
aklībabhāṣibhiramithyābhāṣibhiḥ satyavādibhirityarthaḥ | putrakṣetre ādye yeṣāṃ
gṛhādīnāṃ te putrakṣetrādyāstadvihonakaistadrahitairityarthaḥ || 51 ||
sarvebhyo dvīpebhyo jambūdvīpasya śreṣṭhayamāha | santīti | dvirgatā āpo yasmin sa

teṣu svargātsamāgatya tu |
ramante tridivaukasaḥ || 54 ||
yojanānāṃ sahasrāṇi navavistāratastvidam |
bhārataṃ prathamaṃ varṣa merordakṣiṇataḥ sthitam || 55 |
tatrāpi himavindhyādrerantaraṃ puṇyadaṃ param |
gaṅgāyamunayormadhye hyantarvedībhuvaḥ parāḥ || 56 |
kurukṣetraṃ hi sarveṣāṃ kṣetrāṇāmadhikaṃ tataḥ |
tato'pi naimiṣāraṇyaṃ svargasādhanamuttamam || 57 ||
dakṣiṇato harivarṣaṃ kimpuruṣañceti | tatra teṣu navasu varṣeṣu bhārataṃ varṣamajanābhaṃ sadbharata-
syaṣaṃbhaputrasya nāmnā vikhyātamuttamaṃ śreṣṭhamityarthaḥ | tathā coktaṃ bhāgavate-
tasyāsīdbharato jyeṣṭho nārāyaṇaparāyaṇaḥ |
ākhyātaṃ varṣametadyannāmnā bhāratamadbhutamiti || 53 |

naimiṣāraṇyato'pīha sarvasmin kṣitimaṇḍale |
sarvebhyo'pi hi tīrthebhyastīrtharājo viśiṣyate || 58 |
svargado mokṣadaścaiva sarvakāmaphalapradaḥ |
prayāgastanmahatkṣetraṃ tīrtharāja iti smṛtaḥ || 5 9 ||
yāgāḥ sarve mayā pūrva tulayā vidhṛtā dvija |
tacca tīrthavaraṃ ramyaṃ kāmikaṃ kāmapūraṇāt || 60 ||
dṛṣṭrā prakṛṣṭaṃ yāgebhyaḥ puṣṭebhyo dakṣiṇādibhiḥ |
prayāgamiti tannāma kṛtaṃ hariharādibhiḥ || 61 ||
brahmaṇā visṛṣṭasya cakrasya nemiḥ śīryate yatra tannimiśaṃ nimiśameva naimiśam |
vāyasarākṣasādivat svārthe taddhitaḥ | tathā ca vāyupurāṇe -
etanmanomayaṃ cakraṃ mayā sṛṣṭaṃ visṛjyate |
yatrāsya śīryate nemiḥ sa deśaḥ tapasaḥ śubhaḥ ||
ityuktvā sūryasaṃkāśaṃ cakraṃ sṛṣṭrā manomayam |
praṇipatya mahādevaṃ visasarja pitāmahaḥ ||
te'pi hṛṣṭatarā viprāḥ praṇamya jaganāṃ prabhum |
prayayustasya cakrasya yatra nemivrvyaśīryata ||
tadvanaṃ tena vikhyātaṃ naimiśaṃ munipūjitam || iti || 57 ||
ko'sau tīrtharāja ityākāṅkṣāyāmāha | svargaṃda iti | mahadutkṛṣṭam | mameti
kacit || 5 9 ||

nāmamātrasmṛteryasya prayāgasya trikālataḥ |
smartuḥ śarore no jātu pāpaṃ vasati kutracit || 62
santi tīrthānyanekāni pāpatrāṇakarāṇi ca |
na śaktānyadhikaṃ dātuṃ kṛtainaḥ pariśuddhitaḥ || 63 ||
janmāntareṣvasaṃkhyeṣu yaḥ kṛtaḥ pāpasañcayaḥ |
duṣpraṇodyo hi nitarāṃ vratairdānaistapojapaiḥ || 64 ||
sa tīrtharājagamanodyatasya śubhajanmanaḥ |
aṅgeṣu vepate'tyantaṃ drumo vātahataṃ yathā || 65 ||
tataḥ krāntā'rdhamārgasya prayāgadṛḍhacetasaḥ |
puṃsaḥ śarīrānniryātumapekṣeta padāntaram || 66 |
bhāgyānnetrātithībhūte tīrtharāje mahātmanaḥ |
palāyate drutataraṃ tamaḥ sūryodaye yathā || 67 |
yāgādibhyaḥ prakṛṣṭatvameva darśayati | nāmamātreti || 62 |
kṛtāni yāni enāṃsi pāpāni teṣāṃ pariśuddhito nāśādityeva || 63 |
sa pāpasañcayaḥ || 64-65 |
padāntaraṃ sthānāntaram || 66 ||

saptadhātumayībhūtatanau pāpāni yāni vai |
keśeṣu tāni tiṣṭhanti vapanādyānti tānyapi || 68 |
evaṃ niṣkaluṣībhūya tataḥ snāyāt sitāsiteṃ |
yaṃ yaṃ kāmamabhidhyāya taṃ tamāpnoti nānyathā ||| 66 |
puṇyarāśi ca vipulaṃ puṇyān bhogānyathepsitān |
svargaṃ prāpnoti tatpuṇyānniṣkāmo mokṣamāpnuyāt || 70 ||
snāyādyo'bhilaṣanmokṣaṃ kāmānanyānvihāya ca |
so'pi mokṣamavāpnoti kāmadāttīrtharājataḥ || 71 ||
tīrtharājaṃ parityajya yo'nyasmātkāmamicchati |
bhāratākhye mahāvarṣe sa kāmaṃ nāpnuyātsphuṭam || 72 ||
satyaloke prayāge ca nāntaraṃ vedmyahaṃ dvija |
tatra ye śubhakarmāṇaste malloka nivāsinaḥ || 73 ||
tvaṅmāṃsarudhirasnāyvasthimajjāśukrāṇīti saptadhātavastanmabhūtatano tatsvarūpa-

sevyaṃ torthāntaraṃ nahi I |
anyatra bhūmivalaye tīrtharājātprayāgataḥ || 74 |
yathāntaraṃ dvijaśreṣṭha bhūpe tvitarasevake |
dṛṣṭāntamātraṃ kathitaṃ prayāgetaratorthayoḥ || 75 ||
yathākathañcittīrthe'smin prāṇatyāgaṃ karotiyaḥ |
tasyātmaghātadoṣo na prāpnuyādopsitānyapi || 76
yasya bhāgyavataścātra tiṣṭhantyasthīnyapi dvija |
na tasya duḥkhaleśo'pi kvāpi janmani jāyate || 77 ||
brahmahatyādipāpānāṃ prāyaścittaṃ cikīrṣuṇā |
prayāgaṃ vidhivatsevyaṃ dvijavākyānna saṃśayaḥ || 78 ||

ki bahūktena viprendra mahodayamabhīpsunā |
sevyaṃ sitā'sitaṃ tīrthaṃ prakṛṣṭaṃ jagatotale || 76 ||
prayāgato'pi tīrtheśāt sarveṣu bhuvaneṣvapi |
anāyāsena vai muktiḥ kāśyāṃ dehāvasānataḥ || 80 ||
prayāgādapi vai ramyaṃ vimuktaṃ na saṃśayaḥ |
yatra viśveśvaraḥ sākṣāt svayaṃ samādhitiṣṭhati || 81 ||
avimuktān mahākṣetrādviśveśa samadhiṣṭhitāt |
na ca kiñcitkvacidramyamiha brahmāṇḍagolake || 82 ||
avimuktamidaṃ kṣetramapi brahmāṇḍamadhyagam |
brahmāṇḍamadhye na bhavet pañcakrośapramāṇataḥ || 83 ||

tathā tathonnayedo lastatkṣetraṃ pralayādapi |||
kṣetrametattriśūlāgne 84 |
śūlinastiṣṭhati dvija |
antarikṣena bhūmiṣṭhaṃ nekṣante mūḍhabuddhayaḥ

mayā sṛṣṭāni viprendra bhuvanāni caturdaśa |
asyā puryā vinirmātā svayaṃ viśveśvaraḥ prabhuḥ || 86 |
purā yamastapastaptvā bahukālaṃ suduṣkaram |
trailokyādhikṛti prāptastyaktvā vārāṇasīṃ purom || 60 |
carācarasya sarvasya yāni karmāṇi tāni vai |
gocare citraguptasya kāśīvāsikṛtādṛte || 61 ||
praveśo yamadūtānāṃ na kadādvijottama |
madhye kāśīpurīṃ kvāpi rakṣiṇastatra tadgaṇāḥ || 62 ||
itarābhyo'syā ādhikyaṃ dyotayati | tadevāha | iyaṃ kāśī lokottarā caturdaśalokā-
dūrdhveti yāvat || 88 |

tanutyajām |
tatrāpi kṛtapāpānāṃ niyantā kālabhairavaḥ
tatra pāpaṃ na kartavyaṃ dāruṇā rudrayātanā |
aho rudrapiśācatvaṃ narakebhyo'pi duḥsaham |||
pāpameva hi kartavyaṃ matirasti yadīdṛśī |
sukhenā'nyatra kartavyaṃ mahī hyasti mahīyasī ||| 65 |
api kāmāturo janturekāṃ rakṣati mātaram |
api pāpakṛtā kāśī rakṣyā mokṣārthinaikikā || 66 ||
parāpavādaśīlena paradārābhilāṣiṇā
tena kāśī na saṃsevyā kva kāśonirayaḥ kva saḥ || 67 |
niyantā tattvajñānopadeṣṭā | tatrāpi tanutyajāmapi madhye | niyantā śāsakaḥ ||9 3 ||

abhilaṣyanti ye nityaṃ dhanaṃ cātra pratigrahaiḥ |
parasvaṃ kapaṭairvāpi kāśī sevyā na tairnaraiḥ || 68 |
parapīḍākaraṃ karma kāśyāṃ nityaṃ vivarjayet |
tadeva cet kimatra syāt kāśīvāsodurātmanām || 66 ||
tyaktvā vaiśveśvarīṃ bhakti ye'nyadevaparāyaṇāḥ |
sarvathā tairna vastavyā rājadhānī pinākinaḥ || 100 |
arthāthanastu ye vipra ye ca kāmārthino narāḥ |
avimuktaṃ na taiḥ sevyaṃ mokṣakṣetramidaṃ yataḥ || 101 ||
śivanindāparā ye ca vedanindāparāśca ye 1 |
vedācārapratīpā ye sevyā vārāṇasī na taiḥ || 102 ||
pāpibhiḥ kāśī na vastavyetyetat kaimutyanyāyenāha | abhilaṣyantīti | dhanaṃ
ceti cakāreṇa vastrādikaṃ gṛhyate | yuktārantumiti pāṭhe yuktā udyuktāḥ kṛtādhyavasāyā

ca parerṣyākāriṇaśca ye |
paropatāpino ye vai teṣāṃ kāśī na
manasā'pi siddhaye || 103 ||
na ye kāśīmabhinandanti dudhiyaḥ |
teṣāṃ nirvāṇavārtā'pi dūre durvṛttacetasām

na mahāmantrajapyaiśca gurubhiḥ pratipāditaiḥ |
na svādhyāyairyathoktaṃśca nāgniśuśrūṣaṇaiḥ paraiḥ || 108 |
na sevayā gurūṇāṃ ca na śrāddhairdevatārcanaiḥ |
na nānātīrthayātrābhirjñānaṃ samadhigamyate ||| 10 9 |
na yogena vinā jñānaṃ yogastattvārthaśīlanam |
gurūpadiṣṭamārgeṇa sadābhyāsavaśena ca || 110 ||
tasyāntarāyā bahavaḥ sudūraśravaṇādayaḥ |
ato na prāpyate jñānaṃ yogādekena janmanā || 111 ||
vinā tapo japādyaiśca vinā yogena suvrata |
niḥśreyo labhyate kāśyāmihaikenaiva janmanā ||| 112 |
tvayā śuddhadhiyā kāśyāṃ yacchreyaḥ samupārjitam |
tacchreya so'pyudarkaste mahānasti dvijottama || 113 ||

so'pi |
pramuditaścā'bhūcchivaśarmā mahāmanāḥ
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe brahmakṛtakāśīpraśaṃsā nāma dvāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ dvāviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ

|| atha trayoviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
śivaśarmovāca-
satyalokeśvaravidhe sarveṣāṃ prapitāmaha |
kiñcidvijñaptukāmo'smi na bhayādvaktumutsahe || 1 |
brahmovāca-
yattvaṃ praṣṭumanā vipra jñātaṃ te tanmanogatam |
pipṛcchiṣustvaṃ nirvāṇaṃ gaṇau tatkathayiṣyataḥ || 2 ||
netayorviṣṇugaṇayoragocaramihāsti hi |
sarvametau vijānīto yatkiñcid brahmagolake || 3 |
tryadhike viśatitame'dhyāye cāru manoharaḥ |
varṇyate kamalājānerabhiṣekamahotsavaḥ || 1 |
tacchreyaso'pyudarkaste mahānastītyuktaṃ tatra praṣṭuṃ vijñāpayati | satyaloke iti |
kiñcitkaivalyamiti hṛdistham || 1 ||
bhagavallokaprāptāvasya kathāvyāsaṅgena vilambaḥ kārito mayetyanucitaṃ manvāno'taḥ

praṇamya lokakartāraṃ te'pi hṛṣṭāḥ pratasthire
punaḥ svayānamāruhya vaikuṇṭhamabhito yayuḥ |
gacchatā'pi punastatra dvijenāpṛcchito gaṇau || 5 |
śivaśarmovāca-
kiyaddūraṃ vayaṃ prāptā gantavyaṃ ca kiyatpunaḥ |
pṛcchāmyanyacca vāṃ bhadrau brūtaṃ prītyā tadapyaho || 6 |
kāñcyavantī dvāravatī kāśyayodhyā ca pañcamī |
māyāpurī ca mathurāpuryaḥ saptavimuktidāḥ || 7 |
tatkathane'sāmarthyametayorna mantavyamityāha | naiteyoriti || 3 |
pratasthire pracalitāḥ || 4 ||

vihāya ṣaṭpuroścānyāḥ kāśyāmeva pratiṣṭhitā |
muktiviśvasṛjā tatki mama muktirna samprati || 8 |
iti sarvaṃ mama puraḥ prasādādvaktumarhatam |
iti tadvākyamākarṇya gaṇāvūcaturādarāt || 9 ||
gaṇāvūcatu : - -
yathārthaṃ kathayāvaste yatpṛṣṭaṃ bhavatā'nagha |
viṣṇuprasādājjānīvo bhūtaṃ bhāvi bhavattathā || 10 ||
viprā'vabhāsate yāvatkiraṇaiḥ puṣpavantayoḥ |
tāvatī bhūḥ samuddiṣṭā sasamudrādrikānanā || 11 ||

tāvaduparivistāraparimaṇḍalam |
yojanānāṃ ca niyute bhūmerbhānurvyavasthitaḥ
bhānoḥ sakāśādupari lakṣa lakṣyaḥ kṣapākaraḥ
nakṣatramaṇḍalaṃ somāllakṣayojanamucchritam || 13
uḍumaṇḍalataḥ saumya upariṣṭāvilakṣataḥ |
dvilakṣe tu budhācchukraḥ śukrādbhaumo dvilakṣake || 14 |
māheyādupariṣṭācca surejyo niyutadvaye |
dvilakṣayojanotsedhaḥ saurirdevapurohitāt || 15 ||
daśāyutasamucchrāyaṃ saureḥ saptarṣimaṇḍalam |
saptarṣibhyaḥ sahasrāṇāṃ śatādūdhvaṃ dhruvaḥ sthitaḥ || 16 ||
vistāraparimaṇḍalaṃ yathā syāt | tatra vistāro dairghyam | parimaṇḍalaṃ vartulā-

pādagamyaṃ hi yatkiñcidvastvasti dharaṇītale |
tadbhūrloka iti khyātaḥ sāndhidvīpādrikānanam || 17 |
bhūrlokācca bhuvarloko braghnāvadhirudāhṛtaḥ |
ādityādādhruvaṃ vipra svarloka iti gīyate || 18 ||
parāpavādaśīlena paradārā'bhilāṣiṇā |
maharloka : kṣiterūrdhvameka koṭipramāṇataḥ |
koṭidvaye tu saṃkhyāto jano bhūrlokato janaiḥ || 16 ||
catuṣkoṭipramāṇastu tapoloko'sti bhūtalāt |
upariṣṭāt kṣiteraṣṭau koṭayaḥ satyamīritam || 20 ||
satyādupari vaikuṇṭho yojanānāṃ pramāṇataḥ |
bhūrlokātparisaṃkhyātaḥ koṭiṣoḍaśasaṃmitaḥ || 21 ||

sarveṣāmabhayapradaḥ |
tatastu ṣoḍaśaguṇaḥ kailāso'sti śivālayaḥ || 22 |
pārvatyā sahitaḥ śambhurgajāsyaskandanandibhiḥ |
yatra tiṣṭhati viśveśaḥ sakalaḥ saparaḥ smṛtaḥ ||
tasya devasya khelo'yaṃ svalīlāmūrtidhāriṇaḥ |
sa viśveśa iti khyātaḥ tasyājñākṛdidaṃ jagat || 24 ||
sarveṣāṃ śāsakaścāsau tasya śāstā na cāparaḥ |
svayaṃ sṛjati bhūtāni svayaṃ pātti tathā'tti ca || 25 ||
prasaṅgād bhūrlokāt kailāsapramāṇamāhatuḥ | tata iti | tato vaikuṇṭhāt ṣoḍaśa-
guṇaḥ ṣoḍaśakoṭisaṃmitaḥ || 22 ||

sarvajña ekaḥ sa proktaḥ svecchādhīnaviceṣṭitaḥ |
tasya pravartakaḥ ko'pi nahi caiva nivartakaḥ || 26 ||
amṛtaṃ yatparaṃ brahma samūtaṃ śruticoditam |
sarvavyāpi sadā nityaṃ satyaṃ dvaitavivarjitam || 27 ||
sarvebhyaḥ kāraṇebhyaśca parātparataraṃ param | |
ānandaṃ brahmaṇo rūpaṃ śrutayo yatpracakṣate || 28 ||
saṃvidante na yaṃ vedā viṣṇurveda na vai vidhiḥ |
yato vāco nivartante hyaprāpya manasā saha || 26 ||
tastra śāstā na cāpara ityetadeva vivṛṇoti | tasya pravartaka iti || 26 |

yogigamyastvanākhyeyo yaḥ pramāṇaikagocaraḥ
nānārūpo'pyarūpo yaḥ sarvago'pi na gocaraḥ |
ananto'pyanta kavapuḥ sarvavitkarmavajitaḥ || 31 ||
tasyedamaiśvaraṃ rūpaṃ khaṇḍacandrāvataṃsakam |
tamālaśyāmalagalaṃ sphuradbhālavilocanam || 32 ||
lasadvāmārdhanārokaṃ . kṛtaśeṣaśubhāṅgadam |
gaṅgātaraṅgasatsaṅga sadā dhautajaṭātaṭam || 33 ||
yasmādetādṛg brahma sa śambhustasmāt sa svayaṃ vedyaḥ svabhānānyānapekṣaḥ tatra

smarāṅgajarajaḥpuñja pūjitāvayavojjvalam
vicitra gātravidhṛtamahāvyālavibhūṣaṇam || 34 |
mahokṣasyandanagamaṃ virutājagavāyudham |
gajājinottarāsaṅgaṃ daśārdhavadanaṃ śubham || 35 ||
uttrāsitamahāmṛtyuṃ mahābalagaṇāvṛtam |
śaraṇārthikṛtatrāṇāṃ natanirvāṇakāraṇam |
manorathapathātītaṃ varadānaparāyaṇam || 36 ||
tasya tattatsvarūpasya rūpātītasya bho dvija |
parāvare rudrarūpe sarva vyāpyāvatiṣṭhataḥ || 37 ||
nirākāro'pi sākāraḥ śiva eva hi kāraṇam |
muktaye bhuktaye vā'pi na śivānmokṣado'paraḥ || 38 |
smaraḥ kāmaḥ tadaṅgād dagdhānnāto yo rajaḥpuñjo bhasmarāśistena pūjitā
uddhūlokṛtā ye'vayavāstairujjvalam | vyālāḥ sarpāḥ || 34 ||
mahānukṣā valīvarda eva syandanastena gamo gamanaṃ yasya tat | gajā'surasyā'jina-
carmaiva uttarāsaṅgaṃ uttarīyaṃ vastraṃ yasya tat || 35 |
uccaistrāsito mahāmṛtyuryena tat | sakālakālaḥ | kālamūṣikabhakṣaka iti
śrutismṛtibhyām || 36 |
upasaṃharatastasyeti dvābhyām | sarvaṃ vyāpyāvatiṣṭhatastasya parāvare saguṇanirguṇe
iti vā || 37 ||

hyetat pārvatīpatisātkṛtam |
idaṃ carācaraṃ savaṃ dṛśyā'dṛśya marūpiṇā ||
tathā sṛḍānīkāntena 3 9 |
viṣṇusādakhilaṃ jagat |
vidhāya krīḍyate vipra nityaṃ svacchandalīlayā
yathā śivastathā viṣṇuryathā viṣṇustathā śivaḥ |
antaraṃ śivaviṣṇvośca manāgapi na vidyate |||
āhūya pūrva brahmādīn samastān devatāgaṇān |
vidyādharoragādīṃśca siddhagandharvacāraṇān || 42 |
nanu saguṇanirguṇe rudrasyaiva rūpe cettarhi kathaṃ jagadīśvaratvaṃ viṣṇoḥ prakhyātamityā-

nijasiṃhāsanasamaṃ kṛtvā siṃhāsanaṃ śubham |
upaveśya hariṃ tatracchatraṃ kṛtvā manoharam || 43 ||
ślakṣṇaṃ koṭiśalākaṃ ca viśvakarmavinirmitam |
pāṇḍuraṃ ratnadaṇḍaṃ ca sthūlamuktāvalambitam || 44 |
kalaśena vicitre hyapariṣṭādvirājitam |
sahasrayojanāyāmaṃ sarvaratnamayaṃ śubham || 45 |
paṭṭasūtramayaiḥ ramyaiścāmaraiśca pariṣkṛtam |
rājā'bhiṣekayogyaiśca dravyaiḥ sarvoṣadhādibhiḥ ||| 46 |
pratyakṣatorthapāthobhiḥ pañcakumbhairmanoharaiḥ |
siddhārthākṣatadūrvābhirmantraḥ svayamupasthitaiḥ || 47 |
devānāṃ ca tatharṣīṇāṃ siddhānāṃ phaṇināmapi |
ānoya maṅgalakarāḥ kanyāḥ ṣoḍaśa ṣoḍaśa || 48 ||
vīṇāmṛdaṅgābjabherīmaruḍiṇḍimajharjharaiḥ
ānakaiḥ kāṃsyatālādyairvādyairlalitagāyanaiḥ || 46 |
pratyakṣatīrthapāthobhiḥ pratyakṣāṇi yāni tīrthāni teṣāṃ pāthobhirjalaiḥ pratyakṣaistīrthe-

śubhe tithau śubhe lagne
tārācandrabalānvite || 50 |
ābaddhamukuṭaṃ ramyaṃ kṛtakautukamaṅgalam
mṛḍānokṛtaśṛṅgāraṃ suśriyā suśriyāyutam ||| 51
abhiṣicya |
maheśena svayaṃ brahmāṇḍamaṇḍape |
dattaṃ samastamaiśvayaṃ yannijaṃ nānyagāmi ca || 52
tatastuṣṭāva deveśaḥ pramathaiḥ saha śāṅkṣiṇam |
brahmāṇaṃ lokakartāramuvāca ca vacastvidam || 53 |
mama vandyastvayaṃ viṣṇuḥ praṇama tvamamuṃ harim | |
ityuktvā'tha svayaṃ rudro nanāma garuḍadhvajam ||| 54 |
tato gaṇeśvaraiḥ sarvairbrahmaṇā ca marudgaṇaiḥ |
yogibhiḥ sanakādyaiśca siddhairdevarṣibhistathā || 55 |
vidyādharaḥ sagandharvairyakṣarakṣopsarogaṇaiḥ |
guhyakaiścāraṇabhūtaiḥ śeṣavāsukitakṣakaiḥ || 56 |
mṛḍānokṛtaśṛṅgāraṃ bhavānīracitaveṣam | suśriyāyutaṃ śobhanayā padmayā sametam |
kathambhūtayā suśriyā ? śobhanakāntimatyā || 51 ||
tatastuṣṭāvetyuktaṃ tāmeva stutiṃ leśato darśayantī idaṃ tayā nirdiṣṭaṃ vacanamāhatuḥ |

patatribhiḥ kinnaraṃśca sarvaiḥ sthāvarajaṅgamaiḥ |
tato jayajayetyuktvā namo'stviti namo'stviti || 57 |
tato harirmaheśena saṃsadidyusadāṃ tadā |
etairmahāravaiḥ ramyaiśvānaca paramārciṣā paramārciṣā || 58 |
tvaṃ kartā sarvabhūtānāṃ pātā hartā tvameva ca |
tvameva jagatāṃ pūjyastvameva jagadīśvaraḥ || 56 |
dātā dharmārthakāmānāṃ śāstā durnayakāriṇām |
ajeyastvaṃ ca saṃgrāme mamā'pi hi bhaviṣyasi || 60 |
icchāśaktiḥ kriyāśaktirjñānaśaktistathottamā |
śaktitrayamidaṃ viṣṇo gṛhāṇa prāpitaṃ mayā ||| 61 |
tvadveṣṭāro hare nūnaṃ mayā śāsthāḥ prayatnataḥ |
tvadbhaktānāṃ mayā viṣṇo deyaṃ nirvāṇamuttamam || 62 |
māyāṃ cāpi gṛhāṇemāṃ duṣpraṇodyāṃ surāsuraiḥ |
yayā saṃmohitaṃ viśvamakiścijjñaṃ bhaviṣyati || 63 ||
saṃsadidyusavāṃ devānāṃ sabhāyām | ānaca pūjitaḥ | paramārciṣā upalakṣito

dakṣiṇo'sau pitāmahaḥ |
asyā'pi hi vidheḥ pātā janitā'pi bhaviṣyasi
vaikuṇṭheśvaryamāsādya haretthiṃ haraḥ
kailāse svayam |
pramathaiḥ sādhaṃ svairaṃ krīḍatyumāpatiḥ || 65
tadāprabhṛti |
devo'sau śārṅgadhanvā gadādharaḥ |
trailokyamakhilaṃ śāsti dānavāntakaro hariḥ ||
iti te kathitā vipra lokānāṃ ca paristhitiḥ |
idānoṃ kathayiṣyāvastava nirvāṇakāraṇam || 67 ||
idaṃ tu paramākhyānaṃ bhṛṇuyādyaḥ samāhitaḥ |
svarlokamabhigamyā'tha kāśyāṃ nirvāṇamāpnuyāt || 68 |
yajñotsave vivāhe ca maṅgaleṣvakhileṣvapi |
rājyā'bhiṣekasamaye devasthāpanakarmaṇi || 6 9 |
avāntaraprakṛtamupasaṃharato prāha vaikuṇṭheti dvābhyām || 66 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ trayoviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 23 ||

sarvādhikāradāneṣu navaveśmapraveśane |
paṭhitavyaṃ prayatnena tatkāryaparisiddhaye || 70 ||
aputro labhate putramadhano dhanavān bhavet |
vyādhito mucyate rogī baddho mucyet bandhanāt || 71 ||
japyametatprayatnena satataṃ maṅgalārthinā |
amaṅgalānāṃ śamanaṃ haranārāyaṇapriyam || 72 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe caturbhujā'bhiṣeko nāma
trayoviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 23 ||

|| atha caturviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
gaṇāvūcatuḥ—
śivaśarmannudakaṃ te kathayāvo niśāmaya |
tvamatra vaiṣṇave loke bhuktvā bhogān supuṣkalān
brahmaṇo ||1 ||
vatsaraṃ pūrṇa ramamāṇo'psarogaṇaiḥ |
sutīrthamaraṇopāttapuṇyaśeṣeṇa vai
bhaviṣyasi punaḥ || 2 |
mahīpālo nagare nandivardhane |
rājyaṃ prāpyāsapatnaṃ ca samṛddhabalavāhanam ||
kṛṣṭibhirhaṣṭapuṣṭaiśva ramyahāṭakabhūṣaṇaiḥ |
saṃjuṣṭamiṣṭāpūrtānāṃ dharmāṇāṃ nityakartṛbhiḥ || 4 |
caturbhiradhike viśe'dhyāye'tyantamanorame |
kaivalyaṃ paramānandaṃ varṇyate śivaśarmaṇaḥ || 1 ||
idānīṃ kathayiṣyāvaḥ tava nirvāṇakāraṇamityuktaṃ pūrvaṃ tadeva saprapañcaṃ kathayataḥ |

sadā sampannasasyaṃ ca sūrvarakṣetrasaṃkulam |
sudeśaṃ suprajaṃ susthaṃ sutṛṇaṃ bahugodhanam || 5 |
devatāyatanānāṃ ca rājibhiḥ parirājitam |
suyūpā yatra vai grāmāḥ suvittaddhavirājitāḥ || 6 ||
supuṣpakṛtrimodyānāḥ sasadā phalapādapāḥ |
sapadminīkakāsārā yatra rājanti bhūmayaḥ || 7 |
sadambhā nimnagārājirna yatra janatā kvacit |
kulānyeva kulonāni na cānyāyadhanāni ca || 8 |
sadā sampannāni sasyāni yasmiṃstat | ata eva sūrvarakṣetrasaṃkulaṃ sūrvarāṇi
śobhanaphalasasyāḍhyabhūmīni yāni kṣetrāṇi , taiḥ saṃkulaṃ vyāptam || 5 |

na vidvatsu ca karhicit |
nadyaḥ kuṭilagāminyo na yatra viṣaye prajāḥ
tamoyuktāḥ kṣapā yatra bahuleṣu na mānavāḥ
rajoyujastriyo yatra na dharmabahulā narāḥ || 10
dhanairanandho yatrāsti mano naiva ca bhojanam
anayaḥ syandanaṃ yatra na ca vai rājapūruṣaḥ ||
daṇḍa : paraśukuddālavālavyajana rājiṣu |
ātapatreṣu nānyatra kvacit krodhāparādhajaḥ || 12 |
nārīṣu vibhramo nāma sauratabhāvaprakāśanam | vidvatsu vibhramo'jñānam | kuṭila-

anyatrākṣikavṛndebhyaḥ kvacinna paridevanam |
ākṣikā eva dṛśyante yatra pāśakapāṇayaḥ || 13 ||
jāḍyavārtājaleṣveva strīmadhyā eva durbalāḥ |
kaṭhorahṛdayā yatra sīmantinyo na mānavāḥ || 14 ||
auṣadheṣveva yatrāsti kuṣṭhayogo na mānave |
vedho'pyantaḥ suratneṣu śūlaṃ mūrtikareṣu vai || 15 ||
akṣeḥ sāribhiḥ vyavaharantītyākṣikāsteṣāṃ vṛndebhyaḥ samūhebhyaḥ | paridevanaṃ dyuta-
krīḍā | pakṣāntare paridevanaṃ pralāpaḥ | ākṣikā eva pāśakapāṇayaḥ | pakṣāntare pāśā eva
pāśakā ratnavaste pāṇiṣu yeṣāṃ te tathā | yatra cānṛtavādina iti kacit pāṭhaḥ sa
cintyaḥ || 13 ||

na bhayātkvāpi kasyacit |
saṃjvaraḥ kāmajo yatra dāridracaṃ kaluṣasya
ca || 16 ||
durlabhatvaṃ sadā kasya sukṛtena ca vastunaḥ
ibhā eva pramattā vai yuddhaṃ vīcyorjalāśaye || 17 ||
dānahāni gajeṣveva drumeṣveva hi kaṇṭakāḥ |
janeṣveva vihārā hi na kasyaciduraḥsthalī || 18 ||
sāttvikabhāvo bhaktiḥ svabhartṛṣu strīṇāṃ strīṣu ca puṃsām | saṃjvaraḥ kāmajanita-

bāṇeṣu guṇaviśleṣo bandhoktiḥ pustake dṛḍhā |
snehatyāgaḥ sadaivāsti yatra pāśupate jane || 1 9 ||
daṇḍavārtā sadā yatra kṛtasaṃnyāsakarmaṇām |
mārgaṇāścāpakeṣveva bhikṣukā brahmacāriṇaḥ || 20 ||
yatra kṣapaṇakā eva dṛśyante maladhāriṇaḥ |
prāyo madhuvratā eva yatra cañcalavṛttayaḥ || 21 ||
bāṇeṣveva guṇaviśleṣo jyāparityāgaḥ | pakṣāntare'nyatra guṇānāmudāratādīnāṃ
viśleṣo vicchedo netyarthaḥ | pustakeṣu pustikāyāmeva dṛḍhā bandhoktiḥ , pustakaṃ dṛḍhaṃ bandha-

dharmeṇa rājadharmajña śauṇḍīryaguṇaśālini

santatāvabhṛthaklinnamūrdhajaḥ kṣitiparṣabhaḥ |
prajāpālana sampannaḥ kośaprīṇitabhūsuraḥ || 26 ||
padāravindaṃ gauvindaṃ hṛdi dhyāyannatandritaḥ |
vāsudevakathālāpaparikṣiptadinakṣapaḥ ||| 27 |
kadācidupaviṣṭaḥ sanmadhye rājasabhaṃ dvija |
dūrāt kārpaṭikairdṛṣṭo vārāṇasyāḥ samāgataiḥ || 28 ||
tvatkarmabhāvisadṛśaistadā tvamabhinanditaḥ |
taiḥ sarvaiḥ rājaśārdūla svāśīrvādairanakeśaḥ || 26 |
śrīmadviśveśvaro devo viśveṣāṃ jagatāṃ guruḥ |
kāśīnāthastu te kuryāt kumaterapavarjanam || 30 ||
santatamavabhṛthena yajñasamāptyanantaraṃ kriyamāṇena snānena klinnā ārdrā mūrdhajāḥ ,
keśā yasya saḥ | sattīrthodakasaṃklinneti pāṭhe sattīrthānyutkṛṣṭāni yāni kāverītuṅgabhadrā-

kāśīnāthaḥ sa te diśyājjñānaṃ malavivarjitam
yena puṇyena te || 31 |
prāptaṃ rājyaṃ prājyamakaṇṭakam |
tatpuṇyaśeṣato bhūyādviśvanāthe matistava || 32
yasya prasādāt sulabhamāyuḥ putrāmbarāṅganāḥ |
samṛddhayaḥ svargamokṣau sa viśveśaḥ prasīdatu || 33 |
nāmaśravaṇamātreṇa yasya viśveśituvibhoḥ |
mahāpātakavicchedaḥ sa viśveśo'stu te hṛdi || 34 |
na cātra sādhanaprayāsa ityāha | naiḥśreyasīṃ kaivalyākhyām | smaraṇādapi śabdādu-

tvaṃ vṛddhakālo bhūpālaḥ śrutvetyāśīḥ paramparām |
smariṣyasīdaṃ vṛttāntaṃ pulakāṅkavapustadā || 35 |
ākāragopanaṃ kṛtvā tebhyo datvā dhanaṃ bahu |
sumuhūrtamanuprāpya sute rājyaṃ vidhāya ca || 36 ||
anaṅgalekhayā rājñyā tataḥ kāśīṃ gamiṣyasi |
datvā dānāni bhūrīṇi prīṇayitvā'rthino janān || 37 |
svanāmnā tatra saṃsthāpya liṅgaṃ nirvāṇakāraṇam |
prāsādaṃ tatra kṛtvoccaistadagre kūpamuttamam || 38 ||
vidhāya vidhivattatra kalaśāropaṇādikam |
maṇimāṇikyacāmpeya dukūle bhāśvagodhanam || 3 9 ||
mahādhvajapatākāśca cchatracāmaradarpaṇam |
devopakaraṇaṃ bhūri viśrāṇya śramavajitaḥ || 40 ||

madhyāhane nirjane tatra drakṣasyekaṃ

dākṣiṇātya iha prāptastvetayā saha kāntayā |
dhyāyāmi liṅgametacca prārthayāmi na kiñcana || 47 ||
prāsādasyāsya jaṭilaḥ svayaṃ kārayitā śivaḥ |
viśeṣato'sya liṅgasya nāma no vedmi niścitam || 48 ||
iti śrutvā narapatervākyaṃ prāha jaṭādharaḥ |
satyamuktaṃ tvayaikaṃ hi liṅganāma na vetsi yat || 4 9 |
paśyeyaṃ tvāmahaṃ nityamupaviṣṭaṃ suniścalam |
śruto bhaviṣyati tava prāsādo yena kāritaḥ || 50 ||
mamāgre tatsamācakṣva yadi jānāsi tattvataḥ |
ākarṣṇeti vacastasya punaḥ prāha bhavāniti || 51 |
kartā kārayitā śambhuḥ kimatathyaṃ bravīmyaham |
athavā cintayā ki me tapasvinnanayā vibho || 52 |
dākṣiṇātyo dakṣiṇadeśodbhavaḥ | etayā'naṅgalekhayā || 47 ||
bhavāniti gaṇavākyam || 51 ||

punarvṛddhatāpasaḥ |
pipāsurasmi pānīyamānīyāśu prayaccha
iti tena me || 53 |
ca nunnastvaṃ vāryānīya ca kūpataḥ |
pāyayiṣyasi taṃ vṛddhaṃ tāpasaṃ tatkṣaṇācca

janmano'smāṃdiyaṃ rājannāsīdviprasya kanyakā |
turvasorvedavapuṣaḥ śubhācārā śubhānanā || 56 |
tena dattā vivāhārthaṃ naidhruvāya mahātmane | |
sa ca kālavaśaṃ prāpto naidhruvo'prāptayauvanaḥ || 60 |
vaidhavyaṃ pālayantyeṣā mṛtā'vantyāṃ śubhavatā |
tena puṇyena saṃjātā pāṇḍayasya nṛpateḥ sutā || 61 ||
pariṇītā tvayā rājan pativrataratā sadā |
tvayā saha samprāptā mukti prāpsyatyanuttamām ||| 62 |
ayodhyāyāmathā'vantyāṃ mathurāyāmathā'pi vā |
dvāravatyāṃ ca kāntyāṃ vā māyāpuryāmatho nṛpa || 63 ||
api pātakino ye ca kālena nidhanaṃ gatāḥ |
te hi svargādihāgatya kāśyāṃ mokṣamavāpnuyuḥ || 64 ||
anyāni puṇyakṣetrāṇi kāśīprāptikarāṇīti vaktuṃ tayoḥ pūrvajanmavṛttāntamāha |
janmano'smādiyamityādinā || 5 9 ||
nanvavantyāṃ mokṣapuryāṃ mṛtāyāḥ kathaṃ punarjanma tatrāha | ayodhyāyāmityādi || 63 |

māthura pūrvajanmani |
śivaśarmākhyo māyāpuryāṃ bhavān
tatpuṇyātprāpya mṛtaḥ || 65 |
vaikuṇṭhaṃ bhuktvā bhogān manoramān
tatpuṇyaśeṣāt kṣitipo jātastvaṃ nandivardhane

niścitaṃ viśvanāthena preritena tvayā'nagha |
kṛtaṃ hi kṛtakṛtyena prāsādādiha vedamyaham || 71 ||
vṛddhakāleśvaraṃ nāma liṅgametan mahīpate |
jānīhyanādisaṃsiddhaṃ nimittaṃ kintu vai bhavān || 72 ||
darśanāt sparśanāttasya pūjanācchravaṇānnateḥ |
vṛddhakāleśaliṅgasya sarvaṃ prāpnoti vāñchitam || 73 ||
kūpaḥ kālodako nāma jarāvyādhivighātakṛt |
yadīyajalapānena mātuḥ stanyamapānavān || 74 ||
kṛtakūpodakasnānaḥ kṛtaitalliṅgapūjanaḥ |
varṣeṇa siddhimāpnoti mano'bhilaṣitāṃ naraḥ || 75 |
na kuṣṭhaṃ na ca visphoṭā na raṃdhā na vicacikā |
pītātspṛṣṭāt pratiṣṭhanti kaphaḥ kāladamodakāt || 76 |

na mūtrakṛcchra no pāmā |
pānīyasyāsya sevanāt || 77 |
bhūtajvarāśca ye kecidye kecidviṣamajvarāḥ
te kṣipramupaśāmyanti |
hyetatkūpodasevanāt || 78 ||
tavā'grato mama jarāpalitaṃ ca yathāvidhi
etatkū |
podapānena kṣaṇānnaṣṭaṃ navo'bhavam
vṛddhakāleśvare || 76 ||
liṅge sevite na daridratā |
nopasargā na vā rogā na pāpaṃ nādhajaṃ phalam

śatadhā mucyate pāpairnātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 83 |
itthaṃ bhavitrī te muktiḥ kaiṭabhārātidarśanāt |
bhogān bhuktvā bahuvidhān vaikuṇṭhanagare śubhe || 84 ||
iti saṃhṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ sa vipro bhagavattadguṇavaktrato niśamya |
svamudarkamathārkakoṭiramyaṃ harilokaṃ parilokayāñcakāra ||85 ||
maitrāvaruṇiruvāca-
lopāmudre sa viprendro bhogān bhuktvā manoramān |
māyāpuryāṃ kṛtaprāṇatyāgapuṇyabalena ca || 86 |
vaikuṇṭhalokādāgatya pattane nandivardhane |
bhaumāni bhuktvā saukhyāni putrānutpādya sundarān || 87 |
teṣu rājyaṃ vinikṣipya prāpya vārāṇasīṃ purīm |
viśveśvaraṃ samārādhya nirvāṇapadamīyivān || 88 |
svamudakaṃ svīyamuttarakālīnaṃ phalam || 85 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ caturviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 24 ||

śrutvā pāpavinirmukto jñānaṃ paramamṛcchati || 8 9 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe śivaśamaṃnirvāṇaprāpaṇaṃ nāma
catuviśo'dhyāyaḥ || 24 ||

|| atha pañcaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||
vyāsa uvāca -
śṛṇu sūta pravakṣyāmi kathāṃ kalaśajanmanaḥ |
yāmākarṇya naro bhūyādvirajā jñānabhājanam || 1 |
giri pradakṣiṇīkṛtya śrīsaṃjñaṃ kalaśodbhavaḥ |
sapatnīko dadarśātha ramyaṃ skandavanaṃ mahat || 2 |
sarvartukusumāḍhyaṃ ca rasavatphalapādapam |
susevyakandamūlāḍhyaṃ suvalkalamahīruham || 3 ||
pañcādhikatame viśe'dhyāye kalaśajanmanaḥ |
varṇyate'tra sabhāryasya śikhivāhanadarśanam || 1 |
evaṃ tāvat prathamato'dhyāyatrayeṇa vṛndārakahiraṇyagarbhasaṃvādadvāreṇa kāśīmāhātmyaṃ
manāk prapañcya tato'pyagastya mahālakṣmīlopāmudrāsaṃvādadvāreṇādhikataraṃ prapañcaya
tato'pyagastyakārtikeyasaṃvādenādhikatamaṃ prapañcayitumupakramate | | śṛṇviti | virajā

svaccha gambhīrakāsāraṃ sāraṃ sarvabhuvaḥ param || 4 ||
nānāpatatrisaṃghuṣṭaṃ nānāmunijanoṣitam |
tapaḥ saṅketanilayamivaikaṃ sampadāmpadam || 5 |
lohito nāma tatrāsti giriḥ svarṇagiriprabhaḥ |
sukandara prasravaṇaḥ svasānuśikharaprabhaḥ
kailāsasyaikaśakalaṃ karmabhūmāvihāgatam |
tapastaptumiva proccairnānāścarya samanvitam || 7 |
nitarāṃ vīto gataḥ śvāpadānāṃ hiṃsrasvabhāvānāṃ vyāghrādīnāṃ gaṇo yatra tattathā |
vinīteti pāṭhe vinītastyaktakrauryaḥ śvāpadānāṃ gaṇo yatra tattathā | saridbhiḥ sahitāni
yāni palvalānyalpodakasarāṃsi tairāvṛtam | svacchāni nirmalāni gambhīrāṇyagādhāni
sarovarāṇi yasmistatsvacchagambhīrakāsāram || 4 ||
tapaḥsaṅketanilayaṃ tapaso rahasyasthānamivetyutprekṣā | ekaṃ mukhyam || 5 ||
kiñca lohito lohitagiririti dakṣiṇāyāṃ prasiddhaḥ parvatastatra vane'sti |
svarṇagiriprabhaḥ sumeruriva sundaraḥ | śobhanāḥ kandarādaryaḥ prasravaṇāni ca nirjharā yatra saḥ |
prasthāḥ parvataikadeśasamabhāgāḥ | śikharāṇi śṛṅgāṇi | svānāṃ svasambandhināṃ
sānavaḥ prabhā śobhā yatra saḥ | su iti kacit | susānuśikharītya-
sānuśikharāṇāmebhirvā
nyatra || 6 || syāttathā tapastaptumāgatamivetyu-
ekaśakalamekakhaṇḍaṃ iha vane uccairyathā
tprekṣā || 7 |

tatrādrākṣīnmuniśreṣṭho'gastyaḥ sākṣāt ṣaḍānanam
praṇamya daṇḍavabhūmau sapatnīko mahātapāḥ || 8 |
tuṣṭāva girijāsūnuṃ sūktaiḥ śrutisamudbhavaiḥ |
tathā svakṛtayā stutyā prabaddha karasampuṭaḥ || 9 |
agastiruvāca—
namo'stu vṛndārakavṛndavandyapādāravindāya sudhākarāya |
ṣaḍānanāyā'mitavikramāya gaurīhṛdānandasamudbhavāya ||| 10 |

dātre rathānāṃ paratārakasya hantre pracaṇḍāsuratārakasya

tapaḥsvarūpāya tapodhanāya tapaḥ phalānāṃ pratipādakāya |
kumārāya hi māramāriṇe tṛṇīkṛtaiśvaryavirāgiṇe namaḥ || 14 ||
sadā
namo'stu tubhyaṃ śarajanmane vibho prabhātasūryā'ruṇadantapaṅktaye |
bālāya cābālaparākramāya ṣāṇmāturāyā'lamanāturāya || 15 |
dhyeyaḥ sadā savitṛmaṇḍalamadhyavartī nārāyaṇaḥ sarasijāsanasanniviṣṭaḥ |
keyūravān makarakuṇḍalavān kirīṭī hārī hiraṇmayavapurdhṛtaśaṅkhacakraḥ || iti |
hiraṇyabāhave hiraṇyāni svarṇamayāni keyūrādīni bāhuṣu hastādiṣu yasya tasmai |

namo'stu te janmajarātigāya namo viśākhāya suśaktipāṇaye ||
sarvasya nāthasya kumārakāya krauñcāraye tārakamārakāya |
svāheya gāṅgeya ca kārtikeya śaiveya tubhyaṃ satataṃ namo'stu || 17 ||
itthaṃ pariṣṭutya sa kārtikeyaṃ namo namastvityabhibhāṣamāṇaḥ |
dvistriḥ parikramya puro viveśa sthito munīśopaviśeti coktaḥ || 18 ||
moduṣṭamāya sakāmeṣu phalasecanakartṝṇāṃ madhye śreṣṭhāya | uttaramīḍhuṣe bhāviphalānāṃ

kārtikeya uvāca -
kṣemo'sti kumbhajamune tridaśaikasahāyakṛt |
jāne tvāmiha samprāptaṃ tathā vindhyācalonnatim || 16 ||
avimukte mahākṣetre kṣemaṃ mantrayakṣeṇa rakṣite |
yatra kṣīṇāyuṣāṃ sākṣād virūpākṣo'sti mokṣadaḥ || 20 |
bhūrbhuvaḥ svastale vā'pi na pātālatale malam |
nordhvaloke mayā dṛṣṭaṃ tādṛk kṣetraṃ kvacinmune || 21 |
ahamekacaro'pyatra tatkṣetraprāptaye mune
tapye tapāṃsi nā'dyā'pi phaleyurme manorathāḥ || 22 |
agre kāśīmāhātmyakathanaviśvāsāya kuśalapraśnapūrvakaṃ tvatprāptyādikaṃ sarvajñatayā

na labhyaṃ vividhairyajñairlabhyamaiśādanugrahāt
īśvarā'nugrahādeva || 23 ||
kāśīvāsaḥ sudurlabhaḥ |
sulabhaḥ syānmune nūnaṃ na vai sukṛtakoṭibhiḥ || 24 ||
anyaiva kācitsā sṛṣṭividhāturyā'tirekiṇī |
na tatkṣetraguṇān vaktumīśvaro'pīśvaro yataḥ || 25 |
aho mateḥ sudaurbalyamaho bhāgyasya daurvidham |
aho mohasya māhātmyaṃ yatkāśīha na sevyate || 26 ||
śarīraṃ jīryate nityaṃ saṃjīryantondriyāṇyapi |
āyurmṛgo mṛgayunā kṛtalakṣyo hi mṛtyunā || 27 |
tatkṣetram || 23 |

sāpadaṃ sampadaṃ jñātvā sāpāyaṃ kāyamuccakaiḥ |
capalācapalaṃ cāyurmatvā kāśīṃ samāśrayet || 28 ||
yāvannaityāyuṣaścāntastāvatkāśī na mucyate |
kālaḥ kalālavasyā'pi saṃkhyātuṃ naiva vismaret || 26 |
jarānikaṭanikṣiptā bādhante vyādhayo bhṛśam |
tathāpi deho nāneho nāho kāśīṃ samohate || 30 |
tīrthasnānena japyena paropakaraṇoktibhiḥ |
vinā'yaṃ labhyate dharmo dharmādarthaḥ svayaṃ bhavet || 31 ||
vinaivā'rthārjanopāyaṃ dharmādartho bhaveddhruvam |
ato'rthacintāmutsṛjya dharmamekaṃ samāśrayet || 32 ||
capalācapalaṃ vidyudivā'sthiram || 28 |
na ca kāśīṃ prāpya punarapi kutracid gantavyamityāha | yāvaditi || 2 9 |
evaṃ maraṇasyāniyatatvād bālakāvasthāyāmevā'vimuktamāśrayaṇīyamityuktaṃ
pūrvamidānīṃ vṛddhāvasthāyāmapi ye kāśīṃ na samāśrayanti te'timandā ityāha | jareti |
nāneho nānāvyāpāravān san | aho khede || 30 |
nanvarthasya dharmahetutvāttadīhāṃ parityajya kimiti kāśyevāśrayaṇīyā tatrāha |

svargo'pi sulabho dharmāt kāśyekā durlabhā param
upāyatrayamevātra sthāṇunarvāṇakāraṇam |
śarvāṇyagre babhāṇāddhā parinirṇīya sarvataḥ || 34 ||
pūrva pāśupato yogastatastīrthaṃ sitā'sitam |
tato'pyekamanāyāsamavimuktaṃ vimuktidam || 35 |
śrīśaila himaśailādyā nānānyāyatanāni ca |
tridaṇḍadhāraṇaṃ cā'pi saṃnyāsaḥ sarvakarmaṇām || 36 ||
nanu tarhi dharma eva yatra kutrā'pyanuṣṭheyastata eva kāśyāptirapi setsyatīti

tapāṃsi nānārūpāṇi vratāni niyamā yamāḥ |
sindhūnāmapi sambhedā araṇyāni bahūnyapi || 37 ||
mānasānyapi bhaumāni dhārātīrthādikāni ca |
ūṣarāścāpi pīṭhāni hyacchinnāmnāyapāṭhanam || 38 |
japaścāpi manūnāñca tathā'gnihavanāni ca |
dānāni nānākratavo devatopāsanāni ca || 36 |
trirātraṃ pañcarātrāṇi sāṃkhyayogādayastathā |
viṣṇorārādhanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ muktaye'bhihitaṃ kila || 40 ||
mityādivacanaiḥ śrīśailādonāmapi mokṣahetutvaṃ śrūyate , satyaṃ tattathaivetyāha | śrīti |
śrīśailetyārabhyetānītyataḥ prāktanena | ādyapadena mandarādayo gṛhyante | nānānyāyatanāni
ca nānā yānyāyatanāni puruṣottamādīni tāni cetyarthaḥ || 36 |
sindhūnāṃ nadīnāṃ sambhedāḥ saṅgamāḥ | araṇyāni nava | taduktam-
saindhavaṃ daṇḍakāraṇyaṃ jambūmārgaśca puṣkaram |
utpalāraṇyamāraṇyaṃ naimiṣaṃ kurujāṅgalam ||
hemadamarbudaṃ caiva navā'raṇyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || iti || 37 ||
mānasāni manaḥ kāryāṇi dhṛtyādīni | bhaumāni bhūsambandhīni | dhārātīrthaṃ
komāratīrthaṃ dakṣiṇadeśe prasiddham | ūṣarā reṇukādayo nava | taduktam-
yathā kālakhalaṃ sāraṃ badarīkaṃ tathaiva ca |
reṇukā sūkara : kāśī kālī kālavaṭeśvaraḥ ||
kālañjaro mahākāla ūṣarā nava kīrtitāḥ || iti ||

kaivalyasādhanānoha bhavantyeva viniścitam || 41 ||
etāni yāni proktāni kāśīprāptikarāṇi ca |
prāpya kāśīṃ bhavenmukto janturnānyatra kutracit || 42 ||
ata eva M hi tatkṣetraṃ pavitramaticitrakṛt |
viśveśituḥ priyaṃ nityaṃ viṣvag brahmāṇḍamaṇḍale || 43 ||
idameva hi tatkṣetraṃ kuśalapraśnakāraṇam |
ehyehi dehi me spaśaṃ nijagātrasya suvrata || 44 ||
api kāśyāḥ samāgacchat sparśavat sparśa iṣyate |
mayā'tra tiṣṭhatā nityaṃ kintu tvaṃ tata āgataḥ ||| 45 |

trirātramapi ye kāśyāṃ vasanti niyatendriyāḥ |
teṣāṃ punanti niyataṃ spṛṣṭāśrcaraṇareṇavaḥ || 46 |
tvaṃ tu tatra kṛtāvāsaḥ kṛtapuṇyamahoccayaḥ |
uttarapravahāsnānajātapiṅgalamūrdhajaḥ ||| 47 |
tava tatra tu yatkuṇḍamagastīśvarasannidhau | |
tatra snātvā ca pītvā ca kṛtasarvodakakriyaḥ || 48 |
pitan piṇḍaiḥ samabhyarcya śraddhāśrāddhavidhānataḥ |
kṛtakṛtyo bhavejjanturvārāṇasyāḥ phalaṃ labhet || 46 ||
ityuktvā sarvagātrāṇi spṛṣṭrā kumbhodbhavasya ca |
skando'mṛtasarovāri vigāhya sukhamāptavān || 50 ||
jaya viśveśa netrāṇi vinimīlya vadannapi |
tataḥ kiñcitkṣaṇaṃ dadhyau guhaḥ sthāṇusuniścalaḥ || 51 |
punanti tṛṇagulmādīnapīti śeṣaḥ || 46 ||
tava kṛtārthatāyāḥ kiṃ vaktavyamityāśayenāha | tava tatreti || 48 |
amṛtaṃ sudhā tadeva sarovāri sarojalaṃ tadvigāhya āloḍya | tadgātrasparśajanitā'-
mṛtasalilena snātvetyarthaḥ || 50 ||

pratīkṣya mukhe |
vāgavasaraṃ papracchā'tha munirguham ||| 52
agastiruvāca— |
svāmin yathā bhagavatā bhagavatyai purā'kathi |
vārāṇasyāstu mahimā himaśailabhuve mudā || 53 |
tvayā yathā samākaṇi tadutsaṅganivāsinā |
tathā kathaya ṣaḍvaktra tatkṣetraṃ me'tirocate || 54 ||
skanda uvāca -
śṛṇuṣva maitrāvaruṇe yathā bhagavatā'kathi |
tatkṣetrasyā'vimuktasya mama mātuḥ puraḥ purā || 55 |
śrutaṃ ca yattadutsaṅge sthitena sthiracetasā |
māhātmyaṃ tacchṛṇu mune kathyamānaṃ mayā'nagha || 56 |
vistareṇa kāśīmāhātmyaṃ śrotuṃ pṛcchati | svāminniti | atirocate'tiśayena

guhyānāṃ paramaṃ guhyamavimuktamiheritam | |
tatra sannihitā siddhistatra nityaṃ sthito vibhuḥ || 57 |
bhūrloke naiva saṃlagnaṃ tatkṣetraṃ tvantarikṣagam |
ayogino na vīkṣante paśyantyeva ca yoginaḥ || 58 |
yastatra nivased vipra saṃyatātmā samāhitaḥ |
trikālamapi bhuñjāno vāyubhakṣasamo bhavet || 56 |
nimeṣamātramapi yo hyavimukte'tibhaktibhāk |
brahmacaryasamāyuktaṃ tena taptaṃ mahattapaḥ || 60 |
yastu māsaṃ vaseddhoro laghvāhāro jitendriyaḥ |
sarvaṃ tena vrataṃ cīrṇaṃ divyaṃ pāśupataṃ bhavet || 61 ||
saṃvatsaraṃ vasaṃstatra jitakrodho jitendriyaḥ |
aparastvavipuṣṭāṅgaḥ parānnaparivarjakaḥ || 62 |
tatrā'vimukte siddhiḥ sannihitā | tatra hetustatra nityamiti | yatreti
kacit || 57 ||
brahmacaryasamāyuktaṃ brahmacaryeṇa samyagāyuktam || 60 |
aparastvavipuṣṭāṅgaḥ na parasvena vipuṣṭamaṅgaṃ yasya saḥ | parasvaparipuṣṭāṅgaḥ
iti pāṭhe'nyatra parasvaparipuṣṭāṅgo'pītyarthaḥ || 62 ||

samāḥ sahasramanyatra tena taptaṃ mahattapaḥ || 63 |
yāvajjīvaṃ vasedyastu kṣetramāhātmyavinnaraḥ |
janmamṛtyubhayaṃ hitvā sa yāti paramāṅgatim || 64 ||
na yogaryā gatirlabhyā janmāntaraśatairapi |
anyatra helayā sā'tra labhyeśasya prasādataḥ ||| 65 |
brahmahā yo'bhigacchedvai devādvārāṇasīṃ purom |
tasya kṣetrasya māhātmyād brahmahatyā nivartate || 66 ||
ā dehapatanaṃ yāvadyo'vimuktaṃ na muñcati |
na kevalaṃ brahmahatyā prakṛtiśca nivartate || 67 ||
ananyamānaso bhūtvā tatkṣetraṃ yo na muñcati |
sa muñcati jarāmṛtyuṃ garbhavāsaṃ suduḥsaham || 68 |
prakṛtiravidyā || 67 ||

avimuktaṃ niṣeveta devarṣigaṇasevitam |
yadīcchen mānavo dhīmānna punarjananaṃ bhuvi || 66 ||
avimuktaṃ na muñceta saṃsārabhayamocanam |
prāpya viśveśvaraṃ devaṃ na sa bhūyo'bhijāyate || 70 |
kṛtvā pāpasahasrāṇi piśācatvaṃ varaṃ tviha |
na tu kratuśataprāpyaḥ svargaḥ kāśīpurīṃ vinā || 71 |
antakāle manuṣyāṇāṃ bhidyamāneṣu marmasu |
vātenātudyamānānāṃ smṛtirnaivopajāyate || 72 |
tatrotkramaṇakāle tu sākṣādviśveśvaraḥ svayam |
vyācaṣṭe tārakaṃ brahma yenā'sau tanmayo bhavet || 73 ||
nanu yāvajjīvaṃ kāśīvāse pāpamapi syāttathā ca rudrapiśācatvaṃ durvāram , yathā
kramelakasya , satyam , tathāpi kāśīprāptau tadbhogā'nantaraṃ mukteravaśyaṃbhāvitvāttadapi

avimuktaṃ niṣeveta saṃsārabhayanāśanam || 74 ||
vighnairāloḍyamāno'pi yo'vimuktaṃ na muñcati
naiḥśreyasīṃ śriyaṃ prāpya duḥkhāntaṃ so'dhigacchati || 75 |
mahāpāpaughaśamanī puṇyopacayakāriṇīm |

sanpūrṇānanda- saṃskṛta- viśvavidyālaya
śrutam gopāya
meṃ
