# smp_kkh_pt2_p001-200_OCR (main text from page 51)
======================================================================

śrīmanmaharṣivyāsaviracite
skandamahāpurāṇe
atha ṣaḍaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
agastiruvāca —
prasanno'si yadi skanda mayi prītiranuttamā |
tat samācakṣva bhagavaṃściraṃ yanme hṛdi sthitam || 1 ||
avimuktamidaṃ kṣetraṃ kadā ss rabhya bhuvastale |
parāṃ prathitimāpannaṃ mokṣadaṃ cā'bhavat katham || 2 ||
kathameṣā trilokīḍayā gīyate maṇikarṇikā |
tatrāsīt kiṃ purā svāmin yadā nā'maranimnagā || 3 ||
ṣaḍvaṃśatitame'dhyāye kāśyāvirbhāva ucyate |
ākhyānaṃ maṇikarṇyāśca sarvapāpaharaṃ param || 1 ||
evaṃ saṃkṣepeṇa kāśīmāhātmyaṃ śrutvā vistareṇa śrotuṃ prārthayate - prasanno'sīti || 1 ||

vārāṇasīti kāśīti rudrāvāsa iti prabho |
avāpa nāmadheyāni kathametāni sā purī ||
mahāśmaśāna iti ca kathaṃ khyātaṃ śikhidhvaja |
etadicchāmyahaṃ śrotuṃ sandehaṃ me'panodaya || 5 |
skanda uvāca -
praśnabhāro'yamatulaḥ tvayā yaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ |
kumbhayone'mumevārthamaprākṣodambikā haram
yathā ca devadevena sarvajñena niveditam |
jaganmātuḥ purastācca tathaiva kathayāmi te || 7 |
vārāṇasītyādi praśnacatuṣṭayam || 4 ||
iti ceti cakārādānandakānanamiti ca | evaṃ tāvadekādaśapraśnāḥ || 5 ||
yadyapyeṣāṃ praśnānāṃ pratyuttaraṃ durghaṭaṃ tathāpi jaganmātuḥ praśnānantaraṃ yathaiveśvareṇa
pratyuttaritam , tathaivā'haṃ kathayāmi mātuḥ koḍe sthitvobhayorme śrutatvādityāha -
praśnabhāro'yamiti || 6-7 |

mahāpralayakāle ca naṣṭe sthāvarajaṅgame |
āsīttamomayaṃ sarvamanarkagrahatārakam || 8 |
acandramanahorātra managnyanilabhūtalam
apradhānaṃ viyacchūnyamanyatejo virvādhitam || 9 ||
draṣṭṛtvādivihīnaṃ ca śabdasparśasamujjhitam |
vyapetagandharūpaṃ ca rasatyaktamadiṅmukham || 10 ||
itthaṃ satyandhatamasi sūcībhedye nirantare |
tat sabrahmeti yacchrutyā sadaikaṃ pratipādyate || 11 |
prathamapraśnottaramāha - mahāpralayetyārabhya skandetyataḥ prāktanena granthena | mahāpralaya-
kāle prākṛtapralaya samaye sarvaṃ viśvaṃ tamomayamāsīdityanvayaḥ | mahāpralaya kālasvarūpamāha |
naṣṭe sthāvarajaṅgame iti | naṣṭe'darśanaṃ gate | tamomayamajñānasvarūpam | tamaḥ śabdena
guṇaikadeśavācinā tatsamudāyarūpā prakṛtiruktā | tamasacoktistatkāle viśvasya mūḍhātma-
katvena tasya supratipādatvāt | tathā ca manuḥ - āsīdidaṃ tamobhūtamiti | yadvā tamomayaṃ
tamasā āvaraṇātmakena ajñānena vyāptamāvṛtamityarthaḥ | tathā ca śrutiḥ - mṛtyunaivedamāvṛta-

amanogocaro vācāṃ viṣayaṃ na kathañcana |
anāmarūpavarṇaṃ ca na sthūlaṃ na ca yatkṛśam || 12 ||
ahrasvadīrghamalaghu gurutvaparivajitam
na yatropacayaḥ kaścittathā cāpacayo'pi ca || 13 ||
abhidhatte sacakitaṃ yadastīti śrutiḥ punaḥ |
satyaṃ jñānamanantaṃ ca yadānandaṃ paraṃ mahaḥ || 14 ||
jñānasyāndhatamapadenopādānaṃ brahmavidyāmantareṇa durbhedyatvā'bhiprāyeṇa | ata eva sūcībhedye

aprameyamanādhāramavikāramanākṛti
nirguṇaṃ yogigamyaṃ ca sarvavyāpyekakāraṇam || 15 |
nirvikalpaṃ nirārambhaṃ nirmāyaṃ nirupadravam |
yasyetthaṃ saṃvikalpyante saṃjñāḥ saṃjñoditasya vai || 16 ||
tasyaikalasya carato dvitīyecchā'bhavatkila |
amūrtena svamūrtiśca tenākalpi svalīlayā || 17 ||
sarvaiśvarya guṇopetā sarvajñānamayī śubhā |
sarvagā sarvarūpā ca sarvadṛk sarvakāriṇī ||| 18 |
kīdṛśaṃ brahma ? yasya saṃjñoditasya saṃjñayā vedāntādau vyavahriyamāṇasya | ve prasiddham |
saṃjñojjhitasya ve iti pāṭhe'pi saṃjñayā varjitasyāpi satyaṃ jñānamityādyāḥ saṃjñāḥ
saṃvikalpyante parikalpyanta iti pāṭhe'pi kalpanayocyante iti tṛtīyenā'nvayaḥ | tatra

sarvaikavandyā sarvādyā sarvadā sarvasaṃkṛtiḥ |
parikalpyeti tāṃ mūrtimīśvaroṃ śuddharūpiṇīm || 16 ||
antardadhe ' parākhyaṃ yad brahma sarvagamavyayam || 20 ||
amūtaṃ yatparākhyaṃ vai tasya mūrtirahaṃ priye |
arvācīnaparācīnā īśvaraṃ māṃ jagurbudhāḥ || 21 ||
tatastadekalenāpi svairaṃ viharatā mayā |
svavigrahātsvayaṃ sṛṣṭā svaśarīrānapāyinī || 22 ||
pradhānaṃ prakṛti tvāṃ ca māyāṃ guṇavatīṃ parām |
buddhitattvasya jananīmāhuvikṛtivarjitām || 23 ||
sarvasya samyak kṛtiryasyāḥ sā sarvasaṃkṛtiḥ | tataḥ kiṃ kṛtavāṃstatrāha |
parikalpyeti || 1 9 -20 |
etāvatā prastute kimāyātamityāśaṅkayānuvādapūrvakaṃ tadāha - amūrtamiti |

yugapacca tvayā śaktyā sā kaṅkālasvarūpiṇā |
mayā'dya puruṣeṇaitatkṣetraṃ cāpi vinirmitam || 24 ||
skanda uvāca -
sā śaktiḥ prakṛtiḥ proktā sa pumānīśvaraḥ paraḥ |
tābhyāṃ ca ramamāṇābhyāṃ tasminkṣetre ghaṭodbhava || 25 |
paramānandarūpābhyāṃ paramānandarūpiṇi |
pañcakośaparīmāṇe svapādatalanirmite || 26 ||
sune pralayakāle'pi na tatkṣetraṃ kadācana |
vimuktaṃ hi śivābhyāṃ yadavimuktaṃ tato viduḥ || 27 ||
pratibhāsamātraśarīratvameva na vastutattvamityāha - māyāmiti | nanu kathamīśvarasya
nityaśuddhabuddhamuktasvabhāvasya māyayā svabhāvaviparītajanmādi tatrāha - guṇavatīmiti |
sisṛkṣitadehādiveṣamyārthaṃ midaṃ viśeṣaṇamiti draṣṭavyam | nanu kathaṃ tahi kevalyenāvasthānaṃ
tatrāha - parāmiti | brahmavidyāmityarthaḥ | ayamabhiprāyaḥ - yāvadavidyātmanāvaraṇavikṣepī
karoti , tāvannoparamati , yadā tu tu seva vidyārūpeṇa pariṇatā tadā'jñānaṃ tatkāryaṃ ca dagdhvā
nirindhanāgnivat svayamuparamediti | buddhitattvasya heraṇyagarbhabuddherbuddhibuddhimatorabhedopa-
cārād vā hiraṇyagarbhasya jananīmutpādayitrīm | vikṛtivajitāṃ vivartādhiṣṭhānabhūtā-

na yadā bhūmivalayaṃ na yadā'pāṃ samudbhavaḥ |
tadā vihartumīśena kṣetrametadvinirmitam || 28 ||
idaṃ rahasyaṃ kṣetrasya veda ko'pi na kumbhaja |
nāstikāya na vaktavyaṃ kadāciccarmacakṣuṣe || 26 ||
śraddhālave vinītāya trikālajñānacakṣuṣe |
śivabhaktāya śāntāya vaktavyaṃ ca sumukṣave || 3 |
avimuktaṃ tadārabhya kṣetrametadudīryate |
paryaṅkabhūtaṃ śivayonirantara sukhāspadam || 31 ||
abhāvaḥ kalpyate mūḍhairyadā ca śivayostayoḥ |
kṣetrasyāsya tadābhāvaḥ kalpyo nirvāṇakāriṇaḥ || 32 ||
etatkṣetraṃ bhautikaṃ bhūtārabdhatvena pratīyamānatvāt sampratipannavadityāśaṅkaya
smṛtibādhitatvena pariharati - na yadeti | yadvā yugapaccetyādinedaṃ kṣetraṃ vinirmitamityuktaṃ
tacca kadetyapekṣāyāmāha — na yadeti | bhūmivalayaṃ bhūmimaṇḍalam || 28 ||

anārādhya maheśāna manavāpya ca kāśikām |
yogādyupāyavijño'pi na nirvāṇamavāpnuyāt || 33 ||
asyānandavanaṃ nāma purā'kāri pinākinā |
kṣetrasyānandahetutvādavimuktamanantaram || 34 ||
ānandakandabījānāmaṅkurāṇi yatastataḥ |
jñeyāni sarvaliṅgāni tasminnānandakānane || 35 ||
avimuktamitikhyātamāsīditthaṃ ghaṭodbhava |
tathā cākhyāmyatha mune yathāsīnmaṇikarṇikā || 36 ||
prāgānandavane tantra śivayo ramamāṇayoḥ |
icchetyabhūt kalaśaja sṛjyaḥ ko'vyaparaḥ kila || 37 ||

yasminnyaste mahābhāre āvāṃ svaḥ svairacāriṇau |
nirvāṇaśrāṇanaṃ kurvaḥ kevalaṃ kāśiśāyinām || 38 ||
sa eva sarvaṃ kurute sa eva paripāti ca |
sa eva saṃvṛṇotyante sarvaiśvaryanidhiḥ sa ca || 36 ||
cetaḥ samudramākuñcya cintākalloladolitam |
sattvaratnaṃ tamogrāhaṃ rajovidrumavallitam || 40 ||
yasya prasādāttiṣṭhāvaḥ sukhamānandakānane |
parikṣipta manovṛttau kva hi cintāture sukham || 41 ||
svabhāvataḥ sveracāritve'pi mokṣaphaladātṛtvamāha - nirvāṇati | śrāṇanaṃ dānam |
kāśiśāyināṃ kāśyāṃ mṛtānām || 38 |
sṛjyaṃ viśinaṣṭi - sa eva sarvamiti | yaḥ sṛjya : sraṣṭavyaḥ sa evaṃvidho vidheya

sampradhāryeti sa vibhuḥ sarvataścitsvarūpayā |
tayā saha jagaddhātryā jagaddhātā'tha dhūrjaṭiḥ || 42 ||
savye vyāpārayāñcakre dṛśamaṅge sudhāmucam |
tataḥ pumānāvirāsīdekastrailokyasundaraḥ || 43 ||
śāntaḥ sattvaguṇodrikto gāmbhīryajitasāgaraḥ |
tathā ca kṣamayā yukto mune'labdhopamo'bhavat || 44 |
indranīladyutiḥ śrīmān puṇḍarīkottamekṣaṇaḥ |
suvarṇākṛtisucchāyadukūla yugalāvṛtaḥ || 45 ||
lasatpracaṇḍadordaṇḍayugaladvayarājitaḥ
ullasatparamāmodanābhīhṛdakuśeśayaḥ || 46 ||
ekaḥ sarvaguṇāvāsastvekaḥ sarvakalānidhiḥ |
eka : sarvottamo yasmāttato yaḥ puruṣottamaḥ || 47 ||

tato mahāntaṃ taṃ vīkṣya mahāmahimabhūṣaṇam |
mahādeva uvācedaṃ mahāviṣṇurbhavā'cyuta | 48 |
tava niḥśvasitaṃ vedāstebhyaḥ sarvamavaiṣyati |
vedadṛṣṭena mārgeṇa kuru sarvaṃ yathocitam || 46 ||
ityuktvā taṃ maheśāno buddhitattvasvarūpiṇam |
śivayā sahito rudro viveśānandakānanam || 50 ||
tataḥ sa bhagavān viṣṇuma lāvājñāṃ nidhāya ca |
kṣaṇaṃ dhyānaparo bhūtvā tapasyeva mano dadhau ||| 51 |
pūrva kriyayaivā'nvayaḥ || 47 |
mahāntaṃ vyāpakaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ vā | mahānto mahimā yeṣāṃ tāni tathābhūtāni bhūṣaṇāni
yasya tam || 48

khanitvā tatra cakreṇa ramyāṃ puṣkariṇīṃ hariḥ |
nijāṅgasvedasandohasalilaistāmapūrayat || 52 |
samāḥ sahasraṃ pañcāśattapa ugraṃ cacāra saḥ |
cakrapuṣkariṇītīre tatra sthāṇusamākṛtiḥ || 53 ||
tataḥ sa bhagavānīśī mṛḍānyā sahito mṛḍaḥ |
dṛṣṭvā jvalantaṃ tapasā niścalaṃ mīlitekṣaṇam || 54 ||
tamuvāca hṛṣīkeśaṃ maulimāndolayan muhuḥ |
aho mahattvaṃ tapasastvaho dheyaṃ ca cetasaḥ || 55 |
aho anindhano vahnirvvalatyeṣa nirantaram |
alaṃ taptvā mahāviṣṇo varaṃ varaya sattama || 56 ||
mṛḍasyāmreḍitamidaṃ pratyabhijñāya bhāṣitam |
unmīlitadṛgambhojaḥ samuttasthau caturbhujaḥ || 57 ||
nijāṅgasvedasandohasalilaiḥ svagātraghamaṃpūrajaleḥ || 52 ||
sthāṇusamākṛtiḥ sthāṇusamā śākhādivihīnavṛkṣaviśeṣasamā ākṛtiḥ śarīraṃ yasya
sa tathā || 53 |
mīlitekṣaṇaṃ mudritekṣaṇam || 54 ||
aho anindhana ityutprekṣā || 56 ||
āmreḍitaṃ dvistriruktam | idaṃ pūrvoktam | āmreḍitaṃ mahograsyeti kvacit |
bhāṣitaṃ vacanam || 57 ||

śrīviṣṇuruvāca -
yadi prasanno deveśa devadeva maheśvara |
bhavānyā sahitaṃ tvāṃ tu draṣṭumicchāmi sarvadā || 58 ||
sarvakarmasu sarvatra tvāmeva śaśiśekhara |
puraścarantaṃ paśyāmi yathā tanme varastathā || 56 |
tvadīyacaraṇāmbhojamakarandamadhūtsukaḥ
macceto bhramaro bhrānti vihāyāstu suniścalaḥ || 60 ||
śrīśiva uvāca -
evamastu hṛṣīkeśa hṛṣīkeśa yattvayoktaṃ janārdana |
anyaṃ varaṃ prayacchāmi tamākarṇaya suvrata || 61 ||
tvadīyasyāsya tapaso mahopacayadarśanāt |
yanmayāndolito maulirahiśravaṇabhūṣaṇaḥ || 62 |

tadāndolanataḥ karṇātpapāta maṇikarṇikā |
maṇibhiḥ khacitā ramyā tato'stu maṇikarṇikā || 63 |
cakrapuṣkariṇītīrthaṃ purākhyātamidaṃ śubham |
tvayā cakreṇa khananācchaṅkhacakragadādhara || 64 |
mama karṇātpapāteyaṃ yadā ca maṇikarṇikā |
tadāprabhṛti loke'tra khyātā'stu maṇikarṇikā ||| 65 |
śrīviṣṇuruvāca—
muktākuṇḍalapātena tavā'dritanayāpriya |
tīrthānāṃ paramaṃ tīthaṃ muktikṣetramihā'stu vai || 66 ||
tadāndolanatastasya mauleścālanād yasmāt karṇānmaṇikarṇikā papāta | maṇi-
kaṇiketyetadeva vyutpādayati | maṇibhirmuktādibhiḥ khacitā vyāptā ramyā maṇikarṇiketi

kāśate'tra yato jyotistadanākhyeyamīśvaraḥ |
ato nāmā'paraṃ cāstu kāśīti prathitaṃ vibho ||| 67 |
anyaṃ varaṃ vare deva deyaḥ so'pyavicāritam |
sa teṃ paropakārārthaṃ jagadrakṣāmaṇe śiva || 68 |
ābrahmastambaparyantaṃ yatkiñcijjantu saṃjñitam |
caturṣu bhūtagrāmeṣu kāśyāṃ tanmuktimāpsyatu || 66 ||
asnistīrthavare śambho maṇiśravaṇabhūṣaṇe |
sandhyāṃ snānaṃ japaṃ homaṃ vedādhyayanamuttamam |
tarpaṇaṃ piṇḍadānaṃ ca devatānāṃ ca pūjanam || 70 ||

gobhūtilahiraṇyāśvadīpānnāmbarabhūṣaṇam
kanyādānaṃ prayatnena saptatantūnanekaśaḥ || 71 || |
vratotsagaṃ vṛṣotsagaṃ liṅgādisthāpanaṃ tathā |
karoti yo mahāprājño jñātvāyuḥ kṣaṇagatvaram || 72 ||
vipatta vipulāṃ cāpi sampattimatibhaṅgarām |
akṣayā muktirekā'stu vipākastasya karmaṇaḥ || 73 ||
anyaccāpi śubhaṃ karma yadatra śraddhayā yutam |
vinātmaghātamīśāna tyaktvā prāyopaveśanam || 74 ||
naiḥśreyasyāḥ śriyo hetustadastu jagadīśvara |
nā'nuśocati nākhyāti kṛtvā kālāntare'pi yat || 75 ||
gobhūtilādīnāṃ bhūṣaṇāntānāṃ dānam | saptatantūn agniṣṭomādīn | taduktam -
agniṣṭomastathātyagniṣṭoma ukthotha ṣoḍaśī , vājapeyo'tirātro'ptoryāmaḥ saṃsthā ime kramā-
diti || 71 ||
liṅgādītyādipadena pratimādayo gṛhyante | mahāprājña iti viśeṣaṇasya tātparya -
māha - jñātvāyuriti pādatrayeṇa || 72 ||
anuktaṃ saṃgṛhṇāti - anyacceti | śraddhayā yutaṃ yaddattaṃ ca tannaiḥśreyasyāḥ śriyo
heturastvityagrimeṇānvayaḥ | tarhi ātmaghātasyāpi ki kevalyaphalaṃ netyāha - vineti |
tarhi kiṃ kaivalyamuddiśya prāyopaveśanenā'pi nātmaghāto vidheyo netyāha- tyaktveti |
prāyopaveśanaṃ tyaktvā prakārāntareṇa ya ātmaghātastaṃ vinetyarthaḥ || 74 ||
naiḥśreyasyāḥ kaivalyākhyāyāḥ || 75 |

tadihākṣayatāmetu tasyeśa tvadanugrahāt |
tava prasādāttasyeśa sarvamakṣayamastu tat || 76 ||
yadasti yadbhaviṣyacca yadbhūtaṃ ca sadāśiva |
tasmādetacca sarvasmātkṣetramastu śubhodayam || 77 ||
yathā sadāśiva tvatto na kiñcidadhikaṃ śivam |
tathā''nandavanādasmāt kiñcinmāstvadhikaṃ kvacit || 78 ||
vinā sāṃkhyena yogena vinā svātmā'valokanam |
vinā vratatapodānaiḥ śreyo'stu prāṇināmiha || 76 ||
śaśakā maśakāḥ koṭāḥ pataṅgāsturagoragāḥ |
paśvakośyāṃ mṛtāḥ kāśyāṃ santu nirvāṇadīkṣitāḥ || 80 ||
nāmā'pi gṛhṇatāṃ kāśyāḥ sadaivāstvenasaḥ kṣayaḥ || 81 ||
śivaṃ kalyāṇarūpam || 78 ||
sāṃkhyenātmā'nātmavivekena | yogenā'ṣṭāṅgena | ātmāvalokanaṃ jīvabrahmaṇoraikyā-
nusandhānam || 7 9 |
prāṇināṃ śreyo'stvityetadvivṛṇoti - śaśakā iti | nirvāṇe kaivalye dīkṣitāḥ || 80 |
enasaḥ pāpasya || 81 || "

sadā kṛtayugaṃ cā'stu sadā cāstūttarāyaṇam |
sadā mahodayaścā'stu kāśyāṃ nivasatāṃ satām || 82 ||
yāni kāni pavitrāṇi śrutyuktāni sadāśiva |
tebhyo'dhikataraṃ cā'stu kṣetrametattrilocana || 83 ||
caturṇāmapi vedānāṃ puṇyamadhyayanācca yat |
tatpuṇyaṃ jāyatāṃ kāśyāṃ gāyatrīlakṣajāpyataḥ || 84 ||
aṣṭāṅgayogābhyāsena yatpuṇyamapi jāyate |
tatpuṇyaṃ sādhikaṃ bhūyācchraddhākāśīniṣevaṇāt || 85 |
kṛcchracāndrāyaṇādyaṃśca yacchrayaḥ samupāyate |
tadekenopavāsena bhavatvānandakānane || 86 ||
anyatra yattapastaptvā śreyaḥ syāccharadāṃ śatam |
tadastu kāśyāṃ varṣeṇa bhūmiśayyāvratena hi || 87 |

ājanma maunavratato yadanyatra phalaṃ smṛtam |
tadastu kāśyāṃ pakṣāhaḥ satyavākparibhāṣaṇāt || 88 |
anyatra datvā sarvasvaṃ sukṛtaṃ yatsamīritam |
sahasrabhojanātkāśyāṃ tadbhūyādayutādhikam || 86 |
muktikṣetrāṇi sarvāṇi yatsaṃsevyoditaṃ phalam |
paśvarātrāttadatrā'stu niṣevya maṇikarṇikām || 60 |
prayāgasnānapuṇyena yatpuṇyaṃ syācchivapradam |
kāśīdarśanamātreṇa tatpuṇyaṃ śraddhayāstviha || 61 ||
yatpuṇyamaśvamedhena yatpuṇyaṃ rājasūyataḥ |
kāśyāṃ tatpuṇyamāpnotu trirātraśayanādyamī || 62 ||
tulā puruṣadānena yatpuṇyaṃ samyagāpyate |
kāśodarśanamātreṇa tatpuṇyaṃ śraddhayā'stu vai || 9 3 ||
śivapradaṃ mokṣapradaṃ kalyāṇapradaṃ vā || 9 1 |
yamī saṃyamavān || 9 2 |

iti viṣṇorvaraṃ śrutvā devadevo jagatpatiḥ |
uvāca ca prasannātmā tathā'stu madhusūdana || 64 ||
śrīmahādeva uvāca—
śṛṇu viṣṇo mahābāho jagataḥ prabhavāpyaya |
vidhehi sṛṣṭi vividhāṃ yathāvattvaṃ śrutīritām || 65 ||
piteva sarvabhūtānāṃ dharmataḥ pālako bhava |
vidhvaṃsanīyā vividhā dharmadhvaṃsavidhāyinaḥ || 66 ||
dharmetarapathasthānāmupasaṃhṛtaye hare |
hetumātraṃ bhavā'nyasmāt svakarmanihatā hi te || 67 ||
yathā pariṇataṃ sasyaṃ patetprasavabandhanāt |
te pariṇatapāpmānaḥ patiṣyanti tathā svayam || 68 |
ye ca tvāmavamanyante darpitāḥ svatapobalaiḥ |
teṣāṃ caivopasaṃhṛtyai prabhaviṣyāmyahaṃ hare || 66 |
upapātakino ye ca mahāpātakinaśca ye |
te'pi kāśīṃ samāsādya bhaviṣyanti gatainasaḥ || 100 |

mamājñā prabhavedana nānyājñā prabhavediha ||| 101 |
punavaṣṇurmayā prokto mṛḍāni śubhalocane |
atyugratejasā tejo amaṃstrailokyavibhramaḥ || 102 ||
pāṇināmapi jantūnāmavimuktanivāsinām |
nānyaḥ śāsayitā viṣṇo teṣāṃ śāstā'hameva hi || 103 |
yojanānāṃ śatastho'pi yo'vimuktaṃ smareddhṛdi |
bahupātakapūrṇo'pi na sa pāpaiḥ prabādhyate || 104 ||
mama priyasya kṣetrasya yo'vimuktasya saṃsmaret |
prāṇaprayāṇasamaye dūrago'pyaghavānapi || 105 ||

sa pāpapūga sutsṛjya svargabhogān samaśnute |
kāśīsmaraṇapuṇyena svargābhraṣṭo hi jāyate || 106 ||
pṛthivyāmekarāḍbhūtvā bhuktvā bhogānanekaśaḥ |
prāpyā'vimuktaṃ tatpuṇyānnirvāṇapadabhāgbhavet || 107 ||
bahukālamuṣitvātra niyatendriyamānasaḥ |
yadyanyatra vipadyeta daivayogācchucismite || 108 |
so'pi svargasukhaṃ bhuktvā bhūtvā kṣitipatīśvaraḥ |
punaḥ kāśīmavāpyā'tha vindennaiḥśreyasīṃ śriyam || 106 |
viṣṇo'vimukte saṃvāsaḥ karmanirmūlanakṣamaḥ |
dvitrāṇāṃ hi pavitrāṇāṃ nirvāṇāyeha jāyate || 110 |
tatpuṇyādantakāle kāśīsmaraṇapuṇyāt || 107 |

viṣṇuruvāca -
deveśa kṣetramāhātmyaṃ yo na jānāti tattvataḥ |

pañcakrośīṃ praviśatastasya pātakasantatiḥ |
bahireva pratiṣṭheta nāntaniviśate kvacit || 114 ||
bhayād bahiḥ sthitāyāṃ ca tasya pātakasantatau |
triśūlapāśapāṇīnāṃ gaṇānāṃ somacāriṇām || 115 |
praveśamātrādanaghaḥ sarvairenobhirujjhitaḥ |
saṃsnāya maṇikarṇikyāṃ puṇyaṃ prāpnotyanuttamam || 116 ||
sarvatortheṣu saṃsnānādyatpuṇyaṃ samavāpyate |
tatpuṇyamāpyate samyaṅ maṇikarṇyakamajjanāt || 117 ||
vidhinā tatra saṃsnāya mṛdgomayakuśādibhiḥ |
svaśākhāvāruṇairmantrairdūrvā'pāmārgadarbha kaiḥ || 118 |
sarvatīrtheṣu yatpuṇyaṃ sarvadāneṣu yatphalam |
maṇikarṇya vidhisnātaḥ śraddhayā tadavāpnuyāt || 116 ||

aśraddhayā'pi yaḥ snāto maṇikarṇya vidhānataḥ |
so'pi puṇyamavāpnoti svargaprāptikaraṃ param || 120 ||
śraddhayā vidhivatsnātvā kṛtvā devāditarpaṇam |
tilabahiryavaiḥ samyak sarvayajñaphalaṃ labhet || 121 ||
śraddadhāno vidhisnātaḥ kṛtasarvodakakriyaḥ |
japan devān samabhyarcya sarvamantraphalaṃ labhet || 122 ||
snātvā maunena viśveśadarśanānniyatendriyaḥ |
sarvavratakṛtaṃ śreyo labhedvācaṃyamaḥ śive || 123 |
snāne devārcane japye malamūtravisarjane |
maunaṃ kuryātprayatnena dantadhāvanahomayoḥ || 124 ||
viśveśvaraṃ samabhyarcya sūpacāraividhānataḥ |
yāvajjīvaṃ śivārcāyāḥ phalamāpnoti vai sakṛt ||| 125 |
barhīṣi kuśāḥ || 121 |
sarvavratakṛtamaśeṣavrataiḥ sampāditam | sarvayajñakṛtamiti kvacit | śreyaḥ phalam |

ṣaḍvaṃśo'dhyāyaḥ 2 9
datvā'lpamapi deveśi nyāyenopārjitaṃ dhanam |
avimukte mama kṣetre na daridro bhavetvavacit || 126 ||
vividhaṃ dhanamāvarjya yo'vimukte na yacchati |
samprāpya nidhanaṃ mūḍho'nyatra śocati sarvadā || ||| 127 ||
ramyāṇi yāni ratnāni gogajāśvāmbarāṇyapi |
kṛtāni tāni śreyo'rthamavimuktanivāsinām || 128 ||
viśveśaprīṇanārthāya dhanaṃ nidhanameva vā |
nyāyena kāśyāṃ yaḥ kuryāt sa dhanyaḥ sa ca dharmavit || 12 9 |
yo'sau viśveśvaro devaḥ kāśīpuryāmume sthitaḥ |
liṅgarūpadharaḥ sākṣānmama śreyāspadaṃ hi tat || 130 ||
avimuktaṃ mahatkṣetraṃ pañcakrośaparomitam | |
jyotirliṅgaṃ tadekaṃ hi jñeyaṃ viśveśvarā'bhidham || 131 ||

ekadeśasthitamapi yathā mārtaṇḍamaṇḍalam |
dṛśyate sarvagaṃ sarvaiḥ kāśyāṃ viśveśvarastathā || 132 ||
niṣpratyūhena yogena nānājanmārjitena ca |
yatphalaṃ labhyate'nyatra tatkāśyāṃ tyajatastanum || 133 |
taptvā tapāṃsi sarvāṇi bahukālaṃ jitendriyaiḥ |
yatphalaṃ labhyate'nyatra tatkāśyāmekarātrataḥ || 134 ||
akṣetramahimajño'pi śraddhāhīno'pi kālataḥ |
kāśīpraveśādanagho'mṛtatvaṃ labhate mṛtaḥ || 135 |
kṛtvāpyenāṃsi cogrāṇi kālātprāpyā'tha kāśikām |
tyaktvā tanuṃ prasādānme māmeva pratipadyate || 136 ||
vinā mama prasādaṃ vai kaḥ kāśoṃ pratipadyate |
vinā bradhnaṃ viśālākṣi dinakṛt ka ihocyate || 137 ||

caturviṃśatibhiḥ pāśaistriguṇaiḥ kriyayā dṛḍhaiḥ |
kaṇṭhe baddhā vimucyante kathaṃ kāśīṃ vinā janāḥ || 13 9 |
bahūpasargo yogo'yaṃ kṛcchrasādhyaṃ tapo hi yat |
yogādbhraṣṭastapo bhraṣṭo garbhakleśasahaḥ punaḥ || 140 |
kṛtvā'pi kāśyāṃ pāpāni kāśyāmeva mriyeta cet |
bhūtvā rudrapiśāco'pi punarmuktimavāpsyati || 141 ||
kāśyāṃ mṛtānāṃ jantūnāṃ daivātpāpakṛtāmapi |
na pāto narake teṣāṃ teṣāṃ śāstā'hameva yat || 142 ||
kārya vijñāya sāpāyaṃ smṛtvā garbhasya vedanām |
tyaktvā rājyamapi prājyaṃ sevyā kāśī nirantaram ||143 ||
atarkitaṃ samabhyetya yamadūtāḥ sudāruṇāḥ |
baddhvā pāśairhaniṣyanti kṣipraṃ kāśīṃ tataḥ śrayet || 144 ||
pāśān kathayan kaimutyanyāyamāha | caturviṃśatibhiriti | caturviṃśatibhiḥ

na pāpebhyo bhayaṃ yatra na bhayaṃ yatra vai yamāt |

skanda uvāca --
dūraṃ me maraṇaṃ yuvā'hamadhunā dhāyaṃ na citte tviti
śrotavyo nibhṛtaṃ kṛtāntamahiṣagraiveya ghaṇṭāravaḥ |

agastyasya puraḥ sūta kathayitvā kathāmimām |

atha saptaviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca --
vārāṇasīti prathitaṃ yathā cānandakānanam |
tathā ca kathayāmīha devadevena bhāṣitam || 1 |
īśvara uvāca-
niśāmaya mahābāho viṣṇo trailokyasundara |
prāptaṃ vārāṇasītyākhyāmavimuktaṃ yathā tathā || 2 |
nirdagdhān sāgarān śrutvā kapilakrodhavahninā |
aśvamedhāśvasaṃyuktān pūrvajān svān bhagīrathaḥ || 3 |
saptādhikatame viśe'dhyāye pāpapraṇodanaḥ |
sukhamokṣapradāyāḥ śrīgaṅgāyā mahimocyate || 1 ||
atīte'dhyāye idaṃ kṣetraṃ yaṃ kālamārabhya parāṃ prathitimāpannamānandakānana-
mavimuktaṃ kāśīti nāmatritayādikaṃ ca nirūpyāstra prathamato vārāṇasīti ṣaṣṭhapraśnasyo-
ttaraṃ vaktuṃ pratijānīte 1 | vārāṇasīti || 1 |

sūryavaṃśe mahātejā rājā paramadhārmikaḥ |
ārirādhayiṣurgaṅgāṃ tapase kṛtaniścayaḥ || 4 ||
himavantaṃ nagaśreṣṭhamamātyanyasta rājyadhūḥ |
jagāma yaśasāṃ rāśiruddidhīrṣuḥ pitāmahān || 5 |
brahmaśāpāgninirdagdhān mahādurgatigānapi |

yāmetāṃ jagatāṃ dhātrīṃ dhārayāmi svalīlayā |
viśvasya rakṣaṇārthāya parabrahmasvarūpiṇīm || 6 ||
trailokye yāni tīrthāni puṇyakṣetrāṇi yāni ca |
sarvatra sarve ye dharmāḥ sarve yajñāḥ sadakṣiṇāḥ || 10 |
tapāṃsi viṣṇo sarvāṇi śrutiḥ sāṅgā catuvidhā |
ahaṃ ca tvaṃ ca kaścāpi devatānāṃ gaṇāśca ye || 11 ||
puruṣārthāśca sarve vai śaktayo vividhāśca yāḥ |
gaṅgāyāṃ sarva evaite sūkṣmarūpeṇa saṃsthitāḥ || 12 ||
sasnātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu sarvakratuṣu dīkṣitaḥ |
cīrṇasarvavrataḥ so'pi yastu gaṅgāṃ niṣevate || 13 |
kimatra pramāṇamahameveśvara ityāha | yāmetāmiti | yadvā kāsetyapekṣāyāmaṅgulyā

tapāṃsi tena taptāni sarvadānapradaḥ sa ca | |
sa prāptayoganiyamo yastu gaṅgāṃ niṣevate || 14 ||
sarvavarṇāśramebhyaśca vedavidabhyaśca vai tathā |
śāstrārthapāragebhyaśca gaṅgāsnāyī viśiṣyate || 15 | ||
manovākkāyajairdoṣairduṣṭo bahuvidhairapi |
vīkṣya gaṅgāṃ bhavet pūtaḥ puruṣo nātra saṃśayaḥ || 16 ||
kṛte sarvatra tīrthāni tretāyāṃ puṣkaraṃ param |
dvāpare tu kurukṣetraṃ kalau gaṅgeva kevalam || 17 ||
pūrva ' janmāntarābhyāsa vāsanāvaśato hare |
gaṅgātīre nivāsaḥ syānmadanugrahataḥ parāt || 18 ||
dhyānaṃ kṛte mokṣahetustretāyāṃ tacca vai tapaḥ |
dvāpare tadddvayaṃ yajñāḥ kalau gaṅgeva kevalam || 16 ||
sarvadānapradaḥ sarvadānaṃ prakarṣeṇa dadātīti tathā | sarvadānavrata iti pāṭhe sarvāṇi
dānāni vratāni ca yasya saḥ || 14 ||

yo dehapatanādyāvad gaṅgātīraṃ na muñcati |
sa hi vedāntavidyogī brahmacaryavratī sadā || 20 ||
kalau kaluṣacittānāṃ paradravyaratātmanām |
vidhihīna kriyāṇāṃ ca gatirgaṅgāṃ vinā na hi || 21 ||
alakṣmīḥ kālakarṇī ca duḥsvapno durvicintitam |
gaṅgā gaṅgeti japanāttāni nopaviśanti hi || 22 ||
gaṅgā hi sarvabhūtānāmihāsutra sarvabhūtānāmihāmutra phalapradā |
bhāvānurūpato viṣṇo sadā sarvajagaddhitā || 23 ||
yajñadānatapoyogajapāḥ saniyamā yamāḥ |
gaṅgāsevāsahasrāṃśaṃ na labhante kalau hare || 24 |
kimaṣṭāṅgena yogena ki tapobhiḥ kimadhvaraiḥ |
vāsa eva hi gaṅgāyāṃ brahmajñānasya kāraṇam || 25 |
agnihotrādikarmāṇi sāpāyāni kalau yuge |
gaṅgāsnānaṃ harernāma nirapāyamidaṃ dvayam || iti || 1 9 ||
kālakarṇī kākaviṣṭhā rākṣasīviśeṣo vā | duḥsvapnaṃ duṣṭasvapnaḥ | ṣaṃḍhatvamārṣam |
duḥsvapna ityeva vā pāṭhaḥ || 22 ||
bhāvānurūpato bhaktyanusāreṇa ||| 23 |

api dūrasthitasyā'pi gaṅgāmāhātmyavedinaḥ |
ayogyasyā'pi govinda bhaktyā gaṅgā prasodati || 26 |
śraddhā dharmaḥ paraḥ sūkṣmaḥ śraddhā jñānaṃ paraṃ tapaḥ |
śraddhā svargaśca mokṣaśca śraddhayā sā prasīdati || 27 |
ajñānarāgalobhādyaiḥ puṃsāṃ sammūḍhacetasām |
śraddhā na jāyate dharme gaṅgāyāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ || 28 |
bahiḥ sthitaṃ jalaṃ yadvannārikelāntare sthitam | |
tathā brahmāṇḍabāhyasthaṃ parabrahmāmbu jāhnavī || 26 ||
gaṅgālābhātparolābhaḥ kvacidanyo na vidyate |
tasmād gaṅgāmupāsīta gaṅgeva paramaḥ pumān || 30 ||

śaktasya paṇḍitasyā'pi guṇino dānaśīlinaḥ |
gaṅgāsnānavihīnasya hare janma nirarthakam || 31 ||
vṛthā kulaṃ vṛthā vidyā vṛthā yajñā vṛthā tapaḥ |
vṛthā dānāni tasyeha kalau gaṅgāṃ na yo bhajet || 32 ||
guṇavatyātrapūjāyāṃ na syādvai tādṛśaṃ phalam |
yathā gaṅgājalasnānapūjane vidhinā phalam || 33 || ||
mama tejo'gnigarbheyaṃ mama vīryātisaṃvṛtā |
dāhikā sarvadoṣāṇī sarvapāpavināśinī || 34 ||
smaraṇādeva gaṅgāyāḥ pāpasaṃghātapañjaram |
śatadhā bhedamāyāti girirvajrahato girirvajrahato yathā ||| 35 |
gaṅgāṃ gacchati yastveko yastu bhaktyā'numodayet |
tayostulyaṃ phalaṃ prāhurbhaktirevā'tra kāraṇam || 36 ||
mama vīryātisaṃvṛtā mama prabhāvātiśayena sampannā matsadṛśītyarthaḥ | abhisaṃvṛteti
pāṭhe'pi sa evā'rthaḥ || 34 ||
hare ! paṇḍita , guṇī aura dānaśīla hone para bhī śakti rahate yadi gaṃgāsnāna

gacchaṃstiṣṭhan japan dhyāyan bhuñjan jāgrat ' svapan vadan |
yaḥ smaretsatataṃ gaṅgāṃ sa hi mucyeta bandhanāt || 37 ||
pitanuddiśya yo bhaktyā pāyasaṃ madhusaṃyutam |
guḍasapistilaiḥ sādhaṃ gaṅgā'mbhasi vinikṣipet || 38 ||
tṛptā bhavanti pitarastasya varṣaśataṃ hare |
yacchanti vividhān kāmān parituṣṭāḥ pitāmahāḥ || 36 |
liṅge sampūjite sarvamacitaṃ syājjagadyathā |
gaṅgāsnānena labhateṃ sarvatīrthaphalaṃ tathā || 40 |
gaṅgāyāṃ tu naraḥ snātvā yo liṅgaṃ nityamarcati |
ekena janmanā mukti parāṃ prāpnoti sa dhruvam || 41 ||
agnihotraṃ ca yajñāśca vratadānatapāṃsi ca |
gaṅgāyāṃ liṅgapūjāyāḥ koṭacaṃśenā'pi no samāḥ || 42 ||
gaṅgāṃ gantuṃ viniścitya kṛtvā śrāddhādikaṃ gṛhe |
sthitasya samyak saṅkalpāt tasya nandanti pūrvajāḥ || 43 ||

pāpāni ca rudantyāśu hā kva yāsyāma ityalam |
lobhamohādibhiḥ sārdhaṃ mantrayanti punaḥ punaḥ || 44 |
yathā na gaṅgāṃ yātyeṣa tathā vighnaṃ prakurmahe |
gaṅgāṃ gato yathā caiṣa na ucchitti vidhāsyati ||| 45 |
gṛhād gaṅgāvagāhārthaṃ gacchatastu pade pade |
nirāśāni vrajantyeva pāpānyasya śarīrataḥ || 46 |
pūrvajanmakṛtaiḥ puṇyaistyaktvā lobhādikaṃ hare |
vyudasya sarvavighnaughān gaṅgāṃ prāpnoti puṇyavān || 47 ||
anuṣaṅgena maulyena vāṇijyenā'pi sevayā |
kāmāsakto'pi vā martyo gaṅgāsnāto divaṃ vrajet || 48 ||
anicchyā'pi saṃspṛṣṭo dahano hi yathā dahet |
anicchyā'pi saṃsnātā gaṅgā pāpaṃ tathā dahet || 46 ||
tāvad bhramati saṃsāre yāvad gaṅgāṃ na sevate |
saṃsevya gaṅgāṃ no janturbhavakleśaṃ prapaśyati || 50 ||
usake pāpagaṇa turata " hāya kahā~ jāveṃge " yaha kahakara rodana karane evaṃ lobha-

yo gaṅgāmbhasi nisnāto bhaktyā santyaktasaṃśayaḥ |
manuṣyacarmaṇā naddhaḥ sa devo nātra saṃśayaḥ || 51 |
gaṅgāsnānārthamudyukto madhye māgaṃ mṛto yadi |
gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ so'pi tadāpnoti na saṃśayaḥ || 52 |
māhātmyaṃ ye ca gaṅgāyāḥ śṛṇvanti ca paṭhanti ca |
te'pyaśeṣairmahāpāpairmucyante nā'tra saṃśayaḥ || 53 |
durbuddhayo durācārā durācārā haitukā haitukā bahusaṃśayāḥ |
paśyanti mohitā viṣṇo gaṅgāmanyanadīmiva || 54 |
janmāntarakṛtairdānaistapobhirniyamairvṛtaiḥ
iha janmani gaṅgāyāṃ nṛṇāṃ bhaktiḥ prajāyate || 55 |
gaṅgābhaktimatāmarthe mahendrādipureṣu ca |
harmyāṇi ramyabhogāni nirmitāni svayambhuvā || 56 |
haitukāḥ satkriyāsuhetubhiḥ sandehotpādakāḥ | | bahusaṃśayā bahusaṃśayā dṛṣṭādṛṣṭakarmasu
nānāsaṃśayavantaḥ || 54 ||

siddhayaḥ siddhiliṅgāni sparśaliṅgānyanekaśaḥ |
prāsādā ratnaracitāścintāmaṇigaṇā api || 57 |
gaṅgājalāntastiṣṭhanti kalikalmaṣabhītitaḥ |
ata eva hi saṃsevyā kalau gaṅgeṣṭasiddhidā || 58 ||
sūryodaye tamāṃsīva vajrapātabhayānnagāḥ |
tāryekṣaṇādyathā sarpā meghā vātāhatā iva || 56 |
tattvajñānādyathā mohaḥ siṃhaṃ dṛṣṭvā yathā mṛgāḥ |
tathā sarvāṇi pāpāni yānti gaṅgekṣaṇātkṣayam || 60 |
divyauṣadhairyathā rogā lobhena ca yathā guṇāḥ |
yathā grīṣmoṣmasampattiragādha hṛdamajjanāt || 61 |
tūlaśailaḥ sphuliṅgena yathā naśyati tatkṣaṇāt |
tathā doṣāḥ praṇaśyanti gaṅgāmbhaḥ sparśanād dhruvam || 62 |

krodhena ca tapo yadvat kāmena ca yathā matiḥ |
anayena yathā lakṣmīvidyā mānena vai yathā || 63 ||
dambhakauṭilyamāyābhiryathā dharmo vinaśyati |
tathā naśyanti pāpāni gaṅgāyā darśanena tu || 64 ||
mānuṣyaṃ durlabhaṃ prāpya vidyutsampātacañcalam |
gaṅgāṃ yaḥ sevate so'tra buddheḥ pāraṃ paraṃ gataḥ || 65 |
vidhūtapāpā ye martyāḥ paraṃ jyotiḥ svarūpiṇīm |
sahasrasūryapratimāṃ gaṅgāṃ paśyanti te bhuvi || 66 ||
sādhāraṇāmbhasā pūrṇāṃ sādhāraṇanadīmiva |
paśyanti nāstikā gaṅgāṃ pāpopahatalocanāḥ || 67 ||
saṃsāramocakaścā'haṃ janānāmanukampayā |
gaṅgātaraṅgarūpeṇa sopānaṃ nirmame divaḥ || 68 |

sarva eva śubhaḥ kālaḥ sarvo deśastathā śubhaḥ |
sarvo jano dānapātraṃ śrīmatī jāhnavītaṭe || 66 ||
yathā'śvamedha yajñānāṃ nagānāṃ himavān yathā |
vratānāṃ ca yathā satyaṃ dānānāmabhayaṃ yathā || 70 |
prāṇāyāmaśca tapasāṃ mantrāṇāṃ praṇavo yathā |
dharmāṇāmapyahiṃsā ca kāmyānāṃ śroryathā varā || 71 ||
yathātmavidyā vidyānāṃ strīṇāṃ gaurī yathottamā |
sarvadevagaṇānāṃ ca yathā tvaṃ puruṣottama || 72 |
sarveṣāmeva pātrāṇāṃ śivabhakto yathā varaḥ |
tathā sarveṣu tīrtheṣu gaṅgātīrthaṃ viśiṣyate || 73 ||
hare yaścāvayorbhedaṃ na karoti mahāmatiḥ |
śivabhaktaḥ sa vijñeyo mahāpāśupataśca saḥ || 74 ||
pāpapāṃsumahāvātyā pāpadrumakuṭhārikā |
pāpendhanadavāgniśca gaṅgeyaṃ puṇyavāhinī || 75 |
śrīmatī jāhnavītyatra puṃvadbhāvābhāva ārṣa | || 6 9 |

nānārūpāśca pitaro gāthā gāyanti sarvadā |
api kaścit kule'smākaṃ gaṅgāsnāyī bhaviṣyati || 76 |
devarṣīn parisantarpya dīnānāthāṃśca duḥkhitān |
śraddhayā vidhinā snātvā dāsyate salilāñjalim || 77 ||
api naḥ sa kule bhūyācchvei viṣṇau ca sāmyadṛk |
tadālayakaro bhaktyā tasya sammārjanādikṛt || 78 ||
akāmo vā sakāmo vā tiryagyonigato'pi vā |
gaṅgāyāṃ yo mṛto martyo narakaṃ sa na paśyati || 76 |
tīrthamanyat praśaṃsanti gaṅgātīre sthitāśca ye |
gaṅgāṃ na bahu manyante te syunirayagāminaḥ || 80 ||
māṃ ca tvāñcaiva yo dveṣṭi gaṅgāṃ ca puruṣādhamaḥ |
svakīyaiḥ puruṣaḥ sādhaṃ sa ghoraṃ narakaṃ vrajet || 81 ||
tadālayakarastayoḥ śivaviṣṇvoḥ prāsādakartā | tasya tayorālayasya sammārja-

ṣaṣṭirgaṇasahasrāṇi gaṅgāṃ rakṣanti sarvadā |
abhaktānāṃ ca pāpānāṃ vāse vighnaṃ prakurvate || 82 ||
kāmakrodhamahāmohalobhādiniśitaiḥ śaraiḥ |
ghnanti teṣāṃ manastatra sthiti cāpanayanti ca || 83 |
gaṅgāṃ samāśrayedyastu sa muniḥ sa ca paṇḍitaḥ |
kṛtakṛtyaḥ sa vijñeyaḥ puruṣārthacatuṣṭaye || 84 ||
gaṅgāyāṃ ca sakṛtsnāto hayamedhaphalaṃ labhet |
tarpayaṃśca pitaṃstatra tārayennarakārṇavāt || 85 |
nairantaryeṇa gaṅgāyāṃ māsaṃ yaḥ snāti puṇyavān |
śakraloke sa vasati yāvacchakraḥ sapūrvajaḥ || 86 |
abdaṃ yaḥ snāti gaṅgāyāṃ nairantaryeṇa puṇyabhāk |
viṣṇorlokaṃ samāsādya sa sukhaṃ saṃvasennaraḥ || 87 |
moho'vivekastasya mahattvaṃ nāma tattvajñānamantareṇāparicchedyatvam | ghnantyuccā-

gaṅgāyāṃ snāti yo martyo yāvajjīvaṃ dine dine |
jīvanmuktaḥ sa vijñeyo dehānte mukta eva saḥ || 88 |
tithinakṣatra pūrvādi nāpekṣyaṃ jāhnavījale |
snānamātreṇa gaṅgāyāṃ sañcitā'ghaṃ vinaśyati || 86 |
paṇḍito'pi sa mūrkhaḥ syācchaktiyukto'pyaśaktikaḥ |
yastu bhāgīrathītīraṃ sukhasevyaṃ na saṃśrayet || 60 |
ki vāyuṣāpyarogeṇa vikāsinyātha ki śriyā |
kiṃ vā buddhayā vimalayā yadi gaṅgāṃ na sevate || 61 |
yaḥ kārayedāyatanaṃ gaṅgāpratikṛternaraḥ |
bhuktvā sa bhogān pretyāpi yāti gaṅgāsalokatām || 62 ||
tithinakṣatra pūrvādi yatsaṅkalpavākyaṃ tannāpekṣyamityarthaḥ | parvādīti pāṭhe ādi-
padena dinādikaṃ gṛhyate ||| 8 9 |
bhāgīrathītīraṃ siddhikṣetram | | tathā coktam- gaṅgātīre vasennityaṃ bhikṣu-

śṛṇvanti mahimānaṃ ye gaṅgāyā nityamādarāt | |
gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ teṣāṃ vācakaprīṇanāddhanaiḥ || 63 ||
pitanuddiśya yo liṅgaṃ snapayed gāṅgavāriṇā |
tṛptāḥ syustasya pitaro mahānirayagā api || 64 ||
aṣṭakṛtvo mantrajaptairvastrapūtaiḥ sugandhibhiḥ |
procurgājalaiḥ snānaṃ ghṛtasnānādhikaṃ budhāḥ || 65 ||
aṣṭadravya vimiśreṇa gaṅgātoyena yaḥ sakṛt |
māgadhaprasthamātreṇa tāmrapātrasthitena ca || 66 ||
bhānave'ghaṃ pradadyācca svakīyapitṛbhiḥ saha |
so'titejovimānena sūryaloke mahīyate ||| 67 |
āpaḥ kṣīraṃ kuśāgrāṇi ghṛtaṃ madhu gavāṃ dadhi |
raktāni karavīrāṇi raktacandanamityapi || 68 |
vācaka prīṇanāddhanairdravyervācakasya santarpaṇādityarthaḥ || 9 3 ||
mantrajaptaiḥ ' oṃ namaḥ śivāya ' ityanena vakṣyamāṇaviṃśatyakṣaragaṅgāmantreṇa vā'bhi-

aṣṭāṅgā'rdhoyamuddiṣṭastvatīvaravitoṣaṇaḥ
gāṅgarvābhiḥ koṭiguṇo jñeyo viṣṇo'nyavāritaḥ || 66 ||
gaṅgātīre svaśaktyā yaḥ kuryāddevālayaṃ sudhīḥ |
anyatīrthapratiṣṭhāto bhavetkoṭiguṇaṃ phalam || 100 ||
aśvatthavaṭacūtādi vṛkṣāropeṇa yatphalam |
kūpavāpītaḍāgādiprapāsatrādibhistathā || 101 ||
anyatra yadbhavetpuṇyaṃ tad gaṅgādarśanād bhavet |
puṣpavāṭyādibhiścāpi gaṅgāspaśaṃ tato'dhikam || 102 |

kanyādānena yatpuṇyaṃ yatpuṇyaṃ go'nnadānataḥ |
tatpuṇyaṃ syācchataguṇaṃ gaṅgāgaṇḍūṣapānataḥ || 103 ||
cāndrāyaṇasahastreṇa yatpuṇyaṃ sthājjanārdana |
tato'dhikaphalaṃ gaṅgā'mṛtapānādavāpnuyāt || 104 ||
bhaktyā gaṅgā'vagāhasya kimanyatphalamucyate |
akṣayaḥ svargavāso'pi nirvāṇamathavā hare || 105 |
gaṅgāyāḥ pādukāyugmaṃ nityamarcati yo naraḥ |
āyuḥ puṇyaṃ dhanaṃ putrān svargamokṣo ca vindati || 106 |
nāsti gaṅgāsamaṃ tīrthaṃ kalikalmaṣanāśanam |
nāsti muktipradaṃ muktipradaṃ kṣetramavimuktasamaṃ hare || 107 |
gaṅgāsnānarataṃ matyaṃ dṛṣṭvaiva yamakiṅkarāḥ |
diśo daśa palāyante siṃhaṃ dṛṣṭvā yathā mṛgāḥ || 108 ||
gaṅgāgaṇḍūṣapānataḥ gaṅgājalasya culukamātrapānāt || 103 |

gaṅgābhajanaśīlasya gaṅgātaṭanivāsinaḥ |
arjāṃ kṛtvā yathānyāyamaśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet || 106 || |
gobhūhiraṇyadānena bhaktyā gaṅgātaṭe śubhe |
naro na jāyate bhūyaḥ saṃsāre duḥkhasaṅkaṭe || 110 ||
dorghāyuṣyaṃ ca ca vāsobhirjñānaṃ vāsobhirjñānaṃ pustakadānataḥ |
annadānena sampatti koti kanyāpradānataḥ || 111 |
anyatra yatkṛtaṃ karma vrataṃ dānaṃ japastapaḥ |
gaṅgātaṭe tu tatsarvaṃ hare koṭiguṇaṃ bhavet || 112 ||
dhenuṃ savatsāṃ yo dadyād gaṅgātīre vidhānataḥ |
goromasaṃkhyayā viṣṇo yugān sarvasamṛddhimān || 113 ||
goloke mama loke vā kāmadhenupradānataḥ |
bhuñjānaḥ sarvakāmāṃstu divyānnānāvidhān bahūn || 114 ||
gaṅgābhajanaśīlasyeti ślokadvayaṃ vākyam || 10 9 |
duḥkhasaṅkaṭe duḥkhasambādhe || 110 |
dīrghāyuṣyamityādi dvitīyānteṣu caturṣu padeṣu prāpnotīti śeṣaḥ | labhediti

devānāmapyalabhyāṃśca bhuktvā tu saha bāndhavaiḥ |
pitṛbhiśca suhṛdbhiśca sarvaratnavibhūṣitaḥ || 115 |
jāyate satkule paścāddhanadhānyasamākule |
ratnakāñcanasampanne śīlavidyāsamanvite || 116 ||
bhuktvā sa vipulān bhogān putrapautrasamanvitaḥ |
punargaṅgāṃ samāsādya kāśyāmuttaravāhinīm || 117 ||
viśveśvaraṃ samārādhya prāgjanurvāsanāvaśāt |
kālāddehāntamāsādya brahma sampadyate tataḥ || 118 |
vivartanadvayamapi bhūmerbhāgīrathītaṭe |
naro dadāti yo bhaktyā tasya puṇyaphalaṃ śṛṇu || 11 9 ||
tadbhūmitrasareṇūnāṃ saṃkhyayā yugamānayā |
mahendracandralokeṣu bhuktvā bhogān manaḥ priyān || 120 |
kāmadhenupradānataḥ pūrvoktāyāḥ kāmadhenordānāt | kāmadhenuvrajāvṛta iti kvacit |
tatra goloke kāmadhenusamūhena vṛtaḥ mama loke cenmadīyairgaṇairvṛta iti jñeyam | ubhayatra vā

saptadvīpapatirbhūtvā mahādharmaparāyaṇaḥ |
narakasthān pitan sarvān prāpayettridivaṃ hare || 121 ||
svargasthāṃśca pitan sarvān mocayitvā mahādyutiḥ |
ante jñānā'sinā chittvā hyavidyāṃ pāñcabhautikīm || 122 ||
paraṃ vairāgyamāpanno yuñjāno yogamuttamam | |
prāpyā'thavā'vimuktaṃ ca paraṃ brahmā'dhigacchati || 123 ||
suvarṇamātramapi yaḥ suvarṇaṃ samprayacchati |
suvarṇāya suvarṇaṃ ca hare bhāgīrathītaṭe || 124 ||
sa hemaratnakhacite vimāne vimāne sarvage śubhe |
sarvaiśvaryasamāyuktaḥ sarvalokeṣu pūjitaḥ || 125 |
mocayitvā mokṣaṃ dāpayitvā pāñcabhautikīṃ pañcabhūtākāreṇa pariṇatāmavidyāṃ
chitvā dehe'bhimānaṃ tyaktvetyarthaḥ | pañcapavikāmiti pāṭhe tamo moho mahāmohastāmisro
hyandhasaṃjñita iti viṣṇupurāṇoktāmi pañcaparvāṇi yasyāstāmityarthaḥ || 122 ||
yuñjāno ghaṭayan kurvannityetat | yogaṃ jīvaparamātmanoraikyam | aṣṭāṅgayāge
vyavacchedārthamuttamamiti viśeṣaṇam | athavā'vimuktaṃ prāpya dehāvasāne paraṃ kevalyaṃ

brahmāṇḍāntarasaṃstheṣu bhuñjan bhogān manoramān |
sarvaiḥ sampūjito viṣṇo yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 126 |
ekarāṭ ca tato bhūtvā jambūdvīpe pratāpavān |
tato'vimuktamāsādya padaṃ nirvāṇamṛcchati || 127 |
janmarkṣe tu kṛte snāne gaṅgāyāṃ bhaktipūrvakam |
janmaprabhṛtipāpaughāt sañcitānmucyate kṣaṇāt || 128 ||
vaiśākhe kārtike māghe gaṅgāsnānaṃ sudurlabham |
darśe śataguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ saṅkrāntau ca sahasrakam || 126 |
candrasūryagrahe lakṣaṃ vyatīpāte tvanantakam |
ayutaṃ viṣuve caiva niyutaṃ tvayanadvaye || 130 ||
brahmāṇḍāntarasaṃstheṣu sarvalokeṣviti sambandhaḥ | yāvadābhūtasaṃplavaṃ bhūtānāṃ

somagrahaḥ somadine ravivāre ravergrahaḥ |
tacca cūḍāmaṇiparvākhyaṃ tatra snānamasaṃkhyakam || 131 ||
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homo yadyaccūḍāmaṇau kṛtam |
tadakṣayaṃ sarvamiha viṣṇo bhāgorathotaṭe || 132 |
śraddhayā bhaktiyuktastu gaṅgāṃ snātvā nidhānataḥ |
brahmahā'pi viśuddhayeta kiṃ punastvanyapātakī || 133 |
kṛmikīṭapataṅgādyā ye mṛtā jāhnavītaṭe |
kūlātpatanti ye vṛkṣāste'pi yānti parāṃ gatim || 134 ||
jyeṣṭhe māsi site pakṣe daśamyāṃ hastasaṃyute |
gaṅgātīre tu puruṣo nārī vā bhaktibhāvataḥ || 135 |
asaṃkhya kama saṃkhyāta phalajanakamityarthaḥ || 131 |
iha jagati bhāgīrathītaṭe bhāgīrathyāṃ tattaṭe cetyarthaḥ | tatra tīraṃ dhanuḥ śatatraya-

niśāyāṃ jāgaraṃ kuryād gaṅgāṃ daśavidherhare |
puṣpaiḥ sugandhainaivedyaḥ phalairdaśadaśonmitaiḥ || 136 |

hemnā rūpyeṇa vā śaktyā gaṅgāmūrti vidhāya ca |
vastrācchāditavaktrasya pūrṇakumbhasya copari || 141 ||
pratiṣṭhāpyā'rcayeddevīṃ pañcāmṛtaviśodhitām |
caturbhujāṃ trinetrāñca nadīnadaniṣevitām || 142 |
lāvaṇyāmṛta niṣpandasaṃ śīladgātrayaṣṭikām |
pūrṇakumbhasitāmbhojavaradābhayasatkarām || 143 |
tato dhyāyet susaumyāṃ ca candrāyutasamaprabhām |
cāmarairvījyamānāṃ ca śvetacchatropaśobhitām || 144 ||
sudhāplāvitabhūpṛṣṭhāṃ divyagandhānulepanām |
trailokyapūjitapadāṃ devarṣibhirabhiṣṭutām || 145 |
dhyātvā samarcya mantreṇa dhūpadīpopahārataḥ |
māṃ ca tvāṃ ca vidhi bradhnaṃ himavantaṃ bhagīratham || 146 ||
pañcāmṛtena viśodhitāṃ snāpitām | dhyānamāha | caturbhujāmiti sārdhatrayeṇa |
tato dhyāyediti dvitīyaślokasya prathamaṃ caraṇaṃ prathamato jñātavyam || 142 |
lāvaṇyaṃ saundaryaṃ tadevā'mṛtaṃ tasya niṣyandaḥ sravaṇam | niṣyandeti pāṭhe'pi sa
evā'rthastena saṃśīlantī gātrameva yaṣṭikā yasyāstām | pūrṇakumbhasitāmbhojābhyāṃ sahitā
varadābhayā bhaktānāṃ bhayanivārakāḥ santaḥ karā yasyāstām || 143 |

pratimāgre samabhyarcya candanākṣatanirmitām |
daśa prasthatilān dadyāddaśaviprebhya ādarāt || 147 ||
palaṃ ca kuḍavaḥ prastha āḍhako droṇa eva ca |
dhānyamānena boddhavyāḥ kramaśo'sī caturguṇāḥ || 148 ||
matsyakacchapamaṇḍūkamakarādi jalecarān |
haṃsakāraṇḍavabaka cakraṭiṭṭibhasārasān || 14 9 |
yathāśakti svarṇarūpyatāmrapṛṣṭhavinirmitām |
abhyarcya gandhakusumairgaṅgāyāṃ prakṣiped vratī || 150 |
prasthasya mānaṃ darśayan palādīnāṃ caturṇāmapi mānamāha | palañceti | amī

evaṃ kṛtvā vidhānena vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ |
upavāsī vakṣyamāṇairdaśapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 151 |
adattānāmupādānaṃ hisā caivāvidhānataḥ |
paradāropasevā ca kāyikaṃ trividhaṃ smṛtam || 152 |
pāruṣyamanṛtaṃ caiva paiśunyaṃ caiva sarvaśaḥ |
asambaddhapralāpaśca vāṅmayaṃ syāccatuvidham || 153 |
paradravyeṣvabhidhyānaṃ manasā'niṣṭa cintanam |
vitathā'bhiniveśaśca mānasaṃ trividhaṃ smṛtam || 154 ||
etairdaśavidhaiḥ pāpairdaśajanmasamudbhavaiḥ |
mucyate nātra sandehaḥ satyaṃ satyaṃ gadādhara || 155 |
uddharennarakātpūrvān daśa ghorān daśāvarān |
vakṣyamāṇamidaṃ stotraṃ gaṅgā'gre śraddhayā japet || 156 ||
paruṣameva pāruṣyaṃ kaṭhoravacanamityarthaḥ | asambaddhapralāpo niṣprayojana-
vāgvyavahāraḥ || 153 | vitathā'bhiveśo mithyābhūteṣu kāryeṣvāgrahaḥ || 154 ||

oṃ namaḥ śivāyai gaṅgāyai śivadāyeṃ namo namaḥ |
namaste viṣṇurūpiṇyai brahmamūrtyai namo'stu te ||1 || 157 ||
namaste rudrarūpiṇyai śāṅkaryai te namo namaḥ |
sarvadevasvarūpiṇyai namo bheṣajamūrtaye || 2 || 158 |
sarvasya sarvavyādhīnāṃ bhiṣakśreṣṭhye namo'stu te |
sthāsnujaṅgamasambhūta viṣahantryai namo'stu te ||3||15 9 ||
saṃsāraviṣanāśinyai jīvanāyai namo'stu te |
tāpatritayasaṃhantryai prāṇeśyai te namo namaḥ ||4 || 160 ||

śāntisantānakāriṇyai namaste śuddhamūrtaye |
sarvasaṃśuddhikāriṇyai namaḥ pāpārimūrtaye || 5 || 161 |
bhuktimuktipradāyinyai bhadradāyai bhadradāyai namo namaḥ |
bhogopabhogadāyinyai bhogavatyai namo'stu te ||6 || 162 ||
mandākinye namaste'stu svargadāyai namo namaḥ |
namastrailokyabhūṣāyai tripathāyai namo namaḥ ||7 || 163 ||
namastriśukla saṃsthāyai kṣamāvatyai namo namaḥ |
trihutāśanasaṃsthāyai tejovatyai namo namaḥ || 8 || 164 ||

nandāyaṃ liṅgadhāriṇyai sudhādhārātmane namaḥ |
namaste viśvamukhyāyai revatyai te namo namaḥ ||6 || 165 ||
bṛhatyai te namaste'stu lokadhātryai namo'stu te |
namaste viśvamitrāyai nandinyai namo namaḥ ||10||166 ||
pṛthvyai śivāmṛtāyai ca suvṛṣāyai te namo namaḥ |
parāparaśatāḍhyāyai tārāyaṃ te namo namaḥ ||11||167 ||
yadvā triṣu kāleṣu śuklena śuddhena brahmarūpeṇeti yāvat | samyak sthitiryasyāstasyai |
taduktam - - yo'sau nirañjano devaśvitsvarūpī janārdanaḥ |
sa eva dravarūpeṇa gaṅgāmbho nā'tra saṃśayaḥ || iti |
yadvā maheśvaracandramaṇḍalahimālayeṣu kailāseṣu vā triśukleṣu saṃsthāye | yadvā
triśuklavacchaṅkhakundenduvat saṃsthā ākṛtiryasyāstasyai | tathā ca śrūyate gaṅgāstotre |
śaṅkhakundendudhavalā mahāpātakanāśinīti | kṣamāvatyai kṣamākaryai | trihutāśanasaṃsthāye
dakṣiṇāgnirgārhapatyāhavanīyo trayo'gnayasteṣu saṃsthāyaṃ | tejovatye doptimatye || 8 | 164 |

pāśajālanikṛntinyaṃ abhinnāyai namo'stu te |
śāntāyai ca variṣṭhāyai varadāyai namo namaḥ || 12 || 168 |
ugrāyai sukhajagdhye ca sañjīvinyai namo'stu te |
brahmiṣṭhāyai brahmadāyai duritaghnyai namo namaḥ ||13||166 ||
praṇatātiprabhañjinye jaganmātre namo'stu te |
sarvāpatpratipakṣāyai maṅgalāyai namo namaḥ ||14 || 170 ||
śaraṇāgatadīnārtaparitrāṇaparāyaṇe
sarvasthātihare devi nārāyaṇi namo'stu te || 15 || 171 ||
pāśaścatuviśatitattvānyeva jālamānāyobandhana hetutvāttannikṛntinyai | abhinnāyai

nirlepāyeṃ durgahantryai dakṣāyai te namo namaḥ |
parāparaparāyai ca gaṅge nirvāṇadāyini || 16 || 172 ||
gaṅge mamāgrato bhūyā gaṅge me tiṣṭha pṛṣṭhataḥ |
gaṅga me pārśvayoredhi gaṅge tvayyastu me sthitiḥ || 17 || 173 ||
ādau tvamante madhye ca savaṃ tvaṃ gāṅgate śive |
tvameva mūlaprakṛtistvaṃ pumān para eva hi ||
gaṅge tvaṃ paramātmā ca śivastubhyaṃ namaḥ śive || 18 || 174 |
ya idaṃ paṭhate stotraṃ śṛṇuyācchuddhayā'pi yaḥ |
daśadhā sucyate pāpaiḥ kāyavāk cittasambhavaiḥ || 16 || 175 ||
nirlepāyai avidyātatkārya ra hitāye | durgahantryai durganāmno'surasya nāśinyai | dakṣāye

rogastho rogato mucyed vipadbhyaśca vipadyutaḥ |
mucyate bandhanād baddho bhīto bhīteḥ pramucyate ||20||176 ||
sarvānkāmānavāpnoti pretya ca tridivaṃ vrajet |
divyaṃ vimānamāruhya divyastrīparivījitaḥ ||21 || 177 ||
gṛhe'pi likhitaṃ yasya sadā tiṣṭhati dhāritam |
nāgnicaurabhayaṃ tasya na sarpādibhayaṃ kvacit || 22 || 178 ||
jyeṣṭhamāse site pakṣe daśamīhastasaṃyutā |
saṃharettrividhaṃ pāpaṃ budhavāreṇa saṃyutā ||23||17 9 |
tasyāṃ daśamyāmetacca stotraṃ gaṅgājale sthitaḥ |
yaḥ paṭheddaśakṛtvastu daridro vā'pi cākṣamaḥ || 24 || 180 ||
so'pi tatphalamāpnoti gaṅgāṃ sampūjya yatnataḥ |
pūrvoktena vidhānena yatphalaṃ samprakīrtitam ||25 || 181
yathā gaurī tathā gaṅgā tasmādgauryāstu pūjane |
yo vidhivihitaḥ samyak so'pi gaṅgāprapūjane ||26||182 ||
tasyāṃ prasiddhāyāṃ jyeṣṭhe māsi śuklapakṣe jātāyāmityarthaḥ || 24 || 180 ||
tarhi matto'pi sā śreṣṭheti devyā āśayamālakṣyāha bhagavān | yathāgaurīti |
yata evamatastasmād gauryāstviti || 26 || 182 |

yathā'haṃ tvaṃ tathā viṣṇo yathā tvaṃ tu tathā hyamā |
umā yathā tathā gaṅgā caturūpaṃ na bhidyate || 27 || 183 |
viṣṇurudrāntaraṃ caiva śrīgauryorantaraṃ tathā |
gaṅgāgauryantaraṃ caiva yo brūte mūḍhadhīstu saḥ || 28 || 184 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe gaṅgāmahimavarṇanapūrvakaṃ daśaharā stotrakathanaṃ
nāma saptaviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||27 ||
tarhyahameva sarvanikṛṣṭa iti viṣṇorāśayamālakṣya brūte viśveśvaraḥ | yathā'haṃ
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptaviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 27 |

athāṣṭāviṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
umovāca- -
kiñcitpraṣṭumanā nātha svasandehāpanuttaye |
vada khedo yadi na te trikālajñānakovida || 1 |
tadā bhagīratho rājā kva kva bhāgīrathī tadā |
yadā viṣṇustapastepe cakrapuṣkariṇītaṭe || 2 |
śiva uvāca -
sandeho'tra na kartavyo viśālākṣi sadā'male |
śrutau smṛtau purāṇeṣu kālatrayamudīryate || 3 ||
aṣṭādhikatame viṃśe vāhīkākhyānapūrvakam |
gaṅgāyā bhūri māhātmyaṃ varṇyate śambhunā harim || 1 ||
atītā'dhyāyādibhāge viṣṇuṃ sambodhya nirdagdhān sāgarān śrutvā gaṅgāmāri-
rādhayiṣurbhagīratho himavantaṃ jagāmetyādyuktamīśvareṇa tatra prākṛtānāṃ sandehāpanuttaye sandi-
hāneva bhavānī viśveśaṃ paripṛcchati | kiñciditi dvayena || 1 |
bhāvinibhūtavadupacāra iti nyāyena bhāvyapi bhutavannirdiśyata ityabhiprāyeṇa

bhūtaṃ bhāvi bhavaccāpi saṃśayaṃ mā vṛthā kṛthāḥ |
ityuktvā punarāheśo gaṅgāmāhātmyamuttamam || 4 ||
agastya uvāca-
pārvatīnandana punardyunadyāḥ parito vada |
mahimoktoharau yadvaddevadevena vai tadā || 5 |
skanda uvāca -
mune'tra maitrāvaruṇe yathā devena bhāṣitam |
śṛṇu tripathagāminyā māhātmyaṃ pātakāpaham || 6 ||
trisrotasaṃ samāsādya sakṛt piṇḍān dadāti yaḥ |
uddhṛtāḥ pitarastena bhavāmbhodhestilodakaiḥ || 7 |
yāvantaśca tilā martyairgṛhītāḥ pitṛkarmaṇi |
tāvad varṣasahasrāṇi pitaraḥ svargavāsinaḥ || 8 |
devāḥ sapitaro yasmād gaṅgāyāṃ sarvadā sthitāḥ |
āvāhanaṃ visagaṃ ca teṣāṃ tatra tato na hi || 9 |
kṛthāḥ kuru || 4 | yadvadyathā || 5 |
triṣu lokeṣu sroto yasyāḥ sā trisrotāstāṃ trisrotasam || 7 |
pitṛkarmaṇi tarpaṇādī || 8 ||

pitṛvaṃśe mṛtā ye ca mātṛvaṃśe tathaiva ca |
guruśvaśurabandhūnāṃ ye cānye bāndhavā mṛtāḥ || 10 ||
ajātadantā ye kecidye ca garbhe prapīḍitāḥ |
agnividyuccorahatā vyāghradaṃṣṭribhireva ca || 11 ||
udbandhanamṛtā ye ca patitā ātmaghātakāḥ |
ātmavikrayiṇaśvorā ye tathā'yājyayājakāḥ || 12 |
rasavikrayiṇo ye ca ye cānye pāparogiṇaḥ |
agnidā garadāścaiva goghnāścaiva svavaṃśajāḥ || 13 |
asipatravane ye ca kumbhīpāke ca ye gatāḥ |
raurave'pyandhatāmistre kālasūtre ca ye gatāḥ || 14 ||
jātyantarasahastreṣu bhrāmyante ye svakarmabhiḥ |
ye tu pakṣimṛgādīnāṃ kīṭavṛkṣādivīrudhām || 15 ||
yoniṃ gatāstvasaṃkhyātāḥ saṃkhyātānāmaśobhanāḥ |
prāpitā yamalokaṃ tu sughorairyamakiṅkaraiḥ || 16 ||
pitṛvaṃśe mṛtā ye cetyādīnāmetān mantrān samuccāryetyagrimeṇā'nvayaḥ || 10 |
pāparogiṇaḥ kuṣṭharogavantaḥ pāpanimitta rogiṇa iti vā || 13 ||
asipatrādyāḥ pañcanarakaviśeṣāḥ || 14 ||
saṃkhyātānāmaśobhanāḥ saṃkhyātānāmapi pakṣyādīnāṃ madhye ye'śobhanā nikṛṣṭā

ye bāndhavā abāndhavā vā ye'nyajanmani bāndhavāḥ |
ye s pi cājñānāmāno ye cā s putrāḥ svagotrajāḥ || 17 |
viṣeṇa ca bhṛtā vai ye ye vai śṛṅgibhirāhatāḥ |
kṛtaghnāśca gurughnāśca ye ca mitrahastathā ||| 18 |
strībālaghātakā ye ca ye ca viśvāsaghātakāḥ |
asatya hiṃsāniratāḥ sadā pāparatāca ye || 16 ||
aśvavikrayiṇo ye ca paradravyaharāśca ye |
anāthāḥ kṛpaṇā dīnā mānuṣyaṃ prāptumakṣamāḥ || 20 ||
tapitā jāhnavītoyairnareṇa vidhinā sakṛt |
prayānti svargati te'pi svargiṇo muktimāpnuyuḥ || 21 ||
etānmantrān samuccārya yaḥ kuryātpitṛtarpaṇam |
śrāddhaṃ piṇḍapradānaṃ ca savidhijña ihocyate || 22 ||
kāmapradāni tīrthāni trailokye yāni kānicit |
tāni sarvāṇi sevante kāśyāmuttaravāhinīm || 23 ||
ye abāndhavā iti cchedaḥ || 17 |

svaḥ sindhuḥ sarvataḥ puṇyā brahmahatyāpahāriṇī |
kāśyāṃ viśeṣato viṣṇo yatra cottaravāhinī || 24 ||
gāyanti gāthāmetāṃ vai devarṣipitaro gaṇāḥ |
api dṛggocarā naḥ syātkāśyāmuttaravāhino ||| 25 |
yatratyāmṛtasantṛptāstāpatritayavarjitāḥ
syāma tvamṛtamevāddhā viśvanāthaprasādataḥ || 26 ||
gaṅgeva kevalā muktyai nirṇītā parito hare |
avimukte viśeṣeṇa mamā'dhiṣṭhānagauravāt || 27 ||
jñātvā kaliyugaṃ ghoraṃ gaṅgābhaktiḥ sugopitā |
na vindanti janā gaṅgāṃ muktimārgekadāyikām || 28 |
anekajanmaniyutaṃ bhrāmyamāṇastu yoniṣu |
nirvṛti prāpnuyātko'tra jāhnavībhajanaṃ ' vinā || 2 9 |
narāṇāmalpabuddhīnāmenovikṣiptacetasām
gaṅgeva paramaṃ viṣṇo bheṣajaṃ bhavarogiṇām || 30 ||
yatratyāmṛtasantṛptāḥ kāśyuttaravahā bhavajalena saṃhṛṣṭāḥ | syāma tvamṛtamiti |

khaṇḍasphuṭita saṃskāraṃ gaṅgātīre karoti yaḥ |
mama loke ciraṃ kālaṃ tasyā'kṣayasukhaṃ hare || 31 |
gantumuddiśya yo gaṅgāṃ parārthaṃ svārthameva vā |
na gacchati paraṃ mohāt sa patet pitṛbhiḥ saha || 32 ||
sarvāṇi yeṣāṃ gāṅgeyaistoyaiḥ kṛtyāni dehinām |
bhūmisthā api te martyā amartya eva vai hare || 33 ||
carame'pi vayo bhāge svaḥ sindhuṃ yo niṣevate |
kṛtvā'pyenāṃsi bahuśaḥ so'pi yāyācchubhāṃ gatim || 34 |
yāvadasthi manuṣyāṇāṃ gaṅgātoyeṣu tiṣṭhati |
tāvadabdasahasrāṇi svargaloke mahīyate || 35 |
śrīviṣṇuruvāca -
devadeva jagannātha jagatāṃ hitakṛtprabho |
kīkasañcetpateddaivāddurvṛttasya durātmanaḥ || 36 |
khaṇḍasphuṭitasaṃskāraṃ devālayādīnāmiti śeṣaḥ | tatra khaṇḍaṃ bhagnaṃ sphuṭitaṃ vidīrṇaṃ
tayoḥ saṃskāraḥ sandhānamityarthaḥ || 31 |
lokānujighṛkṣayā'jānanniva bhagavān paripṛcchati | devadeveti | kokasam
asthi || 36 |

jale nadyā niṣpāpe kathaṃ tasya parāgatiḥ |
apamṛtyuvipannasya tadīśa vinivedyatām || 37 ||
maheśvara uvāca- -
atrārthe kathayiṣyāmi purāvṛttamadhokṣaja |
śṛṇuṣvaikamanā viṣṇo vāhīkasya dvijanmanaḥ || 38 ||
purā kaliṅgaviṣaye dvijo lavaṇavikrayī |
sandhyāsnānavihīnaśca vedākṣaravivarjitaḥ || 3 9 |
vāhīko nāmato yajñasūtramātraparigrahaḥ |
parigrahaśca tasyāsīt kauvindī vidhavā navā || 40 ||
durbhikṣapīḍitenā'tha vṛṣalīpatinā vinā |
prāṇādhāraṃ tadā tena deśāddeśāntaraṃ yayau ||| 41 |
lokaviśrambhaṇāyākhyāyikayottaramāha | atrārthaṃ iti | vāhīkasya nāmneti

madhye'tha daṇḍakāraṇyaṃ kṣutkṣāmaḥ saṅgavajitaḥ |
vyāghreṇa ghātitastatra naramāṃsapriyeṇa saḥ || 42 ||
tasya vāmapadaṃ gṛdho gṛhītvodapatastataḥ |
māṃsāśinā'nyagṛdhreṇa tastha yuddhamabhūddivi || 43 |
gṛdhrayorāmiṣaṃ gṛdhandoḥ parasparajayaiṣiṇoḥ |
avāpatatpādagulphaṃ kaṅkacañcupuṭāttadā || 44 ||
tasya vāhīkavitrasya vyāghravyāpāditasya ha |
madhyegaṅga daivayogādapatadvandvakāriṇoḥ || 45 |
yadaiva hatavān dvīpī taṃ vāhīkamaraṇyagam |
tasminneva kṣaṇe baddhaḥ sa pāśaiḥ krūrakiṅkaraiḥ || 46 ||
atha saṅgavajitaḥ san tatra madhye daṇḍakāraṇyaṃ daṇḍakāraṇyasya madhye vyāghreṇa
gṛdhrayoriti ślokadvayaṃ vākyam | āmiṣaṃ gṛdhnvorākāṅkṣatoḥ | pādagulkaṃ caraṇa-

kaśābhirghātito'tyantamārābhiḥ paritoditaḥ |
vaman rudhiramāsyena nītastaiḥ sa yamāgrataḥ || 47 ||
āpṛcchi dharmarājena citragupto'tha māpate |
dharmā'dhamaṃ vicāryā s sya kathayā''śu dvijanmanaḥ || 48 |
vaivasvatena pṛṣṭo'tha citragupto vicitradhīḥ |
sarvadā sarvajantūnāṃ veditā sarvakarmaṇām || 4 9 |
jagāda yamunābandhuṃ vāhīkasya dvijanmanaḥ |
janmakarma dinārabhya durvṛttasya śubhetaram || 50 |
citragupta uvāca -
garbhādhānādikaṃ karma prākṛtaṃ nā'sya kenacit |
jātakarmakṛtaṃ nā'sya pitrā'jñānavatā hare || 51 ||
kaśābhiraśvapraṇodinībhi : | ārābhirmarmabhedikābhiḥ | paritoditaḥ samantato bheditaḥ
sarvāṅge vyathita iti vā || 47 || | dharmeti | dharmaścā'dharmaśca

garbhenaḥ śamane hetuṃ hetuṃ samastāyuḥ samastāyuḥ sukhapradam |
ekādaśe'hni nāmā'sya na kṛtaṃ vidhipūrvakam || 52 ||
khyātaḥ syādyena vidhinā sarvatra vidhipāvanam |
nā'kārṣonnigamaṃ cāsya caturthe māsi mandadhīḥ || 53 |
janakaḥ śubhatithyā dau videśagamanāpaham |
ṣaṣṭhe'nnaprāśanaṃ māsi na kṛtaṃ vidhipūrvakam || 54 ||
sarvadā miṣṭamaśnāti karmaṇā yena bhāskare |
na cūḍākaraṇaṃ cā'sya kṛtamabde yathākulam || 55 |
karmaṇā yena keśāḥ syuḥ snigdhāḥ kusumavarṣiṇaḥ |
nā'kāri karṇavedho'sya janitrā samaye śubhe || 56 |
suvarṇagrāhiṇo yena karṇo syātāṃ ca suśruto |
mauñjībandho'pyabhūdasya vyatīte'bde'ṣṭame hare |
brahmacaryā'bhivṛddhacai yo brahmagrahaṇahetukaḥ || 57 |
yena nāmakaraṇena || 53 ||

mauñjīmokṣaṇavārtā'pi kṛtā nā'sya januḥ kṛtā |
gārhasthyaṃ prāpyate yasmātkarmaṇo'nantaraṃ varam || 58 ||
yathākathañcidṛḍhā'tha patnī tyaktakulādhvagā |
vṛṣalīpatinā tena paradārāpahāriṇā || 5 9 |
ārabhya pañcamādvarṣāt parasvasyāpahārakaḥ |
abhūdeṣa durācāro durodaraparāyaṇaḥ || 60 |
rumāyāṃ vasatā'nena hatā gaurekavārṣikī |
ekadā dṛḍhadaṇḍena lihantī lavaṇaṃ mṛtā || 61 ||
jananīṃ pādaghātena bahuśo'sāvatāḍayat |
kadācidapi no vākyaṃ pituḥ kṛtamanena vai || 62 ||
januḥ kṛtā janmakartrā pitretyarthaḥ | ramāpata iti kvacit | yasmān moñjī-
mokṣaṇāt || 58 ||

viṣaṃ bhakṣitavāneṣa bahuśaḥ kalahapriyaḥ |
janopatāpaśīlo'sau kṛtodaravidāraṇa || 63 ||
dhattūrakaravīrādi bahudhopaviṣāṇi ca |
krīḍākalahamātreṇa bhakṣayaccaiṣa durmatiḥ || 64 ||
dagdho s sāvagninā saure śvabhiśca kavalīkṛtaḥ |
śṛṅgibhiḥ paritaḥ proto viṣāṇāgrairasau bahu || 65 ||
dandaśūkairbhṛśaṃ daṣṭo duṣṭaḥ śiṣṭavigarhitaḥ |
kāṣṭheṣṭaloṣṭaiḥ pāpiṣṭhaḥ kṛtā'niṣṭaḥ sadātmanaḥ || 66 |
āsphālitaṃ śiro'nenā'sakṛccā'pi durātmanā |
yadaryate sadā sadbhiruttamāṃ gamanekadhā || 67 |

asau hi brāhmaṇo mando gāyatrīmapi veda na |
kāmato matsyamāṃsāni jagdhānyekena dudhiyā || 68 |
ātmārthaṃ pāyasama sau paryapākṣīdanekadhā |
lākṣālavaṇamāṃsānāṃ sapayodadhisarpiṣām ||| 66 |
viṣalohāyudhānāṃ ca dāsīgovājināmapi |
vikretā'sau sadā mūḍhastathā vai keśacarmaṇām || 70 ||
śūdrānnaparipuṣṭāṅgaḥ parvaṇyahani maithunī |
parāṅmukho daivapitryakarmaṇyeṣa durātmavān || 71 |
pakṣiṇo ghātitā'nena mṛgāścā'pi paraḥśatam |
akāraṇadrumacchedī sadā nirdayamānasaḥ || 72 ||
udvegajanako nityaṃ nijabandhujaneṣvapi |
asatyavādī satataṃ sadā hiṃsāparāyaṇaḥ || 73 ||
kāmato jagdhāni bhakṣitāni | anenā'kāmato bhakṣaṇe na doṣa iti dhvanitam |
tathā cāha manuḥ - devān pitṝn samabhyarcya khādan māṃsaṃ na duṣyatītyādi || 68 |

adattadānaḥ piśunaḥ śiśnodaraparāyaṇaḥ |
kiṃ bahūktena ravija sākṣātpātakamūrtimān || 74 ||
raurave'pyandhatāmistre kumbhīpāke'tiraurave |
kālasūtre kṛmibhuji pūyaśoṇitakardame || 75 |
asipatrabhavane ghore yantrapīḍe sudaṃṣṭrake |
adhomukhe pūtigandhe viṣṭhāgartteṣvabhojane || 76 ||
sūcībhedye'tha sandaṃśe lālāpekṣuradhārake |
pratyekaṃ narake tveṣa pātyatāṃ kalpasaṃkhyayā || 77 |
dharmarājaḥ samākarṇya citraguptamukhāditi |
nirbhatsyaṃ taṃ durācāraṃ kiṅkarānādideśa ha || 78 ||
bhūsaṃjñayā hṛtairnītaḥ sa baddhvā nirayālayam |
ākrandarāvo yatroccaiḥ pāpināṃ romaharṣaṇaḥ || 76 |
rauravādyā narakaviśeṣāḥ || 75 ||
kalpasaṃkhyayā brahmaṇo dinagaṇanayā || 77 |
ādideśa ājñaptavān || 78 ||

īśvara uvāca-
yātanāsvatitīvrāsu vāhīke saṃsthite tadā |
tatkāla puṇyaphala de gāṅgeyāmbhasi nirmale || 80 ||
patitaṃ taddhi gṛdhrā''syādvāhīkasya dvijanmanaḥ |
hare vimānaṃ vimānaṃ tatkālamāpannaṃ surasadmataḥ || 81 |
ghaṇṭā'valambitaṃ divyaṃ divyastrīśatasaṃkulam |
āruhya devayānaṃ sa divyaveṣadharo dvijaḥ || 82 ||
vījyamāno'psa rovṛnde divyagandhānulepanaḥ
jagāma svargabhuvanaṃ gaṅgā'sthipatanāddhare || 83 ||
skanda uvāca -
vastuśaktivicāro'yamadbhutaḥ ko'pi kumbhaja |

yathā'nyāḥ sarito loke vāripūrṇāḥ sahasraśaḥ |
tathaiṣā nā'numantavyā saddhistripathagāminī || 86 ||
śrutyakṣarāṇi niścotya kāruṇyācchambhunā mune |
nirmitā tadravaireṣā gaṅgā gaṅgādhareṇa vai || 87 ||
yogopaniṣadāmetaṃ sāramākṛṣya śaṅkaraḥ |
kṛpayā sarvajantūnāṃ cakāra saritāṃ varām || 88 |
akalānidhayo rājyo vipuṣpāścaiva pādapāḥ |
yathā tathaiva te deśā yatra nāstyama rāpagā || 8 ī |
anayāḥ sampado yadvan makhā yadvadadakṣiṇāḥ |
tadvaddeśādiśaḥ sarvā honā gaṅgāmbhasā hare || 60 |
ata eva eṣā nā'nyasaritsametyāha | yathā'nyā iti || 86 |

vyomāṅgaṇamanakaṃ ca nakte'dīpaṃ yathā gṛham |
avedā brāhmaṇā yadvad gaṅgāhonāstathā diśaḥ ||| 61 |
cāndrāyaṇasahasraṃ tu yaḥ kuryāddehaśodhanam |
gaṅgā'mṛtaṃ pibedyastu tayorgaṅgāmbupo'dhikaḥ || 62 ||
pādenaikena yastiṣṭhet sahasraṃ śaradāṃ śatam |
abdaṃ gaṅgāmbupo yastu tayorgaṅgāmbupo'dhikaḥ || 63 ||
avākśirāḥ pralambedyaḥ śatasaṃvatsarānnaraḥ |
bhīṣmasūvālukātalpaśayastasmādvaro hare || 64 ||
pāpatāpābhitaptānāṃ bhūtānāmiha jāhnavī |
pāpatāpaharā yadvad gaṅgā nānyattathā kalau || 65 ||
tārkṣyavīkṣaṇamātreṇa phaṇino nirviṣā yathā |
niṣprabhāṇi tathaināṃsi bhāgīrathyavalokanāt || 66 ||
bhīṣmasūvālukātalpaśayaḥ bhīṣmaṃ sūta iti bhīṣmasūrgaṅgā tasyā vālukā eva
talpaṃ śayyā tatra śeta iti tathā || 9 4 |

gaṅgātaṭodbhavāṃ mṛtsnāṃ yo maulau bibhṛyānnaraḥ |
birbhāta so'rkabimbaṃ vai tamonāśāya niścitam || 67 ||
vyasanairabhibhūtasya dhanahīnasya pāpinaḥ |
gaṅgeva kevalaṃ tasya gatiruktā na cānyathā || 68 |
śrutābhilāṣitā dṛṣṭā spṛṣṭā potā'vagāhitā |
puṃsāṃ vaṃśadvayaṃ gaṅgā tārayennā'tra saṃśayaḥ || 66 ||
kīrtanādarśanātsparśād gaṅgā pānā'vagāhanāt |
daśottaraguṇā jñeyā puṇyā puṇyadhanāśayoḥ || 100 |
na sutairna ca vā vittairnānyenā'pi sukarmaṇā |
tatphalaṃ prāpyate martyo gaṅgāmāpya yadāpyate || 101 |
gaṅgātaṭodbhavāṃ gaṅgātīre jātām | gaṅgātaṭottarāmiti pāṭhe gaṅgātīrāduttara
uttaraṇam uddhāro yasyāḥ sā tathā tāmityarthaḥ | tamonāśāya pāpanāśāya paramparayā' -
jñānanāśāyeti vā || 9 7 |
vaṃśadvayaṃ mātṛvaṃśaṃ pitṛvaṃśaṃ cetyarthaḥ || 99 |

jātyandhāḥ paṅgavaste vai jīvanto'pyatha te mṛtāḥ |
samarthā api ye gaṅgāṃ na snāyurmokṣagarbhiṇīm || 102 ||
śruti niśāmaya hare gaṅgāmāhātmyabhāṣiṇīm |
viniścitārthaṃ yāṃ śrutvā śrayedgaṅgāṃ na narottamaḥ || 103 ||
irāvatīṃ madhuvatīṃ payasvinī namṛtarūpāmūrjasvatīm |
tridivaprasūtāṃ gaṅgāṃ śritāsastridivaṃ vrajanti || 104 ||
ṛṣijuṣṭāṃ viṣṇupadīṃ purāṇāṃ supuṇyadhārāṃ manasā hi loke |
sarvātmanā jāhnavīṃ ye prapannāste brahmaṇaḥ sadanaṃ samprayānti || 105 ||
lokānimānnayati yā jananīva putrān svargaṃ sadā sarvaguṇopapannā |
sthānamiṣṭaṃ brāhmamabhīpsamānairgaṅgā sadaivātmavaśairupāsyā ||106 ||
śrutim irāvatīmityādikām | viniścitārthāmasandehārthām || 103 ||

usairjuṣṭā miṣatīṃ viśvarūpāmirāvatīṃ janayitrīṃ guhasya śiṣṭaiḥ |
sevyāmamṛtāṃ brahmakāntāṃ gaṅgāṃ śrayedātmaviśuddhikāmaḥ ||107 ||
gaṅgāyāṃ tu naraḥ snātvā brahmacārī samāhitaḥ |
vidhūtapāpo bhavati vājapeyaṃ ca vindati ||| 108 |
aśubhaiḥ karmabhigrastānmajjamānānmahārṇave |
patato niraye gaṅgā saṃśritānuddharetsadā || 106 |
brahmalokastu lokānāṃ sarveṣāmuttamo yathā |
saritāṃ sarasāṃ vā'pi variṣṭhā jāhnavī tathā ||| 110 |
anyatra samyak saṅkalpya tapaḥ kṛtvā samā trayam |
yatphalaṃ tadbhaktyā gaṅgāyāṃ gaṅgāyāṃ ghaṭikā'rdhataḥ || 111 |
svasthasya na sā prītirbhuñjataḥ sukhamakṣayam |
yāsyādgaṅgātaṭe puṃsāṃ rātrau candrodaye sati || 112 |

jarārogābhipannaṃ kuṇapaṃ jāhnavījale |
dhairyeṇa tṛṇavattyaktvā praviśedamarāvatīm || 113 ||
satataṃ yasyāḥ plāvyate śaśimaṇḍalam |
bhūyo'dhikatarāṃ śobhāṃ birbhāta tadahaḥ kṣaye || 114 ||
āplutasya jale yasyāḥ sadyo naśyati pātakam |
mahataḥ śreyasaḥ prāptiḥ tatkṣaṇādeva jāyate || 115 |
pitṛbhyaḥ śraddhayā yatra dattāstvāpaḥ svavaṃśajaiḥ |
prayacchanti parāṃ tṛpti śaradāṃ trayamacyuta | 116 |
tārayet kṣiti yānmartyavadhasthāṃśca sarīsṛpān |
svarge svargasado viṣṇo gaṅgā tripathagā tataḥ || 117 |
torthānāmuttamaṃ tothaṃ saritāmuttamā sarit |
svargadā sarvajantūnāṃ mahāpātakināmapi || 118 ||
yasyā vāryoghaiḥ śaśimaṇḍalaṃ plāvyate ityādīnāṃ sā tīrthānāṃ paramaṃ tīrthamitya-
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭāviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 28 |

adhyuṣṭāḥ koṭayo viṣṇo santi tīrthāni sarvataḥ |
divi bhūmyantarikṣe ca jāhnavyāṃ tāni kṛtsnaśaḥ || 11 9 |
jñātvā'jñātvā ca gaṅgāyāṃ yaḥ paśvatvamavāpnuyāt |
anātmaghātī svargīyānnarakān sa na paśyati || 120 |
gaṅgeva sarvatīrthāni gaṅgeva ca tapovanam |
gaṅgeva siddhikṣetraṃ hi nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 121 |
yatra kāmaphalā vṛkṣā mahī yatra hiraṇmayī |
jāhnavīsnāyinastatra nivasanti ghaṭodbhava ||| 122 |
dhenuṃ bhāgīrathītīre suśolāṃ ca payasvinīm |
vāso ratnairalaṅkṛtvā brāhmaṇāya dadāti yaḥ || 123 |
yāvanti tasyā lomāni mune tatsantaterapi |
tāvadvarṣasahasrāṇi sa svargasukhabhugbhavet || 124 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe gaṅgāmahimānāmā'ṣṭāviṃśatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 28 ||

athaikonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
agastya uvāca -
vinā snānena gaṅgāyāṃ nṛṇāṃ janmanirarthakam |
upāyāntaramastyanyadyena snānaphalaṃ labhet ||1 ||
aśaktānāṃ ca paṅganāmālasyopahatātmanām |
dūradeśāntarasthānāṃ gaṅgāsnānaṃ kathaṃ bhavet || 2 ||
dānaṃ vā'tha vrataṃ vā'tha mantraḥ stotraṃ japo'thavā |
tīrthāntarā'bhiṣeko vā devatopāsanaṃ tu vā || 3 |
yadyasti kiñcit ṣaḍvaktra gaṅgāsnānaphalapradam |
vidhānāntaramātreṇa tadvada praṇatāya me || 4 |
namo bhagavate tasmai brahmaviṣṇuśivātmane |
parabrahmasvarūpiṇyai gaṅgāyai ca namo namaḥ || 1 | |
ekonatriṃśadadhyāye gaṅgānāmasahasrakam |
vaṇyaṃte bhūri māhātmyaṃ sarvā'ghoghavidāraṇam || 2 ||
pūrvoktāparimitaguṇagaṇāyā gaṅgāyāḥ snānamantareṇa nṛṇāṃ janma vyartha
syādato'śaktadūradeśasthitānāṃ yenopāyāntareṇa tadbhavati tatkimastīti sarvaloko-

tvatto veda skandā'nyo gaṅgāgarbhasamudbhava |
paraṃ svargataraṅgiṇyā mahimānaṃ mahāmate | 5 |
skanda uvāca -
santi puṇyajalānīha sarāṃsi sarito mune |
sthāne sthāne ca tīrthāni jitātmā'dhyuṣitāni ca || 6 ||
dṛṣṭapratyayakārīṇi mahāmahimabhāñjyapi |
paraṃ svargataraṅgiṇyāḥ koṭacaṃśo'pi na tatra vai || 7 ||
anenaivānumānena buddhasva kalaśodbhava |
dadhe gaṅgottamāṅgena devadevena śambhunā || 8 |
snānakāle'nyatīrtheṣu japyate jāhnavī janaiḥ |
vinā viṣṇupadoṃ kvā'nyat samarthamaghamocane ' || 6 ||
anya eva kaścitpraṣṭavya iti na vācyamityāha | tvatta iti | yatastvaṃ
gaṅgāgarbhasamudbhavo'tastvattaḥ paro gaṅgāmāhātmyaṃ na jānātītyarthaḥ || 5 |
yadyapi pṛthivyāṃ madhye madhye pratyakṣaphalajanakāni munibhiradhyuṣitāni mahāmahima-
yuktānyapi tīrthāni santi , tathāpi gaṅgāyāḥ koṭyaṃśasyāṃśo'pi teṣu nāstyato
gaṅgāsnānajaṃ phalaṃ gaṅgāyāmeva labhyate , nā'nyatreti sadṛṣṭāntamuttaramāha | santi
puṇyajalānīti pañcabhiḥ || 6 |
pratīyata iti pratyayaḥ phalam || 7 |

gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ brahman gaṅgāyāmeva labhyate |
yathā drākṣāphalasvādo drākṣāyāmeva nānyataḥ || 10 |
astyupāya iha tvekaḥ syādyenā'vikalaṃ phalam |
snānasya devasarito mahāguhyatamo mune || 11 ||
śivabhaktāya śāntāya viṣṇubhaktiparāya ca |
śraddhālave tvāstikāya garbhavāsamumukṣave || 12 |
kathanīyaṃ cā'nyasya kasyacitkenacitkvacit |
idaṃ rahasyaṃ paramaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam || 13 ||
mahāśreyaskaraṃ puṇyaṃ manorathakaraṃ param |
dhunadīprītijanakaṃ śivasantoṣasantatiḥ || 14 ||
nāmnāṃ sahasraṃ gaṅgāyāḥ stavarājeṣu śobhanam |
japyānāṃ paramaṃ japyaṃ japyaṃ vedopaniṣadā samam || 15 |
drākṣā gostanī ||| 10 |
tahyaṃndhapavādīnāṃ kathaṃ nistāra ityata āha | astyupāya iti || 11 ||
idaṃ nāmnāṃ sahasramityanvayaḥ || 13 |
śivasantoṣasantatiḥ śivasantoṣasya santatiḥ paramparā yatra tattathā | santoṣa-
kṛditi kvacit || 14 |
staveṣu madhye rājanta iti stavarājāsteṣu śobhanaṃ śobhāyamānaṃ cārutaramityarthaḥ |
vedopaniṣadā vedāntena tajjanyavidyayā vā || 15 ||

japanīyaṃ prayatnena mauninā vācakaṃ vinā |
śucisthāneṣu śucinā suspaṣṭākṣarameva ca || 16 ||
prathamato gaṅgānāmasahasraṃ vakṣyan maṅgalamācarati | oṃ namo gaṅgā devyā iti |
nanvatrā'kārādyādikṣakārādyantāni nāmāni krameṇa dṛśyante , tatkimiti madhye ṛ ṝ
ḷ ḹ aḥ ṅa ña ṭha ṇa thādīni nāmāni nopalabhyanta iti | na ca patitānīti vācyam ,

skanda uvāca -
oṃkārarūpiṇyajarā'tulā'nantā'mṛtasravā
atyudārā'bhayā'śokā'lakanandā'mṛtā 10 malā ||| 17 |
oṃkārarūpaṇīti yadyapi brahmādiśabdāḥ paradevatāyā vācakāstathāpi śrutiprāmā-
ṇyātparadevatāyā nediṣṭhamabhidhānayoṃkāraḥ | ata eva paradevatāpratipattāvidaṃ paraṃ

anāthavatsalā'moghā s pāṃyonira mṛtapradā |
avyaktalakṣaṇā'kṣobhyā'navacchinnā'parā'jitā || 18 ||
anāthanāthā'bhīṣṭārthasiddhidā'naṅgarvādhanī
aṇimādiguṇā'dhārāgragaṇyāḍalīkahāriṇī || 1 9 ||
aḥ viṣṇurnātho yeṣāṃ te'nāthā viṣṇubhaktāsteṣu saṃsārāṅgārapāpacyamāneṣu

acintyaśaktiranaghā'dbhutarūpā 30 'ghahāriṇī |
advirājasutā'ṣṭāṅga yogasiddhipradā'cyutā || 20 |
akṣuṇṇaśaktirasudā'nantatīrthā'mṛtodakā
anantamahimā'pārā 40 nantasaukhyapradā'nnadā || 21 |
acintyā śaktirmāyākhyā yasyā acintyā duradhigamyā ca sā śaktiścicchakti-
śveti vā sā'cintyaśaktiḥ | mama māyā duratyayeti smṛteḥ | na vidyate'ghamajñānaṃ
tatkāryalakṣaṇaṃ pāpalakṣaṇaṃ vā yasyā yasyāḥ sakāśāditi vā sā'naghā | niravadyaṃ nirañjana-

aśeṣadevatāmūrtiraghorā'mṛtarūpiṇo
avidyājālaśamanī pratagatipradā || 22 |
aśeṣavighnasaṃhartrī viśeṣaguṇagumphitā
ajñānatimirajyoti 50 ranugrahaparāyaṇā || 23 ||
abhirāmā'navadyāṅgyanantasārā'kalaṅkinī
ārogyadā''nandavallo tvāpannātivināśinī ||| 24 |
aśeṣāḥ samagrā devatā mūrtī yasyāḥ sā aśeṣadevatāmūrtiḥ | sarvadevamayo haririti

āścaryasūtirāyuṣyā 60 hyāḍhyā''dyā''prā''ryaṃ sevitā |
āpyāyinyāptavidyā''khyā tvānandā''śvāsadāyinī || 25 |
ālasyaghnyā 70 padāṃ hantrī hyānandāmṛtavarṣiṇī |
irāvatīṣṭadātrīṣṭā tviṣṭāpūrta phalapradā || 26 ||
āścaryā mūrtiḥ svarūpaṃ yasyāḥ sā āścaryamūrtiḥ | āścaryarūpiṇīti kvacitpāṭhaḥ |
āyubhya hitā āyuṣyā 60 āḍhyā paripūrṇetyarthaḥ | ādau bhavā ādyā sarvakāraṇa-

itihāsa śrutīḍyārthī tvihā'mutra śubhapradā
ijyā śīlasamijjyeṣṭhā tvindrādiparivanditā 80 || 27 |
ilā'laṅkāramāleddhā tvindirāramyamandirā
idindirādisaṃsevyā tvīśvarīśvaravallabhā || 28 |
ītibhītihareḍyā ca tvīḍanīyacaritrabhṛt 60
utkṛṣṭaśaktirutkṛṣṭoḍupamaṇḍalacāriṇī || 26 ||
itihāsa : purāvṛttaṃ śrutirvedastābhyāṃ īḍyaḥ stutyo'rthaḥ prayojanaṃ puruṣārtho vā
yasyāḥ sā itihāsaśrutīcyārthā | tu ihā'smilloke'mutra ca paraloke śubhaṃ sukhaṃ mokṣaṃ
ca pradadātīti ihāmutraśubhapradā | sukhadā mokṣadā gaṅgā gaṅgeva paramā gatiriti

uditāmbaramārgo sroragalokavihāriṇī
ukṣorvarotpalotkumbhā 100 upendracaraṇadravā || 30 |
udanvatpūtihetuścodārotsāhaprarvādhano
udvegaghnyuṣṇaśamanī uṣṇaraśmisutāpriyā || 31 ||
udita udayaṃ prāpito'mbaramārge yayā sā uditāmbaramārga | utrādevī dyotanā-

utpattisthitisaṃhārakāriṇyuparicāriṇī
ūrjavahaṃ 110 tyūrjadharorjāvatī comimālino || 32 |
ūrdhvaretaḥ priyordhvādhvā hyamilordhvagatipradā |
ṛṣivṛndastutaddhaśca ṛṇatrayavināśinī 120 || 33 ||
ṛtambharaddhidātrī ca ṛvasvarūpā ṛjupriyā |
ṛkṣamārgavaharkṣāciṛjumārgapradarśano ||| 34 |
utpattisthitisaṃhārakāriṇī brahmaviṣṇuśivarūpiṇītyarthaḥ | upari pṛthivyā !
svargalokasya brahmāṇḍasya vā upari cartuṃ śolaṃ yasyāḥ sā uparicāriṇī | ujavahantī
ūrjavahantīramṛtaṃ ghṛtamityādimantrarūpā 110 | ūrjaṃ balaṃ prāṇaṃ vā dharatītyūrjadharā |
ūrjā baladhāraṇā prāṇadhāraṇā vā tadvato ūrjāvato ca | ūrmayastaraṅgāsteṣāṃ mālā
vartate yasyāḥ sā ūrmimālinī || 32 |
ūrdhvaretasāṃ bhikṣukāṇāṃ priyā'bhīṣṭā ūrdhvaretaḥ priyā | tathā coktam-
gaṅgātore vasennityaṃ bhikṣurmokṣaparāyaṇaḥ |
siddhikṣetraṃ tu tajjñeyaṃ yāvaddhanuśatatrayam || iti |
ūrmīstaraṅgān śokamohajarāmṛtyukṣutpipāsādīn vā dehādhyāsaṃ vā lāti gṛhṇātītya-

edhitā'khiladharmārthā tvekaikā mṛtadāyinī 130 |
edhanīyasvabhāvaijyā tvejitāśeṣapātakā || 35 |

parameṣṭhino brahmaṇaḥ kamaṇḍalurāśrayatvena yasyāḥ sā parameṣṭikamaṇḍaluḥ | ādāvādipitā-
mahasya niyamavyāpārapātre jalamityukteḥ || 111 |
padmanābhapadāryeṇa prasūtā viṣṇupādāryeṇa sambhūtā | paścāt pannagaśāyino bhagavataḥ

phālitainomahākṣetrā phaṇilokavibhūṣaṇam |
phenacchala praṇunnaināḥ phullakairavagandhinī || 114 ||
phenilācchāmbudhārābhā 640 phuḍuccāṭitapātakā |
phāṇitasvādusalilā phāṇṭapathyajalāvilā || 115 ||
viśvamātā ca viśveśī viśvā viśveśvarapriyā |
brahmaṇyā brahmakṛdbrāhmī 650 brahmiṣṭhā vimalodakā ||| 116 |
phālitaṃ khaṇḍitamenasāṃ pāpānāṃ mahākṣetraṃ yayā sā phālitainomahākṣetrā |
bhogavatīrūpeṇa sarpalokabhūṣaṇarūpā phaṇilokavibhūṣaṇam | phenacchalena praṇunnāni dūro-
kṛtāni enāṃsi pāpāni yayā sā phenacchala praṇunnaināḥ | phullaṃ vikasitaṃ yatkairavaṃ
kumudaṃ tadgandha iva gandhaḥ , tadgandho vā vartate yasyāḥ sā phullakairavagandhinī || 114 ||
phenilaṃ phenayuktaṃ yadacchamambu tasya yā dhārā pravāhastenābhā dīptiyaṃsyāstatsva-
rūpā vā sā phenilācchāmbudhārābhā 640 | phuḍiti śabdānukaraṇam | phuḍiti-
śabdenoccāṭitaṃ pātakaṃ yayā sā phuḍuccāṭitapātakā | phaṇitaṃ pakvānnaviśeṣamiva svādu
salilaṃ yasyāḥ sā phāṇitasvādusalilā | phāṇṭaṃ takraṃ tadvat pathyaṃ yajjalaṃ tenāvilā sā
phāṇṭapathyajalāvilā || 115 ||
viśveṣāṃ mātā viśvamātā ca | viśveśī sarveśvarītyarthaḥ | viśvā sarvasvarūpā |
viśveśvarasya priyā viśveśvaro vā priyo yasyāḥ sā viśveśvarapriyā | brahmaṇe paramātmane
hiraṇyagarbhāya vedāya brāhmaṇāya vā hitā brahmaṇyā | hiraṇyagarbhādīn karotīti brahma-

vibhāvarī ca virajā vikrāntānekaviṣṭapā |

vipāśā vaibudhī vedyā vedākṣararasasravā ||
vidyā vegavatī vandyā bṛṃhaṇī 118 |
brahmavādinī |
varadā viprakṛṣṭā ca variṣṭhā ca viśodhinī || 11 9 |

tāsāṃ tasyāsan śatasāhasrāḥ pramadāḥ kamalekṣaṇāḥ ||

vigataṃ rajo yasyāḥ sā virajāḥ | śuddhasattvetyarthaḥ | vikrāntaṃ vyāptam - anekaṃ
