ādhivyādhiparikṣipto ghoratāpapariplutaḥ |
mucyate sarvaduḥkhebhyaḥ stavasyā'syā'nukīrtanāt || 184 ||
saṃvatsareṇa yuktātmā paṭhan bhaktiparāyaṇaḥ |
abhīpsitāṃ labhetsiddhi sarvaiḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 185 |
saṃśayāviṣṭacittasya dharmavidveṣiṇo'pi ca |
dāmbhikasyā'pi hiṃstrasya ceto dharmaparaṃ bhavet || 186 |
varṇāśramapathīnastu kāmakrodhavivarjitaḥ |
yatphalaṃ labhate jñānī tadāpnotyasya kīrtanāt || 187 |
gāyatryayutajapyena yatphalaṃ samupārjitam |
sakṛtpaṭhanataḥ samyak tadaśeṣamavāpnuyāt || 188 |
gāṃ datvā vedaviduṣe yatphalaṃ labhate kṛtī |
tatpuṇyaṃ samyagākhyātaṃ stavarājasakṛjjapāt || 186 |
jehmayaṃ puṃsi ca maithunyaṃ jātibhraṃśakaraṃ smṛtam |
kharāśvoṣṭramṛgebhānāmajāvikavadhastathā ||
saṃkalīkaraṇaṃ jñeyaṃ mīnāhimahiṣasya ca |
ninditebhyo dhanādānaṃ vāṇijyaṃ śūdrasevanam |
apātrīkaraṇaṃ jñeyamasatyasya ca bhāṣaṇam ||
kṛmikīṭavayohatyā madyānugatabhojanam
phalaidhaḥ kusumasteyamadhairyaṃ ca malāvaham || iti || 183 ||

guruśuśrūṣaṇaṃ kurvan yāvajjīvaṃ narottamaḥ |
yatpuṇyamarjayettadbhāgvaṣaṃ triṣavaṇaṃ japan || 160 |
vedapārāyaṇātpuṇyaṃ yadatra paripaṭhyate |
tat ṣaṇmāsena labhate trisandhyaṃ parikīrtanāt || 161 |
gaṅgāyāḥ stavarājasya pratyahaṃ pariśīlanāt |
śivabhaktimavāpnoti viṣṇubhakto'thavā bhavet || 162 |
yaḥ kīrtayedanudinaṃ gaṅgānāmasahasrakam |
tatsamīpe sahacarī gaṅgādevī sadā bhavet || 163 ||
sarvatra pūjyo bhavati sarvatra vijayo bhavet |
sarvatra sukhamāpnoti jāhnavīstotrapāṭhataḥ || 164 |
sadācārī sa vijñeyaḥ sa śucistu sadaiva hi |
kṛtasarvasurārcaḥ sa kīrtayedya imāṃ stutim || 165 |
tasmastṛpte bhavettṛptā jāhnavī nātra saṃśayaḥ |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena gaṅgābhaktaṃ samarcayet || 166 |
vedapārāyaṇād upavāsapūrvakaṃ samagrāyāḥ svaśākhāyāḥ pāṭhāt | atra
jagati || 1 9 1 |

stavarājamimaṃ gāṅgaṃ śṛṇuyādyaśca vai paṭhet |
śrāvayedatha tadbhaktān dambhalobhavivarjitaḥ || 167 ||
mucyate trividhaiḥ pāpairmanovākkāyasambhavaiḥ |
kṣaṇānniṣpāpatāmeti pitṝṇāṃ ca priyo bhavet || 168 ||
sarvadevapriyaścāpi sarvaṣigaṇasammataḥ |
ante vimānamāruhya divya strīśatasaṃvṛttaḥ || 166 ||
divyābharaṇasampanno divyabhogasamanvitaḥ |
nandanādivane svairaṃ devavat sa pramodate ||| 200 |
bhujyamāneṣu vipreṣu śrāddhakāle viśeṣataḥ |
japannidaṃ mahāstotraṃ pitṝṇāṃ tṛptikārakam || 201 |
yāvanti tatra sikthāni yāvanto'mbukaṇāḥ sthitāḥ |
tāvantyeva hi varṣāṇi modante svaḥ pitāmahāḥ || 202 |

yathā prīṇanti pitaro gaṅgāyāṃ piṇḍadānataḥ |
tathaiva tṛpnuyuḥ śrāddhe stavasyā'syā'nusaṃśravāt || 203 |
etatstotraṃ gṛhe yasya likhitaṃ paripūjyate |
tatra pāpabhayaṃ nāsti śuci tadbhavanaṃ sadā || 204 ||
agaste ! ki bahūktena śṛṇu me niścitaṃ vaca : |
saṃśayo nātra kartavyaḥ sandegdhari phalaṃ na hi || 205 |
yāvanti martye stotrāṇi mantrajālānyanekaśaḥ |
tāvanti stavarājasya gāṅgeyasya samāni na || 206 ||
yāvajjanma japedyastu nāmnāmetatsahasrakam |
sa kīkaṭeṣvapi mṛto na punargarbhamāviśet || 207 |
nityaṃ niyamavānetadyo japetstotramuttamam |
anyatrā'pi vipannaḥ sa gaṅgātīre mṛto bhavet || 208 ||
kīkaṭeṣu gayāpradeśeṣu || 207 |

etatstotravaraṃ ramyaṃ purā proktaṃ pinākinā |
viṣṇave nijabhaktāya muktibījākṣarāspadam || 206 ||
gaṅgāsnānapratinidhiḥ stotrametanmayeritam |
sisnāsurjāhnavīṃ tasmādetatstotraṃ japetsudhīḥ || 210 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe gaṅgāsahasranāmakathanaṃ nāmaikonatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 9 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekonatriṃśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 2 9 ||

atha triṃśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
śṛṇvagastya mahābhāga sa ca rājā bhagīrathaḥ |
ārādhya śrīmahādevamuddidhīrṣuḥ pitāmahān || 1 ||
brahmaśāpavinirdagdhān sarvān rājarṣisattamaḥ |
mahatā tapasā bhūmimānināya trivartmagām || 2 |
trayāṇāmapi lokānāṃ hitāya mahate nṛpaḥ |
samānaiṣīttato gaṅgāṃ yatrāsīnmaṇikarṇikā || 3 ||
ānandakānanaṃ śambhoścakrapuṣkariṇī hareḥ |
parabrahmaikasukṣetraṃ līlāmokṣasamarpakam || 4 ||
atha triśattame'dhyāye rahasyaśrutisaṃmitam |
dhanañjayakathāgabhaṃ vaṇyaṃte kāśijaṃ mahat || 1 ||
maṇikaṇya gaṅgāyāḥ samāgamāt kṣetrasyādhikyaṃ vaktuṃ gaṅgāgamanaprakāraṃ śrāvayati |

prāpayāmāsa tāṃ gaṅgāṃ dailipiḥ purataścaran |
nirvāṇakāśanādyatra kāśīti prathitā purī || 5 |
avimuktaṃ mahākṣetraṃ na muktaṃ śambhunā kvacit |
prāgeva hi mune'nadhyaṃ jātyaṃ jāmbūnadaṃ svayam || 6 ||
punarvāritareṇā'pi hīreṇa yadi saṅgatam |
cakrapuṣkariṇītīrthaṃ prāgeva śreyasāṃ padam || 7 |
tataḥ śreṣṭhataraṃ śambhormaṇiśravaṇabhūṣaṇāt |
ānandakānane tasminnavimukte śivālaye || 8 |
prāgeva muktiḥ saṃsiddhā gaṅgāsaṅgāttato'dhikā |
yadā prabhṛti sā gaṅgā maṇikarṇya samāgatā || 6 |
punarapi tadeva viśeṣayan pūrvoktanāmadvayanirvacanamanuvadati | nirvāṇakāśanā-
dityekena ' | yatra ānandavane | yadvā gaṅgāṃ viśinaṣṭi | nirvāṇeti | yatra yasyāṃ gaṅgāyāṃ
kāśyāmuttaravāhinyāṃ nimittabhūtāyāṃ nirvāṇakāśanāt kaivalyasya prakāśanātkāśīti-
purīti prathitā tāṃ gaṅgāṃ samāneṣīditi pūrveṇaivānvayaḥ || 5 |
avimuktaṃ ca prathitamiti vipariṇamayyā'nvayaḥ | tatra hetunaṃ muktamiti |
taduktaṃ mātsye—
vimuktaṃ na mayā yasmānmokṣyate na kadācana |
mahatkṣetramidaṃ tasmādavimuktamiti smṛtam || iti |
yadarthamanūditaṃ taddṛṣṭāntapuraḥ saramāha | prāgevetyārabhya kṛtvā karmāṇītyataḥ

tadā prabhṛti tatkṣetraṃ duṣprāpaṃ tridaśairapi |
kṛtvā karmāṇyanekāni kalyāṇānītarāṇi vā || 10 |
tāni kṣaṇāt samutkṣipya kāśīsaṃstho'mṛto bhavet |
tasyāṃ vedāntavedyasya nididhyāsanato vinā || 11 ||
vinā sāṃkhyena yogena kāśyāṃ saṃstho'mṛto bhavet |
karmanirmūlanavatā vinā jñānena kumbhaja ||| 12 |
śaśimauliprasādena kāśīsaṃstho'mṛto bhavet |
yatnato'yatnato vā'pi kālātyaktvā kalevaram ||| 13 |
tārakasyopadeśena kāśīsaṃstho'mṛto bhavet |
anekajanmasaṃsiddhairbaddho'pi prākṛtairguṇaiḥ || 14 ||
itarāṇi pāpāni || 10 |

asisambhedayogena kāśīsaṃstho'mṛto bhavet |
dehatyāgo'tra vai dānaṃ dehatyāgo'tra vai tapaḥ || 15 ||
dehatyāgo'tra vaṃ yogaḥ kāśyāṃ nirvāṇasaukhyakṛt |
prāpyottaravahāṃ kāśyāmatiduṣkṛtavānapi || 16 ||
yāyāt svaṃ helayā tyaktvā tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam |
yamendrāgnimukhā devā dṛṣṭvā muktipathonmukhān ||| 17 |
sarvān sarve samālokya rakṣāṃ cakruḥ purā puraḥ |
asi mahāsirūpāṃ ca prāpya sanmatikhaṇḍanīm || 18 ||
duṣṭapraveśaṃ dhunvānāṃ dhunoṃ devā vinirmamuḥ |
varaṇāṃ ca vyadhustatra kṣetravighnanivāriṇīm || 16 ||
asisaṃbhedayogena asyā'sisaṃjñayā nadyā saṃbhedaḥ saṃbhedanaṃ chedanamiti yāvat |
arthāt pāśānāṃ sa eva yoga upāyastena | asi dhārayetyukteḥ | yadvā asyā saha saṃbhedoṃ
yasya tadasisaṃbhedaṃ gaṅgāmbhastatsambandhenetyarthaḥ | gaṅgāsaṅgāttato'dhiketyukteḥ | prākṛtaṃ

durvṛttasupravṛtteśva nivṛttikaraṇīṃ surāḥ |
dakṣiṇottaradigbhāge kṛtvā'si varaṇāṃ surāḥ || 20 ||
kṣetrasya mokṣanikṣeparakṣāṃ nirvṛttimāpnuyuḥ |
kṣetrasya paścāddigbhāge taṃ dehalivināyakam || 21 ||
svayaṃ vyāpārayāmāsa rakṣārtha śaśiśekharaḥ |
anujñātapraveśānāṃ viśveśena kṛpāvatā || 22 |
te praveśaṃ prayacchanti nānyeṣāṃ hi kadācana |
ityarthe kathayiṣye'hamitihāsaṃ purātanam |
āścaryakāri paramaṃ kāśībhaktipravardhanam || 23 ||

skanda uvāca -
dakṣiṇābdhitaṭe kaścit setubandhasamīpataḥ |
vaṇigdhanañjayo nāma mātṛbhaktisamanvitaḥ || 24 ||
puṇyamārgārjitadhano dhanatoṣita mārgaṇaḥ |
mārgaṇasphāritayaśā yaśodātanayārcakaḥ || 25 |
samunnato'pi sampattyā vinayāvanatakandharaḥ |
ākaro'pi guṇānāṃ hi guṇiṣvākāragopakaḥ || 26 ||
rūpasampadudāro'pi paradāraparāṅmukhaḥ |
sa sampūrṇakalo'pyāsīnniṣkalaṅkodayaḥ sadā || 27 ||
dakṣiṇārṇavatīre rāmasetunikaṭe dhanañjayo nāma vaṇig babhūveti śeṣaḥ | taṃ viśi-

sa satyānṛtavṛttiśca prāyaḥ satyapriyo mune |
varṇetaro'pyabhūlloke suvarṇakṛtavarṇanaḥ || 28 ||
sadācaraṇago'pyeṣa sukhayānacaraḥ kṛtī |
adaridro'pi medhāvī so'bhūtpāpadaridradhīḥ || 2 9 ||
tasyaivaṃ vartamānasya kadācitkālaparyayāt |
jananī nidhanaṃ prāptā vyādhitā'tijarāturā || 30 ||
tayā ca yauvanaṃ prāpya meghacchāyāticañcalam |
prāvṛṇnadopurasamaṃ svapatiḥ parivañcitaḥ || 31 |
dinatricaturasthāyi yā nārī prāpya yauvanam |
bhartāraṃ vañcayenmohātsā'kṣayaṃ narakaṃ vrajet || 32 ||

śīlabhaṅgena nārīṇāṃ bhartā dharmaparo'pi hi |
pateduḥkhārjitātsvargācchīlaṃ rakṣyaṃ tataḥ striyā || 33 ||
viṣṭhāgarte ca niraye svayaṃ patati durmatiḥ |
ābhūtasaṃplavaṃ yāvattataḥ syād grāmaskarī || 34 ||
svaviṣṭhāpāyinī cā'tha valgulī vṛkṣalambinī |
ulūkī vā divāndhā syād vṛkṣakoṭaravāsinī || 35 ||
rakṣaṇīyaṃ mahāyatnādidaṃ sukṛtabhājanam |
vapuḥ parasya duḥsparśātsukhābhāsātmakātstriyā || 36 ||
anenaiva śarīreṇa bhartṛsādvihitena hi |
ki satī na ca tastambha bhānumudyantamājñayā ||| 37 |
adhomukhasyordhvapādasya vṛkṣe'valambamānasya gedurā iti prasiddhasya pakṣiviśeṣasya

atripattyanusūyā ki bhartṛbhaktiprabhāvataḥ |
dadhāra na trayīṃ garbhe pativrataparāyaṇā || 38 |
iha kīrtiśca vipulā svarge vāsastathā'kṣayaḥ |
pātivratyāt striyā labhyaṃ sakhitvaṃ ca śriyā saha || 36 |
sā durvṛttyā parityajya patidhamaṃ sanātanam |
svacchandacāriṇī bhūtvā mṛtā nirayamudyayau || 40 ||

dhanañjayo'pi ca mune kenacicchviyoginā |
sādhaṃ tapodayāditthaṃ so'bhavaddharmatatparaḥ || 41 ||
dhanañjayo'pi dharmātmā mātṛbhaktiparāyaṇaḥ |
ādāyā'sthīnyatho māturgāmārgasthito'bhavat || 42 ||
pañcagavyena saṃsnāpya tataḥ pañcāmṛtena vai |
yakṣakardamalepena liptvā puṣpaiḥ prapūjya ca || 43
āveṣṭya netravastreṇa netravastreṇa tataḥ ||
paṭṭāmbareṇa ve |
tataḥ surasavastreṇa tato mañjiṣṭhavāsasā || 44 |
nanu nikṛṣṭajātī jātasya dhanañjayasya kathaṃ pūrvoktaguṇatvaṃ tatrāha | dhanañjayo'pi -

nepāla kambalenā'tha mṛdā cā'tha viśuddhayā |
tāmrasampuṭake kṛtvā māturaṅgānyaho vaṇik || 45 |
aspṛṣṭahīnajātiḥ sa śuciṣmān sthaṇḍileśayaḥ |
ānayan jvarito'pyāsīnmadhyemāgaṃ dhanañjayaḥ || 46 |
bhāravāhaḥ kṛtastena kṛtastena kaściddatvocitāṃ bhṛtim |
ki bahūktena ghaṭaja kāśī prāptā'tha tena vai || 47 ||
dhṛtvā saṃbhṛtirakṣārthaṃ bhāravāhaṃ dhanañjayaḥ |
jagāmāpaṇamānetuṃ kiñcidvastvaśanādikam || 48 ||
bhāravāhyantaraṃ prāpya tasya saṃbhūtimadhyataḥ |
tāsampuṭamādāya dhanaṃ jñātvā gṛhaṃ yayau ||| 4 9 |

vāsasthānamathāgatya tamadṛṣṭrā dhanañjayaḥ |
tvarāvān saṃbhṛti vīkṣya tāmrasampuṭavajitām || 50 |
hā hetyātāḍya hṛdayaṃ cakranda bahuśo bhṛśam |
itastatastamālokya gatastadanusārataḥ || 51 ||
akṛtvā jāhnavīsnānamanavekṣya jagatpatim |
tasya saṃvasathaṃ saṃvasathaṃ prāpto bhāravodurdhanañjayaḥ || 52 |
bhāravāḍapyaraṇyānyāṃ tāmrasampuṭamadhyataḥ |
dṛṣṭrā'sthīni viniḥśvasya tāni tyaktvā gṛhaṃ yayau || 53 |
vaṇik ca tadgṛhaṃ prāpya śuṣkakaṇṭhoṣṭhatālukaḥ |
dṛṣṭrā'tha cailaśakalaṃ tṛṇakuṭayantare tṛṇakuṭayantare tadā || 54 ||

āśayā kiñcidāśvasya tatpatnīṃ paripṛṣṭavān |
satyaṃ brūhi na bhetavyaṃ dāsyāmyanyadapi dhruvam ||| 55 |
vasu kva te gato bhartā māturasthīni me'rpaya |
vayaṃ kārpeṭikā bhadre bhavāmo na ca duḥkhadāḥ || 56 |
ajñātvā lobhavaśatastena nīto'sthisampuṭaḥ |
tasyaiṣa doṣo no bhadre māturme karma tādṛśam || 57 ||
athavā na prasūdoṣo mandabhāgyo'smi tatsutaḥ |
sutena kṛtyaṃ yatkṛtyaṃ tatprāptirnāsti bhilli me || 58 ||
udyamaṃ kṛtavānasmi na siddhayenmandabhāgyataḥ |
āyātu satyavākyānme mā bibhetu vanecaraḥ || 5 9 |
āśayā'sthīni prāptavyānīti vāñchayā | āśvasya viśramya viśvāsaṃ kṛtveti

asthīni darśayatvāśu dhanaṃ dāsye'dhikaṃ tataḥ |
ityuktā tena sā bhillī vyājahāra nijaṃ patim || 60 |
lajjānamraśirāḥ so'tha vṛttāntaṃ vinivedya ca |
nināya tāmaraṇyānīṃ śabarastaṃ dhanañjayam ||
vanecaro'tha tatsthānaṃ 61 ||
daivādvismṛtavān mune |
digbhrānti samavāpyā'tha paribabhrāma kānane || 62 |
ito'raṇyāttato yāti tato'raṇyādito vrajet |
vanādvanāntaraṃ bhrāntvā khinnaḥ so'pi vanecaraḥ || 63 ||
vihāya madhye'raṇyāni taṃ yayau ca svapakkaṇam |
dvitrāṇyahāni saṃbhramya sa kārpaṭikasattamaḥ || 64 |
kṣutkṣāmaḥ śuṣkakaṇṭhoṣṭho hā heti paridevayan |
punaḥ kāśīṃ purīṃ prāptaḥ parimlānamukho vaṇik || 65 ||
adhikaṃ bahu || 60 |
araṇyānī mahāraṇyam | śabaro bhillaḥ || 61 |

tanmandabhāgyatāṃ śrutvā lokātkāpaṭiko mune |
kṛtvā gayāṃ prayāgaṃ ca tataḥ svaviṣayaṃ yayau || 66 ||
kāśyāṃ praveśaṃ prāpyā'pi tadasthīni ghaṭodbhava |
vinā vaiśveśvarīmājñāṃ bahiryātāni tatkṣaṇāt || 67 ||
evaṃ kāśyāṃ praviśyā'pi pāpī dharmānuṣaṅgataḥ |
na kṣetraphalamāpnoti bahirbhavati tatkṣaṇāt || 68 |
tasmādviśveśvarājñaiva kāśīvāse'tra kāraṇam | |
asiśca varaṇā yatra kṣetrarakṣākṛtau kṛte || 66 ||
vārāṇasīti vikhyātā tadārabhya mahāmune |
aseca varaṇāyāśca saṅgamaṃ prāpya kāśikā || 70 |
tanmandabhāgyatāṃ tasyā mātuḥ parapuruṣagāmitām | karpaṭena raktavāsādinā
dṛṣṭāntaṃ vinigamayya dāntike vinigamayati kāśyāmiti dvayena || 67 |
dharmānuṣaṅgataḥ prākṛtapuṇyavaśādityarthaḥ | kṣetraphalaṃ kevalyam | tatra heturbahi-
bhavatīti || 68 |

vārāṇasīha karuṇāmayadivya mūrtirutsṛjya
yatra tu tanuṃ tanubhṛtsukhena | |
viśveśa dṛṅmahasi yatsahasā praviśya
rūpeṇa tāṃ vitanutāṃ padavīṃ dadhāti || 71 ||
jāto mṛto bahuṣu tīrthavareṣu re tvaṃ
janto na jātu tava śāntirabhūnimajjya |
vārāṇasī nigadatīha mṛto'mṛtatvaṃ
prāpyā'dhunā mama balātsmaraśāsanaḥ syāḥ || 72 ||
atiharṣeṇa punarapi kāśīṃ varṇayati | vārāṇasīhetyārabhyārudrarudrākṣetyataḥ

anyatra tīrthasalile patito dvijanmā
devādibhāvamayate na tathā tu kāśyām |
citraṃ yadatra patitaḥ punarutthita na
prāpnoti pulkasajano'pi kimagrajanmā || 73 ||
saiṣā purī saṃsṛtirūpapārāvārasya
pāraṃ purahā purāriḥ |
yasyāṃ paraṃ pauruṣamarthamicchan
siddhi nayetpauraparamparāṃ saḥ || 74 |

tīrthāntarāṇi manujaḥ parito'vagāhya
hitvā tanuṃ kaluṣitāṃ divi daivataṃ syāt |
vārāṇasīparisare tu visṛjya dehaṃ
sandeha bhāgbhavati dehadaśāptaye'pi || 75 ||
vārāṇasī samarasīkaraṇādṛte'pi
yogādayogijanatāṃ janatāpahantrī |
tattārakaṃ śravaṇagocaratāṃ nayantī

vārāṇasīparisare tanumiṣṭadātroṃ
dhamārthakāmanilayāmahahā visṛjya |
iṣṭaṃ padaṃ kimapi hṛṣṭataro'bhilaṣya
lābho'stu mūlamapi no yadavāpa śūnyam || 77 ||
āḥ kāśivāsijanatā nanu vaśvitā'bhūd
bhāle vilocanavatā vanitā'rdhabhājā |
ādāya yatsukṛtabhājanamiṣṭadehaṃ
nirvāṇamātramapavarjayatā punarbhu || 78 ||
brahmaṇā punarbhavo na bhavati tādṛśamityarthaḥ | yadyapi viśveśa eva tārakopadeṣṭā , tathāpi
kāśyāṃ mṛtānāmevopadiśatīti saiva darśayatītyucyata iti || 76 |

vārāṇasī sphuradasī maguṇaikabhūmi-
yaṃtra sthitāstanubhṛtaḥ śaśibhṛtprabhāvāt |
sarve gale garalino'kṣiyujo lalāṭe
vāmārdhavāmatanavo'tanavastato'nte
ānandakānanamidaṃ sukhadaṃ puraiva
tatrāpi cakrasarasī maṇikarṇikā'tha |
svaḥ sindhusaṅgatiratho paramāspadaṃ ca
viśveśituḥ kimiha tanna vimuktaye yat || 80 ||
pūrvakaṃ taṃ viśinaṣṭi | yadyasmāt sukṛtasya bhājanaṃ pātramabhilaṣitadehamādāya gṛhītvā
nirvāṇamātramapavarjayatā prayacchatā | kathambhūtaṃ nirvāṇamātram | apunarbhu na vidyate punarbhūrjanma
yasmistat || 78 ||

vārāṇasīha varaṇā'sisaridvariṣṭhā
saṃbhedakhedajananī dhunadīlasacchrīḥ |
viśrāmabhūmiracalā'malamokṣalakṣmyā
haināṃ vihāya kimu sīdati mūḍhajantuḥ || 81 ||
ki vismṛtaṃ tvahaha garbhajamāmanasyaṃ
kāntidūtakṛtabandhanatāḍanaṃ ca |
śambhoranugrahaparigrahalabhya kāśīṃ
mūḍho vihāya kimu yāti karasthamuktim || 82 |

tīrthāntarāṇi kaluṣāṇi haranti sadyaḥ
śreyo dadatyapi bahu tridivaṃ nayanti |
pānāvagāhana vidhānatanuprahāṇe-
vārāṇasī tu kurute bata mūlanāśam || 83 ||
kāśīpurīparisare maṇikarṇikāyāṃ
tyaktvā tanuṃ tanubhṛtastanumāpnuvanti |
bhāle vilocanavatīṃ galanīlalakṣmīṃ
vāmārdhabandhuravadhaṃ vidhurāvarodhāḥ ||| 84 |
jñātvā prabhāvamatulaṃ maṇikarṇikāyāṃ
yaḥ pudgalaṃ tyajati cāśucipūyagandhi |
svātmāvarodhamahasā sahasā militvā
kalpāntareṣvapi sa naiva pṛthaktvameti || 85 |
nanu tīrthāntarakaraṇenāpi muktirbhaviṣyatyatastadarthaṃ yātītyāśaṃkyāha |

rāgādidoṣaparipūra mano hṛṣīkā :
kāśīpurīmatuladivya mahāprabhāvām
ye kalpayantyaparatīrthasamāṃ samantāt
te pāpino na saha taiḥ paribhāṣaṇīyam || 86 |
bodhamahasā svarūpabhūtaprakāśacaitanyena sahasā tatkṣaṇādeva militvā ekabhāvaṃ prāpya
pṛthaktvaṃ pṛthagbhāvaṃ naiveti naiva prāpnotītyarthaḥ || 85 |
nanu
kāśīvāsayugānyaṣṭodinekaṃ puruṣottame |
tadevāṣṭaguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ virajāmukhadarśane ||
yā gatiryogayuktasya vārāṇasyāṃ mṛtasya ca |
sā gatirghaṭikārdhena puruṣottamadakṣiṇe ||
siṃhācalasamakṣetraṃ samantādyojanatrayam |
gayāprayāgakāśībhyaḥ satyaṃ śataguṇādhikam ||
ityādivacanātkāśīto'pi mahattaraṃ tīrthāntaraṃ śrūyate tatkimarthaṃ matistutiḥ

vārāṇasīṃ smaraharapriyarājadhānīṃ
tyaktvā kuto vrajasi mūḍha digantareṣu |
prāpyāpyajādyasulabhāṃ sthiramokṣalakṣmīṃ
lakṣmīṃ svabhāvacapalāṃ kimu kāmayethāḥ || 87 |
vidyā dhanāni sadanāni gajāśvabhṛtyāḥ
srakcandanāni vanitāśca nitāntaramyāḥ |
svargo'pyagamya iha nodyamabhāji puṃsi
vārāṇasī tvasulabhā śalabhādimuktiḥ || 88 |
dhātrā dhṛtāni tulayā tulanāmavaituṃ
vaikuṇṭhamukhya bhuvanāni ca kāśikā ca |
tānyudyayurlaghutayā nyagiyaṃ gurutvāt
tasthau puroha puruṣārthacatuṣṭayasya || 86 |

kāśīpurīmadhivasan hi naro'naro'pi
hyāropyamāṇa iha mānya ivaikarudraḥ |
nānopasargaja nisargajaduḥkhabhāraiḥ
karmāpanudya sa viśetparameśadhāmni || 60 ||
sthirāpāyaṃ kārya jananamaraṇakleśanilayaṃ
vihāyā'syāṃ kāśyāmahaha parigṛhṇīta na kutaḥ |
vapustejorūpaṃ sthirataraparānandasadanaṃ
vimūḍho'sau jantuḥ sphuṭitamiva kāṃsyaṃ vinimayan || 61 |
tāni tathā udyayurudhvaṃ yayuḥ | laghutayā'lpatvena | iyaṃ kāśī nyak adhastasthāvitya-
nvayaḥ || 8 9 kāśīsyo | yaḥ kaścidapi
viśveśvara iva mānanīya ityāha | kāśīpurīmiti |
iha kāśyāmāropyamāṇaḥ sthāpyamāno'rthādīśvareṇa kāśīpurīmadhivasan kāśyāṃ
tiṣṭhannaraḥ anaro vā paśusthāvarādiryo bhavati sa ekarudraḥ kevalaviśveśvara iva mānyo

aho lokaḥ śokaṃ kimiha sahate hanta hatadhī-
vipadbhāraiḥ sārairniyata nidhanaidhvaṃsitadhanaiḥ |
kṣitau satyāṃ kāśyāṃ kathayati śivo yatra nidhane
śrutau kiñcidbhūyaḥ praviśati na yenodaradarīm || 62 |
kāśivāsini jane vanecare
dvitribhujyapi samīrabhojane |
svairacāriṇi jitendriye'pyaho
kāśivāsini jane viśiṣṭatā || 63 |
kāṃsyapātrādikaṃ vinimayan parivartayan yathā dṛḍhataraṃ samujjvalaṃ pātrādikaṃ gṛhṇāti tadvat |
kāśyāṃ vinimayanniti pāṭhe kāśyāmityasya dṛṣṭāntena sambandhānna paunaruktyam || 9 1 ||

nāstīha duṣkṛtakṛtāṃ sukṛtātmanāṃ vā
kācidviśeṣagatiranta kṛtāṃ hi kāśyām |
bījāni karmajanitāni yadūṣarāyāṃ
nāṅkarayanti haradṛgjvalitāni teṣām || 64 |
śaśakā maśakā bakāḥ śukāḥ
kalaviṅkāśca vṛkāḥ sajambukāḥ |
turagoragavānarā narā girije
kāśimṛtā : parāmṛtam || 65 |

arudrarudrākṣaphaṇīndrabhūṣaṇā-
stripuṇḍracandrārdhadharādharāṅgatāḥ
nirantaraṃ kāśinivāsino janā
girīndraje pāriṣadā matā mama || 66 |

yāvanta eva nivasanti ca jantavo'tra
kāśyāṃ jalasthacarā jhaṣajambukādyāḥ
tāvanta eva madanugraharudradeha hā
dehāvasānamadhigamya mayi praviṣṭāḥ || 67 ||
ye tu varṣeṣavo rudrā divi devi prakīrtitāḥ |
vāteṣavo'ntarikṣe ye ye bhuvyanneṣavaḥ priye || 68 |
rudrā daśa daśa prācyavācī pratyaguda sthitāḥ
ūrdhvadiksthāśca ye rudrāḥ paṭhyante vedavādibhiḥ || 6 |

asaṃkhyātāḥ sahasrāṇi ye rudrā adhibhūtale |
tatsarvebhyo'dhikāḥ kāśyāṃ jantavo rudrarūpiṇaḥ || 100 |
yeṣāmannaṃ vāto varṣamiṣavastebhyo daśa prācīrdaśa dakṣiṇā daśa pratīcīrdaśodīcīdaṃśordhvā-
stebhyo namaste no mṛḍyantu te yaṃ dviṣmo yaśca no dveṣṭi taṃ vo jaṃbhe dadhāmīti " | asyāḥ

rudrāvāsastataḥ proktamavimuktaṃ ghaṭodbhava |
tasmātsamarcya kāśisthān varṇān varṇetarāśramān || 101 ||
śraddhayeśvarabuddhayā ca rudrācaphalabhānaraḥ || 102 ||
śmaśabdena śavaḥ proktaḥ proktaḥ śānaṃ śayanamucyate |
nirvacanti śmaśānārthaṃ mune śabdārthakovidāḥ || 103 |
mahāntyapi ca bhūtāni pralaye samupasthite |
śerate'tra śavā bhūtvā śmaśānaṃ tu tato mahat || 104 ||
asu bhūriha laye layaṃ vrajedāpa aurvavadanograkandare |
mātariśvani mahātanūnapād vyomni saṃkṣayati vai sadāgatiḥ || 105 ||

vyoma cāpi layametyahaṅkṛtau sāpi ṣoḍaśavikārasaṃyutā |
līyate mahati buddhisaṃjñake hā mahān prakṛtimadhyago bhavet || 106 ||
sā guṇatrayamayī ca nirguṇaṃ taṃ pumāṃsamavaguhya tiṣṭhati |
pañcaviṃśatitamaḥ paraḥ pumān dehagehapatireṣa jīvakaḥ || 107 |
prākṛtaḥ pralaya eṣa ucyate haṃsayānaharirudravajitaḥ |
kālamūrtiratha taṃ ca purūṣaṃ helayā kalayatīśvaraḥ paraḥ || 108 ||

sa ve mahāviṣṇuritīryate budhai-
staṃ vai mahādevamudāharanti |
so'ntādimadhyaiḥ parivarjitaḥ śivaḥ
sa śrīpatiḥ so'pi hi pārvatīpatiḥ || 10 9 |
dainandine'tha pralaye triśūla koṭau
samutkṣipya purīṃ haraḥ svām |
birbhāta saṃvartamahā sthibhūṣaṇastato
hi kāśī kalikālavajitā ||| 110 |

skanda uvāca - vārāṇasīti
kāśīti rudrāvāsa iti dvija |
mahāśmaśānamityevaṃ proktamānandakānanam || 111 |
iti devīpura : proktaṃ devadevena śambhunā |
yathā viṣṇoḥ purā khyātaṃ tathaiva ca mayā śrutam |
tacca tvadagre kathitaṃ rahasyaṃ kāśijaṃ mahat || 112 ||
japtvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ ||
mahāpātakanāśanam |
śrāvayitvā dvijān samyak śivaloke mahīyate || 113 |
ataḥ paraṃ kalaśaja kiṃ śuśrūṣasi śuśrūṣasi tadvada |
kāśīkathā kathyamānā mamā'pi paritoṣakṛt || 114 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe vārāṇasīmahimavarṇanaṃ
nāma triśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 30 ||
vārāṇasyādināmanirvacanamupasaṃharati | vārāṇasīti || 111 ||
kāśī rahasya kathanamupasaṃharati | iti devīpura iti | puro'grataḥ | yathā viṣṇoḥ
purākhyātaṃ kathitaṃ devyāḥ puraḥ proktam , tathaiva ca tādṛśameva māturutsaṅgasthitena mayā
śrutamityarthaḥ || 112 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ triṃśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 30 ||

arthakatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
agastya uvāca-
sarvajña hṛdayānanda skanda skanditatāraka |
na tṛptimadhigacchāmi śṛṇvan vārāṇasīkathām || 1 |
anugraho yadi mayi yogyo'smi śravaṇe yadi |
tadā kathaya me nātha kāśyāṃ bhairavasaṃkathām || 2 |
ko'sau bhairavanāmātra kāśīpuryāṃ vyavasthitaḥ |
kiṃ rūpamasya kiṃ karma kāni nāmāni cā'sya vai || 3 ||
kathamārādhitaścaiva siddhidaḥ sādhakasya vai |
ārādhitaḥ kutra kāle kṣipraṃ sidhyati bhairavaḥ || 4 ||
ekatriṃśattame'dhyāye mahāpuṇyapradaṃ nṛṇām |
vaṇyaṃte kālarājasya māhātmyaṃ janmanā saha || 1 ||
etādṛk tapaḥprabhāvavānapyahaṃ śrīkālarājena kāśyā niṣkāśita iti manasi
nidhāya paramasambhrameṇa śrīkālabhairavakathāṃ praṣṭumuktānuvādapūrvakaṃ pūrvoktāṃ kathāmātmana-
stṛptyabhāvāvedanenābhinandati | sarvajñeti | skanditaḥ śoṣito māritastārakanāmā'suro
yena tatsambodhanaṃ tathā || 1 |

ekatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ 1 9 1
skanda uvāca -
vārāṇasyāṃ mahābhāga yathā te prema vartate |
tathā na kasyacinmanye tato vakṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ || || 5 | |
prādurbhāvaṃ bhairavasya mahāpātakanāśanam |
yacchrutvā kāśivāsasya phalaṃ nirvighnamāpnuyāt || 6 ||
pāṇibhyāṃ paritaḥ prapīḍya sudṛḍhaṃ niścotya ca
brahmāṇḍaṃ sakalaṃ pacelimarasāloccaiḥ phalābhaṃ muhuḥ |
pāyaṃ pāyamapāyatastrijagatī munmattavattairasaiḥ
nṛtyaṃstāṇḍavaḍambareṇa vidhinā pāyānmahābhairavaḥ || 7 |
bhairavakathāṃ kathayiṣyan prathamaṃ praṣṭāraṃ stauti | vārāṇasyāmiti | prema bhaktiḥ |

kumbhayone na vetyeva mahimānaṃ maheśituḥ |
caturbhujo'pi vaikuṇṭhaścaturvaktro'pi viśvakṛt || 8 |
na citramatra bhūdeva bhavamāyā duratyayā |
tayā saṃmohitāḥ sarve nāvayantyapi taṃ param || 6 ||
vedayedyadi cātmānaṃ sa eva parameśvaraḥ |
tadā vindanti brahmādyāḥ svecchayaiva na taṃ viduḥ || 10 ||
sa sarvago'pi nekṣyeta svātmārāmo maheśvaraḥ |
devavad buddhayate mūḍhairatīto yo mano girām || 11 ||
nityabodhaparipīḍitaṃ jagadvibhramaṃ tudati vākyajā matiḥ |
vāsudevanihataṃ dhanañjayo hanti kauravakulaṃ yathā punaḥ || iti |
niścotya niścotya ca manananididhyāsanābhyāṃ kṣaraṇatāmāpādya ca pītvā pītvā
atyantaṃ nāśaṃ nītvā sarva saṃharaṇāt kālaḥ kuyogināṃ bhayaṅkaratvād bhairavaḥ paramātmā
tattvamasyādivākyotthabuddhivṛttyabhivyaktastai rasaiḥ prasiddhe bra̭hmānandānubhavai nṛtyaṃstrijagatīsthaṃ

ekatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ 1 9 3
purā pitāmahaṃ vipra meruśṛṅge maharṣayaḥ |
procuḥ praṇamya lokeśaṃ kimekaṃ tattvamavyayam || 12 ||
sa māyayā maheśasya mohito lokasambhavaḥ |
avijñāya paraṃ bhāvamātmānaṃ prāha varṣiṇam || 13 ||
jagadyonirahaṃ dhātā svayambhūreka īśvaraḥ |
anādimadahaṃ brahma māmanarcya na mucyate || 14 ||
pravartako hi jagatāmahameko nivartakaḥ |
nānyo yadadhikaḥ satyaṃ kaścitko'pi surottamāḥ || 15 |
tasyaivaṃ bruvato dhātuḥ kraturnārāyaṇāṃśajaḥ |
provāca prahasan vākyaṃ roṣatāmravilocanaḥ || 16 ||
avijñāya paraṃ tattvaṃ kimetat pratipādyate |
ajñānaṃ yogayuktasya na caitaducitaṃ tava || 17 ||

ahaṃ kartā hi lokānāṃ yajño nārāyaṇaḥ paraḥ |
na māmanādṛtya vidhe jīvanaṃ jīvanaṃ jagatāmaja ||| 18 |
ahameva paraṃ jyotirahameva parā gatiḥ |
matpreritena bhavatā sṛṣṭireṣā vidhīyate || 16 ||
evaṃ viprakṛtau mohātparasparajayaiṣiṇau |
papracchatuḥ pramāṇajñānāgamāṃścaturo'pi tau || 20 ||
vidhikratū ūcatuḥ - -
vedāḥ pramāṇaṃ sarvatra pratiṣṭhāṃ paramāmitāḥ |
yūyameva na sandehaḥ kiṃ tattvaṃ pratitiṣṭhata || 21 |
śrutaya ūcu : -
yadi mānyā vayaṃ devau sṛṣṭisthitikarau vibhū |
tadā pramāṇaṃ vakṣyāmo bhavatsandehabhedakam || 22 ||

śrutyuktamidamākaṇyaṃ procatustau śrutīḥ prati |
yuṣmaduktaṃ pramāṇaṃ nau kiṃ tattvaṃ samyagucyatām || 23 ||
ṛguvāca—
yadantasthāni bhūtāni bhūtāni yataḥ yataḥ savaṃ pravartate |
yadāhustatparaṃ tattvaṃ sa rudrastveka eva hi || 24 ||
yajuruvāca-
yo yajñerakhilerośo yogena ca samijyate |
yena pramāṇaṃ hi vayaṃ sa ekaḥ sarvadṛk śivaḥ || 25 |
sāmovāca-
yenedaṃ bhrāmyate viśvaṃ yogibhiryo vicintyate |
yadbhāsā bhāsate viśvaṃ sa ekastryambakaḥ paraḥ || 26 |

atharvovāca-
yaṃ prapaśyanti deveśaṃ bhaktyānugrahiṇo janāḥ |
tamāhurekaṃ kaivalyaṃ śaṅkaraṃ duḥkhataskaram ||| 27 |
śrutīritaṃ niśamyetthaṃ tāvatīva vimohitau |
smitvāhatuḥ kratuvidhī mohāndhyenāṃkitau mune || 28 ||
kathaṃ pramathanātho'sau ramamāṇo nirantaram |
digambaraḥ pitṛvane śivayā śivayā dhūlidhūsaraḥ || 2 9 ||
viṭaṅkaveśo jaṭilo vṛṣagovyālabhūṣaṇaḥ |
paraṃ brahmatvamāpannaḥ kva ca tatsaṅgavajitam || 30 ||
vidyuto bhānti kuto'yamagniḥ | tameva bhāntamanubhāti sarva yasyā bhāsā sarvamidaṃ
vibhāti " | iti || 26-27 |
jñānena jātaṃ yadāndhyamajñatvaṃ tenāṅkito cihnitau yuktāviti yāvat || 28 |

tadudīritamākarṇya praṇavātmā sanātanaḥ |
amūrto mūrtimān bhūtvā hasamāna uvāca tau || 31 ||
praṇava uvāca --
na hyeṣa bhagavān śaktyā svātmano vyatiriktayā |
kadācidramate rudro līlārūpadharo haraḥ || 32 ||
asau hi bhagavānīśaḥ svayaṃjyotiḥ sanātanaḥ |
ānandarūpā tasyaiṣā śaktirnāgantukī śivā || 33 ||
A ityevamukte'pi tadā makhamūrterajasya hi |
nājñānamagamannāśaṃ śrīkaṇṭhasyaiva māyayā || 34 |

prādurāsīttato jyotirubhayorantare mahat |
pūrayannijayā bhāsā dyāvābhūmyoryadantaram || 35 ||
jyotirmaṇḍalamadhyastho dadṛśe puruṣākṛtiḥ |
prajajvālā'tha kopena brahmaṇaḥ pañcamaṃ śiraḥ || 36 |
āvayorantaraṃ ko'sau bibhṛyāt puruṣākṛtim |
vidhiḥ sambhāvayedyāvattāvat sa hi vilokitaḥ || 37 ||
sraṣṭrā kṣaṇena ca mahān puruṣo nīlalohitaḥ |
triśūlapāṇirbhālākṣo nāgoḍupavibhūṣaṇaḥ || 38 ||
hiraṇyagarbhastaṃ prāha jāne tvāṃ candraśekharam |
bhālasthalānmama purā rudraḥ rudraḥ prādurabhūd bhavān || 36 |
rodanādrudra nāmnā'pi yojito'si mayā purā |
māmeva śaraṇaṃ yāhi putra rakṣāṃ karomi te || 40 ||

atheśvaraḥ padmayoḥ śrutvā garvavatīṃ giram |
sa kopataḥ samutpādya puruṣaṃ bhairavākṛtim ||| 41 |
prāha paṅkajajanmā'sau śāsyaste kālabhairava |
kālavadrājase sākṣātkālarājastato bhavān || 42 |
viśvaṃ bhatuṃ samartho'si bharaṇād bhairavaḥ smṛtaḥ |
tvatto bheṣyati kālo'pi tatastvaṃ kālabhairavaḥ || 43 ||
āmardayiṣyati bhavāṃstuṣṭo duṣṭātmano yataḥ |
āmardaka iti khyātiṃ tataḥ sarvatra yāsyati ||| 44 |
yataḥ pāpāni bhaktānāṃ bhakṣayiṣyati tatkṣaṇāt |
pāpabhakṣaṇa ityeva tava nāma bhaviṣyati || 45 ||

yā me muktipurī kāśī sarvābhyo'pi garīyasī |
ādhipatyaṃ ca tasyāste kālarāja sadaiva hi ||| 46 |
tatra pāpakartārasteṣāṃ śāstā tvameva hi |
śubhāśubhaṃ na tatkarma citragupto likhiṣyati || 47 ||
etānvarānpragṛhyājtha tatkṣaṇātkālabhairavaḥ |
vāmāṅgulinakhāgreṇa cakarta ca śiro vidheḥ ||| 48 |
yadaṅgamaparādhnoti kāryaṃ tasyaiva śāsanam |
ato yena kṛtā nindā tacchinnaṃ pañcamaṃ śiraḥ || 4 9 |
yajñamūrtidharo viṣṇustatastuṣṭāva śaṅkaram |
bhīto hiraṇyagarbho'pi jajāpa śatarudriyam ||| 50 |
kālabhairavāya varān dadāti | yā me iti dvābhyām | anena kiṃ karmā'syeti
tṛtīyapraśnasyottaramuktam | ādhipatyaṃ pālakatvam | ata evoktaṃ kālabhairavāṣṭake'smābhiḥ |
īśvaradatta nijasthalapālaṃ kuṅkumacandanamaṇḍitabhālam | bhūtapiśācapuraskṛtatālaṃ naumi
sadāśiva bhairavadevamiti || 46-47 |

āśvāsya tau mahādevaḥ prītaḥ praṇatavatsalaḥ |
prāha svāṃ mūrtimaparāṃ bhairavaṃ taṃ karpādanam || 51 | |
mānyo'dhvaro'sau bhavatā tathā śatadhṛtistvayam |
kapālaṃ vaidhasaṃ cāpi nīlalohita dhāraya || 52 ||
brahmahatyā s panodāya vrataṃ lokāya darśayan |
cara tvaṃ satataṃ bhikṣāṃ kāpālavratamāsthitaḥ |
ityuktvā'ntarhito devastejorūpastadā śivaḥ || 53 ||
utpādya kanyāmekāntu brahmahatyeti viśrutām | |
raktāmbaradharāṃ raktāṃ raktasraggandhalepanām || 54 ||

daṃṣṭrākarālavadanāṃ lalajjihvātibhīṣaṇām |
antarikṣaikapādāgrāṃ pibantīṃ rudhiraṃ bahu || 55 |
kartrī karparahastāgrāṃ sphuratpiṅgogratārakām |
garjayantoṃ mahāvegāṃ bhairavasyāpi bhoṣaṇām || 56 |
yāvadvārāṇasīṃ divyāṃ puromeṣa gamiṣyati |
tāvattvaṃ bhīṣaṇe kālamanugacchograrūpiṇi || 57 |
sarvatra te praveśo'sti tyaktvā vārāṇasīṃ purom |
niyojya tāmiti śivo'pyantardhānaṃ gatastataḥ || 58 ||
tatsānnidhyādbhairavo'pi kālo'bhūtkālakālataḥ |
sa devadevavākyena vibhratkāpālikaṃ vratam || 56 |
lalantyā bahirniḥsarantyā jihvayā'tiśaya bhīṣaṇāmatiśayena bhayaṅkarām || 55 |
kartrī kara kaviśeṣastasyāḥ karparaṃ khaṇḍaṃ hastāgre yasyāstāṃ hastāgrakṛtabhagnakarakā-

ekatriyoḥ 203
kapālapāṇiviśvātmā cacāra bhuvanatrayam |
nātyākṣīccāpi taṃ devaṃ brahmahatyā sudāruṇā || 60 |
satyaloke'pi vaikuṇṭhe mahendrādipuroṣvapi |
trijagatpatirugro'pi vratī trijagatīśvaraḥ | 61 |
pratitīrthaṃ bhramannāpi vimukto brahmahatyayā || 62 |
anenaivānumānena mahimā tvavagamyatām |
brahmahatyā'panodinyāḥ kāśyāḥ kalaśasambhava || 63 |
santi tīrthānyanekāni bahūnyāyatanāni ca |
adhitrilokino kāśyāḥ kalāmarhanti ṣoḍaśom ||| 64 |
kimiti taṃ nākramettatrāha | tatsānnidhyādviśveśvarasānnidhyād bhairavo'pi kālakālataḥ
kālasyāpi bhakṣakaḥ kālaḥ kalayati janayati prakāśayatīti vā kāla : parabrahmasvarūpoṃ'-

tāvad garjanti pāpāni brahmahatyādikānyalam |
yāvannāma na śṛṇvanti kāśyāḥ pāpācalāśaneḥ || 65 |
pramathaiḥ sevyamāno'yaṃ trilokīṃ vicaran haraḥ |
kāpāliko yayau devo nārāyaṇaniketanam || 66 ||
athāyāntaṃ mahākālaṃ trinetraṃ sarpakuṇḍalam |
mahādevāṃśasambhūtaṃ bhairavaṃ bhīṣaṇākṛtim || 67 ||
papāta daṇḍavad bhūmau dṛṣṭrā taṃ garuḍadhvajaḥ |
devāśca munayaścaiva devanāryaḥ samantataḥ || 68 |
nipetuḥ praṇipatyainaṃ praṇataḥ kamalāpatiḥ |
śirasyañjalimāropya stutvā bahuvidhaiḥ stavaiḥ || 66 ||
pāpācalāśane : pāpaparvatavatrasya tannāśakasyetyarthaḥ || 65 ||
vaikuṇṭhe'pi nātyākṣīditi yaduktaṃ tadvarśayati | niketanaṃ vaikuṇṭham | yadvā
nārāyaṇaniketanaṃ śvetadvīpaṃ mahākālapuraṃ vā || 66 ||
athāyāntamiti rudrasya paramo viṣṇurviṣṇośca paramaḥ śiva iti harivaṃśottabhūtaṃ
rudrameva kālabhairavaṃ dṛṣṭvā viṣṇordaṇḍavad bhūmau patanaṃ nāścaryamiti viṣṇubhaktairmano na kheda-

kṣīrodamathanodbhūtāṃ prāha padmālayāṃ hariḥ |
priye paśyā'bjanayane dhanyā'si subhage'naghe || 70 ||
dhanyo'haṃ devi suśroṇi yatpaśyāvo jagatpatim |
ayaṃ dhātā vidhātā ca lokānāṃ prabhurīśvaraḥ || 71 |
anādiḥ śaraṇaḥ śāntaḥ paraḥ ṣaḍviṃśasaṃmitaḥ |
sarvajñaḥ sarvayogīśaḥ sarvabhūtaikanāyakaḥ || 72 ||
sarvabhūtāntarātmā'yaṃ sarveṣāṃ sarvadaḥ sadā |
yaṃ vinidrā viniḥśvāsāḥ śāntā dhyānaparāyaṇāḥ || 73 |
dhiyā paśyanti hṛdaye so'yamadya samīkṣyatām |
yaṃ vidurvedatattvajñā yogino yatamānasāḥ || 74 |
arūpo rūpavān bhūtvā so'yamāyāti sarvagaḥ |
aho vicitraṃ devasya ceṣṭitaṃ parameṣṭhinaḥ || 75 ||
yasyākhyāṃ bruvatāṃ nityaṃ na dehaḥ so'pi dehadhṛk |
yaṃ dṛṣṭrā na punarjanma labhyate mānavairbhuvi || 76 ||

so'yamāyāti bhagavāṃstrayambakaḥ śaśibhūṣaṇaḥ |
puṇḍarīkadalāyāme dhanye me'dya vilocane || 77 ||
dhig dhik padaṃ tu devānāṃ paraṃ dṛṣṭrā'tra śaṅkaram |
labhyate yanna nirvāṇaṃ sarvaduḥkhāntakṛttu yat || 78 || ||
devatvādaśubhaṃ kiñciddevaloke na vidyate |
dṛṣṭrā'pi sarvadeveśaṃ yanmukti na labhāmahe || 76 ||
evamuktvā hṛṣīkeśaḥ saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ |
praṇipatya mahādevamidamāhavṛṣadhvajam || 80 ||
kimidaṃ devadevena sarvajñena tvayā vibho |
kriyate jagatāṃ dhānā sarvapāpaharā'vyaya ||| 81 |

phrīḍeyaṃ tava deveśa trilocana mahāmate | |
kiṃ kāraṇaṃ virūpākṣa ceṣṭitaṃ te smarārdana || 82 |
kimarthaṃ bhagavan śambho bhikṣāṃ carasi śaktipa |
saṃśayo me jagannātha natatrailokyarājyada || 83 ||
evamuktastataḥ śambhuḥ viṣṇumetadudāharat |
brahmaṇastu śiraśchinnamaṅgulya granakhena ha || 84 ||
tadaghapratighaṃ viṣṇo carāmyetadvrataṃ śubham |
evamukto maheśena puṇḍarīkavilocanaḥ || 85 |
smitvā kiñcinnataśirāḥ punarevaṃ vyajijñapat |
yathecchasi tathā krīḍa sarvaviṣṭapanāyaka || 86 ||
māyayā māṃ mahādeva na cchādayitumarhasi |
nābhīkamalakośāttu koṭiśaḥ kamalāsanān || 87 |
śaktipa he māyāniyantaḥ || 83 ||
yadapratighaṃ tadaghasya pratihantṛ || 85 |
smitvā aho īśvaralīleti vismayena īṣaddhāsyaṃ kṛtvā | sarvaviṣṭapanāyaka
aśeṣalokapate || 86 |

kalpe kalpe sṛjāmīśa tvanniyogabalād vibho |
tyaja māyāmimāṃ deva dustarāmakṛtātmabhiḥ || 88 |
madādayo mahādeva māyayā tava mohitāḥ |
yathāvadavagacchāmi ceṣṭitaṃ te śivāpate || darda
saṃhārakāle samprāpte sadevānakhilānsunīn |
lokān varṇāśramavato varṇāśramavato hariṣyasi yadā hara || 60 |
tadā kva te mahādeva pāpaṃ brahmavadhādikam |
pāratantryaṃ na te śambho svairaṃ krīḍettato bhavān || 61 ||
atīta brahmaṇāmasthanāṃ trakkaṇṭhe tava bhāsate |
tadā tadā kva nu gatā brahmahatyā tavānagha || 62 |
yadvā , madādayo'haṃ viṣṇurādiryeṣāṃ te madādayastava māyayā mohitāḥ | atastava
ceṣṭitaṃ yathāvatparamārthamivāvagacchāmi ||| 8 9 |
na caitatsaṃgacchata ityāha | saṃhāreti || 9 0 |
asthanāṃ srakkīkasānāṃ mālā | tadā tadā tasmiṃstasmin saṃhārakāle | kva kutra |

kṛtvā'pi sumahatpāpaṃ tvāṃ yaḥ smarati bhāvataḥ |
ādhāraṃ jagatāmīśaṃ tasya pāpaṃ vilīyate || 63 |
yathā tamo na tiṣṭheta sannidhāvaṃśumālinaḥ |
tathā na bhavabhaktasya pāpaṃ tasya vrajetkṣayam || 64 |
yaścintayati puṇyātmā tava pādāmbujadvayam |
brahmahatyādikamapi pāpaṃ tasya vrajetkṣayam || 65 |
tava nāmā'nuraktā vāgyasya puṃso jagatpate |
apyadrikūṭatulitaṃ nainastamanubādhate || 66 |
rajasā tamasā virvādhataṃ kva tu pāpaṃ paritāpadāyakam |
kva ca te śivanāmamaṅgalaṃ janajīvātu jagadrujāpaham || 67 ||
kaimutyanyāyena sadṛṣṭāntaṃ pāpābhāvamāha | kṛtvā'poti dvayena | bhāvato

yadi jātu cidandhakadviṣastava nāmoṣṭhapuṭādviniḥsṛtam |
śivaśaṅkaracandraśekharetyasakṛttasya na saṃsṛtiḥ punaḥ || 68 |
paramātman paraṃ dhāma svecchāvidhṛtavigraha |
kutūhalaṃ taveśedaṃ kva parādhīnateśvare || 66 ||
adya dhanyo'smi deveśa yaṃ na paśyanti yoginaḥ |
paśyāmi taṃ jaganmūlaṃ parameśvaramakṣayam || 100 | |
adya me paramo lābhastvadya me maṅgalaṃ param |
tvaddṛṣṭayamṛtatṛptasya tṛṇaṃ svargāpavargadam ' || 101 |

itthaṃ vadati govinde vimalā padmayā tayā |
manorathavatīnāmabhikṣāpātre samarpitā || 102 |
bhikṣāṭanāya devo'pi niragātparayā mudā |
dṛṣṭrā'nuyāyinīṃ tāṃ tu samāhūya janārdanaḥ || 103 ||
samprārthayad brahmahatyāṃ vimuñca tvaṃ triśūlinam |
brahmahatyovāca-
anenā'pi miṣeṇā'haṃ saṃsevyāmuṃ vṛṣadhvajam |
ātmānaṃ pāvayiṣyāmi kva punarbhavadarśanam || 104 ||
sātatyāja na tatpāśvaṃ vyāhṛtā'pi murāriṇā |
tamūce'tha hari śambhuḥ smerāsyo vacanaṃ śubham || 105 |
tvadvākyapīyūṣapānena tṛpto'smi bahumānada | |

vimalā śuddhā pavitreti yāvat yāvat | | manorathavatī abhīṣṭavato amṛtakalpe-
tyarthaḥ || 102 |

na mādyanti tathā bhaikṣaibhikṣavo'pyatisaṃskṛtaiḥ |
yathā māna sudhāpānairnunnabhikṣāṭanajvarāḥ || 107 |
mahāviṣṇuruvāca -
eṣa eva varaḥ ślāghyo yadahaṃ devatādhipam |
paśyāmi tvāṃ devadevaṃ manorathapathātigam ||| 108 |
anatra yaṃ sudhāvṛṣṭiranāyāso mahotsavaḥ |
ayatno nidhilābho yadvīkṣaṇaṃ hara teṃ satām || 106 |
aviyogo'stu me deva tvadaṅghriyugalena vai |
eṣa eva varaḥ śambho nānyaṃ kañcidvaraṃ vṛṇe ||| 110 | ||
nanu manorathavatīṃ bhikṣāṃ tyaktvā kimiti vāksudhāpānenaiva tṛptirāvedyate

śrī īśvara uvāca ' . -
evaṃ bhavatu te'nanta yattvayoktaṃ mahāmate |
sarveṣāmapi devānāṃ varadastvaṃ bhaviṣyasi ||| 111 |
anugṛhyeti daityāri kendrādibhuvane caram |
bheje vimuktijananīṃ nāmnā vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 112 ||
yatra sthitānāṃ jantūnāṃ kalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm |
api brahmādidevānāṃ padāni vipadāṃ padam || 113 |
varaṃ vārāṇasīvāsī jaṭī muṇḍo digambaraḥ |
nānyatra 2 cchatrasaṃchannavasudhāmaṇḍaleśvaraḥ || 114 ||
kendrādibhuvane brahmendrādīnāṃ loke || 112 |

varaṃ vārāṇasībhikṣā na lakṣādhipatā'nyataḥ |
lakṣādhīśo viśed garbha tadbhikṣāśī na garbhabhāk || 115 |
bhikṣā'pi yatra bhikṣubhyo dattāmalakasaṃmitā |
sumeruṇā'pi tulitā vārāṇasyāṃ gururbhavet || 116 ||
varṣāśanaṃ hi yo dadyāt kāśyāṃ sīdatkuṭumbine |
yāvantyabdāni tāvanti yugāni sa divījyate || 117 ||
vārāṇasyāṃ varṣabhojyaṃ yo dadyānnirupāyine |
sa kadācittṛkṣudhā no duḥkhaṃ bhuṅkte nararṣabhaḥ || 118 ||
vārāṇasyāṃ nivasatāṃ yatpuṇyamupajāyate |
tadeva saṃvāsayituḥ phalaṃ tvavikalaṃ bhavet || 116 ||

brahmahatyādipāpāni yasyā nāmno'pi kīrtanāt |
tyajanti pāpinaṃ kāśī sā kenehopamīyate || 120 |
kṣetre praviṣṭamātre'tha bhairave bhoṣaṇākṛtau |
hā hetyuktvā brahmahatyā pātālatalamāviśat || 121 ||
kapālaṃ brahmaṇo rudraḥ sarveṣāmeva paśyatām |
hastātpatitamālokya nanarta parayā mudā || 122 |
vidheḥ kapālaṃ nāmuñcat karamatyanta ' duḥsaham |
harasya bhramataḥ kvā'pi tatkāśyāṃ kṣaṇato'patat || 123 ||
śūlino brahmaṇo hatyā nāpaiti sma ca yā kvacit |
sā kāśyāṃ kṣaṇato naṣṭā kathaṃ kāśī na durlabhā || 124 ||
ataḥ pradakṣiṇīkāryā pūjanīyā purī tviyam || 125 ||

vārāṇasoti kāśīti mahāmantramimaṃ japan |
yāvajjīvaṃ trisandhyaṃ tu janturjātu na jāyate || 126 ||
avimuktaṃ mahākṣetraṃ smaran prāṇāṃstu yastyajet |
dūradeśāntarastho'pi so'pi jātu na jāyate || 127 |
ānandakānane yasya cittaṃ saṃsmarate sadā |
tatkṣetranāmaśravaṇānna sa bhūyo'bhijāyate || 128 ||
rudrāvāse vasennityaṃ naro niyatamānasaḥ |
enasāmapi saṃbhāraṃ kṛtvā kālādvimucyate || 126 |
mahāśmaśānamāsādya yadi devādvipadyate |
punaḥ śmaśānaśayanaṃ na kvāpi labhate pumān || 130 ||
kapālamocanaṃ kāśyāṃ ye smariṣyanti mānavāḥ |
teṣāṃ vinaṅkṣyanti kṣipramihānyatrāpi pātakam || 131 |

āgatya tīrthapravare snānaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ |
tarpayitvā pitṝn devān mucyate brahmahatyayā || 132 ||
aśāśvatamidaṃ jñātvā vārāṇasyāṃ vasanti ye |
dehānte tatparaṃ jñānaṃ teṣāṃ dāsyati śaṅkaraḥ || 133 |
iyaṃ kāśīpurī vipra sākṣādrudratanuḥ parā |
anirvācyā parānandā duṣprāpyeśavirodhibhiḥ || 134 ||
asyāstattvamahaṃ jāne śivabhaktiparo'pi vā |
mucyante jantavo'traiva yathāyogena yoginaḥ || 135 |
paraṃ padamiyaṃ kāśī parānanda iyaṃ purī |
iyameva paraṃ jñānaṃ sevyā'sau mokṣakāṅkṣibhiḥ || 136 |
atroṣitvāpīśabhaktān viruṇaddhi tu yaḥ kudhīḥ |
purye druhyati vā mūḍhastasyānyatrātra no gatiḥ || 137 ||
tīrthaṃ pravare kapālamocane | 132 |
anirvācyā vāgagocarā || 134 ||
mucyante videhakevalyaṃ prāpnuvantītyarthaḥ | yogena brahmātmanoraikyajñānena || 135 ||
paraṃ padamityādisādhane sādhyopacārāt || 136 ||
viruṇaddhi viśeṣeṇāvṛṇoti pīḍayatīti yāvat | niruṇaddhīti pāṭhe'pi sa

kapālamocanaṃ tīrthaṃ puraskṛtvā puraskṛtvā tu tu bhairavaḥ |
tatraiva tasthau bhaktānāṃ bhakṣayannaghasantatim || 138 ||
pāpabhakṣaṇamāsādya kṛtvā pāpaśatānyapi |
kuto bibheti pāpebhyaḥ kālabhairava sevakaḥ || 136 ||
āmardayati pāpāni duṣṭānāṃ ca manorathān |
āmardaka iti khyātastato'sau kālabhairavaḥ || 140 |
kali kālaṃ kalayati sadā kāśīnivāsinām |
ataḥ khyāti parāṃ prāptaḥ kālabhairavasaṃjñitām || 141 ||
pāpabhakṣaṇāmardaketi nāmadvayaṃ nirvakti | kapālamocanamiti tribhiḥ | tatraiva mandā
kinyā dakṣiṇataṭapradeśa eva |
idamāyatanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ maṇimāṇikyanirmitam |
śrīmataḥ kālarājasya kalikālātihāriṇaḥ ||
nijabhaktajanaṃ pāti yaḥ pāpātpāpabhakṣaṇaḥ |
kṣetravighnakarān pāpān pātayan yātanāśataiḥ ||
iyaṃ mandākinī ramyā tapastaptumihāgatā |
kāśīvāsasukhaṃ prāpya nādyāpi divamīhate ||
ityagre vakṣyamāṇatvāt kālodatīrthasyātraṃva sarva lokā'nādisiddhatvāt | kulastambha-
sthalaṃ tu yātanāsthalam | I etadapyuktaṃ tatraiva | ayaṃ sa hi kulastambho yatra śrīkālabhairavaḥ ,
kṣetrapāpakṛtaḥ śāsti darśayaṃstītrayātanāmiti || 138-140 |
prakārāntareṇa kālabhairavanāma nirvakti | kalimiti | kāśīnivāsināṃ kali
kalināmānaṃ kālaṃ yugaṃ kalayati nāśayati ato'so kālaḥ smṛta iti śeṣaḥ | ataḥ
khyātimityadhaṃ tato'sau bhairava iti dvitīyaślokasyānantaraṃ jñātavyam | yadvā , nanu yathā
śrutavyutpattyanusāreṇa kālasaṃjñitāmiti vaktavye kathaṃ kālabhairavasaṃjñitāmityuktaṃ tatrāha |

sadaiva yasya bhaktebhyo yamadūtāḥ sudāruṇāḥ |
paramāṃ bhīrutāṃ prāptāstato'sau bhairavaḥ smṛtaḥ || 142 |
mārgaśīrṣā'sitā'ṣṭamyāṃ . kālabhairavasannidhau |
upoṣya jāgaraṃ kurvan . mahāpāpaiḥ pramucyate || 143 ||
yatkiñcidaśubhaṃ karma kṛtaṃ mānuṣabuddhitaḥ |
tatsavaṃ vilayaṃ yāti kālabhairavadarśanāt || 144 ||
anekajanma niyutairyatkṛtaṃ jantubhistvagham |
tatsavaṃ vilayatyāśu kālabhairavadarśanāt || 145 |
kṛtvā ca vividhāṃ pūjāṃ mahāsambhāravistaraiḥ |
naro mārgā'sitā'ṣṭamyāṃ vārṣikaṃ vighnamutsṛjet || 146 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ ca caturdaśyāṃ ravibhūmijavāsare |
yātrāṃ ca bhairavīṃ kṛtvā kṛtaiḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 147 |
idānīṃ prakārāntareṇa bhairavanāma vyutpādayati | sadaiveti | bhaktebhya eva bibhyati
kiṃ punastasmāditi bhāvaḥ || 142 |
kathamārādhitaścaiṣa ārādhitaḥ kutra kāla iti pañcamaṣaṣṭhapraśnayoruttaramāha |

kālabhairavabhaktānāṃ sadā kāśīnivāsinām |
vighnaṃ yaḥ kurute mūḍhaḥ sa durgatimavāpnuyāt || 148 ||
viśveśvare'pi ye bhaktā no bhaktāḥ kālabhairave |
kāśyāṃ te vighnasaṃghātaṃ labhante tu pade pade || 146 ||
tīrthe kālodake snātvā kṛtvā tarpaṇamatvaraḥ |
vilokya kālarājaṃ ca nirayāduddharet pitṛn || 150 ||
aṣṭau pradakṣiṇīkṛtya pratyahaṃ pāpabhakṣaṇam |
naro na pāpailipyeta manovākkāyasambhavaiḥ || 151 |
tasminnāmardake pīṭhe japtvā svābhīṣṭadevatām |
ṣaṇmāsaṃ siddhimāpnoti sādhako bhairavājñayā || 152 |
vārāṇasyāmuṣitvā yo bhairavaṃ na bhajennaraḥ |
tasya pāpāni vardhante śuklapakṣe yathā śaśī || 153 |
yaṃ yaṃ saṃcintayetkāmaṃ pāpakṣaṇasevayā |
balipūjopahāraiśca taṃ taṃ sa samavāpnuyāt || 154 ||

kālarājaṃ na yaḥ kāśyāṃ pratibhūtā'ṣṭamīkujam |
bhajettasya kṣayetpuṇyaṃ kṛṣṇapakṣe yathā śaśī || 155 |
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ brahmahatyāpanodakam |
bhairavotpattisaṃjñaṃ ca sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 156 |
bandhanāgārasaṃstho'pi prāpto'pi vipadaṃ parām |
prādurbhāvaṃ bhairavasya śrutvā mucyate saṅkaṭāt || 157 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe bhairavaprādurbhāvo nāmaikatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 31 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 31 ||

atha dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
agastya uvāca-
bahiyāna samācakṣva harikeśasamudbhavam |
ko'sau kasya sutaḥ śrīmān kīdṛgasya tapo mahat || 1 ||
kathaṃ ca devadevasya priyatvaṃ samupeyivān |
kāśīvāsijanīno'bhūt kathaṃ vā daṇḍanāyakaḥ || 2 |
etadicchāmyahaṃ śrotuṃ prasādaṃ kuru me vibho |
annadatvaṃ ca samprāptaḥ kathameṣa mahāmatiḥ || 3 ||
sambhramo vibhramaśvobhau kathaṃ tadanugāminau |
vibhrāntikāriṇau kṣetravairiṇāṃ sarvadā nṛṇām || 4 |
dvātriṃśattame'dhyāye sarvapāpaikanāśake |
harikeśasamutpattirvarṇyate'timanoharā || 1 ||
evaṃbhūto jitendriyo'pyahaṃ kṣetrādabahirniṣkāsitaḥ kālarājavadanenāpīti
paramāścaryeṇa daṇḍapāṇerapyutpattyādikaṃ pṛcchati | barhoti caturbhiḥ | bahiyāna mayūraratha ||1 ||

skanda uvāca-
samyagāpucchi bhavatā kāśīvāsisamāhitam |
kumbhasambhava viprarṣe daṇḍapāṇikathānakam || 5 |
yadākarṇya naraḥ prājña kāśīvāsasya yatphalam |
niṣpratyūhaṃ tadāpnoti viśvabharturanugrahāt || 6 ||
ratnabhadra iti khyātaḥ parvate gandhamādane |
yakṣaḥ sukṛtalakṣaśrīḥ purā paramadhārmikaḥ || 7 |
pūrṇabhadraṃ sutaṃ prāpya so'bhūtpūrṇamanorathaḥ |
vayaśvaramamāsādya bhuktvā bhogānanekaśaḥ || 8 |
śāmbhavenā'tha yogena dehamutsṛjya pārthivam |
āsasāda śivaṃ śāntaṃ śāntasarvendriyārthakaḥ || 6 |

pitaryuparate so'tha pūrṇabhadro mahāyaśāḥ | |
sukṛtopāttavibhavabhavasambhogabhuktibhāk
sarvānmanorathāṃllebhe vinā svargaikasādhanam |
gārhasthyāśramanepathyaṃ pathyaṃ paitāmahaṃ mahat || 11 ||
saṃsāratāpasantaptāvayavāmṛtasīkaram
apatyaṃ patatāṃ potaṃ bahukleśa mahārṇave || 12 ||
pūrṇabhadro'tha saṃvīkṣya mandiraṃ sarvasundaram | |
tadbālakomalālāpavikalaṃ tyaktamaṅgalam || 13 ||
śūnyaṃ daridrahṛdiva jīrṇāraṇyamivā'thavā |
pānthavatprāntaramiva khinno'tīvānapatyavān || 14 ||

āhūya gṛhiṇīṃ so'tha yakṣaḥ kanakakuṇḍalām |
uvāca yakṣiṇīṃ śreṣṭhāṃ pūrṇabhadro ghaṭodbhava || 15 |
na hamrmyaṃ sukhadaṃ kānte kānte darpaṇodarasundaram |
muktāgavākṣa subhagaṃ candrakāntaśilājiram || 16 ||
padmarāgendranīlā ciracitāṭṭālakaṃ kvaṇat |
vidrumastambhaśobhāḍhyaṃ sphuratsphaṭikakuḍyavat || 17 ||
preṅkhatpatākānikaraṃ maṇimāṇikyamālitam |
kṛṣṇāgurumahādhūpabahulāmodamoditam || 18 ||
anasanasaṃyuktaṃ cāruparyaṅkabhūṣitam | |
ramyārgalakapāṭāḍhacaṃ dukūlacchannamaṇḍapam ||| 16 |
pūrṇabhadra iti punaruktiranvayārthā | pūrṇa sampūrṇa bhadraṃ yasya sa tatheti vā || 15 ||

suramyaratiśālāḍhacaṃ vājirājivirājitam |
dāsīdāsaśatākoṇaṃ kiṅkiṇīnādanāditam || 20 ||
nūpurārāvasotkaṇṭhake kike kāravākulam
kūjatpārāvata kulaṃ gurusārīkathāvaram ' || 21 ||
khelanmarālayugalaṃ jīvaṃ jīvakakāntimat |
mālyāhūtadvirephāṇāṃ mañjuguñjāravāvṛtam || 22 ||
karpūraiṇamadā modasodarānilavījitam
krīḍāmarkaṭadaṃṣṭrā grīkṛtamāṇikyadāḍimam || 23 ||
dāḍimī bīja sambhrāntaśukatuṇḍāttamauktikam |
dhanadhānya samṛddhaṃ ca padmālayamivāparam || 24 ||

kamalāmodagarbha ca garbharūpaṃ vinā priye |
garbharūpamukhaṃ prekṣye kathaṃ kanakakuṇḍale || 25 |
yadyupāyo'sti tadbrūhi dhigaputrasya jīvitam |
sarva śūnyamivābhāti gṛhametadanaṅgajam || 26 ||
dhigetatsaudha saundayaṃ dhigetaddhanasañcayam |
vinā'patyaṃ priyatame jīvitaṃ ca dhigāvayoḥ || 27 |
pralapantamiva proccaiḥ priyaṃ kanakakuṇḍalā |
babhāṣe'ntaviniḥśvasya yakṣiṇī sā pativratā || 28 |
kanakakuṇḍalovāca—
kimarthaṃ khidyase kānta jñānavānasi yadbhavān |
atropāyo'styapatyāptyai visrabdhamavadhāraya || 26 ||
kamalānāṃ kamalāyā vā moda āmodo harṣo vā yasmin | garbharūpamukhaṃ putramukham |
garbhasyāpatyasya rūpayuktaṃ mukhamiti vā || 25 |
yadyupāyo'sti putrotpattāviti śeṣaḥ | na vidyate gajaḥ putro yasmistat || 26 ||

kimudyamavatāṃ puṃsāṃ durlabhaṃ durlabhaṃ hi hi carācare |
īśvarāpitabuddhīnāṃ sphurantyagre manorathāḥ || 30 ||
daivaṃ hetuṃ vadantyevaṃ bhṛśaṃ kāpuruṣāḥ pate | |
svayaṃ purākṛtaṃ karma daivaṃ tacca na hītarat || 31 ||
tataḥ pauruṣamālambya tatkarmapariśāntaye |
īśvaraṃ śaraṇaṃ yāyāt sarvakāraṇakāraṇam || 32 ||
apatyaṃ draviṇaṃ dārā hārā hamyaṃ hayā gajāḥ |
sukhāni svargamokṣau ca na dūre śivabhaktitaḥ || 33 ||
vidhātuḥ śāmbhavīṃ bhakta priya sarve manorathāḥ |
siddhayo'ṣṭau gṛhadvāraṃ sevante nātra saṃśayaḥ || 34 |
nanvadṛṣṭameva phalasiddhau kāraṇaṃ kimudyamena tatrāha | daivamiti | devameva heturiti

nārāyaṇo'pi bhagavānantarātmā jagatpatiḥ |
carācarāṇāmavitā jātaḥ śrīkaṇṭhasevayā || 35 ||
brahmaṇaḥ sṛṣṭikartṛtvaṃ dattaṃ tenaiva śambhunā |
indrādayo lokapālā jātāḥ śambhoranugrahāt || 36 ||
mṛtyuñjayaṃ sutaṃ lebhe śilādo'pyanapatyavān |
śvetaketurapi prāpa jīvitaṃ kālapāśitaḥ || 37 |

kṣīrārṇavādhipatitāmupamanyuravāptavān
andhako'pyabhavad bhṛṅgī gāṇapatyapadojitaḥ || 38 ||
kaścinmunirgatāyurgirigahvare mahādevamabhyarcya stauti sma , tataśca prāptakālaṃ taṃ netuṃ kāla !
sānnidhyamakarot , tadā prāptakālo'pi śvetastaṃ kālaṃ dṛṣṭvā viśveśamabhyarcato me varākaḥ
kālaḥ kiṃ kariṣyati , yato mṛtyorapi mṛtyurahaṃ sthito'smīti bhāvayan śaṅkaramanusmaran

jigāya śāṅkṣiṇaṃ saṃkhye dadhīciḥ śambhusevayā |
prājāpatyapadaṃ prāpa dakṣaḥ saṃśolya śaṅkaram || 36 ||

manorathapathātītaṃ yacca vācāmagocaram |
gocaro gocarīkuryāttatpadaṃ kṣaṇato mṛḍaḥ || 40 ||
anārādhya maheśānaṃ sarvadaṃ sarvadehinām |
ko'pi kvā s pi kimapyatra na labheteti niścitam || 41 ||
stasya tādṛśaṃ vacaḥ śrutvā kupito haristaṃ didhakṣuścakraṃ mumoca tato dadhīcasya
prabhāvāt sudāruṇamapi taccakraṃ kṣupasya sannidhāveva kuṇṭhitadhāramabhavat , kuṇṭhitadhāraṃ
taccakraṃ dṛṣṭvā dadhīca āha- śivasya etaccakraṃ tatastvayā labdhaṃ māṃ na jighāṃsati , ato
brāhmādyairastre hantuṃ prayatnaṃ kurviti , tasya tadvacaḥ śrutvā sarvāṇyastrāṇi tasmai sasarja ,
devā api viṣṇoḥ sāhāyyaṃ cakruḥ , tadā kuśamuṣṭimādāya bhavaṃ saṃsmaran dadhīciḥ
sasarja , sa ca kuśamuṣṭidivyaṃ kālāgnisadṛśaprabhaṃ triśūlamabhavat tena ca devān dagdhuṃ
sa mati cakre , tadastraprabhāvānnārāyaṇādibhistyaktānyastrāṇi ca praṇeśurdevāśca dudruvuḥ |
tata ātmanaḥ sadṛśān divyān lakṣāyutān gaṇān sa bhagavān sasarja , tān sarvānekadaiva sa
munisattamo dadāha , tatastasya vismāpanārthāya hariviśvamūttirabhūttaṃ dṛṣṭvā dadhīcenoktam-
he mahāviṣṇo ! māyāṃ tyaja , mamā'pyetādṛśaṃ viśvarūpaṃ tvaṃ paśyetyuktvā svatanau viśvarūpaṃ
darśayāmāsa , āha ca harimanayā māyayā kim ? tasmānmāyāṃ tyaktvā yoddhumarhasīti ,
evaṃ tasya vacaḥ śrutvottamaṃ māhātmyaṃ ca dṛṣṭvā devāśca bhūyo'pi dudruvurnārāyaṇaṃ ca
niśceṣṭaṃ brahmā vārayāmāsa , tato brahmaṇo vacanaṃ niśamya tena nirjitastaṃ mahāmuni
praṇipatya bhagavān yayau , tataḥ kṣupo'pi duḥkhāturo bhūtvā dadhīcaṃ brāhmaṇā eva śreṣṭhāḥ ,
mayā'parāddhaṃ kṣamasveti prārthayāmāsa tato dadhīcastaṃ rājānamanugṛhya surottamān dakṣayajñe
viṣṇunā gaṇeśva samaṃ he devā : ! dhvastā bhavateti śaśāpa | kṣupaṃ sambodhya brāhmaṇā eva
pūjyā ityādyuktvā svoṭajaṃ praviveśa | dadhīcamabhivandya kṣupo'pi vismitaḥ san jagāma "

tasmāt sarvaprayatnena śaṅkaraṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja |
yadicchasi priyaṃ putraṃ putraṃ priya sarvajanīnakam || 42 ||
iti śrutvā vacaḥ patnyāḥ pūrṇabhadraḥ sa yakṣarāṭ |
ārādhya śrīmahādevaṃ gītajño gītavidyayā ||| 43 |
dinaiḥ katipayaireva paripūrṇamanorathaḥ |
putrakāmamavāpoccaistasyāṃ pattyāṃ dṛḍhavrataḥ || 44 |
nādeśvaraṃ samabhyarcya keḥ kairnāpi svacintitam |
tasmāt kāśyāṃ prayatnena sevyo nādeśvaro nṛbhiḥ || 45 |
antarvatyatha kālena tatpatnī suṣuve sutam |
tasya nāma pitā cakre harikeśa iti dvija || 46 ||
prītidāyaṃ dadau cā'tha bhūriputrānanekṣaṇāt |
pūrṇabhadrastathā'gastya hṛṣṭā kanakakuṇḍalā || 47 ||

bālo'pi pūrṇacandrābhavadano madanopamaḥ |
vṛddhi pratikṣaṇaṃ prāpa śuklapakṣa ivoḍurāṭ || 48 ||
yadā'ṣṭavarṣadeśīyo harikeśo'bhavacchiśuḥ |
nityaṃ tadāprabhṛtyevaṃ śivamekamamanyata || 46 ||
pāṃsukrīṇanasakto'pi kuryālliṅgaṃ rajomayam |
śādvalaiḥ komalatṛṇaiḥ pūjayecca sakautukam || 50 |
ākārayati mitrāṇi śivanāmnā'khilāni saḥ |
candraśekhara bhūteśa mṛtyuñjaya mṛḍeśvara || 51 |
dhūrjaṭe khaṇḍaparaśo mṛḍānīśa trilocana |
bharga śambho paśupate pinākinnugra śaṅkara || 52 |
śrīkaṇṭha nīlakaṇṭheśa smarāre pārvatīpate |
kapālin bhālanayana śūlapāṇe maheśvara || 53 |
evaṃ vakṣyamāṇaprakāreṇa || 4 9 ||
khaṇḍaparaśo bhagnakuṭhāra || 52 ||

ajināmbara digvāsaḥ svardhunīklinnamaulija |
virūpākṣāhinepathya gṛṇannāmāvalīmimām || 54 ||
savayaskāniti muhuḥ samāhūyati lālayan |
śabdagrahau na gṛhṇītastasyānyākhyāṃ harādṛte || 55 ||
paddbhyāṃ na padyate cānyadṛte bhūteśvarājirāt |
draṣṭuṃ rūpāntaraṃ tasya vīkṣaṇena vicakṣaṇe || 56 |
rasayettasya rasanā haranāmākṣarā'mṛtam |
śivāṅghrikamalāmodād ghrāṇaṃ naiva jighṛkṣati || 57 ||
karau tatkautukakarau tatkautukakarau mano manati nāparam |
śivasātkṛtya peyāni pīyante tena saddhiyā || 58 |
ahinepathya sarpabhūṣaṇa || 54 ||
savayaskān samānavayaso mitrāṇītyetat | pūrvaṃsyā'yamanuvādo'nvayārthaḥ | śabdagrahau
karṇau || 55 ||

bhakṣyante sarvabhakṣyāṇi tryakṣapratyakṣagānyapi |
sarvāvasthāsu sarvatra na sa paśyecchivaṃ vinā || 5 9 |
gacchan gāyan svapaṃstiṣṭhañchyāno'dan pibannapi |
paritastryakṣamaikṣiṣṭa nānyaṃ bhāvaṃ ciketi saḥ || 60 |
kṣaṇadāsu prasupto'pi kva yāsīti vadan muhuḥ |
kṣaṇaṃ tryakṣa pratīkṣasva buddhayatīti sa bālakaḥ | 61 |
spaṣṭāṃ ceṣṭāṃ vilokyeti harikeśasya tatpitā |
aśikṣayatsutaṃ so'tha gṛhakarmarato bhava || 62 |
ete turaṅgamā vatsa tavaite'śva kiśorakāḥ |
citrāṇīmāni vāsāṃsi sudukūlānyamūni ca || 63 ||
ratnānyākaraśuddhāni nānājātīnyanekaśaḥ |
kupyaṃ bahuvidhaṃ caitad godhanāni mahānti ca || 64 ||
tryakṣa pratyakṣagāni trilocanāye ānīya samarpitānītyarthaḥ | apibhinnakrame
bhakṣyāṇītyanena sambadhyate || 5 9 |

amatrāṇi mahārhāṇi raupya kāṃsyamayāni ca |
paṇanīyāni vastūni nānādeśod ' bhavānyapi ||| 65 |
cāmarāṇi vicitrāṇi gandhadravyāṇyanekaśaḥ |

kva yāmi kva sthite śambho mama śreyo bhaviṣyati |
pitrā nirvāsitaścāhaṃ na ca vedsyatha kiñcana || 72 ||
iti śrutaṃ mayā pūrva piturutsaṅgavartinā |
gadatastātapurataḥ kasyacidvacanaṃ sphuṭam || 73 |
mātrā pitrā parityaktā ye tyaktā nijabandhubhiḥ |
yeṣāṃ kvāpi gatirnāsti teṣāṃ vārāṇasī gatiḥ || 74 |
jarayā paribhūtā ye ye vyādhivikalīkṛtāḥ |
yeṣāṃ kvāpi gatirnāsti teṣāṃ vārāṇasī gatiḥ || 75 |
pade pade samākrāntā ye vipadbhirahanaśam |
yeṣāṃ kvāpi gatirnāsti teṣāṃ vārāṇasī gatiḥ || 76 |
pāparāśibhirākrāntā ye dāridryaparājitāḥ |
yeṣāṃ kvāpi gatirnāsti teṣāṃ vārāṇasī gatiḥ || 77 |
saṃsārabhayabhītā ye ye baddhāḥ karmabandhanaiḥ |
yeṣāṃ kvāpi gatirnāsti teṣāṃ vārāṇasī gatiḥ || 78 |
kutra gacchāmi kutra vā sthite mama śreyo bhaviṣyatītyedvayaṃ niścinoti |

śrutismṛtivihīnā ye śaucācāravivarjitāḥ |
yeṣāṃ kvāpi gatirnāsti teṣāṃ vārāṇasī gatiḥ || 76 |
ye ca yogaparibhraṣṭāstapodānavivarjitāḥ |
yeṣāṃ kvāpi gatirnāsti teṣāṃ vārāṇasīgatiḥ || 80 |
madhye bandhujane ' yeṣāmapamānaṃ pade pade |
teṣāmānandadaṃ caikaṃ śambhorānandakānanam || 81 ||
ānandakānane yeṣāṃ rucirve vasatāṃ satām |
viśveśānugṛhītānāṃ teṣāmānandajodayaḥ || 82 ||
bharjyante karmabījāni yatra viśveśavahninā |
ato mahāśmaśānaṃ tadagatīnāṃ parāgatiḥ || 83 |
harikeśo vicāryeti yāto vārāṇasīṃ purīm |
yatrāvimukte jantūnāṃ tyajatāṃ pārthivīṃ tanum || 84 ||
ānandadaṃ ceti cakārādapamānanāśaka mityapi jñeyam || 81 |

punarno tanusambandhastanudveṣiprasādataḥ
ānandavanamāsādya sa tapaḥ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ || 85 |
atha kālāntare śambhuḥ praviśyānandakānanam |
pārvatyaṃ darśayāmāsa nijamākoḍakānanam || 86 ||
amandāmodamandāraṃ kovidārapariṣkṛtam |
cārucampakacūtāḍhyaṃ protphullanavamallikam || 87 |
vikasanmālatījālaṃ karavīravirājitam |
prasphuṭat ketakavanaṃ prodyatkurabako jitam || 88 ||
tanudveṣī kāśīsthānāṃ tanubhṛnmātrāṇāṃ tanumātradveṣī pralayakāle vā tanumātradveṣī

jṛmbhadvicakilāmodaṃ lasatkaṃ kelipallavam |
navamallīparimalākṛṣṭaṣaṭpadanāditam
punnāganikaraṃ bakulāmodamoditam
medasvipāṭalāmodasadāmodita diṅmukham || 60 |
bahuśo lambirolambamālāmālitabhūtalam
calaccandanaśākhāgraramamāṇapikākulam
guruṇā'guruṇā mattabhadrajātivihaṅgamam
nāgakesaraśākhāsthaśālabhañjivinoditam || 62 ||
jṛmbhatāmujjṛmbhatāṃ vikasitāniti yāvat | vicikilānāṃ drumaviśeṣāṇāmāmodo

merutuṅganamerusthacchāyā krīḍita kinnaram
kinnarīmithunodgītaṃ gānavacchuka kiśukam || 63 ||
kadambānāṃ kadambeṣu guñjadrolambayugmakam |
jitasauvarṇavarṇoccakaṇikāravirājitam
( śā ' latālatamālālīhitā līlakucāvṛtam )
lasatsaptacchadāmodaṃ kharjūrīrājirājitam |
nārikelatarucchannaṃ nāraṅgīrāgarañjitam || 65 ||
phalijambīranikaraṃ madhūkamadhuṣākulam |
śālmalīśītalacchāyaṃ picumandamahāvanam || 66 |
merutuṅganamerusthacchāyāsu merūcca rudrākṣavṛkṣajātacchāyāsukrīḍitāḥ krīḍāyuktāḥ

madhurāmodadamanacchannaṃ maruvanoditam |
lavalīlolalolābhṛnmandamārutalolitam
bhillo hallīsa kaprītijhillī rāvavirāviṇam
kvacitsaraḥ parisarakrīḍat kroḍakadambakam || 68 |
marālīgalanālosthabisāsaktasitacchadam
viśokako kamithuna krīḍā kraॅkārasundaram
bakaśāvaka sañcāraṃ lakṣmaṇāsaktasārasam |
mattabarhiṇasaṃghuṣṭaṃ kapiñjalakulākulam || 100 ||
madhuro ramya āmodo yeṣāṃ tairdamanakairācchannam | marubeṇa marubakena piṇḍītakena
noditamucchalitaṃ marūṇāṃ marūbakānāṃ vā vanairuditaṃ prakāśitam | maruvamodinamiti pāṭhe

jīvaṃ jīvalasajjīvaṃ kvaṇatkāraṃḍavotkaṭam |
dīrghikāvārisaṃcāri śītamārutavījitam || 101 ||
mandāndolitakāraparāgaparipiṅgalam
ullasatpaṅkajamukhaṃ nīlendīvaralocanam || 102 ||
tamālakabarībhāraṃ vilasaddāḍimīradam |
bhramarālīlasakaṃ śukanāsāvirājitam || 103 ||
mahāndhuśravaṇaṃ dūrvāstvakṣubhiḥ pariśobhitam |
kamalāmodaniḥsvāsaṃ bimbīphalaradacchadam || 104 |
jīvaṃ jīveḥ pakṣiviśeṣairlasanta ullasanto jīvāḥ prāṇino yasmin | kvaṇadbhiḥ
' śabdāyamānaiḥ kāraṇḍavaiḥ pakṣiviśeṣairutkaṭamuccairvyāptamityarthaḥ | dīrghikāvārisaṃcāriṇā
vāpyudakaprasaraṇavatā śītena vātena vījitaṃ sevitamityarthaḥ || 101 |
mandāndolitakahlārāṇāmīṣaccalitasaugandhikānāṃ parāge rajobhiḥ paripiṅgala-

supadmapatravasanaṃ kaṇikāravibhūṣaṇam |
kanakambulasatkaṇṭhaṃ śaṅkaraskandhabandhuram ||| 105 |
gandhasārasamāsaktā honadordaṇḍamaṇḍitam
aśokapallavāṅguṣṭhaṃ ketakīnakharojjvalam || 106 ||
lasatkaṇṭhīravoraskaṃ gaṇḍaśailapṛthūdaram |
jalāvartalasannābhitarujaṃghāyugānvitam || 107 |
śobhanaṃ padmapatraṃ vasanaṃ yasya tat | karṇikārāḥ parivyādhāḥ supuṣpitavṛkṣaviśeṣā
vibhūṣaṇāni yasya tat ! kamra kambuḥ kamanīyaśuktiḥ śobhanavṛkṣaviśeṣaḥ sa eva lasacchobha-
mānaḥ kaṇṭho yasya tat | śuktiḥ śaṅkhaḥ khuraḥ koladabaṃnakhamityamaraḥ | yadvālaṃ kamraḥ , kāmuko
yaḥ kambuḥ śaṅkhaḥ sa eva lasatkaṇṭho yasya tat | kāmāturo hi śaṅkhaśabdaṃ kurvāṇo bhavati
kamanaḥ kāmanobhika ityamaraḥ | śaṅkaraśivākhyo vitunnakāparaparyāyaḥ kālānusāryāpara-
paryāyo vā vṛkṣaviśeṣaḥ | atha vitunnakaḥ jhaṭāmalā jhalātālī śivā tāmalakīti ca |
kālānusāryavṛkṣāśmapuṣpaśītaśivāni tu śaileyamityamaraḥ | sa eva skandhabandhure skandhasthe
bandhure unnatānate yasmistat | bandhurantūnnatānatamityamaraḥ | athavā krīḍārthamāgataḥ
śaṅkara īśādirudra eva mūttibhedena skandhabandhuraṃ skandhasthaṃ mulaprarohasthaṃ bandhuramunnatāvanataṃ

sthala bhāk padmacaraṇaṃ mattamātaṅgagāminam |
lasatkadalikedāradalaccīnāṃśukāvṛtam || 108 |
nānākusumamālābhirmālitaṃ ca samantataḥ |
akaṇṭakita rucchannaṃ mahiṣasvāpadāvṛtam ||| 106 |
candrakānta śilā supta kṛṣṇaiṇaharitor̤apam
taruprakīrṇakusuma jitasvarlokatārakam
darśayannityamākrīḍaṃ daivyai devo'viśadvanam ||| 110 |
sthalabhājau padmau caraṇo yasya tat 1 | mattamātaṅgena gantuṃ śīlaṃ yasya tat |

yathā priyatamā devi mama tvaṃ sarvasundari |
tathā priyataraṃ caitanme sadānandakānanam || 111 ||
atrānandavane devi mṛtānāṃ madanugrahāt |
vapustvamṛtatāṃ prāptamapunarbhavinastu te || 112 |
bhavino ye vipadyante vārāṇasyāṃ mamājñayā |
teṣāṃ bījāni dagdhāni śmaśānajvaladagninā || 113 ||
mahāśmaśāne ye prāptā dorghanidrāṃ girīndraje |
na punargarbhaśayane te svapanti kadācana || 114 |
brahmajñānena mucyante nānyathā jantavaḥ kvacit |
brahmajñānamaye kṣetre prayāge vā tanutyajaḥ || 115 |
kānanaṃ praviśya kimakarot kāśīṃ varṇayāmāsetyāha | devadeva uvāceti yathā
priyatametyādīnāmiti bruvāṇo deveśo harikeśamavekṣatetyagrimeṇā'nvayaḥ | me mama | sadaiveti
kvacit || 111 ||

brahmajñānaṃ tadevāhaṃ kāśī saṃsthitibhāginām |
diśāmi tārakaṃ prānte mucyante te tu tatkṣaṇāt || 116 |
gṛhṇīyuḥ pāpakarmāṇi pāpakarmāṇi kāśīmṛta vinindakāḥ |
sukṛtāni stutikṛto mucyante te'tra jantavaḥ || 117 |
brahmajñānaṃ kuto devi kalinopahatātmanām |
svabhāvacañcalākṣāṇāṃ tadbrahmeha diśāmyaham || 118 |
yogino yogavibhraṣṭāḥ patantyaiśvaryamohitāḥ |
kāśyāṃ patitvā na punaḥ patantyapi mahālaye || 116 ||
brahmajñānaṃ na vindanti yogerekena janmanā |
janmanaikena mucyante kāśyāmantakṛto janāḥ || 120 |
saṃsthitirmaraṇaṃ samyak sthitirvā || 116 ||
kāśīmaraṇādamuktimuktī kathayatodaṣaguṇāvāha | gṛhopuriti | atra ye jantavo
mriyante te na mucyante iti kāśīmṛtavinindakāḥ pāpāni gṛhṇīyurgṛhṇanti | te
mucyanta iti stutikṛtaḥ sukṛtāni gṛhṇanti prāpnuvantītyarthaḥ || 117 ||

yatheha mucyate janturgirije madanugrahāt |
avimukte mahākṣetre na tathā'nyatra kutracit || 121 ||
bahujanmasamabhyāsādyogī mucyeta vā na vā |
mṛtamātro vimucyeta kāśyāmekena janmanā || 122 ||
na siddhayati kalau yogo na sidhyati kalau tapaḥ |
nyāyājitadhanotsargaḥ sadyaḥ sidhyetkalau naraḥ || 123 |
na vrataṃ na tapo nejyā na japo na surārcanam |
dānameva kalau muktyai kāśīdānairavāpyate || 124 ||
kalau viśveśvaro devaḥ kalau vārāṇasī purī |
kalau bhāgīrathī gaṅgā kalau dānaṃ viśiṣyate || 125 |
samyagabhyāsaḥ samabhyāsastasmāt | kṛtābhyāsāditi kacit || 122 ||
nanu kecidyogena tapasā vā mucyanta iti śrūyate , satyam , tattu kalau na sidhyatī-

gaṅgottaravahā kāśyāṃ liṅgaṃ viśveśvaraṃ mama |
ubhe vimuktide puṃsāṃ prāpye dānabalātkalau | 126 |
puṇyavānitaro vā'pi mama kṣetrasya sevayā |
mukto bhavati deveśi nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 127 |
avimuktasya māhātmyātpuṇyapāpena karmaṇā |
devi prabhavataḥ puṃsāmapi janmaśatārjite || 128 |
avimuktaṃ na moktavyaṃ tasmāddevi mumukṣuṇā |
hanyamānena bahudhā hyapasargaśatairapi || 126 ||
vidhāya kṣetrasaṃnyāsaṃ ye vasantīha mānavāḥ |
jīvanmuktāstu te devi teṣāṃ vighnaṃ harāmyaham || 130 ||
na yogināṃ hṛdākāśe na kailāse na mandare |
tathā vāsaratirme'sti yathā kāśyāṃ ratirmama || 131 ||

kāśīvāsijano devi mama garbhe vasetsadā |
atastaṃ mocayāmyante pratijñeyaṃ yato mama || 132 |
tāmasīṃ prakṛti prāpya kālo bhūtvā carācaram |
grasāmi līlayā devi kāśīṃ rakṣāmi yatnataḥ || 133 |
premapātradvayaṃ devi nitarāṃ netanmama |

iti bruvāṇo deveśo harikeśamavaikṣata |
madhye vanaṃ tapasyantamaśoka tarumūlagam || 137 |
śuṣka snāyupinaddhā sthisañcayaṃ niścalākṛtim |
valmīkakīṭakākoṭiśoṣitāsṛgasṛgdharam || 138 ||
nirmāsakokasacayaṃ sphaṭikopalaniścalam |
śaṅkhakundendutuhina mahāśaṅkha - lasa cchriyam || 136 ||
sattvāvalambitaprāṇamāyuḥ śeṣeṇa rakṣitam |
niḥśvāsocchvāsapavanavṛttisūcitajīvitam || 140 ||
kodṛgasya tapo mahaditi caturthasya praśnasya pratyuttaraṃ dātuṃ viśvanāthena dṛṣṭaṃ

dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ 25 3
nimeṣonmeṣasaṃcārapiśunīkṛtajantukam
piṅgatārasphuradraśminetradīpitadiṅmukham || 141 ||
tattapo'gniśikhādāvacumbitamlānakānanam
tatsaumya dṛk sudhāvarṣa saṃsiktā'khilabhūruham || 142 ||
sākṣāttapasyantamiva tapo dhṛtvā narākṛtim |
nirākṛti nirākāṅkṣa kṛtvā bhakti ca kāñcana || 143 ||
kuraṅgaśāvairgaṇaśo bhramadbhiḥ parivāritam |
nitāntabhīṣaṇāsyaiśca pañcāsyaiḥ parirakṣitam || 144 || |
nimeṣonmeṣasaṃcāreṇa prāṇidharmeṇa apiśunāḥ piśunā guṇeṣu doṣāropakāḥ kṛtā
jantavo vyāghrādayo yena tam | teṣāmasmin vyādhabuddhirjāteti bhāvaḥ | piṅge piṅgale
tāre kanīnike yayo sphurantoḥ raśmayo yayoste ca te netre ca tābhyāṃ dīpitāni
diśāṃmukhāni yena tam || 141 |
sa prasiddhaścāsau tapo'gniśca tasya śikhaiva dāvo vanāgnistena cumbitāni
sambandhena mlānāni kānanāni yasmāditi vā | te prasiddhe ca saumyadṛśau ca śāṃtanetre
tayoḥ sudhāvarṣeṇa saṃsiktā akhilabhūruhā yena tam || 142 ||
narākṛti manuṣyaśaroraṃ dhṛtvā sākṣāttapa iva tapasyantam | kiṃ kṛtvetyapekṣāyā-

. taṃ al tathābhūtamālokya devī devaṃ vya jijñapat |
vareṇa cchandayeśā muṃ nijabhaktaṃ tapasvinam || 145 |
tvadekacittaṃ tvadadhīnajīvitaṃ tvadekakarmāṇamamuṃ tvadāśrayam |
tīvrastapobhiḥ pariśuṣka vigrahaṃ kuruṣva yakṣasya varairanugraham ||| 146 |
devo vṛṣendrādavaruhya devyā śailādinā dattaka rāvalambaḥ |
samādhisaṃkocita netrapatraṃ pasparśa hastena dayārdracetāḥ || 147 |
tataḥ sa yakṣo vinimīlya cakṣuṣī tryakṣaṃ puro vīkṣya samakṣamātmanaḥ |
udyatsahasrāṃśusahasratejasaṃ jagāda harṣākulagadgadākṣaram || 148 ||
jayeśa śambho girijeśa śaṅkara triśūlapāṇe śaśikhaṇḍaśekhara |
sparśatkṛpālo tava pāṇipaṅkajaṃ prāpyā'mṛtībhūtatanūlato'bhavam || 146 ||

śrutvoditāṃ tasya maheśvaro giraṃ mṛdvīkayā sāmyamupeyuṣīṃ mṛdu |
bhaktasya dhīrasya mahātaponidhe dadau varāṇāṃ nikaraṃ tadā mudā || 150 |
kṣetrasya yakṣāya mama priyasya bho
bhavā'dhunā daṇḍadharo varānmama |
sthirastvamadyādidurātmadaṇḍakaḥ
supālakaḥ puṇyakṛtāṃ ca matpriyaḥ || 151 |
tvaṃ daṇḍapāṇirbhava nāmato'dhunā
sarvān gaṇān śādhi mamājñayotkaṭān |
gaṇāvimau tvāmanuyāyinau sadā
nāmnā yathārthī nṛṣu sambhramodāmau || 152 |
kathaṃ ca devadevasyetyādipraśnacatuṣṭayasyottaraṃ dātumupakramate | śrutveti | he mahāta-
ponidhe agastya ! visargāntapāṭhe harikeśaviśeṣaṇam | maheśvarastasya harikeśasya mṛdu
yathā syāttathā giraṃ śrutvā varāṇāṃ nikaraṃ prādādityanvayaḥ | mṛdumiti pāṭhe giro

tvamantyabhūṣāṃ kuru kāśivāsināṃ
gale sunīlāṃ bhujagendrakaṅkaṇām | |
bhāle sunetrāṃ karikṛttivāsasaṃ
vāmekṣaṇalakṣitavāmabhāgām || 153 |
maulau lasatpiṅgakapardabhāriṇīṃ
vibhūtisaṃkṣālitapuṇya vigrahām
aho himāṃśoḥ kalayā lasacchriyaṃ
vṛṣendralīlāgatimandagāminīm || 154 |
tvamannadaḥ kāśinivāsināṃ sadā
tvaṃ prāṇado jñānada eka eva hi |
tvaṃ mokṣado manmukha sūpadeśata-
stvaṃ niścalāṃ sahasata vidhāsyasi ||| 155 |

tvaṃ vighnapūgaiḥ paripīḍya pāpinaḥ

pūrṇabhadrasuta daṇḍanāyaka
tryakṣa yakṣa harikeśa piṅgalaḥ
kāśivāsavasatāṃ sadānnada
jñānamokṣada gaṇāgraṇīrbhava || 156 |
madbhaktiyukto'pi vinā tvadīyāṃ
bhakti na kāśīvasati labheta |
gaṇeṣu deveṣu hi mānaveṣu
tadagramānyo bhava daṇḍapāṇe || 160 |
jñānodatīrthe vihitodakakriyo
yastvāṃ samārādhayitā gaṇeśam |
sa eva loke kṛtakṛtyatāmagā-
nmamātulānugrahato'tra puṇyavān || 161 |
tvaṃ dakṣiṇasyāṃ diśi daṇḍapāṇe
sadaiva me netrasamakṣamatra |
tvaṃ . 2 daṇḍayan prāṇabhṛto durīhā-
nihāsva nan svānabhayaṃ diśanvaṃ || 162 | |
tattasmādagramānyaḥ prathamata eva pūjyaḥ || 160 |
gaṇeśaṃ gaṇānāṃ niyantāraṃ tvāmiti || 161 |
he daṇḍapāṇe ! tvamiha kṣetre sadeva me mama netrasamakṣaṃ pratyakṣamāsva tiṣṭhetyanvayaḥ |

dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ 25 9
skanda uvāca -
iti dattvā varān vipra girośo daṇḍapāṇaye |
vṛṣendra madhiruhyā'tha viveśānandakānanam || 163 |
kumbhodbhava tadārabhya yakṣarāḍ daṇḍanāyakaḥ |
purīṃ vārāṇasīṃ samyaganuśāsti nideśataḥ || 164 |
ahamapyatra varsāta cakre tadanusūyayā |
vasannapi mayā kāśyāṃ yataḥ sambhāvito na saḥ || 165 |
mune kṣetraṃ kṣetraṃ yadatyākṣīstvamapyevaṃvidho vaśī |
śaṅke tatrāhamevāddhā kāmaṃ tasyaiva vikriyām || 166 ||

manāg viruddhācaraṇaṃ yadi dvija vilakṣayet |
harikeśastadā kāśyāṃ kva sthitiḥ kva ca nirvṛtiḥ || 167 ||
daṇḍapāṇimanārādhya kaḥ kāśyāṃ sukhamāpnuyāt |
pravivikṣurahaṃ kāśīṃ dūrago'pi bhajāmi tam || 168 |
ratnabhadrāṃ gajodbhūta pūrṇabhadrasutottama |
nirvighnaṃ kuru me yakṣa kāśīvāsaṃ śivāptaye || 166 |
dhanyo yakṣaḥ pūrṇabhadro pūrṇabhadro dhanyā kāñcanakuṇḍalā |
yayorjaṭharapīṭhe bhūrdaṇḍapāṇe mahāmate || 170 |
jaya yakṣapate dhīra jaya piṅgalalocana |
jaya piṅgajaṭābhāra jaya daṇḍamahāyudha || 171 |
tadvikriyāyāṃ hetuṃ darśayan pūrvoktameva vivṛṇoti | manāgiti | nirvṛtiḥ
sukham || 167 ||
ataḥ svayamapi kāśīvāsāyodriktabhaktistameva prārthayate | ratnabhadreti | uttama
śreṣṭha | śivāptaye mokṣāya || 16 9 |
buddhayā pratyakṣīkṛtya taṃ stotumupakramate | dhanya iti | he daṇḍapāṇe he mahāmate
yayo ' jaṭharapīṭhe bhavatīti bhūstvaṃ sa pūrṇabhadro dhanyaḥ , sā ca kanakakuṇḍalā
dhanyeti || 170 |

avimuktamahākṣetrasūtradhārogratāpasa
daṇḍanāyaka bhīmāsya jaya viśveśvarapriya || 172 |
saumyānāṃ saumyavadana bhīṣaṇānāṃ bhayānaka |
kṣetrapāpadhiyāṃ kāla mahākāla mahāpriya || 173 |
jaya prāṇada yakṣendra kāśīvāsānnamokṣada |
mahāratnasphuradraśmi jaya carcitavigraha || 174 |
mahāsambhrāntijanaka mahodbhrāntipradāyaka |
abhaktānāṃ ca bhaktānāṃ sambhrāntyudbhrāntināśaka ||| 175 |
prāntanepathyacatura jaya jñānanidhiprada |
jaya gaurīpadābjāle mokṣekṣaṇavicakṣaṇa || 176 |
yakṣarājāṣṭakaṃ puṇyamidaṃ nityaṃ trikālataḥ |
japāmi maitrāvaruṇe vārāṇasyāptikāraṇam ||| 177 |
sūtradhārasthapate || 172 |
mahān priyo mahāpriyaḥ || 173 |
mahāratnānāṃ sphuratā raśmi ca yena carcito vigraho yasya || 174 |
abhaktānāṃ cetyasya pūrveṇānvayaḥ || 175 |
prāntanepathyacatura ! antimakālīnālaṅkaraṇe dakṣa | gaurīpadābjāle bhavānīpāda-

daṇḍapāṇyaṣṭakaṃ dhīmān japan vighnairna jātucit |
śraddhayā paribhūyeta kāśīvāsaphalaṃ labhet || 178 ||
prādurbhāvaṃ daṇḍapāṇeḥ śṛṇvan stotramidaṃ gṛṇan |
vipattimanyataḥ prāpya kāśīṃ janmāntare labhet || 17 9 |
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ daṇḍapāṇisamudbhavam |
paṭhitvā pāṭhayitvā'pi na vighnerabhibhūyate || 180 | |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe daṇḍapāṇiprādurbhāvo nāma dvātriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 32 ||

atha vayasvaśo'dhyāyaḥ
agastya uvāca-
skanda jñānodatīrthasya māhātmyaṃ vada sāmpratam |
jñānavāpīṃ praśaṃsanti yataḥ svargau kaso'pyalam || 1 ||
skanda uvāca- -
ghaṭodbhava mahāprājña śṛṇu pāpapraṇodinīm |
jñānavāpyāḥ samutpatti kathyamānāṃ mayā'dhunā || 2 |
anādisiddhe saṃsāre purā devayuge mune |
prāptaḥ kutaścidīśānaścaran svairamitastataḥ || 3 |
cidvāpyā varṇanaṃ citraṃ citrakāśīkṣaṇāntaram |
trayastraśattame'dhyāye tathyaṃ saṃkathyate dhruvam || 1 ||
jñānodatīrthe vihitodakakriya ityuktaṃ tatra pṛcchati | skandeti | viśeṣata etat-

na varṣanti yadā'srāṇi na prāvartanta nimnagāḥ |
jalābhilāṣo na yadā snānapānādikarmaṇi || 4 |
kṣārasvādūdayoreva yadāsījjaladarśanam |
pṛthivyāṃ narasaṃcāre vartamāne kvacit kvacit || 5 |
nirvāṇakamalākṣetraṃ śrīmadānandakānanam |
mahāśmaśānaṃ sarveṣāṃ bījānāṃ paramūṣaram || 6 |
mahāśayana suptānāṃ jantūnāṃ pratibodhakam |
saṃsārasāgarāvartapatajjantutaraṇḍakam ||7 ||
yātāyātātisaṃkhinnajantu viśrāma maṇḍapam
anekajanmaguṇitakarmasūtracchidākṣuram
kadā prāpta ityākāṅkṣāyāṃ kālaṃ nirdiśati | na varṣanti yadeti dvābhyām || 4 |
kṣārasvāduno ude udake yayostī kṣārasvādūdī lavaṇajalārṇavau tayoḥ || 5 |

saccidānandanilayaṃ parabrahmarasāyanam |
sukhasantāna janakaṃ mokṣasādhana siddhidam || 6 ||
praviśya kṣetrametat sa īśāno jaṭilastadā |
lasatriśūla vimalaraśmijālasamākulaḥ || 10 ||
āluloke mahāliṅgaṃ vaikuṇṭhaparameṣṭhinoḥ |
mahāhamahamikāyāṃ prādurāsa yadāditaḥ || 11 |
jyotirmayībhirmālābhiḥ paritaḥ pariveṣṭitam |
vṛndairvṛndārakarṣīṇāṃ gaṇānāṃ ca nirantaram || 12 ||
saccidānandalakṣaṇasya viśveśvarasya nilayamāśrayam | parabrahma cāso rasaśceti |
prāpayati tasyāyanaṃ prāptiryasmāditi vā tat || 9 ||

siddhānāṃ yogināṃ stomairarcyamānaṃ nirantaram |
gīyamānaṃ ca gandharvaiḥ stūyamānaṃ ca cāraṇaiḥ || 13 ||
aṅgahārairapsarobhiḥ sevyamānamanekadhā |
nīrājyamānaṃ satataṃ nāgībhirmaṇidīpakaiḥ || 14 ||
vidyādharīkinnarībhistrikālaṃ kṛtamaṇḍanam |
amarocamarorājivījyamānamitastataḥ || 15 ||
asyeśānasya talliṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvecchetyabhavattadā |
snapayāmi mahalliṅgaṃ kalaśaiḥ śītalairjalaiḥ || 16 ||
cakhāna ca triśūlena dakṣiṇāśopakaṇṭhataḥ |
kuṇḍa pracaṇḍavegena rudro rudravapurdharaḥ || 17 |
siddhānāṃ kapilādīnāṃ yogināṃ ca sanakādīnāṃ stomaiḥ samūhaiśca nirantara-

pṛthivyāvaraṇāmbhāṃsi niṣkrāntāni tadā mune |
bhūpramāṇāddaśaguṇairyairiyaṃ vasudhāvṛtā || 18 |
tairjalaiḥ snāpayāñcakre tvaspṛṣṭairanyadehibhiḥ |
tuṣārairjāḍyavidhurai jaṃjapūkaughahāribhiḥ ||1 9 |
sanmanobhirivātyacchaṃranaccheyamavartmavat
jyotsnāvadujjvalacchāyaiḥ pāvanaiḥ śambhunāmavat || 20 ||
pīyūṣavatsvādutaraiḥ sukhasparśairgavāṅgavat |
niṣpāpadhīvadgambhīraistaralaiḥ pāpiśarmavat || 21 ||
vijitābja mahāgandhaḥ pāṭalāmodamodibhiḥ |
adṛṣṭapūrvalokānāṃ manonayanahāribhiḥ || 22 |
pṛthivyāvaraṇāmbhāṃsi pṛthivyā dvitīyāvaraṇāmbhāṃsi | kathaṃbhūtāni ? bhūpramāṇāt
pañcāśatko ṭilakṣaṇāddaśaguṇairye rambhobhirjalairiyaṃ vasudhāvṛtā tāni || 18 |

ajñānatāpasantaptaprāṇiprāṇaikarakṣibhiḥ
pañcāmṛtānāṃ kalaśaiḥ snapanātiphalapradaḥ || 23 ||
śraddhopaspaśahṛdaya liṅgatritayahetubhiḥ
ajñānatimirākabhairjñānadāna nidāyakaiḥ ||| 24 |
viśvabharturumā sparśasukhātisukhakāribhiḥ
mahāvabhṛthasusnāna mahāśuddhividhāyibhiḥ || 25 |
sahasradhāraiḥ kalaśaiḥ sa īśāno ghaṭodbhava |
sahasrakṛtvaḥ snapayāmāsa saṃhṛṣṭamānasaḥ || 26
tataḥ prasanno bhagavān viśvātmā viśvalocanaḥ |
tamuvāca tadeśānaṃ rudraṃ rudravapurdharam || 27 |
ajñānarūpatāpasantaptaprāṇiprāṇānāṃ mukhyarakṣaṇaśīlaiḥ | dadhidugdhaghṛtamadhuśarkarāṇāṃ
kumbhairyatsnānaṃ tato'pyatiphalaṃ pradadatīti tathā taiḥ || 23 ||
śraddhayopaspraṣṭumācamituṃ śīlaṃ yeṣāṃ teṣāṃ hṛdayeṣu liṅgatritayahetubhiliṅgatritaya-

trayastriśo'dhyāyaḥ 26 9
tava prasanno'smīśāna karmaṇā'nena suvrata |
guruṇā'nanyapūrveṇa mamā'tiprītikāriṇā | 28 |
tatastvaṃ jaṭileśāna varaṃ brūhi tapodhana |
adeyaṃ na tavā'styadya mahodyamaparāyaṇa || 26 |
īśāna uvāca-
yadi prasanno deveśa varayogyo'smyahaṃ yadi |
tavetadatulaṃ tīrthaṃ tava nāmnā'stu śaṅkara || 30 ||
viśveśvara uvāca -
trilokyāṃ yāni tīrthāni bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ sthitānyapi |
tebhyo'khilebhyastīrthebhyaḥ śivatīrthamidaṃ param ||| 31 |
śivajñānamiti brūyuḥ śivaśabdārthacintakāḥ |
tacca jñānaṃ dravībhūtamiha me mahimodayāt || 32 |

ato jñānodanāmaitattīrthaṃ trailokyaviśrutam |
asya sparśanamātreṇa sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 33 ||
jñānodatīrtha saṃsparśādaśvamedhaphalaṃ labhet |
sparśanācamanābhyāṃ ca rājasūyāśvamedhayoḥ || 34 ||
phalgutīrthe naraḥ snātvā santarpya ca pitāmahān |
yatphalaṃ samavāpnoti tadatra śrāddhakarmaṇā | 35 |
gurupuṣyāsitāṣṭamyāṃ vyatīpāto yadā bhavet |
tadā'tra śrāddhakaraṇād gayākoṭiguṇaṃ bhavet || 36 ||
yatphalaṃ samavāpnoti pitṝn santarpya puṣkare |
tatphalaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ jñānatīrthe tilodakaiḥ || 37 |
phalgutīrthe gayā'ntargate || 35 ||
amāvasyāyukto ravivāsaro vyatīpāto yogaviśeṣo vā | gurupuṣyāsitāṣṭamyāṃ
vyatīpāto yogo yadā bhavedityekaṃ ' vākyam || 36 |
puṣkare citrakūṭadeśāntargata pāriyātraparvatā vidūre || 37 |

sannihatyāṃ kurukṣetre tamograste vivasvati |
yatphalaṃ piṇḍadānena tajjñānode dine dine || 38 |
piṇḍanirvapaṇaṃ yeṣāṃ jñānatīrthe sutaiḥ kṛtam |
modante śivaloke te yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 36 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ ca caturdaśyāmupavāsī narottamaḥ | |
prātaḥ snātvā'tha pītāmbhastvantaliṅgamayo bhavet || 40 ||
ekādaśyāmupoṣyā'tra prāśnāti culukatrayam |
hṛdaye tasya jāyante trīṇi liṅgānyasaṃśayam || 41 ||
īśānatīrthe yaḥ snātvā viśeṣātsomavāsare |
santarpya devarṣipitan datvā dānaṃ svaśaktitaḥ || 42 |
tataḥ samayaṃ śrīliṅgaṃ mahāsambhāravistaraiḥ |
atrāpi dattvā nānārthān kṛtakṛtyo bhavennaraḥ || 43 ||

upāsya saṃdhyāṃ jñānode yatpāpaṃ kālalopajam |
kṣaṇena tadapākṛtya jñānavān jāyate dvijaḥ ||| 44 |
śivatīrthamidaṃ proktaṃ jñānatīrthamidaṃ śubham |
tārakākhyamidaṃ tīrthaṃ mokṣatīrthamidaṃ dhruvam || 45 ||
smaraṇādapi pāpaugho jñānodasya kṣayeddhruvam |
darśanātsparśanātsnānātpānāddharmādisambhavaḥ || 46 |
ḍākinī śākinī bhūtapretavetālarākṣasāḥ |
grahāḥ kūṣmāṇḍajhoṭiṅgāḥ kālakarṇīśiśugrahāḥ || 47 ||
jvarāpasmāravisphoṭadvitīya kacaturthakāḥ
sarve praśamamāyānti śivatīrthajale kṣaṇāt || 48 |
jñānodatīrthapānīyailiṅgaṃ yaḥ snāpayetsudhīḥ |
sarvatīrthodakaṃstena dhruvaṃ saṃsnāpitaṃ bhavet || 46 ||
tārayatīti tārakaṃ tadākhyaṃ tannāmakam || 45 ||

jñānarūpo'hamevā'tra dravamūrti vidhāya ca |
jāḍayavidhvaṃsanaṃ kuryāṃ kuryāṃ jñānopadeśanam || 50 ||
iti dattvā varāñchambhustatraivāntaradhīyata |
kṛtakṛtyamivātmānaṃ so'pyamaṃsta triśūlabhṛt || 51 ||
īśāno jaṭilo rudrastatprāśya paramodakam |
avāptavān paraṃ jñānaṃ yena nirvṛtimāptavān || 52 ||
skanda uvāca -
kalaśodbhava citrārthamitihāsaṃ purātanam |
jñānavāpyāṃ hi yadvṛttaṃ tadākhyāmi niśāmaya || 53 |
harisvāmīti vikhyātaḥ kāśyāmāsīd dvijaḥ purā |
tasyaikā tanayā jātā rūpeṇāpratimā bhuvi || 54 ||
na samā śīlasampattyā tasyāḥ kācana bhūtale |
kalākalāpakuśalā svareṇa jitakokilā || 55 |
nirvṛti brahmānandamāptavān | jīvanmuktoṃ babhūvetyarthaḥ || 52 |
īśānasya tajjalaprāśanadvārā svānandāvāptirityetannāticitraṃ prākṛtānāmapi
taddarśanāditi kathayitumitihāsamavatārayati | kalaśodbhaveti || 53 |
tanyate vaṃśo'nayeti tanayā | tāṃ viśinaṣṭi | rūpeṇeti sapādapañcadaśabhiḥ || 54 |

na nārī tādṛgastīha nāmarī kinnarī na ca |
vidyādharī na no nāgī gāndharvī nāsurī na ca || 56 |
sarvasaundaryanilayā sarvalakṣaṇasatkhaniḥ |
adhiśete dhruvaṃ dhvāntaṃ tanmauli braghnasādhvasāt || 57 ||
tadāsyaṃ śaraṇaṃ yāto manye darśabhayācchaśī |
divāpi na tyajet tāṃ tu trastaścaṇḍamarīcitaḥ || 58 |
tad bhrūbhramararājīva gaṇḍapatralatāntare |
udañcannyañcaduḍḍonagate rabhyāsabhājinī || 56 ||
tādṛgiti sarvatra sambadhyate | kinnarīti ceti pāṭhe iti ceti pakṣāntare || 56 |
sūcitā bradhnasādhvasāt sūryabhayāt || 17 ||
darśabhayādamāvāsyāyāṃ nāśabhayādityarthaḥ | divāpi apiśabdānnaktamapi |
caṇḍamarīcitaḥ sūryāt || 58 ||
tasyā bhrūśorūrdhvastharomālī gaṇḍayoḥ kapolayoryatpatramalaṅkaraṇaviśeṣastadeva
latā tasyā ābhyantare madhye udañcantī ūddhavaṃ gacchantī nyañcantī adhogacchantī ca
yā uḍḍīnagatiḥ khagagatikriyāviśeṣastasyā abhyāsabhājinī sādṛśyabhājinī āvṛtti -

taccārulocanakṣetre vicarantau ca khañjanau |
sadaiva śāradīṃ prīti nirviśete nijecchayā || 60 |
sudatyā radanaśreṇī chadeṣu viṣameṣuṇā |
vihitā kāñcanī rekhā kvendāvetāvatī kalā ||| 61 |
prāyo madanabhūpālaharmyaratnāntare śubhe |
jitapravālasucchāye tasyā radanavāsasī || 62 |
svarge matyeṃca pātāle naiṣā rekhā kvacit striyām |
tatkaṇṭhare khātritayavyājena śapate smaraḥ || 63 |
taccārulocanakṣetre tasyāścārulocanayoṃ ! kṣetram upanāsāmūlaṃ tasmistatsamīpa

śaṅke cittabhuvo rājño lasatpaṭakuṭīdvayam |
anarghyaratnakośāḍhyaṃ tasyā vakṣoruhadvayam || 64 |
anaṅgabhū niyamato'dṛśye madhye natabhruvaḥ |
romālīla kṣiṇāmūrdhvāmiva yaṣṭi vidhirvyadhāt || 65 |
tasyā nābhodaroṃ prāpya kandarpo'naṅgatāṃ gataḥ |
punaḥ prāptumivāṅgāni tapyate paramaṃ tapaḥ || 66 ||
guruṇaitannitambena mahāmanmatha dīkṣayā

ūrustambhena caitasyāḥ stambhavat kasya no manaḥ |
tastambhe na munervāpi suvṛttena suvartanam || 68 |
pādāṅguṣṭhanakhajyotiḥ prabhayā kasya na prabhā |
vivekajanitā'dhvaṃsi mune tasyā mṛgīdṛśaḥ || 66 |
sā pratyahaṃ jñānavāpyāṃ snāyaṃ snāyaṃ śivālaye |
saṃmārjanādikarmāṇi kurute'nanyamānasā || 70 ||
tatpādapratibimbeṣu rekhāśaṣpāṃkuraṃ caran |
nānyadvanāntaraṃ yāti kāśyāṃ yūnāṃ manomṛgaḥ || 71 ||
ūrureva stambha ūrustambhaḥ kadalyādirūpastena munermananaśīlasyāpi kasya mano

tadāsyapaṅkajaṃ hitvā yūnāṃ netrālimālayā |
na latāntaramāsevi apyāmodaprasūnayuk || 72 ||
sulocanāpi sā kanyā prekṣetāsyaṃ na kasyacit |
suśravā api sā bālā nādatte kasyacidvacaḥ || 73 | |
suśīlā śīlasampannā rahastadvirahāturaiḥ |
prārthitā'pi surūpāḍhayairnābhilāṣaṃ babandha sā || 74 |
dharnastasthājanetāpi yuvabhiḥ prārthito bahu |
nāśakattāṃ suśīlāṃ sa dātuṃ śīlojitaśriyam || 75 |
jñānodatīrthabhajanāt sā suśīlā kumārikā |
bahirantastadā'drākṣītsarvaṃ liṅgamayaṃ jagat || 76 |

striśo'dhyāyaḥ 27 9
kadācidekadā tāntu prasuptāṃ sadanāṅgaṇe |
mohito rūpasampattyā kaścidvidyādharo'harat || 77 ||
vyomavartmani tāṃ rātrau yāvanmalayaparvatam |
sa ninīṣati tāvacca vidyunmālī samāgataḥ || 78 ||
rākṣaso bhīṣaṇavapuḥ kapāla kṛtakuṇḍalaḥ |
vasārudhiraliptāṅgaḥ śmaśrulaḥ piṅgalocanaḥ || 76 ||
rākṣasa uvāca -
mama dṛggocaraṃ yāto vidyādhara kumāraka |
adya tvāmetayā sādhaṃ preṣayāmi yamālayam || 80 ||
iti śrutvā'tha sā vākyaṃ vyāghrāghrātā mṛgī yathā |
cakampe'tīva saṃbhītā kadalīdalavanmuhuḥ || 81 |

nijaghāna triśūlena rakṣo vidyādharaṃ ca tam |
vidyādharakumāro'pi nitarāṃ madhurākṛtiḥ ||| 82 |
tadbhīṣaṇatriśūlena bhinnorasko mahābalaḥ
jaghāna muṣṭighātena vajrapātopamena tam || 83 ||
naramāṃsavasāmattaṃ vidyunmālinamāhave |
cūrṇito muṣṭipātena so'patadvasudhātale || 84 |
rākṣaso mṛtyuvaśago vajreṇeva mahodharaḥ |
vidyādharo'pi tacchūlaghātena vikalīkṛtaḥ || 85 |
uvāca gadgadaṃ vākyaṃ vighūrṇitavilocanaḥ |
priye mudhā samānītā suśityardhoktimuccaran || 86 |
jahau prāṇān raṇe vīrastāṃ priyāṃ paritaḥ smaran || 87 |
ananyapūrvasaṃsparśasukhaṃ samanubhūya sā |
tameva ca pati matvā cakre śokāgnisāttanum || 88 |

liṅgatrayaśarīriṇyāstasyāḥ sānnidhyataḥ sa hi |
divyaṃ vapuḥ samāsādya rākṣasaḥ tridivaṃ yayau ||| 8 9 |
raṇe paṇīkṛtaprāṇo vidyādharasuto'pi saḥ |
ante priyāṃ smaran prāpa janurmalayaketutaḥ || 9 0 ||
dhyāyantī sā'pi taṃ bālā vidyādharakumārakam |
virahāgnau visṛṣṭāsuḥ karṇāṭe janmabhāgabhūt || 9 1 |
suto malayaketostāṃ kālena pariṇītavān |
mālyaketuranaṅgaśrīḥ pitrā dattāṃ kalāvatom || 9 2 |
sā'pi prāgvāsanāyogālliṅgārcanaratā satī |
hitvā malayayakṣodaṃ vibhūti bahvamaṃsta ve || 9 3 ||
suktāvaidūryamāṇikyapuṣparāgebhya eva sā |
mene rudrākṣa nepathyamanadhyaṃ garbhasundarī || 9 4 |
ananyapūrvapuṃsparśeti kvacit | cakārāddevaṃ ca | śokāgnisācchokāgnau tanuṃ śarīraṃ cakre

kalāvatī mālyaketuṃ pati prāpya pativratā |
apatyatritayaṃ lebhe divyabhogasamṛddhibhāk || 9 5 |
ekadā kaścidaudocyo mālyaketuṃ nareśvaram | |
citrakuccitrapaṭikāṃ citrāṃ darśitavānatha || 9 6 |
tāṃ tu citrapaṭa rājā kalāvatyai samārpayat |
sā'tha citrapaṭoṃ ramyāṃ saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhā || 9 7 |
muhurmuhuḥ prapaśyantī rahasi prāṇadevatām |
visasmāra svamapi ca samādhistheva yoginī || 9 8 |
kṣaṇamunmīlya nayane kṛtvā netrātithi paṭīm |
tarjanyagramathotkṣipya svātmānaṃ samabodhayat || 99 |
saṃbhedo'yamase ramya upalolārkamagrataḥ |
upadhīkeśavapadaṃ varaṇaiṣā saridvarā || 100 |
audīcya uttaradigutpannaḥ || 9 6 ||
prāṇadevatā viśvanāthastaliṅgādhāratvāt paśyati tathā tām | svaṃ deham |

svarge prārthitasaṃsparśā saiṣā svargataraṅgiṇī |
udagvahābhilaṣyanti yāṃ divodyasadaḥ sadā ||| 101 |
alakṣyā mokṣalakṣmīryā vedānte paripaṭhyate |
vimuktaye satāṃ saiṣā śrīmatī maṇikarṇikā || 102 |
maraṇaṃ maṅgalaṃ yatra saphalaṃ yatra jīvitam |
svargastṛṇāyate yatra saiṣā śrīmaṇikarṇikā || 103 ||
yatra sampattisambhārān viśrāṇyanidhanecchyā |
yativrataṃ samālambya tiṣṭhate mūlakandabhuk || 104 ||
svarge prārthitasaṃsparśetyasyā'yaṃ bhāvaḥ | tathāpi kāśyadhikaraṇikāyā udagvahāyā
atiśayitatvena durlabhatvāt svarge prārthitasaṃsparśetyuktamiti | udagvahā uttaravāhinī |

yatra trimārgagāṅgaṃ gāṃ mārgamāṇo mṛtān haraḥ |
svamaulibālacandreṇa muktimāgaṃ pradarśayan || 105 |
saṃsāraṃ yatra durvāraṃ pratārayati śaṅkaraḥ |
mṛtā apyamṛtāyante karṇadhārādyato narāḥ || 106 ||
saṃsārasāra padavī yatra syādadavīyasī |
karṇejapān maheśānāt karuṇāvaruṇālayāt || 107 |
anekabhavasambhūtaprabhūtasukṛtairnarāḥ ,
karṇe japaṃ bhavaṃ yatra labhante te bhavāpaham ||| 108 |
yatra mṛtān prati muktimārgaṃ pradarśayan haro vartata iti śeṣaḥ | kathaṃbhūtaḥ ? svamauli-
bālacandreṇa saha gaṅgāṃ mārgamāṇaḥ | adhikāribhedena sārūpyamuktidānārthaṃ svaśirasthaṃ
durvāraṃ tattvajñānamantareṇāvinaśvaraṃ pratārayati nāśayati | śaṃ kalyāṇaṃ karotīti

svīkṛtya kṣetrasaṃnyāsaṃ yadbalena mahādhiyaḥ |
tṛṇaṃ kṛtāntaṃ manyante seyaṃ śrīmaṇikarṇikā || 10 9 |
tṛṇīkṛtya nijaṃ dehaṃ yatra rājarṣisattamaḥ |
hariścandraḥ sapatnīko vyakrīṇād bhūriyaṃ hi sā || 110 |
abhilaṣyanti yatratyamapi vaikuṇṭhavāsinaḥ |
saikataṃ mṛdulaṃ talpaṃ saiṣā śrīmaṇikarṇikā || 111 ||
anekajanmajanitaka maṃsūtraniyantraṇam
unmucya yatra muktāḥ syuḥ saiṣā śrīmaṇikarṇikā ||| 112 |
satyaloke'pi ye lokāste'rthayanti nirantaram |
yāmaho dorghanidrāyai seyaṃ śrīmaṇikarṇikā || 113 ||

ayaṃ hi sakulastambho yatra śrīkālabhairavaḥ |
kṣetrapāpakṛtaḥ śāsti darśayaṃstīvrayātanām || 114 ||
anyatra vihitaṃ pāpaṃ naśyetkāśīnirīkṣaṇāt |
kāśyāṃ kṛtānāṃ pāpānāṃ dāruṇeyaṃ tu yātanā || 115 |
kapālamocanaṃ tīrthametattadapi pāvanam |
kapālaṃ patitaṃ yatra vidhebhairavapāṇitaḥ || 116 ||
ṛṇatrayādvimucyante yatra snātā narottamāḥ |
tīrthaṃ viśuddhijanakaṃ tadetadṛṇamocanam || 117 ||
praṇavākhyaṃ paraṃ brahma yatra nityaṃ prakāśate |
sa pañcāyatanopeta oṃkāreśo'yamadbhutaḥ || 118 |
kṣetrapāpakṛtaḥ kṣetre pāpakāriṇo manuṣyān | bahiḥ kṛtānāṃ pāpānāṃ kṣetrapraveśa-
mātreṇaivopakṣayāt nanu " || nāvimukte 114 |
naraḥ kaścinnarakaṃ yāti kilbiṣī | īśvarānugṛhītā hi sarve
yānti parāṃ gatim " iti laiṅgokteḥ kathamidaṃ saṅgacchata iti svayamevāśaṅkayāha-

aśva uśca makāraśca nādo binduśca pañcamaḥ |
