pañcātmakaṃ paraṃ brahma yatra nityaṃ prakāśate || 11 9 |
eṣā matsyodaro ramyā yatsnāto mānavottamaḥ |
māturjātadaradarīṃ na viśedeṣa niścayaḥ || 120 |
trilocano'yaṃ bhagavān kuryādeva trilocanam |
nijabhaktaṃ kṛpāyuktastvapi deśāntarasthitam || 121 |
asau kāmeśvaro devo yaḥ kāmān pūrayetsatām |
durvāsā api yatrāpa nijakā mamahodayam || 122 |
svayaṃ līno maheśo'tra bhaktakāmasamṛddhaye |
tasmātsvalanasaṃjñā'sya devadevasya śūlinaḥ || 123 |

vārāṇasyāṃ mahādevo yaḥ purāṇeṣu paṭhyate |
kṣetrābhimānī bhagavāṃstatprāsādo'yamadbhutaḥ || 124 ||
asau skandeśvaro devaḥ śraddhayā yadvilokanāt |
ājanma brahmacaryasya phalamāpnoti mānavaḥ || 125 |
vināyakeśvaraśvāyaṃ sarvasiddhipradāyakaḥ |
yatsevayā praṇaśyanti nṛṇāṃ sarve vināyakāḥ || 126 ||
iyaṃ vārāṇasī devī sākṣānmūrtimayī śubhā |
yasyā vilokanāt puṃsāṃ bhūyo no garbhasambhavaḥ || 127 || |
pārvatīśvara liṅgasya mahadāyatanaṃ tvidam |
yatra nityaṃ maheśāno gauryā saha vimuktidaḥ || 128 ||
eṣa bhṛṅgośvaraḥ śrīmān mahāpātakanāśanaḥ |
jīvanmukto'bhavad bhṛṅgī yasya liṅgasya sevayā || 12 9 |
vināyakā vighnahetavaḥ || 126 |

caturvedeśvaraścaiṣa caturvedadharo vidhiḥ |
labhedyadvīkṣaṇādvipro vedādhyayanajaṃ phalam || 130 |
yajñaḥ saṃsthāpitaṃ caitalliṅgaṃ yajñeśvarābhidham |
yadarcanāllabhenmartyaḥ sarvayāgaphalaṃ mahat || 131 ||
purāṇeśvaranāmaitalliṅgamaṣṭādaśāṅgulam
aṣṭādaśānāṃ vidyānāṃ syādādhāro yadīkṣaṇāt || 132 |
dharmaśāstreśvaraścāyaṃ smṛtibhiśca pratiṣṭhitaḥ |
smṛtyadhyayanajaṃ puṇyaṃ yadvilokanato bhavet || 133 |
sārasvatamidaṃ liṅgaṃ sarvajāḍya vināśakṛt |
sarvatīrtheśvaraṃ liṅgametatsadyo viśuddhidam || 134 ||
caturo vedān dharatīti tathā | caturvaktradhara iti kvacit | vidadhātīti vidhiḥ
aṣṭādaśāṅgulaṃ tiryagūrdhvaṃmaṣṭādaśāṅgulaparimitamityarthaḥ | tadupayogamāhā'-
ṣṭādaśeti || 132 |

śaileśvarasya liṅgasya maṇḍapo'yaṃ mahādbhutaḥ |
sarveṣāṃ ratnajātānāṃ yo birbhāta parāṃ śriyam || 135 |
saptasāgarasaṃjñaṃ vai liṅgametanmanoharam |
yadvīkṣaṇāllabhenmartyaḥ saptābdhisnānajaṃ phalam || 136 |
asau mantreśvaraḥ śrīmān mantrajāpyaphalapradaḥ |
saptakoṭimahāmantraiḥ sthāpito yaḥ purā yuge || 137 ||
tripureśasya liṅgasya puraḥ kuṇḍamidaṃ mahat |
tripuraiḥ khānitaṃ pūrvaṃ tripurāripriyaṃ param || 138 |
idaṃ bāṇeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ sahasrabhujapūjitam | |
dvibhujasyāpi bāṇasya sahasrabhuja hetukam || 136 |
vairocaneśvaraścaiṣa puraḥ prahlādakeśavāt |
balikeśavanāmāsāveṣa nāradakeśavaḥ || 140 ||
birbhāta dhārayati || 135 ||
purā puge satyayuge || 137 |
tripureśasya tripurastheśasyetyarthaḥ | tripurai : tripurasthaiḥ || 138 ||

ādikeśavapūrveṇa tvayamāditya keśavaḥ |
bhīṣma keśavanāmā'sau dattātreyeśvarastvayam || 141 |
dattātreyeśvarātpūrvameṣa ādigadādharaḥ |
bhṛgukeśavanāmāsāveva vāmanakeśavaḥ || 142 |
naranārāyaṇāvetau yajñavārāha keśavaḥ |
vidāranāsiṃho'yaṃ gopīgovinda eṣa ha || 143 ||
eṣa lakṣmīnṛsiṃhasya prāsādo ratnaketanaḥ |
yasya prasādāt prahlādaḥ padamaindramavāptavān || 144 |
akharvasiddhidaḥ puṃsāmeṣa kharvavināyakaḥ |
śeṣamādhavanāmā'sau śeṣeṇa sthāpitaḥ purā || 145 |
yasya bhaktā na dahyante tvapi saṃvartavahninā |
śaṅkhamādhavanāmāsau śaṅkhaṃ hatvā'tra saṃsthitaḥ || 146 ||
ha iti prasiddhī | hoti pāṭhe'pi sa evārthaḥ || 143 ||
kharvavināyakaḥ kharvanāmā gaṇādhipaḥ | tarhi kharvatvātkharvaphalada eva kiṃ netyāha |

idaṃ sārasvataṃ srotaḥ parabrahmarasāyanam |
sarasvatyā mahānadyā saṅgamo yatra gaṅgayā || 147 |
yatrāplutā narā bhūyaḥ sambhavanti na bhūtale |
śrībindumādhavastveṣa sākṣāllakṣmīpatiḥ paraḥ || 148 ||
śraddhayā yaṃ namanmatyoṃ na vasedgarbhaveśmani |
na dāridryamavāpnoti vyādhibhirnā'bhibhūyate || 146 ||
bindumādhavabhakto yastaṃ yamo'pi namasyati |
praṇavātmā ya eko'sti nādabindusvarūpadhṛk ||| 150 | |
amūtaṃ yatparaṃ brahma bindumādhava eva saḥ |
etatpañcanadaṃ tīthaṃ pañcabrahmātmasaṃjñakam || 151 ||
yatra snāto na gṛhṇīyāccharīraṃ pāñcabhautikam |
eṣā sā maṅgalāgaurī kāśyāṃ paramamaṅgalam || 152 |
yatprasādādavāpnoti naro'tra ca paratra ca |
mayūkhādityasaṃjño'yaṃ raśmimālī tamopahaḥ || 153 |

gabhastośo mahāliṅgametaddivyamahaḥ pradam |
mṛkaṇḍusūnunāpyatra tapastaptaṃ purā mahat || 154 |
liṅgaṃ saṃsthāpya paramaṃ svanāmnāyuḥpradaṃ param |
kiraṇeśvaranāmaitalliṅga trailokyaviśrutam || 155 ||
sakṛśatamidaṃ lokaṃ nayetkiraṇamālinaḥ |
dhautapāpeśvaraṃ liṅgametatpātakadhāvanam || 156 ||
nirvāṇanarasiṃho'yaṃ bhaktanirvāṇakāraṇam |
maṇipradīpanāgo'yaṃ mahāmaṇivibhūṣaṇaḥ || 157 |
yadarcanānnaro jātu na nāgaiḥ paribhūyate |
kapileśamidaṃ liṅgaṃ kapilena pratiṣṭhitam ||158 |
mucyate kapayo'pyasya darśanātkimu mānavāḥ |
priyavrateśvaraṃ liṅga mahadetatprakāśate || 156 |
yasyā'rcanālla bhejjantuḥ priyatvaṃ sarvajantuṣu |
idamāyatanaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ maṇimāṇikyanirmitam || 160 |
gabhastīśa iti puṃstvamārṣam | divyamahaḥ svaprakāśaṃ jyotistatpradam | mṛkaṇḍu-
sūnunā mārkaṇḍeyena || 154 |

śrīmataḥ kālarājasya kalikālātihāriṇaḥ |
nijabhaktaṃ janaṃ pāti yaḥ pāpātpāpabhakṣaṇaḥ || 161 |
kṣetravighnakarān pāpān ghātayanyātanāśataiḥ |
iyaṃ mandākinī ramyā tapastastumihāgatā || 162 |
kāśovāsasukhaṃ prāpya nā s dyā'pi divamohate |
snātvā'tra santarpya pitṝn śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ || 163 |
naro na narakaṃ paśyedapi duṣkṛtakarmakṛt | |
yāni kāni ca liṅgāni kāśyāṃ santi sahasraśaḥ || 164 |
ratnabhūtamidaṃ teṣu liṅgaṃ ratneśvarā'bhidham |
ratneśvaraprasādena bhuktvā ratnānyanekaśaḥ || 165 |

viśveśvarāvimuktau ca dvāvetau dakṣiṇau karau |
dharmeśa maṇikarṇeśau dvau karau dakṣiṇetarau || 166 ||
kāleśvarakapardīśau caraṇāvatinirmalau |
jyeṣṭheśvaro nitambaśva nābhirvai madhyameśvaraḥ || 170 |
kapardo'sya mahādevaḥ śirobhūṣā śrutīśvaraḥ |
candreśo hṛdayaṃ tasya ātmā vīreśvaraḥ paraḥ || 171 ||
liṅga tasya tu kedāraḥ śukraṃ śukreśvaraṃ viduḥ |
anyāni yāni liṅgāni paraḥ koṭiśatāni ca || 172 ||
jñeyāni nakhalomāni vapuṣo bhūṣaṇānyapi |
yāvetau dakṣiṇau hastau nityanirvāṇadau hi tau || 173 |
jantūnāmabhayaṃ dattvā patatāṃ mohasāgare |
iyaṃ durgā bhagavatī pitṛliṅgamidaṃ pitṛliṅgamidaṃ param || 174 |
dharmeśa maṇikarṇeśāvityatrā'ntimapade ṭābantatvamārṣam || 16 9 |
ātmā'haṅkāraḥ || 171 |
koṭiśatebhyaḥ parāṇi paraḥ koṭiśatāni anantānotyarthaḥ || 172 |
yāveto viśveśvarā'vimukteśvarāvityuktā'nuvādo'nyatpraṣṭum | tadevāha | nityeti

iyaṃ hi citraghaṇṭeśī ghaṇṭākarṇahradastvayam |
iyaṃ sā lalitāgaurī viśālākṣīmadbhutā || 175 |
āśāvināyakastveṣa dharmakūpo'yamadbhutaḥ |
yatra piṇḍānnaro dattvā pitṛn brahmapadaṃ nayet || 176 |
eṣā viśvabhujā devī viśvaikajananī parā |
asau vandī mahādevī nityaṃ trailokyavanditā || 177 |
nigaḍasthānapi janān pāśānmocayati smṛtā |
daśāśvamedhikaṃ tīrthametat trailokyavanditam || 178 ||
yatrāhutitrayeṇā'pi agnihotraphalaṃ labhet |
prayāgākhyamidaṃ srotaḥ sarvatīrthottamottamam || 176 |
aśokākhyamidaṃ tīrthaṃ gaṅgākeśava eṣa vai |
mokṣadvāramidaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ svargadvāramidaṃ viduḥ || 180 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe jñānavāpovarṇanaṃ nāma trayastriśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 33 ||
īśī īśvarī citraghaṇṭā cāsāvīśī cetyekaṃ padaṃ vā || 175 |
viśvabhujā viśvabāhukā bandī nāmnā || 177 |
srotastīrthaṃ gaṅgāyāṃ pravāharūpaṃ vā || 17 9 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ trayastriśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 33 ||

atha catustriśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca- -
punardadarśa tanvatī citrapaṭayāṃ ghaṭodbhava |
svargadvārātpurobhāge śrīmatīṃ śrīmatīṃ maṇikaṇikām || 1 |
saṃsārasarpadaṣṭānāṃ jantūnāṃ yatra śaṅkaraḥ |
apasavyena hastena brūte brahma spṛśan śrutim || 2 ||
na kāpilena yogena na sāṃkhyena na ca vrataiḥ |
yā gatiḥ prāpyate puṃbhistāṃ dadyānmokṣabhūriyam || 3 ||
vaikuṇṭhe viṣṇubhavane viṣṇubhaktiparāyaṇāḥ |
japeyuḥ satataṃ muktyai śrīmatīṃ maṇikarṇikām || 4 ||
catustriśattame'dhyāye sarvapāpai kahārake |
jñānavāpīpraśaṃsā ca vaṇyate'maradurlabhā || 1 ||
punariti jñānavāpyāḥ praśaṃsāṃ vaktuṃ punarapi citrapaṭīdarśanameva prastāvayati |
maṇikarṇikāyā ādhikyadyotanārthaṃ punaḥ praśaṃsāmāha | saṃsāretyādinā |

hutvā'gnihotramapi ca yāvajjīvaṃ dvijottamāḥ |
ante śrayante muktyai yāṃ seyaṃ śrīmaṇikarṇikā || 5 |
vedān paṭhitvā vidhivad brahmayajñaratā bhuvi |
yāṃ śrayanti dvijā muktyai seyaṃ śrīmaṇikarṇikā || 6 |
iṣṭvā kratūnapi nṛpā bahūn paryāptadakṣiṇān |
śrayante śreyase dhanyāḥ prānte'dhimaṇikarṇikam || 7 |
sīmantinyo'pi satataṃ pativrataparāyaṇāḥ |
suktyai patimanuvrajya śrayanti maṇikarṇikām || 8 |
vaiśyā api ca sevante nyāyopārjitasampadaḥ |
dhanāni sādhu sātkṛtvā prānte śrīmaṇikarṇikām || 6 ||
tyaktvā putrakalatrādi sacchūdrā nyāyamārgagāḥ |
nirvāṇaprāptaye caināṃ bhajeyurmaṇikarṇikām || 10 ||
brahmayajñaratā jñānayajñaratāḥ | ata eva śaṅkarācāryaprabhṛtīnāṃ maṇikarṇyāśrayaṇaṃ

yāvajjīvaṃ caranto'pi brahmacayaṃ jitendriyāḥ |
niḥśreyase śrayantyenāṃ śrīmatīṃ maṇikarṇikām || 11 ||
atithīnapi santarpya pañcayajñaratā api |
gṛhasthāśramiṇo nemāṃ tyajeyurmaṇikarṇikām || 12 |
vānaprasthāśramayujo jñātvā nirvāṇasādhanam |
sanniyamyendriyagrāmaṃ maṇikarṇīmupāsate || 13 |
ananyasādhanāṃ mukti jñātvā śāstrairanekadhā |
mumukṣubhistvekadaṇḍaiḥ sevyate maṇikarṇikām || 14 ||
daṇḍayitvā mano vācaṃ kāyaṃ nityaṃ tridaṇḍinaḥ |
naiḥśreyasīṃ śriyaṃ prāptuṃ śrayante maṇikarṇikām || 15 ||
devayajña pitṛyajña manuṣyayajñabhūtayajñabrahmayajñā iti pañcayajñāḥ | tyajeyuḥ

saṃnyastā'khilakarmāṇo daṇḍayitvā calaṃ manaḥ |
ekadaṇḍavratā suktyai bhajeyurmaṇikarṇikām || 16 ||
śikhī muṇḍī jaṭo vā'pi kaupīnī vā digambaraḥ |

yathoktamācaredeko niṣṭhāpāśupataṃ vratam |
nirantaraṃ smaredeko hṛdyenāṃ maṇikarṇikām || 21 ||
dṛṣṭā'tra vapuṣaḥ pāte dvayośca sadṛśī gatiḥ |
tasmātsarvaṃ vihāyāśu sevyaiṣā maṇikarṇikā || 22 ||
svargadvāre viśeyurye vigāhya maṇikarṇikām |
teṣāṃ vidhūtapāpānāṃ kvāpi svargo na dūrataḥ || 23 ||
svargadvāḥ svargabhūrekhā mokṣabhūrmaṇikarṇikā |
svargāpavargāvatraiva nopariṣṭānna cāpyadhaḥ || 24 |
datvā dānānyanekāni vigāhya maṇikarṇikām |
svargadvāraṃ praviṣṭā ye na te nirayagāminaḥ || 25 |
yathoktamiti sārdhaṃ vākyam | niṣṭhā tātparyaṃ tatpūrvakaṃ pāśupatavrataṃ niyamam |
kīdṛśam ? yathoktaṃ sanatkumārasaṃhitāyāṃ yathāvatproktaṃ vibhūtibhistripuṇḍradhāraṇādirūpa -
meka ācadanutiṣṭhet , eko nirantaraṃ hṛdyenāṃ maṇikaṇikāṃ smarettayordvayoratra maṇikaya
vapuṣaḥ pāte sadṛśī gatirdṛṣṭetyarthaḥ || 21 ||

svargāpavargayorarthaḥ ' kovidaiśva nirūpitaḥ |
svargaḥ sukhaṃ samuddiṣṭamapavargo mahāsukham || 26 ||
maṇikarṇyapaviṣṭasya yatsukhaṃ jāyate sataḥ |
siṃhāsanopaviṣṭasya tatsukhaṃ kva śatakratoḥ || 27 ||
mahāsukhaṃ yaduddiṣṭaṃ samādhau vismṛtātmanām |
śrīmatyāṃ maṇikarṇya tatsahajenaiva jāyate || 28 |
svargadvārātpurobhāge devanadyāśva paścime |
saubhāgyabhāgyaikanidhiḥ kācidekā mahāsthalī || 26 ||
yāvanto bhāsvataḥ sparśād bhāsante saikatāḥ kaṇāḥ |
tāvanto druhiṇā jagmurnetyeṣā maṇikarṇikā || 30 ||
sukhaṃ taddadātīti tathā | atraivetyasyāyaṃ bhāvaḥ | atraiva svargamokṣa prāpyā'pi tatprāptye
mūḍhā anyatra yāntyatra kasmānnāyāntītyanukrośati bhagavān kārtikeya iti || 24-25 |
svargāpavargāvatraiveti svānubhavena darśayituṃ svargāpavargayorarthamāha | svargā-
pavargayoriti || 26 ||
brahmanālikāyā maṇikarṇikāyācihnamāha | svargadvārāditi |
bhāgyamaiśvaryādiṣāḍguṇyaṃ tayorekanidhirmukhya āśrayaḥ kācidaparimeyaguṇagahanā | ekā

santi tīrthāni tāvanti parito maṇikarṇikām |
yāvadbhistilamātrāpi na na bhūmiviralīkṛtā || 31 ||
yadanvaye ko'pi muktaḥ samprāpya maṇikarṇikām |
tadvaṃśyāstatprabhāveṇa mānyāḥ svagauṃ kasāmapi || 32 |
tarpitāḥ pitaro yena samprāpya maṇikarṇikām |
sapta sapta tathā sapta pūrvajāstena tāritāḥ || 33 ||
āmadhyāddevasarita āhariścandramaṇḍapāt |
āgaṅgākeśavādā ca svargadvārānmaṇikarṇikā || 34 ||
etadrajaḥ kaṇatulāṃ trilokyapi na gacchati |
etatprāptyaṃ prayatate trilokastho'khilo bhavī || 35 |

kalāvatī citrapaṭoṃ paśyantītthaṃ muhurmuhuḥ |
jñānavāpīṃ dadarśātha śrīviśveśvaradakṣiṇe || 36 ||
yadambu satataṃ rakṣedurvṛttāddaṇḍanāyakaḥ |
sambhramo viśramaśvāsau ' dattvā bhrānti garīyasīm || 37 ||
yo'ṣṭamūrti mahādevaḥ purāṇe paripaṭhyate |
tasyaiṣāmbumayī mūrtirjñānadā jñānavāpikā || 38 |
netrayoratithīkṛtya jñānavāpa kalāvatī |
kadamba kusumākārāṃ babhāra kṣaṇatastanum || 36 |
aṅgāni vepathaṃ prāpuḥ svinnā bhālasthalī bhṛśam |
harṣavāṣpāmbukalile jāte tasya vilocane || 40 |
tastambha gātralatikā mukhaṃ vaivarṇyamāpa ca |
svaro'tha gadgado jāto vyabhraṃśattatkarātpaṭī ||| 41 |

sā kṣaṇaṃ svaṃ visasmāra kā'haṃ kvā'haṃ na vetti ca |
saughuptāyāṃ daśāyāṃ ca paramātmeva niścalā || 42 ||
atha tatparicāriṇyastvaramāṇā itastataḥ |
kiṃ kiṃ kimetadetatka pṛcchanti sma parasparam || 43 ||
tadavasthāṃ samālokya tāṃ tāścaturacetasaḥ |
vijñāya sāttvikairbhāvairidamūcuḥ parasparam || 44 ||
bhavāntare premapātrametayaikṣi tu tu kiñcana | |
cirāttena ca saṅgatya sukhamūrcchāmavāpa ha || 45 |
atha netthaṃ kathamiyamakāṇḍātparya mūmuhat |
prekṣamāṇā rahaścitrapaṭīmatipaṭīyasīm || 46 ||

tanmohasya nidānaṃ tāḥ samyageva vicārya ca |
upacerurmahāśāntaṃ rupacārairanākulam || 47 ||
kācittāṃ vījayāñcakre kadalītālavṛntakaiḥ |
bisinīvalayairanyā dhanyāṃ tāṃ paryabhūṣayat || 48 ||
amandaiśvandanarasairabhyaṣiñcadamuṃ purā |
aśokapallavairasyāḥ kācicchokamanīnaśat || 46 ||
dhārāmaṇḍapadhārāmbusokaraistattanūlatām
iṣṭārthavirahaglānāṃ siñcayāmāsa kācana || 50 |
jalārdravāsasā kācidetasyāstanumāvṛṇot |
karpūrakṣovajālepairanyāstāmabhvalepayan || 51 ||
tanmohasyanidānaṃ sa cāso mohaśca tasyāṃ vā mohastanmohastasya kāraṇam |
upacaryate ebhirityupacārā vyajanādayastairanākulamanābādhaṃ yathā syāttathā upacerurupa -

padminīdalaśayyāṃ ca kācid vyaracayanmṛdum |
kācitkuliśanepathyaṃ dūrīkṛtya tadaṅgataḥ || 52 |
muktākalāpaṃ racayāñcakre vakṣojamaṇḍale |
kācicchaśimukhī tāṃ tu candrakāntaśilātale || 53 ||
svāpayāmāsa tanvaṅkṣoṃ sravacchītāmbuśītale |
dṛṣṭvāpacāryamāṇāṃ tāmitthaṃ buddhiśarīriṇī || 54 ||
atitāpaparītāṅgī tāḥ sakhīḥ pratyabhāṣata |
etasyāstāpaśāntyarthaṃ jāne'haṃ paramauṣadham || 55 ||
upacārānimān sarvān dūrīkuruta māciram |
apatāpāṃ karomyenāṃ sadyaḥ paśyata kautukam || 56 |
dṛṣṭvā citrapaṭīmeṣā sadyo vihvalatāmagāt |
atraiva kācidetasyāḥ premabhūrasti niścitam || 57 ||
ataścitrapaṭīsparśāt paritāpaṃ vihāsyati |
vākyābuddhiśarīriṇyāstatastatparicārikāḥ || 58 |
kuliśanepathyaṃ vajrālaṅkaraṇam || 52 ||
buddhiyuktaṃ śarīraṃ vartate yasyāḥ sā buddhiśarīriṇīti sānvayā saṃjñā || 54 ||

nidhāya tatpuraḥ procuḥ paṭoṃ paśya kalāvati |
tavānandakarī yatra kācidastīṣṭadevatā || 56 |
sā'pīṣṭadevatānāmnā tatpaṭīdarśanena ca |
sudhāsekamiva prāpya mūccha hitvotthitā drutam || 60 |
avagrahaparimlānā varṣāsārairivauṣadhīḥ |
punarālokayāñcakne jñānadāṃ jñānavāpikām || 61 |
spṛṣṭvā kalāvatī tāṃ tu vāpīṃ citragatāmapi |
lebhe bhavāntarajñānaṃ yathāsīt pūrvajanmani || 62 ||
punarvicārayāñcakre vāpomāhātmyamuttamam |
aho citragatā'pīyaṃ saṃspṛṣṭā jñānavāpikā || 63 |
jñānaṃ me janayāmāsa bhavāntarasamudbhavam |
atha tāsāṃ puro hṛṣṭā kathayāmāsa sundarī || 64 ||
nijaṃ prāgbhavavṛttāntaṃ jñānavāpīprabhāvajam |
kalāvatyuvāca—
etasmājjanmanaḥ pūrvamahaṃ brāhmaṇakanyakā || 65 |
avagraheṇa vṛṣṭipratighātena sūryatāpeneti yāvat | parimlānā īṣacchuṣkā | |
oṣadhīroṣadhyaḥ || 61 ||

upaviśveśvaraṃ kāśyāṃ jñānavāpyāṃ rame mudā |
janako me harisvāmī janayitrī priyaṃvadā || 66 ||
ākhyā mama suśīleti māṃ ca vidyādharo'harat |
madhyemāgaṃ niśīthe'tha tadopamalayācalam ||| 67 |
rakṣasā saha hato vīro rākṣasaṃ sa jaghāna ha |
rakṣo'pi muktaṃ śāpāttu divyaṃ vapuravāpa ha || 68 |
avāpa janma gandharvastvasau malayaketutaḥ |
karṇāṭanṛpateḥ kanyā babhūvā'haṃ kalāvatī || 66 ||
iti jñānaṃ mamodbhūtaṃ jñānavāpīkṣaṇātkṣaṇāt |
iti tasyā vacaḥ śrutvā sā'pi buddhiśarīriṇī || 70 |
tāśca tatparicāriṇyaḥ prahṛṣṭāsyāstadā'bhavan |
procustāṃ praṇipatyā'tha puṇyaśīlāṃ kalāvatīm || 71 ||
aho kathaṃ hi sā labhyā yatprabhāvo'yamodṛśaḥ |
dhigjanma teṣāṃ martye'smin yeneṃkṣi jñānavāpikā || 72 ||
upaviśveśvaraṃ viśveśvarasamīpe || 66 |
madhyemāgaṃ mārgasya madhye | upamalayācalaṃ malayācalasamīpe || 67 ||

kalāvati namastubhyaṃ kuru no'pi samīhitam |
jani saphalayāsmākaṃ naya naḥ prārthyaṃ bhūpatim || 73 ||
ayaṃ ca niyamo s smākamadyārabhya kalāvati |
nirvekṣyāmo mahābhogān dṛṣṭvā tāṃ jñānavāpikām || 74 ||
avaśyaṃ jñānavāpī sā nāmnā bhavitumarhati |
citraṃ citragatā'pīha yā tava jñānadāyinī || 75 |
oṃ kṛtya tāsāṃ vākyaṃ sā svākāraṃ parigopya ca |
priyāṇi kṛtvā bhūbhartuḥ prastāvajñā vyajijñapat || 76 ||
kalāvatyuvāca-
jīviteśa na me tvattaḥ kiñcit priyataraṃ kvacit |
tvāmāsādya pati rājan prāptāḥ sarve manorathāḥ || 77 |
nirvekṣyāmo'titarāṃ prāpsyāmaḥ | mahābhogāditi pāṭhe nirvekṣyāmo nirviṇṇā
sā bhaktebhyo jñānamupyate dīyate'nayeti jñānavāpīnāmnā yathārthākhyā bhavitu-
marhatītyarthaḥ || 75 ||
oṃ kṛtya svīkṛtya svākāraṃ paṭīdarśanena sāttvikabhāvena vivaśaṃ śarīraṃ parigopyā-
cchādya pūrvavat kṛtvetyarthaḥ | vyajijñapad vijñāpayāmāsa || 76 |

eko manorathaḥ prārthyo mamā'styatrāryaputraka |
vicārapathamāpannastavā'pi sa mahāhitaḥ || 78 ||
mama tu tvadadhīnāyāḥ suduṣprāpataro mahān |
tava svādhīnavṛttestu siddhaprāyo manorathaḥ || 76 ||
prāṇeśa ki bahūktena yadi prāṇaiḥ prayojanam | |
tadā'bhilaṣitaṃ dehi prāṇā yāsyantyathā'nyathā || 80 ||
prāṇebhyo'pi garīyasyāstasyā vākyaṃ niśamya saḥ |
uvāca vacanaṃ rājā tasyāḥ svasyā'pi ca priyam || 81 |
rājovāca-
nā'haṃ priye tavādeyamiha paśyāmi bhāmini |
prāṇā api mama krītāstvayā śīlakalāguṇaiḥ || 82 ||
āpannaḥ prāptaḥ || 78 |
anyathā'bhilaṣitasyādāne'thā'nantarameva prāṇā yāsyantītyanvayaḥ | me'nyatheti
kvacit || 80 ||
garīvasyā adhikāyāḥ ||| 81 |
śīlaṃ satsvabhāvaḥ , phalāścatuḥṣaṣṭividhāḥ | guṇāḥ pātivratyādyāḥ , taiḥ || 82 |

avilambitamācakṣva kṛtaṃ viddhi kalāvati |
bhavadvidhānāṃ sādhvīnāṃ manye'prāpyaṃ na kiñcana || 83 ||

kalāvatyuvāca-
nātha prajāsṛjā pūrva sṛṣṭā nānāvidhāḥ prajāḥ |
prajāhitāya saṃsṛṣṭaṃ puruṣārthacatuṣṭayam || 88 |
tadvihīnā janirapi jalabudbudavanmudhā |
tasmādeko'pi saṃsādhyaḥ paratreha ca śarmaṇe | 8 9 |
yatrā'nukūlyaṃ dampatyostrivargastatra vardhate |
yaducyate purā vidbhiriti tattathyamīkṣitam || 9 0 ||
madidhānāṃ tu dāsīnāṃ śataṃ te'stīha mandire |
tathāpi nitarāṃ prema svāmino mayi dṛśyate || 9 1 ||
tava dāsyapi bhogāḍhyā kimutāṃkasthalī carī |
tatrāpyananyasampattistatra svādhīnabhartatā || 9 2 ||
vipaścit saṃcayedarthāniṣṭāpūrtaya karmaṇe |
tapo'rthamāyunirvighnaṃ dārāṃścāpatyalabdhaye || 9 3 |

tavaitatsarvamastīha viśveśānugrahātpraya |
pūraṇīyo'bhilāṣo me yadi tadvacamyahaṃ śṛṇu || 9 4 |
tūrṇaṃ prahiṇu māṃ nātha viśvanāthapurīṃ prati |
prāṇāḥ prayātāḥ prāgeva vapuḥśeṣā'smi kevalam || 9 5 |
mālyaketuḥ kalāvatyā ityākarṇya vacaḥ sphuṭam |
kṣaṇaṃ vicārya svahṛdi rājā provāca tāṃ priyām || 9 6 |
priye kalāvati yadi tava gantavyameva hi |
rājyalakṣmyā s nayā kiṃ me calayā tvadvihīnayā || 9 7 |
na rājyaṃ rājyamityāhū rājyaśrīḥ preyasī dhruvam |
saptāṅgamapi tadrājyaṃ tayā honaṃ tṛṇāyate || 9 8 | |
niḥsapatnaṃ kṛtaṃ rājyaṃ bhuktvā bhogānnirantaram |
hṛṣīkārthāḥ kṛtārthāśca vidhṛtā ādhṛtiḥ priye || 99 |
prahiṇu prasthāpaya || 9 5 |

apatyānyapi jātāni ki kartavyamihā'sti me |
avaśyameva gantavyā ss vābhyāṃ vārāṇasīpurī || 100 |
mālyaketuḥ priyāmityamāśvāsya kṛtaniścayaḥ |
samāhūya ca daivajñān prakṛtīḥ paripūjya ca || 101 ||
putre rājyaṃ nidhāyā'tha rājā kāśīṃ pratasthivān
ratnajātaṃ kiyadapi putrādarthaṃ pragṛhya ca || 102 ||
dṛṣṭvā viśveśvarapurīṃ hṛṣṭaromā nareśvaraḥ |
mene kṛtārthamātmānaṃ saṃsārāmbudhipāragam || 103 ||
prāgjanmavāsanāyogāt sā'pi rājñī kalāvatī |
grāmāntarādāgateva purīmārgānavaitsvayam || 104 ||
maṇikarṇyāmatha snātvā bhūri dattvā tato vasu |
viśveśamarcayitvā'tha ratnajātairanakeśaḥ || 105 ||
bahuvacanena pariṇamayya pūrvakriyayā sambandhaḥ | jātā iti śeṣa iti vā | bhuktā bhogā-
stvayā saheti kvacit | ādhṛtirā samantāddheyaṃ viśeṣeṇa dhṛtā vighṛtetyarthaḥ || 99 -100 |
prakṛtīḥ pauraśreṇīḥ || 101 ||
putrādratnajātamarthaṃ pragṛhyeti sambandhaḥ | putradattamiti pāṭhe spaṣṭa evārthaḥ || 102 |
avait jñātavatī ||| 104 |

dattvā tatrāpi ratnāni gajānaśvān gavāṃ vrajam |
dukūlāni vicitrāṇi pūjopakaraṇāni ca || 106 |
suvarṇarūpyakalaśān dīpodarpaṇacāmarān |
dhvajastambhapatākāśca vicitrollocakāni ca || 107 |
atha pradakṣiṇīkṛtya muktimaṇḍapamāviśat |
tatra dharmakathāṃ śrutvā dattvā tatrāpi saddhanam ||| 108 |
sāyantanīṃ mahāpūjāṃ punaḥ kṛtvā kṣitīśvaraḥ |
tatra jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā tauryatrikamahotsavaiḥ || 106 |
atha prātaḥ samutthāya kṛtvā śaucācamakriyām |
rājñā vinirdiṣṭapathā jñānavāpīṃ nṛpo yayau ||| 110 |
nṛpaḥ sādhaṃ kalāvatyā tatra sasnau prahṛṣṭavat |
atha piṇḍān sa nirvāpya santarpya śraddhayā pitṝn || 111 ||
tatra rūpya suvarṇādi pātrebhyaḥ pratipādya ca |
dīnāndhakṛpaṇānāthān mahārhai ratnajātakaiḥ || 112 ||
vrajaṃ samūham , dukūlāni paṭṭavastrāṇi ||| 106 |
dīpo'syā'stīti dopī dīpādhārayaṣṭirityarthaḥ | dīpyādīnāṃ trayāṇāṃ dvandvaḥ |

prīṇayitvā narapatiḥ pāraṇāṃ kṛtavāṃstataḥ |
saṃskāryaratnasopānairjñānavāpīṃ kalāvatī || 113 ||
ābabandha ratiṃ tatra saha bhartrā tapasvinī |
ekāntaropavāsaiśca kadācicca tryahovrateḥ || 114 |
baḍaho bhojanaiśvāpi pakṣārdhaniyamairatha |
pakṣāntaropavāsaiśca māsopavasanādibhiḥ || 115 |
cāndrāyaṇavrataiḥ kṛcchreḥ bhartuḥ śuśrūṣaṇairapi | |
nināya kṣaṇavatkālamāyuḥśeṣasya sā'naghā || 116 ||
ekadā jñānavāpyāntu prātaḥ snātvopaviṣṭayoḥ |
āgatya jaṭilaḥ kaśvidvibhūti dattavān kare || 117 |
uvāca ca prasannāsya āśībhirabhinandya ca |
uttiṣṭhataṃ prakurutaṃ mahānepathyamadya vai || 118 ||
tārakodaya samprāptirbhavitrī vāṃ kṣaṇādiha |
yāvaditthaṃ samācaṣṭa jaṭilo'gre tayorvacaḥ || 116 ||
tāvadvimānamāpannaṃ sakvaṇatkiṅkiṇīgaṇam |
paśyatāṃ sarvalokānāṃ candramauliratho rathāt || 120 |
mahānepathyaṃ mahadalaṅkaraṇam || 118 |
kvaṇatā śabdavatā kiṅkiṇīgaṇena sahitaṃ sakvaṇatkiṅkiṇīgaṇam | prakvaṇaṭika-
ṅkiṇīgaṇamiti kvacit || 120 |

uttīryaṃ tacchrutipuṭe kimapi svayamādiśat |
anākhyaṃ yatparaṃ jyotiruccakrāma ca tatkṣaṇāt || 121 ||
udyotayannabhovartma devo'pi svālayaṃ yayau |
skanda uvāca -
tadā prabhṛti loke'tra jñānavāpī viśiṣyate || 122 |
sarvebhyastīrthamukhyebhyaḥ pratyakṣajñānadā sune |
sarvajñānamayī caiṣā sarvaliṅgamayī śubhā ||| 123 |
sākṣācchivamayī mūrtirjñānakṛjjñānavāpikā |
santi tīrthānyanekāni sadyaḥ śucikarāṇyapi || 124 ||
parantu jñānavānyā hi kalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm |
jñānavāpyāḥ samutpatti yaḥ śroṣyati samāhitaḥ |
na tasya jñānavibhraṃśo maraṇe jāyate kvacit || 125 |
uttīryā'vatīrya kimapi vāṅmanasayoragocaraṃ yad brahmātmaikatvaṃ tadādiśadupadiṣṭa-
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ catustriśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 34 ||

mahākhyānamidaṃ puṇyaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam |
mahādevasya gauryāśva mahāprītivivardhanam || 126 |
paṭhitvā pāṭhayitvā vā śrutvā vā śraddhayānvitaḥ |
jñānavāpyāḥ śubhākhyānaṃ śivaloke mahīyate || 127 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe jñānavāpī praśaṃsanaṃ nāma
catustriśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 34 ||

atha pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
kumbhayoniruvāca-
avimuktaṃ mahākṣetraṃ paraṃ nirvāṇakāraṇam |
kṣetrāṇāṃ paramaṃ kṣetraṃ maṅgalānāñca maṅgalam || 1 ||
śmaśānānāṃ ca sarveṣāṃ śmaśānaṃ paramaṃ mahat |
pīṭhānāṃ paramaṃ paramaṃ pīṭhamūṣarāṇāṃ pīṭhasūṣarāṇāṃ mahoṣaṇam || 2 |
dharmābhilāṣibuddhīnāṃ dharmarāśikaraṃ param |
arthāthanāṃ śikhiratha paramārthaprakāśakam || 3 ||
kāmināṃ kāmajananaṃ mumukṣūṇāṃ ca mokṣadam |
śrūyate yatra yatraitattatra tatra parāmṛtam || 4 ||
pañcatriṃśattame'dhyāye sadācāro nirūpyate |
sāmānyena caturvarṇāśramāṇāṃ ca viśeṣataḥ || 1 ||
jñānavāpyāḥ kathāśravaṇajanitānandakadambenātyotsukyāduktānuvādapūrvaṃ kamavimuktaṃ
stutvā'vimuktaprāpakaṃ sadācāraṃ pṛcchati | avimuktamityādinā || 1 |
śikhiratha mayūravāhana || 3 |
yatra yatra tvayā kathyamāne ākhyāne | etadavimuktam || 4 |
( sadācāra - nirūpaṇa )
agastya kahane lage-

kṣetraikadeśavartinyā jñānavāpyāḥ kathāṃ param |
śrutvemāmiti manye'haṃ gaurīhṛdayanandana || 5 |
aṇupramāṇamapi yā madhye kāśivikāsinī |
mahī mahīyasī jñeyā sā siddhayai na mudhā kvacit || 6 ||
kiyanti santi tīrthāni neha kṣoṇītale'khile |
paraṃ kāśī rajomātratulāsāmyaṃ kva teṣvapi || 7 |
kiyantyo na sravantyo'tra ratnākaramudāvahāḥ |

kathameṣā trayī skanda prāpyate niyataṃ naraḥ | |
tiṣye yuge viśeṣeṇa nitarāṃ cañcalendriyaiḥ || 11 ||
tapastādṛk kva vā tiṣye tiṣye yogaḥ kva tādṛśaḥ |
kva vā vrataṃ kva vā dānaṃ tiṣye mokṣastvataḥ kutaḥ || 12 ||
vinā'pi tapasā skanda vinā yogena ṣaṇmukha |
vinā vratavinā dānaiḥ kāśyāṃ mokṣastvayeritaḥ || 13 ||
kiṃ kimācaratā skanda kāśī prāpyeta tad vada |
manye vinā sadācāraṃ na siddhayeyurmanorathāḥ || 14 ||
ācāraḥ paramo dharma ācāraḥ paramaṃ tapaḥ |
ācārād vardhate hyāyurācārātpāpasaṃkṣayaḥ || 15 |
trayāṇāṃ gaṅgāviśveśvarakāśīnāṃ samāhārastrayo | niyatamavaśyaṃ yathā
syāttathetyarthaḥ || 11 |
svataḥ tu eva ata eva mokṣaḥ kutaḥ | tapa āderabhāvāt sattvaśuddhayabhāvā-
dityarthaḥ || 12 ||
tarhi kalī tapa āderabhāvānmokṣo nāstyeva kiṃ netyāha | vinā'pīti || 13 ||
ataḥ kāśīprāptyupāyaṃ vadeti pṛcchati | kiṃ kimiti | tatra tāvanmanoratha-
mātrāṇāṃ sadācāraprāpyatvāttatstutipūrvakaṃ sadācārameva prathamaṃ vadetyāha | magya iti
sārdhadvābhyām || 14 ||

ācārameva prathamaṃ tasmādācakṣva ṣaṇmukha |
devadevo yathā prāha tavā'gre tvaṃ tathā vada || 16 ||
skanda uvāca -
mitrāvaruṇajā''khyāmi sadācāraṃ satāṃ hitam |
yadācarannaro nityaṃ sarvān kāmānavāpnuyāt || 17 ||
sthāvarāḥ kṛmayo'bjāśca pakṣiṇaḥ paśavo narāḥ |
krameṇa dhārmikāstvete etebhyo dharmikāḥ surāḥ || 18 ||
eka mukhatvādanyairetadvaktuṃ na śakyamiti dyotayan sambodhayati | ṣaṇmukheti | na ca
svayamūhitvā saṃkṣepeṇa vā kathanīyamityāha | devadeva iti || 16 ||
sadācāraṃ vaktuṃ pratijānīte | mitrāvaruṇajeti | devaputratvāttave vetacchravaṇe'-
dhikāra iti dyotayan sambodhayati | mitreti | sadācāraṃ śiṣṭācāraṃ satāṃ sādhūnāṃ hitaṃ

sahasrabhāgaḥ prathamād dvitīyo'nukramāttathā |
sarva ete mahābhāgā yāvanmuktisamāśrayāḥ || 16 ||
caturṇāmapi bhūtānāṃ prāṇino'tīva cottamāḥ |
prāṇibhyo'pi sune śreṣṭhāḥ sarve buddhayupajīvinaḥ || 20 ||
matimadbhyo narāḥ śreṣṭhāstebhyaḥ śreṣṭhāstu vāḍavāḥ |
viprebhyo'pi ca vidvāṃso vidvadbhyaḥ kṛtabuddhayaḥ || 21 |
viśeṣastvamīṣāmuttarottaramalpīyastvamityāha | sahasreti | prathamāt prathamanirdiṣṭāt
sthāvarādirūpād dvitīyastadanantaraṃ nirdiṣṭaḥ kṛmyādirūpo'nukramāt sahasrabhāgaḥ prathama-
dvitīyāditi pāṭhe sahasraṃ bhāgamaṃśamatti bhajatīti sahasrabhāgāt | tathā | dvitīyaṃ
dvitīyatvaṃ prathamanidiṣṭādanantaranirdiṣṭatvaṃ kṛmyādirūpatvamatti bhajata iti dvitīyāditi

kṛtadhobhyo'pi kartāraḥ kartṛbhyo brahmatatparāḥ |
na teṣāmarcanīyo'nyastriṣu lokeṣu kumbhaja || 22 ||
anyonyamarcakāste vai tapovidyā'viśeṣataḥ |
brāhmaṇo brahmaṇā sṛṣṭaḥ sarvabhūteśvaro yataḥ || 23 ||
ato jagatsthitaṃ sarva brāhmaṇo'rhati nāparaḥ |
sadācāro hi sarvārho nācārādvicyutaḥ punaḥ |
tasmādvipreṇa satataṃ bhāvyamācāraśolinā || 24 ||
vidveṣarāgarahitā anutiṣṭhanti yaṃ mune |
vidvāṃsastaṃ sadācāraṃ dharmamūlaṃ vidurbudhāḥ || 25 |
lakṣaṇaiḥ parihīno'pi samyagācāratatparaḥ |
śraddhāluranasūyaśca naro jīvet samāḥ śatam || 26 ||

śrutismṛtibhyāmuditaṃ sveṣu sveṣu ca karmasu |
sadācāraṃ niṣeveta dharmamūlamatandritaḥ || 27 |
durācārarato loke garhaṇīyaḥ pumān bhavet |
vyādhibhiśvā'bhibhūyeta sadā'lpāyuḥ suduḥkhabhāk || 28 ||
tyājyaṃ karma parādhīnaṃ kāryamātmavaśaṃ sadā |
duḥkhī yataḥ parādhīnaḥ sadaivātmavaśaḥ sukhī || 26 |
yasmin karmaṇyantarātmā kriyamāṇe prasīdati |
tadeva karma kartavyaṃ viparotaṃ na ca kvacit || 30 ||
prathamaṃ dharma sarvasvaṃ proktā yanniyamā yamāḥ |
atastveṣveva vai yatnaḥ kartavyo dharmamicchatā || 31 |
uditaṃ kathitam ||| 27 |
sadācāraṃ stutvā durācāraṃ nindati | durācārarata iti | dveṣarāgayuktāḥ puruṣā
adharmasya mūlaṃ yaṃ kriyākalāpaṃ kurvanti , sa durācāraḥ || 28 ||
parāyattaṃ dharmamapi tyājyamityāha | tyājyamiti || 2 9 ||
svādhīnamapi karma na sarvaṃ kāryamityāha | yasminniti | antarātmā manaḥ | tathā
ca manuḥ - ' manaḥpūtaṃ samācaret ' iti || 30 |
yadyasmāddhamaṃsarvasvaṃ prathamaṃ yamā niyamāśca proktāḥ , atasteṣveva yamaniyameṣveva

satyaṃ kṣamārjavaṃ dhyānamānṛśaṃsasyamahiṃsanam |
damaḥ pramādo mādhuyaṃ mṛduteti yamā daśa || 32 |
śaucaṃ snānaṃ tapo dānaṃ maunejyādhyayanaṃ vratam |
upoṣaṇopasthadaṇḍau daśaite niyamāḥ smṛtāḥ || 33 || |
kāmaṃ krodhaṃ madaṃ mohaṃ mātsaryaṃ lobhameva ca |
amūn ṣaḍvairiṇo jitvā sarvatra vijayī bhavet || 34 ||
śanaiḥ śanaiḥ saṃcinuyāddhamaṃ valmīkaśṛṅgavat |
parapīḍāmakurvāṇaḥ paralokasahāyinam || 35 |
kṣamā ākruṣṭasya tāḍitasya vā'vikṛtacittatā | ārjavaṃ mṛdutā avakrateti yāvat |
dhyānaṃ śivasya viṣṇorvā cintanam | ānṛśaṃsyaṃ amārātmakatā | ahiṃsā prāṇimātrā -

dharma eva sahāyī syādasūtra na paricchadaḥ |
pitṛmātṛsutastrātṛyoṣibandhujanādikaḥ || 36 ||
jāyate caikalaḥ prāṇī prastriyeta tathaikalaḥ |
ekalaḥ sukṛtaṃ bhuṅkte bhuṅkte duṣkṛtamekalaḥ || 37 ||
dehaṃ pañcatvamāpannaṃ tyaktvā kau kāṣṭhaleoṣṭhavat |
bāndhavā vimukhā yānti dharmo yāntamanuvrajet || 38 ||
kṛtī saṃcinuyāddhamaṃ tato'mutra sahāyinam |
dharmaṃ sahāyinaṃ labdhvā santared dustaraṃ tamaḥ || 36 ||
sambandhānāca rennityamuttamairuttamaiḥ sudhīḥ |
adhamānadhamāṃstyaktvā kulamutkarṣatāṃ nayet || 40 ||
dharmasyaiva sahāyitvaṃ pratyakṣamavalambyāha | dharmaṃ eveti | paricchadaḥ karituraga-

uttamānuttamāneva gacchan honāṃśca varjayan |
brāhmaṇaḥ śreṣṭhatāmeti pratyavāyena śūdratām || 41 ||
anadhyayanaśīlaṃ ca sadācāravilaṃdhinam |
sālasaṃ ca durannādaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ bādhate'ntakaḥ || 42 |
tato'bhyasetprayatnena sadācāraṃ sadā dvijaḥ |
tīrthānyapyabhilaṣyanti sadācārisamāgamam || 43 ||
rajanī prāntayāmādha brāhmasamaya ucyate |
svahitaṃ cintayetprājñastamiścotthāya sarvadā || 44 ||
gajāsyaṃ saṃsmaredādau tata īśaṃ sahā'mbayā |
śrīraṅga śrīsametaṃ tu brahmāṇyā kamalodbhavam ||| 45 |

indrādīn sakalān devān vasiṣṭhādīn munīnapi |
gaṅgādyāḥ saritaḥ sarvāḥ śrīśailādyakhilān girīn || 46 ||
kṣīrodādīn samudrāṃśca mānasādi sarāṃsi ca |
vanādinandanādīni dhenūḥ kāmadughādikāḥ || 47 |
kalpavṛkṣādivṛkṣāṃśca dhātūn kāṃcanamukhyataḥ |
divya stroruvaṃśī mukhyā garuḍādīn patattriṇaḥ || 48 |
nāgāṃśca śeṣapramukhān gajānairāvatādikān |
aśvānuccaiḥśravomukhyān kaustubhādīn maṇon śubhān || 46 |
smaredarundhatomukhyāḥ pativratavatīrvadhūḥ |
naimiṣādīnyaraṇyāni purī : kāśīpurīmukhāḥ || 50 |
viśveśādīni liṅgāni vedānukapramukhānapi |
gāyatrīpramukhān mantrānyoginaḥ sanakādikān || 51 ||
praṇavādimahābījaṃ nāradādīṃśca vaiṣṇavān |
śivabhaktāṃśva bāṇādīn prahlādādīn dṛḍhavratān || 52 |
harau ramatāṃ mano me ' iti vacanāt | śriyo lakṣmyā raṅgo harṣo yasmāditi vā | ata
eva śrīsameta miti viśeṣaṇam | 1 brahmāṇyā sāvitryā || 45-46 |
nandanādīnītyādipadena caitrarathādīni gṛhyante | kāmadughā kapilā | ādipadena
surabhyādayo gṛhyante || 47 ||
kalpavṛkṣādītyādipadenāśvatthādayo gṛhyante | kāñcanamukhyataḥ suvarṇamukhyān |
urvaśī mukhyāstatpradhānā rambhātilottamādyāḥ | garuḍādīnityādipadena jaṭāyuḥ pramukhā
gṛhyante || 48 ||
śeṣo'nantastatpramukhāṃstadādīnityarthaḥ | airāvatādikānityādipadena puṇḍarīkā-
dayo gṛhyante || 4 9 |
anantara indrādi samasta devagaṇa , vasiṣṭha prabhṛti muni , gaṃgā ityādi nadī ,
ādika vana , kāmadhenu prabhṛti dhenu , kalpavṛkṣādi vṛkṣa , suvarṇādi dhātu , urvaśī prabhṛti
divyastrī , garur̤a ādi pakṣī , śeṣanāga ādi sarpa , airāvata ityādi gaja , uccaiḥśravā
prabhṛti aśva , kaustubhādi śubha maṇi , arundhatī prabhṛti pativratā ramaṇī , naimiṣādika
ityādi mantra , sanakādi yogigaṇa , praṇavādi mahābīja , nāradādi vaiṣṇava , bāṇāsura
prabhṛti śivabhakta , prahlāda ādi dṛḍhavrata , dadhīci ādi udāra dātā , hariścandra

vadānyāṃśca dadhīcyādon hariścandrādibhūpatīn |
jananīcaraṇau smṛtvā sarvatīrthottamottamau || 53 |
pitaraṃ ca gurūṃśvāpi hṛdi dhyātvā prasannadhīḥ |
tataśvāvaśyakaṃ karttuṃ nairṛtīṃ diśamāśrayet || 54 ||
grāmāddhanuḥśataṃ gacchennagarācca ||
caturguṇam |
tṛṇairācchādya vasudhāṃ śiraḥ prāvṛtya vāsasā || 55 |
karṇopavītyudagvaktro divase sandhyayorapi |
viṇmūtre visṛjanmaunī niśāyāṃ dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ || 56 |
na tiṣṭhannāpsu no vipragovahnayanilasammukhaḥ |
na phālakṛṣṭe bhūbhāge na rathyāsevyabhūtale || 57 |
nālokayeddiśo bhāgān jyotiścakraṃ nabho'malam |
vāmena pāṇinā śiśnaṃ dhṛtvottiṣṭhetprayatnavān || || 58 ||
nairṛtīṃ vadānyān dātṝn yāmīvāruṇyormadhyām || 53 |
karṇe || 54 ||
upavītaṃ vartate yasya sa tathā || 56 |
rathyā ca sevyabhūtalaṃ ca tasmin || 57 ||
amalamityanena samalasyālokane na doṣaḥ || 58 ||

atho mṛdaṃ samādāya jantukarkaravajitām |
vihāya mūṣakotkhātāṃ śaucocchiṣṭāñca nākulām || 56 |
guhye dadyānmṛdaṃ caikāṃ pāyau pañcāmbusāntarāḥ |
daśa vāmakare cāpi sapta pāṇidvaye mṛdaḥ || 60 |
ekaikāṃ pādayordadyāttitraḥ pāṇyormṛdastathā |
itthaṃ śaucaṃ gṛhī kuryād gandhalepakṣayāvadhi ||| 61 |
kramād dvaiguṇyametasmād brahmacaryādiṣu triṣu |
divā vihitaśaucasya rātrāvadhaṃ samācaret || 62 ||
rujyadhaṃ ca tadadhaṃ ca pathi caurādibādhite |
tadadhaṃ yoṣitāṃ cāpi susthe nyūnaṃ na kārayet || 63 ||
api sarvanadītīryamṛtkuṭaiścāpi gaumayaiḥ |
āpādamācaran śaucaṃ bhāvaduṣṭo na śuddhibhāk || 64 ||
nākulāṃ nakulājjātāmityarthaḥ | nākulīmiti pāṭhe spaṣṭa evārthaḥ || 5 9 |

ārdradhātrīphalonmānā mṛdaḥ śauce prakīrtitāḥ |
sarvāścāhutayo'pyeva grāsāścāndrāyaṇe'pi ca || 65 ||
prāgāsya udagāsyo vā sūpaviṣṭaḥ śucau bhuvi |
upaspṛśedvihīnāyāṃ tuṣāṅgārāsthibhasmabhiḥ || 66 ||
anuṣṇābhiraphenābhiradbhirha dgābhiratvaraḥ
brāhmaṇo brāhmatīrthena dṛṣṭipūtābhirācamet || 67 ||
kaṇṭhagābhirnṛpaḥ śuddhaye tālugā bhistayorujaḥ |
strīśūdrāvāsya saṃsparśamātreṇā'pi viśuddhayataḥ || 68 |
śiraḥ prāvṛtya kaṇṭhaṃ vā jale muktaśikho'pi ca |
akṣālita padadvandva ācānto'pyaśucirmataḥ || 66 ||
triḥ pītvāmbu viddhyarthaṃ tataḥ khāni viśodhayet |
aṅguṣṭhamūladeśena dvidviroṣṭhādharau dvidviroṣṭhādharau spṛśet || 70 ||

aṅgulībhistribhiḥ paścāt punarāsyaṃ spṛśetsudhīḥ |
tarjanyaṅguṣṭhakoṭayā ca ghrāṇarandhre punaḥ punaḥ || 71 ||
aṅguṣṭhānāmikāgrābhyāṃ cakṣuḥ śrotre punaḥ punaḥ |
kaniṣṭhā'ṅguṣṭhayogena nābhirandhramupaspṛśet || 72 ||
spṛṣṭrā talena hṛdayaṃ samastābhiḥ śiraḥ spṛśet |
aṅgulyagraistathā skandhau sāmbu sarvatra saṃspṛśet || 73 ||
ācāntaḥ punarācāmet kṛte rathyopasarpaṇe |
snātvā bhuktvā payaḥ pītvā prārambhe śubhakarmaṇām || 74 ||
sāmbu yathā syāttathā sarvatra saṃspṛśedityarthaḥ | tathā ca dakṣaḥ-
prakṣālya pādau hastī ca triḥ pibedambu vīkṣitam |
saṃvṛtyāṅguṣṭhamūlena dviḥ pramṛjyāttato mukham ||
saṃhatābhistribhiḥ pūrvamāsyaṃ tu samaspṛśet |
aṅguṣṭhena pradeśinyā ghrāṇaṃ paścādanantaram ||
aṅguṣṭhā'nāmikābhyāṃ tu cakṣuḥ śrotre punaḥ punaḥ |
kaniṣṭhā'ṅguṣṭhayornābhiṃ hṛdayantu talena ve ||
sarvābhistu śiraḥ paścād bāhū cāgreṇa saṃspṛśet || iti || 73 ||

suptvā vāsaḥ parīdhāya tathā dṛṣṭrā'pyamaṅgalam |
pramādādaśuci spṛṣṭrā dvirācāntaḥ śucirbhavet || 75 ||
atho mukhaviśuddhayarthaṃ gṛhṇīyāddantadhāvanam |
ācānto'pyaśuciryasmādakṛtvā dantadhāvanam || 76 |
pratipaddarśaṣaṣṭhīṣu navamyāṃ ravivāsare |
dantānāṃ kāṣṭhasaṃyogo dahedāsaptamaṃ kulam || 77 ||
alābhe dantakāṣṭhānāṃ niṣiddhe vā'tha vāsare |
gaṇḍūṣā dvādaśagrāhyā mukhasya pariśuddhaye || 78 ||
kaniṣṭhā'graparīmāṇaṃ satvacaṃ nivṛṇaṃ ṛjum |
dvādaśāṅgulamānaṃ ca sādhaṃ syāddantadhāvanam || 76 ||
sahetukaṃ dantadhāvanaprakāramutthāpayati | atheti | vipakṣe bādhakamāha | ācānta
iti || 76 ||
sahetukaṃ dantadhāvana kāṣṭhaniṣedhasamayamāha | pratipaditi || 77 ||
nanu tarhi dantakāṣṭhānāmabhāve pratiṣiddhadine vā kiṃ vidheyaṃ tatrāha | alābha
iti || 78 ||

ekai kā'ṅgulahāsena varṇeṣvanyeṣu kīrtitam |
āsrāsrātakadhātrīṇāṃ ' kaṅkolakhadirodbhavam || 80 || ||
śamyapāmārgakharjūrīśeluśrīrpāṇapolujam '
rājādanaṃ ca nāraṅga kaṣāyakaṭukaṇṭakam || 81 ||
kṣīravṛkṣodbhavaṃ vā'pi praśastaṃ dantadhāvanam |
jihvollekhanikāṃ cā'pi kuryāccāpākṛtaṃ śubhām || 82 ||
annādyāyavyūhadhvaṃ somo rājā'yamāgamat |
sa me mukhaṃ pramārkṣyate yaśasā ca bhagena ca || 83 ||
anyeṣu kṣatriyādiṣu kīrtitaṃ kathitam | nūditamiti kvacit | kiṃ vṛkṣodbhavaṃ
dantakāṣṭhaṃ vidheyamityatrāha | āmneti || 80 ||
rājādanamityadhaṃ kāryakāraṇayorabhedā'bhiprāyeṇa ||| 81 |

āyurbalaṃ yaśo varcaḥ prajāḥ paśu vasūni ca |
brahmaprajñāṃ ca medhāṃ ca tvaṃ no dehi vanaspate || 84 ||
mantrāvetau samuccārya yaḥ kuryāddantadhāvanam |
vanaspatigataḥ somastasya nityaṃ prasīdati || 85 |
mukhe paryuṣite yasmād bhavedaśucibhāg naraḥ |
tataḥ kuryāt prayatnena ● śuddhayarthaṃ dantadhāvanam || 86 |
upavāse'pi na duṣyeddantadhāvanamañjanam |
gandhālaṅkārasadvastrapuṣpamālānulepanam || 87 |
prātaḥ sandhyāṃ tataḥ kuryād dantadhāvanapūrvikām |
prātaḥ snānaṃ caritvā ca śuddhe tīrthe viśeṣataḥ || 88 |
prātaḥ snānādyataḥ śuddhacet kāyo'yaṃ malinaḥ sadā |
chidrito navabhiśchidaiḥ sravatyeva divāniśam || 8 9 |
dvitīyo mantraḥ spaṣṭa eva || 84 ||

utsāhamedhāsaubhāgyarūpasampatpravartakam
manaḥprasannatā hetuḥ prātaḥ snānaṃ praśasyate || 9 0 |
prasvedalālādyāklinno nidrādhīno yato naraḥ |
prātaḥ snānāttato'rhaḥ syānmantrastotrajapādiṣu || 9 1 |
prātaḥ prātastu yatsnānaṃ saṃjāte cāruṇodaye |
prājāpatyasamaṃ prāhustanmahāghavighātakṛt || 9 2 |
prātaḥ snānaṃ haretpāpamalakṣmīṃ glānimeva ca |
aśucitvaṃ ca duḥsvapnaṃ tuṣṭi puṣṭi prayacchati || 9 3 |
nopasarpanti vai duṣṭāḥ prātaḥsnāyijanaṃ kvacit |
dṛṣṭādṛṣṭaphalaṃ yasmātprātaḥ snānaṃ samācaret || 9 4 |
prasaṅgataḥ snānavidhi vakṣyāmi kalaśodbhava |
vidhisnānaṃ yataḥ prāhuḥ snānācchataguṇottaram || 9 5 |
prājāpatyo vrataviśeṣaḥ || 9 2 |

pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ 33 9
viśuddhāṃ mṛdamādāya bahaṣi tilagomayam |
śucau deśe paristhāpya tvācamyasnānamācaret || 9 6 |
upagrahī baddhaśikho jalamadhye samāviśet |
urūhīti mantreṇa toyamāvartya sṛṣṭitaḥ || 9 7 ||
ye te śataṃ japtvā toyasyāmantraṇāya ca |
sumitriyāno mantreṇa pūrvaṃ kṛtvā jalāñjalim |
kṣipedveṣyaṃ samuddiśya japan durmitriyā iti || 9 8 |
panthāmanveta vā u | apade pādā pratidhātave'kurutāya vaktāhṛdayāvidhaścit | namo
varuṇāyabhiṣṭhito varuṇasya pāśa iti mantrasya śeṣaḥ | uru vistīrṇaṃ hi atiśayena
rājā varuṇaḥ cakāra kṛtavān | sūryāya ṣaṣṭhyarthe caturthī | sūryasya panthānam | anvetave

idaṃ viṣṇurimaṃ japtvā limpedaṅgāni mṛtsnayā |
mṛdaikayā śiraḥ kṣālya dvābhyāṃ nābhestathopari || 99 | |
nābheradhastu tisṛbhiḥ pādau ṣaḍrbhāiviśodhayet |
majjet pravāhābhimukha āpo asmānimaṃ japan || 100 |
surocanāḥ svacanāḥ svarcanā veti | sumitriyāna iti | āpa oṣadhayaḥ santviti mantraśeṣaḥ |
asyārthaḥ – sumitriyāḥ sādhumitratvenāvasthitā no'smākamāpa oṣadhayaśca santviti |

udidābhyaḥ śuciriti mantra unmajjane mataḥ |
mānastoka imaṃ japtvā limyed gātrāṇi gomayaiḥ || 101 ||
imaṃ me varuṇetyādi mantraiḥ svātmā'bhiṣecanam |
tattvāyāmi tathā tvannaḥ sa tvaṃ naścāpyuduttamam || 102 |

dhāmno dhāmnastathā māpo mauṣadhīriti saṃjapet |
yadāhuraghnyā muñcantu meti cāvabhṛtheti ca || 103 ||
yasmācca tvaṃ yajiṣṭho yajñakṛttamo vahnitamo voḍhatamo haviṣā śośucāno dedīpyamāno
bhavasi , tasmāt prārthaye | viśvā viśvāni dveṣāṃsi sarvāṇi daurbhāgyāni pramumugdhi vimuñca

abdevatā ime mantrāḥ proktāḥ svātmā'bhiṣecane |
praṇavena tato vipro mahāvyāhṛtibhistataḥ || 104 || ||
ātmānaṃ pāvayedvidvān gāyatryā ca tataḥ kṛtī |
āpo hiṣṭheti tisṛbhiḥ pratyṛcaṃ pāvanaṃ smṛtam || 105 ||
yamasya yamayati niyamayati sarvaṃ jagaditi yamastasya yamasya sambandhinā paḍvīśāt

ete'pi pāvanā mantrā idamāpo haviṣmatoḥ |
devīrāma apo devā drupadādiva saṃjñakāḥ || 106 |
vā yaḥ savitā no'smākaṃ pracodayāt , cuda saṃcodane prakarṣeṇa codayati prerayati | tasya
savituḥ sambandhivīryaṃ tejo vā dhyāyāma iti sambandhaḥ | vākyabhedena vā yojanā |
tatsaviturvaraṇīyaṃ vīryaṃ tejo vā devasya vyāyāmaḥ | yaśca buddhīḥ pracodayāt prerayatyasmākaṃ
taṃ ca dhyāyāmaḥ | sa ca saviteva bhavati | liṅgavyatyayena vā yojanā | tatsavitu-
rvaraṇīyaṃ bhargo devasya dhyāyāmaḥ | dhiyo yo bhargaḥ asmākaṃ prerayatīti | āpohiṣṭheti
tisṛbhiḥ kaṇḍikābhiriti śeṣaḥ | tatra mayo bhuvastāna ūrje dadhātana | maheraṇāya

tasmādenasaḥ pavamānaśca muñcantviti mantraśeṣaḥ | asyārthaḥ - he āpa idaṃ paśusaṃjñapana-
nimittaṃ pāpaṃ pravahata apanayata | kiñcāvadyamavadanīyaṃ ca yadabhiśāpādi malaṃ ca yat ,
yacca malaṃ śarīrasaṃlagnaṃ mūtrapurīṣādi prasiddhaṃ tacca pravahata apanayata | yaccābhidu-
drohānṛtam , druha jighāṃsāyām , yadapi cābhidrugdhavānasmi asatyamuccāyaṃ yacca śepe
abhīruṇam , śapa ākrośe , yacchapitavānasmi abhīruṇamaparādhinamanaparādhīti na bibheti ,
yadvā'bhilunāti chinatti marmāṇi yaduccaritaṃ sat | yaccābhīruṇam | āpaḥ mā māṃ
tasmādenasaḥ pāpāt pavamānaḥ somo vāyurvā muñcatu pṛthak karotviti | haviṣmatīriti |
imā āpo haviṣmām āvivāsati | haviṣmān devo adhvarohaviṣmām astu sūrya iti

śanno devīrapo devīrapā rasamityapi
punantu meti ca nava pāvamānyaḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 107 |

tato'ghamarṣaṇaṃ japtvā drupadāṃ ca tato japet |
prāṇāyāmaṃ ca vidhivadathavāntarjale japet || 108 ||
antargataṇijartho'yaṃ pāvayase gamayasi | kiñca , āsuvorjamiṣaṃ ca naḥ iṣaṃ vrīhyādikam
ūrjaṃ dadhikṣīrādyupasecanaṃ no'smabhyaṃ āsuva abhyanujānīhi | āre dūre vyavasthitaṃ
santaṃ ducchunāṃ ducchudaurgatyaṃ vyādhayaśca | durjanaprabhṛtayo lakṣyante tān bādhasvetyarthaḥ |
punantu mā devajanā : punantu manasā dhiyā | punantu viśvābhūtāni jātavedaḥ punīhi
meti caturtho mantraḥ | asyārthaḥ - liṅgoktadevalyānuṣṭup devajanā devānugā janā māṃ
punantu punantu manasā dhiyaḥ manasā vivekena sampannena manasā saṃjātā dhiyo devatā
viṣayajñānāni karmāṇi vā māṃ punantu | viśvāni bhūtāni māṃ punantu | he śrījātavedaḥ

praṇavaṃ trirjapedvāpi viṣṇuṃ vā saṃsmaretsudhīḥ |
snātvetthaṃ vastramāpīḍya gṛhṇīyāddhautavāsasī || 106 |
ācamya ca tataḥ kuryāt prātaḥ sandhyāṃ kuśānvitām |
yo na sandhyāmupāsota brāhmaṇo hi viśeṣataḥ || 110 |
sa jīvanneva śūdrastu mṛtaḥ śvā jāyate dhruvam |
sandhyāhī no'śucinityamanarhaḥ sarvakarmasu || 111 |
yadanyatkurute karma na tasya phalabhāg bhavet |
praṇavaṃ prādiśi smṛtvā tato datvā kuśāsanam || 112 |

catuḥsraktirimaṃ mantraṃ paṭhitvā nānyadṛṅmanāḥ || 113 ||
prāṅmukho baddhacūḍo vāpyupaviṣṭa udaṅmukhaḥ |
pradakṣiṇaṃ svamabhyukṣya prāṇāyāmaṃ samācaret || 114 ||
gāyatrī śirasā sādhaṃ saptavyāhṛtipūrvikām | |
trirjapet sa daśoṃkāraḥ prāṇāyāmo'yamucyate || 115 |
prāṇāyāmāṃścaran vipro niyatendriyamānasaḥ |
ahorātrakṛtaiḥ pāpairmukto bhavati tatkṣaṇāt || 116 ||
daśa dvādaśasaṃkhyā vā prāṇāyāmāḥ kṛtā yadi |
niyamya mānasaṃ tena tadā taptaṃ mahattapaḥ || 17 |

savyāhṛtipraṇavakāḥ prāṇāyāmāstu ṣoḍaśa |
api bhrūṇahanaṃ māsāt punantyaharahaḥ kṛtāḥ || 118 |
yathā pārthivadhātūnāṃ dahyante dhamanānmalāḥ |
tathendriyaiḥ kṛtā doṣā jvālyante prāṇasaṃyamāt || 116 ||
ekaṃ sambhojya vidhivad brāhmaṇaṃ yatphalaṃ labhet |
prāṇāyāmairdvādaśabhistatphalaṃ śraddhayā''pyate || 120 |
vedādivāṅmayaṃ savaṃ praṇave yatpratiṣṭhitam |
tataḥ praṇavamabhyasyed vedādi vedajāpakaḥ || 121 |
praṇave nityayuktasya saptasu vyāhṛtiṣvapi |
tripadāyāntu gāyatryāṃ na bhayaṃ jāyate kvacit || 122 |
ekākṣaraṃ paraṃ brahma prāṇāyāmaḥ paraṃ tapaḥ |
gāyatryāstu paraṃ nāsti pāvanaṃ kalaśodbhava || 123 |
bhrūṇahanaṃ garbhahantāraṃ śreṣṭhabrāhmaṇahantāraṃ vā || 118 |
dahyante dāhakartṛbhiriti śeṣaḥ | dhamanādagnisaṃyogāt | jvālyante nāśyante prāṇā-

======================================================================
# smp_kkh_pt2_p401-600_OCR (main text from page 1)

karmaṇā manasā vācā yadrātrau kurute tvagham |
uttiṣṭhan pūrvasandhyāyāṃ prāṇāyāmaiviśodhayet || 124 ||
yadahnā kurute pāpaṃ manovākkāyakarmabhiḥ |
āsīnaḥ paścimāṃ sandhyāṃ tatprāṇāyāmato haret || 125 ||
pūrvāṃ sandhyāṃ japaṃstiṣṭhet sāvitrīmārkadarśanāt |
paścimāntu samāsīnaḥ samyagarkṣavibhāvanāt || 126 |
pūrvāṃ sandhyāṃ japaṃstiṣṭhannaiśameno vyapohati |
paścimāntu samāsīno malaṃ hanti divākṛtam || 127 ||
nopatiṣṭhettu yaḥ pūrvāṃ nopāste yastu paścimām |
sa śūdravad bahiṣkāryaḥ sarvasmād dvijakarmaṇaḥ || 128 ||
apāṃ samīpamāsādya nityakarma samācaret |
gāyatrīmapyadhīyīta gatvā'raṇyaṃ samāhitaḥ || 126 |

gṛhād bahuguṇā yasmāt sandhyā bahirupāsitā |
gāyatryabhyāsamātro'pi varaṃ vipro jitendriyaḥ || 130 ||
trivedyapi ca to mānyaḥ sarvabhuk sarvavikrayī |
savitā devatā yasyā mukhamagnistripācca yā || 131 ||
viśvāmitro ṛṣiśchando gāyatrī sā viśiṣyate |
gāyatrīmuṣasi dhyāyellohitāṃ brahmadevatām || 132 |
haṃsārūḍhā maṇṭavarṣā raktakhaganulepanām |
ṛksvarūpāmabhayadāmakṣamālāvalambinīm || 133 ||
vyāsaviṇā stūyamānāṃ chandasā'nuṣṭubhāyutām |
etaddhyānāduṣardevyā naiśameno vyapohati || 134 ||
sūryaśceti ca mantreṇa syādācamanamuttamam |
āpohiṣṭheti tisṛbhirmārjanaṃ tataścaret || 135 |
gāyatryabhyāsamātraḥ gāyatrīsāramātraḥ | jitendriyaḥ suyantritaḥ | tathā ca manuḥ--
gāyatrīsāramātro'pi varaṃ vipraḥ suyantritaḥ |
nā'yaṃ tritastrivedo'pi sarvāśī sarvavikrayī || iti || 130 ||
uṣardevyāḥ prātaḥkālopāsyāyā gāyatryāḥ || 134 ||

bhūmau śirasi cākāśe ākāśe bhuvi mastake |
mastake ca tathākāśe bhūmau ca navadhā kṣipet || 136 |
bhūmi śabdena caraṇāvākāśaṃ hṛdayaṃ smṛtam |
śirasyeva śiraḥ śabdo mārjanajñairudāhṛtaḥ || || 137 || |
vāruṇādapi cāgneyādvāyavyādapi caindrataḥ |
mantrasnānādapi paraṃ brāhmaṃ snānamidaṃ param || 138 |

brāhmasnānena yaḥ snātaḥ sa bāhyābhyantare śuciḥ |
sarvatra cārhatāmeti devapūjādikarmaṇi || 136 |
naktaṃ dinaṃ nimajyāpsu kaivartāḥ kimu pāvanāḥ |
śataśo'pi tathā snātā na śuddhā bhāvadūṣitāḥ || 140 | |
antaḥkaraṇaśuddhā ye tān vibhūtiḥ pavitrayet |
kiṃ pāvanāḥ prakīrtyante rāsabhā bhasmadhūsarāḥ || 141 |
sa snātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu sa sarvamalavajitaḥ |
tena kratuśatairiṣṭaṃ ceto yasyeha nirmalam || 142 |
tadeva nirmalaṃ ceto yathā syāttanmune śṛṇu |
viśveśaścet prasannaḥ syāttadā syānnānyathā kvacit || 143 |
tatra bhaumaṃ mṛdālambanaṃ tilakādidhāraṇamiti yāvat | divyamaindram | mānasaṃ
saguṇanirguṇabhedena hariharayościntanam | tathā ca brāhmādapi snānānmānasaṃ snānamadhika-
miti darśitaṃ bhavati | yadvā , bhūmāvityādiślokadvayaṃ mārjanaviśeṣaparaṃ tadā vāruṇādi -

tasmāccetoviśuddhayarthaṃ kāśīnāthaṃ samāśrayet |
tadāśrayeṇa niyataṃ saṃkṣīyante manomalāḥ || 144 |
saṃkṣoṇamānasamalo viśveśā'nugrahātparāt |
idaṃ śarīramutsṛjya paraṃ brahmādhigacchati | 145 |
viśveśā'nugrahe hetuḥ sadācāro mato nṛṇām | |
śrutismṛtibhyāmuditaṃ tasmāttamanusaṃśrayet || 146 ||
drupadāntu tato japtvā jalamādāya pāṇinā |
kuryādṛtañca mantreṇa vidhijñaḥ tvaghamarṣaṇam || 147 ||
nimajjyāpsu ca yo vidvān japettriraghamarṣaṇam |
yathā'śvamedhāvabhṛthastasya syāttattathā dhruvam || 148 ||
jale vā'pi sthale vā'pi yaḥ kuryādaghamarṣaṇam |
tasyāghaugho vinaśyeta yathā sūryodaye tamaḥ ||| 146 |

imaṃ mantraṃ tataśvoktvā kuryādācamanaṃ dvijaḥ |
ācāryāḥ kecidicchanti śākhābhedena cāpare || 150 |
antaścarasi bhūteṣu bhūteṣu guhāyāṃ viśvatomukhaḥ |
tvaṃ yajñastvaṃ vaṣaṭkāra āpo jyotī rasomṛtam || 151 |
gāyatrī śirasā honāṃ mahāvyāhṛtipūrvikām |
praṇavādyāṃ japaṃstiṣṭhan kṣipedambho'ñjali trayam || 152 |
teṃna vajrodakenāśu mandehānāmarākṣasāḥ |
sūryārayaḥ pralīyante śailā vajrāhatā iva || 153 |
vivasvataḥ sahāyārthaṃ yo dvijo nā'ñjalitrayam |
kṣipenmandehanāśāya so'pi mandehatāṃ vrajet || 154 ||
prātastāvajjapaṃstiṭhedyāvatsūryasya darśanam |
upaviṣṭo japet sāyamṛkṣāṇāmāvilokanāt || 155 |
imaṃ imameva varuṇeti mantram | ācāryā iti | kecidapare ācāryāḥ śākhā-
bhedenā'ntaścarasi — ityācamanamantramicchantīti śeṣaḥ | imaṃ vakṣyamāṇaṃ mantramuktvā''camanaṃ

kālalopo na kartavyo dvijena svahitepsunā |
ardhodayāstasamaye tasmādvajrodakaṃ kṣipet || 156 |
vidhinā'pi kṛtā sandhyā kālātītā'phalā bhavet |
ayameva hi dṛṣṭānto vandhyāstrīmaithunaṃ yathā || 157 !
jalaṃ vāmakare kṛtvā yā sandhyā caritā dvijaiḥ |
vṛṣalī sā parijñeyā rakṣogaṇamudāvahā || 158 |
udvayanta mudutyañca citrandeveti tatparam |
taccakṣurityupasthāna mantrā braghnasya siddhidāḥ || 156 |
udvayantamityanusvāra ārṣaḥ | pratīkā'bhiprāyo vā | masaḥ parisvaḥ paśyanta

sahasrakṛtvo gāyatryāḥ śatakṛtvo'thavā punaḥ |
daśakṛtvo'tha devyaiva kuryāt saurīmupasthitim || 160 |
sahasraparamāṃ devīṃ śatamadhyāṃ daśāvarām |
gāyatrī yo japedvipro na sa pāpaiḥ pralipyate || 161 |
vibhrāḍityanuvākaṃ vā kaṃ vā sūktaṃ vā pauruṣaṃ japet |
śivasaṃkalpamathavā brāhmaṇaṃ maṇḍalaṃ tu vā || 162 |

etāni copasthānāni raviprītikarāṇi ca |
raktacandana miśrā'dbhirakṣataiḥ kusumaiḥ kuśaiḥ || 163 ||
vedoktairāgamoktairvā mantrairaghaṃ pradāpayet |
arcitaḥ savitā yena tena trailokyamacitam || 164 ||
arcitaḥ savitā sūte sutān paśuvasūni ca |
vyādhīn hareddadātyāyuḥ pūrayed vāñchitānyapi || 165 |
ayaṃ hi rudra ādityo harireṣa divākaraḥ |
ravihiraṇyagarbho'sau trayīrūpo'yamaryamā || 166 ||
ravestu toṣaṇāttuṣṭā brahmaviṣṇumaheśvarāḥ |
indrādayo'khilā devā marīcyādyā maharṣayaḥ || 167 ||
mānavā manumukhyāśca somapādyāḥ pitāmahāḥ |
raveraca vidhāyetthaṃ tatastarpaṇamārabhet || 168 |
maṇḍalaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ yadetanmaṇḍalamityādi trayoviṃśatikaṇḍikātmakaṃ vā japet | eteṣāṃ

darbhānagarbhānādāya nava sapta ca pañca vā |
sāgrān samūlānacchinnān dvijo dakṣiṇapāṇinā | 166 |
anvārandhena savyena tarpayet ṣaḍvināyakān |
brahmādīnakhilāndevān marīcyādīṃstathā munīn || 170 |
candanāgurukastūrīgandhavatkusumairapi
tarpayecchucibhisto yaistṛpyantviti samuccaran || 171 |
sanakādīn manuṣyāṃśca nivītī tarpayedyavaiḥ |
aṅguṣṭhadvayamadhye tu kṛtvā darbhānṛjūn dvijaḥ || 172 ||
kavyavāḍanalādīṃśca pitṝn divyān pratarpayet |
prācīnāvītiko darbhedviguṇaistila miśritaḥ || 173 ||
ravau śukre trayodaśyāṃ saptamyāṃ niśi sandhyayoḥ |
śreyo'rthī brāhmaṇo jātu na kuryāttilatarpaṇam || 174 |
anvārabdhena savyena dakṣiṇahastasaṃlagnena vāmena hastena | bavināyakān
caṇḍapracaṇḍadharma vināyaka vighnarājamahāgaṇapatīn || 170 |
nivītī kaṇṭhalagnayajñopavītī ||| 172 |
prācīnāvītiko dakṣiṇaskandhayajñopavītavān || 173 |

yadi kuryāttataḥ kuryācchuklaireva tilaiḥ kṛtī |
caturdaśayamān paścāttarpayennāma uccaran || 175 |
tataḥ svagotramuccārya tarpayet svapitṛn mudā |
savyajānunipātena pitṛtīrthena vāgyataḥ || 176 |
ekaikamañjala devā dvau dvau tu sanakādikāḥ |
pitarastrīn pravāñchanti striya ekaikamañjalim || 177 |
aṅgulyagre bhaveddevamārṣamaṅgulimūlagam
brāhmamaṅguṣṭhamūle tu pāṇimadhye prajāpateḥ || 178 ||
madhye'ṅguṣṭhapradeśinyoḥ pitryaṃ tīrthaṃ pracakṣate |
navarcamuccaran vidvān vidadhyāt pitṛtarpaṇam || 176 ||
udīratāmaṅgirasa āyantu na itīṣyate |
ūrjaṃ vahantī pitṛbhyaḥ svadhāyibhyastataḥ paṭhet || 180 ||
tatrāpi yādṛcchika pratiprasavamāha | yadīti | caturdaśeti | yamāya dharmarājāya
mṛtyave cāntakāya ca | vaivasvatāya kālāya sarvabhūtakṣayāya ca | audumbarāya daghnāya

ye ceha pitarastadvanmadhuvātā iti tṛcam |
namo vaḥ pitaraśvoktvā paṭhan siñcejjalaṃ bhuvi || 181 |
ābrahmastambaparyantaṃ devarṣipitṛmānavāḥ |
tṛpyantu pitaraḥ sarve mātṛmātāmahādayaḥ || 182 |
atīta kulakoṭīnāṃ saptadvīpanivāsinām |
ābrahmabhuvanāllokādidamastu tilodakam || 183 |
ye cāsmākaṃ kule jātā aputrāgotriṇo mṛtāḥ |
sarve te tṛptimāyāntu vastraniṣpīḍanodakaiḥ || 184 ||
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā vedābhyāsaṃ tataścaret |
śrutyabhyāsaḥ pañcadhā syāt svīkāro'rthavicāraṇam || 185 |
abhyāsaśca japaścāpi śiṣyebhyaḥ pratipādanam |
labdhasya pratipālārthamalabdhasya ca labdhaye || 186 |
dātāraṃ samupeyādvai svagurutvaṃ ca vardhayet |
prātaḥ kṛtyamidaṃ proktaṃ dvijātīnāṃ dvijottama || 187 |
svadhāyibhya iti pañca , ye ceheti ṣaṭ , madhuvātā iti kaṇḍikātrayam iti navarca muktvā
pitṛtarpaṇaṃ vidadhyāditi pūrveṇaivā'nvayaḥ || 180 |
mātṛramantrakaṃ santarpya mātāmahatarpaṇamāha | namo va iti || 181 |
ā brahmeti mantratrayaṃ paṭhan bhuvi jalaṃ siñcediti sapādatrayāṇāmanvayaḥ || 182 |

athavā prātarutthāya kṛtvāvaśyakameva ca |
śaucācamanamādāya bhakṣayeddantadhāvanam || 188 |
viśodhya sarvagātrāṇi prātaḥsandhyāṃ samācaret |
vedārthānadhigacchecca śāstrāṇi vividhānyapi || 18 9 |
adhyāpayecchucīn śiṣyān hitān medhāsamanvitān |
upeyādīśvaraṃ caiva yogakṣemādisiddhaye || 1 9 0 |
tato madhyāhnasiddhayarthaṃ pūrvoktaṃ snānamācaret |
snātvā mādhyāhnikī sandhyāmupāsīta vicakṣaṇaḥ ||| 1 9 1 |
navayauvanabhinnāṅgīṃ śuddhasphaṭikanirmalām |
triṣṭup chandaḥ samāyuktāṃ sāvitrīṃ rudradaivatām || 1 9 2 |
kaśyapaṣisamāyuktāṃ yajurvedasvarūpiṇīm |
tryakṣarāṃ vṛṣabhārūḍhāṃ bhaktābhayakarāṃ parām || 1 9 3 |
devatāṃ paripūjyā'tha naityikaṃ vidhimācaret |
pacanāgni samujjvālya vaiśvadevaṃ samācaret || 1 9 4 || |
prātaḥ snānāsaktānpratyāha | athaveti || 188 |
tryakṣarāṃ praṇavātmikām || 1 9 3 |
pacanāgni vaiśvadevārthamagnim ' || 1 9 4 ||

niṣpāvān kodravān māṣān kalāyāṃścaṇakāṃstyajet |
tailapakvaṃ ca pakvānnaṃ savaṃ lavaṇayuk tyajet || 1 9 5 |
āḍhakīśca masūrāṃśca vartulān varaṭāṃstathā |
bhuktaśeṣaṃ paryuṣitaṃ vaiśvadeve vivarjayet || 1 9 6 |
darbhapāṇi : samācamya prāṇāyāmaṃ vidhāya ca |
pṛṣṭho devīti mantreṇa paryukṣaṇamathācaret || 1 9 7 |
pradakṣiṇaṃ ca paryukṣya triḥ paristīrya vai kuśān |
eṣo ha devamantreṇa kuryād rvāhna susaṃmukham || 1 9 8 |
vaiśvānaraṃ samabhyacarya sājyapuṣpākṣatairatha |
bhūrādyāśvāhutīstisraḥ svāhāntāḥ praṇavādikāḥ || 1 99 |
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ svāheti vipro dadyāttathāhutim |
tathā devakṛtasyādyā juhuyācca ṣaḍāhutīḥ || 200 |
niṣpāvān śimbī : vallāvallahā iti gauḍe prasiddhāḥ | kodravān koradūṣakān |

yamāya tūṣṇīmekāṃ ca tathā sviṣṭakṛtodvayam |
viśvebhyaśvāpi devebhyo bhūmau dadyāttato balim || 201 |
sarvebhyaścāpi bhūtebhyo namo dadyāttaduttare |
taddakṣiṇe pitṛbhyaśca prācīnāvītiko dadet || 202 ||
nirṇejanodakānnaṃ caiśānyāṃ vai yakṣmaṇe'rpayet |
tato brahmādidevebhyo namo dadyāttaduttare || 203 |
nivītī sanakādibhyaḥ pitṛbhyastvapasavyavān |
hantaḥ ṣoḍaśabhirgrāsaiścatubhiḥ puṣkalaṃ smṛtam || 204 ||
grāsamātrā bhavedbhikṣā gṛhastha sukṛtapradā |
adhvagaḥ kṣīṇavṛttiśca vidyārthī gurupoṣakaḥ || 205 |
yatiśca brahmacārī ca ṣaḍete dharmabhikṣukāḥ |
atithiḥ pathiko jñeyo'nūcānaḥ śrutipāragaḥ || 206 ||
mānyāvetau gṛhasthānāṃ brahmalokamabhīpsatām |
api śvapāke śuni vā naivānnaṃ niṣphalaṃ bhavet || 207 ||
sviṣṭakṛtodvayam agnaye sviṣṭakṛte svāhetyāhutidvayam || 201 |
anūcānaḥ sāṅgādhītiḥ || 206 ||

annārthini samāyāte pātrāpātraṃ na cintayet |
śunāṃ ca patitānāṃ ca śvapacāṃ pāparogiṇām || 208 ||
kākānāṃ ca kṛmīṇāṃ ca bahirannaṃ kiredbhuvi |
aindravāruṇavāyavyāḥ saumyā vai nairṛtāśca ye | 20 9 | |
pratigṛhṇantvimaṃ piṇḍaṃ kākā bhūmau mayāpitam |
dvau śvānau śyāmaśabalau vaivasvatkulodbhavā || 210 |
tābhyāṃ piṇḍaṃ pradāsyāmi syātāmetāvahiṃsakau |
devā manuṣyāḥ paśavo rakṣo yakṣoragāḥ khagāḥ || 211 |
daityāḥ siddhāḥ piśācāśca pretā bhūtāśca dānavāḥ |
tṛṇāni taravaścāpi maddattānnābhilāṣukāḥ || 212 |
kṛmikīṭapataṅgādyāḥ karmabaddhā bubhukṣitāḥ |
tṛptyarthamannaṃ hi mayā dattaṃ teṣāṃ mude'stu vai || 213 |
itthaṃ bhūtabala datvā kālaṃ godohamātrakam |
pratīkṣyātithimāyāntaṃ viśed bhojyagṛhaṃ tataḥ || 214 |
tarhi kimadhvagādyaṣṭau vihāyānyebhyo'nnaṃ na deyam ? kenoktamityāha | annārthinīti |
kintu śunāmiti || 208 |

adatvā vāyasabala nityaśrāddhaṃ samācaret |
nityaśrāddhe svasāmarthyāt trīn dvāvekamathāpi vā || 215 |
bhojayetpitṛyajñārthaṃ dadyāduddhṛtya durbalaḥ |
nityaśrāddhaṃ devahīnaṃ niyamādivivarjitam || 216 ||
dakṣiṇārahitaṃ tvetaddātṛbhoktṛvratojjhitam |
pitṛyajñaṃ vidhāyetthaṃ svastha buddhiranāturaḥ || 217 |
aduṣṭāsanamadhyāsya bhuñjīta śiśubhiḥ saha |
sugandhiḥ sumanāḥ sragvī śucivāso dvayānvitaḥ || 218 |
prāgāsya udagāsyo vā bhuñjīta pitṛsevitam || 216 ||
vidhāyānnamanagnaṃ tadupariṣṭādadhastathā |
āpośana vidhānena kṛtvā'śnīyātsudhīdvijaḥ || 220 ||
pradadyād bhuvaḥ pataye bhuvanapataye tathā |
bhūtānāṃ pataye svāhetyuktvā bhūmau balitrayam || 221 |
dadyāduddhṛtya durbala iti | daridraśca sarvasmāt svabhojyāt kiñcit kiñciduddhṛtya
sarvebhya eka baॉla dadyādityarthaḥ || 216 | tadannamadha upariṣṭāccānagnatāṃ vidhāya

sakṛccāpa upaspṛśya prāṇādyāhutipañcakam |
dadyājjaṭhara dadyājjaṭharakuṇḍāgnau kuṇḍāgnau darbhapāṇiḥ prasannadhīḥ || 222 |
darbhapāṇistu yo bhuṅkte tasya doṣo na vidyate |
keśakīṭādisambhūtastadaśnīyāt sadarbhakaḥ || 223 |
yāvaducyannamaśnīyānna brūyāttadguṇā'guṇān
bhuñjate pitarastāvadyāvaśoktā guṇāguṇāḥ || 224 ||
ato maunena yo bhuṅkte sa bhuṅkte kevalā'mṛtam |
anupīya tataḥ kṣīraṃ takaṃ pānīyameva vā || 225 |
amṛtāpidhānamasītyevaṃ prāśyodakaṃ sakṛt |
potaśeṣaṃ kṣipedbhūmau toyaṃ mantramimaṃ paṭhan || 226 |
aprakṣālita hastasya dakṣiṇāṅgaṇḍamūlataḥ |
raurave s puṇyanilaye padmārbudanivāsinām || 227 ||
ucchiṣṭodakamicchūnāmakṣayyamupatiṣṭhatām || 228 |

punarācamya medhāvī śucirbhūtvā prayatnataḥ |
hastenodakamādāya mantrametamudīrayet || 22 9 |
aṅguṣṭhamātraḥ puruṣastvaṃguṣṭhaṃ ca samāśritaḥ |
īśaḥ sarvasya jagataḥ prabhuḥ prīṇāti viśvabhuk || 230 ||
ityannaṃ parisaṃkalpya prakṣālya caraṇau karau | |
tato'nnapariṇāmārthaṃ mantrānetānudīrayet || 231 |
agnirāpyāyayandhātūn pārthivān pavaneritaḥ |
dattāvakāśo nabhasā jarayatvastu me sukham || 232 |
prāṇāpānasamānānāmudānavyānayostathā
annaṃ puṣṭikaraṃ cāstu mamāstvavyāhataṃ sukham || 233 ||
samudro vaḍavāgniśca bradhno bradhnasya nandanaḥ |
mayābhyavahṛtaṃ yattadaśeṣaṃ jarayantvime || 234 |
mukhaśuddha tataḥ kṛtvā purāṇaśravaṇādibhiḥ |
ativāhya divāśeṣaṃ tataḥ sandhyāṃ samārabhet || 235 ||

gṛhe goṣṭhe nadītīre sandhyā daśaguṇā kramāt |
saṃbhede syācchataguṇā hyanantā śivasannidhau || 236 ||
upāsitā bahiḥ sandhyā divāmaithunapātakam |
śamayedanṛtokttā ghaṃ madyagandhajameva ca || 237 |
sāmavedasvarūpāṃ ca vasiṣṭhaṣisamāyutām |
kṛṣṇāṅgīṃ kṛṣṇavasanāṃ manākskhalitayauvanām || 238 |
sarasvatīṃ tārkṣyayānāṃ vighnaghnīṃ viṣṇudaivatām |
jagatī cchandasā yuktāṃ dhyāyedekākṣarāṃ parām || 236 ||
agniśceti ca mantreṇa vidhāyācamanaṃ sudhoḥ |
paścimāsyo japettāvadyāvannakṣatradarśanam || 240 ||
atithi sāyamāyāntamapi vāgbhūtṛṇodakaiḥ |
sambhāvya parikalpyetthaṃ niśaḥ prākpraharaṃ sudhīḥ || 241 |
agniśceti mantraḥ , sūryaśva mā manyuśca mantreṇaiva vyākhyātaprāyaḥ || 240 ||

itthaṃ divākarma kṛtvā śruteḥ paṭhanapāṭhanaḥ |
ekakāṣṭhamayīṃ śayyāṃ nātitṛpto'tha saṃviśet || 242 |
uddeśataḥ samākhyāto hyeṣa nityatamo vidhiḥ |
itthaṃ samācaran vipro nāvasīdati karhicit || 243 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe sadācāro nāma pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 35 ||
tattasmād ekakāṣṭhamayoṃ ekajātīyakāṣṭhamayīm | akhaṇḍakāṣṭhamayīṃ vā || 242 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ pañcatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 35 ||

atha ṣaṭtriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
purnāvaśeṣaṃ vakṣyāmi sadācārasya kumbhaja |
yaṃ śrutvā'pi naro dhīmānnājñānatimiraṃ viśet || 1 ||
brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyā vaiśyāstrayo varṇā dvijāḥ smṛtāḥ |
prathamaṃ mātṛto jātād dvitīyaṃ copanāyanāt || 2 ||
eṣāṃ kriyā niṣekādiśmaśānāntā ca vaidikī |
ādadhīta sudhīrgarbhamṛtau mūlaṃ maghāṃ tyajet || 3 ||
spandanāt prāk puṃsavanaṃ sīmantonnayanaṃ tataḥ |
māsi ṣaṣṭhe'ṣṭame vā'pi jāte'tho jātakarma ca || 4 |
triśatitame'dhyāye pāvane'tyantaśobhane |
prathamāśramiṇāṃ tāvat sadācāro nirūpyate || 1 ||
evaṃ sādhāraṇyena dharmānuktvā prathamāśramiṇāṃ dharmān vaktumupakramate | purnāvaśeṣa-
miti || 1 |

māse'nnaprāśanaṃ ṣaṣṭhe cūḍābde vā yathākulam || 5 |
śamameno vrajedevaṃ baijaṃ garbhajameva ca |
strīṇāmetāḥ kriyāstūṣṇīṃ pāṇigrāhastu mantravān || 6 ||
saptame'thā'ṣṭame vābde sāvitrīṃ brāhmaṇo'rhati |
nṛpastvekādaśe vaiśyo dvādaśe vā yathākulam || 7 ||
brahmatejo'bhivṛddhyarthaṃ vipro'bde pañcame'rhati |
ṣaṣṭhe balārthī nṛpatimañjīṃ vaiśyo'ṣṭame dhiyet || 8 |
mahāvyāhṛtipūrvaṃ ca vedamadhyāpayed guruḥ |
upanīya ca taṃ śiṣyaṃ śaucācāre ca yojayet || 6 |

pūrvoktavidhinā śaucaṃ kuryādācamanaṃ tathā |
dantān jihvāṃ viśodhyā'tha kṛtvā malaviśodhanam || 10 ||
snātvā'mbudaivatermantraiḥ prāṇānāyamya yatnataḥ |
upasthānaṃ raveḥ raveḥ kṛtvā kṛtvā sandhyayorubhayorapi ||| 11 |
agnikāryaṃ tataḥ kṛtvā brāhmaṇānabhivādayet |
bruvannamukagotro'hamabhivādaya ityapi || 52 |
abhivādanaśīlasya vṛddhasevāratasya ca |
āyuryaśo balaṃ buddhirvardhate'haraho'dhikam || 13 ||
adhīte guruṇāhūtaḥ prāptaṃ tasmai nivedayet |
karmaṇā manasā vācā hitaṃ tasyācaret sadā || 14 |
adhyāpyādharmato nārthāt sādhvāptajñānavittadā |
śaktāḥ kṛtajñāḥ śucayo'drohakāśvānasūyakāḥ || 15 |
dhārayenmekhalādaṇḍopavītā jinameva ca
anindyeṣu cared bhaikṣyaṃ brāhmaṇeṣvātmavṛttaye || 16 ||
anindyeṣu abhiśaptapatitavarjiteṣu | brāhmaṇeṣviti sarveṣāṃ sādhāraṇyena || 16 |

brāhmaṇakṣatriya viśāmādimadhyāvasānataḥ
bhaikṣyacaryā krameṇa syād bhavacchabdopalakṣitā || 17 |
vāgyato gurvanujñāto bhuñjītā'nnamakutsayan |
ekānaṃ na samaśnīyācchrāddhe'śnīyāttathāpadi ||| 18 |
anārogyamanāyuṣyamasvagyaṃ cātibhojanam |
apuṇyaṃ lokavidviṣṭaṃ tasmāttatparivarjayet || 16 ||
na dvirbhuñjīta caikasmin divā kvā'pi dvijottamaḥ |
sāyaṃ prātadvijo'śnīyādagnihotravidhānavit || 20 ||

madhumāṃsaṃ prāṇihiṃsā bhāskarālokanāñjane |
striyaṃ paryuṣitocchiṣṭaṃ parivādaṃ vivarjayet || 21 ||
aupanāyanikaḥ kālo brahmakṣatraviśāṃ paraḥ |
āṣoḍaśādādvāviṃśādācatuviśadabdataḥ || 22 ||
ito'pyadhvaṃ na saṃskāryāḥ patitā dharmavarjitāḥ |
vrātyastomena yajñena tatpātityaṃ parivrajet || 23 |
sāvitropatitaiḥ sādhaṃ sambandhaṃ na samācaret |
aiṇaṃ ca rauravaṃ bāstaṃ kramāccarma dvijanmanām || 24 |
vasīrannānupūrvyeṇa śāṇakṣaumāvikāni ca |
dvijasya mekhalā mauñjī maurvī ca bhujajanmanaḥ |
bhavettrivṛtsamāślakṣṇā viśastu śaṇatāntavī || 25 ||
bhāskarālokanavarjanaṃ tadayādiṣu | tathā ca manuḥ - " nekṣyetodyantamādityam ”

muñjābhāve vidhātavyā kuśāśmantakabalvajaḥ |
granthinaikena saṃyuktā tribhiḥ pañcabhireva vā || 26 ||
upavītaṃ krameṇa syāt kārpāsaṃ śāṇamāvikam |
trivṛddūrdhvavṛtaṃ tacca bhadedāyuvivṛddhaye ||| 27 ||
bilvapālāśayordaṇḍo brāhmaṇasya nṛpasya tu |
nyagrodhabāladalayoḥ polū dumbarayoviṃśa : || 28 |
āmauli vā''lalāṭaṃ vā''nāsamūrdhvapramāṇataḥ |
brahmakṣatraviśāṃ daṇḍastvagāḍhyo nāgnidūṣitaḥ || 26 |

pradakṣiṇaṃ parotyāgnimupasthāya divākaram |
daṇḍājinopavītāḍhyaścaredbhaikṣyaṃ yathoditam || 30 |
mātṛmātṛṣvasṛsvasṛpitṛsvasṛpuraḥsarāḥ
prathamaṃ bhikṣaṇīyāḥ syuretāyā ca na no vadet || 31 ||
yāvadvedamadhīte ca caran vedavratāni ca |
brahmacārī bhavettāvadūdhvaṃ snāto gṛhī bhavet || 32 ||
prokto'sāvupakurvāṇo dvitīyastatra naiṣṭhikaḥ
tiṣṭhettāvadgurukule yāvatsyādāyuṣaḥ kṣayaḥ || 33 ||
gṛhāśramaṃ samāśritya yaḥ punarbrahmacaryabhāk |
nā'sau yatirvanastho vā syāt sarvāśramarvājitaḥ || 34 |
anāśramī na tiṣṭheta dinamekamapi dvijaḥ |
āśramaṃ tu vinā tiṣṭhan prāyaścittī yato hi saḥ || 35 ||
yathoditaṃ pūrvoktaprakāreṇoktam || 30 ||
na no vadenāstīti na brūyāt | yā cainaṃ nāvamānayediti pāṭhe enaṃ brahmacāriṇaṃ

jayaṃ homaṃ vrataṃ dānaṃ svādhyāyaṃ pitṛtarpaṇam |
kurvāṇo'thāśramabhraṣṭo nā'sau tatphalamāpnuyāt || 36 ||
mekhalājinadaṇḍāśca liṅgaṃ syād brahmacāriṇaḥ |
gṛhiṇo vedayajñādi nakhalomavanasthiteḥ || 37 |
tridaṇḍādi yateruktamupalakṣaṇamatra vai |
etallakṣaṇahīnastu prāyaścitto dine dine || 38 ||
jīṇaṃ kamaṇḍaluṃ daṇḍamupavītājine api |
apsveva tāni nikṣipya gṛhṇītānyacca mantravat || 3 9 ||
vidadhyāt ṣoḍaśe varṣe keśāntaṃ karma ca kramāt |
dvāviṃśe ca catuviśe gārhasthyapratipattaye ||| 40 |
tapo yajñavratebhyaśva sarvasmācchubhakarmaṇaḥ |
dvijātīnāṃ śrutikā hetu niḥśreyasaśriyaḥ || 41 ||
vedaśca yajñaśvādiyaṃsya liṅgasya cihnasya tattathā | vedayaṣṭyādīti pāṭhaści-
ntyaḥ || 37 ||
upalakṣaṇaṃ cihnam || 38 |
keśāntaṃ samāvartanam || 40 ||
ekā mukhyā kevalā || 41 ||
koī āśramabhraṣṭa hokara japa , homa , vrata , dāna , svādhyāya aura pitṛtarpaṇa ādi

vedārambhe visarge ca vidadhyāt praṇavaṃ sadā |
aphalo s noṃkṛto yasmātpaṭhito'pi na siddhaye ||| 42 |
vedasya vadanaṃ proktaṃ proktaṃ gāyatrī gāyatrī tripadā parā |
tisṛbhiḥ praṇavādyābhirmahāvyāhṛtibhiḥ saha || 43 ||
sahasraṃ sādhikaṃ kiñcittrikametajjapan yamī |
māsaṃ bahiḥ pratidinaṃ mahāghādapi mucyate || 44 ||
atyabdamiti yo'bhyaset pratighatramananyadhīḥ |
sa vyomamūrtiḥ śuddhātmā paraṃ brahmādhigacchati ||| 45 |
trivarṇamayamoṃkāraṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svariti trayam |
pādatrayaṃ ca sāvitryāstrayo vedā adduhan || 46 |
etadakṣaramenāṃ ca japed vyāhṛti pūrvikām |
sandhyayorvedavidvipro vedapuṇyena yujyate || 47 ||
bahi : nadītīrādī || 44 |

vidhikratordaśaguṇaṃ japasya phalamaśnute |
vidhikratordaśaguṇo japakraturudīritaḥ || 48 ||
upāṃśustacchataguṇaḥ sahasro mānasastataḥ || 4 9 |
adhītya vedān vedau vā vedaṃ vā śaktito dvijaḥ |
suvarṇa pūrṇadharaṇīdānasya phalamaśnute || 50 |
śrutimeva sadā'bhyasyettapastaptaṃ dvijottamaḥ |
śrutyabhyāseo hi viprasya paramaṃ tapa ucyate || 51 || |
hitvā śruteradhyayanaṃ yo'nyat paṭhitumicchati |
sa dogdhrīṃ dhenumutsṛjya grāmakroḍoṃ dudhukṣati || 52 ||
upanīya ca vai śiṣyaṃ vedamadhyāpayed dvijaḥ |
sakalpaṃ sarahasyaṃ sarahasyaṃ ca ca tamācāyaṃ vidurbudhāḥ || 53 |

yo'dhyāpayedekadeśaṃ śruteraṅgānyathā'pi vā |
vṛttyarthaṃ sa upādhyāyo vidvadbhiḥ parigīyate || 54 ||
yathāvidhi niṣekādi yaḥ karma kurute dvijaḥ |
sambhāvayettathā'nena guruḥ sa iha kīrtyate || 55 ||
agnyādheyaṃ pākayajñānagniṣṭomādikān makhān |
yaḥ karoti vṛto yasya sa tasyatvigihocyate || 56 |
upādhyāyāddaśācārya ācāryāttu śataṃ pitā |
sahasrantu piturmātā gauraveṇātiricyate || 57 ||
viprāṇāṃ jñānato jyaiṣṭhayaṃ bāhujānāṃ tu vīryataḥ |
vaiśyānāṃ dhānyadhanataḥ pajjātānāntu janmataḥ || 58 ||
yathā dārumayo hastī yathā kṛttimayo mṛgaḥ |
tathā vipro'nadhīyānastrayo'mī nāmadhāriṇaḥ || 5 9 |
āhavanīyādyagnyutpādakaṃ karma agnyādheyam | pākayajñān pakvanavasasyanimittān
aṣṭakādīn vā || 56 ||
kṛttimayaḥ carmamayaḥ || 5 9 ||

snātvārka marcayitvā triḥ punarmāmityṛcaṃ japet || 6 ||
svadharmaniratānāṃ ca vedayajñakriyāvatām |
brahmacārī caredbhaikṣyaṃ veśmasu prayato'nvaham || 61 ||
akṛtvā bhaikṣyacaraṇamasamidhyahutāśanam |
anāturaḥ saptarātramavakīṇivrataṃ caret || 62 ||
yatheṣṭaceṣṭo na bhaved gurornayanagocare |
na nāma parigṛhṇīyāt parokṣepyaviśeṣaṇam || 63 ||
gurunindā bhavedyatra parivādastu yatra ca |
śrutī pidhāya vā stheyaṃ yātavyaṃ vā tato'nyataḥ ||| 64 |
kharo guroḥ parīvādācchvā bhavedgurunindakaḥ |
matsarī kṣudrakīṭaḥ syāt paribhoktā bhavet kṛmi : || 65 |

nābhivādyā guroḥ patnī spṛṣṭvāṃghrī yuvatī satī |
kvāpi viśativarṣeṇa jñātṝṇā guṇadoṣayoḥ || 66 ||
svabhāvaścañcalaḥ strīrṇā doṣaḥ puṃsāmataḥ smṛtaḥ |
pramadāsu pramādyanti kvacinnaiva vipaścitaḥ || 67 ||
vidvāṃsamapyavidvāṃsaṃ yatastādharṣayantyalam |
svavaśaṃ vāpi kurvanti sūtrabaddhaśakuntavat || 68 |
na mātrā na duhitrā vā na svastraikāntaśīlatā |
balavantīṃdriyāṇyatra mohayantyapi kovidān || 66 |
prayatnena khananyadvadbhūmervāryadhigacchati
śuśrūṣayā gurostadvad vidyāṃ śiṣyo'dhigacchati || 70 ||

śayānamabhyudayate bradhnaśced brahmacāriṇam |
pramādādatha nimnocecjapannupavaseddinam || 71 ||
sutasya sambhave kleśaṃ sahete pitarau ca yat |
śakyā varṣaśatenāpi no kartuṃ tasya niṣkṛtiḥ || 72 ||
atastayoḥ priyaṃ kuryād gurorapi ca sarvadā |
triṣu teṣu sutuṣṭeṣu tapaḥ savaṃ samāpyate || 73 ||
teṣāṃ trayāṇāṃ śuśrūṣā paramaṃ tapa ucyate |
tānatikramya yatkuryāttanna siddhayetkadācana || 74 ||
trīnevāmūn samārādhya trī llokān sa jayetsudhīḥ |
devavad divi divyeta teṣāṃ toṣaṃ vivardhayan || 75 |
bhūrlokaṃ jananībhaktyā bhuvarlokaṃ tathā pituḥ |
guroḥ śuśrūṣaṇāttadvat svarlokaṃ ca jayet kṛtī || 76 ||
japan gāyatrīmiti śeṣaḥ || 71 ||

etadeva nṛṇāṃ proktaṃ puruṣārthacatuṣṭayam |
yadeteṣāṃ hi santoṣa upadharmo'nya ucyate || 77 ||
adhītya vedān vedau vā vedaṃ vā'pi kramādvijaḥ |
apraskhaladbrahmacaryo gṛhāśramamathāśrayet || 78 ||
aviplutabrahmacaryo viśveśānugrahād bhavet |
anugrahaśca vaiśveśaḥ kāśīprāptikaraḥ paraḥ || 76 |
kāśīprāptyā bhavejjñānaṃ jñānānnirvāṇamṛcchati |
nirvāṇārthaṃ prayatno hi sadācārasya dhīmatām || 80 ||
sadācāro gṛhe yadvanna tathā'styāśramāntare |
vidyājātaṃ paṭhitvānte gṛhasthāśramamāśrayet || 81 ||
gṛhāśramāt paraṃ nāsti yadi patnī vaśaṃvadā |
ānukūlyaṃ hi dampatyostrivargodayahetave || 82 ||
ṛcchati prāpnoti || 80 ||

prātikūlyaṃ kalatraṃ cennarakeṇāpi kiṃ tataḥ || 83 ||
gṛhāśramaḥ sukhārthāya bhāryāmūlaṃ ca tatsukham |
sā ca bhāryā vinītā yā trivargo vinayo dhruvam || 84 ||
jalaukayopamīyanteṃ pramadā mandabuddhibhiḥ |
mṛgīdṛśāṃ jalaukānāṃ vicārānmahadantaram || 85 |
jalaukā kevalaṃ raktamādadānā tapasvinī |
pramadā sarvadā datte cittaṃ vittaṃ balaṃ sukham || 86 |
dakṣā prajāvatī sādhvī priyavāk ca vaśaṃvadā |
guroramībhiḥ saṃyuktā sā śrīḥ strīrūpadhāriṇī || 87 ||
tata ānukūlyāttadeti vā | evamagre'pi ||| 83 |

murāranujñayā snātvā vrataṃ vedaṃ samāpya ca |
udvaheta tato bhāryāṃ savarṇāṃ sādhulakṣaṇām || 88 |
janeturasagotrā yā māturyāpyasapiṇḍakā |
dārakarmaṇi yogyā sā dvijānāṃ dharmavṛddhaye || 8 9 |
strīsambandhe'pyapasmārikṣayiśvitrikulaṃ tyajet |
abhiśastisamāyuktaṃ tathā kanyāprasūṃ tyajet || 9 0 ||
rogahīnāṃ bhrātṛmatīṃ svasmāt kiñcillaghīyasīm |
udvaheta dvijo bhāryāṃ saumyāsyāṃ mṛdubhāṣiṇīm || 9 1 |
na parvatarkṣavṛkṣāhvāṃ na nadīsarpanāmikām |
na pakṣyahipreṣyanāmnī saumyākhyāmudvahetsudhīḥ || 9 2 ||
na cātiriktahonāṃgoṃ nātidīrghā na vā kṛśām |
nālomikāṃ nātilomāṃ nāsnigdhasthūlamaulijām || 9 3 ||
parvataśca ṛkṣaṃ ca nakṣatraṃ ca ṛkṣaśca bhallūka iti vā | vṛkṣaśca tadāhvāṃ tadākhyā-
|| iti śrīkāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ ṣatriṃśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 36 ||

hīnopayamanādyāti santānamapi hīnatām || 9 4 |
lakṣaṇāni ' parīkṣyādau tataḥ kanyāṃ samudvahet |
sulakṣaṇāsadācārāpatyurāyuvivardhayet || 9 5 |
brahmacārisamācāra iti iti te samudīritaḥ |
ghaṭodbhava prasaṅgena strīlakṣaṇamatha bruve || 9 6 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe ṣaṭ triṃśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 36 ||

atha saptatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca - yadi |
sadā gṛhī sukhaṃ bhuṅkte strīlakṣaṇavatī
ataḥ samṛddhadharthamādau lakṣaṇamīkṣayet || 1 |
vapurāvarta gandhāśca chāyā satvaṃ svaro gatiḥ |

āpādatalamārabhya yāvanmauliruhaṃ kramāt |
śubhāśubhāni vakṣyāmi lakṣaṇāni mune śṛṇu || 3 ||
ādau pādatalaṃ rekhāstato'ṅguṣṭhāṅgulīnakhāḥ |
pṛṣṭhaṃ gulphadvayaṃ pārṇī jaṃghe romāṇi jānunī || 4 ||
ūrū kaṭonitambasphig bhago jaghanabastike |
nābhiḥ kukṣidvayaṃ pārśvodaramadhyavalitrayam || 5 |
vapuṣo lakṣaṇaṃ vaktuṃ pratijānīte | āpādeti | yāvanmauliruhaṃ yāvatkeśam || 3 |
śarīrasya pratyaṅgaṃ lakṣaṇaṃ vaktumaṅgāni kathayati | | ādhāviti ṣaḍbhiḥ | yoṣidevaṃ

romālīhṛdayaṃ vakṣojadvayacūcukam |
jatruskandhāṃsakakṣādormaṇibandhakaradvayam
pāṇipṛṣṭhaṃ pāṇitalaṃ ' rekhāṅguṣṭhā'ṅgulīnakhāḥ |
pṛṣṭhiḥ kṛkāṭikākaṇṭhe cibukaṃ ca hanūdvayam || 7 ||
kapolau vakramadharottaroṣṭhau dvijajihnikāḥ |
ghaṇṭikā tālu hasitaṃ nāsikā kṣutamakṣiṇī || 8 |

ṣaṣṭiḥ ṣaḍuttarā yoṣidaṅgalakṣaṇasatkhaniḥ || 6 |
strīṇāṃ pādatalaṃ snigdhaṃ māṃsalaṃ mṛdulaṃ samam |
asvedamuṣṇamaruṇaṃ bahubhogocitaṃ smṛtam ||| 10 |
rukṣaṃ vivaṇaṃ paruṣaṃ khaṇḍitapratibimbakam |
sūrpākāraṃ viśuṣkaṃ ca duḥkhadaurbhāgyasūcakam || 11 ||
cakrasvastika śaṃkhābjadhvajamīnātapatravat
yasyāḥ pādatale rekhā sā bhavet kṣitipā'ṅganā || 12 |

bhavedakhaṇḍabhogāyoddhṛrvā madhyā'ṅgulisaṅgatā |
rekhākhusarpakākābhā duḥkhadākhiyasūcikāḥ || 13 ||
unnato māṃsalo'ṅguṣṭho vartulo'tula bhogadaḥ |
vakro hrasvaśca cipiṭaḥ sukhasaubhāgyabhañjakaḥ || 14 ||
vidhavā vipulena syāddīrghā'ṅguṣṭhena durbhagā |
mṛdavo'ṅgulayaḥ śastā ghanāvṛttāḥ samunnatāḥ || 15 |
dīrghā'ṅgulībhiḥ kulaṭā kṛśābhiratinirdhanā |
hasvāyuṣyā ca hrasvābhirbhugnābhirbhugnavartinī || 16 ||
cipiṭābhirbhaveddāsī viralābhirdaridriṇī |
parasparaṃ samārūḍhāḥ pādā'ṅgulyo bhavanti hi || 17 ||
hatvā bahūnapi patīn parapreṣyā tadā bhavet |
yasyāḥ pathi samāyāntyā rajo bhūmeḥ samucchalet || 18 ||

yasyāḥ kaniṣṭhikā bhūmiṃ na gacchantyā parispṛśet || 16 ||
sā nihatya pati yoṣā dvitīyaṃ kurute patim |
anāmikā ca madhyā ca yasyā bhūmi na saṃspṛśet || 20 ||
patidvayaṃ nihantyādyā dvitīyā ca patitrayam |
patihīnatvakāriṇyau hone te dve ime yadi || 21 ||
pradeśinī bhavedyasyā aṅguṣṭhāvyatirekiṇī |
kanyaiva kulaṭā sā syādeṣa eva viniścayaḥ || 22 |
snigdhāḥ samunnatāstāmrā vṛttāḥ pādanakhāḥ śubhāḥ || 23 ||
rājñītvasūcakaṃ strīṇāṃ pādapṛṣṭhaṃ samunnatam |
asvedamaśirāḍhyaṃ ca masṛṇaṃ mṛdumāṃsalam || 24 ||

daridrā madhyanatreṇa śirālena sadādhvagā |
romāḍhayena bhaveddāsī nirmāṃsena ca durbhagā || 25 ||
gūḍhī gulphau śivāyoktāvaśirālau suvartulau |
sthapuṭau śithilau dṛśyau syātāṃ daurbhāgyasūcakau || 26 ||
samapāṇiḥ śubhā nārī pṛthupāṣṇiśca durbhagā |
phulaṭonnatapāṇiḥ syāddīrghapāṣṇiśca duḥkhabhāk || 27 ||
romahīne same snigdhe yajjaṅge kramavartule |
sā rājapatnī bhavati viśire sumanohare || 28 |
pādapṛṣṭhasya śubhāśubhalakṣaṇe āha | rājñośveti dvayena || 24-25 |
pādagranthyaparaparyāyasya gulphasya śubhāśubhalakṣaṇe āha | | gūḍhāvityekena | | sthapuṭo

ekaromā rājapatnī dviromā ca sukhāvahā | |
triromā romakūpeṣu bhaved vaidhavyaduḥkhabhāk || 26 ||
vṛttaṃ piśitasaṃlagnaṃ jānuyugmaṃ praśasyate |
nirmāṃsaṃ svairacāriṇyā daridrāyāśca viślatham || 30 ||
viśiraiḥ karabhākārai rurubhirmasṛṇairdhanaiḥ |
suvṛttai romarahitaṃ bhaveyurbhapavallabhāḥ || 31 ||
vaidhavyaṃ romaśairuktaṃ daurbhāgyaṃ cipiṭairapi |
madhyacchidrairmahāduḥkhaṃ dāridracaṃ kaṭhinatvacaiḥ || 32 ||
catubhiraṅgulaiḥ śastā kaṭiviṃśatisaṃyutaiḥ |
samunnatanitambāḍhyā caturasrā mṛgīdṛśām || 33 ||
kūpotthasya romṇaḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | ekarometyekena | romakūpeṣviti triṣvapi

vinatā cipiṭā dīrghā nirmāsā saṃkaṭā kaṭiḥ |
hasvā romayutā nāyaṃ duḥkhavaidhavyasūcikāḥ || 34 ||
nitambabimbo nārīṇāmunnato māṃsalaḥ pṛthuḥ |
mahābhogāya samproktastadanyo'śarmaṇe mataḥ || 35 |
kapitthaphalavadvṛttau mṛdulau māṃsalau ghanau |
sphicau valivinirmuktau ratisaukhyavivardhanau || 36 ||
śubhaḥ kamaṭhapṛṣṭhābho gajaskandhopamo bhagaḥ |
vāmonnatastu kanyājaḥ putrajo dakṣiṇonnataḥ || 37 ||

tuṅgaḥ kamalaparṇābhaḥ śubho'śvatthadalākṛtiḥ || 38 |
kuraṅgakhurarūpo yaścullikodarasannibhaḥ
romaśo vivṛtāsyaśca dṛśyanāso'tidurbhagaḥ || 36 |.
śaṅkhāvarto bhago yasyāḥ sā garbhamiha necchati |
cipiṭa : kharparākaraḥ kiṅkarīpadado bhagaḥ || 40 ||
vaṃśavetasapatrābho gajaromoccanāsikaḥ
vikaṭaḥ kuṭilākāro lambagallastathā'śubhaḥ || 41 ||
ākhūnāṃ mūṣakānāmiva piṅgalāni romāṇi yasya sa tathā | gūḍho maṇiriva maṇi-
rvarāṅgatvānmadhyabhāgaviśeṣo yasya sa tathā | suśliṣṭaḥ sunibiḍaḥ | saṃhato dṛḍhā | pṛthu-

bhagasya bhālaṃ jaghanaṃ vistoṇaṃ tuṅgamāṃsalam |
mṛdulaṃ mṛdulomāḍhyaṃ dakṣiṇāvarta mīḍitam || 42 ||
vāmāvarta ca nirmāsaṃ bhugnaṃ vaidhavyasūcakam |
saṃkaṭasthapuṭaṃ rukṣaṃ jaghanaṃ duḥkhadaṃ sadā || 43 |
bastiḥ praśastā vipulā mṛdvostokasamunnatā |
romaśā ca sirālā ca rekhāṅkā naiva śobhanā ||| 44 |
gambhīrā dakṣiṇāvartā nābhī syāt sukhasampade |
vāmāvartā samuttānā vyaktagranthirna śobhanā ||| 45 |
romāṇi yasya sa tathā | uccanāsiko dīrghanāsikaḥ | vikaṭaḥ kutsitaḥ | kuṭilākāro

kṣitīśaṃ janayetputraṃ janayetputraṃ maṇḍūkābhena kukṣiṇā ||| 46 |
unnatena valībhājā sāvartenāpi kukṣiṇā |
vandhyā pravrajitā dāsī kramādyoṣā bhavediha || 47 ||
samaiḥ samāṃsairmṛdubhiryoṣinmagnāsthibhiḥ śubhaiḥ |
pārśvaḥ saubhāgyasukhayonidhānaṃ syādasaṃśayam || 48 ||
yasyā dṛśyaśire pārśve unnate romasaṃyute |
nirapatyā ca duḥśīlā sā bhaved duḥkhaśevadhiḥ || 46 ||

udareṇātitucchena viśireṇa mṛdutvacā |
yoṣidbhavati bhogāḍhyā nityaṃ miṣṭānnasevinī ||| 50 |
kumbhākāraṃ daridrāyā daridrāyā jaṭharaṃ ca mṛdajavat |
kūṣmāṇḍābhaṃ yavābhaṃ ca duṣpūraṃ jāyate striyāḥ || 51 |
suviśālodarī nārī nirapatyā ca durbhagā |
pralambajaṭharā hanti śvaśuraṃ cāpi devaram ||| 52 |
madhyakṣāmā ca subhagā bhogāḍhyā sarvalitrayā |
ṛjvī tanvī ca romālī yasyāḥ sā śarmanarmabhūḥ || 53 |
pilā kuṭilā sthūlā vicchinnā romarājikā |
cauravaidhavyadaurbhāgyaṃ vidadhyādiha yoṣitām || 54 ||
udarasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | udareṇeti tribhiḥ | atitucchenātisūkṣmeṇe-
tyartha || 50 ||
devaraṃ bhartṛbhrātaram || 52 |

nirlomahṛdayaṃ yasyāḥ samaṃ nimnatvarvājitam |
aiśvayaṃ cāpyavaidhavyaṃ priyaprema ca sā labhet || 55 |
vistīrṇahṛdayā yoṣā puṃścalī nirdayā tathā |
udbhinnaromahṛdayā pati hanti viniścitam || 56 ||
aṣṭādaśāṅgulatatamuraḥ pīvaramunnatam |
sukhāya duḥkhāya bhavedromaśaṃ viṣamaṃ pṛthu || 57 |
ghanau vṛttau dṛḍhau pīnau samau śastau payodharau |
sthūlāgrau viralau śuṣkau vāmorūṇāṃ na śarmaṃdau || 58 ||
dakṣiṇonnatavakṣojā putriṇī tvagraṇīrmatā |
vāmonnatakucā sūte kanyāṃ saubhāgyasundarīm || 5 9 |
hṛdayasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | nirlometi dvābhyām || 55 |
vakṣasaḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | aṣṭādaśetyekena || 57 ||
vakṣojasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | ghanāviti caturbhiḥ | śastī praśastī || 58 ||

araghaṭṭaghaṭītulyā kucau dauḥ śīlyasūcakau |
pīvarāsyau sāntarālau pṛthūpāntau na śobhanau || 60 ||
mūle sthūlo kramakṛśāvane tīkṣṇau payodharau |
sukhadau pūrvakāle tu paścādatyantaduḥkhadau | 61 |
sudṛḍhaṃ cūcukayugaṃ śastaṃ śyāmaṃ suvartulam |
antarmagnaṃ ca doghaṃ ca kṛśaṃ kleśāya jāyate || 62 |
pīvarābhyāṃ ca jatrubhyāṃ dhanadhānyanidhirvadhūḥ |
ślathāsthibhyāṃ ca nimnābhyāṃ viṣamābhyāṃ daridriṇī || 63 |
abaddhāvanatau skandhāvadīrghāvakṛśau śubhau |
vaqau sthūlau ca romāḍhyau preṣyavaidhavyasūcakau || 64 ||
araghaṭṭo ghaṭīyantraṃ rahaṭṭa iti gujaṃradeśe prasiddham | tatrasthā yā ghaṭī , tattulyo
cūcukasya śubhāśubha lakṣaṇe āha | sudṛḍhamityekena | sudṛśāmiti kvacit || 62 ||

vaidhavyadau samuccānau nirmāṃsāvatiduḥkhado || 65 ||
kakṣe susūkṣmarome tu tuṅge snigdhe ca māṃsale |
śaste na śaste gambhīre śirāle svedamedure || 66 ||
syātāṃ doṣau sunirdoṣau gūḍhāsthigranthikomalau |
viśirau ca viromāṇau saralau hariṇīdṛśām || 67 |
vaidhavyaṃ ' sthūlaromāṇau hrasvau daurbhāgyasūcakau |
parikleśāya nārīṇāṃ paridṛśyaśirau bhujau || 68 ||
ambhojamukulākāramaṅguṣṭhāṅgulisaṃmukham
hastadvayaṃ mṛgākṣīṇī bahubhogāya jāyate || 66 |
aṃśasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | nigūḍhetyekena | samuccāgrī unnatāgrī || 65 |
kakṣayoḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | kakṣe ityekena | śirāle śirāyukte | svedamedure
svedasnigdhe || 66 ||
doṣaḥ śubhāśubha lakṣaṇe āha | sthātāmiti dvayena | gūḍho asthigranthī yayostī
gūḍhāsthigranthī tau ca to komalo ceti tathā | 67 |
maṇibandhāvadhikarasya śubhalakṣaṇamāha | ambhojetyekena | aṅguṣṭho'ṅgulayaśca
samyaṅmukhaṃ yasya tattathā || 6 9 |

mṛdu madhyonnataṃ raktaṃ talaṃ pāṇyorarandhrakam |
praśastaṃ śastarekhāḍhyamalparekhaṃ śubhaśriyam || 70 ||
vidhavā bahurekheṇa virekheṇa daridriṇī |
bhikṣukī suśirāḍhyena nārī karatalena vai || 71 |
viromaviśiraṃ śastaṃ pāṇipṛṣṭhaṃ samunnatam |
vaidhavya hetu romāḍhyaṃ nirmāsaṃ snāyumatyajet || 72 ||
raktā vyaktā gabhīrā ca snigdhā pūrṇā ca vartulā |
kararekhā'ṅganāyāḥ syācchubhā bhāgyānusārataḥ || 73 |
matsyena subhagā nārī svastikena vasupradā |
padmena bhūpateḥ patnī janayed bhūrpāta sutam || 74 ||
kramamanādṛtya pāṇitalasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | mṛdumadhyonnatamiti
dvayena || 70 ||
pāṇipṛṣṭhasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | virometyekena || 72 |
hastarekhāyāḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | raktetyādi sārdhāṣṭabhiḥ || 73 |
svastikena trikoṇāṅkitarekhāviśeṣeṇa || 74 ||

śaṅkhatipatrakamaṭhā nṛpamātṛtvasūcakāḥ || 75 |

kaṅkajambuka maṇḍūkavakavṛścikabhoginaḥ
rāsabhoṣṭra biḍālāḥ syuḥ karasthā duḥkhadāḥ striyāḥ || 80 ||
śubhadaḥ saralo'ṅguṣṭho vṛtto vṛttanakho mṛduḥ || 81 ||
aṅgulyaśca suparvāṇo dīrghāvṛttāḥ kramātkṛśāḥ |
cipiṭāḥ sthapuṭā rukṣāḥ pṛṣṭharomayujo'śubhāḥ || 82 ||
atihrasvāḥ kṛśā vaktā viralā rogahetukāḥ |
duḥkhāyā'ṅgulayaḥ strīṇāṃ bahuparvasamanvitāḥ || 83 ||
aruṇāḥ saśikhāstuṅgāḥ karajāḥ sudṛśāṃ śubhāḥ |
nimnā vivarṇā śuktyābhāḥ potā dāridryadāyakāḥ ||| 84 |

puruṣā api jāyante duḥkhinaḥ puṣpitairnakhaiḥ || 85 |
antarnimagnavaṃśā sthiḥ pṛṣṭhiḥ syānmāṃsalā śubhā |
pṛṣṭhena romayuktena vaidhavyaṃ labhate dhruvam || 86 ||
bhugnena vinatenāpi saśireṇā'pi duḥkhitāḥ |
ṛjvī kṛkāṭikā śreṣṭhā samāṃsā ca samunnatā || 87 |
śuṣkā śirālā romāḍhyā viśālā kuṭilā śubhā |
māṃsalo vartulaḥ kaṇṭhaḥ praśastaścaturaṅgulaḥ || 88 ||
śastā grīvā trirekhāṅkā tvavyaktāsthiḥ susaṃhatā |
nirmāṃsā cipiṭā dorghā sthapuṭā na śubhapradā ||| 8 9 |
sthūlagrīvā ca vidhavā vakragrīvā ca kiṅkarī |
vandhyā hi cipiṭagrīvā hrasvagrīvā ca niḥsutā || 9 0 ||
prasaṅgāt puruṣāṇāmapi nakhānāmaśubhalakṣaṇamāha | paruṣā ityardhena | puṣpiteḥ
śvetapuṣpavarṇairityarthaḥ || 85 |
pṛṣṭheḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | antariti sārdhena | antarnimagnaṃ tiryagvaṃśākāra -
masthi yasyāṃsāntarnimagnavaṃśāsthiḥ || 86 |
kṛkāṭikāyāḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | ṛjvītyekena ' || 87 ||
kaṇṭhasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | māṃsala iti sārdhadvayena || 88 |

cibukaṃ dvayaṅgulaṃ śastaṃ vṛttaṃ pīnaṃ sukomalam |
sthūlaṃ dvidhā saṃvibhaktamāyataṃ romaśaṃ tyajet || 9 1 ||
hanuścibukasaṃlagnā nirlomā sughanā śubhā |
vakrā sthūlā kṛśā hrasvā romaśā na śubhapradā || 9 2 |
śastau kapolau vāmākṣyāḥ pīnau vṛttau samunnatau |
romaśau paruṣau nimnau nirmāsau parivarjayet || 9 3 ||
samaṃ samāṃsaṃ susnigdhaṃ svāmodaṃ vartulaṃ mukham |
janetṛvadanacchāyaṃ dhanyānāmiha jāyate || 9 4 |
pāṭalo vartulaḥ snigdho lekhābhūṣitamadhyabhūḥ |
sīmantinīnāmadharo dharājānipriyo bhavet || 9 5 |
cibukasya śubhāśubha lakṣaṇe āha | cibukamityekena | tyajetsthūlādicibukavatīṃ

śyāvaḥ sthūlo'dharoṣṭhaḥ syādvaidhavya kalahapradaḥ || 9 6 |
masṛṇo mattakāśinyāścottaroṣṭhaḥ subhogadaḥ |
kiñcinmadhyonnato'romā viparīto viruddhakṛt || 9 7 ||
gokṣīrasannibhāḥ snigdhā dvātriṃśaddaśavāḥ śubhāḥ |
adhastādupariṣṭācca samāḥ stokasamunnatāḥ || 9 8 |
pītāḥ śyāvāśca daśanāḥ sthūlā dīrghā dvipaṅktayaḥ |
śuktyākārāśca viralā duḥkha ' daurbhāgyakāraṇam || 99 |
adhastādadhikairdantermātaraṃ bhakṣayetsphuṭam |
patihīnā ca vikaṭaiḥ kulaṭā viralairbhavet || 100 |
śyāvaḥ kapiśaḥ || 9 6 |
avayavasaṃkhyā 50 uttaroṣṭhasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | masṛṇa ityekena |
viparītaḥ kutsitaḥ pūrvasmādviparīto vā | dvijānāṃ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | gokṣīreti

jihveṣṭamiṣṭabhoktrī syācchoṇā mṛdvī tathāsitā |
duḥkhāya madhya saṃkīrṇā purobhāgasa vistarā || 101 |
sitayā toyamaraṇaṃ śyāmayā kalahapriyā |
daridriṇī māṃsalayā lambayā'bhakṣyabhakṣiṇī || 102 |
viśālayā rasanayā pramadātipramādabhāk |
snigdhaṃ kokanadābhāsaṃ praśastaṃ tālu komalam || 103 ||
site tāluni vaidhavyaṃ pītā pravrajitā bhavet |
kṛṣṇe'patya viyogārtā rukṣe bhūrikuṭumbinī || 104 ||
kaṇṭhe sthūlā suvṛttā ca kramatīkṣṇā sulohitā |
apralambā śubhā ghaṇṭī sthūlā kṛṣṇā ca duḥkhadā || 105 |
jihvāyāḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | jihveti sārdhadvayena | śoṇā śoṇavarṇā ||101 ||
kramamanādṛtya tālunaḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | snigdhamiti sārdhena | kokanadābhā
saṃśoṇacchavim || 103 |
ghaṇṭikāyāḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | kaṇṭha ityekena | tīkṣṇā sūkṣmā || 105 |

smitaṃ praśastaṃ sudṛśāmanimīlitalocanam || 106 ||
samavṛttapuṭā nāsā laghucchidrā śubhāvahā |
sthūlāgrā madhyanasmrā ca na praśastā samunnatā || 107 |
ākuñcitāruṇāgrā ca vaidhavya kleśadāyinī |
parapreṣyā ca cipiṭā hrasvā dīrghā kalipriyā ||| 108 |
dīrghāyuḥ kṛtkṣataṃ dīrghaṃ yugapadvitripiṇḍitam |
lalanālocane śaste raktānte kṛṣṇatārake || 106 |
gokṣīravarṇaviśade susnigdhe kṛṣṇapakṣmaṇī |
unnatākṣī na dīrghāyurvṛttākṣī kulaṭā bhavet || 110 ||

meṣākṣī mahiṣākṣī ca kekarākṣī na śobhanā |
