kāmagṛhīlā nitarāṃ gopiṅgākṣī sudurvṛtā || 111 ||
pārāvatākṣī duḥśīlā raktākṣī bhartṛghātinī |
koṭarā nayanā duṣṭā gajanetrā na śobhanā | 112 |
puṃścalī vāmakāṇākṣī vandhyā dakṣiṇakāṇikā |
madhupiṅgākṣī ramaṇī dhanadhānyasamṛddhibhāk || 113 ||
pakṣmabhiḥ sughanaiḥ snigdhaiḥ kṛṣṇaiḥ sūkṣmaiḥ subhāgyabhāk |
kapilaiviralaiḥ sthūlainindyā bhavati bhāminī || 114 ||
bhruvau suvartule tanvyāḥ snigdhe kṛṣṇe asaṃhate |
praśaste mṛduromāṇau suśruvaḥ kārmukākṛtī ||| 115 |
gṛhīlā gṛddhinī || 111 ||
koṭarānayanā koṭaravad vṛkṣachidravadāsāmantānnayane yasyā , sā tathā , nimnanetre-
tyarthaḥ || 112 ||
pakṣmaṇaḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | pakṣmabhirityekena || 114 ||

na bhrūḥ praśastā militā dorgharomā ca piṅgalā || 116 ||
lambau karṇau śubhāvatau sukhadau ca śubhapradau |
śaṣkulīrahitau nindyau śirālau kuṭilau kṛśau || 117 ||
bhālaḥ śirāvirahito nirlomārdhendusannibhaḥ |
animnastrayaṅgulo nāryāḥ saubhāgyārogyakāraṇam || 118 ||
vyaktasvastikarekhaṃ ca lalāṭaṃ rājyasampade |
pralambaṃ mastakaṃ yasyā devaraṃ hanti sā dhruvam || 116 ||
romaśena śirālena prāṃśunā rogiṇī matā || 120 |
sīmantaḥ saralaḥ śasto mauliḥ śastaḥ samunnataḥ |
gajakumbhanibho vṛttaḥ saubhāgyaṃśvayaṃsūcakaḥ || 121 |
karṇayoḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | lambāvityekena || 117 |
bhālasya śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | bhāla iti sārdhadvayena || 118 ||

sthūlamūrdhā ca vidhavā dīrghaśīrṣā ca bandhakī |
viśālenāpi śirasā bhaveddaurbhāgyabhājanam || 122 ||
keśā alikulacchāyāḥ sūkṣmāḥ snigdhāḥ sukomalāḥ |
kiñcidākuñcitāgrāśca kuṭilāścātiśobhanāḥ || 123 ||
paruṣāḥ sphuṭitāgrāśca viralāśca śiroruhāḥ |
piṅgulā laghavo rukṣā duḥkhadāridrayabandhadāḥ || 124 ||
bhruvorantarlalāṭe vā vā maśako rājyasūcakaḥ |
vāme kapole maśakaḥ śoṇo miṣṭānnadaḥ striyāḥ || 125 |
tilakaṃ lāñchanaṃ vā'pi hṛdi saubhāgyakāraṇam |
yasyā dakṣiṇavakṣoje śoṇe tilakalāñchane | 126 |
maulijānāṃ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe āha | keśā iti dvayena | alikulacchāyā bhramara-
kadambaśyāmāḥ || 123 |
laghavo hrasvāḥ || 124 ||

kanyācatuṣṭayaṃ sūte sūte sā ca sutatrayam |
tilakaṃ lāñchanaṃ śoṇaṃ yasyā vāme kuce bhavet || 127 ||
ekaṃ putraṃ prasūyādau tataḥ sā vidhavā bhavet |
guhyasya dakṣiṇe bhāge tilakaṃ yadi yoṣitaḥ || 128 ||
tadā kṣitipateḥ patnī sūte vā kṣitipaṃ sutam |
nāsāgre maśakaḥ śoṇo mahiṣyā eva jāyate || 126 ||
kṛṣṇaḥ sa eva bhartṛghnyāḥ puṃścalyāśca prakīrtitaḥ |
nābheradhastāttilakaṃ maśako lāñchanaṃ śubham || 130 |
maśakastilakaṃ cihna gulphadeśe daridrakṛt |
kare karṇe kapole vā kaṇṭhe vāme bhavedyadi || 131 |
eṣāṃ trayāṇāmekaṃ tu prāggarbhe putradaṃ bhavet |
bhālagena triśūlena nirmitena svayambhuvā || 132 |
nitambinī sahasrāṇāṃ svāmitvaṃ yoṣidāpnuyāt |
suptā parasparaṃ yā tu dantān kiṭikiṭāyate || 133 |
mahiṣyāḥ kṛtābhiṣekāyā rājyāḥ || 12 9 |
sarvalakṣaṇasampannā'pi doṣaviśeṣeṇa tyājyetyāha | suptetyekena | kiṭikiṭāyate
dantagharṣaṇajaṃ śabdaṃ karotītyarthaḥ || 133 |

sulakṣmā'pi na sā śastā yā kiñcitpralapettathā |
pāṇau pradakṣiṇāvarto dhamryo vāmo na śobhanaḥ || 134 ||
nābhau śrutāvurasi vā dakṣiṇāvarta īḍitaḥ |
sukhāya dakṣiṇāvartaḥ pṛṣṭhavaṃśasya dakṣiṇe || 135 |
antaḥpṛṣṭhaṃ nābhisamo bahvāyuḥ putravardhanaḥ |
rājapatnyāḥ pradṛśyeta bhagamaulau pradakṣiṇaḥ || 136 |
sa cecchakaṭabhaṅgaḥ syād bahvapatya sukhapradaḥ |
kaṭigo guhyavedhena patyapatyanipātanaḥ || 137 |
syātāmudaravedhena pṛṣṭhāvartī na śobhanau | |
ekena hanti bhartāraṃ bhavedanyena puṃścalī || 138 ||
vapuṣaḥ śubhāśubhe lakṣaṇe abhidhāya kramaprāptasyāvartasya te āha | pāṇāviśyārabhya
sulakṣaṇetyataḥ prāktanena granthena | pradakṣiṇāvarto romṇāmiti śeṣaḥ | dhayoṃ dharmyārhaḥ |
vāmo vāmāvartaḥ || 134 |

kaṇṭhago dakṣiṇāvarto duḥkhavaidhavyahetukaḥ |
sīmante'tha lalāṭe vā tyājyo dūrātprayatnataḥ || 136
sā pati hanti varṣeṇa yasyā |
madhye kṛkāṭikam |
pradakṣiṇo vā vāmo vā romṇāmāvartakaḥ striyāḥ || 140 |
eko vā mūrdhani dvau vā vāme vāmagatī yadi |
ādaśāhaṃ patighnau tau tyājyoṃ dūrātsubuddhinā || 141 ||
kaṭayāvartā ca kulaṭā nābhyāvartā pativratā |
pṛṣṭhāvartā ca bhartṛghnī kulaṭā vā'ya jāyate || 142 |
skanda uvāca --
sulakṣaṇā'pi duḥśīlā kulakṣaṇāśiromaṇiḥ |
alakṣaṇā'pi sā sādhvī sarvalakṣaṇabhūstu sā || 143 ||
madhyekṛkāṭikaṃ kṛkāṭikāmadhye || 140 |
' gandhādīnāṃ ṣaṇṇāṃ śubhāśubhalakṣaṇāni ratiśāstrādo draṣṭavyāni | tathā ca-
padminī padmagandhā ca mīnagandhā ca citriṇī |
śaṃkhinī kṣāragandhā ca madagandhā ca hastinī ||

sulakṣaṇā sucaritrā svādhīnā patidevatā |
viśveśā'nuprahādeva gṛhe yoṣidavāpyate || 144 |
alaṅkṛtā svavāsinyo yābhiḥ prāktanajanmani |
nānāvidhairalaṅkāraistāḥ svarūpā bhavanti hi || 145 |
sutīrtheṣu vapuryābhiḥ kṣayitaṃ vā vihāyitam |
tā lāvaṇyataraṅgiṇyo bhavantīha sulakṣaṇāḥ || 146 ||
haṃsapunnāgavarṇābhā yā nārī raktalocanā |
aṣṭau janayate putrān prāpnoti paramaṃ sukham ||
kākasvarā kākajaṃghā tathaivodhvaṃsvarā tathā |
lamboṣṭhī lambavadanā tāṃ kanyāṃ parivarjayet ||
haṃsatulyagatirnārī rājapatnī ca sā bhavet |
yasyāgamanamātreṇa bhūmikampaḥ prajāyate ||
sā strī dainyakarī jñeyā sāmudravacanaṃ yathā |
āvarta ! prajane yasyā madhye caiva pradakṣiṇaḥ ||
ekaṃ sā janayetputraṃ rājānaṃ pṛthivīpatim || ityādīnīti || 143 |
nanu tarhi sulakṣaṇatvādiguṇaviśiṣṭā sādhvī strī kasmāllabhyate tatrāha | sulakṣa-
ṇeti || 144 ||
strīṇāṃ surūpatvalāvaṇya sucāritryasvādhīnabhartṛtvaprāptau hetunāha | alaṅkṛtā

jagatāṃ mātā yābhirmṛḍavadhūriva | |
tā bhavanti sucāritrā yoṣāḥ svādhīnabhartṛkāḥ
svādhīnapatikānāṃ || 147 ||
ca suśīlānāṃ mṛgīdṛśām |
svargāpavargāvatraiva sulakṣaṇaphalaṃ hi tat || 148 ||
sulakṣaṇaiḥ sucaritairapi mandāyuṣaṃ patim |
dīrghāyuṣaṃ prakurvanti pramadāḥ pramadāspadam || 146 ||
ataḥ sulakṣaṇā yoṣā pariṇeyā vicakṣaṇaiḥ |
lakṣaṇāni parīkṣyādau hitvā durlakṣaṇānyapi ||| 150 |
mṛḍavadhūrivetyatreva kāro'vadhāraṇārthaḥ | iheti vā pāṭhaḥ | śobhanaṃ cāritryaṃ
pātivratyādilakṣaṇaṃ yāsāṃ tāḥ sucāritrāḥ | svādhīnaḥ śuśrūṣādibhirvaśīkṛtaḥ santoṣito
na tu strījito bhartā yāsāṃ tāstathā || 147 |

lakṣaṇāni mayoktāni sukhāya gṛhamedhinām |
vivāhānapi vakṣyāmi tannibodha ghaṭodbhava || 151 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe strīlakṣaṇavarṇanaṃ nāma saptatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 37 ||
uktā'nuvādapūrvakamuttarādhyāyārthaṃ prastāvayati | lakṣaṇānīti || 151 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 37 ||

athāṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
vivāhā brāhmadevārṣāḥ prājāpatyā'surau tathā |
gāndharvo rākṣasaścāpi paiśāco'ṣṭama ucyate || 1 |
athā'ṣṭatriṃśake dharmye'dhyāye'tīva suśobhane |
kriyate samudācārātsaddhamaṃ parivarṇanam || 1 ||
brāhmadevārṣā vivāhā ucyante , prājāpatyā'suro ca vivāhāvucyete iti vacanaṃ vipariṇamayya
ucyata ityasyāḥ kriyāyā evānuṣaṅgaḥ | tatra brāhmo varamāhūya dānam | daiva ṛtvije

sa brāhmo varamāhūya yatra kanyā svalaṅkṛtā |
dīyate tatsutaḥ pūyāt puruṣānekaviṃśatim || 2 |
yajñasthāryātvaje daivastajjaḥ pāti caturdaśa |
varādādāya godvandvamārṣastajjaḥ punāti ṣaṭ || 3 ||
sahobhau caratāṃ dharmamityuktvā dīyate'thine |
yatra kanyā prājāpatyastajjo vaṃśān punāti ṣaṭ || 4 ||
catvāra ete viprāṇāṃ dharmyāḥ pāṇigrahāḥ smṛtāḥ |
āsuraḥ krayaṇāddravyairgāndharvo'nyonyamaitrataḥ || 5 |
prasahya kanyāharaṇādrākṣaso ninditaḥ satām |
chalena kanyāharaṇāt paiśāco garhito'ṣṭamaḥ || 6 |
etāneva lakṣaṇato vivṛṇvan yasya varṇasya yo vivāho dharyo yasya vivāhasya
ityādinā savarṇaṃ ityataḥ prāktanena granthena || 2-3 |

aṣṭamastveṣa pāpiṣṭhaḥ pāpiṣṭhānāṃ ca sambhavet || 7 |
savarṇayā karo grāhyo dhāryaḥ kṣatriyayā śaraḥ |
pratodo vaiśyayā dhāryo vāso'ntaḥ pajjayā tathā || 8 |
asavarṇastveṣa vidhiḥ smṛto dṛṣṭaśca vedane |
savarṇābhistu sarvābhiḥ pāṇigrahyastvayaṃ vidhiḥ || 6 ||
dharmeṃvivāhairjāyante dharmyā eva śatāyuṣaḥ |
adhayairdharmarahitā mandabhāgyadhanāyuṣaḥ || 10 ||

ṛtukālā'bhigamanaṃ dharmo'yaṃ gṛhiṇaḥ paraḥ |
strīṇāṃ varamanusmṛtya yathākāmyathavā bhavet || 11 ||
divā'bhigamanaṃ puṃsāmanāyuṣyaṃ paraṃ matam |
śrāddhā'haḥ sarvaparvāṇi yatnāttyājyāni dhīmatā || 12 |
tatra gacchan striyaṃ mohāddharmātpracyavate parāt || 13
ṛtukālā'bhigāmī yaḥ svadāranirataśca yaḥ |
sa sadā brahmacārī ca vijñeyaḥ sadgṛhāśramī || 14 ||

putrāstāsvapi yā yugmā ayugmāḥ kanyakāprajāḥ || 15 ||
tyaktvā candramasaṃ dusthaṃ maghāṃ pauṣṇaṃ vihāya ca |
śuciḥ sannirviśetpatnīṃ punnāmarkṣe viśeṣataḥ |
śuci putraṃ prasūyeta puruṣārthaprasādhakam || 16 |
ārṣe vivāhe godvandvaṃ yaduktaṃ tanna śasyate |
śulkamaṇvapi kanyāyāḥ kanyāvikrayapāpakṛt || 17 ||
apatyavikrayī kalpaṃ vasedviṭkṛmibhojane |
ato nāṇvapi kanyāyā upajīvet pitā dhanam || 18 |
kanyakāḥ prajāḥ yābhyastāstathā || 15 ||
dusthaṃ rāhuṇā grastam | punnāmakṣaṃ śravaṇahastapunarvasu mūlapuṣyamṛgaśīrṣāṇi ||| 16 |

strīdhanānyupajīvanti ye mohādiha bāndhavāḥ |
na kevalaṃ nirayagāsteṣāmapi hi pūrvajāḥ || 16 |
patyā tuṣyati yatra strī tuṣyedyatra striyā patiḥ |
tatra tuṣṭā mahālakṣmīnivaseddānavāriṇā || 20 |
vāṇijyaṃ nṛpateḥ sevā vedānadhyāpanaṃ tathā |
kuvivāhaḥ kriyālopaḥ kule patana hetavaḥ || 21 |
kuryādvaivāhike vahnau gṛhyaṃ karmānvahaṃ gṛhī |
pañcayajñakriyāṃ cāpi pakti dainandinīmapi || 22 |
gṛhasthāśramiṇaḥ pañca sunākarma dine dine |
kaṇḍanī peṣaṇī cullī hyudakumbhastu mārjanī || 23 ||

tāsāṃ ca pañca sūnānāṃ nirākaraṇahetavaḥ |
kratavaḥ pañca nirdiṣṭā gṛhiśreyo'bhivardhanāḥ || 24 ||
pāṭhanaṃ brahmayajñaḥ syāttarpaṇaṃ ca pitṛkratuḥ |
homo daivo balibhato'tithyarcā nṛkratuḥ kramāt || 25 ||
pitṛprīti prakurvāṇaḥ kurvīta śrāddhamanvaham |
annodakapayomūlaḥ phalairvā'pi gṛhāśramī || 26 ||
godānena ca yatpuṇyaṃ pātrāya vidhipūrvakam |
satkṛtya bhikṣave bhikṣāṃ datvā tatphalamāpnuyāt || 27 ||
tapovidyāsamiddīpte hutaṃ viprāsyapāvake |
tārayed vighnasaṃghebhyaḥ pāpābdherapi dustarāt || 28 ||
anacito'tithirgehād bhagnāśo yasya gacchati |
ājanmasañcitātpuṇyātkṣaṇātsa hi bahirbhavet || 26 ||

sānvapūrvāṇi vākyāni śayyārthe bhūstṛṇodake |
etānyapi pradeyāni sadā'bhyāgatatuṣṭaye || 30 ||
gṛhasthaḥ parapākādī pretya tatpaśutāṃ vrajet |
śreyaḥ parānnapuṣṭasya gṛhṇīyādannado yataḥ || 31 ||
ādityoḍho'tithiḥ sāyaṃ satkartavyaḥ prayatnataḥ |
asatkṛto'nyato gacchan duṣkṛtaṃ bhūri yacchati || 32 ||
bhuñjāno'tithiśeṣānnamihāyurdhanabhāg bhavet |
praṇodyātithimannāśī kilbiṣī ca gṛhāśramo || 33 ||
vaiśvadevāntasamprāptaḥ sūryoḍho vā'tithiḥ smṛtaḥ |
na pūrvakāla āyāto na ca dṛṣṭacaraḥ kvacit || 34 ||
parapākānnamattuṃ śīlaṃ yasya parapākasyānnasyādo'danaṃ vā'syā'stīti parapākādo |
tatpaśutāṃ yasya pākamatti tasya paśutāmityarthaḥ || 31 ||
praṇodya tyaktvā dūrīkṛtyeti yāvat || 33 |

adatvā taṃ bāla tasmai yathāśaktyā'nnamarpayet || 35 ||
kumārāśca ' svavāsinyo garbhiṇyo'tirujānvitāḥ |
atitherādito'pyete bhojyā nātra vicāraṇā || 36 |
pitṛdeva manuṣyebhyo datvā'snātyamṛtaṃ gṛhī |
svārthaṃ pacannaghaṃ bhuṅkte kevalaṃ svodarambhariḥ || 37 ||
mādhyāhnikaṃ vaiśvadevaṃ gṛhasthaḥ svayamācaret |
patnī sāyaṃ bali dadyāt siddhānnamaṃntravajitam || 38 ||
etatsāyantanaṃ nāma vaiśvadevaṃ gṛhāśrame |
sāyaṃ prātarbhavedevaṃ vaiśvadevaṃ prayatnataḥ || 36 |
vaiśvadevena ye honā ātithyena vivarjitāḥ |
sarve te vṛṣalā jñeyāḥ prāptavedā api dvijāḥ || 40 ||
svavāsinyaḥ ciriṇṭyaḥ || 36 ||

akṛtvā vaiśvadevaṃ tu bhuñjate ye dvijādhamāḥ |
iha loke'nnahīnāḥ syuḥ kākayoni vrajantyatha ||| 41 |
vedoditaṃ svakaṃ karma nityaṃ kuryādatandritaḥ |
taddhi kurvanyathāśakti prāpnuyātsadgati parām ||| 42 |
ṣaṣṭhayaṣṭamyorvasetpāpaṃ taile māṃse sadaiva hi |
pañcadaśyāṃ caturdaśyāṃ tathaiva ca bhage kṣure || 43 ||
udayantaṃ na cekṣeta nāstaṃyantaṃ na madhyagam |
na rāhuṇopasṛṣṭaṃ ca nāmbusaṃsthaṃ divākaram || 44 ||
na vīkṣetātmano rūpamāśu dhāvenna varṣati |
nollaṅghayed vatsatantrīṃ na nagno jalamāviśet || 45 ||
devatāyatanaṃ vipraṃ dhenuṃ madhu mṛdaṃ ghṛtam |
jātivṛddhaṃ vayovṛddhaṃ vidyāvṛddhaṃ tapasvinam || 46 |
te iti pāṭhe ye ityarthāt | ye iti pāṭhe te iti | atha janmāntare || 41 |
bhage yono || 43 |
upasṛṣṭaṃ grastam || 44

aśvatthaṃ caityavṛkṣaṃ ca guruṃ jalabhṛtaṃ ghaṭam |
siddhānnaṃ dadhi siddhārthaṃ gacchan kuryātpradakṣiṇam || 47 ||
rajasvalāṃ na seveta nā'śnīyātsaha bhāryayā |
ekavāsā na bhuñjīta na bhuñjītotkaṭāsane || 48 ||
nāśnantīṃ strīṃ samīkṣeta tejaskāmo dvijottamaḥ |
asantarpya pitandevānnādyādannaṃ navaṃ kvacit || 46 ||
pakvānnaṃ cāpi Ε no māṃsaṃ dīrghakālaṃ jijīviṣuḥ |
na sūtraṃ govraje kuryānna valmīke na bhasmani || 50 ||
na garteṣu sasatveṣu na tiṣṭhanna vrajannapi |
goviprasūryavāyvagnicandrarkṣā'mbugurūnapi || 51 ||
caityavṛkṣam ātapādisamaye sevyamānaṃ vṛkṣam pūjyaṃ vṛkṣaṃ vā yasyā'dhastātpūjā
kriyate taṃ vṛkṣaṃ vā | siddhārthaṃ sarṣapam || 47 ||
pīṭhādyantareṇāsanamutkaṭāsanaṃ tasmin || 48 ||
aśnantīṃ bhojanaṃ kurvatīm || 4 9 ||
pakvānnaṃ laḍḍukādikam | no māṃsamiti pṛthagvākyam | dīrghakālaṃ jijīviṣuḥ
pitṛnabhyarcyānabhyarcya vā māṃsaṃ no adyādityarthaḥ | paviṣṭa ca vineti pāṭhe paśvālambhanaṃ
yāgaṃ vinā doghaṃ kālaṃ jijīviṣurdevān pitṛn santarpya'santarpya vā māṃsaṃ nā'dyāditya-

abhipaśyanna kurvīta malamūtravisarjanam
tiraskṛtyāvana loṣṭakāṣṭhaparṇatṛṇādibhiḥ || 52 |
prāvṛtya vāsasā mauli maunī viṇmūtramutsṛjet |
yathāsukhamukho rātrau dine chāyāndhakārayoḥ || 53 ||
bhītiṣu prāṇabādhāyāṃ kuryānmalavisarjanam |
mukhenopadhamennāgni nagnāṃ nekṣeta yoṣitam ||| 54 |
nāṃtrī pratāpayedagnau na vastvaśuci nikṣipet |
prāṇihiṃsā na kurvīta nā'śnīyātsandhyayordvayoḥ || 55 |
na saṃviśeta sandhyāyāṃ pratyaksaumyaśirā api |
viṇmūtraṣṭhīvanaṃ nā'psu kuryāddīghaṃ jijīviṣuḥ || 56 |

dhayantīṃ gāṃ nendracāpaṃ pradarśayet |
naikaḥ supyāt kvacicchūnye na śayānaṃ prabodhayet || 57 ||
panthānaṃ naikalo yāyānna vāryañjalinā pibet |
na divoddhṛtasāraṃ ca bhakṣayeddadhi to niśi || 58 ||
strīdharmiṇyā nābhivadennādyādātṛpti rātriṣu |
tauyaṃtrikapriyo na syātkāṃsye pādau na dhāvayet || 56 ||
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā paraśrāddhe yo'śnīyājjñānavarjitaḥ |
dātuḥ śrāddhaphalaṃ nāsti bhoktā kilbiṣabhugbhavet || 60 |
na dhārayedanyabhuktaṃ vāsaścopānahāvapi |
nābhinnabhājane'śnīyānnāsītāgnyādidūṣite
nācakṣīta na kathayīta | dhayantīṃ bhakṣayantīṃ pibantīṃ vā | śayānaṃ jyeṣṭhaṃ na
prabodhayet || 57 ||

ārohaṇaṃ gavāṃ pṛṣṭhe pretadhūmaṃ sarittaram |
bālātapaṃ divā svāpaṃ tyajeddoghaṃ jijīviṣuḥ ||| 62 |
snātvā na mārjayedgātraṃ visṛjenna śikhāṃ pathi |
hastau śiro na dhunuyānnakarṣedāsanaṃ padā || 63 |
notpāṭayellomanakhaṃ daśanena kadācana |
karajaiḥ karajacchedaṃ tṛṇacchedaṃ vivarjayet || 64 ||
śubhāya na yadāyatyāṃ tyajettatkarma yatnataḥ |
advāreṇa na gantavyaṃ svaveśmaparaveśmanoḥ || 65 |

na śayīta kvacinnagnaḥ pāṇau bhuñjīta naiva ca || 66 ||
ārdrapādakarāsyo'śnan dorghakālaṃ ca jīvati |
saṃviśennārdracaraṇo nocchiṣṭaḥ kvacidāvrajet || 67 ||
śayanastho na cāśnīyānna pibenna japed dvijaḥ |
sopānatkaśca nācāmenna tiṣṭhan dhārayā pibet || 68 |
savaṃ tilamayaṃ nādyāt sāyaṃ śarmābhilāṣukaḥ |
na nirīkṣeta viṇmūtre nocchiṣṭaḥ saṃspṛśecchiraḥ || 66 ||
nādhitiṣṭhettuṣāṅgārabhasmakeśakapālikāḥ
patitaiḥ saha saṃvāsaḥ patanāyaiva jāyate || 70 |
pāṇāviti yatyanyaviṣayam |
kare karpaṭake caiva āyase tāmrabhājane |
bhuñjan bhikṣuḥ na lipyeta lipyante gṛhamedhinaḥ || iti vacanāt || 66 |
ārdrāṇi pādakarāsyāni yasya saḥ | saṃviśet svapet || 67 |
śayyate'sminniti śayanaṃ śayyā tatrasthaḥ | sopānatkaḥ upānadbhyāṃ pādukābhyāṃ

śrāvayedvaidikaṃ mantraṃ na śūdrāya kadācana |
brāhmaṇyāddhīyate vipraḥ śūdro dharmācca hīyate || 71 |
dharmopadeśa : śūdrāṇāṃ svaśreyaḥ pratighātayet |
dvijaśuśrūṣaṇaṃ dharmaḥ śūdrāṇāṃ hi paro mataḥ || 72 ||
kaṇḍūyanaṃ hi śirasaḥ pāṇibhyāṃ na śubhaṃ matam |
ātāḍanaṃ karābhyāṃ ca krośanaṃ keśaluñcanam || 73 ||
aśāstravartino bhūpāllubdhātkṛtvā pratigraham |
brāhmaṇaḥ sānvayo yāti narakānekaviṃśatim || 74 ||
akālavidyutstanite varṣata pāṃsuvarṣaṇe |
mahāvātadhvanau rātrāvanadhyāyāḥ prakīrtitāḥ || 75 |
ulkāpāte ca bhūkampe digdāhe madhyarātriṣu |
sandhyayorvṛṣalopānte rājño rāhośca sūtake || 76 ||
vaidikaṃ mantraṃ na śrāvayedityanena tantrādyuktaṃ śrāvayedityabhyanujānāti || 71 ||
dharmopadeśo brāhmaṇakartṛkaḥ śūdrakartṛko vā | svaśreya ityatra svaśabda upadeṣṭṛparaḥ |
dvitīye śrotṛparo'pi || 72 ||
karābhyāmityasyāgre'pi sambandhaḥ || 73 ||
sānvayo vaṃśasahitā || 74 ||
akālavidyutstanite varṣartvatiriktakāle meghagarjite vidyutsāhita garjita iti

pratipadyapi pūrṇāyāṃ gajoṣṭrābhyāṃ kṛtāntare || 77 ||
kharoṣṭra kroṣṭravirute samavāye rudatyapi |
upākarmaṇi cotsarge nāvimārge tarau jale || 78 ||
āraṇyakamadhītyā'pi bāṇasāmnorapi ||
dhvanau |
anadhyāyeṣu caiteṣu nādhīyīta dvijaḥ kvacit || 7 9 ||
kṛtāntarāyo na paṭhed bhekākhuśvāhiba srubhiḥ |
bhūtāṣṭamyoḥ pañcadaśyorbrahmacārī sadā bhavet || 80 ||
anāyuṣyakaraṃ caiva paradāropasarpaṇam |
tasmāttaddūratastyājyaṃ vairiṇāṃ copasevanam ||| 81 |
pūrvadhabhiḥ parityaktamātmānaṃ nāvamānayet |
sadodyamavatāṃ yasmācchriyo vidyā na durlabhāḥ || 82 ||
śrāddhikaṃ śrāddhanimantraṇaṃ śrāddhasambandhidravyaṃ vā | pūrṇāyāṃ ṣaḍdaṇḍaparimitāyāṃ
pratipadyapi na tu nyūnāyām || 77 ||
utsarge ṛgādīnām || 78 |
bāṇa sāmnoḥ śarasāmavedayordhvanī śrūyamāṇe | apiśabdādārtasvane'pi || 7 9 |
babhrurnakulaḥ , bhūtā caturdaśī | pañcadaśyoḥ pūrṇimāmāvāsyayoḥ ||| 80 |

satyaṃ brūyātpriyaṃ brūyānna brūyātsatyamapriyam |
priyaṃ ca nānṛtaṃ brūyādeṣa dharmo ghaṭodbhava ||| 83 |
bhadrameva vadennityaṃ bhadrameva vicintayet |
bhadraireveha saṃsargo nābhadvaiśva kadācana || 84 |
rūpavittakulairhīnān sudhīrnādhikṣipennarān |
puṣpavantau na cekṣeta tvaśucirjyotiṣāṃ gaṇam || 85 |
vācovegaṃ manovegaṃ jihvāvegaṃ ca varjayet |
utkocadyūta dautyārtadravyaṃ dūrātparityajet || 86 |
gobrāhmaṇāgnīnucchiṣṭapāṇinā naiva saṃspṛśet |
na i pṛśedanimittena khāni svāni tvanāturaḥ || 87 |
guhyajānyapi lomāni tatsparśādaśucirbhavet |
pādadhautodakaṃ mūtramucchiṣṭānnodakāni ca || 88 |

aharniśaṃ śruterjāpyācchaucācāraniṣevaṇāt |
adrohavatyā buddhayā ca pūrva janma smaredvijaḥ || 8 9 ||
vṛddhān prayatnādvandeta dadyātteṣāṃ svamāsanam |
vinamradhama nistasmādanuyāyāttataśca tān || 9 0 |
śruti bhūdevadevānāṃ nṛpasādhutapasvinām |
pativratānāṃ nārīṇāṃ nindāṃ kuryānna karhicit || 9 1 ||
na manuṣyastuti kuryānnātmānamapamānayet |
abhyudyataṃ na praṇudetparamarmāṇi noccaret || 9 2 |
adharmādedhate pūrva vidveṣṭṛnapi saṃjayet |
sarvatobhadramāpyāpi tato naśyecca sānvayaḥ || 9 3 |
uddhṛtya pañca mṛtpiṇḍān snāyātparajalāśaye |
anuddhṛtya ca tatkarturenasaḥ syātturīyabhāk || 9 4 |

śraddhayā pātramāsādya yatkiñciddīyate vasu |
deśe kāle ca vidhinā tadānantyāya kalpate || 9 5 |
bhūprado maṇḍalādhīśaḥ sarvatra sukhino'nnadāḥ |
toyadātā sadā tṛpto rūpavān rūpyado bhavet || 9 6 |
pradopado nirmalākṣī godātā'ryamalokabhāk |
svarṇadātā ca dīrghāyustiladaḥ syāttu suprajāḥ || 9 7 ||
veśmado'tyuccasaudheśo vastradaścandralokabhāk |
hayaprado divyayāno lakṣmīvān vṛṣabhapradaḥ || 9 8 ||
subhāryaḥ śibikādātā suparyaṅkaprado'pi ca |
dhānyaiḥ samṛddhimānnityamabhayaprada īśitā || 99 |
brahmado brahmalokejyo brahmadaḥ sarvado mataḥ |
upāyenāpi yo brahma dāpayetso'pi tatsamaḥ || 100 |
śraddhayā pratigṛhṇāti śraddhayā yaḥ prayacchati |
svagiṇau tāvubhau syātāṃ patato'śraddhayātyadhaḥ ||| 101 |
suprajāḥ śobhanaputraḥ || 9 7 |

kṣaretkīrtanato dānamāyuviprāpavādataḥ ||| 102 |
gandhapuṣpakuśān śayyāṃ śākaṃ māṃsaṃ payo dadhi |
maṇimatsyagṛhaṃ dhānyaṃ grāhyametadupasthitam || 103 |
madhūdakaṃ phalaṃ mūlameghāṃsyabhayadakṣiṇā |
abhyudyatāni grāhyāṇi tvetānyapi nikṛṣṭataḥ || 104 ||
dāsanāpitagopāla kulamitrārdha sīriṇaḥ
bhojyānnāḥ śūdravarge'mī tathātmavinivedakaḥ || 105 ||
itthamānṛṇyamāsādya devarṣipitṛjādṛṇāt |
mādhyasthāmāśrayed gehe sute viṣvag visṛjya ca || 106 ||
mehe'pi jñānamabhyasyet kāśīṃ vā'tha samāśrayet |
samyag jñānena vā muktiḥ kiṃ vā viśveśaveśmani || 107 ||
vismayato garvāt || 102 |
grāhyaṃ nikṛṣṭata ityagrimeṇā'nvayaḥ || 103 |

samyagjñānaṃ bhavetpuṃsāṃ kuta ekena janmanā |
vārāṇasyāṃ dhruvā muktiḥ śaroratyāgamātrataḥ || 108 ||
adya śvo vā paraśvo vā kālādvā'tha paraḥśatāt |
satvaro gatvāro dehaḥ kāśyāṃ cedamṛtībhavet || 106 ||
sā ca vārāṇasī labhyā sadācāravatā sadā |
manasā'pi sadācāramato vidvānna laṅghayet || 110 ||
ākarṇyeti tato'gastyaḥ punaḥ prāha ṣaḍānanam |
punaḥ kāśīṃ samācakṣva sadācāreṇa yāpyate || 111 ||
kāni kāni ca liṅgāni skanda jñānapradāni ca |
vārāṇasyāṃ paribrūhi tāni me paripṛcchataḥ || 112 ||
vinā kāśīṃ na me protivinā kāśīṃ na me ratiḥ |
citraputrakavaccā'smi vinā kāśīṃ ṣaḍānana || 113 ||
antimapakṣasya sulabhatvenādhikyamāha | samyagiti || 108 ||
śatātparaṃ paraḥśataṃ tasmāccenmriyata iti śeṣaḥ ||| 10 9 |

kāśīdvayakṣarapīyūṣaṃ pibāmi hi ca kevalam || 114 |
iti śrutvā vacaḥ skando maitrāvaruṇibhāṣitam |
avimuktasya māhātmyaṃ vaktuṃ samupacakrame || || 115 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe sadācāravarṇanaṃ nāmā'ṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 38 ||
kāśīti yad dvayakṣaraṃ tadeva pīyūṣaṃ kevalaṃ pibāmi | hoti niścaye | I cakāro'va-
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭatriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 38 |
na to maiṃ sotā hū~ , na jāgatā hū~ , na kucha khātā hū~ aura na jalapāna hī karatā hū~ |

athaikonacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
śṛṇvagastya mahābhāga kathāṃ pāpapraṇāśinīm |
naiḥśreyasyāḥ śriyāhetumavimuktasamāśrayām || 1 ||
paraṃ brahma yadāmnātaṃ niṣprapañcaṃ nirātmakam |
nirvikalpaṃ nirākāramavyaktaṃ sthūlasūkṣmavat || 2 |
tadetatkṣetramāpūrya sthitaṃ sarvagamapyaho |
kimanyatra na śakto'sau jantūn mocayituṃ bhavāt || 3 ||
triśe navādhike puṇye'dhyāye'tyantamanorame |
vārāṇasīdivodāsāvimuktama himocyate || 1 ||
pūrvādhyāyānte'vimuktasya māhātmyaṃ vaktuṃ samupacakrame ityuktamatastadeva prastāva-

mahatyāyogayuktyā vā mahādānairakāmikaiḥ || 1 |
sumahadbhistapobhirvā śivo'nyatra vimocayet |
yogayukti na mahatīṃ na dānāni mahānti ca || 5 ||
na tapāṃsyatidīrghāṇi kāśyāṃ muktyai śivo'rthayet |
viyunakti na yatkāśyā upasarge mahatyapi || 6 |
ayameva mahāyoga upayogastitvahā'paraḥ |
niyamena tu viśveśe puṣpaṃ patraṃ phalaṃ jalam || 7 |
yaddattaṃ sumanovṛttyā mahādānaṃ tadatra vai |
muktimaṇḍapikāyāṃ ca kṣaṇaṃ yatsthiramāsyate || 8 |
snātvā gaṅgā'mṛte śuddhe tapa etadihottamam |
satkṛtya bhikṣave bhikṣā yatkāśyāṃ paridīyate |
tulāpuruṣa etasyāḥ kalāṃ nārhati ṣoḍaśīm || 6 ||
akāmikainiṣkāmairityubhayatra sambadhyate || 4 ||
atidīrghakālamārabhya kṛtāni atidīrghāṇi | atitīvrāṇīti kvacit |
arthayet prārthayet kimiti na prārthayet , anyathaiva tattritayasya jātatvādityāha | viyuna-

hṛdi sañcintya viśveśaṃ kṣaṇaṃ yadvinimīlyate |
devasya dakṣiṇe bhāge mahāyogo'yamuttamaḥ || 10 ||
idameva tapo'tyunaṃ yadindriyavilolatām |
niṣidhya sthīyate kāśyāṃ kṣattāpādyavamanya ca || 11 ||
māsi māsi yadāpyeta vratāccāndrāyaṇātphalam |
anyatra tadihāpyeta bhūtāyāṃ naktabhojanāt || 12 ||
māsopavāsādanyatra yatphalaṃ samupāyate |
śraddhayaikopavāsena tatkāśyāṃ syādasaṃśayam || 13
cāturmāsyavratātproktaṃ yadanyatra mahāphalam |
ekādaśyupavāsena tatkāśyāṃ syādasaṃśayam || 14 |
ṣaṇmāsānnaparityāgādyadanyatra phalaṃ labhet |
śivarātryupavāsena tatkāśyāṃ jāyate dhruvam ||| 15 | |
varṣaṃ kṛtvopavāsāni labhedanyatra labhedanyatra yadvratī |
tatphalaṃ syāttrirātreṇa kāśyāmavikalaṃ mune || 16 ||
bhūtāyāṃ caturdaśyām || 12 | tatphalamityuttarārdhe'pi

māsi māsi kuśāgrā'mbu pānādanyatra yatphalam |
kāśyāmuttaravāhinyāmekena culukena tat || 17 ||
ananto mahimā kāśyāḥ kastaṃ varṇayituṃ prabhuḥ |
vipattimicchato jantoryatra karṇejapaḥ śivaḥ || 18 ||
śambhustatkiñcidācaṣṭe triyamāṇasya janminaḥ |
karṇe'kṣaraṃ yadākarṇya mṛto'pyamṛtatāṃ vrajet || 16 ||
smāraṃ smāraṃ smararipoḥ purīṃ tvamiva śaṅkaraḥ |
adunonmandaraṃ yāto bahuśastadavāptaye || 20 |
agastya uvāca-
svakāryanipuṇaiḥ svāmin gīrvāṇairatidāruṇaiḥ |
tyājito'haṃ purīṃ kāśīṃ haro'tyākṣītkutaḥ prabhuḥ || 21 ||
culukena gaṇḍūṣeṇa || 17 |
vipattimicchato maraṇaṃ prāpnuvataḥ || 18 ||
avimuktamahimavarṇanārthameva divodāsamahimānaṃ vaktuṃ prastāvayati | smāraṃ smāra-

parādhīno'hamiva kiṃ devadevaḥ pinākavān |
kāśikāṃ so'tyajatkasmānnirvāṇamaṇirāśikām || 22 |
skanda uvāca - mitrāvaruṇasambhūta kathayāmi kathāmimām |
tatyāja ca yathā sthāṇuḥ kāśīṃ vidhyuparodhataḥ || 23 ||
prārthitastvaṃ yathā lekhaiḥ lekhaiḥ paropakṛtaye mune |
druhiṇena tathā rudraḥ svarakṣaṇavicakṣaṇaḥ ||| 24 |
agastya uvāca -- bhagavān rudro druhiṇena kṛpāmbudhiḥ |
kathaṃ sa
prārthito'bhūtkimarthaṃ ca tanme brūhi ṣaḍānana || 25 |
skanda uvāca pādame - kalpe purāvṛtte manoḥ svāyambhuve'ntare |
anāvṛṣṭirabhūdvipra sarvabhūtaprakampinī || 26 |

cintāmavāpa mahatīṃ jagadyoniḥ prajākṣayāt |
prajāsu kṣīyamāṇāsu kṣīṇayajñādikāḥ kriyāḥ || 32 ||
tāsu kṣīṇāsu saṃkṣoṇāḥ sarve yajñabhujo'bhavan |
tataścintayatā sraṣṭrā dṛṣṭo rājarṣisattamaḥ || || 33 ||
avimukte mahākṣetre tapasyanniśvalendriyaḥ |
manoranvayajo vīraḥ kṣātro dharma ivoditaḥ || 34 |
ripuñjaya iti khyāto rājā'parapurañjayaḥ |
atha brahmā tamāsādya bahugauravapūrvakam || 35 |
uvāca vacanaṃ rājan rājan ripuñjaya ripuñjaya mahāmate |
ilāṃ pālaya bhūpāla sasamudrādrikānanām || 36 |
nāgakanyāṃ nāgarājaḥ patnyathaṃ te pradāsyati |
anaṅgamohinīṃ nāmnā vāsukiḥ śīlabhūṣaṇām || 37 |

prajāpālana santuṣṭā mahārāja pratikṣaṇam || 38 ||
divodāsa iti khyātamato nāma tvamāpsyasi |
matprabhāvācca nṛpate divyaṃ sāmarthyamastu te || 36 ||
parameṣṭhivacaḥ śrutvā tato'sau rājasattamaḥ |
vedhasaṃ bahuśaḥ stutvā vākyaṃ cedamuvāca ha || 40 ||
rājovāca-
pitāmaha mahāprājña janākīrṇe mahītale |
kathaṃ nānye ca rājāno māṃ kathaṃ kathyate tvayā ||| 41 |
brahmovāca-
tvayi rājyaṃ prakurvāṇe devo vṛṣṭi vidhāsyati |
pāpaniṣṭhe ca vai rājñi na devo varṣate punaḥ || 42 ||
ripuñjayasya sānvayaṃ bhāvisaṃjñāntaraṃ sandiśati | divo'poti sārdhena || 38 |

rājovāca-
pitāmaha mahāmānya trilokīkaraṇakṣama |
mahāprasāda ityājñāṃ tvadīyāṃ mūrkyupādade || 43 ||
kiñcidvijñaptukāmo'haṃ tanmadathaṃ karoṣi cet |
tataḥ karomyahaṃ rājyaṃ pṛthivyāmasapatnavat || 44 ||
brahmovāca-
avilambena tadbrūhi kṛtaṃ manyasva pārthiva |
yatte hṛdi mahābāho tavā'deyaṃ na kiñcana || 45 |
rājovāca--
yadyahaṃ pṛthivīnātha : sarvalokapitāmaha
tadā diviṣado devā divi tiṣṭhantu mā bhuvi || 46 ||
deveṣu divi tiṣṭhatsu mayi tiṣṭhati bhūtale |
asapatnena rājyena prajā saukhyamavāpsyati || 47 |
diviṣada iti sābhiprāyaṃ viśeṣaṇam | ato na paunaruktyam || 46 |
rājā phira kahane lagā-
" he trailokyasarjanasamarthaṃ ! mahāmānya ! pitāmaha ! yaha āpakā mahāne anugraha

paṭahaṃ ghoṣayāñcakre divaṃ devā vrajantviti || 48 |
māgacchantviha vai nāgā narāḥ svasthā bhavantvitaḥ |
mayi praśāsati kṣoṇīṃ surāḥ svasthā bhavantviti || 46 ||
etasminnantare brahmā viśveśaṃ praṇipatya ha |
yāvadvijñaptukāmo'bhūttāvadīśo'bravīdvidhim || 50 ||
lokeśvara samāyāhi samāyāhi mandaro nāma bhūdharaḥ |
kuśadvīpādihāgatya tapastapyeta duṣkaram || 51 |
yāvastasmai varaṃ dātuṃ bahukālaṃ tapasyate |
ityuktvā pārvatīnātho nandibhṛṅgipurogamaḥ || 52 |
jagāma vṛṣamāruhya mandaro yatra tiṣṭhati |
uvāca ca prasannātmā devadevo vṛṣadhvajaḥ | || 53 |

uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha bhadraṃ te varaṃ brūhi dharottama |
so'tha śrutvā maheśānaṃ devadevaṃ trilocanam || 54 |
praṇamya bahuśo bhūmāvadviretad vyajijñapat |
lolāvigrahabhṛcchambho praṇataikakṛpānidhe || 55 |
sarvajño'pi kathaṃ nāma na vettha mama vāñchitam |
śaraṇāgatasaṃtrāṇa sarvavṛttāntakovida || 56 |
sarveṣāṃ hṛdayānanda śarva sarvaga sarvakṛt |
yadi deyo varo mahyaṃ svabhāvād dṛṣadātmane | 57 |
yācakāyātiśocyāya praṇatārtiprabhañjaka |
tato'vimuktakṣetrasya sāmyaṃ hyabhilaṣāmyaham ||| 58 |
kuśadvīpa umāsādhaṃ nāthā'dya saparicchadaḥ |
manmaulau vihitāvāsaḥ prayātveṣa varo mama || 56 |
līlāvigrahaṃ krīḍāśarīraṃ birbhāta gṛhṇātīti tathā | kṛditi kvacit || 55 ||

vijñātā'vasaro brahmā tāvacchambhuṃ vyajijñapat |
praṇamyā'gresaro bhūtvā maulau baddhakaradvayaḥ
brahmovāca—–
viśveśa jagatāṃ nātha patyā vyāpārito'smyaham |
kṛtaprasādena vibho sṛṣṭi kartuṃ catuvidhām || 61 ||
prayatnena mayā sṛṣṭā sā sṛṣṭistvadanujñayā |
avṛṣṭayā ṣaṣṭihāyinyā tatra naṣṭāḥ prajā bhuvi || 62 ||
arājakaṃ mahaccāsīd duravasthamabhūjjagat |
tato ripuñjayo nāma rājarṣirmanuvaṃśajaḥ || 63 |
mayā'bhiṣikto rājarṣiḥ prajāḥ pātuṃ nareśvaraḥ |
cakāra samayaṃ so'pi mahāvīryo mahātapāḥ || 64 ||
vyajijñapat vijñāpayāmāsa || 60 |

tavājñayā cetsthāsyanti sarve diviṣado fafa divi |
nāgaloke tathā nāgāstato rājyaṃ karomyaham || 65 ||
tatheti ca mayā proktaṃ pramāṇīkriyatāṃ tu tat |
mandarāya varo datto bhavedevaṃ kṛpānidhe ||| 66 |
tasya rājñaḥ prajāstrātuṃ bhūyāccaiṣa manorathaḥ |
mama nāḍīdvayaṃ rājyaṃ tasyāpi ca śatakratoḥ || 67 |
martyānāṃ gaṇanā kveha nimeṣārdhanimeṣiṇām |
devo'pi nirmalaṃ matvā mandaraṃ cārukandaram || 68 |
vidheśva gauravaṃ rakṣastathorīkṛtavān haraḥ |
jambūdvīpe yathā kāśī nirvāṇapadadā sadā || 66 ||
tathā bahutithaṃ kālaṃ dvīpo'bhūtso'pi mandaraḥ |
yiyāsunā ca devena devena mandaraṃ citrakandaram || 70 |
nāḍīdvayaṃ ghaṭikādvayam || 67 ||
nimeṣādhaṃnimeṣiṇāṃ mama nimeṣārdhaṃ nimeṣituṃ śīlaṃ yeṣāṃ te tathā teṣām || 68 |
vidheva brahmaṇo'pi || 6 9 |

nijamūrtimayaṃ liṅgamavijñātaṃ vidherapi |
sthāpitaṃ sarvasiddhīnāṃ sthāpakebhyaḥ samarpitum || 71 ||
vipannānāñca jantūnāṃ dātuṃ naiḥśreyasīṃ ||
śriyam |
sarveṣāmiha saṃsthānāṃ kṣetraṃ caivābhirakṣitum || 72 ||
mandarādri gatenāpi kṣetraṃ naitatpinākinā |
vimuktaṃ liṅgarūpeṇa avimuktamataḥ smṛtam || 73 ||
purā nandavanaṃ nāma kṣetrametat prakīrtitam |
avimuktaṃ tadārabhya nāmā'sya prathitaṃ bhuvi || 74 ||
nāmā'vimuktamabhavadubhayoḥ kṣetraliṅgayoḥ |
etaddvayaṃ samāsādya na bhūyo garbhabhāgbhavet || 75 ||
avimukteśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā kṣetre'vimuktake |
vimukta eva eva bhavati bhavati sarvasmātkarmabandhanāt || 76 ||

arcanti viśve viśveśaṃ viśveśo'rcati viśvakṛt |
avimukteśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ bhuvi muktipradāyakam || 77 ||
purā na sthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ kasyacitkenacitkvacit |
kimākṛti bhavelliṅga naitadvetyapi kaścana || 78 |
ākāramavimuktasya dṛṣṭvā brahmā'cyutādayaḥ |
liṅgaṃ saṃsthāpayāmāsurvasiṣṭhādyāstatharṣayaḥ || 76 |
ādiliṅgamidaṃ proktamavimukteśvaraṃ mahat |
tato liṅgāntarāṇyatra jātāni kṣitimaṇḍale || 80 |
avimukteśa nāmā'pi śrutvā janmārjitādadyāt |
kṣaṇānmukto bhavenmartyo nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 81 ||
avimukteśvaraṃ liṅga smṛtvā dūragato'pi ca |
janmadvayakṛtātpāpāt kṣaṇādeva vimucyate ||| 82 |
avimukte mahākṣetre'vimuktamavalokya ca |
trijanmajanitaṃ pāpaṃ hitvā puṇyamayo bhavet || 83 ||

yatkṛtaṃ jñānavibhraṃśādenaḥ pañcasu janmasu |
avimukteśasaṃsparśāttatkṣayedeva nānyathā ||| 84 |
arcayitvā mahāliṅgamavimukteśvaraṃ naraḥ |
kṛtakṛtyo bhavedatra na ca syājjanmabhākkutaḥ || 85 |
stutvā natvā'rcayitvā ca yathāśakti yathāmati |
avimukte vimukteśaṃ vimukteśaṃ stūyate stūyate namyate'rcyate || 86 |
anādimadidaṃ liṅgaṃ svayaṃ viśveśvarācitam |
kāśyāṃ prayatnataḥ sevyamavimuktaṃ vimuktaye || 87 |
santi liṅgānyanekāni puṇyeṣvāyataneṣu ca |
āyānti tāni liṅgāni māghīṃ prāpya caturdaśīm || 88 |
kṛṣṇāyāṃ māghabhūtāyāmavimukteśajāgarāt |
sadā vigatanidrasya yogino gatibhāy bhavet ||| 8 9 |

nānāyatana liṅgāni caturvarga pradānyapi |
māgha kṛṣṇa caturdaśyāmavimuktamupāsate
ki bibheti naro dhīraḥ kṛtādaghaśiloccayāt |
avimukteśaliṅgasya bhaktivajradharo yadi || 9 1 |
kvāvimuktaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ caturvargaphalodayam |
kva pāpipāpaśailo'lpo yaḥ kṣayenāmasambhūtaḥ || 9 2 |
avimukte mahākṣetre viśveśasamadhiṣṭhite |
yairna dṛṣṭaṃ vimūḍhāste'vimuktaṃ liṅgamuttamam || 9 3 | |
draṣṭārama vimuktasya dṛṣṭvā daṇḍadharo yamaḥ |
dūrādeva praṇamati prabaddha karasampuṭaḥ || 9 4 |
dhanyaṃ tannetranirmāṇaṃ kṛtakṛtyau tu tau karau |
avimukteśvaraṃ yena ' yābhyāmaikṣiṣṭa yaḥ spṛśet || 9 5 |
yaḥ pāpipāparaulo nāma sambhṛto nāmnā nāśāya sambhūto lakṣīkṛtaḥ kṣayennārāṃ
gacchet , sa kvetyarthaḥ | anādipāpeti pāṭhe eka eva kvaśabda ubhayatra yojanīyaḥ |
nāmasambhṛta ityatra nāmni saṃsmṛta iti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 9 2 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekonacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 9 ||

dūradeśavipanno'pi kāśī mṛtaphalaṃ labhet || 9 6 ||
avimuktaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā grāmāntaraṃ vrajet |
labdhvāśu kāryasaṃsiddhi kṣemeṇa praviśed gṛham || 9 7 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe avimukteśāvirbhāvo
nāmaikonacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 3 9 |

atha catvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
avimukteśamāhātmyaṃ varṇitaṃ te'grato mayā |
atho kimasi śuśrūṣuḥ kathayiṣyāmi tatpunaḥ || 1 |
agastya uvāca-
avimukteśamāhātmyaṃ śrāvaṃ śrāvaṃ śrutī mama |
atīva suśrute jāte tathāpi na dhinomyaham || 2 |
avimukteśvaraṃ liṅga kṣetraṃ cāpyavimuktakam |
etayostu kathaṃ prāptirbhavet ṣaṇmukha tad vada || 3 ||
catvāriṃśeti vistīrṇe īśaprītikarāḥ śubhāḥ |
gṛhasthadharmā varṇyante niṣedhavidhigocarāḥ || 1 ||
uktānuvādapūrvakaṃ śravaṇā'ntare'gastyaṃ svacchandayati | avimukteśeti || 1 |
śrutānuvādapūrvakamātmanastṛptyabhāvamāvedayan pṛcchati | avimukteśeti dvābhyām |
śrāvaṃ śrāvaṃ śrutvā śrutvā | suśrute śobhane śravaṇendriye | na dhinomi alaṃ pratyayaṃ
na yāmi || 2-3 |

skanda uvāca -
śṛṇu kumbhaja vakṣyāmi yathā prāptirbhavediha |
svaśreyo dāturetasyāvimuktasya mahāmate | 4 |
samīhitārthasaṃsiddhirlabhyate puṇyabhārataḥ |
tacca puṇyaṃ bhaved vipra śrutivartmasabhājanāt || 5 |
śrutivartmajuṣaḥ puṃsaḥ saṃsparśānnaśyato mune |
kalikālāvapi sadā chidraṃ prāpya jighāṃsataḥ || 6 |
varjitasya vidhānena proktasyākaraṇena vai |
kaliphālāvapi hato brāhmaṇaṃ randhradarśanāt || 7 ||

niṣiddhācaraṇaṃ tasmāt kathayiṣye tavā'grataḥ |
taddūrataḥ parityajya naro na nirayī bhavet || 8 |
palāṇḍuṃ viḍvarāhaṃ ca śeluṃ laśunagṛñjane |
gopīyūṣaṃ taṇḍulīyaṃ vajyaṃ ca kavakaṃ sadā || 6 |
vraścanān vṛkṣaniryāsān pāyasāpūpaśaṣkulī : |
adevapitryaṃ palalamavatsāgopayastyajet || 10 ||
paya ekaśaphaṃ heyaṃ tathā krāmelakāvikam |
rātrau na dadhi bhoktavyaṃ divā na navanītakam || 11 ||
palāṇḍuṃ raktalaśunabhedaṃ ' pyāja ' iti prasiddham | viḍvarāhaṃ purīṣabhujaṃ grāmya-

tyajenmāṃsāśinaḥ sarvān sārasaṃ kukkuṭaṃ śukam ||| 12 |
jālapādān khañjarīṭān buḍitvā matsyabhakṣakān |
matsyāśī sarvamāṃsāśī tanmatsyān sarvathā tyajet || 13 ||
havyakavyaniyuktau tu bhakṣyau pāṭhīnarohitau |
māṃsāśibhistvamī bhakṣyāḥ śaśaśallakakacchpāḥ || 14 ||
śvāvidgodhe praśaste ca jñātāśca mṛgapakṣiṇaḥ |
āyuṣkāmaiḥ svargakāmaistyājyaṃ māṃsaṃ prayatnataḥ || 15 ||

yajñārthaṃ paśuhiṃsā yā sā svargyā netaro kvacit |
tyajet paryuṣitaṃ sarvamakhaṇḍasnehavajitam || 16 ||
prāṇātyaye natau śrāddhe bheṣaje viprakāmyayā |
alaulyamitthaṃ palalaṃ bhakṣayannaiva doṣabhāk || 17 |
na tādṛśaṃ bhavetpāpaṃ mṛgayāvṛttikāṅkṣiṇaḥ |
yādṛśaṃ bhavati pretya pretya laulyānmāṃsopasevinaḥ ||| 18 |
makhārthaṃ brahmaṇā sṛṣṭāḥ paśudumamṛgauṣadhīḥ |
nighnanna hiṃsako viprastāsāmapi śubhā gatiḥ ||| 16 |
pitṛdevakratukṛte madhuparkārthameva ca |
tatra hiṃsāmyahiṃsā syāddhisā'nyatra sudustarā || 20 ||
akhaṇḍasnehavajitaṃ niḥśeṣasneharahitamityarthaḥ | pāṭhāntare khaṇḍasnehābhyāṃ nirmitaṃ
yanna bhavati tadakhaṇḍasnehanirmitam || 16 ||

jantūnātmapuṣṭyarthaṃ hinasti jñānadurbalaḥ |
durācārasya tasyeha nāmutrāpi sukhaṃ kvacit || || 21 ||
bhoktā'numantā saṃskartā krayivikrayihiṃsakāḥ |
upahartā ghātayitā hisakāścāṣṭadhā smṛtāḥ || 22 ||
pratyabdamaśvamedhena śataṃ varṣāṇi yo yajet |
amāṃsabhakṣako yaśva yaśva tayorantyo viśiṣyate || 23 |
yathaivātmāparastadvad draṣṭavyaḥ sukhamicchatā |
sukhaduḥkhāni tulyāni yathātmani tathā pare || 24 ||
sukhaṃ vā yadi vā cānyadyatkiñcit kriyate pare |
tatkṛtaṃ hi punaḥ paścātsarvamātmani sambhavet || 25 |
na kleśena vinā dravyamarthahīne kutaḥ kriyāḥ |
kriyāhīne kuto dharmo dharmahīne kutaḥ sukham || 26 ||
sukhaṃ hi sarverākāṅkṣyaṃ tacca dharmasamudbhavam |
tasmāddharmo'tra kartavyaścāturvarṇena yatnataḥ || 27 |
smṛtā vidvadbhiriti śeṣaḥ | aṣṭadhā'dhamā iti vā pāṭhaḥ || 22 ||
caturvarṇā eva cāturvaṇyaṃ tena || 27 ||

nyāyāgatena dravyeṇa kartavyaṃ pāralaukikam |
dānaṃ ca vidhinā deyaṃ kāle pātre ca bhāvataḥ || 28 |
vidhihonaṃ tathā'pātre yo dadāti pratigraham |
na kevalaṃ hi tadyāti śeṣaṃ tasya ca naśyati || 26 |
vyasanārthe kuṭumbārthe yadṛṇārthe ca dīyate |
tadakṣayaṃ bhavedatra paratra ca na saṃśayaḥ || 30 |
mātāpitṛvihīnaṃ yo maujopāṇigrahādibhiḥ |
saṃskārayennijairarthaistasya śreyastvanantakam || 31 |
agnihotrairna tacchreyo nāgniṣṭomādibhirmakhaḥ |
yacchreyaḥ prāpyate martyedvije caike pratiṣṭhite || 32 |
yo hyanāthasya viprasya pāṇi grāhayate kṛtī |
iha saukhyamavāpnoti so'kṣayaṃ svargamāpnuyāt || 33 |
bhāvato bhaktitaḥ || 28 |
śeṣamanyadapi puṇyam || 2 9 ||
akṣayaṃ bahukālasthāyi tatphalaṃ bhavatītyarthaḥ || 30 |
śreyaḥ puṇyam || 31 |
pāṇi grāhayate vivāhaṃ kārayati || 33 |

pitṛgehe tu yā kanyā rajaḥ paśyedasaṃskṛtā |
bhrūṇahā tatpitā jñeyo vṛṣalī sā'pi kanyakā || 34 ||
yastāṃ pariṇayenmohāt sa bhaved vṛṣalopatiḥ |
tena sambhāṣaṇaṃ tyājyamapāṅkte yena sarvadā || 35 ||
vijñāya doṣamubhayoḥ kanyāyāśca varasya ca |
sambandhaṃ racayetpaścādanyathā doṣabhāk pitā || 36 ||
striyaḥ pavitrāḥ satataṃ netā duṣyanti kenacit |
māsi māsi rajastāsāṃ duṣkṛtānyapakarṣati || 37 ||
pūrva striyaḥ surairbhuktāḥ somagandharvavahnibhiḥ |
bhuñjate mānuṣāḥ paścānnaitā duṣyanti kenacit || 38 ||
strīṇāṃ śaucaṃ dadau somaḥ pāvakaḥ sarvamedhyatām | |
kalyāṇavāṇīṃ gandharvāstena medhyāḥ sadā striyaḥ || 36 |
bhrūṇahā śreṣṭhabrāhmaṇahantā | garbhasthabrāhmaṇabālahanteti vā | vṛṣalī śūdrī || 34 |
paścādrajodarśanasyā'rvāk pūrvamityarthaḥ || 36 |
pūrva striya iti | bhuktā vivāhānantaraṃ krameṇa triṣu divaseṣu | tathā ca śrutiḥ -
somaḥ prathamo vivide gandharvo vivida uttaraḥ |
tṛtīyo'gniṣṭe patisturīyaste manuṣyajā || ityādi || 38 ||

kanyāṃ bhuṅkte rajaḥkāle'gniḥ śaśī lomadarśane |
stanodabhedeṣu gandharvāstatprāgeva pradīyate || 40 |
dṛśyaromā tvapatyaghnī kulaghnyudgatayauvanā |
pitṛghnyāviṣkṛtarajāstatastāḥ parivarjayet || 41 ||
kanyādānaphalaprepsustasmāddadyādanagnikām
anyathā na phalaṃ dātuḥ pratigrāhī patedadhaḥ || 42 |
kanyāmabhuktāṃ somādyairdadaddānaphalaṃ labhet |
devabhuktāṃ dadaddātā na svargamadhigacchati || 43 ||
śayanāsanayānāni kuṇapaṃ strīmukhaṃ kuśāḥ |
yajñapātrāṇi sarvāṇi na duṣyanti budhāḥ kvacit || 44 ||
vatsaḥ prasravaṇe prasravaṇe medhyaḥ śakuniḥ phalapātane |
nāryo ratiprayogeṣu śvā mṛgagrahaṇe śuciḥ ||| 45 |
iti pūrvamukteḥ || 42 ||
kuṇapaṃ kuṇapaśabdena khaḍgapātrādi | strīmukhaṃ bhogakāle | tathā ca manuḥ–
" nityamāsyaṃ śucistrīṇām " iti | na duṣyanti na dūṣayanti duṣṭabuddhayā na
paśyantītyarthaḥ || 44 ||

pādato brāhmaṇā medhyāḥ striyo medhyāstu sarvataḥ || 46 |
balātkāropabhuktā vā corahastagatā'pi vā |
na tyājyā dayitā nārī nā'syāstyāgo vidhīyate || 47 |
āmlena tāmraśuddhiḥ syācchuddhiḥ kāṃsasya bhasmanā |
saṃśuddhī rajasā nāryastaṭinyā vegataḥ śuciḥ || 48 ||
manasāpi hi yāneha cintayetpuruṣāntaram |
somayā saha saukhyāni bhuṅkte cātrāpi kotibhāk || 46 ||
pitā pitāmaho bhrātā sakulyo jananī tathā |
kanyāpradaḥ pūrvanāśe prakṛtisthaḥ paraḥ paraḥ || 50 ||
aprayacchan samāpnoti bhrūṇahatyāmṛtāvṛtau |
svayaṃ tvabhāve dātṝṇāṃ kanyā kuryātsvayaṃvaram || 51 |
tyāgo na vidhīyate | poṣaṇāvekṣaṇe kārye iti bhāvaḥ | yathā śrute'rthe gṛhyamāṇe
rāvaṇahastagatāyā balātkāropabhogaśaṅkitāyā lakṣmyā viṣṇunā tyāgāyogāt || 47 ||
rajasā saṃśuddhirmanovyabhicāre satītyarthaḥ | yathāśrutamiti tairmuktāstanna
rajasā strī mano duṣṭeti yājñalkyavacanavirodhāt | śuciḥ śucitvam | taṭinīti vā

hṛtādhikārāṃ malināṃ piṇḍamātropajīvinīm |
paribhūtāmadhaḥśayyāṃ vāsayed vyabhicāriṇīm || || 52 ||
vyabhicārādṛtau śuddhirgarbhe śuddhirgarbhe tyāgo tyāgo vidhīyate |
garbhabhartṛvadhādau tu mahatyapi ca kalmaṣe || 53 |
śūdrasya bhāryā śūdraiva sā ca svā ca viśaḥ smṛte |
te ca svā caiva rājñastu tāśca svā cāgrajanmanaḥ || 54 ||
āropya śūdrāṃ śayane vipro gacchedadhogatim |
utpādya putraṃ śūdrāyāṃ brāhmaṇyādeva hīyate || 55 ||
daivapitryātitheyāni tatpradhānāni yasya tu |
devādyāstanna cāśnanti sa ca svargaṃ na gacchati || 56 |

jāmayo yāni gehāni śapantyapratipūjitāḥ |
kṛtyābhirnihatānīva naśyeyustānyasaṃśayam || 57 ||
tadabhyaryāḥ suvāsinyo bhūṣaṇācchādanāśanaiḥ |
bhūtikāmairnarainityaṃ satkāreṣutsaveṣu ca || 58 ||
yatra nāryaḥ pramuditā bhūṣaṇācchādanāśanaiḥ |
ramante devatāstatra syustatra saphalāḥ kriyāḥ || 56 |
yatra tuṣyati bhartrā strī striyā bhartā ca tuṣyati |
tatra veśmani kalyāṇaṃ sampadyeta pade pade || 60 |
ahutaṃ ca hutaṃ caiva prahutaṃ prāśitaṃ tathā |
brāhmaṃ hutaṃ ' pañcamaṃ ca pañca yajñā ime śubhāḥ || 61 ||
jāmaya iti yāni gehāni jāmayo jñātibhāryā bhaginī patnī duhitṛsnuṣādayā
apūjitāḥ satyo'bhiśapanti , idamaniṣṭameṣāmastviti , tānyabhicārahatānīva dhanapaśvādi-
sahitāni naśyanti yasmāt || 57 ||

japo huto huto homaḥ prahuto bhautiko baliḥ |
prāśitaṃ pitṛsantṛptirhataṃ brāhmaṃ dvijārcanam || 62 ||
pañca yajñānimān kurvan brāhmaṇo nā'vasīdati |
eteṣāmananuṣṭhānāt pañcasūnā avāpnuyāt || 63 |
brāhmaṇaṃ kuśalaṃ pṛcched bāhujātamanāmayam ||
vaiśyaṃ sukhaṃ samāgamya śūdraṃ santoṣameva ca || 64 ||
jātamātraḥ śiśustāvadyāvadaṣṭau samāḥ smṛtāḥ |
bhakṣyābhakṣyeṣu no duṣyedyāvannaivopanīyate || 65 ||
bharaṇaṃ poṣyavargasya dṛṣṭādṛṣṭaphalodayam |
pratyavāyo hyabharaṇe bhartavyastatprayatnataḥ || 66 ||
mātā pitā guruḥ patnī tvapatyāni samāśritāḥ |
abhyāgato'tithiścāgniḥ poṣyavargā amī nava || 67 |
ahutaṃ ceti ślokaṃ vyācaṣṭe | japo'huta iti | ahutaśabdena brahmayajñākhyo japa

jīvanmṛto'tha vijñeyaḥ puruṣaḥ svodarambhariḥ || 68 ||
dīnānāthaviśiṣṭebhyo dātavyaṃ bhūtikāmyayā | |
adattadānā jāyante parabhāgyopajīvinaḥ || 66 ||
vibhāgaśīlasaṃyukto dayāvāṃśva kṣamāyutaḥ |
devatā'tithibhaktastu gṛhastho dhārmikaḥ smṛtaḥ || 70 ||
śarvarīmadhyayāmau yau hutaśeṣaṃ ca yaddhaviḥ |
tatra svapaṃstadaśnaṃśca brāhmaṇo nā'vasīdati || 71 |
na vai tāni gṛhasthasya kāryāṇyabhyāgate sadā |
sudhāvyayāni yatsaumyaṃ vākyaṃ cakṣurmanomukham || 72 ||
svodarambhariḥ svīyodaramātrapūrakaḥ || 68 |
vibhāgo vibhajanaṃ śīlaṃ sadācāraḥ satsvabhāvo vā tābhyāṃ saṃyuktaḥ || 70 |
sudhāvyayāni sudhātulyānyavyayāni kuśalānītyekam | yatsaumyam iti vākyā-
dīnāṃ viśeṣaṇam || 72 ||

abhyutthānamihāyāta sasnehaṃ pūrvabhāṣaṇam |
upāsanamanuvrajyā gṛhasthonnatihetave || 73 ||
tathaiṣadvyayayuktāni kāryāṇyetāni vai nava |
āsanaṃ pādaśaucaṃ ca yathāśaktyāśanaṃ kṣitiḥ || 74 ||
śayyātṛṇajalābhyaṅgadīpā gārhasthyasiddhidāḥ |
tathā nava vikarmāṇi ' tyājyāni gṛhamedhinām || 75 |
paiśunyaṃ paradārāśca drohaḥ krodhānṛtā'priyam |
dveṣo dambhaśca māyā ca svargamārgargalāni hi || 76 |
navāvaśyakakarmāṇi kāryāṇi prativāsaram |
snānaṃ sandhyā japo homaḥ svādhyāyo devatārcanam || 77 ||
ihāyāta āgacchateti snehapūrvaṃ bhāṣaṇamityekam | upāsanaṃ pādasaṃvāhanādi |
gṛhasthānāmunnatihetave vṛddhihetave || 73 ||

nava gopyāni yānyatra mune tāni niśāmaya || 78 |
janmakṣaṃ maithunaṃ mantro gṛhacchidraṃ ca vañcanam |
āyurdhanā'pamānaṃ strī na prakāśyāni sarvathā || 76 ||
navaitāni prakāśyāni rahaḥ pāpamakutsitam |
prāyogya mṛṇaśuddhiśva sānvayaḥ krayavikrayau |
kanyādānaṃ guṇotkarṣo nānyatkenāpi kutracit || 80 || |
pātramitra vinīteṣu dīnānāthopakāriṣu |
mātāpitṛgu ruṣṭvetanna vakaṃ dattamakṣayam || 81 ||
janmakṣaṃ janmano nakṣatram | dhanaṃ cāpamānañceti dvandvaikyam || 7 9 ||
akutsitaṃ ' sadhrīcīnam | prāyogyaṃ prayogasambandhi | ṛṇaśuddhiradhamarṇasthāni-
ttvāpākaraṇamityarthaḥ || 80 ||

niṣphalaṃ navasūtsṛṣṭaṃ cāṭacāraṇataskare |
kuvaidye kitave dhūrte śaṭhe malle ca vandini || || 82 ||
āpatsvapi na deyāni nava vastūni sarvathā |
anvaye sati sarvasvaṃ dārāṃśca śaraṇāgatān || 83 ||
nyāsādhī kulavṛtti ca nikṣepaṃ strīdhanaṃ sutam |
yo dadāti sa mūḍhātmā prāyaścittaiviśuddhayati || 84 ||
etannavānāṃ navakaṃ jñātvā priyamavāpnuyāt |
anyacca navakaṃ vacmi sarveṣāṃ svargamārgadam || 85 | |
satyaṃ śaucamahiṃsā ca kṣāntirdānaṃ dayā damaḥ |
asteyamindriyākocaḥ sarveṣāṃ dharmasādhanam || 86 |

abhyasya navati caṃtāṃ svargamārgapradīpikām |
satāmabhimatāṃ puṇyāṃ gṛhastho nā'vasīdati || 87 ||
jihvā bhāryā suto bhrātā mitradāsasamāśritāḥ |
yasyaite vinayāḍhyāśca tasya sarvatra gauravam || 88 |
pānaṃ durjanasaṃsargaḥ patyā ca virahoṭanam |
svapno'nyagṛhavāsaśca nārīṇāṃ dūṣaṇāni ṣaṭ || ||| 8 9 ||
samaghaṃ dhānyamuddhṛtya mahaghaṃ yaḥ prayacchati |
sa hi vārdhuṣiko nāma tasyānnaṃ naiva bhakṣayet || 9 0 ||
agre māhiṣikaṃ dṛṣṭvā madhye ca vṛṣalīpatim |
ante vārdhuṣikaṃ caiva nirāśāḥ pitaro gatāḥ || 9 1 ||
mahiṣītyucyate nārī yā ca syādvyabhicāriṇī |
tāṃ duṣṭāṃ kāmayedyastu sa vai māhiṣikaḥ smṛtaḥ || 9 2 ||
daśabhinaṃvakemilitvā navatim || 87 |

svavṛṣaṃ yā parityajya paravṛṣe vṛṣāyate |
vṛṣalī sā hi vijñeyā na śūdrī vṛṣalī bhavet || 9 3 ||
yāvaduṣṇaṃ bhavatyannaṃ yāvanmaunena bhujyate |
tāvadaśnanti pitaro yāvannoktā havirguṇāḥ || 64 ||
vidyāvinayasampanne śrotriye gṛhamāgate |
krīḍantyoṣadhayaḥ sarvā yāsyāmaḥ paramāṃ gatim || 65 |
bhraṣṭaśauca vratācāre vedavivajite |
rodityannaṃ dīyamānaṃ kiṃ mayā duṣkṛtaṃ kṛtam || 9 6 ||
yasya koṣṭhagataṃ cānaṃ vedābhyāsena jīryati |
sa tārayati dātāraṃ daśapūrvān daśāparān || 67 |
na strīṇāṃ vapanaṃ kāryaṃ na ca gāḥ samanuvrajet |
na carātrau vased goṣṭhe na kuryādvaidikīṃ śrutim || 68 |
' svavṛṣaṃ svapatim | paravṛṣe parapatī vṛṣāyate parapati vāñchatītyarthaḥ | tathā
ca manuḥ - " vṛṣasyantī tu kāmukīti " || 9 3 |

sarvān 483
keśān samuddhṛtya cchedayedaṅgaladvayam |
evameva tu nāroṇāṃ śiraso muṇḍanaṃ bhavet || 99 |
rājā vā rājaputro vā brāhmaṇo vā bahuśrutaḥ |
akārayitvā vapanaṃ prāyaścittaṃ vinirdiśet || 100 ||
keśānāṃ rakṣaṇārthāya dviguṇaṃ vratamādiśet |
dviguṇā dakṣiṇā deyā brāhmaṇe vedapārage || 101 ||
yo'gṛhītvā vivāhāgni gṛhastha iti manyate |
annaṃ tasya na bhoktavyaṃ vṛthā pāko hi sa smṛtaḥ || 102 |
dārāgnihotradīkṣāṃ ca kurute yo'graje sthite |
parivettā sa vijñeyaḥ parivittistu pūrvajaḥ || 103 ||
tarhi ki nārīṇāṃ vapanaṃ nāstyeva tatrāha | sarvāniti || 99 |

parivṛttiḥ parivettā yayā ca parividyate |
sarve te narakaṃ yānti dātṛyājakapañcamāḥ || 104 ||
klībe deśāntarasthe ca mūke pravrajite jaḍe |
kubje sarve ca patite na doṣaḥ parivedane || 105 |
vedākṣarāṇi yāvanti niyuñjyādarthakāraṇe |
tāvatī bhrūṇahatyā vedavikrayakṛllabhet || 106 |
yastu pravrajito bhūtvā sevate maithunaṃ punaḥ |
ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṃ jāyate kṛmiḥ || 107 |
śūdrānnaṃ śūdrasamparkaḥ śūdreṇa ca sahāsanam |
śūdrād vidyāgamaḥ kaścijjvalattamapi pātayet || 108 |
prasaṅgāt parivedanasambandhināṃ pañcānāmapyaniṣṭaṃ phalamāha | parivittiriti |
parivittiḥ parivettā yayā ca kanyayā parivedanaṃ kriyate , sā kanyāpradātā yājakaśca
tadvivāhahomakartā sa pañcamo yeṣāṃ te sarve narakaṃ yānti || 104 ||
parivedane vivāhe || 105 |
arthakāraṇe'rthādiprāptyartham || 106 ||
prasaṅgāt strīlampaṭaṃ bhikṣaṃ nindati | yastviti || 107 |

te yānti narakaṃ ghoraṃ brahmatejovirvājitāḥ || 106 |
mākṣikaṃ phāṇitaṃ śākaṃ gorasaṃ lavaṇaṃ ghṛtam |
hastadattāni bhuktāni dinamekamabhojanam || 110 ||
hastadattāśca ye snehā lavaṇaṃ vyañjanāni ca |
dātāraṃ nopatiṣṭhante bhoktā bhuṅkte tu kilbiṣam || 111 ||
āyasenaiva pātreṇa yadannamupadīyate |
bhoktā tadviṭsamaṃ bhuṅkte dātā ca narakaṃ vrajet || 112 ||
aṅgulyā dantakāṣṭhaṃ ca pratyakṣaṃ lavaṇaṃ ca yat |
mṛttikābhakṣaṇaṃ yacca samaṃ gomāṃsabhakṣaṇaiḥ ||| 113 |
śūdrāśamānoyate na nirvāpaṃ pacanti | nirūpyata iti nirvāpaṃ carupuroḍāśādi-
kam || 10 9 |
viṭsamaṃ purīṣatulyam || 112 ||
aṅgulyā dantakāṣṭhaṃ kevalayā'ṅgulyaiva dantaśodhanamityarthaḥ , tajjanyā vā--
śaṇaśākaṃ mṛtaṃ māṃsaṃ kareṇa mathitaṃ dadhi |
tarjanī dantadhāvaśca sadyo gomāṃsabhakṣaṇam || iti vacanāt |

pānīyaṃ pāyasaṃ bhaikṣaṃ bhaikṣaṃ ghṛtaṃ lavaṇameva ca |
hasta dattaṃ na gṛhṇīyāttulyaṃ gomāṃsabhakṣaṇaiḥ || 114 ||
agrato nivasenmūrkho dūrataśca guṇānvitaḥ |
guṇānvitāya dātavyaṃ nāsti mūrkhe vyatikramaḥ || 115 ||
brāhmaṇātikramo nāsti vipre vedavivarjite |
jvalantamagnimutsṛjya na hi bhasmani hūyate || 116 ||
sannikṛṣṭamadhīyānaṃ brāhmaṇaṃ yo vyatikramet |
bhojane caiva dāne ca dahedāsaptamaṃ kulam || 117 ||
gorakṣakān vāṇijakāṃstathā kārukuśīlavān |
preṣyān vārdhuṣikāṃścaiva viprān śūdravadācaret || 118 ||
pratyakṣalavaṇaṃ kevalalavaṇaṃ cakṣurdṛśyalavaṇamiti kecit | mṛttikābhakṣaṇamapakvamṛd-
bhakṣaṇaṃ sāmānyabhṛdbhakṣaṇaṃ vā | bhṛtikāyā bhakṣaṇamiti || 113 |
agrato nivasedityetadeva hetuta upapādayati | brāhmaṇeti || 116 ||

kulānyāśu vinaśyanti brāhmaṇātikrameṇa ca |
ca || 116 ||
mā dehīti ca yo brūyād gavāgnibrāhmaṇeṣu ca |
tiryagyoniśataṃ gatvā cāṇḍāleṣvabhijāyate || 120 |
vācā yacca pratijñātaṃ karmaṇā nopapāditam |
ṛṇaṃ taddharmasaṃyuktamihaloke paratra ca || 121 |
vighasāśī bhavennityaṃ nityaṃ cāmṛtabhojanaḥ |
yajñaśeṣo'mṛtaṃ bhuktaśeṣaṃ tu tu vighasaṃ vighasaṃ viduḥ || 122 |
savyādaṃsāt paribhraṣṭe nābhideśe vyavasthite |
vastre sa ekavāsāstaṃ daive pitrye ca varjayet || 123 |
yadeva tarpayatyadbhiḥ pitṝn snātvā dvijottamaḥ |
tenaiva sarvamāpnoti pitṛyajñakriyāphalam || 124 |
deveti vibhāgena vibhajyāgrahaṇena || 11 9 ||

hastau prakṣālya gaṇḍūṣaṃ yaḥ pibed bhojanottaram |
devaṃ pitryaṃ tathātmānaṃ trayaṃ sa upaghātayet || 125 |
gaṇānnaṃ gaṇikānnaṃ ca yadannaṃ prāmayājake |
strīṇāṃ prathamagarbheṣu bhuktvā cāndrāyaṇaṃ caret || 126 ||
pakṣe vā yadi vā māse yasya gehe'tti na dvijaḥ |
bhuktvā durātmānastasya careccāndrāyaṇavratam || 127 |
satriṇāṃ dīkṣitānāṃ ca yatīnāṃ brahmacāriṇām |
eteṣāṃ sūtakaṃ nāsti ṛtvijāṃ karma kurvatām || 128 |
ajīrṇe'bhyudite vānte śmaśrukarmaṇi maithune |
duḥsvapne durjanasparśe snānameva vidhīyate || 126 |
caityavṛkṣaṃ citiṃ yūpaṃ śivanirmālyabhojinam |
vedavikrayiṇaṃ spṛṣṭvā sacailo jalamāviśet || 130 |
gaṇānnaṃ bahubhirekatra bahubhirekatra pakvaṃ bhaktam | gaṇikānnaṃ veśyānnam | strīṇāṃ
prathamagarbheṣu sīmantonnayanādiṣu || 126 |
ajīrṇe'bhyudite jāte || 12 9 ||
caityavṛkṣaṃ grāmyajanapūjyaṃ tarum | śivanirmālyabhojinamiti bāṇādiliṅga vyati-
rekeṇa boddhavyam || 130 ||

svādhyāye bhojane pāne pāduke vai visarjayet || 131 ||
khalakṣetragataṃ dhānyaṃ kūpavāpīṣu yajjalam |
agrāhyādapi tadgrāhyaṃ yacca goṣṭhagataṃ payaḥ ||| 132 |
yadveṣṭitaśirā bhuṅkte yo bhuṅkte dakṣiṇāmukhaḥ |
sopānatkaśca yad bhuṅkte tadvai rakṣāṃsi bhuñjate || 133 ||
yātudhānāḥ piśācāśca rākṣasāḥ krūrakarmiṇaḥ |
haranti rasamannasya maṇḍalena vivarjitam || 134 |
brahmādyāśca surāḥ sarve vasiṣṭhādyā maharṣayaḥ |
maṇḍalaṃ copajīvanti tataḥ kurvīta maṇḍalam || 135 | |
brāhmaṇe caturasraṃ syāttryatraṃ vai bāhujanmanaḥ |
vartulaṃ ca viśaḥ proktaṃ śūdrasyābhyukṣaṇaṃ smṛtam || 136 ||

nāsane na ca śayyāyāṃ bhuñjīta na malāditaḥ || 137 |
dharmaśāstrarathārūḍhā vedakhaṅgadharā dvijāḥ |
krīḍārthamapi yadbrūyuḥ sa dharmaḥ paramaḥ smṛtaḥ || 138 ||
rātrau dhānādadhiyutaṃ dharmakāmo na bhakṣayet |
āśnato dharmahāniḥ syādvayādhibhiścopapīḍyate ||| 136 |
phāṇitaṃ gorasaṃ toyaṃ lavaṇaṃ madhu kāñjikam |
hastena brāhmaṇo datvā kṛcchraṃ cāndrāyaṇaṃ caret || 140 ||
gandhābharaṇamātyāni yaḥ prayacchati dharmavit |
sa sugandhiḥ sadā hṛṣṭo yatra yatropajāyate || 141 ||
nīlīraktaṃ tu yadvastraṃ dūrataḥ parivarjayet |
strīṇāṃ krīḍārthasaṃyoge śayanīye na duṣyati || 142 |
ghānādadhiyutaṃ lājadadhibhyāṃ miśritamannādotyarthaḥ || 13 9 ||
phāṇitaṃ pheṇīti prasiddham | kañjikaiva kāñjikā madhu ca kālikā ca madhukāli-

apavitro bhavedviprastribhiḥ kṛcchraviśudhyati || 143 ||
snānaṃ dānaṃ tapo homaḥ svādhyāyaḥ pitṛtarpaṇam |
vṛthā tasya mahāyajñā nīlīvāso birbhāta yaḥ || 144 |
nīlīraktaṃ yadā vastraṃ vipraḥ svāṅgeṣu dhārayet |
tantusantatisaṃkhyāke narake sa vaseddhruvam || 145 |
ahorātroṣito bhūtvā pañcagavyena śudhyati || 146 ||
nīlīraktena vastreṇa yadannamupakalpayet |
bhoktā viṣṭhāsamaṃ bhuṅkte dātā ca narakaṃ vrajet || 147 ||
amṛtaṃ brāhmaṇasyānnaṃ kṣatriyānnaṃ payaḥ smṛtam |
vaiśyasya cānnamevānnaṃ śūdrasya rudhiraṃ smṛtam || 148 ||

vaiśvadevena homena devatābhyarcanairjapaḥ |
amṛtaṃ tena viprānnamṛgyajuḥsāmasaṃskṛtam || 14 9 ||
vyavahārānurūpeṇa nyāyena tu yadarjanam |
kṣatriyasya payastena prajāpālanato bhavet || 150 ||
praharānaddhavāhādyadannamutpādya yacchati
sītāyajñavidhānena vaiśyānnaṃ tena saṃskṛtam ||| 151 |
ajñānatimirāndhasya madyapānaratasya ca |
rudhiraṃ tena tena śūdrānnaṃ vedamantravivarjitam || 152 |
na vṛthā śapathaṃ kuryātsvalpe'pyarthe narottamaḥ |
vṛthā hi śapathaṃ kurvan pretya ceha vinaśyati || 153 |

kāminīṣu vivāhe ca gavāṃ bhukte dhanakṣaye |
brāhmaṇābhyupapattau ca śapathairnāsti pātakam || 154 ||
satyena śāpayedvipraṃ kṣatriyaṃ kṣatriyaṃ vāhanāyudhaiḥ |
gobījakāñcanairvaiśyaṃ śūdraṃ sarvaistu pātakaiḥ || 155 |
agni vā hārayedenamapsu cainaṃ nimajjayet |
sparśayetputradārāṇāṃ śirāṃ syenaṃ ca vā pṛthak || 156 |
na yamaṃ yamamityāhurātmā vai yama ucyate |
ātmā saṃyamito yena taṃ yamaḥ kiṃ kariṣyati || 157 |
na nistriśastathā tīkṣṇaḥ phaṇī vā duratikramaḥ |
ripurvā nityasaṃkruddho yathātmā duradhiṣṭhitaḥ || 158 ||
ekaḥ kṣamāvatāṃ doṣo na dvitīyaḥ kathañcana |
yadenaṃ kṣamayā yuktamaśaktaṃ manyate janaḥ || 156 |
enaṃ śūdram || 156 |
duradhiṣṭhito'vaśaḥ || 158 |

na śabdaśāstrābhiratasya mokṣo na caiva ramyāvasthapriyasya |
na bhojanācchādanatatparasya na lokavittagrahaṇe ratasya || 160 |
ekāntaśīlasya sadaiva tasya sarvendriyapratinivartakasya |
svādhyāyayoge gatamānasasya mokṣo dhruvaṃ nityamahiṃsakasya || 161 |
kvaikāntaśīlatvamihāsti puṃsaḥ kva cendriyaprotinivṛttirasti |
kva yogayuktiḥ kva ca daivatejyā kāśyāṃ vinebhiḥ sahajena muktiḥ || 162 ||
viśveśa saṃśolanameva yogastapaśca viśveśapurīnivāsaḥ |
vratāni dānaṃ niyamā yamāśca snānaṃ dyunadyāṃ yadudagvahāyām || 163 ||
skanda uvāca- -
nyāyāgatadhanastattvajñānaniṣṭho'tithipriyaḥ
śrāddhakṛtsatyavādī ca gṛhastho'pīha mucyate || 164 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ catvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 40 |

dīnāndhakṛpaṇārthibhyo datvā'nnāni viśeṣataḥ |
kṛtvā gārhāṇi karmāṇi gṛhasthaḥ śreya āpnuyāt || 165 |
itthamācaratāṃ puṃsāṃ kāśīprāptistu mokṣakṛt |
kāśīnāthaprasādena kāśī yena niṣevitā || 166 ||
sa sarvatīrtha susnātaḥ sa sarvakratudīkṣitaḥ |
sa dattasarvadānastu kāśī yena niṣevitā ||| 167 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe gṛhasthadharmākhyānaṃ nāma catvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 40 ||

athaikacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
uṣitvaivaṃ gṛhe vipro dvitīyādāśramātparam |
valīpalita saṃyuktastṛtīyāśramamāviśet ||1 ||
apatyāpatyamālokya grāmyāhārān visṛjya ca |
patnīṃ putreṣu santyajya patnyā vā vanamāviśet || 2 |
vasānaśvarmacīrāṇi sāgnirmunyannavartanaḥ |
jaṭī sāyaṃpragesnāyī śmaśrulonakhalomabhṛt || 3 |
ekenādhikacatvāriśake'dhyāye suśobhane |
ucyante vividhā yogā dharmāśca yativānagāḥ || 1 |
kramaprāptān vanasthadharmānāha | uṣitvevamiti | valī tvacaḥ ślathatā palitaṃ jarasā
śoklyam , tābhyāṃ yutaḥ || 1 |

pañcayajñāna hāpayet |
ammūlaphalabhikṣābhirarcayed bhikṣukā'tithīn || 4 ||
anādātā ca dātā ca dāntaḥ svādhyāyatatparaḥ |
vaitānikaṃ ca juhuyādagnihotraṃ yathāvidhi || 5 |
munyannaiḥ svayamānīteḥ puroḍāśāṃśca nirvapet |
svayaṃ kṛtaṃ ca lavaṇaṃ khādetsnehaṃ phalodbhavam || 6 ||
varjayeccheluśinū ca kabakaṃ kabakaṃ palalaṃ madhu |
munyannamāśvine māsi tyajedyatpūrvasañcitam || 7 ||
grāmyāṇi phalamūlāni phālajānnaṃ ca santyajet |
dantolūkhalako vā syādaśmakuṭṭo'yavā bhavet || 8 |

sadyaḥ prakṣālako vā syādathavā māsasañcayo |
triṣaḍvādaśamāsānaphalamūlādisaṃgrahī
nakkāśyekāntarāśī vā ṣaṣṭhakālāśano'pi vā |
cāndrāyaṇavratī vā syātpakṣabhugvā'tha māsabhaka ||| 10 |
vaikhānasatasthastu phalamūlāśano ' 'pi vā |
tapasā śoṣayeddehaṃ pitan devāṃśva tarpayet || 11 ||
agnimātmani cādhāya vicaredaniketanaḥ |
bhikṣayetprāṇayātrārthaṃ tāpasān vanavāsinaḥ || 12 |
grāmādānīya vā'śnīyādaṣṭau grāsān vasan vane |
itthaṃ vanāśramī vipro brahmaloke mahīyate || 13 || ||
aśaktaṃ vairāgyahīnaṃ pratyāhāgnimiti | śrotamagni vaikhānasaśāstravidhānena
bhasmapānādinā svātmani samāropyāniketano laukikāgnivad gṛhaśūnyo vicaret |

bhāgaṃ tṛtīyamiti kānane |
āyuṣastu turīyāṃśe tyaktvā saṃgānparivrajet ||
ṛṇatrayamasaṃśodhyatvanutpādya 14 ||
tathā yajñānaniṣṭvā sutānapi |
ca mokṣamicchan vrajatyadhaḥ || 15 |
manāgapi na bhūtānāṃ yasmādutpadyate bhayam
sarvabhūtāni |
tasyeha prayacchantyabhayaṃ sadā || 16 ||
tāpaseṣveva vipreṣu yātrikaṃ bhaikṣyamāharet |
gṛhavāsiṣu cānyeṣu dvijeṣu vanavāsiṣu ||
grāmādāhṛtya vā'śnīyādaṣṭo grāsān vane vasan |
pratigṛhya puṭenaiva pāṇinā śakalena vā || iti |

eka eva carennityamanagniraniketanaḥ |
siddhyarthamasahāyaḥ syād grāmamannārthamāśrayet || 17 ||
jīvitaṃ maraṇaṃ vā'tha nā'bhikāṅkṣet kvacidyatiḥ |
kālameva pratīkṣeta nirdeśaṃ bhṛtako yathā || 18 ||
sarvatra mamatāśūnyaḥ sarvatra samatāyutaḥ |
vṛkṣamūlaniketaśca mumukṣuriha śasyate || 16 |
dhyānaṃ śaucaṃ tathā bhikṣā nityamekāntaśīlatā |
yateścatvāri karmāṇi pañcamaṃ nopapadyate || 20 ||
vāṣikāṃścaturo māsān viharena yatiḥ kvacit |
bījāṅkurāṇāṃ jantūnāṃ hiṃsā tatra yato bhavet || 21 ||

gacchetpariharan jantūn pibetkaṃ vastraśodhitam |
vācaṃ vadedanudvegāṃ na krudhyetkenacit kvacit || 22
caredātmasahāyaśca nirapekṣo ||
nirāśrayaḥ |
nityamadhyātmanirato nīcakeśanakho vaśī || 23
kusumbhavāsā daṇḍāḍhyo bhikṣāśī khyātivarjitaḥ ||
alābudārumṛdveṇupātraṃ śastaṃ na pañcamam || 24 ||
na grāhyaṃ taijasaṃ pātraṃ bhikṣukena kadācana |
varāṭake saṃgṛhīte tatra tatra tatra dine dine dine || 25 ||
gosahasravadhaṃ pāpaṃ śrutireṣā sanātanī |
hṛdi sasnehabhāvena cedrakṣet striyamekadā || 26 ||
kaṃ jalam || 22 |
varjitaḥ kusumbhavāsāḥ kusumbhāktavāsāḥ | gairikādyaktavastrāderupalakṣaṇametat | khyāti-

koṭidvayaṃ brahmakalpaṃ kumbhīpākī na saṃśayaḥ |
ekakālaṃ cared bhaikṣaṃ na kuryāttatra vistaram || 27 ||
vidhūme sannamusale vyaṃgāre bhuktavajjane |
vṛtte śarāvasampāte bhikṣāṃ nityaṃ caredyatiḥ || 28 ||
alpāhāro rahaḥsthāyī tvindriyārtheṣvalolupaḥ |
rāgadveṣavinirmukto bhikṣurmokṣāya kalpate || 26 ||
āśrame tu yatiryasya muhūrtamapi viśramet |
kiṃ tasyānekatantreṇa kṛtakṛtyaḥ sa jāyate || 30 |

sañcintayad gṛhasthena pāpamāmaraṇāntikam |
nirdhakṣyati hi tatsarvameka rātroṣito yatiḥ || 31
dṛṣṭvā jarābhibhavanamasahyaṃ |
rogapīḍitam |
dehatyāgaṃ punargabhaṃ garbhakleśaṃ ca dāruṇam || 32
nānāyoninivāsaṃ ca viyogaṃ ||
ca priyaiḥ saha |
apriyaiḥ saha saṃyogamadharmādduḥkhasambhavam || 33
punanirayasaṃvāsaṃ |
karmadoṣasamudbhūtā nānānarakayātanāḥ |
nṛṇāṃ gatiranekadhā || 34 |
deheṣvanityatāṃ dṛṣṭvā nityatāṃ paramātmanaḥ |
kurvīta muktaye yatnaṃ yatra yatrāśrame rataḥ || 35 |
karapātrīti vikhyātā bhikṣāpātravivarjitāḥ |
teṣāṃ śataguṇaṃ puṇyaṃ bhavatyeva dine dine || 36 ||
nirdhakṣyati bhasmasātkariṣyatītyarthaḥ || 31 |
dṛṣṭvetyādi dvitīyāntapadānāṃ dṛṣṭvā muktaye yatnaṃ kurvītetyagrimeṇā'nvayaḥ || 32 |
evaṃ pūrvoktaprakāreṇa nṛṇāmanekadhāgati phalatā dṛṣṭetyarthaḥ | gatīna ' ṇāmanekadheti
pāṭhaścettarhi ṛjurevārthaḥ dṛṣṭvetipadasyāvṛttiḥ sarvatrānvayārthā || 34 ||

āśramāṃścaturastvevaṃ kramādāsevya paṇḍitaḥ |
nirdvandvastyaktasaṅgaśca brahmabhūyāya kalpate || 37 |
asaṃyataḥ kubuddhīnāmātmā bandhāya kalpate |
dhīmadbhiḥ saṃyataḥ so'pi padaṃ dadyādanāmayam || 38 ||
śrutismṛtipurāṇānāṃ vidyopaniṣadastathā |
ślokāḥ sūtrāṇi bhāṣyāṇi yaccānyadvāṅmayaṃ kvacit || 36 |
vedānuvacanaṃ jñātvā brahmacayaṃ tapo damaḥ |
śraddhopavāsaḥ svātantryamātmano jñānahetavaḥ || 40 |

sa hi sarvairvajijñāsya ātmaivāśramavatibhiḥ |
śrotavyastvatha mantavyo draṣṭavyaśca prayatnataḥ || 41
ātmajñānena muktiḥ syāt ||
tacca yogādṛte na hi |
sa ca yogaściraṃ kālamabhyāsādeva sidhyati || 42 |
nāraṇyasaṃśrayādyogo na nānāgranthacintanāt |
na dānairna vratairvāpi na tapobhirna vā makhaiḥ || 43 ||
na ca padmāsanādyogo na vā ghrāṇāgravīkṣaṇāt |
na śaucena na maunena na mantrārādhanairapi || 44 |
abhiyogātsadā'bhyāsāttatraiva ca viniścayāt |
punaḥ punaranirvedāt siddhayadyogo na cānyathā || 45 ||

ātmakrīḍasya satataṃ sadātmamithunasya ca |
ātmanyeva sutṛptasya yogasiddhirna dūrataḥ || 46 |
atrātmavyatirekeṇa dvitīyaṃ yo na paśyati |
ātmārāmaḥ sa yogīndro brahmobhūto bhavediha || 47 || ||
saṃyogastvātmamanasoryoga ityucyate budhaiḥ |
prāṇāpānasamāyogo yoga ityapi keścana || 48 ||
viṣayendriyasaṃyogo yoga ityapyapaṇḍitaiḥ |
viṣayāsaktacittānāṃ jñānaṃ mokṣaśca dūrataḥ || 46 |
durnivārā manovṛttiryāvat sā na nivartate |
kiṃ vadantyapi yogasya tāvannedīyasī kutaḥ || 50 |
ātmamithunasya paramātmaikyabhāvamāpannasya || 46 ||
jīvaparamātmanoraikyameva mukhyo yogaśabdārtha iti vaktuṃ mukhyādiyogatrayamāha |

manaḥ kṛtvā kṣetrajñe paramātmani |
ekīkṛtya vimucyeta yogayuktaḥ sa ucyate || 51 ||
bahirmukhāni sarvāṇi kṛtvā svānyantarāṇi vai |
manasyevendriyagnāmaṃ manaścātmani yojayet || 52 ||
sarvabhāvavinirmuktaṃ kṣetrajñaṃ brahmaṇi nyaset |
etaddhyānaṃ ca yogaśca śeṣo'nyo granthavistaraḥ || 53 |
yannāsti sarvalokeṣu tadastīti virudhyate |
kathyamānaṃ tadanyasya hṛdayenāvatiṣṭhate || 54 |

svasaṃvedyaṃ hi tadbrahma kumāro strīsukhaṃ yathā |
ayogī naiva tadvetti jātyandha iva vartikām || 55 |
nityābhyasanaśīlasya svasaṃvedyaṃ hi tadbhavet |
tatsūkṣmatvādanirdeśyaṃ paraṃ brahma sanātanam || 56 |
kṣaṇamapyekamudakaṃ yathā na sthiratāmiyāt |
vātāhataṃ yathā cittaṃ tasmāttasya na viśvaset || 57 ||
bādhitamathaṃ vedo'pi na bodhayati kañcana |
asambhāvyaṃ na vaktavyaṃ pratyakṣaṃ dṛśyate yadi ||
śilā tarati pānīyaṃ gītaṃ gāyati vānaraḥ || ityādi || 54 ||
etadeva sadṛṣṭāntaṃ spaṣṭayati | svasaṃvedyamiti | tatpratyag brahma svasaṃvedyaṃ puṇyakarmā-
dinā śuddhāntaḥkaraṇe yogābhyāsena yogibhiḥ svayameva jñeyam | tatra dṛṣṭāntaḥ | kumārī-

ato'nilaṃ nirundhīta cittasya sthairyahetave |
marunnirodhanārthāya ṣaḍaṅgaṃ yogamabhyaset || 58 ||
āsanaṃ prāṇasaṃrodhaḥ pratyāhāraśca dhāraṇā |
dhyānaṃ samādhiretāni yogāṅgāni bhavanti ṣaṭ || 56 |
āsanānoha tāvanti yāvantyo jīvayonayaḥ |
siddhāsanamidaṃ proktaṃ yogino yogasiddhidam || 60 |
kiñcācalasyāpi brahmaṇo'sthiratvaṃ cittādhīnaṃ yato'taścittasya sthairyāthaṃ vāyuṃ
sthirīkuryāttasya ca sthirīkaraṇārthaṃ ṣaṭ āsanādīnyaṅgāni yasya taṃ yogaṃ samabhyaset ,
āvṛttyā kuryāditi || 58 |

etadabhyasanānnityaṃ varmadāḍharcamavāpnuyāt || 61 ||
dakṣiṇaṃ caraṇaṃ nyasya vāmorūpari yogavit |
yāmyorupari vāmaṃ ca padmāsanamidaṃ viduḥ || 62 ||
karābhyāṃ dhārayetpaścādaṅguṣṭhau dṛḍhabandhavit | |
bhavetpadmāsanādasmādabhyāsāddṛḍha vigrahaḥ || 63 ||
athavā hyāsane yasmin sukhamasyopajāyate |
svastikādau tadadhyāsya yogaṃ yuñjīta yogavit || 64 ||

na daṃśamaśakākīrṇe na caitye na ca catvare |||
keśabhasma 65 |
tuṣāṅgārakīkasādipradūṣite
nābhyasetpūtigandhādau na sthāne janasaṃkule || 66 '
jānūrvorantare samyak kṛtvā pādatale ubhe |
ṛjukāyaḥ samāsīnaḥ svastikaṃ tatpracakṣate ||
savye dakṣiṇagulphantu savye pārśve niyojayet |
dakṣiṇe tu tu tathā savyaṃ gomukhaṃ gomukhaṃ yathā ||
ekapādaṃ tathekasmin vinyasedūrasaṃsthitam |
itarasmistathā coru vīrāsanamitīritam ||
gudaṃ nirudhya gulphābhyāṃ vyutkrameṇa samāhitaḥ |
kūrmāsanaṃ bhavedetaditi yogavido viduḥ ||
padmāsanaṃ tu saṃyojya jānūrvorantare karī |
niveśya bhūmau saṃsthāpya vyomasthaṃ kukkuṭāsanam ||
kukkuṭāsanabandhasyoṃ dorbhyāṃ sambadhyakandharām |
bhavetkūrmavaduttānametaduttānakūrma kam
pādāṅguṣṭhī tu pāṇibhyāṃ gṛhītvā śravaṇāvadhi |
dhanurākarṣaṇaṃ kṛtvā dhanurāsanamīritam ||
vāmorumūlārpitadakṣajānurantarbahirveṣṭitadakṣadorbhyām |
pragṛhya tiṣṭhan parivartitāṅgaḥ śrīmatsyanāyoditamāsanaṃ syāt ||
ityādīni || 64 ||
niṣedhamukhena yogasthānaṃ nirdiśati | na toyeti dvayena | daṃśo makṣikākārastataḥ
kīkasamasthi , ādipadena śoṇitādīni gṛhyante || 66 ||

sarvabādhāvirahite sarvendriyasukhāvahe |
manaḥ prasādajanane sragdhūpāmodamodite || 67 ||
nātitṛptaḥ kṣudhārto na na viṇmūtraprabādhitaḥ |
nādhvakhinno na cintārto yogaṃ yuñjīta yogavit || 68 |
ūrusthottānacaraṇaḥ savye nyasyottaraṃ karam |
uttānaṃ kiñcidunnamya vaktraṃ viṣṭabhya corasā ||| 66 |
nimīlitākṣaḥ sattvastho dantairdantānna saṃspṛśet |
tālusthācalajihvaśca saṃvṛtāsyaḥ suniścala : || 70 |
sanniyamyendriyagrāmaṃ nātinīcocchritāsanaḥ |
madhyamaṃ cottamaṃ cātha prāṇāyāmamupakramet || 71 ||
niṣedhamukhenoktvā vidhimukhenāpyāha | sarvetyekena || 67 ||
kiviśiṣṭoṃ yogaṃ kuryāditi pṛcchāyāṃ yoginaṃ nirdiśati | nātitṛpta iti || 68 |
āsanasthānādhikāriṇo nirūpya evaṃbhūtaḥ san prāṇāyāmaṃ kuryādityāha |

calaṃ savaṃ niścale tatra niścalam |
sthāṇutvamāpnuyādyogī tato'nilanirundhanāt |
yāvaddehe sthitaḥ || 72 ||

nirgate tatra maraṇaṃ tataḥ prāṇaṃ nirundhayet
yāvad baddho maruddehe || 73 ||

svedaṃ kampaṃ viṣādaṃ ca janayetkramaśastvasau |
prathamena jayetsvedaṃ dvitīyena tu vepathum || 77 | ||
viṣādaṃ hi tṛtīyena siddhaḥ prāṇo'tha yoginaḥ |
bhavetkramātsanniruddhaḥ siddhaḥ prāṇo'tha yoginā |
krameṇa sevyamāno'sau nayate yatra cecchati || 78 |

dehaṃ vidārayatyeṣa kuṣṭhādi janayatyapi || 76 |
tatpratyāyayitavyo'sau krameṇāraṇyahastivat !
banyo gajo gajārirvā krameṇa mṛdutāmiyāt || 80 || ||

na ca taṃ parilaṅghayet
tathā prāṇo hṛdistho'yaṃ yoginā kramayogataḥ |
gṛhītaḥ sevyamānastu viśrambhamupagacchati ||| 81 |

dṛḍhāsano yathāśakti prāṇaṃ candreṇa pūrayet |
recayedatha sūryeṇa prāṇāyāmo'yamucyate || 84 ||
sravatpīyūṣadhāraughaṃ dhyāyaṃścandrasamanvitam |
prāṇāyāmena yogīndraḥ sukhamāpnoti tatkṣaṇāt || 85 |
raviṇā prāṇamākṛṣya pūrayedaudaroṃ darīm |
kumbhayitvā śanaiḥ paścādyogī candreṇa recayet || 86 |
dvātriṃśadvārajapena bahirvāyuṃ recayet | tato dakṣiṇanāsāpuṭena nilīnamārutaṃ ramiti
vahnibījaṃ raktavarṇaṃ vicintya dakṣiṇanāsāpuṭena ramityasyaiva vahnibījasya ṣoḍaśavārajapena
vāyaṃ pūrayitvā raṃ bījotthavahninā samasta śarīraṃ dagdhvā raṃ bījasyaiva dvātriṃśadvāra -
japena vāmanāsābhasmanā saha bahirvāyuṃ recayet , tato vāmanāsāpuṭe vamiti śuklavarṇaṃ
candrabījaṃ saṃsmṛtya vamityasya ṣoḍaśavārajapena vaṃ bījarūpaṃ candraṃ lalāṭacandraṃ nayet |
tasmāllalāṭacandrād vamityasya catuḥṣaṣṭivārajapena kuṃbhakayogenāmṛtavṛṣṭimakārādi-
kṣakārāntamayīmutpādya tenāmatena samastaṃ śarīraṃ punarutpannaṃ vicintya tenaivā'mbhasā

anena yāmyāyāmena yogīndraḥ śarmabhāgbhavet || 87
itthaṃ māsatrayābhyāsādubhayāyāmasevanāt |
siddhanāḍīgaṇo |
yogī siddhaprāṇo'bhidhīyate || 88 |
yatheṣṭaṃ dhāraṇaṃ vāyoranalasya pradīpanam |
nādā'bhivyaktirārogyaṃ bhavennāḍīviśodhanāt || 8 9 ||
pradīptavahnirāśisadṛśamuṣmagaṃ sūryādhiṣṭhānaṃ śrīviśveśvaraṃ nārāyaṇaṃ vā |
hṛdindriyāṇyasuyamavāyuragnirjalaṃ mahī |
sūryaścandrastapaścaiva sthānānyekādaśaiva te "
dhyeyaḥ sadā savitṛmaṇḍalamadhyavartī nārāyaṇaḥ sarasijāsanasanniviṣṭaḥ |
keyūravān makarakuṇḍalavān kirīṭī hārī hiraṇmayavapurdhṛtaśaṃkhacakraḥ || iti vacanāt |

prāṇo dehagato vāyurāyāmastannibandhanam |
ekaśvāsamayī mātrā prāṇāyāmo nirucyate || 9 0 | |
prāṇāyāme'dhame dharmaḥ kampo bhavati madhyame |
uttiṣṭheduttame beho baddhapadmāsano muhuḥ || 9 1 |
prāṇāyāmairdaheddoṣān pratyāhāreṇa pātakam |
manodhairya dhāraṇayā dhyāneneśvaradarśanam || 9 2 ||
samādhinā labhenmokṣaṃ tyaktvā dharmaṃ śubhāśubham |
āsanena vapurdāḍhyaṃ ṣaḍaṅgamiti kīrtitam || 9 3 |
prakārāntareṇa prāṇāyāmanāma nirvakti | prāṇa iti | tannibandhanaṃ prāṇaghaṭitaṃ

pratyāhāra udāhṛtaḥ |
pratyāhārairdvādaśabhirdhāraṇā parikīrtitā
bhavedīśvarasaṃgatyai || 9 4 ||
dhyānaṃ dvādaśadhāraṇam |

samādheḥ parato jyotiranantaṃ svaprakāśakam |
tasmin dṛṣṭe kriyākāṇḍaṃ yātāyātaṃ nivartate || 9 6 ||
pavane vyomasamprāpte dhvanirutpadyate mahān | |
ghaṇṭādīnāṃ pravādyānāṃ tataḥ siddhiradūrataḥ || 9 7 ||

prāṇāyāmena yuktena sarvavyādhikṣayo bhavet |
ayuktābhyāsayogena sarvavyādhisamudbhavaḥ || 9 8 |
hikkā śvāsaśva kāsaśca śiraḥ karṇākṣivedanāḥ |
bhavanti vividhā doṣāḥ pavanasya vyatikramāt || 99 |

indriyāṇāṃ hi caratāṃ viṣayeṣu yadṛcchayā |

ca candramāḥ |

kākacañcuvadāsyena śītalaṃ śītalaṃ pibet |
