rasanāṃ tāluvivare nidhāyordhvamukho'mṛtam |
dhayannirjaratāṃ gacchedāṣaṇmāsānna saṃśayaḥ || 106 |
ūrdhvajihvaḥ sthiro bhūtvā somapānaṃ karoti yaḥ |
māsārdhena na sandeho mṛtyuṃ jayati yogavit || 107 |
sampīḍya rasanāgreṇa rājadantabilaṃ mahat |
dhyātvā sudhāmayīṃ devīṃ ṣaṇmāsena kavirbhavet || 108 ||
amṛtāpūrṇadehasya yogino dvitrivatsarāt |
ūdhvaṃ pravartate reto hyaṇimādiguṇodayam || 106 |
nityaṃ somakalāpūrṇa śarīraṃ yasya yoginaḥ |
takṣakenāpi daṣṭasya viṣaṃ tasya na sarpati || 110 |
tyataḥ prāktanena granthena | kākacañcuvadāsyena kākatroṭitulyena mukhena | śītalaṃ

samāyuktaḥ prāṇāyāmena saṃyutaḥ |
pratyāhāreṇa sampanno dhāraṇāmatha cābhyaset || 111
hṛdaye pañcabhūtānāṃ dhāraṇāṃ yaḥ pṛthak pṛthak |
manaso niścalatvena dhāraṇā sā'bhidhīyate || 112 |
haritālanibhāṃ bhūmi salakārāṃ salakārāṃ savedhasam |
catuṣkoṇāṃ hṛdi dhyāyedeṣā syātkṣitidhāraṇā || 113 ||
kaṇṭhe'mbutattvamardhendunibhaṃ viṣṇusamanvitam |
vakārabījaṃ kundābhaṃ dhyāyannambu jayediti || 114 ||
tālusthamindragopābhaṃ trikoṇaṃ rephasaṃyutam |
rudreṇādhiṣṭhitaṃ teṃjo dhyātvā vahna jayediti || 115 ||

vāyutattvaṃ bhruvormadhye vṛttamañjanasannibham |
yaṃ bījamīśadevatyaṃ dhyāyan vāyuṃ jayediti || 116 ||
ākāśaṃ ca marīcivārisadṛśaṃ yadbrahmarandhrasthitaṃ
yannāthena sadāśivena sahitaṃ śāntaṃ hakārākṣaram |
prāṇaṃ tatra vinoya pañcaghaṭikaṃ cittānvitaṃ dhāraye-
deṣā mokṣakapāṭapāṭanapaṭuḥ proktā nabho dhāraṇā || 117 ||
stambhanī plāvanī caiva dahanī bhrāmaṇī tathā |
śamanī ca bhavantyetā bhūtānāṃ pañca dhāraṇāḥ || 118 |
dhyai cintāyāṃ smṛto dhātuścintātattva suniścalā |
etaddhyānamiha proktaṃ saguṇaṃ nirguṇaṃ dvidhā || 116 || ||

saguṇaṃ varṇabhedena nirguṇaṃ kevalaṃ matam |
samantraṃ saguṇaṃ viddhi nirguṇaṃ mantravajitam || 120 |
antaśceto bahiścakṣuravasthāpya sukhāsanam |
samatvaṃ ca śarīrasya dhyānamudrātisiddhidā || 121 ||
nāśvamedhena tatpuṇyaṃ na ca vai rājasūyataḥ |
yatpuṇyamekadhyānena labhedyogī sthirāsanaḥ || 122 |
śabdādīnāṃ ca tanmātrā yāvatkarṇādiṣu sthitā |
tāvadeva smṛtaṃ dhyānaṃ syātsamādhirataḥ param || 123 ||
dhāraṇā pañcanāḍīkā dhyānaṃ syātṣaṣṭināḍikam |
dinadvādaśakena syātsamādhiriha bhaṇyate || 124 ||

jalasaindhavayoḥ sāmyaṃ yathā bhavati yogataḥ |
tathātmamanasoraikyaṃ samādhiriha bhavyate || 125 |
yadā saṃkṣoyateṃ prāṇo mānasaṃ ca pralīyate |
tadā samarasatvaṃ yatsa samādhirihocyate || 126 |
yatsamatvaṃ dvayoratra jīvātmaparamātmanoḥ |
sa naṣṭa sarvasaṅkalpaḥ samādhirabhidhīyate || 127 |
nātmānaṃ na paraṃ vetti na śītaṃ noṣmameva ca |
samādhiyukto yogīndro na sukhaṃ na sukhetarat || 128 ||
kātyate naiva kālena lipyate naiva karmaṇā |
bhidyate na śastrāstrairyogī yuktaḥ samādhinā || 12 9 |
evaṃ prasaṅgāgataṃ kālakṛtaṃ dhāraṇādīnāṃ vibhāgamabhidhāya syātsamādhirataḥ
lavaṇakhaṇḍa : jalasaindhavayoḥ yathāyogato melanāt sāmyamaikyaṃ bhavati tathātmamanasoraikyaṃ
sāmyaṃ bahirviṣayaṃ parityajyātmanyeva lagnaṃ sanmanastiṣṭhatīti yattatsamādhiriha bhaṇyate |
athavā''tmā paro mano mana upādhirjīvastayoraikyamiti | 125 |

yuktāhāravihāraśca yuktaceṣṭo hi karmasu |
yuktanidrāvabodhaśca yogī tattvaṃ prapaśyati || 130 ||
tattvaṃ vijñānamānandaṃ brahma brahmavido viduḥ |
hetu dṛṣṭānta rahitaṃ vāṅmanobhyāmagocaram || 131 ||
tatra yogī nirālambe nirātaṅke nirāmaye |
ṣaḍaṅgayogavidhinā pare brahmaṇi līyate || 132 |
yathā ghṛte ghṛtaṃ kṣiptaṃ ghṛtameva hi tadbhavet |
kṣīre kṣīraṃ tathā yogī tatra tanmayatāṃ vrajet || 133 ||

anasañjātapānīyairvidadhyādaṅgamardanam
tyajetkaduṣṇaṃ lavaṇaṃ kṣīrabhojī sadā bhavet || 134 ||
brahmacārī jitakrodho jitalobho vimatsaraḥ |
abdamitthaṃ sadābhyāsātsa yogīti nigadyate || 135 |
mahāmudrāṃ nabhomudrāmuḍḍīyānaṃ jalandharam |
mūlabandhantu yo vetti sa yogī yogasiddhibhāk || 136 |
śodhanaṃ nāḍījālasya ghaṭanaṃ candrasūryayoḥ |
rasānāṃ śoṣaṇaṃ samyaṅmahāmudrā'bhidhīyate || 137 ||
anasaṃjātapānīyaiḥ na saṃjātaṃ pānīyaṃ yeṣu vibhūtyādiṣu tairdravyaiḥ śarīramardanaṃ

yoni vāmāṃghriṇā''pīḍya 52 9
kṛtvā vakṣasthale hanum |
hastābhyāṃ prasṛtaṃ pādaṃ dhārayeddakṣiṇaṃ ciram
prāṇena || 138 ||
kukṣimāpūrya ciraṃ saṃrecayecchanaiḥ |
eṣā proktā mahāmudrā mahāghaughavināśinī
candrāṅge || 136 ||
tu samabhyasya sūryā punarabhyaset |
yāvattulyā bhavetsaṃkhyā tato mudrāṃ visarjayet || 140 ||
na hi pathyamapathyaṃ vā rasāḥ sarve'pi nīrasāḥ |
api ghoraṃ viṣaṃ pītaṃ pīyūṣamiva jīryati || 141

kṣayakuṣṭhagudāvarta gulmājīrṇapurogamāḥ
tasya doṣāḥ kṣayaṃ yānti mahāmudrāṃ ca yo'bhyaset || 142 |
kapālakuhare jihvā praviṣṭā viparītagā |
sruvorantargatā dṛṣṭirmudrā bhavati khecaro || 143 ||
na pīḍyate śaraugheṇa na ca lipyeta karmaṇā |
bādhyate na sa kālena yo mudrāṃ vetti khecarīm || 144 ||

carati khe gatā |
tenaiṣā khecaronāma mudrā siddhaniṣevitā || 145 ||
yāvad binduḥ sthito dehe tāvanmṛtyubhayaṃ kutaḥ |
yāvad baddhā nabhomudrā tāvad bindurna gacchati || 146 ||
uḍḍonaṃ kurute yasmādahorātraṃ yasmādahorātraṃ mahākhagaḥ |
uḍḍīyānaṃ tataḥ proktaṃ tatra bandho vidhīyate || 147 ||
jaṭhare paścimaṃ tānaṃ nābherūdhvaṃ ca dhārayet |
uḍḍīyāno hyayaṃ bandho mṛtyorapi bhayaṃ tyajet || 148 ||
nabhomudrāyā eva khecarī nāma nirvakti | cittaṃ caratoti | etadapi tasyāmevo-

badhnāti hi śirājālamadhogāmi nabho jalam |
eṣa jālandharo bandhaḥ kaṇṭhe duḥkhaughanāśanaḥ || 146 ||
jālandhare kṛte bandhe kaṇṭhasaṃkocalakṣaṇe |
na pīyūṣaṃ patatyagnau na ca vāyuḥ pradhāvati || 150 |
pāṇibhāgena saṃpīḍya yonimākuñcayed gudam |
apānamūrdhvamākṛṣya mūlabandho vidhīyate || 151 |
apānaprāṇayoraikye kṣayo mūtrapurīṣayoḥ |
yuvā bhavati vṛddho'pi satataṃ mūlabandhanāt | 152 |
nirvacanapūrvakaṃ jālandharabandhamāha | badhnātīti | badhnāti dhārayati | śirājālaṃ

jīva ūrdhvā'dhaḥ paridhāvati |
vāmadakṣiṇamārgeṇa cañcalo na sthiti labhet ||
guṇabaddho yathā 153 |
pakṣī gato'pyākṛṣyate punaḥ |
guṇairbaddhastathā jīvaḥ prāṇāyāmena kṛṣyate || 154 |
apānaḥ karṣati prāṇaṃ prāṇo'pānaṃ ca karṣati |
ūrdhvā'dhaḥ saṃsthitāvetau saṃyojayati yogavit || 155 |
pāṣṇibhāgena sampīḍya yonimākuñcayed gudam |
apānamūrdhvamākṛṣya mūlabandho'yamucyate ||
adhogatamapānaṃ vai ūrdhvagaṃ kurute haṭhāt |
ākuñcanena taṃ prāhurmūlabandhaṃ tu yoginaḥ ||
gudaṃ pārthyānusampīḍya vāyumākuñcayed balāt |
vāraṃ vāraṃ tathā cordhvaṃ samāyāti samīraṇaḥ ||
prāṇāpānau nādabindu mūlabandhena caikatām |
gatvā yogasya saṃsiddhi gacchato nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
apānaprāṇayoraikyaṃ kṣayo mūtrapurīṣayoḥ |
yuvā bhavati vṛddho'pi satataṃ mūlabandhanāt || iti || 152 ||
nanvātmanaḥ kūṭasthatvād vikārābhāvād yogena kiṃ kriyate tatrāha | prāṇā'-

hakāreṇa bahiryāti sakāreṇa viśetpunaḥ |
haṃsa haṃsetyato mantraṃ jīvo japati sarvadā || 156 ||
ṣaṭśatāni divārātrau sahasrāṇyekaviṃśatiḥ |
etatsaṃkhyānvitaṃ mantraṃ jovo japati sarvadā || 157 ||
ajapā nāma gāyatrī yogināṃ mokṣadāyinī |
asyāḥ saṅkalpamātreṇa naraḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate | 158 |

śrūyate dūragā vārtā dūrasthaṃ dṛśyate puraḥ || 15 9 ||
yojanānāṃ śataṃ yātuṃ śaktiḥ syānnimiṣārdhataḥ |
acintitāni śāstrāṇi kaṇṭhapāṭhī bhavanti hi || 160 |
dhāraṇāśaktiratyugrā mahābhāro laghurbhavet |
kṣaṇaṃ kṛśaḥ kṣaṇaṃ sthūlaḥ kṣaṇamalpaḥ kṣaṇaṃ mahān || 161 |
parakāyaṃ praviśati tiraścāṃ vetti bhāṣitam |
divyagandhaṃ tanau dhatte divyāṃ vāṇīṃ pravakti ca || 162 |
prārthyate divyakanyābhirdivyaṃ dhārayate vapuḥ |
ityādayo'ntarāyāḥ syuryogasaṃsiddhisūcakāḥ || 163 |
yadyebhirantarāyairna kṣipyate'syeha mānasam |
tadagre tatsamāpnoti padaṃ brahmādi durlabham || 164 || |
yogaṃ yuñjato yogino vighnarūpāḥ siddhaya āyānti , tā upekṣya brahmaṇyeva mano
dheyamityāhā'ntarāyā ityārabhya yatprāpyetyataḥ prāktanena granthena | antarāyāneva saṃkṣepato

yatprāpya na nivarteta yatprāpya na ca śocati |
tallabhyate ṣaḍaṅgena yogena kalaśodbhava || 165 |
ekena janmanā yogaḥ kathamitthaṃ prasiddhayati |
ṛte ca yogasaṃsiddheḥ kathaṃ muktirihāpyate || 166 ||
ubhe eva hi nirvāṇavartmanī kila kumbhaja |
kiṃ vā kāśyāṃ tanutyāgaḥ kiṃ vā yogo'yamīdṛśaḥ || 167 |
cañcalendriyavṛttitvāt kalikalmaṣajṛmbhaṇāt |
alpāyuṣāṃ tathā nṛṇāṃ kveha yogamahodayaḥ || 168 ||
ata eva hi jantūnāṃ mahodayapadapradaḥ |
sadaiva sa dayāvādhiḥ kāśyāṃ viśveśvaraḥ sthitaḥ || 166 |
kāśyāṃ sukhena kaivalyaṃ yathā labhyeta jantubhiḥ |
yogayuktyādyupāyaiśca na tathā'nyatra kutracit || 170 |
kāśyāṃ svadehasaṃyogaḥ samyag yoga udāhṛtaḥ |
mucyate neha yogena kṣipramanyena kenacit || 171 ||
tadeva padaṃ darśayan yogaphalamupasaṃharati | yatprāpyeti || 165 |
dayāvādhiḥ kṛpāsamudraḥ || 16 9 ||

śrīmān duṇḍirdaṇḍapāṇiḥ ṣaḍaṅgo yoga eṣa vai || 172 ||
etat ṣaḍaṅgaṃ yo yogaṃ nityaṃ kāśyāṃ niṣevate |
samprāpya yoganidrāṃ sa dīrghāmamṛtamaśnute || 173 ||
oṃkāraḥ kṛttivāsāśca kedāraśca triviṣṭapaḥ |
vīreśvaro'tha viśveśaḥ ṣaḍaṅgo'yamihā'paraḥ || 174 |
pādodakāsisambhedajñānodamaṇikarṇikāḥ
ṣaḍaṅgo'yaṃ mahāyogo brahmadharmahṛdāvapi || 175 |
ṣaḍaṅgasevanādasmādvārāṇasyāṃ narottama
na jātu jāyate janturjananījaṭhare punaḥ || 176 ||
nanu yogenā'nte tanuṃ tyajet , yoga : cittavṛttinirodhaḥ , śucau deśe pratiṣṭhāpya
sthiramāsanamātmana ityādivacanādyogādeva kaivalyaṃ manyante , tatkathaṃ kāśyāṃ dehatyāga-
mātreṇa muktirityāśaṅkāyāṃ ' tuṣyatu durjanaḥ ' iti nyāyena sukhasādhyamanyameva ṣaḍaṅgayogaṃ

gaṅgāsnānaṃ mahāmudrā mahāpātakanāśinī |
etanmudrākṛtābhyā so'pyamṛtatvamavāpnuyāt || 177 |
kāśīvīthiṣu sañcāro mudrā bhavati khecarī |
khecaro jāyate nūnaṃ khecaryā mudrayānayā || 178 ||
uḍḍīya sarvato deśādyānaṃ vārāṇasīṃ prati |
uḍḍīyāno mahābandha eṣa muktyai prakalpate || 176 |
jalasya dhāraṇaṃ dhāraṇaṃ mūni mūrdhni viśveśasnānajanmanaḥ |
eṣa jālandharo bandhaḥ samastasuradurlabhaḥ || 180 |
vṛto vighnaśatenāpi yanna kāśīṃ tyajetsudhīḥ |
mūlabandhaḥ smṛto hyeṣa duḥkhamūla nikṛntanaḥ || 181 |
iti yogaḥ samākhyāto mayā te dvividho mune |
saṣaḍaṅgaḥ samudraśca muktaye śambhubhāṣitaḥ || 182 |
kāśīvīthiṣu kāśyā mārgeṣu khe brahmaṇi caratīti khecaro brahmaniṣṭhaḥ | " kaṃ brahma
khaṃ brahmeti " śruteḥ || 178 ||
dvividhaṃ yogamupasaṃharati || iti yoga iti | samudro mudrāsahitaḥ || 182 |

yāvatkālavilambo'sti tāvadyogarato bhavet || 183 |
ubhayoryogayormadhye kāśīyogo'yamuttamaḥ |
kāśīyogaṃ samabhyasya prāpnuyādyogamuttamam || 184 |
ādhivyādhisahāyinyā jarayā mṛtyuliṅgayā |
kālaṃ nikaṭato jñātvā kāśīnāthaṃ samāśrayet || 185 |
kāśīnāthaṃ samāśritya kutaḥ kālabhayaṃ nṛṇām |
kruddho'pi jīvahṛtkālastacca kāśyāṃ sumaṅgalam || 186 |
ātithye'nehasi yathā pratīkṣetā'tithi kṛtī |
kāśyāṃ kālaṃ tathā''yāntaṃ bhāgyavān sampratīkṣate || 187 |
uttamaṃ yogaṃ jīvabrahmaṇoraikyalakṣaṇam || 184 ||
kālaṃ maraṇakālam || 185 |
ātithye'nehasi atithisamarcanavelāyām | kālaṃ maraṇasamayam | āyāntam
āgacchantam || 187 |

kaliḥ kālaḥ kṛtaṃ karma trikaṇṭakamitīritam |
etattrayaṃ na prabhavedānandavanavāsinām || 188 |
anyatrā'tarkitaḥ kālaḥ kalayiṣyatyasaṃśayam |
kālādabhayamiccheccettataḥ kāśīṃ samāśrayet || 186 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe yogākhyānaṃ nāmaikacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 41 ||
trikaṇṭakaṃ kaṇṭakavat kaṇṭakaṃ saṃsārā'narthadāyītyarthaḥ || 188 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 41 ||

atha dvicatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
agastiruvāca -
kathaṃ nikaṭataḥ kālo jñāyate haranandana |
tāni cihnāni katicid brūhi me paripṛcchataḥ || 1 |
kumāra uvāca -
vadāmi kālacihnāni jāyante yāni dehinām |
mṛtyo nikaṭamāpanne mune tāni niśāmaya || 2 ||
yāmyanāsāpuṭe yasya vāyurvāti divāniśam |
akhaṇḍameva tasyāyuḥ kṣayatyabdatrayeṇa hi || 3 |
dvayahorātraṃ tryahorātraṃ ravirvahati santatam |
abdamekaṃ ca tasyeha jīvanāvadhirucyate || 4 ||
dvicatvāriṃśake'dhyāye kāśīmāhātmyamiśritāḥ |
kālasya vañcanopāyā ucyante'tisukhapradāḥ || 1 ||
kālaṃ nikaṭato jñātvā kāśīnāthaṃ samāśrayedityuktaṃ tatra pṛcchati | kathamiti |
katicit kiyanti || 1 |
yāmyanāsāpuṭe dakṣiṇanāsāchidre | makhaṇḍaṃ niśchidram || 3 |

vahennāsāpuṭayuge daśāhāni nirantaram |
vātaścet sahasaṃkrāntistayā jīveddinatrayam || 5 |
nāsāvadvayaṃ hitvā mātariśvāmukhād vahet |
śaṃseddinadvayādarvāk prayāṇaṃ tasya cādhvani || 6 |
akasmādeva yatkāle mṛtyuḥ sannihito bhavet |
cintanīyaḥ prayatnena sa kālo mṛtyubhīruṇā || 7 |
sūrye saptamarāśisthe janmarkṣasthe niśākare |
pauṣṇaḥ sa kālo draṣṭavyo yadā yāmye ravirvahet || 8 |
akasmād vīkṣate yastu puruṣaṃ kṛṣṇapiṅgalam |
tasminneva kṣaṇe'rūpaṃ sa jīvedvatsaradvayam || 6 |
kathaṃbhūto vātaḥ sahasaṃkrāntiḥ samyak krāntiḥ saṃkrāntirutkrāntirityarthaḥ | tayā

ihaikadā patedyasya abdaṃ tasyāyuriṣyate || ||| 10 ||
indranīlanibhaṃ vyomni nāgavṛndaṃ ya īkṣate |
itastataḥ prasṛmaraṃ ṣaṇmāsaṃ na sa jīvati || 11 ||
vya'hni vāripūrṇāsyaḥ pṛṣṭhīkṛtya divākaram |
phūtkṛtyāśvindracāpaṃ na paśyetṣaṇmāsajīvitaḥ || 12 ||
arundhatīṃ dhruvaṃ caiva viṣṇostrīṇi padāni ca |
āsanna mṛtyuna paśyeccatuthaṃ mātṛmaṇḍalam || 13 ||
arundhatī bhavejjihvā dhruvo nāsāgramucyate |
viṣṇoḥ padāni bhrūmadhye netrayormātṛmaṇḍalam || 14 ||
veti nīlādivarṇasya kaṭvamlādirasasya hi |
akasmādanyathābhāvaṃ ṣaṇmāsena sa mṛtyubhāk || 15 |

ṣaṇmāsa mṛtyormatyaṃsya kaṇṭhoṣṭharasanāradāḥ |
śuṣyanti satataṃ tadvadvicchāyāstālupañcamāḥ || 16 ||
retaḥ karajanetrāntā nīlimānaṃ bhajanti cet |
tahiṃ kīnāśanagaroṃ ṣaṣṭhe māsi vrajennaraḥ || 17 ||
sampravṛtte nidhuvane madhye'nte kṣauti cennaraḥ |
niścitaṃ pañcame māsi dharmarājā'tithirbhavet || 18 ||
drutamāruhya saraṭhastrivarṇo yasya mastake |
prayāti yāti tasyāyuḥ ṣaṇmāsena parikṣayam || 16 ||
susnātasyāpi yasyāśu hṛdayaṃ pariśuṣyati |
caraṇau ca karau vāpi trimāsaṃ tasya jīvitam || 20 ||
pratibimbaṃ bhavedyasya padaṃ khaṇḍapadākṛti |
pāṃsau vā kardame vāpi pañcamāsān sa jīvati || 21 ||

kṛtāntadūtā badhnanti caturthe māsi taṃ naram ||| 22 |
nijasya pratibimbasya nīrājyamukurādiṣu |
uttamāṅgaṃ na yaḥ paśyetsa māsena vinaśyati || 23 ||
matibhraṃśyet skhaledvāṇī dhanuraindraṃ nirīkṣate |
rātrau candradvayaṃ cāpi divā dvau ca divākarau || 24 ||
divā ca tārakācakraṃ rātrau vyomavitārakam |
yugapacca ' caturdikṣu śākraṃ kodaṇḍamaṇḍalam || 25 |
bhūruhe bhūdharāgre ca gandharvanagarālayam |
divā piśācanatyaṃ ca ete pañcatvahetavaḥ || 26 ||
sarveṣveteṣu cihnaṣu yadyekamapi vīkṣate |
tadā māsāvadhi mṛtyuḥ pratīkṣeta na cādhikam || 27 ||

karāvaruddhaśravaṇaḥ śṛṇoti na yadā dhvanim |
sthūlaḥ kṛśaḥ kṛśaḥ sthūlastadā māsānnivartate || 28 ||
yaḥ paśyedātmanaśchāyāṃ dakṣiṇāśāsamāśritām |
dināni pañca jīvitvā pañcatvamupayāti saḥ || 26 ||
prohyate bhakṣyate vāpi piśācāsuravāyasaiḥ |
bhūtaiḥ pretaiḥ śvabhirgṛdhairgomāyukharasūkaraiḥ || 30 ||
rāsabhaiḥ karabhaiḥ kośaḥ śyenairaśvataraṃrbakaiḥ |
svapne sa jīvitaṃ tyaktvā varṣānte yamamīkṣate || 31 ||
gandhapuṣpāṃśukaiḥ śoṇaḥ svāṃ tanuṃ bhūṣitāṃ naraḥ |
thaḥ paśyetsvapnasamaye so'ṣṭau māsānanityaho || 32 ||
pāṃsurāśi ca valmīkaṃ yūpadaṇḍamathāpi vā |
yo'dhirohati vai svapne sa ṣaṣṭhe māsi naśyati || 33 |
prodyata iti ślokadvayaṃ vākyam | prohyate pṛṣṭhādī sthāpayitvā nīyate | gomāyuḥ

tailābhyaktaṃ ca muṇḍitam |
nīyamānaṃ yamāśāṃ yaḥ svapne paśyetsvapūrvajān || 34
svamaulau svatanau vāpi ||
yaḥ paśyetsvapnago naraḥ |
tṛṇāni śuṣkakāṣṭhāni ṣaṣṭhe māsi na tiṣṭhati || 35 ||
lohadaṇḍadharaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ puruṣa kṛṣṇavāsasam
svayaṃ yo'gre sthitaṃ paśyetsatrīn |
māsānna laṃghayet || 36 ||
kālī kumārī yaṃ svapne badhnīyād bāhupāśakaiḥ |
sa māsena samīkṣeta nagarīṃ śamanoṣitām || 37 |
naro yo vānarārūḍho yāyāt prācīṃ diśaṃ svapan |
dinaiḥ sa pañcabhireva paśyetsaṃyaminīṃ purom || 38 |
kṛpaṇo'pi vadānyaḥ syādvadānyaḥ kṛpaṇo yadi |
prakṛtevikṛtiścetsyāttadā pañcatvamṛcchati || 36 ||

etāni kālacihnāni kālacihnāni santyanyāni bahūnyapi |
jñātvā'bhyasennaro yogamathavā kāśikāṃ śrayet || 40 ||
na kālavañcanopāyaṃ mune'nyamavayāmyaham |
vinā mṛtyuñjayaṃ kāśīnāthaṃ garbhāvarodhakam || 41 ||
tāvad garjanti pāpāni tāvad garjedyamo nṛpaḥ |
yāvadviśveśaśaraṇaṃ naro na nirato vrajet || 42 || ||
prāptaviśveśvarāvāsaḥ pītottaravahāpayāḥ |
spṛṣṭaviśveśasalliṅgaḥ kaśca yāti na vandyatām || 43 ||
kariṣyet kupitaḥ kālaḥ ki kāśīvāsināṃ nṛṇām |
kāle śiva : svayaṃ karṇe yatra mantropadeśakaḥ || 44 |
kālacihnānyupasaṃharan kālavañcanopāye dve gatī āha | etānīti || 40 |
tatrā'pyantimagateḥ śreṣṭhatvamāha | na kāleti | 41 |

satvaraṃ gatvaraṃ tadvadyauvanaṃ |
cāpi vārdhakam || 45 ||
yāvanna hi jarākrāntiryāvannendriyavaiklavam |
tāvatsavaṃ phalgurūpaṃ hitvā kāśīṃ śrayetsudhīḥ || 46
anyāni kālalakṣmāṇi tiṣṭhantu ||
jaraiva kalaśodbhava |
prathamaṃ lakṣma citraṃ tatrāpi bhīnaṃ hi || 47 ||
parābhūto hi jarayā sarvaiśva paribhūyate ||
hṛtatāruṇya māṇikyo dhanahīnaḥ pumāniva || 48 ||
sutā vākyaṃ na kurvanti patnī premāpi muñcati |
bāndhavā naiva manyante jarasā śleṣitaṃ naram || 46 ||
sānubhavaṃ prakṛtaṃ sāramupasaṃharati | yatheti dvābhyām || ll 45 ||

āśliṣṭaṃ jarayā dṛṣṭvā parayoṣidviśaṅkitā |
bhavetparāṅmukhī nityaṃ praṇayinyapi kāminī ||| 50 |
na jarāsadṛśo vyādhinaṃ duḥkhaṃ jarayā samam |
kārayitryapamānasya jaraiva maraṇaṃ nṛṇām || 51 |
na jīyate tathā kālastapasā yogayuktibhiḥ |
yathā cireṇa kālena kāśīvāsād vijīyate || 52 |
vinā yajñaivinā dānaivinā vratajapādibhiḥ |
vinā'tipuṇyasambhāraiḥ kaḥ kāśīṃ prāptumīhate || 53 |
kāśīprāptirayaṃ yogaḥ kāśīprāptiridaṃ tapaḥ |
kāśīprāptiridaṃ dānaṃ kāśīprāptiḥ śivaikatā || 54 |
etadeva sotprekṣaṃ prapañcayati | āśliṣṭamiti || 50 ||
