sthito'pi bhagavānīśo mandaraṃ cārukandaram |
kāśa vinā rati nā''pa divodāsanṛpoṣitām || 60 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe kālavañcanopāyo nāma
dvicatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 42 |
viśvanāthasyā'pi kāśī paramānandajanikā kimutā'nyeṣāmityāha | sthito'-
pīti || 60 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ dvicatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 42 ||
vastutaḥ yaha prācīna lokokti bahuta ṭhīka jāna par̤atī hai-
" canā cabainā gaṃgajala , jo purava~hi karatāra |
kāśī kabahu~ na chā~r̤iye , viśvanātha darabāra || "
bhagavān viśveśvara , sundarakandarāvāle mandarācala para virājamāna hokara bho divodāsa

atha vicatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
agastiruvāca-
divodāsaṃ narapata kathaṃ devastrilocanaḥ |
kāśīṃ santyājayāmāsa kathamāgācca mandarāt || 1 ||
etadākhyānamākhyāhi śrotṝṇāṃ pramude bhago |
skanda uvāca -
mandaraṃ gatavān devo brahmaṇo vākyagauravāt
tapasā tasya santuṣṭo mandarasyaiva bhūbhṛtaḥ || 2 |
tricatvāriśake'dhyāye nānāścaryasudhālaye ' |
divodāsasya bhūjāne : pratāpastāvaducyate || 1 ||
sthito'pi bhagavānīśo mandaraṃ cārukandaram |
kāśīṃ vinā rati nā''pa divodāsanṛpoṣitām ||
ityanantaraśloke mandare ratyabhāvāddivodāsaṃ nṛpati cyāvayitvā bhagavān
kāśyāmagādityarthāduktaṃ tatra pṛcchati divodāsamiti | sārdhaślokaṃ vākyam | bhago
he pūjya || 1 |
tatra prathamato bhagavato mandaragamane kāraṇamāha | mandaramiti ślokena | tasya
śākadvīpasthasya || 2 |

gate viśveśvare deve mandaraṃ girisundaram |
giriśena samaṃ jagmurapi sarve divaukasaḥ || 3 |
kṣetrāṇi vaiṣṇavānīha tyaktvā viṣṇurapi kṣiteḥ |
prayāto mandaraṃ yatra devadeva umādhavaḥ || 4 ||
sthānāni gāṇapatyāni gaṇeśo'pi tato'vrajat |
hitvā'hamapi viprendra gatavānmandaraṃ prati || 5 |
sūraḥ saurāṇi santyajya gataścāyatanādaram |
svaṃ svaṃ sthānaṃ kṣitau tyaktvā yayuranye'pi nirjarāḥ || 6 |
gateṣu devasaṃgheṣu pṛthivyāḥ pṛthivīpatiḥ |
cakāra rājyaṃ nirdvandvaṃ divodāsaḥ pratāpavān || 7 |
vidhāya rājadhānīṃ sa vārāṇasyāṃ suniścalām |
edhāñcakre mahābuddhiḥ prajādharmeṇa pālayan || 8 |
na kevalaṃ bhagavāneva gatavān ; api tu sarve devā ityāha | gata iti | girisundaraṃ
parvateṣu madhye manoharam | cārukandaramiti kvacit || 3 ||

sūryavat sa pratapitā durhṛdāṃ hṛdi netrayoḥ |
somavat suhṛdāmāsīnmānaseṣu svakeṣvapi || 6 |
akhaṇḍamākhaṇḍalavat kodaṇḍaṃ kalayan raṇe |
palāyamānairāloki śatrusainyabalāhakaiḥ || 10 ||
sa dharmarājavajjāto dharmādharmavivecakaḥ |
adaṇḍyān maṇḍayan rājā daṇḍyāṃśca paridaṇḍayan || 11 ||
dhanañjaya ivā'dhākṣīt parāraṇyānyanekaśaḥ |
pāśīva pāśayāñcakre vairicakraṃ vidūragaḥ || 12 || ||
sūryādīnāṃ daśalokapālānāṃ sādharmyamāha | sūryavaditi ṣaḍbhiḥ pratapitā '

so'bhūtpuṇyajanādhīśo ripurākṣasavardhanaḥ |
jagatprāṇasamānaśva jagatprāṇanatatparaḥ ||| 13 |
rājarājaḥ sa evā'bhūt sarveṣāṃ dhanadaḥ satām |
sa eva rudramūrtiśva prekṣiṣṭa ripubhī raṇe || 14 ||
viśveṣāṃ sa hi devānāṃ tapasā rūpadhṛg yataḥ |
viśvedevāstatastaṃ tu stuvanti ca bhajanti ca || 15 ||
asādhyaḥ sa hi sādhyānāṃ vasubhyo vasunādhikaḥ |
grahāṇāṃ vigrahadharo dasrato'janarūpabhāk || 16 ||
marudgaṇā na gaṇayaṃstuṣitāṃstoṣayanguṇaiḥ |
sarva vidyādharo yastu sarvavidyādhareṣvapi || 17 ||
puṇyajanā dhārmikā janāsteṣāmadhīśaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ | pakṣāntare puṇyajanā rākṣasā -

agarvāneva gandharvānyaścakre nijagītibhiḥ |
rarakṣuryakṣarakṣāṃsi tadadugaṃ svargasodaram || 18 |
nāgānāgāṃsicakruśca tasya nāgabalīyasaḥ |
danujāmanujākāraṃ kṛtvā taṃ ca siṣevire || 16 |
jātā guhyacarā yasya guhyakāḥ parito nṛṣu |
saṃseviṣyāmahe rājannasurāstvāṃ svavaibhavaiḥ || 20 ||
vayaṃ yatastvadviṣaye surāvāso'pi durlabhaḥ |
aśikṣayat kṣitipateriha yasya turaṅgamān |
āśugaścāṣugāmitvaṃ pāvamāne pathi sthitaḥ || 21 |

agajānyasya tu gajānnagavarṣmasu varmaṇaḥ |
ajasradānino dṛṣṭvā bhavannanye'pi dāninaḥ || 22 ||
sadojire ca boddhāro yoddhāraścaraṇājire |
na yasya śāstraivijitā na śastraiḥ kenacitkvacit || 23 ||
na netraviṣaye jātā viṣaye yasya bhūbhṛtaḥ |
sadā naṣṭapadā dveṣyāstadā'naṣṭapadāḥ prajāḥ || 24 |
kalāvāneka evā'sti tridive'pi divaukasām |
tasya kṣoṇibhūtaḥ kṣoṇyāṃ janāḥ sarve kalālayāḥ || 25 |
eka eva hi kāmo'sti svarge so'pyaṅgavajitaḥ |
sāṅgopāṅgāśca sarveṣāṃ sarve kāmā hi tadbhuvi || 26 ||

tasyopavartane'pyeko na śruto gotrabhitkvacit |
svarge svargasadāmīśo gotrabhitparikīrtitaḥ || 27 ||
kṣayī ca tasya viṣaye ko'pyākaṇa na kenacit |
tripiṣṭape kṣapānāthaḥ pakṣe pakṣe ' kṣayīṣyate || 28 |
nāke navagrahāḥ santi deśāstasyā'navagrahāḥ || 26 ||
hiraṇyagarbhaḥ svarloke'pyeka svarloke'pyeka eva prakāśate |
hiraṇyagarbhāḥ sarveṣāṃ tatpaurāṇāmihālayāḥ || 30 ||
saptāśva ekaḥ svarloke nitarāṃ bhāsateṃ'śumān |
sadaṃśukāḥ pratidinaṃ bahvaśvāstatpuraukasaḥ ||| 31 |
sadapsarā yathā svarbhastatpuryapi sadapsarāḥ |
ekaiva padmā vaikuṇṭhe tasya padmākarāḥ śatam || 32 ||
upavartante'sminnityapavartanaṃ rājyaṃ tasmin || 27 ||

anītayaśva tadgrāmā nā rājapuruṣāḥ kvacit |
gṛhe gṛhe'tra dhanadā nāka eko'lakāpatiḥ || 33 |
divodāsasya tasyaivaṃ kāśyāṃ rājyaṃ praśāsataḥ |
gataṃ varṣa dinaprāyaṃ śaradāmayutāṣṭakam || 34 ||
gīrvāṇā vipratīkāramatha tasya cikīrṣavaḥ |
guruṇā ' mantrayāñcakrurdharmavarmānuyāyinaḥ || 35 |
bhavādṛśāmiva mune prāyaśo dharmacāriṇām |
vibudhā vidadhatyeva mahatīrāpadāṃtatīḥ || 36 ||
yadyapyasau dharādhīśo vyādhino durdharādhvaraiḥ |
tānadhvarabhujo'tyantaṃ tathāpi suhṛdo na te || 37 ||
na vidyante ītayo'tivṛṣṭya nāvṛṣṭiśalabhamūṣaka śukasvacakrapratikularājalakṣaṇā yeṣu

svabhāva eva sadāṃ parotkarṣāsahiṣṇutā |
balibāṇadadhīcādyairaparāddhaṃ kimatra taiḥ || 38 ||
antarāyā bhavantyeva dharmasyāpi pade pade |
tathāpi na nijo dharmo dharmadhībhivamucyate || 36 ||
adharmiṇaḥ samedhante dhanadhānyasamṛddhibhiḥ |
adharmādeva ca paraṃ samūlaṃ yāntyadhogatim || 40 ||
prajāḥ pālayatastasya putrāniva nijaurasān |
ripuñjayasya nā'lpo'pi babhūvā'dharmasaṃgrahaḥ || 41 ||
ṣāḍguṇyavedinastasya triśaktyūjitacetasaḥ |
caturopāyavittasya na randhaṃ vividuḥ surāḥ || 42 ||

buddhimanto'pi vibudhā vipratīkartumudyatāḥ |
manāgapi na saṃśekurapakartuṃ tadīśituḥ || 43 ||
ekapatnīvratāḥ sarve pumāṃsastasya maṇḍale |
nārīṣu kācinnaivāsodapativratadharmiṇī || 44 ||
anadhīto na vipro'bhūdaśūro naiva bāhujaḥ |
vaiśyo'nabhijño naivāsīdarthopārjanakarmasu || 45 ||
ananyavṛttayaḥ śūdrā dvijaśuśrūṣaṇaṃ prati |
tasya rāṣṭre samabhavan divodāsasya bhūpateḥ || 46 ||
aviplutabrahmacaryāstadrāṣṭre brahmacāriṇaḥ |
nityaṃ gurukulādhīnā vedagrahaṇatatparāḥ ||| 47 |
ātithyadharmapravaṇā dharmaśāstravicakṣaṇāḥ |
nityaṃ sādhu samācārā gṛhasthāstasya sarvataḥ || 48 ||

tṛtīyāśramiṇo yasmin vanavṛttikṛtādarāḥ |
niḥspṛhā grāmavārtāsu vedavartmānusāriṇaḥ || 46 ||
sarvasaṅgavinirmuktā nirmuktā niṣparigrahāḥ |
vāṅmanaḥ karmadaṇḍāḍhaghā yatayo yatra niḥspṛhāḥ || 50 ||
anye'nulomajanmānaḥ pratilomabhavā api |
svapāramparyaṃto dṛṣṭaṃ manāg vartma na tatyajuḥ || 51 |
anapatyo na tadrāṣṭre dhanahīno'pi ko'pi na |
avṛddhasevī no kaścidakāṇḍamṛtibhāk ca na || 52 ||
na cāṭā naiva vācāṭā vañcakā no na hiṃsakāḥ |
na pāṣaṇḍā na vai bhaṇḍā na raṇḍā na ca śauṇḍikāḥ || 53 |
śrutighoṣo hi sarvatra śāstravādaḥ pade pade |
sarvatra subhagālāpā mudā maṅgalagītayaḥ || 54 ||
vīṇāveṇupravādāśca mṛdaṅgā madhurasvanāḥ |
somapānaṃ vinā'nyatra pānagoṣṭhī na karṇagāḥ || 55 |
vanavṛttikṛtādarāḥ vanavṛttāvaraṇyavartane kṛta ādaro yaiste || 4 9 ||
anulomajanmānaḥ mūrdhāvasiktāṃbaṣṭhakaraṇāḥ | pratilomabhavāḥ sūtamāgadhavaidehāḥ || 51 ||

māṃsāśinaḥ puroḍāśe naivā'nyatra kadācana |
na durodariṇo yatra nā'dhamarṇā na taskarāḥ || 56 ||
putrasya pitroḥ padayoḥ pūjanaṃ devapūjanam |
upavāso vrataṃ tīrthaṃ devatārādhanaṃ param || 57 ||
nārīṇāṃ bhartṛpadayorarcanaṃ tadvacaḥ śrutiḥ |
samarcayanti satataṃ manujā nijamagrajam || 58 |
saparyayanti muditā bhṛtyāḥ svāmipadāmbujam | |
hīnavarṇairagravarṇo varṇyate guṇagauravaḥ || 5 9 |
varivasyanti bhūyo'pi trikālaṃ kāśidevatāḥ |
sarvatra sarve vidvāṃsaḥ samarcyante manorathaiḥ || 60 |
yajñasya prathamasamaye puroḍāśe'gnipakve māṃsakhaṇḍe hūyamāne māṃsāśinaḥ | anyatra
puroḍāśaṃ vihāya naivetyarthaḥ | durodariṇo dyūtakarāḥ | adhamarṇaḥ ṛṇagrahītā || 56 |
agrajaṃ jyeṣṭhabhrātaram || 58 |
saparyayanti pūjayanti || 5 9 ||
varivasyantītyetasyāpi sa evārthaḥ | kāśidevatāḥ kāśīṃ taddevatāścetyarthaḥ |
bhūmidevatā iti pāṭhe brāhmaṇānityarthaḥ | samarcyante pūjyante sādhāraṇe janaiḥ | asyāḥ
kriyāyā agre'pi sambandhaḥ || 60 |

taponiṣṭhāstaponiṣṭhe jitendriyāḥ |
jitendriyairjñānaniṣṭhā jñānibhiḥ śivayoginaḥ ||| 61 |
mantrapūtaṃ mahāhaṃ ca vidhiyuktaṃ susaṃskṛtam |
vāḍavānāṃ mukhāgnau ca hūyate'haniśaṃ haviḥ || 62 ||
vāpīkūpataḍāgānāmā rāmāṇāṃ pade pade |
śucibhirdravyasambhāraiḥ kartāro yatra bhūriśaḥ || 63 |
yadrāṣṭre hṛṣṭatuṣṭāśca dṛśyante sarvajātayaḥ |
anindya sevāsampannā vinā vinā mṛgayusaunikān || 64 ||
itthaṃ tasya mahījāneḥ sarvatra śucivartinaḥ |
unmiṣanto'pyanimiṣā manāk chidraṃ na lebhire || 65 ||
śivayoginaḥ śivekaśaraṇāḥ pāśupatā iti kecit || 61 ||
vāḍavānāṃ brāhmaṇānām || 62 ||
mṛgayusaunikān mṛgayavo lubdhakāḥ saunikāḥ paśughātakāśca , tān || 64 ||

athovācā'maragururdevānapacikīrṣukān
tasmin rājani dharmiṣṭhe variṣṭhe mantravediṣu || 66 ||
gururuvāca -- dvaidhabhāvanam |
sandhivigrahayānāsti saṃśrayaṃ
yathā sa rājā saṃvetti na tathā'trāpi kaścana || 67 |
upāyo'pyeka evā'sti catuṣviha divaukasaḥ |
bhedo nāma sa cet sidhyet tapobalini tatra hi || 68 |
tena yadyapi bhūbhartrā bhūmerdevā vivāsitāḥ |
tathāpi bhūriśastatra santyasmatpakṣapātinaḥ || 66 ||
kālo nimiṣamātro'pi yān vinā na sukhaṃ vrajet |
asmākamapi tasyā'pi santi te tatra mānitāḥ || 70 ||
antarbahiścarā nityaṃ sarvaviśrambhabhūmayaḥ |
samāgateṣu teṣvatra sarvaṃ naḥ setsyati priyam || 71 |

samākarṇya ca te sarve tridaśā goṣpatīritam |
nirṇītavantastasyāthaṃ tasmādantarbahiścarān |
abhinandyā'tha taṃ sarve procuritthaṃ bhavediti || 72 ||
tataḥ śakraḥ samāhūya votihotraṃ puraḥ sthitam |
ūce madhurayā vācā bahumānapuraḥsaram || 73 ||
havyavāhana yā mūrtistava tatra pratiṣṭhitā |
tāmupasaṃhara kṣipraṃ viṣayāttasya bhūpateḥ || 74 ||
samāgatāyāṃ tanmūrtī sarvā naṣṭā'gnayaḥ prajāḥ |
havyakavyakriyāśūnyā virajiṣyanti rājani || 75 ||
prajāsu ca viraktāsu rājyakāmadughāsu vai |
kṛcchreṇopārjito'pārtho rājaśabdo bhaviṣyati || 76 ||
samākarṇyati sārdhaṃ vākyaṃ bṛhaspatoritaṃ vākyaṃ samākarṇya te devāstasmāddeva-
vākyāttasya vākyasyārthaṃ nirṇītavantaḥ | arthamevāha | antarbahiśvarāniti | athā'nanta-
ramabhinandya itthaṃ bhavediti procuḥ | yadā hyantariti pāṭhe tadetyarthāt || 72 ||
vītihotram agnim || 73 |

prajānāṃ rañjanādrājā yeyaṃ rūḍhirupārjitā |
tasyāṃ rūḍhyāṃ pranaṣṭāyāṃ rājyameva vinaṅkṣyati || 77 ||
prajāvirahito rājā kośadurgabalādibhiḥ |
samṛddho'pyacirānnaśyetkulasaṃstha iva drumaḥ | 78 |
trivargasādhanāhetuḥ prāk prajaiva mahīpateḥ |
kṣīṇavṛttyāṃ prajāyāṃ vai trivargaḥ kṣīyate svayam || 76 |
kṣīṇe trivarge saṃkṣīṇā gatirlokadvayātmikā || 80 ||
itīndravacanād vahnirahnāya vahnirahnāya kṣoṇimaṇḍalāt |
ācakarṣa nijāṃ mūrti yogamāyābalānvitaḥ || 81 ||
astu tathā tāvatā kiṃ syāt tatrāha | prajānāmiti || 77 |
māstu prajānāmanurāgastāvatā kim ? yadvā rājyanāśe'pi kim ? tatrāha |
prajeti || 78 ||

ninye na kevalaṃ tretāṃ jāṭharāgnimapi prabhuḥ |
vajriṇo vacasā vahninijaśaktisamanvitam || 82 ||
vahnau svarlokamāpane jāte madhyandine nṛpaḥ |
kṛtamādhyāhnikastūrṇaṃ prāviśad bhojyamaṇḍapam || 83 ||
mahānasādhikṛtayo vepamānāstato mahuḥ |
kṣudhārtamapi bhūpālamidaṃ mandaṃ vyajijñapan || 84 ||
sūpakārā ūcu : -
atyahaskara tejaska pratāpavijitānala |
kiñcidvijñaptukāmā smo'pyakāṇḍe raṇapaṇḍita || 85 |
yadi viśrāṇayedrājan bhavānabhayadakṣiṇām |
tadā vijñāpayiṣyāmaḥ prabaddha karasampuṭāḥ || 86 ||
tretāṃ āhavanīyagārhapatyadakṣiṇāgnirūpāmityarthaḥ | nijaśaktiḥ pākārhāmannādīnāṃ
dāhikāśaktistatsamanvitam || 82 |
kṣudhārtamapi tasmin samaye vijñāpanānarhamapītyarthaḥ | ata evāpyakāṇḍa iti vakṣyati |
vyajijñapan vijñāpayāmāsuḥ || 84 ||
atyeti ślokadvayaṃ vākyam | atyatikrāntamahaskarasya sūryasya tejaso yena
tatsambodhanaṃ he atyahaskaratejaska | akāṇḍe'navasare'pi ||| 85 |
vibhāṇayet prayacchet || 86 |
unhoṃne kevala āhavanīya , gārhapatya aura dakṣiṇāgni nāmaka inhīṃ tīnoṃ rūpoṃ

bhrūsaṃjñayā kṛtādeśāḥ praśastāsyena bhūbhujā |
mṛdu vijñāpayāñcakruḥ pākaśālā'dhikāriṇaḥ || 87 |
na jānīmo vayaṃ nātha tvatpratāpabhayārditaḥ |
kusṛtyātha kayāvidvānnaṣṭo vaiśvānaraḥ purāt || 88 |
kṛśānau kṛśatāṃ prāpte kathaṃ pākakriyā bhavet |
tathāpi sūryapākena sūryapākena siddhā paktirhi kācana || 8 9 |
prabhorādeśamāsādya tāmihaivānayāmahe |
manyāmahe ca bhūjāne paktiradyatanī śubhā || 9 0 ||
śrutvāndhasikavākyaṃ sa mahāsatvo mahāmatiḥ |
nṛpatiścintayāmāsa devānāṃ vai kṛtaṃ tvidam || 9 1 |
kṣaṇaṃ saṃśīlayaṃstatra dadarśa tapaso balāt |
na kevalaṃ jahā~ gehaṃ hutabhuk caudarīdarīḥ || 9 2 |
kusṛtyātha kayā kayā'pi kusṛtyetyarthaḥ | āvidvān mūrkhaḥ , tava mahimānamajāna-
nniti vā || 88 |
kṛśāno vahnī kṛśatāṃ kṣīṇatāṃ nāśamiti vā || 8 9 |
manyāmaha ityadhaṃ vākyam | dināntare vahnipāke na yā paktistasyāḥ sakāśāt
andhasā'nnena vyavaharantītyāndhasikāḥ pākakartārasteṣāṃ vākyam | viruddhākṛti-
vikṛtistasyāṃ jātaṃ vaikṛtamidaṃ gehādagnergamanam | ve iti pṛthak padam | kṛtaṃ karma ||9 1 ||
kṣaṇamiti sārdhaślokaṃ vākyam | saṃśīlayan dhyāyan | gehaṃ pākādigṛham |
audaroruvarasambandhinīrda rīrguhāśceti cakārasyā'nvayaḥ || 9 2 ||

avyahāsodito lokājjagāma ca surālayam |

te'jire bhejire sarve ratnāciḥ parisevite |
vijitāmodasandohe surāno kahasaurabhaiḥ |
rājñaḥ śataśalākasya cchatrasya cchāyayā śubhe || 99 |
viśāmpatirathovāca tanmukhacchāyayeritam |
vijñāya tadabhiprāyamalaṃ bhītyā puraukasaḥ || 100 |
vikārakāribhilekheryadi nīto'nalo bhuvaḥ |
etāvataiva ki siddhayenmayi teṣāṃ parābhavaḥ || 101 |
cikīrṣurahamevāsaṃ paurāḥ kāryamidaṃ purā |
paraṃ hyupekṣitaprāyaṃ diṣṭyā taiḥ smāritaṃ cirāt || 102 ||
te paurajānapadā bhejire'dhiṣṭhitā āsanānītyarthaḥ | visarjitāsanā iti pūrva-

gato'nalo'bhavadbhadraṃ jagatprāṇo'pi yātvitaḥ |
varuṇaḥ puṣpavantābhyāmavilambaṃ prayānvitaḥ || 103 |
ahameva hi parjanyo bhaviṣyāmi tapobalāt |
mude janapadānāṃ ca sarvasasyasamṛddhidaḥ || 104 |
tapoyogabalenāhamātmānaṃ parikalpya ca |
tridhā vahnisvarūpeṇa paktīṣṭivyuṣṭikṛttamaḥ || 105 ||
antarbahiśca yo dvedhā nabhasvatpadavīṃ dadhat |
sarveṣāmeva vetsyāmi tvantaḥkaraṇaceṣṭitam || 106 |
vidhāya cāmbhasīṃ mūrti sarvajīvaikajīvanīm |
prajāḥ saṃjīvayiṣyāmi ki jaḍaiviṣaye mama ||| 107 | |

yadā khe tamasā paurā grasyete śaśibhāskarau |
tadā na kiṃ vinā tābhyāṃ jovāmaḥ kṣitimaṇḍale || 108 |
śriyaṃ cāndramasīṃ prāpya hlādayiṣyāmyahaṃ prajāḥ |
niśācareṇa kimiha kṣayiṇā ca kalaṅkinā || 106 ||
asmatkule mūlabhūto bhāskaro mānya eva naḥ |
sa tiṣṭhatu sukhenā'tra yātāyātaṃ karotu ca || 110 |
sa eko jagatāmātmā viśeṣātkuladevatā |
sopakartuṃ na vetyeva tasyedaṃ vratamuttamam || 111 |

iti narapativāksudhārasaughaṃ
śrutipuṭakaiḥ paripīya pauravargaḥ |
vikasitavadanāmbujo jagāma
nija nija mālayamādhimuktacittaḥ || 112 ||
kṣitipatirapi tattathā vidhāya tapaso'-
sādhyamihāsti ki trilokyām |
ativahnayarkamasau dadhacca tejo
sadāṃ śalyamivoccakairbabhūva || 113 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe divodāsapratāpavarṇanaṃ
nāma tricatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 43 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ phāśokhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ tricatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ ||43 ||

atha catuścatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca - mandarakandarodarollasadasamadyutiratnamandire |
atha samadhiṣṭhitāmare nijaśikharairvasanīkṛtāmbare || 1 |
paritaḥ
nivasan jagadīśvaro haraḥ kṛśarajanīśakalāmanoharaḥ |
labhate sma na śarma śaṅkaraḥ prasarat kāśiviyogajajvaraḥ || 2 |
virahānalaśāntaye tadā samalepi tripurāriṇā'pi yaḥ |
malayodbhavapaṅka eṣa sampratipede hyadhunāpi pāṃsutām || 3 |
catubhiradhike catvāriṃśake'dhyāya uttame |
viśveśavirahāntasthaṃ kāśīvarṇanamucyate || 1 ||
kathamāgācca mandarāditi praśnasyottaraṃ vakṣyannāgamanakāraṇaṃ kāśīviyogajāta-
śaṅkaraḥ śarma sukhaṃ na labhate sma nā'labhat | kiṃ kurvan ? nivasan nivāsaṃ kurvan | kva ?
mandarasya parvatasya kandarodare ullasanti uccaranti sphurantīti yāvat | asamadyutīni
na vidyate samānā dyutiḥ kāntiryeṣāṃ tāni ratnāni yasmiṃstasmin mandakandaroda rolla-
sadasamadyutiratnaṃ tacca tanmandiraṃ ceti tasmin | paritaḥ sarvataḥ samyagadhiṣṭhitā amarā

paritāpaharāṇi padminīnāṃ mṛdulānyapi kaṅkaṇīkṛtāni |
gaditāni yadīśvareṇa sarpāstadabhūtsatyamaho maheśvarecchā || 4 ||
yadu dugdhanidhi nimathya devairmṛdusāra : samakarṣa pūrṇacandraḥ |
sa babhūva kṛśo viyogatapteśvara mūrdhoṣmapariccharaccharīraḥ || 5 |
yadadīdharadeṣa jātatāpaḥ pṛthule maulijaṭānikuñjakoṇe |
paritāpaharāṃ harastadānīṃ nadīṃ tāmadhunāpi nojjihīte || 6 |
bhagavadgātrasthitāḥ sarpā utprekṣyante | paritāpeti | kaṅkaṇīkṛtāni yāni
padminīnāṃ mṛṇālāni iti śeṣaḥ I | kathaṃ bhūtāni ? paritāpaharāṇi mṛdulāni komalānyapi
tāni yadyasmāt sarpā iti īśvareṇa gaditāni tattasmātkāraṇātsatyaṃ yathā syāttathā
tānyeva sarpāḥ abhūvannityartha | | īśvareṇa sarpā iti gaditāni yat tad gadanameva satyama-

mahato virahasya śaṅkaraḥ prasabhaṃ tasya vaśī vaśaṃgataḥ |
vivide na suraiḥ sado gatairapi saṃvītasutāpaveṣṭitaḥ || 7 |
aticitramidaṃ yadātmanā śucirapyeṣa kṛpīṭayoninā |
svapurīvirahodbhavena vai paritāpyeta jagattrayeśvaraḥ || 8 |
nijabhālatalaṃ kalānidheḥ kalayā nityamalaṅkaroti yaḥ |
sa tadīśvaramapyatāpayad vidhureko viparīta eva tu || 6 |
garalaṃ galanālikātale vilasedasya na tena tāpitaḥ |
amṛtāṃśutuṣāra dīdhitipracayaireva tu tāpito'dbhutam ||| 10 |

vilasaddha ricandanodakacchaṭayā tadvirahāpanuttaye
hṛdayāhitayāpyadūyata prasaradbhogiphaṭābharvarna
sakalaṃ bhramameṣa tu || 11 ||
nāśayet stragahitvādyapadeśajaṃ haraḥ |
idamadbhutamasya yadbhramaḥ sphuṭamālye'pi mahāhisambhavaḥ || || 12 ||
smṛtimātrapathaṃ gato'pi yastrividhaṃ tāpamapākarotyalam |
sa hi kāśiviyogatāpitaḥ svagataṃ kiścidajalpadityajaḥ || 13 |
api kāśisamāgato'nilo yadi gātrāṇi pariṣvajenmama |
davathuḥ pariśāntimeti tanna himānīparigāhanairapi || 14 ||

agamiṣyadaho kathaṃ sa tāpo nanu dakṣāṅgajayāya edhitaḥ |
mama jīvātulatā jhaṭityalaṃ hyabhaviṣyanna himādrijā yadi ||| 15 |
na tathojjhitadehayātayā mama dakṣodbhavayā mano'dunot |
avimuktaviyogajanmanā paridūyeta yathā mahoṣmaṇā || 16 ||
ayi kāśi mudā kadā punastava lapsye sukhamaṅgasaṅgajam |
atiśītalitāni yena me'dbhutagātrāṇi bhavanti tatkṣaṇāt || 17 ||
ayi kāśi vināśitāghasaṃghe tava viśleṣaja āśuśukṣaṇiḥ |
amṛtāṃśukalāmṛdudraveraticitraṃ haviṣeva vardhate || 18 ||

prāgdhimavatsutauṣadhena |
adhunā khalu naiva śāntimīyāṃ yadi kāśoṃ na vilokaye'hamāśu ||
manaseti gṛṇaṃstadā 16 |
śivaḥ sutarāṃ saṃvṛtatāpavaikṛtaḥ |
jagadambikayā dhiyāṃ jananyā kathamapyeṣa viyukta ityamāni || 20 |
priyayā vapuṣo'rghayā'nayāpyaparijñātaviyogakāraṇaḥ |
vacanairupacaryate sma sa praṇataprāṇinidāghadāraṇaḥ || 21 |
śrīpārvatyuvāca -
tava sarvaga sarvamasti haste vilasadyogaviyoga eva karate |
tava bhūtiraho vibhūtidātrī sakalāpatkalikā'pi bhūtadhātrī || 22 ||
tarhyadhunā'pi kāśīviyogajatāpaśāntyarthaṃ manyadevopāyāntaraṃ cintyatāṃ tatrāhā'-

tvadanokṣaṇataḥ kṣaṇād vibho pralayaṃ yānti jaganti śocyavat |
cyavate bhavataḥ kṛpālavāditaro'pośa na yaṃstvayoṅkṛtaḥ || 23 |
bhavataḥ paritāpahetavo na bhavantīndudivākarāgnayaḥ |
nayanāni yatastrinetra te'mī praṇayinyasti lasajjalā ca maulau || 24 ||
bhujagā bhujagāḥ sadaiva te'mī na viṣaṃ saṃkramate ca nīlakaṇṭha |
ahamasmi ca vāmadeva vāmā tava vāmaṃ vapuratra cittayuktā || 25 ||

iti saṃsṛtisaṃbījajananyā'bhihite hite |
girāṃ nigumphe giriśo vaktumapyādade giram || 26 |
īśvara uvāca- -
ayi kāśītyaṣṭamūrtirbhavo bhāvāṣṭako'bhavat |
satvaraṃ śivayā'jñāyi dhruvaṃ kāśyā hṛto haraḥ || 27 ||
atha bālasakhībhūtatattatkānanavīrudham |
śivā prastāvayāñcakre vimuktāṃ muktidāṃ purīm || 28 ||
iti saṃsṛtisaṃbojajananyā saṃsṛteḥ samyag bījaṃ mūlakāraṇamajñānaṃ mahattattvaṃ vā
tajjananī abhaktānāṃ tadutpādayitrī tayā | itthaṃ pūrvoktaprakāraṃ yathā syāttathā hite'bhihite
sati giriśo'thā'nantaraṃ giraṃ vaktumādade upakramaṃ kṛtavān | kathambhūte hite ? girāṃ
nigumphe girāṃ vacasāṃ nitarāmatiśayena gumpho gumphanaṃ grathanaṃ yatra tasmin | vaktumapītyatra
gadgadāmiti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 26 |
viyogadvārā santāpita iti śivayā pāvatyā'jñāyi jñātaḥ | kīdṛśo haro'ṣṭamūrtiḥ
pañcabhūtacandrasūryātmāno mūrtayo yasya saḥ | bhavatyasmāditi bhavaḥ | bhāvyante jāyante
pattyaitihyānupalabdhisambhavā iti bhāvā'ṣṭau tatsvarūpo bhāvāṣṭakaḥ | tathā coktaṃ brahma-
vidbhiḥ - vṛttyārūḍhaḥ pramāṇamiti | bhavatsadrūpa etādṛśo'pītyarthaḥ || 27 ||
kāśyā hṛto hara iti bhagavanmukhādevākarṇya pārvatī bhavasyā'gre kāśīṃ prastā-

pārvatyuvāca -
gaganatala militasalile pralaye'pi bhavatriśūlaparividhṛtām |
kṛtapuṇḍarīkaśobhāṃ smarahara kāśīṃ purīṃ yāvaḥ || 26 ||
dharādharendrasya dharāti sundarā
na māṃ tathā syāpi dhinoti dhūrjaṭe |
dharāgatāpīha na yā dhruvaṃ dharā
purī dhurīṇā tava kāśikā yathā || 30 ||
na yatra kāśyāṃ kalikālajaṃ bhayaṃ
na yatra kāśyāṃ maraṇātpunarbhavaḥ |
na yatra kāśyāṃ kaluṣodbhavaṃ bhayaṃ
kathaṃ vibho sā nayanā'tithirbhavet || 31 ||

no santi puraḥ sahasraśaḥ
pade pade sarvasamṛddhibhūmayaḥ |
paraṃ na kāśī sadṛśī dṛśoḥ padaṃ
kvacidgatā me bhavatā śape śiva || 32 |
puṇyapāpānāṃ dhanyā vārāṇasī purī " iti | leṅge ca-
nāvimukte naraḥ kaścinnarakaṃ yāti kilbiṣī |
īśvarānugrahādeva sarve yānti parāṃ gatim || iti |
na ca kālabhairavayātanāśāstravirodhastasyāḥ paścādbhāvitvāt | tathā ca
brahmavaivarte kāśīviśveśvarayorvākyāni –
pratijñā mama deveśa sthāvarā jaṅgamā janā | |
tāraṇīyāḥ sarvato me sā gacchati kalau śubhā
tatrāpi manujā deva dharmā'dharmādhikāriṇaḥ | |
na cānye trividhā jīvā | pūrvakarmopajīvinaḥ ||
paradāraratāḥ kecit kecidravyaparāyaṇāḥ |
parāpavādapaiśunyaparadroharatāḥ khalāḥ ||
kecidgovadhakartāraḥ kecinmadyaparāyaṇāḥ |
kecitpākhaṇḍakuśalā vañcakāḥ sūcakāḥ pare ||
tīrthadrohakarā liṅgaviṣṇubrāhmaṇa viḍgavām | |
drohiṇo nivasantyeva dvāparānte kalo tathā ||
anyānyapi ca pāpāni ' bahūni sumahāntyapi |
kurvantyevaṃ narāḥ sarve " mayyeva ca viśeṣataḥ ||
adya yāvattāritāste pratijñārakṣaṇāya me |
ataḥ paraṃ tvaccharaṇaṃ gatā'smi śivaśaṅkara ||

triviṣṭape santi na ki puraḥ śataṃ
samasta kautūhalajanmabhūmayaḥ |
tṛṇībhavantīha ca tāḥ puraḥ puraḥ
padaṃ purāre bhavato bhavadviṣaḥ || 33 |
na kevalaṃ kāśiviyogajo jvaraḥ
prabādhate tvāṃ tu tathā yathā'tra mām |
upāya eṣo'tra nidāghaśāntaye
purī tu sā vā mama janmabhūratha || 34 |

na mokṣalakṣmyo'tra samakṣamīkṣitā-
stanubhṛtā kenacideva kutracit |
avaimyahaṃ śarmada sarvaśarmaṃdā
sarūpiṇī muktirasau hi kāśikā || 36 |
na muktirastīha tathā samādhinā
sthirendriyatvojjhitatatsamādhinā |
kratukriyābhinaṃ na vedavidyayā
yathā hi kāśyāṃ parihāya vigraham || 37 |
na nākaloke sukhamasti tādṛśaṃ
kutastu pātālatale'tisundare |
vārtāpi mayeṃ sukhasaṃśrayā kva vā
kāśyāṃ hi yādṛk tanumātradhāriṇī || 38 |

kṣetre triśūlin bhavato'vimukte
vimuktilakṣmyā na kadāpi mukte |
mano'pi yaḥ prāṇivaraḥ prayuṅkte
ṣaḍaṅgayogaṃ sa sadaiva yuṅkte || 36 ||
ṣaḍajayogānna hi tādṛśī nṛbhiḥ
śarīrasiddhiḥ sahasā'tra labhyate | |
sukhena kāśīṃ samavāpya yādṛśī
dṛśau sthirīkṛtya śiva tvayi kṣaṇam || 40 ||
nākaloke svarloke nāsti | ato'tisundare'pi pātālatale | I svarlokādapi ramyāṇi
pātālānīti nāradaḥ prāha , svargasadāṃ madhye pātālebhyo gato divītyādi darśanāt |
kutastādṛk sukham ? yadā svarge pātāle ca tādṛk sukhaṃ nāsti , tadā martye manuṣyaloke
sukhasaṃśrayā vārtā'pi kva vā ? vāśabdaḥ kaṭākṣe | na kvāpītyarthaḥ || 38 |

varaṃ hi tiryaktvamabuddhivaibhavaṃ
na mānavatvaṃ bahubuddhibhājanam |
akāśisaṃdarśana niṣphalodayaṃ
samantataḥ puṣkarabubudopamam ||| 41 |
dṛśau kṛtārthe kṛtakāśidarśane
tanuḥ kṛtārthā śiva kāśivāsinī |
manaḥ kṛtārthaṃ dhṛta kāśisaṃśrayaṃ
mukhaṃ kṛtārthaṃ kṛtakāśisammukham || 42 ||

varaṃ hi tatkāśirajo'tipāvanaṃ
rajastamodhvaṃsi śaśiprabhojjvalam | |
kṛtapraṇāmairmaṇikarṇikābhuve
lalāṭagaṃ yad bahu manyate suraiḥ || 43 ||
na devaloko na ca satyaloko
na nāgaloko maṇikarṇikāyāḥ |
tulāṃ vrajedyatra mahāprayāṇakṛ-
cchrutirbhaved brahmarasāyanāspadam ||| 44 |
mahāmahobhūrmaṇikarṇikāsthalo
tamastatiryatra sameti saṃkṣayam |
paraḥśatairjanma bhiredhitā'pi yā
divākarāgnīndukarairanigrahā || 45 ||

kimu nirvāṇapadasya bhadrapīṭhaṃ mṛdulaṃ talpamayo nu mokṣalakṣmyāḥ | -
athavā maṇikarṇikāsthalo paramānandasukandajanmabhūmiḥ || 46 ||
samatīta vimuktajantu saṃkhyā kriyate yatra janaiḥ sukhopaviṣṭeḥ | |
vilasadyutisūkṣmaśarkarābhiḥ svavapuḥ pātamahotsavā'bhilāṣaiḥ || 47 |
skanda uvāca -
aparṇā parivarṇyati purīṃ vārāṇasīṃ mune | :
punavajñāpayāmāsa kāśīprāptyai pinākinam || 48 |

śrīpārvatyuvāca -
pramathādhipa sarveśa nityasvādhīnavartana |
yathā''nandavanaṃ yāyāṃ tathā kuru varaprada || 46 |
jitapīyūṣa mādhuryāṃ kāśīstavana sundarīm |
athā sssss ha mudito giriśo girijāṃ giram ||| 50 |
śrīdevadeva uvāca -
ayi priyatame gauri tvadvāgamṛtasīkaraiḥ | |
āpyāyito'smi nitarāṃ kāśīprāptyaṃ yate'dhunā || 51 |
tvaṃ jānāsi mahādevi mama yattanmahadvratam |
abhuktapūrvamanyena vastūpāśnāmi netarat || 52 |
pramathādhipetyādisambodhanacatuṣṭayena tava kimapyaśakyaṃ nāstīti sūcayati || 4 9 |

pitāmahasya vacanāddivodāse mahīpatau |
dharmeṇa śāsati puroṃ ka upāyo vidhīyatām
kathaṃ sa rājā || 53 |
dharmiṣṭhaḥ prajāpālanatatparaḥ |
viyojyate puraḥ kāśyā divodāso mahīpatiḥ || 54
adharmavatano yasmād ||
vighnaḥ syānnetarasya tu |
tasmātkaṃ preṣayāmīśe yastaṃ kāśyā viyojayet || 55
dharmavartmā'nusaratāṃ yo ||
vighnaṃ samupācaret |
tasyaiva jāyate vighnaḥ pratyuta premarvārdhani || 56 | |
vinā cchidreṇa taṃ bhūpaṃ notsādayitumutsahe |
mayaiva hi yato rakṣyāḥ priye dharmadhurandharāḥ || 57 ||
tahi kāśyā anyairādhipatyenānāśritatvāt siddhaṃ naḥ samīhitaṃ netyāha |
pitāmahasyeti || 53 |
tarhi balānniḥsāraṇīyastatrāha | kathamiti || 54 ||
tarhi vighnamutpādyotkraṣṭavyo netyāha | adharmeti | tasmād he īśe ! yena kenāpi
prakāreṇa yastaṃ viyojayet , taṃ kaṃ preṣayāmīti yojanā || 55 |

na jarā tamatikrāmetra taṃ mṛtyujighāṃsati |
vyādhayastaṃ na bādhante dharmavartmabhūdatra yaḥ || || 58 | ||
iti sañcintayan devo yoginīcakramagrataḥ |
dadarśā'timahāprauḍhaṃ gāḍhakāryastha sādhanam || 56 |
atha devyā samālocya vyomakeśo mahāmune |
yoginīvṛndamāhūya jagau vākyamidaṃ haraḥ || 60 |
satvaraṃ yāta yoginyo nama vārāṇasī purīm |
yatra rājā divodāso rājyaṃ dharmeṇa śāstyalam ||| 61 | |

svadharmavicyutaḥ kāśoṃ yathā tūṇaṃ tyajennṛpaḥ |
tathopacarata prājñā yogamāyābalānvitāḥ || 62 ||
yathā punarnavīkṛtya purīṃ vārāṇasīmaham |
itaḥ prayāmi yoginyastathā kṣipraṃ vidhīyatām || 63 ||
iti prasādamāsādya śāsanaṃ śirasā vahan |
kṛtapraṇāmo niryāto yoginīnāṃ gaṇastataḥ || 64 |
yayurākāśamāviśya manaso'pyatiraṃhasā |
parasparaṃ bhāṣamāṇā yoginyastā mudānvitāḥ || 65 |
adya dhanyatarāḥ smo vai devadevena yatsvayam |
kṛtaprasādāḥ prahitāḥ śrīmadānandakānanam || 66 ||
adya sadyo mahālābhāvabhūtāṃ no'tidurlabhau |
trinetra rājasammānastathā kāśīvilokanam || 67 ||

iti muditamanāḥ sa yoginīnāṃ nikurambastvatha mandarādrikuñjāt |
nabhasi laghukṛtaprayāṇavego nayanātithyamalambhayat purīṃ tām || 68 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe kāśīvarṇanaṃ nāma catuścatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 44 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ catuścatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 44 ||

atha pañcacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
atha tadyoginovṛndaṃ dūrāddṛṣṭi prasārya ca |
svanetradairghyanirmāṇaṃ praśaśaṃsa phalānvitam || 1 ||
divyaprāsādamālānāṃ patākāścalapallavāḥ |
sādaraṃ dūramārgasthān dūramārgasthān pānyānāhvayatoriva || 2 |
cañcatprāsādamāṇikyaivijṛmbhitamarīcibhiḥ |
sunīlamapi ca vyoma vīkṣyamāṇaṃ sunirmalam || 3 ||
catvāriṃśe'tha pañcamordhve'dhyāye'tīva suśobhane |
yoginīnāṃ samūhasyāgamanaṃ vaṇyaṃte sphuṭam || 1 ||
pūrvādhyāyānte yoginīnāṃ nikurambastāṃ purīṃ nayanātithyamalambhayadiyuktaṃ
tadanantaraṃ kiṃ vṛttamityapekṣāyāmāha | atheti | atha puryā netraviṣayaprāptyanantaraṃ tadyogi-
nīnāṃ vṛndaṃ dūrādeva dṛṣṭi prasāryaṃ svacakṣuṣo dairghyanirmāṇaṃ phalānvitaṃ praśaśaṃsetyanvayaḥ ||1 ||
divya prāsādamālānāṃ patākāśca praśaśaṃsetyanuṣajjate | kathambhūtāḥ ? calāśca-
palāḥ pallavā agrāṇi yāsāṃ tāstathā | tā utprekṣante | sādaramiti | sādaraṃ yathā
syāttathā dūramārgasthān pānthān pathikānāhvayatīrākārayatīriveti || 2 ||

devatvaṃ māyayācchādya veṣaṃ kārpoṭikocitam |
vidhāya kāśīma viśadyoginīcakramakramam || 4 ||
kācicca yoginībhūtā kācijjātā tapasvinī |
kācid babhūva sairandhrī kācinmāsopavāsinī || 5 |
mālākāravadhūḥ kācit kācinnāpitasundarī |
sūtikarmavicārajñā'parā bhaiṣajyakovidā || 6 ||
vaiśyā ca kācidabhavat krayavikrayacañcurā |
vyālagrāhiṇyabhūt kāciddāsī dhātrī ca kācana || 7 |
ekā ca nṛtyakuśalā tvanyā gānaviśāradā |
aparā veṇuvādajñā'parā vīṇādharā'bhavat || 8 |
mṛdaṅgavādanajñā'nyā kācittālakalāvatī |
kācitkārmaṇatattvajñā kācinmauktika gumphikā || 6 |

kācidakṣakalālayā |
ālāpollāsakuśalā kāciccatvaracāriṇī || 10 ||
vaṃśādhirohaṇe dakṣā rajjumārgeṇa cetarā |
kācid vātulaceṣṭā'bhūt pathi cīvaraveṣṭanā || 11 ||
apatyadā'napatyānāṃ parā tatra pure'vasat |
kācitkarāṃghrirekhāṇāṃ lakṣaṇāni ciketi na | 12 |
citralekhananaipuṇyāt kācijjanamanoharā |
vaśīkaraṇa mantrajñā kācittatra cacāra ha || 13 |
guṭikāsiddhidā kācit kācidañjanasiddhidā |
dhātuvādavidagdhā'nyā pādukāsiddhidā parā || 14 ||
gandhabhāgavidhijñā gandhavibhāgaprakārajñā | akṣakalālayā dyūtavidyāśrayabhūtā |
ālāpasyollāse vilāse cāturya iti yāvat | kuśalā | catvaracāriṇī
bhikṣukīrūpeṇa prāṅgaṇacāriṇī ||| 10 |
vaṃśasya ūrdhvokṛtya dhṛtasyoparyaṃdhirohaṇe dakṣā | itarā ubhayapārśve ūrdhvakṛtya
baddhāyā rajjvā mārgeṇa tadupari gamane itarā dakṣeti dakṣetarapadayoḥ parasparamubhayatrā'-

agnistambhaṃ jalastambhaṃ vākastambhaṃ cāpya śikṣayat |
khecarītvaṃ dadau kācidadṛśyatvaṃ parā dadau || 15 |
kācidākarṣaṇoṃ siddhi dadāvuccāṭanaṃ parā | |
kācinnijāṃgasaundaryayuvacittavimohinī
cintitārthapradā kācit kācijjyotiḥ kalāvatī |
ityādiveṣabhāṣābhiranukṛtya samantataḥ || 17 |
pratyaṅgaṇaṃ pratigṛhaṃ prāviśadyoginīgaṇaḥ |
itthamabdaṃ carantyastā yoginyo'haniśaṃ puri ||| 18 |
na cchidraṃ lebhire kvāpi nṛpavighnacikīrṣavaḥ |
tataḥ sametya tāḥ sarvā yoginyo vandhyavāñchitāḥ |
tasthuḥ sammantrya tatraiva na gatā mandaraṃ punaḥ || 16 ||
agnistambhādiṣu triṣu paretyanuṣajjate | khecarītvamākāśagāmitvam | adṛśya-
tvaṃ cakṣuṣmatā sammukhe'pi darśanā'narhatvam || 15 |
ākarṣaṇī siddhirnāma icchayā striyāḥ puruṣasya balādānayanam | uccāṭanaṃ
susthasyāpi dausthyāpādānam | nijāṅgasya saundaryeṇa lāvaṇyena yūnāṃ cittasya vimohinī

prabhukāryamaniṣpādya sadaḥ sambhāvanaṃdhitaḥ |
kaḥ puraḥ śaknuyāt sthātuṃ svāmino kṣatavigrahaḥ || 20 ||
anyacca cintitaṃ tābhiryoginobhiridaṃ mune |
prabhuṃ vināpi jīvāmo na tu kāśīṃ vinā punaḥ || 21 ||
prabhū ruṣṭo'pi sadbhṛtye jīvikāmātrahārakaḥ |
kāśī haret karābhraṣṭā puruṣārthacatuṣṭayam || 22 ||
nā'dyāpi kāśīṃ santyajya tadārabhya mahāmune |
yoginyo'nyatra tiṣṭhanti carantyo'pi jagattrayam || 23 ||
prāpyā'pi śrīmatī kāśīṃ yastitikṣati durmatiḥ |
sa eva pratyuta tyakto dharmakāmārthamuktibhiḥ || 24 ||

kaḥ kāśīṃ prāpya durbuddhiraparatra yiyāsati |
mokṣanikṣepakalaśīṃ tucchavīkṛtamānasaḥ || 25 ||
vimukho'pīśvaro'smākaṃ kāśīsevanapuṇyataḥ |
sammukho bhavitā puṇyaṃ kṛtakṛtyāḥ sma tadvayam || 26 |
dinaiḥ katipayaireva sarvajño'pi sameṣyati |
vinā kāśīṃ na ramate yato'nyatra trilocanaḥ || || 27 ||
śambhoḥ śaktiriyaṃ kāśī kācitsarvairagocarā |
śambhureva hi jānīyādetasyāḥ paramaṃ sukham || 28 ||
iti niścitya manasi śambhorānandakānane |
atiṣṭhadyoginīvṛndaṃ kayācinmāyayāvṛtam || 26 ||
vyāsa uvāca -
itthaṃ samākarṇya muniḥ punaḥ papraccha ṣaṇmukham |
kāni kāni ca nāmāni tāsāṃ tāni vadeśvara || 30 ||
mokṣarūpasya nikṣepasya kalaśīmāśrayamityarthaḥ || 25 ||
vimukho'pīśvaro yadā'smākaṃ sammukho bhavitā , tadā vayaṃ kṛtakṛtyāḥ smetyanvayaḥ |
kathambhūta īśvaraḥ ? puṇyaṃ puṇyahetuḥ puṇyasvarūpo vā || 26 |
kuto na ramate tatrāha | śambhoriti || 28 |
itthamiti ślokadvayena praśnacatuṣṭayam || 30 ||

bhajanādyoginīnāṃ ca kāśyāṃ ki jāyate phalam |
kasminparvaṇi tāḥ pūjyāḥ kathaṃ pūjyāśca tadvada || 31
śrutveti praśnamaumeyo yoginīsaṃśrayaṃ |
yoginīsaṃśrayaṃ tataḥ |
pratyuvāca mune vacmi śṛṇotvavahito bhavān || 32 ||
skanda uvāca -
nāmadheyāni vakṣyāmi yoginīnāṃ ghaṭodbhava |
ākarṇya yāni pāpāni kṣayanti bhavināṃ kṣaṇāt || 33 ||
gajānanā siṃhamukhī gṛdhrāsyā kākatuṇḍikā |
uṣṭragrīvā hayagrīvā vārāhī śarabhānanā || 34 ||
ulūkikā śivārāvā mayūro vikaṭānanā |
aṣṭavaktā koṭarākṣī kubjā vikaṭalocanā || 35 |
sarveṣāṃ praśnānāṃ pratyuttaraṃ pratyabhijñāpayati bhagavān vyāsaḥ | śrutveti || 32 ||
phalasahitaṃ prathama praśnapratyuttaraṃ pratijānāti skando nāmadheyānīti | kṣayanti

śuṣkodarī lalajjihvā śvadaṃṣṭrā vānarānanā |
ṛkṣākṣī kekarākṣī ca bṛhattuṇḍā surāpriyā || 36 ||
kapālahastā raktākṣo śukī śyenī kapotikā |
pāśahastā daṇḍahastā pracaṇḍā caṇḍavikramā || 37 ||
śiśughnī pāpahantrī ca kālī rudhirapāyinī |
vasādhayā garbhabhakṣā śavahastāntramālinī || 38 ||
sthūlakeśī bṛhatkukṣiḥ sarpāsyā pretavāhanā |
dandaśūkakarā krauñcī mṛgaśīrṣā vṛṣānanā || 36 |
vyāttāsyā dhūmaniḥśvāsā vyomaikacaraṇordhvadṛk |
tāpanī śoṣaṇīdṛṣṭiḥ koṭarī sthūlanāsikā || 40 || ||
vidyutprabhā balākāsyā mārjārī kaṭapūtanā |
aṭṭāṭṭahāsā kāmākṣī mṛgākṣī mṛgalocanā || 41 ||
nāmānīmāni yo martyaḥ catuḥṣaṣṭi dine dine |
japettrisandhyaṃ tasyeha duṣṭabādhā praśāmyati ||| 42 |
vasādhayā vasāṃ dhayati pibatīti vasādhayā medaḥ pāyinotyarthaḥ || 38 |
dandaśūkakarā sarpahastā sarpākārahasteti vā || 3 9 |
koṭarī koṭaravad gabhīrā sthūladaretyarthaḥ | puruṣottamadeśe prasiddhā devyā mūrti-
viśeṣarūpā vā ||| 40 |

na ḍākinyo na śākinyo na kūśmāṇḍā na rākṣasāḥ |
tasya pīḍāṃ prakurvanti nāmānīmāni yaḥ paṭhet || 43 ||
śiśūnāṃ śāntikāroṇi garbhaśāntikarāṇi ca |
raṇe rājakule vāpi vivāde jayadānyapi || 44 ||
labhedabhīpsitāṃ siddhi yoginīpīṭha sevakaḥ |
mantrāntarāṇyapi japaṃstatpīṭhe siddhibhāgbhavet || 45 ||
balipūjopahāraṃśva dhūpadopasamarpaṇaiḥ |
kṣipraṃ prasannā yoginyaḥ prayaccheyurmanorathān || 46 ||
śaratkāle mahāpūjāṃ tatra kṛtvā vidhānataḥ |
havīṃṣi hutvā mantrajño mahatīṃ siddhimāpnuyāt || 47 ||
ārabhyāśvayujaḥ śuklāṃ tithi pratipadaṃ śubhām |
pūjayennavamīṃ yāvannaraścintitamāpnuyāt || 48 ||
kṛṣṇapakṣasya bhūtāyāmupavāsī narottamaḥ |
tatra jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā mahatīṃ siddhimāpnuyāt || 4 9 ||
ḍākinyaḥ śākinyaśca duṣṭagrahaviśeṣāḥ | kūśmāṇḍā gaṇaviśeṣāḥ ||| 43 |
bhūtāyāṃ caturdaśyām || 4 9 ||

praṇavādicaturthyanternāmabhirbhaktimānnaraḥ
pratyekaṃ havanaṃ havanaṃ kṛtvā śatamaṣṭottaraṃ niśi || 50 ||
sasarpiṣā guggulunā laghuko lipramāṇataḥ |
yāṃ yāṃ siddhimabhīpseta tāṃ tāṃ prāpnoti mānavaḥ || 51 |
caitra kṛṣṇapratipadi tatra যātrā prayatnataḥ |
kṣetravighnapraśāntyathaṃ kartavyā puṇyakṛjjanaiḥ || 52 ||
yātrāṃ ca sāṃvatsarikoṃ yo na kuryādavajñayā |
tasya vighnaṃ prayacchanti yoginyaḥ kāśivāsinaḥ || 53 |
agre kṛtvā sthitāḥ sarvāstāḥ kāśyāṃ maṇikarṇikām |
tannamaskāramātreṇa naro vighnerna bādhyate || 54 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe catuḥṣaṣṭiyoginyāgamanaṃ
nāma pañcacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 45 ||
laghukolipramāṇataḥ sūkṣmabadarīphalapramāṇena || 51 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭokāyāṃ pañcacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 45 ||

atha ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
gate'tha yoginīvṛnde devadevo ghaṭodbhava |
kāśīpravṛtti jijñāsuḥ prāhiṇodaṃśumālinam || 1 ||
devadeva uvāca -
saptāśva tvarito yāhi purīṃ vārāṇasīṃ śubhām |
yatrā'sti sa divodāso dharmamūrtirmahīpatiḥ || 2 |
tasya dharmavirodhena yathā tatkṣetramudvaset | |
tathā kuruṣva bho kṣipraṃ māvamaṃsthāśca taṃ nṛpam || 3 |
dharmamāgaṃ pravṛttasya kriyate yā'vamānanā |
sā bhavedātmano nūnaṃ mahadenaśca jāyate || 4 |
ṣaṭcatvāriṃśake'dhyāye sarvapāpaikanāśane |
lolārkamahimā tāvadvaṇyate'timanoharaḥ || 1 |
kāśīsthān dvādaśādityān vaktuṃ prastāvayati | | gate'theti | | aṃśumālinaṃ
sūryam || 1 |
udvaseducchinnaṃ bhavet || 3 ||
enaḥ pāpam || 4 |

tava buddhivikāsena cyavate cet sa dharmataḥ |
tadā sā nagarī bhāno tvayodvāsyātsahaiḥ karaiḥ || 5 |
kāmakrodhau lobhamohau matsarā'haṅkṛtī api |
te tatra na bhavetāṃ yattatkālo'pi na taṃ jayet || 6 ||
yāvaddharme sthirā buddhiryāvaddharme sthiraṃ manaḥ |
tāvad vighnodayaḥ kvā'sti vipadyapi rave nṛṣu || 7 ||
sarveṣāmiha jantūnāṃ tvaṃ vetsi bradhna ceṣṭitam |
ata eva eva jagaccakṣurvraja tvaṃ kāryasiddhaye || 8 |
ravirādāya devājñāṃ mūrtimanyāṃ prakalpya ca |
nabhodhvagāmahorātraṃ kāśomabhimukho'bhavat

manasā'tovalolo'bhūt kāśīdarśanalālasaḥ |
sahasracaraṇo'pyaicchattadā khe naikapādatām
haṃsatvaṃ tasya sūryasya
tadā saphalatāmagāt |
sadā nabhodhvanīnasya kāśīṃ prati yiyāsataḥ || 11 |
atha kāśīṃ samāsādya ravirantarbahiścaran |
manāgapi na tadbhūpe dharmadhvastimavaikṣata || 12 ||
vibhāvasurvasan kāśyāṃ nānārūpeṇa vatsaram |
kvacinnā'vasaraṃ prāpa tatra rājñi surdhārmaṇi || 13 ||
kadācidatithirbhūto durlabhaṃ prārthayan raviḥ |
na tasya rājño viṣaye durlabhaṃ kiñcidekṣata || 14 ||
tvarayā kāśyabhimukhatve hetumāha | manaseti | lolaḥ kṣubdhaḥ ākula iti

kadācidyācako jāto bahudo'pi kadāpyabhūt |
kadāciddīnatāṃ prāptaḥ kadācid gaṇako'pyabhūt || 15
veda bāhyāṃ kriyāṃ cāpi kadācit pratyapādayat |
kadācitsthāpayāmāsa dṛṣṭapratyayamaihikam || 16 ||
kadācijjaṭilo jātaḥ kadācicca digambaraḥ |
sa kadācijjāṅgaliko viṣavidyāviśāradaḥ | 17 |
sarvapākhaṇḍadharmajñaḥ kadācid brahmavādyabhūt |
aindrajālika āsīcca kadācid bhrāmayan janān || 18 ||
nānāvratopadeśaiśca kadācit sa pativratāḥ |
kṣobhayāmāsa bahuśaḥ sadṛṣṭāntakathānakaiḥ || 16 |
dīnatāṃ daridratām || 15 |
vedabāhyāṃ pāṣaṇḍātmikām | dṛṣṭaḥ pratyayo jñānaṃ yasya taddṛṣṭapratyayaṃ pratyakṣajñāna-

kāpālika vratadharaḥ kadāciccā'bhavadvijaḥ |
kadācidapi vijñānī dhātuvādī kadācana || 20
kvacidvipraḥ kvacidrājaputro vaiśyo'ntyajaḥ kvacit |
brahmacārī kvacidabhūd gṛhī vanacaraḥ kvacit || 21 ||
yatiḥ kadāciditi sa rūpairabhrāmayañjanān |
sarvavidyāsu kuśalaḥ sarvajñaśvā'bhavat kvacit || 22 ||
iti nānāvidhaṃ rūpaiścaran kāśyāṃ graheśvaraḥ |
na kadāpi jane kvāpi cchidraṃ prāpa kadācana || 23 |
tato nininda cātmānaṃ cintārtaḥ kaśyapātmajaḥ |
dhik parapreṣyatāṃ yasyāṃ yaśo labhyeta na kvacit || 24 ||
kāpālikaḥ śevaviśeṣo loke yogīti prasiddhastadvratadharaḥ | dvijaḥ pakṣī | dvijoṃ
brāhmaṇaḥ san kāpālika vratadhara iti vā | vijñānī brahmajñānī | dhātuvādī svarṇādi-
siddhivādī || 20 |
athavā kadācidabhavadvija ityetatprapañcayati | kvacidvipra iti sārdhapadena || 21 |
abhrāmayat bhrāmayāmāsa || 22 |
cintayātaḥ pīḍitaḥ || 24 ||

mārtaṇḍa uvāca -
mandaraṃ yadi yāmyadya sadyastat krudhyatīśvaraḥ |
aniṣpāditakāryārthe mayi sāmānyabhṛtyavat || 25 |
kopamapyurarīkṛtya yadi yāyāṃ kathañcana |
kathaṃ tiṣṭhe purastasya tahi vai mūḍhabhṛtyavat || 26 |
athokṛtyāvahelaṃ vā yāmi cecca kathañcana |
krodhānnirīkṣetrayakṣo māṃ viṣaṃ peyaṃ tadā mayā || 27 |
harakopānale nūnaṃ yadi yātaḥ pataṅgatām |
pitāmaho'pi māṃ trātuṃ tadā śakṣyati na sphuṭam || 28 ||
sthāsyāmyatraiva tannityaṃ na tyakṣyāmi kadācana |
kṣetrasaṃnyāsavidhinā vārāṇasyāṃ kṛtāśramaḥ || 26 |
cintāmevāha - mandaramiti catubhiḥ | tat tadā || 25 |

puraḥ purāreḥ kāryārthamanivedyeha tiṣṭhataḥ |
yatpāpaṃ bhāvi me tasya kāśī pāpasya niṣkṛtiḥ ||
anyānyapi ca pāpāni 30 ||
mahāntyalpāni yāni ca |
kṣayanti tāni sarvāṇi kāśīṃ praviśatāṃ satām ||
buddhipūrva mayā caitanna 31 ||
pāpaṃ samupārjitam |
purāriṇaiva hi purā''śāsi dharmo hi rakṣyatām || 32 ||
dharmo hi rakṣito yena dehe satvaragatvare |
trailokyaṃ rakṣitaṃ tena ki kāmārthaiḥ surakṣitaiḥ || 33 ||
rakṣaṇīyo yadi bhavet kāmaḥ kāmāriṇā katham |
kṣaṇādanaṅgatāṃ nīto bahūnāṃ sukhakāryapi || 34 ||
taha kāryā'nivedane pāpaṃ syānnetyāha | pura iti | kāryarūpamarthaṃ kāryārthamago-
carayitvā iha kāśyāṃ tiṣṭhato me yatpāpaṃ bhāvi bhaviṣyati tasya pāpasya kāśī niṣkṛtiḥ

arthaścetsarvathā rakṣya iti kaiścidudāhṛtam |
tatkathaṃ na hariścandro'rakṣat kuśikanandane || 35 ||
dharmastu rakṣitaḥ sarverapi dehavyayena ca |
śibiprabhṛtibhūpālairdadhīcipramukhairdvijaiḥ || 36 ||
ayameva hi vai dharmaḥ dharmaḥ kāśīsevanasambhavaḥ |
ruṣitādapi rudrānmāṃ rakṣiṣyati na saṃśayaḥ || 37 |

vārāṇasīṃ samutsṛjya yastvanyatra yiyāsati |
hatvā nidhānaṃ pādena so'rthamicchati bhikṣayā || 36 ||
putramitrakalatrāṇi kṣetrāṇi ca dhanāni ca |
pratijanmeha labhyante kāśyekā naiva labhyate || 40 ||
yena labdhā purī kāśī trelokyoddharaṇakṣamā |
trailokyaiśvaryaduṣprāpaṃ tena labdhaṃ mahāsukham || 41 ||
kupito'pi hi me rudrastejohāni vidhāsyati |
kāśyāṃ ca lapsye tattejo yadvai svātmāvabodhajam || 42 ||
itarāṇīha tejāṃsi bhāsante tāvadeva hi |
khadyotābhāni yāvalo jṛmbhate kāśijaṃ mahaḥ || 43 ||
iti kāśīprabhāvajño jagaccakṣustamonudaḥ |
kṛtvā dvādaśadhātmānaṃ kāśīpuryāṃ vyavasthitaḥ || 44 |

lolārka uttarārkaśca sāmbādityastathaiva ca |
caturtho drupadādityo mayūkhāditya eva ca || 45 |
khakholkaścāruṇādityo vṛddhakeśavasaṃjñakau
daśamo vimalādityo gaṅgādityastathaiva ca || 46 | ||
dvādaśaśca yamādityaḥ kāśipuryāṃ ghaṭodbhava |
tamo'dhikebhyo duṣṭebhyaḥ kṣetraṃ rakṣantyamī sadā || 47 ||
tasyārkasya mano lolaṃ yadāsotkāśidarśane |
ato lolārka ityākhyā kāśyāṃ jātā vivasvataḥ || 48 |
lolārkasvasisambhede dakṣiṇasyāṃ diśi sthitaḥ |
yogakṣemaṃ sadā kuryātkāśīvāsijanasya ca || 46 |
mārgaśīrṣasya saptamyāṃ ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vā ravivāsare |
vidhāya vārṣika yātrāṃ naraḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 50 |
tamo'dhikebhya ātyantikatāmasebhyaḥ || 47 |

kṛtāni yāni pāpāni nareḥ saṃvatsarāvadhi |
naśyanti kṣaṇatastāni ṣaṣṭhyarke loladarśanāt || 51
naraḥ snātvāsisambhede ||
santarpya pitṛdevatāḥ |
śrāddhaṃ vidhāya vidhinā pitrānṛṇyamavāpnuyāt || 52 |
lolārkasaṅgame snātvā dānaṃ ' homaṃ surārcanam |
yatkiñcitkriyate karma tadānantyāya kalpate || 53 |
sūryoparāge lolārke snānadānādikāḥ kriyāḥ |
kurukṣetrāddaśaguṇā bhavantīha na saṃśayaḥ || 54 |
lolārka rathasaptamyāṃ snātvā gaṅgāsisaṃgame |
saptajanmakṛteḥ pāpairmukto bhavati tatkṣaṇāt || 55 |
pratyarkavāraṃ lolākaṃ yaḥ paśyati śucivrataḥ |
na tasya duḥkhaṃ loke'smin kadācitsambhaviṣyati || 56 |
ṣaṣṭhca ṣaṣṭhyā yukte'rkadine || 51 ||
lolārkasaṃgame lolārkasamīpe saṃgamo lolārkeṇa vā saṃgamaḥ lolārkasaṃgamastasmin |
lolārkasambhava iti pāṭhe lolārkasya sambhavo yasmin saṃgame tasminnityarthaḥ || 53 |
rathasaptamyāṃ māghaśuklasaptamyām || 55 | |

na tasya duḥkhaṃ nopāmā na dadurna vicacakā |
lolārkamarke yaḥ paśyettatpādodakasevakaḥ || 57 ||
vārāṇasyāmuṣitvā'pi yo lolārka na sevate |
sevante taṃ naraṃ nūnaṃ kleśāḥ kṣudvyādhisaṃbhavāḥ || 58
sarveṣāṃ kāśitīrthānāṃ lolārkaḥ prathamaṃ śiraḥ |
tato'ṅgānyanyatīrthāni tajjalaplāvitāni hi || 56 |
torthāntarāṇi sarvāṇi bhūmovalayagānyapi |
asisambhedatīrthasya phalāṃ nārhanti ṣoḍaśīm || 60 |
sarveṣāmeva tīrthānāṃ snānādyallabhyate phalam |
tatphalaṃ samyagāpyeta narairgaṅgā siṃgame ||| 61 |
nārthavādo'yamuditaḥ stutivādo na vai mune |
satyaṃ yathārthavādo'yaṃ śraddheyaḥ sadbhirādarāt || 62 ||
pāmāvircācakayoravāntarabhedaḥ || 57 |
āpyeta āpyate || 61 |
nanvādityo ve yūpo yajamānaḥ prastara ityādivadarthavādo bhaviṣyati netyāha |

yatra viśveśvaraḥ sākṣādyatra svargataraṅgiṇī |
mithyā tatrā'numanyante tārkikaśvānusūyakāḥ || 63 ||
udāharanti ye mūḍhāḥ kutarkabaladarpitāḥ |
kāśyāṃ sarve'rthavādo'yaṃ te viṭkoṭā yuge yuge || 64 ||
kasyacit kāśitorthasya mahimno mahatastulām |
nā'dhirohenmune nūnamapi trailokyamaṇḍapaḥ || 65 |
nāstikā vedabāhyāśca śiśnodaraparāyaṇāḥ |
antyajātāśca ye teṣāṃ puraḥ kāśo na varṇyatām || 66 ||
lolārkakaraniṣṭaptā asidhāravikhaṇḍitāḥ |
kāśyāṃ dakṣiṇadigbhāge na viśeyurmahāmalāḥ ' || 67 ||
arthavādavaktṝṇāṃ doṣaṃ svayamevāha | udāharantoti || 64 |

mahimānamimaṃ śrutvā lolārkasya narottamaḥ |
na du : khī jāyate kvāpi saṃsāre duḥkhasāgare || 68 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe lolārkavarṇanaṃ nāma ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 46 ||
steṣāmevā'sidhārayā khaṅgadhārayā vikhaṇḍitā viśeṣeṇa khaṇḍitāḥ khaṅgacchedaṃ prāpitā
yathā na viśantīti śabdaśleṣā'laṅkāro'yam || 67-68 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ ṣaṭcatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 46 ||

atha saptacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
athottarasyāmāśāyāṃ kuṇḍamarkākhyamuttamam |
tatra nāmnottarārkeṇa raśmimālī vyavasthitaḥ || 1 |
tāpayan duḥkhasaṃghātaṃ sādhūnāpyāyayan raviḥ |
uttarārko mahātejāḥ kāśīṃ rakṣati sarvadā || 2 |
tatretihāso yo vṛttastaṃ niśāmaya suvrata |
vipraḥ priyavrato nāma kaścidātreyavaṃśajaḥ || 3 |
āsītkāśyāṃ śubhācāraḥ sadā'tithijanapriyaḥ |
bhāryā śubhavatā tasya babhūvā'timanoharā || 4 ||
catvāriṃśe'tha saptoveṃ'dhyāye paramapāvane |
uttarārkasya māhātmyaṃ varṇyate'timanoharam || 1 ||
lolārka uttarārkaścetyādinā dvādaśādityā upakṣiptāstatra lolārkasya sambhavaṃ
māhātmyaṃ coktvottarārkasyāpi te āha- atheti | raśmimālī sūryaḥ || 1 |

bhartṛśuśrūṣaṇaratā gṛhakarmasu peśalā |
tasyāṃ sa janayāmāsa kanyāmekāṃ sulakṣaṇām || 5 |
mūlarkṣaprathame pāde tathā tathā kendre kendre bṛhaspatau |
vavṛdhe sā gṛhe pitroḥ śukle pakṣe yathā śaśī || 6 |
surūpā vinayācārā pitrośca priyakāriṇī |
atīvanipuṇā jātā gṛhopaskaramārjane || 7 |
yathā yathā samaidhiṣṭa sā kanyā pitṛmandire |
tathā tathā pitustasyāścintā saṃvavṛdhetarām || 8 |
kasmai deyā varā kanyā suramyeyaṃ sulakṣaṇā |
asyā anuguṇo labhyaḥ kva mayā vara uttamaḥ || 6 |
kulena vayasā cāpi śīlenāpi śrutena ca |
rūpeṇārthena saṃyuktaḥ kasmai dattā sukhaṃ labhet || 10 ||
sulakṣaṇāṃ nāmnā || 5 ||
mūlakṣaṃsya mūlanakṣatrasya prathame pāde tathā bṛhaspatī kendre lagnacaturthadaśamasaptamā-
nyatamasmin rāśī sthite sati || 6 |
samadhiṣṭa avardhata || 8
kasmai dattā satīyaṃ sukhaṃ labhet | datvā sukhaṃ labha iti kvacit || 10 ||

iti cintayatastasya jvaro'bhūdatidāruṇaḥ |
yaśvintākhyo jvaraḥ puṃsāmauṣadharnāpi śāmyati || 11 ||
tanmūlarkṣavipākena cintākhyena jvareṇa ca |
sa vipraḥ pañcatāṃ prāptastyaktvā sarvaṃ gṛhādikam || 12 ||
pitaryuparate tasyāḥ kanyāyāḥ sā jananyapi |
śubhavatā parityajya tāṃ kanyāṃ patimanvagāt || 13 ||
dharmo'yaṃ sahacāriṇyā jīvatājīvatāpi vā |
patyā sahaiva sthātavyaṃ pativratayujā sadā || 14 ||
nāpatyaṃ pāti no mātā na pitā naiva bāndhavāḥ |
patyuścaraṇaśuśrūṣā pāyādvai kevalaṃ striyam || 15 ||
tanmūlarkṣavipākena kanyāyā mūlanakṣatraphalena | tattadeti vā | pañcatāṃ maraṇam || 12 |
patimanvagāddattāgni patidahemanu svayamagno viveśetyarthaḥ || 13 ||

sulakṣaṇāpi duḥkhārtā pitroḥ pañcatvamāptayoḥ |
aurdhvadehikamāpādya daśāhaṃ vinivartya ca || 16 ||
cintāmavāpa mahatomanāthā dainyamāgatā |
kathamekākinī pitrā mātrā honā bhavā'mbudhaḥ || 17 ||
dustaraṃ pāramāpsyāmi strītvaṃ sarvābhibhāvi yat |
na kasmaicidvarāyāhaṃ pitṛbhyāṃ pratipāditā || 18 ||
tadadattā kathaṃ svairamahamanyaṃ varaṃ vṛṇe |
vṛto'pi na kulīnaśced guṇavānna ca śīlavān || 16 ||
svādhīno'pi na tattena vṛtenāpi hi kiṃ bhavet |
iti sañcintayantī sā rūpaudāryaguṇānvitā || 20 ||
yuvabhirbahubhinityaṃ prārthitā'pi muhurmuhuḥ |
na kasyāpi dadau bālā praveśaṃ nijamānase || 21 |

pitrorupatiṃ dṛṣṭvā vātsalyaṃ ca tathāvidham |
nininda bahudhātmānaṃ saṃsāraṃ ca nininda ha ||
yābhyāmutpāditā 22 ||
cāhaṃ yābhyāṃ ca paripālitā |
pitarau kutra tau yātau dehino dhiganityatām || 23
aho deho'pyaho'ṅgatvaṃ ||
yathā pitroḥ puro mama |
iti niścitya sā bālā vijitendriyamānasā || 24 |
brahmacayaṃ dṛḍhaṃ kṛtvā tapa ugraṃ cacāra ha |
uttarārkasya devasya samīpe sthiramānasā || 25 |
tasyāṃ tapasyamānāyāmekā cchāgī laghīyasī | |
tana pratyahamāgatya tiṣṭhettatpurato'calā || 26 | |
tṛṇaparṇādikaṃ kiñcitsāyamabhyavahṛtya sā |
tatkuṇḍapītavānīyā svasvāmisadanaṃ vrajet || 27 ||
dehino dhiganityatāṃ dehino jīvasyā'nityatāṃ prati dhigastvityarthaḥ || 23 |

tata itthaṃ vyatītāsu pañcaṣāsu samāsu ca |
līlayā vicaran devastatra gauryā sahā ss gataḥ || 28 ||
sannidhāvuttarārkasya tapasyantīṃ sulakṣaṇām |
sthāṇuvanniścalāṃ sthāṇuradrākṣīttapasā kṛśām || 26 |
tato girijayā śambhuvijñaptaḥ karuṇātmanā |
vareṇā'nugṛhāṇemāṃ bandhuhīnāṃ sumadhyamām || 30 |
śarvāṇī giramākarṇya tataḥ śarvaḥ kṛpānidhiḥ |
.. samādhimīlitākṣīṃ tāmuvāca varado haraḥ || 31 ||
sulakṣaṇe prasanno'smi varaṃ varaya suvrate |
ciraṃ khinnā'si tapasā kaste'stoha manoratha : || 32 |
sā'pi śambhogiraṃ śrutvā mukhapīyūṣavarṣiṇīm |
mahāsantāpaśamanīṃ locane udamīlayat || 33 ||
tryakṣaṃ pratyakṣamāvīkṣya varadānonmukhaṃ puraḥ |
devīṃ ca vāmabhāgasthāṃ praṇanāma kṛtāñjaliḥ || 34 ||
pañcaṣāsu pañcaṣaṭsu vā samāsu vatsareṣu || 28 ||
karuṇā ātmani yasyāstayā dayāsvarūpayeti vā | yā devī sarvabhūteṣu dayārūpeṇa

ki vṛṇe yāvaditthaṃ sā cintayeccārumadhyamā |
tāvattayā nirakṣiṣṭa varāko varkarī pura : || 35 |

devadevastataḥ prāha devi paśya girīndraje |
sādhūnāmīdṛśī buddhiḥ paropakaraṇojitā || 41 |
te dhanyāḥ sarvalokeṣu sarvadharmāśrayāśca te |
yatante sarvabhāvena paropakaraṇāya ye || 42 ||
sañcayāḥ sarvavastūnāṃ ciraṃ tiṣṭhanti no kvacit |
suciraṃ tiṣṭhate caikaṃ paropakaraṇaṃ priye || 43 ||
dhanyā sulakṣaṇā caiṣā yogyā'nugrahakarmaṇi |
brūhi devi varo deyaḥ ko'sye cchāgyai ca kaḥ priye || 44 ||
śrīdevyuvāca-
sarvasṛṣṭikṛtāṃ kartaḥ sarvajña praṇatārtihan |
sulakṣaṇā śubhācārā sakhī me s stu śubhodyamā ||| 45 |
yathā jayā ca vijayā yathā caiva jayantikā |
śubhā nandā sunandā ca kaumudī ca yathomilā ||| 46 |
anugrahakarmaṇi anukūlakārye yogyā | asyai sulakṣaṇāye || 44 ||
śubhāyodyamo yasyāḥ sā śubhodyamā ||| 45 |
jayati sarvotkarṣeṇa tiṣṭhatīti jayā | viśeṣeṇa jayati vijayā | anyāsāmapi
yathāyatha nāmanirvacanaṃ jñeyam || 46 ||

yathā campakamālā ca yathā malayavāsinī |
karpūralatikā yadvadgandhadhārā yathā
aśokā ca viśokā ca yathā śubhā || 47 |
malayagandhinī |
yathā candananiḥśvāsā yathā mṛgamadottamā || 48 ||
yathā ca kokilālāpā yathā madhurabhāṣiṇī |
gadyapadyanidhiryadvadanuktajñā yathā ca sā || 46
dṛgañcaleṅgitajñā ca ||
yathā kṛtamanorathā |
gānacittaharā yadvattathā'stveṣā sulakṣaṇā || 50 |
atipriyā bhavitrī me yadabālabrahmacāriṇī |
anenaiva śarīreṇa divyāvayavabhūṣaṇā || 51 |
divyāmbarā divyagandhā divyajñānasamanvitā |
samayā māṃ sadevāstāṃ cañcaccāmaradhāriṇī || 52 |
eṣā'pi kāśirājasya kumāryastviha varkarī |
atraiva bhogān samprāpya mukti prāpsyatyanuttamām || 53 |
samayā māṃ matsamīpe | | cañcaccāmaradhāriṇī sphuradbālavyajanahastā || 52 |
eṣā'pi varkarīti sambandhaḥ | iha kāśyām | atraiva kāśyāmevetiśabdeneśvarī-
cchyā bhagavata īśvarasya varadānācca kāśyāṃ mṛtāyā api varkaryāḥ dehasambandha iti

anayā svarkakuṇḍe'smin puṣye māsi ravedine |
snātaṃ tvanudite sūrye śotādakṣubdhacittayā || 54 ||
rājaputrī tataḥ puṇyādastveṣā śubhalocanā |
varadānaprabhāveṇa tava viśveśvara prabho || 55 |
varkarīkuṇḍamityākhyā tvarkakuṇḍasya jāyatām |
etasyāḥ pratimā pūjyā bhaviṣyatyatra mānavaiḥ || 56 |
uttarārkasya devasya puṣye māsi khedine |
kāryā sāṃvatsarī yātrā nataiḥ kāśīphalepsubhiḥ || 57 |
mṛḍānyābhihitaṃ sarvaṃ kṛtvetad viśvago vibhuḥ |
viśvanātho viveśā'tha prāsādaṃ svamatarkitaḥ || 58 |
skanda uvāca -
lolārkasya ca māhātmyamuttarārkasya ca dvija |
kathitaṃ te mahābhāga sāmbādityaṃ niśāmaya || 56 |
akṣubdhacittayā sthirāntaḥkaraṇayā || 54 ||

vyādhibhirnābhibhūyeta na dāridrayeṇa bādhyate || 60 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe uttarākaṃvarṇanaṃ nāma saptacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 47 ||
saptacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 47 ||

athāṣṭacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca --
śṛṇuṣva maitrāvaruṇe dvāravatyāṃ yadūdvahaḥ |
dānavānāṃ vadhārthāya bhuvo bhārāpanuttaye || 1 |
āvirāsītsvayaṃ kṛṣṇaḥ kṛṣṇavartma pratāpavān |
vāsudevo jagaddhāma devakyāṃ vasudevataḥ || 2 |
sā'śītilakṣaṃ tasyāsan kumārā arkavarcasaḥ |
svarge'pi tādṛśā bālāḥ suśīlā na hi kumbhaja || 3 ||
atīvarūpasampannā atīva sumahābalāḥ |
atīvaśastraśāstrajñā atīvaśubhalakṣaṇāḥ || 4 ||
aṣṭā'dhike'tha catvāriśa ke'dhyāye manorame |
sāmbādityasya mahimā vaṇyate'ti sphuṭaḥ śubhaḥ || 1 ||
sāmbādityotpatti vaktuṃ śrotṝnabhimukhīkurvannupodghātaṃ racayati | śṛṇudhveti |

tāṃ draṣṭuṃ mānasaḥ putro brahmaṇastapasāṃ nidhiḥ |
kṛtavalkala kaupīno dhṛtakṛṣṇājināmbaraḥ || 5 ||
gṛhīta brahmadaṇḍaśva trivṛnmauñjī sumekhalaḥ |
urasthalasthatulasīmālayā samalaṅkṛtaḥ ||6 ||
gopīcandana niryāsala sadaṅga vilepanaḥ
tapasā kṛśasarvāṅgo mūrtojvalanavajjvalan || 7 ||
ājagāmā'mbaracaro nārado dvārakāṃ purīm |
viśvakarmavinirmāṇāṃ jitasvargapurīśriyam || 8 |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā nāradaṃ sarve vinamratarakandharāḥ |
prabaddhamūrdhāñjalayaḥ praṇemurvṛṣṇinandanāḥ || 6 |
sāmbaḥ svarūpasaundarya garvasarvasvamohitaḥ |
na nanāma muni tatra hasaṃstadrūpasampadam ||| 10 |
yasyāṃ dvārakāyām āvirāsīttāṃ dvārakāṃ draṣṭuṃ nārada ājagāmeti caturthenā'-

viveśa sumahāramyaṃ nāradaḥ kṛṣṇamandiram || 11 ||
kṛṣṇo'tha dṛṣṭvā''gacchantaṃ pratyudgamya ca nāradam |
madhuparkeṇa sampūjya svāsane copaveśayat || 12 ||
kṛtvā kathā vicitrārthāstata ekāntavartinaḥ |
kṛṣṇasya karṇe'kathayannāradaḥ sāmbaceṣṭitam || 13 13 | ||
avaśyaṃ yaśodānandavardhana |
prāyaśastanna ghaṭate'sambhāvyaṃ nā'thavā striyām || 14 ||
yūnāṃ tribhuvanasthānāṃ sāmbo'tīva surūpavān |
svabhāvacaśvalākṣīṇāṃ cetovṛttiḥ sucaśvalā ||| 15 |

apekṣante na mugdhākṣyaḥ kulaṃ śīlaṃ bhutaṃ dhanam |
rūpameva samīkṣante viṣameṣu vimohitāḥ || 16 ||
athavā viditaṃ no te ballavīnāṃ viceṣṭitam |
vināṣṭau nāyikāḥ kṛṣṇa kāmayante'balā hyamum || 17 ||
vāmabhruvāṃ svabhāvācca nāradasya ca vākyataḥ |
vijñātā'khilavṛttāntastathyaṃ kṛṣṇo'pyamanyata || 18 ||
tāvadveyaṃ calākṣīṇāṃ tāvaccetovivekitā |
yāvannārthī viviktatyo vivikte'rthani nānyathā || 16 |
viṣameṣuḥ kāmastena mohitāḥ || 16 |
gopālastavarāje ballavonandanamityatra vallabhāmityapi kecana paṭhanti | athavā gopa-
veṣadhāritvād ballavaḥ śrīkṛṣṇastatpatnyo ballavyastāsāṃ tava bhāryāṇāmityarthaḥ | aṣṭau
rukmiṇī satyānāgnajito sunandā mitravindā sudakṣiṇā jāmbavatī suśīlā nāyikā :
paṭṭamahiṣī : | amuṃ sāmbam || 17 ||
vāmabhruvāmiti skandavākyam || 18 |
tāvaditi ślokatrayaṃ vākyam | vijanastho yāvadarthī prārthako na bhavettāvadeva
dhairyaṃ ceto vivekitā ca | vivikte'rthini sati tadvayaṃ na ; kintvanyathā adhairyamavivekitvaṃ
cetyarthaḥ || 1 9 |

viveśa sumahāramyaṃ nāradaḥ kṛṣṇamandiram || 11 ||
kṛṣṇo'tha dṛṣṭvā''gacchantaṃ pratyudgamya ca nāradam |
madhuparkeṇa sampūjya sampūjya svāsane svāsane copaveśayat || 12 || ||
kṛtvā kathā vicitrārthāstata ekāntavartinaḥ |
kṛṣṇasya karṇe'kathayannāradaḥ sāmbaceṣṭitam || 13 |
avaśyaṃ kiñcidatrā s sti yaśodānandavardhana |
prāyaśastanna ghaṭate'sambhāvyaṃ nā'thavā striyām || 14 ||
yūnāṃ tribhuvanasthānāṃ sāmbo'tīva surūpavān |
svabhāvacaśvalākṣīṇāṃ cetovṛttiḥ sucañcalā ||| 15 |

apekṣante na sugdhākṣyaḥ kulaṃ śīlaṃ śrutaṃ dhanam |
rūpameva samīkṣante viṣameṣu vimohitāḥ || 16 ||
athavā viditaṃ no te ballavīnāṃ viceṣṭitam |
vināṣṭau nāyikāḥ kṛṣṇa kāmayante'balā hyamum || 17 ||
vāmabhruvāṃ svabhāvācca nāradasya ca vākyataḥ |
vijñātā'khilavṛttāntastathyaṃ kṛṣṇo'pyamanyata || 18 |
tāvaddheyaṃ calākṣīṇāṃ calākṣīṇāṃ tāvacceto vivekitā |
yāvannārthī viviktatyo vivikte'thani nānyathā || 16 ||
viṣameṣuḥ kāmastena mohitāḥ || 16 |
gopālastavarāje ballavonandanamityatra vallabhāmityapi kecana paṭhanti | athavā gopa-
veṣadhāritvād ballavaḥ śrīkṛṣṇastatpatnyo ballavyastāsāṃ tava bhāryāṇāmityarthaḥ | aṣṭau
rukmiṇī satyānāgnajito sunandā mitravindā sudakṣiṇā jāmbavato suśīlā nāyikā :
paṭṭamahiṣī : | amuṃ sāmbam || 17 ||
vāmabhruvāmiti skandavākyam || 18 |
tāvaditi ślokatrayaṃ vākyam | vijanastho yāvadarthī prārthako na bhavettāvadeva
dhairyaṃ ceto vivekitā ca | vivikte'rthini sati tadvayaṃ na ; kintvanyathā adhairyamavivekitvaṃ
cetyarthaḥ || 1 9 |

itthaṃ vivecayaṃścitte kṛṣṇaḥ krodhanadīrayam |
viveka setunā''stabhya nāradaṃ prāhiṇot sudhīḥ || 20 ||
sāmbasya vaikṛtaṃ kiñcitkvacitkṛṣṇo na vaikṣata |
gate devamunau tasmin vīkṣamāṇo'pyahaniśam || 21 ||
kiyatyapi gate kāle punarapyāyayau muniḥ |
madhye līlāvatīnāṃ ca jñātvā kṛṣṇamavasthitam | 22 |
bahiḥ krīḍantamāhūya sāmbamityāha nāradaḥ |
yāhi kṛṣṇāntikaṃ tūrṇaṃ kathayā''gamanaṃ mama || 23 |
sāmbo'pi yāmi no yāmi kṣaṇamityamacintayat |
kathaṃ rahaḥsthaṃ pitaraṃ yāmi straiṇasakhaṃ prati || 24 |
na yāmi ca kathaṃ vākyādasyāhaṃ brahmacāriṇaḥ |
jvaladaṅgārasaṅkāśasphuratsarvāṅgatejasaḥ || 25 |

praṇamatsu kumāreṣu vrīḍito'yaṃ mayaikadā |
idānīmapi na yāyāmasya vākyānmahāmuneḥ || 26 |
atyāhitaṃ tadastīha tadā godvayadarśanāt |
pituḥ kopo'pi suślāghyo mayi no brāhmaṇasya tu || 27 ||
brahmakopāgninirdagdhāḥ prarohanti na jātucit |
aparāgnivinirdagdhā rohante dāvadagdhavat || 28 ||
iti dhyātvā kṣaṇaṃ sāmbo'viśadantaḥpuraṃ pituḥ |
madhye straiṇasabhaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ yāvajjāmbavatīsutaḥ || 2 9 |
dūrātpraṇamya vijñapti sa cakāra saśaṅkitaḥ |
tāvattamanvagacchacca nāradaḥ kāryasiddhaye || 30 |
vrīḍita upahasitaḥ || 26 ||
atyāhitaṃ mahābhītistacca tadā godvayaṃ cāparādhadvayaṃ taddarśanāt || 27 ||
dāvadagdhavad vanāgnidagdha iva || 28 |

sasambhramo'tha kṛṣṇo'pi dṛṣṭvā sāmbaṃ ca nāradam |
samuttasthau paridadhatpīta kauśeyamambaram ||| 31 |
utthite devakīsūnau tāḥ sarvā api gopikāḥ |
vilajjitāḥ samuttasthurgṛhṇantyaḥ svaṃ svamambaram || 32 ||
mahārhaśayanīye taṃ haste dhṛtvā mahāmunim |
samupāveśayatkṛṣṇaḥ sāmbaśca krīḍituṃ yayau || 33 ||
tāsāṃ skhalitamālokya tiṣṭhantīnāṃ puro suniḥ |
kṛṣṇalīlādravībhūtavarājānāṃ jagau harim || 34 |
paśya paśya mahābuddhe dṛṣṭvā jāmbavatīsutam |
imāḥ skhalitamāpannāstadrūpakṣubdha cetasaḥ || 35 |

kṛṣṇo'pi sāmbamāhūya sahasaivā'śapatsutam |
sarvā jāmbavatītulyāḥ paśyantamapi durvidheḥ || 36 ||
yasmāttvadrūpamālokya gopālyaḥ skhalitā imāḥ |
tasmātkuṣṭhī bhava kṣipramakāṇḍa | ''gamanena ca || 37 ||
vepamāno mahāvyādhibhayātsāmbo'pi dāruṇāt |
kṛṣṇaṃ prasādayāmāsa bahuśaḥ pāpaśāntaye || 38 |
kṛṣṇo'pyanena saṃjānan sāmbaṃ svasutamorasam |
abravītkuṣṭhamokṣāya vraja vaiśveśvarīṃ purīm || 36 |
tatra bradhnaṃ samārādhya prakṛtiṃ svāmavāpsyasi |
mahainasāṃ kṣayo'nyatra nāsti vārāṇasīṃ vinā || 40 ||
yatra viśveśvaraḥ sākṣādyatra svargāpagā ca sā |
yeṣāṃ mahainasāṃ dṛṣṭā munibhirnaiva niṣkṛtiḥ |
teṣāṃ viśuddhirastyeva prāpya vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 41 ||
durvidheḥ duradṛṣṭāddhetoḥ || 36 | gopālarūpasya bhagavataḥ patnya iti tu
gopālya ityasya pūrvavadevā'rthaḥ | yadvā , anavasarā''gamanena |
ballavīnāmityatraiva vyākhyātamiti | akāṇḍā''gamanena caḥ
samuccaye || 37 || śāpa de diyā-

na kevalaṃ hi pāpebhyo vārāṇasyāṃ vimucyate |
prākṛtebhyo'pi pāpebhyo mucyate śaṅkarājñayā ||| 42 |
purāpurāriṇā sṛṣṭamavimuktaṃ vimuktaye |
sarveṣāmeva jantūnāṃ kṛpayā'nte tanutyajām || 43 ||
tatrānandavane śambhostava śāpanirākṛtiḥ |
sāmba tattveritaṃ yāhi nānyathā śāpanirvṛtiḥ || 44 ||
tataḥ kṛṣṇaṃ samāpṛcchya karmanirmuktaceṣṭitaḥ |
nāradaḥ kṛtakṛtyaḥ san yayāvākāśavartmanā ||| 45 |
sāmbo vārāṇasīṃ prāpya samārādhyāṃ'śumālinam |
kuṇḍaṃ tatpṛṣṭhataḥ kṛtvā nijāṃ prakṛtimāptavān || 46 ||
prākṛtebhyaḥ prakṛtikāryebhyaḥ || 42 ||
tattveritaṃ satyatvena kathitam | tvaritamiti kvacit | śāpānnimittānnirvṛtiḥ

sarvavyādhiharo raviḥ |
dadāti sarvabhaktebhyo'nāmayāḥ sarvasampadaḥ || 47 |
sāmbakuṇḍe naraḥ snātvā ravivāre'ruṇodaye |
sāmbādityaṃ ca sampūjya vyādhibhirnā'bhibhūyate || 48 ||
na strī vaidhavyamāpnoti sāmbādityasya sevanāt |
vandhyā putraṃ prasūyeta ' śuddharūpasamanvitam || 46 |
śuklāyāṃ dvijasaptamyāṃ māghe māsi ravedine |
mahāparva samākhyātaṃ raviparvasamaṃ śubham || 50 |
mahārogātpramucyeta tatra snātvā'ruṇodaye |
sāmbādityaṃ prapūjyā'pi dharmamakṣayamāpnuyāt || 51 ||
sannihatyāṃ kurukṣetre yatpuṇyaṃ rāhudarśane | |
tatpuṇyaṃ ravisaptamyāṃ māghe kāśyāṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 52 |

madhau māsi ravervāre yātrā sāṃvatsarī bhavet |
aśokaistatra sampūjya kuṇḍe snātvā vidhānataḥ || 53 |
sāmbādityaṃ naro jātu na śokairabhibhūyate |
saṃvatsarakṛtātpāpād bahirbhavati tatkṣaṇāt || 54 ||
viśveśātpaścimāśāyāṃ sāmbenā'tra mahātmanā |
samyagārādhitā mūtirādityasya śubhapradā || 55 |
iyaṃ bhaviṣyā tanmūrtiragaste tvatpuro'kathi |
tāmabhyarcya namaskṛtya kṛtvā'ṣṭau ca pradakṣiṇāḥ |
naro bhavati niṣpāpa : kāśīvāsaphalaṃ labhet || 56 |
sāmbādityasya māhātmyaṃ kathitaṃ te mahāmate |
yacchrutvā'pi naro jātu yamalokaṃ na paśyati || 57 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 48 |

idānīṃ draupadādityaṃ kathayiṣyāmi te'nagha
tathā draupada ādityaḥ |
saṃsevyo bhaktasiddhidaḥ || 58 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe sāmbāvityamāhātmyakathanaṃ
nāmāṣṭacatvāriṃśo'dhyāyaḥ || 48 |

athaikonapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
sūta uvāca -
pārāśarya mune vyāsa kumāraḥ kumbhajanmane |
yadā'vadatkathāmetāṃ tadā kva drupadātmajā || 1 ||
vyāsa uvāca -
purāṇasaṃhitā sūta brūte traikālikīṃ kathām |
sandeho nā'tra kartavyo yadastadgocaro'khilam || 2 ||
skanda uvāca -
ākarṇaya mune pūrvaṃ pañcavaktro haraḥ svayam |
pṛthivyāṃ pañcadhā bhūtvā prādurāsījjagaddhitaḥ || 3 ||
ekenone'tha pañcāśe'dhyāye paramapāvane |
draupadādityamāyūkhādityayorvaṇyate kathā || 1 ||
anantarā'dhyāyā'vasāne idānīṃ dropadādityaṃ kathayiṣyāmītyuktaṃ tatra draupadyā-
bhaviṣyatvāttadānīṃ tayā''rādhanasyā'sambhavādākṣipati | pārāśaryeti || 1 ||
purāṇeṣu kālatrayasambandhino'rthasya kathanānnā'yaṃ doṣa iti pariharati | purāṇeti |
purāṇasaṃhitā purāṇarūpadharmaśāstramityarthaḥ | traikālikīṃ bhūtabhaviṣyadvartamānakālasamba-

umā'pi ca jagaddhātrī drupadasya mahībhujaḥ |
yajato vahnikuṇḍācca prāduścakre'tisundarī || 4 ||
pañcā'pi pāṇḍutanayāḥ sākṣādrudravapurdharāḥ |
avateruriha svargāduṣṭasaṃhārakārakāḥ ||5 |
nārāyaṇo'pi kṛṣṇatvaṃ prāpya tatsāhacaryakṛt |
udvṛttavṛttaśamanaḥ sadvṛttasthitikārakaḥ || 6 ||
pratapantaḥ pṛthivyāṃ te pārthāśceruḥ pṛthak pṛthak |
udayānudayau tasmin sampadāṃ vipadāmapi || 7 ||
kadācitte mahāvīrā bhrātṛvyapratipāditām |
vipattimāpya mahatīṃ babhūvuḥ kānanaukasaḥ || 8 |
pāñcālyapi ca tatpatnī pativyasanatāpitā |
dharmajñā prāpya tatvatī braghnamārādhayad bhṛśam || 6 |
prāduścakre prādurbhāva cakāra prādurabhūdityarthaḥ || 4 |

ārādhito'tha savitā tathā drupadakanyayā |
sadavoṃ savidhānāṃ ca sthālikāmakṣayāṃ dadau ||| 10 |
uvāca ca prasannātmā bhāskaro drupadātmajām |
ārādhayantīṃ bhāvena sarvatra śucimānasām || 11 ||
sthātyaitayā mahābhāge yāvanto'nnārthino janāḥ |
tāvantastṛptimāpsyanti yāvacca tvaṃ na bhokṣyase || 12 ||
bhuktāyāṃ tvayi riktaiṣā pūrṇabhaktā bhaviṣyati |
rasavadvayañjana nidhiricchābhakṣyapradāyinī || 13 ||
itthaṃ varastayā labdhaḥ kāśyāmādityato mune |
aparaśca varo dattastasyai devena bhāsvatā ||| 14 |
raviruvāca --
viśveśāddakṣiṇe bhāge yo māṃ tvatpurataḥ sthitam |
ārādhayiṣyati naraḥ kṣudbādhā tasya naśyati || 15 |
anyaśca me varo datto viśveśena pativrate |
tapasā parituṣṭena taṃ niśāmaya vacmi te || 16 ||
cālanādyarthapātraviśeṣo dava tatsahitāṃ sthālīṃ pākapātraviśeṣam || 10 ||

prāgrave tvāṃ samārādhya yo māṃ drakṣyati mānavaḥ |
tasya tvaṃ duḥkhatimiramapānuda nijaiḥ karaiḥ || 17 ||
ato dharmapriye nityaṃ prāpya viśveśvarād varam |
kāśīsthitānāṃ jantūnāṃ nāśayāmyaghasañcayam || 18 ||
ye māmatra bhajiṣyanti mānavāḥ śraddhayānvitāḥ |
tvadvarodyatapāṇi ca teṣāṃ dāsyāmi cintitam ||| 1 9 |
bhavatīṃ matsamīpasthāṃ yudhiṣṭhirapativratām |
viśveśāddakṣiṇe bhāge daṇḍapāṇeḥ samīpataḥ || 20 |
ye'rcayiṣyanti bhāvena puruṣā vā striyo'pi vā |
teṣāṃ kadācinno bhāvi bhayaṃ priyaviyogajam || 21 ||
na vyādhijaṃ bhayaṃ kvāpi na kṣuttṛdoṣasambhavam |
draupadīkṣaṇataḥ kāśyāṃ tava dharmapriye'naghe || 22 |
anyadeśādāgatānāmapi kāśyāṃ sthitatvātkāśīsthitānāmityuktam || 18 |

iti datvā varān deva ādityaḥ sarvada : satām |
śambhumārādhayāmāsa dharma draupadyupāyayau || 23 |
ādityasya kathāmetāṃ draupadyārādhitasya vai |
yaḥ śroṣyati naro bhaktyā tasyainaḥ kṣayameṣyati || 24 |
skanda uvāca - -
draupadādityamāhātmyaṃ saṃkṣepātkathitaṃ mayā |
mayūkhādityamāhātmyaṃ śṛṇvidānīṃ ghaṭodbhava || 25 ||
purā pañcanade tīrthe triṣu lokeṣu viśrute |
sahasraraśmirbhagavāṃstapastepe sudāruṇam || 26 |
pratiṣṭhāpya mahāliṅgaṃ gabhastīśvarasaṃjñitam |
gaurīṃ ca maṅgalānāmnīṃ bhaktamaṅgaladāṃ sadā || 27 |
divyaṃ varṣasahasraṃ tu śatena guṇitaṃ mune |
ārādhayan śivaṃ somaṃ somārdhakṛtaśekharam || 28 ||

svarūpatastu tapanastrilokītāpanakṣamaḥ |
tato'titīvratapasā jajvāla nitarāṃ mune || 2 9 ||
mayūkhaistatra savitustrailokyadahanakṣamaiḥ
tataṃ samastaṃ tatkāle dyāvābhūmyoryadantaram || 30 ||
vaimānika viṣṇupade tatyaje ca gatāgatam |
tīvra pataṅgamahasi pataṅgatvabhayādiva || 31 |
mayūkhā eva dṛśyante tiryagūrdhvamadho'pi ca |
ādityasya na cādityo nopapuṣpasthiteriva || 32 || |
tasya vai mahasāṃ - rāśestaporāśestapociṣām |
cakampe sādhvasāttīvrāttrailokyaṃ sacarācaram || 33 ||

sūrya ātmā'sya jagato vedeṣu paripaṭhyate ,

mayūkhamālinaṃ śambhurālokyā'tisuniścalam |
samādhivismṛtātmānaṃ visismāya tapaḥ prati || 3 9 ||
uvāca ca prasannātmā śrīkaṇṭhaḥ praṇatārtihṛt |
alaṃ taptvā varaṃ brūhi dyumaṇe mahasāṃnidhe || 40 ||
niruddhendriyavṛttitvād bradhno dhyānasamādhinā |
na jagrāha vacaḥ śambhodviṃ trirukto'pyakarṇavat || 41 ||
kāṣṭhībhūtaṃ tu taṃ jñātvā śivaḥ pasparśa pāṇinā |
mahātapaḥ samudbhūtasantāpā'mṛtavarṣiṇā || 42 ||
tata unmīlayāñcakre locane viśvalocanaḥ |
tasyodayamiva prāpya prage paṅkajinīvanī || 43 ||
visismāya vismayaṃ cakre || 3 9 ||

parivyapetasantāpastapanaḥ sparśanādvibhoḥ
avagrahitasasya śrīrullalāsa yathā'mbudāt || 44 |
mitro netrātithīkṛtya tryakṣaṃ pratyakṣamagrataḥ |
daṇḍavatpraṇanāmoccaistuṣṭāva ca pinākinam || 45 ||
raviruvāca-
devadeva jagatāṃ pate vibho bhargabhīma bhava candrabhūṣaṇa |
bhūtanātha bhavabhītihāraka nato'smi natavāñchitaprada ||| 46 |
candracūḍa mṛḍa dhūrjaṭe hara tryakṣa dakṣaśatatantuśātana |
śāntaśāśvata śivāpate śiva tvāṃ nato'smi natavāñchitaprada || 47 ||

nīlalohita samīhitārthada dvayekalocana virūpalocana |
vyomakeśa paśupāśanāśana tvāṃ nato'smi catavācchitaprada ||| 48 |
vāmadeva śitikaṇṭha śūlabhṛccandraśekhara phaṇīndrabhūṣaṇa |
kāmakṛt paśupate maheśvara tvāṃ nato'smi natavāñchitaprada || 46 |
tryambaka tripurasūdaneśvara trāṇakṛt trinayana trayīmaya |
kālakūṭadalanā'ntakāntaka tvāṃ nato'smi natavāñchitaprada || 50 |
śarvarīrahita śarva sarvaga svargamārgasukhadā'pavargada |
andhakāsuraripo kapardabhṛttvāṃ nato'smi natavāñchitaprada || 51 |
he nīlalohita , he samīhitārthada , he dvayekalocana , he trinetra , he virūpalocana ,
he vyomakeśa , he paśupāśanāśana jīvānāṃ saṃsāranāśana , he natavāñchitaprada ! tvāṃ nato'-
smīti || 48 ||
he vāmadeva , he śitikaṇṭha , he śūlabhṛt , he candraśekhara , he phaṇīndrabhūṣaṇa , he kāmakṛt
kāmacchedaka , he paśupate , he maheśvara , he natavāñchitaprada ! tvāṃ nato'smīti || 4 9 ||
he tryambaka , he tripurasūdana , he īśvara , he trāṇakṛt he trinayana , he trayīmaya ,
kālakūṭadalana , he antakāntaka , he natavāñchitaprada ! tvāṃ nato'smīti || 50 ||
he he svargamārga sūryātman ,
he śarvarīrahita māyāvinirmukta , he śavaṃ , he sarvaga , kapardabhṛt ,
sukhada , svargamārgasukhadeti vā | he apavargada , he andhakāsuraripo , he
he tvāṃ nato'smīti || 51 ||
he natavāñchitaprada
samīhitārthaprada ! trinayana ! virūpākṣa ! vyomakeśa ! āpa

śaṅkarogra girijāpate pate viśvanātha vidhiviṣṇusaṃstuta |
vedavedya viditā'khilekhita tvāṃ nato'smi natavāñchitaprada || 52 |
viśvarūpa pararūpavarjita brahma jihmarahitā'sṛtaprada |
vāṅmano'viṣaya dūra dūraga tvāṃ nato'smi natavāñchitaprada || 53 |
itthaṃ parītya mārtaṇḍo mṛḍaṃ devaṃ mṛḍānikām |
atha ' tuṣṭāva prītātmā śivavāmārdhahāriṇīm ||| 54 |
raviruvāca --
devi tvadīyacaraṇāmbujareṇugaurīṃ
bhālasthaloṃ vahati yaḥ praṇatipravīṇaḥ |
janmāntare'pi rajanīkaracārulekhā
tāṃ gaurayatyatitarāṃ kila tasya puṃsaḥ || 55 |
he śaṅkara , he ugra , he girijāpate , he pate svāmin , he viśvanātha , he vidhiviṣṇu-
saṃstuta , he vedavedya , he viditā'khileṅgita , he natavāñchitaprada ! tvāṃ nato'smīti ||52 ||
he viśvarūpa , he para , he rūpavarjita , he brahmasvarūpa , he jihyarahita nirmāya , he amṛta-
prada , he vāṅmano'viṣaya , he dūravāṅmanoviṣaya dūreti vā , he dūraga , he natavāñchitaprada !

śrīmaṅgaleṃ sakala maṅgalajanmabhūme
śrīmaṅghale sakalakalmaṣatūlavahne |
śrīmaṅgale sakala dānavadarpahantri
śrīmaṅgale'khilamidaṃ paripāhi viśvam || 56 |
viśveśvari tvamasi viśvajanasya kartrī
tvaṃ pālayitryasi tathā pralaye'pi hantrī |
tvannāmakīrtanasamullasadacchapuṇyā
srotasvinī harati pātakakūlavṛkṣān || 57 ||
punastāṃ bhālasthalīṃ janmāntare rajanīkaracārulekhā nitarāṃ gaurayati śobhayatītyanvayaḥ |
vahane prakāraṃ darśayaṃstaṃ viśinaṣṭi | praṇatau daṇḍavat praṇipāte pravīṇo dakṣa iti | api-
śabdādiha janmani ca | bāṇāndhakādīnāṃ tathā darśanāt || 55 ||
bhaktyudrekāda bahudhā sambodhayati | he śrīmaṅgale śrīyuktamūrtimaṅgale | he sakala-

mātarbhavāni bhavatī bhavatīvraduḥkha-
sambhārahāriṇi śaraṇyamihā'sti nānyā |
dhanyāsta eva bhuvaneṣu ta eva mānyā
yeṣu sphurettava śubhaḥ karuṇākaṭākṣaḥ || 58 |
ye tvāṃ smaranti satataṃ sahajaprakāśāṃ
kāśīpurīsthitimatoṃ natamokṣalakṣmīm |
tān saṃsmaret smaraharo dhṛtaśuddhabuddho-
nirvāṇarakṣaṇavicakṣaṇapātrabhūtān 11 X2
mātastavāṃghriyugalaṃ . vimalaṃ hṛdisthaṃ
yasyāsti tasya bhuvanaṃ sakalaṃ karastham |
yo nāma te japati maṅgalagauri nityaṃ
siddhayaṣṭakaṃ na parimuñcati tasya geham || 60 |
he mātarhe bhavāni he bhavatīvraduḥkhasambhārahāriṇi saṃsāraduḥkhaughanāśini iha
jagati bhavatyeva śaraṇyaṃ śaraṇamasti nā'nyā yeṣu tava śubhaḥ karuṇākaṭākṣaḥ sphuredullaset ,
bhuvaneṣu madhye ta eva dhanyāsta eva mānyā iti || 58 ||
ye janāstvāṃ satataṃ smaranti tān smaraharaḥ smaredityanvayaḥ | kathambhūtām ?
sahajaprakāśāṃ svaprakāśāmityarthaḥ | kāśīpuryāṃ sthitimatīṃ kṛtanivāsāmityarthaḥ | natānāṃ
mokṣalakṣmoryasyāstāṃ mokṣalakṣmīsvarūpāmiti vā | tān kīdṛśān ? dhṛtā sampāditā

tvaṃ devi vedajananī praṇavasvarūpā
gāyatryasi tvamasi vai dvijakāmadhenuḥ | |
tvaṃ vyāhṛtitrayamihā'khilakarmasiddhaye
svāhā svadhā'si sumanaḥ pitṛtṛptihetuḥ ||| 61 |
gauri tvameva śaśimaulini vedhasi tvaṃ
sāvitryasi tvamasi cahniṇi cārulakṣmīḥ |
kāśyāṃ tvamasya malarūpiṇi mokṣalakṣmī-
stvaṃ me śaraṇyamiha maṅgalagauri mātaḥ || 62 |
stutveti tāṃ smaraharārdhaśarīraśobhāṃ
śrīmaṅgalāṣṭakamahāstavanena bhānuḥ |
devīṃ ca devamasakṛtparitaḥ praṇamya
tūṣṇīṃ babhūva savitā śivayoḥ purastāt || 63 |
he devi ! tvaṃ vedajananī praṇavasvarūpā oṃkārasvarūpā ca | praṇavasvarūpā vedajananī

devadeva uvāca - |
uttiṣṭhottiṣṭha bhadraṃ te prasanno'smi mahāmate
mitra mannetrago nityaṃ prapaśyaitaccarācaram || 64 | |
mama mūrtirbhavān sūrya sarvajño bhava sarvagaḥ |
sarveṣāṃ mahasāṃ rāśiḥ sarveṣāṃ sarvakarmavit || 65 ||
sarveṣāṃ sarvaduḥkhāni bhaktānāṃ tvaṃ nirākuru |
tvayā nāmnāṃ catuḥṣaṣṭyā yadaṣṭakasudīritam || 66 |
anena māṃ pariṣṭutya naro mabhaktimāpsyati |
aṣṭakaṃ maṅgalāgauryā maṅgalāṣṭakasaṃjñakam ||| 67 |
anena maṅgalāgaurīṃ stutvā maṅgalamāpsyati |
catuḥṣaṣṭyaṣṭakaṃ stotraṃ maṅgalāṣṭakameva ca || 68 ||
etatstotravaraṃ puṇyaṃ sarvapātakanāśanam |
dūradeśāntarastho'pi japannityaṃ narottamaḥ || 6 9 |
trisandhyaṃ pariśuddhātmā kāśīṃ prāpsyati durlabhām
anena stotrayugmena japtena pratyahaṃ nṛbhiḥ || 70 ||
etaccatuḥṣaṣṭraghātmakaṃ maṅgalāṣṭakaṃ ca stotravaraṃ stavaśreṣṭham | stotradvayamiti
kvacit || 6 9 |

dhruvaṃ dainandinaṃ pāpaṃ kṣālitaṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ |
na tasya dehino dehe jātucit kilbiṣasthitiḥ || 71 |
trikālaṃ yo japennityametatstotradvayaṃ śubham |

etatstotradvayaṃ dadyāt kāśyāṃ naiḥśreyasīṃ śriyam |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena mānavairmokṣakāṅkṣibhiḥ || 73 ||
etatstotradvayaṃ japyaṃ tyaktvā stotrāṇyanekaśaḥ |
prapaśva āvayoreva sarva eṣa carācaraḥ || 74 |
tadāvayoḥ stavādasmānniṣprapañco jano bhavet |
samṛddhimāpya mahatīṃ putrapautravatīmiha | 75 |
ante nirvāṇamāpnoti japan stotramidaṃ naraḥ |
anyacca śṛṇu saptāśva graharāja divākara || 76 |
tvayā pratiṣṭhitaṃ liṅgaṃ gabhastośvarasaṃjñitam |
sevitaṃ bhaktibhāvena sarvasiddhisamarpakam || 77 |
eṣa carācararūpaḥ prapañca āvayorāvābhyāṃ viracitaḥ || 74 ||

tvayā gabhastimālābhiścāmpeyāmbujakāntibhiḥ |
yadacitvaiśvaraṃ ' liṅga sarvabhāvena bhāskara || 78 |
gabhastīśvara ityākhyāṃ tato likhamavāpsyati |
arcayitvā gabhastīśaṃ snātvā pañcanade naraḥ || 7 9 |
na jātu jāyate māturjaṭhare dhūtakalmaṣaḥ |
imāṃ ca maṅgalāgaurīṃ nārī vā puruṣo'pi vā || 80 ||
caitraśukla tṛtīyāyā supoṣaṇaparāyaṇaḥ
mahopacāraiḥ sampūjya dukūlābharaṇādibhiḥ || 81 ||
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā gītanṛtyakathādibhiḥ |
prātaḥ kumārī : sampūjya dvādaśācchādanādibhiḥ || 82 |
sambhojya paramānnādyairvatvā'nyebhyo'pi dakṣiṇām |
homaṃ kṛtvā vidhānena jātavedasa ityṛcā || 83 ||
aṣṭottaraśatābhiśva tilājyāhutibhiḥ prage |
ekaṃ gomithunaṃ datvā brāhmaṇāya kuṭumbine || 84 ||
cāmpeyaścampakaḥ ambujaṃ padmaṃ tadvat kāntibhiḥ | tuśabdena śreṣṭhayaṃ dyotyate ||78
dhūtakalmaṣo vigatapāpaḥ || 80 |
jātavedasa ityṛcā kaṇḍikayā | jātavedase sunavāmasomamarātī yato nidahāti
vedaḥ , sa naḥ parṣadati durgāṇi viśvānāveva sindhuṃ duritātyagniriti mantraśeṣaḥ || 83 ||
prage prātaḥkāle || 84 |

śraddhayā samalaṅkṛtya bhūṣaṇairdvijadampatī |
bhojayitvā mahārhānnaiiḥ prīyetāṃ maṅgaleśvarau || 85 |
iti mantraṃ samuccārya prātaḥ kṛtvā'tha pāraṇam |
na dubhaṃgatvamāpnoti na dāridryaṃ kadācana || 86 |
na vai santānavicchitti bhogocchitti na jātucit |
strī vaidhavyaṃ na cāpnoti na nāyoṣidviyogabhāk || 87 ||
pāpāni vilayaṃ yānti puṇyarāśiśca labhyate |
api vandhyā prasūyeta kṛtvaitanmaṅgalāvratam || 88 |
etad vratasya karaṇāt kurūpatvaṃ na jātucit |
kumāro vindate'tyantaṃ guṇarūpayutaṃ patim || 86 ||
kumāro'pi vrataṃ kṛtvā vindati ' striyamuttamām |
santi vratāni bahuśo dhanakāmapradāni ca || 9 0 |
maṅgalāvratatulyatām |
kartavyā cābdikī yātrā madhau tasyāṃ tithau naraiḥ || 9 1 |

sarvavighnapraśāntyarthaṃ sadā kāśīnivāsibhiḥ |
aparaṃ dvimaṇe vacmi tava cātra tapasyataḥ || 9 2 |

draupadādityasahitaṃ naro na nirayaṃ vrajet || 9 6 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe draupadādityamayūkhādityorvarṇanaṃ

atha pañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ
skanda uvāca -
vārāṇasyāṃ tathādityā ye cānye tān vadāmyataḥ |
kalaśodbhava te prītyā sarve sarvā'ghanāśanāḥ || 1 |
khakholko nāma bhagavānādityaḥ parikīrtitaḥ |
triviṣṭapottare bhāge sarvavyādhivighātakṛt || 2 ||
yathā khakholka ityākhyā tasyādityasya tacchṛṇu |
purā kadraśca vinatā dakṣasya tanaye śubhe || 3 |
kaśyapasya ca te patnyau māroceḥ prāk prajāpateḥ | |
krīḍantyaveikadā'nyo'nyaṃ mune ūcatustviti || 4 |
adhyāye tvatha pañcāśe nānāścaryamanohare |

kadrūruvāca-
vinate tvaṃ vijānāsi yadi tadbrūhi me'grataḥ |
akhaṇḍitā gatiste'sti yato gaganamaṇḍale || || 5 |
yo'sāvuccaiḥśravā vājī bhūyate savita rathe |
ki rūpaḥ so'sti śabalo dhavalo vā vadā''śu me || 6 ||

ki paṇena bhaginyatra kathayāmyevameva hi |

kadrūruvāca—
krīḍeyaṃ nātra bhagini kāraṇaṃ kimapi krudhaḥ |
khelasya vyavahāro'yaṃ paṇe yat kiñciducyate || 10 ||
vinatovāca-
tathā kuru yathā prītistavā'sti pavanāśini |
atha tāṃ vinatāmāha kadrūḥ kuṭilamānasā || 11 |
tasyāstu sā bhaveddāsī parājīyeta yā yayā |
asminpaṇe imāḥ sarvāḥ sakhyaḥ sākṣiṇya eva nau ||| 12 |
ityanyonyaṃ paṇīkṛtya sarpiṇyapi patattriṇī |
uvāca karburaṃ kadrūraśvaṃ śvetaṃ garutmatī || 13 ||

jagmatuśca viramyā'tha krīḍanātsvasvamālayam || 14 ||

uvāca yāta vai putrā drataṃ vacanato mama ||| 15 |

turaṅgamuccaiḥśravasaṃ prodbhūtaṃ kṣīranīradheḥ |
surāsurairmathyamānān mandarāghātasādhvasāt || 16 |

tathā tadaṅgalomāni vidhatta viṣasotkṛtaiḥ || 18 |
iti śrutvā vaco mātuḥ kādraveyāḥ parasparam |

nāgā ūcu : -
mātarvayaṃ tvadāhnānādvihāya krīḍanaṃ balāt |
prāptāḥ prahṛṣṭā sṛṣṭānaṃ dāsyatyadya prasūriti || 20 |
kalmaṣāyata kalmaṣavarṇamiva kuruta || 17 ||

sṛṣṭaṃ tiṣṭhatu taddaraṃ viṣādapyadhikaṃ kaṭu |
tattvayā'vādi yanmantrairauṣadhairnopaśāmyati || 21 |

skanda uvāca -
anye'pi ye kuṭilagāḥ pararandhraniṣeviṇaḥ |

avādi uktam || 21 |

tārkṣyasya bhakṣyā'bhavata yūyaṃ madvākyalaṅghanāt |

iti śāpā'nalādbhītaiḥ kaiścitpātālamāśritam |

te pucchamauccaiḥśravasamadhigamya mahādhiyaḥ |
sunīlacikurābhāsaṃ canuraja ca karburam || 28 |
tatkṣveḍānaladhūmaughaiḥ phūtkārabhara niḥsṛtaiḥ |
mātṛvākkṛtijāddharmānna dagdhā bhānubhānubhiḥ || 26 ||
vinatāpṛṣṭhamāruhya kadrūḥ snehavaśāttataḥ |

pucchamauccaiḥśravasaṃ śravasaḥ pucchamityarthaḥ | pucchagoccairiti pāṭhe visarga lope'pi
sandhirārṣa : | sunīlacikurābhāsamatikṛṣṇa keśa sadṛśam || 28 ||
tatkṣveḍānaladhūmoghaisteṣāṃ sarpāṇāṃ viṣāgnidhūmrasamūhaiḥ | phūtkārabharaniḥsṛtaiḥ

uṣṇagoruṣṇagobhirme tāpyate nitarāṃ tanuḥ |
visrabdhā'haṃ svabhāvena tvaṃ sāpekṣā hi sarvataḥ || || 32 ||
svarūpeṇa pataṅgī tvaṃ pataṅgo'sau sahasraguḥ |
ata eva na te bādhā gagane tāpasambhavā || 33 ||

vinate vinatāṃ māṃ tvaṃ kiṃ nāvasi patattriṇī |
tava dāsī bhaviṣyāmi tvaducchiṣṭaniṣeviṇī || 36 |

yāvajjīvamahaṃ bhūyāṃ tvatpādodakapāyinī |
khakholkā nipatedeṣā bhṛśaṃ gadgadabhāṣiṇī || 37 ||
sūccha gatavatī pakṣapuṭau dhṛtvā biḍorago |

khakholketi yaduktā goḥ kadravā sambhrāntacetasā |
tadā khakholkanāmārka : stuto vinatayā bahu || 36 |
manāgatigmatāṃ prāpte khe prayāti vivasvati |
tābhyāṃ turaṅgamo'daśa kiñcitkarmīravān rathe || 40 ||
uktā vinatayaivaiṣā tāpopahatalocanā |
krūrā sarīsṛpī satyavādinyā viśvamānyayā ||| 41 |
khakholkanāmatve arkasya hetumāha | khakholketi dvayena || 37 ||

kadru tvayā jitaṃ bhadre yata uccaiḥśravā hayaḥ |
candraraśmiprabho'pyeṣa kalmāṣa iva bhāsate || 42 |
vidhirbalīyān bhujagi citraṃ jayaparājaye | |
krūro'pi vijayī kvāpi tvakkrūro'pi parājayī || 43 ||

suparṇa uvāca-
prātaḥ prātaraho mātaḥ kva yāsi tvaṃ dine dine |

kuto niḥśvasisi proccairaśrupūrṇavilocanā |
