vinatādhārā vinamratāyā ādhārabhūtā | vinatācāreti kvacit || 44 ||

brūhi mātarjhaṭityadya kuto dūnāsi patriṇi |
mayi jīvati te bāle kāle'pi kṛtasādhvase || 48 |
aśrunirmāṇakaraṇe kāraṇaṃ ki tapasvini |
sucaritrāsu nārīṣu nāmaṅgalamiheṣyate || 46 |
dhik tāṃśca putrānyanmātā teṣu jīvatsu duḥkhabhāk |
varaṃ vandhyaiva sā yasyāḥ sutā vandhyamanorathāḥ || 50 |
ityūrjasvala mākarṇya vacaḥ sunorgarutmataḥ |
vinatā prāha taṃ putraṃ mātṛbhaktisamanvitam || 51 |
ahaṃ dāsyasmi re bāla kavāśca krūracetasaḥ |
pṛṣṭhe vahāmi tāṃ nityaṃ tatputrānapi putraka || 52 |
kadācinmandaraṃ yāmi kadācinmalayācalam |
kadācidantarīpeṣu careyaṃ tadudanvatām || 53 |

yatra yatra nayeyuste kādraveyāḥ sudurmadāḥ |
vrajeyaṃ tatra tatrā'haṃ tadadhonā yataḥ suta || 54 ||
garuḍa uvāca -
dāsītvakāraṇaṃ mātaḥ ki te jātaṃ sulakṣaṇe |
dakṣaprajāpateḥ putri kaśyapasya priye'naghe || 55 |
vinatovāca garuḍaṃ purāvṛttamaśeṣataḥ |
dāsītvakāraṇaṃ yadvadādityāśvavilokanam || 56 ||
śrutveti garuḍaḥ prāha mātaraṃ satvaraṃ vraja |
pṛcchādya mātastān duṣṭān kādraveyānidaṃ vacaḥ || 57 |
yadurlabhaṃ hi bhavatāṃ yatrā'tyantaruciśca vaḥ |
maddāsītvavimokṣāya tadyācadhvaṃ dadāmyaham || 58 |
tathā'karocca vinatā te'pi śrutvā tadīritam |
sarpāḥ sammantrya tāṃ procuvinatāṃ hṛṣṭamānasāḥ || 56 |
saṃmantrya mātrā sārdhamiti śeṣaḥ || 5 9 ||

mātṛśāpavimokṣāya yadi dāsyati naḥ sudhām |
tadā samīhitaṃ te'stu na dāsyatyatha dāsyasi || 60 |
ityoṅkṛtya samāpṛcchya kadraṃ drutagatiḥ khagī |
garutmantaṃ samācaṣṭa dṛṣṭvā saṃhṛṣṭamānasam || 61 ||
nāgāntakastataḥ prāha mātaraṃ cintayāturām |
ānītaṃ viddhi pīyūṣaṃ mātarme dehi bhojanam || 62 ||
vinatā prāha taṃ putraṃ samprahṛṣṭatanūruhā |
bho suparṇārṇavaṃ tūrṇaṃ yāhi maṅgalamastu te || 63 |
santi tatrāpi bahuśo niṣādā matsyaghātinaḥ |
velātaṭanivāsāśca tānbhakṣaya durātmanaḥ || 64 |
mātṛśāpavimokṣāya tākṣyaṃsya bhakṣyā'bhavateti mātrā kadravā dattasya śāpasya

paraprāṇainijaprāṇān ye puṣṇantīha dudhiyaḥ |
śāsanīyāḥ prayatnena śreyastacchāsanaṃ param ||| 65 |
bahuhiṃsākṛtāṃ hiṃsā bhavetsvargasya sādhanam |
vihisiteṣu duṣṭeṣu rakṣyante bhūriśo yataḥ || 66 ||
niṣādeṣvapi cedvipraḥ kaścidbhavati putraka |
sa rakṣaṇīyo yatnena bhakṣaṇīyo na karhicit || 67 ||
garuḍa uvāca -
matsyādināṃ vasanmadhye kathaṃ jñeyo dvijo mayā |
abhakṣyo yastvayā proktastaccihna kiñcanāttha me || 68 |
vinatovāca-
yajñasūtraṃ gale yasya sottarīyaṃ sunirmalam |
nityadhautāni vāsāṃsi bhālaṃ tilakalāñchitam || 66 ||
śāsanīyāḥ māraṇīyāḥ || 65 ||
matsyādināṃ matsyabhakṣakāṇām | matsyāśināmiti kvacit | ātya kathaya |

sapavitrau karau yasya yannīvī kuśargābhaṇī |
yanmauliḥ saśikhāgranthiḥ sa jñeyo brāhmaṇastvayā || 70 ||
uccaredṛgyajuḥsāmnāmṛcamekāmapīha yaḥ |
gāyatrīmātramantro'pi sa vijñeyo dvijastvayā || 71 |
garuḍa uvāca -
madhye sadā niṣādānāṃ yo vasejjanani dvijaḥ |
tasyaiteṣvekamapyeva na manye lakṣmabodhakam || 72 |
lakṣmāntaraṃ samācakṣva dvijabodhakaraṃ prasūḥ |
yena vijñāya taṃ vipraṃ tyajeyamapi kaṇṭhagam || 73 |
tacchrutvā vinatā prāha yaste kaṇṭhagato'ṅgana |
khadirāṅgāravaddahyāttamapākuru dūrataḥ || 74 ||
nīvī paridhānavastram || 70 ||
lakṣma cihnam || 72 |
prasūḥ he mātaḥ || 73 ||
khavirāṅgāravat khadirakāṣṭhasya jvaladaṅgāravadityarthaḥ || 74 ||

dvijamātre'pi yā hiṃsā sā hiṃsā kuśalāya na |
deśaṃ vaṃśaṃ śriyaṃ svaṃ ca nirmūlayati kālataḥ || 75 ||
niśamya kāśyapiriti prasūpādau praṇamya ca |
gṛhītāśoryayau śīghraṃ khamārgeṇa khageśvara || 76 ||
dūrādālokayāñcake niṣādānmatsyajīvinaḥ |
pakṣau vidhūya pakṣīndro rajasāpūrya rodasī || 77 ||
andhīkṛtya diśo bhāgānabdhirodhasyupāviśat |
vyādāya vadanaṃ ghoraṃ mahākandarasannibham || 78 ||
kāndiśīkā niṣādāstu viviśustatra ca svayam |
manvāneṣvatha panthānaṃ teṣu kaṇṭhaṃ viśatsvapi || 76 ||
jajvāleṅgalasaṃsparśo dvijastatkaṇṭhakandalīm
prāk praviṣṭānayo tārkṣyo niṣādānaudarindarīm || 80 ||
dvijamātre'pi brāhmaṇamātre yā hiṃsā hiṃsāmātraṃ prāṇanāśo vā , sā kuśalāya
hitāya na ; kintu deśamiti | evaṃ dhanam | kālataḥ kālakrameṇa || 71 |

praveśya kaṇṭhatālusthaṃ taṃ vijñāya dvijaṃ sphuṭam |
bhayādudgirattūrṇaṃ mātṛvākyaniyantritaḥ || 81 ||
tamudgīṇaṃ naraṃ dṛṣṭvā pakṣirāṭ samabhāṣata |
kastvaṃ jātyāsi nigada mama kaṇṭhavidāhakṛt || 82 ||
sa tadāheti vipro'haṃ pṛṣṭaḥ san garuḍā'grataḥ |
vasāmyeṣu niṣādeṣu jātimātropajīvakaḥ || 83 ||
taṃ preṣya garuḍo dūraṃ bhakṣayitvā'tha bhūriśaḥ |
nabho vikṣobhayāñcakre pralayā'nilasannibhaḥ ' || 84 ||
taṃ dṛṣṭvā tigmatejaskaṃ jvālātatadigantaram |
jvaladdāvānalaṃ śailamiva bibhyudivaukasaḥ || 85 |
te saṃnahyanta yuddhāya sajjo kṛtavalāyudhāḥ |
adhyāsya vāhanānyāśu sarve varmabhṛtaḥ surāḥ || 86 |
udgirat udgīrṇavān mukhānniṣkāśitavānityarthaḥ || 81 |
nigada kathaya || 82 |
preṣya prasthāpayitvā || 84 ||
bibhyuḥ bhayaṃ prāpuḥ || 85 |
varmabhṛtaḥ kavacadhāriṇaḥ || 86 |

tiryaggatī ravirnā'yaṃ nā'yamagniḥ sadhūmavān |

śastrāstrodyatapāṇīṃstān surānādhūya surānādhūya sarvaśaḥ |
dadarśa kartarīyantramamṛtopari saṃsthitam || 9 2 |
manaḥ pavanavegena bhramamāṇaṃ mahārayam |
api spṛśantaṃ maśakaṃ yatkhaṇḍayati koṭiśaḥ || 9 3 |
upopaviśya pakṣīndrastasya yantrasya nirbhayaḥ |
kṣaṇaṃ vicārayāmāsa kimatra karavāṇyaho || 9 4 |
spraṣṭuṃ na labhyate caitad vātyā na prabhavediha |
ka upāyo'tra kartavyo vṛthā jāto mamodyamaḥ || 9 5 |
na balaṃ prabhavedatra na kiñcidapi pauruṣam |
aho prayatno devānāmetatpīyūṣarakṣaṇe || 9 6 ||
ādhūya utsāyaṃ dūrīkṛtyeti yāvat | kartarīyantraṃ kartanaśīlaṃ yantram | kartanaṃ
kartastaṃ rātuṃ śīlaṃ yasyeti vyutpatteḥ | yakārāgamābhāvo daighyaṃ cārṣam | yadvā kartaḥ
kartanaṃ chedanaṃ kartasya chedanasya rādānaṃ vidyate yasmin | vrīhyādibhyaścetyanakārāntādiniḥ |

yadi me śaṅkare bhaktinirdvandvātīvaniścalā |
tadā sa devadevo māṃ viyunaktu mahādhiyā || 9 7 |
yadyahaṃ mātṛbhakto'smi svāminaḥ śaṅkarādapi | |
tadā me buddhiratrā'stu pīyūṣaharaṇakṣamā | || 9 8 | |
ātmārthaṃ nodyamaśvā'yaṃ hṛtstho vettīti viśvagaḥ |
māturdāsyavimokṣāya yate'hamabhūtaṃ prati || 99 |
jaritau pitarau yasya bālāpatyaśca yaḥ pumān |
sādhvī bhāryā ca tatpuṣṭyaṃ doṣo'kṛtye'pi tasya na || 100 ||
iti cintayatastasya buddhirāsīnmahātmanaḥ || 101 |
behaṃ cakāra so'tyantamaṇīyāṃsamaṇorapi |
paramāṇusahasrāṃśaṃ kṛtvā rūpaṃ mahādbhutam || 102 |
praviśya kartarīyantramadhodehasya lāghavāt |
bibhyat tadyantrato dehaṃ vañcayan vāyukhaṇḍanāt || 103 ||
dehaṃ ceti ślokadvayaṃ vākyam | pūrvārdhameva vivṛṇoti | paramāṇvityardhena || 102 |
dehasya lāghavāllaghutvātkartarīyantramadhaḥ praviśya | kiṃ kurvan ? tadyantratastasmā-

mūlamutpāṭya tarasā gṛhītvā'mṛtabhājanam |
niryayau pāvane mārge krośatsu svargasadmasu || 104 ||
tathā vaikuṇṭhanāthaṃ te gatvā procuḥ sudhābhujaḥ |
nirjitya nīyate cakrin sudhā no jīvitaṃ param || 105 ||
ityākarṇya haristebhyo'bhayaṃ datvā tvarāyutaḥ |
kṛtvā yuddhaṃ ca sumahad viśārkagha ṭikādvayam || 106 |
śumbhadevyoryathā sūta garuḍastatra cādhikaḥ |
tadā prasanno bhagavān mahāyuddhena sarvadaḥ || 107 |
garavā garuḍamāhedaṃ prasanno'smi khageśvara |
varaṃ vṛṇīhi bhadraṃ te jitavṛndāravṛndaka ||| 108 |
mūlamutpāṭaya yasmistadamṛtabhājanaṃ sthāpitaṃ tadutpāṭayāmṛtabhājanaṃ gṛhītvā
svargasadmasu deveṣu krośatsu satsu amṛtaṃ haratītyārtasvaraṃ kurvāṇeṣu satsu supāvane mārge
āvahanavahāvivāyumārge niyaṃyāviti || 104 ||
viśārkaghaṭikādvayaṃ viśo viśatiḥ arko dvādaśaviśārkau ca tā ghaṭikāśca
tāsāṃ dvayaṃ catuḥṣaṣṭidaṇḍāḥ | daṇḍacatuṣṭayādhikāhorātramityarthaḥ || 106 |
tatra viṣṇugaruḍayormadhye || 107 ||

hasitvā garuḍaḥ prāha viśvarūpaṃ janārdanam |
ahameva prasanno'smi tvaṃ prārthaya varadvayam || 106 ||
tataḥ kaiṭabhajit prāha vainateyaṃ mudānvitaḥ |
vṛtaṃ vṛtaṃ mahodāra dehi dehi varadvayam || 110 ||
iti viṣṇūditaṃ śrutvā prahasannāha pakṣirāṭ |
kiṃ vilambena tad brūhi dattaṃ dattaṃ varadvayam || 111 ||
alabdhalābhe saṃjāte dyūtādivijayodaye |
dātavyaṃ sudhiyā pātre sadā lābhajayau kva vā || 112 ||
śrīviṣṇuruvāca-
balavānasi pakṣīndra tanme vāhanatāṃ vraja |
eko varo'yaṃ varada dvitīyaṃ śṛṇu kāśyapa || 113 ||
vṛtaṃ vṛtamiti harṣe dviruktiḥ || 110 ||
dattaṃ dattamityautsukye || 111 |
autsukyena ripave varadvayadāne svayameva hetumāha | alabdhalābha iti ||| 112 |

darśayitvā'mṛtaṃ prājña mātṛdāsyavimokṣakam |
dvijihvebhyaḥ kuru tathā drāgaśnanti na te yathā || 114 ||
deyā sudhā sudhābhugbhyo dvitīyo'stu varo mama |
tatheti sa . pratijñāya niryayau pakṣirār̤a divaḥ || 115 |
sa mātaraṃ vinirmocya dāsyātkāśyapanandanaḥ |
nāgānāṃ purato dhṛtvā mahāmṛtakamaṇḍalum || 116 |
amṛtaṃ pātukāmāṃstānityācaṣṭa mahāmatiḥ |
nāgāḥ śucitvamāsādya bhoktavyaiṣā sudhā śubhā || 117 ||
no cedaśucibhiḥ spṛṣṭā snānādiparivarjitaiḥ |
yāsyatyadṛśyatāmeṣā sudhā'nimiṣarakṣitā || 118 |
sāmānyamapi yadbhakṣyaṃ spṛśyate'śucibhiḥ kvacit |
haranti tadrasaṃ devāstacca tiṣṭhati nīrasam || 11 9 | |
dvijihvebhya iti bhāvasvarūpaṃ jānatā bhagavatoktam | drāk jhaṭiti -prajñā- || 114 sandhāna
divaḥ svargāt pu 0 tithī saṃ ko
|| 115 || 0 .....
bhāratī

ityuktvā sahito mātrā vainateyo viniryayau |
kuśāsane ca tairukto dhṛtvā pīyūṣabhājanam || 120 |
yāvatsnātuṃ gatāḥ sarpāstāvatpīyūṣabhājanam |
ādāya viṣṇunā dattaṃ devebhya iva jovitam || 121 ||
āgatya bhujagāḥ snātvā na dṛṣṭvā'mṛtabhājanam |
aho pratāritā notamamṛtaṃ ceti cukra śuḥ ||| 122 |
tataḥ paryalihan darbhān pīyūṣasparśakāṅkṣiṇaḥ |
āstāṃ tāvatsudhā dūraṃ jihvāsteṣāṃ dvidhā'bhavan || 123 ||
anye'pyanyāyalabdhāthaṃ ye bubhukṣanti kevalam |
tanno pariṇati gacched bhoktuṃ vā tairna labhyate || 124 ||
nyāyādhvasthena tāryeṇa sudhā prāptā'tidurlabhā |
labdhāpyanyāyato nāgairdṛṣṭamātrākṣaṇādgatā || 125 |
ivaśabdo bhinnakrame devebhyo'rthātteṣāṃ jīvitamiti veti || 121 ||
uktanyāyamanyatrāpyatidiśati | anye iti | bubhukṣanti bhoktumicchanti |
anyāya labdhānnamiti vā pāṭha | | pariṇati paripākam || 124 |

atha dāsyādvinirmuktā vinatovāca khecaram |
putra kāśīṃ prayāsyāmi dāsyapāpāpanuttaye || 126 ||
tāvatpāpāni jṛmbhante nānājanmārjitānyapi |
yāvatkāśī na hṛtsaṃsthā punarbhavavighātinī || 127 ||
kāśīsmaraṇamātreṇa kiṃ citraṃ yadaghaṃ vrajet |
garbhavāso'pi naśyeta viśveśānugrahātparāt || 128 ||
yatra viśveśvaraḥ sākṣāttārāpativibhūṣaṇaḥ |
tārayettāraka droṇyā dustarād bhavasāgarāt || 126 |
viśveśānugṛhītānāṃ vicchinnākhilakarmaṇām |
bhavetkāśa prati matirnetareṣāṃ kadācana || 130 |
kāśa prati mano yeṣāṃ niḥśeṣakṣālitainasām |
ta eva mānavā loke satyaṃ nṛpaśavo pare || 131 ||
evamupodghātamāracayya prastutaṃ vaktumāha | athetyata ārabhya ubhāvapītyataḥ
prāktanena granthena || 126 |
tārāpativibhūṣaṇaḥ candralāñchanaḥ | tārakadroṇyā tārakaḥ praṇavaḥ ṣaḍakṣara-
rāmamantrarājo vā sa eva droṇī naukāviśeṣastayetyarthaḥ | droṇī kāṣṭhā'mbuvāhinītyamaraḥ

taireva kālo vijitasta eva hi gatainasaḥ |
apunargarbhavāsāste prāptā vārāṇasīha yaiḥ || 132 ||
śreyasāṃ bhājanaṃ caitannajanma na sudhā nayet |
devānāmapi duṣprāpyaṃ kāśīsandarśanāvṛte || 133 |
kaḥ kaliḥ ko'thavā kālaḥ kiṃ vā karmāṇyanekadhā |
parānandapradaṃ kṣetramavimuktaṃ yadīkṣitam || 134 ||
te garbhavāse tiṣṭhanti punaste garbhavāsinaḥ |
ye na garbhavanacchetrīṃ sevante varaṇāmasim || || 135 | |
niśamyeti vacaḥ prāha tārkṣyo nasvā'tha mātaram |
ahamapyāgamiṣyāmi kāśīṃ draṣṭuṃ śivācitām || 136 ||
māturājñāmatha prāpya jananyā saha pakṣirāṭ |

ubhāvapi ca tepāte tapa ugraṃ mahāmatī |
saṃsthāpya śāmbhavaṃ liṅgaṃ patattrīṃdro'calendriyaḥ || 138 ||
nāmnā khakholkamādityaṃ saṃsthāpya vinatā śubham |
acireṇaiva kālena mahatastapasastayoḥ || 136 ||
kāśyāṃ prasannau saṃjātau devau śaṅkarabhāskarau |
garuḍasthāpitālliṅgādāvirāsīdumāpatiḥ || 140 ||
garuḍāya varān prādāt subahūnatidurlabhān |
khagendra mama bhakto'si tava jñānaṃ bhaviṣyati || 141 |
vetsyasi tvaṃ rahasyaṃ me yanna jñātaṃ surairapi |
tvayaitatsthāpitaṃ liṅga garuḍeśvarasaṃjñitam || 142 |
paramajñānadaṃ puṃsāṃ dṛṣṭaṃ spṛṣṭaṃ samacitam |
anyacca śṛṇu pakṣīndra hitaṃ te vacmi sāmpratam || 143 |
asāvahaṃ sa vai viṣṇurmāstu te bhedadṛk ca nau |
evaṃ tasyaiva pakṣīndra daityendrabalahāriṇaḥ || 144 |

prāpya satyatratāṃ patristvamapyacyoṃ 68 9
iti datvā varaṃ śambhuḥ bhaviṣyasi |
tatraivā'ntarhito svabhaktāya garutmate || 145
jāto garuḍo'pi hari |
hare rathatvaṃ samprāpya so'pi yayau |
tapasyantīmathālokya pūjyo'bhavadbhuvi || 146 ||
śivasyaiva kadācidvinatāṃ
parāmūrtiḥ khakholko nāma prabhuḥ |
datvā varaṃ ca pāpaghnaṃ bhāskaraḥ || 147 ||
kāśīvāsijanāneka śivajñānasamanvitam |
vinatāditya ityākhyaḥ bhavapāpakṣayaṅkaraḥ || 148 ||
khakholkastatra saṃsthitaḥ |
itthaṃ khakholka ādityaḥ kāśīvighnatamoharaḥ
tasya darśanamātreṇa || 14 9 ||
sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate |
kāśyāṃ paiśaṃgile tīrthe khakholkasya vilokanāt
naraścintitamāpnoti |
nīrogo jāyate kṣaṇāt || 150 ||
patati gacchatīti patraṃ yānam | satpatratāṃ sadvāhanatāmityarthaḥ || 145 |
paiśaṃgile pilipilātīrthe || 150 ||
|| iti śrīmatparamahaṃsaparivrājakācārya bhagavatpūjyapādaśiṣya śrīrāmendravanaśiṣyeṇa
rāmānandena kṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍapūrvāghaṃṭokāyāṃ pañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ samāptaḥ ||50 ||

naraḥ śrutvaitadākhyānaṃ khakholkādityasambhavam | |
garuḍeśena sahitaṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 151 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe khakholkā dityagaruḍeśayorvarṇanaṃ
nāma pañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 50 ||

saṃskṛta- taḥ viśvavidyālayaḥ
śrutam gopāya
