skanda uvāca - prāptā vinatā sā tapasvinī |
haṃjikātvaṃ yathā
tadapyahaṃ samākhyāmi niśāmaya mahāmate || 3 |
kadrūrazījanatputrān śataṃ kaśyapataḥ purā |
ulūkamaruṇaṃ tārkṣyamasūta vinatā trayam || 4 ||
kauśiko rājyamāpyā'pi śreṣṭhatvātpakṣiṇāṃ mune |
nirguṇatvācca taiḥ sarvaiḥ sa rājyādavaropitaḥ || 5 ||
krūrākṣo'yaṃ divāndho'yaṃ sadā vakranakhastvasau |
atīvodvegajanakaṃ sarveṣāmasya bhāṣaṇam || 6 |
putraśāpāddāsītvaṃ prāptavatīti vaktuṃ taduktamanūdya tadākhyānaṃ pratijānīte |

itthaṃ tasya guṇagrāmān vikathya bahuśaḥ khagāḥ |
nādyā'pi vṛṇvate rājye kamapi svairacāriṇaḥ ||7 |
kauśike'tha tathā vṛtte putravīkṣaṇalālasā |
aṇḍaṃ prasphoṭayāmāsa madhyamaṃ vinatā tadā || 8 |
pūrṇe varṣasahasre tu prasphoṭayaṃ ghaṭasambhava |
tadabhedi tayautsukyādaṇḍamaṣṭamake śate || 9 |
tāvatsarvāṇi gātrāṇi tasyā'timahasaḥ śiśoḥ |
ūrvorupari siddhāni tadaṇḍāntarnivāsinaḥ || 10 ||
aṇḍānnirgatamātreṇa krodhāruṇamukhaśriyā |
ardhaniṣpannadehena śiśunā'śāpitā prasūḥ || 11 |
janayitri tvayā dṛṣṭvā kādraveyān svalīlayā |
khelato māturutsaṅge yadaṇḍaṃ vyādhi tadvidhā || 12 ||

teṣāmevaidhi dāsī tvaṃ sapatnyaṅgabhuvāmiha || 13 ||
vepamānā'tha tacchāpādidaṃ provāca pakṣiṇī |
anūro brūhi me śāpā'vasānaṃ māturaṅgaja || 14 ||
anūruruvāca- tṛtīyaṃ mā bhindhi hyaniṣpannaṃ mameva hi |
aṇḍaṃ
asminnaṇḍe bhaviṣyo yaḥ sa te dāsyaṃ hariṣyati || 15 |
ityuktvā so'ruṇo'gacchaduḍḍīyā''nandakānanam |
yatra viśveśvaro dadyādapi paṅgoḥ śubhāṃ gatim || 16 ||
etatte pṛcchataḥ khyātaṃ vinatādāsyakāraṇam |
mune prasaṅgato vacmi aruṇādityasambhavam || 17 ||

vārāṇasyāṃ tapastaptvā tenā'rādhi divākaraḥ || 18 |
so'pi prasanno datvā'tha varāṃstasmā anūrave |
ādityastasya nāmnā'bhūdaruṇāditya ityapi || 1 9 || ||
arka uvāca-
tiṣṭhānūro mama rathe sadaiva vinatātmaja |
jagatāṃ ca hitārthāya dhvāntaṃ vidhvaṃsayan puraḥ || 20 ||
atra tvatsthāpitāṃ mūrti ye bhajiṣyanti mānavāḥ |
vārāṇasyāṃ mahādevottare teṣāṃ kuto bhayam || 21 ||
ye'rcayiṣyanti satatamaruṇādityasaṃjñakam |
māmatra teṣāṃ no duḥkhaṃ na dāridryaṃ na pātakam || 22 ||
vyādhibhirnā'bhibhūyante nopasargeśca kaiścana
śokāgninā na dahyante hyaruṇādityasevanāt || 23 ||
anūruraruṇa iti nāmadvayaṃ nirvakti | anūrutvāditi | yaḥ anūrutvājjānvorupari-

adyā'pi sa rathe saure prātareva samudyati || 24 ||
yaḥ kuryātprātarutthāya namaskāraṃ dine dine |
aruṇāya sasūryāya tasya duḥkhabhayaṃ kutaḥ || 25 ||
aruṇādityamāhātmyaṃ yaḥ śroṣyati narottamaḥ |
na tasya duṣkṛtaṃ kiñcid bhaviṣyati kadācana || 26 ||
skanda uvāca -
vṛddhādityasya māhātmyaṃ śṛṇu te kathayāmyaham |
yasya śravaṇamātreṇa naro no duṣkṛtaṃ bhajet || 27 ||
purā'tra vṛddhahārīto vārāṇasyāṃ mahātapāḥ
mahātapaḥsamṛddhyarthaṃ samārādhitavān ravim || 28 ||
mūrti saṃsthāpya śubhadāṃ bhāsvataḥ śubhalakṣaṇām |
dakṣiṇena viśālākṣyā dṛḍhabhaktisamanvitaḥ || 2 9 ||
aruṇāya sasūryāya sūryasahitāya | aruṇodayasūryāyeti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 25 |
vṛddhaścāsau nāmnā gotrato vā hārītaśca vṛddhahārītaḥ || 28 ||

alaṃ vilambya yācasva kaste deyo varo mayā || 30 |
so'tha prasannād dyumaṇeravṛṇīta varaṃ muniḥ |
yadi prasanno bhagavān yuvatvaṃ dehi me punaḥ || 31 ||
tapaḥkaraṇasāmarthyaṃ sthavirasya na me yataḥ |
punastāruṇyamāpto'haṃ cariṣyāmyuttamaṃ tapaḥ || 32 ||
tapa eva paro dharmastapa eva paraṃ vasu |
tapa eva paraḥ kāmo nirvāṇaṃ tapa eva hi || 33 ||
ṛte na tapasaḥ kvāpi labhyā aiśvaryasampadaḥ |
padaṃ dhruvādibhiḥ prāpi kevalaṃ tapaso balāt || 34 ||
tatastapaścariṣyāmi lokadvayamahattvadam |
prāpya tvadvaradānena yauvanaṃ sarvasammatam || 35 ||
bradhnaḥ sūryaḥ || 30 ||

jarāturendriyagrāme striyo'pi na yataḥ svasāt || 36 ||
varaṃ maraṇamevā'stu mā jarāstvatiśocyakṛt |
kṣaṇaṃ duḥkhaṃ ca maraṇaṃ jarāduḥkhaṃ kṣaṇe kṣaṇe || 37 ||
kāṅkṣanti dīrghatapase ciramāyurjitendriyāḥ |
dhanaṃ dānāya putrāya kalatraṃ muktaye dhiyam || 38 ||
vṛddhasya vārdhakaṃ bradhnastatkṣaṇādapahṛtya vai
dadau ca cārutāhetuṃ tāruṇyaṃ puṇyasādhanam || 3 9 ||
evaṃ sa vṛddhahārīto vārāṇasyāṃ mahāmuniḥ |
samprāpya yauvanaṃ bradhnāttapa ugraṃ cacāra ha || 40 ||
vṛddhenā''rādhito yasmāddhārītena tapasvinā |
ādityo vārdhakaharo vṛddhādityastataḥ smṛtaḥ || 41 ||
jarayā ātura indriyagrāmo yasya tasmin | jarāturendriyagrāmāniti kvacit |
dhiyaṃ jñānam || 38 |

vṛddhādityaṃ samārādhya vārāṇasyāṃ ghaṭodbhava |
jarādurgatirogaghnaṃ bahavaḥ siddhimāgatāḥ || 42 ||
vṛddhādityaṃ namaskṛtya vārāṇasyāṃ ravau naraḥ |
labhedabhīpsitāṃ siddhiṃ na kvacidurgatiṃ labhet || 43 ||
skanda uvāca-
ataḥ paraṃ śṛṇu mune keśavādityamuttamam |
yathā tu keśavaṃ prāpya savitā jñānamāptavān || 44 ||
vyomni saṃcaramāṇena saptāśvenādikeśavaḥ |
ekadā'darśi bhāvena pūjayan liṅgamaiśvaram || 45 ||
kautukāddiva uttīrya hare hare ravirupāviśat |
niḥśabdo niścalaḥ svastho mahāścaryasamanvitaḥ || 46 ||
pratīkṣamāṇo'vasaraṃ kiñcitpraṣṭumanā harim |
hariṃ visarjitā'rcañca praṇanāma kṛtāñjaliḥ || 47 ||
upāviśadupa samīpe viveśa | kimarthamāviśadityākāṅkṣāyāmāha - niḥśabda iti |
svastho nirudvignaḥ || 46 |
avasaramavakāśam || 47 |

svābhyāśa āsayāmāsa bhāsvantaṃ natakandharam || 48 |
athā'vasaramālokya lokacakṣuradhokṣajam |
natvā vijñāpayāmāsa kṛtānujño'surāriṇā || 4 9 |
raviruvāca- jagatpate |
antarātmā'si jagatāṃ viśvambhara
tavā'pi pūjyaḥ ko'pyasti jagatpūjyā'tra mādhava || 50 ||
tvattaścāvirbhavedetattvayi sarvaṃ pralīyate
tvameva pātā sarvasya jagato jagatāṃ nidhe || 51 ||
ityāścaryaṃ samālokya prāpto'smyatra tavā'ntikam |
kimidaṃ pūjyate nātha bhavatā bhavatāpahṛt || 52 ||
iti śrutvā hṛṣīkeśaḥ sahasrāṃśorudīritam
uccairmā śaṃsa saptāśvaṃ vārayan karasaṃjñayā || 53 ||

devadevo mahādevo nīlakaṇṭha umāpatiḥ |
eka eva hi pūjyo'tra sarvakāraṇakāraṇam || 54 ||
atra trilocanādanyaṃ samarcayati yo'lpadhīḥ |
salocano'pi vijñeyo locanābhyāṃ vivarjitaḥ || 55
eko mṛtyuñjayaḥ pūjyo || ||
janmamṛtyujarāharaḥ |
mṛtyuñjayaṃ kilā'bhyarcya śveto mṛtyuñjayo'bhavat || 56 ||
kālakālaṃ samārādhya bhṛṅgīkālaṃ jigāya vai |
śailādimapi tatyāja mṛtyurmṛtyuñjayā'rcakam || 57 ||
vijigye tripuraṃ yastu helayaikeṣu mokṣaṇāt |

idameva paraṃ jñānaṃ sthāṇuliṅgaṃ yadarcyate || 65 ||
yairliṅgaṃ sakṛdapyatra pūjitaṃ pārvatīpateḥ |
kuto duḥkhabhayaṃ teṣāṃ saṃsāre duḥkhabhājane || 66 ||
sarvaṃ parityajya rave yo liṅgaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ |
na taṃ pāpāni bādhante mahāntyapi divākara || 67 ||
liṅgārcane bhaved buddhisteṣāmevā'tra bhāskara
yeṣāṃ punarbhavacchedaṃ cikīrṣati maheśvaraḥ || 68 |
na liṅgārādhanātpuṇyaṃ triṣu lokeṣu cāparam |
sarvatīrthābhiṣekaḥ syālliṅgasnānāmbusevanāt || 6 9 ||
tasmāṃlliṅgaṃ tvamapyarka samarcaya maheśituḥ |
saṃprāptuṃ paramāṃ lakṣmīṃ mahātejobhijṛmbhaṇīm || 70 ||
iti śrutvā harervākyaṃ tadārabhya sahasraguḥ |
vidhāya sphāṭikaṃ liṅga mune'dyā'pi samarcayet || 71 ||
maheśituḥ maheśvarasya || 70 ||
uttareṇa uttarasyām || 72 ||

tatropatiṣṭhate'dyā'pi uttareṇādikeśavāt || 72 ||
ataḥ sa keśavādityaḥ kāśyāṃ bhaktatamonudaḥ
samarcitaḥ sadā deyānmanaso vāñchitaṃ phalam || 73 ||
keśavādityamārādhya vārāṇasyāṃ narottamaḥ |
paramaṃ jñānamāpnoti yena nirvāṇabhāg bhavet || 74 ||
tatra pādodake tīrthe kṛtasarvodakakriyaḥ |
vilokya keśavādityaṃ mucyate janmapātakaiḥ || 75 ||
agaste rathasaptamyāṃ ravivāro yadāpyate |
tadā pādodake tīrthe tīrthe ādikeśavasannidhau || 76 ||
snātvoṣasi naro maunī keśavādityapūjanāt
saptajanmārjitātpāpānmukto bhavati tatkṣaṇāt || 77 ||
pādodake gaṅgāvaruṇayoḥ saṃbhede || 75 |
rathasaptamī acalāsaptamī || 76 ||

tanme rogaṃ ca śokaṃ ca mākarī hantu saptamī || 78 ||
etajjanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ yacca janmāntarārjitam |
manovākkāyajaṃ yacca jñātā'jñāte ca ye punaḥ || 7 9 |
iti saptavidhaṃ pāpaṃ snānānye saptasaptike |
saptavyādhisamāyuktaṃ hara mākari saptami || 80 ||
etanmantratrayaṃ japtvā snātvā pādodake naraḥ |
keśavādityamālokya kṣaṇānniṣkaluṣo bhavet || 81 ||
keśavādityamāhātmyaṃ śṛṇvan śraddhāsamanvitaḥ |
naro na lipyate pāpaiḥ śivabhaktiṃ ca vindati || 82 ||
skanda uvāca -
ataḥ paraṃ śṛṇu mune vimalādityamuttamam |
harikeśavane ramye ramye vārāṇasyāṃ vārāṇasyāṃ vyavasthitam || 83 ||
tatra snānasya pūrvāṅgaṃ mantratrayamāha | yadyadityādi | janmasu kṛtaṃ janmakṛtaṃ
janmārabhya yatpāpaṃ kṛtamityarthaḥ | mākarī makarasambandhinī māghītyarthaḥ || 78 |
manovākkāyajādīni pāpāni bhaviṣyajjanmaviṣayāṇyapīti jñātavyāni || 7 9 |
saptasaptayo'śvāḥ yasyāḥ sā saptasaptikā saurīśaktirityarthaḥ , tasyāḥ sambodhanaṃ he
saptasaptike || 80 ||

sa prāktanātkarmayogādvimale pathyapi sthitaḥ || 84 ||
kuṣṭharogamavāpyoccaistyaktvā dārān gṛhaṃ vasu |
vārāṇasīṃ samāsādya bradhnamārādhayatsudhīḥ || 85 |
karavīrairjapābhiśca gandhakaiḥ kiṃśukaiḥ śubhaiḥ | |
raktotpalairaśokaiśca sa samānarca bhāskaram || 86 |
vicitraracanairmālyaiḥ pāṭalācampakodbhavaiḥ |
kuṅkamāgurukarpūramiśritaiḥ śoṇacandanaiḥ || 87 |
devamohanadhūpaiśca bahvāmodatatāmbaraiḥ |
karpūravartidīpaiśca naivedyairghṛtapāyasaiḥ || 88 |
arghadānaiśva vidhivat saureḥ stotra japairapi |
evaṃ samārādhayatastasyā'rko varado'bhavat || 8 9 ||
uccadeśe parvatadeśe tannāmnīti vā | bāhujaḥ kṣatriya : | bāhū rājanyaḥ kṛta iti
śruteḥ || 84 ||
gandhakaiḥ gandhayuktairiti sarveṣāṃ viśeṣaṇam | bandhūkairiti vā pāṭhaḥ || 86 |
śoṇacandanaiḥ raktacandanaiḥ || 87 |
bahvāmodatatāmbaraiḥ bahulagandhānekavastraiḥ | bahunā āmodena tataṃ vyāptamambara-
mākāśaṃ yaistaidervamohanadhūpairiti vā | bahubhirdevatāparairiti kvacitpāṭhaḥ | tadā
devataikoddeśena sampāditairityarthaḥ | ghṛtapāyasairdhṛtāloḍitaparamānnaiḥ | ghṛtasādhitairiti
kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 88 |

kuṣṭhaśca te prayātveṣa prārthayā'nyaṃ varaṃ punaḥ || 9 0 ||
ākarṇya vimalaścetthamālāpaṃ raśmimālinaḥ
praṇato daṇḍavadbhūmau saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ || 9 1 |
śanairvijñāpayāñcakre ekacakrarathaṃ ravim |
jagaccakṣurameyātman mahādhvāntavidhūnana ||9 2 ||
yadi prasanno bhagavan yadi deyo varo mama |
tadā tvadbhaktiniṣṭhā ye kuṣṭhaṃ mā'stu tadanvaye || 9 3 ||
anye'pi rogā mā santu mā'stu teṣāṃ daridratā |
mā'stu kaścana santāpastvadbhaktānāṃ sahasrago || 9 4 |
śrīsūrya uvāca-
tathā'stviti mahāprājña śṛṇvanyaṃ varamuttamam |
tvayeyaṃ pūjitā mūrti rave kāśyāṃ mahāmate || 9 5 ||
asyāḥ sānnidhyamatrā'haṃ na tyakṣyāmi kadācana |
prathitā tava nāmnā ca pratimaiṣā bhaviṣyati || 9 6 |

sarvavyādhinihantrī ca sarvapāpakṣayaṅkarī || 9 7 |
iti datvā varān sūryaḥ tatraivāntaradhīyata |
vimalo nirmalatanuḥ so'pi svabhavanaṃ yayau || 9 8 ||
itthaṃ sa vimalādityo vārāṇasyāṃ śubhapradaḥ |
tasya darśanamātreṇa kuṣṭharogaḥ kuṣṭharogaḥ praṇaśyati || 99 |
yaścaitāṃ vimalādityakathāṃ vai śṛṇuyānnaraḥ
prāpnoti nirmalāṃ śuddhiṃ tyajyate ca manomalaiḥ || 100 |
skanda uvāca- gaṅgādityo'sti tatrā'nyo viśveśāddakṣiṇena vai
tasya darśanamātreṇa naraḥ śuddhimiyādiha || 101 |
yadā gaṅgā samāyātā bhagīrathapuraskṛtā |
tadā gaṅgāṃ pariṣṭotuṃ ravistatraiva saṃsthitaḥ || 102 ||

adyāpyaharniśaṃ gaṅgāṃ sammukhīkṛtya bhāskaraḥ
pariṣṭauti prasannātmā gaṃgābhaktavarapradaḥ || 103 ||
gaṅgādityaṃ samārādhya vārāṇasyāṃ narottamaḥ |
na jātu durgatiṃ kvāpi labhate na ca rogabhāk || 104 ||
skanda uvāca-
anyacchṛṇu mahābhāga yamādityasya saṃbhavam |
yacchrutvā'pi naro jāṃtu yamalokaṃ na paśyati || 105 ||
yameśātpaścime bhāge vīreśātpūrvato mune |
yamādityaṃ naro dṛṣṭvā yamalokaṃ na paśyati || 106 ||
yamatīrthe naraḥ snātvā bhūtāyāṃ bhaumavāsare |
yameśvaraṃ vilokyāśu sarvaiḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 107 |

yameśaṃ ca yamādityaṃ pratyaṣṭhād bhaktasiddhidam || 108 ||
yamena sthāpito yasmādādityastatra kumbhaja |
sa hi yamādityo yāmīṃ harati yātanām || 10 9 ||
ataḥ ca yamādityaṃ yamena sthāpitaṃ naman | |
yameśaṃ na paśyati || 110 |
yamatīrthe kṛtasnāno yamalokaṃ
yamatīrthe caturdaśyāṃ bharaṇyāṃ bhaumavāsare |
tarpaṇaṃ piṇḍadānaṃ ca kṛtvā pitranṛṇī bhavet || 111 ||
abhilaṣyanti satataṃ pitaro narakaukasaḥ |
bhaume bharaṇyāṃ bhūtāyāṃ yadi yogo'yamuttamam || 112 ||
kāśyāṃ kaścidyame tīrthe kṛtvā snānaṃ mahāmatiḥ
api yastarpaṇaṃ kuryāt satilaṃ no vimuktaye || 113 ||
pratyaṣṭhāt sthāpitavān || 108 || maṅgalavāsare bharaṇyāṃ
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 51 ||

kiṃ gayāgamanaiḥ puṃsāṃ kiṃ śrāddhairbhūridakṣiṇaiḥ |
yadi kāśyāṃ yame tīrthe yoge'smin śrāddhamāpyate || 114 ||
śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā yame tīrthe pūjayitvā yameśvaram |
yamādityaṃ namaskṛtya pitṝṇāmanṛṇo bhavet || 115 ||
skanda uvāca iti - te dvādaśādityāḥ
kathitāḥ pāpanāśanāḥ |
yatsambhavaṃ samākarṇya naro na nirayī bhavet || 116 || ||
anye'pi santi ghaṭaza ravibhaktairanekaśaḥ |
kāśyāṃ saṃsthāpitāḥ sūryā guhyakārkādayaḥ kila || 117 ||
śrutvā'dhyāyānimān puṇyān dvādaśādityasūcakān |
śrāvayitvā'pi no martyo durgatiṃ yāti kutracit || 118 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe aruṇavṛddhakeśavavimalagaṅgāyamādityavarṇanaṃ nāmaika-
pañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 51 ||

|| atha dvipañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca- gabhastimālini gate kāśīṃ trailokyamohinīm |
punaścintāmavāpoccairmandarastho mune haraḥ || 1 |
nādyāpyāyānti yoginyo nādyāpyāyāti tigmaguḥ |
pravṛttirapi me kāśyāścitramatyantadurlabhā || 2 |
kimatra citraṃ yatkāśī madīyamapi mānasam
niścalaṃ cañcalayati gaṇanā ketare sure || 3 ||
adhākṣiṣamahaṃ kāmaṃ trijagajjittvaraṃ dṛśā |
aho kāśyabhilāṣo'tra māmeva dunuyāttarām ||4 ||
dvipañcāśattame yānaṃ vidhermandaragotrataḥ |
kāśyāṃ daśāśvamedhasya māhātmyaṃ copavarṇyate || 1 ||
tigmāstīkṣṇā gāvo raśmayo yasya sa tigmaguḥ || 2 |
yoginyaḥ tigmaguścānandavanaṃ prāpya kāśīvṛttāntaṃ nivedayituṃ nāyātyetanna

kāśīpravṛttimanveṣṭuṃ kaṃ vā prahiṇuyāmitaḥ |
jñātuṃ ka eva nipuṇo yataḥ sa caturānanaḥ || 5 |
ityāhūya vidhātāraṃ bahumānapuraḥsaram |
tatropaveśya śrīkaṇṭhaḥ provāca caturānanam || 6 ||
yoginyaḥ preṣitāḥ pūrvaṃ preṣito'tha sahasraguḥ |
nā'dyāpi te nivartante kāśyāḥ kamalasambhava
sā samutsukayetkāśī lokeśa mama mānasam |
prākṛtasya janasyeva cañcalākṣīva kācana || 8 ||
mandare'tra ratirme na bhṛśaṃ sundarakandare |
anacchatucchapānīye nakrasyevā'lpapalvale || 9 ||

kāśīvirahajanmā'tra yathā māmatibādhate || 10 ||
śītaraśmiḥ śirastho'pi varṣan pīyūṣasīkaraiḥ |
kāśīviśleṣajaṃ tāpaṃ nāho gamayituṃ prabhuḥ || 11 ||
vidhe vidhehi me kāryamāryadhurya kāryamāryadhurya mahāmate |
yāhi kāśīmitastūrṇaṃ yatasva ca mamehite || 12 |
brahmaṃstvameva tadvetsi kāśītyajanakāraṇam |
mando'pi na tyajetkāśīṃ kimu yo vetti kiñcana || 13 ||
adyaiva kiṃ na gaccheyaṃ kāśīṃ brahman svamāyayā |
divodāsaṃ svadharmasthaṃ na tūllaṅghitumuktaye || 14 |
nā'bādhiṣṭa na bādhitavān || 10 ||
īhate ceṣṭite kārye iti yāvat || 12 ||

iti ceti ca vaktavyaṃ tvayyapārthamato'khilam || 15 ||
ariṣṭaṃ gaccha panthāste śubhodarko bhavatvalam
ādāyājñāṃ vidhirmūrdhina yayau vārāṇasīṃ mudā || 16 ||
sitahaṃsarathastūrṇaṃ prāpya vārāṇasīṃ purīm
kṛtakṛtyamivātmānamamanyata tadātmabhūḥ || 17 ||
haṃsayānaphalaṃ me'dya jātaṃ kāśīsamāgame
kāśīprāptau yataḥ proktā antarāyāḥ pade pade || 18 ||
dṛśidhāturabhūdadya maddṛśau prāpya sānvayaḥ
spaṣṭaṃ dṛṣṭipathaṃ prāptā yadeṣā''nandavāṭikā || 1 9 ||

yatrānandamayā vṛkṣā yatrānandamayā janāḥ || 20 |
nirviśanti sadā kāśyāṃ phalānyānandavantyapi |
sadaivānandabhūḥ kāśī kāśī sadaivānandadaḥ sadaivānandadaḥ śivaḥ || 21 ||
ānandarūpā jāyante tena kāśyāṃ hi jantavaḥ I
caraṇau carituṃ vittastāveva kṛtināmiha || 22 |
caraṇau vicaretāṃ yau viśvabhartṛpurī bhuvi |
tāveva śravaṇau śrotuṃ saṃvidāte bahuśrutau ||23 ||
iha śrutimatāṃ puṃsāṃ yābhyāṃ kāśī śrutā sakṛt
tadeva manute sarva manastviha manasvinām || 24 ||
yenānumanyate caiṣā kāśī sarvapramāṇabhūḥ |
buddhirbudhyati sā sarvamiha buddhimatāṃ satām satām || 25 ||
ānandavāṭikāṃ viśinaṣṭi svayamiti | svābhiḥ svakīyābhiḥ | tābhiriti pāṭhe
prasiddhābhirityarthaḥ || 20 ||
sthitānyapi phalāni kāśyāṃ nirviśanti santi ānandavanti bhavantīti |
kāśīsthitānāṃ vṛkṣāṇāmānandamayatvaṃ kiṃ vaktavyamiti bhāvaḥ | yatrānandamayā janā

varaṃ tṛṇāni dhānyāni tāni vātyā hatānyapi
kāśyāṃ yānyāpatantīha na janāḥ kāśyadarśanāḥ || 26 ||
adya me saphalaṃ cāyuḥ parārdhadvayasaṃmitam |
yasmin sati mayā'prāpi duṣprāpā kāśikāpurī || 27 ||
aho me dharmasampattiraho me bhāgyagauravam |
yadadrākṣiṣamadyāhaṃ kāśīṃ suciracintitām || 28 ||
adya me svatovṛkṣo manorathaphalairalam
śivabhaktyambunā siktaḥ phalito'tibṛhattaraiḥ || 2 9 ||
mayā vyadhāyi bahudhā sṛṣṭiḥ sṛṣṭiṃ vitanvatā "
paramanyādṛśī kāśī svayaṃ viśveśanirmitiḥ || 30 ||
iti hṛṣṭamanā vedhā dṛṣṭvā vārāṇasīṃ purīm |
vṛddhabrāhmaṇarūpeṇa rājānaṃ ca dadarśa ha ha || 31 ||
vātyā hatāni vātacakreṇāndolitāni | kāśīṃ na paśyanti , kāśyā na darśanaṃ
yeṣāmiti vā kāśyadarśanāḥ || 26 |
bṛhattaraiḥ phalairityanvayaḥ || 2 9 ||

jalārdrākṣatapāṇiśca svastyuktva pṛthivībhuje
kṛtapraṇāmo rājñā'tha bheje taddattamāsanam || 32 ||
kṛtamāno nṛpatinā so'bhyutthānāsanādibhiḥ |
vipro vyajijñapad bhūpaṃ pṛṣṭāgamanakāraṇam || 33 |
brāhmaṇa uvāca- bahukālīno'smyahamatra cirantanaḥ
bhūpāla hi ripuñjayam || 34 ||
tvaṃ tu māṃ naiva jānāsi jāne tvāṃ
paraḥśatā mayā dṛṣṭā rājāno bhūridakṣiṇā :
vijitānekasaṃgrāmā yāyajūkā jitendriyāḥ || 35 ||
viniṣkṛtāriṣaḍvargāḥ suśīlāḥ sattvaśālinaḥ
pāradṛśvāno rājanītivicakṣaṇāḥ || 36 ||
śrutasya satyavrataparāyaṇāḥ
dayādākṣiṇyanipuṇāḥ
kṣamayā kṣamayā tulyā gāmbhīryajitasāgarāḥ || 37 ||
śatebhyaḥ pare paraḥśatā asaṃkhyātā rājāno mayā dṛṣṭāḥ paraṃ kevalaṃ teṣveṣu rājasu
madhye tava sadguṇā dvitrāḥ pavitrā ye te prāyaśo mama dṛśaṃ na gatā iti pañca-

ityādiguṇasampannāḥ susañcitayaśodhanāḥ || 38 ||
paraṃ dvitrāḥ pavitrā ye rājarṣe tava sadguṇāḥ
teṣveṣu rājasu mama prāyaśo na dṛśaṃ gatāḥ || 3 9 ||
prajā nijakuṭumbastvaṃ tvaṃ tu bhūdevadaivataḥ
mahātapaḥ sahāyastvaṃ yathā nānye tathā nṛpāḥ
dhanyo mānyo'si ca satāṃ pūjanīyo'si sadguṇaiḥ
devā api divodāsa tvattrāsānnavimārgagāḥ || 41 ||
kiṃ naḥ stutyā tava nṛpa dvijānāmaspṛhāvatām
kiṃ kurmastvadguṇagrāmāḥ svannaḥ
goṣṭhī tiṣṭhatviyaṃ tāvatprastutaṃ staumi sāmpratam
yaṣṭukāmo'smyahaṃ rājaṃstvāṃ sahāyamato vṛṇe
rayo vegaḥ || 38 |
dṛśaṃ netraṃ jñānaṃ vā || 3 9 ||
sadguṇatvamevāha | prajeti || 41 ||
aspṛhāvatāṃ spṛhārahitānām | nirīhasya tṛṇaṃ nṛpā iti nyāyādityarthaḥ |
stāvakān stutiṃ kurvāṇān || 42 ||
goṣṭhī vārtā | | staumi kathayāmi || 43 |

ahaṃ cāstidhano rājannyāyopāttamahādhanaḥ
iyaṃ ca rājadhānī te karmabhūmāvanuttamā
yasyāṃ kṛtānāṃ kāryāṇāṃ saṃvarte'pi na saṃkṣayaḥ || 45 ||
sañcitaṃ yaddhanaṃ puṃbhirnayasanmārgagāmibhiḥ
tatkāśyāṃ viniyujyeta kleśāyetarathā bhavet
mahimānaṃ paraṃ kāśyāḥ ko'pi veda na bhūpate
ṛte trinayanācchambhoḥ sarvajñānapradāyinaḥ
manye dhanyataro'si tvaṃ bahujanmaśatārjitaiḥ |
sukṛtaiḥ pāsi yatkāśīṃ viśvabhartuḥ parāṃ tanum
kāśī trijagatīsārastrivedīsāra eva vai
trivargottarasāraśca nirṇīteti maharṣibhiḥ || 4 9 ||
ahaṃ cāstidhana iti | astiśabdaḥ subantapratirūpakaḥ | asti dhanaṃ yasya so'stidhanaḥ |
astidhanīti kvacit || 44 |
he rājan ! yaha bhūmaṃḍala tumhāre hī dvārā sarājaka aura samasta saṃpattiyoṃ kā

ekasyāpyavanātkāśyāṃ trailokyamavitaṃ bhavet || 50 ||
anyacca te hitaṃ vacmi yadi te rocate'nagha |
prīṇanīyaḥ sadaivako viśveśaḥ sarvakarmabhiḥ || 51 |
anyadevadhiyā rājan viśveśaṃ paśya mā kvacit
brahmaviṣṇvindracandrārkāḥ krīḍeyaṃ tasya dhūrjaṭeḥ || 52 ||
viprairudarkamicchadbhiḥ śikṣaṇīyā yato nṛpāḥ
atastava hitaṃ khyātaṃ kiṃ vā me cintayā'nayā || 53 ||
iti joṣaṃ sthitaṃ vipraṃ pratyuvāca nṛpottamaḥ |
sarvaṃ mayā hṛdi dhṛtaṃ yattvayoktaṃ dvijottama || 54 ||
joṣaṃ tūṣṇīm || 54 |

ahaṃ yiyakṣamāṇasya tava sāhāyyakarmaṇi |
dāso'smi yajñasaṃbhārānnaya me kośato'khilān || 55 ||
yadasti me'khilaṃ tatra saptāṅge'pi bhavān prabhuḥ
yajasvaikamanā brahman siddhaṃ manyasva vāñchitam || 56 ||
rājyaṃ karomi yad brahman svārthaṃ tanna manāgapi
putraiḥ kalatrairdehena paropakṛtaye yate || 57 ||
rājñāṃ kratukriyābhyo'pi tīrthebhyo'pi samantataḥ
prajāpālanamevaiko dharmaḥ prokto manīṣibhiḥ || 58 |
prajāsantāpajo vahnirvajāgnerapi dāruṇaḥ |
dvitrāndahati vajrāgniḥ pūrvo rājyaṃ kulaṃ tanum || 5 9 ||
yiyakṣamāṇasya yajñaṃ kariṣyataḥ || 55 ||
saptāṅge svāmyamātyasuhṛtkośarāṣṭradurgabalarūpe || 56 |
pūrvaḥ prajāsantāpajaḥ || 5 9 ||

tadā viprapadāmbhobhirabhiṣekaṃ karomyaham || 60 |
havanaṃ brāhmaṇamukhe yatkaromi dvijottama
manye kratukriyābhyo'pi tadviśiṣṭaṃ mahāmate || 61 ||
abhilāṣeṣu sarveṣu jāgartyaiko hṛdīha me
adyāpi mārgaṇaḥ ko'pi draṣṭavyaḥ svatanorapi || 62 ||
aho ahobhirbahubhiḥ phalito me manorathaḥ |
yattvaṃ me'dya gṛhe prāptaḥ kiñcitprārthayituṃ dvija || 63 ||
ekāgramānaso vipra yajñān vipuladakṣiṇān
bahūnyajakṛtaṃ viddhi sāhāyyaṃ sarvavastuṣu || 64 ||
iti rājño mahābuddherdharmaśīlasya bhāṣitam |
śrutvā tuṣṭamanāḥ sraṣṭā kratusambhāramāharat || 65 |
sāhāyyaṃ prāpya rājarṣerdivodāsasya padmabhūḥ |
iyāja daśabhiḥ kāśyāmaśvamedhairmahāmakhaiḥ || 66 ||
svaśarīrasya || 62 ||
yajñān vipuladakṣiṇān yaja kuru | ayameva vā pāṭhaḥ || 64 |

tadāprabhṛti na vyomanīlimānaṃ jahātyadaḥ || 67 |
tīrthaṃ daśāśvamedhākhyaṃ prathitaṃ jagatītale
tadāprabhṛti tatrāsīdvārāṇasyāṃ śubhapradam || 68 |
purā rudrasaro nāma tattīrthaṃ kalaśodbhava
daśāśvamedhikaṃ paścājjātaṃ vidhiparigrahāt || 6 9 ||
svardhunyatha tataḥ prāptā bhagīrathasamāgamāt
atīvapuṇyavajjātamatastattīrthamuttamam || 70 ||
vidhirdaśāśvamedheśaṃ liṅgaṃ saṃsthāpya tatra vai
sthitavānna gato'dyāpi kvāpi kāśīṃ vihāya tu || 71 ||
rājño dharmaratestasya cchidraṃ nā'vāpa kiñcana
ataḥ purāreḥ purato vrajitvā kiṃ vadedvidhiḥ || 72 ||
adyeti | yadyadāprabhṛti yaṃ kālamārabhya homadhūmaughairgaganāntaraṃ vyāptaṃ tadāprabhṛti
adyāpi nīlimānaṃ tamālaśyāmalatvamado nabho na jahātītyanvayaḥ || 67 ||

kṣetraprabhāvaṃ vijñāya dhyāyan viśveśvaraṃ śivam
brahmeśvaraṃ ca saṃsthāpya vidhistatraiva saṃsthitaḥ || 73 ||
parātanuriyaṃ kāśī viśveśasyeti niścitam
asyāḥ saṃsevanācchambhurna kupyati puro mayi
kaḥ prāpya kāśīṃ durmedhāḥ punastyaktumihehate |
anekajanmajanitakarmanirmūlanakṣamām || 75 ||
viśvasantāpasaṃhartuḥ sthāne viśvapatestanuḥ |
santāpyatetarāṃ kāśyā viśleṣajamahāgninā || 76 ||
prāpya kāśīṃ tyajedyastu samastāghaughanāśinīm
nṛpaśuḥ sa parijñeyo mahāsaukhyaparāṅmukhaḥ || 77 |
nirvāṇalakṣmīṃ yaḥ kāṅkṣe tyaktvā saṃsāradurgatim
tena kāśī na saṃtyājyā yadyāptaiśādanugrahāt || 78 ||

tasya hastatalād gaccheccaturvargaphalodayaḥ || 7 9 |
nibarhaṇīmaghaughasya supuṇyaparibṛṃhiṇīm
kaḥ prāpya kāśīṃ durmedhāstyajenmokṣasukhapradām || 80 |
satyaloke kva tatsaukhyaṃ kva saukhyaṃ vaiṣṇave pade
yatsaukhyaṃ labhyate kāśyāṃ nimeṣārdhaniṣevaṇāt || 81 |
vārāṇasīguṇagaṇānnirṇīya histviti |
vyāvṛtya mandaragiriṃ na punaḥ pratyagānmune || 82 ||
skanda uvāca - mitrāvaruṇayoḥ putra mahimānaṃ bravīmi te |
kāśyāṃ daśāśvamedhasya sarvatīrthaśiromaṇeḥ || 83 ||
daśāśvamedhikaṃ prāpya sarvatīrthottamottamam |
yatkiñcitkriyate karma tadakṣayamiheritam || 84 ||
snānaṃ dānaṃ japo homaḥ svādhyāyo devatārcanam |
sandhyopāstitarpaṇaṃ ca śrāddhaṃ pitṛsamarcanam || 85 |

dṛṣṭvā daśāśvamedheśaṃ sarvapāpaiḥ pramucyate || 86 |
jyeṣṭhe māsi site pakṣe prāpya pratipadaṃ tithim | |
daśāśvamedhike snātvā mucyate janmapātakaiḥ || 87 ||
jyeṣṭhe śukladvitīyāyāṃ snātvā rudrasarovare |
janmadvayakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tatkṣaṇādeva naśyati || 88 |
evaṃ sarvāsu tithiṣu kramasnāyī narottamaḥ |
āśuklapakṣadaśami pratijanmāghamutsṛjet || 8 9 ||
tithiṃ daśaharāṃ prāpya daśajanmāghahāriṇīm |
daśāśvamedhike snāto yāmīṃ paśyenna yātanām || 9 0 | ||
liṅga daśāśvamedheśaṃ dṛṣṭvā daśaharātithau | |
daśajanmārjitaiḥ pāpaistyajyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 9 1 ||
snātaṃ daśaharāyāṃ yaḥ pūjayelliṅgamuttamam |
bhaktyā daśāśvamedheśaṃ na taṃ garbhadaśā spṛśet || 9 2 ||

kurvan vai vārṣikīṃ yātrāṃ na vighnairabhibhūyate || 9 3 ||
daśāśvamedhāvabhṛthairyatphalaṃ samyagāpyate
daśāśvamedhe tannūnaṃ snātvā daśaharātithau || 9 4 ||
svardhunyāḥ paścime tīre natvā daśahareśvaram
na durdaśāmavāpnoti pumān puṇyatamaḥ kvacit || 9 5 ||
yatkāśyāṃ dakṣiṇadvāramantargehasya kīrtyate
tatra brahmeśvaraṃ dṛṣṭvā brahmaloke mahīyate || 9 6 ||
iti brāhmaṇaveṣeṇa vārāṇasyāṃ mahādhiyā
duhiṇena sthitaṃ tāvadyāvadviśveśvarāgamaḥ || 9 7 ||
divodāso'pi rājendro vṛddhabrāhmaṇarūpiṇe '
brahmaṇe kṛtayajñāya brahmaśālāmakalpayat || 9 8 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ dvipañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 52 ||

brahmā tatrā'vasadvyoma brahmaghoṣairninādayan || 99 |
iti te kathito brahman mahimā'timahattaraḥ
daśāśvamedhatīrthasya sarvāghaughavināśanaḥ || 100 |
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ śrāvayitvā tathaiva ca
brahmalokamavāpnoti śraddhayā mānavottamaḥ || 101 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe daśāśvamedhavarṇanaṃ nāma
dvipañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 52 ||

|| atha tripañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastiruvāca-
apūrveyaṃ kathā khyātā brahmaṇo brahmavittama |
kiṃ cakāra punaḥ śambhustatra brahmaṇyapi sthite || 1 ||
skanda uvāca- kāśyāṃ brahmaṇyapi sthite
śṛṇvagastya mahābhāga
giriśaścintayāmāsa bhṛśamudvignamānasaḥ || 2 ||

vidhirvidhānadakṣo'pi na me sa sa vidho'bhavat || 5 ||
cintayanniti deveśo gaṇānāhūya bhūriśaḥ
preṣayāmāsa bho yāta kṣipraṃ vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 6 |
kiṃ kurvanti tu yoginyaḥ kiṃ karoti sa bhānumān ||
gatvā vitta tvarāyuktā vidhiśca vidadhāti kim || 7 ||
nāmagrāhaṃ tato'praiṣīd bahumānapuraḥsaram |
śaṅkukarṇa mahākāla ghaṇṭākarṇa mahodara || 8 |
somanandinnandiṣeṇa kāla piṅgala kukkuṭa |
kuṇḍodara mayūrākṣa bāṇa gokarṇa tāraka || 9 ||
tilaparṇa sthūlakarṇa dṛmicaṇḍa prabhāmaya |

pañcākṣa bhārabhūtākhya tryakṣa kṣemaka lāṅgalin || 11 ||
virādha sumukhāṣāḍhe bhavanto mama sūnavaḥ |
yathemau skandaherambau naigameyo yathātvayam || 12 ||
yathā śākhaviśākhau ca yathemau nandibhṛṅgiṇau
bhavatsu vidyamāneṣu mahāvikramaśāliṣu || 13 ||
kāśīpravṛttiṃ no jāne divodāsanṛpasya ca
yoginyarkavidhīnāṃ ca tadvau yātaṃ bhavatsvamū || 14 ||
śaṅkukarṇamahākālau kālasyāpi prakampanau
jñātuṃ vārāṇasīvārtāmāyātaṃ ca tvarānvitau || 15 ||
kṛtapratijñau tau tūrṇaṃ prāpya vārāṇasīṃ purīm
śaṅkukarṇamahākālau vismṛtya śāmbhavīṃ giram || 16 ||
svakāryaṃ kartuṃ tān protsāhayati | bhavanta iti || 12 ||

kṣaṇena mohamāyāti kāśīṃ vīkṣya tathaiva tau || 17 ||
aho mohasya māhātmyamaho māhātmyamaho bhāgyaviparyayaḥ |
nirvāṇarāśiṃ yatkāśīṃ prāpya yāntyanyato'budhāḥ || 18 |

labhedayutagopuṇyaṃ kastāṃ kāśīṃ tyajetsudhīḥ || 24 ||
ekaṃ liṅga pratiṣṭhāpya yatra saṃsthāpitaṃ bhavet |
api trailokyamakhilaṃ tāṃ kāśīṃ kaḥ samujjhati || 25 ||
pariniścitya tāvitthaṃ liṅge saṃsthāpya puṇyade
tatraiva saṃsthitiṃ prāptau kāśīṃ nādyā'pi muñcataḥ || 26 ||
śaṅkukarṇeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ śaṅkukarṇagaṇārcitam ||
dṛṣṭvā na jāyate janturjātu māturmahodare ||27 ||
viśveśādvāyudigbhāge śaṅkukarṇeśvaraṃ naraḥ I
sampūjya na viśedatra ghore saṃsārasāgare || 28 |
mahākāleśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ mahākālagaṇārcitam
arcayitvā ca natvā ca stutvā kālabhayaṃ kutaḥ || 2 9 ||
viśveśādvāyudigbhāge iti | viśvāni tadīśāṃścāttīti viśveśād yamo vāyordig
yasmāt sa vāyudik varuṇaḥ , tayorbhāge madhye nairṛtyāṃ diśītyarthaḥ | athavā viśveśād
yathāśrutavyākhyāne pūṃrvāparavirodhāpatteḥ || 28 |

mahākāle cirantanavilambite |
jñātvā sarvajñanātho'tha prāhaiṣīdaparau gaṇau || 30 ||
ghaṇṭākarṇa tvamāgaccha mahodara mahāmate |
kāśīṃ yātaṃ yuvāṃ tūrṇaṃ jñātuṃ tatratyaceṣṭitam || 31 ||
ityagaste gaṇau tau tu gatvā kāśīṃ mahāpurīm |
vyāvṛtyādyāpi no yātau kvāpi tatraiva saṃsthitau || 32 ||
ghaṇṭākarṇeśvaraṃ liṅga ghaṇṭākarṇagaṇottamaḥ |
kāśyāṃ saṃsthāpya vidhivat svayaṃ tatraiva nirvṛtaḥ || 33 ||
kuṇḍaṃ tatraiva saṃsthāpya liṅgasnapanakarmaṇe |
nādyāpi saṃtyajetkāśīṃ dhyāyan liṅgaṃ tathaiva hi || 34 ||
mahodaro'pi tatprācyāṃ śivadhyānaparāyaṇaḥ |
mahodareśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ dhyāyedadyā'pi kumbhaja || 35 ||
jñātveti | asmatkāryamaniṣpādya kṣetramāhātmyaṃ jñātvā tatraiva tau tasthaturiti

kadācidapi vai mātuḥ praviśennaudarīṃ praviśennaudarīṃ darīm || 36 |
ghaṇṭākarṇahṛde snātvā dṛṣṭvā vyāseśvaraṃ vibhum
yatra kutra vipanno'pi vārāṇasyāṃ mṛto bhavet || 37 ||
ghaṇṭākarṇe mahātīrthe śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ |
api durgatimāpannānuddharetsaptapūrvajān || 38 |
nimajyādyā'pi tatkuṇḍe kṣaṇaṃ yo'vahito bhavet
viśveśvaramahāpūjāghaṇṭārāvān śṛṇoti saḥ || 3 9 ||
vadanti pitaraḥ kāśyāṃ ghaṇṭākarṇe'male jale
dātā tilodakasyāpi vaṃśe naḥ ko'pi jāyate || 40 ||
yadvaṃśyā munayaḥ kāśyāṃ ghaṇṭākarṇe mahāhade
kṛtodakakriyāḥ prāptāḥ parāṃ siddhiṃ ghaṭodbhava || 41 ||

gaṇe yāte prayāte ca mahodare |
visismāya smaradveṣṭā maulimāndolayan muhuḥ || 42 ||
uvāca ca manasyeva haraḥ smitvā punaḥ punaḥ |
mahāmohanavidyā'si kāśi tvāṃ paryavaimyaham || 43 ||
purāvidaḥ praśaṃsanti tvāṃ mahāmohahāriṇīm |
kāśīṃ tviti na jānanti mahāmohanabhūriyam || 44 ||
preṣayiṣyāmyahaṃ sarvān bhavatī mohayiṣyati |
iti samyag vijānāmi kāśi tvāṃ mohanauṣadhim || 45 ||
tathāpi preṣayiṣyāmi yāvānme'sti paricchadaḥ |
nodyamādviramantīha jñāninaḥ sādhyakarmaṇi || 46 ||
yebhyo vaṃśebhyaste tathā munayaḥ santaḥ parāṃ siddhiṃ prāptāḥ , tathā vayamapi prāpsyāma
ityabhiprāyeṇa vadantīti || 41 ||
tu punaḥ iyaṃ kāśī mahāmohanabhūriti punarna jānantītyarthaḥ || 44 |
yāvān paricchadaḥ parikarastāvantaṃ preṣayiṣyāmītyarthaḥ | sarvāṃścenmohayiṣyāmi kiṃ

pratikūlo'pi khidyeta vidhistatsatatodyamāt || 47 ||
śītoṣṇabhānū svarbhānugrastāvapi nabho'ṅgaṇe |
gatiṃ na tyajato'dyāpi prakrāntavyakṛtodyamau || 48 ||
ekatra hanti kāryāṇi prātikūlyādvidhirmuhuḥ |
ekatra karaṇīyāni setsyantyatra bhṛśodyamāt || 4 9 |
daivaṃ pūrvakṛtaṃ karma kathyate netaratpunaḥ |
tannirākaraṇe yatnaḥ svayaṃ kāryo vipaścitā || 50 ||

hastavastrodyamāttacca praviśedaudarīṃ darīm || 51 ||
ityudyamaṃ samarthyeśo niścitaṃ daivajitvaram |
punaśca preṣayāñcakre gaṇān pañca mahārayān || 52 ||
somanandī nandiṣeṇaḥ kālapiṅgalakukkuṭāḥ |
te'dyāpi na nivartante kāśyāṃ jīvā mṛtā yathā || 53 |
te'pi svanāmnā liṅgāni śambhusantuṣṭikāmyayā
pratiṣṭhāpya sthitāḥ kāśyāṃ viśvanirvāṇajanmani || 54 ||
somanandīśvaraṃ dṛṣṭvā liṅgaṃ nandavane param |
somaloke parānandaṃ prāpnuyādbhaktimānnaraḥ || 55 |
taduttare vilokyā'tha nandiṣeṇeśvaraṃ naraḥ I
ānandasenāṃ samprāpya jayenmṛtyumapi kṣaṇāt || 56 ||

praṇamya kālapāśena no badhyeta kadācana || 57 ||
piṅgaleśvaramabhyarcya kāleśātkiñciduttare
labhate piṅgalajñānaṃ yena tanmayatāṃ vrajet || 58 |
kukkuṭeśvaraliṅgasya ye'tra bhaktiṃ vitanvate
kukkuṭāṇḍākṛtestasya na te garbhamavāpnuyuḥ || 5 9 ||
skanda uvāca - mune pañcagaṇeṣvapi |
somanandiprabhṛtiṣu
ānandakānanaṃ prāpya sthiteṣu sthāṇurabravīt || 60 ||
kāryamasmākamevaitadyadi samyag vimṛśyate |
anenopādhināpyete tatra tiṣṭhantu māmakāḥ || 61 ||
pramatheṣu praviṣṭeṣu māyāvīryamahatsvapi |
ahameva praviṣṭo'smi vārāṇasyāṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 62 |
piṅgalajñānaṃ piṅgaleśvarasvarūpajñānam || 58 |
kukkuṭāṇḍasyevākṛtirākāro yasya sa kukkuṭāṇḍākṛtistasya || 5 9 |
māyāvīryamahatsu māyāvīryābhyāṃ mahattareṣu || 62 |

tatra sarveṣu yāteṣu tato yāsyāmyahaṃ punaḥ || 63 ||
saṃpradhāryeti hṛdaye devadevena śūlinā
praiṣiṣṭa pramathānāntu tato gaṇacatuṣṭayam || 64 ||
kuṇḍodaro mayūrākhyo bāṇo gokarṇa eva ca |
māyābalaṃ samāśritya kāśīṃ praviviśurgaṇāḥ || 65 ||
kṛtvopāyaśataṃ taistu divodāsasya sambhrame |
yadaiko'pi samartho na tadā tatraiva saṃsthitam || 66 ||
aparādhaśateṣvīśaḥ kena tuṣyati karmaṇā |
saṃpradhāryeti te cakrurliṅgārādhanamuttamam || 67 ||
ekasmin śāmbhave liṅge vidhinā'tra sami
kṣamettryakṣo'parādhānāṃ śataṃ mokṣaṃ ca yacchati || 68 |
na tuṣyati tathā śambhuryajñadānatapovrataiḥ |
yathā tuṣyetsakṛlliṅge vidhinā'bhyarcite sati || 6 9 ||
liṅgārcanavidhānajño liṅgārcanarataḥ sadā
tryakṣa eva sa vijñeyaḥ sākṣād dvyakṣo'pi mānavaḥ || 70 ||

tatphalaṃ labhyate puṃbhiryat sakṛlliṅgapūjanāt || 71 ||
aśvamedhādibhiryāgairna tatphalamavāpyate |
yatphalaṃ labhyate martyairnityaṃ liṅgaprapūjanāt || 72 |
snāpayitvā vidhānena yo liṅgasnapanodakam
triḥ pibettrividhaṃ pāpaṃ tasyehāśu praṇaśyati || 73 ||
liṅgasnapanavārbhirya : kuryānmūrmyabhiṣecanam |
gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ tasya jāyate'tra vipāpmanaḥ || 74 ||
liṅgaṃ samarcitaṃ dṛṣṭvā yaḥ kuryātpraṇatiṃ sakṛt
sandeho jāyate tasya punardehanibandhane || 75 ||
liṅgaṃ yaḥ sthāpayed bhaktyā saptajanmakṛtādaghāt || 1 76 ||
mucyate nātra sandeho viśuddhaḥ svargabhāgbhavet
snāpayitveti | yattvagrāhyaṃ śivanirmālyaṃ patraṃ puṣpaṃ phalaṃ jalamityādi - niṣedhavacanaṃ
tattvajñānapūrvakaṃ kāśyatiriktasthānaviṣayaṃ viṣṇupādodakāsaṃsargaviṣayaṃ vā I
śālagrāmaśilātoyāt sarvaṃ yāti pavitratāmityukteḥ | śivā'bhaktaviṣayaṃ vā |
śivaviṣṇvorbhedadarśimūḍhaviṣayaṃ veti dik | | vastutastu bāṇaliṅgādivyatiriktaviṣayameva
taditi pūrvoktaṃ na prasmartavyam || 73-74 |
deha eva nitarāṃ bandhanaṃ dehabandhanaṃ tasmin || 75 ||

vicāryeti gaṇaiḥ kāśyāṃ svāmidrohopaśāntaye
pratiṣṭhitāni liṅgāni mahāpātakabhindyapi || 77 ||
kuṇḍodareśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā lolārkasannidhau
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ śivaloke mahīyate ||78 ||
kuṇḍodareśvarālliṅgātpratīcyāmasirodhasi
mayūreśvaramabhyarcya na garbha pratipadyate || 7 9 |
mayūreśapratīcyāṃ ca liṅgaṃ bāṇeśvaraṃ mahat
tasya darśanamātreṇa sarvaiḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 80 ||
gokarṇeśa mahāliṅgamantargehasya paścime
dvāre samarcya vai kāśyāṃ na vighnairabhibhūyate || 81 ||
gokarṇeśvarabhaktasya pañcatvasamaye sati
jñānabhraṃśo na jāyeta kvacidapyantamṛcchataḥ || 82 ||
mahāpātakāni bhindantīti mahāpātakabhindi || 77 ||
asirodhasi asyā nadyāstīre || 7 9 |

skanda uvāca - gaṇeṣveṣu caturṣvapi gaṇeśvaraḥ |
cirayatsu
mahimānaṃ mahattvaṃ tu tatkāśyāḥ paryavarṇayat || 83 ||
vaiṣṇavyā māyayā viśvaṃ bhrāmyetā'tra yayā'khilam
dhruvaṃ mūrtimatī saiṣā kāśī viśvaikamohinī || 84 ||
apāsya sodarān dārān putraṃ kṣetraṃ gṛhaṃ vasu |
apyaṅgīkṛtya nidhanaṃ sarve kāśīmupāsate || 85 |
maraṇādapi no kāśyāṃ bhayaṃ yatra manāgapi |
gaṇāstatra tu tiṣṭhantaḥ kuto matto'pi bibhyati || 86 |
maraṇaṃ maṅgalaṃ yatra vibhūtiryatra bhūṣaṇam |
kaupīnaṃ yatra kauśeyaṃ kāśī kutropamīyate || 87 |
gaṇeśvara ityatra maheśvara iti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 83 ||
mohakatvamātreṇa māyayaikatvābhidhānaṃ na tu tatkāryakaratvena , tadevāha |
apāsyeti || 84-85 |
nanu svāminaṃ vihāya tiṣṭhantaḥ kutaste na bibhyayustatrāha | maraṇāditi || 86 |

nirvāṇaramaṇī yatra raṅkaṃ vā'raṅkameva vā
brāhmaṇaṃ vāśvapākaṃ vā vṛṇīte prāntyabhūṣaṇam || 88
mṛtānāṃ yatra jantūnāṃ nirvāṇapadamṛcchatām |
koṭyaṃśenāpi na samā api śakrādayaḥ surāḥ || 8 9 ||
yatra kāśyāṃ mṛto janturbrahmanārāyaṇādibhiḥ
prabaddhamūrdhāalibhirnamasyetāti yatnataḥ || 9 0 ||
yatra kāśyāṃ śavatve'pi janturnā'śucitāṃ vrajet
atastatkarṇasaṃsparśa karomyahamapi svayam || 9 1 ||
yastu kāśīti kāśīti dvistrirjapati puṇyavān
api sarvapavitrebhyaḥ sa pavitrataro mahān || 9 2 ||
yena kāśī hṛdi dhyātā yena kāśīha sevitā
tenā'haṃ hṛdi saṃdhyātastenā'haṃ sevitaḥ sadā || 9 3 ||
nirvāṇaṃ kaivalyameva ramaṇī sundarī nirvāṇaramaṇī | prakarṣeṇā'nte dehatyāgā'vasare
bhavatīti prāntyastārakopadeśastadeva bhūṣaṇaṃ yasya sa tathā tam | yadvā , prānte bhavaṃ
prāntyaṃ maraṇaṃ tadeva bhūṣaṇaṃ maṅgalaṃ yasya tam | maraṇaṃ maṅgalaṃ yatretyukteḥ | yatra kāśyāṃ
śavatve'pi janturnā'śucitāṃ vrajedityuktatvāt | śāvaṃ nālokayedityādi manuvacanaṃ tu
kāśyatiriktaviṣayaṃ draṣṭavyam || 88 |
śavatve'pi apiśabdājjīvatve'pi | ata eva tasya jantormaraṇāvyavahitasamaye
tārakopadeśārthaṃ karṇasaṃsparśaṃ karomi || 9 1 |

tamahaṃ hṛdaye nityaṃ dhārayāmi prayatnataḥ || 9 4 |
svayaṃ vastumaśakto'pi vāsayettīrthavāsinam |
apyekamapi mūlyena sa vastuḥ phalabhāg dhruvam || 9 5 ||
kāśyāṃ vasanti ye dhīrā āpañcatvaviniścayāḥ
jīvanmuktāstu te jñeyā vandyāḥ pūjyāsta eva hi ||9 6 ||
itthaṃ vimṛśya bahuśaḥ sthāṇurvārāṇasīguṇān |
gaṇānanyān samāhūya prāhiṇotprītipūrvakam || 9 7 ||
tāraka tvaṃ samāgaccha gacchā'tisvacchamānasa |
divodāso vṛṣāvāso yāmadhīṣṭe varāṃ purīm || 9 8 |
tilaparṇa sthūlakarṇa damicaṇḍa prabhāmaya |
sukeśa vindate chāga kapardin piṅgalākṣaka || 99 |
vīrabhadra kirātākhya caturmukha nikumbhaka | |
pañcākṣa bhārabhūtākhya tryakṣa kṣemaka lāṅgalin || 100 ||
vṛṣāvāso dharmāśrayaḥ | adhīṣṭe adhikaṃ yathā syāttathā īṣṭe śāstītyarthaḥ || 9 8 ||

ete gaṇā mahābhāgāḥ svāmibhaktā dṛḍhavratāḥ || 101 ||
kṛtvā māyā bahuvidhā bahurūpā vicakṣaṇāḥ
animeṣekṣaṇāstasthuḥ kṣoṇīśacchidrakāṅkṣiṇaḥ || 102 ||
aparijñātatacchidrā vidrāvitayaśodhanāḥ
āḥ kimetadaho jātaṃ nininduḥ svamitīha te || 103 ||
gaṇā ūcuḥ-
dhigasmān svāminā nityaṃ kṛtasambhāvanān muhuḥ
manuṣyamātramapyatra yairekaṃ na vaśīkṛtam || 104 ||
bahumānena dānena sauhārdena mahīyasā |
kṛtaprasādāṃstryakṣeṇa dhiṅ naḥ tatkāryavañcakān || 105 ||
nimeṣarahitānīkṣaṇāni yeṣāṃ te'nimeṣekṣaṇāḥ | atyantaṃ sāvadhānā
na parijñātaṃ tasya rājñaśchidraṃ yaiste'parijñātatacchidrāḥ | vidrāvitaṃ dūrīkṛtaṃ yaśo-
lakṣaṇaṃ dhanaṃ yeṣāṃ te vidrāvitayaśodhanāḥ | āḥ krodhe | aho khede || 103 ||
ekaṃ manuṣyamātramapi yaḥ kaścideko manuṣyo vā'pi na vaśīkṛtam | tasya narendrasya
vaśīkaraṇaṃ tu dūrata eva nirastamityarthaḥ || 104 |
he virādha ! sumukha ! aura āṣār̤ha ! tuma saba pṛthak - pṛthak vahā~ jāo |
( kārtikeya kahane lage ki ) ye saba parama svāmibhakta mahātmā , dṛr̤hapratijña pramathagaṇa ,

andhantamomaye loke dhuvaṃ vāso bhaviṣyati || 106 ||
akṛtasvāmikāryāṇāmaho jīvitadhāriṇām
akṣatendriyavṛttīnāṃ durgatiśca pade pade || 107 ||
labdhasambhāvanānāṃ ca nyakkṛtasvāmikarmaṇām
bhṛtyānāṃ bhūribhājāṃ ca bhaṅgarāḥ syurmanorathāḥ || 108 ||
aniṣpāditakāryārthā ye mukhaṃ prekṣayantyaho
apatrapāḥ puro bhartustairbhūrbhāravatī tviyam || 10 9 ||
nādrīṇāṃ na samudrāṇāṃ na drumāṇāṃ mahīyasām
bhūtadhātryāstathābhāro yathā svāmiduhāṃ mahān || 110 ||
aho paurāṇikī gāthā smṛtā'smābhiraninditā
tadarthamavalambyeha sthāsyāmaḥ kṛtaniścayāḥ || 111 ||
svāmikāryā'sāvadhānānāṃ kimiti narakaprāptistatrāhurakṛteti || 107 |
bhaṅgarā nāśaśīlāḥ || 108 ||

anākalitapuṇyānāṃ parikṣīṇadhanāyuṣām |
sarvopāyavihīnānāṃ gatirvārāṇasīpurī || 112 ||
apuṇyabhārakhinnānāṃ paścāttāpamupeyuṣām |
viṣvagūrdhvagatīnāṃ ca gatirvārāṇasī purī || 113 |
svāmidruhaḥ kṛtaghnāśca ye ca viśrambhaghātakāḥ |
teṣāṃ kvāpi gatirnāsti muktvā vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 114 ||
itthaṃ niścitya gāthārthaṃ pramathā avatasthire |
avijñātasvarūpāśca divodāsena bhūbhujā || 115 |
na bubodha sa bhūpālo nitarāṃ buddhimānapi |
vibudhān vividhākāraiḥ sthitānīśaprabhāvataḥ || 116 ||
citraṃ na citragupto'pi vetti vārāṇasīsthitān |

avicchinnaprabhāvāṇāmaparicchinnatejasām
kṛtaliṅgapratiṣṭhānāṃ taṃ prāpnoti dharmarāṭ || 118 ||
iti te pramathā sarve ghaṭodbhava mahāmune
kṛtaliṅgārcanā kāśīṃ nādyāpyujjhanti śarmadām || 11 9 ||
tārakeśaṃ mahāliṅga tārakākhyo gaṇottamaḥ
tārakajñānadaṃ puṃsāṃ mune'dyāpi samarcayet || 120 ||
tārakeśvaraliṅgasya kṛtvā bhaktiṃ suniścalām
sukhena tārakajñānaṃ labhyate tairnarottamaiḥ || 121 ||
tilaparṇeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tilaparṇapratiṣṭhitam
tilapramāṇamapyatra dṛṣṭvā pāpaṃ na saṃbhavet || 122 ||
sthūlakarṇeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ paripūjya narottamaḥ
na durgatimavāpnoti puṇyamāpnoti cottamam || 123 ||
dṛmicaṇḍeśvaraṃ liṅga tathā liṅgaṃ prabhāmayam
ārādhya tatpratīcyāṃ ca na pāpairabhibhūyate || 124 ||

prabhāmayena yānena śivaloke vrajetsudhīḥ || 125 | |
sukeśeśvaramabhyarcya harikeśavane naraḥ |
ṣāṭkauśikamayaṃ dehaṃ dhārayenna punaḥ punaḥ || 126 ||
vindatīśaṃ naro'bhyarcya bhīmacaṇḍīsamīpataḥ |
tyaktvā pracaṇḍamapyeno mokṣaṃ vindati śāśvatam || 127 ||
chāgaleśaṃ mahāliṅga pitrīśvarasamīpagam |
vilokya paśuvat ko'pi na pāpaṃ prākṛtaṃ spṛśet || 128 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe vārāṇasīvarṇanagaṇapreṣaṇaṃ nāma
tripañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 53 |
tvaṅmāṃsarudhirasnāyvasthimajjā iti ṣaṭkośāstairnirmitaṃ ṣāṭkauśikam || 126 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ tripañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 53 ||

|| atha catuṣpañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca-
kumbhasambhava vakṣyāmi śṛṇotvavahito bhavān |
kapardīśasya liṅgasya mahāmāhātmyamuttamam || 1 ||
kapardī nāma gaṇapaḥ śambhoratyantavallabhaḥ |
pitrīśāduttare bhāge liṅgaṃ saṃsthāpya śāmbhavam || 2 ||
kuṇḍaṃ cakhāna tasyāgre vimalodakasaṃjñakam |
yasya toyasya saṃsparśādvimalo jāyate naraḥ || 3 ||
itihāsaṃ pravakṣyāmi tatra tretāyuge purā
yathāvṛttaṃ kumbhayone śravaṇātpātakāpaham
ekaḥ pāśupataśreṣṭho vālmīkiriti saṃjñitaḥ |
tapaścacāra sa muniḥ kapardīśaṃ samarcayan || 5 ||
kapardīśasya liṅgasya māhātmyākhyānapūrvakam |
catuṣpañcāśake'dhyāye paiśācākhyānamucyate || 1 |

ekadā sa hi hemante mārge māsi tapodhanaḥ |
snātvā tatra mahātīrthe madhyāhne vimalodake || 6 ||
cakāra bhasmanā snānamāpādatalamastakam |
liṅgasya dakṣiṇe bhāge kṛtamādhyāhnikakriyaḥ || ||7 ||
nyastamastakapāṃsuśca sandhyāmādhyātmikīṃ smaran
japan pañcākṣarīṃ vidyāṃ dhyāyan devaṃ kapardinam || 8 ||
kṛtvā saṃhāramārgeṇa sapramāṇaṃ pradakṣiṇam |
huḍukṛtya huḍuṃkṛtya huḍuṃkṛtya triruccakaiḥ ||9 ||
idānīṃ tasya pāśupatayogāvasthānamāha | ekadeti | mārge mārgaśīrṣe || 6 |
liṅgasya dakṣiṇe bhāge ityādīnāṃ sa kṣaṇaṃ sarastīre upaviṣṭaḥ san rākṣasa-
madrākṣīditi ṣaṣṭhaślokagatenānvayaḥ || 7 |

gītaṃ vidhāya sānandaṃ sanṛtyaṃ hastakānvitam || 10 ||
aṅgahārairmanohāri cārīmaṇḍalasaṃyutam |
kṣaṇaṃ tatra sarastīre upaviṣṭo mahātapāḥ || 11 |
adrākṣīdrākṣasaṃ ghoramatīvavikṛtākṛtim |
śuṣkaśaṅkhakapolāsyaṃ nimagnāpiṅgalocanam || 12 ||
somasūtradvayaṃ yatra yatra vā viṣṇumandiram |
apasavyaṃ na kurvīta kuryādeva pradakṣiṇam || iti |

rukṣasphuṭitakeśāgraṃ mahālambaśirodharam |
atīvacipiṭaghrāṇaṃ śuṣkauṣṭhamatidanturam || 13 ||
mahāviśālamauliṃ ca prordhvabhūtaśiroruham |
pralambakarṇapālīkaṃ piṅgalaśmaśrubhīṣaṇam || 14 ||
pralambitalalajjihvamatyutkaṭakṛkāṭikam
sthūlāsthijatrusaṃsthānaṃ dīrghaskandhadvayotkaṭam || 15 ||
nimagnakakṣākuharaṃ śuṣkaṃ hrasvabhujadvayam |
viralāṅgalihastānaṃ natapīnanakhāvalim || 16 ||
rukṣāṇi śuṣkāṇi sphuṭitāni vidīrṇāni keśānāmagrāṇyagrabhāgā yasya tam | mahatī
sthūlā lambāyamānā dīrghā śirodharā grīvā yasya tam | atīvacipiṭaṃ ' nimnaṃ ghrāṇaṃ
nāsā yasya tam | śuṣkau oṣṭhau yasya tam | danturān ati atidanturastaṃ
mahādanturamityarthaḥ || 13 ||
mahatī dīrghā viśālā vistṛtā maulirmastakaṃ yasya tam | prakarṣeṇa ūrdhvabhūtā
udgatāḥ śiroruhāḥ keśā yasya tam | pralambakarṇapālīkaṃ lambāyamānaśrotro-

kaṭītaṭena vikaṭaṃ nirmāṃsatrikabandhanam || 17 ||
pralambasphigyugayutaṃ śuṣkamuṣkālpamehanam
dīrghanirmāṃsalorūkaṃ sthūlajānvasthipaṃjaram || 18 ||
asthicarmāvaśeṣaṃ ca śirājālitavigraham
śirālaṃ dīrghajaṃghaṃ ca sthūlagulphāsthibhīṣaṇam || 1 9 ||
ativistṛtapādaṃ ca dīrghavakrakṛśāṅgulim |
asthicarmāvaśeṣeṇa śirātāḍitavigraham || 20 ||
viśeṣeṇa śuṣko rukṣaḥ pāṃsulo dhūli dhūsara ut unnaddhaḥ kroḍo yasya tam | pṛṣṭhe
lagnā udara sambandhinī tvag yasya tam | kaṭītaṭena śroṇyuparibhāgena vikaṭaṃ

vikaṭaṃ bhīṣaṇākāraṃ kṣutkṣāmamatilomaśam |
dāvadagdhadrumākāramaticañcalalocanam || 21 ||
mūrta bhayānakamiva sarvaprāṇibhayapradam |
hṛdayākampanaṃ dṛṣṭvā taṃ pretaṃ vṛddhatāpasaḥ ||
atidīnānanaṃ kastvamiti dhairyeṇa pṛṣṭavān || 22 ||
kutastvamiha samprāptaḥ kasmātte gatirīdṛśī |
anukrośadhiyā rakṣa pṛcchāmi vada nirbhayam || 23 ||
asmākaṃ tāpasānāṃ ca na bhayaṃ tvadvidhān manāk |
śivanāmasahasrāṇāṃ vibhūtikṛvarmaṇām || 24 ||
tāpasodīritamiti tadrakṣaḥ prītipūrvakam |
niśamya prāñjaliḥ prāha taṃ kṛpāluṃ tapodhanam || 25 ||

rākṣasa uvāca- anukrośo'sti yadi te bhagavaṃstāpasottama |
svavṛttāntaṃ tadā vacmi śṛṇuṣvāvahitaḥ kṣaṇam || 26 ||
pratiṣṭhānābhidhāno'sti deśo godāvarītaṭe |
tīrthapratigraharucistatrāsaṃ brāhmaṇastvaham || 27 ||
tena karmavipākena prāpto'smi gatimīdṛśīm |
marusthale mahāghore tarutoyavivarjite || 28 ||
gato bahutaraḥ kālastatra me vasato mune |
kṣudhitasya tṛṣārtasya śītatāpasahasya ca ||2 9 ||
varṣatyapi mahāmeghe dhārāsārairdivāniśam
prāvṛṭkāle'nile vāti kiñcitprāvaraṇaṃ na me || 30 ||
parvaṇyadattadānā ye kṛtatīrthapratigrahāḥ |
ta imāṃ yonimṛcchanti mahāduḥkhanibandhanīm || 31 ||
gate bahutithe kāle marubhūmau mune mayā |
dṛṣṭo brāhmaṇadāyāda ekadā kaścidāgataḥ || 32 ||
godāvarītīra iti prayāgavyāvṛttyarthamuktam || 27 |

sūryodayamanuprāpya sandhyāvidhivivarjitaḥ
kṛtvā mūtrapurīṣe tu śaucācamanavarjitaḥ || 33 ||
muktakacchamaśaucaṃ ca sandhyākarmavivarjitam
taṃ dṛṣṭvā taccharīre'haṃ saṃkrānto bhogalipsayā || 34 ||
sa dvijo mandabhāgyānme kenacid vamijā saha
arthalobhena samprāptaḥ purīṃ puṇyāmimāṃ mune || 35 ||
antaḥ puri praviṣṭo'bhūt sa dvijo munisattama
taccharīrād bahirbhūtastvahaṃ pāpaiḥ samaṃ kṣaṇāt || 36 ||
praveśo nāsti cāsmākaṃ pretānāṃ tapasāṃnidhe
mahatāṃ pātakānāṃ ca vārāṇasyāṃ śivājñayā || 37 ||
adyāpi tāni pāpāni tadbahirnirgamecchayā
bahireva hi tiṣṭhanti sīmni pramathasādhvasāt || 38 ||
adya śvo vā paraśvo vā sa bahirnirgamiṣyati
ityāśayā sthitāḥ smo vai yāvadadya tapodhana || 3 9 ||
saṃkrāntaḥ praviṣṭaḥ || 34 |

ityāsmahe nirādhārā āśāpāśaniyantritāḥ || 40 ||
citramadyatanaṃ vacmi tapasvistanniśāmaya |
atīvabhāvikalyāṇamiti manye'dhunaiva hi || 41 ||
ā prayāgaṃ pratidinaṃ prayāmaḥ kṣudhitā vayam |
āhārakāmyayā kvāpi paraṃ no kiñcidāpnumaḥ || 42 |
santi sarvatra phalinaḥ pādapāḥ pratikānanam |
jalāśayāścaṃ svacchāpāḥ santi bhūmyāṃ pade pade || 43 ||
adyāpīti | sīmni sīmani I | sīmā pramatheti pāṭhe ādanto'pi sīmāśabdo

anyānyapi ca bhakṣyāṇi sarveṣāṃ sulabhānyaho |
pānānyapi vicitrāṇi santi bhūyāṃsi sarvataḥ || 44 ||
paraṃ no dṛggatānyeva dūre dūre brajantyaho |
daivādadyaikamāyāntaṃ dṛṣṭvā kārpaṭikaṃ mune || 45 ||
tasyāntikamahaṃ prāptaḥ kṣudhayā paripīḍitaḥ |
prasahya bhakṣayāmyenamiti matvā tvarānvitaḥ || 46 ||
yāvattaṃ tu jighṛkṣāmi tāvattadvadanāmbujāt
śivanāmapavitrā nāniragād vighnahāriṇī || 47 ||
śivanāmasmaraṇato madīyamapi pātakam |
mandībhūtaṃ tatastena praveśaṃ labdhavānaham || 48 ||
sīmasyaiḥ pramathairnāhaṃ sadyo dṛggocarīkṛtaḥ
śivanāma śrutau yeṣāṃ tānna paśyedyamo'pi yat || 4 9 ||
antargehasya sīmānaṃ prāptastena sahādhunā |
sa tu kārpaṭiko madhyaṃ praviṣṭo'hamiha sthitaḥ || 50 ||

māmuddhara kṛpālo tvaṃ yonerasmātsudāruṇāt || 51 ||
iti pretavacaḥ śrutvā sa kṛpālustapodhanaḥ |
manasā cintayāmāsa dhiṅ nijārthodyamānnarān || 52 ||
svodarambharayaḥ sarve paśupakṣimṛgādayaḥ |
sa eva dhanyaḥ saṃsāre yaḥ parārthodyataḥ sadā || 53 |
tapasādya nijenāhaṃ pretametamaghāturam |
māmeva śaraṇaṃ prāptamuddhariṣyāmyasaṃśayam || 54 ||
vimṛśyeti sa vai citte piśācaṃ prāha sattamaḥ
vimalode sarasyasmin snāhi re pāpanuttaye || 55 ||
piśāca te piśācatvaṃ tīrthasyāsya prabhāvataḥ I
kapardīśekṣaṇādadya kṣaṇātkṣīṇaṃ vinaṅkṣyati || 56 |
śrutveti sa munervākyaṃ pretaḥ prāha praṇamya tam |
prītātmā prītamanasaṃ prabaddhakarasampuṭaḥ || 57 ||
sattamaḥ satāṃ madhye śreṣṭhaḥ | tāpasa iti kvacit || 55 ||

nopasarpanti niyatamapi hiṃsrāḥ samantataḥ || 64 ||
bhaktyā bibharti yo bhasma śivamantrapavitritam |
bhāle vakṣasi dormūle na taṃ hiṃsanti hiṃsakāḥ || 65 ||
sarvebhyo duṣṭasattvebhyo yato rakṣedaharniśam |
rakṣatyeṣā tataḥ proktā vibhūtirbhūtikṛdyataḥ || 66 ||
bhāsanād bhārtsanād bhasma pāṃsuḥ pāṃsutvadāyataḥ |
pāpānāṃ kṣāraṇāt kṣāro budhairevaṃ nirucyate || 67 ||
gṛhītvādhāramadhyāt sa bhasma pretakare'rpayat |
so'pyādarātsamādāya bhāladeśe nyaveśayat || 68 ||
śivamantrairnamaḥ śivāyetyādibhiḥ || 64 |
bhāle vakṣasi dormūle śirasyapi boddhavyam | śiro lalāṭavakṣaḥskandheṣviti
śruteḥ || 65 ||
agnihotrādidagdhasya karīṣādernāmapañcakaṃ nirvakti sarvebhya iti dvayena || 66 ||

vibhūtidhāriṇaṃ vīkṣya piśācaṃ jaladevatāḥ |
jalāvagāhanaparaṃ vārayāñcakrire na tam || 6 9 |
snātvā pītvā sa nirgacchedyāvattasmājjalāśayāt |
tāvatyaiśācyamagamaddivyadehamavāpa ca || 70 ||
divyamālāmbaradharo divyagandhānulepanaḥ |
divyayānaṃ samāruhya vartma prāpto'tha pāvanam || 71 ||
gacchatā tena gagane sa tapasvī namaskṛtaḥ |
proccaiḥ provāca bhagavan mocito'smi tvayā'nagha || 72 ||
tasmātkadaryayonitvādatīvaparininditāt
asya tīrthasya māhātmyāddivyaṃ dehamavāptavān || 73 ||
piśācamocanaṃ tīrthamadyārabhya samākhyayā
anyeṣāmapi paiśācyamidaṃ snānāddhariṣyati || 74 ||
asmiṃstīrthe mahāpuṇye ye snāsyantīha mānavāḥ |
piṇḍāṃśca nirvapiṣyanti sandhyātarpaṇapūrvakam || 75 ||
daivātpaiśācyamāpannāsteṣāṃ pitṛpitāmahāḥ |
te'pi paiśācyamutsṛjya yāsyanti paramāṃ gatim || 76 ||

atra snānādikaṃ kāryaṃ paiśācyaparimocanam || 77 ||
imāṃ sāṃvatsarīṃ yātrāṃ ye kariṣyanti mānavāḥ |
tīrthapratigrahātpāpānniḥsariṣyanti te narāḥ || 78 ||
piśācamocane snātvā kapardīśaṃ samarcya ca |
kṛtvā tatrānnadānaṃ ca naro'nyatrāpi nirbhayāḥ || 7 9 |
mārgaśuklacaturdaśyāṃ kapardīśvarasannidhau |
snātvā'nyatrāpi maraṇānna paiśācyamavāpnuyuḥ || 80 ||
ityuktvā divyapuruṣo bhūyo bhūyo namasya tam |
tapodhanaṃ mahābhāgo divyāṃ gatimavāptavān || 81 |
tapodhano'pi taddṛṣṭvā mahāścaryaṃ ghaṭodbhava |
kapardīśvaramārādhya kālānnirvāṇamāptavān || 82 |
piśācamocanaṃ tīrthaṃ tadārabhya mahāmune |
vārāṇasyāṃ parāṃ khyātimagamatsarvapāpahṛt || 83 ||
naro narāḥ || 7 9 |

koṭibhojyaphalaṃ samyagekaikaparisaṃkhyayā || 84 |
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ naro niyatamānasaḥ |
bhūtaiḥ pretaiḥ piśācaiśca kadācinnābhibhūyate || 85 ||
bālagrahābhibhūtānāṃ bālānāṃ śāntikārakam |
paṭhanīyaṃ prayatnena mahākhyānamidaṃ param || 86 |
idamākhyānamākarṇya gacchan deśāntaraṃ naraḥ
coravyāghrapiśācādyairnābhibhūyeta kutracit || 87 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe piśācamocanamahimākathanaṃ nāma
catuṣpañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 54 ||
bālagrahābhibhūtānāṃ bālagrahāḥ pūtanādyāstadabhibhūtāstadākrāntāsteṣāṃ bālānām || 86 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ catuṣpañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 54 ||

|| atha pañcapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca- anye'pi ye gaṇāstatra kāśyāṃ
liṅgāni cakrire
tāṃśca te kathayiṣyāmi kumbhayone niśāmaya || 1 1 || |
gaṇena piṅgalākhyena piṅgalākhyeśasaṃjñitam |
liṅga pratiṣṭhitaṃ śambhoḥ kapardaśādudagdiśi || 2 ||
tasya darśanamātreṇa pāpānāṃ jāyate kṣayaḥ
vīrabhadro mahāprīto devadevasya śūlinaḥ || 3 ||
vīrabhadreśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ dhyāyedadyāpi niścalaḥ |
tasya darśanamātreṇa vīrasiddhiḥ prajāyate || 4 |
avimukteśvarātpaśvādvīrabhadreśvaraṃ naraḥ |
samarcya na raṇe bhaṅga kadācidapi cāpnuyāt || 5 |
vīrabhadraḥ svayaṃ sākṣādvīramūrtidharo mune |
saṃharedvighnasaṃghātamavimuktanivāsinām || 6 ||
adhyāye pañcapañcāśe mahimānandakānanaḥ |
piṅgalādyairgaṇeśaiśca liṅgārādhanamucyate || 1 |
udaguttarasyām || 2 |
skanda bole-

bhadrayā bhadrakālyā ca bhāryayā śubhayā yutam |
vīrabhadraṃ naro'bhyarcya kāśīvāsaphalaṃ labhet || 7 ||
kirātena kirāteśaṃ liṅga kāśyāṃ pratiṣṭhitam |
kedārāddakṣiṇe bhāge bhaktānāmabhayapradam || 8 |
caturmukho gaṇaḥ śrīmān vṛddhakāleśasannidhau |
caturmukheśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ dhyāyedadyāpi niścalaḥ || 9 |
bhaktāścaturmukheśasya caturānanavaddivi |
pūjyante surasaṃghātaiḥ sarvabhogasamanvitāḥ || 10 ||
nikumbheśvaramālokya nikumbhagaṇapūjitam |
pūjayitvā vrajan grāmaṃ kāryasiddhimavāpnuyāt ||
kubereśasamīpe tu śivaloke mahīyate || 11 ||
pañcākṣeśaṃ mahāliṅga mahādevasya dakṣiṇe |
samabhyarcya naraḥ kāśyāṃ jātismṛtimavāpnuyāt || 12 ||
śubhayā śubhakāriṇyā || 7 ||
vṛddhakāleśasannidhau dakṣiṇabhāga ityanuṣajyate || 9 |
tathā kubereśasamīpa iti || 11 ||

antargṛhottaradvāri dhyātvā śivapure vaset || 13 ||
bhārabhūteśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ yaiḥ kāśyāṃ na vilokitam |
bhārabhūtāḥ pṛthivyāste'vakeśina iva drumāḥ || 14 |
gaṇena tryakṣasaṃjñena liṅge tryakṣeśvaraṃ param |
trilocanapurobhāge śīlyetā'dyāpi kumbhaja || 15 ||
tasya liṅgasya ye bhaktāste tu dehāvasānataḥ |
tryakṣā eva prajāyante nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 16 ||
kṣemako nāma gaṇapaḥ kāśyāṃ mūrtidharaḥ svayam |
viśveśvaraṃ sarvagataṃ dhyāyedadyāpi niścalaḥ || 17 ||
kṣemakaṃ pūjayedyastu vārāṇasyāṃ mahāgaṇam |
vighnāstasya pralīyante kṣemaṃ syācca pade pade || 18 ||
deśāntaraṃ gato yastu tasyāgamanakāmyayā |
kṣemakaḥ pūjanīyo'tra kṣemeṇāśu sa āvrajet || 1 9 ||
avakeśino'phalāḥ || 14 ||

lāṅgalīśvaramālokya liṅga lāṅgalinārcitam |
viśveśāduttare bhāge na naro rogabhāgbhavet || 20 ||
lāṅgalīśaṃ sakṛtpūjya pañcalāṅgaladānajam |
phalaṃ prāpnotyavikalaṃ sarvasampatkaraṃ param || 21 ||
virādheśvaramārādhya virādhagaṇapūjitam |
sarvāparādhayukto'pi nā'parādhyati kutracit || 22 ||
dine dine'parādho yaḥ kriyate kāśivāsibhiḥ |
sa yāti saṃkṣayaṃ kṣipraṃ virādheśasamarcanāt || 23 ||
nairṛte daṇḍapāṇestu virādheśaṃ prayatnataḥ |
natvā sarvāparādhebhyo mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 24 ||
sumukheśaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ sumukhākhyagaṇārcitam |
paścimābhimukhaṃ liṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 25 ||
snātvā pilipilātīrthe sumukheśaṃ vilokya ca I
sadaiva sumukhaṃ paśyeddharmarājaṃ na durmukham || 26 ||
āṣāḍhinārcitaṃ liṅgamāṣāḍhīśvarasaṃjñikam |
dṛṣṭvā''ṣāḍhyā naro bhaktyā sarvaiḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 27 ||
dṛṣṭvā''ṣāḍhyāṃ pañcadaśyāmityagrimamanuṣañjanīyam || 27 |

āṣāḍhyāṃ pañcadaśyāṃ vai na pāpaiḥ paritapyate || 28 |
śuciśuklacaturdaśyāṃ pañcadaśyāmathāpi vā
kṛtvā sāṃvatsarīṃ yātrāmanenā jāyate naraḥ || 2 9 |
skanda uvāca - caiteṣu vārāṇasyāṃ sthiteṣviti |
mune gaṇeṣu
svanāmnā sthāpya liṅgāni viśveśaparituṣṭaye || 30 ||
viśveśaścintayāñcakre punaḥ kāśīpravṛttaye |
kaṃ vā hitaṃ prahityādya nirvṛtiṃ paramāṃ bhaje || 31 ||
yoginyastigmagurvedhāḥ śaṅkakarṇamukhā gaṇāḥ |
vyāvṛttya nāgatāḥ kāśyāḥ sindhugā iva sindhavaḥ || 32 ||
dhruvaṃ kāśyāṃ praviṣṭā ye te praviṣṭā mamodare |
teṣāṃ vinirgamo nāsti dīpte'gnau haviṣāmiva || 33 ||
yeṣāṃ hi saṃsthitiḥ kāśyāṃ liṅgārcanaratātmanām |
ta eva mama liṅgāni jaṅgamāni na saṃśayaḥ || 34 ||
anenā niṣpāpaḥ || 2 9 ||
prahṛtya prasthāpya || 31 |

sthāvarā jaṅgamāḥ kāśyāmacetanasacetanāḥ
sarve mamaiva liṅgāni tebhyo hyanti durdhiyaḥ || 35 ||
vāci vārāṇasī yeṣāṃ śrutau vaiśveśvarī kathā
ta eva kāśīliṅgāni varāṇyarcyānyahaṃ yathā || 36 |
vārāṇasītiṃ kāśīti rudrāvāsa iti sphuṭam
mukhādvinirgataṃ yeṣāṃ teṣāṃ na prabhavedyamaḥ || 37 ||

kāśyāṃ nānyatra nirvighnaṃ vāñchedrājyamapi kvacit kvacit || 41 ||
kiyannimeṣasaṃbhogyāḥ santi lakṣmyāḥ pade pade |
paraṃ nirantarasukhā'mutrāpyatrāpi kāśikā || 42 |
viśvanātho hyahaṃ nāthaḥ kāśikā muktikāśikā |
sudhātaraṅgā svargaṅgā trayyeṣā kinna yacchati || 43 ||
pañcakrośyā parimitā tanureṣā purī mama |
avicchinnapramāṇardhirbhaktanirvāṇakāraṇam
saṃsārabhārakhinnānāṃ yātāyātakṛtāṃ sadā |

cakravarteriyaṃ chatraṃ vicitraṃ sarvatāpahṛt |
kāśī nirvāṇarājasya mama śūloccadaṇḍavat || 47 ||
nirvāṇalakṣmīṃ ye puṇyāḥ parivāñchanti līlayā
nirantarasukhaprāptyai kāśī tyājyā na tairnṛbhiḥ || 48 ||
mamā''nandavane ye vai nirantaravanaukasaḥ |
mokṣalakṣmīphalānyatra susvādūni labhanti te || 4 9 ||
nirmamaṃ cāpi nirmohaṃ yā māmapi vimohayet
kairna saṃsmaraṇīyā sā kāśī viśvavimohinī || 50 ||
nāmā'pi madhuraṃ yasyāḥ parānandaprakāśakam |
kāśyā : kāśīti kāśīti sā kaiḥ puṇyairna japyate || 51 ||
kāśīnāmasudhāpānaṃ ye kurvanti nirantaram |
teṣāṃ vartma bhavatyeva sudhāma vasudhāmayam || 52 |
mamatārahitasyāpi mama sarvātmano dhruvam |
ta eva māmakā loke ye kāśīnāmajāpakāḥ || 53 |
nirvāṇarājasya cakravarteriti sambandhaḥ | cakravarterityārṣam || 47 |

rahasyamiti vijñāya vārāṇasyā gaṇeśvaraiḥ |
sabrahmayoginībradhnaiḥ sthitaṃ tatraiva nānyathā || 54 ||
anyathā tāśca yoginyaḥ sa raviḥ sa pitāmahaḥ |
te gaṇā māṃ parityajya kathaṃ tiṣṭheyuranyataḥ || 55 ||
atīvabhadraṃ saṃjātaṃ kāśyāṃ tiṣṭhatsu teṣu hi |
eko'pi bhede prabhavedrājye rājyāntaraṃ vinā || 56 |
labdhapraveśāstāvantaste sarve matsvarūpiṇa |
yatiṣyanti yato'vaśyaṃ madāgamanahetave || 57 ||
anyānapi preṣayāmi matpārśvaparivartinaḥ |
ye te tatra sthitāḥ śreṣṭhā api gantāsmyahaṃ tataḥ || 58 |
vicāryeti mahādevaḥ samāhūya gajānanam |
prāhiṇotkathayitveti gaccha kāśīmitaḥ suta || 5 9 |
pañcapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 55 ||

tatra sthito'pi saṃsiddhyai yatasva sahito gaṇaiḥ |
nirvighnaṃ kuru cāsmākaṃ nṛpe vighnaṃ samācara || 60 ||
ādhāya śāsanaṃ mūrdhni gaṇādhīśo'tha dhūrjaṭeḥ |
pratasthe tvaritaḥ kāśīṃ sthitijñaḥ sthitihetave || 61 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe kāśīvarṇana - gaṇeśapreṣaṇaṃ nāma
pañcapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 55 ||

skanda uvāca-
atheśājñāṃ samādāya gajavaktraḥ pratasthivān |
śambhoḥ kāśyāgamopāyaṃ cintayanmandarādritaḥ || 1 |
prāpya vārāṇasīṃ tūrṇamāśu syandanago vibhuḥ |
vāḍavīṃ mūrtimālambya prāviśacchakunaiḥ stutaḥ ||2 |
nakṣatrapāṭhako bhūtvā vṛddhaḥ pratyavarodhagaḥ |
cacāra madhye nagaraṃ paurāṇāṃ prītimāvahan || 3 ||
svayameva niśābhāge svapnaṃ sandarśayannṛṇām |
prātasteṣāṃ gṛhān gatvā teṣāṃ vakti balābalam ||4 ||
ṣaḍuttare'tha pañcāśe'pyadhyāye'tyantapāvane |
duṇḍermāyāprapañcaśca varṇyate'tisukhapradaḥ || 1 |
atheti maṅgalārthaḥ || 1 |
āśu syandanagaḥ śīghragāmirathagaḥ | ākhviti kvacit | vāḍavīṃ mūrti
brāhmaṇamūrtim |
vāḍavaṃ karaṇe strīṇāṃ ghoṭakaughe napuṃsakam |
pātāle na striyāṃ puṃsi brāhmaṇe vaḍavānalaḥ || iti medinīkāraḥ |
' śakunairyātrikairmāṅgalikaiḥ savatsadhenupramukhairiti yāvat | stutaḥ stuterviṣayīkṛtaḥ

bhavatkautūhalotpattyai tadeva kathayāmyaham || 5 ||
svapatā bhavatā rātrau turye yāme mahāhṛdaḥ
adarśi tatra ca bhavān majjanmajjaṃstaṭaṃ gataḥ ||6 ||
tadambu picchile paṅke magnonmagno'si bhūriśaḥ
duḥsvapnasyā'sya ca mahān vipāko'tibhayapradaḥ ||7 ||
kāṣāyavasano muṇḍaḥ praikṣyaho bhavatā'pi yaḥ
paritāpaṃ mahāneṣa janayiṣyati dāruṇam || 8 ||
rātrau sūryagraho dṛṣṭo mahā'niṣṭakaro dhruvam |
aindraṃ dhanurdvayaṃ rātrau yadaloki na tacchubham || 9 ||
pratīcyāṃ ravirāgatya prodyantaṃ vyomni śītagum |
pātayāmāsa bhūpṛṣṭhe tadrājyabhayasūcakam || 10 ||
magnaśvāsau unmagnaśceti magnonmagnaḥ | magnomagna iti kvacit | vipākaḥ
phalam || 7 |

yadadarśi na tadbhadraṃ rāṣṭrabhaṅgāya kevalam || 11 ||
viśīryatkeśadaśanaṃ nīyamānaṃ ca dakṣiṇe
ātmānaṃ yatsamadrākṣīḥ kuṭumbasyāpi bhīṣaṇam || 12 ||
prāsādadhvajabhaṅgo yastvayaikṣata niśākṣaye
rājyakṣayakaraṃ viddhi mahotpātāya niścitam || 13 ||
nagarī plāvitā svapne taraṅgaiḥ kṣīranīradheḥ
pakṣaistricaturaiḥ śaṅke mahāśaṅkāṃ puraukasām || 14 ||
svapne vānarayānena yattvamūḍho'si dakṣiṇām
atastadvaṃcanopāyaḥ puratyāgo mahāmate || 15 ||
rudatī yā tvayā dṛṣṭā mahilaikā niśātyaye
muktakeśī vivasanā sā nārī śrīrivodgatā || 16 ||

devālayasya kalaśo yattvayā vīkṣitaḥ patan
dinaiḥ katipayaireva rājyabhaṅgo bhaviṣyati || 17 ||
purī parivṛtā svapne mṛgayūthaiḥ samantataḥ
rorūyamāṇairatyarthaṃ māsenaivovasī bhavet || 18 ||
ātāyiyūkagṛdhādyaiḥ purīmuparicāribhiḥ
sūcyate'tyāhitaṃ kiñciddhruvamatra nivāsinām || 1 9 ||
svapnotpātāniti bahūn śaṃsan śaṃsannitastataḥ
bahūnuccāṭayāñcakre sa vighneśaḥ puraukasaḥ || 20 ||
keṣāñcitpurato'vādīd grahacāraṃ pradarśayan |
ekarāśisthitāḥ saurisitabhaumā na śobhanāḥ || 21 ||
so'yaṃ dhūmagraho vyomni bhittvā saptarṣimaṇḍalam
prayātaḥ paścimāmāśāṃ sa nāśāya viśāṃpateḥ || 22 ||
mṛgāḥ kukkurāstatsādhāraṇā vā teṣām | yūthaiḥ samūhaiḥ || 18 ||
ātāyiścillaḥ , yūko ghūkastatpratipakṣabhūto bako vā | ghūketi vā pāṭhaḥ | gṛdhro

aticāragato mandaḥ punarvakrādhvasaṃsthitaḥ
pāpagrahasamāyukto na yukto'yamiheṣyate || 23 ||
vyatīte vāsare yo'yaṃ bhūkampaḥ samapadyata
kampaṃ janayate'tīva hṛdo me'pi puraukasaḥ || 24 ||
udīcyāṃ dakṣiṇāśāyāṃ yeyamulkā pradhāvitā
vilīnā ca viyatyeva sanirghātaṃ na sā śubhā || 25 |
unmūlito mahāmūlo mahānilarayeṇa yaḥ
catvare caityavṛkṣo'yaṃ mahotpātaṃ praśaṃsati || 26 |
sūryodayamanuprāpya prācyāṃ śuṣkatarupari |
karaṭo rāraṭītyeṣa kaṭūtkaṭabhayapradaḥ || 27 ||
madhye vipaṇi yattūrṇaṃ kauciccāraṇyacāriṇau
mṛgau mṛgayatāṃ yātau paurāṇāṃ purato'hitau || 28 ||
aticāragato rāśimullaṃghya gataḥ | mandaḥ śaniḥ | pāpagrahā rāhuketubhaumāstaiḥ
samāyuktaḥ || 23 ||

mahākālabhayaṃ manye'pyakāle'pi puraukasām || 2 9 ||
sādhvasaṃ janayitveti keciduccāṭitāḥ puraḥ |
tena vighnakṛtā paurāḥ kapaṭadvijarūpiṇā || 30 |
atha madhye'varodhaṃ sa praviśya nijamāyayā |
dṛṣṭārthameva kathayan strīṇāṃ visrambhabhūrabhūt || 31 ||
tava putraśataṃ jajñe saptonaṃ śubhalakṣaṇe |
teṣvekasturagārūḍho bāhyālyāṃ patito mṛtaḥ || 32 ||
antarvatnī tviyaṃ kanyāṃ janayiṣyati śobhanām
eṣā hi durbhagā pūrva sāmprataṃ subhagā'bhavat subhagā'bhavat || 33 ||
rasālā āmrāḥ , śālāḥ sarjāsteṣāṃ mukulaṃ kuḍmalam || 2 9 |
puraḥ puryāḥ || 30 ||
avarodhamantaḥpuram || 31 |
bāhyālyāṃ bahiḥ setau || 32 ||

muktālaṅkṛtiretasyai rājñā dattā nijorasa : || 34 ||
pañcasaptadinānyeva jātānītīha tarkyate
asyai rājñā prasādena grāmau dātumudīritau || 35 ||
iti dṛṣṭārthakathanai rājñīmānyo'bhavadvijaḥ
varṇayanti ca tā rājñaḥ parokṣe'pi guṇān bahūn || 36 ||
aho yādṛgasau vipraḥ sarvatrā'tivicakṣaṇaḥ
suśīlaśca surūpaśca satyavāṅ mitabhāṣaṇaḥ || 37 ||
alolupa udāraśca sadācāro jitendriyaḥ
api svalpena santuṣṭaḥ pratigrahaparāṅmukhaḥ || 38 ||
jitakrodhaḥ prasannāsyastvanasūyuravañcakaḥ
kṛtajñaḥ prītisumukhaḥ parivādaparāṅmukhaḥ || 3 9 ||
puṇyopadeṣṭā puṇyātmā sarvavrataparāyaṇaḥ |
śuciḥ śucicaritraśca śrutismṛtiviśāradaḥ
dhīraḥ puṇyetihāsajñaḥ sarvadṛk sarvasaṃmataḥ
kalākalāpakuśalo jyotiḥśāstraviduttamaḥ || 41 ||
kṣamī kulīno'kṛpaṇo bhoktā nirmalamānasaḥ
ityādiguṇasampannaḥ ko'pi kvāpi na dṛggataḥ
alaṃkṛtiralaṅkāraḥ || 34 |

kālaṃ vinodayanti sma antaḥpuracarāḥ striyaḥ || 43 ||
ekadā'vasaraṃ prāpya divodāsasya bhūbhujaḥ
rājñī līlāvatī nāma rājñe taṃ vinyavedayat
rājan vṛddho guṇairvṛddho brāhmaṇa : suvicakṣaṇaḥ
eko'sti sa tu draṣṭavyo mūrto brahmanidhiḥ paraḥ || 45 ||
rājñī rājñā kṛtā'nujñā sakhīṃ preṣya vicakṣaṇām
ānināya ca taṃ vipraṃ brāhmaṃ teja ivāṅgavat || 46 ||
rājā'pi dūrādāyāntaṃ taṃ vilokya mahīsuram |
yatrākṛtirguṇāstatra jaharṣeti jaharṣeti vadan hṛdi || 47 ||
vinyavedayadviśeṣeṇa jñāpitavatī || 44 ||

caturnigamajābhiḥ sa tamāśīrbhiranandayat
kṛtapraṇāmo rājñā sa sādaraṃ dattamāsanam
bheje'tha kuśalaṃ pṛṣṭaḥ sa rājñā tena bhūpatiḥ || 4 9 ||
parasparaṃ kuśalinau kuśalau ca kathāgame
praśnottarābhyāṃ santuṣṭau dvijavaryakṣamābhṛtau || 50 ||
kathāvasāne rājñā'tha gehaṃ visasṛje dvijaḥ
labdhamānamahāpūjaḥ sa svamāśragamāviśat || 51 ||
gate'tha svāśramaṃ vipre divodāso nareśvaraḥ
līlāvatyāḥ puro vipraṃ varṇayāmāsa bhūriśaḥ || 52 ||
mahādevī mahāprājñe līlāvati guṇapriye
yathāśaṃsi tathā viprastato'pi guṇavattaraḥ || 53 ||

atītaṃ vetti vetti sakalaṃ sakalaṃ vartamānamavaiti ca
praṣṭavyaḥ prātarāhūya bhaviṣyaṃ kiñcideṣa vai || 54 ||
mahāvibhavasaṃbhārairmahābhogairanekadhā
vyuṣṭāyāṃ sa nṛpo rātryāṃ prātarāhūtavān dvijam || 55 ||
satkṛtya taṃ dvijaṃ bhaktyā dukūlādipradānataḥ |
ekānte taṃ dvijaṃ rājā papraccha nijahṛtsthitam || 56 ||
rājovāca-
dvijavaryo bhavānekaḥ pratibhātīti niścitam
yathā tattvavatī te dhīrna tathā'nyasya me matiḥ || 57 ||
dṛṣṭvā tvāṃ tu mahāprājñaṃ śāntaṃ dāntaṃ taponidhim |
kiñcitpraṣṭumanā vipra tadākhyāhi yathārthavat || 58 ||
śāsiteyaṃ mayā pṛthvī na tathā'nyaistu pārthivaiḥ
yāvadbhūtimayā bhuktā divyā bhogā anekadhā || 5 9 ||
dukūlaṃ paṭṭavastram || 56 ||
eko mukhyaḥ kevalo veti pratibhātītyatra pratibhātītyasyopariṣṭāditiśabdo
draṣṭavyaḥ || 57 ||
yāvadbhūti aiśvaryamanatikramya || 5 9 ||

vinirjitya haṭhāduṣṭān prajeyaṃ paripālitā || 60 |
dvijapādārcanātkiñcitsukṛtaṃ vedmi nā'param
anenāparikathyena kathiteneha kiṃ mama || 61 ||
nirvismamiva me cetaḥ sāmprataṃ sarvakarmasu
vicāryārya śubhodarkamata ākhyāhi sattama || 62 ||
dvija uvāca-
api svalpataraṃ kṛtyaṃ yadbhavedbhūbhujāmiha
ekānte tattu pṛṣṭena vaktavyaṃ sudhiyā sadā || 63 ||
amātyenāpyapṛṣṭena na vaktavyaṃ nṛpāgrataḥ
mahāpamānabhītena stokamapyatra kiñcana || 64 ||
pṛṣṭaścet kathayāmīha mā tatra kuru saṃśayam
tatkṛte tava gantā vai manonirvedakāraṇam || 65 ||
aparikathyena kathanānarheṇa mama kiṃ na kiñcit | mayeti kvacit | yadāha
bhāgavate bhagavān – ' kṛtasyāparikīrtanam iti || 61 ||
nirvismaṃ viraktam || 62 |
tu punaḥ || 63 ||
tatkṛte yanmayā ucyate tasmin kṛte satīti | tvatkṛta iti pāṭhe pūrveṇaivā'nvayaḥ |
gantā gamiṣyati || 65 ||

śṛṇu rājan mahābuddhe nāyathārthaṃ bravīmyaham
vikrānto'syatiśūro'si bhāgyavānasi sarvadā || 66 ||
puṇyena yaśasā buddhyā sampanno'sti bhavān yathā
manye tathā'marāvatyāṃ tridaśeśo'pi naiva hi || 67 ||
sudhiyā tvāṃ guruṃ manye prasādena sudhākaram
tejasā'sti bhavānarka : pratāpenāśuśukṣaṇiḥ || 68 |
prabhañjano balenā'si śrīdo'si śrīsamarpaṇaiḥ
śāsanena bhavān rudro nirṛtistvaṃ raṇā'ṅgaṇe || 6 9 ||
duṣṭapāśayitā pāśī yamo niyamane satām
indanāttvaṃ mahendro'si kṣamayā tvamasi kṣamā || 70 ||
maryādayā bhavānabdhirmahattva himavānasi
bhārgavo rājanītyāsi rājyena manunā samaḥ || 71 ||
santāpahartā'mbudavatpavitro gāṅganāmavat |
sarveṣāmeva jantūnāṃ kāśīvasugatipradaḥ || 72 ||
nirṛtiryamo mṛtyurvā || 6 9 |

vidhivattvaṃ vidhātā'si bhāratī te mukhāmbuje || 73 ||
tvatpāṇipadme kamalā tvatkrodhe'sti halāhalaḥ
amṛtaṃ tava vāgeva tvadbhujāvaśvinīsutau
tatkiṃ yattvayi bhujānau sarvadevamayo hyasi
tasmāttava śubhodarko mayā jñāto'sti tattvataḥ
ārabhyā'dyadinād bhūpa brāhmaṇo'ṣṭādaśe'hani
udīcyaḥ kaścidāgatya dhruvaṃ dhruvaṃ tvāmupadekṣyati || 76 ||
tasya vākyaṃ tvayā rājan kartavyamavicāritam
tataste hṛtsthitaṃ sarvaṃ setsyatyeva mahāmate || 77 ||
ityuktvā pṛcchya rājānaṃ labdhānujño dvijottamaḥ
viveśa svāśramaṃ tuṣṭo nṛpo'pyāścaryavānabhūt
amṛtameveti . sambandhaḥ | ivārthe evaśabdaḥ || 74 |
kiṃ bahunā , tatkimiti | yatkiñcit sāraṃ vastu - jātaṃ tatsarvaṃ tvayi bhūjānau

itthaṃ vighnajitā sarvā purī svātmavaśīkṛtā
sapaurā sāvarodhā ca sanṛpā nijamāyayaḥ || 7 9 ||
kṛtakṛtyamivātmānaṃ tato matvā sa vighnajit
vidhāya bahudhātmānaṃ kāśyāṃ sthitimavāpa ca || 80 ||
yadā sa na divodāsaḥ prāgāsīt kumbhasambhava
tadātanaṃ nijaṃ sthānamalañcakre gaṇādhipaḥ || 81 ||
divodāse narapatau viṣṇunoccāṭite sati |
punarnavīkṛtāyāṃ ca nagaryāṃ viśvakarmaṇā || 82 ||
svayamāgatya devena mandarātsundarāṃ purīm |
vārāṇasīṃ prathamatastuṣṭuve gaṇanāyakam ? " || 83 ||
agastya kathaṃ uvāca-
stuto bhagavetā devadevena vighnajit
kathaṃ ca bahudhātmānaṃ sa cakāra vināyakaḥ || 84 ||
|| iti śrīkāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ rāmānandakṛtāyāṃ ṣaṭpañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 56 |

iti sarvaṃ samāsena kathayasva ṣaḍānana || 85 |
ityudīritamākarṇya kumbhayone : ṣaḍānanaḥ
yathāvatkathayāmāsa gaṇarājakathāṃ śubhām || 86 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe gaṇeśamāyāprapañco nāma
ṣaṭpañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 56 ||

|| atha saptapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca viśveśo -
viśvayā sārdhaṃ mayā ca munisattama
mahāśākhaviśākhābhyāṃ nandibhṛṅgipurogamaḥ || 1 ||
naigameyena sahito rudraiḥ sarvatra saṃvṛtaḥ
devarṣibhiḥ samāyuktaḥ sanakādyairabhiṣṭutaḥ || 2 ||
' samastāyatanādhīśairdikpālairabhinanditaḥ
tīrthairdarśitatīrthaśca gandharvairgītamaṅgalaḥ || 3 ||
kṛtapūjo sarobhiśca nṛtyahastakapallavaiḥ |
viyatyanāhatairvādyaiḥ samantādanumoditaḥ || 4 ||
adhyāye saptapañcāśe mandarādetya śaṅkaraḥ |
astaud gajānanaṃ tasya prādurbhāvaśca kīrtyate || 1 |
viśveśo viśvayā pārvatyā saha vārāṇasīṃ purīṃ praviveśeti daśamaśloka-
gatenā'nvayaḥ || 1 |

kṛtastutiścāraṇaughairvimānairabhito vṛtaḥ || 5 ||
triviṣṭapavadhūmuṣṭibhraṣṭairlājairitastataḥ
abhivṛṣṭo mahādevaḥ saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ || 6 |
dattamālyopahāraśca bahuvidyādharīgaṇaiḥ
yakṣaguhyakasiddhaiśca khecarairabhinanditaḥ ||7 ||
kṛtapraveśaśakuno mṛgaiḥ śakunibhiḥ puraḥ
kinnarībhiḥ prahṛṣṭāsyaiḥ kinnarairupavarṇitaḥ | || 8 ||
viṣṇunā ca mahālakṣmyā brahmaṇā viśvakarmaṇā
nandināthagaṇeśena āviṣkṛtamahotsavaḥ || 9 ||
nāgāṅganābhiḥ paritaḥ kṛtanīrājanāvidhiḥ |
praviveśa mahādevaḥ purīṃ vārāṇasīṃ śubhām || 10 ||
paśyatāṃ sarvadevānāmavaruhya vṛṣendrataḥ |
pariṣvajya gaṇādhīśaṃ provāca vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ || 11 ||

mayā'pyatīvaduṣprāpyāṃ sa prasādo'sya vai śiśoḥ || 12 ||
yahuṣprasādhyaṃ hi piturapi trijagatītale |
tatsūnunā susādhyaṃ syādatra dṛṣṭāntatā mayi || 13 ||
anena gajavaktreṇa svabuddhivibhavairiha |
kāśīprāptiryathā me syāttathā kiñcidanuṣṭhitam || 14 ||
putravānahamevā'smi yacca me ciracintitam |
svapauruṣeṇa kṛtavānabhilāṣaṃ karasthitam || 15 |
ityuktvā tripurīhartā puruhūtādibhiḥ stutaḥ |
parituṣṭāva saṃhṛṣṭaḥ spaṣṭagīrbhirgajānanam ||16 ||
vibhavaḥ sāmarthyam || 14 |
karasthitaṃ santam || 15 |
trayāṇāṃ svarṇarūpyalohamayānāṃ samāhārastripurī tasyāhartā | pāṭhāntare 2 karmaṇi
ṣaṣṭhī |
ānandavanasamprāptyā harṣanirbharamānasaḥ |
caturviṃśatibhiḥ padyairastaucchambhurgajānanam || 16 ||

śrīkaṇṭha uvāca- bhaktanirvighnakāraka
jaya vighnakṛtāmādya
avighnavighnaśamanamahāvighnaikavighnakṛt || 17 ||
jaya sarvagaṇādhīśa jaya sarvagaṇāgraṇīḥ
gaṇapraṇatapādābjagaṇanātītasadguṇa || 18 ||
jaya sarvaga sarveśa sarvabuddhyekaśevadhe |
sarvamāyāprapañcajña sarvakarmāgrapūjita || 1 9 ||
sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalya jaya tvaṃ sarvamaṅgala
amaṅgalopaśamanamahāmaṅgalahetuka || 20 ||
jaya . utkarṣamāviṣkuru sarvotkarṣeṇa vartasva | ādyakāraṇa | bhaktanirvighnakāra-

jaya saṃhṛtikṛtstutya jaya satkarmasiddhida || 21 ||
siddhavandyapadāmbhoja jaya siddhividhāyaka
sarva siddhayekanilaya mahāsiddhyṛddhisūcaka || 22 ||
aśeṣaguṇanirmāṇa guṇātīta guṇātīta guṇāgraṇīḥ
paripūrṇacaritrārtha jaya tvaṃ guṇavarṇita || 23 ||
jaya sarvabalādhīśa balārāti balaprada
balākojjvaladantāgra bālābālaparākrama || 24 ||

dantāgraprotadiṅnāga jaya nāgavibhūṣaṇa || 25 ||
ye tvāṃ namanti karuṇāmaya divyamūrte
sarvainasāmapi bhuvo bhuvi muktibhāja :
teṣāṃ sadaiva harasīha mahopasargān
svargāpavargamapi sampradadāsi tebhyaḥ || 26 ||
ye vighnarāja bhavatā karuṇākaṭākṣaiḥ
“ samprekṣitāḥ kṣititale kṣaṇamātramatra
teṣāṃ kṣayanti sakalānyapi kilbiṣāṇi
lakṣmīḥ kaṭākṣayati tānpuruṣottamān hi || 27 ||

ye tvāṃ stuvanti natavighnavighātadakṣa
dākṣāyaṇī hṛdayapaṅkajatigmaraśme
śrūyanta eva ta iha prathitā na citraṃ
citraṃ tadatra gaṇapā yadaho ta eva || 28 ||
ye śīlayanti satataṃ bhavato'ṅghriyugmaṃ
te putra pautradhanadhānyasamṛddhibhājaḥ
saṃśīlitāṃdhikamalā bahubhṛtyavarge-
bhūpālabhogyakamalāṃ vimalāṃ labhante || 2 9 ||
tvaṃ kāraṇaṃ paramakāraṇakāraṇānāṃ
vedyo'si vedaviduṣāṃ satataṃ tvamekaḥ
tvaṃ mārgaṇīyamasi kiñcana mūlavācāṃ
vācāmagocara carācara divyamūrte || 30 ||
prathitā vikhyātāḥ || 28 |

vedā vidanti na yathārthatayā bhavantaṃ
brahmādayo'pi na carācarasūtradhāra
tvaṃ haṃsi pāsi vidadhāsi samastamekaḥ
kaste stutivyatikaro manasāpyagamya || 31 ||
tvadduṣṭadṛṣṭiviśikhairnihatānnihanmi
daityān purāndhaka jalaṃdharamukhyakāṃca |
kasyāsti śaktiriha yastvadṛte'pi tucchaṃ
vāñchedvidhātumiha siddhida kāryajātam || 32 |

anveṣaṇe dṛḍhirayaṃ prathito'sti dhātuḥ
sarvārthaḍhuṃḍhitatayā tava ḍhuṃḍhināma

samodamodakabharairvaradhūpadīpai-
rmālyaiḥ sugandhabahulairanulepanaiśva
saṃprīṇya kāśinagarīphaladānadakṣaṃ
proktvātha mā ka iha sidhyati naiva ḍhuṃḍhe || 36 ||
tīrthāntarāṇi ca tataḥ kramavarjito'pi
saṃsādhayanniha bhavatkaruṇākaṭākṣaiḥ
dūrīkṛtasvahitaghātyupasargavargo
ḍhuṃḍhe labhedavikalaṃ phalamatra kāśyām || 37 ||
yaḥ pratyahaṃ namati ḍhuṃḍhivināyakaṃ tvāṃ
kāśyāṃ prage pratihatākhilavighnasaṃghaḥ
no tasya jātu jagatītalavarti vastu
duṣprāpamatra ca paratra ca kiñcanāpi || 38 ||
bharaiḥ samūhairbhārairiti vā | proktvā stutvā | mā mām | proktvātha māmiti vā
pāṭhaḥ || 36 |
kramavarjitaḥ ullaṃghitakramaḥ || 37 ||
prage prātaḥ samaye || 38 |

taṃ vai japantyanudinaṃ hṛdi siddhayo'ṣṭau
bhogān vibhujya vividhān vibudhopabhogyān
nirvāṇayā kamalayā vriyate sa cānte || 3 9 ||
dūre ⋅ sthito'pyaharahastava pādapīṭhaṃ
yaḥ saṃsmaretsakalasiddhida ḍhuṃḍhirāja
kāśīsthiteravikalaṃ saphalaṃ labheta
naivānyathā na vitathā mama vākkadācit || 40 ||
jāne vighnānasaṃkhyātān vinihantumanekadhā
kṣetrasyā'sya mahābhāga nānārūpairiha sthitaḥ || 41 ||
yāni yāni ca rūpāṇi yatra yatra ca te'nagha
tāni tatra pravakṣyāmi śṛṇvantvete divaukasaḥ || 42 ||

āḍhuṃḍhya sarvabhaktebhyaḥ sarvārthān saṃprayacchasi
aṅgāravāsaravatīmiha yaiścaturthī
saṃprāpya moṃdakabharaiḥ paramodavadbhiḥ
pūjā vyadhāyi vividhā tava gandhamālyai-
stānatra putra vidadhāmi gaṇān gaṇeśa
ye tvāmiha praticaturthi samarcayanti
ḍhuṃḍhe vigāḍhamatayaḥ kṛtinasta eva
sarvāpadāṃ śirasi vāmapadaṃ nidhāya
samyaggajānana gajānanatāṃ labhante || 45 ||
māghaśuklacaturthyāṃ tu naktavrataparāyaṇāḥ
ye tvāṃ ḍhūṃḍhe'rcayiṣyanti te'rcyāḥ syurasuraguhām || 46 ||
vidhāya vārṣikīṃ yātrāṃ caturthī prāpya tāpasīm |
śuklāṃ śuklatilairbaddhvā prāśnīyāllaḍḍukān vratī || 47 ||
kāryā yātrā prayatnena kṣetrasiddhimabhīpsubhiḥ |
tasyāṃ caturthyāṃ tvatprītyai ḍhuṃḍhe sarvopasargahṛt || 48 ||
āḍhuṃḍhyā'nviṣya || 43 |

tāṃ yātrāṃ nātra yaḥ kuryānnaivedyaṃ tilalaḍḍukaiḥ |
upasargasahasraistu sa hantavyo mamājñayā || 4 9 |
homaṃ tilājyadravyeṇa yaḥ kariṣyati bhaktitaḥ |
tasyāṃ caturthyāṃ mantrajñastasya mantraḥ prasetsyati || 50 ||
vaidiko'vaidiko vā'pi yo mantraste gajānana |
japtastvatsannidhau duḍhe siddhiṃ dāsyati vāñchitām || 51 ||
īśvara uvāca -
imāṃ stutiṃ mama kṛtiṃ yaḥ paṭhiṣyati sanmatiḥ |
na jātu taṃ tu vighnaughāḥ pīḍayiṣyanti niścitam || 52 ||
ḍhauṇḍīṃ stutimimāṃ puṇyāṃ yaḥ paṭhed duṇḍisannidhau |
sānnidhyaṃ tasya satataṃ bhajeyuḥ sarvasiddhayaḥ || 53 ||
imāṃ stutiṃ naro japtvā paraṃ niyatamānasaḥ |
mānasairapi pāpaistaiḥ nābhibhūyeta karhicit || 54 ||
vaidiko gaṇānāṃ tvetyādiḥ | avaidiko gamityādiḥ || 51 ||

putrān kalatraṃ kṣetrāṇi varāśvān varamandiram
prāpnuyācca dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ duṇḍistotraṃ japannaraḥ || 55 ||
sarvasampatkaraṃ nāma stotrametanmayeritam
prajaptavyaṃ prayatnena muktikāmena sarvadā ||56 ||
japtvā stotramidaṃ puṇyaṃ kvāpi kārye gamiṣyataḥ
puṃsaḥ puraḥ sameṣyanti niyataṃ sarvasiddhayaḥ || 57 ||
anyacca kathayāmyatra śṛṇvantvete divaukasaḥ
duṇḍhinā kṣetrarakṣārthaṃ yatra yatra sthitiḥ kṛtā || 58 ||
kāśyāṃ gaṅgāsisaṃbhede nāmato'rkavināyakaḥ
dṛṣṭo'rkavāsare puṃbhiḥ sarvatāpapraśāntaye || 5 9 ||
durge nāma gaṇādhyakṣaḥ sarvadurgatināśanaḥ
kṣetrasya dakṣiṇe bhāge pūjanīyaḥ prayatnataḥ || 60 |
bhīmacaṇḍīsamīpe tu bhīmacaṇḍavināyakaḥ
kṣetranairṛtadeśastho dṛṣṭo hanti mahābhayam || 61 ||
arkadurgabhīmacaṇḍadehalyuddaṇḍapāśapāṇikharvasiddhayo bāhyāvaraṇe gaṇapāḥ sthitāḥ || 5 9 ||

======================================================================
# smp_kkh_pt3_p201-400_OCR (main text from page 1)

kṣetrasya paścime bhāge sa dehalivināyakaḥ
sarvānnivārayedvighnān bhaktānāṃ nātra saṃśayaḥ || 62 ||
kṣetravāyavyadigbhāge uddaṇḍākhyo gajānanaḥ
uddaṇḍānapi vighnaughān bhaktānāṃ daṇḍayetsadā || 63 ||
kāśyāḥ sadottarāśāyāṃ pāśapāṇirvināyakaḥ
vināyakān pāśayanti bhaktyā kāśīnivāsinām || 64 ||
gaṅgāvaraṇayoḥ saṅge ramyaḥ kharvavināyakaḥ |
akharvānapi vighnaughān bhaktānāṃ kharvayetsatām || 65 ||
prācyāṃ tu kṣetrarakṣārthaṃ siddhaḥ siddhivināyakaḥ |
paścime yamatīrthasya sādhakakṣiprasiddhidaḥ || 66 ||
bāhyāvaraṇagāścaite kāśyāmaṣṭau vināyakāḥ |
uccāṭayantyabhaktāṃśca bhaktānāṃ sarvasiddhidāḥ || 67 |
uddaṇḍān bahūn || 63 ||

dvitīyāvaraṇe caiva ye rakṣanti vināyakāḥ |
avimuktamidaṃ kṣetraṃ tānahaṃ kathayāmyataḥ || 68 |
svardhunyāḥ paścime kūle uttare'rkavināyakāt
lambodaro gaṇādhyakṣaḥ kṣālayedvighnakardamam kṣālayedvighnakardamam || 6 9 ||
tatpaścime kūṭadanta udagdurgavināyakāt
durgopasargasaṃhartā rakṣet kṣetramidaṃ sadā || 70 ||
bhīmacaṇḍagaṇādhyakṣāt kiñcidīśānadiggataḥ
kṣetrarakṣo gaṇādhyakṣaḥ pūjyaḥ śālakaṭaṃkaṭaḥ || 71 ||
prācyāṃ dehalivighneśāt kūṣmāṇḍākhyo vināyakaḥ
pūjanīya : sadā bhaktairmahotpātapraśāntaye || 72 ||
uddaṇḍākhyād gaṇapaterāśuśukṣaṇidik sthitaḥ
mahāprasiddhaḥ sampūjyo bhaktairmuṇḍavināyakaḥ || 73 ||
lambodarakūṭadantaśālakaṭaṃkaṭakūśmāṇḍamuṇḍavikaṭadvijarājaputrapraṇavā dvitīyā-
varaṇasthāḥ || 68 |
uttare'rkavināyakāditi madhyavartyāvaraṇābhiprāyam | vastuto lambodaro vāyavya-
digbhāga evāsti || 6 9 ||
kṣetraṃ rakṣatīti kṣetrarakṣo viśeṣaṇametat || 71 ||

pātāle tasya deho'sti muṇḍaṃ kāśyāṃ vyavasthitam
ataḥ saṃgīyate kāśyāṃ devo muṇḍavināyakaḥ || 74 ||
pāśapāṇergaṇeśānād dakṣiṇe vikaṭadvijam |
pūjayitvā gaṇapatiṃ gāṇapatyapadaṃ labhet || 75 ||
kharvākhyānnairṛte bhāge rājaputro vināyakaḥ
bhraṣṭarājyaṃ ca rājānaṃ rājānaṃ kurute'rcitaḥ ||76 ||
gaṅgāyāḥ paścime kūle praṇavākhyo gaṇādhipaḥ
avācyāṃ rājaputrācca praṇataḥ praṇayeddivam || 77 |
dvitīyāvaraṇe kāśyāmaṣṭāvete vināyakāḥ
utsādayeyurvighnaughān kāśīsthitinivāsinām || 78 ||
kṣetre tṛtīyāvaraṇe kṣetrarakṣākṛtaḥ sadā
ye vighnarājāḥ santīha te vaktavyā mayā'dhunā || 7 9 ||

udagvahāyāḥ svardhunyā ramye rodhasi vighnarāṭ
lambodarādudīcyāṃ tu vakratuṇḍoghasaṃghahṛt || 80 ||
kūṭadantād ' gaṇapaterudīcyāmekadantakaḥ
sadopasargasaṃsargāt pāyādānandakānanam || 81 ||
kāśībhayaharo nityamaiśyāṃ śālakaṭaṃkaṭāt
trimukho nāma vighneśaḥ kapisiṃhadvipānanaḥ || 82 ||
kūṣmāṇḍāt pūrvadigbhāge pañcāsyo nāma vighnarāṭ |
pañcāsyasyandanavaraḥ pāti vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 83 ||
herambākhyaḥ sadāgneyyāṃ pūjyo muṇḍavināyakāt
ambāvat pūrayet kāmān sarveṣāṃ kāśivāsinām
udagvahāyā uttaravāhinyā rodhasi tīre yo lambodarastasmādudīcyāmuttarasyāmiti

avācyāmarcayeddhīmān siddhyai vikaṭadantataḥ
vighnarājaṃ gaṇapatiṃ sarvavighnavināśanam || 85 |
vināyakādrājaputrāt kiñcidrakṣodiśi sthitaḥ
varadākhyo gaṇādhyakṣaḥ pūjyo bhaktavarapradaḥ || 86 |
yāmyāṃ praṇavavighneśād gaṇeśo modakapriyaḥ
pūjyaḥ piśaṅgilātīrthe devanadyāstaṭe śubhe || 87 |
caturthāvaraṇe kāśyāṃ bhaktavighnavināśakāḥ |
draṣṭavyā hṛṣṭacetobhiḥ spaṣṭamaṣṭau vināyakāḥ || 88 |
vakratuṇḍādudagdiksthaḥ svaḥ sindho rodhasi sthitaḥ
vināyako'styabhayadaḥ sarveṣāṃ bhayanāśanaḥ || 8 9 ||
-kauberyāmekadaśanāt siṃhatuṇḍo vināyakaḥ
upasargagajān hanti vārāṇasinivāsinām . || 9 0 ||
vighnarājamiti viśeṣyam || 85 |
rakṣodiśi nairṛtyāṃ diśi || 86 |
yāmyāmityuttaravahābhiprāyeṇa | vastutastu praṇavāt pratīcyāṃ modakapriyaḥ || 87 |
abhayadasiṃhatuṇḍakūṇitākṣakṣipraprasadanāḥ | cintāmaṇidantahastapiciṇḍiloddaṇḍā
caturthāvaraṇāḥ || 88 |
śreṣṭhasya vācakā iti vacanāt || 9 0 |

kūṇitākṣo gaṇādhyakṣastrituṇḍādīśadisthitaḥ
mahāśmaśānaṃ satataṃ pāyādduṣṭakudṛṣṭitaḥ || 9 1 ||
prācyāṃ pañcāsyataḥ pāyāt purīṃ kṣipraprasādanaḥ
kṣipraprasādanārcātaḥ kṣipraṃ siddhyanti siddhayaḥ || 9 2 ||
herambādvahnidigbhāge cintāmaṇivināyakaḥ
bhaktacintāmaṇiḥ sākṣāccintitārthasamarpakaḥ || 9 3 ||
vighnarājādavācyāṃ tu dantahasto gaṇeśvaraḥ
likhedvighnasahasrāṇi nṛṇāṃ vārāṇasī hām || 9 4 ||
varadādyātudhānyāṃ ca yātudhānagaṇāvṛtaḥ
devaḥ piciṇḍilo nāma purīṃ rakṣedaharniśam || 9 5 |
dṛṣṭaḥ pilipilātīrthe dakṣiṇe modakapriyāt
uddaṇḍamuṇḍo herambo bhaktebhyaḥ kiṃ na yacchati || 9 6 ||
kūṇite saṃkucita akṣiṇī yasya || 9 1 |

prāvāre pañcame kāśyāṃ dvicatuṣkavināyakāḥ
kurvanti rakṣāṃ kṣetrasya ye tānatra bravīmyaham || 9 7 ||
tīre svargataraṅgiṇyā uttare cābhayapradāt
sthūladanto gaṇeśānaḥ sthūlāḥ siddhīrdiśet satām || 9 8 ||
siṃhatuṇḍādudagbhāge kalipriyavināyakaḥ
kalahaṃ kārayennityamanyonyaṃ tairthikadruhām || 99 |
kūṇitākṣāttathaiśānyāṃ caturdanto vināyakaḥ
tasya darśanamātreṇa vighnasaṃghaḥ kṣayet svayam || 100 ||
kṣipraprasādanādaindyāṃ dvituṇḍo gaṇanāyakaḥ
agrataḥ pṛṣṭhataścāpi bibhartti sadṛśīṃ śriyam || 101 ||
tasya sandarśanātpuṃsāṃ bhavecchrīḥ sarvatomukhī
jyeṣṭho nāma gaṇādhyakṣo jyeṣṭho me putrasampadi || 102 ||

jyeṣṭhaśuklacaturdaśyāṃ sampūjyo jyeṣṭhatāptaye
sthito vahnidiśo bhāge cintāmaṇivināyakāt || 103 ||
dantahastādyamāśāyāṃ pūjyo gajavināyakaḥ
tasya sampūjanād bhaktyā gajāntā śrīravāpyate || 104 ||
piciṇḍilād gaṇapateryāmyāṃ kālavināyakaḥ
bhayaṃ na kālakalitaṃ tasya saṃsevanānnṛṇām || 105 ||
uddaṇḍamuṇḍadgaṇapāt kīnāśadiśi saṃsthitam
nāgeśaṃ gaṇapaṃ dṛṣṭvā nāgaloke mahīyate || 106 |
atha ṣaṣṭhāvaraṇagāḥ procyante vighnanāyakāḥ
teṣāṃ nāmaśravaṇādeva puṃsāṃ siddhiḥ prajāyate || 107 |
maṇikarṇo gaṇapatiḥ prācyāṃ vighnavighātakṛt
āśāvināyako vahnyāṃ bhaktāśāṃ pūrayan sthitaḥ || 108 ||
uddaṇḍo mahānmuṇḍo yasya sa tathā tasmāt | uddaṇḍaśuṇḍāditi kvacit pāṭhaḥ ,

yāṃgyāṃ sṛṣṭigaṇeśaśca sṛṣṭisaṃhārasūcakaḥ
nairṛtyāṃ yakṣavighneśaḥ sarvavighnaharaḥ paraḥ || 10 9 ||
pratīcyāṃ gajakarṇaśca sarveṣāṃ kṣemakārakaḥ
citraghaṇṭo gaṇapatirvāyavyāṃ pālayet purīm || 110 ||
sthūlajaṅgha udīcyāṃ ca śamayecchamināmagham
aiśyāmaiśīṃ purīṃ pāyāt samaṅgalavināyakaḥ || 111 ||
yamatīrthādudīcyāṃ ca pūjyo mitravināyakaḥ
saptamāvaraṇe ye ca tāṃśca vakṣye vināyakān || 112 ||
śamayecchāmināmaghamiti | śamināṃ śāntānām aghamiti rogādyupalakṣaṇaṃ śamaye-

modādyāḥ pañcavighneśāḥ ṣaṣṭho jñānavināyakaḥ
saptamo dvāravighneśo mahādvārapuraścaraḥ || 113 ||
aṣṭamaḥ sarvakaṣṭaughānavimuktavināyakaḥ
avimukte mamā kṣetre haret praṇatacetasām || 114 ||
ṣaṭṭpañcāśad gajamukhānetānyaḥ saṃsmariṣyati
dūradeśāntarastho'pi sa mṛto jñānamāpnuyāt || 115 ||
duṇḍhistutiṃ mahāpuṇyāṃ ṣaṭpañcāśad gajānanām
yaḥ paṭhiṣyati puṇyātmā tasya siddhiḥ pade pade || 116 ||
ime gaṇeśvarāḥ sarve smartavyā yatra kutracit
mahāvipatsamudrāntaḥ patantaṃ pānti mānavam || 117 ||
iti stutiṃ mahāpuṇyāṃ śrutvā caitān vināyakān
jātu vighnairna bādhyeta pāpebhyo'pi prahīyate || 118 ||
modādyāḥ pañcavighneśāstathājñānavināyakaḥ |
tadvaddvārāvimuktākhyau saptamāvṛtigāstvamī || 113 ||
sa cāvimukta iti sarvopalakṣaṇārthaḥ | sarvakaṣṭaughān hareddharati | kaṣṭamuktavināyaka
iti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 114 |

ityuktvā devadevo'pi mahotsavitamānasaḥ |
kṛtābhiṣeko brahmādyaistebhyo datvā'bhivāñchitam || 11 9 ||
samprasādya yathāyogaṃ sarvānucitacañcuraḥ
aviśadrājasadanaṃ viśvakarmavinirmitam || 120 ||
skanda uvāca-
evaṃ stuto bhagavatā devadevena vighnajit
itthaṃ ca bahudhātmānaṃ sa cakāra vināyakaḥ || 121 ||
etāni tasya nāmāni duṇḍirājasya kumbhaja
japitvā yāni manujo lapsyate nijavāñchitam || 122 ||
anye'pi tatra vai bhedāstasya duṇḍhergaṇeśituḥ
bhaktaiḥ samarcitā bhaktyā hyasaṃkhyātāḥ sahasraśaḥ || 123 ||
mahadudāramutsaṃvitamutsavayuktaṃ ceto yasya sa mahotsavitamānasaḥ || 11 9 |
ucitacañcuraḥ yathāyogyavyavahāre dakṣaḥ || 120 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 57 ||

bhagīrathagaṇādhyakṣo hariścandravināyakaḥ
kapardākhyo gaṇapatistathā binduvināyakaḥ || 124 ||
ityādyāstatra vighneśāḥ pratibhaktapratiṣṭhitāḥ
teṣāmapyarcanātpuṃsāṃ jāyante sarvasampadaḥ || 125 ||
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ naraḥ śraddhāsamanvitaḥ
sarvavighnān samutsṛjya labhate vāñchitaṃ padam || 126 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe duṇḍhivināyakaprādurbhāvo nāma
saptapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 57 ||
jaise bhagīratha - gaṇeśa , hariścandra - vināyaka , kaparda - gaṇapati , bindu - vināyaka ityādika

|| athāṣṭapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-
kiṃ cakāra haraḥ skanda mandarādrigatastadā
vilambamālambayati tasminnapi gajānane || 1 ||
skanda uvāca-
śṛṇvagastya kathāṃ puṇyāṃ kathyamānāṃ mayā'dhunā
vārāṇasyekaviṣayāmaśeṣāghaughanāśinīm ||2 ||
karīndravadane tatra kṣetravarye'vimuktake
vilambabhājitryakṣeṇa praikṣi kṣipramadhokṣajaḥ || 3 ||
prokto'tha bahuśaśceti bahumānapuraḥsaram |
tathā tvamapi mā kārṣīryathā prākprasthitaiḥ kṛtam
śrīviṣṇuruvāca-
udyamaḥ prāṇibhiḥ kāryo yathābuddhi balābalam
paraṃ phalanti karmāṇi tvadadhīnāni śaṅkara śaṅkara ||5 ||
adhyāye cāṣṭapañcāśe viṣṇorgamanamucyate |
mandarādavimukte ca divodāsasya nirvṛtiḥ || 1 ||
kṛtakṛtyamivātmānaṃ tato - matvā sa vighnajit |
vidhāya bahudhātmānaṃ kāśyāṃ sthitimavāpa ca || 2 |
ityuktaṃ tatra pṛcchati | kiṃ cakāreti || 1 ||

acetanāni karmāṇi svatantrāḥ prāṇino'pi na
tvaṃ ca tatkarmaṇāṃ sākṣī tvaṃ ca prāṇipravarttakaḥ || ||6 6 | ||
