kintu tvatpādabhaktānāṃ tādṛśī jāyate matiḥ |
tvameva kathayeḥ sādhvanena tvanuṣṭhitam || 7 7 ||
yayā yatkiñcidiha vai karma stokaṃ vā'stokameva vā
tatsiddhyatyeva giriśa tvatpādasmṛtyanuṣṭhitam || 8 |
susiddhamapi vai kāryaṃ subuddhyā'pi svanuṣṭhitam |
atvatpadasmṛtikṛtaṃ vinaśyatyeva tatkṣaṇāt || 9 |
śambhunā preṣitenādya sūdyamaḥ kriyate mayā
tvadbhaktisampattimatāṃ sampannaprāya eva naḥ || 10 ||
atīva yadasādhyaṃ syāt svabuddhibalapauruṣaiḥ
tatkāryaṃ hi susiddhaṃ syāt tvadanudhyānataḥ śiva || 11 ||
no'smākamudyamaḥ sampannaprāyaḥ siddhaprāya iti yoginyādya'nantarbhāvyāha | hīti pāṭhe
niścitamityarthaḥ || 10 ||

yānti pradakṣiṇīkṛtya ye bhavantaṃ bhavaṃ vibho
bhavanti teṣāṃ kāryāṇi puro bhūtāni te bhayāt || 12 ||
jātaṃ viddhi mahādeva kāryametatsuniścitam
kāśīprāveśikaścintyaḥ śubhalagnodayaḥ param || 13 ||
athavā kāśisamprāptau na cintyaṃ hi śubhāśubham
tadaiva hi śubhaḥ kālo yadaivāpyeta kāśikā || 14 ||
śambhuṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya praṇamya ca punaḥ punaḥ
pratasthe'tha salakṣmīko mandarād garuḍadhvajaḥ || 15 ||
dṛśoratithitāṃ nītvā viṣṇurvārāṇasīṃ tataḥ |
puṇḍarīkākṣa ityākhyāṃ saphalīkṛtavān mudā || 16 ||
gaṅgāvaraṇayorviṣṇuḥ saṃbhede svacchamānasaḥ
prakṣālya pāṇicaraṇaṃ sacailaḥ snātavānatha || 17 ||
tadā prabhṛti tattīrthaṃ pādodakamitīritam
pādau yadādau śubhadau kṣālitau pītavāsasā || 18 ||
tatra pādodake tīrthe ye snāsyantīha mānavāḥ
teṣāṃ vinaśyati kṣipraṃ pāpaṃ saptabhavārjitam || 1 9 ||
prāveśikaḥ praveśayogyaḥ , kāla iti śeṣaḥ | śubhalagnodayo vā viśiṣyate || 13 ||

tatra śrāddhaṃ naraḥ kṛtvā datvā caiva tilodakam
sapta sapta tathā sapta svavaṃśyāṃstārayiṣyati || 20 ||
gayāyāṃ yādṛśī tṛptirlabhyate prapitāmahaiḥ
tīrthe pādodake kāśyāṃ tādṛśī labhyate dhruvam || 21 ||
kṛtapādodakasnānaṃ pītapādodakodakam
dattapādodapānīyaṃ naraṃ na nirayaḥ spṛśet || 22 ||
viṣṇupādodake tīrthe prāśya pādodakaṃ sakṛt
jātucijjananīstanyaṃ na pibediti niścitam || 23 ||
sacakraśālagrāmasya śaṃkhena snāpitasya ca |
adbhiḥ pādodakasyāmbu pibannamṛtatāṃ vrajet || 24 ||
viṣṇupādodake tīrthe viṣṇupādodakaṃ pibet
yadi tatsudhayā kiṃ nu bahukālīnayā tayā || 25 ||
dattaṃ pādodapānīyaṃ devādibhyo nayena tam || 22 |
pādodakasya tīrthasyādbhiḥ śiṃkhena snāpitasyetyanvayaḥ || 24 ||

kāśyāṃ pādodake tīrthe yaiḥ kṛtā nodakakriyāḥ
janmaiva viphalaṃ teṣāṃ jalabudbudasaśriyām || 26 ||
kṛtanityakriyo viṣṇuḥ salakṣmīkaḥ sakāśyapiḥ
upasaṃhṛtya tāṃ mūrti trailokyavyāpinīṃ tathā || 27 ||
vidhāya dārṣadīṃ mūrtiṃ svahastenādikeśavaḥ
svayaṃ saṃpūjayāmāsa sarvasiddhisamṛddhidām || 28 ||
ādikeśavanāmnīṃ tāṃ śrīmūrti pārameśvarīm
sampūjya martyo vaikuṇṭhaṃ manyate svagṛhāṅgaṇam || 2 9 ||
śvetadvīpa iti khyātaṃ tatsthānaṃ kāśisīmani
śvetadvīpeva santyeva narāstanmūrtisevakāḥ || 30 ||
kṣīrābdhisaṃjñaṃ tatrānyattīrthaṃ keśavato'grataḥ I
kṛtodakakriyastatra vasetkṣīrābdhirodhasi || 31 ||
saśriyāmityatra sannibhamiti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 26 |
kṛtā nityakriyāḥ sandhyādirūpā yena sa tathā | kāśyapirgaruḍaḥ | upasaṃhṛtya tāṃ
mūrtimiti ślokadvayaṃ vākyam || 27 |

tatra śrāddhaṃ naraḥ kṛtvā gāṃ datvā ca payasvinīm
yathoktasarvābharaṇāṃ kṣīrode vāsayet pitṝn || 32 ||
ekottaraśataṃ vaṃśyānnayetpāyasakardamam
kṣīrodarodha : puṇyātmā bhaktyā tatraikadhenudaḥ || 33 ||
bahvīśca naicikīrdatvā śraddhayā'tra sadakṣiṇāḥ
śayyottarāṃśca pratyekaṃ pitṝṃstatra suvāsayet || 34 ||
kṣīrodāddakṣiṇe tatra śaṃkhatīrthamanuttamam
tatrāpi santarpya pitṝn viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 35 ||
tadyāmyāṃ cakratīrthaṃ ca pitṝṇāmapi durlabham
tatrāpi vihitaśrāddho mucyate paitṛkādṛṇāt || 36 ||
tatsannidhau gadātīrthaṃ viṣvagādhinibarhaṇam
tāraṇaṃ ca pitṝṇāṃ vai kāraṇaṃ cainasāṃ kṣaye || 37 ||
yathoktaṃ svarṇaśṛṅgaraupyakhurādyābharaṇaṃ yasyāḥ sā tathā tām || 32 ||

padmatīrthaṃ tadagre tu tatra snātvā narottamaḥ
pitṝn santarpya vidhinā padmayā naiva hīyate || 38 ||
tatraiva ca mahālakṣmyāstīrthaṃ trailokyaviśrutam
svayaṃ yatra mahālakṣmīḥ snātā trailokyaharṣadā || 3 9 ||
tatra tīrthe kṛtasnāno datvā ratnāni kāñcanam
paṭṭāmbarāṇi viprebhyo na lakṣmyā parihīyate ||
yatra yatra hi jāyeta tatra tatra samṛddhimān
pitaro'pi hi saśrīkāstasya syustīrthagauravāt || 41 ||
tatrāsti hi mahālakṣmyā mūrtistrailokyavanditā
tāṃ praṇamya naro bhaktyā na rogī jāyate kvacit || 42 ||
nabhasyabahulāṣṭamyāṃ kṛtvā jāgaraṇaṃ niśi
samarcya ca mahālakṣmīṃ vratī vrataphalaṃ labhet
tārkṣyatīrthaṃ hi tatrāsti tārkṣyakeśavasannidhau
tatra snātvā naro bhaktyā saṃsārāhiṃ na paśyati ||44 ||
nabhasyabahulāṣṭamyāṃ bhādrakṛṣṇāṣṭamyām || 43 |

tadagre nāradaṃ tīrthaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam
brahmavidyopadeśaṃ ca prāptavān yatra nāradaḥ || 45 ||
tatra snāto naraḥ samyag brahmavidyāmavāpnuyāt
keśavāttena tatroktaḥ kāśyāṃ nāradakeśavaḥ || 46 ||
arcayitvā naro bhaktyā devaṃ nāradakeśavam
jananyā jaṭharaṃ pīṭhamadhyāste na kadācana
prahlādatīrthaṃ tasyāgre yatra prahlādakeśavaḥ
tatra śrāddhādikaṃ kṛtvā viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 48 ||
āmbarīṣamahātīrthamaghaghnaṃ tasya sannidhau
tatraudakīṃ kriyāṃ kurvanniṣkāluṣyaṃ labhennaraḥ
ādityakeśavaḥ pūjya ādikeśavapūrvataḥ
tasya sandarśanādeva mucyate coccapātakaiḥ || 50 ||
prāptavān keśavāditi dvitīyenānvayaḥ | yathāśrutayojanikāyāmagre nāradakeśava iti
susaṃśliṣṭaṃ na syāt || 45 ||
mucyate ceti cakārādrogaiśca || 50 ||

dattātreyeśvaraṃ tīrtha tatraivādigadādharaḥ |
pitṝn santarpya tatraiva jñānayogamavāpnuyāt || 51 ||
bhṛgukeśavapūrveṇa tīrthaṃ vai bhārgavaṃ param |
tatra snāto naraḥ prājño bhaved bhārgavavatsudhīḥ || 52 ||
tatra vāmanatīrthaṃ ca prācyāṃ vāmanakeśavāt |
pūjayitvā ca taṃ viṣṇuṃ viṣṇuṃ vasedvāmanasannidhau || 53 ||
naranārāyaṇaṃ tīrthaṃ naranārāyaṇātpuraḥ
tatra tīrthe kṛtasnāno naro nārāyaṇo bhavet bhavet || 54 ||
yajñavārāhatīrthaṃ ca tadagre pāpanāśam
pratimajjanatastatra rājasūyakratoḥ phalam || 55 ||
vidāranārasiṃhākhyaṃ tatra tīrthaṃ sunirmalam
snāto vidārayettatra pāpaṃ janmaśatārjitam || 56 ||
gopigovindatīrthaṃ ca gopigovindapūrvataḥ
snātvā tatra samabhyarcya viṣṇuṃ viṣṇupriyo bhavet || 57 ||
bhārgavamauśanasam || 53 |

tīrthaṃ lakṣmīnṛsiṃhākhyaṃ gopigovindadakṣiṇe
na lakṣmyā tyajate kvāpi tattīrthaparimajjanāt || 58 ||
tadagre śeṣatīrthaṃ ca śeṣamādhavasannidhau
tarpitānāṃ pitṝṇāṃ ca yatra tṛptirna śiṣyate ||5 9 ||
śaṃkhamādhavatīrthaṃ ca tadavācyāṃ sunirmalam
kṛtodako narastatra bhavet pāpo'pi nirmala : || 60 |
tadagre ca hayagrīvaṃ tīrthaṃ paramapāvanam
tatra snātvā hayagrīvaṃ keśavaṃ paripūjya ca || 61 ||
piṇḍaṃ ca tatra nirvāpya hayagrīvasya sannidhau
hāyagrīvīṃ śriyaṃ prāpya sa mucyeta sapūrvajaḥ || 62 ||
skanda uvāca - mayaitāni tīrthāni kathitāni te
prasaṅgato
bhūmau tilāntarāyāṃ yattatra tīrthānyanekaśaḥ || 63 ||
uddiṣṭānāṃ tu tīrthānāmeteṣāṃ kalaśodbhava
nāmamātramapi śrutvā niṣpāpo jāyate naraḥ

idānīṃ prastutaṃ vipra śṛṇu vakṣyāmi te'grataḥ
vaikuṇṭhanātho yaccakre śaṃkhacakragadādharaḥ || 65 ||
tasyāṃ mūrtī samāveśya kaiśavyāmatha keśavaḥ
śambhoḥ kārye kṛtamanā aṃśāṃśāṃśena nirgataḥ || 66 ||
agastya uvāca-
aṃśāṃśāṃśena niścakre kuto bho cakrapāṇinā
kva nirgataṃ ca hariṇā prāpya kāśīṃ ṣaḍānana || 67 ||
skanda uvāca- sāmastyena yadarthaṃ
na nirgataṃ viṣṇunā mune
bruve tatkāraṇamiti kṣaṇamātraṃ niśāmaya || 68 |
samprāpya puṇyasaṃbhāraiḥ prājño vārāṇasīṃ purīm |
na tyajetsarvabhāvena mahālābhairapīritaḥ ||6 9 ||
ataḥ pratikṛtiḥ svīyā tatra kāśyāṃ murāriṇā
pratitasthe kalaśaja stokāṃśena ca nirgatam || 70 ||
prasaṅgāgataṃ parisamāpya prastutamāvedayati | idānīmiti || 65 |
samāveśya samyagāveśya praveśya | vyāpinīṃ tanumiti śeṣaḥ | nanu kriyā
nāma vyāpāraḥ , kathaṃ sā viṣṇorvyāpakasyetyata āha - aṃśaḥ antaryāmī tasyāṃśaḥ
puruṣastasyāṃśaścaturbhujastena || 66 |
pratitasthe sthāpitā || 70 ||
he vipra ! aba maiṃ tumhāre āge vaha prastuta viṣaya kahatā hū~ , jo ki śaṃkha - cakra-

kiñcitkāśyā udīcyāṃ ca gatvā devena cakriṇā
svasthityai kalpitaṃ sthānaṃ dharmakṣetramitīritam || 71 ||
tatastu saugataṃ rūpaṃ śiśrāya śrīpatiḥ svayam
atīvasundarataraṃ trailokyasyāpi mohanam || 72 |
śrīḥ parivrājikā jātā nitarāṃ subhagākṛtiḥ
yāmālokya jagatsarvaṃ citranyastamivāsthitam || 73 ||
viśvayoniṃ jagaddhātrīṃ nyastahastāgrapustakām
garutmānapi tacchiṣyo jāto lokottarākṛtiḥ
atyadbhutamahāprājño niḥspṛhaḥ sarvavastuṣu
guruśuśrūṣaṇaparo nyastahastāgrapustaka : || 75 ||

apṛcchat paramaṃ dharma saṃsāravinimocakam |
ācāryavaryaṃ saumyāsyaṃ prasannātmānamuttamam || 76 ||
dharmārthaśāstrakuśalaṃ jñānavijñānaśālinam |
susvaraṃ supadavyakti susnigdhamṛdubhāṣiṇam ||77 ||
stambhanoccāṭanābṛṣṭivaśīkarmādikovidam

puṇyakīrtiruvāca-
tvayā vinayakīrte yo dharmaḥ pṛṣṭaḥ sanātanaḥ
vakṣyāmyahamaśeṣeṇa śṛṇuṣva tvaṃ mahāmate || 82 ||
anādisiddhaḥ saṃsāraḥ kartṛkarmavivarjitaḥ
svayaṃ prādurbhavedeṣa svayamevaṃ vilīyate || 83 ||
brahmādistambaparyantaṃ yāvaddehanibandhanam
ātmaivaikeśvarastatra na dvitīyastadīśitā || 84 ||
yad brahmaviṣṇurudrādyāstathākhyā dehināmimāḥ
ākhyā yathā'smadādīnāṃ puṇyakīrtyādirucyate || 85 ||
anuvādapūrvakaṃ vaktuṃ pratijānīte | tvayeti | sanātanaḥ pravāharūpeṇa nityaḥ || 82 |
svabhāvavādamādāya nirīśvareśvaravādau nirasyati | anādisiddha iti || 83 ||
dehadvayopādhijagadanūdyasarvadeheṣvātmābhedaṃ pratijānīte | brahmādīti | brahmādi-
stambaparyantaṃ hiraṇyagarbhamārabhya gulmāvasānaṃ jagaditi śeṣaḥ | nibadhyate'neneti
nibandhanam , dehadvayaṃ sthūlasūkṣmalakṣaṇaṃ nibandhanaṃ yattajjagat | tathā ātmaivaiketi | tatra
tadīśitetyatra tacchabdo jagadviṣayaḥ || 84 |
nanu brahmaviṣṇuharā jaganniyantāraḥ santi tatrāha | brahmeti | dehināmasmadādīnāṃ
yathā puṇyakīrtyādirākhyocyate tathā brahmādīnāṃ caturmukha - caturbhuja - pañcavaktrādyā ucyate

deho yathā'smadādīnāṃ svakālena vilīyate |
brahmādimaśakāntānāṃ svakālāllīyate tathā || 86 |
vicāryamāṇe dehe'sminna kiñcidadhikaṃ kiñcidadhikaṃ kvacit |
āhāro maithunaṃ nidrā bhayaṃ bhayaṃ sarvatra sarvatra yatsamam || 87 ||
nijāhāraparīmāṇaṃ prāpya sarvo'pi dehabhṛt |
sadṛśīmeva saṃtṛptiṃ prāpnuyānnādhiketarām || 88 |
yathā vitṛṣitāḥ syāma pītvā peyaṃ mudā vayam |
tṛṣitāstāstu tathā'nye'pi na viśeṣo'lpako'dhikaḥ || 8 9 ||
santu nāryaḥ sahasrāṇi rūpalāvaṇyabhūmayaḥ |
paraṃ nidhuvane kāle hyekaivehopayujyate || 9 0 |
brahmādimaśakāntānāṃ dehānāṃ sāmyamāha | brahmādipadaviraktyai | deha ityārabhya idaṃ
niścityataḥ prāktanena granthena || 86 |
adhiketarāmadhikayā saha itarā nyūnā adhiketarā tāmatiriktāṃ nyūnāṃ
cetyarthaḥ || 88 |
tatra svānubhavaṃ pramāṇayati | yatheti || 8 9 |
sādhanabhūyastvābhūyastvābhyāṃ sukhasyādhikyanyūnatāṃ nirākaroti | santu nārya iti |
nidhuvane maithune ; parantu maithuna iti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 9 0 ||

adhirohe tathāpyeko na dvitīyastathātmanaḥ || 9 1 |
paryaṅaśāyināṃ svāpe sukhaṃ yadupapadyate |
tadeva saukhyaṃ nidrāyāmiha bhūśāyināmapi || 9 2 ||
yathaiva maraṇād bhītirasmadādivapuṣmatām |
brahmādikīṭakāntānāṃ tathā maraṇato bhayam || 9 3 |
sarve tanubhṛtastulyā yadi buddhyā vicāryate |
idaṃ niścitya kenā s pi no hiṃsyaḥ ko'pi kutracit || 9 4 ||
dharmo jīvadayātulyo na kvāpi jagatītale |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena kāryā jīvadayā nṛbhiḥ || 9 5 ||
ekasmin rakṣite jīve trailokyaṃ rakṣitaṃ bhavet |
ghātite ghātitaṃ tadvattasmādrakṣenna ghātayet || 9 6 ||

tasmānna hiṃsā kartavyā narairnarakabhīrubhiḥ || 9 7 ||
na hiṃsāsadṛśaṃ pāpaṃ pāpaṃ trailokye sacarācare
hiṃsako narakaṃ gacchet svargaṃ gacchedahiṃsakaḥ ||9 8 ||
santi dānānyanekāni kiṃ taistucchaphalapradaiḥ
abhītidānasadṛśaṃ paramekamapīha na ||99 ||
iha catvāri dānāni proktāni paramarṣibhiḥ
vicārya nānāśāstrāṇi śarmaṇe'tra paratra ca || 100 ||
bhītebhyaścā'bhayaṃ deyaṃ vyādhitebhyastathaiauṣadham
deyā vidyārthināṃ vidyā deyamannaṃ kṣudhāture || 101 |
jīvadayātulyo dharmo nāstītyatra vedāntināṃ saṃmatimāha | ahiṃseti | na
hiṃsyātsarvabhūtānīti śruteḥ | yadvā pūrvasūribhiḥ prāktanairboddhācāryairityarthaḥ | ahiṃsā
paramo dharma ityukteḥ || 9 7 ||
tarhi kiṃ bhūtābhayapradānādanyo dharmo nāstyeva tatrāha | iha catvārīti || 100 |

tadabhyasyaṃ prayatnena nānārthopārjanāya vai || 102 ||
arthānupā bahuśo dvādaśāyatanāni vai
paritaḥ paripūjyāni kimanyairiha pūjitaiḥ || 103 ||
pañca karmendriyāṇyeva pañca buddhīndriyāṇi caṃ
manobuddhiriha proktaṃ dvādaśāyatanaṃ śubham || 104 ||
ihaiva svarganarakau prāṇināṃ nānyataḥ kvacit
sukhaṃ svargaḥ samākhyāto duḥkhaṃ naraka eva hi || 105 ||
sukheṣu bhujyamāneṣu yatsyāddehavisarjanam |
ayameva paro mokṣo na mokṣo'nyaḥ kvacitpunaḥ || 106 ||

vāsanāsahitakleśasamucchede sati dhruvam
vijñāno paramo mokṣo vijñeyastattvacintakaiḥ || 107 |
prāmāṇikī śrutiriyaṃ procyate vedavādibhiḥ |
na hiṃsyātsarvabhūtāni nānyā hiṃsāpravartikā || 108 ||
agnīṣomīyamiti yā bhrāmikā sā'satāmiha
na sā pramāṇaṃ jñātṝṇāṃ paśvālambhanakārikā || 10 9 ||
prāmāṇikasaṃmatyā uktaṃ draḍhayati | vāsanāsahitakleśeti | vāsayati saṃsāre
pravartayatīti vāsanāsaṃvṛtiravidyeti yāvat | tatsahitāḥ kleśā avidyāsmitā-

vṛkṣāṃśchitvā paśūn hatvā kṛtvā rudhirakardamam
dagdhvā vahnau tilājyādi citraṃ svargo'bhilaṣyate || 110 ||
ityevaṃ dharmajijñāsāṃ puṇyakīrtī prakurvati |
pāramparyeṇa tacchrutvā paurā yātrāṃ pracakrire || 111 ||
parivrājikayāpyevaṃ samākṛṣṭāḥ purāṅganāḥ
tayā vijñānakaumudyā sarvavidyāvidagdhayā sarvavidyāvidagdhayā || 112 ||
bauddhadharmānavīvadat
tatastāsāṃ purastātsā |
dṛṣṭārthapratyayakarāndehasaukhyaikasādhanān || 113 ||
śruteraprāmāṇyaṃ yuktyā sādhayati | vṛkṣāniti | vṛkṣānaśvatthādīn samidāharaṇārthaṃ

vijñānakaumudyuvāca-
ānandaṃ brahmaṇo rūpaṃ śrutyaivaṃ yannigadyate
tattathaiveha mantavyaṃ mithyānānātvakalpanā || 114 ||
yāvatsvasthamidaṃ varṣma yāvannendriyaviklavaḥ
yāvajjarā ca dūre'sti tāvatsaukhyaṃ prasādhayet || 115 ||
asvāsthyendriyavaikalye vārdhake tu kutaḥ sukham
śarīramapi dātavyamarthibhyo'taḥ sukhepsubhiḥ || 116 ||
yācamānamanovṛttiprīṇane yasya no janiḥ
tena bhūrbhāravatyeṣā samudrāgaḍumairna hi || 117 ||
sarvaprakāreṇa sukhaṃ sādhanīyamiti vakṣyantī prathamaṃ śrutyavaṣṭambhena sukhaṃ sādhayati |
ānandamiti | ṣaṇḍhatvamārṣam | " ānandaṃ brahmaṇo rūpaṃ tacca mokṣe pratiṣṭhitam " , " ānando
brahmeti vyajānāt " , " sa eṣa paramānandaḥ " ityādiśrutyā yatsukhaṃ nigadyate , tattathaiva mantavyaṃ

satvarogatvaro dehaḥ saṃcayāḥ saparirakṣayāḥ
iti vijñāya vijñātā dehe saukhyaṃ prasādhayet 118 |
śvavāyasakṛmīṇāṃ ca prānte bhojyamidaṃ vapuḥ
bhasmāntaṃ taccharīraṃ ca vede satyaṃ prapadyate || 11 9 ||
sudhā jāti vikalpo'yaṃ lokeṣu parikalpyate
mānuṣye sati sāmānye ko'dhamaḥ ko'tha cottamaḥ || 120 ||
brahmādisṛṣṭireṣeti procyate vṛddhapūruṣai :
tasya sraṣṭuḥ sutau dakṣamarīcī ceti viśrutau || 121 ||
mārīcinā kaśyapena dakṣakanyāḥ sulocanā :
dharmeṇa kila mārgeṇa pariṇītāstrayodaśa || 122 ||

apīdānīntanairmartyairalpabuddhiparākramaiḥ
ayaṃ gamyastvagamyo'yaṃ vicāraḥ kriyate mudhā || 123 ||
mukhabāhūrupajjātaṃ cāturvarṇyamihoditam
kalpaneyaṃ kṛtā kṛtā pūrvairna ghaṭeta vicārata : || 124 ||
ekasyāṃ ca tanau jātā ekasmādyadi vā kvacit
catvārastanayāstatkiṃ bhinnavarṇatvamāpnuyuḥ || 125 ||
varṇāvarṇaviveko'yaṃ tasmānna pratibhāsate
ato bhedo na mantavyo mānuṣye kenacit kvacit || 126 ||
vijñānakaumudīvāṇīmityākarṇya purāṅganāḥ
bhartṛśuśrūṣaṇavatīṃ vijahurmatimuttamām || 127 ||
abhyasyākarṣaṇīṃ vidyāṃ vaśīkṛtimatīmapi
puruṣāḥ saphalīcakruḥ paradāreṣu mohitāḥ || 128 |
varṇāvarṇabhedo'pi na ghaṭata ityāha | mukheti sārdhadvayena || 124 ||

paurāḥ purāṅganāścāpi sarve tābhyāṃ vimohitāḥ || 12 9 |
vandhyānāṃ cāpi vandhyātvaṃ sā parivrājikāharat |
taistaiśca kārmaṇopāyairasaubhāgyavatīḥ striyaḥ || 130 ||
saubhāgyabhāgyasampannā vyadhādvijñānakaumudī |
kasyaicidaanaṃ dattaṃ kasyaicittilakauṣadham || 131 ||
vaśīkaraṇamantraiśca tathā bahvayo'padīkṣitāḥ |
mantrān japeyuḥ kāścicca yantrāṇyanyā likhanti ca || 132 |
kāścijjuhvati kuṇḍāgnau nānādravyāṇi niścalāḥ
evaṃ sarveṣu paureṣu nijadharmeṣu sarvathā |
parāṅmukheṣu jāteṣu prollalāsa vṛṣetaraḥ || 133 ||

siddhayaḥ kṛṣṭapacyādyā naṣṭā enaḥ praveśanāt |
āsītkuṇṭhitasāmarthyo nṛpo'pi sa manāṅmanāk || 134 ||
dūrasthito'pi vighneśo nṛpaṃ nirviṇṇamānasam
cakāra rājyakaraṇe duṇḍhirājo ripuñjayam || 135 |
ajīgaṇaddivodāso'pyaṣṭādaśadināvadhim
kadā gantā sa vai vipro yo māṃ samupadekṣyati || 136 ||
itthamaṣṭādaśe prāpte divase divaseśvare |
prāpte madhyaṃ nabhobhāgaṃ dvāraṃ prāpto dvijottamaḥ || 137 ||
sa eva puṇyakīrtyākhyo dharmakṣetrādadhokṣajaḥ |
dvijaveṣaṃ samālambya samāyāto nṛpāntikam || 138 ||
dvitraiḥ pavitrairbahudhā jaya jaya jīvetivādibhiḥ |
sametaḥ sa ito vipro mūrtimāniva pāvakaḥ || 13 9 ||
akṛṣṭapacyatvaṃ karṣaṇaṃ vinaiva sasyādisampannatvaṃm | ādyaśabdena puṭakādau

vilokya taṃ samāyāntaṃ dūrādutkaṇṭhito nṛpaḥ
mene bhaved gururayaṃ yukto madupadeśane || 140 ||
abhigamya ca taṃ rājā praṇamya ca punaḥ punaḥ
gṛhītasvastivacano nināyāntaḥpuraṃ dvijam || 141 ||
madhuparkeṇa vidhinā taṃ sampūjya janādhipaḥ
vyapetādhvaśramaṃ svasthaṃ prollasan mukhapaṅkajam || 142 ||
nivedya khādyavastūni kṛtakṛtyakriyāvidhim
paritṛptaṃ sukhāsīnaṃ papraccha papraccha brāhmaṇaṃ nṛpaḥ || 143 ||
rājovāca-
khinno'smi vipravaryā'haṃ rājyabhāraṃ samudvahan
khedo nāstyeva hi paraṃ vairāgyamiva jāyate || 144 ||
utkaṇṭhitastaddarśanotsukaḥ || 140 ||
svastivacanānyāśīrvādāḥ || 141 |
madhuparkeṇa vidhinā dadhimadhughṛtānāṃ samāhāro madhuparkaḥ , sa eva vidhiḥ prakārastena
vidhinā śāstroktaprakāreṇa madhuparkeṇa ceti vaiyadhikaraṇyaṃ vā || 142 |
khādyavastūni bhakṣyadravyāṇi | kṛtaḥ kṛtyakriyāvidhiḥ kartavyānuṣṭhānaprakāro yasmai sa
tathā tam || 143 |
khinnaḥ pīḍitaḥ || 144 |

kiṃ karomi kva gacchāmi kathaṃ me nirvṛtirbhavet
pakṣadvayyeva yāteti mama cintayato dvija || 145 ||
asīmasukhasaṃtānaṃ bhuktaṃ rājyaṃ mayā dvija
parikṣīṇavipakṣaṃ ca ca tryakṣaiśvaryāmava tryakṣaiśvaryāmava sphuṭam || 146 ||
svasāmarthyādahaṃ jātaḥ parjanyāgnyanilātmakaḥ
prajāśca pālitāḥ samyak putrā iva nijaurasā : || 147 ||
tarpitāścāpi bhūdevā vasubhiśca dine dine I
ekamevāparāddhaṃ ca mayā rājyaṃ praśāsatā || 148 ||
devāstṛṇīkṛtāḥ sarve svatapobaladarpataḥ I
tacca prajopakārārthaṃ na svārthaṃ bhavatā śape || 14 9 ||
adhunā gururedhi tvaṃ mama bhāgyodayāgataḥ
rājyaṃ tu prakaromyevaṃ nyakkṛtāntakasādhvasam || 150 ||
pakṣadvayyeva yāteti | pakṣadvayyeva māsamātramevetyarthaḥ | pakṣadvayeva yāteti pāṭhe pakṣadvaye
ātmānātmavastunormadhye'vayātā prāptamatiriti śeṣaḥ || 145 |

.. akālakālakalanaṃ mama rājye na kutracit
jarāvyādhidaridrebhyo mama rājye'pi no bhayam || 151 ||
ko'pi dharmetarāṃ vṛttiṃ na śrayenmayi śāsati
dharmodayā janāḥ sarve sarve santi sukhodayāḥ || 152 ||
sadvidyāvyasanāḥ sarve sarve sanmārgacañcurāḥ
athavā yadi kalpāntaṃ tiṣṭhedāyustato'pi kim || 153 ||
sarve bhogyāstathā bhānti yathā carvitacarvaṇam
kiṃ piṣṭapeṣaṇenātra rājyena dvijapuṅgava || 154 ||
kimapyupadiśa prājña garbhavāsopaśāntaye
athavā tvāṃ prapannasya mama kiṃ cintanairimaiḥ || 155 ||
yadeva kathayasyadya tatkariṣyāmyasaṃśayam
tvadvilokanamātreṇa sarva sarva eva eva manorathāḥ || 156 ||
anyeṣāmapi jāyante jātaprāyā mamaiva tu

avanto'pi prajāḥ svīyā nijadharmamanuvratāḥ |
purā te tripurāḥ śūrāḥ śivabhaktiparā api || 158 ||
dharāmayaṃ rathaṃ kṛtvā dhanuḥ kṛtvā himācalam |
vedāṃśca vājinaḥ kṛtvā guṇaṃ kṛtvā ca vāsukim || 15 9 ||
viriñciṃ sārathiṃ kṛtvā kṛtvā viṣṇuṃ ca pattriṇam |
rathacakre puṣpavantau pratodaṃ praṇavātmakam || 160 |
tārāgrahamayān kīlān varūthaṃ gaganātmakam |
dhvajadaṇḍaṃ sumeruṃ ca prāṃśu kalpataruṃ dhvajam || 161 ||
yoktrāṇi cakṣuḥśravasaśchandāṃsyaṅgāni rakṣakān |
bhallaṃ kālāgnirudrākhyaṃ puṃkhīkṛtya prabhañjanam || 162 ||
evaṃ svasāmarthyādikaṃ darśayitvā vairāgyaṃ prakaṭayati | athaveti || 156 |
purā te iti | tripurāstripurasthā daityā ekabāṇapātena hareṇa bhasmasātkṛtā dagdhā
iti pañcamenānvayaḥ || 158 |
puṣpavantau sūryacandrau | dvitīyāntānāṃ padānāṃ kṛtveti sambandhaḥ || 160 |

harepaikeṣu pātena līlayā bhasmasātkṛtāḥ
baliryajñakṛtāṃ śreṣṭhaḥ kṛtvā kapaṭakharvatām || 163 ||
pātālaṃ gamitaḥ pūrvaṃ hariṇā vikramaistribhiḥ
vṛttavānapi vai vṛtraḥ sutrāmṇā vinisūditaḥ || 164 ||
dadhīcirapi viprendro devairasthikṛte devairasthikṛte hataḥ
pūrvavairamanusmṛtya jayārthaṃ yudhyato hareḥ
kuśāstrairvijitasyājau tenaiva ca dadhīcinā || 165 |
śivabhaktasya bāṇasya do : sahasraṃ purā hariḥ
ciccheda saṃkhye kiṃ tenāparāddhaṃ sādhuvartinā || 166
tasmādvirodho bhadrāya na bhaveddaivataiḥ saha
devebhyo madbhayaṃ nāsti satpathīnasya vai manāk || 167 ||
sutrāmṇā indreṇa || 164 | śreṣṭhabrāhmaṇo'pyasthi-

yajñairdevatvamāpannā gīrvāṇā vāsavādayaḥ
yajñairdānaistapobhiśca tebhyo'pyādhikyamasti me || 168 ||
astu nyūnatvamādhikyaṃ kimanenā'dhunā mama '
indriyoparamaḥ prāptaḥ sukhadastava darśanāt || 16 9 ||
idānīṃ diśa me tāta karmanirmūlanakṣamam
upāyaṃ tvamupāyajña yena nirvṛtimāpnuyām || 170 ||
skanda uvāca -
gaṇeśāveśavaśato rājñeti yadudīritam
tadākarṇya hṛṣīkeśaḥ prāha brāhmaṇaveṣabhṛt || 171 ||
śrīviṣṇuruvāca-
sādhu sādhu mahāprājña nṛpacūḍāmaṇe'nagha
mayā yadupadeṣṭavyaṃ tattvatyaiva nirūpitam || 172 ||
āveśaḥ praveśaḥ || 171 |

tvamādāveva nirvṛttaḥ paraṃ me mānado hyasi
kṣālitendriyapaṅkaśca sutapaḥ svacchavāribhiḥ || 173 ||
yaduktaṃ bhavatā bhūpa tatsarvaṃ tathyameva hi
tava śaktiṃ ca jānāmi viraktiṃ ca mahāmate || 174 ||
na bhavatsadṛśo rājā bhuvi bhūto bhaviṣyati
rājyaṃ bhoktuṃ tvayājñāyi yuktaṃ yattu mumukṣasi || 175 ||
virodhe'pi hi devānāṃ tvayā nāpakṛtaṃ kvacit
dharmetarapraveśaśca tava rāṣṭre'pi no'bhavat || 176 ||
pravartitābhirbhavatā prajābhiryadanuṣṭhitam
dharme dharmaṃ svadharmajña tena tṛptā divaukasaḥ || 177 ||
eka eva hi te doṣo hṛdi me pratibhāsate
kāśyā viśveśvaro dūraṃ yatkṛto bhavatā kila || 178 ||
svacchāni nirmalāni || 173 ||
mumukṣasi tyaktumicchasi || 175 ||
dharmetaro'dharmaḥ || 1-76 |
dharme pravartitābhirityanvayaḥ || 177 |

mahāntamaparādhaṃ te te jāne bhūjānisattama
imaṃ tatpāpaśāntyai ca vacyupāyaṃ mahattaram || 17 9 ||
saṃkhyāsti yāvatī dehe dehino romasambhavā
tāvanto'pyaparādhā vai yānti liṅgapratiṣṭhayā || 180 ||
ekaṃ pratiṭhitaṃ yena liṅgamatreśabhaktitaḥ |
tenātmanā samaṃ viśvaṃ jagadetatpratiṣṭhitam || 181 ||
ratnākare ratnasaṃkhyā saṃkhyāvidbhirapīṣyate
liṅgapratiṣṭhāpuṇyasya na tu saṃkhyeti likhyate || 182 ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena kuru liṅgapratiṣṭhitim
tayā liṅgapratiṣṭhityā kṛtakṛtyo bhaviṣyasi || 183 ||
ityuktvā brāhmaṇo dadhyau kṣaṇaṃ niścalamānasaḥ
uvāca ca prahṛṣṭāsyo rājānaṃ pāṇinā spṛśan || 184 ||
bhūrjāyā yeṣāṃ te bhūjānayasteṣāṃ madhye sattama śreṣṭha bhūjānisattama | vacmi
kathayāmi || 17 9 |

śrīviṣṇuruvāca-
anyacca kiñcitpaśyāmi bhūpāla jñānacakṣuṣā
śṛṇuṣvāvahito bhūtvā tadapi prājñasattama || 185 |
dhanyo'si kṛtakṛtyo'si mānyo'si mahatāmapi
japyaṃ ca tava nāmeha prātaḥ śubhaphalepsunā || 186 |
divodāsa tvadabhyāśādapi dhanyatarā vayam |
te'pi dhanyatarā martye ye tvadākhyāṃ pracakṣate || 187 |
smāyaṃ smāyaṃ jagau vipro maulimāndolayan muhuḥ
hṛdyeva bahuśo hṛṣṭaḥ saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ || 188 |
aho bhāgyodayaścāsya aho nairmalyamasya vai
yadenamaniśaṃ dhyāyed dhyeyo viśveśvaro'khilaiḥ || 18 9 ||
tvadabhyāśāttvatsannidhānāt || 187 |
smāyaṃ smāyamiti | punaḥ punarīṣaddhāsyaṃ kṛtvetyarthaḥ || 188 ||
yadyasmādakhilairthyeya iti sambandha || 18 9 |
śrīviṣṇu bole-

aho udarka etasya na kaiścitpratipadyate |
asmākamapi yaddūramadavīyastadasya yat || 1 9 0 ||
hṛdyālocyeti vipro'tha varṇayitvā kṣitīśvaram
āviśvakāra tatsarvaṃ yatsamādhāvalokayat || 1 9 1 ||
brāhmaṇa uvāca-
rājaṃstavādya phalito manorathamahādrumaḥ
anenaiva śarīreṇa tvaṃ gantā'si paraṃ padam || 1 9 2 |
yathā viśveśvaro nityaṃ tvāmeva hṛdi śīlayet
tathāsmadādīnapi na dvijāṃstatpādalocanāt || 1 9 3 |
kṛtaliṅgapratiṣṭhaṃ tvāṃ saptame hyadya vāsarāt
divyaṃ vimānamāgatya netumeṣyati śāmbhavam śāmbhavam || 1 9 4 |
rājaṃstvaṃ vetsi kasyāyaṃ vipākaḥ sukṛtasya te
vārāṇasyāḥ puraḥ samyak sevanādityavaimyaham || 1 9 5 ||
udarka uttarakālīnaṃ phalaṃm | davīyo'lpaṃ na davīyo'davīyo mahattaram | adavīyo

tasyāpyevaṃ vipāko'sti dehānte rājasattama || 1 9 6 ||
iti śrutvā sa rājarṣirdivodāsaḥ pratāpavān I
brāhmaṇāya saśiṣyāya prādātprīto'bhivāñchitaṃm || 1 9 7 ||
atha saṃprīṇitaṃ vipraṃ praṇamya ca muhurmuhuḥ
provāca rājā saṃhṛṣṭastārito'smi bhavārṇavāt || 1 9 8 ||
brāhmaṇo'pi prahṛṣṭātmā paripūrṇamanorathaḥ |
samāpṛcchya mahīnāthaṃ sveṣṭaṃ deśaṃ jagāma ha || 1 99 ||
vilokya kāśīṃ parito māyādvijavapurhariḥ |
bhūyo bhūyo vicāryāpi kimatrātīvapāvanam || 200 ||
samprīṇitaṃ santoṣitam || 1 9 8 |

sthānaṃ yaccāhamadhyāsya nijabhaktānaśeṣataḥ
neṣyāmi paramaṃ dhāma viśveśānugrahātparāt || 201 |
saṃpradhāryeti bhagavān dṛṣṭvā pāñcanadaṃ hradam
tatra kṛtvā vidhisnānaṃ tatastatraiva saṃsthitaḥ || 202 ||
pratīkṣamāṇo lakṣmīśo maṃkṣu tryakṣasamāgamam
tārkṣya prasthāpayāñcakre rājavṛttāntavedinam || 203 ||
divodāso'pi rājendro viprendraṃ parivarṇayan
āhūya prakṛtīḥ sarvāḥ sāmātyānmaṇḍaleśvarān || 204 ||
adhyakṣānapi sarvāṃśca kośāśvebhādideśitān
putrān pañcaśataṃ prāgrayaṃ sutaṃ ca samarañjayam || 205 ||
purohitaṃ pratīhāramṛtvijo gaṇakān dvijān
sāmantān rājaputrāṃśca sūpakārāṃścikitsakān || 206 ||
vaideśikānapi bahūnnānākāryasamāgatān
sāntaḥpurāṃ ca mahiṣīṃ vṛddhagopālabālakān || 207 ||
sarvān provāca hṛṣṭātmā prabaddhakarasampuṭaḥ
yathā sa brāhmaṇaḥ prāha dinasaptāvadhisthitim || 208 ||

svayaṃ rājagṛhaṃ nītvā kumāraṃ samarañjayam || 20 9 ||
abhiṣicya mahābuddhiḥ paurān jānapadānapi
prasādīkṛtya puṇyātmā punaḥ kāśīmagānnṛpaḥ || 210 |
āgatya kāśīṃ medhāvī sa bhūpālo ripuñjayaḥ
prāsādaṃ kārayāmāsa svardhunyāḥ paścime taṭe || 211 |
ripūn pramathya samare yāvatī śrīrupārjitā
tāvatyā sa hi bhūpāla : śivālayamacīklṛpat || 212 ||
bhūpālalakṣmīrakhilā yattatra viniyojitā
bhūpālaśrīriti khyātā tataḥ sā bhūrabhūcchubhā || 213 ||
divodāseśvaraṃ liṅga pratiṣṭhāpya ripuñjayaḥ
kṛtakṛtyamivātmānamamanyata nareśvaraḥ || 214 ||
punaḥ kāśīmagāditi viṣṇuvākyātkāśīṃ tyaktvā tatpūrvadigbhage gomatītīre
saparivāro gatastatra putraṃ rājye abhiṣicya liṅgasthāpanadvārā rudraṃ prasādayitumāgataḥ |
tathā coktaṃ harivaṃśe— " viṣayānte purīṃ ramyāṃ gomatyāṃ sa nyaveśayat ' iti || 210 |

samabhyarcya namaskṛtya yāvattuṣṭāva tuṣṭidam || 215 ||
tāvannabho'ṅgaṇādāśu divyaṃ yānamavātarat
pārṣadaiḥ paritaḥ kīrṇaṃ śūlakhaṭvāṅgapāṇibhiḥ || 216 ||
atyādityāgnitejobhirbhālanetraiḥ kapardibhiḥ
śuddhasphaṭikasaṃkāśairaṅgairdīptanabho'ṅgaṇaiḥ || 217 |
vibhūṣāhiphaṇāratnajyotiḥ pūjitavigrahaiḥ
nityaprakāśasaṃtrastatamaḥ śritaśirodharaiḥ || 218 |
cāmaravyagrahastāgrarudrakanyāśatāvṛtam divyakhaganulepanaiḥ || 21 9 |
atha pāriṣadai rājā
divyairdukūlanepathyairalañcakre mudānvitaiḥ |
trinetrīkṛtasadbhālaṃ śyāmīkṛtaśirodharam || 220 ||
yānaṃ viśinaṣṭi | | pārṣadairiti | pārṣadān viśinaṣṭi | śūletyādisārdhadvayena |
khaṭvāṅgamāyudhaviśeṣaḥ || 216 ||
ati atikrāntamādityāgnitejo yaiste tathā tairatyādityāgnitejobhiḥ || 217 |
nityeti | nityaprakāśena svaprakāśena saṃtrastaistamobhirāśritā śirodharā grīvā yeṣāṃ
te , tathā taiḥ nīlakaṇṭhairityarthaḥ || 218 |

caturbhujīkṛtatanuṃ bhūṣaṇīkṛtapannagam || 221 |
mārīcinā kaśyapena dakṣakanyāḥ sulocanāḥ
candrārdhīkṛtamūrdhānaṃ ninyustaṃ pārṣadā divam || 222 ||
tadāprabhṛti tattīrthaṃ bhūpālaśrīriti śrutam
tatra śrāddhādikaṃ kṛtvā dānaṃ datvā svaśaktitaḥ || 223 ||
divodāseśvaraṃ dṛṣṭvā samabhyarcya ca bhaktitaḥ
rājñaścākhyāyikāṃ śrutvā na naro garbhamāviśet || 224 ||
ākhyānametannṛpaterdivodāsasya pāvanam
paṭhitvā pāṭhayitvā'pi naraḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 225 ||
divodāsaśubhākhyānaṃ śrutvā yaḥ samaraṃ viśet
na jātu jāyate tasya bhayaṃ vairikṛtaṃ kvacit || 226 ||
divodāsakathā puṇyā mahotpātanikṛntanī I
paṭhanīyā prayatnena sarvavighnopaśāntaye || 227 ||
divaṃ kailāsam || 22 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 58 ||

nāvṛṣṭirjāyate tatra nākālamaraṇādbhayam
daivodāsī kathā yatra sarvapātakanāśinī || 228 ||
asyākhyānasya paṭhanād viṣṇoriva manorathāḥ ●
sampūrṇatāṃ gamiṣyanti śambhościntitakāriṇaḥ || 22 9 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe divodāsanirvāṇaprāpti-
rnāmāṣṭapañcāśattamo'dhyāyaḥ || 58 ||

|| athaikonaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca- gaurīcumbitamūrdhaja
sarvajña hṛdayānanda bhadrakāriṇe
tārakāntaka ṣaḍvaktra tāriṇe || 1 ||
sarvajñānanidhe tubhyaṃ namaḥ sarvajñasūnave
sarvathā jitamārāya kumārāya mahātmane ||2 ||
kāmārimardhanārīśaṃ vīkṣya kāmakṛtaṃ kila
yo jigāya kumāro'pi māraṃ tasmai namo'stu te ||3 ||
yaduktaṃ bhavatā skanda māyādvijavapurhariḥ
kāśyāṃ pañcanadaṃ tīrthamadhyāsātīva pāvanam
bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ pradeśeṣu kāśīparamapāvanam
tatrāpi hariṇājñāyi tīrthaṃ pañcanadaṃ param || 5 ||
ekonaṣaṣṭike'dhyāye śrīmadānandakānane |
pañcānāṃ saritāṃ puṇyaḥ prādurbhāvo nirūpyate || 1 |
agrimaṃ praṣṭuṃ skandaṃ protsāhayan stauti | sarvajñeti | tārituṃ śīlamasyāstīti
tārī , tasmai || 1 |
adhyāsa adhi adhiṣṭhāya āsa sthitavānityarthaḥ || 4 |

kutaḥ pañcanadaṃ nāma tasya tīrthasya ṣaṇmukha
kutaśca sarvatīrthebhyastadāsīt pāvanaṃ param ||6 ||
kathaṃ ca bhagavān viṣṇurantarātmā jagatpatiḥ
sarveṣāṃ jagatāṃ pātā kartā hartā ca līlayā
arūpo rūpamāpanna avyakto vyaktatāṃ gataḥ
nirākāro'pi sākāro niṣprapañcaḥ prapañcabhāk || 8 ||
ajanmā'nekajanmā ca tvanāmā sphuṭanāmabhṛt
nirālambo'khilālambo nirguṇo'pi guṇāspadam ||9 ||
ahṛṣīko hṛṣīkeśo'pyanaṃghrirapi sarvagaḥ
upasaṃhṛtya rūpaṃ svaṃ sarvavyāpī janārdanaḥ || 10 ||
sthitaḥ sarvātmabhāvena tīrthe pañcanade pare
etadākhyāhi ṣaḍvaktra pañcavaktrādyathā śrutam || 11 ||
skanda uvāca kathayāmi - kathāmetāṃ namaskṛtya
maheśvaram
sarvāghaughapraśamanīṃ sarvaśreyovidhāyinīm || 12 ||
āpanna ityatra visandhirārṣaḥ || 8 |
ahṛṣīka indriyarahito'tha hṛṣīkeśa indriyāṇāṃ pravartakaḥ | ' apāṇipādo javano
grahītā paśyatyacakṣuḥ sa śṛṇotyakarṇa : ' ityādiśruteḥ || 10 ||

yathā pañcanadaṃ tīrthaṃ kāśyāṃ prathitimāgatam
yannāmagrahaṇādeva pāpaṃ yāti sahasradhā 13 |
prayāgo'pi ca tīrtheśo yatra sākṣātsvayaṃ sthitaḥ
pāpināṃ pāpasaṃghātaṃ prasahya nijatejasā
haranti sarvatīrthāni prayāgasya balena hi
tāni sarvāṇi tīrthāni māghe makarage ravau || 15 ||
pratyabdaṃ nirmalāni syustīrtharājasamāgamāt
prayāgaścāpi tīrthendraḥ sarvatīrthārpitaṃ malam || 16 ||
mahādhināṃ mahāghaṃ ca haretpāñcanadādvalāt
yaṃ sañcayati pāpaughamāvarṣantīrthanāyakaḥ
tamekamajjanādūrje tyajetpañcanade dhruvam || 17 ||
yathā pañcanadotpattistathā ca kathayāmyaham
niśāmaya mahābhāga mitrāvaruṇanandana || 18 ||
purā vedaśirā nāma munirāsīnmahātapāḥ
bhṛguvaṃśasamutpanno mūrto veda ivāparaḥ || 1 9 ||
ūrje kārtike || 17 |

tapasyatastasya muneḥ puro dṛggocaraṃ gatā
śucirapsarasāṃśreṣṭhā rūpalāvaṇyaśālinī || 20 ||
tasyā darśanamātreṇa parikṣubdhaṃ munermanaḥ
caskanda sa munistūrṇaṃ sā'tha bhītā varāpsarā || 21 ||
dūrādeva namaskṛtya tamṛṣiṃ sā'bhyabhāṣata
atīvavepamānāṅgī śucistacchāpabhītitaḥ || 22 ||
nāparādhnomyahaṃ kiñcinmahogratapasāṃ nidhe
kṣantavyaṃ me kṣamādhāra kṣamārūpāstapasvinaḥ || 23 ||
munīnāṃ mānasaṃ prāyo yatpadmādapi tanmṛdu
striyaḥ kaṭhorahṛdayāḥ svarūpeṇaiva sattama || 24 ||
rūpaṃ saundaryaṃ lāvaṇyamaṅgasauṣṭhavaṃ tacchālinī || 20 ||
paraḥ śrīkṛṣṇaḥ sa pitṛtvena vartate yasya sa parī kāmastena kṣubdhaṃ kṣubhitaṃ munermano
babhūveti śeṣaḥ || 21 |
munīnāṃ mananaśīlānāṃ mānasaṃ yattatpadmādapi mṛdu komalamityanvayaḥ | prāyo grahaṇaṃ
durvāsaḥprabhṛtīnāṃ vyāvṛttyartham | svabhāvātkṣamiṇāṃ mṛdu iti kvacitpāṭhaḥ | svarūpeṇaiva

iti śrutvā vacastasyāḥ śucerapsaraso muniḥ |
vivekasetunā staṃbhīnmahāroṣanadīrayam || 25 ||
uvāca ca prasannātmā śuce śucirasi dhruvam |
na me'lpo'pi hi doṣo'tra na te doṣo'sti sundari || 26 ||
vahnisvarūpā lalanā navanītasamaḥ pumān
anabhijñā vadantīti vicārānmahadantaram || 27 ||
snihyeduddhṛtasāro'pi vahneḥ saṃsparśamāpya vai
citraṃ stryākhyāsamādānātpumān snihyati dūrataḥ || 28 ||
vivekasetunā ātmānātmavivekadhṛtyā mahān yo roṣa eva nadī tasyā rayaṃ
vegamastaṃbhītstaṃbhitavānityarthaḥ || 25 ||
navanītasamaḥ prathamoddhṛtaghṛtatulyaḥ | iti udāharaṇamiti śeṣaḥ | anabhijñatve
hetumāha | vicārāditi | antaramasāmyaṃ dṛṣṭāntadāntikayoriti śeṣaḥ || 27 ||
sāmyābhāvamevāha | snihyediti | uddhṛtaścāsau sāraśceti uddhṛtasāro ghṛtam | strī
iti ākhyā yasya padārthasya sa stryākhyāstasyāḥ samādānādasaṃsparśādityarthaḥ |
strīnāmagrahaṇāditi vā || 28 ||

ataḥ śuce na bhetavyaṃ tvayā śucimanogate
atarkitopasthitayā tvayā ca skhalitaṃ mayā || 2 9 ||
skhalanānna tathā hānirakāmāttapaso muneḥ
yathā kṣaṇāndhīkaraṇāddhāniḥ koparayādare : || 30 ||
kopāttapaḥ kṣayaṃ yāti saṃcitaṃ yatsukṛcchrataḥ
yathābhrapaṭalaṃ prāpya prakāśa : puṣpavantayoḥ || 31 ||
anarthakāriṇaḥ krodhāt kvārthānāṃ parijṛmbhaṇam
kva vā khalajanotsedhātsādhūnāṃ parivardhanam || 32 ||
śuciḥ pavitrā manogatirantaḥkaraṇavṛttiryasyāḥ sā tathā tasyāḥ sambodhanaṃ

amarṣe karṣati mano manobhūsambhavaḥ kutaḥ
vidhuntude tudatyuccairvidhuṃ kutrāsti kaumudī || 33 ||
jvalato roṣadāvāgneḥ kva vā śāntidaroḥ sthitiḥ
dṛṣṭā kenāpi kiṃ kvāpi siṃhātkalabhasusthatā || 34 ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena pratīpaḥ pratighātukaḥ |
caturvargasya dehasya pariheyo vipaścitā || 35 ||
idānīṃ śṛṇu kalyāṇi kartavyaṃ yattvayā śuce
amoghabījā hi vayaṃ tadbījamurarīkuru || 36 ||
etasmin rakṣite vīrye pariskanne tvadīkṣaṇāt
tvayā tava bhavitryekaṃ kanyāratnaṃ mahāśuci || 37 ||
nanu krodhāddharmādīnāmabhāve'pi stryādiviṣayaḥ kāmo bhaviṣyati tatrāha | amarṣe

ityuktā tena muninā punarjātava sāpsarā
mahāprasāda ityuktvā muneḥ śukramajīgilat || 38 ||
atha kālena divyastrī kanyāratnamajījanat
atīvanayanānandi nidhānaṃ rūpasampadām || 3 9 ||
tasyaiva vedaśirasaḥ āśrame tāṃ nidhāya sā
śucirapsarasāṃ śreṣṭhā jagāma ca yathepsitam || 40 ||
tāṃ ca vedaśirāḥ kanyāṃ snehena samavardhayat
kṣīreṇa svāśramasthāyā hariṇyā hariṇīkṣaṇām || 41 ||
munirnāma dadau tasyai dhūtapāpeti cārthavat
yannāmoccāraṇenāpi kampate pātakāvalī || 42 ||
sarvalakṣaṇaśobhāḍhyāṃ sarvāvayavasundarīm |
munistatyāja ' notsaṃgātkṣaṇamātramapi kvacit
dine dine vardhamānāṃ tāṃ paśyan mumude bhṛśam
kṣīranīradhivadramyāṃ niśi cāndramasīṃ kalām || 44 ||
ajīgilat gilitavatī || 38 ||
yathepsitaṃ yathāruci jagāma | tridaśālayamiti kvacit || 40 ||

athāṣṭavārṣikīṃ dṛṣṭvā tāṃ kanyāṃ sa munīśvaraḥ
kasmai deyeti saṃcintya tāmeva samapṛcchata || 45 ||
vedaśirā uvāca- mahābhāge dhūtapāpe śubhekṣaṇe |
ayi putri
kasmai dadyāṃ varāya tvāṃ tvamevākhyāhi taṃ varam
atisnehārdracittasya janetuśceti bhāṣitam
niśamya dhūtapāpā sā provāca vinatānanā
dhūtapāpovāca- te
janetaryadyahaṃ deyā sundarāya varāya
tadā tasmai prayaccha tvaṃ yamahaṃ kathayāmi te
tubhyaṃ ca rocate tāta śṛṇotvavahito bhavān
sarvebhyo'tipavitro yo yaḥ sarveṣāṃ namaskṛtaḥ || 4 9 ||
sarve yamabhilaṣyanti yasmātsarvasukhodayaḥ
kadācidyo na naśyeta yaḥ sadaivānuvartate || 50 ||
ihāmutrāpi yo rakṣenmahāpadudayāddhruvam
sarve manorathā yasmāt paripūrṇā bhavanti hi || 51 ||

dine dine ca saubhāgyaṃ vardhate yasya sannidhau
nairantarye yatsevāṃ kurvato na bhayaṃ kvacit || 52 ||
yannāmagrahaṇādeva ke'pi bādhāṃ na kurvate
yadādhāreṇa tiṣṭhanti bhuvanāni bhuvanāni caturdaśa || 53 ||
evamādyā guṇā yasya varasya varaceṣṭitam
tasmai prayaccha māṃ tāta mama te'pīha śarmaṇe || 54 ||
etacchrutvā pitā tasyā bhṛśaṃ mudamavāpa ha
dhanyo'smi dhanyā me pūrve yeṣāmeṣā sutānvaye || 55 ||
dhruvā hi dhūtapāpā'sau yasyā īdṛgvidhā matiḥ
īdṛgvidhairguṇagaṇairgarimṇā ko'tra vai bhavet || 56 ||
athavā sa kathaṃ labhyo vinā puṇyabharodayam
iti kṣaṇaṃ samādhāya manaḥ sa munipuṅgavaḥ || 57 ||
jñānena taṃ samālocya varamīdṛgguṇodayam
dhanyāṃ kanyāṃ babhāṣe'tha śṛṇu vatse śubhaiṣiṇi || 58 ||
garimṇā gariṣṭhatvena || 56 ||

pitovāca- guṇā ete vicakṣaṇe
varasya ye tvayā proktā
eṣāṃ guṇānāmādhāro varo'stīti viniścitam || 5 9 ||
paraṃ sa sukhalabhyo na nitarāṃ subhagākṛtiḥ
tapaḥpaṇena sa krayyaḥ sutīrthavipaṇau kvacit || 60 |
nārthabhāraiḥ sa sulabho na kaulīnyena kanyake
vedaśāstrābhyasanairna caiśvaryabalena vai || 61 ||
na vapuṣā na buddhyā na parākramaiḥ
na saundaryeṇa
ekayaiva manaḥ śuddhyā karaṇānāṃ jayena ca || 62 ||
mahātapaḥsahāyena damadānadayāyujā
labhyate sa mahāprājño nānyathā sadṛśaḥ patiḥ || 63 ||
iti śrutvā'tha sā kanyā pitaraṃ praṇipatya ca
anujñāṃ prārthayāmāsa tapase kṛtaniścayā
sutīrthameva vipaṇiḥ paṇyavīthikā tasyām || 60 |
pitā kahane lage-

skanda uvāca - sā
kṛtānujñā janetrā kṣetre paramapāvane
tapastatāpa paramaṃ yadasādhyaṃ tapasvibhiḥ || 65 ||
kva sā bālā'timṛdvaṅgī kva ca tattādṛśaṃ tapaḥ
kaṭhoravarṣmasaṃsādhyamaho saccetaso dhṛtiḥ || 66 ||
dhārāsārāsu varṣāsu mahāvātavatīṣvalam I
śilāsu sāvakāśāsu sā bahvīranayanniśāḥ || 67 ||
śrutvā garjaravaṃ ghoraṃ dṛṣṭvā vidyuccamatkṛtī :
āsārasīkaraiḥ klinnā na cakampe manāk ca sā || 68 |
taḍitsphurantī ttvasakṛttamisrāsu tapovane
yātāyātaṃ karotīva draṣṭuṃ tattapasaḥ sthitim || 6 9 |
tapartureva sākṣācca kumārīkaitavātkila |
pañcāgnīn paridhāyātra tapasyati tapasyati tapovane || 70 ||

jalābhilāṣiṇī bālā na manāgapi sāpibat
kuśāgratoyapṛṣataṃ pañcāgni paritāpitā || 71 ||
romāñcakañcukavatī vepamānatanucchadā
paryakṣipatkṣapāḥ kṣāmā tapasā haimanīśca sā || 72 ||
niśīthinīṣu śiśire śrayantī sārasaṃ rasam
mene sā sārasaiḥ keyamudyatādyeti padminī || 73 ||
manasvināmapi mano rāgatāṃ sṛjate madhau
tadoṣṭhapallavādrāgo jahe mākandapallavaiḥ
manāgapi īṣadapi kadācidapītyarthaḥ | tapo'vadhīti vā pāṭhaḥ | pṛṣataṃ bindum || 71 ||

vasante nivasantī sā vane bālā calaṃ manaḥ
cakre tapasyapi śrutvā kokilākākalīravam || 75 ||
bandhujīve'dhararuciṃ kalahaṃse kalāgatīḥ
nikṣepamiva sā kṣiptvā śaradyāsīttaporatā || 76 ||
apāstabhogasamparkā bhogināṃ vṛttimāśritā
kṣudbudbodhanirodhāya dhūtapāpā tapasvinī || 77 ||
śāṇena maṇivallīḍhā kṛśāpyāyādanarghatām
tathāpi tapasā kṣāmā didīpe tattanustarām
nirīkṣya tāṃ tapasyantīṃ vidhiḥ saṃśuddhamānasām
upetyovāca suprajñe prasanno'smi varaṃ vṛṇu || 7 9 ||

praṇamya prāñjaliḥ prītā provācā'tha prajāpatim || 80 ||
dhūtapāpovāca-
pitāmaha varo mahyaṃ yadi deyo varaprada
sarvebhyaḥ pāvanebhyo'pi kuru māmatipāvanīm || 81 ||
sraṣṭā tadiṣṭamākarṇya nitarāṃ tuṣṭamānasaḥ
pratyuvācā'tha tāṃ bālāṃ vimalāṃ vimalaiṣiṇīm || 82 ||
brahmovāca- sarvataḥ
dhūtapāpe pavitrāṇi yāni santyatra
tebhyaḥ pavitramatulaṃ tvamedhi varato varato mama mama || 83 ||
tisraḥ koṭyo'rdhakoṭī ca santi tīrthāni kanyake
divi bhuvyantarikṣe ca pāvanānyuttarottaram || 84 ||
tāni sarvāṇi tīrthāni tvattanau pratiloma vai
vasantu mama vākyena bhava sarvātipāvanī || 85 |

ityuktvā'ntardadhe vedhāḥ sā'pi nirdhūtakalmaṣā
dhūtapāpoṭajaṃ prāptā'tho vedaśirasaḥ pituḥ || 86 ||
kadācittāṃ samālokya khelantīmuṭajājire
dharmastattapasākṛṣṭaḥ prārthayāmāsa kanyakām
dharma uvāca-
pṛthuśroṇi viśālākṣi kṣāmodari śubhānane
krītaḥ svarūpasampattyā tvayā'haṃ dehi me rahaḥ || 88 |
nitarāṃ bādhate kāmastvatkṛte māṃ sulocane I
ajñātanāmnā sā tena prārthitetyasakṛdgrahaḥ || 8 9 ||
uvāca sā pitā dātā taṃ prārthaya sudurmate
pitṛpradeyā yatkanyā śrutireṣā sanātanī || 9 0 |
atho'nantaraṃ pituruṭajaṃ parṇaśālāṃ lakṣmīnṛsiṃhasamīpasthāṃ prāptetyarthaḥ || 86 |
uṭajājire parṇaśālā'ṅgaṇe ākṛṣṭa ākarṣito vaśīkṛta iti yāvat || 87 |
raho grāmyadharmam | ratimiti vā pāṭhaḥ || 88 ||
na jñātaṃ nāma yasya tena dharmeṇa ityevaṃ prakāreṇāsakṛtprārthitā asakṛtprārthane
pituḥ kanyādātṛtve śrutiṃ pramāṇayati pitriti yadyasmāt || 9 0 ||
yaha kahakara brahmā antardhāna ho gaye aura vaha dhūtapāpā bhī nirmala hokara apane

punarnirbandhayāñcakre'padhṛtirdhṛtiśālinīm || 9 1 ||
dharma uvāca- tava sundari |
na prārthaye'haṃ subhage pitaraṃ
gāndharveṇa vivāhena kuru me tvaṃ samīhitam || 9 2 ||
iti nirbandhavadvākyaṃ sā niśamya kumārikā
pituḥ kanyāphalaṃ ditsuḥ punarāheti taṃ dvijam || 9 3 ||
are jaḍamate mā tvaṃ punarbrūhīti yāhyataḥ
ityukto'pi kumāryā sa nātiṣṭhanmadanāturaḥ || 9 4 ||
tataḥ śaśāpa taṃ bālā prabalā tapaso balāt
jaḍo'si nitarāṃ yasmājjalādhāro nado bhava || 9 5 ||
iti śaptastayā so'tha tāṃ śaśāpa krudhānvitaḥ
kaṭhorahṛdaye tvaṃ tu śilā bhava sudurmate || 9 6 ||
gauravād gurutvād balavattaratvādityarthaḥ | apadhṛtirapagatadhairyaḥ || 9 1 |
gāndharveṇa kanyāvarayormithaḥ samayarūpeṇa || 9 2 |

skanda uvāsa-
ityanyonyasya śāpena mune dharmo nado'bhavat |
avimukte mahākṣetre khyāto dharmanado mahān || 9 7 |
sāpyāha pitaraṃ trastā svaśilātvasya kāraṇam |
dhyānena dharma vijñāya muniḥ kanyāmathābravīt || 9 8 ||
mā bhaiḥ putri kariṣyāmi tava sarvaṃ śubhodayam |
tacchāpo nānyathā bhūyāccandrakāntaśilā bhava || 99 ||
candrodayamanuprāpya dravībhūtatanustataḥ
dhunī bhava sute sādhvi dhūtapāpeti viśrutā || 100 |
sa ca dharmanadaḥ kanye tava bhartā suśobhanaḥ |
tairguṇaiḥ paripūrṇāṅgo ye guṇāḥ prārthitāstvayā || 101 |
anyacca śṛṇu sabuddhe mamāpi tapaso balāt |
dvairūpyaṃ bhavatorbhāvi prākṛtaṃ ca dravaṃ ca vai || 102 || ||
mā bhairmā bhaiṣīḥ || 99 |
dhunī nadī || 100 ||

ityāśvāsya pitā kanyāṃ dhūtapāpāṃ parantapa
candrakāntaśilā bhūtā manujagrāhabuddhimān || 103 ||
tadārabhya mune kāśyāṃ khyāto dharmanado hradaḥ
dharmo dravasvarūpeṇa mahāpātakanāśana : || 104 ||
dhunī ca dhūtapāpā sā sarvatīrthamayī śubhā |
harenmahāghasaṃghātān kūlajāniva pādapān || 105 ||
tatra dharmanade tīrthe dhūtapāpāsamanvite
yadā na svardhunī tatra tadā bradhnastapo vyadhāt || 106 ||
gabhastimālī bhagavān gabhastīśvarasannidhau
śīlayanmaṅgalāṃ gaurīṃ tapa ugraṃ cacāra ha || 107 ||
nāmnā mayūkhādityasya tīrthe tatra tapasthataḥ
kiraṇebhyaḥ pravavṛte mahāsvedo'tikhedataḥ || 108 ||
kiraṇebhyaḥ pravṛttā yā mahāsvedasya santatiḥ
tataḥ sā kiraṇā nāma jātā puṇyā taraṅgiṇī || 10 9 ||
mahāpāpāndhatamasaṃ kiraṇākhyā taraṅgiṇī
dhvaṃsayetsnānamātreṇa militā dhūtapāpayā || 110 ||
śīlayan dhyāyan || 107 |

ādau dharmanadaḥ puṇyo miśrito dhūtapāpayā
yayā dhūtāni pāpāni sarvatīrthīkṛtātmanā || 111 ||
tato'pi militāgatya kiraṇā raviṇaidhitā
yannāmasmaraṇādeva mahāmoho'ndhatāṃ vrajet || 112 ||
kiraṇādhūtapāpe ca tasmin dharmanade śubhe
stravantyau pāpasaṃhaauṃ vārāṇasyāṃ śubhadrave || 113 ||
tato bhāgīrathī prāptā tena dailīpinā saha
bhāgīrathī samāyātā yamunā ca sarasvatī || 114 ||
kiraṇā dhūtapāpā ca puṇyatoyā sarasvatī
gaṅgā ca yamunā caiva pañcanadyo'tra kīrtitāḥ || 115 ||
sarvatīrthīkṛta ātmā yayā sā tathā tayā sarvatīrthīkṛtātmanā || 111 ||
edhitā vardhitā sampāditetyetat | andhatāṃ svakāryākṣamatām || 112 ||
kiraṇeti | kiraṇādhūtapāpeca dhaute tasmin dharmanade tasthuriti śeṣaḥ || 113 ||
dailīpinā bhagīrathena || 114 ||

ataḥ pañcanadaṃ nāma tīrthaṃ trailokyaviśrutam
tatrāpluto na gṛhaṇīyāddehaṃ nā pāñcabhautikam || 116 ||
asmin pañcanadīnāṃ ca saṃbhede'ghaughabhedini
snānamātrātprayātyeva bhittvā brahmāṇḍamaṇḍapam || 117 ||
tīrthāni santi bhūyāṃsi kāśyāmatra pade pade
na pañcanadatīrthasya koṭyaṃśena samānyapi || 118 ||
prayāge māghamāse tu samyak snātasya yatphalam
tatphalaṃ syāddinaikena kāśyāṃ pañcanade dhruvam || 11 9 ||
snātvā pañcanade tīrthe kṛtvā ca pitṛtarpaṇam
bindumādhavamabhyarcya na bhūyojanmabhāgbhavet || 120 ||
yāvatsaṃkhyāstilā dattāḥ pitṛbhyo jalatarpaṇe
puṇye pañcanade tīrthe tṛptiḥ syāttāvadābdikī || 121 ||
śraddhayā yaiḥ kṛtaṃ śrāddhaṃ tīrthe pañcanade śubhe
teṣāṃ pitāmahā muktā nānāyonigatā api || 122 ||
nā puruṣaḥ || 116 ||
koṭyaṃsenāpītyanvayaḥ || 118 ||

yamaloke pitṛgaṇairgātheyaṃ parigīyate
mahimānaṃ pāñcanadaṃ dṛṣṭvā śrāddhavidhānataḥ || 123 ||
asmākamapi vaṃśyo'tra kaścicchrāddhaṃ kariṣyati
kāśyāṃ pañcanadaṃ prāpya yena mucyāmahe vayam || 124 ||
iyaṃ gāthā pratidinaṃ śrāddhadevasya sannidhau
pitṛbhiḥ parigīyeta kāśyāṃ pañcanadaṃ prati || 125 ||
tatra pañcanade tīrthe yatkiñciddīyate vasu
kalpakṣaye'pi na bhavettasya puṇyasya saṃkṣayaḥ || 126 ||
vandhyāpi varṣaparyantaṃ snātvā pañcanade hrade
samarcya maṅgalāṃ gaurīṃ putraṃ janayati dhruvam || 127 ||
jalaiḥ pāñcanadaiḥ puṇyairvāsasā pariśodhitaiḥ
mahāphalamavāpnoti snapayitveṣṭadevatām || 128 ||
pañcāmṛtānāṃ kalaśairaṣṭottaraśatonmitaiḥ
tulito'dhikatāṃ yāto binduḥ pāñcanadāmbhasaḥ || 12 9 ||

pañcakūrcena pītena yā'tra śuddhirudāhṛtā
sā śuddhiḥ śraddhayā prāśya binduṃ pāñcanadāmbhasaḥ || 130 ||
bhavedavabhṛthasnānādrājasūyāśvamedhayoḥ
yatphalaṃ tacchataguṇaṃ snānāt pāñcanadāmbhasā || 131 ||
rājasūyāśvamedhau ca bhavetāṃ svargasādhanam
ābrahmaghaṭikādvandvaṃ muttyai pāñcanadāplutiḥ || 132 ||
svargarājyābhiṣeko'pi na tathā saṃmataḥ satām
abhiṣeka : pāñcanado yathānalpasukhapradaḥ || 133 ||
varaṃ vārāṇasīṃ prāpya bhṛtyaḥ pañcanadokṣiṇām
nānyatra sevakībhūtabhūpakoṭirnareśvaraḥ || 134 ||
pañcakūrcena pañcagavyena || 130 ||
ānbrahmaghaṭikādvandvaṃ brahmamuhūrtadvayamabhivyāpya sīmānaṃ kṛtveti vā | pañcanadā-
plutistatsnānaṃ muktaye | ābrahmaghaṭikādvandvamityasya pūrveṇa vā sambandhaḥ || 132 ||
pañcanadokṣiṇāṃ pāñcanadajalasekavatām | pañcanadekṣiṇāmiti pāṭhe
tatpaśyatām || 134 ||

yairna pañcanade snātaṃ kārtike pāpahāriṇi
te'dyāpi garbhe tiṣṭhanti punaste garbhavāsinaḥ || 135 ||
kṛte dharmanadaṃ nāma tretāyāṃ dhūtapāpakam
dvāpare bindutīrthaṃ ca kalau pañcanadaṃ smṛtam || 136 |
śataṃ samāstapastaptvā kṛte yatprāpyate phalam
tatkārtike pañcanade sakṛtsnānena labhyate || 137 ||
iṣṭāpūrtteṣu dharmeṣu yāvajjanmakṛteṣu yat
anyatra syātphalaṃ tatsyādūrje dharmanadāplavāt || 138 ||
na dhūtapāpasadṛśaṃ tīrthaṃ kvāpi mahītale
yadekasnānato naśyedadhaṃ janmatrayārjitam || 13 9 ||
bindutīrthe naro datvā kāñcanaṃ kṛṣṇalonmitam
na daridro bhavet kvāpi na svarṇena viyujyate || 140 ||
iṣṭāni antarvedyāṃ dīyamānāni pūrṇāni vāpīkūpataḍāgādinirmāṇāni teṣu
kṛteṣvanyatra yatphalaṃ syāttaddharmanadāplavātsyādityanvayaḥ || 138 ||
kṛṣṇalonmitaṃ raktikāparimāṇam || 140 |

yatkiñcidvindutīrthe'tra datvā'kṣayamavāpnuyāt || 141 ||
ekāmapyāhutiṃ datvā samiddhe'gnau vidhānataḥ
puṇye dharmanade tīrthe koṭihomaphalaṃ labhet || 142 ||
na pañcanadatīrthasya mahimānamanantakam
ko'pi varṇayituṃ śaktaścaturvargaśubhaukasaḥ || 143 ||
śrutvākhyānamidaṃ puṇyaṃ śrāvayitvā'pi bhaktitaḥ
sarvapāpaviśuddhātmā viṣṇuloke mahīyate || 144 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe pañcanadāvirbhāvo nāma ekonaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 9 ||
ko'pi brahmā'pi yaḥ kaściditi vā || 143 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekonaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 5 9 ||

|| atha ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca- uktā pañcanadotpattirmitrāvaruṇanandana
idānīṃ kathayiṣyāmi mādhavāviṣkṛtiṃ parām || 1 ||
yāṃ śrutvā śraddhayā dhīmān pāpebhyo mucyate kṣaṇāt
na ca śriyā viyujyeta saṃyujyeta vṛṣeṇa ca || 2 |
āgatya mandarādadrerupendraścandraśekharam
āpṛcchya tārkṣyarathagaḥ kṣaṇādvārāṇasīṃ purīm || 3 ||
divodāsaṃ mahīpālaṃ samuccāṭya svamāyayā
sthitvā pādodake tīrthe keśavākhyasvarūpataḥ
mahimānaṃ paraṃ kāśyāṃ vicārya suvicārya ca
dṛṣṭvā pañcanadaṃ tīrthaṃ parāṃ mudamavāpa ha || 5 ||
uvāca ca prasannātmā puṇḍarīkavilocanaḥ
agaṇyā api vaikuṇṭhaguṇā vigaṇitā mayā ||6 ||
atha ṣaṣṭitame'dhyāye'vimukte mokṣadhāmani |
mādhavāviṣkṛtiḥ puṇyā varṇyate'timanoharā || 1 |

yāvanto vijayante'tra kāśyāṃ pañcanade hṛde ||7 ||
śvetadvīpe'pi sāmagrī kva guṇānāṃ garīyasī
īdṛśī yādṛśī kāśyāṃ dhūtapāpe'sti pāvanī
mude kaumodakīsparśastathā na mama jāyate
dhūtapāpāmbusamparko yathā bhavati sarvathā ||9 ||
na kṣīranīradhijayā sukhaṃ sukhaṃ me śliṣṭagātrayā
tathā bhavedyathā'tra syātspṛṣṭayā dhūtapāpayā || 10 ||
itthaṃ pañcanade tīrthe kṣīranīradhijādhavaḥ
sampreṣya tārkṣyaṃ tryakṣāgre vṛttāntaṃ viniveditum || 11 ||
ānandakānanabhavaṃ divodāsakṣamāpateḥ
saṃvarṇayan guṇagrāmaṃ puṇyaṃ pāñcanadodbhavam || 12 ||
sukhopaviṣṭaḥ saṃhṛṣṭaḥ sudṛṣṭirviṣṭaraśravāḥ
dṛṣṭavāṃstapasā juṣṭamapuṣṭāṅga tapodhanam || 13 ||
dhūtapāpe tīrthe || 8 |
mude harṣāya || 9 |
viṣṭaṃ vyāptiṃ rāti kīrtayatīti viṣṭarā yājñavalkyādayaḥ , tebhyaḥ śrūyate viṣṭare
śabdaprapañcamaye vede śrūyata iti vā viṣṭaraśravāḥ | viṣṭare svacche śravasī śravaṇe yasyeti
madhumādhavyāmamaraṭīkāyām || 13 ||

sa ṛṣistaṃ samabhyetya puṇḍarīkākṣamacyutam |
upopaviṣṭakamalaṃ vanamālāvirājitam || 14 ||
śaṃkhapadmagadācakracañcatkaracatuṣṭayam
kaustubhodbhāsitoraskaṃ pītakauśeyavāsasam || 15 ||
sunīlendīvararuciṃ susnigdhamadhurākṛtim |
nābhīhadalasatpadmaṃ supāṭalaradacchadam || 16 ||
dāḍimībījadaśanaṃ kirīṭadyotitāmbaram |
devendravanditapadaṃ sanakādipariṣṭutam || 17 ||
divyarṣibhirnāradādyaiḥ parigītamahodayam |
prahlādādyairbhāgavataiḥ parinanditamānasam || 18 ||
dhṛtaśārṅgadhanurdaṇḍaṃ daṇḍitākhiladānavam |
madhukaiṭabhahantāraṃ kaṃsavidhvaṃsasūcakam || 1 9 ||
upopaviṣṭakamalamiti upasargasya dvirvacanam | tathā ca śrūyate-
praprapūjya mahādevaṃ saṃsaṃyamya manaḥ sadā |
upopahāya saṃsargamududgataḥ sa tāpasaḥ || ityādi |
upaviṣṭaṃ kamalaṃ yena sa tathā tam | yadvā , upa samīpe upaviṣṭā kamalā
lakṣmīryasya tam || 14 |
cañcacchabdaḥ sphuraṇārthaḥ || 15 ||
supāṭalaradacchadaṃ śobhanapāṭalapuṣpavadoṣṭham || 16 ||

taṃ puṃmūrtyā pariṇataṃ bhaktānāṃ bhaktihetutaḥ || 20 ||
vedā viduryadākāraṃ naivopaniṣadoditam
brahmādyā na ca gīrvāṇāścakre netrātithiṃ sa tam || 21 ||
praṇanāma mudā yuktaḥ kṣitivinyastamastakaḥ
ṛṣistaṃ hṛṣīkeśamagnibindurmahātapāḥ || 22 ||
sa parayā bhaktyā maulibaddhakarāñjaliḥ
tuṣṭāva balidhvaṃsinamacyutam || 23 ||
adhyastavistīrṇaśilaṃ
tatra pañcanadābhyāse mārkaṇḍeyādisevite
govindamagnibinduḥ sa stutavāṃstuṣṭamānasaḥ || 24 ||
agnibinduruvāca- bāhyāntaḥ śaucadāyine
oṃ namaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣa
sahasraśīrṣā puruṣa : sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt || 25 ||
vedāḥ karmopāsanaviṣayā upaniṣadoditaṃ vidyaikasamadhigamyaṃ naiva viduḥ || 21 |
adhyastavistīrṇaśilamāśritabṛhatpāṣāṇam || 23 |
parekonaviṃśatyā bhaktyā paramayā mudā
astauṣīnmādhavaṃ devamagnibindurdvijottamaḥ || 1 ||

nirdvandvayā dhiyā viṣṇo jiṣṇvādisuravandita || 26 ||
yaṃ stotuṃ nādhigacchanti vāco vācaspaterapi
tamīṣṭe ka iha stotuṃ bhaktiratra balīyasī || 27 ||
api yo yo bhagavānīśo manaḥ prācāmagocaraḥ |
sa mādṛśairalpadhībhiḥ kathaṃ stutyo vacaḥ paraḥ || 28 ||
yaṃ vāco na viśantīśaṃ manatīha mano na yam
manogirāmatītaṃ taṃ kaḥ stotuṃ śaktimān bhavet || 2 9 ||

devasya mahimā mahān kairavagamyate || 30 ||
tasya atandritamanobuddhīndriyā yaṃ sanakādayaḥ
dhyāyanto'pi hṛdākāśe na vindanti yathārthataḥ || 31 ||
nāradādyairmunivarairābālabrahmacāribhiḥ
gīyamānacaritro'pi na samyag yo'dhigamyate || 32 ||
taṃ sūkṣmarūpamajamavyayamekamādyaṃ
brahmādyagocaramajeyamanantaśaktim
nityaṃ nirāmayamamūrtamacintyamūrti
kastvāṃ carācaracarācarabhinna vetti || 33 ||
yasyeti | śikṣākalpavyākaraṇaniruktachandojyotīṃṣyaṅgāni padakramāśca tatsahitā
mahato bhūtasya niḥśvasitametadyadṛgvedo yajurveda ityādiśruteḥ || 30 ||
atandritvamakuṇṭhitatvam || 31 ||

ekaikameva tava nāma harenmurāre
janmārjitāghamaghināṃ ca mahāpadāḍhyam
dadyāt phalaṃ ca mahitaṃ mahato makhasya
japtaṃ mukunda madhusūdana mādhaveti || 34 ||
nārāyaṇeti narakārṇavatāraṇeti
dāmodareti madhuheti caturbhujeti
viśvambhareti virajeti janārdaneti
kvāstīha janma japatāṃ kva kṛtāntabhītiḥ || 35 ||
ye tvāṃ trivikrama sadā hṛdi śīlayanti
kādambinīrucirarociṣamambujākṣam
saudāmanīvilasitāṃśukavītamūrte
te'pi spṛśanti tava kāntimacintyarūpām || 36 ||

govinda tārkṣyaratha keśava cakrapāṇe
lakṣmīpate danujasūdana śārṅgapāṇe
tvadbhaktibhājinabhayaṃ kvacidasti puṃsi || 37 ||
yairarcito'si bhagavaṃstulasī prasūnai-
rdūrīkṛtaiṇamadasaurabhadivyagandhaiḥ
tānarcayanti divi devagaṇāḥ samastā
mandāra dāmabhiralaṃ vimalasvabhāvān || 38 |
yadvāci nāma tava kāmadamabjanetra
yacchrotrayostava kathāmadhurākṣarāṇi
yaccittabhittilikhitaṃ bhavato'sti rūpaṃ
nīrūpabhūpapadavī na hi tairdurāpā || 3 9 |
dūrīkṛta eṇamadasaurabho mṛgamadaparimalaḥ kastūrīgandho yena tādṛśo divyagandho yeṣāṃ
taistulasīprasūnairiti || 38 |
nirgataṃ rūpaṃ yatra tannīrūpaṃ brahma , tadeva bhūpastasya padavī sthitiḥ durāpā
duṣprāpā || 3 9 |
he śrīvatsalāṃchana ! hare ! acyuta ! kaiṭabhāre ! govinda ! garur̤avāhana ! keśava !

ye tvāṃ bhajanti satataṃ bhuvi śeṣaśāyiṃ-
stāñchrīpate pitṛpatīndrakuberamukhyāḥ
vṛndārakā divi sadaiva sabhājayanti
svargāpavargasukhasantatidānadakṣa || 40 ||
ye tvāṃ stuvanti satataṃ divi tān stuvanti
siddhāpsaro'maragaṇā lasadabjapāṇe

iti stutvā hṛṣīkeśamagnibindurmahātapāḥ-
tasthau tūṣṇīṃ tato viṣṇuruvāca varado munim || 44 ||
śrīviṣṇuruvāca- mahatāṃ tapasāṃnidhe
agnibindo mahāprājña
varaṃ varaya suprītastavādeyaṃ na kiñcana || 45 ||
agnibinduruvāca- vaikuṇṭheśa jagatpate
yadi prīto'si bhagavan
kamalākānta taddehi yadiha prārthayāmyaham ||46 ||
kṛtānujño'tha hariṇā bhrūbhaṅgena sa tāpasaḥ
kṛtapraṇāmo hṛṣṭātmā varayāmāsa keśavam
bhagavan sarvago'pīha tiṣṭha pañcanade hade
hitāya sarvajantūnāṃ mumukṣūṇāṃ viśeṣataḥ || 48 ||
lakṣmīśena varo mahyameṣa deyo'vicārataḥ
" nānyaṃ varaṃ samīhe'haṃ bhaktiṃ ca tvatpadāmbuje

prītaḥ paropakārārthaṃ tathetyāhābdhijāpatiḥ || 50 ||
śrīviṣṇuruvāca—
agnibindo muniśreṣṭha sthāsyāmyahamiha dhruvam
kāśībhaktimatāṃ puṃsāṃ muktimārga samādiśan || 51 ||
mune punaḥ prasanno'smi varaṃ D brūhi dadāmi te
atīva mama bhakto'si bhaktiste'stu dṛḍhā mayi || 52 ||
ādāveva hi tiṣṭhāsurahamatra taponidhe
tatastvayā samabhyarthi sthāsyāmyatra sadaiva hi || 53 ||
' prāpya kāśīṃ sudurmedhāḥ kastyajejjñānavān yadi
anarghyaṃ prāpya āṇikyaṃ hitvā kācaṃ ka īhate || 54 ||
alpīyasā śrameṇeha vapuṣo vyayamātrataḥ
avaśyaṃ gatvarasyāśu yathā muktistathā kvaṃ hi || 55 ||

prājñāḥ kimu na gṛhaṇīyuramṛtaṃ nairjaraṃ vapuḥ || 56 ||
na tapobhirna vā dānairna yajñairbahudakṣiṇaiḥ |
anyatra labhyate mokṣo yathā kāśyāṃ tanuvyayāt || 57 ||
api yogaṃ hi yuānā yogino yatamānasāḥ
naikena janmanā muktāḥ kāśyāṃ muktā vapurvyayāt || 58 ||
idameva mahādānamidameva mahattapaḥ |
idameva vrataṃ śreṣṭhaṃ yatkāśyāṃ mriyate tanuḥ || 5 9 ||
sa eva vidvān jagati sa eva vijitendriyaḥ |
sa eva puṇyavān dhanyo labdhvā kāśīṃ na yastyajet || 60 |
tāvatsthāsyāmyahaṃ cātra yāvatkāśī mune tviha
pralaye'pi na nāśo'syāḥ śivaśūlāgrasusthiteḥ || 61 ||
ityākarṇya giraṃ viṣṇoragnibindurmahāmuniḥ
prahṛṣṭaromā provāca punaranyaṃ varaṃ vṛṇe || 62 ||

abhaktebhyo'pi bhaktebhyaḥ sthito muktiṃ sadādiśa || 63 ||
ye sa pañcanade snātvā gatvā deśāntareṣvapi |
narāḥ pañcatvamāpannā muktiṃ tebhyo'pi vai diśa || 64 ||
ye tu pañcanade snātvā tvāṃ bhajiṣyanti mānavāḥ
calācalā'pi dvairūpā mātyākṣīcchrīśca tānnarān || 65 ||
śrīviṣṇuruvāca-
evamastvagnibindo'tra bhavatā yad vṛtaṃ mune |
tvannāmno'rdhana me nāma mayā saha bhaviṣyati || 66 ||
bindumādhava ityākhyā ityākhyā mama mama trailokyaviśrutā
kāśyāṃ bhaviṣyati mune mahāpāpaughaghātinī || 67 ||
ye māmatra narāḥ puṇyāḥ puṇye . pañcanade hade |
sadā saparyayiṣyanti teṣāṃ saṃsārabhī : kutaḥ || 68 |..

tatpārśvagā sadā yeṣāṃ hṛdi pañcanade hyaham || 6 9 ||
yairna pañcanadaṃ prāpya vasubhiḥ prīṇitā dvijāḥ
āśu labhyavipattīnāṃ teṣāṃ tadvasu roditi || 70 ||
ta eva dhanyā loke'smin kṛtakṛtyāsta eva hi
prāpya yairmama sānnidhyaṃ vasavo mama sātkṛtāḥ || 71 ||
bindutīrthamidaṃ nāma taba nāmnā bhaviṣyati |
agnibindo muniśreṣṭha sarvapātakanāśanam || 72 ||
kārtike bindutīrthe yo brahmacaryaparāyaṇaḥ
snāsyatyanudite bhānau bhānujāttasya bhīḥ kutaḥ || 73 ||
api pāpasahasrāṇi kṛtvā mohena mānavaḥ
ūrje dharmanade snāto niṣpāpo jāyate kṣaṇāt
yāvatsvastho'sti deho'yaṃ yāvannendriyaviklavaḥ
tāvad vratāni kurvīta yato dehaphalaṃ vratam || 75 ||

ekabhaktena naktena tathaivāyācitena ca
upavāsena deho'yaṃ saṃśodhyo'śucibhājanam || 76 ||
kṛcchracāndrāyaṇādīni kartavyāni prayatnataḥ
aśuciḥ śucitāmeti kāyo yadvratadhāraṇāt || 77 ||
vrataiḥ saṃśodhite dehe dharmo vasati niścalaḥ
arthakāmau sanirvāṇau tatra yatra vṛṣasthitiḥ || 78 ||
tasmād vratāni satataṃ caritavyāni mānavaiḥ
dharmasānnidhyakartṝṇa caturvargaphalepsubhiḥ || 7 9 |
sadā kartuṃ na śaknoti vratāni yadi mānavaḥ
cāturmāsyamanuprāpya tadā kuryātprayatnataḥ || 80 ||
bhūśayyā brahmacaryaṃ ca kiñcidbhakṣyaniṣedhanam
ekabhaktādiniyamo nityadānaṃ svaśaktitaḥ || 81 ||
purāṇaśravaṇaṃ caiva tadarthācaraṇaṃ punaḥ
akhaṇḍadīpodbodhaśca mahāpūjeṣṭadaivate || 82 ||
prabhūtāṅkarabījāḍhye deśe cāpi gatāgatam
yatnena varjayeddhīmān mahādharmavivṛddhaye || 83 ||

maunaṃ cāpi sadā kāryaṃ tathyaṃ vaktavyameva vā || 84 ||
niṣpāvāṃśca masūrāṃśca kodravān varjayed vratī
sadā śucibhirāstheyaṃ spraṣṭavyo nāvratījanaḥ || 85 |
dantakeśāmbarādīni nityaṃ śodhyāni yatnataḥ
aniṣṭacintā no kāryā vratinā hṛdyapi kvacit || 86 |
dvādaśasvapi māseṣu vratino yatphalaṃ bhavet |
cāturmāsyavratabhṛtāṃ tatphalaṃ syādakhaṇḍitam || 87 |
caturṣvapi ca māseṣu na sāmarthyaṃ vrate yadi |
tadorje vratinā bhāvyamapyabdaphalamicchatāṃ || 88 |
avrataḥ kārtiko yeṣāṃ gato mūḍhadhiyāmiha |
teṣāṃ puṇyasya leśo'pi na bhavet sūkarātmanām || 8 9 ||
kṛcchraṃ vā cātikṛcchraṃ vā prājāpatyamathāpi vā
samprāpte kārtika māsi kuryācchaktyātipuṇyavān || 9 0 |
ekāntaraṃ vrataṃ kuryāttrirātravratameva vā |
pañcarātraṃ saptarātraṃ saṃprāpte kārtike vratī || 9 1 ||

pakṣavrataṃ vā kurvīta māsopoṣaṇameva ● vā |
norjo vandhyo vidhātavyo vratinā kenacit kvacit || 9 2 |
śākāhāraṃ payohāraṃ phalāhāramathāpi vā
caredyavānnāhāraṃ vā saṃprāpte kārtike vratī || 9 3 ||
nityaṃ naimittikaṃ snānaṃ kuryādūrje vratī naraḥ |
brahmacaryaṃ caredūrje mahāvrataphalārthavān || 9 4 ||
bāhulaṃ brahmacaryeṇa yaḥ kṣipecchucimānasaḥ |
samastaṃ hāyanaṃ tena brahmacaryaṃ kṛtaṃ bhavet || 9 5 ||
yastu kārtikikaṃ māsamupavāsaiḥ samāpayet |
apyabdamapi teneha bhavetsamyagupoṣitam || 9 6 ||
śākāhārapayohārairūrjī yairativāhitaḥ |
akhaṇḍitā śarattena tadāhāreṇa yāpitā || 9 7 |
patrabhojī bhavedūrje kāṃsyaṃ tyājyaṃ prayatnataḥ |
yo vratī kāṃsyabhojī syānna tadvrataphalaṃ labhet || 9 8 |
yāpitā nītā || 9 7 |

ūrje na bhakṣayetkṣaudramatikṣudragatipradam || 99 |
madhutyāge ghṛtaṃ dadyātpāyasaṃ ca saśarkaram |
abhyaṅge'bhyavahāre ca tailamūrje vivarjayet . || 100 |
bhūyātsa nārakī dehī tatrābhyaṅgādyato'nagha |
tailatyāge tilān dadyāddroṇamātrān sakāñcanān || 101 ||
kārtike matsyabhojī yaḥ sa taimīṃ yonimṛcchati |
bāhule māṃsabhojī yaḥ sa kṛmiḥ pūyaśoṇite || 102 ||
māṃsāśino'pi ye bhūpāstyajeyuste'pi kārtike |
matsyamāṃsāni santyajya kārtike vratatatparaḥ || 103 |
matsyamāṃsādanāddoṣād bahirbhavati niścitam |
niyame matsyamāṃsānāṃ dadyātkārtikike vratī ||
kūṣmāṇḍāni samāṣāṇi " daśasvarṇayutānyapi || 104 || ||
abhyaṅgādyata iti | abhyaṅgādudvartanāt | ādyataḥ ādyāt abhyavahārāccetyarthaḥ |
abhyaṅgādyata iti vā padacchedaḥ | tatrābhyaṅgādityabhyavahāropalakṣaṇam || 101 ||
taimīṃ timirmatsyastadīyāṃ yonim || 102 |

sughaṇṭāṃ satilāṃ maunī sahiraṇyāṃ pradāpayet || 105 ||
kārtike lavaṇaṃ tyaktaṃ yena vratabhṛtā satā
tyaktāḥ sarve rasāstena tattyāgī gāṃ pradāpayet || 106 ||
bhūśayyāṃ kārtike kurvanna bhuvaṃ saṃspṛśed vratī
paryaṅkaṃ bhūśayo dadyāt satūlaṃ sopadhānakam || 107 ||
dīpaṃ yaḥ kārtike dadyādakhaṇḍaṃ ghṛtavartikam |
mohāndhatamasaṃ prāpya sa na gacchati durgatim || 108 ||
yaḥ kuryātkārtika māse rajanyāṃ dīpakaumudīm |
tāmisraṃ cāndhatāmisraṃ na sa paśyetkadācana || 10 9 ||
pāpāndhakārasaṃkruddhaḥ kārtike dīpadānataḥ
krodhāndhakāritamukhaṃ bhāskariṃ sa na vīkṣate || 110 |
sa udyotamayaṃ paśyet trailokyaṃ sacarācaram
prabodhayenmamāgre yo dīpaṃ sojjvalavartikam || 111 ||
pāpāndhakārasaṃkruddhaḥ pāpamevāndhakārastasmai saṃkruddhaḥ || 110 ||

kṣīrābdhitaṭamāsādya vasetkalpaṃ sa puṇyavān || 112 ||
pratikṣapaṃ kārtikike kurvan jyotsnāṃ pradīpajām
mamāgre bhaktisaṃyukto garbhadhvāntaṃ na saṃviśet || 113 ||
ājyavartikamūrje yo dīpaṃ me'gre prabodhayet
buddhibhraṃśaṃ na cāpnoti mahāmṛtyubhaye sati || 114 ||
kārtike māsi me yātrā yaiḥ kṛtā bhaktitatparaiḥ
bindutīrthe kṛtasnānaisteṣāṃ muktirna dūrataḥ || 115 ||
vratinaḥ kārtike māsi snātasya vidhivanmama
dāmodara gṛhāṇā'rghyaṃ danujendraniṣūdana || 116 ||
snāne naimittike kṛṣṇa kārtike pāpaśoṣaṇe
gṛhaṇātvarghyaṃ mayā dattaṃ rādhayā sahito bhavān || 117 ||
imau mantrau samuccārya yo'rghyaṃ mahyaṃ prayacchati
suvarṇaratnapuṣpāmbuyujā śaṃkhena puṇyavān || 118 |
suvarṇapūrṇapṛthivī saṅkalpodakapūrvakam
tena dattā bhavetsamyak supātrāya suparvaṇi || 11 9 ||

ekādaśīṃ samāsādya prabodhakaraṇīṃ mama
bindutīrthakṛtasnāno rātrau jāgaraṇānvitaḥ || 120 ||
dīpān prabodhya bahuśo mamālaṅkṛtya śaktitaḥ
tauryatrikavinodena purāṇaśravaṇādibhiḥ || 121 ||
mahāmahotsavaṃ kṛtvā yāvatpūrṇā tithirbhavet
tatrānnadānaṃ bahuśaḥ kṛtvā matprītaye naraḥ || 122 ||
mahāpātakayukto'pi na viśetpramadodaram
bindumādhavanāmānaṃ yoṃ māmatra samarcayet || 123 ||
bindutīrthakṛtasnāno nirvāṇaṃ sa hi vindati
ādimādhavanāmā'haṃ pūjyaḥ satyayuge mune || 124 ||
anantamādhavo jñeyastretāyāṃ sarvasiddhidaḥ
śrīdamādhavasaṃjño'haṃ dvāpare paramārthakṛt || 125 ||
kalau kalimaladhvaṃsī jñeyo'haṃ bindumādhavaḥ
kalau kalmaṣasampannā na māṃ vindanti mānavāḥ || 126 ||
mamaiva māyayā mūḍhā bhedavādaparāyaṇāḥ
mama bhaktiṃ prakurvāṇā ye viśveśaṃ dviṣanti vai || 127 ||
prabodhakaraṇīm utthānaikādaśīm || 120 |

vidviṣo mama te jñeyāḥ piśācapadagāminaḥ
paiśācīṃ yonimāpyāpi kālabhairavaśāsanāt || 128 ||
triṃśadvarṣasahasrāṇi uṣitvā duḥkhasāgare
viśveśānugrahādeva tato mokṣamavāpnuyuḥ || 12 9 ||
tasmādddveṣo na kartavyo viśveśe paramātmani
viśveśadveṣiṇāṃ puṃsāṃ prāyaścittaṃ yato na hi || 130 ||
manasā'pi hi viśveśaṃ vidviṣantīha ye'dhamāḥ
adhyāsate'ndhatāmisraṃ mṛtāste'nyatra santatam || 131 ||
śivanindāparā ye ca ye pāśupatanindakāḥ
vidviṣo mama te jñeyāḥ patanto narake'śucau || 132 ||
aṣṭāviṃśatikoṭīṣu narakeṣu krameṇa hi
kalpaṃ kalpaṃ vaseyuste ye viśveśvaranindakāḥ || 133 ||

madbhaktaistadviśeṣeṇa sevyo viśveśvaro'niśam || 134 ||
iyaṃ vārāṇasī jñeyā mune pāśupatasthalī
tasmātpaśupatiḥ sevyaḥ kāśyāṃ niḥśreyasārthibhiḥ || 135 ||
atra pañcanade tīrthe snāti viśveśvaraḥ svayam
ūrje sadaiva sagaṇaḥ saskandaḥ saparicchadaḥ || 136 ||
brahmā savedaḥ samakho brahmāṇyādyāśca mātaraḥ
saptābdhayaḥ sasaritaḥ snāntyūrje dhūtapāpake || 137 ||
sacetanā hi yāvantastrailokye dehadhāriṇaḥ
tāvantaḥ snātumāyānti kārtike dhūtapāpake || 138 ||
dhūtapāpaka iti tapa audāryakhyāpanāyoktam | dhūtapāpakopalakṣite dharmanada
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 60 |
śivadrohī mama dāsa kahāve | so nara sapanehu mohiṃ na pāve |
śaṃkara vimukha bhakti caha morī | so nara mūr̤ha mandamati thorī ||
śaṃkarapriya mama drohī , śivadrohī mama dāsa |

yairna pañcanade snātaṃ prāpya kārtikikaṃ śubham
jalabudabudavatteṣāṃ vṛthā janma śarīriṇām || 13 9 |
ānandakānanaṃ puṇyaṃ puṇyaṃ pāñcanadaṃ tataḥ
tato'pi mama sānnidhyamagnibindo mahāmune || 140 ||
anenaivānumānena viddhi pañcanadasya
mahimānaṃ mahāprājña sarvatīrthottamottamam || 141 ||
śrutvā'pi yaṃ mahāprājño mahāpāpaiḥ pramucyate
viṣṇormukhāditi śrutvā so'gnibindurmahāmuniḥ || 142 |
punaḥ praṇamya papraccha bindumādhavamacyutam || 143 ||
agnibinduruvāca-
bhagavan śrotumicchāmi bindumādhava tadvada
katidhā tava rūpāṇi kāśyāṃ santi janārdana || 144 ||

bhaviṣyāṇyapi kānīha tāni me kathayā'cyuta
yāni sampūjya te bhaktāḥ prāpsyanti kṛtakṛtyatām || 145 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe bindumādhavāvirbhāvo nāma ṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 60 |

|| athaikaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya ṣaḍāsya uvāca- mādhavākhyānaṃ śrutaṃ me pāpanāśanam
mahimā'pi śrutaḥ śreyān samyak paṃñcanadasya vai || 1 ||
yadagnibindunā'pṛcchi mādhavo daityasūdanaḥ
tasyottaraṃ samākhyāhi yathākhyātaṃ madhudviṣā ||2 ||
skanda uvāca śṛṇvagastya - maharṣe tvaṃ kathyamānaṃ mayā'dhunā
mādhavena yathā''cakṣi munaye cāgnibindave ||3 ||
bindumādhava uvāca-
ādauṃ pādodake tīrthe viddhi māmādikeśavam
agnibindo mahāprājña bhaktānāṃ muktidāyakam
ekaṣaṣṭitame'dhyāye mahāmāhātmyasūcakam |
vaiṣṇavānāṃ ca tīrthānāṃ māhātmyaṃ hariṇā'kathi || 1 ||
atītādhyāye bhagavannityādinā agnibindunā pṛṣṭasya pratyuttaramuktānuvādapūrvakaṃ

avimukte'mṛte kṣetre ye'rcayantyādikeśavam
te'mṛtatvaṃ bhajantyeva sarvaduḥkhavivarjitāḥ ||5
saṃgameśaṃ mahāliṅga pratiṣṭhāpyādikeśavaḥ
darśanādaghahaṃ nṛṇāṃ bhuktiṃ muktiṃ diśetsadā ||6 ||
yāmyāṃ pādodakācchvetadvīpatīrthaṃ mahattaram
tatrāhaṃ jñānado nṛṇāṃ jñānakeśavasaṃjñakaḥ ||7 ||
śvetadvīpe naraḥ snātvā jñānakeśavasannidhau
na jñānād bhraśyate kvāpi jñānakeśavapūjanāt ||8 ||
tārkṣyakeśavanāmā'haṃ tārkṣyatīrthe narottamaiḥ
pūjanīyaḥ sadā bhaktyā tārkṣyavatte priyā mama || 9 ||
tatraiva nārade tīrthe'smyahaṃ nāradakeśava :
brahmavidyopadeṣṭā ca tattīrthāplutavarṣmaṇām || 10 ||
prahlādatīrthaṃ tatraiva nāmnā prahlādakeśavaḥ
bhaktaiḥ samarcanīyo'haṃ mahābhaktisamṛddhaye || 11 ||

tīrthe'mbarīṣe tatrā'haṃ nāmnaivādityakeśavaḥ
pātakadhvāntanicayaṃ dhvaṃsayāmīkṣaṇādapi || 12 ||
' dattātreyeśvarādyāmyāmahamādigadādharaḥ
harāmi tatra bhaktānāṃ saṃsāragadasaṃcayam || 13 |
tatraiva bhārgave tīrthe bhṛgukeśavanāmataḥ
kāśīnivāsinaḥ puṃso bibharmi ca manorathaiḥ || 14 ||
vāmanākhye mahātīrthe manaḥ prārthitade śubhe
pūjyo'haṃ śubhamicchadbhirnāmnā vāmanakeśavaḥ || 15 ||
naranārāyaṇe tīrthe naranārāyaṇātmakam
bhaktāḥ samarcya māṃ syurvai naranārāyaṇātmakāḥ || 16 ||
tīrthe yajñavarāhākhye yajñavārāhasaṃjñakaḥ
naraiḥ samarcanīyo'haṃ sarvayajñaphalepsubhiḥ || 17 ||
vidāranarasiṃho'haṃ kāśīvighnavidāraṇaḥ
tannāmni tīrthe saṃsevyastīrthopadravaśāntaye || 18 |

samarcya māṃ naro bhaktyā mama māyāṃ na saṃspṛśet 1 9 |
mune lakṣmīnṛsiṃho'smi tīrthe tannāmni pāvane
diśāmi bhaktiyuktebhyaḥ sadā naiḥśreyasīṃ śriyam || 20 ||
śeṣamādhavanāmā'haṃ śeṣatīrthe'ghahāriṇi
viśrāṇayāmyaśeṣāṃśca viśeṣān bhaktacintitān || 21 ||
śaṃkhamādhavatīrthe ca snātvā māṃ śaṃkhamādhavam |
śaṃkhodakena saṃsnāpya bhavecchaṃkhanidheḥ patiḥ || 22 ||
hayagrīve mahātīrthe māṃ hayagrīvakeśavam
praṇamya prāpnuyānnūnaṃ tadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam || 23 ||
bhīṣmakeśavanāmā'haṃ vṛddhakāleśapaścime
upasargān hare bhīṣmān sevito bhaktiyuktitaḥ || 24 ||
nirvāṇakeśavaścāhaṃ bhaktanirvāṇasūcakaḥ
lolārkāduttare bhāge lolatvaṃ cetaso hare || 25 ||
gopīgovindatīrthaṃ gopīyuktaśrīkṛṣṇatīrtham || 1 9 |
viśeṣānutkṛṣṭābhilaṣitapadārthān || 21 |
bhaktiyuktitaḥ bhaktiyogena || 24 ||

vandyāstrilokasundaryā yāmyāṃ yo māṃ samarcayet
kāśyāṃ khyātaṃ tribhuvanakeśavaṃ na sa garbhabhāk || 26 ||
jñānavāpyāḥ purobhāge viddhi māṃ jñānamādhavam
tatra māṃ bhaktito'bhyarcya jñānaṃ prāpnoti śāśvatam || 27 ||
śvetamādhavasaṃjño'haṃ viśālākṣyāḥ samīpataḥ
śvetadvīpeśvaraṃ rūpaṃ kuryāṃ bhaktyā samarcitaḥ || 28 ||
udagdaśāśvamedhānmāṃ prayāgākhyaṃ ca mādhavam
prayāgatīrthe susnāto dṛṣṭvā pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 2 9 ||
prayāgagamane puṃsāṃ yat phalaṃ tapasi śrutam |
tatphalaṃ syāddaśaguṇamatra snātvā mamā'grataḥ || 30 ||
gaṅgāyamunayoḥ saṅge yatpuṇyaṃ snānakāriṇām
kāśyāṃ matsannidhāvatra tatpuṇyaṃ syāddaśottaram || 31 ||
udaguttare || 2 9 |
tapasi māghe || 30 |
matsannidhau prayāgamādhavanikaṭe || 31 ||

dānāni rāhugraste'rke dadatāṃ yatphalaṃ bhavet
kurukṣetre hi tatkāśyāmatraiva syāddaśādhikam || 32 ||
gaṅgottaravahā yatra yamunā pūrvavāhinī
tatsaṃbhedaṃ naraḥ prāpya mucyate brahmahatyayā || 33 ||
vapanaṃ tatra kartavyaṃ piṇḍadānaṃ ca bhāvataḥ
deyāni tatra dānāni mahāphalamabhīpsunā
guṇāḥ prajāpatikṣetre ye sarve samudīritāḥ
avimukte mahākṣetre'saṃkhyātāśca bhavanti hi || 35 ||
prayāgeśaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ tatra tiṣṭhati kāmadam
tatsānnidhyācca tattīrthaṃ kāmadaṃ parikīrtitam || 36 ||
kāśyāṃ māghaḥ prayāge yairna snāto makarārkagaḥ
aruṇodayamāsādya teṣāṃ niḥśreyasaṃ kutaḥ || 37 ||
prayāgeśaṃ śūlaṭaṅkeśvaram || 36 ||

daśāśvamedhajanitaṃ phalaṃ phalaṃ teṣāṃ bhaveddhruvam || 38 ||
prayāgamādhavaṃ bhaktyā prayāgeśaṃ ca kāmadam
prayāge tapasi snātvā ye'rcayantyanvahaṃ sadā || 3 9 ||
dhanadhānyasutarddhāste labdhvā bhogān manoramānu
bhuktveha paramānandaṃ paraṃ mokṣamavāpnuyuḥ
māghe sarvāṇi tīrthāni prayāgamadhiyānti hi
prācyudīcī pratīcīto dakṣiṇādhastathordhvataḥ || 41 ||
kāśīsthitāni tīrthāni mune yānti na kutracit
yadi yānti tadāyānti tīrthatrayamanuttamam
āyāntyūrje pañcanade prātaḥ prātarmamāntikam
mahāghaughapraśamane mahāśreyovidhāyini
prāpya māghamaghāriṃ ca prayāgeśasamīpataḥ |
prātaḥ prayāgaṃ saṃsnānti sarvatīrthāni māmanu
ūrje kārtika || 43 |
māmanu māṃ lakṣyīkṛtya matsamīpe cetyarthaḥ || 44 |

saṃsnātuṃ sarvatīrthāni muktidāṃ maṇikarṇikām || 45
kāśyāṃ rahasyaṃ paramametatte kathitaṃ ||
yathā tīrthatrayī mune
śreṣṭhā svasvakāle viśeṣataḥ
anyadrahasyaṃ vakṣyāmi na vācyaṃ yatra kutracit
abhakteṣu sadā gopyaṃ na gopyaṃ bhaktimajjane
kāśyāṃ sarvāṇi tīrthāni ekaikāduttarottaram
mahaināṃsi prahantyeva prasahya nijatejasā ||48 ||
etadeva rahasyaṃ te vārāṇasyā udīryate
utkṣipyaikāṅguliṃ tathyaṃ śreṣṭhaikā maṇikarṇikā || 4 9 ||
garjanti sarvatīrthāni svasvadhiṣṇyagatānyaho |
kevalaṃ balamāsādya sumahanmaṇikarṇikam || 50 ||
pāpāni pāpināṃ hatvā mahāntyapi bahūnyapi
kāśītīrthāni madhyāhne prāyaścittacikīrṣayā || 51 ||
prahantyeva praghnaṃtyevetyarthaḥ | dahantīti vā pāṭhaḥ || 48 |

parvasvaparvasvapi vā nityaṃ niyamavantyaho
nirmalāni bhavantyeva vigāhya maṇikarṇikām || 52 ||
viśveśo viśvayā sārdhe sadopamaṇikarṇikam
madhyaṃdinaṃ samāsādya saṃsnāti prativāsaram || 53 ||
vaikuṇṭhādapyahaṃ nityaṃ madhyāhne maṇikarṇikām
vigāhe padmayā sārdhaṃ mudā paramayā mune || 54 ||
sakṛnmamākhyāṃ gṛṇatāṃ nirharanyadaghānyaham
harināmasamāpannastadbalānmāṇikarṇikāt || 55 ||
satyalokāt pratidinaṃ haṃsayānaḥ pitāmahaḥ
mādhyāhnikavidhānāya samāyānmaṇikarṇikām || 56 ||
indrādyā lokapālāśca marīcādyā maharṣayaḥ
mādhyāhnikīṃ kriyāṃ kartuṃ samīyurmaṇikarṇikām || 57 ||
maṇikarṇikāyāḥ samīpamupamaṇikarṇikaṃ maṇikarṇikāyāmityarthaḥ || 53 |

śeṣavāsukimukhyāśca nāgā vai nāgalokataḥ
samāyāntīha madhyāhne saṃsnātuṃ maṇikarṇikām || 58 ||
carācareṣu sarveṣu yāvantaśca sacetanāḥ I
tāvanta : snānti madhyāhne maṇikarṇījale'male || 5 9 ||

kṛtā nānāvidhā dharmā iṣṭāpūrtāstu tairnṛbhiḥ
vārdhakaṃ samanuprāpya prāpi yairmaṇikarṇikā || 65 ||
ratnāni sadukūlāni kāñcanaṃ gajavājinaḥ
deyāḥ prājñena yatnena sadopamaṇikarṇikam || 66 ||
puṇyenopārjitaṃ dravyamatyalpamapi yairnaraiḥ
dattaṃ tadakṣayaṃ nityaṃ mune'dhimaṇikarṇikam || 67 ||
kuryādyathoktamapyekaṃ prāṇāyāmaṃ narottamaḥ
yastena vihito nūnaṃ ṣaḍaṅgo yoga uttamaḥ || 68 |
japtvaikāmapi gāyatrīṃ samprāpya maṇikarṇikām
labhedayutagāyatrījapanasya phalaṃ sphuṭam || 6 9 ||
ekāmapyāhutiṃ prājño datvopamaṇikarṇikam
yāvajjīvāgnihotrasya labhedavikalaṃ phalam || 70 ||
iti harervākyamagnibindurmahātapāḥ
praṇipatya mahābhaktyā punaḥ papraccha mādhavam || 71 ||

agnibinduruvāca-
viṣṇo kiyatparīmāṇā puṇyaiṣā maṇikarṇikā
brūhi me puṇḍarīkākṣa na tvattastattvavit paraḥ || 72 ||
śrīviṣṇuruvāca-
āgaṅgā keśavādā ca hariścandrasya maṇḍapāt
āmadhyāddevasaritaḥ svardvārānmaṇikarṇikā ||73 ||
sthūlametat parīmāṇaṃ sūkṣmaṃ ca pravadāmi te |
hariścandrasya tīrthāgre hariścandravināyakaḥ
sīmāvināyakaścātra maṇikarṇīhṛdottare
sīmāvināyakaṃ bhaktyā pūjayitvā narottamaḥ || 75 ||
modakaiḥ sopacāraiśca prāpnuyānmaṇikarṇikām
hariścandre mahātīrthe tarpayeyuḥ pitāmahān || 76 ||
śataṃ samāḥ sutṛptāḥ syuḥ prayacchanti ca vāñchitam
hariścandre mahātīrthe snātvā śraddhānvito naraḥ || 77 ||
hariścandreśvaraṃ natvā na satyātparihīyate |
tataḥ parvatatīrtha ca parvateśvarasannidhau || 78 ||
tatra sūkṣmaparimāṇaṃ vaktuṃ prasaṅgāt sthūlamaṇikarṇikāyāmavāntaratīrthānyāha |
hariścandretyārabhya cakrapuṣkaraṇītyataḥ prāktanena granthena || 74 ||
sutṛptāḥ syuḥ , tasya te pitāmahā iti śeṣaḥ || 77 ||

tatra snātvā'rcayitveśaṃ kiñciddatvā svaśaktitaḥ || 7 9 ||
adhyāsya meruśikharaṃ divyān bhogān samaśnute
kambalāśvataraṃ tīrthaṃ parvateśvaradakṣiṇe || 80 ||
kambalāśvatareśaṃ ca tattīrthātpaścime śubham
tasmiṃstīrthe kṛtasnānastalliṅgaṃ yaḥ samarcayet || 81 ||
api tasya kule jātā gītajñāḥ syuḥ śriyānvitāḥ
cakrapuṣkariṇī tatra yonicakranivāriṇī || 82 ||
saṃsāracakre gahane yatra snāto viśenna nā
cakrapuṣkariṇītīrthaṃ mamādhiṣṭhānamuttamam || 83 ||
samāḥ parārdhasaṃkhyātāstatra taptaṃ mahātapaḥ
tatra pratyakṣatāṃ yāto mama viśveśvaraḥ paraḥ || 84 ||
tattīrthātparvateśvaratīrthāt | tasmiṃstīrthe kambalāśvataratīrthe || 81 |

cakrapuṣkariṇī caiva khyātā'bhūnmaṇikarṇikā || 85 |
dravarūpaṃ parityajya lalanārūpadhāriṇī |
pratyakṣarūpiṇī tatra mayaikṣi maṇikarṇikā || 86 ||
tasyā rūpaṃ pravakṣyāmi bhaktānāṃ śubhadaṃ param |
yadrūpadhyānataḥ puṃbhirāṣaṇmāsaṃ trisandhyataḥ || 87 |
pratyakṣarūpiṇī devī dṛśyate maṇikarṇikā
caturbhujā viśālākṣī sphuradbhālavilocanā || 88 |
paścimābhimukhī nityaṃ prabaddhakarasampuṭā
indīvaravatīṃ mālāṃ dadhatī dakṣiṇe kare || 8 9 ||
varodyate kare savye mātuluṅgaphalaṃ śubham I
kumārīrūpiṇī nityaṃ nityaṃ nityaṃ dvādaśavārṣikī || 9 0 ||
śuddhasphaṭikakāntiśca sunīlasnigdhamūrddhajā
jitapravālamāṇikyaramaṇīyaradacchadā || 9 1 ||
indīvaravatīṃ nīlotpalavatīm || 8 9 |
mātuluṅgaphalaṃ rucakaphalam | yadāhā'maraḥ - ' rucako mātuluṅgakaḥ ' iti || 9 0 ||
phira vahā~ hī bar̤ā avinaśvara aiśvarya mujhe milā thā aura vahī cakrapuṣkariṇī

sarvāṅgamuktābharaṇā candrakāntyaṃśukāvṛtā ||9 2 ||
puṇḍarīkamayīṃ mālāṃ saśrīkāṃ bibhratī hṛdi |
dhyātavyā'nena rūpeṇa mumukṣubhiraharniśam || 9 3 ||
nirvāṇalakṣmībhavanaṃ śrīmatī maṇikarṇikā
mantraṃ tasyāśca vakṣyāmi bhaktakalpadrumābhidham ||
yasyāvartanataḥ siddhyedapi siddhyaṣṭakaṃ nṛṇām || 9 4 ||
vāgbhavamāyā - lakṣmī- madanapraṇavān vadetpūrvam |
bhāntyaṃ bindūpetaṃ maṇipadamatha karṇike sahṛt praṇavapuṭaḥ || 9 5 ||

mantraḥ suradrumasamaḥ samastasukhasantatiprado japyaḥ
tithibhiḥ parimitavarṇaḥ paramapa daṃśati diniśitadhiyām || 9 6 ||
tārastāratṛtīyo bindvanto maṇipadaṃ tataḥ karṇike |

trilakṣamantrajapyena mṛto deśāntareṣvapi
avaśyaṃ muktimāpnoti mantrasyā'sya prabhāvataḥ || 100 ||
sauvarṇī pratimā kāryā navaratnasamanvitā
pūrvoktarūpasampannā sampūjyā sā prayatnataḥ || 101 ||
sampūjyā vā sadā gehe narairmokṣaikakāṅkṣibhiḥ
maṇikarṇyāmathākṣepyā samabhyarcya prayatnataḥ || 102 ||
saṃsārabhīrubhiḥ puṃbhiḥ śraddhābaddhādarairiha
upāyaḥ samanuṣṭheyo hyapi dūranivāsibhiḥ || 103 ||
maṇikarṇya kṛtasnāno maṇikarṇīśavīkṣaṇāt
jananījaṭharāvāse vasatiṃ na labhennaraḥ || 104 ||
maṇikarṇīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ purā saṃsthāpitaṃ mayā
prāgdvāre'ntargṛhasyātra samarthyo mokṣakāṅkṣibhiḥ || 105 ||
tataḥ pāśupataṃ tīrthamavācyāṃ maṇikarṇitaḥ
kṛtodakakriyastatra paśyetpaśupatīśvaram || 106 ||
navaratnasamanvitā nūtanai ratnairalaṃkṛtetyarthaḥ || 101 |

mamāpi vidhimukhyānāṃ surāṇāṃ paśupāśahṛt || 107 ||
ataḥ paśupatiryatra liṅgarūpadharaḥ svayam
paśupāśavimokṣāya nityaṃ kāśyāṃ prakāśate || 108 ||
tatra caitracaturdaśyāṃ śuklāyāṃ śucimānasaiḥ
kāryā yātrā prayatnena rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ tathā || 10 9 ||
pūjayitvā paśupatimupoṣaṇaparāyaṇāḥ
paśupāśairna badhyante darśa vihitapāraṇāḥ || 110 ||
" ātmānaḥ paśavaḥ proktāḥ sarve saṃsāravartinaḥ |
teṣāṃ patirahaṃ devaḥ smṛtaḥ paśupatirbudhaiḥ || iti |

rudrāvāsastatastīrthaṃ tīrthātpāśupatātpuraḥ
tatra snātvā narairarthyo rudrāvāseśvaro haraḥ || 111 ||
maṇikarṇīśvarādyāmyāṃ rudrāvāseśvaraṃ naraḥ
samārādhya vaselloke rudrāvāse na saṃśayaḥ || 112 ||
viśvatīrthaṃ tato yāmyāṃ viśvaistīrthairadhiṣṭhitam
tatra snātvā naro bhaktyā viśvanāthaṃ vilokayet || 113 |
viśvāṃ gaurīṃ ca tadanu pūjayitvā'tibhaktitaḥ
viśvasya pūjyo bhavati tato viśvamayo bhavet || 114
muktitīrthaṃ ca tadanu tatrāpi kṛtamajjanaḥ
mokṣeśvaraṃ tato'bhyarcya mokṣamāpnotyasaṃśayam || 115 ||
avimukteśvarātpaścānmokṣeśaṃ vīkṣya mānavaḥ
na punarmānave loke yātāyātaṃ karotyaho || 116 ||
avimukteśvaraṃ tīrthaṃ muktitīrthānmanāku pare
tatrāplutyā'vimukteśamarcayitvā . vimucyate || 117 ||
tatparaṃ tārakaṃ tīrthaṃ yatra viśveśvaraḥ svayam |
ācaṣṭe tārakaṃ brahma mṛtakarṇe'mṛtātmakam || 118 ||

saṃsārasāgaraṃ tīrtvā tārayetsvapitṝnapi || 11 9 ||
tatrābhyāse skandatīrthaṃ tatrāplutya narottamaḥ |
dṛṣṭvā ṣaḍānanaṃ caiva jahyāt ṣāṭkauśikīṃ tanum || 120 ||
tārakeśvarapūrveṇa dṛṣṭvā devaṃ ṣaḍānanam |
vaset ṣaḍānane loke kaumāraṃ vapurudvahan || 121 |
duṇḍhitīrthaṃ tataḥ puṇyaṃ narastatra kṛtodakaḥ |
duḍhi gaṇapatiṃ stutvā na vighnairabhibhūyate || 122 ||
bhavānītīrthamatulaṃ duṇḍitīrthasya dakṣiṇe
tatra snātvā vidhānena bhavānīṃ paripūjya ca || 123 ||
dukūlai - ratnanepathyainaivedyairbahuvistaraiḥ
puṣpairdhūpaiḥ pradīpaiśca bhavānīśau prapūjya ca || 124 ||
samastamarcitaṃ tena trailokyaṃ sacarācaram |
bhavānīśaṅkarau kāśyāmarcitau śraddhayā tu yaiḥ || 125 ||
tvaṅmāṃsaṃ rudhiramiti mātṛtaḥ snāyvasthimajjā iti pitṛta iti
ṣaṭkośāstatprabhāvāṃ ṣāṭkauśikīm || 120 |

aṣṭādhikāḥ prakartavyāḥ śatakṛtvaḥ pradakṣiṇāḥ || 126 ||
pradakṣiṇīkṛtā tena saptadvīpavatī mahī
saśailā sasamudrā ca sāśramā ca sakānanā || 127 ||
aṣṭau pradakṣiṇā deyāḥ pratyahaṃ tuṣṭitatparaiḥ
namanīyau prayatnena bhavānīśaṅkarau sadā || 128 ||
bhaktānāṃ kāmadā nityaṃ bhavānīvāsasāṃpradā
ato bhavānī sampūjyā kāśyāṃ tīrthanivāsibhiḥ || 12 9 ||
yogakṣemaṃ sadā kuryād bhavānī kāśivāsinām
tasmād bhavānī saṃsevyā satataṃ kāśivāsibhiḥ || 130 ||
bhikṣaṇīyā sadā bhikṣā bhikṣuṇā mokṣakāṅkṣiṇā
yato bhikṣāpradā kāśyāṃ viśveśasya kuṭumbinī || 131 ||
gṛhumedhyatra viśveśo bhavānī tatkuṭumbinī |
sarvebhyaḥ kāśisaṃsthebhyo mokṣabhikṣāṃ prayacchati || 132 ||
sasamudrā samudraiḥ sahitā || 127 || 128 ||
tuṣṭitatparairityatra tuṣṭīti kriyāviśeṣaṇam | bhaktitatparairiti vā pāṭhaḥ ||

duṣprāpamapi yatkiñcitkāśīkṣetranivāsinām
tatsuprāpyaṃ karotyeva bhavānī pūjitā nṛbhiḥ || 133 |
kuryājjāgaraṇaṃ rātrau mahāṣṭamyāṃ vratī naraḥ
prātarbhavānīmabhyarcya prāpnuyād vāñchitaṃ phalam || 134 ||
śakreśātpaścimāśāyāṃ bhavānīṃ yo'bhivīkṣate
sarve manorathāstasya siddhyantīha na saṃśayaḥ || 135 ||
kāśyāṃ sadaiva vastavyaṃ snātavyottaravāhinī
bhavānīśaṅkarau sevyau prāptavye bhuktimuktike || 136 ||
mātarbhavāni tava pādarajo bhavāni
mātarbhavāni tava dāsataro bhavāni
mātarbhavāni na bhavāni yathā bhave'smiṃ-
stvadbhāgbhavānyanudinaṃ na punarbhavāni || 137 ||

tiṣṭhatā gacchatā vā'pi svapatā jāgratā'pi vā
ayaṃ mantraḥ sadā japyaḥ sukhāptyai kāśivāsinā || 138 ||
īśānatīrthaṃ tatraiva bhavānītīrthasannidhau
tatra snāto ya īśānamarcayenna sa janmabhāk || 13 9 ||
jñānatīrthaṃ ca tatraiva jñānadaṃ sarvadā nṛṇām
kṛtābhiṣekastattīrthe dṛṣṭvā jñāneśvaraṃ śivam || 140 ||
jñānavāpīsamīpastho jñāneśo yaiḥ samarcitaḥ
jñānabhraṃśo na teṣāṃ syādapi pañcatvamṛcchatām || 141 ||
śailāditīrthaṃ tatraivaṃ paramarddhiprakāśakam
tatra śrāddhādikaṃ kṛtvā datvā dānaṃ svaśaktitaḥ || 142 ||

labhedgaṇatvapadavīṃ nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 143 ||
nanditīrthādavācyāṃ tu viṣṇutīrthaṃ paraṃ mama
tatra piṇḍān vinirvāpya pitṝṇāmanṛṇo bhavet || 144 ||
viṣṇutīrthe kṛtasnāno yo māṃ viṣṇuṃ vilokayet
viśveśāddakṣiṇe pārśve viṣṇulokaṃ sa gacchati || 145 ||
yaḥ pratyekādaśīṃ prāpya śayanīṃ bodhinīṃ tathā
kuryājjāgaraṇaṃ rātrau mama mūrtisamīpataḥ || 146 ||
prātaḥ samarcya māṃ bhaktyā bhojayitvā dvijānapi
datvā gāḥ kāñcanaṃ bhūmiṃ na bhūyo bhūmibhāgbhavet || 147 ||
kṛtvā tatra vratotsargaṃ vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ
samyag vrataphalaṃ dhīmān prāpnotyeva mamājñayā || 148 ||
mama tīrthādavācyāṃ tu tīrthaṃ paitāmahaṃ śubham
tatra śrāddhavidhānena tarpayitvā pitāmahān || 14 9 ||
pitāmaheśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ brahmanāloparisthitam
pūjayitvā naro bhaktyā brahmalokamavāpnuyāt || 150 ||

brahmasrotaḥ samīpe tu kṛtaṃ karma śubhāśubham
parāmakṣayatāmeti śubhameva tataścaret || 151 ||
atyalpamapi yatkarma kṛtamatra śubhāśubham
pralaye'pi na tasyā'sti pralayo munisattama || 152 ||
nābhitīrthamidaṃ proktaṃ nābhibhūtaṃ yataḥ kṣiteḥ
api brahmāṇḍagolasya nābhireṣā śubhodayā || 153 ||

darśanād brahmahatyāyāḥ puraścaraṇamucyate || 158 ||
aśubhāṃ gatimāpannā yasya pūrve pitāmahāḥ
tena bhāgīrathītīrthe tarpaṇīyāḥ prayatnataḥ || 15 9 ||
taṃtra bhāgīrathe tīrthe śrāddhaṃ kṛtvā vidhānataḥ
brāhmaṇān bhojayitvā tu brahmaloke nayetpitṝn || 160 |
taddakṣiṇe mahātīrtha khurakartarisaṃjñitam
golokādāgatābhiśca gobhiryatkhurakoṭibhiḥ || 161 ||
sthapuṭīkṛtabhūbhāgaṃ tatastatkhurakartari
tasmiṃstīrthe kṛtasnānaḥ kṛtapiṇḍodakakriyaḥ || 162 ||
khurakartarīśaṃ liṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā golokamāpnuyāt
godhanairna vimucyeta talliṅgasya samarcanāt || 163 ||
dakṣiṇe khurakartaryā mārkaṇḍaṃ tīrthamuttamam
kṛtaśrāddhavidhānaśca tasmiṃstīrthe'ghahāriṇi || 164 ||
sthapuṭīkṛtabhūbhāgaṃ ślathīkṛtabhūpradeśam ācchāditabhūbhāgaṃ vā | sampuṭīti pāṭhe'pi sa
evārthaḥ || 162 |
khurakartaryā iti khurakartariṇastīrthādityarthaḥ || 164 |

brahmatejo'bhivṛddhiṃ ca kīrti ca paramāṃ bhuvi || 165 ||
vasiṣṭhatīrthaṃ paramaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam ca
tarpayitvā pitṝṃstatra vasiṣṭheśaṃ vilokya || 166 ||
naro na lipyate pāpairjanmatrayasamarjitaiḥ |
vasiṣṭhaloke vasati brahmatejaḥ samanvitaḥ || 167 ||
tatraivā'rundhatītīrthaṃ strīṇāṃ saubhāgyavardhanam
pativratābhistattīrthaṃ gāhanīyaṃ viśeṣataḥ || 168 ||
pauṃścalyajanito doṣastattīrthaparimajjanāt
kṣaṇādvināśamāgacchedarundhatyāḥ prabhāvataḥ || 16 9 ||
mārkaṇḍeyeśvarātprācyāṃ vasiṣṭheśvarapūjanāt
niṣpāpo jāyate martyo mahatpuṇyamavāpnuyāt || 170 ||
mūrtī vasiṣṭhā'rundhatyostatra pūjye prayatnataḥ
na strī vaidhavyamāpnoti na pumāṃstrīviyogitām || 171 ||
vasiṣṭhatīrthato yāmyāṃ narmadātīrthamuttamam
vidhāya śrāddhaṃ medhāvī narmadeśaṃ vilokya ca || 172 ||

tatra datvā mahādānaṃ padmayā na vimucyate
tatastrisandhyaṃ vai tīrthaṃ trisandhyeśvarapūrvataḥ || 173 ||
tatra tīrthe naraḥ snātvā kṛtvā sandhyāṃ vidhānataḥ
sandhyākālavilopotthapātakairnā'bhibhūyate || 174 |
trisandhyeśvaramālokya kṛtasandhyastrikālataḥ
trivedāvartajaṃ puṇyaṃ prāpnuyācchraddhayā dvijaḥ || 175 ||
tato'nu yoginītīrthaṃ narastatra kṛtāplavaḥ
dṛṣṭvā tu yoginīpīṭhaṃ yogasiddhimavāpnuyāt || 176 |
agastitīrthaṃ tatrāsti mahāghaughavighātakṛt
tatra snātvā prayatnena dṛṣṭvā'gastīśvaraṃ vibhum || 177 |
agastikuṇḍe ca tataḥ santarpya ca pitāmahān |
agastinā sametāṃ ca lopāmudrāṃ praṇamya ca || 178 ||
sarvapāpavinirmuktaḥ sarvakleśavivarjitaḥ
gacchetsa pūrvajaiḥ sārdhaṃ śivalokaṃ narottamaḥ || 17 9 ||
dakṣiṇe'gastyatīrthācca tīrthamastyatipāvanam
gaṅgākeśavasaṃjñaṃ ca sarvapātakanāśanam || 180 ||

sampūjya śraddhayā dhīmān mama loke mahīyate || 181 |
tatra piṇḍān vinirvāpya datvā dānaṃ svaśaktitaḥ
śatasāṃvatsarīṃ tṛptiṃ pitṝṇāṃ sa samarpayet || 182 ||
maṇikarṇīparīmāṇametatte kīrtitaṃ mahat
sīmāvināyakādyāmyāṃ sarvavighnavighātanāt || 183 |
vairocaneśvarātprācyāmahaṃ vaikuṇṭhamādhavaḥ
tatra māṃ bhaktito'bhyarcya vaikuṇṭhārcāmavāpnuyāt || 184 ||
vīramādhavasaṃjño'haṃ vīreśātpaścime mune
tatra vratī samabhyarcya na yāmīṃ yātanāṃ labhet || 185 ||
kālamādhavanāmā'haṃ kālabhairavasannidhau |
kaliḥ kālo na kalayenmadbhaktamiti niścitam || 186 ||
mārgaśīrṣasya śuklāyāmekādaśyāmupoṣitaḥ
tatra jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā yamaṃ nālokayetkvacit || 187 |
nirvāṇanarasiṃho'haṃ pulastīśvaradakṣiṇe
bhakto nirvāṇamāpnoti tanmūrtinamanādapi || 188 ||

dūtān mahābalānyāmyānna paśyettu tadarcaka : || 18 9 ||
pracaṇḍanarasiṃho'haṃ caṇḍabhairavapūrvataḥ
pracaṇḍamapyadhaṃ kṛtvā niṣpāpmā syāttadarcanāt || 1 9 0 ||
ahaṃ girinṛsiṃho'smi taddehalivināyakāt
