prācyāṃ prabalapāpaughagajānāṃ pravidāraṇaḥ || 1 9 1 ||
mahābhayaharaścā'haṃ narasiṃho mahāmune
pitāmaheśvarātpaścād bhaktasādhvasasādhvasaḥ || 1 9 2 ||
atyugranarasiṃho'haṃ kalaśeśvarapaścime
atyugramapi pāpaughaṃ harāmi śraddhayārcitaḥ || 1 9 3 ||
jvālāmālīnṛsiṃho'haṃ jvālāmukhyāḥ samīpataḥ
saṃjvālayāmi pāpaughatṛṇāni paripūjitaḥ || 1 9 4 |
kolāhalanṛsiṃho'smi daityadānavamardanaḥ
mama nāma samuccārādaghakolāhalo yataḥ || 1 9 5 ||
mama me viṣṇoḥ || 1 9 5 |

tatra māṃ bhaktito'bhyarcya nopasargairnirudhyate || 1 9 6 ||
viṭaṅkanarasiṃho'smi nīlakaṇṭheśvarādanu
tatra māṃ śraddhayā pūjya naro bhavati nirbhayaḥ || 1 9 7 |
anantavāmanaścāhamananteśvarasannidhau
anantānyapi bhaktasya kaluṣāṇi hare'rcitaḥ || 1 9 8 |
dadhivāmanasaṃjño'haṃ bhaktānāṃ dadhibhaktadaḥ
yannāmasmaraṇādeva na daridro naro bhavet || 1 99 | |
trivikramo'smyahaṃ kāśyāmudīcyāṃ ca trilocanāt
dadāmi pūjito lakṣmīṃ harāmi vṛjinānyapi || 200 ||
balivāmananāmā'haṃ balinā paripūjitaḥ |
balibhadreśvarātprāṃcyāṃ bhaktānāṃ balavardhanaḥ || 201 |
kaṃ brahmāṇaṃ kālayatīti kaṃkālaḥ , sa cāsau bhairavaśceti kaṅkālabhairavaḥ | māṃ
kolāhalanṛsiṃham || 1 9 6 ||
viṭaṅko bhayaṅkaraḥ alaṅkṛto vā || 1 9 7 ||

nāmnā tāmravarāho'smi bhaktānāṃ cintitārthadaḥ || 202 ||
mune dharaṇivārāhaḥ prayāgeśvarasannidhau |
snātvā vārāhatīrthe'tra dṛṣṭvā māṃ kiṭirūpiṇam || 203 ||
sampūjya bahubhāvena na viśedyonisaṅkaṭam
tatrā'lpamapi datvā'nnaṃ dharādānaphalaṃ labhet || 204 ||
mahākaluṣagambhīrasāgare nipatan janaḥ
mama bhaktyuḍupaṃ prāpya pralaye'pi na majjati || 205 ||
ahaṃ kokāvarāho'smi kiṭīśvarasamīpataḥ
tatra māṃ pūjayanmartyo labhate cintitaṃ phalam || 206 ||
nārāyaṇāḥ śataṃ pañca śataṃ ca jalaśāyinaḥ
triṃśatkamaṭharūpāṇi matsyarūpāṇi viṃśatiḥ || 207 ||
gopālāśca śataṃ sāṣṭaṃ buddhāḥ santi sahasraśaḥ |
triṃśatparaśurāmāśca rāmā ekottaraṃ śatam || 208 ||
kiṭirūpiṇaṃ sūkararūpiṇam || 203 ||

mune kṛtaprasādena viśveśena śritaḥ svayam || 20 9 ||
nārāyaṇasvarūpeṇa gaṇāścakragadodyatāḥ
kurvanti rakṣāṃ kṣetrasya parito niyutāni ṣaṭ || 210 ||
so'gnibinduriti śrutvā saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ
punaḥ papraccha medhāvī mūrtibhedān vada prabho || 211 |
hitāya nijabhaktānāṃ mama sandehaśāntaye
kati te mūrtayo'nanta kathaṃ jñeyāstathā vada || 212 ||
ityākarṇya vacastasyā'gnibindostapasāṃ nidheḥ
viṣṇurmūrtibhedānanukramāt || 213 |
uvāca bhagavān martyo yamagocaratāṃ vrajet |
yān śrutvā'pi hi no
keśavādīṃścaturviṃśadbhedānāha prajāpatiḥ || 214 |

agnibindo mahāprājña śṛṇu te kathayāmyaham
ādyadakṣiṇahastācca viddhi sṛṣṭikramān mune || 215 ||
śaṃkhacakragadāpadyairmūrtiṃ jānīhi kaiśavīm
pūjitā yā nṛṇāṃ kuryāccintitārthamasaṃśayam || 216 ||
madhuhā paricetavyaḥ śaṃkhapadmagadādibhiḥ |
vairiṇo nāśamāyānti tanmūrtiparisevanāt || 217 |
saṃkarṣaṇaḥ samaryo'tra śaṃkhābjārigadāyudhaḥ
tanmūrtipūjanājjātu janturna syāt punarbhavī || 218 ||
agnibindo iti I | kathayāmi svamūrtibhedāniti śeṣaḥ | sṛṣṭikramāt pradakṣiṇa-
kramāt || 215 ||
tatrādyadakṣiṇakarādyavāmakarādho vāmakarā'dho dakṣiṇakarakrameṇa śaṃkha - cakra - gadā-
padmaḥ keśavamadhuhasaṃkarṣaṇadāmodaravāmanapradyumnaṣaṭkaṃ viṣṇumādhavā'niruddha-
puruṣottamā'dhokṣajajanārdanaṣaṭkaṃ govindatrivikramaśrīdharahṛṣīkeśanṛsiṃhā'cyutaṣaṭkaṃ
vāsudevanārāyaṇapadmanābhopendraharikṛṣṇaṣaṭkaṃ mūrtayo bhavanti | tatra keśavādiṣaṇmūrtiṣu
ādyadakṣiṇakare śaṃkha eva ādyavāmakare cakrapadmagadācakragadāḥ adho vāmakare
gadācakracakrapadmapadmāni adho dakṣiṇakare padmacakragadāpadmagadācakrāṇi viṣṇvādi-
ṣaṇmūrtiṣu ādyavāmakare śaṃkha eva govindādiṣaṇmūrtiṣu adho vāmakare śaṃkha eva
vāsudevādiṣaṇmūrtiṣu adho dakṣiṇakare śaṃkha eva anyatsa prādakṣiṇyena pūrvavadeva | tatra
keśavaḥ svarṇavarṇaḥ || 216 |
madhuhā'rjunavarṇaḥ || 217 |
saṃkarṣaṇaḥ svarṇavarṇaḥ || 218 |
śrīviṣṇu bole-
he mahāprājña ! agnibindo ! mune ! maiṃ tumase kahatā hū~ , śravaṇa karo | pahale

dadāti vittaṃ putrāṃśca godhanaṃ dhānyameva hi || 21 9 ||
vāmanaḥ śaṃkhacakrābjagadābhirupalakṣitaḥ
lakṣmīvantaṃ janaṃ kuryād gṛhe'pi paridhāritaḥ || 220 ||
pāñcajanyaṃ gadāṃ padmaṃ citramūrtisudarśanam
pradyumnaḥ pūjyate martyairbahudyumnaṃ prayacchati || 221 |
ūrdhvavāmakarātsṛṣṭyā viṣṇvādyaṃ ṣaṭkamucyate
yasya smaraṇamātreṇa vilīyante'gharāśayaḥ || 222 ||
śaṃkhāribhyāṃ gadābjābhyāṃ pūjyo viṣṇuḥ śriye naraiḥ
śaṃkhapadmagadācakrairmādhavaḥ paramarddhidaḥ || 223 ||
dāmodaraḥ kṣīravarṇaḥ || 21 9 |
vāmano raktavarṇaḥ || 220 ||
pāñcajanyamiti | citrā vicitrā mūrtiryasya sudarśanasya tattathā | etaccatuṣṭayaṃ
bibhrāṇa iti śeṣaḥ | pradyumno vajravarṇaḥ || 221 |

śaṃkhena gadayā cakrāmbujābhyāṃ puruṣottamaḥ || 224 ||
adhokṣajo janihara : śaṃkhāryabjagado mune
śaṃkhakaumodakīpadmacakrerthyeyo janārdanaḥ || 225 ||
adho vāmakarāt sṛṣṭyā ṣaḍgovindādimūrtayaḥ
śaṃkhaṃ cakraṃ gadāṃ padmaṃ govindo bibhṛyātsadā || 226 ||
śaṃkhapadmagadācakrairarthyo lakṣmyai trivikramaḥ
śaṃkhābjacakraṃ bibhrāṇo gadāvān śrīdharaḥ śriye || 227 ||
hṛṣīkeśaśca śaṃkhena gadācakrāmbujairmataḥ
nṛsiṃha : śaṃkhacakrābhyāṃ padmena gadayohyate || 228 ||
acyutaḥ śaṃkhabhṛnnityaṃ gadāpadmarathāṅgavān |
dakṣiṇādhaḥ karādūhyā vāsudevādayaśca ṣaṭ || 22 9 ||
aniruddhaḥ kṛṣṇavarṇaḥ || 224 ||
govindo manaḥśilāvarṇaḥ || 226 ||

śaṃkhāmbujagadācakrī dhyeyo nārāyaṇo nṛbhiḥ || 230 ||
śaṃkhī padmī padmanābho jñeyaścakrī gadī mune
upendraḥ śaṃkhavānnityaṃ gadārikamalāyudhaḥ || 231 |

śaṃkhena gadayā padmacakrābhyāṃ kṛṣṇa ucyate || 232 ||
ete bhedā mayākhyātāḥ svamūrtīnāṃ mahāmune
yān vijñāya dhuvaṃ martyo bhuktiṃ muktiṃ ca vindati || 233 ||
evaṃ vadati govinde munaye cāgnibindave
pakṣīndraḥ pakṣavikṣiptavipakṣo'kṣipathaṃgataḥ || 234
prāha ca praṇipatyāśu tryakṣasyāgamanaṃ mudā
saṃbhrameṇa hṛṣīkeśaḥ kveśa ityavadattataḥ || 235 ||
garuḍa uvāca-
pratyakṣaḥ kriyatāmeṣa mahāvṛṣabhaketanaḥ
yasya dhvajasya ratnārciḥ pūrayedrodasīmimām || 236 ||
pakṣeti | pakṣābhyāṃ vikṣiptā nirastā vipakṣā yena saḥ || 234 |
rodasī dyāvāpṛthivyorantarālam || 236 ||

koṭimārtaṇḍavidyotapradyotitadigānanam || 237 ||
nirīkṣya puṇḍarīkākṣastryakṣasya vṛṣabhadhvajam
vimānināṃ vimānaughaiḥ parītagaġanāṅgaṇam || 238 |
mahāvādyaninādaughaiḥ pratisvānitakandaram
vidyādharīparikṣiptapuṣpāñjalisugandhitam || 23 9 ||
praṇamya dūrādapi ca saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ |
abhyutthātuṃ manaścakre śaṃkhacakragadādharaḥ || 240 ||
agnibindumatha prāha muktidastu mudāṃnidhiḥ I
idaṃ sudarśanaṃ cakraṃ spṛśa savyena pāṇinā || 241 ||
loketi | puṇḍarīkākṣastryakṣasya loketyādi viśeṣaṇaviśiṣṭaṃ vṛṣabhadhvajaṃ vṛṣabharūpo
dhvajo vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ , vṛṣabho vṛṣo dhvajo yasmin ratha iti vā taṃ nirīkṣya dūrādapi ca
dūrādeva , cakāraḥ saṃbhrame , abhyutthātumabhyutthānena gantuṃ manaścakre dūrādeva nirīkṣyeti

agnibinduriti proktaḥ spṛśedyāvatsudarśanam
tāvatsudarśano jātaḥ paramānugrahāddhareḥ || 242 ||
skanda uvāca- jyotīrūpo'tha
sa muni : kaustubhe jyotiṣāṃ tanau
ekībhūtaḥ kalaśaja bindumādhavasevanāt || 243 ||
bindumādhavapādābjabhramarīkṛtamānasāḥ
agnibindūpamāṃ yānti kalaśodbhava niścitam || 244 ||
' kāśyāṃ sadaiva vastavyaṃ draṣṭavyoṃ bindumādhavaḥ
śrotavyamidamākhyānaṃ jetavyā jagatāṃ gatiḥ || 245 ||
puṇyā pañcanadotpattiḥ puṇyā puṇyā mādhavasaṃkathā
puṇyo vārāṇasīvāsaḥ saṃbhavet puṇyajanmanām || 246 ||
agnibindoḥ stutiṃ yo'tra mādhavāgre paṭhiṣyati
samṛddhasarvakāmaḥ sa mokṣalakṣmīpatirbhavet || 247 ||
śobhanaṃ darśanaṃ jñānaṃ yasya sa sudarśanaḥ || 242 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 61 ||

dvijānāṃ bhuñjamānānāṃ purastāt paratṛptaye || 248 ||
japtavyamidamākhyānaṃ parvakāle viśeṣataḥ
puṇye pañcanadābhyāśe puṇyalakṣmīvivṛddhaye || 24 9 ||
paṭhitavyaḥ prayatnena bindumādhavasaṃbhavaḥ
śrotavyaḥ parayā bhaktyā bhuktimuktisamṛddhaye || 250 ||
samprāpte vāsare viṣṇo rātrau jāgaraṇānvitaḥ I
śrutvākhyānamidaṃ puṇyaṃ vaikuṇṭhe vasatiṃ labhet || 251 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe bindumādhavāvirbhāvo mādhavāgnibindusaṃvādo
vaiṣṇavatīrthamāhātmyaṃ ca nāmaikaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 61 ||

|| atha dviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-
śrutvā skanda na tṛpto'smi tava karitāṃ kathām
atyāścaryakaraṃ proktamākhyānaṃ baindumādhavam || 1 ||
idānīṃ śrotumicchāmi devadevasamāgamam
tārthyāttryakṣaḥ samākarṇya divodāsasya ceṣṭitam ||2 ||
viṣṇumāyāprapañcaṃ ca kimāha garuḍadhvajam |

etadākhyāhi me skanda mahatkautūhalaṃ mayi || 5 ||
imaṃ praśnaṃ niśamyaiśirmunaiḥ kalaśajanmanaḥ |
pratyuvāca namaskṛtya śivau praṇatasiddhidau || 6 ||
skanda uvāca - kathāmetāṃ sarvapātakanāśinīm
mune śṛṇu
aśeṣavighnaśamanīṃ mahāśreyo'bhivardhinīm ||7 ||
atha devo'suraripuḥ śrutvā śambhusamāgamam |
dvijarājāya samudā samadātpāritoṣikam || 8 |
āyānaṃ śaṃsate śambhorupavārāṇasipriyam |
brahmāṇamagrataḥ kṛtvā tataścābhyudyayau hariḥ || 9 ||
imamiti vyāsavākyam || 6 ||

vivasvatā sametaśca tairgaṇaiḥ parito vṛtaḥ
yoginībhiranūdyāto gaṇeśamupasaṃsthitaḥ || 10 ||
atha netrātithīkṛtya devadevaṃ vṛṣadhvajam
maṃkṣu tārthyādavāruhya praṇanāma śriyaḥ patiḥ || 11 ||
pitāmaho'pi sthaviro bhṛśaṃ namraśirodharaḥ
praṇatena mṛḍenaiva praṇaman vinivāritaḥ || 12 ||
svastyabhyuditapāṇiśca rudrasūktairamantrayat
akṣatānyatha sārdrāṇi darśayan saphalānyajaḥ || 13 ||
mauliṃ pādābjayoḥ kṛtvā gaṇeśaḥ satvaro nataḥ
mūrkyupājidhayāñcakre haro harṣādgajānanam || 14 ||
abhyupāveśayaccāpi pariṣvajya nijāsane
somanandiprabhṛtayaḥ praṇemurdaṇḍavadgaṇāḥ || 15 ||
maṃkṣu drutam || 11 |

taraṇiḥ praṇanāmā'tha pramathādhipatiṃ haram || 16 ||
khaṇḍenduśekharaścātha upasiṃhāsanaṃ harim
samupāveśayadvāmapārśve mānapuraḥsaram || 17 ||
brahmāṇaṃ dakṣiṇe bhāge pariviśrāṇitāsanam
dṛṣṭvā saṃbhāvitāḥ sarve śarveṇa praṇatā gaṇāḥ || 18 ||
maulicālanamātreṇa yoginyo'pi prasāditāḥ
santoṣito raviśvāpi viśeti karasaṃjñayā || 1 9 ||
atha śambhuṃ śatadhṛtiḥ prabaddhakarasampuṭaḥ
parivijñāpayāñcakre prasannavadanāmbujam || 20 ||
brahmovāca- girijāpate
bhagavan devadeveśa kṣantavyaṃ
vārāṇasīṃ samāsādya yadahaṃ nāgataḥ punaḥ || 21 ||
upasiṃhāsanaṃ siṃhāsanasya samīpe || 17
śatadhṛtirbrahmā || 20 ||

prasaṅgato'pi kaḥ kāśīṃ prāpya candravibhūṣaṇa
kiñcidvidhātuṃ śakto'pi tyajet sthaviratāṃdadhat || 22 |
svarūpato brāhmaṇatvādapākartuṃ na śakyate
atha śakto'pyapākartuṃ kaḥ puṇye saṃcikīrṣati || 23 ||
vibhorapi samājñeyaṃ dharmavartmānusāriṇi
ni kiñcidapakartavyaṃ jānatā kenacit kvacit || 24 ||
kastādṛśi mahījānau puṇyavartmanyatandrite
kāśīpāle divodāse manāgapi viruddhadhīḥ || 25 ||
niśamyeti vacastuṣṭaḥ śrīkaṇṭho'tiviśuddhadhīḥ
hasan provāca dhātāraṃ brahman sarvamavaimyaham || 26 ||

devadeva..uvāca- brahmatvaṃ brāhmaṇasya
ādau tāvadadoṣaṃ hi
vājimedhādhvarāṇāṃ ca tato'pi daśakaṃ kṛtam || 27 ||
tato'pi vihitaṃ brahman bhavatā paramaṃ hitam
aparādhasahasrāṇi yalliṅgaṃ sthāpitaṃ mama || 28 |
yenaikamapi me liṅgaṃ sthāpitaṃ yatra kutracit
tasyā'parādhaleśo'pi nāsti sarvāparādhinaḥ || 2 9 ||
aparādhasahene'pi brāhmaṇaṃ yo parādhnuyāt
dinaiḥ katipayaireva tasyaiśvaryaṃ vinaśyati || 30 ||
iti bruvati deveśa'pyantarucchvasitaṃ gaṇaiḥ
samātṛbhiḥ samantācca vilokyāsyaṃ parasparam || 31 ||
arko'pyavasaraṃ jñātvā śambhuṃ natvā vyajijñapat
prasannāsyamumākāntaṃ dṛṣṭvā dṛṣṭacarācaraḥ || 32 ||
aparādhasahasrāṇi kṛtvā'pīti śeṣaḥ || 28 ||
ucchvasitamaparādhajaṃ bhayaṃ tyaktamityarthaḥ || 31 ||
mahādeva kahane lage-

arka uvāca-
nātha kāśīmito gatvā yathāśakti kṛtopadhiḥ
akiñcitkaratāṃ prāptaḥ sahasrakaravānapi || 33 ||
svadharmapālake tasmin divodāse dharāpatau
niścitāgamanaṃ jñātvā devasyāhamiha sthitaḥ
pratīkṣamāṇo deveśa tvadāgamanamuttamam
vibhajya bahudhātmānaṃ tvadārādhanatatparaḥ || 35 ||
manorathadumaścādya phalitaḥ śrīmadīkṣaṇāt
kiñcidbhaktilavāmbhobhiḥ sikto dhyānena puṣpitaḥ || 36 ||
ityudīritamākarṇya rakhervai ravilocanaḥ
provāca devadeveśo nāparādhyasi bhāskara || 37 ||
mamaiva kāryaṃ vihitaṃ tvaṃ yadatra vyavasthitaḥ
yasyāṃ surapraveśo na tasmin rājani śāsati || 38 |

iti sūraṃ samāśvāsya devadevaḥ kṛpānidhiḥ
gaṇānāśvāsayāmāsa vrīḍānanaśirodharān || 3 9 ||
yoginyo'pi sudṛṣṭvā'tha śambhunā saṃprasāditāḥ
trapābharasamākrāntakandharā iva saṅgatāḥ | || 40 ||
tato vyāpārayāñcakre tryakṣo netrāṇi cakriṇi
harirna kiñcidapyūce sarvajñāgre mahāmanāḥ || 41 ||
īśo'pi śrutavṛttāntastārthyādgaṇapaśārṅgiṇoḥ
manasaiva prasanno'bhūnna kiñcitparyabhāṣata
etasminnantare prāptā golokātpañcadhenavaḥ
sunandā sumanāścāpi suśīlā surabhistathā || 43 ||
pañcamī kapilā cāpi sarvāghaughavighaṭṭinī
vātsalyadṛṣṭyā garbhasya tāsāmūdhāṃsi susruvuḥ ||44 ||
sūraṃ sūryam || 3 9 |

dhārāsārairavicchinnaistāvadyāvaddhado'bhavat || 45
payaḥ payodhiriva sa dvitīyaḥ praikṣi ||
pārṣadaiḥ
deveśasamadhiṣṭhānāttattīrthamabhavatparam || 46 ||
kapilāhrada ityākhyāṃ cakre tasya maheśvaraḥ
tato devājñayā sarve snātāstatra divaukasaḥ || 47 ||
āvirāsustatastīrthādatha divyapitāmahāḥ
tān dṛṣṭvā te surāḥ sarve tarpayāñcakrire mudā || 48 ||
agniṣvāttā barhiṣada ājyapāḥ somapāstathā
ityādyā divyapitarastṛptāḥ śambhuṃ vyajijñapan || 4 9 ||
devadeva jagannātha bhaktānāmabhayaprada
asmistīrthe tvabhyāāśājjātā nastṛptirakṣayā || 50 ||
tasmācchambho varaṃ dehi prasannenāntarātmanā
iti divyapitṝṇāṃ sa śrutvā vākyaṃ vṛṣadhvajaḥ || 51 ||
śṛṇvatāṃ servadevānāmidaṃ vacanamabravīt |
śarvaḥ sarvapitṝṇāṃ vai paratṛptikaraṃ param || 52 ||
tadūdhāṃsi tāsāṃ kṣīrāśayāḥ payodharāśca stanāḥ ūdhāṃsīti pañcamyarthe vā || 45 ||
sa hradaḥ payaḥpayodhiriva kṣīrābdhiriva praikṣi dṛṣṭaḥ || 46 ||

śrīdevadeva uvāca- pitāmaha
śṛṇu viṣṇo mahābāho śṛṇu tvaṃ ca
etasmin kāpile tīrthe kāpileyapayobhṛte || 53 ||
ye piṇḍānnirvapiṣyanti śraddhayā śrāddhadānataḥ
teṣāṃ pitṝṇāṃ saṃtṛptirbhaviṣyati mamājñayā || 54 ||
anyaṃ viśeṣaṃ vakṣyāmi mahātṛptikaraṃ param
kuhūsomasamāyoge dattaṃ śrāddhamihā'kṣayam || 55 ||
saṃvartakāle saṃprāpte jalarāśirjalānyapi
kṣīyante na kṣayatyatra śrāddhaṃ somakuhūkṛtam || 56 ||
amāsomasamāyoge śrāddhaṃ yadyatra labhyate
tīrthe kāpiladhāre'smin gayayā puṣkareṇa kim || 57 ||
gadādhara bhavān yatra yatra tvaṃ ca pitāmaha
vṛṣadhvajo'smyahaṃ yatra phalgustatra na saṃśayaḥ || 58 ||
amā amāvāsyā || 57 | phalgurnadī || 58 ||
gayāpuṣkarābhyāṃ kṛtyābhāve hetumāha | gadādhareti |

tānyatra nivasiṣyanti darśe somadinānvite || 5 9 ||
kurukṣetre naimiṣe ca gaṃṅgāsāgarasaṅgame
grahaṇe śrāddhato yatsyāttattīrthe vārṣabhadhvaje || 60 |
asya tīrthasya nāmāni yāni divyapitāmahāḥ
tānyahaṃ kathayiṣyāmi bhavatāṃ tṛptidānyalam || 61 ||
madhusraveti prathamameṣā puṣkariṇī smṛtā
kṛtakṛtyā tato jñeyā tato'sau kṣīranīradhiḥ || 62 ||
vṛṣabhadhvajatīrthaṃ ca tīrthaṃ paitāmahaṃ tataḥ I
tato gadādharākhyaṃ ca pitṛtīrthaṃ tataḥ param || 63 |
tataḥ kāpiladhāraṃ vai sudhākhaniriyaṃ punaḥ
tataḥ śivagayākhyaṃ ca jñeyaṃ tīrthamidaṃ śubham ||64 ||
etāni daśanāmāni tīrthasyā'sya pitāmahāḥ I
bhavatāṃ tṛptikārīṇi vināpi śrāddhatarpaṇaiḥ || 65 ||
kṛtaṃ kṛtyaṃ kāryamātraṃ yayā sā kṛtakṛtyā | kṛtakṛtyetyatra ghṛtakulyeti kvacit ,
ghṛtakulyāṃ nivāpata ityagre darśanāt || 62 |
bahuta kyā kaheṃ , kyā svarga , kyā antarikṣa athavā kyā bhūmaṃḍala- sarvatra hī

brāhmaṇān bhojayiṣyanti teṣāṃ śrāddhamanantakam || 66 ||
śrāddhe pitṝṇāṃ santṛptyai dāsyanti kapilāṃ śubhām
ye'tra teṣāṃ pitṛgaṇo vaset kṣīrodarodhasi || 67 ||
vṛṣotsargaḥ kṛto yaistu tīrthe'smin vārṣabhadhvaje
aśvamedhapuroḍāśaiḥ pitarastena tarpitāḥ || 68 |
gayāto'ṣṭaguṇaṃ puṇyamasmiṃstīrthe pitāmahāḥ
amāyāṃ somayuktāyāṃ śrāddhaṃ kāpiladhārike || 6 9 ||
yeṣāṃ garbhe'bhavatsrāvo ye'dantajananā mṛtāḥ
teṣāṃ tṛptirbhavennūnaṃ tīrthe tīrthe kāpiladhārike || 70 ||
adattamauñjīdānā ye ye cādāraparigrahāḥ
tebhyo nirvāpitaṃ piṇḍamiha hyakṣayatāṃ vrajet || 71 ||
agnidāhamṛtā ye vai nāgnidāhaśca yeṣu vai
te sarve tṛptimāyānti tīrthe kāpiladhārike || 72 ||
rodhasi tīre || 67 ||

te tṛptimadhigacchanti ghṛtakulyāṃ nivāpataḥ || 73 ||
aputrāśca mṛtā ye vai yeṣāṃ nāstyudakapradaḥ
te'pi tṛptiṃ parāṃ yānti madhusravasi tarpitāḥ
apamṛtyumṛtā ye vai coravidyujjalādibhiḥ
teṣāmiha kṛtaṃ śrāddhaṃ jāyate sugatipradam || 75 ||
ātmaghātena nidhanaṃ yeṣāmiha vikarmaṇām
te'pi tṛptiṃ labhante'tra piṇḍaiḥ śivagayākṛtaiḥ || 76 ||
pitṛgotre mṛtā ye vai mātṛpakṣe ca ye mṛtāḥ
teṣāmatra kṛtaḥ piṇḍo bhavedakṣayatṛptidaḥ || 77 ||
patnīvarge mṛtā ye vai mitravarge ca ye mṛtāḥ
te sarve tṛptimāyānti tarpitā vārṣabhadhvaje

yeṣāṃ nāma gṛhītvā'tra dīyate te samuddhṛtāḥ || 7 9 ||
tiryagyonimṛtā ye vai ye piśācatvamāgatāḥ
te'pyūrdhvagatimāyānti tṛptāḥ kāpiladhārike || 80 ||
ye tu mānuṣaloke'smin pitaro martyayonayaḥ
te divyayonayaḥ syurvai madhusravasi tarpitāḥ || 81 ||
ye divyaloke pitaraḥ puṇyairdevatvamāgatāḥ
te brahmaloke gacchanti tṛptāstīrthe vṛṣadhvaje || 82 ||
kṛte kṣīramayaṃ tīrthaṃ tretāyāṃ madhumatpunaḥ
dvāpare sarpiṣā pūrṇaṃ kalau jalamayaṃ bhavet || 83 ||
sīmābahirgatamapi jñeyaṃ tīrthamidaṃ śubham
madhyevārāṇasi śreṣṭhaṃ mama sānnidhyato naraiḥ
vārāṇasyā madhye madhyevārāṇasi | I dīrghāntapāṭhe vārāṇasyāṃ śreṣṭhamityarthaḥ | madhya

dhvajo me vṛṣalāñchanaḥ
vṛṣadhvajena nāmnātaḥ sthāsyāmyatra pitāmahāḥ || 85 |
pitāmahena sahito gadādharasamanvitaḥ
raviṇā pārṣadaiḥ sārdhaṃ tuṣṭaye vaḥ pitāmahāḥ || 86 ||
iti yāvad varaṃ datte pitṛbhyo vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ
tāvannandī samāgatya praṇamyeśaṃ vyajijñapat || 87 |
nandikeśvara uvāca-
vihitaḥ syandanaḥ sajjastato'stu vijayodayaḥ |
aṣṭau kaṇṭhīravā yatra yatrokṣṇāmaṣṭakaṃ śubham || 88
yatrebhāḥ paribhāntyaṣṭau yatrāṣṭau javino |
hayāḥ
mana : saṃyamanaṃ yatra kaśāpāṇivyavasthitam || 8 9 ||
itīti kumāravākyam || 87 ||

sāyaṃ prātarmaye cakre chatraṃ dyaurmaṇḍalaṃ śuci || 9 0 ||
tārāvalīmayāḥ kīlā āheyā upanāyakāḥ
śrutayo mārgadarśinyaḥ smṛtayo rathaguptayaḥ || 9 1 ||
dakṣiṇā dhūrdṛḍhā yatra makhā yatrābhirakṣakāḥ
āsanaṃ praṇavo yatra gāyatrīpāṭhapīṭhabhūḥ || 9 2 ||
sāṅgā vyāhṛtayo yatra śubhāḥ sopānavīthikāḥ
sūryācandramasau yatra satataṃ dvārarakṣakau || 9 3 |
agnirmakaratuṇḍaśca rathabhūḥ kaumudīmayī
dhvajadaṇḍo mahāmeruḥ patākā'haskaraprabhā
svayaṃ vāgdevatā yatra cañcaccāmaradhāriṇī || 9 4 ||
devatā'dhiṣṭhātrī devatetyarthaḥ | cakrayoḥ svarūpamāha | sāyamiti || 9 0 ||
ahīnāṃ kule jātā āheyāḥ | upanāyakā rathabandhanānītyarthaḥ || 9 1 |
ghūryānamukham || 9 2 |
aṅgāni śikṣādīni || 9 3 ||
makaratuṇḍo makarākāratuṇḍaḥ || 9 4 ||

skanda uvāca- śailādineti
vijñapto devadeva umāpatiḥ || 9 5 ||
kṛtanīrājanavidhiraṣṭabhirdevamātṛbhiḥ
pinākapāṇiruttasthau dattahasto'tha śārṅgiṇā
ninādo divyavādyānāṃ rodasī || 9 6 ||
paripūrayat
gītamaṅgalagīrbhiśca cāraṇairanuvardhitaḥ || 9 7 ||
tena divyaninādena badhirīkṛtadiṅmukhāḥ
āhūtā iva ājagmurviṣvagbhuvanavāsinaḥ || 9 8 ||
devāḥ koṭyastrayastriṃśad gaṇāḥ koṭyayutadvayam
nava koṭyastu cāmuṇḍābhairavyaḥ koṭi saṃmitāḥ ||99 ||
śailādineti skandoktiḥ || 9 5 ||
tadeva mātṛbhiḥ brahmāṇītyādibhiḥ | tathā ca vakṣyati -
brahmāṇī vaiṣṇavī raudrī vārāhī nārasiṃhikā |
kaumārī api māhendrī cāmuṇḍā caiva caṇḍikā || iti |

ṣaḍānanāḥ kumārāśca mayūravaravāhanāḥ
mamānugāḥ samāyātāḥ koṭayo'ṣṭau mahābalāḥ || 100 ||
āyayuḥ koṭayaḥ sapta sphuratparaśupāṇayaḥ
picaṇḍilā mahāvegā vighnavighnā gajānanāḥ || 101 ||
ṣaḍaśītisahasrāṇi munayo brahmavādinaḥ
tāvanto'pi samājagmustatrānye gṛhamedhinaḥ || 102 ||
nāgānāṃ koṭayastisraḥ pātālatalavāsinām
dānavānāṃ ca daityānāṃ dve dve koṭī śivātmanām || 103 ||
gandharvā niyutānyaṣṭau koṭyardhaṃ yakṣarakṣasām
vidyādharāṇāmayutaṃ niyutadvayasaṃyutam || 104 ||
tathā ṣaṣṭisahasrāṇi divyāścāpsarasaḥ śubhāḥ
gomātaro'ṣṭau lakṣāṇi suparṇānyayutāni ṣaṭ || 105 ||
niyutāni lakṣāṇi || 104 |
cāmuṃḍā , eka karor̤a bhairavī , āṭha karor̤a bar̤e balī mayūravāhanārūr̤ha ṣaṇmukha , mere
anucaravarga , sāthī , kumāragaṇathe || 99 -100 |

sāgarāḥ sapta saṃprāptā nānāratnopadapradāḥ
saritāṃ ca sahasrāṇi trīṇipañcāyutāni ca || 106 ||
girayo'ṣṭau sahasrāṇi vanaspatiśatatrayam
ājagmurdiggajā aṣṭau yatra devaḥ pinākadhṛk || 107 ||
etaiḥ sametaḥ santuṣṭaḥ pariṣṭuta itastataḥ
śrīkaṇṭho rathamāruhya kāśīṃ prāviśaduttamām || 108 ||
sa girīndrasutastryakṣo mudāṃ dhāma mudāṃ khaniḥ
kāśīṃ praikṣiṣṭa saṃhṛṣṭastriviṣṭapasamutkaṭām || 10 9 ||
skanda uvāca- śrutvākhyānamidaṃ puṇyaṃ koṭijanmāghanāśanam
paṭhitvā pāṭhayitvā ca śivasāyujyamāpnuyāt || 110 ||
śrāddhakāle viśeṣeṇa paṭhanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ
akṣayaṃ tadbhavecchrāddhaṃ pitṛtuṣṭikaraṃ param || 111 ||
nānāratnopadapradāḥ ratnānyeva upadīyanta ityupadānyupaḍhaukanāni tatpradāḥ |
pañcāyutāni pañcāśatsahasrāṇi || 106 ||
mudāṃ mudaḥ paramārthānandāstāsāmityarthaḥ | triviṣṭapasamutkaṭāṃ svargā-
dapyutkaṭām || 107 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ dviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 62 ||

pratyahaṃ varṣamātraṃ tu hyaputraḥ putravān bhavet || 112 ||
viśveśituḥ saṃpraveśo yaḥ kāśyāṃ samudāhṛtaḥ
paramānandakandasya bījametatsuniścitam || 113 ||
paṭhitvaitanmudākhyānaṃ praviśedyo navaṃ gṛham
sa sarvasaukhyanilayo bhavedeva na saṃśayaḥ || 114 ||
trailokyānandajanakametadākhyānamuttamam
asya śravaṇamātreṇa viśveśaḥ saṃprasīdati || 115 ||
alabhyalābho devasya jāto'tra hi yataḥ paraḥ |
tataḥ kāśīpraveśākhyaṃ japyamākhyānamuttamam || 116 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe vṛṣabhadhvajaprādurbhāvo nāma
dviṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 62 ||

|| atha triṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-
dṛṣṭvā kāśīṃ dṛgānandāṃ tārakāre purāriṃṇā
kimakāri samācakṣva prāptāṃ bahumanorathaiḥ || 1 ||
skanda uvāca-
pativratāpate'gastya śṛṇu vakṣyāmyaśeṣataḥ
mṛgāṅkalakṣmaṇotkaṇṭhaṃ kāśī netrātithīkṛtā || 2 ||
atha sarvajñanāthena bhaktavatsalacetasā
jaigīṣavyo muniśreṣṭho guhāntastho nirīkṣitaḥ ||3 ||
yamanehaṃ samārabhya mandarādriṃ viniryayau
adrīndrasutayā sārdhaṃ rudreṇokṣendragāminā
atha triyuṣaṣṭitame'dhyāye paramapāvanī |
jyeṣṭheśajaigīṣavyādikathā prastūyate'dbhutā || 1 |
nirīkṣito jñātaḥ || 3 |

taṃ vāsaraṃ puraskṛtya jagrāha niyamaṃ dṛḍham
jaigīṣavyo mahāmedhāḥ kumbhayone mahākṛtī
viṣamekṣaṇapādābjaṃ samīkṣiṣye yadā punaḥ
tadāmbuvipruṣamapi bhakṣayiṣyāmi cetyaho 6 |
kutaściddhāraṇāyogādathavā śambhvanugrahāt
anaśnannapibanyogī jaigīṣavyaḥ sthito mune ||7 ||
taṃ śambhureva jānāti nā'nyo jānāti kaścana
ata eva tataḥ prāptaḥ prathamaṃ pramathādhipaḥ ||8 ||
jyeṣṭhaśuklacaturdaśyāṃ somavārānurādhayoḥ
tatparvaṇi mahāyātrā kartavyā tatra mānavaiḥ || 9 ||
jyeṣṭhasthānaṃ tataḥ kāśyāṃ tadābhūdapi puṇyadam
tatra liṅgaṃ samabhavatsvayaṃ jyeṣṭheśvarābhidham || 10 ||
talliṅgadarśanātpuṃsāṃ pāpaṃ janmaśatārjitam
tamo sa dayamāpyeva tatkṣaṇādeva naśyati || 11 ||

jyeṣṭheśvaraṃ samālokya na bhūyo jāyate bhuvi || 12 ||
āvirāsītsvayaṃ tatra jyeṣṭheśvarasamīpataḥ
sarvasiddhipradā gaurī jyeṣṭhā śreṣṭhā samantataḥ || 13 ||
jyeṣṭhe māsi sitāṣṭamyāṃ tatra kāryo mahotsavaḥ
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kāryaṃ sarvasampatsamṛddhaye || 14 ||
jyeṣṭhāṃ gaurīṃ namaskṛtya jyeṣṭhavāpīpariplutā
saubhāgyabhājanaṃ bhūyādyoṣā saubhāgyabhāgapi || 15 ||
nivāsaṃ kṛtavān śambhustasmin sthāne yataḥ svayam
nivāseśa iti khyātaṃ liṅgaṃ tatra paraṃ tataḥ || 16 ||
nivāseśvaraliṅgasya sevanātsarvasampadaḥ |
nivasanti gṛhe nityaṃ nityaṃ pratipadaṃ punaḥ || 17 ||
kṛtvā śrāddhaṃ vidhānena jyeṣṭhasthāne narottamaḥ
jyeṣṭhāṃ tṛptiṃ dadātyeva pitṛbhyo madhusarpiṣā || 18 ||
nityaṃ padamityanvayaḥ || 17 ||

jyeṣṭhān svargānavāpnoti naro mokṣaṃ ca gacchati || 1 9 ||
jyeṣṭheśvaro'rcyaḥ prathamaṃ kāśyāṃ śreyo'rthibhirnaraiḥ
jyeṣṭhā gaurī tato'bhyarcyā sarvajyeṣṭhamabhīpsubhiḥ || 20 ||
atha nandinamāhūya dhūrjaṭiḥ sa kṛpānidhiḥ
śṛṇvatāṃ sarvadevānāmidaṃ vacanamabravīt || 21 ||
īśvara uvāca- manoharā
śailāde praviśāśu tvaṃ guhāstyatra
tadantare'sti me bhakto bhakto jaigīṣavyastapodhanaḥ || 22 ||
mahāniyamavānnandiṃstvagasthisnāyuśeṣitaḥ
tamihānaya madbhaktaṃ maddarśanadṛḍhavratam || 23 |
yadā prabhṛtyagāṃ kāśyā mandaraṃ sarvasundaram
mahāniyamavāneṣa tadārabhyojjhitāśanaḥ

gṛhāṇa līlākamalamidaṃ pīyūṣapoṣaṇam
anena tasya gātrāṇi spṛśa sadya : subṛṃhiṇā || 25 ||
tato nandī samādāya tallīlākamalaṃ vibhoḥ
praṇamya devadeveśamāviśad gahvarāṃ guhām || 26 ||
nandī dṛṣṭvā'tha taṃ tatra dhāraṇādṛḍhamānasam |
tapo'gnipariśuṣkāṅgaṃ kamalena samaspṛśat || 27 ||
tapānte vṛṣṭisaṃyogācchālūra iva koṭare
ullalāsa sa yogīndraḥ sparśamātrāttadabjajāt || 28 ||
atha nandī samādāya satvaraṃ munipuṅgavam
devadevasya pādāgre namaskṛtya nyapātayat || 2 9 ||
jaigīṣavyo'tha saṃbhrāntaḥ purato vīkṣya śaṅkaram
vāmāṅgasanniviṣṭādritanayaṃ praṇanāma ha || 30 ||
subṛṃhiṇā śobhanavṛddhihetunā || 25 ||
śālūro bhekaḥ || 28 |

tuṣṭāva parayā bhaktyā sa munibhcandraśekharam || 31 ||
jaigīṣavya uvāca-
namaḥ śivāya śāntāyaṃ sarvajñāya śubhātmane |
jagadānandakandāya paramānandahetave || 32 ||
arūpāya sarūpāya nānārūpadharāya ca
virūpākṣāya vidhaye vidhiviṣṇustutāya ca || 33 ||
sthāvarāya namastubhyaṃ jaṅgamāya namo'stu te
sarvātmane namastubhyaṃ namaste paramātmane
padyaiḥ sārdhacatustriśaiḥ somaṃ somaṃ somakalādharam |
astaunmunirudārātmā saguṇāguṇa bhedataḥ || 1 ||
śivāya sukharūpāya | śubhātmane maṅgalasvarūpāya | śubhaḥ ātmā yasmāttasmā iti
vā | jagadānandakandāya jagati ya ānandaḥ sukhaṃ tasya kandāya mūlāya kāraṇāyetyetat |
sa eṣa parama ānanda etasyaivānandasyānyāni bhūtāni mātrāmupajīvantīti
śruteḥ || 32 ||
vighaye caturānanāya bhāgyasvarūpāyeti vā || 33 |

namo śeṣaviśeṣāya namaḥ śeṣāṅgadāya te || 35 |
śrīkaṇṭhāya namastubhyaṃ viṣakaṇṭhāya te namaḥ
vaikuṇṭhavandyapādāya namo'kuṇṭhitaśaktaye || 36 ||
namaḥ śaktyardhadehāya videhāya sudehine
sakṛtpraṇāmamātreṇa dehidehanivāriṇe || 37 ||
kālāya kālakālāya kāṭakūṭaviṣādine
vyālayajñopavītāya vyālabhūṣaṇadhāriṇe || 38 ||
trailokyakāmyāya trailokyānāṃ kāmyā yasmāttairvā kāmyata iti tathā tasmai |

khaṇḍitāśeṣaduḥkhāya khaḍgakheṭakadhāriṇe || 3 9 ||
gīrvāṇagītanāthāya gaṅgākallolamāline
gaurīśāya girīśāya giriśāya guhāraṇe
candrārdhaśuddhabhūṣāya candrasūryāgnicakṣuṣe
namaste carmavasana namo digvasanāya te || 41 ||
jagadīśāya jīrṇāya jarājanmaharāya te
jīvāya te namastubhyaṃ jaapūkādihāriṇe || 42 ||
namo ḍamaruhastāya dhanurhastāya te namaḥ
trinetrāya namastubhyaṃ jagannetrāya te namaḥ || 43 ||
triśūlavyagrahastāya namastripathagādhara
triviṣṭapādhināthāya trivedīpaṭhitāya ca
nārāyaṇagātre khaṇḍitaḥ kuṇṭhitaḥ paraśuḥ kuṭhāro yasya sa tathā tatsambodhanaṃ he
khaṇḍaparaśo | kheṭakaṃ carma || 3 9 |
jīvayatīti jīva īśvarastasmai kṣetrajñāyeti vā | te tubhyam | jīvātava iti

dīkṣitāya namastubhyaṃ devadevāya te namaḥ || 45 ||
dāritāśeṣapāpāya namaste dīrghadarśine
dūrāya dūravāpyāya doṣanirdalanāya ca || 46 ||
doṣākarakalādhāratyaktadoṣāgamāya ca
namo dhūrjaṭaye tubhyaṃ dhattūrakusumapriya
namo dhīrāya dharmāya dharmapālāya te namaḥ
nīlagrīva namastubhyaṃ namaste nīlalohita
nāmamātrasmṛtikṛtāṃ trailokyaiśvaryapūraka '
namaḥ pramathanāthāya pinākodyatapāṇaye
paśupāśavimokṣāya paśūnāṃ pataye namaḥ
nāmoccāraṇamātreṇa mahāpātakahāriṇe || 50 ||

namo'pāracaritrāya supavitrakathāya ca || 51 ||
vāmadevāya vāmārdhadhāriṇe vṛṣagāmine
namo garbhāya bhīmāya natabhītiharāya ca || 52 ||
bhavāya bhavanāśāya bhūtānāṃ pataye namaḥ
mahādeva namastubhyaṃ maheśa mahasāṃ pate || 53 ||
namo mṛḍānīpataye namo mṛtyuñjayāya te
yajñāraye namastubhyaṃ yakṣarāja priyāya ca || 54 ||
yāyajūkāya yajñāya yajñānāṃ phaladāyine
rudrāya rudrapataye kadrudrāya ramāya ca || 55 ||
parādavyaktāt parāya tatpravartakāya | pārayatīti pāraḥ tasmai pralayāvadhibhūtāyeti

śivāpriyāya śarvāya sarvajñāya namo'stu te || 56 ||
harāya kṣāntirūpāya kṣetrajñāya kṣamākara
kṣamāya kṣitihartre ca kṣīragaurāya te namaḥ || 57 ||
andhakāre namastubhyamādyantarahitāya ca
iḍādhārāya īśāya upendrendrastutāya ca || 58 ||
umākāntāya ugrāya namaste ūrdhvaretase
ekarūpāya caikāya mahadaiśvarya ' rūpiṇe || 5 9 ||
anantakāriṇe tubhyamambikāpataye namaḥ
tvamoṅkāro vaṣaṭkāro bhūrbhuvaḥ svastvameva hi || 60 ||
dṛśyādṛśyaṃ yadatrāsi tatsarvaṃ tvamumādhava
stutiṃ kartuṃ na jānāmi stutikartā tvameva hi || 61 ||
śāśvata he śāśvata | śāśvateśāyetyekaṃ padaṃ vā || 56 ||
iḍā pṛthvī || 58 |

nānyaṃ vedmi mahādeva nānyaṃ staumi maheśvara || 62 ||
nānyaṃ namāmi gaurīśa nānyākhyāmādade śiva |
mūko'nyanāmagrahaṇe badhiro'nyakathāśrutau || 63 ||
paṅguranyābhigamane'smyandho'nyaparivīkṣaṇe
eka eva bhavānīśa ekaḥ kartā tvameva hi || 64 ||
pātā hartā tvamevaiko nānātvaṃ nānātvaṃ mūḍhakalpanā
atastvameva śaraṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ bhūyo bhūyo bhūyaḥ bhūyaḥ punaḥ punaḥ || 65 ||
saṃsārasāgare magnaṃ māmuddhara maheśvara |
iti stutvā maheśānaṃ jaigīṣavyo mahāmuniḥ || 66 ||
vācaṃyamo'bhavatsthāṇoḥ purataḥ sthāṇusannibhaḥ
iti stutiṃ samākarṇya muneścandravibhūṣaṇaḥ
uvāca ca prasannātmā varaṃ brūhīti taṃ munim || 67 |
paṅgaḥ khañjaḥ || 64 |
uvāca ceti cakāreṇādaraḥ sūcitaḥ || 67 |

yadi prasanno deveśa tatastava padāmbujāt
mā bhavāni bhavānīśa dūraṃ dūrapadaprada || 68 |
aparaśca varo nātha deyo'yamavicārataḥ
yanmayā sthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ tatra sānnidhyamastu te ||6 9 ||
īśvara uvāca-
jaigīṣavya mahābhāga yaduktaṃ bhavatā'nagha
tadastu sarvaṃ te'bhīṣṭaṃ varamanyaṃ dadāmi ca || 70 ||
yogaśāstraṃ mayā dattaṃ tava nirvāṇasādhakam
sarveṣāṃ yogināṃ madhye yogācāryo'stu vai bhavān
rahasyaṃ yogavidyāyā yathāvattvaṃ || 71 ||
savetsyase tapodhana
prasādānme yena nirvāṇamāpsyasi || 72 ||
yathā nandī yathā bhṛṅgī somanandī yathā tathā
tvaṃ bhaviṣyasi bhakto me jarāmaraṇavarjitaḥ || 73 ||
santi vratāni bhūyāṃsi niyamāḥ santyanekadhā
tapāṃsi nānā santyatra santi dānānyanekaśaḥ
jaigīṣavya bole-

śreyasāṃ sādhanānyatra pāpaghnānyapi sarvathā
paraṃ hi paramaścaiṣa niyamo yastvayā kṛtaḥ || 75 ||
paro hi niyamaścaiṣa māṃ vilokya yadaśyate
māmanālokya yadbhuktaṃ tadbhuktaṃ kevalaṃ tvagham || 76 ||
asamarcya ca yo bhuṅkte patrapuṣpaphalairapi |
retobhakṣī bhavenmūḍhaḥ sa janma nyekaviṃśatim || 77 ||
mahato niyamasyāsya bhavatā'nuṣṭhitasya vai
nārhanti ṣoḍaśīṃ mātrāmapyanye niyamā yamāḥ || 78 ||
ato maccaraṇābhyāse tvaṃ nivatsyasi sarvathā
ato naiḥśreyasīṃ lakṣmīṃ tatraiva prāpsyasi dhruvam || 7 9 ||
jaigīṣavyeśvaraṃ nāma liṅgaṃ kāśyāṃ sudurlabham
trīṇi varṣāṇi saṃsevya labhedyogaṃ na saṃśayaḥ 11.20 |
jaigīṣavyaguhāṃ prāpya yogābhyasanatatparaḥ
ṣaṇmāsena labhetsiddhiṃ vāñchitāṃ madanugrahāt || 81 ||
tava liṅgamidaṃ bhaktaiḥ pūjanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ
vilokya ca guhā ramyā parāṃ siddhimabhīpsubhiḥ || 82 ||

atra jyeṣṭheśvarakṣetre tvalliṅgaṃ sarvasiddhidam
nāśayedaghasaṃghāni dṛṣṭaṃ spṛṣṭaṃ samarcitam || 83 ||
asmin jyeṣṭheśvarakṣetre saṃbhojya śivayoginaḥ
koṭibhojyaphalaṃ samyagekaikaparisaṃkhyayā
jaigīṣavyeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ gopanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ
kalau kaluṣabuddhīnāṃ purataśca viśeṣataḥ || 85 |
kariṣyāmyatra sānnidhyamasmi~lliṅge tapodhana
yogasiddhipradānāya sādhakebhyaḥ sadaiva hi || 86 ||
dade śṛṇu mahābhāga jaigīṣavyā'paraṃ varam
tvayedaṃ yatkṛtaṃ stotra ṃ yogasiddhikaraṃ param || 87 |
mahāpāpaughaśamanaṃ mahāpuṇyapravardhanam
mahābhītipraśamanaṃ mahābhaktivivardhanam || 88 |
etatstotrajapātpuṃsāmasādhyaṃ naiva kiñcana
tasmātsarvaprayatnena japanīyaṃ susādhakaiḥ || 8 9 ||
śivayoginaḥ śivaviṣṇorabhedadarśinaḥ || 84

iti datvā varaṃ tasmai smarāriḥ smeralocanaḥ
dadarśa brāhmaṇāṃstatra sametān kṣetravāsinaḥ || 9 0 ||
skanda uvāca - niśamyākhyānamatulametatprājñaḥ
prabādhyate prayatnataḥ
niṣpāpo jāyate martyo nopasargeḥ || 9 1 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe jyeṣṭheśākhyānaṃ nāma triṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 63 ||
upasargā ādhyātmikādyupadravāḥ || 9 1 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ triṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 63 ||

|| atha catuṣṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-

khātaṃ khātaṃ ca daṇḍāgrairbhūmiṃ kandādivṛttayaḥ
cakruḥ puṣkariṇīṃ ramyāṃ daṇḍakhātābhidhāṃ mune ||5 ||
tattīrthaṃ paritaḥ sthāpya mahāliṅgānyanekaśaḥ
maheśārādhanaparāstapaścakruḥ prayatnataḥ ||6 ||
vibhūtidhāriṇo nityaṃ nityaṃ rudrākṣadhāriṇaḥ
liṅgapūjāratā nityaṃ śatarudriyajāpinaḥ ||7 ||
te śrutvā devadevasya punarāgamanaṃ mune
tapaḥ kṛśā atitarāmāsurānandamedurāḥ || 8 ||
dvijāḥ pañcasahasrāṇi caranto vipulaṃ tapaḥ
daṇḍakhātān mahātīrthādājagmurdevadarśane || 9 |
tīrthānmandākinīnāmno dvijāḥ pāśupatavratāḥ
śivaikārādhanaparāḥ sametā ayutonmitāḥ || 10 ||
khātaṃ khātaṃ khātvā khātvetyarthaḥ | khātvā khātveti ca kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 5 |
sthāpya sthāpayitvā || 6 ||
" śatarudriyajāpinaḥ " " namaste rudramanyava ' ityādistotrajāpinaḥ || 7 |

śataṃ durvāsasastīrthādekādaśaśatādhikam || 11 ||
matsyodaryāḥ parāpetuḥ sahasrāṇi ṣaḍeva hi
kapālamocanāt saptaśatānyabhyāgatā dvijāḥ || 12 ||
ṛṇamocanatastīrthāt sahasraṃ dviśatādhikam
vaitaraṇyā api mune dvijānāmayutārdhakam || 13 ||
tataḥ pṛthūdakātkuṇḍātpṛthunā parikhānitāt
ayāsiṣurdvijānāṃ ca śatānyeva trayodaśa || 14 ||
tathaivāpsarasaḥ kuṇḍānmenakākhyācchatadvayam
urvaśīkuṇḍataḥ prāptāḥ sahasraṃ dviśatādhikam || 15 ||
tathairāvatakuṇḍācca brāhmaṇāstriśatāni ca
gandharvāpsarasaḥ saptaśatāni dviśatāni ca || 16 ||
vṛṣeśatīrthādājagmurnavatiḥ saśatatrayā
yakṣiṇīkuṇḍataḥ prāptāḥ sahasraṃ triśatottaram || 17 ||
lakṣmītīrthātparaṃ jagmuḥ ṣoḍaśaiva śatāni ca
piśācamocanātsaptasahasrāṇi dvijottamāḥ || 18 ||
ekādaśaśatādhikaṃ śataṃ dviśatādhikasahasramityarthaḥ || 11 ||
ayutārdhakaṃ pañcasahasrāṇi || 13 ||
āyāsiṣurāgatavantaḥ || 14 ||
navatiḥ saśatatrayā navatyadhikā śatatrayītyarthaḥ || 17 ||

mānasākhyācca saraso dviśatī saśatatrayā || 1 9 ||
brāhmaṇā vāsukihradātsahasrāṇi daśaiva tu
tathaivāṣṭaśataṃ draṣṭuṃ jānakīkuṇḍato dvijāḥ || 20 ||
kāśīnāthamanuprāptāḥ paramānandadāyinam
tathā gautamakuṇḍācca śatāni nava cāgatāḥ || 21 ||
tīrthāddurgatisaṃharturbrāhmaṇāḥ pratipedire
ekādaśaśatānyeva draṣṭuṃ devamumāpatim || 22 ||
asīsaṃbhedamārabhya gaṅgātīrasthitā dvijāḥ
āsaṅgameśvarāttatra pariprāptā ghaṭodbhava || 23 ||
aṣṭādaśasahasrāṇi tathā pañcaśatānyapi
brāhmaṇāḥ pañcapañcāśad gaṅgātīrātsamāgatāḥ || 24 ||
sārdradūrvākṣatakaraiḥ sapuṣpaphalapāṇibhiḥ
sugandhamālyahastaiśca brāhmaṇairjayavādibhiḥ || 25 ||
stuto maṅgalasūktaiśca praṇataśca punaḥ punaḥ
tebhyo dattābhayaḥ śambhuḥ papraccha kuśalaṃ mudā || 26 ||
sāgraṃ śataṃ kiñcidadhikaṃ śatamityarthaḥ | sapādaśataṃ vā | dviśatī saśatatrayā
pañcaśatītyarthaḥ || 1 9 |
sārdreti | brāhmaṇairmaṅgalasūktaiḥ punaḥ punaḥ stutaḥ praṇataḥ tebhyo dattābhayaḥ śambhuḥ kuśalaṃ
papraccheti dvitīyenānvayaḥ | caturbhirviśeṣaṇairbrāhmaṇān viśinaṣṭi sārdretyādinā || 25 ||

tataste brāhmaṇāḥ procuḥ prabaddhakarasampuṭāḥ
kṣetre nivasatāṃ nātha sadā naḥ kuśalodayaḥ || 27
viśeṣataḥ kṛto'smābhiḥ sākṣānnamanagocaraḥ ||
tvaṃ yatsvarūpaṃ śrutayo na viduḥ paramārthataḥ
sadaivākuśalaṃ teṣāṃ ye || 28 ||
tvatkṣetraparāṅmukhāḥ
caturdaśāpi vai lokāsteṣāṃ nityaṃ parāṅmukhāḥ || 2 9 ||
yeṣāṃ hṛdi sadaivāste kāśī tvāśīviṣāṅgada
saṃsārāśīviṣaviṣaṃ na teṣāṃ prabhavetkvacit || 30 ||
garbharakṣāmaṇirmantraḥ kāśīvarṇadvayātmakaḥ
yasya kaṇṭhe sadā tiṣṭhettasyākuśalatā kutaḥ || 31 ||
nanvakṣisannikṛṣṭaṃ vastu nayanagocaraṃ bhavatyeva kimāśvaryaṃ tatrāhuḥ | yatsvarūpaṃ śrutayo na

sa nairjarīṃ daśāṃ hitvā sudhaiva parijāyate || 32 ||
śrutaṃ karṇāmṛtaṃ yena kāśītyakṣarayugmakam
na samākarṇayatyeva sa punargarbhajāṃ kathām || 33 ||
kāśīrajo'pi yanmūrdhni yanmūrdhni patedapyanilāhatam
candraśekhara tanmūrdhā bhaveccandrakalāṅkitaḥ || 34 ||
prasaṅgato'pi yannetrapathamānandakānanam
yātaṃ te'tra na jāyante nekṣeran pitṛkānanam || 35 ||
gacchatā tiṣṭhatā vā'pi svapatā jāgratā'thavā I
kāśītyeṣa mahāmantro yena japtaḥ sa nirbhayaḥ || 36 ||
yena bījākṣarayugaṃ kāśīti hṛdi dhāritam |
abījāni bhavantyeva karmabījāni tasya vai || 37 ||
kāśī kāśīti kāśīti japato yasya saṃsthitiḥ |
anyatrāpi satastasya puro muktiḥ prakāśate || 38 |
nirnitarāṃ jarā yasyāṃ sā tathā nirjaraiva nairjarī | nairjarītyupalakṣaṇam |

kṣemamūrtistripathagā nānyatkṣematrayaṃ kvacit || 3 9 ||
brāhmaṇānāmiti vacaḥ kṣetrabhaktivibṛṃhitam
niśamya girijākāntastutoṣa nitarāṃ haraḥ || 40 ||
provāca ca prasannātmā dhanyā yūyaṃ dvijarṣabhāḥ
yeṣāmihedṛśī bhaktirmama kṣetre'tipāvane
jāne sattvamayā jātāḥ kṣetrasyāsya niṣevaṇāt
nīrajaskāvitamasaḥ saṃsārārṇavapāragāḥ
vārāṇasyāstu ye bhaktāste bhaktā mama niścitam
jīvanmuktā hi te nūnaṃ mokṣalakṣmyā kaṭākṣitāḥ || 43 ||
yaiśca kāśīsthito janturalpako'pi virodhitaḥ
tairvai viśvambharā sarvā mayā saha virodhitāḥ || 44 ||
kṣetrabhaktivibṛṃhitaṃ kṣetrabhaktyā viśeṣeṇa varddhitaṃ tatpratipādakamityarthaḥ || 40 ||
na kevalaṃ tutoṣa provāca ceti cakārārthaḥ || 41 |
virodhitaḥ virodhaṃ prāpitaḥ || 44 |

api brahmāṇḍamakhilaṃ dhruvaṃ tenānumoditam || 45 ||
nivasanti hi ye martyā asminnānandakānane
mamāntaḥkaraṇe te vai nivaseyurakalmaṣāḥ
nivasanti mama kṣetre mama bhaktiṃ prakurvate
mama liṅgadharā ye tu tānevopadiśāmyaham
nivasanti mama kṣetre mama bhaktiṃ na kurvate
mama liṅgadharā ye no na tānupadiśāmyaham
kāśī nirvāṇanagarī yeṣāṃ citte prakāśate
te matpuraḥ prakāśante naiḥśreyasyā śriyā vṛtāḥ
nivasantītei bhinnaṃ bhinnaṃ vākyam || 46 |
mama liṅgadharā vaidikatripuṇḍrādidhāriṇaḥ || 47 |

svarlakṣmīṃ kāṅkṣamāṇebhyaḥ patitāste na saṃśayaḥ || 50 ||
kāśīṃ saṃkāṅkṣamāṇānāṃ puruṣārthacatuṣṭayam
puraḥ kiṅkaravattiṣṭhenmamā'nugrahato dvijāḥ || 51 ||
ānandakānane hyatra jvaladdāvānalo'smyaham |
karmabījāni jantūnāṃ jvālaye na prarohaye || 52 ||
vastavyaṃ satataṃ kāśyāṃ yaṣṭavyo'haṃ prayatnataḥ
jetavyau kalikālau ca rantavyā muktiraṅganā || 53 ||
prāpyā s pi kāśīṃ durbuddhiryo na māṃ parisevate
tasya hastagatā'pyāśu kaivalyaśrīḥ praṇaśyati || 54 ||
dhanyā madbhaktilakṣmāṇo brāhmaṇāḥ kāśivāsinaḥ
yūyaṃ yaccetaso vṛtterna dūre'haṃ na na kāśikā kāśikā || 55 |

preyāṃso me yato yūyaṃ kṣetrasaṃnyāsakāriṇaḥ ||56 ||
iti pītvā maheśānamukhakṣīrābdhijāṃ sudhām |
paritṛptā dvijāḥ sarve vabrurvaramanuttamam || 57 ||
brāhmaṇā ūcu umāpate : - maheśāna sarvajña vara eṣa naḥ
kāśī kadāpi na tyājyā bhavatā bhavatāpahṛt || 58 ||
vacanād brāhmaṇānāṃ tu śāpo mā prabhavatvihaṃ
kadācidapi keṣāñcitkāśyāṃ mokṣāntarāyakaḥ || 5 9 ||
tava pādāmbujadvandve nirdvandvā bhaktirastu naḥ i
ākalevarapātaṃ ca kāśīvāso'stu no'niśam || 60 ||
kimanyena vareṇeśa deya eṣa varo hi naḥ
avadhe hyandhakadhvaṃsin varamanyaṃ vṛṇīmahe || 61 ||
bhavatāpahṛditi kāśīviśeṣaṇaṃ viśveśvarasambodhanaṃ vā || 58 ||

pratiṣṭhiteṣu liṅgeṣu sānnidhyaṃ bhavato'stviha || 62 ||
śrutveti teṣāṃ vākyāni tathāstviti pinākinā
proce'nyo'pi varo datto jñānaṃ vaśca bhaviṣyati || 63 ||
punaḥ provāca deveśo niśāmayata bho dvijāḥ
hitaṃ vaḥ kathayāmyatra tadanuṣṭhīyatāṃ dhruvam
sevyottaravahā nityaṃ liṅgamarcya prayatnataḥ
damo dānaṃ dayā nityaṃ kartavyaṃ muktikāṅkṣibhiḥ || 65 ||
idameva rahasyaṃ ca kathitaṃ kṣetravāsinām
matiḥ parahitā kāryā vācyaṃ nodvegakṛdvacaḥ || 66 ||
manasā'pi na kartavyameno'tra vijigīṣuṇā
atyatramakṣayaṃ yasmāt sukṛtaṃ sukṛtetaram || 67 ||
pratinidhiḥ pratirūpam || 62 ||
damo dānaṃ dayetyatra kartavyamiti sāmānyanirdeśaḥ || 65 ||

vārāṇasyāṃ kṛtaṃ pāpamantargehe praṇaśyati || 68 ||
antargehe kṛtaṃ pāpaṃ paiśācyanarakāvaham
piśācanarakaprāptirgacchatyeva bahiryadi || 6 9 |
na kalpakoṭibhiḥ kāśyāṃ kṛtaṃ karma pramṛjyate
kintu rudrapiśācatvaṃ jāyate'trā'yutatrayam || 70 ||
vārāṇasyāṃ sthito yo vai pātakeṣu rataḥ sadā
yoniṃ prāpyā'pi paiśācīṃ varṣāṇāmayutatrayam || 71 ||

punaratraiva nivasan jñānaṃ prāpsyatyanuttamam
taina jñāne'tha samprānte mokṣamāpsyatyanuttamam || 72 ||
duṣkṛtāni vidhāyeha bahiḥ pañcatvamāgatāḥ
teṣāṃ gatiṃ pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu tadvijasattamāḥ || 73 ||
yāmākhyā me gaṇāḥ santi ghorā vikṛtamūrtayaḥ
mūṣāyānte dhamantyādau kṣetraduṣkṛtakāriṇaḥ
nayantyanūpaprāyāṃ ca tataḥ prācīṃ durāsadām
varṣākāle durācārān durācārān pātayanti mahājale || 75 ||
jalaukābhiḥ sapakṣābhirdandaśūkairjalodbhavaiḥ
durnivāraiśca maśakairdaśyante te divāniśam || 76 ||
tato yāmairhimata te'drau himālaye
aśanāvaraṇairhīnāḥ kleśyante te divā'niśam || 77 ||

marusthale tato grīṣme vārivṛkṣavivarjite
divākarakaraistītraistāpyante te pipāsitāḥ
kleśitāste gaṇairugrairyātanābhiḥ samantataḥ
itthaṃ kālamasaṃkhyātamānīyante . tatastviha || 7 9 ||
nivedayanti te yāmāḥ kālarājāntike tataḥ
kālarājo'pi tān dṛṣṭvā karma saṃsmārya duṣkṛtam 11:20
vivastrān kṣuttṛṣārtāṃśca lagnapṛṣṭhodaratvacaḥ
anyai rudrapiśācaiśva saha saṃyojayatyapi || 81 ||
tato rudrapiśācāste bhairavā'nucarāḥ sadā |
sahante klamamatyarthaṃ kṣuttṛṣṇogratvasaṃbhavam || 82 ||
āhāraṃ rudhironmiśraṃ te labhante kadācana |
evaṃ tryayutasaṃkhyākaṃ kālaṃ tatrā'tiduḥkhitāḥ || 83 ||
śmaśānastambhamabhito nīyante kaṇṭhapāśitāḥ
pipāsitā api na te'mbusparśamapi cāpnuyuḥ || 84 ||

ihaiva dehino bhūtvā mucyante te mamājñayā || 85 |
tasmānna kāmayetā'tra vāṅmanaḥ karmaṇā'pyagham
śucau pathi sadā stheyaṃ mahālābhamabhīpsubhiḥ || 86 ||
nā'vimukte mṛtaḥ kaścinnarakaṃ yāti kilbiṣī
mamā'nugrahamāsādya gacchatyeva parāṃ gatim || 87 |
anāśanaṃ yaḥ kurute madbhakta iha suvrataḥ
na . tasya punarāvṛtti : . kalpakoṭiśatairapi || 88 |
aśāśvatamidaṃ jñātvā mānuṣyaṃ bahukilbiṣam
avimuktaṃ sadā sevyaṃ saṃsārabhayamocakam || 8 9 |
nānyatpaśyāmi jantūnāṃ muktvā vārāṇasīṃ purīm
sarvapāpapraśamanīṃ prāyaścittaṃ kalau yuge || 9 0 |
yasmādevaṃ tasmādityupasaṃhāraḥ || 86 |

janmāntarasahasreṣu yatpāpaṃ samupārjitam
avimuktaṃ praviṣṭasya tatsarvaṃ vrajati kṣayam || 9 1 ||
janmāntarasahasreṣu yuñjanyogī yadāpnuyāt
tadihaiva paro paro mokṣo mokṣo maraṇādadhigamyate ||9 2 ||
tiryagyonigatāḥ sattvā ye'vimuktakṛtālayāḥ
kālena nidhanaṃ prāptāste'pi yānti parāṃ gatim || 9 3 ||
avimuktaṃ na sevante ye mūḍhāstamasāvṛtāḥ
viṇmūtraretasāṃ madhye te vasanti punaḥ punaḥ || 9 4 ||
avimuktaṃ samāsādya yo liṅgaṃ sthāpayetsudhīḥ
kalpakoṭiśatairvāpi nāsti tasya punarbhavaḥ || 9 5 ||
grahanakṣatratārāṇāṃ kālena patanaṃ dhruvam
avimukte mṛtānāṃ tu patanaṃ naiva vidyate || 9 6 ||
brahmahatyāṃ naraḥ kṛtvā paścātsaṃyatamānasaḥ
prāṇāṃstyajati yaḥ kāśyāṃ sa mukto nātra saṃśayaḥ || 9 7 ||

striyaḥ pativratā yāśca mama bhaktisamāhitāḥ
avimukte mṛtā viprā yānti tāḥ paramāṃ gatim || 9 8 |
atrotkramaṇakāle'haṃ svayameva svayameva dvijottamāḥ
diśāmi tārakaṃ brahma dehī syādyena tanmayaḥ || 99 ||
manmanā madbhaktaśca mayi sarvārpitakriyaḥ
yathā mokṣamihāpnoti na tathānyatra kutracit || 100 ||
maraṇaṃ niścitaṃ jñātvā gatiṃ cāsukharūpiṇīm
calamāgantukaṃ sarvaṃ tataḥ kāśīṃ samāśrayet || 101 ||
kāśī samāśritā yaistu manovākkāyakarmabhiḥ
tānatra nirmaladhiyo nirvāṇaśrīḥ samāśrayet || 102 ||
kāśīsthitaikamapi yaḥ prīṇayennyāyajairdhanaiḥ
tena trailokyamakhilaṃ prīṇitaṃ tu mayā saha || 103 ||
nyāyajairnyāyamārgājjātaiḥ | pāṭhāntare'pyayamevārthaḥ || 103 |

yaḥ prīṇayati puṇyātmā nirvāṇanagarī naram
pumarthena sthiternityaṃ brāhmaṇāḥ prīṇayāmi tam || 104 ||
divodāso'pi rājarṣiḥ kāśīṃ dharmeṇa pālayan
sadeho matpadaṃ prāpto yato na punarāgatiḥ || 105 ||
atra yogastathā jñānaṃ muktirekena janmanā
ato'vimuktamāsādya nānyadgacchettapovanam || 106 ||
mokṣaṃ sudurlabhaṃ jñātvā saṃsāraṃ cātibhīṣaṇam
aśmanā caraṇau hatvā kālamatra pratīkṣayet || 107 ||
avimuktaṃ parityajya yadā yāsyanti durdhiyaḥ
hasiṣyanti tadā bhūtānyanyonyakaratāḍanaiḥ || 108 ||
prāpya vārāṇasīṃ puṇyāṃ siddhikṣetramanuttamam
pariniṣkrāntumanyatra kasya jantormatirbhavet || 10 9 ||
pumarthena sthiterhetoḥ puruṣārthacatuṣṭayena sthitervasaternimittatvāt | brāhmaṇā he
brāhmaṇāḥ || 104 |
aśmanā pāṣāṇena || 107 ||

mahādānena cānyatra yatphalaṃ labhyate naraiḥ
avimukte tu kākiṇyāṃ dattāyāṃ tadavāpyate || 110 ||
ekaṃ samarcayelliṅgaṃ tapastapyeta cāparaḥ
tayormadhye tu sa śreṣṭho yo liṅgaṃ pūjayediha || 111 ||
tīrthāntare gavāṃ koṭiṃ vidhivadyaḥ prayacchati
ekāhaṃ yo vasetkāśyāṃ kāśīvāsī tayorvaraḥ || 112 ||
anyatra brāhmaṇānāṃ tu koṭiṃ saṃbhojya yatphalam
vārāṇasyāṃ tu caikena bhojitena tadāpyate || 113 ||
sannihatyāṃ kurukṣetre rāhugraste rāhugraste divākare
tulāpuruṣadānena kāśībhikṣāsamā bhavet || 114 ||
mameha paramaṃ jyotirāpātālād vyavasthitam
atītya saptalokādīnanantaṃ liṅgarūpadhṛk || 115 ||
pṛthivyante'pi ye liṅgamavimuktaṃ smaranti me
kaluṣaiste vimucyante mahadbhiriti niścitam || 116 ||
kākiṇyāṃ viṃśativarāṭikāyām || 110 ||

asmin kṣetre tu yenā'haṃ dṛṣṭaḥ spṛṣṭaḥ samarcitaḥ
saṃprāpya tārakaṃ jñānaṃ na sa bhūyo'bhijāyate || 117 ||
yo māmiha samabhyarcya mriyate'nyatra kutracit
janmāntare'pi māṃ prāpya sa vimukto bhaviṣyati || 118 ||
ityuktvā kṣetramāhātmyaṃ dvijānāmagrato haraḥ
paśyatāmeva teṣāṃ tu tatraivāntarhito'bhavat || 11 9
te'pi sākṣād virūpākṣaṃ pratyakṣīkṛtya bāḍavāḥ |
prahṛṣṭamanaso'tyantaṃ prayayuḥ svaṃ svamāśramam || 120 ||
śambhorvākyaṃ viniścitya sarvajñasya kṛpānidheḥ
tyaktvā kāryāntaraṃ viprā liṅgānyeva samarciṣuḥ || 121 ||
bāḍavā brāhmaṇāḥ || 120 ||
samarciṣuḥ samyagarcayāmāsuḥ || 121 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ catuṣṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 64 ||

paṭhitvā pāṭhayitvā ca rahasyākhyānamuttamam
śraddhāluḥ pātakairmuktaḥ śivaloke mahīyate || 122 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe kṣetrarahasyakathanaṃ nāma catuḥṣṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 64 ||

|| atha pañcaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca- jyeṣṭheśvarasya parito yāni liṅgāni kumbhaja
tāni pañcasahasrāṇi munīnāṃ siddhidānyalam || 1 ||
parāśareśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ jyeṣṭheśāduttare mahat
tasya darśanamātreṇa nirmalaṃ jñānamāpyate || 2 2 | ||
tatraiva siddhidaṃ liṅga māṇḍavyeśvarasaṃjñitam
na tasya darśanājjātu durbuddhiṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ || 38
liṅgaṃ ca śaṅkareśākhyaṃ tatraiva śubhadaṃ sadā
bhṛgunārāyaṇastatra bhaktānāṃ sarvasiddhidaḥ
jābālīśvarasaṃjñaṃ ca liṅgaṃ tatrātisiddhidam
tasya saṃdarśanājjātu na janturdurgatiṃ vrajet || 5 ||
sumantu muninā śreṣṭhastatrādityaḥ pratiṣṭhitaḥ
tasya saṃdarśanādeva kuṣṭhavyādhiḥ praśāmyati || 6 ||
parāśareśvarādīnāṃ kandukeśādisaṃyujām |
pañcaṣaṣṭitame'dhyāye mahimā varṇyate'dbhutaḥ || 1 |

kṣetrasya bhīṣaṇaṃ sarvaṃ nāśayed bhāvato'rcitā ||7 ||
tatropajaṃghane liṅga karmabandhavimokṣaṇam
nṛbhiḥ saṃsevitaṃ bhaktyā ṣaṇmāsātsiddhidaṃ param || 8 |
bhāradvājeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ liṅgaṃ mādrīśvaraṃ varam
ekatra saṃsthite dve tu draṣṭavye sukṛtātmanā ||9 ||
aruṇisthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ tatraiva kalaśodbhava
tasya liṅgasya sevātaḥ sarvāmṛddhimavāpnuyāt || 10 ||
liṅgaṃ vājasaneyākhyaṃ tatrāstyatimanoharam
tasya saṃdarśanātpuṃsāṃ vājapeyaphalaṃ bhavet || 11 |
kaṇveśvaraṃ śubhaṃ liṅgaṃ liṅgaṃ kātyāyaneśvaram
vāmadeveśvaraṃ liṅgamautathyeśvarameva na || 12 ||
hārīteśvarasaṃjñaṃ ca liṅgaṃ vai gālaveśvaram
kumbherliṅgaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ tathā vai kausumeśvaram || 13 ||
agnivarṇeśvaraṃ caiva naidhruveśvarameva ca
vatseśvaraṃ mahāliṅga parṇādeśvarameva ca || 14 ||
saktuprastheśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kaṇādeśaṃ tathaiva ca
anyattatra mahāliṅgaṃ māṇḍūkāya nirūpitam || 15 ||

bābhraveyeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ śilāvṛttīśvaraṃ tathā
cyavaneśvara liṅgaṃ ca śālaṃkāyanakeśvaram || 16 ||
kalindameśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ liṅgamakrodhaneśvaram
liṅgaṃ kapotavṛttīśaṃ kaṅkeśaṃ kuntaleśvaram || 17 ||
kaṇṭheśvaraṃ kaholeśaṃ liṅga tumburupūjitam
mataṅgeśaṃ marutteśaṃ magadheyeśvaraṃ tathā || 18 ||
jātūkarṇeśvaraṃ liṅga jambukeśvarameva ca
jārudhīśaṃ jaleśaṃ ca jālmeśaṃ jālakeśvaram || 1 9 ||
evamādīni liṅgāni ayutārdhāni kumbhaja
smaraṇāddarśanātsparśādarcanānnamanātstuteḥ || 20 ||
na jātu jāyate jantoḥ kaluṣasya samudbhavaḥ I
eteṣāṃ śubhaliṅgānāṃ jyeṣṭhasthāne'tipāvane || 21 ||
skanda uvāca- yadvṛttaṃ jyeṣṭhasthāne mahāmune
ekadā tatra
tadahaṃ te pravakṣyāmi śṛṇuṣvā'ghavināśanam || 22 ||
smaraṇādityādīnāṃ pañcamyantānāmeteṣāṃ śubhaliṅgānāmiti dvitīyenā'nvayaḥ || 20 ||

svairaṃ viharatastatra jyeṣṭhasthāne maheśituḥ
kautukenaiva cikrīḍa śivā kandukalīlayā || 23 ||
udañcanyañcadaṅgānāṃ lāghavaṃ paritanvatī
niḥśvāsāmodamuditabhramarākulitekṣaṇā || 24 ||

kandukānugasaddṛṣṭanartitabhrūlatāñcalā
mṛḍānī kila khelantī dadṛśe jagadambikā || 27 ||
antarikṣacarābhyāṃ ca ditijābhyāṃ manoharā
kaṭākṣitābhyāmiva vai samupasthitamṛtyunā || 28 ||
vidalotpalasaṃjñābhyāṃ dṛptābhyāṃ parato vidheḥ
tṛṇīkṛtatrijagatī puruṣābhyāṃ svadorbalāt || 2 9 ||
devīṃ parijihīrṣu tau viṣameṣuprapīḍitau
divo'vateratuḥ kṣipraṃ māyāṃ svīkṛtya śāmbarīm || 30 ||
dhṛtvā pāraṣadīṃ mūrtimāyātāvambikānti̭kam
tāvatyantaṃ sudurvṛttāvaticañcalamānasau || 31 ||
sarvajñena parijñātau cāñcalyāllocanodbhavāt
kaṭākṣitā'tha devena durgā durgārighātinī || 32 ||
vijñāya netrasaṃjñāṃ tu sarvajñārdhaśarīriṇī
tenaiva kandukenā'tha yugapannijaghāna tau || 33 ||
kandukānugāyā satī dṛṣṭistayā nartitaṃ bhrūlatāyā añcalaṃ prāntabhāgo yayā
sā || 27
viṣameṣuḥ kāmaḥ || 30 |

mahābalau mahādevyā kandukena samāhatau
paribhramya paribhramya tau duṣṭau vinipetatuḥ || 34 ||
vṛntādiva phale pakve tālādanilalolite
dambholinā parihate śṛṅge iva mahāgireḥ || 35 ||
tau nipātya mahādaityāvakāryakaraṇodyatau
tataḥ pariṇatiṃ yāto liṅgarūpeṇa kandukaḥ || 36 ||
kandukeśvarasaṃjñaṃ ca talliṅgamabhavattadā
jyeṣṭheśvarasamīpe tu sarvaduṣṭanivāraṇam || 37 ||
kandukeśasamutpattiṃ yaḥ śroṣyati mudānvitaḥ
pūjayiṣyati yo bhaktastasya duḥkhabhayaṃ kutaḥ || 38 |
kandukeśvarabhaktānāṃ mānavānāṃ nirenasām
yogakṣemaṃ sadā kuryād bhavānī bhayanāśinī || 3 9 ||
mṛḍānī tasya liṅgasya pūjāṃ kuryātsadaiva hi
tatraiva devyāḥ sānnidhyaṃ pārvatyā bhaktasiddhidam

kandukeśaṃ mahāliṅga kāśyāṃ yairna samarcitam
kathaṃ teṣāṃ bhavānīśau syātāṃ sarvepsitapradau || 41 ||
draṣṭavyaṃ ca prayatnena talliṅgaṃ kandukeśvaramṃ
sarvopasargasaṃghātavighātakaraṇaṃ param ||42 ||
kandukeśvaranāmā'pi śrutvā vṛjinasantatiḥ
kṣipraṃ kṣayamavāpnoti tamaḥ prāpyoṣṇaguṃ yathā || 43 ||
skanda uvāca - jyeṣṭheśvarasamīpataḥ
saṃśṛṇuṣva mahābhāga
yadvṛttāntamabhūdvipra paramāścaryakṛddhruvam
daṇḍakhāte mahātīrthe devarṣipitṛtṛptide
tapyamāneṣu vipreṣu niṣkāmaṃ paramaṃ tapaḥ || 45 ||
daityo dundubhinirhrādo duṣṭaḥ prahlādamātulaḥ
devāḥ kathaṃ sujeyāḥ syurityupāyamacintayat || 46 ||
kiṃ balāśca kimāhārāḥ kimādhārā hi devatāḥ
vicārya bahuśo daityastattvaṃ vijñāya niścitam || 47 ||
dundubheriva nirhrādaḥ śabdo yasya sa dundubhinirdvādaḥ , etannāmā || 46 |

avaśyamagrajanmāno hetavo'tra vicārataḥ
brāhmaṇān hantumasakṛt kṛtavānudyamaṃ tataḥ 11 48 801 |
yataḥ kratubhujo devāḥ kratavo vedasambhavāḥ
te vedā brāhmaṇādhīnāstato devabalaṃ dvijāḥ || 4 9 ||
niścitaṃ brāhmaṇādhārāḥ sarve vedāḥ savāsavāḥ
gīrvāṇā brāhmaṇabalā nātra kāryā vicāraṇā || 50 ||
brāhmaṇā yadi naṣṭāḥ syurvedā naṣṭāstataḥ svayam
āmnāyeṣu praṇaṣṭeṣu vinaṣṭāḥ śatatantavaḥ || 51 ||
yajñeṣu nāśaṃ gacchatsu hṛtāhārāstataḥ surāḥ
nirbalāḥ sukhajeyāḥ syurjiteṣu tridaśeṣvatha || 52 ||
ahameva bhaviṣyāmi mānyastrijagatīpatiḥ
āhariṣyāmi devānāmakṣayāḥ sarvasampadaḥ || 53 ||
nirvekṣyāmi sukhānyeva rājye nihatakaṇṭake
iti niścitya durbuddhiḥ punaścintitavān mune || 54 ||
śatatantavo yāgāḥ || 51 ||

dvijāḥ kva santi bhūyāṃso brahmatejo'tibṛṃhitāḥ
śrutyadhyayanasampannāstapobalasamanvitāḥ | 55 |
bhūyasāṃ brāhmaṇānāṃ tu sthānaṃ vārāṇasī bhavet
tānādāvupasaṃhṛtya yāmi tīrthāntaraṃ tataḥ || 56 ||
yatra yatra hi tīrtheṣu yatra yatrāśrameṣu ca
santi sarve'grajanmānaste mayādyāḥ samantataḥ || 57 ||
iti dundubhinirhrādo matiṃ kṛtvā kulocitām
prāpyā'pi kāśīṃ durvṛtto māyāvī nyavadhīdvijān || 58 ||
samitkuśān samādātuṃ yatra yānti dvijottamāḥ
araṇye tatra tān sarvān sa bhakṣayati durmatiḥ ||5 9 ||
yathā ko'pi na vettyeva tathācchanno'bhavatpunaḥ
vane vanecaro bhūtvā yādorūpī jalāśaye || 60 |
adṛśyarūpī māyāvī devānāmapyagocaraḥ
divā dhyānaparastiṣṭhenmunibanmunimadhyagaḥ || 61 ||
adyā bhakṣyāḥ || 57 | sarvabhūtarakṣaivocitā'yaṃ tu kāśīṃ prāpyā'pi dvijānavadhī-

praveśamuṭajānāṃ ca nirgamaṃ ca vilokayan |
yāminyāṃ vyāghrarūpeṇa brāhmaṇān bhakṣayed bahūn || 62 ||
niḥśabdameva nayati na tyajedapi kīkasam
itthaṃ nipātitā viprāstena duṣṭena bhūriśaḥ || 63 ||
ekadā śivarātrau tu bhaktastveko nijoṭaje
saparyāṃ devadevasya kṛtvā dhyānasthito'bhavat || 64 ||
sa ca dundubhinirhrādo daityendro baladarpitaḥ
vyāghrarūpaṃ samāsthāya tamādātuṃ matiṃ dadhe || 65 ||
taṃ bhaktaṃ dhyānamāpannaṃ dṛḍhacittaṃ śivekṣaṇe
kṛtāstramantravinyāsaṃ taṃ krāntumaśakanna saḥ || 66 ||
atha sarvagataḥ śambhurjñātvā tasyāśayaṃ haraḥ
daityasya duṣṭarūpasya vadhāya vidadhe dhiyam || 67 ||
praveśaṃ nirgamaṃ ca svātmanaḥ | uṭajānāṃ ceti cakāreṇa maṭhādayo gṛhyante || 62 ||
kīkasam asthi || 63 |
eko mukhyaḥ || 64 |
kṛto'stramantreṇa " astrāya phaṭ iti mantreṇa astrarūpeṇa mantreṇa vā nyāso yena taṃ
kṛtāstramantravinyāsam || 66 |

yāvadāditsati vyāghrastāvadāvirabhūddharaḥ
jagadrakṣāmaṇistryakṣo bhaktarakṣaṇadakṣadhī : || 68 ||
rudramāyāntamālokya tadbhaktārcitaliṅgataḥ
daityastenaiva rūpeṇa vavṛdhe bhūdharopamaḥ || 6 9 ||
sāvajñamatha sarvajñaṃ yāvatpaśyati dānavaḥ
tāvadāyāntamādāya kakṣāyantre nyapīḍayat || 70 ||
pañcāsyaḥ tvatha pañcāsyaṃ muṣṭyā mūrdhanyatāḍayat
sa ca tenaiva rūpeṇa kakṣāniṣpeṣaṇena ca || 71 ||
atyārtamaraṭad vyāghro rodasī paripūrayan
tena nādena sahasā sampravepitamānasāḥ || 72 ||
tapodhanāḥ samājagmurniśi śabdānusārataḥ
tatreśvaraṃ samālokya kakṣīkṛtamṛgeśvaram || 73 ||
āditsati ādātumicchati bhaktamiti śeṣaḥ || 68 |
pañcāsyaṃ vyāghraṃ mukhavatkaracaraṇā apyasya naraturagādividāraṇasamarthā iti taiḥ saha
pañcāsya iti vyutpatteḥ | sa ca tenaiva rūpeṇa vyāghrarūpeṇa atyārtaṃ yathā syāttathā
araṭacchabdaṃ kṛtavānityanvayaḥ | sa tena muṣṭighāteneti kvacit || 71 ||

paritrātā jagattrātaḥ pratyūhāddāruṇāditaḥ || 74 ||
anugrahaṃ kuruṣveśa tiṣṭhā'traiva jagadguro
anenaiva hi rūpeṇa vyāghreśa iti nāmataḥ || 75 ||
kuru rakṣāṃ mahādeva jyeṣṭhasthānasya sarvadā
anyebhyo'pyupasargebhyo rakṣa nastīrthavāsinaḥ || 76 ||
iti śrutvā vacasteṣāṃ devaścandravibhūṣaṇaḥ
tathetyuktvā punaḥ prāha śṛṇudhvaṃ dvijapuṅgavāḥ || 77 ||
yo māmanena rūpeṇa drakṣyati śraddhayā'tra vai
tasyopasargasaṃghātaṃ ghātayiṣyāmyasaṃśayam || 78 ||
etalliṅgaṃ samabhyarcya yo yāti pathi mānavaḥ
cauravyāghrādisaṃbhūtaṃ bhayaṃ tasya kuto bhavet ||7 9 |
maccaritramidaṃ śrutvāṃ smṛtvā liṅgamidaṃ hṛdi
saṃgrāme praviśanmartyo jayamāpnoti nā'nyathā || 80 ||
pratyūhānmṛtyoḥ || 74 ||
no'smān || 76 |

ityuktvā devadeveśastasmi~lliṅge layaṃ yayau |
savismayāstato viprāḥ prātaryātā yathāgatam || 81 ||
skanda uvāca- kumbhottha liṅgaṃ vyāghreśvarābhidham
tadāprabhṛti 82 ||
jyeṣṭheśāduttare bhāge dṛṣṭaṃ spṛṣṭaṃ bhayāpaham bhayāpaham ||
vyāghreśvarasya ye bhaktāstebhyo bibhyati kiṅkarāḥ
yāmā api mahākrūrā jaya jīvetivādinaḥ || 83 ||
parāśareśvarādīnāṃ liṅgānāmiha saṃbhavam
śrutvā naro na lipyeta mahāpātakakardamaiḥ
kandukeśasamutpattiṃ vyāghreśāvirbhavaṃ tathā
samākarṇya naro jātu nopasargeḥ pradūyate || 85 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ pañcaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 655 |

uṭajeśvaraliṅgaṃ tu vyāghreśāt paścime sthitam
bhaktarakṣārthamudbhūtaṃ syātsamabhyarcya nirbhayaḥ || 86 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe parāśareśvarādikandukeśavyāghreśvarādi-
liṅgasambhavo nāma pañcaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 65 ||

|| atha ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca- jyeṣṭheśvarasya parito liṅgānyanyāni yāni tu
tāni te kathayiṣyāmi śṛṇu vātāpitāpana || 1 ||
jyeṣṭheśāddakṣiṇe bhāge liṅgamapsarasāṃ śubham
tatraivā'psarasaḥ kūpaḥ saubhāgyodakasaṃjñakaḥ ||2 ||
tatkūpajalasusnāto vilokyā'psaraseśvaram
na daurbhāgyamavāpnoti nārī vā puruṣo'tha vā ||3 ||
tatraiva kukkuṭeśākhyaṃ liṅgaṃ vāpīsamīpagam
tasya pūjanataḥ puṃsāṃ kuṭumbaṃ parivardhate
ṣaḍbhiḥ ṣaṣṭitame'dhyāye sarvāśvaryamanohare |
śaileśvarādiliṅgānāṃ nirṇītirvarṇyate sphuṭā || 1 |
jyeṣṭheśvarasya parito yāni liṅgānītyuktaṃ tatrā'tīte adhyāye kāniciduktvā
avaśiṣṭāni vaktuṃ prakramate | jyeṣṭheśvareti || 2 ||
apsaraseśvaramityadantatvamārṣam || 3 |

pitāmaheśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ jyeṣṭhavāpītaṭe śubham
tatra śrāddhaṃ naraḥ kṛtvā pitṝṇāṃ mudamarpayet || 5 ||
pitāmaheśānnairṛtyāṃ pūjanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ
gadādhareśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ pitṝṇāṃ paritṛptidam ||6 ||
diśi puṇyajanākhyāyāṃ liṅgājjyeḻeśvarānmune
vāsukīśvarasaṃjñaṃ ca liṅgamarcya samantataḥ ||7 |
tatra vāsukikuṇḍe ca snānadānādikāḥ kriyāḥ
sarpabhītiharāḥ puṃsāṃ vāsukīśaprabhāvataḥ || 8 ||
yaḥ snāto nāgapañcamyāṃ kuṇḍe vāsukisaṃjñite
na tasya viṣasaṃsargo bhavetsarpasamudbhavaḥ || 9 ||
kartavyā nāgapañcamyāṃ yātrā varṣāsu tatra vai
nāgāḥ prasannā jāyante kule tasyāpi sarvadā || 10 ||
tatkuṇḍātpaścime bhāge liṅga vai . takṣakeśvaram
pūjanīyaṃ prayatnena bhaktānāṃ sarvasiddhidam || 11 ||
mune tasyottare bhāge kuṇḍaṃ takṣakasaṃjñitam
kṛtodakakriyastatra na sarvairabhibhūyate || 12 ||

tatkuṇḍāduttare bhāge kṣetrakṣemakaraḥ sadā
bhaktānāṃ sādhvasadhvaṃsī kapālī nāma bhairavaḥ || 13 ||
bhairavasya mahākṣetraṃ tadvai tadvai sādhakasiddhidam
tatra saṃsādhitā vidyā ṣaṇmāsātsiddhimāpnuyuḥ
tatra caṇḍī mahāmuṇḍā bhaktavighnopaśāntidā
balipūjopahārādyaiḥ pūjyā svābhīṣṭasiddhaye || 15 ||
tasyā yātrāṃ tu yaḥ kuryānmahāṣṭamyāṃ narottamaḥ
yaśaśvī putrapautrāḍhyo lakṣmīvā~ścāpi jāyate || 16 ||
mahāmuṇḍā pratīcyāṃ tu catuḥsāgaravāpikā
tasyāṃ snāto bhavetsnātaḥ sāgareṣu caturṣvapi || 17 ||
mahanmuṇḍaṃ yasyāḥ sā | mahātuṇḍeti kvacit || 15 ||

mahāprasiddhaṃ tatsthānaṃ catuḥ sāgarasaṃjñitam
catvāri tatra liṅgāni sāgaraiḥ sthāpitāni ca || 18 ||
tasyā vāpyāścaturdikṣu pūjitāni dahantyagham
taduttare mahāliṅgaṃ vṛṣabheśvarasaṃjñitam || 1 9 ||
harasya vṛṣabheṇaiva sthāpitaṃ tatsvabhaktitaḥ
tasya darśanataḥ puṃsāṃ ṣaṇmāsānmuktirudbhavet || 20 |
vṛṣeśvarādudīcyāṃ tu gandharveśvarasaṃjñitam
gandharvakuṇḍaṃ tatprācyāṃ tatra snātvā narottamaḥ || 21 ||
gandherveśvaramabhyarcya datvā dānāni śaktitaḥ
santarpya pitṛdevāṃśca gandharvaiḥ saha modate || 22 ||
karkoṭanāmā nāgo'sti gandharveśvarapūrvataḥ
tatra karkoṭavāpī ca liṅgaṃ karkoṭakeśvaram || 23 ||
tasyāṃ vāpyāṃ naraḥ snātvā karkoṭeśaṃ samarcya ca
karkoṭanāgamārādhya nāgaloke mahīyate || 24 ||
karkoṭanāgo yairdṛṣṭastadvāpyāṃ vihitodakaiḥ
kramate na viṣaṃ teṣāṃ dehe sthāvarajaṅgamam || 25 ||

karkoṭeśātpratīcyāṃ tu dhundhumārīśvarābhidham
talliṅgābhyarcanātpuṃsāṃ na bhavedvairijaṃ bhayam || 26 |
purūraveśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tadudīcyāṃ vyavasthitam |
draṣṭavyaṃ tatprayatnena caturvargaphalapradam || 27 ||
diggajenārcitaṃ liṅga supratīkena tatpuraḥ |
supratīkeśvaraṃ nāmnā yaśobalavivardhanam || 28 ||
saraśca supratīkākhyaṃ tatpuro bhāsate mahat |
tatra snātvā ca talliṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā dikpatitāṃ labhet || 2 9 ||
tatrā'styekā mahāgaurī nāmnā vijayabhairavī |
rakṣārthamuttaradvāri sthitā pūjyeṣṭasiddhaye || 30 ||
varaṇāyāstaṭe ramye gaṇau huṇḍanamuṇḍanau | |
kṣetrarakṣāṃ vidhattastau vighnastambhanakārakau || 31 ||
tau draṣṭavyau prayatnena kṣetranirvighnahetave |
huṇḍaneśaṃ muṇḍaneśaṃ tatra dṛṣṭvā sukhī bhavet || 32 ||
purūraveśvaramiti salopa ārṣaḥ || 27 |
pūjyeṣṭasiddhaye pūjyā pūjitā satī iṣṭasiddhaye bhavatītyarthaḥ || 30 ||

skanda uvāca- ilvalāre
kathāmekāṃ śṛṇuṣvāvahito bhava
varaṇāyāstaṭe ramye yadvṛttaṃ pūrvamuttamam || 33 ||
ekadādrīndramālokya menā saṃhṛṣṭamānasam
umāṃ saṃsmṛtya niḥśvasya provāceti pativratā || 34 ||
menovāca-
āryaputra na jānāmi pravṛttimapi kāñcana
vivāhasamayādūrdhvaṃ tasyā gauryā girīśvara || 35 ||
sa vṛṣendragatirdevo bhasmoragavibhūṣaṇaḥ
mahāpitṛvanāvāso digvāsāḥ kvā'sti samprati || 36 ||
aṣṭau yā mātaro dṛṣṭā brāhmīprabhṛtayaḥ priya
svasvarūpāstā manye'haṃ bālikākaṣṭahetavaḥ || 37 ||
śaileśotpattiṃ kathayiṣyan agastiṃ sāvadhānayati | ilvaleti || 33 |

tasyaikasya na ko'pyanyo'styadvitīyasya śūlinaḥ
tadudantapravṛttyai ca kriyatāmudyamo vibho || 38 ||
tasyāḥ priyāyā vākyena tadapatyapriyo giriḥ
uvāca vacanaṃ sāmramumāvātsalyasannagīḥ || 3 9
girirāja uvāca- tasyā mene gaveṣaṇe
ahameva gamiṣyāmi
nitarāṃ bādhate prema tadadṛṣṭyagnidūṣitam || 40 ||
gaurīvirahasantāpenāha | aṣṭau yā iti | he priya svāmin aṣṭau yā brāhmīprabhṛtayo
brāhmīpramukhā mātaro dṛṣṭāḥ | tāśca vakṣyati—
brahmāṇī vaiṣṇavī raudrī vārāhī nārasiṃhikā |
kaumārī cāpi māhendrī cāmuṇḍā caiva caṇḍikā || iti
vākyam- jāteti kanyā prathame'tiśokaḥ kasmai dadāmīti mahān vitarkaḥ |
dattā yadā tadgamane'tikaṣṭaṃ kanyā pitṝṇāṃ khalu duḥkhahetuḥ || iti |
prakṛtāyā umāyā du : khahetutvaṃ prakaṭayantī arthājjagadīśvaraṃ stautyardhena | tasya
śūlinaḥ ko'pyanyo nāstītyanvayaḥ | anena saṃjātīyabhedābhāvo dhvanitaḥ | ekasyeti
vijātīyabhedābhāvaḥ | advitīyasyeti svagatabhedābhāvaśca | tathā ca śruti - ' ekamevā-
dvitīyaṃ brahma " iti | pakṣāntare'nyo nāstītyatra hetumāha | ekasyeti | asmin grāme eka
eva puruṣa itivadekaśabdasya mukhyārthatvamityāśaṅkāyāmāha | advitīyasyeti | tadudanta-
pravṛttyai tasya śūlino jāmāturjñānāya | jāmāturvṛttāntajñāne kanyakāyā api vṛttānto
jñāta evetyāśayaḥ || 38 ||
sāmramanasahitaṃ yathā bhavati tathā sākrandamityetat | umāvātsalyasannagīḥ | umāyā
vātsalyena snehena sannā avaruddhā gadgadā girā yasya sa tathā || 3 9 |
premasnaho bādhate māmiti śeṣaḥ | kathaṃbhūtaṃ mām ? tadadṛṣṭyagnidūṣitaṃ tasyā
umāẏā adṛṣṭiradarśanaṃ saivāgnistena dūṣitaṃ santāpitam || 40 ||

yadā prabhṛti sā gaurī nirgatā mama sadmataḥ |
manye mene tadārabhya padmasadmā viniryayau || 41 ||
tadālāpāmṛtadhayau na me śabdagrahau priye |
prāṇeśvari tadārabhya syātāṃ śabdāntaragrahau || 42 ||
jaivātṛkī yato'hnaḥ syāddūrībhūtā dṛśormama
aho jaivātṛkī jyotsnā tato'hno'tidunoti mām || 43 ||
ityuktvādāya ratnāni vāsāṃsi vividhāni ca |
dharādharendro niryātaḥ śubhalagnabalodaye || 44 ||
agastya kāni uvāca- kāni
ca ratnāni kiyantyapi ca ṣaṇmukha |
yānyādāya pratasthe sa tāni me brūhi pṛcchataḥ || 45 ||

skanda uvāca- muktāphalānāṃ tu koṭidvayaparīmitāḥ
tulā ca hīrakāṇāṃ tulāśatam || 46 ||
tathā vāritarāṇāṃ
navalakṣādhikaṃ vipra ṣaḍasrāṇāṃ sutejasām
lakṣadvayaṃ vidūrāṇāṃ tulā vimalavarcasām
koṭayaḥ padma rāgāṇāṃ pañcāvaihi tulā mune
puṣparāgatulālakṣaṃ guṇitaṃ navasaṃkhyayā
tathā gomedaratnānāṃ tulālakṣamitā mune
indranīlamaṇīnāṃ ca tulāḥ koṭyardhasaṃmitāḥ
garuḍodgāraratnānāṃ tulā : prayutasaṃmitāḥ
śuddhavidrumaratnānāṃ tulāśca navakoṭayaḥ || 50 ||

aṣṭāṅgābharaṇānāṃ ca saṃkhyā kartuṃ na śakyate
vāsasāṃ ca vicitrāṇāṃ komalānāṃ tathā mune
cāmarāṇi ca bhūyāṃsi dravyāṇyāmodavanti || 51 ||
suvarṇadāsadāsyādīnyasaṃkhyātāni ca
sarvāṇyapi vai mune || 52 ||
samādāya pratasthe bhūdhareśvaraḥ
āgatya varaṇātīraṃ dūrātkāśīmalokayat || 53 ||

prāsādeṣu pratolīṣu prākāreṣu gṛheṣu ca
gopureṣu vicitreṣu kapāṭeṣu taṭeṣvapi || 58 ||
maṇimāṇikyaratnānāmucchalaccārurociṣām |
jyotirjālairjaṭilitaṃ yathedamavalokyate || 5 9 ||
dyāvābhūmyorantarālaṃ tatheti tatheti samavaimyaham
īdṛksampattisaṃbhāraḥ kuberasyāpi no gṛhe || 60 |

himavānuvāca-
haṃho kārpaṭikaśreṣṭha adhyāsvaitadihāsanam
svapurodantamākhyāhi pūrvami sar || 63 ||
ko'tra saṃpratyadhiṣṭhātā kimadhiṣṭhātṛceṣṭitam
yadi jānāsi tatsarvamihācakṣva mamāgrataḥ
so'pi kārpaṭikastasya girirājasya bhāṣitam
samākarṇya samācaṣṭuṃ mune samupacakrame || 65 ||
kārpaṭika uvāca-
ācakṣe śṛṇu rājendra yatpṛṣṭo'smi tvayā'khilam
ahāni pañcaṣāṇyeva vyatikrāntāni mānada || 66 ||
samāyāte jagannāthe parvatendrasutāpatau |
sundarānmandarādadrerdivodāse gate divi || 67 ||
haṃho ityavyayaṃ sambodhane | adhyāsva adhitiṣṭha | svapurodantaṃ svasambandhipuramavimuktaṃ
tasyodantaṃ vṛttāntamākhyāhi kathaya | iha svapure apūrvaṃ ca kiṃ tadapyākhyāhītyarthaḥ |
kimapūrvamiti svapuretyasya viśeṣaṇaṃ vā || 63 ||
samupacakrame upakrāntavān || 65 ||

sarvadṛksarvadaḥ śarvaḥ kathaṃ na jñāyate vibho || 68 |
manye dṛṣatsvarūpo'si dṛṣado'pi kaṭhoradhīḥ
yato viśveśvaraṃ kāśyāṃ na vetsi girijāpatim || 6 9 ||
svabhāvakaṭhinātmā'pi sa varaṃ himavān giriḥ
prāṇādhikasutādānādyo'dhinodviśvanāyakam || 70 ||
bibhratsahajakāṭhinyaṃ jāto gaurīgururguruḥ |
śambhuṃ prapūjya sutayā srajā viśvagurorapi || 71 ||
yatpṛṣṭaṃ ko'tra saṃpratyadhiṣṭhāteti tatrottaramāha | yo vā iti | vaiśabdaḥ

na smareccitraguptastaṃ kṛtapāpamapi dvija || 77 |
punaḥ śuśrāva himavān hṛṣṭa : kārpaṭikoditam |
kārpaṭika uvāca- viśvakarmaṇā
rājan viśveśvarārthe yaḥ prāsādo
nirmīyate sunirmāṇo janminirvāṇadāyinaḥ
tadapūrvaṃ na karṇābhyāmapyākarṇitavānaham || 7 9 ||
yatrātimitratejobhiḥ śalākābhiḥ samantataḥ
maṇimāṇikyaratnānāṃ prāsāde bhittayaḥ kṛtāḥ || 80 ||
yatra santi śataṃ stambhā bhāsvanto dvādaśottarāḥ
ekaikaṃ bhuvanaṃ dhartumaṣṭāṣṭāviti kalpitāḥ || 81 ||

caturdaśasu yā śobhā viṣṭapeṣu samantataḥ
tasmin vimāne sāstīha śatakoṭiguṇottarā || 82 ||
candrakāntamaṇīnāṃ ca stambhādhāraśilāśca yāḥ
citraratnamayaiḥ stambhaiḥ stambhitāstatprabhābharāḥ || 83 ||
padmarāgendranīlānāṃ śālīnāḥ śālabhañjikāḥ
nīrājayantyahorātraṃ yatra ratnapradīpakaiḥ || 84 ||
sphuratsphaṭikanirmāṇaślakṣṇapadmaśilātale
anekaratnarūpāṇi vicitrāṇi samantataḥ || 85 |
āraktapītamañjiṣṭhanīlakirmīravarṇakaḥ
vinyastānīva bhāsante citre citrakṛtā yataḥ || 86 |

dṛkupicchilā vilokyante māṇikyastambharājayaḥ
yato'vimukte svakṣetre mokṣalakṣmyaṅkarā iva || 87 |
ratnākarebhyaḥ sarvebhyo gaṇā ratnoccayān bahūn
rāśīṃścakruḥ samānīya yatrā'driśikharopamān || 88 ||
yatra pātālatalato nāgānāṃ kośaveśmataḥ
gaṇairmaṇigaṇāḥ sarve samāhṛtya girīkṛtāḥ || 8 9 ||
śivabhaktaḥ svayaṃ yatra paulastyaḥ svadrikūṭataḥ
koṭihāṭakakūṭāni ānayāmāsa rākṣasaiḥ || 9 0 ||
prāsādanirmitiṃ śrutvā bhaktā dvīpāntarasthitāḥ
māṇikyāni samājahuryathāsaṃkhyānyaho nṛpa || 9 1 ||
cintāmaṇiḥ svayaṃ yatra karmaṇe viśvakarmaṇe
viśrāṇayedahorātraṃ vicitrāṃścintitānmaṇīn || 9 2 ||
dṛpicchilā netradṛṣṭipratibandhakāḥ | yato yatra prāsāde | yatrā'vimukte iti pāṭhe
pūrvaṃ yato yatra prāsāda iti vyākhyeyam || 87 |
ratnoccayān ratnasamūhān || 88 |

nānāvarṇapatākāśca yatra kalpamahīruhaḥ
analpāḥ kalpayantyeva nityaṃ bhaktisamanvitāḥ || 9 3 ||
abdhayo yatra satataṃ dadhikṣīrekṣusarpiṣām |
pañcāmṛtānāṃ kalaśaiḥ snapayanti dine dine || 9 4 ||
yatra kāmadughā nityaṃ snapayenmadhudhārayā
svadugdhayā svayaṃ bhaktyā viśveśaṃ liṅgarūpiṇam || 9 5 ||
gandhasārarasairyaṃ ca sevate malayācalaḥ
karpūrarambhākarpūrapūrairbhaktyā niṣevate ||9 6 ||
ityādyapūrvaṃ yatrā'sti pratyahaṃ śaṅkarālaye
kathaṃ taṃ tvamumākāntaṃ na vetsi kaṭhināśaya || 9 7 ||
iti tasya samṛddhiṃ tāṃ dṛṣṭvā jāmāturadvirāṭ
trapayā paribhūto'bhūnnitarāṃ kumbhasambhava || 9 8 |
kāmadughā kāmadhenuḥ || 9 5 ||

punaścintāparo jāto'drirāṭ kārpaṭike gate || 99 ||
uvāceti manasyeva vismayotphullalocanaḥ
aho bhadramidaṃ jātaṃ yattvayā'śrāvi śarmabhāku || 100 ||
yāvatsampattisambhāraḥ śrūyate dṛśyate'tra vai '
jāmāturatra sadane līlā trijagatīpateḥ || 101 ||
tataḥ prābhṛtakastuccho nitarāṃ pratibhāti me
kanyārthaṃ yo mayānīto jāmātuḥ paritoṣakṛt || 102 ||
ahaṃ manye tathaivā'sau yathā'darśi mayā purā
vṛddhokṣamātrasampattiḥ sarvakarmaparāṅmukhaḥ || 103 ||
nainaṃ ko'pi vijānīyānnānvayo'sya kadācana
nāmā'pi yasya naikaṃ ca kiṃ deśīyaśca nohyate || 104 ||
pāritoṣikaṃ paritoṣeṇa deyam || 99 |
prābhṛtaka upaskāraḥ || 102 |
vṛddhokṣamātrasampattirjarjaravṛṣamātrasambhāraḥ || 103 |

kiṃ vṛttaśca kimācāro nāmamātreṇa ceśvaraḥ
aiśvaryasūcakaṃ vastu yasya kiñcinna lakṣyate || 105 ||
so'sau nirvāṇasampattiṃ raṅkāyā'pi dadātyaho
sumukhaḥ sarvakarmāṇi phalavanti karoti saḥ || 106 ||
vedavedyo hi sarvajño yatsantāno'khilaṃ jagat
yaṃ na ko'pi hi vedādau vedavedyaḥ sa eṣa vai || 107 ||
yo'nabhijñaḥ sadā jñātaḥ sa sarvajño'yameva hi
yasyaikamapi no nāma puṃsā jñeyaṃ na kenacit || 108 ||
sarveṣāṃ sarvanāmāni yasya nāmāni niścitam
so'sau hi sarvadeśīyaḥ sarvebhyaḥ sarvasiddhidaḥ || 10 9 ||
yasya deśo na vidito yastu vṛttiparāṅmukhaḥ
ācārahīnamiva yaṃ purā'paśyaṃ kaṭhoradhīḥ || 110 ||
śrutismṛtī yataḥ sarvamācāraṃ vitta eva hi
nāmamātreṇa niyataṃ yamajñāsiṣamīśvaram || 111 ||
apaśyaṃ jñātavān || 110 |

api sarvaguṇādhāro guṇātītaḥ parāparaḥ || 112 ||
arvācīna ihā'pyeṣa parācīnaḥ parātparaḥ
bhūdharāṇāmahaṃ nātho viśvanātha umāpatiḥ || 113 ||
ahaṃ pramitasampattiraprameyadhano hyasau
tucchaprābhṛtakastasmānnedānīmasya darśanam || 114 ||
kariṣye'tha kariṣyāmi vyāvṛttyāgatya karhicit
saṃpradhāryeti manasi sāyaṃ sa ca girīśvaraḥ || 115 ||
āhūya sarvānanugān pārvatīyān mahābalān
ādiṣṭavānidaṃ vākyaṃ sarve yūyaṃ balādhikāḥ || 116 ||
kurvantvekaṃ mamādeśaṃ yāvannodyati bhānumān
tāvacchivālayaṃ caikaṃ vidadhatvatra satvaram || 117 ||
yasmin kṛte kṛtārthaḥ syāmiha loke paratra ca
samāgatyeha kāśyāṃ yaḥ kuryādekaṃ śivālayam || 118 ||

yena trailokyamakhilaṃ sālayaṃ kṛtameva hi
tena dattāni dānāni mahānti vidhipūrvakam || 11 9 ||
suparvaṇi supātrāya sutīrthe śraddhayā'dhikam
yena svavittamānena dharmopārjitavittataḥ || 120 |
kṛtaṃ śambhormahāsadma na taṃ padmā tyajetkvacit
tapāṃsi tena taptāni śīrṇaparṇāśanānyapi || 121 || ||
vārāṇasīṃ samāsādya yenā'kāri śivālayaḥ
aśeṣāḥ suviśeṣāḍhyā iṣṭāstena mahāmakhāḥ || 122 ||
ānandakānane yena devadevālayaḥ kṛtaḥ
iti tasya samādeśaṃ samākarṇyā'nugāstataḥ || 123 ||
cakrurdevālayaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ yāvad vyuṣṭā na yāminī
tāvacchaileśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ śaileśena pratiṣṭhitam ||
candrakāntamaṇeścañcatkāntiśvetitamaṇḍapam || 124 ||
alekhayatpraśastiṃ ca praśastākṣaramālinīm
vyācakṣāṇāṃ nijāṃ sarvagotrebhyo'pyadhikonnatim || 125 ||
suparvaṇi ravigrahe || 120 |
vyuṣṭā prabhātā | 124 |
praśastiṃ prāsādakartṛsūcikāṃ patrīm || 125 ||

śailarājaḥ kālarājaṃ namaskṛtya samarcya ca || 126 ||
tatra rāśiṃ samutsṛjya paritastvarito yayau
pārvatīyairanugataḥ sarvairapi nijālayam || 127 ||
tataḥ prātaḥ samālokya gaṇau huṇḍanamuṇḍana
hṛṣṭau devālayaṃ ramyaṃ varaṇāyāstaṭe śubhe || 128 ||
adṛṣṭapūrvaṃ devāya nivedayitumāgatau
tau tu dṛṣṭvā mahādevamumādarśitadarpaṇam || 12 9 ||
praṇamya daṇḍavadbhūmau kṛtāñjalipuṭau gaṇau
kṛtābhyanujñau bhūkṣepād vijñaptimatha cakratuḥ || 130 ||
devadeva na jānīvaḥ kenacidṛḍhabhaktinā
atīvaramyaḥ prāsādo nirmito varaṇātaṭe || 131 ||
ā sāyaṃ naikṣi cāvābhyāṃ dṛṣṭo'dyaiva prage vibho
gaṇoditamitīśāno niśamyāha girīndrajām || 132 ||
rāśiṃ ratnānāmiti śeṣaḥ || 127 ||
naikṣi na dṛṣṭaḥ | prage prātaḥkāle || 132 |

acalendrāṅgaje yāvastatprāsādavilokane || 133 ||
ityuktveśaḥ sagirijo niragātsagaṇo mune
mahāsyandanamāruhya prāsādaṃ draṣṭumutsukaḥ || 134 ||
athā''luloke giriśaḥ prāsādaṃ varaṇātaṭe
atīvaramyaracanaṃ yāminīmātranirmitam || 135 ||
syandanādavaruhyā'tha garbhāgāramavīviśat
dadarśa ca mahāliṅga candrakāntaśilāmayam || 136 ||
dedīpyamānaṃ mahasā mokṣalakṣmyaṅkarākṛti
dṛṣṭiprasādajananaṃ punarjananaśātanam || 137 ||
kenedaṃ sthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ yāvajjijñāsatīśvaraḥ
tāvaddadarśa purataḥ praśastiṃ kartṛsūcikām || 138 ||
vācayitveva ca manāṅmanasyeva manojahṛt
uvāca devīṃ diṣṭyeti prekṣa svātmapituḥ kṛtim || 13 9 ||
āluloke dadarśa || 135 ||
śātanaṃ nāśakam || 137 |
jijñāsati jijñāsate vicārayatītyarthaḥ || 138 |
karāmalakavatsarvadarśitvādivaśabdaḥ | vācayitvaiveti vā pāṭhaḥ | manojahṛt

umā śrutveti saṃhṛṣṭā kadambakusumaśriyam
ānandāṅkaralakṣmīvadaṅgeṣu paribibhratī || 140 ||
tato vyajijñapaddevaṃ devī pādau praṇamya ca
asmi~lliṅgavare nātha tvayā stheyamaharniśam || 141 ||
asya liṅgasya ye bhaktāḥ śaileśasya maheśituḥ
tebhyastvaṃ mahatīmṛddhiṃ dāsyasīha paratra ca || 142 ||
tatheti deva uktvā tāṃ pārvatīṃ punarabravīt
varaṇāyāṃ kṛtasnānaiḥ śaileśo yaiḥ samarcitaḥ || 143 ||
pitṝn santarpya ca mudā datvā dānāni śaktitaḥ
teṣāṃ punarāvṛttiratra saṃsāravartmani || 144 ||
na śaileśvare mahāliṅge nityaṃ sthāsyāmyahaṃ śubhe
pradāsyāmi parāṃ muktimetalliṅgārcake jane || 145 ||
śaileśvaraṃ ye drakṣyanti varaṇāyā : surodhasi
teṣāṃ kāśyāṃ nivasatāṃ duḥkhaṃ nābhibhaviṣyati || 146 ||

śaileśvarasya ye bhaktāste me putrā na saṃśayaḥ
skanda || 147 ||
uvāca iti - śaileśvaraṃ
liṅgaṃ kathitaṃ te mahāmune
idānīṃ kathayiṣyāmi ratneśvarasamudbhavam
śrutvā śaileśamāhātmyaṃ śraddhayā parayā || 148 ||
naraḥ
pāpakañcukamutsṛjya śivalokamavāpnuyāt || 14 9 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe śaileśādiliṅganirṇayo
nāma ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 66 |
pāpakañcukaṃ pāpameva kañcukaṃ nirmokam || 14 9 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ ṣaṭṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 66 ||

|| atha saptaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca- ratneśvarasamutpattiṃ ṣaḍānana |
kathayasva parivarṇyate || 1 |
ratnabhūtaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ yatkāśyāṃ

uttare kālarājasya tāni tasya girervṛṣāt || 5 ||
sarvaratnamayaṃ liṅgaṃ jātaṃ tatsukṛtātmanaḥ
śakracāpasamacchāyaṃ sarvaratnadyutiprabham ||6 ||
talliṅgadarśanādeva jñānaratnamavāpyate
śaileśvaraṃ samālokya śivau tatra samāgatau ||7 |
yatra ratnamayaṃ liṅgamāvirbhūtaṃ svayaṃ mune
tasya sphuratprabhājālaistatamambaramaṇḍalam
tatra dṛṣṭvā śubhaṃ liṅgaṃ sarvaratnasamudbhavam
bhavānyadṛṣṭapūrvā hi paripapraccha śaṅkaram ||9 ||
devadeva jagannātha sarvabhaktābhayaprada
kutastyametalliṅgaṃ hi saptapātālamūlavat || 10 ||
kālarājasya kālabhairavasya | vṛṣāddharmāt || 5 ||
tat prasiddham | hīti kvacit | sukṛtaṃ puṇyamātmani yasya sa sukṛtātmā tasya |
śakracāpasamacchāyamindradhanuḥsadṛśakānti || 6 |
tataṃ vyāptam || 8 |
sarvaratnānāṃ samudbhavo yasmāt sarvaratnaiḥ samudbhavo vā yasya tatsarvaratnasamudbhavaṃ

kimākhyaṃ kiṃ svarūpaṃ ca kiṃ prabhāvaṃ bhavāntaka || 11 ||
yasya saṃvīkṣaṇādeva mano me'tīva hṛṣṭavat I
ihaiva ramate nātha kathayaitatprasādataḥ || 12 ||
devadeva uvāca- yattvayā'pṛccha pārvati
śṛṇvaparṇe samākhyāmi
svarūpametalliṅgasya sarvatejonidheḥ param || 13 ||
tava pitrā himavatā girirājena bhāmini
tvāmuddiśya mahāratnasambhāro'trā'pyanāyi hi || 14 ||
atra tāni ca ratnāni rāśīkṛtya himādriṇā
sukṛtopārjitānyeva yayau svasadanaṃ punaḥ || 15 ||
tavārthaṃ vā mamārthaṃ vā śraddhayā yatsamarpyate
kāśyāṃ tasya parīpāko bhavedīdṛgvidho'naghe || 16 ||
jvālājaṭilitākāśaṃ jvālābhirjaṭilitaṃ jaṭāvyāptamiva kṛtamākāśaṃ yena
tattathā || 11 ||
mahāratnasaṃbhāraḥ tadrūpaḥ pāribarhaḥ , mahāratnānāṃ samūha iti vā || 14 ||

liṅgaṃ ratneśvarākhyaṃ vai matsvarūpaṃ hi kevalam
asya prabhāvo himavān vārāṇasyāmune dhruvam || 17 ||
sarveṣāmiha liṅgānāṃ ratnabhūtamidaṃ param
ato ratneśvaraṃ nāma paraṃ nirvāṇaratnadam nirvāṇaratnadam || 18 |
anenaiva suvarṇena pitrā rāśīkṛtena ca
prāsādamasya liṅgasya vidhāpaya maheśvari || 1 9 ||
liṅgaprāsādakaraṇāt khaṇḍasphuṭitasaṃskṛteḥ
liṅgasthāpanajaṃ puṇyaṃ helayaiveha labhyate || 20 ||
tatheti bhagavatyoktvā gaṇāḥ prāsādanirmitau
somanandiprabhṛtayo'saṃkhyā vyāpāritā mune || 21 ||
gaṇaiśca kāñcanamayo nānākautukacitritaḥ
nirmame yāmamātreṇa prāsādo meruśṛṅgavat || 22 ||
ume he bhavāni | bhavediti kvacit || 17 ||

gaṇebhyo vyatarad bhūri sammānaṃ pāritoṣikam || 23 ||
punaśca devī papraccha praṇipātapuraḥsaram |
mahimānaṃ mahādevaṃ mahādevaṃ liṅgasyā'sya mahāmune || 24 ||
devadeva uvāca-
liṅga tvanādisaṃsiddhametaddevi śubhapradam |
āvirbhūtamidānīṃ ca tvatpituḥ puṇyagauravāt || 25 ||
guhyānāṃ paramaṃ guhyaṃ kṣetre'smiścintitapradam |
kalau kaluṣabuddhīnāṃ gopanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ || 26 ||
yathā ratnaṃ gṛhe guptaṃ na kaiścijjñāyate paraiḥ |
avimukte tathā liṅgaṃ ratnabhūtaṃ gṛhe mama || 27 |
yāni brahmāṇḍamadhye'tra santi liṅgāni pārvati
tairarcitāni sarvāṇi ratneśo yaiḥ samarcitaḥ || 28 |
pramādenā'pi yaigari liṅgaṃ ratneśamarcitam |
te bhavantyeva niyataṃ saptadvīpeśvarā nṛpāḥ || 2 9 ||

trailokye yāni vastūni ratnabhūtāni tāni tu |
ratneśvaraṃ samabhyarcya sakṛtprāpnoti mānavaḥ || 30 ||
pūjayiṣyanti ye liṅga ratneśaṃ kāmavarjitāḥ |
te sarve madgaṇā bhūtvā prānte drakṣyanti māmiha || 31 ||
rudrāṇāṃ koṭijapyena yatphalaṃ parikīrtitam |
tatphalaṃ labhyate devi ratneśasya samarcanāt || 32 ||
liṅge cānādisaṃsiddhe . yadvṛttaṃ tadbravīmi te |
itihāsaṃ mahāśvaryaṃ sarvapāpanikṛntanam || 33 ||
pureha nartakī kācidāsīnnāṭyārthakovidā |
saikadā phālgune māsi śivarātryāṃ kalāvatī || 34 ||
nanarta jāgaraṃ prāpya jagau gītaṃ ca peśalam |
svayaṃ ca vādayāmāsa nānāvādyāni vādyavit || 35 || |
tena tauryatrikeṇā'pi prīṇayitvā'tha ma़ā naṭī |
ratneśvaraṃ mahāliṅga deśamiṣṭaṃ jagāma ha || 36 ||
kāmavarjitā niṣkāmāḥ || 31 ||
nāṭyārthakovidā nṛtyakaraṇe paṇḍitā || 34 |
peśalaṃ manoharam || 35 |
tauryatrikeṇa nṛtyavādyagītena | yadāhā'maraḥ - ' tauryatrikaṃ nṛtyagītavādyam " iti || 36 ||

sutā gandharvarājasya vasubhūterbabhūva ha || 37 |
saṅgītasya savādyasya tasya lāsyasya puṇyataḥ |
tatreśāgre kṛtasyeha jāgare śivarātrije || 38 |
ramyā ratnāvalī nāma rūpalāvaṇyaśālinī |
kalākalāpakuśalā madhurālāpavādinī || 3 9 ||
piturānandakṛnnityaṃ vasubhūterghaṭodbhava |
sarvagāndharva kuśalā guṇaratnamahākhaniḥ || 40 ||
mune sakhītrayaṃ tasyāścārucāturyabhājaṃnam
śaśilekhā'naṅgalekhā citralekheti nāmataḥ || 41 ||
tisṛbhistābhirekatra vāgdevī pariśīlitā
tābhyaḥ sarvāḥ kalāḥ prādāt pariprītā sarasvatī || 42 ||
prāpya ratnāvalī gauri sā janmāntaravāsanām |
ratneśvarasya liṅgasya jagrāha niyamaṃ śubham || 43 ||

ratnabhūtasya liṅgasya kāśyāṃ ratneśvarasya vai |
nityaṃ saṃdarśanaṃ prāpya vakṣyāmyapi vaco mukhe || 44 ||
itthaṃ niyamavatyāsīt sā gandharvasutottamā |
tābhiḥ sakhībhiḥ sahitā nityaṃ liṅgaṃ ca paśyati || 45 ||
ekadā''rādhya ratneśaṃ mamaitalliṅgamuttamam |
samānarca ca sā bālā . ramyayā gītamālayā || 46 ||
sakhyaḥ pradakṣiṇīkartuṃ liṅgaṃ tisro'pyume gatā :
tasyā gītena tuṣṭo'haṃ liṅgastho varado'bhavam || 47 ||
yastvayā raṃsyate rātrāvadya gandharvakanyake |
tava nāmasamānākhyaḥ sa te bhartā bhaviṣyati || 48 |
iti liṅgāmbudherjātāṃ paripīya vacaḥ sudhām
babhūvā''nandasandohamantharātīva hrīmatī || 4 9 ||
vaco vakṣyāmi vacanaṃ vadiṣyāmi | apiśabdena bhojanādikaṃ saṃgṛhyate || 44 ||

kathayantī nijodantaṃ tamālīnāṃ puro mudā || 50 ||
tābhirdiṣṭyeti diṣṭyeti sakhībhiḥ parinanditā
adya te vāñchitaṃ bhāvi ratneśasya samarcanāt || 51 ||
yadyāyāti sa te rātrāvadya kaumārahārakaḥ
coro bāhulatāpāśaiḥ pāśitavyo'tiyatnataḥ || 52 ||
gocarīkriyate'smābhiryathā sa sukṛtaikabhūḥ
prātareva tava preyān ratneśādiṣṭa iṣṭakṛt || 53 ||
yātā svasmāsu hṛṣṭāsu bhavatī puṇyagauravāt |
aho ratneśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ pratyakṣīkṛtavatyasi || 54 ||
nijodantaṃ svavṛttāntaṃ taṃ ratneśoktaṃ yastvayetyādirūpam | nijoddeśamiti pāṭhe'pi sa

bhāgyodayo nṝṇāmaho puṇya samucchrayaḥ
ekasyaiva bhavetsiddhiryadekatrā'pi |
satyaṃ vadanti tiṣṭhatām || 55 ||
nāsatyaṃ daivaprādhānyavādinaḥ |
daivameva phaledekaṃ phaledekaṃ nodyamo nāparaṃ balam || 56 ||
bhavatyā api cāsmākameka eva hi codyamaḥ |
paraṃ daivaṃ daivaṃ phalatyekaṃ yathā tava na naḥ puraḥ || 57 ||
lokānāṃ vyavahāro'yamāli proktaḥ prasaṅgataḥ |
paraṃ manorathāvāptistava yā saiva naḥ sphuṭam || 58 ||
iti saṃvyāharantīnāmananto'dhvātitucchavat |
kṣaṇāttāsāṃ vyatikrāntaḥ prāptāśca svaṃ svamālayam || 5 9 ||
ucchrayaḥ udrekaḥ || 55 |
tatra daivameva kevalaṃ kāraṇamiti daivaprādhānyavādivākyamanuvādapūrvakamudāharanti |
satyaṃ vadantīti || 56 ||
tadeva vākyaṃ svasmin yojayanti | bhavatyā apīti | daikm adṛṣṭam | phalati
phalaniṣpattiṃ karoti || 57 ||
nanu tarhi bhavatīnāṃ māṃ pratīrṣyā jātā netyāddurlokānāmiti | āli he
sakhi || 58 ||
atitucchavadatyalpavat || 5 9 ||

atha prātaḥ samutthāya punarekatra saṃgatāḥ |
sā ca maunavatī tābhiḥ paribhukteva lakṣitā || 60 |
tūṣṇīṃ prāpyā'tha kāśīṃ sā snātvā mandākinījale |
sakhībhiḥ sahitā'paśyalliṅgaṃ ratneśvaraṃ mama || 61 ||
nirvartya niyamaṃ sā'tha lajjāmukulitekṣaṇā |
nirbandhena vayasyābhiḥ paripṛṣṭā jagāda ha || 62 |
ratnāvalyuvāca- svamandiram |
atha ratneśayātrāyāḥ prayātāsu
bhavatīṣu smarantyeva tadratneśavaco'mṛtam || 63 ||
saviśeṣāṅgasaṃskārā'viśaṃ saveśamandiram |
nidrādaridranayanā tadvilokanalālasā || 64 ||
balātsvapnadaśāṃ prāptā bhāvino'rthasya gauravāt |
ātmavismaraṇe hetū tato dvau me babhūvatuḥ || 65 ||
nirvartya samāpya || 62 |

tandrayā paravaśā cāsaṃ tatastatsparśanena ca || 66 ||
na jāne tvatha kiṃ vṛttaṃ kā'haṃ kvā'haṃ sa cā'tha kaḥ
taṃ nirjigamiṣu sakhyo yāvaddhartuṃ prasāritaḥ || 67 ||
doḥ kaṅkaṇena ripuṇā kvaṇitaṃ tāvadutkaṭam |
mahatā siñjitenā'haṃ tenālpaṃ paribodhitā || 68 |
sukhasantānapīyūṣahade parinimajjya vai |
kṣaṇena tadviyogāgnikīlāsu patitā balāt || 6 9 |
kiṃ kulīyaḥ sa no vedmi kiṃ deśīyaḥ kimākhyakaḥ |
dunoti nitarāṃ sakhyastadviśleṣānalo mahān || 70 ||
tandrī tandrā ālasyamiti yāvat || 66 |

prāṇānāṃ me yiyāsūnāmekameva mahauṣadham || 71 ||
vayasyā niśi bhuktasya tasyaiva punarīkṣaṇam |
bhavatīnāmadhīnaṃ ca tatpunardarśanaṃ mama || 72 |
kālīkamālayo vakti snigdhamugdhe sakhījane |
taddarśanena sthāsyanti prāṇā yāsyanti cā'nyathā || 73 |
daśamyavasthā sannahyed bādhituṃ mā'dhunā bhṛśam |
iti tasyā giraḥ śrutvā dūnāyā nitarāṃ ca tāḥ || 74 ||
pravepamānahṛdayāḥ procuḥ vīkṣya parasparam || 75 ||
sakhya ūcu : yasya - grāmo na no nāma nā'nvayo nā'pi budhyate |
sa kathaṃ prāpyate bhadre ka upāyo vidhīyatām || 76 |
analpotkalitaṃ mahadutkaṇṭhitam | analpotkalpitamiti pāṭhe'pi sa evārthaḥ |
analpotkampitamiti cānyatra | yiyāsūnāṃ gantumicchūnām || 71 ||
vayasyā he sakhyaḥ | tarhi tasya punardarśanaṃ kathaṃ syāttatrāha | bhavatīnāmiti || 72 ||

vayasyā tadavāptau me yūyaṃ kuṇṭhi mumūrcha ha || 77 |
ityardhoktena sā bālā yūyaṃ kuṇṭhitaśaktayaḥ
yadvaktavyaṃ tviti tayā yūyaṃ kuṇṭhīti bhāṣitam
tatastāstvaritāḥ sakhyaḥ paritāpopahārakān
bahuśaḥ śītalopāyān vyadhurmohapraśāntaye || 7 9 |
vyapaiti na yadā mūrcchā tattacchītopacārata :
tasyāstadaikayānītaṃ ratneśasnapanodakam || 80 ||
tadukṣaṇātkṣaṇādeva tanmūrcchā virarāma ha
suptotthiteva sā'vādīn muhuḥ śiva śiveti ca || 81 ||

skanda uvāca- svabhaktānāmupasarge mahatyapi
śraddhāvatāṃ vineśacaraṇodakam
nopāyāntaramastyeva || 82 ||
ye vyādhayo'pi duḥsādhyā bahirantaḥ śarīragāḥ
śraddhayeśodakasparśātte naśyantyeva nānyathā || 83 ||
sevitaṃ yena satataṃ bhagavaccaraṇodakam
taṃ bāhyābhyantaraśuciṃ nopasarpati durgati : || 84 ||
ādhibhautikatāpaṃ ca tāpaṃ cāpyādhidaivikam
ādhyātmikaṃ tathā tāpaṃ harecchrīcaraṇodakam || 85 |
vyapetasaṃjvarā cātha gandharvatanayā mune |
ucitajñeti hovāca tāḥ sakhīḥ snigdhadhīradhīḥ || 86 ||
prasaṅgāt snapanodakamāhātmyamāha | ' śraddhetyādicaturbhiḥ : | upasarge pīḍāyāṃ

ratnāvalyuvāca- madīhite |
śaśilekhe'naṅgalekhe citralekhe
yūyaṃ kuṇṭhitasāmarthyāḥ kuto vastāḥ kalāḥ kva vā || 87 |
matpriyaprāptaye samyagupāyo'sti mayekṣitaḥ |
ratneśvarānugrahato'nutiṣṭhata hitaṃ hitāḥ || 88 |
śaśilekhe'bhilaṣitaprāptyai lekhāṃstvamālikha |
saṃlikhānaṅgalekhe tvaṃ yūnaḥ sarvāvanīcarān || 8 9 ||
citrajñe citralekhe tvaṃ pātālatalaśāyinaḥ |
kiñcidāvirbhavaccārutāruṇyālaṅkṛtīn likha || 9 0 |

athākarṣṇeti tāḥ sakhyastaccāturyaṃ pravarṇyaca ca . . |
lilikhuḥ kramaśaḥ sakhyo yūno yauvanaśevadhīn || 9 1 ||
niryatkaumāralakṣmīkān puṃvattvaśrīsamāvṛtān
prātaḥ sandhyeva gandharvī nṛpādyāṃstānavaikṣata || 9 2 ||
sarvān suranikāyān sā vyalokata śubhekṣaṇā
na cāñcalyaṃ jahāvakṣṇosteṣu svarlokavāsiṣu || 9 3 ||
tato madhyamalokasthān munirājakumārakān |
vilokyā'pi na sā prītiṃ kvāpyāpa premanirbharā || 9 4 ||
atha ratnāvalī bālā karṇābhyarṇavilocanā
dṛśau vyāpārayāmāsa balisadmayuvasvapi || 9 5 ||

ditijān danujān vīkṣya sā gandharvī kumārakān
ratiṃ babandha na kvāpi tāpitā mānmathaiḥ śaraiḥ || 9 6 |
sudhākarakaraspṛṣṭā'pyatidūnāṅgayaṣṭikā
paśyantī nāgayūnaḥ sā kiñciducchrātā'bhavat || 9 7 ||
bhoginastān vilokyā'pi citraṃ citragatānatha
manākū saṃbhuktabhogeva kṣaṇamāsītkumārikā || 9 8 |
yūnaḥ pratyekamadrākṣīdaśeṣān śeṣavaṃśajān |
takṣakānvayagāṃstadvadatha vāsukigotrajān || 99 |
pulīkānantakarkoṭabhadrasantānagānapi
