dṛṣṭvānāgakumaḥrāṃstān śaṃkhacūḍamathaikṣata || 100 |
śaṃkhacūḍekṣaṇādeva parāṃ lajjāṃ babhāra sā |
udbhinnapulakā'pyāsīdaṅgapratyaṅgasandhiṣu || 101 ||
mānmathaiḥ kāmasambandhibhiḥ || 9 6 ||
atidūnāṅgayaṣṭikā'tivyathitaśarīrayaṣṭikā | ucchusitā ullasitā || 9 7 |
bhogino nāgān || 9 8 ||
śeṣo'nantaḥ || 99 |

tattrapābharato'jñāyi tatkaumāraharo varaḥ
tathā vaidagdhyavarayā kṣaṇataścitralekhayā || 102 ||
atha citrapaṭīṃ citralekhā citrapaṭāñcalam
parikṣipyā'vṛṇottūrṇaṃ parihāsaikapeśalā || 103 ||
ratnāvalī citralekhāṃ hiyamaunāvalambinī
dṛśā kuṭilayā'drākṣītprasphuraddaśanāmbarā || 104 ||
kaṭākṣitā'naṅgalekhā tayā'tha śaśilekhayā
citralekhāparikṣiptapaṭāñcalamapākarot || 105 ||
vasubhūtisutā sā'tha kanyā ratnāvalī śubhā
śaṃkhacūḍānvavāye taṃ ratnacūḍamavaikṣata || 106 |
varo bhartā || 102 |
citrapaṭāmbalaṃ citravastrāgrabhāgam | peśalā kuśalā || 103 ||

tadīkṣaṇakṣaṇādṛṣṭirānandāśrubhirāvṛtā
kapolabhittirabhavat svedodakaṇikāñcitā || 107 ||
cakampe gātralatikā dhṛtaromāñcakañcukā
citranyasteva tastambha kṣaṇaṃ mukulitānanā || 108 ||
tataḥ sā citralekhā tāmetyāśvāsayadāturām
mautsukyaṃ vraja gandharvi siddhaste'dya manorathaḥ || 10 9 ||
etasyāvagataṃ sarvaṃ deśanāmā'nvayādikam |
mā viṣīdā''li sulabhastveṣa ratneśvarārpitaḥ || 110 |
aho sadṛgvarāvāptyā ratneśenāsi toṣitā
uttiṣṭha yāmaḥ sadanaṃ ratneśaḥ sarvado hi naḥ || 111 ||
tadīkṣaṇakṣaṇāttasya ratnacūḍasya īkṣaṇena jāto yaḥ kṣaṇo'vasaraṃ utsavo vā | " kṣaṇa
uddhava utsavaḥ " ityamaraḥ | tasmāditi | svedodakaṇikāñcitā gharmā'mbukaṇa-
vyāptā || 107 |
dhṛtaṃ romāñcarūpaṃ kañcukaṃ yayā sā tathā | tastambha sthitavatī || 108 ||
autsukyamautkaṇṭhyaṃ mā vraja mā gaccha | sautsukyamiti pāṭhe sā tvamityarthaḥ | kuta
ityata āha | siddha iti || 10 9 |

atha daivavaśādyāntyastā dṛṣṭā gaganādhvagāḥ
subāhunā dānavena pātālatalavāsinā || 112 ||
gṛhītvā tāścatasro'pi niragāddānavo gṛham
harirvikaṭadaṃṣṭrāsyaḥ prāntare hariṇīriva || 113 ||
tāstaṃ vilokya gandharvyo daṃṣṭra vikaṭitānanam
rudhirāruṇanetraṃ ca jātā vepathubhūmayaḥ || 114 ||
hā mātarhā pitastrāhi hā vidhe mā vidhehi tat
yadetatkartumārabdhamanāthāsvatiniṣṭhuram || 115 ||
hā daiva mandabhāgyābhiḥ kimasmābhiranuṣṭhitam
sukṛtetaravārtā'pi no citte vyāhṛtā kvacit || 116 ||
śiśukrīḍanakaṃ hitvā hitvā ratneśvarārcanam |
pitroḥ svādhīnasacceṣṭā iṣṭaṃ vidmo na kiñcana || 117 ||

adhobhuvanagā dīnā hīnānāthena ko'tra naḥ |
trāti trāṇārthinīrbālāḥ śambho ratneśa sarvaga || 118 ||
itthaṃ gandharvatanayā vilapantī : kṛpāturam |
śuśrāva nāgarājo'sau ratnacūḍo mahāmanāḥ || 11 9 |
ko'sau matsvāmano nāma ratneśasya maheśituḥ |
liṅgarājasya gṛhṇāti karmabandhanabhedinaḥ || 120 |
punarapyārtarāvaṃ sa śrutvā bālāmukheritam |
ratneśa rakṣa rakṣeti gṛhītāstro viniryayau || 121 |
taṃ vasāsavapānena mahāmāṃsaniṣevaṇāt |
atyantonmattaduśceṣṭaṃ ratnacūḍo niraikṣata || 122 ||
adhyākṣipacca re duṣṭa śiṣṭakanyāpahāraka |
maddṛṣṭigocaraṃ yātaḥ kva yāsyasyadya re'dhama || 123 |
mama bāṇahataprāṇaḥ prayāṇaṃ kuru durmate |
ārtatrāṇodyatamatervaivasvatapuraṃ prati || 124 ||
ratneśvara rakṣa rakṣetyārtaevaṃ śrutvetyanvayaḥ || 121 ||
vasā hṛnmedaḥ sa eva rasastasya pānena | vasāsavapāneneti pāṭhe vasaivāsavo madyaṃ
vasā cāsavaśceti vā tasya pāneneti vyākhyātavyam | niraikṣata dṛṣṭavān || 122 ||

ratneśvarasya yairnāma pralayāpadyapi sphuṭam
gṛhītaṃ na bhavādṛgbhyasteṣu bhītirbhayātmasu || 125 ||
ratneśvaramahānāma kṛtatrāṇāstu ye narāḥ
teṣāṃ janmajarāvyādhikalikālabhayaṃ kutaḥ || 126 ||
ityuktvā tā bhayatrastāstanmukhaprahitekṣaṇāḥ
vyāghraghrātā iva mṛgīrmā bhaiṣiṣṭetyuvāca saḥ || 127 ||
ityāśvāsyā'tha gandharvīḥ sa vai bhujagarājajaḥ
ākarṇapūrṇamākṛṣya kodaṇḍaṃ prāhiṇoccharam || 128 ||
so'pi kruddho danujarāṭ padāspṛṣṭabhujaṅgavat
āviddhya kāladaṇḍābhaṃ parighaṃ vyasṛjan mahat || 12 9 ||

hṛdi ratneśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ yasya samyag vijṛmbhate |
alātadaṇjavattasmin kāladaṇḍo'pi jāyate || 130 ||
antareva sa ciccheda parighaṃ svamadeṣubhiḥ |
durvṛttasya yathehāyurvicchidyetāntaraiva hi || 131 ||
tato'sya bāṇaṃ cikṣepa kālānalasamaprabham
sa bāṇastasya hṛdayaṃ praviśya praviśya pragaveṣya ca || 132 |
prāṇānasya viniryātya svayaṃ tūṇamagāt punaḥ |
hṛdisthaṃ tasya daurātmyaṃ sarvaṃ vijñāya tattvataḥ || 133 |
digaṅganāpuraḥ khyātumiva nāgāśugo gataḥ || 134
anyāyopārjitairdravyairyaḥ sukhaṃ bhoktumicchati |
tāni dravyāṇi yāntyeva saprāṇāni kutaḥ sukham || 135 |
ratnacūḍaṃ prati śaṅkamānaṃ sūtaṃ pratyāha | hṛdīti | bhrameṇa krīḍārthaṃ
jvalattṛṇādinirmito'lātadaṇḍaḥ || 130 |
antarmadhye || 131 |

iti taṃ dānavaṃ hatvā nāgarājo mahābalī |

anyadvastvantaraṃ prekṣya ramaṇīyataraṃ tvapi || 142 ||
vaca : pīyūṣamādhuryaṃ nitarāṃ prāpya naḥ śrutī |
śabdāntaragrahāpekṣāṃ na kuvati khajanmanaḥ || 143 ||
āpnutaḥ paṅgatāmetau pādau naścañcalāvapi
amuṃ yuvānamālokya coraṃ naḥ sanmano maṇeḥ || 144 ||
iti bruvantyastā bālāḥ parasparamanulbaṇam
dṛṣṭvā'pi citramadhyasthaṃ vividustanna bālikāḥ || 145 ||
atīvabhīṣaṇākāradanujasyātisādhvasāt
andhībhūtekṣaṇāstaṃ nājñāsiṣurhariṇīkṣaṇā : || 146 ||
ūcuśca taṃ yuvānaṃ tā nijajīvitarakṣiṇam
yadaṅga bhavatā pṛṣṭaṃ snehanirbharacetasā || 147 ||
indriyāṇāṃ stabdhatāmevāhuryātumityādinā | tathā yāthātayyena | netre
cakṣuṣī || 142 |
śrutī śravaṇendriye | khajanmanaḥ ākāśasya || 143 |

tadācakṣāmahe sarvamavadhehi kṣaṇaṃ manaḥ
iyaṃ gandharvarājasya vasubhūtestanūdbhavā || 148 ||
kanyā ratnāvalī nāma guṇaratnamahākhaniḥ
vayaṃ vayasyā etasyāśchāyevānugatāḥ sadā || 14 9 ||
ārabhya bālyamapyeṣā liṅgaṃ ratneśvarābhidham
yāti pitrā'pyanujñātā kāśyāmarcayituṃ sadā || 150 ||
varo'pi dattastenā'syai prasannenā'tha śambhunā
hariṣyatīti yaḥ svapne kaumāraṃ te kumārike || 151 ||
tava nāmasamānākhyaḥ sa te bhartā bhaviṣyati
yuvānaṃ svapnabhoktāraṃ prāpyā'pyeṣā suduḥkhitā || 152 ||
punastadvirahotthena vahninā'tīvatāpitā
kalākauśalyato'smābhiḥ so'pi citre pradarśitaḥ || 153 |
yasya na grāmanāmā'pi nā'nvayo'pyavabudhyate
taṃ dṛṣṭvā citralikhitamapyeṣā jīvitā punaḥ || 154 ||
avaghehi sthirīkuru || 148 |
hariṣyatīti śabdasya bhaviṣyatītyanena sambandhaḥ || 151 ||
kalākauśalyataḥ vidyānaipuṇyāt || 153 |

yāntīstato'nayā sārdhaṃ prāntare gaganādhvani || 155 ||
atarkitāgamaścāsmān dhṛtvā pātālamāviśat
anantaraṃ bhavāneva taṃ vetti danujādhamam || 156 ||
aṅga ityeva vṛttānto nijo'smābhirudīritaḥ
prasādaṃ kuru cāsmākaṃ puraḥ ko'si kṛpānidhe || 157 ||
yadā prabhṛti cāsmābhiḥ sa dṛṣṭo duṣṭadānavaḥ
tadā prabhṛti no netre vidyuteva hataprabhe || 158 ||
kāṃdiśīkā bhayatrātarna vidmaḥ kiñcideva hi

vicitramaṇisopānāṃ haṃsakokakṛtā ravām
kavīnāṃ vāsitavyājāt svāgataṃ kurvatāmiva || 162 ||
tatra tenā'bhyanujñātāḥ krīḍāvāpyāṃ nimajjya tāḥ
sacailapuṣpābharaṇāḥ pronmamajjustataḥ punaḥ || 163 ||
bahirnirgatya gandharvyaḥ paśyantyaḥ sthagitā iva
ratneśālayamālokya kālarājasamīpataḥ || 164 ||
parasparaṃ tataḥ procurgandharvyo vismitā iva
svapno'yaṃ kiṃ nu vā satyaṃ khelo ratneśvarasya vā || 165 ||
vayameva hi vā bhrāntā gandharvyo na vayaṃ kimu
kimetannaiva jānīma aindrajālikakhelavat || 166 ||
eṣottaravahā gaṅgā sphuṭameva bhavediha
śaṃkhacūḍasya vā'pyeṣā vā'pyeṣā śaṃkhacūḍālayastvasau || 167 ||
vicitramaṇisopānaṃ nānāmaṇisambaddhaghaṭṭāmityarthaḥ | kavīnāṃ vāsitavyājājjala-
pakṣiṇāṃ śabdacchalāt || 162 ||
nimajjya jalāśayaṃ gatvā pronmamajjuḥ śirobhiḥ samyaṅmajjanaṃ cakruḥ || 163 ||
sthagitā iva jṛmbhitā iva || 164 ||
khelaḥ krīḍā || 165 |

etatpañcanadaṃ tīrthameṣa vāgīśvarālayaḥ
yasya sandarśanādeva vāgvibhūtirvijṛmbhate || 168 |
śaṃkhacūḍeśvaraścaiṣa śaṃkhacūḍapratiṣṭhitaḥ
yasya saṃdarśanātpuṃsāṃ na bhayaṃ kālasarpam || 16 9 ||
eṣā mandākinī nāma dīrghikā puṇyatoyabhūḥ |
yasyāṃ kṛtodakā martyā martyaloke viśanti na || 170 ||
asāvāśāpurīdevī yā stutā tripurāriṇā |
tripuraṃ jetukāmena mandākinyāstaṭe śubhe || 171 ||
yā'dyāpi pūjitā martyairāśāṃ pūrayate'rthinām |
mandākinyāḥ pratīcyāṃ tu eṣa siddhacaṣṭakeśvaraḥ || 172 ||
bhavedyasya saparyāto saparyāto gṛhe siddhacaṣṭakaṃ sphuṭam |
kuṇḍaṃ siddhacaṣṭakākhyaṃ ca tatraiva virajodakam || 173 |
kālarūpaḥ sarpaḥ kālasarpastasmātkālaśca sarpaśca tābhyāṃ vā jātaṃ
kālasarpajam || 16 9 | |
āśāpurīnāmnā || 171 ||
āśāpurī nāma nirvakti I | yā'dyāpīti || 172 |

yatra snātvā kṛtaśrāddho virajasko divaṃ vrajet |
mūrtyastāḥ siddhayaścāṣṭau yāḥ kāśyāṃ sarvasiddhidāḥ || 174 ||
sarvasiddhipradaścāsau mahārājavināyakaḥ
vināyakāḥ praṇaśyanti yasmai praṇamatāṃ nṛṇām || 175 ||
asau siddheśvarasyoccaiḥ prāsādaḥ kāñcanojjvalaḥ
ratnadhvajapatākāśca siddhiḥ syādyadvilokanāt || 176 ||
kṣetrasya madhyame bhāge madhyameśvara eṣa vai |
madhyā'dholokayormadhye na vasedyasya vīkṣaṇāt || 177 |
madhyameśaṃ samabhyarcya naro madhyamaviṣṭape
āsamudrakṣitīndraḥ syāttato mokṣaṃ ca vindati || 178 ||
siddhacaṣṭakaṃ bhavedityuktaṃ tatkiṃ mūrtimadamūrtimadveti pṛcchāyāmāha | mūrtyo mūrtimatya
vināyakā vighnāḥ || 175 ||
ataḥ asau atreti vā pāṭhaḥ | caḥ samuccaye || 176 ||
madhyamaviṣṭape bhūrloka || 178 |

dṛśyate yatpatākāyāṃ ramya airāvato gajaḥ || 17 9 ||
vṛddhakāleśvarasyaiṣa prāsādo ratnanirmitaḥ
pratidarśaṃ vasedyatra rātrau candraḥ satārakaḥ || 180 ||
yasya sandarśanānnṛṇāṃ na kālaḥ prabhaved bhave
na kaliḥ prabhavetsatyaṃ na ca kalmaṣarāśayaḥ || 181 ||
iti yāvatkathāṃ cakruḥ saṃbhrāntā iva bālikāḥ
tāvad vasuvibhūtiḥ sa gandharvatvarayā yayau || 182 ||
nāradācchrutavṛttāntaḥ subāhudanujanmanaḥ
ratnāvalī sutā prītā sasakhīkā yathā hṛtā || 183 |
ratneśvarāt samāyānti śūnye gaganavartmani
yathā na yacca pātālaṃ yathā yuddhamabhūtpunaḥ || 184 ||
yathā ratneśabhaktena ratnacūḍena ghātitaḥ
sa subāhurdanujanurmaheṣvāsena ceṣuṇā || 185 |
pratidarśaṃ pratyamāvāsyāyām || 180 |
bhave saṃsāre || 181 |

śaṃkhacūḍasya vāpīṃ vāpīṃ tāṃ pātāleṣu pravartinīm || 186 |
yathā ca prāpya niryātāḥ kāśīṃ dṛṣṭvā'pi bālikāḥ |
bhṛśaṃ saṃbhrāntimāpannāḥ paśyantyo'pi samutsukāḥ || 187 |
dṛṣṭvā gandharvarājastāṃ punarjātāmivātmajām
manamlānamukhapaṅkajasuśriyam || 188 ||
savayasyā lalāṭaphalakaṃ
pariṣvajya samāghrāya muhuḥ
aṅkamāropya papraccha sarvaṃ vṛttāntamādarāt || 18 9 ||
atha sā kathayāmāsa danujāpahṛteḥ kathām |
ratneśvaravarā'vāptiṃ svapnāvasthāṃ vihāya ca || 1 9 0 ||
ratnāvalīmanovṛttiṃ vijñāyā'tha mukheṅgitaiḥ
śaśilekhā samācaṣṭa spaṣṭavarṇaiḥ savistaram || 1 9 1 |

prabhāvaṃ varṇayāmāsa mudā ratneśvarasya ca || 1 9 2 |
skanda uvāca ākarṇaya -
muniśreṣṭha vindhyavṛddhivivardhana |
pratyahaṃ ratnacūḍo'pi vāpīmārgeṇa saṃyamī || 1 9 3 ||
nāgalokāt samāgatya snātvā mandākinījale
ratneśvaraṃ samabhyarcya ratnāñjalyaṣṭakenaṃ vai || 1 9 4 ||
suvarṇapaṅkajānyaṣṭau samarpayati hṛṣṭavat
ekadā svapnasamaye ratneśo liṅgarūpadhṛk || 1 9 5 ||
ratnacūḍamuvācedaṃ nijabhaktaṃ dṛḍhavratam
dānavena hṛtāṃ kanyāṃ mocayiṣyati yāṃ bhavān || 1 9 6 ||
taṃ dānavaṃ raṇe jitvā sā te patnī bhaviṣyati
iti smaran varaṃ so'tha nāgarājo mahāmanāḥ || 1 9 7 ||
tāṃ kanyāṃ dānavaṃ hatvā vimocya nijavīryataḥ
vāpīmārgeṇa pātālādānināya punarmahīm || 1 9 8 ||
kṛtī vidvān || 1 9 2 |
evaṃ ratnāvalyā vṛttāntamuktvā ratnacūḍavṛttāntaṃ prastāvayati | ākarṇayeti
viśeṣeṇa vardhayati chedayatīti vivardhanastatsambodhanaṃ tathā | vṛdhu cchedana iti dhātuḥ |
nibarhaṇeti kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 1 9 3 ||

liṅgaṃ samarcayitvā'tha kṛtvā cāpi pradakṣiṇam || 1 99 ||
yāvadbahiḥ samāgacchedramyādratneśamaṇḍapāt |
tāvad gandharvarājāya tābhiḥ sa vasubhūtaye || 200 ||
so'yaṃ so'yaṃ yuvā dhanyastarjanyagreṇa darśitaḥ
gandharvarājastaṃ dṛṣṭvā nāgarājakumārakam || 201 |
atīvasmeranayanaḥ saṃprahṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ |
manasyenaṃ ca saṃvarṇya tadrūpaṃ savayo'nvayam || 202 |
dhanyo'smyanugṛhīto'smi ratneśena varārpaṇāt |
dhanyatarā ceyamanurūpo'sti yatpatiḥ || 203 ||
kanyā saṃpradhāryeti hṛdyenaṃ samākārya ca sundaram
pṛṣṭvā tannāma gotraṃ ca gaṇayitvā balābalam || 204 ||
ratneśvarasya puratastasmai kanyāṃ dadau mudā |
nītvā gandharvalokaṃ ca kṛtakautukamaṅgalam || 205 |
niyamaṃ ratnāñjalyaṣṭakena pūjanaṃ suvarṇapaṅkajāṣṭakasamarpaṇarūpaṃ vratam || 1 99 |
savayo'vayaṃ vayo'nvayābhyāṃ sahitaṃ tadrūpaṃ ca || 202 |

vaivāhikena vidhinā dadau ratnānyanekaśaḥ || 206 ||
śaśilekhā'naṅgalekhā citralekhā'pi kumbhaja |
vijñāpya svajanetāraṃ varayāmāsa taṃ patim || 207 |
upayamya catasro'pi sa sa gandharvasutāḥ gandharvasutāḥ śubhāḥ |
ratnacūḍo jagāmā'tha tābhiḥ svapitṛmandiram || 208 ||
yathā catasṛbhiḥ sārdhaṃ śrutibhiḥ praṇavaḥ śivam |
svapitroścaraṇau natvā navoḍhābhiḥ sa nāgarāṭ || 20 9 |
viniveditavṛttānto ratneśānugrahasya ca |
uvāsa tābhiḥ sasukhaṃ pitṛbhyāmabhinanditaḥ || 210 |
īśvara uvāca-
ratneśvarasya liṅgasya mama sthāvararūpiṇaḥ |
sarveṣāṃ sarvadasyā'sya prabhāvo girije'tulaḥ || 211 |
upayamya vivāhya || 208 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 67 ||

guptamāsīdidaṃ liṅgamadya yāvatsumadhyame || 212 |
tava pitrā himavatā mama bhaktena sarvathā |
puṇyārjitairmahāratnai ratneśaḥ prakaṭīkṛtaḥ || 213 |
asmi~lliṅge mama prītirnitarāmadvirājaje |
vārāṇasyāmidaṃ liṅgaṃ pūjanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ || 214 ||
nānāratnāni labhyante ratneśānugrahādume |
strīratnaputraratnādisvargamokṣāvapi priye || 215 ||
yo'tra ratneśvaraṃ natvā mṛto deśāntareṣvapi |
na sa svargādihāgacchetkalpakoṭiśatairapi || 216 |
asitāyāṃ caturdaśyāmupoṣya niśi jāgarāt
ratneśasannidhau devi mama sānnidhyamāpnuyāt || 217 |
asya liṅgasya pūrveṇa tvayā janmāntare priye |
dākṣāyaṇīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ madbhaktyātra pratiṣṭhitam || 218 |
tasya sandarśanādeva na naro yāti durgatim |
ambikā nāma gaurī tvaṃ tatrā'haṃ cā'mbikeśvaraḥ || 21 9 |
mūrtaḥ ṣaḍānanastatra tava putraḥ sumadhyame |
etattrayaṃ naro dṛṣṭvā na garbhaṃ praviśedume || 220 ||

gopanīyaṃ prayatnena kalikalmaṣacetasām || 221 |
idaṃ ratneśvarākhyānaṃ yaḥ paṭhiṣyati sarvadā
sa putrapautrapaśubhirna viyujyeta karhicit || 222 ||
śrutvā ratneśvarotpattiṃ setihāsāṃ narottamaḥ
anūḍho labhate satyaṃ kanyāratnaṃ kulocitam || 223 ||
kanyā'pīmaṃ samākarṇya tvitihāsaṃ manoramam
śraddhayā satpatiṃ prāpya bhaviṣyati pativratā || 224 ||
itihāsamimaṃ śrutvā nārī vā puruṣo'pi vā
na jātviṣṭaviyogāgnitāpena paritapyate || 225 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe ratneśvarapraśaṃsanaṃ
nāma saptaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 67 |

|| athāṣṭaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca- śṛṇu viprendra vṛttāntaṃ tatra sambhavam |
anyacca mahāścarya mahāpātakahāri ca || 1 ||
prajananaṃ
itthaṃ kathāṃ prakurvāṇe ratneśasya ratneśasya maheśvare |
kolāhalo mahānāsīttrāta trāteti sarvataḥ || 2 |
mahiṣāsuraputro'sau samāyāti gajāsuraḥ |
pramathanpramathānsarvānnijavīryamadoddhataḥ ||3 ||
yatra yatra dharāyāṃ sa caraṇaṃ pramiṇoti hi |
acalollolayāñcakre tatra tatrāsya bhārata :
aṣṭaṣaṣṭitame'dhyāye varṇyate'tisupeśalam
gajāsuravadhākhyānaṃ mahāścaryapradaṃ nṛṇām || 1
kṛttivāseśvarotpattiṃ kathayituṃ gajāsurākhyānaṃ prastāvayati |

ūruvegena taravaḥ patanti śikharaiḥ saha |
yasya dordaṇḍaghātena cūrṇāḥ syuśca śiloccayāḥ || 5 ||
yasya maulijasaṃgharṣād ghanā vyoma tyajantyapi |
nīlimānaṃ na cādyāpi jahyuḥ tatkeśasaṃgajam || 6 ||
yasya niḥśvāsasaṃbhārairuttaraṅgā mahābdhayaḥ
nadyo'pyamandakallolā bhavanti timibhiḥ saha ||7 ||
yojanānāṃ sahasrāṇi nava nava yasya samucchrayaḥ
tāvāneva hi vistārastanormāyāvino'sya hi ||8 ||
yannetrayoḥ piṅgalimā tathā taralimā punaḥ |
vidyutā nojyate'dyāpi so'yamāyāti satvaraḥ ||9 ||
yāṃ yāṃ diśaṃ samabhyeti so'yaṃ duḥsahadānavaḥ
sā sā samībhavedasya sādhvasādiva digdhruvam digdhruvam || 10 ||
śikharaiḥ saha śiloccayāḥ parvatācūrṇāḥ syurityanvayaḥ || 5 |
maulijasaṃgharṣātkeśasaṃmardanāt || 6 ||
niḥśvāsaṃbhāraiḥ śvāsasamūhaiḥ | uttaraṅgā uccormayaḥ | timibhirjalacaraiḥ || 7 |

brahmalabdhavaraścā'yaṃ tṛṇīkṛtajagattrayaḥ |
avadhyo'haṃ bhavāmīti strīpuṃsaiḥ kāmanirjitaiḥ || 11 ||
tatastriśūlahetistamāyāntaṃ daityapuṅgavam
vijñāyā'vadhyamanyena śūlenābhijaghāna tam || 12 ||
protastena triśūlena sa ca daityo gajāsuraḥ
chatrīkṛtamivātmānaṃ manyamāno jagau haram || 13 ||
gajāsura uvāca- deveśa jāne tvāṃ smarahāriṇam
triśūlapāṇe
tava haste mama vadhaḥ śreyāneva purāntakaḥ || 14 ||
kiñcidvijñaptumicchāmi avadhehi mameritam
satyaṃ bravīmi nāsatyaṃ mṛtyuñjaya vicāraya || 15 ||

tvameko jagatāṃ vandyo viśvasyoparisaṃsthitaḥ
ahaṃ tvadupariṣṭācca sthito'smīti jitaṃ mayā || 16 ||
dhanyo'smyanugṛhīto'smi tvatriśūlāgrasaṃsthitaḥ
kālena sarvaiḥ mantavyaṃ śreyase mṛtyurīdṛśaḥ || 17 ||
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā devadevaḥ kṛpānidhiḥ
provāca prahasan śambhurghaṭodbhava gajāsuram || 18 ||
īśvara uvāca-
gajāsura prasanno'smi mahāpauruṣaśevadhe
svānukūlaṃ varaṃ brūhi dadāmi sumate'sura || 1 9 ||
gajāsura uvāca—
ityākarṇya sa daityendraḥ pratyuvāca maheśvaram
yadi prasanno digvāsastadā nityaṃ vasāna me || 20 ||
mahāpauruṣaśevadhe mahāpuruṣakārāśraya || 1 9 |
digvāsaḥ he digvasana vasāna ācchādaya paridhehītyarthaḥ || 20 ||

svapramāṇāṃ sukhasparśā raṇāṅgaṇapaṇīkṛtām || 21 ||
iṣṭagandhiḥ sadaivā'stu sadaivā'stvatikomalā
sadaiva nirmalā cā'stu sadaivā'stvatimaṇḍanam || 22 ||
mahātapo'nalajvālāḥ prāpyā'pi suciraṃ vibho
na dagdhā kṛttireṣā me puṇyagandhanidhistataḥ || 23 ||
yadi puṇyavatī naiṣā mama kṛttirdigambara |
tadā tvadaṅgasaṅgo'syāḥ kathaṃ jāto raṇāṅgaṇe
anyaṃ ca mevaraṃ dehi yadi tuṣṭo'si śaṅkara
nāmā'stu kṛttivāsāste prārabhyā'dyatanaṃ dinam || 25 ||

iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā tathetyuktvā ca śaṅkaraḥ
punaḥ provāca taṃ daityaṃ bhaktinirmalamānasam || 26 ||
īśvara uvāca-
śṛṇu puṇyanidhe daitya varamanyaṃ sudurlabham |
avimukte mahākṣetre raṇatyaktakalevara || 27 ||
idaṃ puṇyaśarīraṃ te kṣetre'smin muktisādhane
mama liṅgaṃ bhavatvatra sarveṣāṃ muktidāyakam || 28 ||
kṛttivāseśvaraṃ nāma mahāpātakanāśanam
sarveṣāmeva liṅgānāṃ śirobhūtamidaṃ varam || 2 9 ||
yāvanti santi liṅgāni vārāṇasyāṃ mahāntyapi
uttamaṃ tāvatāmetaduttamāṅgavaduttamam || 30 ||
mānavānāṃ hitāyā'tra sthāsye'haṃ saparigrahaḥ
iṣṭenā'nena liṅgena pūjitena stutena ca
kṛtakṛtyo bhavenmartyaḥ saṃsāraṃ na viśetpunaḥ || 31 ||
uttamāṅgavacchirovat || 30 ||
saparigrahaḥ - umā - gajānanādisahitaḥ || 31 ||

rudrāḥ pāśupatāḥ siddhā ṛṣayastattvacintakāḥ
śāntā dāntā jitakrodhā nirdvandvā niṣparigrahāḥ || 32 ||
avimukte sthitā ye tu mama bhaktā mumukṣavaḥ
mānāpamānayostulyāḥ samaloṣṭāśmakāñcanāḥ || 33 ||
kṛttivāseśvare liṅge sthāsye'haṃ tadanugrahe
daśakoṭisahasrāṇi tīrthāni prativāsaram || 34 ||
trikālamāgamiṣyanti kṛttivāse na saṃśayaḥ
kalidvāparasaṃbhūtā narāḥ kalmaṣabuddhayaḥ || 35 ||
sadācāravinirmuktāḥ satyaśaucaparāṅmukhāḥ |
māyayā dambhalobhābhyāṃ mohāhaṅkṛtisaṃyutāḥ || 36 |
śūdrānnasevino viprā jihvālā atilālasāḥ
sandhyāsnānajapejyāsu dūrīkṛtamanodhiyaḥ || 37 ||
kṛttivāseśvaraṃ prāpya sarvapāpavivarjitāḥ |
sukhena mokṣameṣyanti yathā sukṛtinastathā || 38 ||
kṛttivāseśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ sevyaṃ kāśyāṃ tato naraiḥ |
janmāntarasahasreṣu mokṣo s nyatra sudurlabhaḥ || 3 9 ||
rudrā ityādīnāṃ tadanugraha ityanenā'nvayaḥ | yā ete rudrādayasteṣāmanugrahe nimitte
kṛttivāseśvare sthāsyāmītyarthaḥ | tadanugrahāditi vā pāṭhaḥ || 32 ||

kṛttivāseśvare liṅge labhyastvekena janmanā
pūrvajanmakṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tapodānādibhiḥ śanai :
naśyetsadyo vinaśyeta kṛttivāseśvarekṣaṇāt ||
kṛttivāseśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ ye'rcayiṣyanti mānavāḥ
praviṣṭāste śarīre me teṣāṃ nāsti punarbhavaḥ || 41 ||
avimukte'tra vastavyaṃ japtavyaṃ śatarudriyam
kṛttivāseśvaro devo draṣṭavyaśca punaḥ punaḥ
saptakoṭimahārudraiḥ sujaptairyatphalaṃ bhavet
tatphalaṃ labhyate kāśyāṃ pūjanātkṛttivāsasaḥ
māghakṛṣṇacaturdaśyāmupoṣya niśi jāgṛyāt
kṛttivāseśamabhyarcya yaḥ sa yāyātparāṃ gatim
śuklāyāṃ pañcadaśyāṃ yaścaitryāṃ kartā mahotsavam
kṛttivāseśvare liṅge na sa garbhaṃ pravekṣyate || 45 ||
avimukte atreti vyadhikaraṇasaptamyau | atra kṛttivāsasaḥ samīpe || 42 |

gajāsurasya mahatīṃ prāvṛṇoddharidambaraḥ
mahāmahotsavo jātastasminnahani kumbhaja
kṛttivāsatvamāpede yasmindevo digambaraḥ
yatra cchatrīkṛto daityaḥ śūlamāropya bhūtale
tacchūlotpāṭanājjātaṃ tatra kuṇḍaṃ mahattaram
tasminkuṇḍe naraḥ snātvā kṛtvā ca pitṛtarpaṇam |
kṛttivāseśvaraṃ dṛṣṭvā kṛtakṛtyo naro bhavet || 4 9 ||
skanda uvāca- tasmiṃstīrthe tu yadvṛttaṃ tadagaste niśāmaya |
kākā haṃsatvamāpannāḥ tattīrthasya prabhāvataḥ || 50 ||

ekadā kṛttivāse tu caitryāṃ yātrā'bhavatpurā
annaṃ rāśīkṛtaṃ tatra hyupahārasamudbhavam || 51 ||
bahudevalakairvipra taṃ dṛṣṭvā pakṣiṇo'milan
parasparaṃ tadannārthaṃ yuddhyanto vyomavartmani || 52 ||
balipuṣṭairapuṣṭāṅgā raṭantaḥ karaṭāḥ kaṭu
balibhiścātipuṣṭāṅgairabalāścañcubhirhatāḥ || 53 ||
te hanyamānā nyapataṃstasmin kuṇḍe nabho'ṅgaṇāt |
āyu : śeṣeṇa saṃtrātā haṃsībhūtāstu vāyasāḥ || 54 ||
āścaryavantastatratyā yātrāyāṃ militā janāḥ
ūcuraṅgulinirdeśairaho paśyata- paśyata || 55 ||
caitryāṃ paurṇamāsyāmiti śeṣaḥ | upahārasamudbhavaṃ balibhiḥ samupajātam || 51 ||

dhārtarāṣṭrāstu te jātāstīrthasyā'sya prabhāvataḥ || 56 ||
haṃsatīrthaṃ tadārabhya kṛttivāsasamīpataḥ |
nāmnā khyātamabhūlloke tatkuṇḍaṃ kalaśodbhava || 57 ||
atīvamalinātmāno mahāmalinakarmabhiḥ |
kṣaṇānnirmalatāṃ yānti haṃsatīrthakṛtodakāḥ || 58 ||
kāśyāṃ sadaiva vastavyaṃ snātavyaṃ haṃsatīrthaka |
draṣṭavyaḥ kṛttivāseśaḥ prāptavyaṃ paramaṃ padam || 5 9 ||
kāśyāṃ liṅgānyanekāni mune santi pade pade |
kṛttivāseśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ sarvaliṅgaśiraḥ smṛtam || 60 |
kṛttivāsaṃ samārādhya bhaktiyuktena cetasā |
sarvaliṅgārādhanajaṃ phalaṃ kāśyāmavāpyate || 61 ||
dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ kṛṣṇacañcucaraṇairupalakṣitā haṃsāḥ | yadāhā'maraḥ - " dhārtarāṣṭrāḥ sitetaraiḥ "
iti || 56 || kṛttivāsetyakārānto vā'tra pāṭhaḥ |
kṛttivāsasamīpata ityatra visargalopa ārṣaḥ |
evamuttaratrā'pi || 57 |
kṛttivāsaṃ kṛttivāsasam || 61 ||

samīpe kṛttivāsasya kṛtaṃ sarvamanantakam || 62 ||
tīrthaṃ tvanādisaṃsiddhametat kalaśasambhava |
punardevasya sānnidhyādāvirāsīnmaheśituḥ || 63 ||
etāni siddhaliṅgāni channāni syuryuge yuge |
avāpya śambhusānnidhyaṃ punarāvirbhavanti hi || ||64 64 || ||
haṃsatīrthasya parito liṅgānāmayutaṃ mune |
pratiṣṭhitaṃ munivarairatrā'sti dviśatottaram || 65 ||
ekaikaṃ siddhidaṃ nṛṇāmavimuktanivāsinām |
liṅgaṃ kātyāyaneśādi cyavaneśāntameva hi || 66 ||
lomaśeśaṃ mahāliṅga lomaśena pratiṣṭhitam |
kṛttivāsa : pratīcyāṃ tu taddṛṣṭvā kvā'ntakādbhayam || 67 ||
mālatīśaṃ śubhaṃ liṅgaṃ kṛttivāsottare mahat |
saparyayitvā talliṅgaṃ rājā gajapatirbhavet || 68 |
saparyayitvā pūjayitvā || 68 |

atipāpo'pi niṣpāpo jāyate tadvilokanāt || 6 9 |
janakeśaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ tatpārśve jñānadaṃ param
talliṅgavarivasyāto brahmajñānamavāpyate || 70 ||
taduttare mahāmūrtirasitāṅgo'sti bhairavaḥ |
darśanataḥ puṃsāṃ puṃsāṃ na bhavedyamadarśanam || 71 ||
tasya śuṣkodarī ca tatrā'sti devī vikaṭaloṃcanā |
kṛttivāsādudīcyāṃ tu kāśīpratyūhabhakṣiṇī || 72 ||
agnijihvo'sti vetālastasyā devyāstu nairṛte |
dadāti vāñchitāṃ siddhiṃ so'rcito bhaumavāsare || 73 ||
vetālakuṇḍaṃ tatrāsti sarvavyādhivighātakṛt
tatkuṇḍodakasaṃsparśād vraṇavisphoṭarugbrajet ||74 ||
rudradisthitamaiśānyāṃ diśi sthitam | rudradeśitamiti pāṭhe'pyayamevā'rthaḥ || 6 9 ||
varivasyātaḥ pūjātaḥ || 70 ||
kṛttivāsāt kṛttivāsasaḥ || 72 ||
vetālo bhūtaviśeṣaḥ || 73 ||

labheta vāñchitāṃ siddhiṃ durlabhāṃ sarvadehibhiḥ || 75 ||
gaṇo'sti tatra dvibhujaścatuṣpāt pañcaśīrṣaka :
tasya saṃvīkṣaṇādeva pāpaṃ yāti sahasradhā || 76
taduttare mune rudrabhcatuḥśṛṅgo'sti bhīṣaṇaḥ |
tripādastu dviśīrṣā ca hastāḥ syuḥ sapta eva hi || 77 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 68 |

kāśīvighnakarā ye ca ye kāśyāṃ pāpabuddhayaḥ 78
teṣāṃ ca saṃchidāṃ kartumahaṃ dhṛtakuṭhārakaḥ
ye kāśyāṃ vighnahartāro ye kāśyāṃ dharmabuddhayaḥ || 7 9 |
sudhāghaṭakaraścā'haṃ tadvaṃśapariṣekakṛt |
taṃ dṛṣṭvā vṛṣarudraṃ vai pūjayitvā tu bhaktitaḥ || 80 ||
mahāmahopacāraiśca na vighnairabhibhūyate |
maṇipradīpo nāgo'sti tasmādrudrādudagdiśi || 81 ||
maṇikuṇḍaṃ tadagre tu viṣavyādhiharaṃ param
tasmin kuṇḍe kṛtasnānastaṃ nāgaṃ parivīkṣya ca || 82 ||
maṇimāṇikyasampūrṇagajāśvarathasaṃkulam
strīratnaputraratnaiśva samṛddhaṃ rājyamāpnuyāt || 83 ||
kṛttivāseśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kāśyāṃ yairna vilokitam
te martyaloke bhārāya bhuvo bhūtā na saṃśayaḥ || 84 ||

skanda uvāca- kṛttivāsaḥ samutpattiṃ
śroṣyantīha mānavāḥ |
talliṅgadarśanācchreyo lapsyante nātra saṃśayaḥ || 85 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe kṛttivāsaḥ samudbhavo nāmāṣṭaṣaṣṭitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 68 |

|| athaikonasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca- śṛṇvagastya taporāśe kāśyāṃ liṅgāni yāni vai |
sevitāni nṛṇāṃ muktyai bhaveyurbhāvitātmanām || 1 ||
kṛttiprāvaraṇaṃ yatra kṛtaṃ devena līlayā |
rudrāvāsa iti khyātaṃ tatsthānaṃ sarvasiddhidam || 2 ||
sthite tatromayā sārdhaṃ svecchayā kṛttivāsasi |
āgatya nandī vijñaptiṃ cakre praṇatipūrvakam || 3 |
devadeveśa viśveśa prāsādā : sumanoharāḥ |
sarvaratnamayā ramyāḥ sāṣṭā ṣaṣṭirabhūdiha || 4 ||
ekonasaptatitame'dhyāye garbhanivāsahṛt ← |
aṣṭaṣaṣṭeśca kṣetrāṇāṃ varṇyate'tra samāgamaḥ ||1
aṣṭaṣaṣṭyāyatanānāṃ kāśyāmāgamanaṃ vaktuṃ teṣāṃ mahattvākhyāpanapūrvakaṃ śrotārama-

bhūrbhuva : svastale yāni śubhānyāyatanā hi
muktidānyapi tānīha mayānītāni sarvataḥ
yato yacca ||5 ||
samānītaṃ yatra yacca kṛtāspadam
kathayiṣyāmyahaṃ nātha kṣaṇaṃ tadavadhāryatām || 6
sthāṇurnāma mahāliṅgaṃ devadevasya ||
mokṣadam
kurukṣetrādihodbhūtaṃ kalāśeṣo'sti tatra vai ||7 ||
tadagre sannihatyākhyā mahāpuṣkaraṇī śubhā
lolārkapaścime bhāge kurukṣetrasthalī tu sā ||8 ||
tatra snātaṃ hutaṃ japtaṃ taptaṃ dattaṃ śubhārthibhiḥ
kurukṣetrād bhavetsatyaṃ koṭikoṭiguṇādhikam ||9 ||
naimiṣāddevadevo'tra brahmāvartena saṃyutaḥ
tatrāṃśamātraṃ saṃsthāpya kāśyāmāvirabhūd vibho || 10 ||
avadhāryatāṃ śrūyatām || 6 ||
brahmāvartena tannāmnā kūpena || 10 ||

liṅgaṃ vai devadevākhyaṃ tadagre kūpa uttamaḥ || 11 ||
brahmāvarta iti khyātaḥ punarāvṛttihṛnṛṇām
tatkūpādbhiḥ kṛtasnāno devadevaṃ samarcya ca || 12 ||
tatpuṇyaṃ naimiṣāraṇyāt koṭikoṭiguṇaṃ smṛtam
gokarṇāyatanādatra svayamāvirabhūnmahat || 13 ||
liṅgaṃ mahābalaṃ nāma sāmbādityasapīpataḥ
darśanātsparśanādyasya kṣaṇādeno mahābalam || 14 ||
vātāhatastūlarāśiriva vidrāti dūrataḥ
kapālamocanapuro dṛṣṭvā liṅgaṃ mahābalam || 15 ||
mahābalamavāpnoti nirvāṇanagaraṃ vrajet
ṛṇamocanataḥ prācyāṃ prabhāsātkṣetrasattamāt || 16 ||
śaśibhūṣaṇasaṃjñaṃ tu liṅgamatra pratiṣṭhitam
talliṅgasevanānmartyaḥ śaśibhūṣaṇatāṃ vrajet || 17 ||
nṛṇāṃ prāṇimātrāṇām || 12 ||

prabhāsakṣetrayātrāyāḥ puṇyaṃ prāpnoti koṭikṛt
ujjayinyā mahākālaḥ svayamatrāgato vibhuḥ || 18 ||
yannāmasmaraṇādeva na bhayaṃ kalikālataḥ
praṇavākhyānmahāliṅgātprācyāṃ kalmaṣanāśanam || 1 9 ||
mahākālābhidhaṃ liṅgaṃ darśanānmokṣadaṃ param
ayogandheśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ puṣkarāttīrthasattamāt || 20 ||
āvirāsīdiha mahatpuṣkareṇa sahaiva tu 7
matsyodaryuttare bhāge dṛṣṭvā'yogandhamīśvaram || 21 ||
snātvā'yogandhakuṇḍe tu bhavāttārayate pitṝn
mahānādeśvaraṃ liṅgamaṭṭahāsādihāgatam || 22 ||
trilocanādudīcyāṃ taddṛṣṭaṃ muktaye matam
mahotkaṭeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ marutkoṭādihāgatam
kāmeśvarottare bhāge dṛṣṭaṃ vimalasiddhidam || 23 ||
ujjayinyāḥ avantyāḥ || 18 ||
kalikālataḥ kalikālābhyāmityarthaḥ || 1 9 |
aṭṭahāsātkṣetraviśeṣāt || 22 ||
marutkoṭāt āyatanaviśeṣāt || 23 ||

viśvasthānādihāyātaṃ liṅgaṃ vai vimaleśvaram
svarlīnātpaścime bhāge dṛṣṭaṃ vimalasiddhidam
mahāvrataṃ mahāliṅga mahendrādiha saṃsthitam
skandeśvarasamīpe tu mahāvrataphalapradam || 25 ||
vṛndārarṣivṛndānāṃ stuvatāṃ prathame yuge
utpannaṃ yanmahāliṅgaṃ bhūmiṃ bhittvā sudurbhidām || 26 ||
mahādeveti tairuktaṃ yanmanorathapūraṇāt
vārāṇasyāṃ mahādevastadārabhyā'bhavacca yat || 27 ||
muktikṣetraṃ kṛtaṃ yena mahāliṅgena kāśikā
avimukte mahādevaṃ yo drakṣyatyatra mānavaḥ || 28 ||
śambhuloke gamastasya yatra tatra mṛtasya hi
avimukte prayatnena tatsaṃsevyaṃ mumukṣubhiḥ || 2 9 ||
viśvasthānātsthalaviśeṣāt || 24 ||
mahendrād gireḥ || 25 |

kalpāntare'pi na tyaktaṃ kadāpyānandakānanam
yena liṅgasvarūpeṇa mahādevena sarvathā || 30 |
tatprāsādo'yamatulaḥ sarvaratnamayaḥ śubhaḥ
hiraṇyagarbhatīrthācca pratīcyāṃ kṣetrarakṣakam || 31 ||
vārāṇasyāmadhiṣṭhātrī devatā sā'bhilāṣadā
mahādeveti saṃjñā vai sarvaliṅgasvarūpiṇī || 32 ||
vārāṇasyā mahādevo dṛṣṭo yairliṅgarūpadhṛk
tena trailokyaliṅgāni dṛṣṭānīha na saṃśayaḥ || 33 ||
vārāṇasyāṃ mahādevaṃ samabhyarcya sakṛnnaraḥ
ābhūtasaṃplavaṃ yāvacchivaloke vasenmudā || 34 ||
pavitraparvaṇi sadā śrāvaṇe māsi yatnataḥ
liṅge pavitramāropya mahādevena garbhabhāk || 35 ||
ābhūtasaṃplavaṃ pralayam || 34 ||
pavitraparvaṇi śuklacaturdaśyām | pavitraṃ sūtram || 35 |

phalguprabhṛtibhistīrthaiḥ sārdhakoṭyaṣṭasaṃmitaiḥ || 36 ||
dharmeṇa yatra vai taptaṃ yugānāmayutaṃ śatam
sākṣīkṛtya mahāliṅgaṃ śrīmaddharmeśvarābhidham || 37 ||
pitāmaheśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tatrā'bhyarcya naro mudā
triḥ saptakulasaṃyukto mucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 38 |
prayāgāttīrtharājācca śūlaṭaṅko maheśvaraḥ
tīrtharājena sahitaḥ sthita āgatya vai svayam || 3 9 ||
nirvāṇamaṇḍapādramyādavācyāmatinirmalaḥ
prāsādo meruṇā yasya spardhate kāñcanojjvalaḥ || 40 ||
devenaiva varo datto yatra pūrvaṃ yugāntare
pūjyo maheśvaraḥ kāśyāṃ prathamaṃ kaluṣāpahaḥ || 41 ||
pavitraparvaṇi śuklacaturdaśyām | pavitraṃ sūtram || 36 |
ayutaṃ śataṃ daśalakṣamityarthaḥ || 37 |
maheśvaraḥ śūlaṭaṅka eva || 3 9 ||
maheśvaraḥ sa eva || 41 ||

yaḥ prayāga iha snāto namasyati maheśvaram
samabhyarcya vidhānena mahāsaṃbhāravistaraiḥ || 42 ||
prayāgasnānajātpuṇyācchūlaṭaṅkavilokanāt
sa prāpnuyānna sandehaḥ puṇyaṃ koṭiguṇottaram || 43 ||
śaṅkukarṇānmahākṣetrānmahāteja itīritam
liṅgamāvirabhūdatra mahātejovivṛddhidam || 44 ||
mahātejonidhistasya prāsādo'tīvanirmalaḥ |
jvālājaṭilitākāśo māṇikyaireva nirmitaḥ || 45 ||
talliṅgadarśanātsparśātstavanācca samarcanāt
prāpyate tatparaṃ dhāma yatra gatvā na śocate || 46 |
vināyakeśvarātpūrva mahātejasamarcanāt |
tejomayena yānena yāti māheśvaraṃ padam || 47 ||
rudrakoṭisamākhyātāttīrthātparamapāvanāt
mahāyogīśvaraṃ liṅgamāviścakre svayaṃ param || 48 ||
maheśvaraṃ tameva || 42 |
jvālājaṭilitākāśo dīptyāvṛtagaganaḥ || 45 |
dhāma sthānam || 46 |

talliṅga darśanātpuṃsāṃ koṭiliṅgaphalaṃ bhavet || 4 9 ||
tatprāsādasya parito rudrāṇāṃ koṭisaṃmitāḥ
prāsādā ramyasaṃsthānā nirmitā rudramūrtibhiḥ || 50 ||
kāśyāṃ rudrasthalī sā tu paṭhyate vedavādibhiḥ
rudrasthalyāṃ mṛtā ye vai kṛmikīṭapataṅgakāḥ kṛmikīṭapataṅgakāḥ || 51 ||
paśupakṣimṛgā martyā mlecchā vā'pyatha dīkṣitāḥ
teṣāṃ tu rudrībhūtānāṃ punarāvṛttiratra na || 52 ||
janmāntarasahasreṣu yatpāpaṃ samupārjitam |
rudrasthalīṃ praviṣṭasya sarvaṃ vrajati kṣayam || 53 |
akāmo vā sakāmo vā tiryagyonigato'pi vā
rudrasthalyāṃ tyajanprāṇān paraṃ nirvāṇamāpnuyāt || 54 ||
svayamekāmbarātkṣetrātkṛttivāsā ihāgataḥ
kṛttivāsasi liṅge'tra svayameva vyavasthitaḥ || 55 ||

asminsthāne svabhaktānāṃ sāmbaḥ sarṣigaṇo vibhuḥ
svayaṃ copadiśed brahma śrutau śrutibhirīḍitam || 56 |
kṣetre'tra siddhide prāptaścaṇḍīśo marujāṅgalāt
pracaṇḍapāpasaṃghātaṃ khaṇḍayecchatadhekṣaṇāt || 57 ||
pāśapāṇigaṇādhyakṣasamīpe yaḥ prapaśyati |
caṇḍīśvaraṃ mahāliṅgaṃ sa yāti paramāṃ gatim || 58 |
kālañjarānnīlakaṇṭhastiṣṭhedatra svayaṃ vibhuḥ |
gaṇeśāddantakūṭākhyātsamīpe bhavanāśanaḥ || 5 9 |
nīlakaṇṭheśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kāśyāṃ yaiḥ paripūjitam |
nīlakaṇṭhāsta eva syusta eva śaśibhūṣaṇāḥ || 60 |
kāśmīrādiha samprāptaṃ liṅge vijayasaṃjñitam |
sadā vijayadaṃ puṃsāṃ prācyāṃ śālakaṭaṅkaṭāt || 61 |
sāmbaḥ ambayā sahitaḥ || 56 ||
marujāṅgalātkṣetraviśeṣāt | mattajāṅgalāditi kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 57 |
kālañjarātparvatāt || 5 9 |

vijayo jāyate puṃsāṃ vijayeśasamarcanāt || 62 |
ūrdhvaretāstridaṇḍāyāḥ samprāpto'tra svayaṃ vibhuḥ
kūṣmāṇḍakaṃ gaṇādhyakṣaṃ puraskṛtya vyavasthitaḥ || 63 ||
ūrdhvā gatimavāpnoti vīkṣaṇādūrdhvaretasaḥ
ūrdhvaretasi ye bhaktā na hi teṣāmadhogatiḥ || 64 |
maṇḍaleśvarataḥ kṣetrālliṅga śrīkaṇṭhasaṃjñitam
vināyakānmaṇḍasaṃjñāduttarasyāṃ vyavasthitam || 65 ||
śrīkaṇṭhasya ca ye bhaktāḥ śrīkaṇṭhā eva te narāḥ
neha śriyā viyujyante te na paratra kadācana || 66 ||
chāgalāṇḍānmahātīrthātkapardīśvarasaṃjñitaḥ
piśācamocane tīrthe svayamāvirabhūdvibhuḥ || 67 ||
kapardīśaṃ samabhyarcya na naro nirayaṃ vrajet |
na piśācatvamāpnoti kṛtvā'trāpyaghamuttamam || 68 ||
tridaṇḍāyāḥ puryāḥ || 63 |

āmrātakeśvarāt kṣetrālliṅgaṃ sūkṣmeśasaṃjñitam |
svayamabhyāgataṃ cātra kṣetre vai śreyasāṃ pade || 6 9 |
vikaṭadvijasaṃjñasya gaṇeśasya samīpataḥ |
dṛṣṭvā sūkṣmeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ gatiṃ sūkṣmāmavāpnuyāt || 70 ||
samprāptamiha deveśaṃ jayantaṃ madhukeśvarāt |
lambodarād gaṇapateḥ purastāttadavasthitam || 71 ||
jayanteśvaramālokya snātvā gaṅgājale śubhe |
prāpnuyādvāñchitāṃ siddhiṃ sarvatra vijayī bhavet || 72 ||
prāduścakāra deveśaḥ śrīśailāttripurāntakaḥ |
śrīśailaśikharaṃ dṛṣṭvā yatphalaṃ samudīritam || 73 ||
tripurāntakamālokya tatphalaṃ helayāpyate |
viśveśātpaścime bhāge tripurāntakamīśvaram || 74 ||
sampūjya parayā bhaktyā na naro garbhamāviśet |
saumyasthānādihāyāto bhagavān kukkuṭeśvaraḥ || 75 ||
madhukeśvarātkṣetrāditi śeṣaḥ || 71 ||
prāduścakāra āvirbabhūva || 73 |
saumyasthānātkṣetraviśeṣāt || 75 ||

taddarśanādarcanācca karasthāḥ sarvasiddhayaḥ || 76 ||
jāleśvarāttriśūlī ca svayamīśaḥ samāgataḥ
kūṭadantād gaṇapateḥ purastātsarvasiddhidaḥ || 77 ||
rāmeśvarānmahākṣetrājjaṭīdevaḥ samāgataḥ
ekadantottare bhāge so'rcitaḥ sarvakāmadaḥ || 78 ||
trisandhyātkṣetrato devastryambako'sti samāgataḥ
trimukhātpūrvadigbhāge pūjitastryambakatvakṛt || 7 9 |
hareśvaro hariścandrātkṣetrādatra samāgataḥ
hariścandreśvarapuraḥ pūjito jayadaḥ sadā || 80 ||
iha śarvaḥ samāyātaḥ sthānānmadhyamakeśvarāt
caturvedeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ purodhāya vyavasthitam || 81 ||
jāleśvarātkṣetrāditi śeṣaḥ || 77 ||
rāmeśvarātsetubandhāt || 78 ||
purodhāya agrekṛtvā || 81 ||

na jātu jantupadavīṃ prāpnuyātkvā'pi mānavaḥ || 82 ||
sthaleśvarānmahāliṅga prādurbhūtaṃ paraṃ tviha
yatra yajñeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ sarvaliṅgaphalapradam || 83 ||
mahāliṅgaṃ samabhyarcya mahāśraddhāsamanvitaḥ
mahatīṃ śriyamāpnoti loke'tra ca paratra ca || 84 ||
iha liṅgaṃ sahasrākṣaṃ suvarṇākhyātsamāgatam
yasya sandarśanātpuṃsāṃ jñānacakṣuḥ prajāyate || 85 |
śaileśvarādavācyāṃ tu sahasrākṣeśvaraṃ vibhum
dṛṣṭvā janmasahasrāṇāṃ śatānāṃ pātakaṃ tyajet || 86 ||
harṣitāddharṣitaṃ cā'tra prādurāsīttamoharam I
liṅga harṣapradaṃ puṃsāṃ darśanātsparśanādapi || 87 |
sthaleśvarātsthāneśvarātkṣetrāditi śeṣaḥ | yatra sthalaśvare kṣetre yajñeśvaraṃ mahāliṅgaṃ
liṅgāntaraṃ mahāliṅgameva vā || 83 ||
suvarṇākhyātkṣetrāditi śeṣaḥ || 85 ||
avācyāṃ dakṣiṇasyām || 86 |
harṣitātkṣetrāditi śeṣaḥ || 87 |

mantreśvarasamīpe tu prāsādo harṣiteśituḥ
tadvilokanataḥ puṃsāṃ nityaṃ harṣaparamparā || 88 |
iha svayaṃ samāyāto rudro rudramahālayāt
yasya sandarśanato yānti rudraloke narāḥ sphuṭam || 8 9 ||
yaistu rudreśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kāśyāmatra samarcitam
te rudrarūpiṇo martyā vijñeyā nātra saṃśayaḥ || 9 0 ||
tripureśasamīpe tu dṛṣṭvā rudreśvaraṃ vibhum
rudrāsta iva vijñeyā jīvanto'pi mṛtā api || 9 1 ||
āgādiha mahādevo vṛṣeśo vṛṣabhadhvajāt
bāṇeśvarasya liṅgasya samīpe vṛṣadaḥ sadā || 9 2 ||
ihāgataṃ tu kedārādīśāneśvarasaṃjñitam
tadddraṣṭavyaṃ pratīcyāṃ ca liṅgaṃ prahlādakeśavāt || 9 3 |
rudramahālayātkṣetrāditi śeṣaḥ || 8 9 ||

vasedīśānanagare īśānasadṛśaprabhaḥ || 9 4 ||
bhairavādu bhairavīmūrtiratrāyātā manoharā
saṃhārabhairavo nāma draṣṭavyaḥ sa prayatnataḥ || 9 5 ||
pūjanātsarvasiddhyai sa prācyāṃ kharvavināyakāt
saṃhārabhairavaḥ kāśyāṃ saṃharedaghasantatim ||9 6 ||
ugraḥ kanakhalāttīrthādāvirāseha siddhidaḥ
tadvilokanato nṛṇāmugraṃ pāpaṃ praṇaśyati || 9 7 ||
ugraṃ liṅgaṃ sadā sevyaṃ prācyāmarkavināyakāt
atyugrā api naśyeyurupasargāstadarcanāt || 9 8 ||
vastrāpathānmahākṣetrād bhavo nāma svayaṃ vibhuḥ
bhīmacaṇḍīsamīpe tu prādurāsīdiha prabho || 99 ||
bhaveśvaraṃ samabhyarcya bhavenāvirbhavennaraḥ
prabhurbhavati sarveṣāṃ rājñāmājñākṛtāmiha || 100 ||
ugraḥ pracaṇḍaḥ || 9 7 |
bhave saṃsāre || 100 |

devadāruvanāddaṇḍī daṇḍayan pātakāvalī :
vārāṇasyāṃ samāgatya sthito liṅgākṛtirvibhuḥ || 101 ||
prācyāṃ daṇḍīśvaraḥ pūjyaḥ sadehalivināyakāt
tasyā'rcanena martyānāṃ na punarbhava īkṣyate || 102 ||
bhadrakarṇahradādatra bhadrakarṇahradānvitaḥ
śivaḥ sākṣādihāyātaḥ sarveṣāṃ śivado'rcitaḥ || 103 ||
uddaṇḍākhyād gaṇapateḥ prācyāṃ tattīrthamuttamam
bhadrakarṇahṛde snātvā'bhyarcya liṅgaṃ śivāhvayam || 104 ||
sarvatra śivamāpnoti bhadrakarṇeśapūjanāt
śṛṇuyātsarvabhūtānāṃ bhadraṃ paśyati cākṣabhiḥ || 105 ||
śaṅkaraśca hariścandrāttvatpuraḥ pratibhāsate
tatpūjanājjanānāṃ na jananījaṭhare janiḥ || 106 ||
pātakāvalīḥ pāpapaṅktīḥ || 101 ||
bhadrakarṇeśapūjanād bhadrakarṇe hṛde sthita īśo . bhadrakarṇeśastasya pūjanāt |
bhadrakarṇebhiruttamamiti pāṭhe karṇebhiḥ karṇairityarthaḥ | tathā ca mantraḥ - " bhadraṃ karṇebhiḥ
śṛṇuyāma devā bhadraṃ paśyemākṣabhiryajatrāḥ " ityādi | akṣabhitraiḥ || 105 |
tvat tvattaḥ hariścandraśivāhvayāt | taditi pāṭhe'pi sa evārthaḥ | janiḥ
janma || 106 ||

kalaśeśa iti khyātaṃ candreśātpaścimena
yamatīrthe ca || 107 ||
naraḥ snātvā mitrāvaruṇadakṣiṇe
kālaliṅga samālokya kalikālabhayaṃ kutaḥ || 108
tatra bhaumacaturdaśyāṃ yastu yātrāṃ kariṣyati ||
api pātakayuktaḥ sa yamayātrāṃ na yāsyati
naipālācca mahākṣetrādāyāt || 10 9 ||
paśupatistviha
yatra pāśupato yoga upadiṣṭaḥ pinākinā || 110 ||
bhavatā devadevena brahmādibhyo vimuktaye
tasya sandarśanādeva paśupāśairviyujyate || 111 ||
karavīrakatīrthācca kapālīśa ihāgataḥ
kapālamocane tīrthe draṣṭavyaḥ sa prayatnataḥ || 112 ||
tadvilokanamātreṇa brahmahatyā vilīyate
umāpatirdevikāyā ihāgatya vyavasthitaḥ || 113 ||
paścimeneti na tṛtīyā ; kintu paścimāyāṃ diśītyasminnarthe taddhito'yaṃ pratyayo'vyaya-

liṅge maheśvarakṣetrādiha dīpteśasaṃjñitam || 114 ||
upomāpati tiṣṭheta dīptyai ceha paratra ca
bhuktimuktipradaṃ liṅgaṃ dīpteśaṃ kāśimadhyagam || 115 ||
kāyārohaṇataḥ kṣetrādācāryo nakulīśvaraḥ
śiṣyaiḥ parivṛtastiṣṭhenmahāpāśupatavrataiḥ || 116 ||
dakṣiṇe hi mahādevāddṛṣṭo jñānaṃ prayacchati
ajñānaṃ nāśayetkṣipraṃ garbhasaṃsṛtihetukam || 117 ||
gaṅgāsāgarataścāyādamareśa itīritam
liṅga yaddarśanādeva nā'maratvaṃ hi durlabham || 118 ||
saptagodāvarītīrthāddivo bhīmeśvaraḥ prabhuḥ
prakāśate liṅgarūpī bhuktyai muktyai nṛṇāmiha || 11 9 ||
nakulīśātpurobhāge dṛṣṭvā bhīmeśvaraṃ prabhum
mahābhīmāni pāpāni praṇaśyanti hi tatkṣaṇāt || 120 ||
maheśvarakṣetrātkailāsāt || 114 ||
upomāpati umāpateḥ samīpe || 115 ||

bhīmeśāddakṣiṇe bhāge tadabhyarcya prayatnataḥ || 121 ||
samyak pāśupatādyogādabhyastāttva samāḥ śatam
yatprāpyate phalaṃ tatsyād bhasmagātravilokanāt || 122 ||
nakulīśvarato devaḥ svayambhūriti viśrutaḥ
ātmanā prakaṭībhūtaḥ kāśyāṃ liṅgākṛtirharaḥ || 123 ||
svayambhuliṅgaṃ sampūjya snātvā siddhihṛde naraḥ
mahālakṣmīśvarapuro na bhūyo janmabhāgbhavet || 124 ||
prayāgatīrthanikaṣā prāsādo vidrumaprabhaḥ |
vārāhasya mahāneṣa dharaṇīnāmna eva eva hi hi || 125 ||
vindhyaparvatataḥ prāpto devaṃ śrutvā samāgatam |
sagaṇaṃ sarṣidevaṃ ca mandarādratnakandarāt || 126 ||
kāśyāṃ dharaṇivārāho draṣṭavyaḥ saprayatnataḥ
āpatsamudrasaṃmagnamuddhareccharaṇāgatam || 127 ||
prayāgatīrthanikaṣā prayāgatīrthasamīpe | vārāhasya sūkarākṛteḥ | vārāṇasyāmiti
kvacitpāṭhaḥ || 125 ||
mandarāt samāgataṃ śrutvetyanvayaḥ || 126 |

samaryo'yaṃ gadāhasta upasargasahasrahṛt || 128 ||
tasmāddharaṇivārāhātpratīcyāṃ diśi saṃsthitam
pūjayitvā gaṇādhyakṣaṃ gāṇapatyapadaṃ labhet || 12 9 |
hemakūṭādvirūpākṣaṃ liṅgamatrāvirāsa ha
maheśvarādavācyāṃ ca dṛṣṭaṃ saṃsāratārakam || 130 |
gaṅgādvārāddhimastheśaṃ liṅga himasamaprabham |
brahmanālātpratīcyāṃ ca draṣṭavyamiha siddhidam || 131 |
gaṇādhipaśca kailāsād gaṇā anye mahābalāḥ
kailāsādreḥ samāyātāḥ saptakoṭimitāḥ prabho || 132 |
durgāṇi tai : kṛtānīha saptasvargasamāni ca
sadvārāṇi sayantrāṇi kapāṭavikaṭāni ca || 133 |
karṇikāraprasūnaruk drumotpalapuṣpakāntiḥ || 128 ||
hemakūṭātparvatāt || 130 ||
sayantrāṇi auṣadhiprayuktanikṣipyamānaśilādyastraviśeṣasahitāni | kapāṭavikaṭāni
kapāṭairviṣamāṇi sakapāṭaviṭāni ceti pāṭhe viṭāḥ pāṣāṇaguḍakāḥ || 133 |

koṭikoṭibhaṭāṭyāni sarvarddhisahitānyapi
suvarṇarūpyatāmmaiśca kāṃsyarītikasīsakaiḥ || 134 ||
ayaskāntena kāntāni dṛḍhānyabhraṃlihānyapi
tataḥ śailaṃ mahādurgaṃ taiḥ kāśīparitaḥ kṛtam || 135 ||
parikhā'pi kṛtā nimnā matsyodaryā jalāvilā
matsyodarī dvidhā jātā bahirantaścarā punaḥ || 136 ||
tacca tīrthaṃ mahatkhyātaṃ militaṃ gāṅgavāribhiḥ
yadā saṃhāramārgeṇa gaṅgāmbhaḥ prasarediha || 137 ||
tadā matsyodarītīrthaṃ labhyate puṇyagauravāt
sūryācandramasoḥ parva tadā koṭiguṇaṃ śatam || 138 ||
sarvaparvāṇi tatraiva sarvatīrthāni tatra
tatraiva sarvaliṅgāni gaṅgāmatsyodarī yataḥ || 13 9 ||
koṭikoṭibhaṭānāmaparimitayodhānāmāṭyamaṭanaṃ yeṣu tāni , tathā | bhaṭāḍhyānīti

kṛtapiṇḍapradānāste na māturudareśayāḥ || 140 ||
avimuktamidaṃ kṣetraṃ matsyākāratvamāpnuyāt 141 |
paritaḥ svardhunīvāri saṃsāri parivīkṣyate ||
matsyodaryāṃ kṛtasnānā ye narāste narottamāḥ
kṛtvā'pi bahupāpāni nekṣante bhāskareḥ purīm || 142 |
kiṃ snātvā bahutīrtheṣu kiṃ taptvā duṣkaraṃ tapaḥ
yadi matsyodarī snātā kuto garbhabhayaṃ tataḥ || 143 ||
hi liṅgāni nṛdevarṣikṛtānyapi |
yatra tatra yatra matsyodarīṃ prāpya susnāto mokṣabhājanam || 144 ||
yatra kutrāpi yadā kadā'pītyarthaḥ || 140 ||
avimuktamiti | matsyākāratvamāpnuyāt | kadetyākāṅkṣāyāmāha | parita iti |
saṃsāri saṃsaraṇaśīlam || 141 ||
tataḥ tadā || 143 |
tatretyatra vīpsā jñeyā || 144 ||

santi tīrthānyanekāni bhūrbhuva : svargatānyapi |
na samāni paraṃ tāni koṭyaṃśenā'pi niścitam || 145 |
itthaṃ tīrthaṃ kṛtaṃ kṛtaṃ tena vibho kailāsavāsinā
gaṇādhipena sumahatsumahodārakarmaṇā || 146 ||
bhūrbhuva : saṃjñakaṃ liṅga parvatād gandhamādanāt
svayamāvirabhūdatra tasmātprācyāṃ gaṇādhipāt || 147 |
vilokyaṃ bhūrbhuvaṃ liṅgaṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svarmahaḥ pare |
nivasanti janāḥ puṇyāḥ suciraṃ divyabhoginaḥ || 148 ||
hāṭakeśaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ bhogavatyā samāyutam
saptapātālatalata ihāyātaṃ svayaṃ vibho || 14 9 |
śeṣavāsukimukhyaiśca tatprāsādo mahāniha |
maṇimāṇikyaratnaughairniramāyi prayatnataḥ || 150 ||
gaṇādhipena saptakoṭipena || 146 ||
bhūrbhuvaḥ svarmahaḥ pare bhūrādīnāṃ lokānāmupari || 148 ||
bhogavatyā pātālagaṅgayā || 14 9 ||
niramāyi nirmitaḥ || 150 ||

īśāneśvarataḥ prācyāṃ pūjanīyaṃ prayatnataḥ || 151 ||
bhaktito'bhyarcya talliṅgaṃ naraḥ sarvasamṛddhimān
bhuktvā bhogānasaṃkhyātānante nirvāṇamṛcchati || 152 |
ākāśāttārakālliṅgaṃ jyotīrūpamihāgatam
jñānavāpyāḥ purobhāge talliṅgaṃ tārakeśvaram || 153 ||
tārakaṃ jñānamāpyeta talliṅgasya samarcanāt
jñānavāpyāṃ naraḥ snātvā tārakeśaṃ vilokya ca || 154 ||
kṛtasandhyādiniyamaḥ paritarpya pitāmahān
dhṛtamaunavrato dhīmān yāvalliṅgavilokanam || 155 ||
mucyate sarvapāpebhyaḥ puṇyaṃ prāpnoti śāśvatam
prānte ca tārakaṃ jñānaṃ yasmājjñānādvimucyate || 156 ||
tārakāttārālokāt || 153 ||
yāvalliṅgavilokanaṃ karotīti śeṣaḥ | tāvatsarvapāpebhyo mucyate || 155 |
yasmājjñānānmucyate taṃttārakaṃ jñānaṃ prānte antakāle prāpnoti || 156 |

kirātācca kirāteśa iha cāvirbabhūva ha
kirātarūpo bhagavān yatra devo'bhavatpurā || 157 ||
tatkirāteśvaraṃ liṅga bhārabhūteśvarādanu
namaskṛtya naro jātu na māturudare śayaḥ || 158 ||
laṅkāpuryā : samāgacchan marukeśvarasaṃjñakam
liṅgaṃ yadarcanātpuṃsāṃ na bhayaṃ rakṣasāṃ bhavet || 15 9 ||
nairṛtyāṃ diśi talliṅgaṃ nairṛteśvarasaṃjñakam
paulastyarāghavātpaścātpūjitaṃ sarvaduṣṭahṛt || 160 ||
puṇyaṃ jalapriyaṃ liṅgaṃ jalaliṅga sthalādapi
āyātaṃ tacca gaṅgāyā jalamadhye vyavasthitam || 161 |
tatprāsādo'dbhutataro madhyegaṅga nirīkṣyate
sarvadhātumayaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ sarvaratnamayaḥ śubhaḥ || 162 ||

adyā'pi dṛśyate tīrthātkoṭīśvarādapi || 163 ||
śreṣṭhaṃ liṅgamihāyātaṃ nirīkṣaṇāt |
koṭiliṅgekṣaṇe puṇyaṃ talliṅgasya
jyeṣṭheśvarātpaścācchreṣṭhasiddhipradāyakam || 164 |
śreṣṭhaṃ samudbhūtaṃ liṅgamatrānaleśvaram |
vaḍavā syāt sarvasiddhidam || 165 |
naleśvarapurobhāge pūjitaṃ
virajastīrthāddevadevastrilocanaḥ |
āgatya tvanādisaṃsiddhe hyavatasthe triviṣṭape || 166 ||
liṅge sarveṣāṃ tārakaprade |
puṇye pilipilātīrthe
āviścakre svayaṃ deva oṅkāro'marakaṇṭakāt || 167 ||
tadādyaṃ tārakakṣetraṃ yadā gaṅgā na cāgatā |
yadaivāvirabhūtkāśī trailokyoddharaṇāya vai || 168 |
koṭīśvarātsthānāditi śeṣaḥ || 163 ||
vaḍavā syāt vaḍavānalā syādityarthaḥ || 165 |
virajastīrthaṃ jājapurasthanābhigayāsthaṃ yatra virajākhyā caṇḍikā tasmāt || 166 |
amarakaṇṭakāt mālavadeśāntargatarevatīrasthāt || 167 ||
tārakakṣetraṃ tārakaḥ praṇavaḥ , sa eva kṣetram upalabdhisthānaṃ yasya tattathā || 168 |

tadoṅkṛtimahalliṅga svayamāvirabhūttataḥ
mahimānaṃ na tasyā'nyaḥ parivetti vibhorṛte || 16 9 ||
etānyāyatanānīśa ānināya mahānti ca
śeṣayitvāṃśamātraṃ ca tasminkṣetre nije nije || 170 ||
ihāyātāni puṇyāni sarvabhāvena nānyathā |
prāsādāḥ sarvataścaiṣāṃ ramyā abhraṃlihā vibho || 171 ||
bahudhātumayāścitrāḥ sarvaratnasamujjvalāḥ
yeṣāṃ kalaśamātrasya darśanānmuktirāpyate || 172 ||
śrutvā'pi nāma caiteṣāṃ liṅgānāṃ surasattama
api janmasahasrotthāḥ kṣīyante pāparāśayaḥ || 173 ||

skanda uvāca- śrutveti nandino vākyaṃ devadeveśvaro haraḥ |
śraddhāprasādyaśailādimidaṃ provāca kumbhaja || 175 ||
śrīdevadeva uvāca- nandin sadānandavidhāyaka |
sādhūkṛtaṃ tvayā caṇḍīrvyāpārayā'dhunā || 176 |
vidhehi me nideśaṃ ca hi |
navakoṭyastu cāmuṇḍā yā yatra nivasanti
svadevatābhiḥ sahitā bhūtavetālabhairavaiḥ || 177 |
tāḥ purīrakṣaṇārthāya savāhanabalāyudhāḥ |
pratidurgaṃ durgarūpāḥ paritaḥ parivāsaya || 178 ||
skanda uvāca- nandinaṃ saṃnideśyeti mṛḍānyā sahito mṛḍaḥ |
yayau traiviṣṭapaṃ kṣetraṃ muktibījaprarohaṇam || 17 9 |
śilādatanayo'pyaiśīṃ mūrddhanyājñāṃ vidhāya ca |
āhūya sarvato durgā : pratidurgaṃ nyaveśayat || 180 ||
śraddhāprasādyaśailādiṃ śraddhayā prasādyaḥ śraddhāprasādyaḥ , sa cāsau śailādiśca tam | mudā
prasādyeti kvacitpāṭhastadā spaṣṭa evārthaḥ || 175 ||
aiśīm īśasambandhinīm || 180 ||

niśamyā'dhyāyametaṃ ca puṇyāyatanagarbhiṇam |
naraḥ svargāpavargau ca prāpnuyācchraddhayā kramāt || 181 ||
śrutvā'ṣṭaṣaṣṭimetāṃ vai mahāyatanasaṃśrayām |
na jātu praviśenmartyo jananyā jāṭharīṃ darīm || 182 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe'ṣṭaṣaṣṭyāyatanasamāgamo
nāmaikonasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 6 9 |
darīṃ kandarām || 182 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtayāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekonasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 6 9 ||

|| atha saptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca- kathaya nandinā viśvanandinā |
kātyāyaneya
yathā vyāpārito devyo devadevanideśataḥ || 1 ||
avimuktasya rakṣārthaṃ yatra yā devatāḥ sthitāḥ
prasādaṃ kuru me deva tāḥ samācakṣva tattvataḥ ||2 ||
ityagastyuditaṃ śrutvā mahādevatanūdbhavaḥ |
kathayāmāsa yā yatra sthitā''nandavane mudā || 3 ||
skanda uvāca - viśālākṣī kṣetrasya parameṣṭadā
vārāṇasyāṃ
viśālatīrthaṃ gaṅgāyāṃ kṛtvā pṛṣṭhe vyavasthitā
adhyāye saptatitame mahāpāpāpahe nṛṇām |
devatānāmadhiṣṭhānaṃ varṇyate'tisukhāvaham || 1 ||
sādhūkṛtaṃ tvayā nandinnityādinā viśveśena caṇḍīḥ parivāsayetyuktamatastāsāṃ
parivasatiṃ śrotuṃ kārtikeyamabhyarthayati | kātyāyaneyeti | kātyāyanī bhavānī , tasyā
apatyaṃ kātyāyaneyastatsambodhanaṃ tathā || 1 ||
agastiśabdo'pyasti || 3 ||

snātvā viśālatīrthe vai viśālākṣīṃ praṇamya ca
viśālāṃ labhate lakṣmīṃ paratreha ca śarmadām || 5 ||
bhādrakṛṣṇatṛtīyāyāmupoṣaṇaparairnṛbhiḥ
kṛtvā jāgaraṇaṃ rātrau viśālākṣīsamīpataḥ || 6 |
prātarbhojyāḥ prayatnena caturdaśakumārikāḥ |
alaṅkṛtā yathāśaktyā sragambaravibhūṣaṇaiḥ || 7 ||
vidhāya pāraṇaṃ paścātputrabhṛtyasamanvitaiḥ |
samyagvārāṇasīvāsaphalaṃ labhyeta kumbhaja || 8 |
tasyāṃ tithau mahāyātrā kāryā kṣetranivāsibhiḥ
upasargapraśāntyarthaṃ nirvāṇakamalāptaye || 9 ||
vārāṇasyāṃ viśālākṣī pūjanīyā prayatnataḥ
dhūpairdīpaiḥ śubhairmālyairupahārairmanoharaiḥ || 10 ||
maṇimuktādyalaṅkārairvicitrollocacāmaraiḥ
śubhairanupabhuktaiśva dukūlairgandhavāsitaiḥ || 11 ||
samanvitaiḥ sahitaiḥ || 8 |

mokṣalakṣmīsamṛddhyarthaṃ yatra kutra nivāsibhi :
atyalpamapi yaddattaṃ viśālākṣyai narottamaiḥ || 12 ||
tadānantyāya jāyeta muna lokadvaye'pi hi
viśālākṣīmahāpīṭhe dattaṃ japtaṃ hutaṃ stutam || 13 ||
mokṣastasya parīpāko nātra kāryā vicāraṇā
viśālākṣīsamarcāto rūpasampattiyukpatiḥ || 14 ||
prāpyate'tra kumārībhirguṇaśīlādyalaṅkataḥ
gurviṇībhi : sutanayo vandhyābhirgarbhasambhavaḥ || 15 |
asau bhāgyavatībhiśca saubhāgyaṃ mahadāpyate
vidhavābhirna vaidhavyaṃ punarjanmāntare kvacit || 16 ||
sīmantinībhiḥ puṃbhirvā paraṃ nirvāṇamicchubhiḥ
śrutā dṛṣṭā'rcitā kāśyāṃ viśālakṣyabhilāṣadā || 17 ||
tato'nyallalitātīrthaṃ gaṅgākeśavasannidhau
tatrā'sti lalitā devī kṣetrarakṣākarī parā || 18 ||
atyalpamapītyatra pūrvā'piśabdasya pūrveṇa sambandhaḥ || 12 |
pīṭhaṃ sthānam || 13 |
parīpākaḥ phalam || 14 ||
atra kāśyām | jagatīti vā | śīlam ācāraḥ || 15 ||

sā ca pūjyā prayatnena sarvasampatsamṛddhaye |
lalitāpūjakānāṃ ca jātu vighno na jāyate || 1 9 ||
iṣe kṛṣṇadvitīyāyāṃ lalitāṃ paripūjya vai
nārī vā puruṣo vā'pi labhate vāñchitaṃ padam || 20 ||
snātvā ca lalitātīrthe lalitāṃ praṇipatya vai
labhetsarvatra lālityaṃ yadvā tadvā'nulāpya ca || 21 ||
mune viśvabhujā gaurī viśālākṣīpura : sthitā
saṃharantī mahāvighnaṃ kṣetrabhaktijuṣāṃ sadā || 22 ||
śāradaṃ navarātraṃ ca kāryā yātrā prayatnataḥ
devyā viśvabhujāyā vai sarvakāmasamṛddhaye || 23 ||
yo na viśvabhujāṃ devīṃ vārāṇasyāṃ namennaraḥ
kuto mahopasargebhyastasya śāntirdurātmanaḥ || 24 ||
iṣe āśvine || 20 |

yaistu viśvabhujā devī vārāṇasyāṃ stutā'rcitā |
na hi tān vighnasaṃghāto bādhate sukṛtātmanaḥ || 25 ||
anyā'sti kāśyāṃ vārāhī kratuvārāhasannidhau
tāṃ praṇamya naro bhaktyā vipadabdhau na majjati || 26 ||
śivadūtī tu tatraiva draṣṭavyā''padvināśinī
ānandavanarakṣārthamudyacchūlāritarjanī || 27 ||
vajra hastā tathā caindrī gajarājarathāsthitā
indreśāddakṣiṇe bhāge'rcitā sampatkarī sadā || 28 ||
skandeśvarasamīpe tu kaumārī barhiyānagā
prekṣaṇīyā prayatnena mahāphalasamṛddhaye || 2 9 ||
maheśvarāddakṣiṇato devī māheśvarī naraiḥ
vṛṣayānavatī pūjyā mahāvṛṣasamṛddhidā || 30 ||
aritarjanī śatrubhartsanī || 27 |
gajarājarathāsthitā gajarāja airāvataḥ sa eva rathastatrāsthitā || 28 ||

nirvāṇanarasiṃhasya samīpe mokṣakāṅkṣibhiḥ
nārasiṃhī samarcyā ca samudyaccakraramyadoḥ || 31 ||
haṃsayānavatī brāhmī brahmeśātpaścime sthitā
galatkamaṇḍalujalaculakā tāḍitāhitā || || 32 ||
brahmavidyāprabodhārthaṃ kāśyāṃ pūjyā dine dine
brāhmaṇairyatibhirnityaṃ nijatattvāvabodhibhiḥ || 33 ||
śārṅgacāpavinirmuktamaheṣubhiritastataḥ
utsādayantī pratyūhān kāśyāṃ nārāyaṇīṃ śrayet || 34 ||
pratīcyāṃ gopigovindād bhrāmyaccakroccatarjanīm
nārāyaṇīṃ yaḥ praṇamettasya kāśyāṃ mahodayaḥ || 35 ||
samudyaccakraramyadoḥ samyaguccalatsudarśanamanoharahastā || 31 ||
galatkamaṇḍalujalaculakā tāḍitāhitā kṣaratkuṇḍīvārigaṇḍūṣapātitavipakṣā || 32 |
nijatattvaṃ brahmātmatattvam || 33 ||
bhrāmyaccakroccatarjanīṃ bhrāmyaccakraṃ yasyā uccaṃ tarjanaṃ duṣṭān prati yasyāḥ sā ca
sā ca bhrāmyaccakreṇa uccā tarjanī tarjanyākhyā aṅguliryasyāḥ , sā . tatheti
vā || 35 ||

tato gaurī virūpākṣīṃ devayānyā udagdiśi
pūjayitvā naro bhaktyā vāñchitāṃ labhate śriyam || 36 |
śaileśvarī samabhyarcyā śaileśvarasamīpagā
tarjayantī tarjanyā saṃsargamupasargajam || 37 ||
ca vicitraphalade nṛṇām
citrakūpe naraḥ snātvā
citragupteśvaraṃ vīkṣya citraghaṇṭāṃ prapūjya ca || 38 ||
bahupātakayukto'pi tyaktadharmapatho'pi vā
na citraguptalekhyaḥ syāccitraghaṇṭā'rcako naraḥ || 3 9 |
yoṣidvā puruṣo vā'pi citraghaṇṭāṃ na yo'rcayet
kāśyāṃ vighnasahasrāṇi taṃ sevante pade pade || 40 ||
caitraśukla tṛtīyāyāṃ kāryā yātrā prayatnataḥ
mahāmahotsavaḥ kāryo niśi jāgaraṇaṃ tathā || 41 ||
devayānī kāvyasutā || 36 ||

mahāpūjopakaraṇaiścitraghaṇṭāṃ samarcya ca |
śṛṇoti nā'ntakasyeha ghaṇṭāṃ mahiṣakaṇṭhagām || 42 ||
citrāṅgadeśvaraprācyāṃ citragrīvāṃ praṇamya ca |
na jātu janturvīkṣeta vicitrāṃ yamayātanām || 43 ||
bhadrakālīṃ naro dṛṣṭvā nā'bhadraṃ paśyati kvacit |
bhadranāgasya purato bhadravāpyāṃ kṛtodakaḥ || 44 |
harasiddhiṃ prayatnena pūjayitvā narottamaḥ |
mahāsiddhimavāpnoti prācyāṃ siddhivināyakāt || 45 ||
vidhiṃ sampūjya vidhivadvividhairupahārakaiḥ |
vividhāṃ labhate siddhiṃ vidhīśvarasamīpagām || 46 ||
prayāgatīrthe susnāto jano nigaḍabhañjanīm
sabhājayitvā no jātu nigaḍaiḥ paribādhyate || 47 ||
bhaumavāre sadā pūjyā devī nigaḍabhañjanī
kṛtvaikabhuktaṃ bhaktyā'tra bandīmokṣaṇakāmyayā
nigaḍo lohaśṛṃkhalam | sabhājayitvā pūjayitvā || 46 ||

pūjayitvā naro bhaktyā devatāmamṛteśvarīm |
amṛtatvaṃ bhajedeva tatpādāmbujasevanāt || 54 ||
dhārayantīṃ mahāmāyāmamṛtasya kamaṇḍalum |

trilokasundarī gaurī tatrā'rcyā'bhīṣṭadāyinī || 60 ||
trilokasundarī siddhiṃ dadyāttrailokyasundarīm | |
vaidhavyaṃ nā''pyate kvā'pi tasyā devyāḥ samarcanāt || 61 || ||
dīptā nāma mahāśaktiḥ sāmbādityasamīpagā |
dedīpyamānalakṣmīkā jāyante tatsamarcanāt || 62 ||
śrīkaṇṭhasannidhau devī mahālakṣmīrjagajjaniḥ |
snātvā śrīkuṇḍatīrthe tu samarcyā jagadambikā || 63 ||
pitṝn santarpya vidhivattīrthe śrīkuṇḍasaṃjñite |
datvā dānāni vidhivanna lakṣmyā parimucyate || 64 ||
lakṣmīkṣetraṃ mahāpīṭhaṃ sādhakasyaiva siddhidam |

mahālakṣmyaṣṭamīṃ prāpya tatra yātrākṛtāṃ nṛṇām
sampūjiteha vidhivat padmā sadma na muñcati || 67 ||
uttare tu mahālakṣmyā hayakaṇṭhī kuṭhāradhṛk
kāśīvighnamahāvṛkṣāṃśchinatti prativāsaram || 68 ||
kaumaśaktirmahālakṣmīrdakṣiṇe pāśapāṇikā
badhnāti vighnasaṃghātaṃ kṣetrasyā'sya pratikṣaṇam || 6 9 ||
sā pūjitā stutā martyaiḥ kṣetrasiddhiṃ prayacchati
vāyavyāṃ ca śikhīcaṇḍī kṣetrarakṣākarī parā || 70 ||
khādantī vighnasaṃghātaṃ śikhīśabdaṃ karoti ca
tasyāḥ sandarśanātpuṃsāṃ naśyanti vyādhayo'khilāḥ || 71 ||
bhīmacaṇḍyuttaradvāraṃ sadā rakṣedatandritā |
bhīmeśvarasya purataḥ pāśamudgaradhāriṇīm || 72 ||
bhīmacaṇḍīṃ naro dṛṣṭvā bhīmakuṇḍe kṛtodakaḥ
bhīmākṛtīnna vai paśyedyāmyān dūtān kvacitkṛtī ||73 ||
chāgavaktreśvarī devī dakṣiṇe vṛṣabhadhvajāt
aharniśaṃ bhakṣayati vighnaughatarupallavān
pallavān patrāṇi kṣudraśākhā vā || 74 ||

ataśchāgeśvarīṃ devīṃ mahāṣṭamyāṃ prapūjayet
tālajaṅgheśvarī devī tālavṛkṣakṛtāyudhā
utsādayati vighnaughānānandavanamadhyagān || 76 ||
saṅgameśvaraliṅgasya dakṣiṇe dakṣiṇe vikaṭānanām
tālajaṅgheśvarīṃ natvā na vighnairabhibhūyate || 77 |
uddālakeśvarālliṅgāttīrtha uddālakā'bhidhe
yāmyāṃ ca yamadaṃṣṭrākhyā carvayedvighnasaṃhatim || 78 ||
praṇatā yamadaṃṣṭrā yaistīrthe coddālakā'bhidhe
kṛtvā'pi pāpasaṃghātaṃ na yamādvibhyatīha te || 7 9 ||
dārukeśvaratīrthe tu dārukeśasamīpataḥ
pātālatāluvadanāmākāśoṣṭhīṃ dharādharām || 80 ||
kapālakatrīhastāṃ ca brahmāṇḍakavalapriyām
śuṣkodarīṃ snāyubaddhāṃ dharmamuṇḍeti viśrutām || 81 ||
mahāṣṭamyāmāśvinaśuklāyām || 75 ||
vighnasaṃhatiṃ vighnasamūham || 78 ||
ākāśoṣṭhīmākāśordhvoṣṭhīmityarthaḥ | dharādharāṃ pṛthvyadharoṣṭhāmityarthaḥ || 80 |
kartrī churikā | snāyunaddhāṃ snāyvāvasayāmāṃsaprabhavadhātuviśeṣeṇeti yāvat | naddhāṃ

kṣetrasya pūrvadigbhāgaṃ rakṣantī vighnasaṃghataḥ
lasatsahasradordaṇḍāṃ jvalatkekaravīkṣaṇām || 82 ||
pārāvāraprasṛmarahastanyastārimodakām
dvīpikṛttiparīdhānāṃ kaṭukāṭṭāṭṭahāsinīm || 83 ||
mṛṇālanālavattīvraṃ carvantīmasthi carvantīmasthi pāpinaḥ
śūlāgraprotadurvṛttakṣetradrohikalevarām || 84 ||
kapālamālābharaṇāṃ mahābhīṣaṇarūpiṇīm
carmamuṇḍāṃ naro natvā kṣetravighnairna bādhyate || 85 |
yathaiva carmamuṇḍaiṣā mahāruṇḍā'pi tādṛśī
etāvāneva bhedo'syā ruṇḍasragbhūṣaṇā tviyam || 86 ||
kṣetrarakṣāṃ prakuruta ubhe devyau mahābale
hasantyau karatālībhiranyo'nyaṃ doḥ prasāraṇāt || 87 ||

mahāruṇḍā pracaṇḍā''syā tiṣṭhate bhaktavighnahṛt || 88 |
carmamuṇḍā mahāruṇḍā kathite ye tu devate
tayorantaratastiṣṭheccāmuṇḍā muṇḍarūpiṇī || 8 9 ||
etāstisraḥ prayatnena pūjyā kṣetranivāsibhiḥ
dhanadhānyapradāścaitāḥ putrapautrapradā imāḥ || 9 0 ||
upasargā na mūrdhnanti dadyurnaiḥśreyasīṃ śriyam
smṛtā dṛṣṭā natāḥ spṛṣṭāḥ pūjitāḥ śraddhayā naraiḥ || 9 1 ||
mahāruṇḍāpratīcyāṃ ca devī svapneśvarī śubhā
bhaviṣyaṃ kathayetsvapne bhaktasyā'gre śubhāśubham || 9 2 |
tatra svapneśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ devīṃ svapneśvarīṃ tathā
snātvā'sisaṅgame puṇye yasminkasmiṃstithāvapi || 9 3 ||
upoṣaṇaparo dhīmānnārī vā puruṣo'pi vā
sampūjya sthaṇḍilaśayaḥ svapne bhāvi vilokayet || 9 4 |
adyā'pi pratyayastatra kārya eṣa vijānatā
bhūtaṃ bhāvi bhavatsarvaṃ vadetsvapneśvarī niśi || 9 5 ||
muṇḍaiḥ kṛtvā rūpaṃ vartate yasyāḥ sā muṇḍarūpiṇī | caṇḍarūpiṇīti kvacit || 8 9 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 70 ||

aṣṭamyāṃ ca caturdaśyāṃ navamyāṃ niśi vā divā
prayatnataḥ samarcyā sā kāśyāṃ jñānārthibhirnaraiḥ || 9 6 ||
svapneśvaryāśca vāruṇyāṃ durgādevī vyavasthitā
kṣetrasya dakṣiṇaṃ bhāgaṃ sā sadaivā'bhirakṣati || 9 7 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe devatā'dhiṣṭhānaṃ nāma saptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 70 ||

|| athaikasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya kathaṃ uvāca- durgeti vai nāma devyā jātamumāsuta |
kathaṃ ca kāśyāṃ sā sevyā samācakṣveti māmiha || 1 |
skanda uvāca kathayāmi - mahābuddhe yathā kalaśasambhava
durgā nāmā'bhavaddevyā yathā sevyā ca sādhakaiḥ || 2 ||
durge nāma mahādaityo rurudaityāṃ gajo'bhavat |
yaśca taptvā tapastīvraṃ puṃbhyo jeyatvamāptavān || 3 ||
tatastenā'khilā lokā bhūrbhuvaḥ svarmukhā api
svasātkṛtā vinijjitya raṇe svabhujasārataḥ
athaikasaptatitame'dhyāye'tyantamanorame |
durganāmno'surendrasya varṇyate'tiparākramaḥ | 1 |
pūrvā'dhyāyānte durgādevī vyavasthitetyuktaṃ tatra pṛcchati | kathaṃ durgetīti || 1 |
yacetyatra yata iti pāṭhe prathamāntāttasil || 3 ||
svasātkṛtā ātmādhīnāḥ kṛtāḥ | svabhujasārataḥ svīyahastabalena || 4 |

svayamindraḥ svayaṃ vāyuḥ svayaṃ candraḥ svayaṃ yamaḥ
svayamagniḥ svayaṃ pāśī dhanado'bhūtsvayaṃ balī ||5 ||
svayamīśānarudrārkavasūnāṃ padamādade |
tatsādhvasādvimuktāni tapāṃsyatitapasvibhiḥ ||6 ||
na vedādhyayanaṃ cakrurbrāhmaṇāstadbhayārditāḥ
yajñavāṭā vinirdhvastāstadbhaṭairatiduḥsahaiḥ ||7 ||
vidhvastā bahuśa : sādhvyastairamārgakṛtāspadaiḥ
prasabhaṃ ca parasvāni apahṛtya durāsadāḥ || 8 |
abhokṣiṣurdurācārāḥ krūrakarmaparigrahāḥ |
nadyo vimārgagā āsan jvalanti na tathā'gnayaḥ || 9 ||
jyotīṃṣi na pradīpyanti tadbhayākulitānyaho
digvadhūvasanānyāsan vicchāyāni samantataḥ || 10 ||
svayamīśānetyatra tathā nirṛtīti kvacit | tapāṃsyatītyatra tapāṃsyapīti
kvacit || 6 |
yajñavāṭā yajñasthānāni || 7 |
amārgakṛtāspadaiḥ pākhaṇḍamārgakṛtāśrayaiḥ | amārgakṛtādarairiti kvacit | prasabhaṃ

dharmakriyā viluptāśca pravṛttāḥ sukṛtetarāḥ
jaladībhūya vavṛṣurnijalīlayā || 11 |
ta eva tadbhayāt sūte tvanuptāpi vasundharā
sasyāni jātāstaravo'pyavakeśinaḥ
sadaiva phalino || 12 ||
bandīkṛtāḥ surarṣīṇāṃ patnyastenā'tidarpiṇa
divaukasaḥ kṛtāstena samastāḥ kānanaukasaḥ || 13 ||
martyā amartyān svagṛhaṃ prāptānapi bhayārditāḥ
api saṃbhāṣamātreṇa nārcayanti vipajjuṣaḥ || 14 ||
skanda uvāca- kaulīnyaṃ na sadvṛttaṃ mahattvāya prakalpate
na padaṃ śreyaḥ padabhraṃśo hi lāghavam || 15 |
ekameva
sukṛtetarā adhamāḥ || 11 || yadāhā'maraḥ-

vipadyapi hi te dhanyā na ye dainyapraṇoditāḥ |
dhanairmalinacittānāmālabhante'ṅgaṇaṃ kvacit || 16 ||
pañcatvameva hi varaṃ loke lāghavavarjitam |
nāmaratvamapi śreyo lāghavena samanvitam || 17 ||
ta eva loke jīvanti puṇyabhājasta eva vai |
vipadyapi na gāṃbhīryaṃ yacceto'bdhiḥ parityajet || 18 |
kadācitsampadudayaḥ kadācidvipadudgamaḥ |
daivāddvayamapi prāpya dhīro dhairyaṃ na hāpayet || 1 9 |
udayānudayau prājñairdraṣṭavyau puṣpavantayoḥ |
sadaikarūpatā'tyājyā harṣāharṣo tato'dhuvau || 20 ||
tasmādvipadyapi āpatkāle'pi ye dainyapreritā dhanairmalinacittānām aṅgaṇaṃ prāṅgaṇaṃ
kvacitkadācidapi ye nālabhante na prāpnuvanti , te dhanyā iti || 16 ||
' tarhi maraṇameva prāptaṃ tatrāha | pañcatvameveti || 17 ||
kiñca ta eveti || 18 |
kiñca sampadvipadudgamayoḥ kādācitkatvāt tadubhayaṃ labdhvā sthiratāṃ na

yastvāpadaṃ samāsādya naṣṭaṃ tasmāddainyaṃ vivarjayet || 21 ||
tasya lokadvayaṃ ca |
āpadyapi hi ye dhīrā iha loke paratra
punaḥ spṛśedāpattaddhairyeṇāvadhīritā || 22 ||
na tān punaḥ maheśaṃ śaraṇaṃ gatāḥ |
bhraṣṭarājyāśca vibudhā
sarvajñena tato devī preritā'suramardane || 23 ||
māheśvarīṃ samāsādya bhavānyājñāṃ prahṛṣṭavat |
amartyāyā'bhayaṃ datvā samarāyopacakrame || 24 |
kālarātrīṃ samāhūya kāntyā trailokyasundarīm |
preṣayāmāsa rudrāṇīṃ tamāhvātuṃ suraham || 25 ||
kālarātrī samāsādya taṃ daityaṃ duṣṭaceṣṭitam |
uvāca daityādhipate tyaja trailokyasampadam || 26 ||

trilokīṃ labhatāmindrastvaṃ tu yāhi rasātalam
pravartantāṃ kriyāḥ sarvā vedoktā vedavādinām || 27 ||
atha ced garvaleśo'sti tadā yāhi samājaye
athavā jīvitākāṅkṣī tadindraṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja || 28 ||
iṃti vaktuṃ mahādevyā mahāmaṅgalarūpayā
tvadantikaṃ preṣitā'haṃ mṛtyuste tadupekṣayā || 2 9 ||
ato yaducitaṃ karttuṃ tadvidhehi mahāsura
paraṃ hitaṃ cecchṛṇuyājjīvagrāhaṃ tato tato vraja vraja || 30 ||
ityākarṇyavaco devyā mahākālyāḥ sa daityarāṭ
prajajvāla tadā krodhād gṛhyatāṃ gṛhyatāmiyam || 31 ||
samājaye samyagyuddhāya | raṇāya vā iti kvacit || 28 ||
rūpayetyatra pūrayeti kvacit | tadupekṣayā tasyā vacasa upekṣayā | mṛtyuste talpā-
dābjajeti pāṭhe ahaṃ viśeṣaṇam | mṛtyurmṛtyuheturityarthaḥ | tu iti pāṭhe te
ityarthāt || 2 9 |
jīvagrāhaṃ jīvanagrahaṇaṃ yathā bhavati tathā vraja viśveśvaryāḥ śaraṇāpanno bhavetyarthaḥ |
hitamityasya viśeṣaṇaṃ vā || 30 ||
mahākālyāḥ kālarātryāḥ || 31 ||

trailokyamohinī hyeṣā prāptā madbhāgyagauravaiḥ |
trailokyarājyasampattivallyāḥ phalamidaṃ mahat || 32 |
etadarthaṃ hi devarṣinṛpā bandīkṛtā bandīkṛtā mayā
anāyāsena me prāptā gṛhameṣā śubhodayāt || 33 ||
avaśyaṃ yasya yogyaṃ yattattasyehopatiṣṭhate
araṇye vā gṛhe vā'pi yato bhāgyasya gauravāt
antaḥpuracarā etāṃ nayantvantaḥpuraṃ mahat |
anayā sadalaṅkṛkṛtyā mama rāṣṭramalaṅkṛtam || 35 ||
aho mahodayaścādya mahodayaścādya jāto mama mahāmateḥ
kevalaṃ na mamaikasya sarvadaityānvayasya ca || 36 ||
nṛtyantu pitaraścādya modantāṃ bāndhavāḥ sukham
mṛtyuḥ kālo'ntako devāḥ prāpnuvantvadya me bhayam || 37 ||

iti yāvatsamāyātāstāṃ netuṃ sauvidallakāḥ |
tāvattayā kālarātryā pratyukto daityapuṅgavaḥ || 38 |
kālarātryuvāca—
daityarāja mahāprājña naitadyuktaṃ bhavādṛśām |
vayaṃ dūtya : paravā rājanītividuttama || 3 9 ||
alpo'pi dūtasambādhāṃ na vidadhyāt kadācana |
kiṃ punarye bhavādṛkṣā mahānto balino'dhipāḥ || 40 |
dūtīṣu ko'nurāgo'yaṃ mahārājālpikāsviha |
anāyāsena ca vayamāyāsyāmastadāgamāt || 41 ||
vijitya samare tāntu svāminīṃ mama daityapa |
mādṛśīnāṃ sahasrāṇi paribhuṅkṣva yathecchayā || 42 ||
adyaiva te mahāsaukhyaṃ bhāvitasyāvilokanāt |
bāndhavānāṃ sukhaṃ te'dya bhavitā saha pūrvajaiḥ || 43 ||
yadāhā'maraḥ– " sauvidallāḥ kañcukinaḥ sthāpatyāḥ sauvidāśca te ' iti | svārthe kaḥ | puṅgavaḥ
śreṣṭhaḥ || 38 ||

sampatsyante'dya
ca mugdhā ca tasyāstrātā na kaścana
abalā sarvarūpamayī sā caiva tāṃ bhavān draṣṭumarhati
hi darśayiṣyāmi yatra sā'sti jagatkhaniḥ || 45 ||
ahaṃ kāmo bhaviṣyati
dhṛtāyāmapi caikasyāṃ kaste
ahaṃ te sannidhiṃ naiva tyakṣyāmyadya dināvadhi
tato nivārayaitān māmāditsūn sauvidallakān
śrutvā vacastasyāḥ sa kāmakrodhamohitaḥ
iti dūtīṃ mṛtyorivāsuraḥ
tāmeva bahvamaṃstaikāṃ
śuddhāntarakṣiṇaścaitāṃ śuddhāntaṃ prāpayaṃ tvaram
iti tena samādiṣṭāḥ sarve varṣavarā mune
tāṃ dhartumudyamaṃ cakrurbalena balavattarāḥ
abalā balahīnā strīti yāvat | vastutastvasya viṣṇoriva balaṃ yasyāḥ | na
vidyate balaṃ yasyāḥ sarvātiśayabaletyartha iti vā | mugdhā mūḍhā vastutastu
sundarī || 44 || dṛṣṭvā kāmaḥ trilokīṃ labhatāmindra ityādi

sā tān bhasmīcakārā''śu huṅkārajanitā'gninā
tato daityapatiḥ kruddho dṛṣṭvā tān bhasmasātkṛtān || 50 ||
kṣaṇenaiva tayā dūtyā daityāṃstryayutasaṃmitān |
dṛśā vyāpārayāmāsa durdharaṃ durmukhaṃ kharam || 51 ||
sīrapāṇiṃ pāśapāṇiṃ surendradamanaṃ hanum
yajñāriṃ khaḍgalomānamugrāsyaṃ devakampanam || 52 ||
baddhvā pāśairimāṃ duṣṭāmānayantvā''śu dānavāḥ
vidhvastakeśaveśāṃ ca visrastāmbarabhūṣaṇām || 53 ||
iti daityādhipādeśādurdharapramukhāstataḥ |
pāśāsimudgaradharāstāmādātuṃ kṛtodyamāḥ || 54 ||
girīndraguruvarmāṇaḥ śastrāstrodyatapāṇayaḥ
digantaṃ te pariprāptāstaducchvāsānilāhatāḥ || 55 ||
śuddhāntarakṣiṇo'ntaḥpurapālinaḥ | yadāhā'maraḥ stryagāraṃ bhūbhujāmantaḥpuraṃ syādavarodhanam |
śuddhāntaścāvarodhaśceti " | aram alam | varṣavarāḥ ṣaṇḍhāḥ chinnavṛṣaṇā iti yāvat |
yadāhā'maraḥ - ' ṣaṇḍho varṣavaraḥ ' iti || 4 9 |
tryayutasaṃmitān triṃśatsahasrasaṃkhyākān | dṛśā netreṇa kaṭākṣeṇeti yāvat | teṣāṃ
evamāpātato .dṛśā jñāpya paścādvacanenā'pyājñāpayati | baddhvā pāśairiti ślokena |
visrastakeśaveśāmunmuktakabarām | yadāhā'maraḥ – ' kabarī keśaveśo'theti | keśapāśāmiti
pāṭhe'pi sa evā'rthaḥ || 53 ||

teṣūḍḍīneṣu daityeṣu śatakoṭimiteṣu ca
sā tu kālarātrirnabho'dhvagā || 56 |
nirjagāma tataḥ viniryāntīmanujagmurmahāsurāḥ |
tatastāṃ tu rodasī || 57 ||
koṭikoṭisahasrāṇi pūrayitvā tu
durgā nāma mahādaityaḥ śatakoṃṭirathāvṛtaḥ |
gajānāmarbudaśatadvayena parivāritaḥ || 58 ||
koṭyarbudena sahito hayānāṃ vātaraṃhasām
padātibhirasaṃkhyātaiḥ paccūrṇitaśiloccayaiḥ || 5 9 ||
udāyudhairmahābhīmaiḥ kṛtatrijagatībhayaiḥ |
sametaḥ sa mahādaityoṃ durga : kruddho viniryayau || 60 ||
atha dṛṣṭvā mahādevīṃ vindhyācalakṛtālayām
āgatya kālarātryā ca niveditatadāgasam || 61 ||
rodasī dyāvābhūmyorantaram || 57 || viniryayāviti

mahābhujasahasrāḍhyāṃ mahātejo'bhibṛṃhitām
tattadghorapraharaṇāṃ raṇakautukasādarām || 62 ||
prodyaccandrasahasrāṃśunirmārjitaśubhānanām
lāvaṇyavārdhinirgacchaccañcaccandraikacandrikām || 63 ||
mahāmāṇikyanicayarociḥkhacitavigrahām
trailokyaramyanagarīsuprakāśapradīpikām
haranetrāgninirdagdhakāmabījā tu vīrudham
lasatsaundaryasambhārajaganmohamahauṣadhim || 65 ||
viṣameṣuśarairbhinnahṛdayo daityapuṅgavaḥ |
ādiṣṭavān mahāsainyanāyakānugraśāsanaḥ || 66 ||
tattadityatra udyaditi kvacit || 62 ||

ayi jambha mahādaṃṣṭra mahāhano || 67 ||
lambodara mahākāya mahogrātyugravigraha
piṅgākṣa mahiṣagrīva
krodhanākranda saṃkrandana mahābhaya || 68 |
krūrākṣa jitāntaka mahābāho mahāvastra mahīdhara
dundubhe dundubhikha mahādundubhināsika || 6 9 ||
ugrāsya dīrghadaśana meghakeśa vṛkānana
siṃhāsya sūkaramukha śivārāva mahotkaṭa || 70 ||
śukatuṇḍa pracaṇḍāsya bhīmākṣa kṣudramānasa
ulūkanetra kaṅkāsya kākatuṇḍa karālavāk || 71 ||
dīrghagrīva mahājaṅgha kramelakaśirodhara
raktabindo japānetra vidyujjihvāgnitāpana || 72 ||
dhūmrākṣa dhūmani : śvāsa caṇḍa caṇḍāṃśutāpana
mahābhīṣaṇamukhyāśca śṛṇvantvājñāṃ mamādarāt || 73 ||
bhavatsveteṣu cānyeṣu ya etāṃ vindhyavāsinīm
dhṛtyā''neṣyati buddhyā vā balenāpi chalena vā
ayi jambhetyādinetyākarṣṇetyataḥ prāktanena granthena || 67 ||
dhṛtyā dhairyeṇa sāmneti yāvat | buddhyā dākṣiṇyena dānena vā balena daṇḍena chalena
bhedena | sāmadāmadaṇḍabhedopāyacatuṣṭayenetyarthaḥ | dhṛtvāneṣyatīti kvacit || 74 ||

tasyā'hamindrapadavīmadya dāsyāmyasaṃśayam |
dṛṣṭvaitāṃ sundarīmadya mano me vyākulaṃ bhavet || 75 ||
yāntu kṣipraṃ na yāvanme pañceṣuśarapīḍitam |
mano vihvalatāṃ gacchedetatprāpterabhāvataḥ || 76 |
ityākarṇya vacastasya durgasya danujeśituḥ |
procuḥ sarve tadā daityāḥ prabaddhakarasampuṭāḥ || 77 ||
avadhehi mahārāja kimetatkarma duṣkaram |
anāthāyāstathaikasyā abalāyā viśeṣataḥ || 78 |
asyā ānayane ko'yaṃ mahāyatnavidhiḥ prabho |
ko'smān pralayakālāgnimahājvālāvalīsamān || 7 9 ||

yadyādeśo bhavedadya tadendraṃ samarudgaṇam || 80 |
sāntaḥpuraṃ samānīya kṣipnumastvatpadāgrataḥ |
svaridaṃ sarvaṃ tvadājñāvaśavartitam || 81 |
bhūrbhuvaḥ maharjanastapaḥsatyalokāstvadadhikāriṇaḥ
tatrāpyasādhyaṃ nā'smākaṃ tvannideśānmahāsura || 82 ||
vaikuṇṭhanāyako nityaṃ tvadājñāparipālakaḥ |
yāni ramyāṇi ratnāni tāni sampreṣayanmudā || 83 ||
asmābhireva saṃtyaktaḥ kailāsādhipatiḥ sa vai
viṣāśī cātini : svatvād bhasmakṛttyahibhūṣaṇaḥ
vaikuṇṭhanāyakaḥ vikuṇṭhā śubhrasya patnī tasyāmutpanno vaikuṇṭhastena nirmito loko'pi
vaikuṇṭhastasya nāyako viṣṇurityarthaḥ | taduktaṃ bhāgavate-
patnī vikuṇṭhā śubhrasya vaikuṇṭhaiḥ surasattamaiḥ |
tasyāṃ sakalayā jajñe vaikuṇṭho bhagavān svayam |
vaikuṇṭhaḥ kalpito yena loko lokanamaskṛtaḥ |
ramayā prārthyamānena devyā tatpriyakāmyayā || iti |
