tasya kvacidbhayaṃ nāsti vajrapañjaragasya hi || 70 |
adya prabhṛti me nāma durgeti khyātimeṣyati |
durgadaityasya samare pātanādatidurgamāt || 71 ||

durgāstutiriyaṃ puṇyā vajrapañjarasaṃjñikā || 72
anayā kavacaṃ kṛtvā mā bibhetu ||
bhūtapretapiśācāśca yamādapi
śākinī - ḍākinīgaṇāḥ ||73 ||
jhoṭiṅgā rākṣasāḥ krūrā viṣasarpāgnidasyavaḥ
vetālāścāpi kaṅkālagrahā bālagrahā api
vātapittādijanitāstathā ca viṣamajvarāḥ
dūrādeva palāyante śrutvā stutimimāṃ śubhām || 75 ||
vajrapañjaranāmaitatstotraṃ durgāpraśaṃsanam
etatstotrakṛtatrāṇe vajrādapi bhayaṃ na hi || 76 ||
aṣṭajaptena cā'nena yo'bhimantrya jalaṃ pibet
tasyodaragatā pīḍā kvāpi no saṃbhaviṣyati || 77 ||
garbhapīḍā tu no jātu bhaviṣyatyabhimantraṇāt
bālānāṃ paramā śāntiretatstotrāmbupānataḥ || 78 ||
mā bibhetu bhayaṃ mā karotu | śākinīḍākinyau duṣṭagrahaviśeṣau || 73 |

etāstu śaktayaḥ sarvāḥ sarvatra sahitā mayā || 7 9 ||
rakṣāṃ parikariṣyanti madbhaktānāṃ mamājñayā
iti datvā varān devī devebhyo'ntarhitā tadā
te s pi svargaukasaḥ sarve svaṃ svaṃ svargaṃ yayurmadā || 80 ||
skanda itthaṃ uvāca- durgā'bhavannāma tayā devyā mahāmune |
kāśyāṃ sevyā yathā sā ca tacchṛṇuṣva vadāmi te || 81 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ ca caturdaśyāṃ bhaumavāre viśeṣataḥ
sampūjyā satataṃ kāśyāṃ durgā durgatināśinī || 82 ||
navarātraṃ prayatnena pratyahaṃ sā samarcitā
nāśayiṣyati vighnaughān sumatiṃ ca pradāsyati || 83 ||
mahāpūjopahāraiśca mahābalinivedanaiḥ
dāsyatyabhīṣṭadā siddhiṃ durgā kāśyāṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 84 ||

śāradaṃ navarātraṃ ca sakuṭumbaiḥ śubhārthibhiḥ
yo na sāṃvatsarīṃ yātrāṃ durgāyāḥ || 85 |
kāśyāṃ kurute kudhīḥ
vighnasahasrāṇi tasya syuśca pade pade || 86 ||
durgākuṇḍe naraḥ snātvā sarvadurgārtihāriṇīm
durgāṃ sampūjya vidhivannavajanmāghamutsṛjet || 87 |
sā durgā śaktibhiḥ sārdhaṃ kāśīṃ rakṣati sarvataḥ
tāḥ prayatnena sampūjyāḥ kālarātrimukhā naraiḥ || 88 |
rakṣanti kṣetrametadvai tathā'nyā navaśaktayaḥ
upasargasahasrebhyastā vai digdevatāḥ kramāt || 8 9 ||
śatanetrā sahasrāsyā tathā'yutabhujā parā
aśvārūḍhā gajāsyā ca tvaritā śavavāhinī || 9 0 ||
viśvā saubhāgyagaurī ca sṛṣṭāḥ prācyādimadhyataḥ I
etā yatnena sampūjyāḥ kṣetrarakṣaṇadevatāḥ || 9 1 ||
śāradaṃ tadeva || 85 |
kālarātrimukhāḥ kālarātripradhānāḥ || 88 |
tvaritā vegavattarā || 9 0 ||
sṛṣṭāni sṛṣṭā niyuktā iti yāvat | devyā iti śeṣaḥ | sṛṣṭyeti pāṭhe

rakṣanti satataṃ kāśīṃ nirvāṇaśrīniketanam || 9 2 ||
ruruścaṇḍo'sitāṅgaśca kapālī krodhanastathā
unmattabhairavastadvat kramātsaṃhārabhīṣaṇau || 9 3 ||
catuḥṣaṣṭistu vetālā mahābhīṣaṇamūrtayaḥ
' ruṇḍamuṇḍasrajaḥ sarve kartrīk͟harparapāṇayaḥ || 9 4 ||
śvavāhanā raktamukhā mahādaṃṣṭrā mahābhujāḥ
nagnā vimuktakeśāśca pramattā rudhirāsavaiḥ || 9 5 ||
nānārūpadharāḥ sarve nānāśastrāstrapāṇayaḥ
tadākāraiśca tadbhṛtyaiḥ koṭiśaḥ parivāritāḥ || 9 6 ||
vidyujjihvo lalajjihnaḥ krūrāsyaḥ krūralocanaḥ |
ugro vikaṭadaṃṣṭraśca vakrāsyo vakranāsikaḥ || 9 7 ||
jambhako jṛmbhaṇamukho jvālānetro vṛkodaraḥ I
gartanetro mahānetrastucchanetro'ntramaṇḍanaḥ || 9 8 ||
nivārṇaśrīniketanaṃ kaivalyasya ramyaṃ sthānaṃ kaivalyalakṣmyā niketanamiti vā || 9 2 ||
kramāt prācyādikramāt || 9 3 |
ruṇḍamuṇḍasrajaḥ kabandhaśiromālāḥ || 9 4 |
rudhirāsavaiḥ rudhirāṇyeva āsavā madyāni taiḥ || 9 5 ||
koṭiśo rudhirāśanā iti kvacit | koṭiśo'parimitāḥ || 9 6 ||

mahānāso lambakarṇaḥ karṇaprāvaraṇo'nasaḥ || 99 ||
ityādayo mune kṣetraṃ durvṛttarudhirapriyāḥ |
trāsayanto durācārān rakṣanti paritaḥ sadā || 100 |
trailokyavijayādyāśca jvālāmukhyantagāśca yāḥ
śaktayo'tra mayā khyātā mune kalaśasaṃbhava || 101 ||
tāḥ kāśīṃ parirakṣanti caturdikṣūdyatāyudhāḥ |
tāḥ samayaḥ prayatnena mahāvighnapraśāntaye || 102 ||
bhairavā rurumukhyāśca mahābhayanivārakāḥ
sampūjyāḥ sarvadā kāśyāṃ sarvasampattihetavaḥ || 103 ||
vidyujjihvaprabhṛtayo vetālā ugrarūpiṇaḥ
atyugrānapi vighnaughān hariṣyantyarcitā iha || 104 ||
tathā bhūtāvalī cātra nānābhīṣaṇarūpiṇī
udāyudhā'vati purīṃ śatakoṭimitā mune mune || 105 ||
vikaṭadaṃṣṭra , vakramukha , vakranāsika , jaṃbhaka , jṛṃbhaṇamukha , jvālānetra , vṛkodara , gartanetra , mahānetra ,
tucchanetra , aṃtramaṃḍana , jvalatkeśa , kaṃbuśirā , kharvagrīva , mahāhanu , mahānāsa , laṃbakarṇa ,
karṇaprāvaraṇa aura anasa - ityādi durvṛtta aura rudhirapriya cauṃsaṭha vetāla , durācārī

etā vai devatāḥ pūjyāḥ kāśyāṃ nirvāṇakāṅkṣibhiḥ || 106 |
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ naro durgajayā'bhidham |
nānāśaktisamāyuktaṃ durgamāśu tariṣyati || 107 |
ya ete bhairavāḥ proktā ye vetālā udāhṛtāḥ |
teṣāṃ nāmāni cākarṇya naro vighnairna dūyate || 108 |
adṛṣṭā api api te bhūtā etadākhyānapāṭhakam |
rakṣiṣyanti prayatnena saha śrotṛjanena ca || 10 9 ||
tasmātsarvaprayatnena kāśībhaktiparairnaraiḥ |
śrotavyamidamākhyānaṃ mahāvighnanivāraṇam || 110 |
gṛhe'pi yasya likhitametatsthāsyati pūjitam |
tasyā''padāṃ sahasrāṇi nāśayiṣyanti devatāḥ || 111 |
pade pade kṣaṇe kṣaṇe || 106 ||
durgaṃ saṅkaṭam || 107 |

śrotavyamidamākhyānaṃ |
vajrapañjarasaṃnibham || 112 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe durgāvijayo nāma dvisaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 72 ||
guruṃ mahāntam || 11.2 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ dvisaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 72 ||

|| atha trisaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca- devadevaḥ ṣaḍānana
trilocanaṃ samāsādya tadvada
jagadambikayā yuktaḥ kiṃ cakārā''śu || 1 |
skanda uvāca - kalaśajā''khyāmi yatpṛṣṭaṃ tanniśāmaya
mune yatproktaṃ sarvasiddhidam
virajaḥsaṃjñakaṃ pīṭhaṃ ||2 ||
tatpīṭhadarśanādeva virajā jāyate naraḥ
yatrāsti tanmahāliṅgaṃ vārāṇasyāṃ trilocanam ||3 ||
tīrthaṃ pilipilākhyaṃ tadyunadyambhasi viśrutam
sarvatīrthamayaṃ tīrthaṃ tatkāśyāṃ parigīyate
trisaptatitame'dhyāye śrīmadoṅkāravarṇanam |
kriyate'tīva pāpaghnaṃ mahāścaryapradaṃ nṛṇām || 1 |
nandinaṃ sanniveśyeti mṛḍānyā sahito mṛḍaḥ mṛḍaḥ |
yayau traiviṣṭapaṃ kṣetraṃ muktibījaprarohaṇam ||

sasaritparvatāraṇyāḥ santi te tatra yanmune || 5 |
tadārabhya ca tattīrthaṃ tacca liṅgaṃ trilocanam
triviṣṭapamiti khyātamato hetormahattaram || 6 ||
triviṣṭapasya liṅgasya mahimoktaḥ pinākinā
jagajjananyāḥ purato yathā vacmi tathā mune || 7 ||
devyuvāca--
devadeva jagannātha śarva sarvada sarvaga |
sarvadṛk sarvajanaka kiñcit pṛcchāmi tadvada || 8 ||
idaṃ tava priyaṃ kṣetraṃ karmabījamahauṣadham |
naiḥśreyasyāḥ śriyo gehaṃ mamā'pi prītidaṃ mahat || 9 ||
viṣṭapatritaye bhuvanatrayamadhye | tatreti tīrthaliṅgayorniruktiḥ | yadyataḥ || 5 |
mahattaraṃ śreṣṭhatamaṃ ca | pāṭhāntaraṃ | spaṣṭam || 6 |
sarvopakārārthamajñeva pṛcchati | devadeveti navabhiḥ | devadeveti sambodhanāni

tasyā'khilasya mahimā viṣvakkenā'vagamyate || 10 ||
yānīha santi liṅgāni tāni sarvāṇyasaṃśayam
nirvāṇakāraṇānyeva svayaṃbhūnyapi tānyapi || 11 |
yadyapyevaṃ tathāpīśa viśeṣaṃ vaktumarhasi |
kāśyāmanādisiddhāni kāni liṅgāni śaṅkara || 12 ||
yatra devaḥ sadā tiṣṭhet saṃvarte'pi savallabhaḥ
yairiyaṃ prathitiṃ prāptā kāśī muktipurīti ca || 13 ||
yeṣāṃ smaraṇato'pyatra bhavetpāpasya saṃkṣayaḥ
darśanasparśanābhyāṃ ca ca syātāṃ syātāṃ svargāpavargakau
yeṣāṃ samarcanādeva madhye janma sakṛd vibho I
liṅgāni pūjitāni syuḥ kāśyāṃ sarvāṇi niścitam || 15 ||

etadācakṣva me śambho pādayoḥ praṇatāsmyaham || 16 ||
ityākarṇya maheśānastasyā devyāḥ subhāṣitam
kathayāmāsa vindhyāre mahāliṅgāni sattama || 17 ||
yannāmākarṇanādeva kṣīyante pāparāśayaḥ
prāpyate puṇyasaṃbhāraḥ kāśyāṃ nirvāṇakāraṇam || 18 ||
devadeva uvāca-
śṛṇu devi paraṃ guhyaṃ kṣetre'smin muktikāraṇam |
idaṃ vidanti naivā'pi brahmanārāyaṇādayaḥ || 1 9 |
asaṃkhyātāni liṅgāni pārvatyānandakānane
sthūlānyapi ca sūkṣmāṇi nānāratnamayāni ca || 20 ||
nānādhātumayānīśe dārṣadānyapyanekaśaḥ
svayambhūnyapyanekāni devarṣisthāpitānyaho || 21 ||
siddhacāraṇagandharvayakṣarakṣo'rcitānyapi
asuroragamartyaiśca dānavairapsarogaṇaiḥ || 22 ||
agastyasya vindhyā'ritvaṃ tadvṛddhivighātakatvājjñeyam || 17 ||
asaṃkhyātāni liṅgānītyādīnāṃ pūjyānīti ṣaṣṭhenā'nvayaḥ || 20 ||
karake āpa yaha batā deveṃ , maiṃ āpake caraṇoṃ para praṇata hū~ || 15-16 |

patatripramukhairdevi svasvanāmāṅkitāni vai || 23 ||
pratiṣṭhitāni yānīha muktihetūni tānyapi
adṛśyānyapi dṛśyāni duravasthānyapi priye || 24 ||
bhagnānyapi ca kālena tāni pūjyāni sundari
parārdhaśatasaṃkhyāni gaṇitānyekadā mayā || 25 ||
gaṅgāmbhasyapi tiṣṭhanti ṣaṣṭikoṭimitāni hi
siddhaliṅgāni tānīśe tiṣye'dṛśyatvamāyayuḥ || 26 ||
gaṇanādivasādarvāṅ mama bhaktajanaiḥ priye
pratiṣṭhitāni yānīha teṣāṃ saṃkhyā na vidyate || 27 ||
tvayā tu yāni pṛṣṭāni yairidaṃ kṣetramuttamam |
tāni liṅgāni vakṣyāmi mukti hetūni sundari || 28 ||

paraṃ teṣāṃ prabhāvo yaḥ svaṃ svaṃ sthānaṃ na hāsyati
kalikalmaṣapuṣṭā || 2 9 ||
ye ye duṣṭā nāstikāḥ śaṭhāḥ
eteṣāṃ siddhaliṅgānāṃ jñāsyantyākhyāmapīha na || 30 ||
nāmaśravaṇato'pīha yalliṅgānāṃ śubhānane
vṛjināni kṣayaṃ yānti vardhante puṇyarāśayaḥ || 31 ||
oṃkāraḥ prathamaṃ liṅgaṃ dvitīyaṃ ca trilocanam |
tṛtīyaśca mahādevaḥ kṛttivāsāścaturthakam || 32 ||
ratneśaḥ pañcamaṃ liṅgaṃ ṣaṣṭhaṃ candreśvarā'bhidham |
kedāraḥ saptamaṃ liṅgaṃ dharmeśaścāṣṭamaṃ priye || 33 ||
vīreśvaraṃ ca navamaṃ kāmeśaṃ daśamaṃ viduḥ |
viśvakarmeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ śubhamekādaśaṃ param || 34 ||
dvādaśaṃ maṇikarṇīśamavimuktaṃ trayodaśam |
caturdaśaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ mama viśveśvarā'bhidham || 35 ||
priye caturdaśaitāni śriyo hetūni sundari |
eteṣāṃ samavāyo'yaṃ muktikṣetramiheritam || 36 ||
na hāsyati na tyakṣyati || 2 9 ||
puṣṭāḥ sthūlā vyāptā vā || 30 ||
samavāyaḥ samāhāro melanamiti yāvat || 36 |

ārādhitāḥ prayacchanti nṛbhyo naiḥśreyasīṃ śriyam || 37 ||
ānandakānane muktyai proktānyetāni sundari
priye caturdaśejyāni mahāliṅgāni dehinām || 38 |
pratimāsaṃ samārabhya tithiṃ pratipadaṃ śubhām
eteṣāṃ liṅgamukhyānāṃ kāryā yātrā prayatnataḥ || 3 9 ||
anārādhya mahādevameṣu liṅgeṣu kumbhaja
kaḥ kāśyāṃ mokṣamāpnoti satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ punaḥ
tasmātsarvaprayatnena kāśīphalamabhīpsubhiḥ
pūjyānyetāni liṅgāni bhaktyā paramayā mune
agastya uvāca- etānyeva kimanyāni mahāliṅgāni ṣaṇmukha
nirvāṇakāraṇānīha yadi santi tadā vada || 42 ||
naiḥśreyasīṃ kaivalyākhyām || 37 ||
pratimāsamiti skandoktiḥ || 3 9 ||

ca santīha mahāliṅgāni suvrata
kaliprabhāvāda guptāni bhaviṣyantyeva tāni vai || 43 ||
yasyeśvare sadā bhaktiḥ yaḥ kāśītattvavittamaḥ
sa evaitāni liṅgāni vetsyatyanyo na kaścana
yeṣāṃ nāmagrahaṇādapi kalikalmaṣasaṃkṣayaḥ
amṛteśastārakeśo jñāneśa : karuṇeśvaraḥ || 45 ||
mokṣadvāreśvaraścaiva svargadvāreśvarastathā
brahmeśo lāṅgalaścaiva vṛddhakāleśvarastathā
vṛṣeśaścaiva caṇḍīśo nandikeśo maheśvaraḥ
jyotīrūpeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ khyātamatra caturdaśam
kāśyāṃ caturdaśaitāni mahāliṅgāni sundari
imāni muktihetūni liṅgānyānandakānane || 48 ||
kalikalmaṣabuddhīnāṃ nākhyeyāni kadācana
etānyārādhayedyastu liṅgānīha caturdaśa || 4 9 ||
pārvatyā īśvaroktānyevā'nyāni caturdaśaliṅgānyāhā'mṛteśa iti || 45 |

na kāśīkośo'yamatulo na prakāśyo yatastataḥ || 50 ||
etalliṅgā'bhidhā devi mahāpadyapi du : khahṛt
rahasyaṃ paramaṃ caitat kṣetrasyā'sya varānane || 51 ||
caturdaśā'pi liṅgāni matsānnidhyakarāṇi hi
avimuktasya hṛdayametadeva girīndraje || 52 |
imāni yāni liṅgāni sarveṣāṃ muktidāni hi
ekaikabhuvanasyeha sāramādāya sarvataḥ |
mayaitāni kṛtānyeva mahābhaktikṛpāvaśāt || 53 ||
asmin kṣetre dhruvaṃ muktiriti yā prathitiḥ priye
kāraṇaṃ tatra liṅgāni mamaitāni caturdaśa || 54 ||
ta eva vratinaḥ kānte ta eva ca tapasvinaḥ |
dhyātānyetāni yairbhaktairliṅgānyānandakānane || 55 ||
ta evābhyastasadyogā dattadānāsta eva hi
kāśyāmimāni liṅgāni yairdṛṣṭānyapi dūrataḥ || 56 ||

te sarve tena vihitā yāvajjīvaṃ nirenasā || 57 ||
yenā'vimuktamāsādya mahāliṅgāni pārvati
sakṛdabhyarcitānīha sa mukto nātra saṃśayaḥ || 58 ||
skanda uvāca anyānyapi -
ca vindhyāre devyai proktāni śambhunā
svabhaktānāṃ hitārthāya tānyathā''karṇayā'graja || 5 9 ||
śaileśa : saṃgameśaśca svarlīno madhyameśvaraḥ |
hiraṇyagarbha īśāno goprekṣo vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ || 60 |
upaśāntaśivo jyeṣṭho nivāseśvara eva ca |
śukreśo vyāghraliṅgaṃ ca jambukeśaṃ caturdaśam || 61 ||
mune caturdaśaitāni mahāntyāyatanāni vai | |
eteṣāmapi sevāto naro mokṣamavāpnuyāt || 62 || ||
nirenasā niṣpāpena || 57 ||
agraja īśvarasya ' mukhadvārāt prathamato jātaḥ | dvijeti vā pāṭhaḥ || 5 9 |
mahāyatanāni tṛtīyacaturdaśaliṅgānyāha | śaileśa iti || 60 ||

ācaturdaśi pūjyāni liṅgānyetāni sattamaiḥ || 63 ||
eteṣāṃ vārṣikī yātrā sumahotsavapūrvakam |
kāryā mumukṣubhiḥ samyak kṣetrasaṃsiddhidāyinī
mune caturdaśaitāni mahāliṅgāni yatnataḥ |
dṛṣṭvā na jāyate jantuḥ saṃsāre duḥkhasāgare || 65 || ||
kṣetrasya paramaṃ tattvametadeva priye dhruvam |
saṃsārarogagrastānāmidameva mahauṣadham || 66 ||
kṣetrasyopaniṣaccaiṣā muktibījamidaṃ param
karmakānanadāvāgnireṣā liṅgāvaliḥ priye || 67 ||
ekaikasyā'sya liṅgasya mahimā''dyantavarjitaḥ
mayaiva jñāyate devi samyaṅ nā'nyena kenacit || 68 ||
iti śrutvā mune prāha devī hṛṣṭatanūruhā |
praṇamya devamīśānaṃ sarvajñaṃ sarvadaṃ śivam || 6 9 |

rahasyaṃ paramaṃ kāśyāṃ yadetat samudīritam |
tacchrutvotsukatāṃ prāptaṃ mano me'tīva vallabha || 70 ||
yaduktaṃ liṅgamekaikaṃ mahāsārataraṃ param |
kāśyāṃ paramanirvāṇakāraṇaṃ kāraṇeśvara || 71 |
pratyekaṃ mahimānaṃ me me brūhyeṣāṃ bhuvaneśvara |
caturdaśānāṃ liṅgānāṃ śravaṇādaghahāriṇām || 72 ||
oṅkāreśasya liṅgasya kathamatra samāgamaḥ |
atipuṇyatamāttasmātkṣetrādamarakaṇṭakāt || 73 |

kathāmākarṇayā'parṇe tavā'grataḥ
yathoṅkārasya liṅgasya prādurbhāva ihā'bhavat || 76 ||
purā''nandavane cā'tra brahmaṇā viśvayoninā
tapastaptaṃ mahādevi samādhiṃ dadhatā param || 77 |
pūrṇe yugasahasre'tha bhittvā pātālasaptakam |
udatiṣṭhatpurojyotirvidyotitaharinmukham || 78 ||
yadantarāvirabhavannirvyājena samādhinā |
tadeva paramaṃ dhāma bahirāvirabhūd vidheḥ || 7 9 |
yo'bhūccaṭacaṭāśabdaḥ sphuṭato bhūmibhāgataḥ
tacchabdād vyasṛjad vedhāḥ samādhiṃ kramato vaśī || 80 ||
tapaḥkaraṇasamaye parṇamapi na bhakṣitamityaparṇā | taduktam-
svayaṃ viśīrṇahumaparṇavṛttitā parā hi kāṣṭhā tapasastayā punaḥ |
tavatyapākīrṇamataḥ priyaṃvadāṃ vadantyaparṇāmiti tāṃ purāvidaḥ || iti |
tasyāḥ sambodhanamaparṇe iti | anena tavaitatkathāśravaṇe'dhikāro'stīti
sūcayati || 76 |

puraḥ paśyeddadarśā'gre tāvadakṣaramādimam || 81 ||
akāraṃ sattvasampannamṛkkṣetraṃ sṛṣṭipālakam
nārāyaṇātmakaṃ sākṣāttamaḥ pāre pratiṣṭhitam || 82
ukāramatha tasyā'gre rajorūpaṃ yajurjanam ||
vidhātāraṃ samastasya |
svākāramiva bimbitam || 83 ||
nīravadhvāntasaṅketasadanābhaṃ tadagrataḥ
makāraṃ sa dadarśātha tamorūpaṃ viśeṣataḥ || 84

atha tatpurato dhātā vyadhāt svanayanātithim || 85 |
viśvarūpamayākāraṃ saguṇaṃ vā'pi nirguṇam
anākhyanādasadanaṃ paramānandavigraham || 86 |
śabdabrahmeti yatkhyātaṃ sarvavāṅmayakāraṇam
athopariṣṭānnādasya bindurūpaṃ parātparam || 87 |
kāraṇaṃ kāraṇānāṃ ca jagadyoniṃ ca taṃ param
vidhirvilokayāñcakre tapasā gocarīkṛtam || 88 |
tamasastamaḥprāyakṣārasamudrasyetyarthaḥ | makārārthamāha tadagrataḥ | ukārasyā'gre tamoguṇena rūpyata
iti tamorūpam || 84 dhyātā dhyānakartā | dhāteti

bhaktamunnayate yasmāttadomiti ya īritaḥ
arūpo'pi sarūpāḍhyaḥ sa dhātrā || 8 9 ||
tārayedyadbhavāmbhodheḥ netragīkṛtaḥ
svajapāsaktamānasam
tatastāra iti khyāto yastaṃ brahmā vyalokayat || 9 0 ||
praṇūyate yataḥ sarvaiḥ paranirvāṇakāmukaiḥ
sarvebhyo'bhyadhikastasmātpraṇavo yaḥ prakīrtitaḥ
svasevitāraṃ puruṣaṃ praṇayedyaḥ || 9 1 ||
atastaṃ paraṃ padam |
praṇavaṃ śāntaṃ pratyakṣīkṛtavān vidhiḥ || 9 2 ||
trayīmayasturīyo yasturyātīto'khilātmakaḥ
nādabindusvarūpo yaḥ sa praikṣi dvijagāminā ||9 3 ||
evamavayavārthanirūpaṇenaivāvayavinamoṅkāraṃ nirūpya anāma dvidhā nirvakti |
avanāditi sārdhena || 8 9 |
netragīkṛtaścakṣurviṣayīkṛtaḥ | tāranāma nirvakti | tārayediti || 9 0 |
praṇavanāma dvidhā nirvakti praṇūyata iti dvābhyām | praṇūyate prakarṣeṇa stūyate | | praṇayet
prāpayet || 9 1 |
trayīmayo vedatrayātmako brahmaviṣṇurudrātmako vā | asaṅgo nirvikāraḥ | parātmā

savedādiḥ padmabhuvā purastādavalokitaḥ || 9 4 ||
vṛṣabho yastridhā baddho roravīti mahomayaḥ
sa netraviṣayīcakre paramaḥ parameṣṭhinā || 9 5 |
śṛṃgāścatvāri yasyā''san hastāsaḥ sapta eva ca
dve śīrṣe ca trayaḥ pādāḥ sa devo vidhinaikṣata || 9 6 ||
yadantarlīnamakhilaṃ bhūtaṃ bhāvi bhavatpunaḥ |
tadvījaṃ bījarahitaṃ hina vilokitam || 9 7 |

ataḥ sa bhājyate sadbhiryalliṅgaṃ tadvilokitam ||9
pañcārthā yatra bhāsante pañcabrahmamayaṃ 8 ||
ādipañcasvarūpaṃ hi yat
yanniraikṣi brahmaṇā hi tat || 99 |
tamālokya tato vedhā liṅgarūpiṇamīśvaram
pañcākṣaraṃ prapañcācca bhinnaṃ tuṣṭāva śaṅkaram
brahmovāca- || 100 ||
nama oṃkārarūpāya namo'kṣaravapurdhṛte |
namo'kārādivarṇānāṃ prabhavāya sadāśiva
liṅganāmanirvacanapūrvakaṃ liṅgaśabdābhidheyaṃ brahma brahmaṇā dṛṣṭamityāha |
līnamiti || 9 8 |
pañcārthā : - asti bhāti priyaṃ rūpaṃ nāma cetyevaṃrūpāḥ | asti bhāti priyaṃ rūpaṃ nāma

ṛgyajuḥ sāmarūpāya rūpātītāya te namaḥ || 102 ||
namo nādātmane tubhyaṃ namo bindukalātmane
aliṅgaliṅgarūpāya sarvarūpasvarūpiṇe || 103 ||
namaste dhāmanidhaye nidhanādivivajita
namo bhavāya rudrāya śarvāya ca namo'stu te || 104 ||
oṃkārarūpāyeti | | praṇavarūpatvenaiva tatprabhāvākārādyakṣaradhārakatvamāha | namo'kṣareti |
akārādisvarūpaṃ kāraṇatvena svasmin dhārayatīti tathā tasmai | oṃkāraprabhavā vedā ,
oṃkāraprabhavāḥ svarā iti smṛteḥ | kūṭasthavapurdhṛta iti vā | etaccākṣarasyāpyupa-

namastārasvarūpāya sambhavāya namo'stu te || 105
amāyāya namastubhyaṃ namaḥ śivatarāya ||
kapardine namastubhyaṃ te
śitikaṇṭha namo'stu te || 106 ||
mīḍhuṣṭamāya giriśa śipiviṣṭāya te namaḥ
namo'hrasvāya kharvāya bṛhate vṛddharūpiṇe
kumāragurave tubhyaṃ || 107 ||
namaḥ kumāravapuṣe namaḥ |
śvetāya kṛṣṇāya pītāyā'ruṇamūrtaye || 108 ||

namaḥ pāṭalavarṇāya namo haritatejase || 10 9 ||
nānāvarṇasvarūpāya varṇānāṃ pataye namaḥ
namaste svararūpāya namo vyañjanarūpiṇe || 110 ||
udāttāyā'nudāttāya svaritāya namo namaḥ
hrasvadīrghapluteśāya savisargāya te namaḥ || 111 ||
anusvārasvarūpāya namaste sānunāsika
namo niranunāsāya dantyatālavyarūpiṇe || 112 ||
dhūmravarṇāya kṛṣṇalohitarūpāya | piṅgāya kapilavarṇāya | kirmīravarcase karburavarṇāya |
pāṭalavarṇāya śvetaraktavarṇāya | śuklapītamiśritavarṇāyetyarthaḥ | haritatejase pālāśa-
varṇāya || 10 9 |
nānāvarṇasvarūpāya uktaśuklādivarṇarūpāyetyarthaḥ | brāhmaṇādisvarūpāyeti vā |
varṇānāṃ pataye teṣāmeva niyantre | svarā akārādi caturdaśa | vyañjanāni kādīni
hakāraparyantāni || 110 |
ūrdhvamādatta ityudāttastadviparītamādatta ityanudāttastayoḥ samāhāraḥ svaritastadrūpāya |
hrasvāḥ a i u ṛ lṛ iti pañca | dīrghāḥ ā ī ū ṛ lṛ iti pañca | plutā dūrāhvāne gāne
lokaprasiddhāstattritayeśāya hrasvādiniyantre | visargeṇa saha vartata iti savisargo
varṇaviśeṣastadrūpāya || 111 |
anusvārasvarūpāya bindvātmakāya | sānunāsika anunāsikairñamaṅaṇanamaiḥ saha

antasthāya namastubhyaṃ pañcamāya pinākine || 113 ||
niṣādāya namastubhyaṃ niṣādapataye namaḥ
vīṇāveṇumṛdaṅgādivādyarūpāya te namaḥ || 114 ||
namastārāya mandrāya ghorāyā'ghoramūrtaye
namastānasvarūpāya mūrcchanāpataye namaḥ || 115 ||
sthāyisaṃcāribhedena namo bhāvasvarūpiṇe
tālapriyāya tālāya lāsyatāṇḍavajanmane || 116 ||
oṣṭhe bhavā oṣṭhyā uvarṇapavargodhmānīyāḥ | urasi bhavā urasyā-

tauryatrikakṛtāṃ bhaktyā nirvāṇaśrīpradāyaka || 117 ||
sthūlasūkṣmasvarūpāya dṛśyā'dṛśyasvarūpiṇe
arvācīnāya ca namaḥ parācīnāya te namaḥ || 118 ||
vākprapañcasvarūpāya vākprapañcaparāya ca
ekāyā'nekabhedāya sadasatpataye namaḥ || 11 9 ||
śabdabrahma namastubhyaṃ parabrahma namo'stu te
namo vedāntavedyāya vedānāṃ pataye namaḥ || 120 ||
namo vedasvarūpāya vedagocaramūrtaye
pārvatīśa namastubhyaṃ jagadīśa namo'stu te || 121 ||
tauryatrikaṃ nṛtyagītavādyaṃ tatsvarūpāya | tadeva tauryatrikaṃ mahatpriyaṃ yasya sa tathā
tatsambodhanaṃ tauryatrikamahāpriya | yadāhā'mara etadeveti | nirvāṇaśrīḥ kaivalya-
lakṣmīḥ || 117 || adṛśyaṃ vāyvākāśaṃ tatsvarūpiṇe |

śaṅkarāya namastubhyaṃ namastubhyaṃ maheśvara || 122
namaste jagadānanda namaste śaśiśekhara ||
mṛtyuñjaya namastubhyaṃ namaste tryambakāya ca ||
namaḥ pinākahastāya triśūlāyudhadhāriṇe 123 ||
namastripurahantre ca namo'ndhakaniṣūdana
kandarpadarpadalana namo || 124 ||
jālandharā'raye
kālāya kālakālāya kālakūṭaviṣādine || 125 ||
viṣādahantre bhaktānāmabhaktaikaviṣādada
jñānāya jñānarūpāya sarvajñāya namo'stu te || 126 ||
yogasiddhiprado'si tvaṃ yogināṃ yogasattama
tapasāṃ phalado'si tvaṃ tapasvibhyastapodhana ||
tvameva mantrarūpo'si mantrāṇāṃ phalado 127 ||
mahādānaphalaṃ bhavān
tvaṃ vai mahādānaprado bhavān || 128 ||

tvaṃ sarvaḥ sarvagastvaṃ vai sarvada : sarvadṛg bhavān || 12 9 ||
sarvabhuk sarvakartā tvaṃ sarvasaṃhārakāraka |
yogināṃ hṛdayākāśakṛtālaya namo'stu te || 130 ||
tvameva viṣṇurūpeṇa śaṅkhacakragadādhara
trilokīṃ trāyase trātaḥ sattvamūrte namo'stu te || 131 ||
tvameva vidadhāsyetad vidhirbhūtvā vidhānavit
rajorūpaṃ samālambya nīrajaskapadaprada || 132 ||
tvameva hi mahārudrastvaṃ mahogro bhujaṅgabhṛt
tvameva hi mahābhīmo mahāpitṛvanecara || 133 |
tāmasīṃ tanumāśritya tvaṃ kṛtāntakṛtāntaka
kālāgnirudro bhūtvā'nte tvaṃ saṃvartapravartakaḥ || 134 ||
nīrajaskaṃ padaṃ kaivalyam || 132 ||
pitṛvanaṃ śmaśānam || 133 |
saṃvartaḥ pralayaḥ || 134 ||

akṣipakṣmasamutkṣepāt punarāviṣkaroṣyaja || 135 ||
unmeṣavinimeṣau te sargāsargekakāraṇam |
kapālamālākhelo'yaṃ bhavataḥ svairacāriṇaḥ
tvatkaṇṭhe nṛkaroṭīyaṃ dhūrjaṭe yā || 136 ||
sarveṣāmantadagdhānāṃ vibhāsate |
tvattaḥ sā sphuṭaṃ bījamālikā || 137 ||
sarvamidaṃ śambho tvayi sarvaṃ carācaramṃ
kastvāṃ stotuṃ vijānāti purāvācāmagocaram
stotā tvaṃ hi stutistvaṃ || 138 ||
hi nityaṃ stutyastvameva ca
vemyoṃnnamaḥ śivāyeti nā'nyadvedamyeva kiñcana || 13 9 ||
puṃprakṛtirūpābhyāṃ puruṣapradhānarūpābhyām | akṣipakṣmaṇo netrāvarakasya samutkṣepā-
dunmeṣāt || 135 ||
nanu kapālasragviṇo me kimiyamatistutiḥ kriyate tatrāha | kapāleti | khelaḥ
krīḍā || 136 ||

tvāmeva praṇamāmīśa namastubhyaṃ namastubhyaṃ namo namaḥ || 140 ||
ityudīryā'sakṛdvedhāḥ praṇanāma maheśvaram |
praṇavākhyaṃ mahāliṅgarūpiṇaṃ daṇḍavat kṣitau || 141 | ||
īśvara uvāca- girīndratanaye śrutvā brahmastutiṃ parām |
tato
paramaiśvaryasampattihetuṃ tuṣṭo'hamadbhutam || 142 ||
amūrto'haṃ tato liṅgānmūrtimāsthāya śāṅkarīm |
prasanno'smi varaṃ brūhītyuvāca caturānanam || 143 |
caturvaktraḥ samutthāya pratyakṣaṃ vīkṣya māmatha |
punarjaya jayetyuktvā praṇanāma kṛtāñjaliḥ || 144 |
ānandavāṣpasalilanetro hṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ
gadgadena svareṇā'tha provāca jalajāsanaḥ || 145 ||
jalajāsanaḥ padmāsanaḥ || 145 ||

yadi prasanno deveśa yadi deyo varo mama |
tadetasmin mahāliṅge sānnidhyaṃ te'stu śaṅkara || 146 ||
ayameva baro deyo nānyaṃ varamahaṃ vṛṇe |
oṃkāreśvaranāmaitadastu bhaktaikamuktidam || 147 |
skanda uvāca-
vidhyuktamiti viprarṣe samākarṇya tadeśitā |
uvāca vacanaṃ caitattathā'stu caturānanam || 148 |
varānanyānapi vibhuḥ prasannastatkṣaṇāddadau |
vidhaye dīrghatapase tayā stutyā'titoṣitaḥ || 14 9 |
īśvara uvāca-
suraśreṣṭha tapaḥśreṣṭha sarvāmnāyanidhirbhava |
sṛṣṭeḥ karaṇasāmarthyaṃ tavā'stu madanugrahāt || 150 ||
bhaktaikamuktidaṃ bhaktānāmekāṃ mukhyāṃ sāyujyalakṣaṇāṃ muktiṃ dadātīti tathā || 147 |
vidhyuktaṃ brahmoktam || 148 |
sarvāmnāyanidhirakhilavedāśrayaḥ || 150 |

tvattapaḥphaladānārthaṃ yadetalliṅgamutthitam || 151 ||
paramoṅkārarūpaṃ ca śabdabrahmamayaṃ vidhe
asyā''rādhanataḥ puṃsāṃ na dūraṃ brahmaṇaḥ padam || 152 ||
akārākhyamidaṃ liṅgamukārākhyamidaṃ param
makārāhvayametacca nādākhyaṃ bindusaṃjñakam || 153 |
pañcāyatanamīśānamitthametadudīritam
mokṣāya . sarvajantūnāmasminnānandakānane || 154 ||
snātvā matsyodarītīrthe vilokyoṅkāramīśvaram
na jātu jāyate janturjananījaṭhare kvacit || 155 |
etannādeśvaraṃ liṅgametalliṅgaṃ sudurlabham |
ramye matsyodarītīre dṛṣṭaṃ spṛṣṭaṃ vimuktidam || 156 ||
yadetatkāpilaṃ jyotiretalliṅge vilokya |
atastu kapileśākhyametalliṅga sudurlabham || 157 |
pañcāyatanaṃ pañcānāmakārādīnāṃ tadvācyānāṃ vā brahmaviṣṇurudreśvarasadāśivānāmāya-
tanamāśrayabhūtamīśānaṃ liṅgamityarthaḥ || 154 |
kapilo viṣṇuḥ | siddhānāṃ kapilaścā'smīti bhagavadukteḥ | tatsambandhijyotiḥ kāpilaṃ
jyotiḥ || 157 |

tadā tatra naraḥ snātvā brahmahatyāṃ vyapohati 158 |
varaṇotsiktapānīye dhunadītoyamiśrite
snātvā nādeśvaraṃ dṛṣṭvā naraḥ kimanuśocati || 15 9 ||
aṣṭamyāṃ ca caturdaśyāṃ tīrthāni saha sāgaraiḥ
ṣaṣṭikoṭisahasrāṇi matsyodaryāṃ viśanti hi || 160 |
praṇaveśasamīpe tu yadā gaṅgā sameṣyati
tadā puṇyatamaḥ kālo devarṣipitṛvallabhaḥ || 161 |
tatra snānaṃ japo dānaṃ havanaṃ devatārcanam |
matsyodaryāmakṣayaṃ syādoṅkāreśvarasannidhau || 162 ||
oṅkāradarśanādeva vājimedhaphalaṃ labhet |
tasmātkāśyāṃ prayatnena dṛśya oṅkāra īśvaraḥ || 163 ||
durlabhaṃ mānavaṃ janma caturvargaikasādhanam |
jalabudbudavattatsyānnādeśo yena yena nekṣitaḥ || 164 ||
jalabudbudaṃ yathā uttiṣṭhati tadvattasya janma vṛthetyarthaḥ || 164 |

kṛtvā piṇḍapradānāni pitṝṇāmanṛṇo bhavet || 165
kṛtvā'pi mohātpāpāni bhūrīṇyeva mahāntyapi
kāśyāmoṅkāramālokya kutastrasyati vai yamāt || 166 ||
oṅkārayātrā'bhimukhaṃ naraṃ vīkṣya pitāmahāḥ
parinṛtyanti muditāḥ svasantānasamudbhavam || 167 ||
yasya yasya ca vai nāma smṛtvā smṛtvā namasyati
taṃ tamunnayate prājñaḥ pitaraṃ brahmaṇaḥ padam || 168 ||
rudrāṇāṃ niyutaṃ japtvā yatphalaṃ samyagāpyate |
tatphalaṃ labhate nūnaṃ bhaktyoṅkāravilokanāt || 16 9 ||
kevalaṃ bhūmibhārāya janmino janma tasya vai
yenā''nandavane dṛṣṭo noṅkāraḥ sarvakāmadaḥ || 170 ||
ekamoṅkāramālokya samaste kṣoṇimaṇḍale
liṅgajātāni sarvāṇi dṛṣṭāni syurna saṃśayaḥ || 171 ||
santāno vaṃśaḥ || 167 ||
niyutaṃ lakṣam || 16 9 ||

praṇaveśaṃ praṇamyā'tha yadyanyatra vipadyate
svargalokamavāpyā'tha kāśyāṃ muktimavāpnuyāt || 172 ||
asmi~lliṅge sadā brahman sthāsyāmīti viniścitam |
dāsyāmi ca sadā mokṣametalliṅgā'rcakāya vai || 173 ||
oṅkāraṃ sakṛdapyatra naro natvā prayatnataḥ |
kṛtakṛtyo bhavennūnaṃ paramānmadanugrahāt || 174 ||
oṅkārapaścime bhāge tāratīrthamanuttamam |
kṛtodakakriyastatra narastarati durgatim || 175 ||
oṅkāreśasya ye bhaktā jñeyāste naiva mānavāḥ
manuṣyacarmaṇā nadvāste rudrā mokṣagāminaḥ || 176 ||
asya liṅgasya mahimā nā'nyairatrā'vagamyate
tvatpuṇyodayato yasmād vidhe'trā''virabhūdidam || 177 |
vipadyate mriyate || 172 |
tāratīrthamoṅkāratīrtham || 175 ||
tvatpuṇyodayatastava śubhādṛṣṭasyodayāt || 177 |

etalliṅgaprabhāvācca sarvaṃ jñāsyasi tattvataḥ
vidhe vidhehi tasmāttvaṃ sarvametaccarācaram || 178 ||
iti datvā varaṃ tasmai brahmaṇe padmasambhuve |
tasminneva mahāliṅge śambhurlīno babhūva ha || 17 9 ||
skanda uvāca - bhajate'dyāpi talliṅgaṃ kalaśodbhava
brahmā'pi
stuvan brahmastavenaiva svātmanā vihitena hi || 180 ||
brahmastavaṃ japanmartyaḥ sarvaiḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate
pūryate ca mahāpuṇyairjñānaṃ prāpnoti sattamam || 181 ||
vidhe vidhehīti | atra vārāṇasyāṃ sthitvā carācaraṃ vidhehītyuktatvāt sṛṣṭeḥ
pūrvamapi kāśī sthitaivā'taḥ pralaye'pi kāśyā no nāśa iti pūrvamuktaṃ na vismarta-
vyamiti || 178 ||
samyag bhavatyasmāt prajeti saṃbhūstaramai sambhuve || 17 9 |
brahmastavena brahmapratipādakena svakṛtena vā || 180 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ trisaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 73 ||

antakāle bhavejjñānaṃ yena bandhātpramucyate || 182 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe oṅkāramahimavarṇanaṃ nā
trisaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 73 ||

|| atha catuḥsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda śṛṇu uvāca- vātāpisaṃhartaḥ kāśyāṃ pātakataṅkinī
padmakalpe tu yā vṛttā damanasya dvijanmanaḥ || 1 ||
bhāradvājasya tanayo damano nāma nāmataḥ
kṛtamauñjīvidhiḥ so'tha vidyājātaṃ pragṛhya ca ||2 ||
saṃsāraṃ duḥkhabahulaṃ jīvitaṃ cā'pi cañcalam
vijñāya damano vidvānnirjagāma gṛhānnijāt ||3 ||
kāñciddiśaṃ samālambya nirvedaṃ paramaṃ gataḥ
pratyāśramaṃ pratinagaṃ pratyabdhi pratikānanam
pratitīrthaṃ pratinadi sa babhrāma tapoyutaḥ |
yāvantyāyatanānīha tiṣṭhanti parito bhuvam || 5 |
adhyāye saptatitame caturbhiradhike tathā |
punaroṅkāramāhātmyaṃ varṇyate'tha savistaram || 1 |

divyauṣadhisahasrāṇi mayā saṃsādhitānyapi || 20 ||

mayā praviṣṭā bahuśaḥ kṛtāntavadanopamāḥ
tataścāpi mahattaptaṃ bahubhirniyamairyamaiḥ || 22 ||

tenaiva mahatī siddhirbhavitrī mama nā'nyathā |

sa yāṃ gatiṃ labhenmartyo yajñairdānairna sā'nyataḥ || 38 |
rāgabījasamudbhūtaḥ saṃsāraviṭapo mahān |

vārāṇasī yadā prāptā kadācitkālaparyayāt |

gokarṇaḥ paścimadvāraṃ pāti koṭigaṇāvṛtaḥ || 51 ||
udagdvāraṃ tathā rakṣed ghaṇṭākarṇo mahāgaṇaḥ
aiśaṃ koṇaṃ chāgavaktro bhīṣaṇo vahnidigdalam || 52 ||
rakṣaḥkāṣṭhāṃ śaṅkukarṇo dṛmicaṇḍo maruddiśam
itthaṃ kṣetraṃ sadā pānti gaṇā ete'tibhāsvarāḥ || 53 |
kālākṣo raṇabhadrastu kauleyaḥ kālakampanaḥ
ete pūrveṇa rakṣanti gaṅgāpāre sthitā gaṇāḥ || 54 ||
vīrabhadro nabhaścaiva kardamā liptavigrahaḥ

ānando gopako babhru rakṣanti varaṇātaṭe || 57 ||
rakṣaḥ kāṣṭhāṃ naiṛtiṃ diśam || 53 ||
ānandagopaka iti kvacit || 57 ||

tasmin kṣetre mahāpuṇye liṅgamoṅkārasaṃjñakam |
tatra siddhiṃ parāṃ prāptā dehenā'nena sādhakāḥ || 58 |
kapilaścaiva sāvarṇiḥ śrīkaṇṭhaḥ piṅgaloṃ'śumān
ete pāśupatāḥ siddhāstalliṅgārādhanena hi || 5 9 ||
ekadā tasya liṅgasya kṛtvā pañcāpi pūjanam
nṛtyantaḥ saḍuḍutkāraṃ tasmi~lliṅge layaṃ yayuḥ || 60 |
anyacca te pravakṣyāmi tatra yadvṛttamadbhutam
niśāmaya mahābuddhe damana dvijasattama || 61 |
ekā bhekī mune tatra carantī liṅgasannidhau
pradakṣiṇaṃ sadā kuryānnirmālyākṣatabhakṣiṇī || 62|
sā tatra mṛtyuṃ na prāpa śivanirmālyabhakṣaṇāt I
kṣetrādanyatra maraṇaṃ jātaṃ tasyāstadenasaḥ || 63 ||
saḍuḍutkāraṃ huḍutkārasahitaṃ yathā bhavati tathā || 60 ||
bhekī dardurī || 62 |

viṣamapi prāśyaṃ śivasvaṃ naiva bhakṣayet |

varṣābhvī tena sā kṣiptā kākena kṣetrabāhyataḥ
atha sā kālato bhekī tatraiva kṣetrasattame || 67 ||

sadakṣaraṃ cādirūpaṃ viśvarūpaṃ parāvaram
varaṃ vareṇya varadaṃ śāśvataṃ śantamīśvaram || 84 |
sarvalokaikajanakaṃ sarvalokaikarakṣakam
sarvalokaikasaṃhartṛ sarvalokaikavanditam || 85 |
ādyantarahitaṃ nityaṃ śivaṃ śaṅkaramavyayam
ekaṃ guṇatrayātītaṃ bhaktasvāntakṛtāspadam || 86 ||
nirupādhiṃ nirākāraṃ nirvikāraṃ nirañjanam
nirmalaṃ nirahaṅkāraṃ niṣprapañcaṃ nijodayam || 87 |
svātmārāmamanantaṃ ca sarvagaṃ sarvadarśinam
sarvadaṃ sarvabhoktāraṃ sarvaṃ sarvasukhāspadam || 88 |
vāgindriyaṃ tadīyaṃ ca proccarattadaharniśam
nāmāntaraṃ na gṛhṇāti kvacidanyasya kasyacit || 8 9 ||
etannāmākṣararasaṃ rasayantī divāniśam |
rasanā naiva jānāti tasyā anyadrasāntaram || 9 0 ||
sadakṣaraṃ sarvabhūtamakṣaraṃ kūṭasthamavyākṛtamiti yāvattadrūpam | pṛthakpadaṃ vā |
taduktaṃ bhagavatā - " kṣaraḥ sarvāṇi bhūtāni kūṭastho'kṣara ucyate " iti | ādirūpamādi-

saṃmārjanaṃ raṃgamālāḥ prāsādaṃ paritaḥ sadā |
vidadhyānmādhavī tatra tathā'rcāpānraśodhanam || 9 1 ||
tatra pāśupatā ye vai praṇaveśārcane ratāḥ |
tāṃśca śuśrūṣayennityaṃ pitṛbuddhyā'tibhaktitaḥ ||9 2 ||
vaiśākhasya caturdaśyāmekadā sā tu mādhavī
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā divopavasanānvitā || 9 3 ||
yātrā militabhakteṣu prātayatiṣu sarvataḥ |
saṃmārjanādikaṃ kṛtvā liṅgamabhyarcya harṣataḥ || 9 4 ||
gāyantī madhuraṃ gītaṃ nṛtyantī nijalīlayā |
dhyāyantī liṅgamoṅkāraṃ tatra liṅge layaṃ yayau || 9 5 |
anenaiva śarīreṇa pārthivena mahāmatiḥ |
asmadācāryamukhyānāṃ paśyatāṃ ca tapasvinām ||9 6 ||
prādurbabhūva yalliṅgājjyotirjaṭilitāmbaram |
tatra jyotiṣi sā bālā jyotirmayyapi sāpyabhūt || 9 7 ||

tatra yātrāṃ prakurvanti mahotsavapurassarāḥ || 9 8 ||
tatra jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā caturdaśyāmupoṣitāḥ |
prāpnuvanti paraṃ jñānaṃ yatra kutrāpi vai mṛtāḥ mṛtāḥ || 99 |
brahmāṇḍodaramadhye tu yāni tīrthāni sarvataḥ |
tāni vaiśākhabhūtāyāmāyāntyoṅkṛtidarśane || 100 |
liṅgā'gre śrīmukhīnāmnī guhā'sti paramottamā
pātālasya ca taddvāraṃ tatra siddhā vasanti hi || 101 | |
tiṣṭheyuḥ pañcarātraṃ ye guhāyāṃ tatra suvratāḥ |
te nāgakanyāḥ paśyanti brūyustāśca śubhāśubham || 102 |
kandarottaradigbhāge tatra kūpo rasodakaḥ |
āṣaṇmāsaṃ ca tatpītvā pibed brahmarasāyanam || 103 ||

tatra nādeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā nādanidānabhūḥ |
sarvanādātmakaṃ viśvaṃ tacchravo gocarībhavet || 104 ||
tatra matsyodarīṃ snātvā svardhunīṃ varuṇāplutām
kṛtakṛtyo bhavejjanturnaiva śocati kutracit || 105 ||
asaṃkhyātā gatāḥ siddhimoṅkāreśvarasevakāḥ
pārthivenaiva dehena divyabhūtena tatkṣaṇāt || 106 ||
avimuktaṃ paraṃ kṣetraṃ brahmāṇḍādapi sarvataḥ
tato'pi para oṅkāra ukto matsyodarītaṭe || 107 ||
praṇaveśo'ṅga yaiḥ kāśyāṃ na nato nāpi cārcitaḥ
kimarthaṃ te samutpannā mātṛtāruṇyahāriṇaḥ || 108 ||
yadāprabhṛti viśveśo mandarādāgato'bhavat
tasminnānandagahane tadāprabhṛti sattama || 10 9 ||
nādanidānabhūḥ nādotpattisthānam | 1 pāṭhāntare nināda udrekaḥ prakaṭateti yāvat |
sarvanādātmakaṃ tacchravo gocarībhavet | talliṅgam | draṣṭuḥ śravaṇendriyasya viṣayaḥ

sanadīni satīrthāni sadvīpāni yayustataḥ || 110 ||
idānīṃ mama bhāgyena smārito'haṃ tvayā mune
ahamapyāgamiṣyāmi yāmaḥ kāśīṃ śanaiḥ śanaiḥ || 111 ||
ete'pi mama śiṣyā ye mahāpāśupatavratāḥ
kāśīṃ yiyāsavaste'pi yataḥ sarve mumukṣavaḥ || 112 ||
api vārdhakamāsādya yaiḥ kāśī naiva śīlitā
mānuṣe durlabhe naṣṭe kutasteṣāṃ mahāsukham || 113 |
yāvannendriyavaikalyaṃ yāvannaivāyuṣaḥ kṣayaḥ
tāvatsevyaṃ prayatnena śambhorānandakānanam || 114 ||
ya ānandavanaṃ śambhoḥ śiśriyuḥ śrīniketanam |
acalā śrīrna muñcettān mahāsaukhyaikaśevadhīn || 115 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ catuḥsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 74 ||

ityākhyāya kathāṃ ramyāṃ gargaḥ pāśupatottamaḥ |
bhāradvājena sahitaḥ prāpa vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 116 ||
damano'pi hi dharmātmā gargācāryeṇa saṃyutaḥ |
ārādhya śrīmadoṅkāraṃ tasmi~lliṅge layaṃ gataḥ || 117 ||
skanda uvāca -
ilvalāre paraṃ sthānamoṅkāramavimuktake |
tatra siddhiṃ parāṃ jagmuḥ sādhakā bahuśo mune || 118 ||
kalau kaluṣacittānāṃ puro nākhyeyameva hi |
praṇaveśvaramāhātmyaṃ nāstikānāṃ viśeṣataḥ || 11 9 |
ye nindanti mahādevaṃ kṣetraṃ nindanti ye'dhiyaḥ |
purāṇaṃ ye ca nindanti te saṃbhāṣyā na kutracit || 120 |
oṅkārasadṛśaṃ liṅgaṃ na kvacijjagatītale |
iti gauryai samākhyātaṃ devadevena niścitam || 121 ||

imamadhyāyamākarṇya narastadgatamānasaḥ
vimuktaḥ sarvapāpebhyaḥ śivalokamavāpnuyāt || 122 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe oṅkāramāhātmyaṃ nāma
catuḥsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 74 ||

|| atha pañcasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-
śrutvoṅkārakathāmetāṃ mahāpātakanāśinīm
na tṛpto'smi viśākhā'tha brūhi traiviṣṭapīṃ kathām || 1 |
kathaṃ ca kathitā devyai devadevena ṣaṇmukha
āvirbhūtirmahābuddhe puṇyā trailocanī parā ||2 ||
skanda uvāca-
ākarṇaya mune vacmi kathāṃ śramanivāriṇīm
yathā devena kathitā triviṣṭapasamudbhavām || 3 ||
virajākhyaṃ hi tatpīṭhaṃ tatra liṅgaṃ triviṣṭapam
tatpīṭhadarśanādeva virajā jāyate naraḥ
adhyāye saptatitame pañcordhve paramādbhute |
trilocanasya devasya hyāvirbhāvo'nuvarṇyate || 1 ||
trilocanatīrthasambandhinīṃ traiviṣṭapīṃ trilocanasambadhinīṃ vā | taduktamatraiva-
biṣṭapatritayā'ntarye devarṣimanujoragāḥ |
sasaritparvatāraṇyāḥ santi te tatra yanmune ||
tadārabhya ca tattīrthaṃ tacca liṅgaṃ trilocanam | triviṣṭapamitiṃ khyātamiti || 1 ||
virajākhyamityatra sandhirārṣa : | sarve sāntā akārāntā iti vā || 4 ||

tisraḥ kalmaṣahāriṇyo dakṣiṇe hi trilocanāt || 5 |
sroto mūrtidharāḥ sākṣālliṅgasnapanahetave |
sarasvatyatha kālindī narmadā cātiśarmadā || 6 6 | ||
tisro'pi hi trisandhyaṃ tāḥ saritaḥ kumbhapāṇayaḥ
snapayanti mahādhāmaliṅga traiviṣṭapaṃ mahat || 7 |
liṅgāni paritastābhiḥ svanāmnā sthāpitānyapi |
teṣāṃ sandarśanāt puṃsāṃ tāsāṃ snānaphalaṃ bhavet || 8 ||
sarasvatīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ dakṣiṇena triviṣṭapāt |
sārasvataṃ padaṃ dadyād dṛṣṭaṃ spṛṣṭaṃ ca jāḍyahṛt || 9 ||
yamuneśaṃ pratīcyāṃ ca narairbhaktyā samarcitam |
api kilbiṣavadbhiśca yamalokanivāraṇam || 10 ||
dṛṣṭaṃ trilocanātprācyāṃ narmadeśaṃ suśarmadam |
talliṅgārcanato nṝṇāṃ garbhavāso niṣidhyate || 11 ||
anvayabhedāttisra ' iti padayorapaunaruktyam || 5 |
mahādhāma mahātejo mahādhāraṃ vā || 7 |
pratīcyāṃ paścimāyāṃ diśi || 10 ||

dṛṣṭvā trilocanaṃ liṅgaṃ kiṃ bhūyaḥ pariśocati || 12 ||
triviṣṭapasya liṅgasya smaraṇādapi mānavaḥ
triviṣṭapapatirbhūyānnā'tra kāryā vicāraṇā || 13 ||
triviṣṭapasya draṣṭāraḥ sraṣṭāraḥ syurna saṃśayaḥ
kṛtakṛtyāsta evā'tra ta evā'tra mahādhiyaḥ || 14 ||
ānandakānane liṅgaṃ praṇataṃ yaistriviṣṭapam |
trilocanasya nāmā'pi yaiḥ śrutaṃ śuddhabuddhibhiḥ || 15 ||
saptajanmārjitātpāpātte pūtā nā'tra saṃśayaḥ
pṛthivyāṃ yāni liṅgāni teṣu dṛṣṭeṣu yatphalam || 16 ||
tatsyāttriviṣṭape dṛṣṭe kāśyāṃ manye tato'dhikam
kāśyāṃ triviṣṭape dṛṣṭe dṛṣṭaṃ sarvaṃ triviṣṭapam || 17 ||
kṣaṇānnirdhūtapāpo'sau na na punargarbhabhāgbhavet
sa snātaḥ sarvatīrtheṣu sarvāvabhṛthavān sa ca || 18 ||
sraṣṭāro bahmāṇaḥ || 14 |

sarittrayaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ yatra sākṣādvasetsadā || 1 9 ||
tatra śrāddhādikaṃ kṛtvā gayāyāṃ kiṃ kariṣyati
snātvā pilipilātīrthe kṛtvā vai piṇḍapātanam || 20 ||
dṛṣṭvā triviṣṭapaṃ liṅgaṃ koṭitīrthaphalaṃ labhet
yadanyatrā'rjitaṃ pāpaṃ tatkāśīdarśanād vrajet || 21 ||
kāśyāṃ tu yatkṛtaṃ pāpaṃ tatpaiśācapadapradam
pramādātpātakaṃ kṛtvā śambhorānandakānane || 22 ||
dṛṣṭvā triviṣṭapaṃ liṅgaṃ tatpāpamapi hāsyati
sarvasminnapi bhūpṛṣṭhe śreṣṭhamānandakānanam || 23 ||

trilocanāca़kānāṃ sā padavī na davīyasī
paraṃ nirvāṇapadmāyā mahāsaukhyaikaśevadheḥ || 27 ||
sakṛttrilocanārcāto yacchreyaḥ samupārjyate
na tadājanma sampūjya liṅgānyanyāni labhyate || 28 ||
kāśyāṃ trilocanaṃ liṅgaṃ ye'rcayanti mahādhiyaḥ
te'rthyāstribhuvanaukobhirmama prītimabhīpsubhiḥ || 2 9 ||
kṛtvā'pi sarvasaṃnyāsaṃ kṛtvā pāśupatavratam
niyamebhyaḥ skhalitvā'pi kuto bibhyati mānavāḥ || 30 ||
vidyamāne mahāliṅge mahāpāpaughahāriṇi
triviṣṭape puṇyarāśau maukṣanikṣepasadmani || 31 ||
samabhyarcya mahāliṅgaṃ sakṛdeva trilocanam
mucyate kaluṣaiḥ sarvairapi janmaśatārjitaiḥ || 32 ||
brahmā'pi surāpo vā'steyī vā gurutalpagaḥ
tatsaṃyogyapi vā varṣaṃ mahāpāpī prakīrtitaḥ || 33 ||
mahāsaukhyaikaśevadheḥ paramānandaikanidheḥ | nirvāṇapadmāyāḥ mokṣalakṣmyāḥ | sā padavī

parāpavādaśīlo'pi tathā visrambhaghātakaḥ || 34 ||
kṛtaghno'pi bhrūṇahā'pi vṛṣalīpatireva vā
mātāpitṛgurutyāgī vahnido garado'pi vā || 35 ||
goghnaḥ strīghno'pi śūdraghnaḥ kanyādūṣayitā'pi ca
krūro vā piśuno vā'pi nijadharmaparāṅmukhaḥ || 36 |
nindako nāstiko vā'pi kūṭasākṣyapravādakaḥ |
abhakṣyabhakṣako vā'pi tathā'vikreyavikrayī || 37 ||
ityādipāpaśīlo'pi muktvaikaṃ śivanindakam
pāpānniṣkṛtimāpnoti natvā liṅgaṃ trilocanam || 38 ||
śivanindārato mūḍhaḥ śivaśāstravinindakaḥ
tasya no niṣkṛtirdṛṣṭā kvā'pi śāstre'pi kenacit || 3 9 ||
ātmaghātī sa vijñeyaḥ sadā trailokyaghātakaḥ
śivanindāṃ vidhatte yaḥ so'nābhāṣyo'dhamādhamaḥ || 40 ||
śivanindāratā ye ca śivabhaktajaneṣvapi
te yānti narake ghore yāvaccandradivākarau || 41 ||
niṣkṛtiṃ muktim || 38 | hetumāha | śivanindeti
muktvaikaṃ śivanindakamiti yaduktaṃ tatrā'nuvādapūrvakaṃ
tribhiḥ || 3 9 |
evaṃ parastrīgāmī , parahiṃsaka , paranindaka , viśvāsaghātī , kṛtaghna , bhrūṇahā , vṛṣalī-

teṣvarciteṣvapi śivaḥ prīto bhavatyasaṃśayaḥ || 42 ||
sarveṣāmiha pāpānāṃ prāyaścittacikīrṣayā
niḥśaṅgaireva vaktavyaṃ pramāṇajñairidaṃ vacaḥ || 43 ||
puraścaraṇakāmaśced bhīto'si yadi pāpataḥ
manyase yadi naḥ satyaṃ vākyaṃ śāstrapramāṇataḥ || 44 |
tataḥ sarvaṃ parityajya kṛtvā manasi niścayam |
ānandakānanaṃ yāhi yatra viśveśvaraḥ svayam || 45 ||
yatra kṣetrapraviṣṭānāṃ narāṇāṃ niścitātmanām |
na bādhate'ghanicayaḥ prāpyeta ca paro vṛṣaḥ || 46 ||
tatrā'dyā'pi mahātīrthe trisrotasyatinirmale
puṇye pilipilānāmni trisaritparisevite || 47 ||
trilocanākṣivikṣepaparikṣiptamahainasi
snātvā gṛhyeoktavidhinā tarpaṇīyānpratarpya ca
datvā deyaṃ yathāśakti vittaśāṭhyavivarjitaḥ |
dṛṣṭvā triviṣṭapaṃ liṅgaṃ samabhyarcyā'tibhaktitaḥ || 4 9 ||
sarveṣāṃ pāpānāṃ śreṣṭhaṃ prāyaścittaṃ vaktumāha | sarveṣāmiti || 43 |
vṛṣo dharmaḥ || 46 |

dhūpairdīpaiḥ sanaivedyairvāsobhirbahubhūṣaṇaiḥ || 50 ||
pūjopakaraṇairdravyairghaṇṭādarpaṇacāmaraiḥ
citradhvajapatākābhirnṛtyavādyasugāyanaiḥ || 51 ||
japaiḥ pradakṣiṇābhiśca namaskārairmudāyutaiḥ |
paricārakasantoṣaiḥ kṛtveti paripūjanam || 52 ||
brāhmaṇānvācayetpaścānniṣpāpo'hamiti bruvan
evaṃ kurvannaraḥ prājño nirenā jāyate kṣaṇāt || 53 ||
tataḥ pañcanade snātvā maṇikarṇīhade tataḥ
tato viśveśamabhyarcya prāpnoti sukṛtaṃ mahat || 54 ||
prāyaścittamidaṃ proktaṃ mahāpāpaviśodhanam
nāstikena pravaktavyaṃ kāśīmāhātmyanindake || 55 ||
dadacca dravyalobhena prāyaścittamidaṃ śubham
dātā narakamāpnoti satyaṃ satyaṃ ghaṭodbhava || 56 |
gandhādyairityādi tṛtīyāntānāṃ padānāṃ samabhyarcetyanenā'nvayaḥ | mālyairmālābhiḥ
puṣpairvā || 50 ||
nirenā niṣpāpaḥ || 53 |
evaṃ pāpakṣayamuktvā puṇyaprāptimāha | tata ityekena || 54 ||

pradoṣe tatphalaṃ kāśyāṃ saptakṛtvastrilocane || 57 ||
bhujaṅgamekhalaṃ liṅgaṃ kāśyāṃ dṛṣṭvā triviṣṭapam
janmāntare'pi muktaḥ syādanyatra maraṇe sati || 58 ||
anyatra sarvaliṅgeṣu puṇyakālo viśiṣyate
triviṣṭape puṇyakālaḥ sadā rātrindivaṃ nṛṇām ||5 9 ||
liṅgānyoṅkāramukhyāni sarvapāpaprakṛntyalam |
paraṃ trilocanīśaktiḥ kācidanyaiva pārvati || 60 |
yataḥ sarveṣu liṅgeṣu liṅgametadanuttamam
tatkāraṇaṃ śṛṇvaparṇe karṇe kuru vadāmyaham || 61 |
purā me yogayuktasya liṅgametadbhuvastalāt
udbhidya saptapātālaṃ niragātpurato mahat || 62 ||
pradakṣiṇātaḥ iti śeṣaḥ || 57 ||
bhujaṅgo'nanto mekhalā kāñcī yasya tam || 58 ||
rātrindivaṃ rātrau divase ca tatrāpi sarvadetyarthaḥ || 5 9 ||
prakṛnti prakarṣeṇa cchedakāni | prahṛntīti pāṭhe'pi sa evārthaḥ || 60 |

tubhyaṃ netratrayaṃ dattaṃ niraikṣiṣṭhāstathottamam || 63 ||
tadāprabhṛti deveśi liṅgametattrilocanam
viṣṭapatritayāntasthairgīyate jñānadṛṣṭidam || 64 ||
trilocanasya ye bhaktāste'pi sarve trilocanāḥ |
mama pāriṣadāste tu jīvanmuktāsta eva hi || 65 ||
trilocanasya liṅgasya mahimānaṃ na kaścana
samyagvetti maheśāni mayaiva parigopitam || 66 |
śuklarādhatṛtīyāyāṃ snātvā pailipile ha hṛde |
upoṣaṇaparā bhaktyā rātrau jāgaraṇānvitāḥ || 67 |
trilocanaṃ pūjayitvā prātaḥ snātvā'pi tatra vai |
punarliṅga samabhyarcya datvā dharmaghaṭānapi || 68
sānnān sadakṣiṇān devi pitṝnuddiśya harṣitāḥ |
vidhāya pāraṇaṃ paścācchivabhaktajanaiḥ saha || 6 9 |

bhavanti devi niyataṃ gaṇā mama purogamāḥ || 70 ||
tāvad bhramanti saṃsāre devā martyā mahoragāḥ |
gauri yāvanna paśyanti kāśyāṃ liṅgaṃ trilocanam || 71 ||
sakṛttriviṣṭapaṃ dṛṣṭvā snātvā pailipile hṛde |
na jātu mātustanapo jāyate janturatra hi || 72 |
pratimāsaṃ sadā'ṣṭamyāṃ caturdaśyāṃ ca bhāmini
āyānti sarvatīrthāni draṣṭuṃ devaṃ triviṣṭapam || 73 ||
triviṣṭapāddakṣiṇataḥ snātaḥ pailipile'mbhasi
tatra sandhyāmupāsyaikāṃ rājasūyaphalaṃ labhet || 74 ||
pādodakākhyastatraiva kūpaḥ pāpavināśakaḥ |
prāśya tasyodakaṃ martyo na martyo jāyate punaḥ || 75 ||
tasya liṅgasya pārśve tu santi liṅgānyanekaśaḥ |
kaivalyadāni tānyatra darśanātsparśanādapi || 76 ||
sakṛttriviṣṭapamiti | agnihotraṃ juhoti yavāgūṃ pacatītivadarthakramo'tra draṣṭavyo na
tviḍo yajatītyādivat pāṭhakramaḥ | prātaścaturthyāṃ snātvā yastīrthe pailipile śubhe
trilocanaṃ samabhyarcyatyādibahuvacanavirodhāt || 72 ||

tatra śāntanavaṃ liṅgaṃ gaṅgātīre pratiṣṭhitam |
taddṛṣṭvā śāntimāpnoti naraḥ saṃsāratāpitaḥ || 77 ||
taddakṣiṇe mahāliṅga mune bhīṣmeśasaṃjñitam | |
kaliḥ kālaśca kāmaśca bādhate na tadīkṣaṇāt || 78 ||
tatpratīcyāṃ mahāliṅga droṇeśa iti kīrtitam |
yalliṅgapūjanāddroṇo jyotīrūpaṃ punardadhau || 7 9 |
aśvatthāmeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tadagre cā'tipuṇyadam |
yadarcanavaśādadroṇirna bibhetyapi kālataḥ || 80 ||
droṇeśādvāyudigbhāge bālakhilyeśvaraṃ param
talliṅgaṃ śraddhayā dṛṣṭvā sarvakratuphalaṃ labhet || 81 |
tadvāme liṅgamālokya vālmīkeśvarasaṃjñitam |
tasya sandarśanādeva viśoko jāyate naraḥ || 82 ||
śāntanavaṃ śāntanunā sthāpitam || 77 |

anyaccā'traiva yadvṛttaṃ tad bravīmi ghaṭodbhava |
triviṣṭapasya . māhātmyaṃ devyai devena bhāṣitam || 83 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe trilocanamāhātmyaṃ nāma
pañcasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 75 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ pañcasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 75 ||

sampūrṇānanda saṃskṛta- viśvavidyā
śrutama gopāya
meṃ
