|| śrīgaṇeśāya namaḥ ||
|| śrītrilocanāya śrīmanmaharṣivyāsaviracite viśveśvarāya namaḥ ||
skandamahāpurāṇe
|| atha ṣaṭsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca-
śṛṇuṣva maitrāvaruṇe purā kalpe rathantare |
itihāsa ihā''sīdyaḥ pīṭhe virajasaṃjñite || 1 ||
trilocanasya prāsāde maṇimāṇikyanirmite |
nānābhaṅgigavākṣāḍhye ratnasānāvivāyate || 2 |
kadācidapi kalpānte dyuloke bhraṃśati kṣaye |
prottambhanastambha iva datto viśvakṛtā svayam || 3 ||
ṣaṭsaptatitame'dhyāye prabhāvo'timahattaraḥ |
trilocanasya devasya varṇyate'tisukhapradaḥ || 1 |
anyaccātraiva yadvṛttaṃ tadbravīmītyuktaṃ tamevetihāsaṃ śrotṛmanaḥ samādhānaprārthanāpūrvakaṃ
prastāvayati trilocanasya - śṛṇuṣveti prāsāda | itihāsaḥ purāvṛttaḥ saṃvādaḥ || 1 |
vasaditi veti pañcamenā'nvayaḥ ityetasya | prāsādaṃ pārāvatadvandvaṃ viśinaṣṭi kalaravayugalaṃ | maṇītyādi vased vasati pādonacaturbhiḥ smā'- |
kalpānte nānābhaṅgigavākṣāḍhye sthityavasāne | dyuloke nānāparipāṭibhitticchidrāḍhye svargaloke | bhraṃśati ratnasānau bhraśyati merau sati || | 2 kṣaye | pralaye |
yāti saṃkṣayamiti pāṭhāntaram | yastasminnityirthaḥ prottambhanastambho || 3 | dhāraṇastambhaḥ | viśvakṛtā viśve-
śvareṇa brahmaṇā vā datta iva

maruttaraṅgitāgrābhiḥ patākābhiritastataḥ |
sannivārayatīvetthamaghaughānviśato mune || 4 ||
dedīpyamānasauvarṇakalaśena virājite |
pārvaṇena śaśāṅkena khedādiva samāśrite || 5 |
tatra pārāvatadvandvaṃ vaset svairaṃ kṛtālayam |
prātaḥ sāyaṃ ca madhyāhne kurvannityaṃ pradakṣiṇam || 6 |
uḍḍīyamānaṃ paritaḥ pakṣavātairitastataḥ |
rajaḥprāsādasaṃllagnaṃ dūrīkurvaddine dine || 7 |
trilocaneti satataṃ nāma bhaktairudāhṛtam |
triviṣṭapeti ca tathā tayoḥ karṇātithī bhavet || 8 |
caturvidhāni vādyāni śambhuprītikarāṇyalam |
tayoḥ karṇaguhāṃ prāpya pratiśabdaṃ pratanyate || 9 |

maṅgalārārtikajyotistrisandhyaṃ pakṣiṇostayoḥ |
netrāntarniviśannityaṃ bhaktaceṣṭāṃ pradarśayet || 10 ||
prāṇayātrāṃ vihāyā'pi kadācitsthiramānasau |
noḍḍīya vāñchitaṃ yātaḥ paśyantau kautukaṃ khagau || 11 ||
tatra bhaktajanākīrṇaṃ prāsādaṃ parito mune |
taṇḍulādi carantau tau kurvāte ca pradakṣiṇam || 12 ||
devadakṣiṇadigbhāge catuḥsrotasvinījalam |
tṛṣārtau dhayato vipra snātau jātucidaṇḍajau || 13 ||
tayoritthaṃ vicaratostrilocanasamīpataḥ |
agād bahutithaḥ kālo dvijayoḥ sādhuceṣṭayoḥ || 14 ||
maṅgalāya yadārārtikaṃ bahudīpayuktaṃ pātraṃ tatsambandhi yajjyotistatkartṛ tayoḥ
pakṣiṇoḥ netrāntarnetramadhye niviśat praviśad bhaktānāṃ ceṣṭāṃ pūjādivyāpāraṃ pradarśayed

atha devālayaskandhe gavākṣāntargatau ca tau |
śyenena kenacid dṛṣṭau krūradṛṣṭyā sukhasthitau || 15 ||
tacca pārāvatadvandvaṃ śyenaḥ parijighṛkṣukaḥ |
avatīryā'mbarādāśu praviṣṭo'nyaśivālaye || 16 ||
tato vilokayāmāsa tadāgamavinirgamau |
kena mārgeṇa viśato durgame tau patattriṇau || 17 ||
kenā'dhvanā ca niryātaḥ kca kāle kurutaśca kim |
kathaṃ yugapade tau me grāhyau svairaṃ bhaviṣyataḥ || 18 |
madhyedurgaṃ praviṣṭau ca mama vaśyāvimau na yat |
ekadṛṣṭiḥ kṣaṇaṃ tasthau śyena itthaṃ vicintayan || 1 9 ||
aho durgabalaṃ prājñāḥ śaṃsantyeveti hetutaḥ |
durbalo'pyākalayituṃ sahasā'rirna śakyate || 20 |
devālayaskandhe devālayaśṛṅgādadhobhāge || 15 |
nanu durbalayorgrahaṇe kimiti kathaṅkārastatrāha | madhyedurgaṃ durgasya madhye | yadyasmāt |
itthaṃ vakṣyamāṇam ||| 1 9 |

ṣaṭsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 7
kariṇāṃ tu sahasreṇa varāśvānāṃ na lakṣataḥ |
tatkarmasiddhirnṛpaterdurgeṇaikena yadbhavet || 21 |
durgastho nā'bhibhūyeta vipakṣaḥ kenacit kvacit |
svatantraṃ yadi durgaṃ syādamarmajñaprakāśitam || 22 ||
iti durgabalaṃ śaṃsan śyeno roṣāruṇekṣaṇaḥ |
asādhvasau kalaravau kalaravau vīkṣya vīkṣya yāto nabho'ṅgaṇam || 23 |
atha pārāvatī dakṣā vipakṣaṃ prekṣya pakṣiṇam |
mahābalaṃ durgabalā prāha pārāvataṃ patim || 24 ||
kalaravyuvāca-
priya pārāvata prājña sarvakāmi sukhārava |
tava dṛgviṣayaṃ prāptaḥ śyeno'yaṃ prabalo ripuḥ ||| 25 |
sāvajñaṃ vākyamākarṇya pārāvatyāḥ sa tatpatiḥ |

kati caiva na paśyanti nau sukhasthāviha priye | |
tebhyo yadīha bhettavyaṃ kuto nau tatsukhaṃ priye || 28 ||
ramasva tvaṃ mayā sārdhaṃ tyaja cintāmimāṃ śubhe |
asya śyenavarākasya gaṇanā'pi na me hṛdi || 2 9 |
itthaṃ pārāvatavacaḥ śrutvā pārāvatī tataḥ |
maunamālambya saṃtasthe patyuḥ pādārpitekṣaṇā || 30 ||
hitavarmopadiśyāpi priyapriyacikīrṣayā |
sādhyā joṣaṃ samāstheyaṃ kāryaṃ patyurvacaḥ sadā || 31 |
anyedyurapyathāyātaḥ śyeno'paśyatsa dampatī |
aparicchinnayā dṛṣṭyā yathā mṛtyurgatāyuṣam || 32 ||
atha maṇḍalagatyā sa prāsādaṃ parito bhraman |
nirīkṣya tadgatāyātau yāto gaganamārgataḥ || 33 ||

gate'tha nabhasi śyene puraḥ pārāvatā'ṅganā |
provāca preyasī nātha dṛṣṭo duṣṭastvayā'hitaḥ || 34 ||
tasyā vākyaṃ samākarṇya punaḥ kalaravo'bravīt |
kiṃ kariṣyatyasau mugdhe mama vyomavihāriṇaḥ ||| 35 |
durgañca svargatulyaṃ me yatra nāstyarito bhayam |
ayaṃ na tā gatīrvetti yā vedā'haṃ nabho'ṅgaṇe || 36 ||
praḍīnoḍḍīnasaṃḍīnakāṇḍavyāḍakapāṭikāḥ |
saṃsanīmaṇḍalavatīgatayo'ṣṭāvudāhṛtāḥ || 37 ||
yathaitāsviha kauśalyaṃ mayi pārāvati priye |
gatiṣu kvāpi kasyāpi pakṣiṇo na tathā'mbare || 38 ||

aparedyurapi śyenastatra bhāraśilātale |
kiyadantaramāsādyopaviṣṭo'tiprahṛṣṭavat || 40 ||
āyāmaṃ tatra saṃsthitvā tatkulāyaṃ vilokya ca |
punarvinirgataḥ śyenaḥ sā'pi bhītā'bravītpunaḥ || 41 ||
priya sthānamidaṃ tyājyaṃ duṣṭadṛṣṭividūṣitam |
asau krūro'tinikaṭamupaviṣṭo'tihṛṣṭavat || 42 ||
sāvajñaṃ sa punaḥ prāha kiṃ kariṣyatyasau priye |
mṛgākṣīṇāṃ svabhāvo'yaṃ prāyaśo bhīruvṛttayaḥ || 43 ||
itaredyurapi prāptaḥ sa ca śyeno mahābalaḥ |
tayorabhimukhaṃ tatra sthito yāmadvayāvadhi ||| 44 |
punarvilokya tadvartma śīghraṃ yāto yathāgatam |
gate'tha śakunau tasmin sā babhāṣe vihaṅgamī || 45 ||

nātha sthānāntaraṃ yāvo mṛtyurnau nikaṭo'tra yat |
punarduṣṭe praṇaṣṭe'sminnāvāṃ syāvaḥ sukhaṃ priya || 46 ||
priya yasya sapakṣasya gatiḥ sarvatra siddhidā | |
sa kiṃ svadeśarāgeṇa nāśaṃ prāpnoti buddhimān || 47 ||
sopasargaṃ nijaṃ deśaṃ tyaktvā yo'nyatra na vrajet |
sa paṅgurnāśamāpnoti kūlasthita iva drumaḥ || 48 ||
priyoditaṃ niśamyeti sa bhavitrīdaśārditaḥ |
sarīḍhaṃ punarapyāha priye mā bhaiḥ khagāttataḥ || 4 9 |
athā'parasminnahani sa śyenaḥ prātareva hi |
tadvāradeśamāsādya sāyaṃ yāvatsthito balaḥ || 50 ||
praṇaṣṭe'darśanaṃ gate || 46 |
sapakṣasya sapatrasya || 47 ||
paṅguḥ paṅgutulyaḥ || 48 |
sarīḍhaṃ sāvajñam || 4 9 |

astācalasya śikharaṃ yāte bhānau gate khage |
kulāyād bāhyamāgatyovāca pārāvatī patim || 51 |
nātha nirgamanasyā'yaṃ kālaḥ kālo'tidūrataḥ |
yāvattāvad viniryāhi tyaktvā māmapi sanmate || 52 ||
tvayi jīvati duṣprāpyaṃ na kiñcijjagatītale |
punardārāḥ punarmitraṃ punarvasu punargṛham || 53 |
yadyātmā rakṣitaḥ puṃsā dārairapi dhanairapi |
tadā sarvaṃ hariścandra bhūpeneveha labhyate || 54 ||
ayamātmā priyo bandhurayamātmā mahaddhanam |
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāmayamātmārjakaḥ paraḥ || 55 |
yāvadātmani vai kṣemaṃ tāvatkṣemaṃ jagattraye |
so'pi kṣemaḥ sumatinā yaśasā saha vāñchrūyate || 56 |
kālo mṛtyurūpaḥ śyeno yāvaddūre vartate tāvaddūraṃ viniryāhīti || 52 |
ātmā dehaḥ || 55 | ,

yaśohīnaṃ tu yatkṣemaṃ tatkṣemānnidhanaṃ varam |
tadyaśaḥ prāpyate puṃbhirnītimārgapravartane || 57 ||
ato nītipathaṃ śrutvā nātha sthānādito vraja |
na gamiṣyasi cevprātastato me saṃsmariṣyasi || 58 |
ityukto'pi sa vai palyā pārāvatyā sumedhayā |
na niryayau pratisthānād bhavitryā prativāritaḥ || 5 9 ||
athoṣasi samāgatya śyenena balinā tadā |
tannirgamādhyā saṃruddhaḥ saṃruddhaḥ kiñcidbhakṣyavatā kiñcidbhakṣyavatā mune || 60 |
dināni katicittatra sthitvā śyeno mahāmatiḥ |
pārāvatamuvācedaṃ dhik dhik tvāṃ tvāṃ pauruṣavarjitam || 61 ||
kiṃ vā yudhyasva durbuddhe kiṃ vā niryāhi me girā |
kṣudhākṣīṇo mṛtaḥ paścānnirayaṃ yāsyasi dhruvam || 62 ||
me vaca iti śeṣaḥ || 58 |
bhavitryā mahāmāyayā || 5 9 |

dvau bhavantāvahaṃ caikaścalau jayaparājayau |
sthānārthaṃ yudhyataḥ sattvātsvargo vā durgameva vā || 63 ||
puruṣārthaṃ samālambya ye yatante mahādhiyaḥ |
vidhireva hi sāhāyyaṃ kuryāttatsattvacoditaḥ || 64 ||
itthaṃ sa śyenasamproktaḥ patnyā'pyutsāhitaḥ khagaḥ |
ayudhyattena śyenena svadurgadvāramāśritaḥ || 65 |
kṣudhitastṛṣitaḥ so'tha śyenena balinā dhṛtaḥ |
caraṇena dṛḍhenāśu cañccā sā'pi dhṛtā khagī || 66 |
tāvādāyoḍḍayāñcakre śyeno vyomani satvaram |
cintayadbhakṣaṇasthānamanyapakṣivivarjitam || 67 |
atha pallyā kalaravaḥ proktastatra sumedhayā |
vaco'vamānitaṃ nātha tvayā me strīti buddhitaḥ || 68 |
yudhyato yuddhaṃ kurvāṇasya puṃsaḥ | sattvāt sattvaguṇādadṛṣṭāditi vā || 63 |
tatsattvacoditastasya yudhyamānasya sattvena guṇenādṛṣṭena vā preritaḥ || 64 | |

ato'vasthāmimāṃ prāptaḥ kiṃ kuryāmabalā yataḥ |
adhunā'pi vacaścaikaṃ karoṣi yadi me priya || 6 9 |
tadā hitaṃ te vakṣyāmi kuru caivāvicāritam |
mamaikavākyakaraṇātstrījito na bhaviṣyasi || 70 |
yāvadāsyagatāsmyasya yāvatsvastho na bhūmigaḥ |
tāvadātmavimuktyai tvamareḥ pādaṃ dṛḍhaṃ daśa || 71 ||
iti patnīvacaḥ śrutvā tathā sa kṛtavān khagaḥ |
sa pīḍito dṛḍhaṃ pāde śyenaścītkṛtavān bahu || 72 |
tena cītkaraṇenā'tha muktā sā mukhasampuṭāt |
pādāṅguliślathatvena so'pi pārāvato'patat || 73 ||
vipadyapi ca na prājñaiḥ santyājyaḥ kvacidudyamaḥ |
kva ca cañcupuṭastasya kva ca tatpādapīḍanam || 74 ||
kya ca dvayostathābhūtādarermokṣaṇamadbhutam |
durbale'pyudyamavati phalaṃ bhāgyaṃ yato'rpayet || 75 ||
daśa cañcvā troṭaya || 71 |
cītkṛtavān śyenajātiśabdamakarot || 72 |

tasmādbhāgyānusāreṇa phalatyeva sadodyamaḥ |
praśaṃsantyudyamaṃ cāto vipadyapi manīṣiṇaḥ || 76 |
atha tau kālayogena vipannau sarayūtaṭe |
muktipuryāmayodhyāyāmeko vidyādharo'bhavat || 77 |
mṛtānāṃ yatra jantūnāṃ kāśīprāptirbhaveddhruvam |
mandāradāmatanayo nāmnā parimalālayaḥ || 78 ||
anekavidyānilayaḥ kalākauśalabhājanam |
kaumāraṃ vaya āsādya śivabhaktiparo'bhavat || 7 9 ||
niyamaṃ cātijagrāha vijitendriyamānasaḥ |
ekapatnīvrataṃ nityaṃ cariṣyāmīti niścitam || 80 |
parayoṣitsamāsaktirāyuḥ kīrtiṃ balaṃ sukham |
haretsvargagatiṃ cāpi tasmāttāṃ varjayetsudhīḥ || 81 |
niyamaṃ viśinaṣṭi - niścitamiti | niścayena citaṃ vyāptamityarthaḥ , tatsvarūpa-
mevāha - ekapatnīti || 80 ||
kimityetādṛśaṃ niyamaṃ gṛhītavāṃstatrāha - parayoṣiditi || 81 |

aparaṃ cāpi niyamaṃ sa śuciṣmān samādade |
gatajanmāntarābhyāsāttrilocanasamāśrayāt || 82 ||
samastapuṇyanilayaṃ samastārthaprakāśakam |
samastakāmajanakaṃ parānandaikakāraṇam || 83 ||
yāvaccharīramarujaṃ yāvannendriyaviplavaḥ |
tāvattrilocanaṃ kāśyāmanarvyāśnāmi nāṇvapi || 84 ||
itthaṃ māndāradāmiḥ sa nityaṃ parimalālayaḥ |
kāśyāṃ triviṣṭapaṃ draṣṭuṃ samāgacchet prayatnavān || 85 ||
pārāvatyapi sā jātā ratnadīpasya mandire |
nāgarājasya pātāle nāmnā ratnāvalīti ca || 86 |
samastanāgakanyānāṃ rūpaśīlakalāguṇaiḥ |
ekaiva ratnabhūtā''sīdratnadīporagātmajā || 87 ||
tasyāḥ sakhīdvayaṃ cāsīdekā nāmnā prabhāvatī |
kalāvatī tathā'nyā ca nityaṃ tadanuge ubhe || 88 |

svadehādanapāyinyau chāyākāntī yathā tathā |
te dve sakhyāvabhūtāṃ hi ratnāvalyā ghaṭodbhava || 8 9 ||
sā tu bālye vyatikrānte kiñcidudbhinnayauvanā |
śivabhaktaṃ svapitaraṃ dṛṣṭvā niyamabhagrahīt || 9 0 |
pitastrilocanaṃ kāśyāmarcayitvā dine dine |
ābhyāṃ sakhībhyāṃ sahitā maunaṃ tyakṣyāmi nānyathā || 9 1 |
evaṃ nāgakumārī sā sakhīdvayasamanvitā |
trilocanaṃ samabhyarcya gṛhānaharaho vrajet || 9 2 ||
dine dine sā pratyagraiḥ kusumairiṣṭagandhibhiḥ |
suvicitrāṇi mālyāni parigumphyā'rcayed vibhum || 9 3 |
tisro'pi gītaṃ gāyanti lasadgāndhārasundaram |
rāsamaṇḍalabhedena lāsyaṃ tisro'pi kurvate || 9 4 |

ṣaṭsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 1 9
vīṇāveṇumṛdaṅgāṃśca layatālavicakṣaṇāḥ |
vādayanti mudā yuktāstisro'pīśvarasannidhau || 9 5 ||
itthamārādhayantīśaṃ timro nāgakumārikāḥ |
vicitragandhamālābhiḥ sammārjanavilepanaiḥ || 9 6 ||
ekadā mādhave māsi tṛtīyāyāmupoṣitāḥ |
rātrau jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā nṛtyagītakathādibhiḥ || 9 7 ||
prātaścaturthī snātvā'tha tīrthe pailipile śubhe |
trilocanaṃ samarcyā'tha prasuptā raṅgamaṇḍape || 9 8 ||
suptāsu tāsu bālāsu trinetraḥ śaśibhūṣaṇaḥ | 隆隆
śuddhakarpūragaurāṅgo jaṭāmukuṭamaṇḍalaḥ || 99 ||
tamālanīlasugrīvaḥ sphuratphaṇivibhūṣaṇaḥ |
vāmārdhavilasacchaktirnāgayajñopavītavān || 900 |
tasmādeva viniṣkramya liṅgātpannagamekhalāt |
uvāca ca tato bālā vibhuruttiṣṭhateti saḥ || 101 |
pilipilaiva pailipilaṃ tasmin || 9 8 |

utthāya tā vinirmārṇya locane śrutisaṅgate | |
aṅgamoṭanavatyaśca jṛmbhābhiḥ kvaṇitānanāḥ || 102 |
yāvatpaśyanti purataḥ sambhramāpannamānasāḥ |
atarkitāgamastāvattābhirdṛṣṭastrilocanaḥ || 103 ||
vavanduratha tā bālā jñātvā lakṣmabhirīśvaram |
tuṣṭuvuśca prahṛṣṭāsyāḥ sannakaṇṭhyo'tigadgadam || 104 ||
jaya śambho jayeśāna jaya sarvaga sarvada |
jaya tripurasaṃhartarjayāndhakaniṣūdana
jaya jālandharahara jaya kandarpadarpahṛt 1
jaya trailokyajanaka jaya jaya trailokyavardhana || 106 |
aṅgamoṭanavatyaḥ śarīracālanavatyaḥ | kvaṇitānanāḥ śabditamukhāḥ || 102 |
sambhrameṇādareṇa āpannaṃ vyāptaṃ mānasaṃ yāsāṃ tāḥ sambhramāpannamānasāḥ | atarkitā-

jaya trailokyanilaya jaya trailokyavandita |
jaya bhaktajanādhīna jaya pramathanāyaka ||| 107 |
jaya tripathagāpāthaḥ prakṣālitajaṭātaṭa |
jaya candrakalājyotirvidyotitajagattraya || 108 |
jaya sarpaphaṇāratnaprabhābhāsitavigraha |
jayādrirājatanayātapaḥkrītārdhadehaka || 10 9 ||
jaya śmaśānanilaya jaya vārāṇasīpriya |
jayā''nandavanādhyāsiprāṇinirvāṇadāyaka || 110 ||
jaya viśvapate śarva śarvarīparivarjita |
jaya nṛtyapriyeśogra jaya gītaviśārada || 111 |
jaya praṇavasaddhāsa jaya dhāmamahānidhe |
jaya śūlin virūpākṣa jaya praṇatasarvada || 112 ||
pātho jalam || 108 |

vidhiḥ sarvavidhijño'pi na tvāṃ stotuṃ vicakṣaṇaḥ |
vāco vācaspaternātha tvatstutau parikuṇṭhitāḥ || 113 ||
vidanti vedāḥ sarvajña na tvāṃ nātha yathārthataḥ |
manatīha mano na tvāmanantaṃ cādivarjitam || 114 ||
namastubhyaṃ namastubhyaṃ namastubhyaṃ namo namaḥ |
trilocana namastubhyaṃ triviṣṭapa namo'stu te || 115 |
ityuktvā daṇḍavad bhūmau praṇipetuḥ kumārikāḥ |
athotthāpya kumārīstāḥ provāca śaśibhūṣaṇaḥ || 116 |
suto mandāradāmnaśca nāmnā parimalālayaḥ |
patirvidyādharavaro bhavatīnāṃ bhaviṣyati | 117 |
ciraṃ vidyādhare loke bhogān bhuktvā samantataḥ |
tato nirvedamāpannāḥ kāśīsiddhimavāpsyatha || 118 ||
vidhirbrahmā || 113 |
manasi mananaviṣayaṃ na karotītyarthaḥ || 114 |
namaḥ śabdāvṛttirādarārthā || 115 |

yūyaṃ tino'pi me bhaktāḥ sa ca vidyādharo yuvā |
catvāro'pyeta evā'tra prānte mokṣamavāpsyatha || 11 9 |
janmāntare'pi me sevā bhavatībhiśca tena ca |
vihitā tena vo janma nirmalaṃ bhaktibhāvitam || 120 |
etacca bhavatī - stotraṃ yaḥ paṭhiṣyati me puraḥ |
tasya kāmaṃ pradāsyāmi bhavatīnāmiva sphuṭam || 121 ||
tyajetkṣapākṛtaṃ pāpaṃ śuciḥ prātaḥ paṭhannaraḥ |
divākṛtamalaṃ hanti sāyaṃ paṭhanataḥ sphuṭam || 122 ||
ityuktavati deveśe tāḥ kanyā hṛṣṭamānasāḥ |
praṇamya procurīśānaṃ prabaddhakarasampuṭāḥ || 123 |
nāgakanyā ūcu : -
pṛcchāmo brūhi no nātha karuṇākara śaṅkara |
janmāntare kathaṃ sevā caturbhirbhavataḥ kṛtā || 124 ||
sa ca bhakta ityekavacanaṃ pariṇamayyā'nuṣaṅgaḥ || 11 9 |

bhava prāgbhavavṛttāntaṃ tasyāpi sukṛtātmanaḥ |
asmākamapi cākhyāhi kṛpāṃ kuru kṛpānidhe ||| 125 |
iti śrutvā praṇayato bālodīritamīśitā |
provāca tāsāṃ tasyāpi bhavāntaraviceṣṭitam || 126 |
īśvara uvāca-
śṛṇudhvaṃ nāgatanayāstisro'pi hi samāhitāḥ |
prāgbhavaṃ bhavatīnāṃ ca tasyā'pi kathayāmyaham || 127 |
eṣā ratnāvalī pūrvamāsītpārāvatī khagī |
sa ca vidyādharavaraḥ patirasyāḥ khago'bhavat || 128 ||
prāsāde'tra mamaitābhyāmuṣitaṃ suciraṃ sukham |
rajaḥ prāsādasaṃlagnaṃ nunnaṃ pakṣānilaiḥ punaḥ || 12 9 |
upariṣṭādadhastācca kṛtā bahvayaḥ pradakṣiṇāḥ |
vyomnā sañcaramāṇābhyāṃ sañcaradbhyāṃ mamā'jire || 130 |
tasya parimalālayasya || 126 |
nunnaṃ preritaṃ dūrīkṛtamiti yāvat || 12 9 |

snātaṃ caturnade tīrthe pītaṃ tatrā'mbu cā'sakṛt |
ābhyāṃ kalaravābhyāṃ ca kṛtaḥ kalaravo mude || 131 ||
etābhyāṃ sthiracetobhyāṃ muditābhyāmatīva hi |
dṛṣṭāni kautukānyatra mama bhaktaiḥ kṛtāni vai || 132 ||
amūbhyāṃ bahuśo dṛṣṭā mama maṅgaladīpikāḥ |
pītaṃ śrutipuṭābhyāṃ ca mama nāmākṣarā'mṛtam || 133 ||
tiryagyoniprabhāveṇa na mṛtau mama sannidhau |
mṛtau puryāmayodhyāyāṃ kāśīprāptikṛti dhruvam || 134 ||
ayodhyānidhanādeṣā ratnadīpasutā'bhavat |
patiḥ pārāvato'syāḥ sa jāto vidyādharāṅgajaḥ || 135 |
eṣā prabhāvatī nāgī nāgarājasya padminaḥ |
iha janmani kanyā''sītpūrvajanma bravīmi vaḥ || 136 ||
triśikhasyoragendrasya sutā ceyaṃ kalāvatī |
etasyā api vṛttāntaṃ niśāmayata vakmyaham || 137 ||
caturnade catasṛṇāṃ nadīnāṃ samāhāraścaturnadaṃ tasmin mude harṣāya mameti śeṣaḥ || 131 |
kāśīprāptiṃ karotīti tathā kāśyāṃ kāśīprāptikṛti || 134 |

bhavāntare tṛtīye'taḥ kanye cārāyaṇasya ha | |
āstāṃ maharṣeḥ śīlāḍhye premavatyau parasparam || 138 ||
pitrā cārāyaṇenā'pi tābhyāṃ sampreritena te |
āmuṣyāyaṇaputrāya datte nārāyaṇāya hi || 13 9 |
aprāptayauvanaḥ so'tha samidāharaṇāya vai |
gato vidhivaśāddaṣṭo dandaśūkena kānane || 140 |
bhavānī - gautamī - nāmnyau te tu cārāyaṇāṅgaje |
vaidhavyaduḥkhamāpanne dainyagraste babhūvatuḥ || 141 |
ata eva prayatnena pariṇetā vivarjayet |
devatāsaridāhvānāṃ kanyāṃ pāṇigrahe sudhīḥ || 142 |
atharṣeḥ kasyaciddaivādāśrame paramādbhute |
rambhāphalānyadattāni mohājjagṛhatustadā || 143 ||
dandaśūkena sarpeṇa || 140 |

kṛtvā māsopavāsādivratāni brāhmaṇāṅgaje |
avāpya nidhanaṃ kālācchākhāmṛgyau babhūvatuḥ || 144 ||
phalacauryavipākena vānarītvaṃ tayorabhūt |
śīlarakṣaṇadharmeṇa kāśyāṃ janimavāpatuḥ || 145 |
sa ca nārāyaṇo vipraḥ pitṛśuśrūṣaṇavrataḥ |
daṣṭo'pi dandaśūkena kāśyāṃ pārāvato'bhavat || 146 ||
evaṃ bhavāntare cāsīdetayoḥ patireṣa kaḥ | |
tisṛṇāṃ bhavatīnāñca bhāvī bhartā'dhunā'pi hi || || 147 ||
prāsādasyā'sya pārśve tu nyagrodhastu mahānabhūt |
tasmin śākhini śākhāḍhye śākhāmṛgyau babhūvatuḥ || 148 ||
catuḥsrotasvinītīrthe krīḍayā ca mamajjatuḥ |
papatuścāpi pānīyaṃ tasmiṃstīrthe tṛṣāture || 14 9 ||
śākhāmṛgyau vānaryau || 144 |
nanu māsopavāsādikṛtavatyostayoḥ kathaṃ śākhāmṛgītvaṃ tatrāha - phaleti | vipākena

jātisvabhāvacāpalyāt krīḍantyau ca pradakṣiṇam |
cakraturbahukṛtvaśca liṅgaṃ dadṛśaturbahu || 150 |
vicarantyāviti svairaṃ tatra nyagrodhasannidhau |
kenacidyogiveṣeṇa pāśena ca niyantrite || 151 |
bhikṣārthaṃ śikṣite tena tadutplutyādinartanam |
atha te kvāpi markaṭyau kāladharmavaśaṃ gate || 152 |
kāśīvāsajapuṇyena trailocanyānusevayā |
prādakṣiṇyādirūpiṇyā jāte nāgasute iti || 153 |
adhunā taṃ patiṃ prāpya vidyādharakumārakam |
nirviśya svargabhogāṃśca kāśyāṃ nirvṛtimeṣyatha || 154 ||
yadalpamapi vai kāśyāṃ kṛtaṃ karma śubhāvaham |
tasya mokṣaḥ parīpāko niścitaṃ madanugrahāt || 155 ||
tadutlutyādi - vānarajāterutphālādi tatprasiddhamiti vā | markaṭyau śākhā-

trilokyā api sarvasyāḥ śreṣṭhā ghārāṇasī purī |
tato'pi liṅgamoṅkāraṃ tato'pyatra trilocanam || 156 |
tiṣṭhamāno'tra liṅge'haṃ bhaktamuktiṃ diśāmyaham |
ataḥ sarvaprayatnena kāśyāṃ pūjyastrilocanaḥ || 157 ||
ityuktvā devadeveśastavyāsādāntarāviśad |
avācyarūpamāsādya sthūlaṃ tribhuvanādapi || 158 ||
tāśca svaṃ svaṃ padaṃ prāpya tadvṛttāntamaśeṣataḥ |
svamātṛpurataśvoktvā kṛtakṛtyā ivā'bhavan || 15 9 |
ekadā mādhave māsi mahāyātrā samāgatā |
vidyādharāstathā nāgā militāḥ saparicchadāḥ || 160 |
virajaske mahākṣetre trilocanasamīpataḥ |
devasya varadānācca pṛṣṭvā'nyonyaṃ kulāvalīm || 161 |
vidyādharāya tā nāgaiḥ kanyāstisro'pi kalpitāḥ |
mandāradāmā santuṣṭaḥ prāpya tacca snuṣātrayam || 162 |
avācyaṃ vāṅmanasayoragocaraṃ sthūlaṃ vyāpakaṃ paripūrṇamiti yāvat || 158 ||
kulāvalīṃ kulaparamparām || 161 |

ratnadīpaśca nāgendraḥ padmī ca bhujageśvaraḥ |
triśikho'pi phaṇīndraśca hṛṣṭā ete trayo'pi ca || 163 |
jāmātaraṃ . samāsādya śubhaṃ parimalālayam |
anyo'nyaṃ svajanāste tu mudā vikasitekṣaṇāḥ || 164 ||
vivāhotsavamākalpya svaṃ svaṃ bhuvanamāviśan |
trilocanasya liṅgasya varṇayanto'tigauravam || 165 |
sa ca vidyādharaḥ śrīmānnāgībhirvipulaṃ sukham |
bhuktvā vārāṇasīṃ prāpya saṃsevyā'tha trilocanam || 166 |
gāyan gītaṃ sumadhuraṃ nāgībhiḥ sahitaḥ kṛtī |
ātmānaṃ cātisaṃsmṛtya madhyeliṅgaṃ layaṃ gataḥ || 167 |
skanda uvāca-
trilocanasya mahimā kalau devena gopitaḥ |
ato'lpasattvā manujā na talliṅgamupāsate || 168 |
atigauravam atimāhātmyam || 165 |
madhyeliṅgaṃ liṅgasya madhye || 167 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ ṣaṭsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 76 |

trilocanakathāmetāṃ śrutvā pāpānvito'pyaho |
vipāpmā jāyate martyo labhate ca parāṃ gatim || 16 9 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe trilocanaprabhāvo
nāma ṣaṭsaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 76 |

|| atha saptasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
pārvatyuvāca-
namaste devadeveśa praṇamatkaruṇānidhe |
vada kedāramāhātmyaṃ bhaktānāmanukampayā ||
tasmi~lliṅge mahāprītistava kāśyāmanuttamā |
tadbhaktāśca janā nityaṃ devadeva mahādhiyaḥ || 2 |
devadeva uvāca-
śṛṇvaparṇe'bhidhāsyāmi kedāreśvarasaṃkathām
samākarṇyā'pi yāṃ pāpo'pyapāpo jāyate kṣaṇāt || 3 |
kedāraṃ yātukāmasya puṃso niścitacetasaḥ |
ājanmasañcitaṃ pāpaṃ tatkṣaṇādeva naśyati || 4 |
gṛhādvinirgate puṃsi kedāramabhiniścitam |
janmadvayārjitaṃ pāpaṃ śarīrādapi nirvrajet || 5 ||
adhyāye saptatitame saptādhika uśattamam |
kedāreśasya māhātmyaṃ varṇyate sarvakāmadam || 1 |
trisaptatitame'dhyāye oṃkārādicaturdaśaliṅgagaṇanāmadhye oṃkārādīnāṃ ṣaṇṇāṃ
pṛcchati - namasta iti || 1 ||

madhyemārgaṃ prapannasya trijanmajanitaṃ tvagham |
dehagehādviniḥsṛtya nirāśaṃ yāti niḥśvasat || 6 |
sāyaṃ kedāra kedāra kedāreti triruccaran |
gṛhe'pi nivasannūnaṃ yātrāphalamavāpnuyāt || 7 ||
dṛṣṭvā kedāraśikharaṃ pītvā tatratyamambu ca |
saptajanmakṛtātpāpānmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 8 |
harapāpahṛde snātvā kedāreśaṃ prapūjya ca |
koṭijanmārjitainobhirmucyate nātra saṃśayaḥ || 9 |
sakṛtpraṇamya kedāraṃ harapāpakṛtodakaḥ |
sthāpya liṅgaṃ hṛdambhoje prānte mokṣaṃ gamiṣyati || 10 ||
madhyemārgaṃ mārgasya madhye || 6 |
kedāraśikharaṃ kedāreśvaraprāsādā'gram | saptajanmakṛtāt saptajanmasvanuṣṭhitāt |
janmajanmakṛtāditi kvacit || 8 |
enobhiḥ pāpaiḥ || 9 |
pāpaṃ haratīti harapāpaṃ harati pāpaṃ yattadvā harapāpam | ubhayathāpyārṣam || 10 ||

harapāpahade śrāddhaṃ śraddhayā yaḥ kariṣyati |
uddhṛtya saptapuruṣān sa me lokaṃ gamiṣyati || 11 ||
purā rāthantare kalpe yadabhūdatra tacchṛṇu |
aparṇe dattakarṇā tvaṃ varṇayāmi tavā'grataḥ || 12 ||
eko brāhmaṇadāyāda ujjayinyā ihā''gataḥ |
kṛtopanayanaḥ pitrā brahmacaryavrate sthitaḥ || 13 |
sthalīṃ pāśupatīṃ kāśīṃ sa vilokya samantataḥ |
dvijaiḥ pāśupataiḥ kīrṇāṃ jaṭāmukuṭabhūṣitaiḥ || 14 ||
kṛtaliṅgasamarceśca bhūtibhūṣitavarṣmabhiḥ |
bhikṣāhṛtānnasantuṣṭaiḥ puṣṭairgaṅgāmṛtodakaiḥ || 15 |
kedāreśvaraṃ didṛkṣūṇāṃ madhyemārgaṃ mṛtānāṃ kailāse vāso bhavatyasminnarthe

babhūvā''nanditamanā vrataṃ jagrāha cottamam |
hiraṇyagarbhādācāryānmahatpāśupatā'bhidham || 16 ||
sa ca śiṣyo vaśiṣṭho'bhūtsarvapāśupatottamaḥ |
snātvā hṛde harapāpe nityaṃ prātaḥ samutthitaḥ || 17 ||
vibhūtyā'harahaḥ snāti trikālaṃ liṅgamarcayan |
nāntaraṃ sa vijānāti śivaliṅge gurau tathā || 18 ||
sa dvādaśābdadeśīyo vaśiṣṭho guruṇā saha |
yayau kedārayātrārthaṃ giriṃ gaurīgurorgurum || 1 9 ||
yatra gatvā na śocanti kiñcitsaṃsāriṇaḥ kvacit |
prāśyodakaṃ liṅgarūpaṃ liṅgarūpatvamāgatāḥ || 20 ||
asidhāraṃ giriṃ pāpya vaśiṣṭhasya tapasvinaḥ |
gururhiraṇyagarbhākhyaḥ pañcatvamagamattadā || 21 ||
paśyatāṃ tāpasānāṃ ca vimāne sārvakāmike |
āropya taṃ pāriṣadāḥ kailāsamanayanmudā || 22 ||
prakṛṣṭo vaśī vaśiṣṭha iti yāvat | vasiṣṭha iti vā pāṭhaḥ || 17 |

yastu kedāramuddiśya gehādardhapathe'pyo |
akātarastyajevprāṇān kailāse sa ciraṃ vaset || 23 ||
tadāścaryaṃ samālokya sa vaśiṣṭhastapodhanaḥ |
kedārameva liṅgeṣu bahvamaṃsta suniścitam || 24 ||
atha kṛtvā sa kedārīṃ yātrāṃ vārāṇasīmagāt |
agrahīnniyamaṃ cāpi yathārthaṃ cākarotpunaḥ || 25 |
praticaitraṃ sadā caitryāṃ yāvajjīvamahaṃ dhruvam |
vilokayiṣye kedāraṃ vasan vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 26 ||
tena yātrāḥ kṛtāḥ samyak ṣaṣṭirekādhikā mudā |
ānandakānane nityaṃ vasatā brahmacāriṇā || 27 |
punaryātrāṃ sa vai cakre madhau nikaṭavartini |
paramotsāhasantuṣṭaḥ palitākalito'pyalam || 28 |
tapodhanaistannidhanaṃ śaṅkamānairnivāritaḥ |
kāruṇyapūrṇahṛdayairanyairapi ca saṅgibhiḥ || 2 9 ||

tato'pi na tadutsāhabhaṅgo'bhūddṛdṛḍhacetasaḥ |
madhyemārgaṃ mṛtasyāpi guroriva gatirmama || 30 ||
iti J niścitacetaske vaśiṣṭhe tāpase śucau |
aśūdrānnaparīpuṣṭe tuṣṭo'haṃ caṇḍike'bhavam || 31 |
svapne mayā sa samprokto vaśiṣṭhastāpasottamaḥ |
dṛḍhavrata prasanno'smi kedāraṃ viddhi māmiha || 32 ||
abhīṣṭaṃ ca varaṃ mattaḥ prārthayasvā'vicāritam |
ityuktavatyapi mayi svapno mithyeti so'bravīt || 33 ||
tato'pi sa mayā proktaḥ svapno mithyā'śuciṣmatām |
bhavādṛśāmamithyaiva svākhyāsadṛśavartinām || 34 ||
varaṃ brūhi prasanno'smi svapnaśaṅkāṃ tyaja dvija |
tava sattvavataḥ kiñcinmayā'deyaṃ na kiñcana || 35 ||
ityuktaṃ me samākarṇya varayāmāsa māmiti |
śiṣyo hiraṇyagarbhasya tapasvijanasattamaḥ || 36 ||
gurormahata ḥ hiraṇyagarbhasya vā || 30 |
svākhyāsadṛśaṃ vartituṃ śīlaṃ yeṣāṃ teṣām || 34 |
sattvavato dhairyavataḥ sāttvikasyeti vā || 35 |

yadi prasanno deveśa tadā me sānugā sānugā ime |
sarve śūlinnanugrāhyā eṣa eva varo mama ||| 37 |
devi tasyedamākarṇya paropakṛtiśālinaḥ |
vacanaṃ nitarāṃ prītastatheti tamuvāca ha || 38 |
punaḥ paropakaraṇāttattapo dviguṇīkṛtam |
tena puṇyena sa mayā punaḥ prokto varaṃ vṛṇu || 3 9 ||
sa vaśiṣṭho mahāprājño dṛḍhapāśupatavrataḥ |
devi me prārthayāmāsa sa himaśailādiha sthitim || 40 ||
tatastattapasākṛṣṭaḥ kalāmātreṇa tatra hi |
himaśaile tataścātra sarvabhāvena saṃsthitaḥ || 41 ||
tataḥ prabhāte sañjāte sarveṣāṃ paśyatāmaham |
himādreḥ prasthitaḥ prātaḥ stūyamānaḥ surarṣibhiḥ || 42 ||
sa vaśiṣṭha ityārabhyātra pūrvaṃ tvityataḥ prāktanasya granthasyā'yaṃ bhāvaḥ - harapāpaṃ
tīrthaṃ kedārākhyaṃ liṅgaṃ ca kāśyāṃ pūrvamapyastyeva | vaśiṣṭhavaraprārthanā tu tatra
kalāmātrāva- śeṣeṇātra sarvātmanāvasthitiriti | ata eva kāśīsthasya vaśiṣṭhasya

vaśiṣṭhaṃ purataḥ kṛtvā sarvasārthasamāyutam |
harapāpahade tīrthe sthito'haṃ tadanugrahāt || 43 ||
matparigrahataḥ sarve harapāpe kṛtodakāḥ |
ārādhya māmanenaiva vapuṣā siddhimāgatāḥ || 44 |
tadā prabhṛti liṅge'smin sthitaḥ sādhaka siddhaye |
avimukte pare kṣetre kalikāle viśeṣataḥ || 45 ||
tuṣārādriṃ samāruhya kedāraṃ vīkṣya yatphalam |
tatphalaṃ saptaguṇitaṃ kāśyāṃ kedāradarśane || 46 ||
gaurīkuṇḍaṃ yathā tatra haṃsatīrthaṃ ca nirmalam |
yathā madhusravā gaṅgā kāśyāṃ tadakhilaṃ tathā || 47 ||
idaṃ tīrthaṃ harapāpaṃ saptajanmāghanāśanam |
gaṅgāyāṃ militaṃ paścājjanmakoṭikṛtāghaham || 48 ||
atra pūrvaṃ tu kākolau yudhyantau khānnipetatuḥ |
paśyatāṃ tatra saṃsthānāṃ haṃsau bhūtvā vinirgatau || 4 9 ||
tatra himādrau kedāre || 47 ||
droṇakākau || 4 9 |

gauri tvayā kṛtaṃ pūrvaṃ snānamātraṃ mahāhade |
gaurītīrthaṃ tataḥ khyātaṃ sarvatīrthottamottamam || 50 ||
atrā'mṛtasravā gaṅgā mahāmohāndhakārahṛt |
anekajanmajanitajāḍyadhvaṃsavidhāyinī || 51 ||
sarasā mānasenātra pūrvaṃ taptaṃ mahātapaḥ |
atastu mānasaṃ tīrthaṃ jane khyātimidaṃ gatam || 52 |
atra pūrvaṃ janaḥ snānamātreṇaiva pramucyate |
paścātprasāditaścāhaṃ tridaśairmuktidurdaśaiḥ || 53 ||
sarve muktiṃ gamiṣyanti yadi deveha mānavāḥ |
kedārakuṇḍe susnātāstadocchittirbhaviṣyati || 54 ||
sarveṣāmeva varṇānāmāśramāṇāṃ ca dharmiṇām |
tasmāttanuvisarge'tra mokṣaṃ dāsyati nānyathā || 55 |
mānasena sarasā mānasasaro'dhiṣṭhātrā | dvijeneti kvacit | tatra tannāmnā

tatastaduparodhena tatheti ca mayoditam |
tadārabhya mahādevi snānātkedārakuṇḍataḥ || 56 |
samarcanācca bhaktyā vai mama nāmajapādapi |
naiḥśreyasīṃ śriyaṃ dadyāmanyatrāpi tanutyajām || 57 ||
kedāratīrthe yaḥ snātvā piṇḍān dāsyati cātvaraḥ |
ekottaraśataṃ vaṃśyāstasya tīrṇā bhavāmbudhim || 58 ||
bhaumavāre yadā darśastadā yaḥ śrāddhado naraḥ |
kedārakuṇḍamāsādya gayāśrāddhena kiṃ tataḥ || 5 9 |
kedāraṃ gantukāmasya buddhirdeyā narairiyam |
kāśyāṃ spṛśaṃstvaṃ kedāraṃ kṛtakṛtyo bhaviṣyasi || 60 |
caitrakṛṣṇacaturdaśyāmupavāsaṃ vidhāya ca |
trigaṇḍūṣān piban prātarhalliṅgamadhitiṣṭhati || 61 ||
kedārodakapānena yathā tatra phalaṃ bhavet |
tathā'tra jāyate puṃsāṃ strīṇāṃ cāpi na saṃśayaḥ || 62 ||

kedārabhaktaṃ sampūjya vāso'nnadraviṇādibhiḥ |
ājanmajanitaṃ pāpaṃ tyaktvā yāti mamālayam || 63 |
āṣaṇmāsaṃ trikālaṃ yaḥ kedāreśaṃ namasyati |
taṃ namasyanti satataṃ lokapālā yamādayaḥ || 64 |
kalau kedāramāhātmyaṃ yo'pi ko'pi na vetsyati |
yo vetsyati sa puṇyātmā sarvaṃ vetsyati sa dhruvam || 65 ||
kedāreśaṃ sakṛddṛṣṭyā devi me'nucaro bhavet | |
tasmātkāśyāṃ prayatnena kedāreśaṃ vilokayet || 66 ||
citrāṅgadeśvaraṃ liṅga kedārāduttare śubham |
tasyā'rcanānnaro nityaṃ svargabhogānupāśnute || 67 ||
kedārāddakṣiṇe bhāge nīlakaṇṭhavilokanāt |
saṃsāroragadaṣṭasya tasya nāsti viṣādbhayam || 68 |
viṣādduḥkharūpāt || 68 |

tadvāyavye'mbarīṣeśo narastadavalokanāt |
garbhavāsaṃ na cāpnoti saṃsāre duḥkhasaṅkule || 6 9 ||
indradyumneśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tatsamīpe samarcya ca |
tejomayena yānena sa svargabhuvi modate || 70 ||
taddakṣiṇe naro dṛṣṭvā liṅgaṃ kālañjareśvaram |
jarāṃ kālaṃ vinirjitya mama loke vasecciram || 71 ||
dṛṣṭvā kṣemeśvaraṃ liṅgamudak citrāṅgadeśvarāt |
sarvatra kṣemamāpnoti loke'tra ca paratra ca || 72 |
skanda uvāca - devadevena
vindhyāre kedāramahimā mahān |
ityākhyāyi purā'mbāyai mayā te'pi nirūpitaḥ || 73 |
kedāreśvaraliṅgasya śrutyotpattiṃ kṛtī naraḥ |
śivalokamavāpnoti niṣpāpo jāyate kṣaṇāt || 74 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe kedāramahimākhyānaṃ nāma saptasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 77 |
ākhyāyi kathitaḥ || 73 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 77 |

|| athāṣṭasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
pārvatyuvāca-
ānandakānane śambho yalliṅgaṃ puṇyavardhanam | |
yannāmasmaraṇādeva mahāpātakasaṃkṣayaḥ || 1 |
yatsevyaṃ sādhakairnityaṃ yatra prītiranuttamā |
yatra dattaṃ hutaṃ japtaṃ dhyātaṃ bhavati cā'kṣayam || 2 |
yasya saṃsmaraṇādeva yalliṅgasya vilokanāt |
yalliṅgapraṇateścāpi yasya saṃsparśanādapi || 3 |
pañcāmṛtādisnapanapūrvādyasyārcanādapi |
talliṅgaṃ kathayeśāna bhavecchreyaḥ paramparā || 4 |
skanda uvāca-
iti devīsamuditaṃ samākarṇya ghaṭodbhava |
sarvajñena yathākhyātaṃ tadākhyāsyāmi te śṛṇu || 5 |
aṣṭādhike mahāścarye śrotrānandavidhāyini |
adhyāye saptatitame dharmeśamahimocyate || 1
viśeṣaṃ jñātuṃ pṛcchati - ānandeti || 1 |
śreyaḥ paramparā nirantaraṃ śreyaḥ || 4 |
samuditaṃ samyak pṛṣṭam || 5 |

devadeva uvāca-
ume bhavatyā yatpṛṣṭaṃ bhavabandhavimokṣakṛt |
tato'haṃ kathayiṣyāmi liṅgaṃ sthiramanā bhava || 6 ||
ānandakānane cā'tra rahasyaṃ paramaṃ mama |
na mayā kasyacit khyātaṃ na praṣṭuṃ vetti kaścana || 7 ||
santi liṅgānyanekāni mamā''nandavane priye |
paraṃ tvayā yathā pṛṣṭaṃ yathāvattad bravīmi te || 8 |
yatra muktisvarūpā tvaṃ svayaṃ tiṣṭhasi viśvage |
yatra te nandanaścāsti kṣetravighnavighātakṛt || 9 |
mamā'pi yena tripurasamare jayakāṅkṣiṇaḥ |
jayāśā pūritā pūritā stutyā bahumodakadānataḥ || 10 ||
ume iti || u iti sambodhya tapase mā iti mātrā niṣiddhatvādumā | tathā ca
harivaṃśe -
ekā tatra nirāhārā tāṃ mātā pratyabodhayat | |
umā iti niṣedhantī mātṛsnehena yantritā ||
sā tathoktā tadā mātrā devī duścaracāriṇī |
umetyevā'bhavatkhyātā triṣu lokeṣu viśrutā || iti || || 6 ||
yatreti saptamyantānāṃ padānāṃ tasya liṅgasyeti saptamenānvayaḥ | sarvatra sāmīpye

yatrā'sti tīrthamaghahṛt pitṛprītivivardhanam |
yatsnānād vṛtrahā vṛtravadhapāpādvimuktavān || 11 |
dharmādhikaraṇaṃ yatra dharmarājo'pyavāptavān |
suduṣkaraṃ tapastaptvā parameṇa samādhinā || 12 ||
pakṣiṇo'pi hi yatrāpurjñānaṃ saṃsāramocanam |
ramyo hiraṇmayo yatra babhūva bahupāddrumaḥ || 13 ||
yalliṅgadarśanādeva durdamo nāma pārthivaḥ |
udvejako'pi lokānāṃ kṣaṇāddharmamatistvabhūt || 14 ||
tasya liṅgasya māhātmyamāvirbhāvaṃ ca sundari |
niśāmayā'bhidhāsyāmi mahāpātakanāśanam || 15 ||
dharmapīṭhaṃ taduddiṣṭamatrānandavane mama |
tatpīṭhadarśanādeva naraḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 16 |
purā vivasvataḥ putro yamaḥ paramasaṃyamī |
tapastatāpa vipulaṃ viśālākṣi tavā'grataḥ || 17 |

śiśire jalamadhyastho varṣāsvabhrāvakāśakaḥ |
tapartau pañcavahnisthaḥ kadāciditi taptavān || 18 ||
pādāgrāṅguṣṭhabhūsparśī bahukālaṃ sa tasthivān |
ekapādasthitaḥ so'pi kadācid bahvanehasam || 1 9 ||
samīrābhyavahartā''sīd bahudiṣṭaṃ sa diṣṭavān |
papau sa tu pipāsuḥ san kuśāgrajalavipruṣaḥ || 20 |
divyāṃ caturyugīmitthaṃ sa nināya tapaścaran |
caturguṇaṃ didṛkṣurmāṃ parameṇa samādhinā || 21 |
tato'haṃ tasya tapasā santuṣṭaḥ sthiracetasaḥ |
yayau tasmai varaṃ dātuṃ śamanāya mahātmane || 22 ||

vaṭaḥ kāñcanaśākhākhyo yastapastāpasantatim |
dūrīcakāra succhāyo bahudvijasamāśrayaḥ || 23 |
mandamandamarullolapallavaiḥ karapallavaiḥ |
yo'dhvagānadhyasantaptānāhvayediva tāpahṛt || 24 |
svānurāgaiḥ surabhibhiḥ svādubhiśca pacelimaiḥ |
prīṇayedarthisārthaṃ yo vṛttairnijaphalairalam || 25 ||
tadadhastāt paraṃ vīkṣya tamahaṃ tapanāṅgajam |
sthāṇuniścalavarṣyāṇaṃ nāsāgranyastalocanam || 26 ||
tapastejobhirudyadbhiḥ paritaḥ paridhīkṛtam |
bhānumantamivākāśe sunīle svena tejasā || 27 |
svākhyāṅkitaṃ mahāliṅga pratiṣṭhāpyā'tibhaktitaḥ |
svacchasūryopalamayaṃ tejaḥpuñjairivārcitam || 28 |
tapastāpasantatiṃ tapojanyatāpaparamparām | dvijāḥ pakṣiṇaḥ || 23 |
mandamandamarullolapallavaiḥ īṣadīṣatpavanāndolitapatraiḥ || 24 |

sākṣīkṛtyeva talliṅgaṃ tapyamānaṃ mahattapaḥ |
pratyavocaṃ dharmarājaṃ varaṃ brūhīti bhāskare || 2 9 |
alaṃ taptvā mahābhāga prasanno'smi śubhavata |
niśamya śamanaśceti dṛṣṭvā māṃ praṇanāma ha || 30 |
cakāra stavanaṃ cāpi parihṛṣṭendriyeśvaraḥ |
nirvyājaṃ sa samādhiṃ ca visṛjya bradhnanandanaḥ || 31 ||
dharma uvāca-
namo namaḥ kāraṇakāraṇānāṃ namo namaḥ kāraṇavarjitāya |
namo namaḥ kāryamayāya tubhyaṃ namo namaḥ kāryavibhinnarūpa || 32 ||
arūparūpāya samastarūpiṇe parāṇurūpāya parāparāya |
apārapārāya parābdhipārapradāya tubhyaṃ śaśimaulaye namaḥ || 33 ||
parihṛṣṭāni indriyāṇi teṣāmīśvaraṃ manaśca yasya sa parihṛṣṭendriyeśvaraḥ |

anīśvarastvaṃ jagadīśvarastvaṃ guṇātmakastvaṃ guṇavarjitastvam |
kālātparastvaṃ prakṛteḥ parastvaṃ kālāya kālātprakṛte namaste || 34 ||
tvameva nirvāṇapadaprado'si tvameva nirvāṇamanantaśakte |
tvamātmarūpaḥ paramātmarūpaḥ tvamantarātmā'si carācarasya ||35 |
tvatto jagattvaṃ jagadeva sākṣājjagattvadīyaṃ jagadekabandho |
hartā'vitā tvaṃ prathamo vidhātā vidhātṛviṣṇvīśa namo namaste || 36 |
mṛḍastvameva śrutivartmageṣu tvameva bhīmo'śrutivartmageṣu | |
tvaṃ śaṅkaraḥ soma subhaktibhājāmugro'si rūdra tvamabhaktibhājām || 37 ||

tvameva śūlī dviṣatāṃ tvameva vinamraceto vacasāṃ śivo'si |
śrīkaṇṭha ekaḥ svapadaśritānāṃ durātmanāṃ hālahalograkaṇṭhaḥ || 38 |
namo'stu te śaṅkara śānta śambho namo'stu te candrakalāvataṃsa |
namo'stu tubhyaṃ phaṇibhūṣaṇāya pinākapāṇe'ndhakavairiṇe namaḥ || 3 9 |
sa eva dhanyastava bhaktibhāgyastavā'rcako yaḥ sukṛtī sa eva |
tava stutiṃ yaḥ kurute sadaiva sa stūyate duścyavanādidevaiḥ || 40 ||
kastvāmiha stotumanantaśakte śaknoti mādṛglaghubuddhivaibhavaḥ |
prācāṃ na vācāmiha gocaro yaḥ stutistvayīyaṃ natireva yāvat || 41 ||
skanda uvāca -
udīrya sūryasya suto'tibhaktyā namaḥ śivāyeti samuccaran saḥ |
ilāmilanmauliratīva hṛṣṭaḥ sahasrakṛtyaḥ praṇanāma śambhum || 42 ||

tataḥ śivastaṃ tapasā'tikhinnaṃ nivārya tābhyaḥ praṇatibhya īśvaraḥ |
varān dadau saptaturaṅgasūnave tvaṃ dharmarājo bhava nāmato'pi || 43 ||
tvameva dharmādhikṛtau samastaśarīriṇāṃ sthāvarajaṅgamānām |
mayā niyukto'dyadinādikṛtyaḥ praśādhi sarvān mama śāsanena || 44 ||
tvaṃ dakṣiṇāyāśca diśo'dhināthastvaṃ karmasākṣī bhava sarvajantoḥ |
tvaddarśitādhyāna ito vrajantu svakarmayogyāṃ gatimuttamā'dhamāḥ || 45 ||
tvayā yadetanmama bhaktibhājā liṅgaṃ samārādhitamatra dharma |
taddarśanāt sparśanato'rcanācca siddhirbhaviṣyatyacireṇa puṃsām || 46 |
dharmeśvaraṃ yaḥ sakṛdeva martyo vilokayiṣyatyavadātabuddhiḥ |
snātvā puraste'tra ca dharmatīrthe na tasya dūre puruṣārthasiddhiḥ || 47 |

kṛtvā'pyaghānāmiha yaḥ sahasraṃ dharmeśvaraṃ paśyati daivayogāt |
saheta no jātu sa nārakīṃ vyathāṃ kathāṃ tadīyāṃ divi kurvate'marāḥ || 48 ||
yo dharmapīṭhaṃ pratilabhya kāśyāṃ svaśreyase no yatate'tra martyaḥ |
kathaṃ sa dharma tvamivā'titejāḥ kariṣyati svaṃ kṛtakṛtyameva || 4 9 ||
tvayā yathāptā iha dharmarāja manorathāste gurubhistapobhiḥ |
tathaiva dharmeśvarabhaktibhājāṃ kāmāḥ phaliṣyanti na saṃśayo'tra || 50
kṛtvā'pyaghānyeva mahāntyapīha dharmeśvarāca sakṛdeva kurvan |
kuto bibheti priyabandhureva tava tvadīyārcitaliṅgabhaktaḥ || 51 ||
patreṇa puṣpeṇa jalena dūrvayā yo dharma dharmeśvaramarcayiṣyati |
samarcayiṣyantyamṛtāndhasastaṃ mandāramālābhiratiprahṛṣṭāḥ || 52 |

tvatto vibheṣyanti kṛtainaso ye bhayaṃ na teṣāṃ bhavitā kadācit |
dharmeśvarācaracanāṃ kariṣyatāṃ hariṣyatāṃ bandhutayā manaste || 53 |
yadatra dāsyanti hi dharmapīṭhe narā dhunadyāṃ kṛtamajjanāśca |
tadakṣayaṃ bhāviyugāntare'pi kṛtapraṇāmāstava dharmaliṅge || 54 ||
ye kārtike māsi sitāṣṭamītithau yātrāṃ kariṣyanti narā upoṣitāḥ |
rātrau ca vai jāgaraṇaṃ mahotsavairdharmeśvare te na punarbhavā bhuvi || 55 ||
stutiṃ ca ye vai tvadudīritāmimāṃ narāḥ paṭhiṣyanti tavā'grataḥ kvacit |
nirainasaste mama lokagāminaḥ prāpsyanti te vai bhavataḥ sakhitvam || 56 |
punarvaraṃ brūhi yathepsitaṃ dade tejonidhernandana dharmarāja |
adeyamatrā'sti na kiñcideva te vidhehi vāgudyamamātrameva || 57 ||
cariṣyatāmiti pāṭhe te mano'nukūlaṃ kariṣyatāmityarthaḥ || 53 |
yugāntare'pi apiśabdātkalpāntare'pi || 54 |
nirenaso niṣpāpāḥ || 56 |

prasannamūrtiṃ sa vilokya śaṅkaraṃ kāruṇyapūrṇaṃ svamanorathābhidham |
ānandasandohasaro nimagno vaktuṃ kṣaṇaṃ naiva śaśāka kiñcit || 58 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dharmeśamahimākhyānaṃ nāmāṣṭasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 78 |
svamanorathābhidhaṃ svamanorathānabhito dadātīti tam |
ānandasandoha eva saraṃstasmin magnaḥ || 58 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭasaptatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 78 |

|| athaikonāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca -
ānandavāṣpasalilaruddhakaṇṭhaṃ vilokya tam | |
mṛḍaḥ pasparśa pāṇibhyāṃ saudhābhyāṃ tu sudhāmbudhiḥ || 1 |
atha tatsparśasaukhyena dharmarājo mahātapāḥ |
punaraṅkurayāmāsa tapo'gnijvalitāṃ tanum || 2 |
tataḥ provāca sa brānirdevadevamumāpatim |
prasannavadanaṃ śāntaṃ śāntapāriṣadāvṛtam || 3 |
prasanno'si yadīśāna sarvajña karuṇānidhe |
kimanyena vareṇā'tra yattvaṃ sākṣātkṛto mayā || 4 ||
ekena rahite'śītitame'dhyāye manorame |
dharmeśvarasya mahimā varṇyate'timanoharaḥ || 1 |
saudhābhyāmamṛtasaṃsrāvibhyām || 1 |
aṅkurayāmāsa rohayāmāsa || || 2 |
bradhnasya sūryasya putro brāghniḥ || 3 |

yaṃ na vedā viduḥ samyaṅ na ca tau vedapūruṣau |
tato'pi varayogyo'smi tannātha prārthayāmyaham || 5 ||
śrīkaṇṭhā'ṇḍajaḍimbhānāmamīṣāṃ madhurabruvām
mattapaścirasākṣīṇāṃ matpuraḥ prāptajanmanām || 6 |
pitṛbhyāṃparihīnānāmitihāsakathāvidām
tyaktāhāravihārāṇāṃ kīrāṇāṃ varado bhava || 7 |
etaṭhaprasūtisamaye āmayena prapīḍitā '
śukī pañcatvamāpannā śukaḥ śyenena bhakṣitaḥ || 8 |
rakṣitānāmanāthānāṃ sadā manmukhadarśinām |
anāthanātha bhavatā hyāyuḥśeṣasvarūpiṇā || 9 |

iti dharmavacaḥ śrutvā paropakṛtinirmalam | |
tānāhūya mune śambhurvinayāvanatānanān || 10 ||
uvāca dharme'tiprītaḥ śukaśāvānidaṃ vacaḥ |
ayi pattrarathā brūta sādhavo dharmasaṅgatāḥ || 11 ||

ekonāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ 5 9
lābhāḥ santūdyamavatāṃ girīśeha paraḥśatāḥ |
paraṃ paro'yaṃ lābho'tra yattvaṃ dṛggocarībhaveḥ || 15 ||
yadetaddṛśyate nātha tatsarvaṃ kṣaṇabhaṅguram |
abhaṅguro bhavānekastvatsaparyā'pyabhaṅgurā || 16 ||
vicitrajanmakoṭīnāṃ smṛtirno'tra parisphuret |
etattapasviracitaliṅgapūjāvilokanāt || 17 ||
devayonirapi prāptā ciramasmābhirīśitaḥ |
divyāṅganāḥ sahasrāṇi tatra bhuktāḥ 1 svalīlayā || 18 |
āsurī dānavī nāgī nairṛtī cā'pi kainnarī |
vidyādharī ca gāndharvī yonirasmābhirarjitā || 1 9 ||
naratve bhūpatitvaṃ ca pariprāptamanekaśaḥ |
jale jalacaratvaṃ ca sthale ca sthalacāritā || 20 ||
bhaveḥ bhavasi || 15 |

vane vanaukaso jātā grāmeṣu grāmavāsinaḥ |
dātāro yācitāraśca rakṣitāraśca ghātukāḥ || 21 ||
sukhino'pi vayaṃ jātā duḥkhino vayamāsma ca |
jetāraśca vayaṃ jātāḥ parājetāra eva ca || 22 |
adhītino'pi mūrkhāśca svāminaḥ sevakā api |
caturṣu bhūtagrāmeṣu uttamā'dhamamadhyamāḥ ||| 23 |
abhūma bhūriśaḥ śambho na kvāpi sthairyamāgatāḥ |
ito yonestato yonau tato yonestato'nyataḥ || 24 ||
pinākin kvāpi na prāpi sukhaleśo manāgapi |
idānīṃ puṇyasambhārairdharmeśvaravilokanāt || 25 ||
tāpaneḥ sutapovahnijvālāprajvalitainasaḥ |
saṃvīkṣya tryakṣa sākṣāttvāṃ kṛtakṛtyā babhūvima || 26 |
ghātukāḥ hiṃsrāḥ || 21 |
āsma jātāḥ || 22 |
caturṣu jarāyujāṇḍajasvedajodbhijjeṣu || 23 |
manāgapi sukhaleśaḥ atyalpo'pyānandalavo'smābhirna labdha iti śeṣaḥ | tāpaneḥ
tapanātmajasya || 26 |

tathāpi cedvaro deyastiryaśvasmāsu dhūrjaṭe |
kṛpaṇeṣvapi śocyeṣu jñānaṃ sarvajña dehi tat || 27 ||
yena jñānena muktāḥ smo'muṣmātsaṃsārabandhanāt |
yantritāḥ prākṛtaiḥ pāśairadurbhedyaiśca mādṛśaiḥ || 28 |
aindraṃ padaṃ na vāñchāmo na cāndraṃ nā'nyadeva hi |
vāñchāmaḥ kevalaṃ mṛtyuṃ kāśyāṃ śambho'punarbhavam || 2 9 ||
tvatsānnidhyādvijānīmaḥ sarvajña sakalaṃ vayam |
yathā candanasaṃsargātsarve surabhayo drumāḥ || 30 ||
etadeva paraṃ jñānaṃ saṃsārocchittikāraṇam |
vapurvisarjanaṃ kāle yatvā''nandakānane || 31 ||
na vidyate punarbhavo'smiṃstaṃ mṛtyum || 2 9 |
nanu kāśīmaraṇe kaivalyamiti kuto'jñāyi tatrāhuḥ- tvaditi || 30 ||
nanu tathāpi jñānaṃ dehīti prārthayitvā kāśīmṛtyuprārthanamakāṇḍatāṇḍavamatyāśaṅkyāhuḥ -

nirmathya viṣvagvāgjālaṃ sārabhūtamidaṃ param |
brahmaṇodīritaṃ pūrvaṃ kāśyāṃ muktistanutyajām || 32 ||
yadvācyaṃ bahubhirgranthaistadṛṣṭābhirihākṣaraiḥ |
hariṇoktaṃ ravipuraḥ kaivalyaṃ kāśisaṃsthitau || 33 ||
yājñavalkyo munivaraḥ proktavān munisaṃsadi |
raveradhītya nigamān kāśyāmante paraṃ padam || 34 ||
svāminā'pi jagaddhātrī purato mandarācale |
idameva purā proktaṃ kāśīnirvāṇajanmabhūḥ || 35 ||
kṛṣṇadvaipāyano'pyevaṃ śambho vakṣyati nānyathā |
yatra viśveśvaraḥ sākṣānmuktistatra pade pade || 36 |
vadantyanye'pi munayastīrthasaṃnyāsakāriṇaḥ |
cirantanā lomaśādyāḥ kāśikā muktikāśikā || 37 ||
kāśyāṃ mṛtau jñānadvārā muktirityatreśvarāṇāṃ munīnāṃ ca sammatimāhuḥ -

vayamapyevaṃ jānīmo yatra svargataraṅgiṇī |
ānandakānane śambhormokṣastatraiva niścitam || 38 ||
bhūtaṃ bhāvi bhaviṣyaṃ yatsvarge martye rasātale |
tatsarvameva jānīmo dharmeśā'nugrahātparāt || 3 9 ||
ato hiraṇyagarbhoktaṃ hariproktaṃ munīritam |
bhavatoktaṃ ca nikhilaṃ śambho jānīmahe vayam || 40 ||
karāmalakavatsarvametad brahmāṇḍagolakam |
asmadvāggocare'styeva dharmapīṭhaniṣevaṇāt || 41 |
dharmarājasya tapasā tiryañco'pi vayaṃ vibho |
jātāḥ sma nirvikalpaṃ hi sarvajñānasya bhājanam || 42 ||
madhuraṃ mṛdulaṃ satyaṃ svapramāṇaṃ susaṃskṛtam |
hitaṃ mitaṃ sadṛṣṭāntaṃ śrutvā pakṣisubhāṣitam || 43 |
nanu tiraścāmetādṛśaṃ jñānaṃ kathamityāśaṅkayaḥ tvatsānnidhyādityādinoktaṃ sahetukaṃ
jñānaṃ spaṣṭayanti - bhūtamiti || 3 9 |
svapramāṇaṃ svānubhavaikagocaram || 43 |

devo'tivismayāpanno'varṇayatpīṭhagauravam
trailokyanagare cātra kāśī rājagṛhaṃ mama || 44 ||
tatrāpi bhogabhavanamanarghyamaṇinirmitam |
mokṣalakṣmīvilāsākhyaḥ prāsādo me'tiśarmabhūḥ || 45 |
patattriṇo'pi mucyante yaṃ kurvāṇāḥ pradakṣiṇam |
svecchayā vicarantaḥ khe khecarā api devatāḥ || 46 |
mokṣalakṣmīvilāsākhyaprāsādasya vilokanāt |
śarīrāddūrato yāti brahmahatyā'pi nānyathā || 47 |
mokṣalakṣmīvilāsasya kalaśo yairnirīkṣitaḥ |
nidhānakalaśāstāṃstu na muñcanti pade pade || 48 |
dūrato'pi patākā'pi mama prāsādamūrdhagā |
netrātithīkṛtā yaistu nityaṃ te'tithayo mama || 4 9 |
pīṭhagauravaṃ sthānamāhātmyam ||| 44 |
netrātithīkṛtā cakṣurviṣayīkṛtā || 4 9 |

bhūmiṃ bhittvā svayaṃ jātastatprāsādamiṣeṇa hi |
ānandākhyasya kandasya ko'pyeṣa paramo'ṅkuraḥ || 50 ||
brahmādisthāvarāntāni yatra rūpāṇyanekaśaḥ |
māmevopāsate nityaṃ citraṃ citragatānyapi || 51 ||
sa saudho me'khile loke sthānaṃ paramanirvṛteḥ |

nimeṣārdhapramāṇaṃ ca kālaṃ tiṣṭhati niścalaḥ |
tatra yastena vai yogaḥ samabhyastaḥ samāḥ śatam || 55 |
nirvāṇamaṇḍapaṃ nāma tatsthānaṃ jagatītale |
tatrarcaṃ sañjapannekāṃ labhetsarvaśruteḥ phalam || 56 |
prāṇāyāmaṃ tu yaḥ kuryādapyekaṃ muktimaṇḍape |
tenā'ṣṭāṅgaḥ samabhyasto yogo'nyatrā'yutaṃ samāḥ || 57 ||
nirvāṇamaṇḍape yastu japedekaṃ ṣaḍakṣaram |
koṭirudreṇa japtena yatphalaṃ tasya tadbhavet || 58 ||
śucirgaṅgā'mbhasi snāto yo japecchatarudriyam |
nirvāṇamaṇḍape jñeyaḥ sa rudro dvijaveṣabhṛt || 5 9 ||
brahmayajñaṃ sakṛtkṛtvā mama dakṣiṇamaṇḍape |
brahmalokamavāpyā'tha paraṃ brahmādhigacchati || 60 |
aṣṭau aṅgāni yamaniyamāsanaprāṇasaṃrodhapratyāhāradhāraṇādhyānasamādhilakṣaṇāni yasya

dharmaśāstraṃ purāṇāni setihāsāni tatra yaḥ |
paṭhennirabhilāṣuḥ san sa vasenmama veśmani || 61 |
tiṣṭhedindriyacāpalyaṃ yo nivārya kṣaṇaṃ kṛtī |
nirvāṇamaṇḍape'nyatra tena taptaṃ mahattapaḥ || 62 ||
vāyubhakṣaṇato'nyatra yatpuṇyaṃ śaradāṃ śatam |
tatpuṇyaṃ ghaṭikārdhena maunaṃ dakṣiṇamaṇḍape || 63 |
mitaṃ kṛṣṇalakenā'pi yo dadyānmuktimaṇḍape |
svarṇaṃ sauvarṇayānena sa tu sañcarate divi || 64 ||
tatraikaṃ jāgaraṃ kuryādyasminkasmin dine'pi yaḥ |
upoṣito'rcayelliṅgaṃ sa sarvavratapuṇyabhāk || 65 |
tatra datvā mahādānaṃ tatra kṛtvā mahāvratam |
tatrā'dhītyā'khilaṃ vedaṃ cyavate na naro divaḥ || 66 ||

prayāṇaṃ kurvate yasya prāṇā me muktimaṇḍape |
sa māmanupraviṣṭo'tra tiṣṭhedyāvadahaṃ khalu || 67 |
jalakrīḍāṃ sadā kuryāṃ jñānavāpyāṃ sahomayā |
yadambupānamātreṇa jñānaṃ jāyeta nirmalam || 68 |
tajjalakrīḍanasthānaṃ mama prītikaraṃ mahat | |
amuṣmin rājasadane jāḍyahṛjjalapūritam || 6 9 |
tavyāsādapurobhāge mama śṛṅgāramaṇḍapaḥ |
śrīpīṭhaṃ taddhi vijñeyaṃ niḥ śrīkaśrīsamarpaṇam || 70 |
madarthaṃ tatra yo dadyāddukūlāni śucīnyaho |
mālyāni suvicitrāṇi yakṣakardamavanti ca || 71 |
nānānepathyavastūni pūjopakaraṇānyapi |
sa śriyā'laṅkṛtastiṣṭhedyatra kutrāpi sattamaḥ | 72 |

nirvāṇalakṣmīrvṛṇute taṃ nirvāṇapadāptaye |
yatra kutrāpi nidhanaṃ prāpnuyādapi saddhruvam || 73 |
mokṣalakṣmīvilāsākhyaprāsādasyottare mama |
aiśvaryamaṇḍapaṃ ramyaṃ tatraiśvaryaṃ dadāmyaham || 74 ||
matprāsādaindradigbhāge jñānamaṇḍapamasti yat |
jñānaṃ diśāmi satataṃ tatra māṃ dhyāyatāṃ satām || 75 |
bhavānirājasadane mamā'sti hi mahānasam |
yattatrohṛtaṃ puṇyaṃ niviśāmi mudaiva tat || 76 ||

yadāhuḥ paramaṃ tattvaṃ yadāhurbrahmasattamam |
svasaṃvedyaṃ yadāhuśca tattatrānte diśāmyaham || 7 9 |
yadāhustārakaṃ jñānaṃ yadāhuratinirmalam |
svātmārāmaṃ yadāhuśca tattatrānte diśāmyaham || 80 ||
jaganmaṅgalabhūryā'tra paramā maṇikarṇikā |
vipāśayāmi tatrā'haṃ karmabhiḥ pāśitān paśūn || 81 ||
nirvāṇaśrāṇane yatra pātrā'pātraṃ na cintaye |
ānandakānane tanme dānasthānaṃ divāniśam || 82 |
bhavāmbudhau mahā'gādhe prāṇinaḥ parimajjataḥ |
bhūtyaiva karṇadhāro'nte yatra santārayāmyaham ||| 83 |
saubhāgyabhāgyabhūryā vai vikhyātā maṇikarṇikā |
dadāmi tasyāṃ sarvasvamagrajāyāntyajāya vā || 84 ||

mahāsamādhisampannairvedāntārthaniṣevibhiḥ |
duṣprāpo'nyatra yo mokṣaḥ śocyairapi sa labhyate || 85 ||
dīkṣito vā divākīrtiḥ paṇḍito vā'pyapaṇḍitaḥ |
tulyo me mokṣadīkṣāyāṃ samprāpya maṇikarṇikām || 86 |
yattyāge'nyatra kṛpaṇastavyāpya maṇikarṇikām |
dadāmi jantumātrāya sarvasvaṃ cirasañcitam || 87 |
yadi daivādiha prāptastrisaṃyogo'tidurghaṭaḥ |
avicāraṃ tadā deyaṃ sarvasvaṃ cirasañcitam || 88 |
śarīramatha sampattiratha sā maṇikarṇikā |
trisaṃyogo'yamaprāpyo devairindrādikairapi || 8 9 |
punaḥ punarvicāryeti jantumātrebhya eva ca |
nirvāṇalakṣmīṃ yacchāmi sadopamaṇikarṇikam || 9 0 |
sa labhyate tasyāṃ maṇikarṇikāyāmityanuṣañjanīyam || 85 ||
divākīrtiścāṇḍālaḥ || 86 |
yat kaivalyam || 78 |
trisaṃyogo'tidurghaṭa ityetatsvayameva vyākaroti - śarīramiti | sampatti-
rdhanam || 8 9 |

muktidānamahī sā me vārāṇasyāṃ mahīyasī |
tanmahīrajasā sāmyaṃ trilokyapi na codvahet || 9 1 ||
paraṃ liṅgārcanasthānamavimukteśvareśvaram |
tatra pūjāṃ sakṛtkṛtvā kṛtakṛtyo naro bhavet || 9 2 ||
sāyaṃ pāśupatīṃ sandhyāṃ kuryāṃ paśupatīśvare |
vibhūtidhāraṇāttatra paśupāśairna vadhyate || 9 3 ||
prātaḥ sandhyāṃ karomyeva sadoṅkāraniketane | |
tatraikā'pi kṛtā sandhyā sarvapātakakṛntanī || 9 4 |
vasāmi kṛttivāse'haṃ sadā praticaturdaśi |
atra jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā caturdaśyāṃ na garbhabhāk || 9 5 ||
ratneśvaro'rcito dadyānmahāratnāni bhaktitaḥ |
ratnaiḥ samarcya talliṅgaṃ strīratnādi labhennaraḥ || 9 6 ||
viṣṭapatritayāntastho'pyahaṃ liṅge triviṣṭape |
tiṣṭhāmi satataṃ bhaktamanorathasamṛddhaye || 9 7 |
viṣṭapatritayāntasthaḥ sarvavyāpako'pītyarthaḥ | triviṣṭape trilocane || 9 7 |

virajaskaṃ mahāpīṭhaṃ tatra saṃsevya mānavaḥ |
virajā jāyate nūnaṃ caturnadakṛtodakaḥ || 9 8 |
mahādeve mahāpīṭhaṃ mama sādhakasiddhidam |
tatpīṭhadarśanādeva mahāpāpaiḥ pramucyate || 99 |
pitṛprītipradaṃ pīṭhaṃ vṛṣabhadhvajasaṃjñakam |
pitṛtarpaṇakṛttatra pitṝṃstārayati kṣaṇāt || 100 |
ādikeśavapīṭhe'hamādikeśavarūpadhṛk
śvetadīpaṃ naye bhaktān vaiṣṇavānativallabhān || 101 ||
tatraiva maṅgalāpīṭhe sarvamaṅgaladāyini |
upapañcanade tīrthe bhaktān santārayāmyaham || 102 |
bindumādhavarūpeṇa yatrā'haṃ vaiṣṇavān janān |
naye pañcanadasnātāṃstadviṣṇoḥ paramaṃ padam || 103 ||

pañcamudre mahāpīṭhe ye vīreśvarasevakāḥ |
teṣāṃ paramanirvāṇaṃ kālenā'lpena jāyate || 104 ||
tatra siddheśvarīpīṭhe candreśvarasamīpataḥ |
tatra sannidhikartṝṇāṃ siddhiḥ ṣaṇmāsato bhavet || 105 ||
kāśyāṃ ca yoginīpīṭhe yogasiddhividhāyini |
siddhīruccāṭanādyāśca kairna labdhāḥ susādhakaiḥ || 106 |
anekānīha pīṭhāni santi kāśyāṃ pade pade |
paraṃ dharmeśapīṭhasya kācicchaktiranuttamā || 107 |
yatrāmī bālakīrāśca nirmalajñānabhājanam |
āsuḥ sadupadeśānme trāta trāteti bhāṣiṇaḥ || 108 |
etaddharmeśvaraṃ pīṭhaṃ tyajāmyadyadināvadhi |
na kadācittaraṇija tvattapovanamuttamam || 10 9 |
āsurbabhūvuḥ || 108 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekonāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 9 |

mamā'nugrahataḥ kīrānetān paśya raveḥ suta |
divyaṃ vimānamāruhya gantāro matpuraṃ mahat || 110 ||
tatra bhuktvā ciraṃ bhogān jñānaṃ prāpya mayeritam |
iha muktimavāpsyanti tvatsaṃsargātinirmalāḥ || 111 ||
ityuktavati deveśe kailāsaśikharopamam |
divyaṃ vimānamāpannaṃ rudrakanyāpariṣkṛtam || 112 ||
āruhya tena yānena divyarūpadharāḥ khagāḥ |
kailāsamabhisañjagmurdharmamāpṛcchyate'malāḥ || 113 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dharmeśākhyānaṃ nāmaikonāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 7 9 |

|| athāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca -
kumbhodbhūta tadāścaryaṃ vilokya jagadambikā |
uvāca śambhuṃ praṇatā praṇatārtiharaṃ param || 1 |
ambikovāca-
asya pīṭhasya māhātmyaṃ mahādeva maheśvara |
tiraścāmapi yajjātaṃ jñānaṃ saṃsāramocanam || 2 |
ataḥ prabhāvaṃ vijñāya dharmapīṭhasya dhūrjaṭe |
dharmeśvarasamīpe'haṃ sthāsyāmyadyadināvadhi || 3 |
atra liṅge tu ye bhaktāḥ striyo vā puruṣāstu vā |
teṣāmabhīṣṭāṃ saṃsiddhiṃ sādhayiṣyāmyahaṃ sadā || 4 |
athāśītitame'dhyāye dharmeśākhyānamadhyage |
śrīmadviśvabhujāśākhyagaṇeśastutipūrvakam || 1 |
sarvakāmapradaṃ puṃsāṃ strīṇāṃ caiva viśeṣataḥ |
manorathatṛtīyākhyavrataṃ samyaṅ nirucyate || 2 |
viśvabhujāśā vināyakadaivataṃ manorathatṛtīyākhyaṃ vrataṃ kathayituṃ prastāvayati-

īśvara uvāca-
sādhu kṛtaṃ tvayā devi kṛtavatyā parigraham |
asyeha dharmapīṭhasya manorathakṛtaḥ satām || 5 ||
ta eva viśvabhoktāro viśvamānyāsta eva hi |
ye tvāṃ viśvabhujāmatra pūjayiṣyanti mānavāḥ || 6 |
viśve viśvabhuje viśvasthityutpattilayaprade |
narāstvadarcakāścā'tra bhaviṣyantyamalātmakāḥ || 7 |
manorathatṛtīyāyāṃ yaste bhaktiṃ vidhāsyati | |
tanmanorathasaṃsiddhirbhavitrī madanugrahāt || 8 |
nārī vā puruṣo vā'tha tvadvratācaraṇāṭhipraye |
manorathāniha prāpya jñānamante ca lapsyate || 9 |
devyuvāca-
manorathatṛtīyāyāṃ vrataṃ kīdṛkkathā katham |
kiṃ phalaṃ kaiḥ kṛtaṃ nātha kathayaitatkṛpāṃ kuru || 10 |
manorathaṃ karotīti manorathakṛt tasya manorathakṛtaḥ || 5 |
pūjāprakāramāha - viśva ityardhena | yadvā viśve ityādīni maheśakṛtasambodha-
nāni || 7 |
manorathatṛtīyā caitraśuklatṛtīyā , tasyām || 8 |

īśvara uvāca-
śṛṇu devi yathā pṛṣṭaṃ bhavatyā bhavatāriṇi |
manorathavrataṃ caitad guhyād guhyataraṃ param || 11 |
pulomatanayā pūrvaṃ tatāpa paramaṃ tapaḥ |
kiñcinmanorathaṃ prāptuṃ na cāpa tapasaḥ phalam || 12 ||
apūpujattato māṃ sā bhaktyā paramayā mudā |
gītena saṃrahasyena kalakaṇṭhīkalena hi || 13 ||
tadgānenā'tisantuṣṭo mṛdunā madhureṇa ca |
sutālena suraṅgeṇa dhātumātrākalāvatā || 14 ||
provāca tvaṃ varaṃ brūhi prasanno'smi pulomaje |
anena ca sugītena tvanayā liṅgapūjayā || 15 ||
pulomajovāca-
yadi prasanno deveśa tadā yo me manorathaḥ |
taṃ pūraya mahādeva mahādevī - mahāpriya ||| 16 |
bhavāttāriṇi saṃsāratāriṇi || 11 |
pulomā nāma daityastattanayā śacī || 12 |

sarvadeveṣu yo mānyaḥ sarvadeveṣu sundaraḥ |
yāyajūkeṣu sarveṣu yaḥ śreṣṭhaḥ so'stu me patiḥ || 17 |
yathā'bhilaṣitaṃ rūpaṃ yathā'bhilaṣitaṃ sukham |
yathābhilaṣitaṃ cāyuḥ prasanno dehi me bhava || 18 |
yadā yadā ca patyā me saṅgaḥ syāddhṛtsukhecchayā |
tadā tadā ca taṃ dehaṃ tyaktvā'nyaṃ dehamāpnuyām || 1 9 ||
sadā ca liṅgapūjāyāṃ mama bhaktiranuttamā |
bhava bhūyād bhavahara jarāmaraṇahāriṇī || 20 ||
bharturvyaye'pi vaidhavyaṃ kṣaṇamātramapīha na |
mama bhāvi mahādeva pātivratyaṃ ca yātu mā || 21 ||
skanda uvāca -
imaṃ manorathaṃ tasyāḥ paulomyāḥ purasūdanaḥ |
samākarṇya kṣaṇaṃ smitvā prāheśo vismayānvitaḥ || 22 ||
īśvara uvāca -
pulomakanye yaścaiṣa tvayā'kāri manorathaḥ |
lapsyase vratacaryātaḥ tatkuruṣva jitendriye || 23 ||

manorathatṛtīyāyāścaraṇena bhaviṣyati |
tatprāptaye vrataṃ vakṣye tadvidhehi yathoditam || 24 ||
tena vratena cīrṇena mahāsaubhāgyadena tu |
avaśyaṃ bhavitā bāle tava caivaṃ manorathaḥ || || 25 |
pulomakanyovāca -
kāruṇyavāridhe śambho praṇataprāṇisarvada |

ādau vināyakaṃ pūjya ghṛtapūrānnivedya ca |
tato'rcayedviśvabhujāmaśokakusumaiḥ śubhaiḥ || 36 |
aśokavartinaivedyairdhūpaiścāgurusambhavaiḥ
kuṅkumenānulipyādāvekabhaktaṃ tataścaret || 37 ||
aśokavartisahitairdhṛtapūrairmanoharaiḥ
evaṃ caitratṛtīyāyāṃ vyatītāyāṃ pulomaje || 38 ||
rādhādiphālgunāntāsu tṛtīyāsu vrataṃ caret |
krameṇa dantakāṣṭhāni kathayāmi tavā'naghe || 3 9 ||
anulepanavastūni kusumāni tathaiva ca |
naivedyāni gajāsyasya devyāśvāpi śubhavate || 40 ||
annāni caikabhaktasya śṛṇu tāni phalāptaye |
jambyapāmārgakhadirajātīcūtakadambakam
plakṣodumbarakharjūrī bījapūrī sadāḍimī |
dantakāṣṭhadrumā ete vratinaḥ samudāhṛtāḥ || 42 |
ghṛtapūrān pakvānnaviśeṣān | naivedyaiḥ ghṛtapūraiḥ || 36-37 |
rādho vaiśākhaḥ || 3 9 |

sindūrāgurukastūrī candanaṃ raktacandanam |
gorocanā- devadāru- padmākṣaṃ ca niśādvayam || 43 |
prītyā'nulepanaṃ bāle yakṣakardamasambhavam |
sarveṣāmapyalābhe ca praśasto yakṣakardamaḥ || 44 |
kastūrikāyā dvau bhāgau dvau bhāgau kuṅkumasya ca |
candanasya trayo bhāgāḥ śaśinastveka eva hi || 45 ||
yakṣakardama ityeṣa samastasuravallabhaḥ |
anulipyā'tha kusumairarcayed vacmi tānyapi || 46 |
pāṭalāmallikāpadmaketakīkaravīrakaiḥ |
utpalaiḥ rājacampaiśca nandyāvarteśca jātibhiḥ || 47 ||
kumārībhiḥ karṇikārairalābhe tacchadaiḥ saha |
sugandhibhiḥ prasūnaudhaiḥ sarvālābhe'pi pūjayet || 48 |
gorocanā gośṛṅgayormadhye samutpannadravyaviśeṣaḥ | niśādvayaṃ haridrādvayam || 43 |
yakṣakardamaṃ svayameva vyācaṣṭe- kastūrikāyā iti | śaśinaḥ karpūrasya | tāni

karambho dadhibhaktaṃ ca sacūtarasamaṇḍakāḥ |
pheṇikā vaṭakāścaiva pāyasaṃ ca saśarkaram || 4 9 ||
samudgaṃ saghṛtaṃ bhaktaṃ kārtike vinivedayet |
iṇḍerikāśca laḍḍūkā māghe lampasikā śubhā || 50 ||
muṣṭikāḥ śarkarāgarbhāḥ sarpiṣā parisādhitāḥ |
nivedyāḥ phālgune devyai sārdhaṃ vighnajitā mudā || 51 |
nivedayedyadannaṃ hi ekabhakte'pi tatsmṛtam |
anyannivedya sammūḍho bhuāno'nyatpatedadhaḥ || 52 |
pratimāsaṃ tṛtīyāyāmevamārādhya vatsaram |
vratasampūrtaye kuryātsthaṇḍile'gnisamarcanam || || 53 |
jātavedasamantreṇa tilājyadraviṇena ca |
śatamaṣṭādhikaṃ homaṃ kārayedvidhinā vratī || 54 ||
sadaiva nakte pūjoktā sadā nakte tu bhojanam |
nakta eva hi homo'yaṃ nakta eva kṣamāpanam || 55 ||
caitramāsanaivedyasya pūrvamuktatvādavaśiṣṭānāṃ māsānāṃ naivedyānāha - karambha iti |
karambho dadhimiśraḥ saktuḥ ||| 4 9 |
muṣṭikāḥ pūrikāḥ || 51 |

gṛhāṇa pūjāṃ me bhaktyā mātarvighnajitā saha |
namo'stu te viśvabhuje pūrayā''śu manoratham || 56 ||
namo vighnakṛte tubhyaṃ nama āśāvināyaka |
tvaṃ viśvabhujayā sārdhaṃ mama dehi manoratham || 57 ||
etau mantrī samuccārya pūjyau gaurī - vināyakau |
vratakṣamāpane deyaḥ paryaṅkastūlikānvitaḥ || 58 |
upadhānyā samāyukto dīpīdarpaṇasaṃyutaḥ |
ācāryaṃ ca sapatnīkaṃ paryaṅkaṃ upaveśya ca || 5 9 ||
vratī samarcayedvastraiḥ karakarṇavibhūṣaṇaiḥ |
sugandhacandanairmālyairdakṣiṇābhirmudānvitaḥ || 60 |
dadyātpayasvinīṃ gāṃ ca vratasya paripūrtaye |
tathopabhogavastūni cchatropānatkamaṇḍalum || 61 |
manorathatṛtīyāyā vratametanmayā kṛtam |
nyūnātiriktaṃ sampūrṇametadastu bhavagirā || 62 ||
dīpī dīpadhārikā puttalikā || 5 9 |

ityācāryaṃ samāpṛcchya tathetyuktaśca tena vai | |
āsīmāntamanuvrajya datvā'nyebhyo'pi śaktitaḥ || 63 |
naktaṃ samācaretpoṣyaiḥ sārdhaṃ suprītamānasaḥ |
prātaścaturthyāṃ sambhojya caturaśca kumārakān || 64 ||
abhyarcya gandhamālyādyairdvādaśā'pi kumārikāḥ |
evaṃ sampūrṇatāṃ yāti vratametatsunirmalam || 65 ||
kāryaṃ manorathā'vāptyai sarvairetadvrataṃ śubham |
patnīṃ manoramāṃ kulyāṃ manovṛttyanusāriṇīm || 66 |
tāriṇīṃ duḥkhasaṃsārasāgarasya pativratām | |
kurvannetadvrataṃ varṣaṃ kumāraḥ prāpnuyāt sphuṭam || 67 |
kumārī patimāpnoti svāḍhyaṃ sarvaguṇādhikam |
suvāsinī labhetputrān patyuḥ saukhyamakhaṇḍitam || 68 |
durbhagā subhagā syācca dhanāḍhyā syāddaridriṇī |
vidhavā'pi na vaidhavyaṃ punarāpnoti kutracit || 6 9 |
naktaṃ naktabhojanam || 64 |

gurviṇī ca śubhaṃ putraṃ labhate sucirāyuṣam |
brāhmaṇo labhate vidyāṃ sarvasaubhāgyadāyinīm || 70 |
rājyabhraṣṭo labhedrājyaṃ vaiśyo lābhaṃ ca vindati |
cintitaṃ labhate śūdro vratasyāsya niṣevaṇāt || 71 |
dharmārthī dharmamāpnoti dhanārthī dhanamāpnuyāt |
kāmī kāmānavāpnoti mokṣārthī mokṣamāpnuyāt || 72 ||
yo yo manoratho yasya sa taṃ taṃ vindate dhruvam |
manorathatṛtīyāyā vratasya caraṇād vratī || 73 |
skanda uvāca -
itthaṃ niśamya śivataḥ śivā santuṣṭamānasā |
punaḥ papraccha viśveśaṃ prabuddhakarasampuṭā || 74 | |
anyatra ye vrataṃ caitatkariṣyanti sadāśiva |
te kathaṃ pūjayiṣyanti māṃ ca āśāvināyakam || 75 |

śiva uvāca -
sādhu pṛṣṭaṃ tvayā devi sarvasandehabhedini |
vārāṇasyāṃ samarcyā tvaṃ viśve pratyakṣarūpiṇī || 76 |
āśāvighnajitā sārdhaṃ sarvāśāpūrtikāriṇā | |
hāriṇā'nantavighnānāṃ mama kṣetraśubhārthinā || 77 |
kṣipramāgamayitvā 1 ca natvā dūraṃ gatānapi |
kṛtakṛtyān vidhāyā'tha cintitaiḥ sumanorathaiḥ || 78 ||
anyatra pratibhirviśve kāñcanī pratimā tava |
pañcakṛṣṇalakādūrdhvaṃ kāryā vighnahṛto'pi ca || 7 9 |
ācāryāya vratī dadyād vratānte pratimādvayam |
sakṛtkṛte vrate cā'smin kṛtakṛtyo vratī bhavet || 80 |

tataḥ pulomajā devi śrutvaitad vratamuttamam |
kṛtvā manorathaṃ prāpa yathā'bhivāñchitaṃ hṛdi || 81 |
arundhatyā vasiṣṭho'pi labdho'triranasūyayā |
sunītyottānapādācca dhruvaḥ prāpto'ṅgajottamaḥ || 82 |
sunīterdurbhagatvaṃ ca punarasmād vratād gatam |
caturbhujaḥ patiḥ prāptaḥ kṣīranīradhijanmanā || 83 ||
kiṃ bahūktena suśroṇi kṛtaṃ yena vrataṃ tvidam | |
vratāni tena sarvāṇi kṛtāni vratinā dhruvam || 84 ||
śrutvā dhīmān kathāṃ puṇyāṃ punastadgatamānasaḥ |
śubhabuddhimavāpnoti pāpairapi vimucyate || 85 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dharmeśvarākhyāne viśvabhujāśāvināyakapraśaṃsane
manorathatṛtīyāghratākhyānaṃ nāmā'śītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 80 ||
aṅgajottamaḥ putraśreṣṭhaḥ || 82 |
kṣīranīradherdugdhā'rṇavājjanma yasyāstayā lakṣmyā || 83 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 80 |

|| athaikāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-
dharmatīrthasya māhātmyaṃ kīdṛg devena śambhunā |
skanda devyai samākhyātaṃ tadākhyāhi kṛpāṃ kuru || 1 |
skanda uvāca -
vindhyonnatihṛdākhyāmi dharmatīrthasamudbhavam |
ākarṇaya mahāprājña yathā devena bhāṣitam || 2 |
vṛtraṃ nihatya vṛtrārirbrahmahatyāmavāptavān |
anutapto'tha papraccha prāyaścittaṃ purohitam || 3 ||
bṛhaspatiruvāca-
yadi tvaṃ devarājemāṃ brahmahatyāṃ sudustyajām |
apānunutsustadyāhi kāśīṃ viśveśapālitām || 4 ||
ekāśītitame'dhyāye nānāścaryekamandire |
durdamākhyānasaṃsargidharmeśākhyānamucyate
anutaptaḥ pratikṣaṇaṃ santaptaḥ | tayā tapta iti kvacit || 3 |
apānunutsurapākartumicchuḥ || 4 |

ekāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ 9 1
nā'nyat kiñcitkvaciddṛṣṭaṃ brahmahatyāmahauṣadham |
rājadhānīṃ parityajya śakra viśveśituḥ parām || 5 ||
bhairavasyā'pi hastāgrādapatadvaidhasaṃ śiraḥ |
yatrā''nandavane tatra vṛtraśatro vraja drutam || 6 ||
sīmānamapi samprāpya śakrā''nandavanasya hi |
brahmahatyā palāyeta vepamānā nirāśrayā || 7 ||
anyeṣāmapi pāpānāṃ mahāpāpajuṣāmapi |
nāśayitrī parākāśī viśveśasamadhiṣṭhitā || 8 | |
mahāpātakato muktiḥ kāśyāmeva śatakrato |
mahāsaṃsārato muktiḥ kāśyāmeva na cā'nyataḥ || 9 |
nirvāṇanagarī kāśī kāśī sarvā'ghasaṃghahṛt |
viśveśituḥ priyā kāśī dyauḥ kāśīsadṛśī na hi || 10 ||

brahmahatyābhayaṃ yasya yasya saṃsārato bhayam |
jātu cittena na tyājyā kāśikā muktikāśikā || 11 ||
jantūnāṃ karmabījānāṃ yatra dehavisarjane |
na jātucit praroho'sti haradṛṣṭyāptaśuṣpraṇām || 12 |
tāṃ kāśīṃ prāpya vṛtrāre vṛtrahatyā'panuttaye |
samārādhaya viśveśaṃ viśvamuktipradāyakam || 13 ||
bṛhaspateriti vaco vaco niśamya sa sahasradṛk |
āyāddrutataraṃ kāśīṃ mahāpātakaghātukām || 14 ||
snātvottaravahāyāṃ ca dharmeśaṃ paritaḥ sthitaḥ |
ārādhayanmahādevaṃ brahmahatyā'panuttaye || 15 ||
mahārudrajapāsaktaḥ sutrāmātha trilocanam |
dadarśa liṅgamadhyasthaṃ svabhāsā dīpitāmbaram || 16 ||
punastuṣṭāva vedokta rudrasūktairanekadhā |
viniṣkramya tato liṅgādāvirbhūya bhavo'vadat || 17 ||
karmāṇyeva bījāni yeṣām | vyadhikaraṇe vā ṣaṣṭhyau | haradṛṣṭyāptaśuṣmaṇāṃ

śacīpate prasanno'smi varaṃ varaya suvrata |
kiṃ deyaṃ drutamākhyāhi dharmapīṭhakṛtāspada || 18 ||
śrutveti devadevasya sapremavacanaṃ hariḥ |
sarvajña kiṃ te'viditaṃ tamuvāceti vṛtrahā || 1 9 ||
tatastatkṛpayā nunno dharmapīṭhaniṣevaṇāt |
niṣpādya tīrthaṃ tatreśo'tra snāhīndreti cā'bravīt || 20 ||
tatrendraḥ snānamātreṇa divyagandho'bhavatkṣaṇāt |
avāpa ca ruciṃ cāru prāktanīṃ śātayājñikīm || 21 ||
tadāścaryamatho dṛṣṭvā munayo nāradādayaḥ |
parisasnurmudā yuktā dharmatīrthe'ghahāriṇi || 22 ||
atarpayan pitṝn divyān vyadhuḥ śrāddhāni śraddhayā |
dharmeśa snāpayāmāsustattīrthāmbubhṛtairghaṭaiḥ || 23 |
tadāprabhṛti tattīrthaṃ dharmāndhuriti viśrutam | |
brahmahatyādipāpānāmakleśaṃ kṣālanaṃ param ||| 24 |

yatphalaṃ tīrtharājasya snānena parikīrtyate |
sahasraguṇitaṃ tatsyāddharmāndhusnānamātrataḥ || 25 |
gaṅgādvāre kurukṣetre gaṅgāsāgarasaṅgame |
yatphalaṃ labhate martyo dharmanīrthe tadāpnuyāt || 26 |
narmadāyāṃ sarasvatyāṃ gautamyāṃ siṃhage gurau | |
snātvā yatphalamāpyeta dharmakūpe tadāpnuyāt || 27 |
mānase puṣkare caiva dvārike sāgare tathā |
tīrthe snātvā phalaṃ yatsyāttatsyāddharmajalāśaye || 28 ||
kārtikyāṃ sūkarakṣetre caitryāṃ gorīmahāhade |
śaṃkhoddhāre haridine yatphalaṃ tatphalaṃ tviha || 2 9 |
tīrthadvaye pratīkṣante sisnāsūn pitaro narān |
gaṅgāyāṃ dharmakūpe ca piṇḍanirvapaṇāśayā || 30 |
tīrtharājasya samudrasya prayāgasya vā || 25 |
dharmatīrthe dharmeśādhiṣṭhite tīrthe || 26 |
dvārike sāgare dvārakāsambandhini sāgare | devaka iti pāṭhe devakapattane prabhāsakṣetre
iti yāvat || 28 |
saukaraṃ śaurabha iti prasiddham | gaṅgātīre | gaurīmahāhade kedāre || 2 9 |

pitāmahasamīpe vā dharmeśasyā'grato'thavā |
phalgau ca dharmakūpe ca mādyanti prapitāmahāḥ || 31 |
dharmakūpe naraḥ snātvā paritarpya pitāmahān |
gayāṃ gatvā kimadhikaṃ kartā pitṛmudāvaham || 32 ||
yathā gayāyāṃ tṛptāḥ syuḥ piṇḍadāne pitāmahāḥ |
dharmatīrthe tathaiva syurna nyūnaṃ naiva cā'dhikam || 33 |
te dhanyāḥ pitṛbhaktāste prīṇitāstaiḥ pitāmahāḥ |
paitrādṛṇāddharmatīrthe niṣkṛtiryaiḥ kṛtā sutaiḥ || 34 |
tattīrthasya prabhāveṇa niṣpāpo'bhūtkṣaṇena ca |
praṇamya devadeveśamindro'gādamarāvatīm || 35 ||
apāro mahimā tasya dharmatīrthasya kumbhaja |
tatkūpe svaṃ nirīkṣyā'pi śrāddhadānaphalaṃ labhet || 36 ||
tatrāpi kākiṇīmātraṃ yacchet pitṛmude naraḥ |
akṣayaṃ phalamāpnoti dharmapīṭhaprabhāvataḥ || 37 |
niṣkṛtirānṛṇyaṃ piṇḍadānamiti yāvat || 34 |
svaṃ pratibimbam || 36 |
kākiṇī viṃśativarāṭikā || 37 |

tatra yo bhojayedviprān yatino'tha tapasvinaḥ |
sikthe sikthe labhet so'tha vājapeyaphalaṃ sphuṭam || 38 ||
prāpyā'marāvatīṃ śakrastato diviṣadāṃ puraḥ |
dharmapīṭhasya māhātmyaṃ mahatkāśyāmavarṇayat || 3 9 |
āgatya punarapyatra śambhorānandakānane |
munivṛndārakaiḥ sārdhaṃ liṅgamasthāpayaddhariḥ || 40 |
tārakeśātpaścimata indreśvaramitīritam |
tasya sandarśanātpuṃsāmaindraloko na dūrataḥ || 41 ||
taddakṣiṇe śacīśaśca svayaṃ śacyā pratiṣṭhitaḥ |
śacīśā'rcanataḥ strīṇāṃ saubhāgyamatulaṃ bhavet || 42 ||
tatsamīpe'sti rambheśo bahusaukhyasamṛddhidaḥ |
indreśvarasya parito lokapāleśvaro paraḥ || 43 ||
tadarcanātprasīdanti lokapālāḥ samṛddhidāḥ |
dharmeśātpaścimāśāyāṃ dharaṇīśaḥ prakīrtitaḥ ||
taddarśanena dhairyaṃ syādrājye rājakulādiṣu || 44 ||
sikthe sikthe kaṇāyāṃ kaṇāyām || 38 |
diviṣadāṃ devānām || 3 9 |

dharmeśādakṣiṇe pūjyaṃ tattveśākhyaṃ paraṃ naraiḥ | |
tattvajñānaṃ pravarteta talliṅgasya samarcanāt || 45 ||
dharmeśātpūrvadigbhāge vairāgyeśaṃ samarcayet | |
nivṛttiścetasastasya liṅgasya sparśanādapi || 46 |
jñāneśvaraṃ tathaiśānyāṃ jñānadaṃ sarvadehinām |
aiśvaryeśa mudīcyāṃ ca liṅgāddharmeśvarācchubhāt || 47 |
taddarśanād bhavennṛṇāmaiśvaryaṃ manasepsitam |
pañcavaktrasya rūpāṇi liṅgānyetāni kumbhaja || 48 ||
etānyavaśyaṃ saṃsevya naraḥ prāpnoti śāśvatam |
anyattatraiva yadvṛttaṃ tadākhyāmi mune śṛṇu || 4 9 |
yacchrutvā'pi naro ghore saṃsārābdhau na majjati |
kadambaśikharo nāma vindhyapādo mahāniha || 50 ||
damasya putrastatrā''sīhurdamo nāma pārthivaḥ |
pitaryuparate rājyaṃ samprāpyā'vijitendriyaḥ || 51 |

haretpurandhrīḥ prasabhaṃ paurāṇāṃ kāmamohitaḥ |
asādhavaḥ priyāstasya sādhavo'priyatāṃ yayuḥ || 52 |
adaṇḍyān daṇḍayāñcakre daṇḍyeṣvāsītparāṅmukhaḥ |
sadaiva mṛgayāśīlaḥ so'bhūnmṛgayusaṅgataḥ | 53 |
vivāsitāḥ svaviṣayāttena sanmatidāyinaḥ |
dharmādhikāriṇaḥ śūdrā brāhmaṇāḥ karadīkṛtāḥ || 54 ||
paradāreṣu santuṣṭaḥ svadāreṣu parāṅmukhaḥ |
ānarca jātucinnaiva devau duḥkhāntakāriṇau || 55 ||
hāriṇau sarvapāpānāṃ sarvavāñchitadāyinau |
sarveṣāṃ jagatīsārau śrīkaṇṭhaṃ śrīpatī patnī || 56 |
svaprajāsveka udito dhūmaketurivā'paraḥ |
durdamo nāma bhūpālaḥ kṣayākāṇḍa eva hi || 57 ||

ekāśītitano'dhyāyaḥ 1 9
sa kadācinmṛgayubhiḥ pāpardhivyasanāturaḥ |
sārdhaṃ viveśā'raṇyāni gṛṣṭipṛṣṭhānugo hayī || 58 |
ekākī daivayogena durdamaḥ so'vanīpatiḥ |
dhanvī turaṅgamārūḍho'viśadānandakānanam || ון 5 9 |
sa vilokyā'tha sarvatra pādapānavakeśinaḥ |
succhāyāṃśca suvistārān gataśrama ivā'bhavat || 60 |
sugandhana suśītena sumandena suvāyunā |
kṣaṇaṃ saṃvījito rājā pallavavyajanaiḥ kujaiḥ || 61 |
kevalaṃ mṛgayājātastatkhedo na vyapāvrajat |
ājanmajanitaḥ khedo niragāttadvane kṣaṇāt || 62 ||
madhyevanaṃ sa cā'paśyavyāsādaṃ cumbitā'mbaram |
mahāratnaśalākānāṃ ramyamekamivākaram || 63 |

athā'varuhya turagāt sa bhūpālo'tivismitaḥ |
dharmeśamaṇḍapaṃ prāpya svātmānaṃ praśaśaṃsa ha || 64 |
dhanyo'smyahaṃ prasanno'smi dhanye me'dya vilocane |
dhanyamadyatanaṃ cāhayedamimāṃ bhuvam || 65 |
punarnininda cātmānaṃ dharmapīṭhaprabhāvataḥ |
dhiṅ māṃ durjanasaṃsargaṃ tyaktasajjanasaṅgamam || 66 |
jantūdvegakaraṃ mūḍhaṃ prajāpīḍanapaṇḍitam |
paradāraparadravyāpahṛtyā sukhamāninam || 67 ||
adyayāvanmama gataṃ vṛthā janmālpamedhasaḥ |
dharmasthānānīdṛśāni yaddṛṣṭāni na kutracit || 68 |
evaṃ bahu vinindya svaṃ natvā dharmeśvaraṃ vibhum |
āruhyā'śvaṃ yayau rājā durdamo viṣayaṃ svag || 6 9 ||
tato'mātyān samāhūya kramāyātāṃśvirantanān |
navīnān parinirvāsya paurāṃścāpi samāhvayat || 70 ||
apahṛtyā apahāreṇa ||| 67 |

brāhmaṇāṃśca namaskṛtya tebhyo vṛttīḥ pradāya ca | |
putre rājyaṃ samāropya prajā dharme niveśya ca || 71 ||
paridaṇḍya ca daṇḍārhān sādhūṃśca paritoṣya ca |
dārānapi parityajya parityajya viṣayeṣu parāṅmukhaḥ || 72 |
samāgacchadathaikākī kāśīṃ śreyovikāsinīm |
dharmeśvaraṃ samārādhya kālānnirvāṇamāptavān || 73 || ||
dharmeśadarśanānnityaṃ tathābhūtaḥ sa durdamaḥ |
babhūva damināṃśreṣṭhaḥ prānte mokṣaṃ ca labdhavān || 74 ||
itthaṃ dharmeśamāhātmyaṃ mayā svalpaṃ nirūpitam |

dharmākhyānamidaṃ śṛṇvannapi dṛrasthitaḥ sudhīḥ |
sarvapāpairvinirmukto gantā'nte śivamandiram || 78 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dharmeśvarākhyānaṃ nāmaikāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 81 |

|| atha dvyaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
pārvatyuvāca-
vīreśasya maheśāna śrūyate mahimā mahān |
parāṃ siddhiṃ parāpetustatra siddhāḥ paraḥśatāḥ || 1 |
kathamāvirbhavastasya kāśyāṃ liṅgacarasya tu |
āśu siddhipradasyeha tanme brūhi jagatpate || 2 2 || ||
maheśvara uvāca -
niśāmaya mahādevi vīreśāvirbhavaṃ param |
yaṃ śrutvā'pi naraḥ puṇyaṃ prāpnoti vipulaṃ śive || 3 ||
āsīdamitrajinnāma rājā parapurañjayaḥ |
dhārmikaḥ sattvasampannaḥ prajārañjanataparaḥ || 4 |
athāśītitame'dhyāye dvyadhike'tyantasundare |
vīreśvarasya liṅgasya prādurbhāvaḥ pratanyate || 1 |
vīreśvarasyā''virbhāvaṃ praṣṭumāha - vīreśasyeti || 1 |
tatrākhyāyikāmavatārayati - āsīditi | rājānaṃ viśinaṣṭi ! ṣaḍakṣarādhika-

yaśodhano vadānyaśca sudhīrbrāhmaṇadaivataḥ |
sadaivā'vabhṛthasnānapariklinnaśiroruhaḥ ||5 ||
vinīto nītisampannaḥ kuśalaḥ sarvakarmasu | |
vidyābdhipāradṛśvā ca guṇavān guṇivatsalaḥ || 6 |
kṛtajño madhurālābhaḥ pāpakarmaparāṅmukhaḥ |
satyāvāk śaucanilayaḥ svalpavāg vijitendriyaḥ || 7 |
raṇāṅgaṇe kṛtāntābhaḥ saṃkhyāvāṃśca sadojire |
kāminīkāmakelijño yuvā'pi sthavirapriyaḥ || 8 |
dharmārthaidhitakośaśca samṛddhabalavāhanaḥ |
subhagaśca surūpaśca sumedhāḥ suprajāśrayaḥ || 9 ||
sthairyadhairyasamāpanno deśakālavicakṣaṇaḥ |
mānyamānaprado nityaṃ sarvadūṣaṇavarjitaḥ || 10 |
vāsudevā'ṅghriyugale ceteovṛttiṃ nidhāya saḥ |
cakāra rājyaṃ nirdvandvaṃ viṣvagītivivarjitam || 11 ||
vadānyo dātā || 5 |

alaṅghyaśāsanaḥ śrīmān viṣṇubhaktiparāyaṇaḥ |
abhunak pracurān bhogān samantādviṣṇusātkṛtān || 12 ||
harerāyatanānyuccaiḥ pratisaudhaṃ pade pade |
tasya rājye samabhavan mahābhāgyanidheḥ śive || 13 ||
govinda gopa gopāla gopījanamanohara |
gadāpāṇe guṇātīta guṇāḍhya garuḍadhvaja || 14 |
keśihṛt kaiṭabhārāte kaṃsāre kamalāpate |
kṛṣṇa keśava kaākṣa kīnāśa bhayanāśana || 15 ||
puruṣottama pāpāre puṇḍarīkavilocana |
pītakauśeyavasana padmanābha parātpara || 16 |
samantāt kāyavāṅmana ādibhirviṣṇusātkṛtān viṣṇave samarpitān | taduktaṃ
bhāgavate -
kāyena vācā manasendriyairvā buddhyātmanā bānusṛtasvabhāvāt |
karoti yadyat sakalaṃ parasmai nārāyaṇāyeti samarpayettat || iti || 12 ||

janā na jagannātha jāhnavījalajanmabhūḥ |
janmi janmaharaṇa jañjapūkā'ghanāśana || 17 ||
śrīvatākṣaḥ śrīkānta śrīkara śreyasāṃnidhe |
śrīraṅga śārṅgakodaṇḍa śaure śītāṃśulocana || 18 ||
daityāre dānavārāte dāmodara durantaka |
devakīhṛdayānanda dandaśūkeśvareśaya || 1 9 |
viṣṇo vaikuṇṭhanilaya bāṇāre viṣṭaraśravaḥ |
viṣvaksena virādhāre vanamālin vanapriya || 20 ||
trivikrama trilokīśa cakrapāṇe caturbhuja |
ityādīni pavitrāṇi nāmāni pratimandiram || 21 |
strīvṛddhabālagopālavadanodīritāni tu |
śrūyante yatra kutrāpi ramyāṇi madhuvidviṣaḥ || 22 ||
jañjapūkā japaśīlāsteṣāmaghanāśana | bhaktānāmiti kvacit || 17 |

surasākānanānyeva vilokyante gṛhe gṛhe |
caritrāṇi vicitrāṇi pavitrāṇyabdhijāpateḥ || 23 ||
saudhabhittiṣu dṛśyante citrakṛnnirmitāni tu | |
ṛte harikathāyāstu nā'nyā vārtā niśamyate || 24 ||
hariṇā naiva vidhyante harināmāṃśadhāriṇaḥ |
tasya rājño bhayād vyādhairaraṇyasukhacāriṇaḥ || 25 |
na matsyā naiva kamaṭhā na varāhāśva kenacit |
hanyante kvāpi tadbhītyā matsyamāṃsāśinā'pi vai || 26 ||
apyuttānaśayāstasya rāṣṭre mitrajitaḥ kvacit |
stanapānaṃ na kurvanti samprāpya harivāsaram || 27 ||
surasākānanāni tulasīvanāni śobhano raso rāgo bhagavato yasyāmiti vyutpatteḥ |
yadāha dhanvantariḥ - " tulasī surasā gaurī bhūtaghnī bahumañjarīti " | caritrāṇi pūtanāvadha-
śakaṭabhañjanādīni || 23 ||
na kevalaṃ gṛhe gṛhe vilokyante saudhabhittiṣu ca dṛśyanta iti sambandhaḥ || 24 |
harināmalakṣaṇo yoṃ'śo bhāgastaddhāriṇaḥ || 25 |

paśavo'pi tṛṇāhāraṃ parityajya harerdine |

kṛṣṇa eva paro devaḥ kṛṣṇa eva parā gatiḥ |
kṛṣṇa eva paro bandhuḥ tasyā''sīdavanīpateḥ || 34 ||
evaṃ tasmin mahīpāle rājyaṃ samyak praśāsati |
ekadā nāradaḥ śrīmāṃstaṃ didṛkṣuḥ samāyayaiau || 35 ||
rājñā samarcitaḥ so'tha madhuparkavidhānataḥ |
nārado varṇayāmāsa tamamitrajitaṃ nṛpam || 36 |
nārada uvāca -
dhanyo'si kṛtakṛtyo'si mānyo'pyasi divaukasām |
sarvabhūteṣu govindaṃ paripaśyan paripaśyan viśāmpate || 37 ||
yo vedapuruṣo viṣṇuryo yajñapuruṣo hariḥ |
yo'ntarātmā'sya jagataḥ kartā hartā'vitā vibhuḥ || 38 ||
tanmayaṃ paśyato viśvaṃ tava bhūpāla sattama |
darśanaṃ prāpya śubhadaṃ śucitvamagamaṃ param || 3 9 ||
dadhnāmiśritaṃ jalaṃ madhuparkaḥ || 36 |
ahamagamaṃ prāptaḥ || 3 9 |

eka eva hi sāro'tra saṃsāre kṣaṇabhaṅgure |
kamalākāntapādābjabhaktibhāvo'khilapradaḥ
parityajya hi yaḥ sarvaṃ viṣṇumekaṃ sadā bhajet |
sumedhasaṃ bhajante taṃ padārthāḥ sarva eva hi || 41 |
hṛṣīkeśe hṛṣīkāṇi yasya sthairyaṃ gatānyaho |
sa eva sthairyamāpnoti brahmāṇḍe'tīva cañcale || 42 ||
yauvanaṃ dhanamāyuṣyaṃ padminījalabinduyat |
atīvacapalaṃ jñātvā'cyutamekaṃ samāśrayet || 43 ||
vāci cetasi sarvatra yasya devo janārdanaḥ |
sa eva sarvadā vandyo nararūpī janārdanaḥ || 44 ||
nirvyājapraṇidhānena śīlayitvā śriyaḥ patim |

anayā viṣṇubhaktyā te santuṣṭendriyamānasaḥ | |
upakartumanā brūyāṃ tanniśāmaya bhūpate || 46 |
bālā vidyādharasutā nāmnā malayagandhinī |
krīḍantī piturākrīḍe hṛtā kaṅkālaketunā || 47 ||
kapālaketuputreṇa dānavena balīyasā |
āgāminyāṃ tṛtīyāyāṃ tasyāḥ pāṇigrahaḥ kila || 48 ||
pātāle campakāvatyāṃ nagaryāṃ sā'sti sāmpratam |
hāṭakeśāt samāgacchaṃstayā'haṃ sāśrunetrayā || 4 9 |
dṛṣṭaḥ praṇamya vijñapto yathā tacca niśāmaya |
brahmacārin muniśreṣṭha gandhamādanaśailataḥ || 50 ||
bālakrīḍanakāsaktāṃ mohayitvā nināya saḥ |
kaṅkālaketurdurvṛtto durjayo'nyāstraghātataḥ || 51 |
svasya triśūlaghātena mriyate nā'nyathā raṇe |
jagatparyākulīkṛtya nidrātyatra vinirbhayaḥ || 52 |
malayaśabdenā'tra malayajo lakṣyate | tadvadgandho vartate yasyāḥ sā malayagandhinī || 47 ||
pāṇigrahaḥ devyoddiṣṭa iti śeṣaḥ || 48 |
hāṭakeśāt pātālasthānāt || 4 9 | 51 |
mohayitvā māyayā mohaṃ sampādya | māṃ jñātvā'treti ' kvacit ||
sa sveti pāṭhe anvayabhedādapaunaruktyam || 52 |

yadi ko'pi kṛtajño māṃ hatyemaṃ duṣṭadānavam |
maddattena triśūlena nayed bhadraṃ bhavennaraḥ || 53 |
yadatropacikīrṣustvaṃ rakṣa māṃ duṣṭadānavāt |
mamā'pi hi varo datto bhagavatyā mahāmune || 54 ||
viṣṇubhakto yuvā dhīmān putri tvāṃ pariṇeṣyati |
ā tṛtīyātithi yathā tadvākyaṃ tathyatāṃ vrajet || 55 ||
tathā nimittamātraṃ tvaṃ bhava yatnaṃ samācara |
iti tadvacanādrājan viṣṇubhaktiparāyaṇam || 56 ||
tad gaccha kāryasiddhyai tvaṃ hatvā taṃ duṣṭadānavam |
ānayā''śu mahābāho śubhāṃ malayagandhinīm || 57 ||

sā tu vidyādharī jīved vilokya tvāṃ nareśvara |
pārvatīvacanādduṣṭaṃ ghātayiṣyatyayatnataḥ || 58 ||
iti nāradavākyaṃ sa niśamyāmitrajinnṛpaḥ |
analpotkaliko jāto vidyādharasutāṃ prati || 5 9 ||
upāyaṃ cāpi papraccha gantuṃ tāṃ campakāvatīm |
nāradena punaḥ proktaḥ sa rājā girirājaje || .0 |
tūrṇamarṇavamāsādya pūrṇimādivase nṛpa |
bhavān drakṣyati potasthaḥ kalpavṛkṣaṃ rathasthitam || 61 |
tatra divyāṅganā kāciddivyaparyaṅkasaṃsthitā |
vīṇāmādāya gāyantī gāthāṃ gāsyati susvaram || 62 ||
yatkarma vihitaṃ yena śubhaṃ vā'tha śubhetaram |
sa eva bhuṅkte tattathyaṃ vidhisūtraniyantritaḥ || 63 |

gāthāmimāṃ sā saṃgīya sarathā samahīruhā |
saparyaṅkā kṣaṇādeva madhyesindhu pravekṣyati || 64 |
bhavānapyaviśaṅkaṃ ca tataḥ potān mahārṇave |
tāmanuvrajatu kṣipraṃ yajñavārāhamāstuvan || 65 ||
tato drakṣyasi pātāle nagarīṃ campakāvatīm |
mahāmanoharāṃ rājan sahitāṃ bālayā'nayā || 66 |
ityuktvā'ntarhito devi sa caturmukhanandanaḥ |
rājā'pyarṇavamāsādya yathoktaṃ parilakṣya ca || 67 |
viveśā'ntaḥ samudraṃ ca nagarīmāsasāda tām |
sā'tha vidyādharī bālā netraprāghuṇikīkṛtā || 68 |
āstuvan ā samantāt kāyavāṅmanobhiḥ | yajñavarāhasya jalakrīḍābhirucitasya ' |
taduktaṃ vanaparvaṇi - " jalakrīḍābhiruciraṃ vārāhaṃ rūpamasmaraditi " | pṛthivyuddharaṇāya jale
praviṣṭatvāttatstavanena tena dharāyā iva jalapraveśā'bādhena tvayā malayagandhinyā udvāho
bhaviṣyatīti bhāvaḥ || 65 |
anayā malayagandhinyā || 66 |
netraprāghuṇikī cakṣuratithiḥ || 68 |

tena 115
rājñā trijagatīsaundarya śrīrivaikikā |
pātāladevateyaṃ vā mama netrotsavāya kim || 6 9 ||
niraṇāyi madhudveṣṭrā sraṣṭuḥ sṛṣṭivilakṣaṇā |
kuhūrāhubhayādeṣā kāntiścāndramasī kimu || 70 |
yoṣidrūpaṃ samāśritya samāśritya tiṣṭhatātrā'kuto'bhayā |
itthaṃ kṣaṇaṃ tāṃ nirvarṇya sa rājā'gāttadantikam || 71 ||
sā vilokyā'tha taṃ bālā nitarāṃ madhurākṛtim |
viśālorasthatalaṃ pralambatulasīmnajam || 72 ||
śaṅkhacakrāṅkasubhagabhujadvayavirājitam
harināmākṣarasudhāsudhautaradanāvalim || 73 ||
bhavānī bhaktibījotthaṃ bhūruhaṃ puruṣākṛtim |
manorathaphalaiḥ pūrṇamāsīddhṛṣṭatanūruhā || 74 |
trijagatītyāderitthaṃ tāṃ nirvarṇya vitartsnyeti tṛtīyenā'nvayaḥ | ekikā mukhyā
ekākinīti vā || 6 9 |
kuhūramāvāsyā ca rāhuśca tayorbhayāt || 70 |

dolāparyaṅkamutsṛjya hībharā namrakandharā |
vepathuṃ ca pariṣṭabhya bālā provāca bhūpatim || 75 |
kastvamatra kṛtāntasya bhavanaṃ madhurākṛte |
prāpto me . mandabhāgyāyāścetovṛttiṃ i | nirundhayan || 76 |
yāvannāyāti subhaga sa kaṭhoratarākṛtiḥ |
atiparyākulīkṛtya trilokīṃ dānavo muhuḥ || 77 ||
kaṅkālaketurdurvṛttastvavadhyaḥ parahetibhiḥ |
tāvadguptaṃ samātiṣṭha śastrāgāre'tigahvare || 78 |
na me kanyāvrataṃ bhaṅktuṃ sa samartha umāvarāt |
āgāminyāṃ tṛrtayāyāṃ paraśvaḥ pāṇipīḍanam || 7 9 |
sañcikīrṣati duṣṭātmā gatāyurmama śāpataḥ |
mā tadbhītiṃ kuru yuvastatkāryaṃ bhavitā'ciram || 80 ||
vidyādharyeti coktaḥ sa śastrāgāre nigūḍhavat |
sthito vīro mahābāhurdānavāgamanekṣaṇaḥ || 81 |
dolāparyaṅkam āndolanakhaṭvām || 75 |

atha sāyaṃ samāyāto dānavo bhīṣaṇākṛtiḥ |
triśūlaṃ kalayan pāṇau mṛtyorapi bhayāvaham || 82 ||
āgatya dānavo raudraḥ pralayāmbudaniḥsvanaḥ |
vidyādharīṃ jagādeti madāghūrṇitalocanaḥ || 83 ||
gṛhāṇemāni ratnāni divyāni varavarṇini |
kanyātvaṃ ca paraśvaste pāṇigrāhādapaiṣyati || 84 ||
dāsīnāmayutaṃ prātardāsyāmi tava sundari | |
āsurīṇāṃ surīṇāṃ ca dānavīnāṃ manoharam || 85 ||
gandharvīṇāṃ narīṇāṃ ca kinnarīṇāṃ śataṃ śatam |

kalayan cālayan || 82 ||

tvadaṅgasaṅgasaṃsparśasukhasandohameduraḥ
parāṃ nirvṛtimāpsyāmi paraśvo nikaṭaṃ yadi || 9 0 |

naramāṃsavasāsvādapramatto vītasādhvasaḥ | 9 3 |
varaṃ smarantī sā gauryā vidyādharakumārikā |

āhūya taṃ naravaraṃ varaṃ sarvāṅgasundaram |

sukhasandoho vṛttirūpastena meduraḥ pūrṇaḥ | parāṃ nirvṛtiṃ paramānandam |
taduktam-

sa eva sukharūpeṇa vyajyate puṇyakarmabhiḥ || iti | 9 0 |

bayaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ 11 9
śūlaṃ tadaṅkādādāya gṛhāṇemaṃ jahi drutam |
iti triśūlaṃ bālāto bālārkasadṛśadyutiḥ || 9 6 ||
samādāya mahābāhuḥ sa tadā'mitrajinnṛpaḥ |
jaharṣa ca jagādoccairbālāyāścā'bhayaṃ diśan || 9 7 |
vāmapādaprahāreṇa tamātāḍya sa nirbhayaḥ |
saṃsmaraṃścakriṇaṃ . citte jagadrakṣāmaṇiṃ harim || 9 8 ||
jagādottiṣṭha re duṣṭa kanyāgharṣaṇalālasa |
yudhyasvā'tra - mayā sārdhaṃ na suptaṃ hanmyahaṃ ripum || 99 ||
iti saṃśrutya sambhrānta utthāya sa danoḥ sutaḥ |
triśūlaṃ dehi me kānte provāceti muhurmuhuḥ || 100 |
ko'yaṃ mṛtyugṛhaṃ prāptaḥ kasya ruṣṭo'dya cā'ntakaḥ |
ka āyuṣā'dya santyakto yaḥ prāpto mama gocaram || 101 |
mama pracaṇḍadordaṇḍakaṇḍūṃ kaṇḍūyanakṣamaḥ |
nā'lpo naro'yaṃ bhavitā kiṃ triśūlena sundari || 102 !

mā bhairme kautukaṃ paśya bhakṣyo'yaṃ mama sāmpratam |

avaśyameva martavyamadya prātaḥ śarīriṇā |

iyaṃ vidyādharī kanyā na mayā dūṣitā satī |

|| atha tryaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
rājñyuvāca- kathayāmi
avadhehi dharānātha yathātatham |
vratasyā'sya vidhānaṃ ca phalaṃ cā'bhīṣṭadevatām || 1 ||
purā puraḥ śrīdapatnyāḥ śrīmukhyā brahmasūnunā |
nāradena sutārthinyā vratametadudīritam || 2 |
cīrṇaṃ cā'tha tayā devyā putro'bhūnnalakūbaraḥ |
anyābhirapi bahvībhiḥ putrāḥ prāptā vratāditaḥ || 3 ||
vidhinā'pyatra sampūjyā gaurī sarvavidhānavit |
stanandhayena sahitā dhayatā stanamunmukham || 4 ||
athāśītitame'dhyāye tryadhike sarvasundare |
vīreśāviṣkṛtiḥ puṇyā samyak tāvannirūpyate || 1 |
abhīṣṭatṛtīyāvrataṃ kathayati - avadhehīti || 1 |

mārgaśīrṣatṛtīyāṃ śuklāyāṃ kalaśopari |
tāmrapātraṃ nidhāyaikaṃ taṇḍulaiḥ paripūritam || 5 ||
avicchinnaṃ navīnaṃ ca rajanīrāgarañjitam |
vāsaḥ pātropari nyasya sūkṣmātsūkṣmataraṃ param || 6 ||
tasyopari śubhaṃ padmaṃ raviraśmivikāsitam |
tatkarṇikāyā upari catuḥsvarṇavinirmitam || 7 |
vidhiṃ sampūjayed bhaktyā ratnapaṭṭāmbarādibhiḥ |
puṣpairnānāvidhai ramyaiḥ phalairnāraṅgamukhyakaiḥ || 8 |
sugandhaiścandanādyaiśca karpūramṛganābhibhiḥ |

hastamātramite kuṇḍe jātavedasa ityṛcā |

navaprasūtāṃ kapilāṃ suśīlāṃ ca payasvinīm || 12 ||

upoṣya dampatī bhaktyā navāmbaravibhūṣitau || 13 ||
prātaḥ snātvā caturthyāṃ ca sampūjyā''cāryamādṛtaḥ |
vastrairābharaṇairmālyairdakṣiṇābhirmudānvitau

sahasraṃ bhojayitvā'tha dvijānāṃ bhaktipūrvakam |
bhuktaśeṣeṇa cā'nnena kuryād vai pāraṇaṃ tataḥ || 17 |
itthametad vrataṃ rājaṃścikīrṣāmi tvayā saha |
kuru caitatpriyaṃ mahyamabhīṣṭaphalalabdhaye || 18 ||
iti bhūpālavaryeṇa śrutvā saṃhṛṣṭacetasā |
mune vrataṃ samācīrṇaṃ sā'ntarvatnī babhūva ha || 1 9 ||
tayā'tha prārthitā gaurī garbhiṇyā bhaktitoṣitā |
putraṃ dehi mahāmāye sākṣād viṣṇvaṃśasambhavam || 20 ||
jātamātro vrajetsvargaṃ punarāyāti cā'tra vai |
bhaktaḥ sadāśive'tyarthaṃ prasiddhaḥ sarvabhūtale || 21 |
vinaiva stanyapānena ṣoḍaśābdākṛtiḥ kṣaṇāt |
evaṃbhūtaḥ suto gauri yathā me sthāttathā kuru || 22 ||
bhuktaśeṣeṇā'vaśiṣṭenā'nnena || 17 ||
mune vrataṃ samācīrṇaṃ palyā saheti śeṣaḥ || 1 9 |

mṛḍānyā'pi tathetyuktā rājñī bhaktyā'tituṣṭayā |
atha kālena tanayaṃ mūlarkṣe sā'pyajījanat || 23 ||
hitairamātyairatha sā vijñaptāriṣṭasaṃsthitā |
devi rājārthinī cettvaṃ tyaja duṣṭarkṣajaṃ sutam || 24 ||
sā mantrivākyamākarṇya kevalaṃ kevalaṃ patidevatā |
atyākṣīttaṃ tathā prāptaṃ tanayaṃ nayakovidā || 25 | |
dhātreyikāṃ samākārya prāhedaṃ sā nṛpāṅganā |
pañcamudre mahāpīṭhe vikaṭā nāma mātṛkā || 26 ||
tadagre sthāpayitvā'muṃ bālaṃ dhātreyike vada |
gauryā dattaḥ śiśurasau tavā'gre viniveditaḥ || 27 |
rājñā patyuḥ priyaiṣiṇyā mantrivijñaptinunnayā |
sā'pi rājñyuditaṃ śrutvā śiśuṃ lāsyaśaśiprabham || 28 |
mūlarkṣe putrotpattyā rājño'riṣṭe nāśe saṃsthitā | vijñāpanamevāha - devīti || 24 |
samākārya ākārayitvā || 26 |
mantrivijñaptinunnayā mantrivākyapreritayā | pāṭhāntare | mantribhirvijñaptaḥ
pituraniṣṭakṛt putro yasyāstayā | lāsyaśaśiprabhaṃ kāmanīyacandraprabham || 28 |

vikaṭāyāḥ puraḥ sthāpya gṛhaṃ dhātreyikā gatā |
