atha sā vikaṭā devī samāhūya ca yoginīḥ || 2 9 ||
uvāca nayata kṣipraṃ śiśuṃ mātṛgaṇā'grataḥ |
tāsāmājñāṃ ca kuruta rakṣatā'muṃ prayatnataḥ || 30 ||
yoginyo vikaṭāvākyāt khecaryastāḥ kṣaṇena tam |
ninyurgaganamārgeṇa brāhmayādyā yatra mātaraḥ || 31 |
praṇamya yoginīvṛndaṃ taṃ śiśuṃ sūryavarcasam | |
puro nidhāya mātṝṇāṃ provāca vikaṭoditam || 32 ||
brahmāṇī vaiṣṇavī raudrī vārāhī nārasiṃhikā |
kaumārī cā'pi māhendrī cāmuṇḍā caiva caṇḍikā || 33 ||
dṛṣṭvā taṃ bālakaṃ ramyaṃ vikaṭāpreṣitaṃ tataḥ |

rājayogyo bhavatyeṣa mahālakṣaṇalakṣitaḥ |
punastatraiva yoginyo netavyastvavilambitam || 36 |
pañcamudrā mahādevī tiṣṭhate yatra kāmyadā |
yasyāḥ saṃsevanānnṛṇāṃ nirvāṇaśrīradūrataḥ || 37 |
sarvatra śubhajanminyāṃ kāśyāṃ muktiḥ pade pade |
tathāpi saviśeṣaṃ hi tatpīṭhaṃ sarvasiddhikṛt || 38 |
tatpīṭhasevanādasya ṣoḍaśābdākṛteḥ śiśoḥ |
siddhirbhavitrī paramā viśveśā'nugrahātparāt || 3 9 |
evaṃ mātṛgaṇāśīrbhiryoginībhiḥ kṣaṇena hi |
prāpito mātṛvākyena pañcamudrāṅkitaṃ punaḥ || 40 |
samprāpya tanmahāpīṭhaṃ svargalokādihāgataḥ |
ānandakānane divyaṃ tatāpa vipulaṃ tapaḥ || 41 |
pade pade sthāne sthāne || 38 ||

tapasā'tīvatībreṇa niścalendriyacetasaḥ |
tasya . rājakumārasya prasanno'bhūdumādhavaḥ || 42 ||
āvirbabhūva purato liṅgarūpeṇa śaṅkaraḥ |
provāca ca prasanno'smi varaṃ brūhi nṛpāṅgaja || 43 |
skanda uvāca -
sarvajyotirmayaṃ liṅgaṃ purato vīkṣya vāṅmayam |
saptapātālamudbhidya sthitaṃ bṛhadanugrahāt || 44 ||
praṇamya daṇḍavadbhūmau parituṣṭāva dhūrjaṭim |
sūktairjanmāntarābhyastaiḥ suhṛṣṭo rudradaivataiḥ || 45 ||
tataḥ prasanno bhagavān devadevo maheśvaraḥ |
santuṣṭastapasā tasya provāca vṛṣabhadhvajaḥ || 46 |
devadeva uvāca-
varaṃ varaya santaptatapasā kleśitaṃ vapuḥ |
tvayedaṃ bālavapuṣā 2 vaśīkṛtaṃ mano mama || 47 |

śivoktaṃ ca samākarṇya varadānaṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
varaṃ ca prārthayāñcakre parihṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ || 48 ||
kumāra uvāca-
devadeva mahādeva yadi deyo varo mama |
tadatra bhavatā stheyaṃ bhavatāpahṛtā sadā ||| 4 9 |
asmi~lliṅge sthitaḥ śambho kuru bhaktasamīhitam |
vinā mudrādikaraṇaṃ mantreṇā'pi vinā prabho || 50 ||
diśa siddhiṃ parāmatra darśanāt sparśanānnateḥ |
asya liṅgasya ye bhaktā manovākkāyakarmabhiḥ || 51 |
sadaivā'nugrahasteṣu kartavyo vara eṣa me |
iti tadvaramākarṇya liṅgarūpo'vadatprabhuḥ || 52 || |
evamastu yaduktaṃ te vīra vaiṣṇavasūnunā | |
janetu viṣṇubhaktācca rājño'mitrajito bhavān || 53 ||

viṣṇvaṃśa evamutpanno mama bhaktiparāṅgaja |
vīravīreśvaraṃ nāma liṅgametattvadākhyayā || 54 ||
kāśyāṃ dāsyatyabhīṣṭāni bhaktānāṃ cintitānyaho |
asmi~lliṅge sadā vīra sthāsyāmyadyadināvadhi || 55 ||
dāsyāmi ca parāṃ siddhimāśritebhyo na saṃśayaḥ |
paraṃ na mahimānaṃ me kalau kaścicca vetsyati || 56 |
yastu vetsyati bhāgyena sa parāṃ siddhimāpsyati |
atra japtaṃ hutaṃ dattaṃ stutamarcitameva vā || 57 ||
jīrṇoddhārādikaraṇamakṣayyaphalahetukam I
tvaṃ tu rājyaṃ paraṃ prāpya sarvabhūpāladurlabham || 58 ||
bhuktvā bhogāṃśca vipulānante siddhimavāpsyasi |
purī vārāṇasī ramyā sarvasmin jagatītale || 5 9 |
puṇyastatrāpi sambhedaḥ saritorasigaṅgayoḥ |
tato'pi ca hayagrīvaṃ tīrthaṃ caivā'tipuṇyadam || 60 |
bhaktyā ' ceti kvacit | he mama bhaktipara aṅgaja putra || 54 ||

bhaktacintitamarpayet
yatra viṣṇurhayagrīvo |
hayagrīvācca vai tīrthād gajatīrthaṃ viśiṣyate || 61 ||
yatra vai snānamātreṇa gajadānaphalaṃ labhet |
kokāvarāhatīrthaṃ ca puṇyadaṃ gajatīrthataḥ || 62 |
kokāvarāha mabhyarcya tatra no janmabhāg janaḥ |
api kokāvarāhācca dilīpeśvarasannidhau || 63 |
dilīpatīrthaṃ suśreṣṭhaṃ sadyaḥ pāpaharaṃ param |
tataḥ sagaratīrthaṃ ca sagareśasamīpataḥ | 64 |
yatra majjannaro majjenna bhūyo duḥkhasāgare |
saptasāgaratīrthaṃ ca śubhaṃ sagaratīrthataḥ || 65 ||
saptābdhisnānajaṃ puṇyaṃ yatra snātvā naro labhet |
mahodadhīti vikhyātaṃ tīrthaṃ saptābdhitīrthataḥ || 66 |
sakṛdyatrā''pluto dhīmān dahedaghamahodadhim |
cauratīrthaṃ tataḥ puṇyaṃ kapileśvarasannidhau || 67 ||

pāpaṃ suvarṇacauryādi yatra snātvā kṣayaṃ vrajet |
haṃsatīrthaṃ tato'pīḍyaṃ kedāreśvarasannidhau || 68 |
haṃsasvarūpī yatrā'haṃ nayāmi brahmadehinaḥ || 6 9 |
tatastribhuvanākhyasya keśavasyā'tipuṇyadam |
tīrthaṃ yatrā''plutā martyā martyalokaṃ viśanti na || 70 |
govyāghreśvaratīrthaṃ ca tato'pyadhikameva hi |
svabhāvavairamutsṛjya yatrobhau siddhimāpatuḥ || 71 ||
tato'pi hi varaṃ vīra tīrthaṃ māndhātṛsaṃjñitam |
cakravartipadaṃ yatra prāptaṃ tena mahībhujā || 72 ||
tato'pi mucukundākhyaṃ tīrthaṃ cā'tīvapuṇyadam | |
yatra snāto naro jātu ripubhirnā'bhibhūyate || 73 |
pṛthutīrthaṃ tato'pyuccaiḥ śreyasāṃ sādhanaṃ param |
pṛthvīśvaraṃ yatra dṛṣṭvā naraḥ pṛthvīpatirbhavet || 74 |

tataḥ paraśurāmasya tīrthaṃ cā'tīvasiddhidam |
yatra kṣatravadhāt pāpājjāmadagnyo vimuktavān || 75 ||
adyā'pi kṣatravadhajaṃ pāpaṃ tatra praṇaśyati |
ekena snānamātreṇa jñānā'jñānakṛtena ca || 76 |
tato'pi śreyasāṃ kartṛ tīrthaṃ kṛṣṇā'grajasya hi |
yatra sūtavadhātpāpād baladevo vimuktavān || 77 |
divodāsasya vai tīrthaṃ tatra rājño'timedhasaḥ |
tatra snāto naro jātu na jñānāccyavate'ntataḥ || 78 |
tato'pi hi mahātīrthaṃ sarvapāpapraṇāśanam |
yatra bhāgīrathī sākṣānmūrtirūpeṇa tiṣṭhati || 7 9 |
snātvā bhāgīrathītīrthe kṛtvā śrāddhaṃ vidhānavit |
datvā dānaṃ ca pātrebhyo na bhūyo garbhabhāgbhavet || 80 |
harapāpaṃ ca bho vīra tīrthaṃ bhāgīrathītaṭe |
tatra snātvā kṣatraṃ yānti mahāpāpakulānyapi || 81 |
sūtavadhā llomaharṣaṇavadhāt || 77 |

yo niṣpāpeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tatra paśyati mānavaḥ |
niṣpāpo jāyate vīra sa talliṅge kṣaṇātkṣaṇāt || 82 ||
daśāśvamedhatīrthaṃ ca tato'pi pravaraṃ matam |
daśānāmaśvamedhānāṃ yatra snātvā phalaṃ labhet || 83 ||
tato'pi śubhadaṃ vīra bandītīrthaṃ pracakṣate |
yatra snāto naro mucyedapi saṃsārabandhanāt || 84 |
hiraṇyākṣeṇa daityena bahuśo devatāḥ purā | :
bandīkṛtā nigaḍitāstuṣṭuvurjagadambikām || 85 |
tato viśṛṅkhalībhūtairvanditā yajjagajjaniḥ |
tadāprabhṛti bandīti gīyate'dyāpi mānavaiḥ || 86 |
bandītīrthaṃ tu tatraiva mahānigaḍakhaṇḍanam |
yatra snāto vimucyeta sarvasmātkarmapāśataḥ || 87 |
bandītīrthaṃ mahāśreṣṭhaṃ kāśīpuryāṃ viśāmpate |
tatra snāto naro yāyād vimuktiṃ devyanugrahāt || 88 |
bandī devī || 84 |
bandīnāma nirvakti – hiraṇyeti dvābhyām | nigaḍitā lohaśṛṅkhalairbaddhāśca || 85 |

tato'pi hi śreṣṭhataraṃ prayāgamiti viśrutam |
prayāgamādhavo yatra sarvayāgaphalapradaḥ || 8 9 |
kṣoṇīvarāhatīrthaṃ ca tato'pi śubhadaṃ param |
tatra snāto naro jātu tiryagyoniṃ na gacchati || 9 0 ||
tataḥ kāleśvaraṃ tīrthaṃ vīra śreṣṭhataraṃ param |
kalikālau na bādhete yatra snātaṃ narottamam || 9 1 ||
aśokatīrthaṃ tatraiva tato'pyatitarāṃ śubham |
yatra snāto naro jātu na patecchokasāgare || 9 2 |
tato'tinirmalataraṃ śukratīrthaṃ nṛpā'ṅgaja |
śukradvārā na jāyeta yatra snāto narottamaḥ || 9 3 ||
tato'pi puṇyadaṃ rājan bhavānītīrthamuttamam |
yatra snātvā bhavānīśau dṛṣṭvā naiva punarbhavet || 9 4 |
prabhāsatīrthaṃ vikhyātaṃ tato'pi śubhadaṃ nṛṇām |
someśvarasya puratastatra snāto na garbhabhāk || 9 5 |

tato garuḍatīrthaṃ ca saṃsāraviṣanāśanam |
garuḍeśaṃ samabhyarcya tatra snātvā na śocati || 9 6 |
brahmatīrthaṃ tataḥ puṇyaṃ vīra brahmeśvarātpuraḥ |
brahmavidyāmavāpnoti tatra snānena mānavaḥ || 9 7 |
tato vṛddhārkatīrthaṃ ca vidhitīrthaṃ tataḥ param |
tatrā''pluto naro yāti ravilokaṃ sunirmalam || 9 8 |
tato nṛsiṃhatīrthaṃ ca mahābhayanivāraṇam |
kālādapi kutastatra snātvā paribibheti ca || 99 |
tato'pi puṇyadaṃ nṛṇāṃ tīrthaṃ citraratheśvaram |
yatra snātvā ca datvā ca citraguptaṃ na paśyati || 100 |
dharmatīrthaṃ tataḥ puṇyaṃ dharmeśapurataḥ sthitam | |
tatra śrāddhādikaṃ kṛtvā pitṝṇāmanṛṇo bhavet || 101 |

viśālatīrthaṃ vimalaṃ viśālaphaladaṃ tataḥ |
tatra snātvā viśālākṣīṃ dṛṣṭvā garbhe na jāyate || 102 |
jarāsandheśatīrthaṃ ca jarāsandheśasannidhau |
saṃsārajcarapīḍābhistatra snāto na muhyati || 103 |
tato'pi lalitātīrthaṃ mahāsaubhāgyavardhanam |
snātvā'rcayitvā lalitāṃ na daridro na duḥkhabhāk || 104 ||
tato gautamatīrthaṃ ca sarvapāpaviśodhanam |
snātvā piṇḍān vinirvāpya yatra śocati na kvacit || 105 ||
gaṅgākeśavatīrthaṃ ca tīrthaṃ cā'gastyasaṃjñakam |
tatastu yoginītīrthaṃ yoginītīrthaṃ trisandhyākhyaṃ tataḥ param || 106 |
tatastu nārmadaṃ tīrthaṃ tata ārundhateyakam |
vāsiṣṭhaṃ ca tatastīrthaṃ mārkaṇḍeyamanuttamam || 107 ||
jñeyānyetāni tīrthāni puṇyadānyuttarottaram |
khurakartarisaṃjñaṃ ca tatastīrthamanuttamam || 108 |

tatra śrāddhādikaraṇānnaro mucyeta kilbiṣaiḥ |
tato bhāgīrathītīrthaṃ rājarṣeratipuṇyadam || 10 9 |
tatrā'lpamapi yacchedyat kalpānte'pyakṣayaṃ hi tat |
etebhyo'pi hi tīrthebhyo liṅgakoṭitrayādapi || 110 ||
vīra vīreśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ mahāśreṣṭhaṃ bhaviṣyati |
vīratīrthe naraḥ snātvā vīreśaṃ paripūjya ca || 111 ||
tīrtheṣyeteṣu sarveṣu snāto bhavati nānyathā |
yastu vīreśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ naktamabhyarcayiṣyati ||
tena trikoṭisaṃkhyāni liṅgānīhā'rcitāni vai || 112 ||
yastu kāmayate lakṣmīṃ muktidāṃ bhuktidāmapi |
tena vīreśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ saṃsevyamatiyatnataḥ || 113 |
vidhāyaikaṃ jāgaraṇaṃ naro vīreśamarcayan |
bhūtāyāṃ naiva gṛhṇāti śarīraṃ pāñcabhautikam || 114 ||
idaṃ liṅgaṃ sadā'bhyarcya siddhaiḥ saṃsiddhikāmukaiḥ |
aihikā''muṣmikānyasmāt sarvān kāmān samarthayet || 115 ||
bhūtāyāṃ caturdaśyām || 114 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ tryaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 83 ||

pañcāmṛtena snapanaṃ yaḥ kariṣyati mānavaḥ |
pale pale phalaṃ tasya vīreśe ghaṭakoṭijam || 116 |
yadanyatra phalaṃ liṅge koṭipuṣpapradānataḥ |
tadekenaiva puṣpeṇa vīreśe nātra saṃśayaḥ || 117 ||
ekāmapyāhutiṃ datyā vīreśvarasamīpataḥ |
koṭihomaphalaṃ samyaṅ nā'tra kāryā vicāraṇā || 118 ||
sikthe sikthe ca naivedye koṭisikthaphalaṃ bhavet |
atyalpamapi vīreśe kṛtamakṣayatāṃ vrajet || 11 9 ||
apyekaṃ yo mahārudraṃ japedvīreśasannidhau |
jāpayed vā bhavettasya koṭirudraphalaṃ dhruvam || 120 |
vratotsargādi vīreśe yatkṛtaṃ vratibhirnṛbhiḥ |
tatkoṭiguṇasaṃkhyākaṃ bhavatyeva na saṃśayaḥ || 121 |
kṛtā aṣṭau namaskārā yena vīreśvarā'grataḥ |
aṣṭakoṭinamaskāraphalaṃ tasya na saṃśayaḥ ||| 122 |

sarvāsāṃ sampadāṃ sthānamidaṃ liṅgaṃ bhaviṣyati |
vīreśvaraṃ na sandeho vīra me varadānataḥ || 123 |
jñānamutpatsyate puṃsāṃ tārakākhyaṃ mamājñayā |
jīvatāmeva tatsevyametalliṅgaṃ śubhārthibhiḥ || 124 ||
etacchrutvā punaḥ prāha vīro'mitrajitaḥ sutaḥ |
praṇamya devadeveśaṃ paripūrṇamanorathaḥ || 125 ||
tīrthānyetāni deveśa yānyuktāni mamā'grataḥ |
kṛpayā punarapyeva tadanyāni vada prabho || 126 ||
ādikeśavamārabhya tattīrthācca bhagīrathāt |
yeṣāṃ śravaṇamātreṇa niṣpāpo jāyate naraḥ || 127 ||
iti śrutvā maheśāno mahīpatanayoditam | |
punastīrthāni gaṅgāyāṃ vaktuṃ samupacakrame || 128 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe vīreśvarāvirbhāvo nāma tryaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 83 ||

|| atha caturaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca - yathā sthāṇuracīkarat |
ākarṇaya kṣoṇisura |

kṛtapādodakasnānaḥ kṛtakeśavapūjanaḥ |
vītasaṃsāravasatiḥ kāśyāmāsīnnarottamaḥ || 5 |
kāśyāṃ sā bhūmiruddiṣṭā śvetadvīpa iti dvijaiḥ |
tatra puṇyārjanaṃ kṛtvā śvetadvīpādhipo bhavet || 6 |
tataḥ pādodakāttīrthāttīrthaṃ kṣīrābdhisaṃjñakam |
tatrā'rjitamahāpuṇyo vasetkṣīrābdhirodhasi || 7 |
kṣīrodāddakṣiṇe bhāge tīrthaṃ śaṃkhākhyamuttamam |
tatra snāto bhavennūnaṃ nāśaṃkhādinidheḥ patiḥ || 8 |
arvāk ca śaṃkhatīrthādvai cakratīrthamanuttamam |
saṃsāracakre na patettattīrthajalamajjanāt || 9 |
gadātīrthaṃ tadagre tadagre tu saṃsāragadanāśanam |
tatra śrāddhādikaraṇātpaśyeddevaṃ gadādharam || 10 ||

padmākṛtpadmatīrthaṃ ca tadagre pitṛtṛptikṛt |
tatra snānādikaraṇātprāpnuyādaghasaṃkṣayam || 11 ||
tatastīrthaṃ mahālakṣmyā mahāpuṇyaphalapradam |
tatrā'bhyarcya mahālakṣmīṃ nirvāṇakamalāṃ labhet || 12 ||
tato gārutmataṃ tīrthaṃ saṃsāragaranāśanam |
kṛtodakakriyastatra vaikuṇṭhe vasatiṃ labhet || 13 |
tato nāradatīrthaṃ ca brahmavidyaikakāraṇam |
tatra snānena muktaḥ syāddṛṣṭvā nāradakeśavam || 14 |
prahlādatīrthaṃ tadyāmye mahābhaktiphalapradam |
tatra vai snānamātreṇa viṣṇoḥ priyataro bhavet || 15 ||
ambarīṣaṃ tatastīrthaṃ mahāpātakanāśanam |
tatra vai śubhakarmāṇo janā no garbhabhājanam || 16 |
gārutmataṃ gāruḍam || 13 |

ādityakeśavaṃ nāma tadagre tīrthamuttamam |
kṛtābhiṣekastatrāpi labhetsvargābhiṣecanam || 17 |
dattātreyasya tatrā'sti tīrthaṃ trailokyapāvanam |
yogasiddhiṃ labhettatra snānamātreṇa bhāvataḥ || 18 ||
tadagre bhārgavaṃ tīrthaṃ mahājñānasamarpakam |
tatra snānavidhānena bhaved bhārgavalokabhāk || 1 9 |
tato vāmanatīrthaṃ ca viṣṇusānnidhyahetukam |
tatra śrāddhavidhānena mucyate pitṛjādṛṇāt || 20 |
naranārāyaṇākhyaṃ hi tatastīrthaṃ śubhapradam |
tattīrthamajjanātpuṃsāṃ garbhavāsaḥ sudurlabhaḥ || 21 ||
yajñavārāhatīrthaṃ ca tato dakṣiṇataḥ śubham |
yatra snātasya vai puṃsāṃ ' rājasūyaphalaṃ dhruvam || 22 |
vidāranārasiṃhākhyaṃ tīrthaṃ tatrā'sti pāvanam |
yatraika snānatonaśyedaghaṃ janmaśatārjitam || 23 |
bhāvato bhaktyā || 18 |
snātasya snātānām || 22 |

vaiṣṇavalokadam |
gopīgovindatīrthaṃ ca tato
yasmin snāto naro vidvānna vindyād garbhavedanam || 24 ||
lakṣmīnṛsiṃhatīrthaṃ ca gopīgovindadakṣiṇe |
nirvāṇalakṣmyā yatratyo vriyate tu narottamaḥ || 25 ||
taddakṣiṇāyāṃ kāṣṭhāyāṃ śeṣatīrthamanuttamam |
mahāpāpaughaśeṣo'pi na tiṣṭhedyannimajjanāt || 26 |
śaṃkhamādhavatīrthaṃ ca tadyāmyāṃ diśi cottamam |
tattīrthasevanānṝṇāṃ kutaḥ pāpabhayaṃ mahat || 27 ||
tato'pi pāvanataraṃ tīrthaṃ tatkṣaṇasiddhidam |
nīlagrīvākhyamatulaṃ tatsnāyī sarvadā śuciḥ || 28 |
tatroddālakatīrthaṃ ca sarvā'ghaughavināśanam |
dadāti mahatīmṛddhiṃ snānamātreṇa tannṛṇām || 2 9 |
tataḥ sāṃkhyākhyatīrthaṃ ca sāṃkhyeśvarasamīpataḥ |
tattīrthasevanātpuṃsāṃ sāṃkhyayogaḥ prasīdati || 30 |

svarlokādyatra saṃlīnaḥ svayaṃ deva umāpatiḥ |
ataḥ svarlīnatīrthaṃ ca svarlīneśvarasannidhau || 31 ||
tatra snānena dānena śraddhayā dvijabhojanaiḥ |
japahomārcanaiḥ puṃsāmakṣayaṃ sarvameva hi || 32 ||
mahiṣāsuratīrthaṃ ca tatsamīpe'tipāvanam |
yatra taptvā sa daityendro vijigye sakalānsurān || 33 ||
tattīrthasevako'dyāpi nāribhiḥ nāribhiḥ | 1 paribhūyate |
na pātakairmahadbhiśca prārthitaṃ ca phalaṃ labhet || 34 ||
bāṇatīrthaṃ ca tasyā''rāttatsahasrabhujapradam |
tatra snāto naro bhaktiṃ prāpnuyācchāmbhavīṃ sthirām || 35 ||
gopratāreśvaraṃ nāma tadagre tīrthamuttamam |
aputro'pi taredyatra snāto vaitaraṇīṃ sukham || 36 |
tīrthaṃ hiraṇyagarbhākhyaṃ tadyāmye sarvapāpahṛt |
tatra snāto hiraṇyena mucyate na kadācana || 37 |
vaitaraṇīṃ yamadvārasthāṃ nadīm || 36 |

tataḥ praṇavatīrthaṃ . ca sarvatīrthottamottamam |
jīvanmukto bhavettatra snānamātreṇa mānavaḥ || 38 |
tataḥ piśaṅgilātīrthaṃ darśanādapi pāpahṛt |
mune mamā'dhiṣṭhānaṃ vai tadagaste'tisiddhidam || 3 9 |
snātvā piśaṅgilātīrthe dattvā dānaṃ ca kiñcana |
kiṃ śocati kṛtātpāpādanyatrā'pi mṛto yadi || 40 ||
yo vai piśaṅgilātīrthe snātvā māmarcayiṣyati |
bhaviṣyati sa me mitraṃ mitratejaḥ samaprabham || 41 |
tataḥ traiviṣṭapīdṛṣṭirnirmalīkṛtapuṣkalam |
tīrthaṃ pilipilākhyaṃ vai manomalavināśanam || 42 ||
tatra śrāddhādikaraṇāddīnānāthapratarpaṇāt |
mahatīṃ śriyamāpnoti mānavo'tīvaniścalām || 43 ||
mitratejaḥ samaprabhaṃ sūryasadṛśatejaskaram || 41 |
traiviṣṭapīdṛṣṭinirmalīkṛtapuṣkalaṃ | trilocanadarśanaśuddha jātasarvam || 42 |

tato nāgeśvaraṃ tīrthaṃ mahā'ghapariśodhanam |
tattīrthamajjanādeva bhavetsarvā'ghasaṃkṣayaḥ || 44 ||
taddakṣiṇe mahāpuṇyaṃ karṇādityākhyamuttamam |
tīrthaṃ yatrā''pluto martyo bhāskarīṃ śriyamāvahet || 45 ||
tato bhairavatīrthaṃ ca mahā'ghaughakṣayapradam |
caturarthodayakaraṃ sarvavighnanivāraṇam || 46 ||
bhaumāṣṭamyāṃ tatra naraḥ snātvā santarpayetpitṝn |
dṛṣṭvā ca bhairavaṃ kālaṃ kaliṃ kālaṃ ca sañjayet || 47 ||
tīrthaṃ kharvanṛsiṃhākhyaṃ tīrthābhairavataḥ puraḥ |
tatra snātasya vai puṃsaḥ kuto'ghajanitaṃ bhayam || 48 |
mṛkaṇḍasya munestīrthaṃ tadyāmyāmatinirmalam |
tatra snānena martyānāṃ nā'pāyamaraṇaṃ kvacit || 4 9 ||
tataḥ pañcanadākhyaṃ vai sarvatīrthaniṣevitam |
tīrthaṃ yatra naraḥ snātvā na saṃsārī punarbhavet || 50 ||

brahmāṇḍodaravartīni yāni tīrthāni sarvataḥ |
ūrje yatra samāyānti svā'ghaughaparinuttaye || 51 |
sarvadā yatra sarvāṇi daśamyādidinatrayam |
tiṣṭhanti tīrthavaryāṇi nijanairmalyahetave || 52 |
bhūriśaḥ sarvatīrthāni madhyekāśi pade pade |
paraṃ pāñcanadaḥ kaiścinmahimā nā'pi kutracit || 53 ||
apyekaṃ kārtikasyā'hastatra vai saphalīkṛtam |
japahomārcanādānaiḥ kṛtakṛtyāsta eva hi || 54 ||
sarvāṇyapi ca tīrthāni yugapattulitānyapi |
nā'dhijagmuḥ pañcanadyāḥ kalāyā api tulyatām || 55 ||
snātvā pāñcanade tīrthe dṛṣṭvā vai bindumādhavam |
na jātu jāyate dhīmān jananījaṭharājire || 56 |

tato jñānahṛdaṃ tīrthaṃ jaḍānāmapi jāḍyahṛt |
tatra snāto naro jātu jñānabhraṃśaṃ na cā''pnuyāt || 57 ||
tatra jñānahṛde snātvā dṛṣṭyā jñāneśvaraṃ naraḥ |
jñānaṃ tadadhigacched vai yena no bādhyate punaḥ || 58 ||
tato'sti maṅgalaṃ tīrthaṃ sarvā'maṅgalanāśanam |
tatrā'vagāhanaṃ kṛtyā bhavenmaṅgalabhājanam || 5 9 ||
amaṅgalāni naśyeyurbhaveyurmaṅgalāni ca |
snāturvai maṅgale tīrthe namaskartuśca maṅgalam || 60 |
mayūkhamālinastīrthaṃ tadagre malanāśanam |
tatrā''pluto gabhastīśaṃ vilokya vimalo bhavet || 61 |
makhatīrthaṃ tu tatraiva makheśvarasamīpataḥ |
makhajaṃ puṇyamāpnoti tatra snāto narottamaḥ || 62 ||
tatpārśve bindutīrthaṃ ca paramajñānakāraṇam |
tatra śrāddhādikaṃ kṛtvā labhetsukṛtamuttamam || 63 |
jaḍānāmajñānām || 57 |

pippalādasya ca munestīrthaṃ tadyāmyadik sthitam |
snātvā śanerdine tatra dṛṣṭvā vai pippaleśvaram || 64 ||
pippalaṃ tatra sevitvā aśvattha iti mantrataḥ |
śanipīḍāṃ na labhate duḥsvapnaṃ cāpi nāśayet || 65 ||
tatastāmravarāhākhyaṃ tīrthaṃ caivā'tipāvanam |
yatra snānena dānena na majjedaghasāgare || 66 |
tadagre kālagaṅgā ca kalikalmaṣanāśinī |
tasyāṃ snātvā naro dhīmāṃstatkṣaṇānniragho bhavet || 67 ||
indradyumnaṃ mahātīrthamindradyumneśvarā'grataḥ |
toyakṛtyaṃ tatra kṛtyā lokamaindramavāpnuyāt || 68 |
tatastu rāmatīrthaṃ ca vīra rāmeśvarā'grataḥ |
tattīrthasnānamātreṇa vaiṣṇavaṃ lokamāpnuyāt || 6 9 |
tata aikṣyākavaṃ tīrthaṃ sarvā'ghaughavināśanam |
tatra snānena pūtātmā jāyate manujottamaḥ || 70 |
aśvattha iti mantrata iti | aśvatthe vo niṣadanaṃ parṇe vo vasatiḥ kṛtā | gobhāja
itkilāsatha yatsanavatha pūruṣamityādimantreṇetyarthaḥ || 65 ||
aikṣyākavam ikṣvākoridam || 70 ||

maruttatīrthaṃ tavyānte marutteśvarasannidhau |
tatra snātvā tamarvveśaṃ mahadaiśvaryamāpnuyāt || 71 ||
maitrāvaruṇatīrthaṃ ca tataḥ pātakanāśanam |
tatra piṇḍapradānena pitṝṇāṃ bhavati priyaḥ || 72 |
tato'gnitīrthaṃ vimalamagnīśapurato mahat |
agnilokamavāpnoti tattīrthaparimajjanāt || 73 |
aṅgāratīrthaṃ tatraiva aṅgāreśvarasannidhau | |
tatrā'ṅgāracaturthyāṃ tu snātvā niṣpāpatāmiyāt || 74 ||
tato vaikalatīrthaṃ ca kalaśeśvarasannidhau |
snātvā talliṅgamabhyarcya kalikālānna bibhyati || 75 ||
candratīrthaṃ ca tatraiva candreśvarasamīpataḥ |
tatra snātvā'rcya candreśaṃ candralokamavāpnuyāt || 76 ||
tadagre vīratīrthaṃ ca vīreśvarasamīpataḥ |
yaduktaṃ prāk tava purastīrthānāmuttamaṃ param || 77 |
arcya arcayitvā || 71 |

vighneśatīrthaṃ ca tataḥ sarvavighnavighātakṛt |
jātucittatra saṃsnāto na vighnairabhibhūyate || 78 ||
hariścandrasya rājarṣestatastīrthamanuttamam |
yatra snāto naro jātu na satyāccyavate kvacit || 7 9 |
hariścandrasya tīrthe tu yacchreyaḥ samupārjitam |
tadakṣayaphalaṃ vīra ihaloke paratra ca || 80 ||
tataḥ parvatatīrthaṃ ca parvateśasamīpataḥ |
sarvaparvaphalaṃ tasya snātvā parvaṇyaparvaṇi | 81 |
kambalāśvataraṃ tīrthaṃ tatra sarvaviṣā'paham |
tatra snāto bhavenmartyo gītavidyāviśāradaḥ || 82 |
tataḥ sārasvataṃ tīrthaṃ sarvavidyopapādakam |
tiṣṭheyuḥ pitarastatra saha devarṣimānavaiḥ || 83 ||
umātīrthaṃ tu tatraiva sarvaśaktisamanvitam |
aumeyalokaprāptyai syātsnānamātreṇa niścitam || 84 ||
tatastrilokīvikhyātaṃ trilokyuddharaṇakṣamam |
tīrthaṃ śreṣṭhataraṃ vīra yadākhyā maṇikarṇikā || 85 |
aparvaṇi ca || 81 |
yadākhyā yasyākhyā maṇikarṇikā , tadityarthaḥ || 85 |

caturaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ 15 9
cakrapuṣkariṇītīrthaṃ tadādau viṣṇunā kṛtam | |
tadākhyā''karṇanādeva sarvaiḥ pāpaiḥ pramucyate || 86 |
svargaukasastrisandhyaṃ vai japanti maṇikarṇikām |
yannāmagrahaṇaṃ puṃsāṃ śreyase paramāya hi || 87 |
yaiḥ śrutā yaiḥ smṛtā vīra yairdṛṣṭā maṇikarṇikā |
ta eva kṛtino loke kṛtakṛtyāsta eva hi || 88 |
triloke ye japantīha mānavā maṇikarṇikām |
japāmi tānahaṃ vīra trikālaṃ puṇyakarmaṇaḥ || 8 9 |
iṣṭaṃ tena mahāyajñaiḥ sahasraśatadakṣiṇaiḥ |
pañcākṣarī mahāvidyā yenoktā maṇikarṇikā || 9 0 |
mahādānāni dattāni tena vai puṇyakarmaṇā |
yenā'hamarcito vīra samprāpya maṇikarṇikām || 9 1 |
maṇikarṇyambubhiryena tarpitāḥ prapitāmahāḥ |
tena śrāddhāni dattāni gayāyāṃ madhupāyasaiḥ || 9 2 |

maṇikarṇījalaṃ yena saṃpītaṃ śuddhabuddhinā |
kiṃ tasya somapānaistaiḥ punarāvṛttilakṣaṇaiḥ || 9 3 ||
te snātāḥ sarvatīrtheṣu mahāparvasu bhūriśaḥ |
tathā ca sarvāvabhṛthairyaiḥ snātā maṇikarṇikā || 9 4 |
taiḥ surāḥ pūjitāḥ sarve brahmaviṣṇumukhā makhaiḥ |
yaiḥ svarṇakusumai ratnairarcitā maṇikarṇikā || 9 5 ||
ahaṃ tenomayā sārdhaṃ dīkṣāṃ samprāpya śāmbhavīm |
arcitaḥ pratyahaṃ yena pūjitā maṇikarṇikā || 9 6 |
tapāṃsi tena taptāni śīrṇaparṇādinā ciram | |
sevitā śraddhayā yena śrīmatī maṇikarṇikā || 9 7 |
datvā dānāni bhūrīṇi makhāniṣṭvā tu bhūriśaḥ |
ciraṃ taptvā'pyaraṇyeṣu svargeśvaryānmahīṃ punaḥ || 9 8 |
vipule'tra mahīpṛṣṭhe pañcakrośyāṃ manoharā | |
saṃśritā maṇikarṇī yaiste yātāścānivartakāḥ || 99 |
mahīṃ punarāyātīti śeṣaḥ || 9 8 |

dānānāṃ ca vratānāṃ ca kratūnāṃ tapasāmapi |
idameva phalaṃ manye yadāpyā maṇikarṇikā || 100 |
mokṣalakṣmīriyaṃ sākṣācchrīmatī maṇikarṇikā |
prāyo'syā mahimānaṃ vai na vedmayahamapi sphuṭam || 101 |
avācyāṃ maṇikarṇyāśca tīrthaṃ pāśupataṃ param |
tīrthaṃ tu rudravāsākhyaṃ viśvatīrthamataḥ param || 102 |
muktitīrthaṃ tato tato ramyamavimuktamathottamam |
tīrthaṃ ca tārakaṃ skāndaṃ ḍhuṇḍhestīrthaṃ tato'pi ca || 103 |
bhavāneyamathaiśānaṃ jñānatīrthamathottamam |
nanditīrthaṃ viṣṇutīrthaṃ tīrthaṃ paitāmahaṃ tataḥ || 104 |
nābhitīrthamidaṃ caiva brahmanālamataḥ param |
tato bhāgīrathaṃ tīrthaṃ yattavā'gre purā'kathi || || 105 |
tīrthānyuttaravāhinyāṃ svardhunyāṃ kāśisannidhau |
santyanekāni puṇyāni mayoktānyalpaśaḥ punaḥ || 106 |
āpyā āpyate yadidameva phalamiti || 100 |

tatrāpi nitarāṃ śreṣṭhā pañcatīrthī nṛpāṅgañja |
yasyāṃ snātvā naro bhūyo garbhavāsaṃ na saṃsmaret || 107 |
prathamaṃ cā'sisambhedaṃ tīrthānāṃ pravaraṃ param |
tato daśāśvamedhākhyaṃ sarvatīrthaniṣevitam || 108 |
tataḥ pādodakaṃ tīrthamādikeśavasannidhau |
tataḥ pañcanadaṃ puṇyaṃ snānamātrādaghaughahat || 10 9 |
eteṣāmapi tīrthānāṃ caturṇāmapi sattama |
pañcamaṃ maṇikarṇyākhyaṃ mano'vayavaśuddhidam || 110 |
ahaṃ snāmyatra satatamumayā saha parvasu |
brahmaṇā viṣṇunā sārdhaṃ sahendrādisurarṣibhiḥ || 111 |
ata evā'tra gīyeta gātheyaṃ śrutisammatā |
nāgalokakṛtāvāsaiḥ svargaukobhiśca santatam || 112 |

satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ satyapūrvamidaṃ vacaḥ |
maṇikarṇīsamaṃ tīrthaṃ nāsti brahmāṇḍagolake || 113 ||
pañcatīrthyāṃ naraḥ snātvā na dehaṃ pāñcabhautikam |
gṛhṇāti jātucit kāśyāṃ pañcāsyo vā'tha jāyate || 114 ||
iti datvā varān devo vīrasyā'ntardadhe haraḥ |
sa ca vīro'pi vīreśaṃ prārcya prāptaḥ samīhitam || 115 |
skanda uvāca - tīrthādhyāyamimaṃ
puṇyamagaste yo niśāmayet |
tasyā'ghaṃ saṃkṣayaṃ yāyādapi janmaśatārjitam || 116 ||
iti vīreśvarākhyānaṃ tīrthākhyānaprasaṅgataḥ |
kathitaṃ te purā'gaste kāmeśaṃ kathayāmyataḥ || 117 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe vīreśvarākhyānaṃ nāma caturaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 84 ||
sadyojātavāmadevāghoratatpuruṣeśānapañcamukhatvāt pañcāsyo viśveśvaraḥ || 114 |
kāmeśaṃ kāmeśākhyānam || 117 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ caturaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 84 ||

|| atha pañcāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca - purāriṇā |
jagajjananyāḥ pārvatyāḥ puro'gaste
yathākhyāyi kathā puṇyā tathā te kathayāmyaham || 1 ||
purā mahīmimāṃ sarvāṃ sasamudrādrikānanām |
sasaritkāṃ sārṇavāṃ ca sagrāmapurapattanām || 2 |
paribhramya mahātejā mahāmarṣo mahātapāḥ |
durvāsāḥ saṃpariprāptaḥ śambhorānandakānanam || 3 ||
vilokyākrīḍamakhilaṃ bahuprāsādamaṇḍitam |
bahukuṇḍataḍāgaṃ ca śambhostoṣamupāgamat || 4 ||
pade pade munīnāṃ ca jitakālamahābhiyām |
dṛṣṭvoṭajāni ramyāṇi durvāsā vismito'bhavat || 5 ||
pañcāśītitame'dhyāye durvāsovarapūrvakam |
śrīmatkāmeśvarotpattirvarṇyate'timanoharā
kāmeśvarotpattiṃ vaktuṃ pratijānīte - jagajjananyā iti || 1 |
mahāmarṣo 'sahanaśīlo mahākrodha iti vā || 3 |
uṭajāni parṇaśālāḥ || 5 |

sarvartukusumān vṛkṣān succhāyasnigdhapallavān |
saphalān sulatāśliṣṭān dṛṣṭvā prītimagānmuniḥ || 6 ||
durvāsāścātihṛṣṭo'bhūddṛṣṭvā pāśupatottamān |
bhūtibhūṣitasarvāṅgān jaṭājaṭitamaulikān || 7 |
kaupīnamātravasanān smarāridhyānatatparān |
kakṣīkṛtamahālābūn huḍutkārajitāmbudān || 8 |
karaṇḍadaṇḍapānīyapātramātraparigrahān |
kvacittridaṇḍino dṛṣṭvā niḥsaṅgānniṣparigrahān || 9 ||
kālādapi nirātaṅkān viśveśaśaraṇaṃgatān |
kvacid vedarahasyajñān ābālyabrahmacāriṇaḥ || 10
nityaṃ bhāgīrathīsnānaparipiṅgalamūrdhajān |
vilokya kāśyāṃ durvāsā brāhmaṇān mumudetarām || || 11 ||
jaṭājaṭitamaulikān jaṭāvyāptamastakān || 7 |

paśuṣvapi ca yā tuṣṭirmṛgeṣvapi ca yā dyutiḥ |
tiryakṣyapi ca yā hṛṣṭiḥ kāśyāṃ nānyatra sā sphuṭam || 12 ||
idaṃ suśreyaso vyuṣṭiḥ kvā'mareṣu triviṣṭape |
yatratyeṣvapi tiryakṣu paramānandavardhinī || 13 |
varamete'pi paśava ānandavanacāriṇaḥ |
sadānandāḥ punardevā nananda na vanāśritāḥ || 14 ||
varaṃ kāśīpurīvāsī mleccho'pi hi śubhāyatiḥ |
nānyatratyo dīkṣito'pi sa hi mukterabhājanam || 15 ||
vaiśveśvarī purī caiṣā yathā me cittahāriṇī |
sarvā'pi na tathā kṣoṇī na svargo naiva nāgabhūḥ || 16 ||
paśuṣu grāmyeṣu gomahiṣādiṣu | mṛgeṣvāraṇyeṣu hariṇādiṣu | tiryakṣu pakṣiṣu | hṛṣṭi-

sthairyaṃ babandha na kvāpi bhramato me manogatiḥ |
sarvasminnapi bhūbhāge yathā sthairyamagādiha || 17 ||
ramyā purī bhavedeṣā brahmāṇḍādakhilādapi |
pariṣṭutyeti durvāsāścetovṛttimavāpa ha || 18 |
tapyamāno'pi hi tapaḥ suciraṃ sa mahātapāḥ |
yadā nāpa phalaṃ kiñciccukopa ca tadā bhṛśam || 1 9 |
dhik ca māṃ tāpasaṃ duṣṭaṃ dhiṅ me duśvaraṃ tapaḥ |
dhik ca kṣetramidaṃ śambho sarveṣāṃ ca pratārakam || 20 ||
yathā na muktiratra syātkasyāpi karavai tathā |
iti śaptuṃ yadodyuktaḥ saṃjahāsa tadā śivaḥ || 21 ||
tatra liṅgamabhūdekaṃ khyātaṃ prahasiteśvaram |
talliṅgadarśanātpuṃsāmānandaḥ syātpade pade || 22 |
uvāca vismayāviṣṭo manasyeva maheśitā |
īdṛśebhyastapasvibhyo namo'stviti punaḥ punaḥ || 23 ||

yatraiva hi tapasyanti yatraiva vihitāśramāḥ |
labdhapratiṣṭhā yatraiva tatraivā'marṣiṇo dvijāḥ || 24 ||
manākū cintitamātraṃ tu cellabhante na tāpasāḥ |
krudhā tadaiva jīyante hāriṇyā tapasāṃśriyaḥ || 25 |
tathāpi tāpasā mānyāḥ svaśreyovṛddhikāṅkṣibhiḥ |

pañcāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ 16 9
tato gaṇāḥ parikṣubdhāḥ pralayārṇavanīravat |
āḥ kimetat kimetadvai bhāṣamāṇāḥ parasparam || 2 9 ||
garjantastarjayantaśca prodyatāyudhapāṇayaḥ |
pramathāḥ paritasthuste parito dhāmaśāmbhavam || 30 ||

brahmāṇḍabhāṇḍamathavā sphoṭayāmaḥ kṣaṇena hi |
āsphālayāmo vā'nyonyaṃ kālaṃ mṛtyuṃ ca tālavat || 34 ||
grasāmo vā'tha bhuvanaṃ muktvā vārāṇasīṃ purīm |
yatra muktā bhavantyeva mṛtamātreṇa | 1 jantavaḥ || 35 ||
kuto'yaṃ dhūmasambhāro jvālāvalyaḥ kutastvamūḥ |

caṇḍo bhṛṅgiriṭistaṇḍī pracaṇḍastāṇḍavapriyaḥ |
piciṇḍilaḥ sthūlaśirāḥ sthūlakeśo gabhastimān || 41 ||
kṣemakaḥ kṣemadhanvā ca vīrabhadro vīrabhadro raṇapriyaḥ |
caṇḍapāṇiḥ śūlapāṇiḥ pāśapāṇiḥ kṛśodaraḥ || 42 |
dīrghagrīvo'tha piṅgākṣaḥ piṅgalaḥ piṅgamūrdhajaḥ |
bahunetro lambakarṇaḥ kharvaḥ parvatavigrahaḥ || 43 |
gokarṇo gajakarṇaśca kokilākhyo gajānanaḥ |
ahaṃ vai naigameyaśca vikaṭāsyo'ṭṭahāsakaḥ || 44 ||
sīrapāṇiḥ śivārāvo vaiṇiko veṇuvādanaḥ |
durādharṣo duḥsahaśca garjano riputarjanaḥ || 45 ||
ityādayo gaṇeśānāḥ śatakoṭidurāsadāḥ |
kāśyāṃ nivārayāmāsurapi prābhañjanīṃ gatim || 46 ||
kṣubdheṣu teṣu teṣu vīreṣu cakampe bhuvanatrayam |
durvāsasaśca kopāgnijvālābhirvyākulīkṛtam || 47 ||
bhṛṅgiriṭiritīdantatvamārṣam || 41 |
prābhañjanīṃ vāyusambandhinīm || 46 |
durvāsasaśceti cakāro bhinnakrame | kṣubdheṣu teṣu ceti sambadhyate || 47 ||
dviśirā , triśirā , soma , paṃcahasta , daśānana , caṇḍa , bhṛṃgiriṭi , tuṃḍī , pracaṃḍa ,
tāṇḍavapriya , piciṃḍila , sthūlaśirā , sthūlakeśa , gabhastimān , kṣemaka , kṣemadhanvā ,
bīrabhadra , raṇapriya , caṃḍapāṇi , śūlapāṇi , pāśapāṇi , kṛśodara , dīrghagrīva , piṃgākṣa ,
piṃgala , piṃgamūrdhaja , bahunetra , laṃbakarṇa , kharva , parvatavigraha , gokarṇa , gajakarṇa ,
vaiṇika , veṇuvādana , durādharṣa , dussaha , garjana aura riputarjana prabhṛti śata koṭi

tadā viviśatuḥ kāśyāṃ sūryācandramasāvapi |
na gaṇairakṛtānujñau tattejaḥ śamitaprabhau || 48 ||
nivārya pramathānīkamatikṣubdhamumādhavaḥ |
madaṃśa eva hi munirānasūyeya eṣa vai || 4 9 ||
atho durvāsaso liṅgādāvirāsītkṛpānidhiḥ |
mahātejomayaḥ śambhurmuniśāpātpurīmavan || 50 ||
mā bhūcchāpo muneḥ kāśyāṃ nirvāṇapratibandhakaḥ |
ityanukrośato devastasya pratyakṣatāṃ gataḥ || 51 ||
uvāca ca prasanno'smi mahākrodhana tāpasa |
varaya svavaraḥ kaste mayā deyo viśaṅkitaḥ || 52 |
nanu yadi vāyorapi gatirnāsti kathaṃ candrasūryau praviṣṭāvityata āha- na gaṇairiti |
na akṛtānujñau apitu kṛtānujñau | tatra hetustatteja iti | svatejasā niṣprabhau dṛṣṭvā
karuṇayā kṛtānujñāvityarthaḥ || 48 |
avan rakṣan || 50 |
anukrośato dayātaḥ || 51 |
aviśaṅkito viśaṅkārahitaḥ san | pāṭhāntare | kriyāviśeṣaṇam || 52 |

tato vilajjito'gastya śāpodyatakaro muniḥ |
aparāddhaṃ bahu mayā krodhāndheneti durdhiyā || 53 |
uvāca ceti bahuśo dhiṅmāṃ krodhavaśaṃgatam |
trailokyābhayadāṃ kāśīṃ śaptumudyatacetasam || 54 |
duḥkhārṇavanimagnānāṃ yātāyāteti khedinām |
karmapāśitakaṇṭhānāṃ kāśyekā muktisādhanam || 55 ||
sarveṣāṃ jantujātānāṃ jananyekaiva kāśikā |
mahāmṛtastanyadātrī netrī ca paramaṃ padam || 56 ||
jananyā saha no kāśī labhedupamitiṃ kvacit |
dhārayejjananī garbhe kāśī garbhādvimocayet || 57 ||
evaṃbhūtāṃ tu yaḥ kāśīmanyo'pi hi śapiṣyati |
tasyaiva śāpo bhavitā na tu kāśyāḥ kathañcana || 58 ||
uvāca ceti cakārasyā'grimakarmaṇā sambandhaḥ | na kevalamaparāddhamityuvāca
dhiṅmāmiti co vā cetyarthaḥ | bahuśa ityasyobhayatra sambandhaḥ || 54 ||
trailokyābhayadatvamevāha 1 – duḥkhārṇavetyādinā || 55 /

iti durvāsaso vākyaṃ śrutvā devastrilocanaḥ |
atīvatuṣito jātaḥ kāśīstavanalabdhamut || 5 9 ||
yaḥ kāśīṃ stauti medhāvī yaḥ kāśīṃ hṛdi dhārayet |
tena taptaṃ tapastīvraṃ teneṣṭaṃ kratukoṭibhiḥ || 60 |
jihvāgre vartate yasya kāśītyakṣarayugmakam |
na tasya garbhavāsaḥ syāt kvacideva sumedhasaḥ || 61 |
yo mantraṃ japati prātaḥ kāśīvarṇadvayātmakam |
sa tu lokadvayaṃ jitvā lokātītaṃ vrajetpadam || 62 ||
ānasūyeya te jñānaṃ kāśīstavanapuṇyataḥ |
yathedānīṃ samutpannaṃ tathā na tapasaḥ purā || 63 |
mune na me priyastadvaddīkṣito mama pūjakaḥ |
yādṛk priyataraḥ satyaṃ kāśīstavanalālasaḥ || 64 ||

tādṛk tuṣṭirna me dānaistādṛkā tuṣṭirna me makhaiḥ |
na tuṣṭistapasā tādṛg yādṛśī kāśisaṃstavaiḥ || 65 ||
ānandakānanaṃ yena stutametat sucetasā |
tenā'haṃ saṃstutaḥ samyak sarvaiḥ sūktaiḥ śrutīritaiḥ || 66 ||
tava kāmāḥ samṛddhāḥ syurānasūyeya tāpasa |
jñānaṃ te paramaṃ bhāvi mahāmohavināśanam || 67 ||
aparaṃ ca varaṃ brūhi kiṃ dātavyaṃ tavā'nagha |
tvādṛśā eva munayaḥ ślāghanīyā yataḥ satām || 68 |
yasyāstyeva hi sāmarthyaṃ tapasaḥ kruddhyatīha saḥ |
kupito'pyasamarthastu kiṃ kartā kṣīṇavṛttivat || 6 9 |
iti śrutvā pariṣṭutya durvāsāḥ kṛttivāsasam |
varaṃ ca prārthayāmāsa parihṛṣṭatanūruhaḥ || 70 |
laukikāni śobhanoktāni vārayati -śrutīritairiti || 66 |
bhāvi bhaviṣyati || 67 |
nanu kruddhānāṃ kutaḥ ślāghanīyatvaṃ tatrāha - yasyāstīti | kartā kariṣyati kṣīṇa-

durvāsā uvāca- |
devadeva jagannātha karuṇākara śaṅkara
mahāparādhavidhvaṃsinnandhakāre smarāntaka | 71 |
mṛtyuñjayograbhūteśa mṛḍānīśa trilocana |
yadi prasanno me nātha yadi deyo varo mama || 72 |
tadidaṃ kāmadaṃ nāma liṅgamastviha dhūrjaṭe |
idaṃ ca palvalaṃ me'tra kāmakuṇḍākhyamastu vai || 73 ||
devadeva uvāca- mahātejo mune paramakopana |
evamastu 74 |
yattvayā sthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ durvāseśvarasaṃjñitam ||
tadeva kāmakṛnnṛṇāṃ kāmeśvaramihāstviti |
yaḥ pradoṣe trayodaśyāṃ śanivāsarasaṃyuji || 75 |
saṃsnāsyati naro dhīmān kāmakuṇḍe tyadāspade |
tvatsthāpitaṃ ca kāmeśaṃ liṅgaṃ drakṣyati mānavaḥ || 76 |
savai kāmakṛtāddoṣādyāmīṃ nāpsyati yātanām |
bahavo'pi hi pāpmāno bahubhirjanmabhiḥ kṛtāḥ || 77 |
kāmatīrthāmbusaṃsnānādyāsyanti vilayaṃ kṣaṇāt |
kāmāḥ samṛddhimāpsyanti kāmeśvaraniṣevaṇāt || 78 |
pāpmānaḥ pāpāni || 77 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ pañcāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 85 | |

iti datvā varāñchambhustalliṅge layamāyayau |
skanda uvāca- talliṅgārādhanātkāmāḥ
prāptā durvāsasā bhṛśam || 7 9 |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena kāśyāṃ kāmeśvaraḥ sadā |
pūjanīyaḥ prayatnena mahākāmā'bhilāṣukaiḥ || 80 |
kāmakuṇḍakṛtasnānairmahāpātakaśāntaye I
idaṃ kāmeśvarākhyānaṃ yaḥ paṭhiṣyati puṇyavān ||
yaḥ śroṣyati ca medhāvī tau niṣpāpau bhaviṣyataḥ || 81 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe durvāsaso varapradānaṃ nāma
pañcāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 85 |

|| atha ṣaḍaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
pārvatyuvāca-
viśvakarmeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ yatkāśyāṃ prathitaṃ param |
tasya liṅgasya kathaya devadeva samudbhavam || 1 ||
devadeva uvāca-
śṛṇu devi pravakṣyāmi kathāṃ pātakanāśinīm |
viśvakarmeśaliṅgasya prādurbhāvaṃ manoharam || 2 |
viśvakarmā'bhavatpūrvaṃ brahmaṇastvaparā tanuḥ |
tvaṣṭuḥ prajāpateḥ putro nipuṇaḥ sarvakarmasu || 3 |
kṛtopanayanaḥ so'tha bālo gurukule vasan |
cakāra guruśuśrūṣāṃ bhikṣānnakṛtabhojanaḥ || 4 |
ṣaḍaśītitame'dhyāye nānāścaryaprade nṛṇām |
viśvakarmeśvarotpattirvarṇyate bahupuṇyadā || 1 |
viśvakarmeśvarotpattiṃ pṛcchati - viśvakarmeśvaramiti || 1 ||
nipuṇaḥ sarvakarmasthiti siddhavatkṛtyoktam | kiñcitkartuṃ na jānāmīti vakṣya-
māṇavirodhāt || 3 |

ekadā tadguruḥ prāha prāvṛṭkāle samāgate |
kurūṭajaṃ madarthaṃ tvaṃ yathā prāvṛṇna bādhate || 5 |
yatkadācinna bhajyeta na purātanatāṃ vrajet |
gurupatnyā tvabhihito re tvāṣṭra kuru kañcukam || 6 |
mamā'ṅgayogyaṃ no gāḍhaṃ na ślathaṃ ca prayatnataḥ |
vinaiva vāsasā cāru bālkalaṃ ca sadojjvalam || 7 |
guruputreṇa cājñapto mamārthaṃ pāduke kuru |
yadārūḍhasya me pādau na paṅkaḥ saṃspṛśet kvacit || 8 |
carmādibandhanirmukte dhāvato me sukhaprade |
yābhyāṃ ca sañcare vāri sthalabhūmāviva drutam || 9 ||
gurukanyā'pi taṃ prāha tvāṣṭra me śravaṇocite |
bhūṣaṇe svena hastena kuru kāñcananirmite || 10 ||
uṭajaṃ parṇaśālām || 5 | kañcukaṃ prasiddham || 6 | vālkalaṃ valkalena nirmitam

kumārīkrīḍanīyāni kautukāni kautukāni ca dehi me |
dantidantamayānyeva svahastaracitāni ca || 11 ||
gṛhopakaraṇaṃ dravyaṃ musalolūkhalādikam |
tathā ghaṭaya medhāvin yathā truṭyati na kvacit || 12 ||
akṣālitānyapi yathā nityaṃ pīṭhāni sattama |
ujjvalāni bhavantyeva sthālikāśca tathā kuru || 13 ||
sūpakarmaṇyapi ca māṃ praśādhi tvaṣṭṛnandana |
yathā'ṅgulyo na dahyante pākaḥ syācca yathā śubhaḥ || 14 ||
ekastambhamayaṃ gehamekadāruvinirmitam |
tathā kuru varaṃ tvāṣṭra yatrecchā tatra dhāraye || 15 ||
ye sahādhyāyino'pyasya vayojyeṣṭhāśca te'pi hi |
sarve sarvaṃ samīhante karma tatkṛtameva hi || 16 ||

tatheti sa pratijñāya sarveṣāṃ purato'drije | |
madhyevanaṃ prāviśacca mahācintābhayārditaḥ || 17 ||
kiñcitkartuṃ na jānāti pratijñātaṃ ca tena vai |
sarveṣāṃ purataḥ sarvaṃ kariṣyāmīti niścitam || 18 ||

kathaṃ tadvacasaḥ siddhiṃ prāpsyāmyatra vane sthitaḥ |
kaśca me'tra sahāyī syādviṣaṇā durbalasya vai || 23 ||
āstāṃ gurukathā dūraṃ yo'nyasyā'pi laghorapi |
omityuktvā na kurute kāryaṃ so'tha vrajatyadhaḥ || 24 ||
kathametāni karmāṇi kariṣye'jño'sahāyavān |
aṅgīkṛtāni tadbhītyā namaste bhavitavyate || 25 ||
yāvaditthaṃ cintayati sa tyāṣṭro vanamadhyagaḥ |
tāvattadaiva samprāptastenaiko'darśi tāpasaḥ || 26 |
atha natvā sa taṃ prāha vane dṛṣṭaṃ tapasvinam |

yo'si so'si namastubhyamupadeśena yuṅkṣva mām |
guruktaṃ gurupalyuktaṃ gurvapatyoktameva ca || 30 ||
kathaṃ kartumahaṃ śaktaḥ karma tatra diśā'dbhutam |
kuru me buddhisāhāyyaṃ nirjane bandhutāṃ gataḥ || 31 ||
ityuktastena sa vane tāpaso brahmacāriṇā |
kāruṇyapūrṇahṛdayo yathoktamupadiṣṭavān || 32 ||
ya āptatvena sampṛṣṭo durbuddhiṃ samprayacchati |
sa yāti narakaṃ ghoraṃ yāvadābhūtasaṃplavam || 33 ||
tāpasa uvāca-
brahmacārin śṛṇu brūyāṃ kimadbhutataraṃ tvidam |
viśveśānugrahād brahmā'pyabhavat sṛṣṭikovidaḥ || 34 |
yadi tvaṃ tvāṣṭra sarvajñaṃ kāśyāmārādhayiṣyasi |
tataste viśvakarmeti nāma satyaṃ bhaviṣyati || 35 ||
satyaṃ sārthakam || 35 ||

viśveśānugrahātkāśyāmabhilāṣā na durlabhāḥ |
sulabho durlabho'pyatra yatra mokṣastanutyajām || 36 |
sṛṣṭeḥ karaṇasāmarthyaṃ sṛṣṭirakṣāpravīṇatā |
vidhinā viṣṇunā nāprāpi viśveśānuhātparāt || 37 |
yāhi vaiśveśvaraṃ sadma padmayā samadhiṣṭhitam |
nirvāṇasaṃjñayā bāla yadīccheḥ svānmanorathān || 38 |
sa hi sarvapradaḥ śambhuryācitaścopamanyunā |
payomātraṃ dadau tasmai sarvaṃ kṣīrābdhimeva ca || 3 9 ||
ānandakānane śambhoḥ kiṃ kiṃ kena na labhyate |
yatra vāsakṛtāṃ puṃsāṃ dharmarāśiḥ pade pade || 40 ||
svardhunīsparśamātreṇa mahāpātakasantatiḥ |

na tādṛg dharmasambhāro labhyate kratukoṭibhiḥ |
yādṛg vārāṇasīvīthīsañcāreṇa pade pade || || 42 ||
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ yadyatrā'sti manorathaḥ |
tadā vārāṇasīṃ yāhi yāhi trailokyapāvanīm || 43 ||
sarvakāmaphalaprāptistadaiva syāddhruvaṃ nṛṇām |
yadaiva sarvadaḥ sarvaḥ kāśyāṃ viśveśvaraḥ śritaḥ || 44 ||
sa tāpasoktamākarṇya tvāṣṭra itthaṃ suhṛṣṭavān |
kāśīsamprāptyupāyaṃ ca tameva samapṛcchata || 45 ||
tvāṣṭra uvāca-
tadānandavanaṃ śambhoḥ kvā'sti tāpasasattama |
yatra no durlabhaṃ kiñcit sādhakānāṃ trayīsthitam || 46 |
svarge vā martyaloke vā balisadmani vā mune |
kva tadānandagahanaṃ yatrā''nandapayobdhijā || 47 ||
vīthī mārgaḥ || 42 | yāhi yāhītyādare vīpsā || 43 | śrita āśrito
bhavati || 44 | trayīsthitaṃ lokatrayasthitam || 46 ||
lokatrayamevāha - svarga iti | vedatrayapratipādyaṃ vā || 47 ||

yatra viśveśvaro devo viśveṣāṃ karṇadhārakaḥ |
vyācaṣṭe tārakaṃ jñānaṃ yena tanmayatāṃ yayuḥ || 48 ||
sulabhā yatra niyatamānandavanacāriṇaḥ |
api naiḥśreyasī lakṣmīḥ kimanye'lpamanorathāḥ || || 4 9 |
kastāṃ māṃ prāpayecchambhoḥ kathaṃ yāmi tathā vada |
sa tapasvīti tadvākyamākarṇya śraddhayānvitam || 50 ||
prāhā''gaccha nayāmi tvāṃ yiyāsurahamapyaho |
durlabhaṃ prāpya mānuṣyaṃ yadi kāśī na sevitā || 51 ||
punaḥ kva nṛtyaṃ śreyobhūḥ kva kāśī karmabandhahṛt |
vṛthā gate hi mānuṣye kāśīprāptivivarjanāt || 52 ||
āyuṣyaṃ ca bhaviṣyaṃ ca sarvameva vṛthā gatam |
ato'haṃ saphalīkartuṃ mānuṣyaṃ cāticañcalam || 53 ||
vanacāriṇa iti ṣaṣṭhyekavacanam | naiḥśreyasī kaivalyarūpā || 4 9 ||
śreyaḥ kalyāṇam || 52 ||
āyuṣyaṃ ca āyuṣe hitaṃ kāraṇaṃ sulakṣaṇarūpakaracaraṇarekhādi | bhaviṣyaṃ ca
bhaviṣyatsūcakaṃ khayogagrahatārādi || 53 |

yāsyāmi kāśīmāyāhi māyāṃ hitvā tvamapyaho |
iti tena saha tyāṣṭro muninā'tikṛpālunā || 54 ||
purīṃ vaiśveśvarīṃ prāpto manaḥsvāsthyamavāpa ca |
tataḥ prāpayya tāṃ kāśīṃ tāpasaḥ kvāpyatarkitam || 55 ||
jagāma kumbhasambhūta sa tyāṣṭro'pītyamanyata |
avaśyaṃ sa hi viśveśaḥ sarveṣāṃ cintitapradaḥ || 56 |
satpathasthiravṛttīnāṃ dūrastho'pi samīpagaḥ |
yasmin prasannadṛk tryakṣastaṃ daviṣṭhamapi dhruvam ||
sunediṣṭhaṃ karotyeva svayaṃ varmopadeśayan || 57 |
kvā'haṃ tatra vane bālaścintākulitamānasaḥ |
kva tāpasaḥ sa yo māṃ vai sūpadiśyeha cānayat || 58 ||
atarkitaṃ yathā syāt || 55 ||

khelo'yamasya tryakṣasya yasya bhaktasya kutracit |
na durlabhataraṃ kiñcidaho kvā'haṃ kva kāśikā || 5 9 ||
nārādhito mayā śambhuḥ prāktane janmani kvacit |
śarīritvānumānena jñātametadasaṃśayam || 60 |
asmin janmani bālatvānna caivārādhitaḥ sphuṭam |
pratyakṣamevamevaitat kuto'nugrahadhīrmayi || 61 |
ājñātaṃ gurubhaktirme hetuḥ śambhuprasādane |
yahā'nugṛhīto'smi viśveśena kṛpālunā || 62 ||
athavā . ' kāraṇāpekṣastryakṣastvitaradevavat |
raṅkamapyanugṛhṇāti kevalaṃ kāraṇaṃ kṛpā || 63 |
yadi no mayyanukrośaḥ kathaṃ tāpasasaṅgatiḥ |
tadrūpeṇa svayaṃ śambhurānināyeha māṃ dhruvam || || 64 ||
svasmin viśveśvarakṛpāmasambhāvyāṃsambhāvayati - nārādhita ityādi || 60 |
hetvantaramāha - – athaveti || 63 |

na dānāni na vai yajñā na tapāṃsi vratāni ca
śambhoḥ prasādahetūni kāraṇaṃ tatkṛpaiva hi || 65 ||
dayāmapi tadā kuryādasau viśveśvaraḥ parām |
yadā śrutyuktamadhvānaṃ sadbhiḥ kṣuṇṇaṃ na saṃtyajet || 66 ||
anukrośaṃ samarthyeti sa tvāṣṭraḥ śāmbhavaṃ śuciḥ |
saṃsthāpya liṅgamīśasyā''rādhayatsvasthamānasaḥ || 67 ||
ānīya puṣpasambhāramārtavaṃ kānanād bahu |
snātvā'bhyarcayatīśānaṃ kandamūlaphalāśanaḥ || 68 |
itthaṃ tvaṣṭṛtanūjasya liṅgārādhanacetasaḥ |
trihāyanātprasanno'bhūttasyeśaḥ karuṇānidhiḥ || 6 9 |
tasmādeva hi liṅgācca prādurbhūya bhavo'bravīt |
varaṃ varaya re tvāṣṭra dṛḍhabhaktyā'nayā tava || 70 |
prasanno'smi bhṛśaṃ bāla gurvarthakṛtacetasaḥ |
guruṇā gurupatnyā ca gurvapatyadvayena ca || 71 ||
kṣuṇṇaṃ kṣoditaṃ sevitam || 66 | samartha samarthayitvā | samartyeti pāṭhe
prāpyetyarthaḥ || 67 | ārtavaṃ ṛtubhavam || 68 |

yathā'rthitaṃ tathā kartuṃ te sāmarthyaṃ bhaviṣyati || 72 ||
anyān varāṃśca te dadyāṃ tvāṣṭra tuṣṭastvadarcayā |
tān śṛṇuṣva mahābhāga liṅgasyāsyādbhutaśriyaḥ || 73 ||
tvaṃ suvarṇādidhātūnāṃ dārūṇāṃ dṛṣadāmapi |
maṇīnāmapi ratnānāṃ puṣpāṇāmapi vāsasām || 74 |
karpūrādisugandhīnāṃ dravyāṇāmapyapāmapi |
kandamūlaphalānāṃ ca dravyāṇāmapi ca tvacām || 75 ||
sarveṣāṃ vastujātānāṃ kartuṃ karma pravetsyasi |
yasya yasya ruciryatra sadmadevālayādiṣu || 76 |
tasya tasyeha tuṣṭyai tvaṃ tathākartuṃ pravetsyasi | |
sarvanepathyaracanā sarvāḥ sūpasya saṃskṛtīḥ || 77 ||
sarvāṇi śilpikāryāṇi tauryatrikamathā'pi ca |
sarvaṃ jñāsyasi kartuṃ tvaṃ dvitīya iva padmabhūḥ || 78 ||
nānāvidhāni yantrāṇi nānāyudhavidhānakam |
jalāśayānāṃ racanāḥ sudurgaracanāstathā || 7 9 |
tādṛkkartuṃ purā vetsi yādṛṅnānyo'dhiyāsyati |
kalājātaṃ hi sarvaṃ tvamavayāsyasi me varāt || 80 ||
nepathyam alaṅkaraṇam || 77 ||
tauryatrikaṃ nṛtyagītavāditram || 78 ||

sarvendrajālikīvidyā tvadadhīnā bhaviṣyati |
sarvakarmasu kauśalyaṃ sarvabuddhivariṣṭhatām || 81 |
sarveṣāṃ ca manovṛttiṃ tvaṃ jñāsyasi varānmama |
kiṃ bahūktena yatsvarge yatpātāle yadatra ca || 82 ||
atilokottaraṃ karma tatsarvaṃ vetsyasi svayam || 83 ||
viśveṣāṃ viśvakarmāṇi viśveṣu bhuvaneṣu ca |
yato jñāsyasi tannāma viśvakarmeti te'nagha || 84 ||

tattvaṃ svaccho'si mukuro mama netratrayasya hi |
kāśyāṃ liṅgārcanāttvāṣṭra varaṃ varaya suvrata || 88 |
kāśyāṃ yo rājadhānyāṃ me hitvā māmanyamarcayet |
sa varāko'lpadhīrmuṣṭo'lpatuṣṭirmuktivarjitaḥ || 8 9 |
tadānandavane hyatra samartho'haṃ mumukṣubhiḥ | |
druhiṇopendracandrendrairihā'nyo na samarcyate || 9 0 |
yathā''nandavanaṃ prāpya tvaṃ māmarcitavānasi |
tathā'nye puṇyakarmāṇo māmabhyarceva māmitāḥ || 9 1 ||
anugrāhyo'si nitarāṃ tato varaya durlabham |
śrāṇitaṃ tadavehi tvaṃ vada vada mā cirayasva bho || 9 2 |

viśvakarmovāca-
idaṃ yatsthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ mayā'jñenā'pi śaṅkara |
talliṅgamanye'pyārādhya santu sadbuddhibhājanam || 9 3 ||
anyacca nātha prārtho'si taccāviśrāṇayiṣyasi |
bhavānmayā vinirmāpayitā svaṃ prāsādaṃ kadā bhava || 9 4 |
devadeva uvāca-
evamastu yaduktaṃ te tava liṅgasamarcakāḥ |
sadbuddhibhājanaṃ vai syuḥ syuśca nirvāṇadīkṣitāḥ || 9 5 ||
yadā ca rājā bhavitā divodāso vidhervarāt |
tadā me vacanāttāta prāsādaṃ me vidhāsyati || 9 6 |
navīkṛtya punaḥ kāśī nirviṣṭā tena bhūbhujā |
gaṇeśamāyayā rājyātparinirviṇṇacetasā || 9 7 |
sadbuddhibhājanaṃ brahmajñānapātram || 9 3 ||
mayā kṛtvā vinirmāpayitā viśeṣeṇa nirmāṇakartā | | atrā'kṣarādhikyācchando-
bhaṅga'śchāndasatvānna doṣaḥ | tathā ca śrutiḥ - " na vā ekenākṣareṇānyacchando bhavati na
dvābhyāmiti " || 9 4 - 9 5 | vidhāsyati bhavāniti śeṣaḥ | athavā bhavadddvārā sa eva
vidhāsyati || 9 6 ||
nirviṣṭā nitarāṃ veśitā prāptā || 9 7 |

viṣṇoḥ sadupadeśācca māmeva śaraṇaṃ gataḥ |
nirvāṇalakṣmīḥ prāpteha hitvā rājyaśriyaṃ calām || 9 8 |
viśvakarman vraja guroḥ śāsanāya yatasva ca |
gurubhaktikṛto yasmānmadbhaktā nā'tra saṃśayaḥ || 99 ||
ye guruṃ cāvamanyante te'vamānyā mayā'pyaho |
tasmādgurūpadiṣṭaṃ hi kuru śiṣya samīhitam || 100 ||
tata āgatya me pārśvaṃ yāvannirvāṇameṣyasi |
tāvatsthāsyasi śuddhātmā devānāṃ hitamācaran || 101 |
tavā'tra liṅge satataṃ sthāsyāmyahamabhīṣṭadaḥ |
asya liṅgasya bhaktānāṃ nirvāṇaśrīradūrataḥ || 102 |
aṅgāreśādudīcyāṃ ye tvalliṅgasya samarcakāḥ |
teṣāṃ manorathā'vāptirbhaviṣyati pade pade || 103 |
ityuktvā'ntardadhe devastyāṣṭro'pi gurumāptavān |
guroḥ samīhitaṃ bhūri vidhāya sa gṛhān yayau || 104 ||
prāptā tena rājñeti śeṣaḥ || 9 8 | gurubhaktikṛto gurubhaktikartāraḥ || 99 |

ṣaḍaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ 1 9 5
gṛhe'pi mātāpitarau santoṣya nijakarmaṇā | |
taduktājñāṃ samādhāya punaḥ kāśīṃ samāyayaiau || 105 ||
svaliṅgārādhanāsakto nādyāpi nādyāpi tvaṣṭṛnandanaḥ |
kāśīṃ tyajati medhāvī sarvadevapriyaṃ caran || 1 06 |
īśvara uvāca-
pṛṣṭāni yāni liṅgāni tvayā devi girīndraje |
kāśīmuktau samarthāni tānyuktāni mayā tava || 107 |
liṅgamoṅkārasaṃjñaṃ ca tathā devaṃ triviṣṭapam |
mahādevaḥ kṛttivāsā ratneśaścandrasaṃjñakaḥ || 108 ||
kedāraścāpi dharmeśastathā vīreśvarābhidhaḥ |
kāmeśaviśvakarmeśau maṇikarṇīśvarastathā || 1 0 9 |
mamā'rcyamavimuktākhyaṃ tato devi mamākhyakam |
viśvanātheti viśvasmin prathitaṃ viśvasaukhyadam || 110 |
avimuktaṃ samāsādya yena viśveśvaro'rcitaḥ |
na tasyāsti punarjanma kalpakoṭiśateṣvapi || 111 |
aṣṭau māsān vihāraḥ syādyatīnāṃ saṃyatātmanām |
ekatra caturo māsānabdaṃ nāvāsa ' iṣyate || 112 ||
abdaṃ na āvāso vāsa iṣyate ekatreti śeṣaḥ | vārṣikānnivasetpunariti kvacit || 12 ||

avimukte praviṣṭānāṃ vihāro naiva yujyate |
mokṣo'pyasaṃśayaścātra tasmāttyājyā na kāśikā || 113 ||
ānandakānanaṃ hitvā nānyad gacchettapovanam |
tapoyogaśca mokṣaśca yatotraiva madāśrayāt || 114 ||
kṛpayā sarvajantūnāṃ kṣetrametanmayā kṛtam |
avaśyameva siddhyanti kṣetre'smin siddhikāṅkṣiṇaḥ || 115 |
atītaṃ vartamānaṃ ca jñānato'jñānataḥ kṛtam |
yadenastallayaṃ yāyādānandavanavīkṣaṇāt || 116 ||
atyugraiśca tapobhiryanmahādānairmahāvrataiḥ |
niyamaiśca yamaiḥ samyak svayogena mahāmakhaiḥ || 117 ||
vedāntaśāstrābhyasanaiḥ sarvopaniṣadāśrayāt |
ebhirvai yadavāpyeta tatkāśyāṃ helayā''pyate || 118 ||
karmasūtreṇa baddhā vai bhrāmyante tāvadeva hi |
yāvad vaiśveśvare dhāmni mama naiva tanutyajaḥ || 11 9 |

ṣaḍaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ 1 9 7
kāśyāṃ svalīlayā devi tiryagyonijuṣāmapi |
dadāmi cānte tatsthānaṃ yatra yānti na yājñikāḥ || 120 |
bhūtagrāmo'khilo'pyatra muktikṣetre kṛtālayaḥ |
kālena nidhanaṃ yāto yātyeva paramāṅgatim || 121 ||
viṣayāsaktacitto'pi tyaktadharmaratistvapi |
kālenojjhitadeho'tra na saṃsāraṃ punarviśet || 122 ||
prayāge yatphalaṃ devi māghe coṣasi majjanāt |
tatphalaṃ koṭiguṇitaṃ vārāṇasyāṃ kṣaṇe kṣaṇe || 123 ||
asya kṣetrasya mahimā ko'pi vācāmagocaraḥ |
uddeśamātramākhyāyi mayā te prītikāmyayā || 124 ||
caturdaśānāṃ liṅgānāṃ śrutvā''khyānāni sattamaḥ |
caturdaśasu lokeṣu pūjāṃ prāpsyatyanuttamām || 125 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe viśvakarmeśaprādurbhāvo nāma ṣaḍaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||86 |
bhūtagrāmo jarāyujāṇḍajasvedajodbhijjalakṣaṇabhūtasamudāyaḥ || 21 ||
tyaktā dharmaratiryena sa tyaktadharmaratiścettarhi sākṣādatra sthito rudrapiśācabhogānantara-
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ ṣaḍaśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 86 |

|| atha saptāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca -
sarvajñasūno ṣaḍvaktra sarvārthakuśala prabho |
prādurbhāvaṃ niśamyaiṣāṃ liṅgānāṃ muktidāyinām || 1 |
nitarāṃ paritṛpto'smi sudhāṃ pītveva nirjaraḥ |
oṅkārapramukhairliṅgairidamānandakānanam || 2 ||
ānandameva janayedapi pāpajuṣāmiha |
parā''nandamahaṃ prāptaḥ śrutvaitalliṅgakīrtanam || 3 |
saptāśītitame'dhyāye dakṣeśotpattisiddhaye |
sarvarddhivipulastāvaddakṣayajño nirūpyate || 1 |
dakṣeśādīni yāni liṅgāni tanmahimānaṃ ca praṣṭumuktamanuvadan prītimāviṣkaroti-

jīvanmukta ivā''saṃ hi kṣetratattva śruteraham |
skanda dakṣeśvarādīni liṅgānīha caturdaśa ||
yānyuktāni samācakṣva tatprabhāvamaśeṣataḥ || 4 |
yo dakṣo garhayāmāsa madhye devasabhaṃ vibhum |
sa kathaṃ liṅgamīśasya pratyasthāpayadadbhutam || 5 |
iti śrutvā śikhirathaḥ kumbhayonerudīritam |
sūta saṅkathayāmāsa dakṣeśvarasamudbhavam || 6 |
skanda uvāca -
ākarṇaya mune vacmi kathāṃ kalmaṣahāriṇīm |
puraścaraṇakāmo'sau dakṣaḥ kāśīṃ samāyayaiau || 7 |
chāgavaktro virūpāsyo dadhīciparidhikkṛtaḥ |
prāyaścittavidhānārthaṃ sūpadiṣṭaḥ svayambhuvā || 8 |
praṣṭavyamarthamāha- skandeti | he skanda ! oṅkārādīni yāni caturdaśaliṅgāni
tānyuktānīha idānīṃ dakṣeśvarādīni yānyaṣṭau liṅgāni aśeṣatastatprabhāvaṃ ca

ekadā devadevasya sevārthaṃ śaśimaulinaḥ |
kailāsamagamad viṣṇuḥ padmayonipuraskṛtaḥ || 9 |
indrādayo lokapālā viśvedevā marudgaṇāḥ |
ādityā vasavo rudrāḥ sādhyā vidyādharoragāḥ || 10 ||
ṛṣayo'psaraso yakṣā gandharvāḥ siddhacāraṇāḥ |
tairnato devadeveśaḥ parihṛṣṭatanūruhaiḥ || 11 |
stutaśva nānāstutibhiḥ śambhunā'pi kṛtādarāḥ |
viviśuścāsanaśreṇyāṃ tanmukhāsaktadṛṣṭayaḥ || 12 ||
atha teṣūpaviṣṭeṣu śambhunā viṣṭaraśravāḥ |
kṛtahastaparisparśamānaḥ pṛṣṭo mahādaram ||| 13 |
śrīvatsalāñchana hare daityavaṃśadavānala |
kaccitpālayituṃ śaktistrilokīmatsyakuṇṭhitā || 14 ||
ditijān danujān duṣṭān kaccicchāssi raṇāṅgaṇe |
api kruddhān mahīdevān māmiva pratimanyase || 15 ||
kathāmevāha - ekadeti || 9 |

bādhayā rahitā gāvaḥ kaccitsanti mahītale |
striyaḥ santi hi suśrīkāḥ pativrataparāyaṇāḥ || 16 ||
vidhiyajñāḥ pravartante pṛthivyāṃ bahudakṣiṇāḥ |
nirābādhaṃ tapaḥ kaccidasti śaśvattapasvinām || 17 ||
niṣpratyūhaṃ paṭhantyeva sāṅgān vedān dvijottamāḥ |
mahīpālāḥ prajāḥ kaccitpānti tvamiva keśava || 18 ||
sveṣu sveṣu ca dharmeṣu kaccidvarṇāśramāstathā |
niṣṭhāvanto hi tiṣṭhanti prahṛṣṭendriyamānasāḥ || 1 9 ||
dhūrjaṭiḥ paripṛcchyeti hṛṣṭaṃ vaikuṇṭhanāyakam |
brahmāṇaṃ cā'pi papraccha brāhmaṃ tejaḥ samedhate || 20 ||
satyamaskhalitaṃ kaccidasti trailokyamaṇḍape |
tīrthāvarodho na kvāpi kenacitkriyate vidhe || 21 ||
indrādayaḥ surāḥ kaccit sveṣu sveṣu pureṣvaho |
rājyaṃ praśāsati svasthāḥ kṛṣṇadordaṇḍapālitāḥ || 22 ||
brāhmaṃ vedādhyayanajaṃ brāhmaṇasambandhīti vā || 20 ||

pratyekaṃ paripṛcchyeśaḥ sarvānitthaṃ kṛtādarān |
pṛṣṭvā''gamanakāryaṃ ca teṣāṃ kṛtvā manorathān || 23 ||
visasarjā'tha tān sarvān devaḥ saudhaṃ samāviśat |
gateṣvatha ca deveṣu svasvadhiṣṇyeṣu hṛṣṭavat || 24 ||
madhyemārgaṃ sacinto'bhūddakṣaḥ satyāḥ pitā tadā |
anyadeva samānaṃ samānaṃ prāpa na cā'dhikam || 25 ||
atīvakṣubdhacitto'bhūnmandarāghātato'bdhivat
uvāca ca manasyetanmahākrodharayāndhadṛk || 26 |
atīvagarvito jātaḥ satīṃ me prāpya kanyakām |
kasyacinnā'pyasau prāyo na ko'syāpi kvacitpunaḥ || 27 ||
saudhaṃ sudhayā dhavalitaṃ prāsādam || 24 |
krodharayena krodhavegenā'ndhā dṛg jñānaṃ yasya saḥ || 26 |
uktimevāha - atīvagarvito jāta ityārabhya sampradhāryetyataḥ prāktanena granthena |

kiṃ vaṃśyastyeṣa 203
kiṃ gotraḥ kiṃ deśīyaḥ kimātmakaḥ |
kiṃ vṛttiḥ kiṃ samācāro'viṣādī vṛṣavāhanaḥ || 28 ||
na prāyaśastapasvyeṣa kva tapaḥ kvā'stradhāraṇam |
na gṛhastheṣu gaṇyo'sau śmaśānanilayo yataḥ || 2 9 ||
asau na brahmacārī syāt kṛtapāṇigrahasthitiḥ |
vānaprasthyaṃ kutaścā'smintraiśvaryamadamohite || 30 ||
na brāhmaṇo bhavatyeṣa yato vedo na vettyamum |
śastrāstradhāraṇātprāyaḥ kṣatriyaḥ syānna so'pyayam || 31 ||
kṣatātsaṃtrāṇanātkṣatraṃ tatkvā'smin pralayapriye |
vaiśyo'pi na bhavedeṣa sadā nirdhanaceṣṭanaḥ || 32 ||
kiṃśabdasya prayoge sarvatra kākyā nañartho jñeyaḥ | aviṣādīti cchedaḥ | viṣādarahitaḥ

śūdro'pi na bhavetprāyo nāgayajñopavītavān |
evaṃ varṇāśramātītaḥ ko'sau samyaṅ na kīrtyate || 33 ||
sarvaḥ prakṛtyā jñāyeta sthāṇuḥ prakṛtivarjitaḥ |
prāyaśaḥ puruṣo nā'sāvardhanārīvapurvataḥ || 34 ||
yoṣā'pi na bhavedeṣa yato'sau śmaśrulā''nanaḥ |
napuṃsako'pi na bhavelliṅgamasya yato'rcyate || 35 |
bālo'pi na bhavatyeṣa yato'yaṃ bahuvārṣikaḥ |
anādivṛddho lokeṣu gīyate cogra eṣa yat || 36 ||
ato yuvatvaṃ sambhāvyaṃ nā'tra nūnaṃ cirantane |
vṛddho'pi na bhavatyeṣa jarāmaraṇavarjitaḥ || 37 |
brahmādīn saṃharet prānte tathāpi ca na pātakī |
puṇyaleśo'pi nā'styasmin brahmamaulicchidi krudhā || 38 ||

asthinepathyavati ca kva śucitvaṃ vivāsasi |
kiṃ bahūktena no kiñcijjñāyate'sya viceṣṭitam || 3 9 ||
aho dhāṣṭryaṃ mahaddṛṣṭaṃ jaṭilasyā'dya cā'dbhutam |
yadāsanānnotthito'sau dṛṣṭvā māṃ śvaśuraṃ gurum || 40 ||
evaṃbhūtā bhavantyeva mātāpitṛvivarjitāḥ |
nirguṇā akulīnāśca karmabhraṣṭā niraṅkuśāḥ || 41 |
svacchandacāriṇo'nāthāḥ sarvatra svābhimāninaḥ |
akiñcanā api prāyastathāpī śvaramāninaḥ || 42 ||
tathā ca śrutiḥ - " athāta ādeśo neti neti tadetad brahmā sthūlamanaṇu
anāmāgotramityādiḥ " | bhāgavate ca-
sa vai na devā'suramartyatirtyaṅ na strī na ṣaṇḍho na pumānna jantuḥ |
nāyaṃ guṇaḥ karma na sanna cāsanniṣedhaśeṣo jayatādaśeṣaḥ || ityādi |
neti || 3 9 |
dhāṭyaṃ mahattvam || 40 ||
mātāpitṛvivarjitāḥ tayorabhāve śikṣābhāvāt | nirguṇā guṇā'tītatvāt |

jāmātṝṇāṃ svabhāvo'yaṃ prāyaśo garvabhājanam |
kiñcidaiśvaryamāsādya bhavatyeva na saṃśayaḥ || 43 ||
dvijarājaḥ sa garviṣṭho rohiṇīpremanirbharaḥ |
kṛttikādiṣu cāsnehī mayā śaptaḥ kṣayīkṛtaḥ || 44 ||
asyā'haṃ garvasarvasvaṃ hariṣyāmyeva śūlinaḥ |
yathā'vamānitaścāhamanenāsya gṛhaṃ gataḥ ||| 45 |
tathā'syā'haṃ kariṣyāmi mānahāniṃ ca sarvataḥ |
sampradhāryeti bahuśaḥ sa tu dakṣaḥ prajāpatiḥ || 46 ||
prāpya svabhavanaṃ devānājuhāva sa vāsavān |
ahaṃ yiyakṣuryūyaṃ me yajñasāhāyyakāriṇaḥ || 47 |
bhavantu yajñasambhārānānayantu tvarānvitāḥ |
śvetadvīpamayo gatvā cakre cakriṇamacyutam || 48 |
mahākratūpadraṣṭāraṃ yajñapūruṣameva ca |
tasyartvijo'bhavansarve ṛṣayo brahmavādinaḥ || 4 9 |

prāvartata tatastasya dakṣasya ca mahādhvaraḥ |
dṛṣṭyā devanikāyāṃśca tasmin dakṣamahādhvare || 50 ||
anīśvarāṃstato vedhā vyājaṃ kṛtvā gṛhaṃ yayau | |
dadhīciratha saṃvīkṣya sarvāṃstrailokyavāsinaḥ || 51 ||
dakṣayajñe samāyātān satīśvaravivarjitān |
prāptasammānasambhārān bāso'laṅkṛtipūrvakam || 52 ||
dakṣasya hi śubhodarkamicchan provāca ceti vai |
dadhīciruvāca-
dakṣaprajāpate dakṣa sākṣāddhātṛsvarūpadhṛk || 53 ||
na cā'sti tava sāmarthyaṃ kvāpi kasyā'pi niścitam |
yādṛśaḥ kratusambhārastava ceha samīkṣyate || 54 ||
na tādṛḍ nedasi prāyaḥ kvāpi jñāto mahāmate |
kratustu naiva kartavyo nāsti kratusamo ripuḥ || 55 ||
anīśvarān mahādevarahitān || 51 |
śubhodarka śubhottaraphalam || 53 |
nedasi nedīyasi idānīntane nikaṭa iti vā | nāsti kratusamo ripuriti | taduktam-
annahīno dahedrāṣṭaṃ mantrahīnastu ṛtvijam |
yajamānamadakṣiṇyo nāsti kratusamo ripuḥ || iti || 55 |

kartavyaścettadā kāryaḥ syāccetsampattirīdṛśī |
sākṣādagniḥ svayaṃ kuṇḍe sākṣādindrādidevatāḥ || 56 |
sākṣācca sarve mantrā vai sākṣādyajñapumānasau |
ācāryapadavīmeṣa devācāryaḥ svayaṃ caret ||
sākṣād brahmā svayaṃ caiṣa bhṛgurve karmakāṇḍavit || 57 ||
ayaṃ pūṣā bhagastveṣa iyaṃ devī sarasvatī |
ete ca sarvadikpālā yajñarakṣākṛtaḥ svayam || 58 ||
tvaṃ ca dīkṣāṃ śubhāṃ prāpto devyā ca śatarūpayā |
jāmātā tveṣa te dharmaḥ patnībhirdaśabhiḥ saha || 5 9 ||
svayameva hi kurvīta dharmakāryaṃ prayatnataḥ |
oṣadhīnāmayaṃ nāthastava jāmātṛṣūttamaḥ || 60 |
saptaviṃśatibhiḥ sārdhaṃ patnībhistava kāryakṛt |
oṣadhīḥ pūrayetsarvā dvijarājo mahāsudhīḥ || 61 |

dīkṣito rājasūyasya dattatrailokyadakṣiṇaḥ |
mārīcaḥ kaśyapaścāsau prajāpatiṣu sattamaḥ ||
trayodaśamitābhiśca bhāryābhistava kāryakṛt || 62 ||
haviḥ kāmadughā sūte kalpavṛkṣaḥ samitkuśān |
dārupātrāṇi sarvāṇi śakaṭaṃ maṇḍapādikam || 63 ||
viśvakarmā'pyalaṅkārān kurute'bhyāgatartvijām | |
vasūni cā'pi vāsāṃsi vasavo'ṣṭau dadatyapi || 64 ||
svayaṃ lakṣmīralaṅkuryād yā vai cā'tra suvāsinīḥ || 65 ||
sarve sukhāya me dakṣa vīkṣamāṇasya sarvataḥ |
ekaṃ duḥkhākarotyeva yattvaṃ vismṛtavānasi || 66 ||
abhyāgatāśca ṛtvijaśca teṣām | vasūni dhanāni || 64 ||
suvāsinīḥ kulavadhūḥ || 65 |
duḥkhākaroti duḥkhaṃ duḥkhinaṃ karoti || 66 |

jīvahīno yathā deho bhūṣito'pi na śobhate |
tatheśvaraṃ vinā yajñaḥ śmaśānamiva lakṣyate || 67 ||
itthaṃ dadhīcivacanaṃ śrutvā śrutvā dakṣaḥ prajāpatiḥ |
bhṛśaṃ jajyāla kopena haviṣā kṛṣṇavartmavat || 68 |
pūrvaṃ stutyā'tisaṃhṛṣṭo dṛṣṭo yo'sau dadhīcinā |
sa eva cā'pi kopāgnimudvaman vīkṣito mukhāt || 6 9 |
pratyuvācā'tha taṃ vipraṃ vepamānāṅgayaṣṭikaḥ |
dakṣaḥ prajāpatī roṣājjighāṃsuriva taṃ dvijam || 70 |
dakṣa uvāca-
brāhmaṇo'si dadhīce tvaṃ kiṃ karomi tavā'tra vai |
dīkṣā mahāmaho prāptaḥ kartuṃ nāyāti kiñcana || 71 |
bhavān kena kena samāhūto yadatrā'gānmahājaḍaḥ |
āgato'pi hi kena tvaṃ pṛṣṭa itthaṃ bravīṣi yat || 72 ||
sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalyo yatra śrīmānayaṃ hariḥ |
svayaṃ vai yajñapuruṣaḥ sa makhaḥ kiṃ śmaśānavat || 73 ||

yatra vajradharaḥ śakraḥ śatayajñaikadīkṣitaḥ |
trayastriṃśatikoṭīnāmamarāṇāṃ patiḥ svayam || 74 ||
taṃ tvaṃ copamimoṣe'muṃ śmaśānena mahāmakham |
dharmarāṭ ca svayaṃ yatra dharmā'dharmaikakovidaḥ || 75 ||
śrīdo'sti yatra śrīdātā sākṣādyatrāśuśukṣaṇiḥ |
taṃ yajñamupamāsi tvamamaṅgalabhuvā tayā || 76 ||
devācāryaḥ svayaṃ yatra kratorācāryatāṃ gataḥ |
abhimānavaśāttaṃ tvamākhyāsi pitṛkānanam || 77 ||
yatrārtvijyaṃ bhajante'mī vasiṣṭhapramukharṣayaḥ |
tamadhvaraṃ samācakṣe maṅgaletarabhūmivat || 78 ||
niśamyeti muniḥ prāha dadhīcirjñānināṃ varaḥ |
sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalyo bhavedyajñapumān hariḥ || 7 9 |
tathāpi śāmbhavīśaktirvede viṣṇuḥ prapaṭhyate |
vāmāṅgaṃ sraṣṭurādyasya haristaditaradvidhiḥ || 80 |

dīkṣito yo'śvamedhānāṃ śatasya kuliśāyudhaḥ |
durvāsasā kṣaṇenāpi nīto niḥśrīkatāṃ hi saḥ || 81 ||
punarārādhya bhūteśaṃ prāpaikāmamarāvatīm |
yastvayā dharmarājo'tra kathitaḥ kraturakṣakaḥ || 82 |
balaṃ tasyā'khilairjñātaṃ śvetaṃ pāśayataḥ purā |
dhanadastryambakasakhastaccakṣuścāśuśukṣaṇiḥ || 83 ||
pārṣṇigrāhyabhavadudro devācāryasya vai tadā |
yadā tārāmadhārṣītsa dvijarājo'tisundarīm || 84 ||
taṃ vidanti vasiṣṭhādyāstavārtvijyaṃ bhajanti ye |
eko rudro na dvitīyaḥ saṃvidānā apīti hi || 85 |

prāvartantarṣayo'nye'pi gauravāttava te kratau | 0
yadi me brāhmaṇasyaikaṃ śṛṇoṣi vacanaṃ hitam || 86 |
tadā kratuphalādhīśaṃ viśveśaṃ tvaṃ samāhvaya |
vinā tena kraturasau kṛto'pyakṛta eva hi || 87 |
sati tasmin mahādeve viśvakarmaikasākṣiṇi |
tavā'pi caiṣāṃ sarveṣāṃ phaliṣyanti manorathāḥ || 88 |
yathā jaḍāni bījāni na phalanti svayaṃ tathā |
jaḍāni sarvakarmāṇi na phalantīśvaraṃ vinā || 8 9 |
arthahīnā yathā vāṇī dharmahīnā yathā tanuḥ |
patihīnā yathā nārī śivahīnā tathā kriyā || 9 0 ||
gaṅgāhīnā yathā deśāḥ putrahīnā yathā gṛhāḥ |
dānahīnā yathā sampacchivahīnā tathā kriyā || 9 1 ||
mantrihīnaṃ yathā rājyaṃ śrutihīnā yathā dvijāḥ |
yoṣāhīnaṃ yathā saukhyaṃ śivahīnā tathā kriyā || 9 2 ||
kiṃ tatra kāraṇaṃ tadāha- tava gauravāditi || 86 |
viśvakarmaikasākṣiṇi sarvavyāpāramukhyadraṣṭari || 88 |
bhaktyudrekāddakṣasya rucyutpādanārthaṃ vā bahudhā dṛṣṭāntayati- arthahīnetyādinā || 9 0 |

darbhahīnā yathā sandhyā tilahīnañca tarpaṇam |
havihīno yathā homaḥ śivahīnā tathā kriyā || 9 3 |
itthaṃ dadhīcinākhyātaṃ jagrāha vacanaṃ na tat |
dakṣo dakṣo'pi tatraiva śambhormāyāvimohitaḥ || 9 4 ||

tattathā'stu paraṃ sākṣī nārthaṃ dadyācca kutracit || 9 8 ||
jaḍāni sarvakarmāṇi na phalantīśvaraṃ vinā |
yaduktaṃ bhavatā tatrā'pyaho dṛṣṭāntayāmyaham || 99 |
jaḍānyapi ca bījāni kālaṃ samprāpya cātmanaḥ |
aṅkarayanti kālācca puṣyanti ca phalanti ca || 100 |
vinā'pīśaṃ tathā karma svayaṃ kālātphalatyaho |
kimīśvareṇa tenā'tra mahāmaṅgalamūrtinā || 101 |
dadhīciruvāca-
yathārthakaraṇātsiddhamapi kāryaṃ kadācana |
īśvaraprātikūlyācca siddhamevāśu naśyati || 102 |
īśvarecchābalātkarma kṛtamapyavidhānataḥ |
saṃsiddhyettadadhīnāśca kathaṃ sarva iheśvarāḥ || 103 |
mahāmaṅgalamūrtinā sarvamaṅgalasvarūpeṇeti vāstavārthaḥ || 101 |
kratumukhyānītyatra taduttaramāha - yathārtheti || 102 |
vipakṣe bādhakamāha- tadadhīnāśceti || 103 |

sāmānyasākṣivanneśaḥ sarveṣāṃ sarvakarmaṇām | |
sākṣībhavedasandigdhaḥ phalasya pratibhūrapi || 104 ||
bhūjalādisvarūpeṇa bījamāviśya sarvakṛt |
svayaṃ kālasyarūpeṇa vidadhyādaṅkurodayam || 105 | |
yattvayoktaṃ vināpīśaṃ kāle karma phaletsvayam |
sa eva kālo bhagavān sarvakartā maheśitā || 106 ||
anyacca bhavatā proktaṃ tadekaṃ tathyameva tat |
kimīśvareṇa tenā'tra mahāmaṅgalamūrtinā || 107 |
ye mahānto bhavantyeva ye ca maṅgalamūrtayaḥ |
īśvarākhyā ca yeṣvasti kiṃ tairatra tavā'ntike || 108 |
uttarāduttaraṃ ceti pratyuttarayati dvije |
dadhīcau cukrudhe'tyantaṃ dakṣo garvātisuśriyā || 10 9 |
īśvara ityāderuttaramāha- sāmānyeti | asandigdhaḥ sandeharahitaḥ | pratibhūḥ

ādideśa samīpasthānālokya paritastviti |
brāhmaṇāpasadaṃ cā'muṃ paridūrayatāśu vai || 110 |
amuṣmādadhvaraśreṣṭhādavariṣṭhamanogatam
itthaṃ dadhīcirākarṇya provāca prahasanniva || 111 ||
kiṃ māṃ dūrayase mūḍha dūrībhūto bhavānapi |
sarvebhyo maṅgalebhyaśca sarvairebhiḥ | samaṃ dhruvam || 112 ||
akāṇḍe krodhajo daṇḍastava mūni patiṣyati |
maheśitustrijagatīpariśāstuḥ prajāpate || 113 ||
ityuktvā nirjagāmāśu yajñavāṭāttato dvijaḥ |
tasminniryāti niryāto durvāsā cyavano bhavān || 114 ||
uttaṅka upamanyuśca ṛcīkoddālakāvapi |
māṇḍavyo vāmadevaśca gālavo gargagautamau || 115 ||
śivatattvavido'nye'pi dakṣayajñādviniryayuḥ |
gate dadhīcau sānandaṃ prāvartata mahāmakhaḥ || 116 ||
ye sthitā brāhmaṇāstatra tebhyo dviguṇadakṣiṇām |
prādāt prajāpatirdakṣastvanyebhyo'pyadhikaṃ vasu || 117 ||
brāhmaṇā apasadā adhamā yasmāttam || 11.0 |
na variṣṭhaḥ śreṣṭho yasmāttasmin manogataṃ yasya tam ||| 111 |
prajāpate iti dakṣasya sopahāsaṃ sambodhanam || 113 ||
bhavān agastyaḥ || 114 |

sarve jāmātarastena toṣitā bhūriśo dhanaiḥ |
kanyāścā'laṅkṛtāḥ sarvā mahāvibhavavistaraiḥ || 118 ||
ṛṣipatnyo'pi bahuśo devapatnyo'pyanekaśaḥ |
tathā purāṅganāḥ sarvāstena mānabhuvaḥ kṛtāḥ || 11 9 |
brahmaghoṣeṇa tāreṇa vyomaśabdaguṇaṃ sphuṭam |
kāritaṃ tena dakṣeṇa viprāṇāṃ hṛṣṭacetasām || 120 |
agnirmandāgnirabhavattasmin juhvati dīkṣite |
haviḥ parimalenaiva paritṛptā digaṅganāḥ || 121 |
svāhākārairvaṣaṭkāraiḥ surā jātāḥ picaṇḍilāḥ |
racitā girayastena sadannānāṃ sadannānāṃ pade pade ||| 122 |
ghṛtakulyāḥ kṛtāstena madhukulyāḥ sahasraśaḥ |
mahāsarāṃsi payasāṃ drapsasyāpi mahāhradāḥ || 123 |
rāśayaśca dukūlānāṃ ratnānāṃ śikharāṇi ca |
yajñavāṭasya vasudhā vasudhā svarṇarūpyamayī kṛtā || 124 ||
tāreṇa mānabhuvaḥ pūjādhārāḥ || 11 9 |
uccena || 120 |
picaṇḍilāḥ sthūlodarāḥ || 122 |

na labhyante kratau tasya mārgitā api mārgaṇāḥ |
hṛṣṭāḥ puṣṭāḥ samabhavannapi tatparicārakāḥ || 125 ||
dhvanirmaṅgalagītānāṃ vyānaśe gaganāṅgaṇam |
jaha cāpsarovṛndairgandharvairmumudetarām || 126 |
vidyādharairnanande ca vasudhā vavṛdhe bhṛśam |
mahāvibhavasambhāre tasmin dākṣe mahākratau |
itthaṃ pravṛtte'tha muniḥ kailāsaṃ nārado yayau || 127 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dakṣayajñaprādurbhāvo nāma saptāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 87 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 87 |

|| athāṣṭāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-
śivalokaṃ samāsādya muninā brahmasūnunā |
kiṃ cakre brūhi ṣaḍvaktra kathāṃ kautukaśālinīm || 1 |
skanda uvāca -
śṛṇu kumbhaja vakṣyāmi nāradena mahātmanā |
yatkṛtaṃ tatra gatvā''śu kailāsaṃ śaṅkarālayam || 2 |
munirgaganamārgeṇa prāpya taddhāma śāmbhavam |
dṛṣṭvā śivau praṇamyā'tha śivena vihitādaraḥ || 3 |
aṣṭāśītitame'dhyāye satyā dehavisarjanam |
varṇyate'tyadbhutataraṃ vairāgyapratipādakam || 1 |
kailāsaṃ nārado yayāvityuktaṃ tatra pṛcchati - śivalokamiti || 1 |

taduddiṣṭāsanaṃ bheje paśyaṃstatkrīḍanakaṃ param |
krīḍantau tau tu cākṣābhyāṃ yadā na ca virematuḥ || 4 ||
tadautsukyena sa muniḥ preryamāṇa uvāca ha |
nārada uvāca-
devadeva tava krīḍā'khilaṃ brahmāṇḍagolakam |
māsā dvādaśa yenātha te sāriphalake gṛhāḥ || 5 |
kṛṣṇā kṛṣṇetarā yā vai tithayastāśca sārikāḥ |
dvipañcadaśamāse yāstvakṣayugmaṃ tathāyane || 6 |
sṛṣṭipralayasaṃjñau dvau glahau jayaparājayau | |
devījaye bhavetsṛṣṭirasṛṣṭidhūrjaṭerjaye || 7 |
bhavatoḥ khelasamayo khelasamayo yaḥ yaḥ sā sthitirudāhṛtā |
itthaṃ krīḍaiva sakalametadbrahmāṇḍamīśayoḥ || 8 |

na devī jeṣyati patiṃ neśaḥ śaktiṃ vijeṣyati |
kiñcidvijñaptukāmo'smi tanmātaravadhāryatām || 9 |
devaḥ sarvajñanātho'pi na kiñcidavabuddhyati |
mānāpamānayoryasmādasau dūre dūre vyavasthitaḥ || 10 |
līlātmā guṇavāneṣa vicārādatinirguṇaḥ |
kurvannapi hi karmāṇi bādhyate naiva karmabhiḥ || 11 |
madhyastho'pi hi sarvasya mādhyasthyamavalambate |
sarvatrā'yaṃ maheśāno mitrāmitrasamānadṛk || 12 |
tvaṃ śaktirasya devasya sarveṣāṃ mānyabhūḥ parā |
dakṣasyā'pi tvayā māno datto'patyanimittakaḥ || 13 ||
tathāpi līlāvigrahadhāriṇoryuvayorvyavahāragocare'kṣakrīḍāyāṃ jayaparājayau na sta
ityāha - na devīti | kiṃ cakre iti yatpṛṣṭaṃ tadāha - kiñciditi || 9 |
avabudhyati avabudhyate || 10 |
nanu guṇavān śarīrī kathaṃ mānāpamānayordūre tiṣṭhati tatrāha - līlātmeti |
yadyapi māyākhyayā tvayā śaktyā'yaṃ līlāvigraho guṇavāṃśca tathāpi vicārād vedānta
tātparyāvadhāraṇādatinirguṇaḥ | ata eva sṛṣṭyādikarmāṇi kurvannapi taiḥ . karmabhirna
lipyata iti || 11 |
tathāpi līlāvigrahāvasthāyāṃ nigrahānugrahau bhavetāmeva netyāha | madhyastho'pi

paraṃ tvaṃ sarvajagatāṃ janayitryekikā dhruvam |
tvatta āvirbhavantyeva dhātṛkeśavavāsavāḥ || 14 ||
tvamātmānaṃ na jānāsi tryakṣamāyāvimohitā |
ata eva hi me cittaṃ dunotyatitarāṃ sati || 15 ||
anyā api hi yāḥ satyaḥ pātivratyaparāyaṇāḥ |
tā bhartṛcaraṇau hitvā kiñcidanyaṃ na manvate || 16 ||
athavā''stāmiyaṃ vārtā prastutaṃ prabravīmyaham |
adya nīlagirestasmāddharidvārasamīpataḥ || 17 |
apūrvamiva saṃvīkṣya pariprāptastavā'ntikam |
atyāścaryaviṣādābhyāṃ kiñcidvaktumihotsukaḥ || 18 ||

āścaryaheturevāyaṃ yatpuṃjātaṃ trayītale |
taddṛṣṭaṃ sakalatraṃ ca dakṣasyā'dhvaramaṇḍape || 1 9 ||
sālaṅkāraṃ samānaṃ ca sānandamukhapaṅkajam |
vismṛtā'khilakāryaṃ ca dakṣayajñapravartakam || 20 ||
viṣāde kāraṇaṃ caitadyato jātamidaṃ jagat |
yasmin pravartate yatra layameṣyati ca dhruvam || 21 |
tadeva tatra no dṛṣṭaṃ bhavadvandvaṃ bhavāpaham |
prāyo viṣādajanakaṃ bhavatoryadadarśanam || 22 ||
tadeva nā'bhavattatra samabhūdanyadeva hi |
tacca vaktuṃ na śakyeta tadvaktā dakṣa eva saḥ || 23 |
tāni vākyāni cākarṇya druhiṇena yaye tataḥ |
maharṣiṇā dadhīcena dhikkṛto nitarāṃ hi saḥ || 24 ||
śaptaśca vīkṣamāṇānāṃ devarṣīṇāṃ prajāpatiḥ |
mayā ca karṇau pihitau śrutvā tadgarhaṇāgiraḥ || 25 ||
puṃjātaṃ puruṣasamudāyaḥ I | puṃmātraṃ yattu jātamiti kvacit || 1 9 |
bhavadvandvaṃ bhavaśca bhavānī ca tayoryugalam || 22 |

dadhīcinā samaṃ kecidurvāsaḥ pramukhā dvijāḥ |
bhavanindāṃ samākarṇya kiyanto'pi viniryayuḥ || 26 ||
prāvartata mahāyāgo hṛṣṭapuṣṭamahājanaḥ |
tathā draṣṭuṃ na śaknomi tata āgatavāniha || 27 ||
bhaginyo'pi ca yā devi tava tatra sabhartṛkāḥ |
tāsāṃ gauravamālokya na kiñcidvaktumutsahe || 28 ||
iti devī samākarṇya satī dakṣakumārikā |
karādakṣau samutsṛjya dadhyau kiñcitkṣaṇaṃ hṛdi || 2 9 ||
uvāca ca bhavatyevaṃ śaraṇaṃ bhava eva me |
sampradhāryeti manasi satī dākṣāyaṇī tataḥ || 30 ||
drutameva samuttasthau praṇanāma ca śaṅkaram |
maulāvañjalimādhāya devī devaṃ vyajijñapat || 31 ||
devyuvāca-
vijayasvāndhakadhvaṃsiṃstryambaka tripurāntaka
caraṇau śaraṇaṃ te me dehyanujñāṃ sadāśiva || 32 ||

mā niṣedhīḥ prārthayāmi yāsyāmi piturantikam |
uktveti maulimadadhādandhakāripadāmbuje || 33 ||
athoktā śambhunā devī mṛḍānyuttiṣṭha bhāmini |
kimapūrṇaṃ tavā'styatra vada saubhāgyasundari || 34 ||
lakṣmyā api ca saubhāgyaṃ brahmāṇyaikāntiruttamā |
śacyai nityanavīnatvaṃ bhavatyā dattamīśvari || 35 |
tvayā ca śaktimānasmi mahadaiśvaryarakṣaṇe | |
tvāṃ ca śaktiṃ samāsādya svalīlārūpadhāriṇīm || 36 |
etat sṛjāmi pāmyadmi tvallīlāprerito'ṅgane |
kuto māṃ hātumicchestvaṃ mama vāmārdhadhāriṇi || 37 |
śivā śivoditaṃ ceti śrutvā'pyāha maheśvaram |
jīviteśa vihāya tvāṃ na kvāpi pariyāmyaham || 38 ||
mano me caraṇadvandve tava sthāsyati niścalam |
kratuṃ draṣṭuṃ pituryāmi naikṣi yajño mayā kvacit || 3 9 ||

śambhuḥ kātyāyanīvākyamiti śrutvā tadā'bravīt |
kratustvayā nekṣitaścedāharāmi tataḥ kratum || 40 ||
macchaktidhāriṇī tvā vā sṛjaivānyāṃ kratukriyām |
anyo yajñapumānastu santvanye lokapālakāḥ || 41 ||
anyānāśu vidhehi tvamṛṣīnārtvijyakarmaṇi |
punarjagāda devīti śrutvā śambhorudīritam || 42 ||
pituryajñotsavo nātha draṣṭavyo'tra mayā dhruvam |
dehyanujñāṃ gamiṣyāmi mā me kārṣīrvaco'nyathā || 43 ||
kaḥ pratīpayituṃ śaktaśceto vā jalameva vā |
nimnāyābhyudyataṃ nātha mā'ya māṃ pratiṣedhaya || 44 ||
niśamyeti punaḥ prāha sarvajño bhūtanāyakaḥ |
mā yāhi devi māṃ hitvā gatā ca na miliṣyasi || 45 ||
adya prācīṃ yiyāsuṃ tvāṃ vārayet paṅguvāsaraḥ |
nakṣatraṃ ca tathā jyeṣṭhā tithiśca navamī priye || 46 |
pratiṣedhe kṛte'pyahaṃ yāsyāmītyāśayenāha - ka iti || 44 ||
paṅkhuvāsaraḥ śanerdinam || 46 ||

adya saptadaśo yogo viyogo'dyatano'śubhaḥ |
dhaniṣṭhārdhasamutpanne tava tārādya pañcamī || 47 |
mā gā devi gatā'dya tvaṃ na hi drakṣyasi māṃ punaḥ |
punardevī babhāṣe sā yadi nāmnā'pyahaṃ satī || 48 |
tadā tanvantareṇā'pi kariṣye tava dāsatām |

ityuktvā niryayau devī kopāndhīkṛtalocanā |
yiyāsubhiśca kāryārthaṃ yatkartavyaṃ na tatkṛtam || 54 ||
na nanāma mahādevaṃ na ca cakre pradakṣiṇam |
ata eva hi sā devī na gatā punarāgatā || 55 ||
apraṇamya maheśānamakṛtvā'pi maheśānamakṛtvā'pi pradakṣiṇam |
adyā'pi na nivartante gatāḥ prāgvāsarā iva || 56 ||
tayā caraṇacāriṇyā rājñā tribhuvaneśituḥ |
api tatpāvanaṃ vartma mene'tikaṭhinaṃ bahu || 57 ||
devo'pi tāṃ satīṃ yāntīṃ dṛṣṭvā caraṇacāriṇīm |
atīva vivyathe citte gaṇāṃścā'tha samāhvayat || 58 ||
gaṇā vimānaṃ nayata manaḥpavanacakriṇam |
pañcāsyāyutasaṃyuktaṃ ratnasānudhvajocchritam || 5 9 ||
kāryārthaṃ yātrānimittam || 54 ||
tadevāha - na nanāmeti | ata eva namaskārapradakṣiṇayorakaraṇādeva gatā satī
punarāgatā netyanvayaḥ || 55 |
vimānaṃ viśinaṣṭi sapādacaturbhiḥ | manaḥ pavanau cakre yasyā'sti tat |
pañcāsyāyutasaṃyuktaṃ siṃhadaśasahasrasambaddham | ratnasānuḥ sumerurdhvajadaṇḍa ucchrito

mahāvātapatākaṃ ca mahābuddhyakṣalakṣitam |
narmadālakanandā ca yatreṣādaṇḍatāṃgate || 60 |
chatrībhūtau ca yatra staḥ sūryācandramasāvapi |
yasmin makaratuṇḍaṃ ca vārāhīśaktiruttamā | 61 |
dhūḥ svayaṃ cā'pi gāyatrī rajjavastakṣakādayaḥ |
sārathiḥ praṇavo yatra . kreṃkāraḥ praṇavadhvaniḥ || 62 |
aṅgāni rakṣakā yatra varūthaśchandasāṃgaṇaḥ |
ityājñaptā gaṇāstūrṇaṃ rathaṃ ninyurharājñayā || 63 |
devyā sanāthaṃ taṃ kṛtvā vimānaṃ pārṣadā divi |
anujagmurmahādevīṃ divyāṃ tejovijṛmbhiṇīm || 64 |
sā kṣaṇaṃ tryakṣaramaṇī vīkṣya dakṣasabhāṅgaṇam |
nabho'ṅgaṇādvimānasthā tato vegādavātarat || 65 |
mahāvātaḥpravahaḥ patākā yasya tat | sa mahābuddhirmahattattvaṃ saivākṣo madhye
dīrghākārakāṣṭhaṃ tena lakṣitam | alakanandā gaṅgā | īṣādaṇḍatāṃgate prāpte | makarākāraṃ
tuṇḍaṃ makaratuṇḍam || 61 |

aviśadyajñavāṭaṃ ca cakitaṃ rakṣivīkṣitā |
kṛtamaṅgalanepathyāṃ prasūṃ dṛṣṭvā kirīṭinīm || 66 ||
sabhartṛkāśca bhaginīrnavā'laṅkṛtiśālinīḥ |
sāścaryāśca sagarvāśca sānandāśca sasādhvasāḥ || 67 ||
acintitā tvanāhūtā vimānāddharavallabhā |
kathameṣā pariprāptā kṣaṇamitthaṃ prapaśyatīḥ || 68 |
asambhāṣyā'pi tāḥ sarvā gatā dakṣāntikaṃ satī |
pitrā pṛṣṭā tu mātrā'pi bhadraṃ jātaṃ tvadāgame || 6 9 |
satyuvāca-
yadi bhadraṃ janetarme samāgamanato bhavet |
kathaṃ nā'haṃ samāhūtā yathaitā me sahodarāḥ || 70 |

dakṣa uvāca- sarvamaṅgale |
ayi kanye mahādhanye hyananye
ayaṃ te na manāg doṣo doṣa eva mamaiva hi || 71 ||
tādṛg vidhāya yatpatye mayā dattā'jñabuddhinā |
yadahaṃ taṃ samājñāsyamīśvaro'sau nirīśvaraḥ || 72 |
tadā kathamadāsyaṃ tvāṃ tasmai māyāsvarūpiṇe |
ahaṃ śivākhyayā tuṣṭo na jāne'śivarūpiṇam || 73 |
pitāmahena bahudhā varṇito'sau mamā'grataḥ |
śaṅkaro'yamayaṃ śambhurasau paśupatiḥ śivaḥ || 74 ||
śrīkaṇṭho'sau maheśo'sau sarvajño'sau vṛṣadhvajaḥ |
asmai kanyāṃ prayaccha tvaṃ mahādevāya dhanvine || 75 ||

vākyācchatadhṛtestasmāttasmai dattā mayā'naghe |
na jāne taṃ virūpākṣamukṣagaṃ viṣabhakṣaṇam || 76 |
pitṛkānanasaṃvāsaṃ śūlinaṃ ca kapālinam |
dvijihvasaṅgasubhagaṃ jalādhāraṃ kapardinam || 77 ||
kalaṅkikṛtamauliṃ ca dhūlidhūsaracarcitam |
..... kvacitkaupīnavasanaṃ nagnaṃ vātūlavat kvacit || 78 ||
kvacicca carmavasanaṃ kvacid bhikṣāṭanapriyam |
viṭaṅkabhūtānucaraṃ sthāṇumugraṃ sthāṇumugraṃ tamoguṇam || 7 9 |
rudraṃ raudraparīvāraṃ mahākālavapurdharam |
nṛkaroṭīparikaraṃ jātigotravivarjitam || 80 ||
tatra hetugarbhāṇi viśeṣaṇāni | līlayā virūpākṣam ukṣagaṃ vṛṣavāhanamityarthaḥ || 76 |
jalaṃ jalada ādhāro yasya taṃ meghavāhanatvāt | jalasya gaṅgārūpasya vā

na samyag vetti taṃ kaśvijjānāno'pi pratāritaḥ |
kiṃ bahūktena tanaye samastanayaśālini || 81 |
kya pāṃsulapaṭacchanno mahāśaṃkhavibhūṣaṇaḥ |
prabaddhasarpakeyūraḥ pralambitajaṭāsaṭaḥ || 82 |
ḍamaḍumarukavyagrahastāgraḥ khaṇḍacandrabhṛt |
tāṇḍavāḍambararuciḥ sarvāmaṅgalaceṣṭitaḥ || 83 |
mṛḍāni sa haraḥ kvā'yamadhvaro maṅgalālayaḥ |
ata eva samāhūtā neha tvaṃ sarvamaṅgale || 84 ||
dukūlānyanukūlāni ratnālaṅkṛtayaḥ śubhāḥ |
prāgeva dhāritāste'tra paśyāgatya gṛhāṇa ca || 85 |
jānāno'pi hiraṇyagarbhavacanādvidvānapi pratāritastanmāyayā vañcita iti

iha maṅgalaveśeṣu devendreṣu sa śūladhṛk |
kathamarho bhavecceti maṅgale viṣamekṣaṇaḥ || 86 |
ityākarṇya satī sādhvī janeturuditaṃ tadā |
atyantadūnahṛdayā vaktuṃ samupacakrame || 87 ||
satyuvāca-
nā''karṇitaṃ mayā kiñcittvayi prabruvati prabho |

yādṛśaṃ vakṣitaṃ śambhuṃ tādṛśaṃ yadyamanyathāḥ |
kuto māmadadāstasmai yaṃ ca kaścana veda na || 9 1 |
athavā tena sambandhe na heturbhavato matiḥ |
tatra heturabhūttāta mama puṇyaikagauravam || 9 2 |
athoktvaivaṃ bahutaraṃ tvaṃ janetā'sya varṣmaṇaḥ |
śrutā'nena ca dehena patyuḥ parivigarhaṇā || 9 3 |
puraścaraṇamevaitadyadasyaiva visarjanam |
suślāghyajanmayā tāvatprāṇitavyaṃ suyoṣitā ||
yāvajjīvitanāthasyāśravaṇīyā vigarhaṇā || 9 4 |
ityuktvā krodhadīptāgnau mahādevasvarūpiṇī |
juhāva dehasamidhaṃ prāṇarodhavidhānataḥ || 9 5 |
varṣmaṇaḥ śarīrasya || 9 3 |

tato vivarṇatāṃ prāptāḥ sarve devāḥ savāsavāḥ |
nā'gnirjajvāla ca tathā yathājyāhutibhiḥ purā || 9 6 |
mantrāḥ kuṇṭhitasāmarthyāstatkṣaṇādeva cā'bhavan |
aho mahāniṣṭataraṃ kimetatsamupasthitam || 9 7 |
kecidūcurdvijavarā mithaḥ pariyiyāsavaḥ |
mahājhaṃjhānilaḥ prāptaḥ parvatāndolanakṣamaḥ || 9 8 |
makhamaṇḍapabhūstena kṣaṇataḥ sthapuṭīkṛtā |
akāṇḍaṃ taḍidāpāto jāto'bhūd bhūprakampanaḥ || 99 ||
divaścolkāḥ prapatitāḥ piśācā nṛtyamādadhuḥ |
ātāpi gṛdhrairupari gagane maṇḍalāyitam || 100 |
raveradhastādaśivaṃ śivāstatrāpyarāriṣuḥ |
meghā rudhiraviprubhistatra vṛṣṭiṃ vyadhuḥ parām || 101 ||
nirghātaniḥsvano bhūmerutthito hṛtprakampanaḥ |
divyāyudhāni ca mitho yudhyanti smā'tibhīṣaṇam || 102 |
jhaṃjhā kaṭhoraḥ || 9 8 |
sthapuṭīkṛtā tṛṇādinācchāditā || 9 1 |
arāriṣuḥ śabdaṃ cakruḥ | rudhiraviprubhiḥ raktabindubhiḥ || 101 |
taba to indrādika samagra devatā loga hataśrī ho gaye | agni pahale - sā āhuti

havanīyaṃ mahādravyaṃ dūṣitaṃ kroṣṭubhiḥ śvabhiḥ |
cakorāḥ karaṭāstatra viceruryajñamaṇḍape || 103 |
śmaśānavāṭavajjāto yajñavāṭaḥ sa vai kṣaṇāt |
yadyatrāvasthitaṃ sarvaṃ tattatraiva pariṣṭhitam || 104 ||
citranyastamivāsīcca vastujātamaśobhi ca |
sthagitā iva saṃvṛttāstatra cakradharādayaḥ || 105 |
dakṣo'pi vadanamlānimavāpya saparicchadaḥ |
punaryathākathañcicca yajñaṃ prāvartayan dvijāḥ || 106 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe satīdehavisarjanaṃ nāmā'ṣṭāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 88 |
kroṣṭubhiḥ sṛgālaiḥ śvabhiśca | cakorāścandraraśmibhoktāraḥ pakṣiviśeṣāḥ | karaṭāḥ
kākāḥ || 103 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭāśītitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 88 |

|| athaikonanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca -
punaḥ sa nārado'gastya devyāḥ prāk samupāgataḥ |
tadvṛttāntamaśeṣaṃ ca harāyā''vedituṃ yayau || 1 |
dṛṣṭvā sa nāradaḥ śambhuṃ nandinā saha saṅkathām |
kāñcittarjanivinyāsapūrvaṃ kurvantamānamat || 2 |
upāviśacca śailādivisṛṣṭāsanamuttamam |
vailakṣyaṃ nāṭayan kiñcitkṣaṇaṃ joṣaṃ samāsthitaḥ || 3 |
ākāreṇaiva sarvajñastadvṛttāntaṃ viveda ha |
avādīcca muniṃ śambhuḥ kuto maunā'valambanam || 4 ||
śarīriṇāṃ sthitiriyamutpattipralayātmikā |
divyānyapi śarīrāṇi kālādyāntyevameva hi || 5 |
navāśītitame'dhyāye yajñadhvaṃsādipūrvakam |
dakṣeśvarasamutpattirvarṇyate'timanoharā || 1 ||

dṛśyaṃ vinaśvaraṃ sarvaṃ viśeṣādyadanīśvaram |
tato'tra citraṃ kiṃ brahman kaṅkālaḥ kālayenna vai || 6 ||
abhāvino hi bhāvasya bhāvaḥ kvāpi na sambhavet |
bhāvino'pi hi nābhāvastato muhyanti no budhāḥ || 7 ||
śambhūdīritamākarṇya sa itthaṃ munipuṅgavaḥ |
proktavān satyamevaitadyaddevena prabhāṣitam || 8 |
avaśyameva yadbhāvyaṃ tadbhūtaṃ nā'tra saṃśayaḥ |
paraṃ māṃ bādhate'tyantaṃ cintaikā cittamāthinī || 9 |

nā'pacīyeta te kiñcinnopacīyeta tattvataḥ | 6615
avyayatvācca pūrṇatvāddhānivṛddhī kutastvayi || 10 ||
aho barākaḥ saṃsāraḥ kva bhaviṣyatyanīśvaraḥ |
ārabhyā'dya dinaṃ na tvāmarcayiṣyanti ke'pi yat || 11 ||
yataḥ prajāpatirdakṣo na tvāmāhūtavān kratau | |
tenādya rīḍhitaṃ dṛṣṭvā devarṣimanujā api || || 12 ||
tava rīḍhāṃ kariṣyanti kimaiśvaryeṇa rīḍhinām | |
prāptāvaheḍanā loke jitakālabhayā api ||
athaiśvaryeṇa sampannāḥ pratiṣṭhābhājanaṃ kimu || 13 ||
mahīyasāyuṣā teṣāṃ vasubhirbhūribhiśca kim |
ye s bhimānadhanā neha labdharīḍhāḥ pade pade || 14 ||
nāpacīyeta na hīyeta | nopacīyeta na vardheta | etadeva hetupūrvakaṃ spaṣṭayati-

acetanāśca sāvajñā jīvanto'pi na kīrtaye |
abhimānadhanā dhanyā varaṃ yoṣitsu sā satī || 15 ||
yā tvadvinindāśravaṇāttṛṇīcakre kre svajīvitam |
ityākarṇya mahākālaḥ samyag jñātvā satīvyayam || 16 |
satyaṃ mune satī devī tṛṇīcakre svajīvitam |
joṣaṃ sthite munau tatra tanmahākālasādhvasāt || 17 ||
rudraścātīvarudro'bhūd bahukopāgnidīpitaḥ |
tatastatkopajād vahnerāvirāsīnmahādyutiḥ || 18 ||
pratyakṣaḥ pratimākāraḥ kālamṛtyuprakampanaḥ |
uvāca ca praṇamyeśaṃ bhuśuṇḍīṃ mahatīṃ dadhat || 1 9 |
ājñāṃ dehi pitaḥ kiṃ te karavai dāsyamuttamam |
brahmāṇḍamekakavalaṃ karavāṇi tvadājñayā || 20 |
varaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ yathā syātkevalamiti vā || 15 |

pibāmi cā'rṇavān saptā'pyekena culukena vai |
rasātalaṃ vā pātālaṃ pātālaṃ vā rasātalam || 21 ||
tvadājñayā nayāmīśa vinimayya svahelayā |
salokapālamindraṃ vā dhṛtvā keśairihānaye || 22 ||
api vaikuṇṭhanāthaścettatsāhāyyaṃ kariṣyati |
tadā taṃ kuṇṭhitānaṃ ca kariṣyāmi tvadājñayā || 23 ||

kiṃ bahūktena dehyājñāṃ mamā'sādhyaṃ na kiñcana |
tvatpādabalamāsādya kṛtaṃ vidvyadya cintitam || 28 |
iti pratijñāṃ tasyeśaḥ śrutvā kṛtamamanyata |
kṛtakṛtyamivā'tyantaṃ taṃ mudā pratyuvāca ca || 2 9 ||
mahāvīro'sire bhadra mama sarvagaṇeṣviha |
vīrabhadrākhyayā tvaṃ hi prathitiṃ paramāṃ vraja || 30 |
kuru me satvaraṃ kārya dakṣayajñaṃ kṣayaṃ naya |
ye tvāṃ tatrā'vamanyante tatsāhāyyavidhāyinaḥ || 31 |
te tvayā'pyavamantavyā vraja putra śubhodaya |
ityājñāṃ mūrdhni cādhāya sa tataḥ pārameśvarīm || 32 ||
haraṃ pradakṣiṇīkṛtya jagmivānatiraṃhasā |
tatastadanugān śambhuḥ svaniḥśvāsasamudgatān || 33 ||
śatakoṭimitānugrān gaṇānanyānavāsṛjat |
te gaṇā vīrabhadraṃ taṃ yāntaṃ kecitpuro gatāḥ || 34 ||
kecittadanugā jātāḥ kecittatpārśvagā yayuḥ |
ambaraṃ taiḥ samākrāntaṃ tejovijitabhāskaraiḥ || 35 ||
kṛtaṃ kṛtyaṃ yena tamiva sampāditakāryamiva || 2 9 |

śṛṅgāgrāṇi girīṇāṃ ca kaiścidutpāṭitāni vai |
ācūḍamūlāḥ kaiścicca vidhūtā vai śiloccayāḥ || 36 ||
utpāṭya mahato vṛkṣān kecitprāptā makhā'ṅgaṇam |
kaiścidutpāṭitā yūpāḥ kecitkuṇḍānyapūpuran || 37 ||
maṇḍapaṃ dhvaṃsayāmāsuḥ kecitkrodhoddhurā gaṇāḥ |
acīkhanan vai vedīśca kecidvai śūlapāṇayaḥ ||
abhakṣayan havīṃṣyanye pṛṣadājyaṃ papuḥ pare || 38 ||
dadhvaṃsurannarāśīṃśca kecitparvatasannibhān |
kecidvai pāyasāhārāḥ kecidvai kṣīrapāyinaḥ || 3 9 |
kecitpakvānnapuṣṭāṅgā yajñapātrāṇyacūrṇayan |
amoṭayan sucāṃ daṇḍān keciddordaṇḍaśālinaḥ || 40 ||

vyabhañjachakaṭān kecitpaśūn kecidajīgilan |
agniṃ nirvāpayāmāsuḥ kecidatyagnitejasaḥ || 41 ||
svayaṃ paridadhuścānye dukūlāni mudāyutāḥ |
jagṛhuḥ kecana purā ratnānāṃ parvataṃ kṛtam || 42 ||
ekena ca bhagodevaḥ paśyaṃścakre'vilocanaḥ |
pūṣṇo dantāvalīmanyaḥ pātayāmāsa kopitaḥ || 43 |
yajñaḥ palāyito dṛṣṭaḥ kenacinmṛgarūpadhṛk |
śirovirahitaścakre tena cakreṇa dūrataḥ || 44 |
ekaḥ sarasvatīṃ yāntīṃ dṛṣṭvā nirnāsikāṃ vyadhāt |
aditeroṣṭhapuṭakau chinnāvanyena kopinā || 45 |
aryamṇo bāhuyugalaṃ tathotpāṭitavān paraḥ |
agnerutpāṭayāmāsa kaścijjihvāṃ prasahya ca || 46 |
ciccheda vāyorvṛṣaṇaṃ pārṣado'nyaḥ pratāpavān |

yatra dharme dharme maheśo na prathamaṃ paripūjyate | |
nairṛtaṃ saṅgṛhītvā'nyaḥ keśeṣyātolya ' cāsakṛt || 48 |
anīśvaraṃ havirbhuktaṃ tvayetyātāḍayatpadā |
kuberamaparo dhṛtvā pādayoradhunod balāt || 4 9 |
bāmayāmāsa bahuśo bhakṣitā hyadhvarāhutīḥ |
ekādaśāpi ye rudrā lokapālaikapaṅktayaḥ || 50 ||
rudrākhyādhāraṇavaśātpramathaiste'vahelitāḥ
varuṇodaramāpīḍya pramatho'nyo balena hi || 51 ||
bahirudgirayāmāsa yaddattaṃ ceśavarjitam |
māyūrīṃ tanumāsādya sahasrākṣo mahāmatiḥ || 52 |
uḍḍīya girimāśritya girimāśritya channaḥ kautukamaikṣata |
brāhmaṇān pramathā natvā yātāyāteti cā'bruvan || 53 |
ātolya ākṛṣya || 48 |
pādayoḥ pādau dhṛtvā'dhunot akampayat || 4 9 |
vāmayāmāsa udgirayāmāsa ca | bhakṣitā ' bhakṣakaḥ || 50 ||
jagau uvāca || 55 |

pramathāḥ kālayāmāsuranyānapi ca yācakān |
itthaṃ pramathite yāge pramathaiḥ prathamāgataiḥ ||
vīrabhadraḥ svataḥ prāptaḥ pramathānīkinīvṛtaḥ || 54 ||
yajñavāṭaṃ śmaśānābhaṃ dṛṣṭvā taiḥ pramathaiḥ purā |
atiśocyāṃ daśāṃ nītaṃ vīrabhadrastato jagau || 55 ||
gaṇāḥ paśyata durvṛttaiḥ prārabdhānāṃ ca karmaṇām |
anīśvarairavastheyaṃ kuto dveṣo maheśvare || 56 |
ye dviṣanti mahādevaṃ sarvakarmaikasākṣiṇam |
dharmakārye pravṛttāstu te prāpsyantīdṛśīṃ daśām || 57 |
kva sa dakṣo durācāraḥ kva ca yajñabhujaḥ surāḥ |
dhṛtyā sarvānānayata yāta drutataraṃ gaṇāḥ || 58 |
ityājñāṃ vīrabhadrasya prāpya te pramathā drutam |
yāvadyāntyagratastāvaddṛṣṭaḥ kruddho gadādharaḥ || 5 9 |
tena te pramathāḥ sarve mahābalaparākramāḥ |
śuṣkaparṇatṛṇāvasthāṃ prāpitā vātyayeva hi || 60 |
ataḥ kuto maheśvare dveṣa iti || 56 |
vātyayā cakravātena || 60 |

atha naṣṭeṣu sarveṣu pramatheṣu harerbhayāt |
cukopa vīrabhadraḥ sa pralayānalasannibhaḥ || 61 |
dadarśa śārṅgiṇaṃ cāgre svagaṇaiśca pariṣṭutam | |
caturbhujairasaṃkhyātairjitadaityamahābalaiḥ || 62 ||
cakribhirgadibhirjuṣṭaṃ khaḍgibhiścāpi śārṅgibhiḥ |
vīrabhadrastataḥ prāha dṛṣṭvā taṃ daityasūdanam || 63 ||
tvaṃ tu yajñapumānatra mahāyajñapravartakaḥ |
rakṣitā nijavīryeṇa dakṣasya tryakṣavairiṇaḥ || 64 ||
kiṃ vā dakṣaṃ samānīya dehi yudhyasva vā mayā |
na dāsyasi ca ceddakṣaṃ tatastaṃ rakṣa yatnataḥ || 65 ||
prāyaśaḥ śambhubhakteṣu yatastvaṃ procyase'graṇīḥ |
ekone'bjasahasre prāg dadau netrāmbujaṃ bhavān || 66 ||
naṣṭeṣvadarśanaṃ gateṣu || 61 |
tatastaṃ rakṣa yatnata iti garvoktiḥ || 65 |
kiñca yuddhaṃ tadapradānaṃ ca tvayi na sambhāvyata ityāha - prāyaśa iti | yadvā rakṣa
