tuṣṭena śambhunā dattaṃ tubhyaṃ cakraṃ sudarśanam |
yatsāhāyyamavāpyājau tvaṃ jayerdanujādhipān || 67 |
ityākarṇya vacastasya vīrabhadrasya corjitam |
jijñāsustadbalaṃ viṣṇurvīrabhadramuvāca ha || 68 |
tvaṃ śambhoḥ sutadeśīyo gaṇānāṃ pravaro'syaho |
rājādeśamanuprāpya tato'pyatibalo mahān || 6 9 |
yo'si so'syahamapyatra dakṣarakṣaṇadakṣadhī : |
paśyāmi tava sāmarthyaṃ kathaṃ dakṣaṃ hariṣyasi || 70 |
ityukto vīrabhadraḥ sa tena vai śārṅgadhanvanā |
pramathān dṛṣṭibhaṅgacaiva prerayāmāsa saṅgare | 71 |
sutadeśīyaḥ putrasthānīyaḥ putrāt kiñcinyūna iti vā | rājata iti rājā
viśvanāthastasyādeśamājñāmiti || 6 9 |
kathaṃ kena prakāreṇa | svayamiti kvacit | tatra svayaṃ balādityeva || 70 |
dṛṣṭibhaṅgayaiva kaṭākṣeṇaiva || 71 |

atha taiḥ pramathairviṣṇoranugā gaditā raṇe |
ādadānāstṛṇaṃ vaktreṇā'pi tāḥ pāśavīṃ daśām || 72 ||
tatastārkṣyarathaḥ kruddhastvekaikaṃ raṇamūrdhani |
sahasreṇa sahasreṇa bāṇānāṃ hṛdyatāḍayat || 73 ||
te bhinnavakṣasaḥ sarve gaṇā rudhiravarṣiṇaḥ |
vāsantīṃ kaiṃśukīṃ śobhāṃ pariprāpū raṇājire || || 74 ||
kṣaranta iva mātaṅgāḥ sravanta iva parvatāḥ |
madena dhāturāgeṇa miśraḥ śuśubhire gaṇāḥ || 75 ||
tataḥ prahasya gaṇapo'bravīdvaikuṇṭhanāyakam |
he śārṅgadhanvan jāne tvāṃ tvaṃ raṇāṅgaṇapaṇḍitaḥ || 76 |

paraṃ yudhyasi daityendrairdānavendrairna pārṣadaiḥ |
ityuktvā vīrabhadreṇa bhuśuṇḍī kalitā kare || 77 |
gadinā'tha gadā tūrṇaṃ daityendragirireṇukṛt |
tataḥ prahatavān vīro bhuśuṇḍyā taṃ gadādharam || 78 |
tadaṅgasaṅgamāsādya vidadre śatadhā tayā |
kaumodakīprahāreṇa vīrabhadraṃ pratāpinam || 7 9 |
jaghāna vāsudevo'pi tarasā'jñātavedanam |
tataḥ khaṭvāṅgamādāya gadāhastaṃ gadādharam || 80 ||
ātāḍya savyadordaṇḍe gadāṃ bhūmāvapātayat |
kupito'yaṃ madhudveṣī cakreṇātāḍayacca tam || 81 |

sa ca cakraṃ samāgacchad dṛṣṭvā sasmāra śaṅkaram |
śaṅkarasmaraṇāccakraṃ manāg vakratvamāpya ca ||
kaṇṭhamāsādya vīrasya samyag jātaṃ sudarśanam || 82 ||
tena cakreṇa śuśubhe nitarāṃ sa gaṇeśvaraḥ |
vīralakṣmyāvṛta iva samare vijayasrajā ||| 83 |
tataḥ sudarśanaṃ dṛṣṭvā tatkaṇṭhābharaṇaṃ hariḥ |
manāk sacakitaṃ smitvā tato jagrāha nandakam || 84 ||
manandakaṃ karaṃ tasya prodyataṃ madhuvidviṣaḥ |
śyato divi siddhānāṃ stambhayāmāsa huṃkṛtā || 85 |
abhyadhāvacca vegena gṛhītvā śūlamujjvalam |
yāvajjighāṃsati hariṃ tāvadākāśavācayā || 86 |
vārito gaṇarājaḥ sa mā kārṣīḥ sāhasaṃ tviti |
tatastaṃmapahāyāśu vīrabhadro gaṇottamaḥ || 87 |
huṃkṛtā huṃkāreṇa ||| 85 |

prāpya dakṣaṃ vinadyoccairdhik tvāmīśvaranindakam |
yasyedṛgasti sampattiryana devāḥ sahāyinaḥ ||
sa kathaṃ seśvaraṃ karma na kuryāddakṣatāṃ dadhat || 88 |
yenāsyenā'pavitreṇa bhavatā ninditaḥ śivaḥ |
cūrṇayāmi tadāsyaṃ te capeṭābhiḥ samantataḥ || 8 9 |
ityuktvā tasya dakṣasya harapāruṣyabhāṣiṇaḥ |
ciccheda vadanaṃ vīraścapeṭaśataghātanaiḥ || 9 0 ||
tatastvaditimukhyānāṃ militānāṃ mahotsave |
troṭayāmāsa karṇādīnyaṅgapratyaṅgakāni ca || 9 1 |
buddhipūrvakaṃ nindati - yasyeti | sahāyinaḥ sāhāyyakāriṇaḥ | ityākarṇyatyārabhya
prāpya dakṣamityādeḥ prāktanasya granthasyā'yamabhiprāyaḥ - svātmano viśveśasya yo vai
viṣṇuḥ sa vai rudra ityādyukteḥ | māno vidheyaḥ , ata evātmābhinnasya rudrasyājñākartu-
vīrabhadrasya sāmarthyajijñāsāpūrvakaṃ māno deyaḥ svabhaktasya śaraṇāpannasya dakṣasyāpi
sāhāyyaṃ vidheyam , ata etattritayaṃ manasi nidhāya bhagavāṃstathā cakre , yathā paraśurāma-
rūpeṇa śaraṇāpannāyā . ambāyāḥ svaśiṣyasya ca bhīṣmasya sāhāyyamānadānārthaṃ
yuddhaṃ mohaṃ parājayaṃ ca svīkṛtavāniti | dadhīciśāpādvā evam | bhaviṣyasi
hṛṣīkeśaḥ svāśrito'pi parāṅmukhaḥ | evamuktvā tu viprarṣirvirarāma taponidhiḥ ||
iti kūrmokteḥ || 88 |
aṅgapratyaṅgakāni aṅgābharaṇāni || 9 1 |

veṇīdaṇḍāśca kāsāñcittena cchinnā mahāruṣā |
kāsāñcicca karāśchinnāḥ kāsāṃñcit kartitāḥ stanāḥ || 9 2 ||
nāsāpuṭāṃstathā'nyāsāṃ pāṭayāmāsa pārṣadaḥ |
ciccheda cāṅgulīścā'pi tathā'nyāsāṃ śivapriyaḥ || 9 3 ||
ye ye ninindurdeveśa ye ye ca śuśruvuḥ tadā |
teṣāṃ jihvāḥ śrutīḥ kopādacchinaccā'karodvidhā || 9 4 |
kecidullambitā yūpe pāśayitvā dṛḍhaṃ gale |
adhomukhā yairdeveśaṃ vihāyāttaṃ mahāhaviḥ || 9 5 ||
dvijarājaśca dharmaśca bhṛgumārīcamukhyakāḥ |
atyantamapamānasya bhājanaṃ tena kāritāḥ | 9 6 |

ete jāmātarastasya yato dakṣasya durdhiyaḥ |
hitvā maheśvaramamūn so'paśyadadhikān śivāt || 9 7 |
tāni kuṇḍāni te yūpāste stambhāḥ sa ca maṇḍapaḥ |
tā vedyastāni pātrāṇi tāni havyānyanekadhā || 9 8 |
te ca vai yajñasambhārāste te yajñapravartakāḥ |
te rakṣapālāste mantrā vineśurhelayā'khilāḥ || 99 |
stokenaiva hi kālena yathardhiḥ paravañcanāt |
arjitā naśyati kṣipraṃ dakṣasampadgatā'śivā || 100 | |
nīte mahākratau tena sagaṇenedṛśīṃ daśām |
vidhirvidhivilopācca haraṃ vijñāpya cānayat || 101 ||
tatra yatra makhaḥ so'bhūdīdṛkṣaḥ śivavarjitaḥ |
āyāte'tha mahādeve vīrabhadro'tilajjitaḥ || 102 |
helayā īśvarasya vīrabhadrasya veti śeṣaḥ || 99 |
aśivā amaṅgalarūpā , na vidyate śiva īśvaro yasyāmiti vā || 100 |

natvā na kiñcidavadaddevaḥ sarvamavaitsvayam |
prasādya devadeveśaṃ surajyeṣṭho'bravītpunaḥ || 103 |
aparādhyapyayaṃ dakṣaḥ samprasādyaḥ kṛpānidhe | |
yathāpūrvaṃ punaramūn sarvān kāraya śaṅkara || 104 |
yathā vidhiḥ pravarteta vaidikaḥ punareva hi |
tathājñā dīyatāṃ śambho karma siddhyati seśvaram || 105 |
anīśvarāsu sarvāsu kriyāsu parameśvara |
evameva bhavantyeva vighnajātāḥ sahasraśaḥ || 106 ||
vicārato barāko'yaṃ dakṣo bhaktatarastava |
kurvanyo'nīśvaraṃ karma paradṛṣṭāntatāṃ gataḥ || 107 |
anyo'pi yo maheśānaṃ hitvā karma kariṣyati |
tasya tatkarmasaṃsiddhirdakṣasyeva bhaviṣyati || 108 |
samprasādyaḥ samyak prasādaṃ prāpyaḥ prāpaṇīyaḥ || 104 |

ato na kaścit kiñcicca kvacitkarma vinā śivam |
vidhāsyati niśamyā'sya dakṣasyedṛkṣaceṣṭitam || 10 9 | |
vidhīritamiti śrutvā smitvā devo maheśvaraḥ |
vīramājñāpayāmāsa yathāpūrvamakalpaya || 110 |
vīrabhadro'pi tatsarvaṃ śarvājñāṃ pratipadya ca |
vinā dakṣasya vadanaṃ yathāpūrvamakalpayat || 111 |
īśvaraṃ ye vinindanti te mūkāḥ paśavo dhruvam |
tato meṣamukhaṃ dakṣaṃ vīrabhadro gaṇo vyadhāt || 112 |
devo brahmāṇamāpṛcchya dharmād gārhasthyataścyutaḥ |
sapārṣado himaprasthaṃ jagāma tapase tataḥ || 113 |
anāśramavatā puṃsā yataḥ kālo manāgapi |
mudhā kalayitavyo na tasmācchreyaḥ sadāśramaḥ || 114 ||
ataḥ sa sarvatapasāṃ phaladātā maheśvaraḥ |
tapaścacāra sagaṇo brahmā dakṣaṃ tvaśikṣayat || 115 |

ekonanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 25 9
haranindāsamudbhūtapāpapaṅkaṃ |papaṅkaṃ sudustyajam |
yadi kṣālayituṃ kāṅkṣā tadā vārāṇasīṃ vraja || 116 ||
prāpya vārāṇasīṃ puṇyāṃ mahāpāpaughahāriṇīm |
kuru liṅgapratiṣṭhāṃ tvaṃ tena śambhuḥ sa tuṣyati || 117 ||
tuṣṭe maheśvare tuṣṭaṃ jagadetaccarācaram |
nānyatra pāpaṃ te gantṛ vinā vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 118
brahmahatyādipāpānāṃ prāyaścittaṃ manīṣibhiḥ |
proktaṃ na haranindāyāstatra kāśyeva kevalam || 11 9 |
kāśyāṃ liṅgapratiṣṭhā yaiḥ kṛtā'tra sukṛtātmabhiḥ |
sarve dharmāḥ kṛtāstaistu ta eva puruṣārthinaḥ || 120 |
ityākarṇya vidhervākyaṃ dakṣaḥ prāpyā'tha satvaram |
avimuktaṃ mahākṣetraṃ tatāpa paramaṃ tapaḥ || 121 |
saṃsthāpya liṅgaṃ liṅgaṃ vidhivalliṅgārādhanatatparaḥ |
na vetti liṅgādaparaṃ sa kiñcijjagatītale || 122 ||
kāṅkṣā ākāṅkṣā || 116 ||

divāniśaṃ maheśānaṃ pariṣṭauti samarcati |
namati dhyāyatīkṣeta dakṣo dakṣaprajāpatiḥ || 123 |
ekacittasya dakṣasya dhyāyato liṅgamaiśvaram |
samāḥ sahasramagamanmitaṃ dvādaśasaṃkhyayā || 124 |
menāṃ yāvat satī prāpya himācalapativratām | |
umārūpā'titapasā patiṃ prāpa pinākinam || 125 |
tāvat sa dakṣastapasi niścalo liṅgamārcayat |
tataḥ kāśīṃ samāsādya saha bhartrā girīndrajā || 126 |
dṛṣṭvā taṃ niścalahṛdaṃ śivaliṅgārcane ratam |
haraṃ vyajijñapaddevī kṣīṇo'yaṃ tapasā vibho || 127 |
prasādaya kṛpāsindhoṃ vareṇainaṃ prajāpatim |
ityukto'parṇayā śambhuḥ prāha taṃ dakṣamīśitā || 128 |
varaṃ brūhi mahābhāga dāsyāmi manasepsitam |
itīśoditamākarṇya praṇamya bahuśo haram || 12 9 ||

stutvā nānāvidhaiḥ stotraiḥ prasannaṃ vīkṣya śaṅkaram |
provāca devadeveśaṃ yadi deyo varo mama || 130 ||
tattvadīyapadadvandve nirdvandvā bhaktirastu me |
idaṃ ca te mahāliṅgaṃ yanmayā'dya pratiṣṭhitam ||
asmi~lliṅge tvayā nātha sthātavyaṃ sarvadaiva hi || 131 ||
mayā'parāddhaṃ yaddeva tatkṣantavyaṃ kṛpānidhe | |
eta eva varāḥ santu kimanyairuttamairvaraiḥ || 132 |
iti śrutvā mahādevaḥ prasanno'titarāṃ bhavaḥ |
provāca ca yaduktaṃ te tattathā'stu na cā'nyathā || 133 |
anyacca te varaṃ dadyāṃ cacchṛṇuṣya prajāpate | |
yattvayā sthāpitaṃ liṅgametaddakṣeśvarābhidam || 134 ||
asya saṃsevanātpuṃsāmaparādhasahasrakam |
kṣamiṣye'haṃ na sandehastasmātpūjyamidaṃ janaiḥ || 135 |
tvaṃ tu liṅgārcanādasmāt sarvamānyo bhaviṣyasi |
parārdhadvitayaprānte tato mokṣamavāpsyasi || 136 ||

ityuktvā devadeveśastasmi~lliṅge layaṃ yayau |
dakṣo'pi gatavān gehaṃ pariprāptamanorathaḥ || 137 |
skanda uvāca -
ityagastya samākhyāto dakṣeśvarasamudbhavaḥ |
yaṃ śrutvā mucyate janturaparādhaśatairapi || 138 ||
śrutvā''khyānamidaṃ puṇyaṃ dakṣeśvarasamudbhavam |
naro na lipyate pāpairaparādhālayo'pi hi || 13 9 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe dakṣeśvaraprādurbhāvo nāmaikonanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 9 |
aparādhālayo 'parādhāśrayaḥ || 13 9 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekonanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 8 9 |

|| atha navatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca -
pārvatīhṛdayānanda pārvatīśasamudbhavam |
kathayeha yaduddiṣṭaṃ bhavatā prāgaghāpaham || 1 |
skanda uvāca -
śṛṇvagaste yadā menā himācalapativratā |
girīndrajāṃ sutāmāha putri te'sya maheśituḥ || 2 ||

mayā śvaśrūgṛhaṃ kānta gamyamadya viniścitam
nāthā'tra naiva vastavyaṃ naya māṃ svaṃ niketanam || 5 ||
girīndrajāgiraṃ śrutvā girīśa iti tattvavit |
hitvā himagiraṃ prāpto nijamānandakānanam || 6 |
prāpyā''nandavanaṃ devī paramānandakāraṇam |
vismṛtya pitṛsaṃvāsaṃ jātā cānandarūpiṇī || 7 |
atha vijñāpayāñcakre gaurī giriśamekadā |
acchinnānandasandohaḥ kutaḥ kṣetre'tra tadvada || 8 ||
iti gaurīritaṃ śrutvā pratyuvāca pinākadhṛk |
pañcakrośaparīmāṇe kṣetre'smin muktisadmani || 9 |
tilāntaraṃ na devyasti vinā liṅgaṃ hi kutracit |
ekaikaṃ parito liṅgaṃ krośaṃ krośaṃ ca yāvaniḥ || 10 ||
anyatrāpi hi sā devi bhavedānandakāraṇam | |
atrā''nandavane devi paramānandajanmani || 11 ||
paramānandarūpāṇi santi liṅgānyanekaśaḥ |
caturdaśasu lokeṣu kṛtino ye vasanti hi || 12 |
tattvavid umā'bhiprāyavit | sarvajña iti vā || 6 |
ekaikamekaikasya liṅgasya || 10 ||

taiḥ svanāmneha liṅgāni kṛtvā''pi kṛtakṛtyatā |
atra yena mahādevi liṅgaṃ saṃsthāpitaṃ mama || 13 ||
vetti tacchreyasaḥ saṃkhyāṃ śeṣo'pi na viśeṣavit || 14 ||
paricchedavyatītasyānandasya parakāraṇam |
atastvidaṃ paraṃ kṣetraṃ liṅgairbhūyobhiradvije || 15 ||
niśamyeti mahādevī punaḥ pādau praṇamya ca |
dehyanujñāṃ mahādeva liṅgasaṃsthāpanāya me || 16 |
patyurājñāṃ samāsādya yacchecchreyaḥ pativratā |
na tasyāḥ śreyaso hāniḥ saṃvarte'pi kadācana || 17 ||
iti prasādya deveśamājñāṃ prāpya maheśituḥ |
liṅgaṃ saṃsthāpitaṃ gauryā mahādevasamīpataḥ || 18 |
talliṅgadarśanātpuṃsāṃ brahmahatyādipātakam |
vilīyeta na sandeho dehabandho'pi no punaḥ || 1 9 ||
āpi prāptā || 13 |
yacched yacchati || 17 |

tatra liṅge varo datto devadevena yaḥ punaḥ |
niśāmaya mune taṃ tu bhaktānāṃ hitakāmyayā || 20 ||
liṅgaṃ yaḥ pārvatīśākhyaṃ kāśyāṃ sampūjayiṣyati |
taddehāvasitiṃ prāpya kāśīliṅgaṃ bhaviṣyati || 21 ||
kāśiliṅgatvamāsādya māmevānu pravekṣyati |
caitraśukla tṛtīyāyāṃ pārvatīśasamarcanāt || 22 ||
iha saubhāgyamāpnoti paratra ca śubhāṃ gatim |
pārvatīśvaramārādhya yoṣidvā puruṣo'pi vā || 23 ||
na garbhamāviśed bhūyo bhavetsaubhāgyabhājanam |
pārvatīśasya liṅgasya nāmā'pi parigṛhṇataḥ || 24 ||
api janmasahasrasya pāpaṃ kṣayati tatkṣaṇāt |
pārvatīśasya māhātmyaṃ yaḥ śroṣyati narottamaḥ ||
aihikāmuṣmikān kāmān sa prāpsyati mahāmatiḥ || 25 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe pārvatīśavarṇanaṃ nāma navatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 0 |
taddehāvasitiṃ yena dehena pūjā kṛtā tasyā'vasānamityarthaḥ || 21 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ navatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 0 |

|| athaikanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca-
pārvatīśasya mahimā kathitaste mayā'nagha |
mune niśāmayedānīṃ gaṅgeśvarasamudbhavam || 1 ||
yaṃ śrutvā yatra kutrāpi gaṅgāsnānaphalaṃ labhet |
cakrapuṣkariṇītīrthaṃ yadā gaṅgā samāgatā || 2 |
tena dailīpinā sārdhamasminnānandakānane |
kṣetraprabhāvamatulaṃ jñātvā śambhuparigrahāt || 3 ||
ekādhike'tha navatitame'dhyāye'tisundare |
gaṅgeśvarasya māhātmyaṃ varṇyate pāpahṛtparam || 1 |
anuvādapūrvakaṃ gaṅgeśotpattiṃ kathayati - pārvatīśasyeti || 1 ||
yatretyasyānantaraṃ tatreti jñātavyam || 2 |
dailīpinā dilīpasya putreṇa bhagīrathena || 3 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 1 | |

smṛtvā liṅgapratiṣṭhāyāḥ kāśyāṃ lokottaraṃ phalam |
gaṅgayā sthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ viśveśātpūrvataḥ śubham || 4 ||
gaṅgeśvarasya liṅgasya kāśyāṃ dṛṣṭiḥ sudurlabhā |
tithau daśaharāyāṃ ca yo gaṅgeśaṃ samarcayet || 5 ||
tasya janmasahasrasya pāpaṃ saṃkṣīyate kṣaṇāt |
kalau gaṅgeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ guptaprāyaṃ bhaviṣyati || 6 |
tasya saṃdarśanaṃ puṃsāṃ jāyate puṇyahetave | |
dṛṣṭaṃ gaṅgeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ yena kāśyāṃ sudurlabham || 7 |
pratyakṣarūpiṇī gaṅgā tena dṛṣṭā na saṃśayaḥ |
kalau sudurlabhā gaṅgā sarvakalmaṣahāriṇī || 8 |
bhaviṣyati na sandeho mitrāvaruṇanandana |
tato'pi tiṣye samprāpte kāśyatyantaṃ sudurlabhā || 9 |
tato'pi durlabhaṃ kāśyāṃ liṅgaṃ gaṅgeśvarābhidham |
yasya sandarśanaṃ puṃsāṃ bhavetpāpakṣayāya vai | 10 |

ekanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 26 9
śrutvā gaṅgeśamāhātmyaṃ na naro nirayī bhavet | |
labhecca puṇyasambhāraṃ cintitaṃ cā'dhigacchati || 11 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe gaṅgeśvaramahimākhyānaṃ nāmaikanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 1 |

|| atha dvinavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca narmadeśasya - māhātmyaṃ kathayāmi mune tava |
yasya smaraṇamātreṇa mahāpātakasaṃkṣayaḥ || 1 |
asya vārāhakalpasya praveśe munipuṅgavaiḥ |

ṛgvedamūrtirgaṅgā syādyamunā ca yajurdhruvam |
narmadā sāmamūrtistu syādatharvā sarasvatī || 6 |
gaṃgā sarvasaridyoniḥ samudrasyā'pi pūraṇī |
gaṅgāyā na labhetsāmyaṃ kācidatra saridvarā || 7 |
kintu pūrvaṃ tapastaptvā revayā bahvanehasam |
varadānonmukho dhātā prārthitaśceti sattama || 8 |
gaṅgāsāmyaṃ vidhe dehi prasanno'si yadi prabho |
brahmaṇā'tha tataḥ proktā narmadā smitapūrvakam || 9 |
yadi tryakṣasamatvaṃ tu labhyate'nyena kenacit |
tadā gaṅgāsamatvaṃ ca labhyate saritā'nyayā || 10 | ||
puruṣottamatulyaḥ syāt puruṣo'nyo yadi kvacit |
srotasvinī tadā sāmyaṃ labhate gaṅgayā parā || 11 ||
yadi gaurīsamā nārī kvacidanyā bhavediha |
anyā dhunīha svardhunyāstadā sāmyamupaiṣyati || 12 |
na labhenna prāpnuyāt | labheta sāmyamiti pāṭhe kākvā na kāciditi
vyākhyeyam || 7 |
bahvanehasaṃ bahukālam || 8 |

yadi kāśīpurītulyā bhavedanyā kvacitpurī |
tadā svargataraṅgiṇyāḥ sāmyamanyā nadī labhet || 13 ||
niśamyeti vidhervākyaṃ narmadā sariduttamā | |
dhāturvaraṃ parityajya prāptā vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 14 |
sarvebhyo'pi hi puṇyebhyaḥ kāśyāṃ liṅgapratiṣṭhiteḥ |
aparā na samuddiṣṭā kaiścicchreyaskarī kriyā || 15 |
atha sā narmadā puṇyā vidhipūrvāṃ pratiṣṭhitim |
vyadhāt pilipilātīrthe triviṣṭapasamīpataḥ || 16 |
tataḥ śambhuḥ prasanno'bhūttasyai nayai śubhātmane |
varaṃ vṛṇīṣva subhage yattubhyaṃ rocate'naghe || 17 |
saridvarā niśamyeti revā prāha maheśvaram |
kiṃ vareṇeha deveśa bhṛśaṃ tucchena dhūrjaṭe || 18 ||
nirdvandvā tvatpadadvandve bhaktirastu maheśvara | |
śrutveti nitarāṃ tuṣṭo revāgiramanuttamām || 1 9 ||
provāca ca saricchreṣṭhe tvayoktaṃ yattathā'stu tat |
gṛhāṇa puṇyanilaye vitarāmi varāntaram || 20 |
triviṣṭapasamīpataḥ trilocanasamīpataḥ || 16 |

yāvantyo dṛṣadaḥ santi tava rodhasi narmade |
tāvantyo liṅgarūpiṇyo bhaviṣyanti varānmama || 21 ||
anyaṃ ca te varaṃ dadyāṃ tamapyākarṇayottamam |
duṣprāpaṃ yacca tapasāṃ rāśibhiḥ paramārthataḥ || 22 ||
sadyaḥ pāpaharā gaṅgā saptāhena kalindajā |
tryahāt sarasvatī reve tvaṃ tu darśanamātrataḥ || 23 ||
aparaṃ ca varaṃ dadyāṃ narmade : darśanā'ghahe |
bhavatyā sthāpitaṃ liṅgaṃ narmadeśvarasaṃjñakam || 24 ||
yattalliṅgaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ muktiṃ dāsyati śāśvatīm |
asya liṅgasya ye bhaktāstān dṛṣṭvā sūryanandanaḥ || 25 ||
praṇamiṣyati yatnena mahāśreyo'bhivṛddhaye |
santi liṅgānyanekāni kāśyāṃ devi pade pade || 26 ||
paraṃ hi narmadeśasya mahimā ko'pi cādbhutaḥ |
ityuktvā devadeveśastasmi~lliṅge layaṃ yayau || 27 ||
sūryanandano yamaḥ || 25 |
kañcukaṃ nirmokam || 30 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ dvinavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 2 |

narmadā'pi prahṛṣṭā''sīt pāvitryaṃ prāpya cā'dbhutam |
svadeśaṃ ca pariprāptā dṛṣṭamātrā'ghahāriṇī || 28 || |
vākyaṃ mṛkaṇḍajamuneste'pi śrutvā munīśvarāḥ |
prahṛṣṭacetaso jātāścakruḥ svaṃ svaṃ tato hitam || 2 9 |
skanda uvāca narmadeśasya - māhātmyaṃ śrutvā bhaktiyuto naraḥ |
pāpakañcukamutsṛjya prāpsyati jñānamuttamam || 30 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe narmadeśvarākhyānaṃ nāma dvinavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 2 ||

|| atha trinavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca- narmadeśasya
māhātmyaṃ śrutaṃ kalmaṣanāśanam |
idānīṃ kathaya skanda satīśvarasamudbhavam || 1 ||
skanda uvāca-
mitrāvaruṇasambhūta kathayāmi kathāṃ śṛṇu |
yathā satīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kāśyāmāvirbabhūva ha || 2 |
purā tatāpa suhattapaḥ śatadhṛtirmune |
tapasā tena deveśaḥ santuṣṭo varado'bhavat 3 |
uvāca cā'pi brahmāṇaṃ nitarāṃ brāhmaṇapriyaḥ |
sarvajñanātho lokātmā varaṃ varaya lokakṛt || 4 |
brahmovāca-
yadi prasanno deveśa varaṃ dāsyasi vāñchitam |
tadā tvaṃ me bhava suto devī dakṣasutā'stu ca || 5 |
trinavatitame'dhyāye mahāpuṇyaikaśevadhau | |
satīśvarasamutpattirvarṇyate'tiśubhāśrayā ||1 ||
anuvādapūrvakaṃ satīśvarotpattiṃ pṛcchati - narmadeśasyeti || 1 |
śatadhṛtiḥ brahmā || 3 |
he lokakṛt || 4 |

iti śrutvā mahādevaḥ sarvado brahmaṇo varam | |
smitvā devīmukhaṃ vīkṣya provāca caturānanam || 6 |
brahmaṃstvadvāñchitaṃ bhūyāt kimadeyaṃ pitāmaha |
ityuktvā brahmaṇo bhālādāvirāsīcchaśāṅkabhṛt || 7 |
rudan sa uttānaśayo brahmaṇo mukhamaikṣata |
tato brahmā'pi taṃ bālaṃ rudantaṃ pravilokya ca || 8 ||
kiṃ māṃ janakamāpyā'pi tvaṃ rodiṣi muhurmuhuḥ |
śrutveti pṛthukaḥ prāha yathoktaṃ parameṣṭhinā || 9 |
nāmne rodimi me sraṣṭarnāma dehi pitāmaha |
rodanādrudra ityākhyāṃ sa māyāḍimbhako labhat || 10 |
agastya uvāca-
arbhakatvaṃ gato'pīśaḥ kiṃ ruroda ṣaḍānana |
yadi vetsi tadā''cakṣva mahatkautūhalaṃ hi me 11 |
devī cicchaktirmahāmāyeti yāvat | tasyā mukham || 6 |
uttānaśayaḥ śiśuḥ || 8 |
pṛthuko bālakaḥ || 9 |

skanda uvāca-
sarvajñasya kumāratvāt kiñcit kiñcidavaimyaham |
rodane kāraṇaṃ vacmi śṛṇu kumbhasamudbhava || 12 ||
manasīti vicāro'bhūddevasya paramātmanaḥ |
buddhivaibhavamasyā'ho vīkṣituṃ vīkṣituṃ parameṣṭhinaḥ || 13 ||
satyalokādhināthasya caturāsyasya vedhasaḥ |
ityānandāt samadbhūto vāṣpapūro maheśituḥ || 14 ||
agastya uvāca-
kiṃ buddhivaibhavaṃ dhātuḥ śambhunā manasīkṣitam |
yenā''nandāśrusambhāro bālye'pyabhavadīśituḥ || 15 ||
etatkathaya me prājña sarvajñā''nandavardhana |
śrutvā'gastyuditaṃ vākyaṃ tārakāriruvāca ha || 16 |
devena manasi dhyātamiti kumbhajane mune | |
vinā'patyaṃ janetāraṃ ka uddhartumiha prabhuḥ || 17 |

eko manorathaścā'yaṃ dvitīyo'yaṃ suniścitam |
apatyatvaṃ gate cā'smin smarturutpattihāriṇi || 18 ||
kṣaṇaṃ kṣaṇaṃ samālokyamaṅgasparśekṣaṇaṃ kṣaṇam |
ekaśayyāsanāhāraṃ lapsye'nena kṣaṇe kṣaṇe || 1 9 |
yo'yaṃ na gocaraḥ kvā'pi vāṇīmanasayorapi |
sa me'patyatvamāsādya kiṃ na dāsyati cintitam || 20 ||
yo'muṃ sakṛt spṛśejjanturyo'muṃ paśyet sakṛnmudā |
na sa bhūyo'bhijāyeta bhaveccānandameduraḥ || 21 |
gṛhakrīḍanakaṃ me'sau yadi bhūyāt kathañcana |
tadā parasya saukhyasya nidhānaṃ syāmasaṃśayam || 22 |
vidheḥ samīhitaṃ ceti nūnaṃ jñātvā sa sarvavit |
ānandavāṣpakalitaṃ cakṣustrayamadīdharat || 23 ||
samālokyaṃ samyag darśanam | lapsye prāpsye ityagrimeṇā'nvayaḥ | ekaśayyāsanāhāraṃ

śrutvetyagastiḥ skandasya bhāṣitaṃ paryamūmudat |
nanāma cāṅghrī provāca jaya sarvajñanandana || 24 ||
vidherapi manojñātaṃ śambhorapi manogatam |
samyak cittaṃ tvayā jñātaṃ namastubhyaṃ cidātmane || 25 ||
skando'pi nitarāṃ tuṣṭaḥ śroturānandadarśanāt |
dhanyo'syagastya dhanyo'si śrotuṃ jānāsi tattvataḥ || 26 ||
na me śramo vṛthā jāto bruvataste puraḥ kathām |
ityagastiṃ samābhāṣya punaḥ prāha ṣaḍānanaḥ || 27 ||
deve rudratvamāpanne devī dakṣasutā'bhavat |
sā'pi taptvā tapastīvraṃ satī kāśyāṃ varārthinī || 28 ||
dadarśa liṅgarūpeṇa prādurbhūtaṃ haraṃ puraḥ |
alaṃ taptvā mahādevi proktavantamiti sphuṭam || 2 9 ||
cidātmane jñānarūpāya || 25 |
skando'pi śroturānandadarśanāddhanya ityādinā'gasti ṛṣiṃ samābhāṣya punaḥ prāheti

idaṃ satīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tava nāmnā bhaviṣyati |
yathā manorathaste'tra phalito dakṣakanyake || 30 |
tathaitalliṅgamārādhyānyasyā'pi hi phaliṣyati |
kumārī . prāpsyati patiṃ manaso'pi samucchritam || 31 ||
etalliṅgaṃ samārādhya kumāro'pi varāṅganām |
yasya yasya hi yaḥ kāmastasya tasya hi sa dhruvam || 32 |
bhaviṣyati na sandehaḥ satīśvarasamarcanāt |
satīśvaraṃ samabhyarcya yo yo yaṃ yaṃ samīhate || 33 |
tasya tasya sa sa kṣipraṃ bhaviṣyati manorathaḥ |
ito'ṣṭame ca divase tvajjanetā prajāpatiḥ || 34 |
mahyaṃ dāsyati kanyāṃ tvāṃ saphalaste manorathaḥ |
ityuktvā devadeveśastatraivāntarhito'bhavat || 35 |
sā'pi svabhavanaṃ yātā satī dākṣāyaṇī mudā |
pitā'pi tasmai prādāttāṃ rudrāya divase'ṣṭame || 36 |
manaso'pi samucchritaṃ yādṛk patiḥ manasā vāñchyate , tato'pyutkṛṣṭamityarthaḥ || 31 |
tvajjanetā tava pitā || 34 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ trinavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 3 |
aura yaha liṃga tumhāre nāmānusāra satīśvara saṃjñaka hovegā | ayi dakṣasute !

skanda uvāca -
itthaṃ satīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kāśyāṃ prādurabhūnmune |
smaraṇādapi liṅgaṃ ca dadyāt sattvaguṇaṃ param || 37 |
ratneśātpūrvato bhāge dṛṣṭvā liṅgaṃ satīśvaram | |
mucyate pātakaiḥ sadyaḥ kramājjñānaṃ ca vindati || 38 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe satīśvaraprādurbhāvo nāma trinavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 3 ||
skanda bole-

phoṭa
|| atha caturnavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
skanda uvāca -
anyānyapi ca liṅgāni kathayāmi mahāmune |
amṛteśamukhādīni yannāmā'pyamṛtapradam || 1 |
purā sanārunāmā''sīnmuniratra gṛhāśramī |
brahmayajñarato nityaṃ nityaṃ cā'tithidaivataḥ || 2 |
liṅgapūjārato nityaṃ nityaṃ tīrthā'pratigrahī |
tasyarṣerabhavatputraḥ sanārorupajaṃghaniḥ || 3 ||
sa kadācid gato'raṇyaṃ tatra daṣṭaḥ pṛdākunā |
atha tatsavayobhiśca sa ānītaḥ svamāśramam || 4 ||
sanāruṇā samucchvasya nītaḥ sa upajaṃghaniḥ |
mahāśmaśāna bhūbhāgaṃ svargadvārasamīpataḥ || 5 ||
amṛtaḥ karuṇeśaśca jyotīrūpeśvarastathā |
varṇyante'tra navatyākhye caturbhiradhike śubhe || 1 |
amṛteśādīni liṅgāni kathayati - anyānīti | amṛtapradaṃ mokṣapradam || 1 |
atra kāśyām || 2 |

tatrā''sīcchrīphalākāraṃ liṅgamekaṃ suguptavat |
nidhāya tatra taṃ yāvacchvaṃ sañcintayetsudhīḥ || 6 ||
sarpadaṣṭasya saṃskāraḥ kathaṃ bhavati ceti vai |
tāvat sa jīvannuttasthau suptavaccopajaṃghaniḥ || 7 |
atha taṃ vīkṣya sa muniḥ sanārurupajaṃghanim |
punaḥ prāṇitasampannaṃ vismayaṃ prāptavān param || 8 ||

ānināya ca tatraiva so'pyanannirgatastataḥ |
atha vijñāya sa munistattvaṃ jīvitasūcitam || 11 ||
mṛduhastatalenaiva yāvat khanati vai muniḥ |
tāvacchrīphalamātraṃ hi liṅga tena samīkṣitam || 12 ||
sanāruṇā'tha talliṅgaṃ tena tatra samarcitam |
cirakālīnaliṅgasya kṛtaṃ nāmā'pi sānyayam || 13 ||
amṛteśvaranāmedaṃ liṅgamānandakānane
etalliṅgasya saṃsparśādamṛtatvaṃ labhed dhruvam || 14 ||
amṛteśaṃ samabhyarcya jīvatputraḥ sa vai muniḥ |
svāspadaṃ samanuprāpto dṛṣṭa dṛṣṭa āścaryavajjanaiḥ || 15 ||
tadā prabhṛti talliṅgamamṛteśaṃ munīśvara |
kāśyāṃ siddhipradaṃ nṛṇāṃ kalau guptaṃ bhavetpunaḥ || 16 ||
amṛteśvarasaṃsparśānmṛtā jīvanti tatkṣaṇāt |
amṛtatvaṃ bhajante'tra jīvantaḥ sparśamātrataḥ || 17 |

amṛteśasamaṃ liṅgaṃ nāsti kvāpi mahītale |
talliṅgaṃ śambhunā tiṣye kṛtaṃ guptaṃ prayatnataḥ || 18 ||
amṛteśvaranāmā'pi ye kāśyāṃ parigṛhṇate |
na teṣāmupasargotthaṃ bhayaṃ kvāpi bhaviṣyati || 1 9 ||
mune'nyacca mahāliṅgaṃ karuṇeśvarasaṃjñitam |
mokṣadvārasamīpe tu mokṣadvāreśvarāgrataḥ || 20 ||
darśanāttasya liṅgasya mahākāruṇikasya vai |
na kṣetrānnirgamo jātu bahirbhavati kasyacit || 21 ||
snātavyaṃ maṇikartyāṃ ca draṣṭavyaḥ karuṇeśvaraḥ |
kṣetropasargajā bhītirhātavyā parayā mudā ||| 22 |
somavāsaramāsādya ekabhaktavrataṃ caret |
yaṣṭavyaḥ karuṇāpuṣpairvratinā karuṇeśvaraḥ || 23 |
tena vratena santuṣṭaḥ karuṇeśaḥ kadācana |
na taṃ kṣetrād bahiḥ kuryāttasmātkāryaṃ vrataṃ tvidam || 24 ||
upasargotthaṃ grahādipīḍotthaṃ vighnotthamiti vā ||| 1 9 |
karuṇāpuṣyaiḥ prasiddhaiḥ || 23 |

tatpatraistatphalairvā'pi sampūjyaḥ karuṇeśvaraḥ |
yo na jānāti talliṅgaṃ samyag jñānavivarjitaḥ || 25 ||
tenā'rcyaḥ karuṇāvṛkṣo deveśaḥ prīyatāmiti |
yo varṣaṃ somavārasya vrataṃ kuryāditi dvijaḥ || 26 ||
prasannaḥ karuṇeśo'tra tasya dāsyati vāñchitam |
draṣṭavyaḥ karuṇeśo'tra kāśyāṃ yatnena mānavaiḥ || 27 |
iti te karuṇeśasya mahimokto mahattaraḥ |
yaṃ śrutvā nopasargotthaṃ bhayaṃ kāśyāṃ bhaviṣyati || 28 ||
mokṣadvāreśvaraṃ caiva svargadvāreśvaraṃ . tathā |
ubhau kāśyāṃ naro dṛṣṭvā svargaṃ mokṣaṃ ca vindati || 2 9 |
jyotīrūpeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kāśyāmanyatprakāśate |
tasya sampūjanād bhaktā jyotīrūpā bhavanti hi || 30 ||
cakrapuṣkariṇītīre jyotīrūpeśvaraṃ param |
samabhyarcyā''pnuyānmartyo jyotīrūpaṃ na saṃśayaḥ || 31 |
tatpatraistatphalairityatra tacchabdaḥ karuṇāvṛkṣaparaḥ || 25 |

yadā bhāgīrathī gaṅgā tatra prāptā saridvarā |
tadārabhyā'rcayennityaṃ talliṅgaṃ svardhunī mudā || 32 |
purā viṣṇau tapatyatra talliṅgaṃ svayameva hi |
-tatrā''virāsīttejasvī tena kṣetramidaṃ śubham || 33 ||
cakrapuṣkariṇītīre jyotīrūpeśvaraṃ tadā |
dūrastho'pīha yo dhyāyettasya siddhiradūrataḥ || 34 ||
eteṣvapi ca liṅgeṣu caturdaśasu sattama |
liṅgāṣṭakaṃ mahāvīryaṃ karmabījadavānalam || 35 ||
oṅkārādīni liṅgāni yānyuktāni caturdaśa |
tathā dakṣeśvarādīni liṅgānyaṣṭau mahānti ca || 36 ||
śaileśādīni liṅgāni tathā yāni caturdaśa |
punaḥ ṣaṭtriṃśadetāni kṣetrasaṃsiddhihetave || 37 ||
eteṣu amṛteśādiṣu liṅgāṣṭakamamṛteśa - tārakeśa - jñāneśa - karuṇeśa - mokṣadvāreśa - svargadvāreśa-
brahmeśa - lāṅgalīśānāmaṣṭakam || 35 ||

ṣaṭtriṃśattattvarūpo'sau liṅgeṣyeṣu sadāśivaḥ |
asmin kṣetre vasannityaṃ tārakaṃ jñānamādiśet || 38 |
kṣetrasya tattvametaddhi ṣaṭtriṃśalliṅgarūpyaho | |
eteṣāṃ bhajanātpuṃsāṃ na bhaveddurgatiḥ kvacit || 3 9 |
mune rahasyabhūtāni liṅgānyetāni niścitam |
etalliṅgaprabhāvācca muktiratra suniścitā || 40 |
mokṣakṣetramidaṃ kāśī liṅgairetairmahāmate |
etānyanyāni siddhāni sambhavanti yuge yuge || 41 |
ānandakānanaṃ śambhoḥ kṣetrametadanādimat |
atra saṃsthitimāpannā muktā eva na saṃśayaḥ || 42 ||

caturnavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 28 9
yogasiddhirihā'styeva tapaḥ siddhirihaiva hi |
vratasiddhirmantrasiddhistīrthasiddhiḥ suniścitam || 43 ||
siddhyaṣṭakaṃ tu yavyoktamaṇimādimahattaram |
tajjanmabhūmireṣaiva śambhorānandavāṭikā || 44 ||
nirvāṇalakṣmyāḥ sadanametadānandakānanam |
etatprāpya na moktavyaṃ puṇyaiḥ saṃsārabhīruṇā || 45 ||
ayameva mahālābha idameva paraṃ tapaḥ |
etadeva mahatpuṇyaṃ labdhā vārāṇasīha yat || 46 ||
avaśyaṃ janmino mṛtyuryatra kutra bhaviṣyati |
karmānusāriṇī labhyā gatiḥ paścācchubhāśubhā || 47 ||
mṛtyuṃ vijñāya niyataṃ gatiṃ karmānusāriṇīm | |
avaśyaṃ kāśikā sevyā sarvakarmanivāriṇī || 48 ||
mānuṣyaṃ prāpya ye mūḍhā nimeṣamitajīvitam | |
na sevante purīṃ kāśīṃ te muṣṭā mandabuddhayaḥ || 4 9 ||
muṣṭā vañcitā daiveneti śeṣaḥ | mūḍhā iti pāṭhe avivekinaḥ | tatra heturmanda-
buddhaya iti || 4 9 |

durlabhaṃ janma mānuṣyaṃ durlabhā kāśikā purī |
ubhayoḥ saṅgamāsādya muktā eva na saṃśayaḥ || 50 |
kva ca tādṛk tapāṃsīha kva tādṛg yoga uttamaḥ |
yādṛgbhiḥ prāpyate muktiḥ kāśyāṃ mokṣottamottamaḥ || 51 |
satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ satyapūrvaṃ punaḥ punaḥ |
na kāśīsadṛśī muktyai bhūmiranyā mahītale || 52 ||
viśveśo muktido nityaṃ muktyai cottaravāhinī |
ānandakānane muktirmuktirnā'nyatra kutracit || 53 |
eka eva hi viśveśo muktido nā'nya eva hi |
sa eva kāśīṃ prāpayya muktiṃ yacchati nā'nyataḥ || 54 ||
sāyujyamuktiratraiva sānnidhyādirathā'nyataḥ |
sulabhā sā'pi no nūnaṃ kāśyāṃ mokṣo'sti helayā || 55 |

skanda uvāca-
śṛṇvagastya mahābhāga bhaviṣyaṃ kathayāmyaham |
kṛṣṇadvaipāyano byāso'kathayadyanmahadvacaḥ ||
niściketumanāḥ paścādyatkariṣyati tacchṛṇu || 56 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe amṛteśādiliṅgaprādurbhāvo nāma caturnavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 4 |
akathayat kathayāmāsa yanmahadvacaḥ | śroṣyatyetanmahadvaca iti kvacit | tatra eka
eva hi viśveśo muktido nānya eva hi ityetacchabdena gṛhyate || 56 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ caturnavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 4 |

|| atha pañcanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
vyāsa uvāca-
śṛṇu sūta mahābuddhe tathā skandena bhāṣitam |
bhaviṣyaṃ mama tasyā'gre kumbhayone mahāmate || 1 |
skanda uvāca-
niśāmaya mahābhāga tvaṃ maitrāvaruṇe mune |
pārāśaryo munivaro yathā mohamupaiṣyati || 2 |
vyasya vedān mahābuddhirnānāśākhāprabhedataḥ |
aṣṭādaśapurāṇāni sūtādīn paripāṭhya ca || 3 |
śrutismṛtipurāṇānāṃ rahasyaṃ yastvacīkarat |
mahābhāratasaṃjñaṃ ca sarvalokamanoharam || 4 |
sarvapāpapraśamanaṃ sarvaśāntikaraṃ param |
yasya śravaṇamātreṇa brahmahatyā vinaśyati || 5 | ||
pañcādhike tathā'dhyāye navatyākhya uśattame |
śrīmadvyāsabhujastambho varṇyate saṃśayāpahaḥ || 1 |
svasyāgāmivṛttaṃ kathayati - śṛṇu sūteti | || 1 |

ekadā . sa muniḥ śrīmān paryaṭan pṛthivītale |
samprāpto naimiṣāraṇyaṃ yatra santi munīśvarāḥ || 6 |
aṣṭāśītisahasrāṇi śaunakadyāstapodhanāḥ |
tripuṇḍritamahābhālā lasadrudrākṣamālinaḥ || 7 |
vibhūtidhāriṇo bhaktyā rudrasūktajapapriyān |
liṅgārādhanasaṃsaktān śivanāmakṛtādarān || 8 |
eka eva hi viśveśo muktido nā'nya eva hi |
iti bruvāṇān satataṃ pariniścitamānasān || 9 ||
vilokya sa munirvyāsastān sarvān giriśātmanaḥ |
utkṣipya tarjanīmuccaiḥ provācedaṃ vacaḥ punaḥ || 10 |
parinirmathya vāgjālaṃ suniścityā'sakṛdbahu |
idamekaṃ parijñātaṃ sevyaḥ sarveśvaro hariḥ || 11 ||
naimiṣāraṇyaṃ viśinaṣṭi - yatra santīti | pādādhikenaikena || 6 |
vibhūtidhāriṇa ityādīnāṃ dvitīyāntānāṃ padānāṃ vilokya sa iti tṛtīye-

vede rāmāyaṇe caiva caiva purāṇeṣu ca bhārate |
ādimadhyāvasāneṣu harireko'tra nā'paraḥ || 12 |
satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ trisatyaṃ na mṛṣā punaḥ |
na vedādaparaṃ śāstraṃ na devā'cyutataḥ paraḥ || 13 |
lakṣmīśaḥ sarvado nā'nyo lakṣmīśo'pyapavargadaḥ |
eka eva hi lakṣmīśastato dhyeyo na cā'paraḥ || 14 |
bhuktermukterihānyatra nā'nyo dātā janārdanāt |
tasmāccaturbhujo nityaṃ sevanīyaḥ sukhepsubhiḥ || 15 |
vihāya keśavādanyaṃ ye sevante'lpamedhasaḥ |
saṃsāracakre gahane te viśanti punaḥ punaḥ || 16 |
eka eva hi sarveśo hṛṣīkeśaḥ parātparaḥ |
taṃ sevamānaḥ satataṃ sevyastrijagatāṃ bhavet || 17 ||
tadeva ca vacanamāha - na vedādityādi || 13 |
api eva || 14 |
vipakṣe bādhakamāha - vihāyeti || 16 |

- pañcanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 2 9 5
eko dharmaprado viṣṇustveko bahvarthado hariḥ |
ekaḥ kāmapradaścakro tveko mokṣaprado'cyutaḥ || 18 |
śārṅgiṇaṃ ye parityajya devamanyamupāsate |
te sadbhiśca bahiṣkāryā vedahīnā yathā dvijāḥ || 1 9 |
śrutveti vākyaṃ vyāsasya naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ |
pravepamānahṛdayāḥ pariprocuridaṃ vacaḥ || 20 ||
ṛṣaya ūcuḥ
pārāśarya mune mānyastvamasmākaṃ mahāmate |
yato vedāstvayā vyastāḥ purāṇānyapi vetsi yat || 21 ||
yataśca kartā tvamasi mahato bhāratasya vai |
dharmārthakāmamokṣāṇāṃ viniścayakṛto dhruvam || 22 ||
tattvajñaḥ ko'paraścātra tvattaḥ satyavatīsuta |
bhavatā yatpratijñātaṃ niścityotkṣipya tarjanīm || 23 ||
viṣṇuṃ vihāyā'nyaṃ sevamānānāṃ na kevalaṃ saṃsārapraveśamātramapi tu mahatī nindā
cetyāha - śārṅgiṇamiti || 1 9 |

asmin māṇavakāstatra pariśraddadhate na hi |
pratijñātasya vacasastava śraddhā bhavettadā || 24 ||
yadā''nandavane śambhoḥ pratijānāsi vai vacaḥ || 25 ||
gaccha vārāṇasīṃ vyāsa yatra viśveśvaraḥ svayam |
na tatra yugadharmo'sti na ca lagnā vasundharā || 26 |
iti śrutvā munirvyāsaḥ kiñcit kupitavahṛdi |
jagāma tūrṇaṃ sahitaḥ svaśiṣyairayutonmitaiḥ || 27 ||
prāpya vārāṇasīṃ vyāsaḥ snātvā pañcanade hade |
śrīmanmādhavamabhyarcya yayau pādodakaṃ tataḥ || 28 ||
tatra snānādikaṃ kṛtvā dṛṣṭvā caivādikeśavam |
pañcarātraṃ tataḥ kṛtvā vaiṣṇavairabhinanditaḥ || 2 9 ||
māṇavakā bālakāḥ || 24 |

agrataḥ pṛṣṭhataḥ śaṃkhairvādyamānaiḥ pramoditaḥ |
jaya viṣṇo hṛṣīkeśa govinda madhusūdana | 30 |
acyutā'nanta vaikuṇṭha mādhavopendra keśava |
trivikrama gadāpāṇe śārṅgapāṇe janārdana || 31 ||
śrīvatsavakṣaḥ śrīkānta pītāmbara murāntaka |
kaiṭabhāre balidhvaṃsin kaṃsāre keśisūdana || 32 ||
nārāyaṇā'suraripo kṛṣṇa śaure caturbhuja |
devakīhṛdayānanda yaśodānandavardhana || 33 ||
puṇḍarīkākṣa daityāre dāmodara balapriya |
balarātistuta hare vāsudeva vasuprada || 34 ||
viṣvakcamūstārkṣyaratha vanamālinnarottama |
adhokṣaja kṣamādhāra padmanābha jaleśaya || 35 ||
nṛsiṃha yajñavārāha gopagopālavallabha |
gopīpate guṇātīta garuḍadhvaja gotrabhṛt || 36 |
jaya viṣṇo ityādīnāṃ ityādināmamālābhiḥ saṃstuvan vyāso viśveśavanaṃ samāyāta

jaya cāṇūramathana jaya trailokyarakṣaṇa |
jayā'nādya jayānanda jaya nīlotpaladyute || 37 ||
kaustubhodbhūṣitoraska pūtanādhātuśoṣaṇa |
rakṣa rakṣa jagadrakṣāmaṇe narakahāraka ||| 38 |
sahasraśīrṣapuruṣa puruhūta sukhaprada |
yadbhūtaṃ yacca bhāvyaṃ vai tatraikaḥ puruṣo bhavān || 3 9 |
ityādināmamālābhiḥ saṃstuvan vanamālinam |
svacchandalīlayā gāyannṛtyaṃśca parayā mudā || 40 ||
vyāso viśveśabhavanaṃ samāyātaḥ sahṛṣṭavat |
jñānavāpīpurobhāge mahābhāgavataiḥ saha ||| 41 |
virājamānasatkaṇṭhastulasīvaradāmabhiḥ
svayaṃ tāladharo jātaḥ svayaṃ jātaḥ sunartakaḥ || 42 |
veṇuvādanatattvajñaḥ svayaṃ śrutidharo'bhavat |
nṛtyaṃ parisamāpyetthaṃ vyāsaḥ satyavatīsutaḥ || 43 ||
punarūrdhvaṃ bhujaṃ kṛtvā dakṣiṇaṃ śiṣyamadhyagaḥ |
punaḥ papāṭha tāneva ślokān gāyannivoccakaiḥ || 44 |
ādau bhava ādyaḥ , na ādyaḥ anādyaḥ , tatsambodhanamanādya | anagheti
kvacit || 37 |
gotrabhṛt ! cāṇūramardana ! ādyantarahita ! trailokyarakṣaṇa ! ānandasvarūpa ! nīlotpaladyute !

parinirmathya vāgjālaṃ suniścityāsakṛdbahu |
idamekaṃ parijñātaṃ sevyaḥ sarveśvaro hariḥ || 45 ||
ityādiślokasaṃghātaṃ svapratijñāprabodhakam |
yāvatpaṭhati sa vyāsaḥ savyamutkṣipya vai bhujam || 46 ||
tastambha tāvattad bāhuṃ sa śailādiḥ svalīlayā |
vākastambhaścāpi tasyāsīnmunervyāsasya sanmune || 47 ||
tato guptaṃ samāgamya viṣṇurvyāsamabhāṣata |
aparāddhaṃ mahaccātra bhavatā vyāsa niścitam || 48 ||
tavaitadaparādhena bhītirme'pi mahattarā |
eka eva hi viśveśo dvitīyo nāsti kaścana || 4 9 ||
tatprasādādahaṃ cakrī lakṣmīśastaṭhābhāvataḥ |
trailokyarakṣāsāmarthyaṃ dattaṃ tenaiva śambhunā || 50 ||
tadbhaktyā paramaiśvaryaṃ mayā labdhaṃ varāttataḥ |
idānīṃ stuhi taṃ śambhuṃ yadi me śubhamicchasi || 51 |
tatprasiddhaṃ paramaiśvaryaṃ ca dattam | labdhaṃ varāttata iti | varācchreṣṭhā-
ttasmātparamaiśvaryaṃ labdhamityarthaḥ || 51 |

anyadāpi na vai kāryā bhavatā śemuṣīdṛśī | |
pārāśarya iti śrutvā saṃjñayā vyājahāra ha || 52 |
bhujastambhaḥ kṛtastena nandinā dṛṣṭimātrataḥ |
bākūstambhastadbhayājjātaḥ spṛśa me kaṇṭhakandalīm || 53 ||
yathā stotuṃ bhavānīśaṃ prabhavāmi bhavāntakam |
saṃspṛśya viṣṇustatkaṇṭhaṃ viṣṇustatkaṇṭhaṃ guptameva jagāma ha || 54 ||
tataḥ satyavatīsūnustathā stambhitadorlataḥ |
prārabdhavān maheśānaṃ pariṣṭotumudāradhīḥ || 55 ||
vyāsa uvāca-
eko rudro na dvitīyo yatastadbrahmaivaikaṃ neha nānā'sti kiñcit |
yadyapyanyaḥ ko'pi vā kutracidvā vyācaṣṭāṃ tadyasya śaktirmadagre || 56 |

yaḥ kṣīrābdhermandarāghātajāto jyālāmālī kālakūṭo'tibhīmaḥ |
taṃ soḍhuṃ vā ko'paro'bhūnmaheśādyatkīlābhiḥ kṛṣṇatāmāpa viṣṇuḥ || 57 ||
yadbāṇo'bhūcchrīpatiryasya yantā lokeśo yatsyandanaṃ bhūḥ samastā |
vāhā vedā yasya yeneṣupātād dagdhā grāmāstraipurāstatsamaḥ kaḥ || 58 |
aśubhadrāvako rudro yajñahā ca punarvadan |
tataḥ smṛtamatho rudraśabdenā'tra vidhīyate || iti |
rutāni bhūtāni tvante dravati drāvayatīti vā rudraḥ 1 rutyā vedarūpayā dharmādīn
bodhayati drāvayatīti vā rudraḥ | rutyā praṇavarūpayā svātmānaṃ prāpayatīti vā rudraḥ |
rorūyamāṇo dravati praviśati martyāniti vā rudraḥ | " tridhā baddho vṛṣabho roravīti
stasyā : drāvayitā bhaktebhya iti vā rudraḥ | rutiṃ śabdaṃ vedātmānaṃ kalpādau brahmaṇe dadātīti

yaṃ kandarpo vīkṣamāṇaḥ samānaṃ devairanyairbhasmajātaḥ svayaṃ hi |

itthaṃ yāvat stauti śambhuṃ maharṣistāvantrandī śāmbhavāddṛkprasādāt |
taddoḥ stambhaṃ tyaktavāṃśca babhāṣe smāyaṃ smāyaṃ brāhmaṇebhyo namo vaḥ || 64 |
nandikeśvara uvāca-
idaṃ stavaṃ mahāpuṇyaṃ vyāsa te parikīrtitam |
yaḥ paṭhiṣyati medhāvī tasya tuṣyati śaṅkaraḥ || 65 ||
vyāsā'ṣṭakamidaṃ prātaḥ paṭhitavyaṃ prayatnataḥ |
duḥsvapnapāpaśamanaṃ śivasānnidhyakārakam || 66 ||
mātṛhā pitṛhā vā'pi goghno bālaghna eva vā |
surāpī svarṇahṛd vā'pi niṣpāpo'syāḥ stuterjapāt || 67 ||
skanda uvāca—
pārāśaryastadārabhya śambhubhaktiparo'bhavat |
liṅgaṃ vyāseśvaraṃ sthāpya ghaṇṭākarṇahṛdāgrataḥ || 68 |
vibhūtibhūṣaṇo nityaṃ nityaṃ rudrākṣabhūṣaṇaḥ |
rudrasūktaparo nityaṃ nityaṃ liṅgārcako'bhavat || 6 9 |
smāyaṃ smāyaṃ smitvā smitvā punaḥ punarīṣaddhāsyaṃ vidhāyeti yāvat || 64 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ pañcanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 5 |

sakṛttvā kṣetrasaṃnyāsaṃ tyajennādyā'pi kāśikām |
tattvaṃ kṣetrasya vijñāya nirvāṇapadadāyinaḥ || 70 || |
ghaṇṭākarṇahṛde snātvā dṛṣṭvā vyāseśvaraṃ naraḥ |
yatra kutra mṛto vā'pi vārāṇasyāṃ mṛto bhavet || 71 ||
kāśyāṃ vyāseśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ pūjayitvā narottamaḥ |
na jñānād bhraśyate kvāpi pātakairnā'bhibhūyate || 72 ||
vyāseśvarasya ye bhaktā na teṣāṃ kalikālataḥ |
na pāpato bhayaṃ kvāpi na ca kṣetropasargataḥ || 73 |
vyāseśvaraḥ prayatnena draṣṭavyaḥ kāśivāsibhiḥ |
ghaṇṭākarṇakṛtasnānaiḥ kṣetrapātakabhīrubhiḥ || 74 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe vyāsabhujastambho nāma pañcanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 5 ||

|| atha ṣaṇṇavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-
kṛṣṇadvaipāyanaḥ skanda śambhubhaktiparo yadi |
yadi kṣetrarahasyajñaḥ kṣetrasaṃnyāsakṛdyadi || 1 |
tathā dṛṣṭaprabhāvaścettathā cejjñānināṃ varaḥ |
purīṃ vārāṇasīṃ śreṣṭhāṃ kathaṃ kila śapiṣyati || 2 ||
skanda uvāca -
satyametattvayā'pṛcchi kathayāmi mune śṛṇu | miṭa
tasya vyāsasya caritaṃ bhaviṣyaṃ tvayi pṛcchati || 3 ||
yadārabhya munestasya nandī stambhitavān bhujam |
tadārabhya maheśānaṃ maheśānaṃ saṃstauti paramādṛtaḥ || 4 |
adhyāye ṣaḍbhiradhike navatyākhye manohare |
vyāsaśāpavimokṣaśca varṇyate'tikutūhalaḥ || 1 |
kāśīṃ vyāsaḥ śapsyatīti pūrvameva jānannākṣipati - kṛṣṇadvaipāyana iti || 1 |

kāśyāṃ tīrthānyanekāni kāśyāṃ liṅgānyanekaśaḥ |
tathāpi sevyo viśveśaḥ snātavyā maṇikarṇikā || 5 |
liṅgeṣveko hi viśveśastīrtheṣu maṇikarṇikā |
iti saṃvyāharan vyāsaḥ tadvayaṃ bahu manyate || 6 |
tyaktvā sa bahubāgjālaṃ prātaḥ snātvā dine dine |
nirvāṇamaṇḍape vakti mahimānaṃ maheśituḥ || 7 |
śiṣyāṇāṃ purato nityaṃ kṣetrasya mahimā mahān |

cakrapuṣkariṇītīrthe snātavyaṃ prativāsaram |
puṣpaiḥ patraiḥ phalaistoyairarthyo viśveśvaraḥ sadā || 11 |
svavarṇāśramadharmaśca tyaktavyo na manāgapi |
pratyahaṃ kṣetramahimā śrotavyaḥ śraddhayā'sakṛt || 12 ||
yathāśakti ca deyāni dānānyatra suguptavat |
annānyapi ca deyāni vighnān parijihīrṣuṇā || 13 |
paropakaraṇaṃ cā'tra kartavyaṃ sudhiyā sadā |
parvasvapi viśeṣeṇa snānadānādikāḥ kriyāḥ || 14 ||
viśeṣapūjā kartavyā sumahotsavapūrvakam |
kāryāstathādhikā yātrāḥ samarcyāḥ kṣetradevatāḥ || 15 |
atra marma na vaktavyaṃ sudhiyā kasyacit kvacit |
paradāraparadravyaparāpakaraṇaṃ tyajet || 16 |
parāpavādo no vācyaḥ parerṣyā naca kārayet |
asatyaṃ naiva vaktavyaṃ prāṇaiḥ kaṇṭhagatairapi || 17 |

atratyajanturakṣārthamasatyamapi bhāṣayet |
yena kena prakāreṇa śubhenāpyaśubhena vā || 18 ||
atratyaḥ prāṇimātro'pi rakṣaṇīyaḥ prayatnataḥ |
ekasmin rakṣite jantāvatra kāśyāṃ prayatnataḥ ||
trailokyarakṣaṇāt puṇyaṃ yat syāttatsyānna saṃśayaḥ || 1 9 ||
ye vasanti sadā kāśyāṃ kṣetrasaṃnyāsakāriṇaḥ |
ta eva rudrā mantavyā jīvanmuktā na saṃśayaḥ || 20 ||
te pūjyāste namaskāryāste santoṣyāḥ prayatnataḥ |
teṣu vai parituṣṭeṣu tuṣyedviśveśvaraḥ svayam || 21 |
yogakṣemo vidhātavyasteṣāṃ viśveśiturmude |
kāśyāṃ vasanti ye martyā dūrasthairapi sannaraiḥ || 22 ||

prasarastvindriyāṇāṃ ca nivāryo'tra nivāsibhiḥ |
manaso'pi hi cāñcalyamiha vāryaṃ prayatnataḥ || 23 |
maraṇaṃ nā'bhikāṅkṣeddhi kākṣyo mokṣo'pi no punaḥ |
śarīraśoṣaṇopāyaḥ kartavyaḥ sudhiyā na hi || 24 ||
śarīrasauṣṭhavaṃ kāṅkṣyaṃ vratasnānādisiddhaye |
āyurbahvatra vai cintyaṃ mahāphalasamṛddhaye || 25 |
ātmarakṣā'tra kartavyā mahāśreyo'bhivṛddhaye |
atrā''tmatyajanopāyaṃ manasā'pi na cintayet || 26 ||
ekasminnapi yaccā'hni kāśyāṃ śreyo'bhilabhyate |
na tu varṣaśatenā'pi tadanyatrā''pyate kvacit || 27 ||
sudhiyā na hītyatra sudhiyānna hīti pāṭhe indriyacāñcalyaparihāropayogitayā
śarīraśoṣaṇopāyaḥ kartavyo na punaḥ śarīranāśāyetyarthaḥ || 24 |
na hītyatra hetumāha - śarīrasauṣṭhavamiti | sauṣṭhavaṃ pāṭavam | pauṣṭikamiti pāṭhe
puṣṭyupāyamityarthaḥ || 25 |
atrātmatyajanopāyaṃ manasā'pi na cintayedityanaśanaṃ vineti boddhavyam |
' vinātmaghātamaśanaṃ tyaktvā prāyopaveśanam | anāśakaṃ yaḥ kurute madbhakta iha suvrataḥ |
na tasya punarāvṛtti ' rityādyukteḥ || 26 ||

anyatra yogābhyasanādyāvajjanma yadarjyate |
vārāṇasyāṃ tadekena prāṇāyāmena labhyate || 28 || |
sarvatīrthāvagāhācca . yāvajjanma yadarjyate |
tadānandavane prāpyaṃ maṇikarṇyekamajjanāt || 2 9 |
sarvaliṅgā'rcanātpuṇyaṃ yāvajjanma yadarjyate |
sakṛdviśveśamabhyarcya śraddhayā tadavāpyate || 30 |
yajjanmanāṃ sahasreṇa nirmalaṃ puṇyamarjitam |
tatpuṇyaparivartena bhavedviśveśadarśanam || 31 |
gavāṃ koṭipradānena samyagdattena yatphalam |
tatphalaṃ samyagāpyeta viśveśvaravilokanāt || 32 ||
yatṣoḍaśamahādānaiḥ puṇyaṃ proktaṃ maharṣibhiḥ | |
tatpuṇyaṃ jāyate puṃsāṃ viśveśe puṣpadānataḥ || 33 ||
aśvamedhādibhiryajñairyatphalaṃ prāpyate'khilaiḥ |
pañcā'mṛtānāṃ snapanādviśveśe tadavāpyate || 34 |

vājapeyasahasreṇa samyagiṣṭena yatphalam |
sakṛnmahārhernaivedyairviśveśe tacchatā'dhikam || 35 ||
dhvajātapatraṃ camaraṃ viśveśe yaḥ samarpayet |
ekacchatraṃ sa vai rājyaṃ prāpnuyādvasudhātale || 36 |
mahāpūjopakaraṇaṃ yo'rpayedviśvabhartari |
na taṃ sampattisambhārā vimuñcantīha kutracit || 37 |
sarvartukusumāḍhyāṃ ca yaḥ kuryātpuṣpavāṭikām |
tadaṅgaṇe kalpavṛkṣāśchāyāṃ kurvanti śītalām || 38 |
yaḥ kṣīrasnapanārthaṃ vai viśveśe dhenumarpayet |
kṣīrārṇavataṭe tasya nivaseyuḥ pitāmahāḥ || 3 9 |
viśveśarājasadane yaḥ sudhāṃ citrameva vā |
kārayettasya bhavanaṃ kailāse citritaṃ bhavet || 40 |

brāhmaṇān yatino vā'pi tathaiva śivayoginaḥ |
bhojayedyo'tra vai kāśyāmekaikagaṇanākramāt || 41 ||
koṭibhojyaphalaṃ tasya śraddhayā nā'tra saṃśayaḥ |
tapastvatra prakartavyaṃ dānamatra pradāpayet || 42 ||
viśveśastoṣaṇīyo'tra snānahomajapādibhiḥ |
anyatra koṭijapyena yatphalaṃ prāpyate naraiḥ ||
aṣṭottaraśataṃ japtvā tadatra samavāpyate || 43 ||
koṭihomena yatproktaṃ phalamanyatra sūribhiḥ |
aṣṭottarāhutiśatāttadatrā''nandakānane || 44 ||
yo japedrudrasūktāni kāśyāṃ viśveśasannidhau |
pārāyaṇena vedānāṃ sarveṣāṃ phalamāpyate || 45 |
tasya puṇyaṃ na jānāmi cintite cā'kṣare pare |
kāśyāṃ nityaṃ pravastavyaṃ sevyottaravahā sadā || 46 ||

āpadyapi hi ghorāyāṃ kāśī tyājyā na kutracit |
yataḥ sarvāpadāṃ hartā trātā viśvapatiḥ prabhuḥ || 47 ||
avandhyaṃ divasaṃ kuryātsnānadānajapādibhiḥ |
yataḥ kāśyāṃ kṛtaṃ karma mahattvāya prakalpate || 48 ||
kṛcchracāndrāyaṇādīni kartavyāni prayatnataḥ |
tathendriyavikārāśca na bādhante'tra karhicit || 4 9 ||
yadīndriyāṇi kurvanti vikriyāmiha dehinām |
tadā'tra vāsasaṃsiddhirvighnebhyo naiva labhyate || 50 ||
agastya uvāca-
kṛcchracāndrāyaṇādīni vyāso vakṣyati yāni vai |
teṣāṃ svarūpamākhyāhi skandendriyaviśuddhaye || 51 ||
skanda uvāca -
kathayāmi mahābuddhe kṛcchrādīni tavā'grataḥ |
yāni kṛtvā'tra manujo dehaśuddhiṃ labhetparām || 52 ||
atha kṛcchracāndrāyaṇakaraṇādyanantaraṃ na bādhante tatkartṛnnarānityarthaḥ || 4 9 |

ekabhaktena naktena tathaivā'yācitena ca |
upavāsena caikena pādakṛcchraḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 53 |
vaṭodumbararājīvabilvapatrakuśodakam
pratyekaṃ pratyahaṃ pītaṃ parṇakṛcchraḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 54 ||
piṇyākaghṛtatakrāmbuṃsaktūnāṃ prativāsaram |
ekaikamupavāsaśca kṛcchraḥ saumyaḥ prakīrtitaḥ || 55 ||
haviṣā prātaraśnīta haviṣā sāyameva ca |
haviṣā yācitaṃ trīṃstu sopavāsastryahaṃ vaset || 56 ||
ekaikaṃ grāsamaśnīyādahāni trīṇi pūrvavat |
tryahaṃ copavasedantyamatikṛcchraṃ caran dvijaḥ || 57 ||
kṛcchrātikṛcchraṃ payasā divasānekaviṃśatiḥ |
dvādaśāhopavāsena parākaḥ parikīrtitaḥ || 58 |
ekabhaktenetyādīnāṃ padyānāmityādi satpravṛttiśceti sārdhasaptaviṃśatitamaśloke-
nā'nvayaḥ || 53 |
rājīvaṃ padmam || 54 | piṇyākaṃ tilapiṣṭaṃ ca | ghṛtaṃ ca taṃkraṃ cāmbu ca saktuśca
teṣāṃ pratyekābhyavaharaṇamiti śeṣaḥ || 55 |
trīniti sarvatra sambadhyate | haviṣā trīn divasān prātarityarthaḥ || 56 |
pūrvavat prātarādivat || 57 ||

tryahaṃ prātastryahaṃ sāyaṃ tryahamadyādayācitam |
tryahaṃ copavasedantyaṃ prājāpatyaṃ caran dvijaḥ || 5 9 ||
gomūtraṃ gomayaṃ kṣīraṃ daghi sarpiḥ kuśodakam |
ekarātropavāsaśca kṛcchraḥ sāntapanaḥ smṛtaḥ || 60 |
pṛthaksāntapanadravyaiḥ ṣaḍahaḥ sopavāsakaḥ |
saptāhena tu kṛcchro'yaṃ mahāsāntapanaḥ smṛtaḥ || 61 |
taptakṛcchraṃ caran vipro jalakṣīraghṛtānilān |
etāṃstryahaṃ pibeduṣṇān sakṛtsnāyī samāhitaḥ || 62 ||
tryahamuṣṇāḥ pibedāpastryahamuṣṇaṃ payaḥ pibet |
tryahamuṣṇaṃ ghṛtaṃ prāśya vāyubhakṣo dinatrayam || 63 |
palamekaṃ payaḥ pītvā sarpiṣaśca paladvayam | |
palamekaṃ tu toyasya taptakṛcchra udāhṛtaḥ || 64 |
gomūtreṇa samāyuktaṃ yāvakaṃ yaḥ prayojayet |
kṛcchramekāhnikaṃ proktaṃ śarīrasya viśodhanam || 65 ||
gomūtramityādīnāmekīkṛtya bhakṣaṇam || 60 | ṣaḍahaḥ ṣaḍahāni ||| 61 |

hastāvuttānataḥ kṛtvā divasaṃ mārutāśanaḥ |
rātrau jale sthito vyuṣṭaḥ prājāpatyena tatsamam || 66 |
ekaikaṃ hāsayed grāsaṃ kṛṣṇe śukle ca vardhayet |
upaspṛśaṃstriṣavaṇametaccāndrāyaṇaṃ smṛtam || 67 |
ekaikaṃ vardhayed grāsaṃ śukle kṛṣṇe ca hrāsayet |
bhuñjīta darśe no kiñcideṣa cāndrāyaṇo vidhiḥ || 68 |
caturaḥ prātaraśnīyāt piṇḍān vipraḥ samāhitaḥ |
caturo'stamite sūrye śiśucāndrāyaṇaṃ smṛtam || 6 9 |
aṣṭāvaṣṭau samaśnīyāt piṇḍān madhyaṃdine sthite |
niyatātmā haviṣyasya yaticāndrāyaṇaṃ smṛtam || 70 ||
yathākathañcitpiṇḍānāṃ tisro'śītīḥ samāhitaḥ |
māsenāśan haviṣyasya candrasyaiti salokatām || 71 ||
adbhirgātrāṇi śudhyanti manaḥ satyena śuddhyati |
vidyātapobhyāṃ bhūtātmā buddhirjñānena śuddhyati || 72 ||
vyuṣṭaḥ prāptaprātaḥ kālaḥ || 66 |
śiśucāndrāyaṇaṃ brahmacāricāndrāyaṇam || 6 9 |

tacca jñānaṃ bhavetpuṃsāṃ samyakkāśīniṣevaṇāt |
kāśīniṣevaṇena syādviśveśakaruṇodayaḥ || 73 ||
tato mahodayāvāptiḥ karmanirmūlanakṣamā |
ataḥ kāśyāṃ prayatnena snānaṃ dānaṃ tapo japaḥ || 74 ||
vrataṃ purāṇaśravaṇaṃ smṛtyuktādhyaniṣevaṇam |
pratikṣaṇaṃ pratidinaṃ viśveśapadacintanam || 75 ||
liṅgārcanaṃ trikālaṃ ca liṅgasyāpi pratiṣṭhitiḥ |
sādhubhiḥ saha saṃlāpo jalpaḥ śiva śiveti ca || 76 |
atitheścāpi satkāro maitrī tīrthanivāsibhiḥ |
āstikyabuddhirvinayo mānāmānasamānadhīḥ || 77 |
akāmitā tvanauddhatyamarāgitvamahiṃsanam
apratigrahavṛttiśca matiścānugrahātmikā || 78 ||
adambhitā tvamātsaryamaprārthitadhanāgamaḥ
alobhitvamanālasyamapāruṣyamadīnatā || 7 9 |
ityādisatpravṛttiśca kartavyā kṣetravāsinā |
pratyahaṃ ceti śiṣyebhyaḥ sa dharmamupadekṣyati || 80 |
nityaṃ triṣavaṇasnāyī nityaṃ bhikṣākṛtāśanaḥ |
liṅgapūjārcako nityamitthaṃ vyāso vasetpurā || 81 |

ekadā tasya jijñāsāṃ kartuṃ devīṃ haro'vadat |
adya bhikṣāṭanaṃ prāpte vyāse paramadhārmike | 82 |
api sarvagate kvāpi bhikṣāṃ mā yaccha sundari |
tathetyuktvā bhavānī sā bhavaṃ bhavanivāraṇam || 83 ||
namaskṛtya pratigṛhaṃ tasya bhikṣāṃ nyaṣedhayat |
sa muniḥ sahitaḥ śiṣyairbhikṣāmaprāpya dūnavat || || 84 ||
velātikramamālokya punarbabhrāma tāṃ purīm |
gṛhe gṛhe pariprāptā bhikṣānyaiḥ sarvabhikṣukaiḥ || 85 |
tadahninā'labhad bhikṣāṃ saśiṣyaḥ sa muniḥ kvacit |
atha sāyantanaṃ karma kṛtvā chātraiḥ samanvitaḥ || 86 |
upoṣaṇaparo . bhūtvā tathaivāsīdaharniśam |
athā'nyedyurmunirvyāsaḥ kṛtvā mādhyāhnikaṃ vidhim || 87 |
yayau bhikṣāṭanaṃ kartuṃ saśiṣyaḥ paritaḥ purīm |
sarvatra sa paribhrāntaḥ pratisaudhaṃ pratisaudhaṃ muhurmuhuḥ || 88 |
bhikṣāṭanaṃ prāpte bhikṣituṃ gate satītyarthaḥ || 82 |
tasya saśiṣyasya bhikṣāṃ nyaṣedhayat | dūnavat khinnavat || 84 |
chatramiva guruṃ gopāyantīti chātrāḥ śiṣyāstaiḥ || 86 |

ṣaṇṇavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 31 9
na kvāpi labdhavān bhikṣāṃ bhāgyahīno dhanaṃ yathā |
atha cintitavān vyāsaḥ pariśrāntaḥ paribhraman || 8 9 |

kimetadakhilaṃ jñātvā samāgacchata satvaram |
dvitrāḥ pavitracaraṇāt prāpyā'nujñāṃ guroratha ||
samācakhyuḥ samāgamya dṛṣṭvardhiṃ tatpuraukasām || 9 5 |
śiṣyā ūcuḥ - -
śṛṇvantvārādhyacaraṇā nopasargo'tra kaścana |
nānnakṣayo vā sarvasyāṃ nagaryāmiha kutracit || 9 6 |
yatra viśveśvaraḥ sākṣādyatrā'maradhunī svayam |
tyādṛśā yatra munayaḥ kva bhīstatropasargajā || 9 7 ||
samṛddhiryā gṛhasthānāmiha viśveśituḥ puri |
na sardhirasti vaikuṇṭhe tvalpāstā alakādayaḥ || 9 8 |
ratnākareṣu ratnāni na tāvanti mahāmune |
yāvanti santi viśveśanirmālyopabhujāṃ gṛhe || 99 |
pavitracaraṇādārādhyacaraṇāt || 9 5 |
viśveśanirmālyopabhujāṃ laiṅgikānāṃ devalakānāmiti vā || 99 |

gṛhe gṛhe'tra dhānyānāṃ rāśayo yādṛśaḥ punaḥ |
na tādṛśaḥ kalpavṛkṣadattā aindre pure kvacit || 100 |
yatra sākṣād viśālākṣī suvistāraphalapradā |
na tatra puri sarvasyāṃ naro vai nirdhanaḥ kvacit || 101 |
nirvāṇalakṣmyāḥ sadane tyasminnānandakānane |
mokṣo'pi yatra sulabhaḥ kimanyattatra durlabham || 102 |
sīmantinyaḥ striyaḥ sarvāḥ pativrataparāyaṇāḥ |
sarvā bhavānīrūpiṇyo viśveśārpitasatkriyāḥ || 103 ||
yāvantaḥ puruṣāḥ kāśyāṃ sarva eva gaṇādhipāḥ |
sarva eva kumārā vai sarve tārakadṛṣṭayaḥ || 104 |
tripuṇḍrāṅkitabhālā ye te sarve candramaulayaḥ |
upasargasahasraiśca pīḍyamānā apīha . ye || 105 ||
na tyajanti sadā kāśīṃ sarvajñā eva te'khilāḥ |
gṛhe gṛhe'pi baṭavo brahmavādavivādinaḥ || 106 |
yādṛśastādṛśa iti ca bahuvacanam || 100 |

svardhunīdhūtakaluṣāḥ santīha caturānanāḥ |
nirvāṇalakṣmīpatayaḥ kṣetrasaṃnyāsakāriṇaḥ || 107 |
sarva eva hṛṣīkeśāḥ sarve vai puruṣottamāḥ |
acyutā eva vijñeyā etatkṣetraparigrahāḥ || 108 ||
striyo vā puruṣā vā'pi sarva eva na saṃśayaḥ |
sarva eva trinayanāḥ sarva eva caturbhujāḥ || 10 9 |
śrīkaṇṭhāḥ sarva evā'tra sarve mṛtyuñjayā dhruvam |
mokṣaśrīśritavarṣmāṇastvardhanārīśvarā yataḥ || 9901
dharmarāśiḥ paraśvā'tra mahānto'trārtharāśayaḥ |
sarve kāmāḥ phalantyatra kaivalyaṃ cā'tra nirmalam || 111 ||
na garbhavāsasaṃsargaḥ kāśīsaṃsthitikāriṇām |
na kaliścā'tra bādheta kālo naiva prabādhate || 112 ||
enāṃsi nā'tra bādhante viśveśaśaraṇārthinaḥ |
yatra viśveśvaraḥ sākṣānnādabindukalātmakaḥ || 113 |

dhvanirūpī hi tatrā'sti praṇavo mantravigrahaḥ |
ato vigrahavanto'tra santi vedā viniścitam || 114 ||
sarasvatī saridrūpā hyataḥ śāstraniketanam |
ānandakānanaṃ sarvaṃ dharmaśāstrakṛtālayam || 115 |
yāvanto divi vai devāstāvanto'tra mṛṣā na hi |
nīrājayanti viśveśaṃ rātrau rātrau sadā'hayaḥ || 116 |
svaphaṇāmaṇidīpaiśca prāpya kāśīṃ rasātalāt |
samudrāḥ sarva evā'tra kāmadhenuvrajānvitāḥ || 117 ||
pañcapīyūṣadhārābhirviśveśaṃ snapayanti hi |
mandāraḥ pārijātaśca santāno haricandanaḥ || 118 ||
kalpadrumaśca pañcaite tarubhiḥ saha sarvadā || 11 9 ||
nīrājayanti nīrājanāṃ prāpayanti || 116 ||
pañcapīyūṣadhārābhiḥ pañcāmṛtasampātaiḥ || 118 |

sarve suranikāyāśca sarva eva maharṣayaḥ |
yoginaḥ sarva sarva evā'tra kāśīnāthamupāsate || 120 |
vidyānāṃ sadanaṃ kāśī lakṣmyāḥ kāśī parālayaḥ |
muktikṣetramidaṃ kāśī kāśī sarvā trayīmayī || 121 ||
iti śrutvā munivaraḥ pārāśaryo mahātapāḥ |
evaṃ babhāṣe tān śiṣyān punaḥ ślokaṃ paṭhantvamum || 122 ||
śiṣyā ūcuḥ -
vidyānāṃ cāśrayaḥ kāśī kāśī lakṣyāḥ parālayaḥ |
muktikṣetramidaṃ kāśī kāśī sarvā trayīmayī || 123 ||
skanda uvāca -
niśamyeti tadā vyāsaḥ krodhāndhīkṛtalocanaḥ |
kṣutkṛśānujcalanmūrtiḥ kāśīṃ śapsyati kumbhaja || 124 ||
vyāsa uvāca -
mā bhūtnaipūruṣī vidyā mā bhūtyaipūruṣaṃ dhanam |
mā bhūttraipūruṣī muktiḥ kāśīṃ vyāsaḥ śapanniti || 125 |

garvaḥ paro'tra vidyānāṃ dhanagarvo'tra vai mahān | |
muktigarveṇa no bhikṣāṃ prayacchantyatra vāsinaḥ || 126 |
iti kṛtvā matiṃ vyāsaḥ kāśyāṃ śāpamadāttadā |
datvā'pi śāpaṃ sa munirbhikṣituṃ krodhavān yayau || 127 ||
pratigehaṃ tvarāyuktaḥ praviśan vyomadattadṛk |
babhrāma nagarīṃ sarvāṃ kvā'pi bhaikṣaṃ na labdhavān || 128 ||
aṃśumālinamāvīkṣya manāglohitamaṇḍalam |
bhikṣāpātraṃ parikṣipya niryayāvāśramaṃ prati || 12 9 ||
atha gacchan mahādevyā gṛhadvāri niṣaṇṇayā |
prākṛtastrīsvarūpiṇyā bhikṣāyai prārthito'tithiḥ || 130 |
gṛhiṇyuvāca-
bhagavan bhikṣukāstāvadadya dṛṣṭā na kutracit |
asatkṛtyā'tithiṃ nātho na me bhokṣyati karhicit || 131 |
etādṛśaśāpe kāraṇamāha - garvaḥ paro'tra vidyānāmiti | paro hyatra vidyeti pāṭhe
garyo garvaheturityarthaḥ || 126 |

vaiśvadevādikaṃ karma karma kṛtvā gṛhapatirmama |
pratīkṣetā'tithipathaṃ tasmāttvamatithirbhava || 132 |
vinā'tithiṃ gṛhastho yastvannameko niṣevate |
niṣevate'ghaṃ sa paraṃ sahitaḥ svapitāmahaiḥ || 133 |
tasmāttvaritamāyāhi kuru me patyurīhitam | |
gārhasthyaṃ saphalaṃ kartumicchato'tithipūjanāt || 134 ||
iti śrutvā gatā'marṣo vyāsastāmāha vismitaḥ |
vyāsa uvāca-

kalā sudhākarasyā'tha kuhūrāhubhayārditā |
sīmantinīsvarūpeṇa tiṣṭheḥ kāśyāmanirbhayā || 138 |
athavā kamalā'si tvaṃ vihāya kamalālayam |
niśi saṅkocinaṃ kāśyāṃ vikāśinyāṃ vaseḥ sadā || 13 9 |
kiṃ vā nu karuṇāmūrtiriha kāśinivāsinām |
sarvaduḥkhaughahariṇī parā''nandapradāyinī || 140 ||
vārāṇasyāḥ kimathavā'dhiṣṭhātrī devatā tvamu |
kiṃ vā nirvāṇalakṣmīstvaṃ yā kāśyāṃ parigīyate || 141 |
śvapākaṃ yāyajūkaṃ vā prānte'laṅkurvatī samam |
madbhāgyaṃ vā pariṇatametadyoṣitsvarūpataḥ || 142 |
athavā sā bhavennūnaṃ yā kṣetre parigīyate |
bhaktapotapradā bhaktyā bhavānī bhavanāśinī || 143 ||
sarvathaiva na nārī tvaṃ nā'surī naiva kinnarī |
vidyādharī na no nāgī no gandharvī na yakṣiṇī || 144 |

tvamiṣṭadevataivā'si kācinme mohahāriṇī |
keyaṃ cintā'thavā me'tra kācittvaṃ bhava sundari || 145 |
paravānasmyahaṃ jātastava darśanato'dhunā |
avaśyameva kartā'smi tavādeśyaṃ tadādiśa || ||| 146 || |
ekaṃ tapovyayaṃ . hitvā kārayiṣyasi yatpunaḥ |
tadevā'haṃ kariṣyāmi vidheyaḥ śubhalocane || 147 |
na vacastvādṛśīnāṃ hi mahattvaṃ hāpayetsatām |
paraṃ tvaṃ kā'si subhage satyaṃ brūhi mamā'grataḥ || 148 |
athavā tava dehe'smin kvā'satyaṃ nirmalakṣaṇe |
iti pṛṣṭā''ha muninā sā viśvāyurghaṭodbhava || 14 9 |
vidheyastvadhīnastvayokta iti yāvat || 147 |
viśvāyurviśvaikajīvanetyarthaḥ | taduktam- " yā devī sarvabhūteṣu vṛttirūpeṇa
saṃsthiteti " || 14 9 |

ṣaṇṇavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 32 9
atratyasyaiva hi mune gṛhiṇī gṛhamedhinaḥ |
nityaṃ vīkṣye carantaṃ tvāṃ bhikṣāṃ śiṣyagaṇairvṛtam || 150 ||
tvameva māṃ no jānīṣe jāne tvāmahameva hi |
tapasvin kiṃ bahūktena yāvannā'staṃ vrajedraviḥ || 151 ||
prāṇanāthasya me tāvadātithyaṃ saphalīkuru |
tacchrutvā sa muniḥ prāha vinayānatakandharaḥ || 152 |
vyāsa uvāca -
asti me niyamaḥ kaścit sa siddhiṃ ced brajecchubhe |
ekabhikṣāṃ tadā'haṃ tu kariṣye nā'nyathā punaḥ || 153 ||
tapasvyudīritaṃ śrutvā sā provāca vacastataḥ |
aviśaṅkaṃ vada mune kaste'sti niyamaḥ sudhīḥ || 154 ||
mama bhartuḥ prasādena kiñcinyūnaṃ yato'tra na |
iti śrutvā prahṛṣṭātmā sa tāmāha tapodhanaḥ || 155 ||
sudhīriti kaṭākṣaḥ || 154 |

ayutaṃ mama śiṣyā ye taiḥ sapaktimahaṃ vṛṇe | |
astaṃ yāvanna yātyarkastāvadbhokṣye'nyathā na hi || 156 |
niśamyeti prahṛṣṭāsyā sā provāca muniṃ tataḥ |
kiṃ vilambena tadyāhi sarvān śiṣyān samāhvaya || 157 ||
punaḥ prāha sa tāṃ sādhvi tvetāvatsiddhirasti te |
yena tṛptiṃ gamiṣyanti macchiṣyāḥ sarva eva te || 158 |
smitvā'tha sā'bravīttaṃ tu mune bharturanugrahāt |
siddhameva sadaivā''ste sarvaṃ tāvanmamā''laye || 15 9 |
yāvatā'rthijanastṛptimeti sarvo'pi sarvaśaḥ |
vayaṃ na tādṛmahilā bhartṛsandehakārikāḥ || 160 |
āyāto'rthī yadā gehe siddhaṃ kāryaṃ tadaiva hi |
paripūrṇā diśaḥ sarvāḥ paripūrṇā manorathāḥ || 161 |
paripūrṇaṃ gṛhaṃ sarvaṃ patyuḥ pādaprasādataḥ |
yāhi tūrṇaṃ samāyāhi yāvadannārthibhiḥ saha || 162 |

patirme bahukālīnaḥ kālaṃ na sahate ciram |
priyātithiḥ priyatamastadātithyasamṛddhaye || 163 ||
iti āśu gatvā samāgaccha yāvannāstamito raviḥ |
prahṛṣṭastvaritaḥ śiṣyānāhūya sarvataḥ || 164 |
āgatya tāṃ punaḥ prāha dṛṣṭvā tanmārgalocanām |
mātaḥ sarve samāyātāstvaritaṃ dehi bhojanam || 165 ||
astācalaṃ hi samayā samiyādeṣa bhāskaraḥ |
ityuktvā mandirasyāntarviviśuste tapodhanāḥ || 166 |
tanmaṇḍapamaṇijyotistatyāhitadinaśriyaḥ
yāvad gacchanti tatsaudhamadhyamāśu tapasvinaḥ || 167 ||
pādau prakṣālya tāvatte kaiścitkaiścitsamarcya ca |
katicitpariviṣṭānnā bhoktumevopaveśitāḥ || 168 |
tanmārgalocanāṃ vyāsāgamavartmadṛṣṭim || 165 |
samayā samīpe || 166 |
jyotistatyā jyotiṣo vistāreṇāhitā samarpitā dinaśrīryeṣāṃ te | 1 svarjita-
svargamāśriyamiti pāṭhe saudhamadhyaviśeṣaṇam || 167 |
katicitpariviṣṭānnāḥ katicidbhirjanaiḥ pariviṣṭamannaṃ yebhyaste yathā || 168 ||

taddivyapākasambhārān dṛṣṭvā taddṛṣṭayaḥ kṣaṇāt |
parāṃ tṛptimupāgacchan ghrāṇanyāmodarājibhiḥ || 16 9 ||
atitṛptiṃ samāpannāste tadannaniṣevaṇāt |
ācāntāścandanaiḥ sragbhirambaraiḥ paribhūṣitāḥ || 170 |
atha sāndhyaṃ vidhiṃ kṛtvā propaviśya tadagrataḥ |
abhinandya mahāśīrbhiryāvadgantuṃ pracakramuḥ || 171 |
tāvad vṛddhagṛhasthena gṛhiṇī sā kaṭākṣitā |

vyāsa uvāca-
svacchāntaḥkaraṇe mātarmahāmiṣṭānnamānade |
sa eṣa dharmo nā'nyo'sti yattvayā paricaryate || 175 ||
tvameva dharmaṃ jānāsi patiśuśrūṣaṇe ratā |
yadi pṛcchasi māṃ satyaṃ tadā kiñcana vacmi te || 176 |
vaktavyameva pṛṣṭena manāgapi vijānatā | |
sa eva dharmaḥ subhage nā'nyo dharmo'sti kaścana || 177 |
yenaiṣa toṣamāyāti tava bhartā cirantanaḥ |
gṛhiṇyuvāca-
ayaṃ dharmo bhavennūnaṃ kriyate ca svaśatiḥ || 178 |
sādhāraṇāni dharmāṇi sampṛcche tāni me vada |
vyāsa uvāca-
anudvegakaraṃ vākyaṃ parotkarṣasahiṣṇutā || 17 9 |
vicārya kāritā nityaṃ svadhiṣṇyodayacintanam |
miṣṭhānnaṃ ca mānaśceti dvandvaḥ || 175 |

gṛhastha uvāca-
eṣu dharmeṣu bho vidvaṃstvayi ko'stīha tadvada || 180 |
tataḥ sthagitavad vyāsastasthau kiñcinna coktavān |
tataḥ punargṛhasthena sa hi proktastapodhanaḥ || 181 |
yadyeta eva vai dharmāstvayā ye pratipāditāḥ |
taddāntatā tavaivaikṣi dānaṃ śāpasya cottamam || 182 |
tvayyeva hi dayā samyag dhairyaṃ tvayyeva cottamam |
tvayi sambhāvanā'styeva kāmakrodhavinigrahe || 183 |
tvameva samyag jānīṣe vaktuṃ codvegavarjitam |
tvayyeva samyag dṛśyeta parotkarṣasahiṣṇutā || 184 ||
vicārya kāritāyāśca tvameva nilayo mahān
svasya dhiṣṇyasya ca bhavāṃścintayedudayaṃ dhruvam || 185 |

mamaikaṃ brūhi bho vidvan śāpaṃ dadyācca yaḥ krudhā |
alabhan svārthasaṃsiddhimabhāgyāttasya kasya saḥ || 186 |
vyāsa uvāca-
yaḥ svārthasiddhimalabhannabhāgyācchapati krudhā |
sa śāpaḥ pratyuta bhavecchapturevā'vivekinaḥ || 187 |
gṛhastha uvāca-
bhavatā bhramatā vipra nāptā bhikṣā yadāpyaho |
tadāparāddhaṃ kimiha varākaiḥ kṣetravāsibhiḥ || 188 | |
tapasvin śṛṇu me vākyaṃ rājadhānyāṃ mameha yaḥ |
ṛddhiṃ draṣṭuṃ na śaknoti pariśaptaḥ sa eva hi || 18 9 |
adyaprabhṛti na kṣetre madīye śāpavarjite |
āvasa krodhanamune na vāse yogyatā'tra te || 1 9 0 |
tasya sa śāpaḥ kasya syādityarthaḥ | kasyābhāgyātmakasya | sa iti kvacit |
abhāgyātsvasyeti cānyatra || 186 |
śāpavarjite datto'pi śāpo'tra na prabhavatītyarthaḥ || 1 9 0 |

idānīmeva nirgaccha bahiḥ kṣetrādito bhava |
tvadvidhānāṃ na yogyaṃ me kṣetraṃ mokṣaikasādhanam || 1 9 1 |
atrā'lpamapi yaddaṣṭyaṃ kṛtaṃ matkṣetravāsinām |
taddauṣṭyasya parīpāko rudrapaiśācyameva hi || 1 9 2 |
tacchrutvā vepamānaḥ sa pariśuṣkauṣṭhatālukaḥ |
jagāma śaraṇaṃ gaurīṃ luṭhaṃstaccaraṇā'grataḥ || 1 9 3 ||
uvāca ca vaco mātastrāhi trāhi bhṛśaṃ rudn |
anāthastvatsanātho'haṃ bāliśastava bālakaḥ || 1 9 4 ||
śaraṇāgataṃ ca saṃtrāhi rakṣa māṃ śaraṇāgatam |
bahūnāmāgasāṃ gehamasmākaṃ duṣṭamānasam || 1 9 5 |
śambhuśāpo'nyathā kartuṃ bhavatyā'pi na śakyate |
ahaṃ ca śaraṇāyātastadekaṃ kriyatāṃ śive || 1 9 6 | 7

pratyaṣṭami sadā kṣetre pratibhūtaṃ ca pārvati |
diśa praveśanā''deśaṃ neśastvadvākyalaṅghakaḥ || 1 9 7 |
ityuktā tena muninā bhavānī karuṇājaniḥ |
mukhaṃ maheśiturvīkṣya tathetyāha tadājñayā || 1 9 8 |
athā'ntarhitavantau tau śivau kṣetraśivaṅkarau |
vyāso'pi niryayau kṣetrāt svāparādhavaśaṃvadan || 1 99 |
ahorātraṃ sa paśyan vai kṣetraṃ dṛṣṭeradūragam | |
prāpyā'ṣṭamīṃ ca bhūtāṃ ca madhyekṣetraṃ sadā viśet || 200 |
lolārkādagnidigbhāge svardhunīpūrvarodhasi |
sthito hyadyāpi paśyet sa kāśīprāsādarājikām || 201 |
pratibhūtaṃ praticaturdaśi || 1 9 7 |
svaścāsau aparādhavaśaśca tamātmānaṃ vadatīti tathā | chāndaso lugabhāvaḥ |
svāparādhaṃ ca saṃvadanniti kvacit || 1 99 |
rodhasi tīre || 201 |

skanda uvāca -
itthaṃ kumbhaja sa vyāsaḥ kṣetre śāpaṃ pradāsyati |
kṣetraśāpapradānācca bahiryāsyati tatkṣaṇāt || 202 |
ata evāvimuktasya kṣetrasya śubhaśaṃsinaḥ |
bhaviṣyati śubhaṃ nityamanyathā tvanyathaiva hi || 203 |
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ vyāsaśāpavimokṣaṇam |
mahādurgopasargebhyo bhayaṃ tasya na kutracit || 204 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe vyāsaśāpavimokṣaṇaṃ nāma ṣaṇṇavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 6 ||
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ ṣaṇṇavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 6 |
skanda bole-

|| atha saptanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
agastya uvāca-
etad bhaviṣyaṃ śrutvā'haṃ vyāsasya śivanandana |
āścaryabhājanaṃ jātastīrthāni kathayā'dhunā || 1 ||
ānandakānane yāni yatra santi ṣaḍānana |
tāni liṅgasvarūpāṇi samācakṣva mamā'grataḥ || 2 |
skanda uvāca- ayameva
hi vai praśno devyai devena bho tadā |
yādṛśaḥ kathito vacmi tādṛśaṃ śṛṇu kumbhaja || 3 |
devyuvāca-
yāni yāni hi tīrthāni yatra yatra maheśvara |
tāni tānīha me kāśyāṃ tatra tatra vada prabho || 4 ||
devadeva uvāca-
śṛṇu devi viśālākṣi tīrthaṃ liṅgamudāhṛtam |
jalāśaye'pi tīrthākhyā jātā mūrtiparigrahāt || 5 ||
varṇanaṃ saptabhiḥ sahite'dhyāye navatyākhye manohare |
kṣetratīrthānāṃ kriyate sarvapāpanut || 1 |
he viśālākṣi ! tarhi jalāśayādeḥ kathaṃ tīrthatvaṃ tatrāha - jalāśaya iti || 5 |

mūrtayo brahmaviṣṇvarkaśivavighneśvarādikāḥ |
liṅgaṃ śaivamiti khyātaṃ yatraitattīrthameva tat || 6 |
vārāṇasyāṃ mahādevaḥ prathamaṃ tīrthamucyate | |
taduttare mahākūpaḥ sārasvatapadapradaḥ || 7 |
kṣetrapūrvottare bhāge taddṛṣṭaṃ paśupāśahṛt |
tatpaścādvigrahavatī pūjyā vārāṇasī naraiḥ || 8 |
sā pūjitā prayatnena sukhavastipradā sadā |
mahādevasya pūrveṇa goprekṣaṃ liṅgamuttamam || 9 ||
taddarśanād bhavetsamyaggodānajanitaṃ phalam |
golokātpreṣitā gāvaḥ pūrvaṃ yacchambhunā svayam || 10 |
mūrtirūpaṃ liṅgamityanvayaḥ || 6 |
paśavo jīvāsteṣāṃ pāśāścaturviṃśatitattvāni taddhṛt || 8 |

vārāṇasīṃ samāyātā goprekṣaṃ tattataḥ smṛtam |
goprekṣāddakṣiṇe bhāge dadhīcīśvarasaṃjñitam || 11 ||
taddarśanād bhavetpuṃsāṃ phalaṃ yajñasamudbhavam |
atrīśvaraṃ tu tavyācyāṃ madhukaiṭabhapūjitam || 12 ||
liṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā prayatnena vaiṣṇavaṃ padamṛcchati |
goprekṣātpūrvadigbhāge liṅgaṃ vai vijcaraṃ smṛtam || 13 ||
tasya sampūjanānmartyo vijvaro jāyate kṣaṇāt |
prācyāṃ vedeśvarastasya caturvedaphalapradaḥ || 14 ||
vedeśvarādudīcyāṃ tu kṣetrajñaścādikeśavaḥ |
dṛṣṭaṃ tribhuvanaṃ sarvaṃ tasya sandarśanāddhruvam || 15 |
saṅgameśvaramālokya tavyācyāṃ jāyate'naghaḥ |
caturmukhena vidhinā tatpūrveṇa caturmukham || 16 |
prayāgasaṃjñakaṃ liṅgamarcitaṃ brahmalokadam |
tatra śāntikarī gaurī pūjitā śāntikṛd bhavet || 17 ||
śambhupreṣitagobhiḥ prekṣyata iti goprekṣam || 11 |
kṣetrajña īśvaraḥ || 15 |
vidhinā sthāpitamiti śeṣaḥ || 16 |

varaṇāyāstaṭe pūrve pūjyaṃ kuntīśvaraṃ nṛbhiḥ |
tatpūjanāt prajāyante putrā nijakulojjcalāḥ || 18 ||
kuntīśvarāduttaratastīrthaṃ vai kāpilo hṛdaḥ |
tatra vai snānamātreṇa vṛṣabhadhvajapūjanāt || 1 9 ||
rājasūyasya yajñasya phalaṃ tvavikalaṃ bhavet |
rauravādiṣu ye kecit pitara koṭisammitāḥ || 20 ||
tatra śrāddhe kṛte putraiḥ pitṛlokaṃ prayānti te |
ānusūyeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ goprekṣāduttare mune || 21 |
taddarśanād bhavetstrīṇāṃ pātivratyaphalaṃ sphuṭam |
talliṅgapūrvadigbhāge pūjyaḥ siddhivināyakaḥ || 22 |
yāṃ siddhiṃ yaḥ samīheta sa tāmāpnoti tannateḥ |
hiraṇyakaśiporliṅgaṃ gaṇeśātpaścime tataḥ || 23 |
kuntīśvaraṃ pṛthayā sthāpitam | kumbhīśvaramiti kvacit || 18 ||
rauravādiṣu ādiśabdena mahārauravādayo gṛhyante || 20 ||
yāṃ siddhimabhīṣṭāṃ siddhim | tannateḥ tasya namaskārataḥ || 23 |

hiraṇyakūpastatrā'sti hiraṇyāśvasamṛddhikṛt || 24 |
muṇḍāsureśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tatpratīcyāṃ ca siddhidam |
abhīṣṭadaṃ tu nairṛtyāṃ goprekṣād vṛṣabheśvaram || 25 ||
mune skandeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ mahādevasya paścime |
talliṅgapūjanānnṛṇāṃ bhavenmama salokatā || 26 ||
tatpārśvato hi śākheśo viśākheśaśca tatra vai |
naigameyeśvarastatra ye'nye nandyādayo gaṇāḥ || 27 |
teṣāmapi hi liṅgāni tatra santi sahasraśaḥ |
taddarśanād bhavetpuṃsāṃ tattadgaṇasalokatā || 28 |
nandīśvarāṭhātīcyāṃ ca śilādeśaḥ kudhīharaḥ |
mahābalapradastatra hiraṇyākṣeśvaraḥ śubhaḥ || 2 9 |
mama skandasya salokatā samānalokatā || 26 |

taddakṣiṇe'ṭṭahāsākhyaṃ liṅga sarvasukhapradam |
prasannavadaneśākhyaṃ liṅga tasyottare śubham || 30 ||
prasannavadanastiṣṭhed bhaktastaddarśanācchubhāt |
taduttare prasannodaṃ kuṇḍaṃ nairmalyadaṃ nṛṇām || 31 ||
pratīcyāmaṭṭahāsasya mitrāvaruṇanāmanī |
liṅge tallokade pūjye mahāpātakahāriṇī || 32 ||
naiṛtyāṃ cā'ṭṭahāsasya vṛddhavāsiṣṭhasaṃjñakam |
liṅgaṃ tatpūjanātpuṃsāṃ jñānamutpadyate mahat || 33 ||
vasiṣṭheśasamīpasthaḥ kṛṣṇeśo viṣṇulokadaḥ |
tadyāmyāṃ yājñavalkyeśo brahmatejovivardhanaḥ || 34 ||
prahlādeśvaramabhyarcya tatpaścād bhaktivardhanam |
svayaṃ līnaḥ śivo yatra bhaktānugrahakāmyayā || 35 ||
ataḥ svalīnaṃ tatpūrve liṅgaṃ pūjyaṃ prayatnataḥ |
sadaiva jñānaniṣṭhānāṃ paramānandamicchatām ||
yā gatirvihitā teṣāṃ svalīne sā tanutyajām || 36 ||

vairocaneśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ svalīnātpurataḥ sthitam |
taduttare balīśaṃ ca mahābalavivardhanam || 37 ||
tatraiva liṅgaṃ bāṇeśaṃ pūjitaṃ sarvakāmadam | |
candreśvarasya pūrveṇa liṅgaṃ vidyeśvarābhidham || 38 |
sarvavidyāḥ prasannāḥ syustasya liṅgasya sevanāt |
taddakṣiṇe tu vīreśo mahāsiddhividhāyakaḥ || 3 9 ||
tatraiva vikaṭā devī sarvaduḥkhaughamocanī |
pañcamudraṃ mahāpīṭhaṃ tajjñeyaṃ sarvasiddhidam || 40 ||
tatra japtā mahāmantrāḥ kṣipraṃ siddhyanti nā'nyathā |
tatpīṭhe vāyukoṇe tu sampūjyaḥ sagareśvaraḥ || 41 ||
tadarcanādaśvamedhaphalaṃ tvavikalaṃ bhavet |
tadīśāne ca vālīśastiryagyoninivārakaḥ || 42 |
mahāpāpaughavidhvaṃsī sugrīveśastaduttare |
hanūmadīśvarastatra brahmacaryaphalapradaḥ || 43 |
avikalaṃ samagram || 42 |

mahābuddhipradastatra pūjyo jāmbavatīśvaraḥ |
āśvineyeśvarau pūjyau gaṅgāyāḥ paścime taṭe || 44 ||
taduttare bhadrahṛdo gavāṃ kṣīreṇa pūritaḥ |
kapilānāṃ sahasreṇa samyag dattena yatphalam || 45 ||
tatphalaṃ labhate martyaḥ snāto bhadrahade dhruvam |
pūrvābhādrapadāyuktā paurṇamāsī yadā bhavet || 46 |
tadā puṇyatamaḥ kālo vājimedhaphalapradaḥ |
hṛdapaścimatīre tu bhadreśvaravilokanāt || 47 |
golokaṃ prāpnuyāttasmātpuṇyānnaivā'tra saṃśayaḥ |
bhadreśvarādyātudhānyāmupaśāntaśivo mune || 48 ||
tasya liṅgasya saṃsparśātparāṃ śāntiṃ samṛcchati |
upaśāntaśivaṃ liṅgaṃ dṛṣṭvā janmaśatārjitam || 4 9 |
tyajedaśreyasorāśiṃ śreyorāśiṃ ca vindati |
taduttare ca cakreśo yonicakranivārakaḥ || 50 ||
āśvineyeśvarau aśvinīkumārābhyāṃ sthāpitau || 44 |
yātudhānyāṃ nairṛtyām ||| 48 |

taduttare cakrahado mahāpuṇyavivardhanaḥ |
snātvā cakrahade martyaścakreśaṃ paripūjya ca || 51 ||
śivalokamavāpnoti bhāvitenāntarātmanā |
tannairṛte ca śūleśo draṣṭavyaśca prayatnataḥ || 52 ||
śūlaṃ tatra purā nyastaṃ snānārthaṃ varavarṇini |
hṛdastatra samutpannaḥ śūleśasyā'grato mahān || 53 ||
snānaṃ kṛtvā hade tatra dṛṣṭvā śūleśvaraṃ vibhum |
rudralokaṃ narā yānti tyaktvā saṃsāragahvaram || 54 ||
tatpūrvato nāradena tapastaptaṃ mahattaram |
liṅgaṃ ca sthāpitaṃ śreṣṭhaṃ kuṇḍaṃ cā'pi śubhaṃ kṛtam || 55 ||
tatraṃ kuṇḍe naraḥ snātvā dṛṣṭvā vai nāradeśvaram | |
saṃsārābdhiṃ mahāghoraṃ santarennā'tra saṃśayaḥ || 56 ||

tadagre tāmrakuṇḍaṃ ca tatra snāto na garbhabhākū |
vighnahartā gaṇādhyakṣastadvāyavye gaṇādhyakṣastadvāyavye suvighnahṛt || 58 ||
tatra vighnaharaṃ kuṇḍaṃ tatra snāto na vighnabhāk |
anārakeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tadudagdiśi cottamam || 5 9 ||
kuṇḍaṃ cā'nārakākhyaṃ vai tatra snāto na nārakī |
varaṇāyāstaṭe ramye varaṇeśastaduttare || 60 |
tatra pāśupataḥ siddhastvakṣapādo mahāmune |
anenaiva śarīreṇa śāśvatīṃ siddhimāgataḥ || 61 | |
tatpaścime ca śaileśaḥ paranirvāṇakāmadaḥ |
koṭīśvaraṃ tu tadyāmyāṃ liṅgaṃ śāśvatasiddhidam || 62 |
koṭitīrthe hade snātvā koṭīśaṃ paripūjya ca |
gavāṃ koṭipradānasya phalamāpnoti mānavaḥ || 63 |

mahāśmaśānastambho'sti koṭīśād vahnidik sthitaḥ |
tasmin stambhe mahārudrastiṣṭhate comayā saha || 64 ||
taṃ stambhaṃ samalaṅkṛtya narastatpadamāpnuyāt |
tatraiva tīrthaṃ paramaṃ kapāleśasamīpataḥ || 65 ||
kapālamocanaṃ nāma tatra snāto'śvamedhabhāk |
ṛṇamocanatīrthaṃ tu tadudagdiśi śobhanam || 66 ||
tatra tīrthe naraḥ snātvā mukto bhavati carṇataḥ |
tatraivā'ṅgārakaṃ tīrthaṃ kuṇḍaṃ kuṇḍaṃ cā'ṅgāranirmalam || 67 ||
snātvā'ṅgārakatīrthe tu bhaved bhūyo na garbhabhāk |
aṅgāravārayuktāyāṃ caturthyāṃ snāti yo naraḥ ||
vyādhibhirnā'bhibhūyeta na ca duḥkhī kadācana || 68 |
viśvakarmeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ jñānadaṃ ca taduttare |
mahāmuṇḍeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tasya dakṣiṇataḥ śubham || 6 9 |
śmaśānavadatibhīṣaṇatvāt śmaśānastambhaḥ kulastambha iti prasiddhaḥ || 64 |
bhavati ca bhavatyeva | ṛṇataḥ ṛṇatrayāt | aṅgāranirmalaṃ jvaladaṅgāravadujjva-
lam || 67 ||

kūpaḥ śubhodanāmā'pi snātavyaṃ tatra niścitam |
tatra muṇḍamayī mālā mayā kṣiptā'tiśobhanā || 70 ||
mahāmuṇḍā tato devī samutpannā'ghahāriṇī |
khaṭvāṅgaṃ ca dhṛtaṃ tatra khaṭvāṅgeśastato'bhavat : 71 |
niṣpāpo jāyate martyaḥ khaṭna ṃ śavilokanāt |
bhuvaneśastato yāmyāṃ kuṇḍaṃ ca bhuvaneśvaram || 72 |
tatra kuṇḍe naraḥ snāto bhuvaneśo bhavennaraḥ |
tadyāmyāṃ vimaleśaśca kuṇḍaṃ ca vimalodakam || 73 ||
tatra snātvā vilokyeśaṃ vimalo jāyate naraḥ |
tatra pāśupataḥ siddhaḥ tryambako nāma nāmataḥ || 74 ||
anenaiva śarīreṇa rudralokamavāptavān |
bhṛgorāyatanaṃ tasya paścime'tīva puṇyadam || 75 ||
vidhipūrvaṃ tadabhyarcya tadabhyarcya prāpnuyācchivamandiram |
śubheśvaraśca tadyāmyāṃ mahāśubhaphalapradaḥ || 76 |
tatra siddhaḥ pāśupataḥ kapilarṣirmahātapāḥ |
tatrā'sti hi guhā ramyā kapileśvarasannidhau || 77 ||

tāṃ guhāṃ praviśadyo vaina sa garbhe viśet kvacit |
tatra yajñodakūpo'sti vājimedhaphalapradaḥ || 78 ||
oṅkāra eṣa evā'sāvādivarṇamayātmakaḥ |
matsyodaryuttare kūle nādeśastvahameva nādeśastvahameva ca || 7 9 ||
nādeśaḥ paramaṃ brahma nādeśaḥ paramā gatiḥ |
nādeśaḥ paramaṃ sthānaṃ duḥkhasaṃsāramocanam || 80 |
kadācittasya devasya darśane yāti jāhnavī |
matsyodarī sā kathitā snānaṃ puṇyairavāpyate || 81 |
matsyodarī yadā gaṅgā paścime kapileśvaram |
samāyāti mahādevi tadā yogaḥ sudurlabhaḥ || 82 ||
uddālakeśvaraṃ . liṅgamudīcyāṃ kapileśvarāt |
taddarśanena saṃsiddhiḥ parā sarvairavāpyate || 83 ||
paścime tasyāḥ paścime || 82 |

taduttare bāṣkulīśaṃ liṅgaṃ sarvārthasiddhidam |
bāṣkulīśāddakṣiṇato liṅgaṃ vai kaustubheśvaram || 84 |
tasyā'rcanena ratnaughairna viyujyeta karhicit |
śaṅkukarṇeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kaustubheśvaradakṣiṇe || 85 |
saṃsevya paramaṃ jñānaṃ labhedadyā'pi sādhakaḥ |
aghoreśo guhādvāri kūpastasyottare śubhaḥ || 86 |
aghoroda iti khyāto vājimedhaphalapradaḥ |
gargeśo damaneśaśca tatra liṅgadvayaṃ śubham || 87 |
anenaiveha dehena yatra tau siddhimāpatuḥ | |
talliṅgayoḥ samarcātaḥ siddhirbhavati vāñchitā || 88 |
taddakṣiṇe mahākuṇḍaṃ rudrāvāsa iti smṛtam |
tatra rudreśamabhyarcya koṭirudraphalaṃ labhet || 8 9 |
aghorodaḥ aghoraṃ saṃsāranivartakamudamudakaṃ yasya sa tathā || 87 |
koṭirudraphalaṃ śatalakṣarudrasūktajapasya phalam ||| 8 9 |

caturdaśī yadā'parṇe rudranakṣatrasaṃyutā |
tadā puṇyatamaḥ kālastasmin kuṇḍe mahāphalaḥ || 9 0 ||
rudrakuṇḍe naraḥ snātvā dṛṣṭvā rudreśvaraṃ vibhum |
yatra tatra mṛto vā'pi rudralokamavāpnuyāt || 9 1 ||
rudrasya nairṛte bhāge liṅgaṃ tatra mahālayam |
tadagre pitṛkūpo'sti pitṝṇāmālayaḥ paraḥ || 9 2 |
tatra śrāddhaṃ naraḥ kṛtvā piṇḍān kūpe parikṣipet |
ekaviṃśakulopetaḥ śrāddhakṛdrudralokabhāk || 9 3 |
tatra vaitaraṇī nāma dīrghikā paścimānanā |
tasyāṃ snāto naro devi narakaṃ naiva gacchati || 9 4 |
bṛhaspatīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ rudrakuṇḍācca paścime |
gurupuṣyasamāyoge dṛṣṭvā divyāṃ labhed giram || 9 5 ||
rudrāvāsāddakṣiṇataḥ kāmeśaṃ liṅgamuttamam |
taddakṣiṇe mahākuṇḍaṃ snānāccintitakāmadam || 9 6 |
rudranakṣatram ārdrā || 9 0 |

caitraśuklatrayodaśyāṃ tatra yātrā ca kāmadā |
nalakūbaraliṅgaṃ ca prācyāṃ kāmeśvarācchubham || 9 7 |
tadagre pāvanaḥ kūpo dhanadhānyasamṛddhidaḥ |
nalakūbarapūrveṇa sūryācandramaseśvarau || 9 8 |
ajñānadhvāntapaṭalīṃ haratastau samarcitau |
taddakṣiṇe'dhvakeśaśca dṛṣṭo mohavināśanaḥ || 99 |
tatra siddhīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ mahāsiddhisamarpakam |
tatraiva maṇḍaleśaśca maṇḍaleśapadapradaḥ || 100 |
kāmakuṇḍasya pūrveṇa cyavaneśaḥ samṛddhidaḥ |
tatraiva sanakeśaśca rājasūyaphalapradaḥ || 101 |
sanatkumāraliṅgaṃ ca tatpaścādyogasiddhikṛt |
taduttare sanandeśo mahājñānasamarthakaḥ || 102 |
tadyāmyāmāhutīśaśca dṛṣṭo homaphalapradaḥ |
tadyāmyāṃ puṇyajanakaṃ liṅgaṃ pañcaśikheśvaram || 103 |

mārkaṇḍeyahadastasya paścime puṇyavardhanaḥ |
tasmin hrade naraḥ snātvā kiṃ bhūyaḥ pariśocati || 104 ||
tatra snānaṃ ca dānaṃ ca bhavedakṣayapuṇyadam |
taduttare ca kuṇḍeśaḥ sarvasiddhairnamaskṛtaḥ || 105 |
dīkṣāṃ pāśupatīṃ labdhvā dvādaśābdena yatphalam |
tatphalaṃ labhate vipra martyaḥ kuṇḍeśadarśanāt || 106 |
mārkaṇḍeyahradātpūrvaṃ śāṇḍilyeśaḥ supuṇyadaḥ |
tatpaścime ca caṇḍeśaścaṇḍāṃśugrahaṇāghahṛt || 107 |
dakṣiṇe ca kapāleśāt kuṇḍaṃ śrīkaṇṭhasaṃjñitam |
tatra kuṇḍe naraḥ snātvā dātā syācchrīprabhāvataḥ || 108 |
mahālakṣmīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tasya kuṇḍasya sannidhau |
mahālakṣmīṃ samabhyarcya snātastatkuṇḍavāriṣu ||| 10 9 |
cāmarāsaktahastābhirdivyastrībhiśca vījyate |
yadā matsyodarīṃ yānti svargalokāddivaukasaḥ ||
tadā tenaiva mārgeṇa yānti strībhirvṛtāḥ sukham || 110 |
caṇḍāṃśugrahaṇā'ghahṛccaṇḍāṃśugrahaṇaṃ yāvadaghaṃ harati tāvadaghahṛt || 107 |

svargadvāramataḥ khyātaṃ tatsthānaṃ munisattama |
tatkuṇḍadakṣiṇe bhāge liṅgaṃ brahmapadapradam || 111 ||
gāyatrīśvarasāvitrīśvarau pūjyau prayatnataḥ |
matsyodaryāstaṭe ramye liṅgaṃ satyavatīśvaram || 112 ||
tayoḥ pūrveṇa sampūjyaṃ tapaḥ śrīparivardhanam |
ugreśvaraṃ mahāliṅgaṃ lakṣmīśāt pūrvadik sthitam || 113 |
jātismaro bhavenmartyastalliṅgasya samarcanāt |
taddakṣiṇe cograkuṇḍaṃ snānāt kanakhalādhikam || 114 ||
karavīreśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tasya kuṇḍasya paścime |
tasya darśanataḥ puṃsāṃ jāyate rogasaṃkṣayaḥ || 115 |
tadvāyavye marīcīśaṃ kuṇḍaṃ cā'ghaughanāśanam |
tatpaścāccaindrakuṇḍaṃ ca liṅgaṃ cendreśvaraṃ mune || 116 ||
pūrveṇa pūrve || 113 ||
kanakhalaṃ haridvāraṃ gayā vāntaratīrthaviśeṣo vā || 114 |

indreśāddakṣiṇe bhāge bhāge śubhā śubhā karkoṭayāpikā |
tatra vāpījale snātvā dṛṣṭvā karkoṭakeśvaram || 117 ||
nāgānāmādhipatyaṃ tu jāyate nātra saṃśayaḥ |
tatpaścāddamicaṇḍeśo brahmahatyāharo haraḥ || 118 ||
taddakṣiṇe mahākuṇḍaṃ rudralokaphalapradam |
tatpaścime mahāliṅgamagnīśa iti viśrutam || 11 9 |
āgneyaṃ nāma kuṇḍaṃ ca tatpūrve'gnisalokadam |
āgneyeśvarataḥ prācyāṃ kuṇḍaṃ taddakṣiṇe śubham || 120 |
tatra kuṇḍe naraḥ snātvā svarge vasati pūrvajaiḥ |
tatprācyāṃ bālacandreśaścandralokagatipradaḥ || 121 |
parito bālacandreśaṃ gaṇaliṅgānyanekaśaḥ |
vilokya tāni liṅgāni gāṇapatyaṃ padaṃ labhet || 122 ||
bālacandrasamīpe tu kūpaḥ pitṛgaṇapriyaḥ |
tatra śrāddhapradaḥ snātvā pitṝn saptā'tra tārayet || 123 |
agnīśo'pyanya eva prasiddhaḥ || 11 9 |
āgneyeśvarataḥ prācyāṃ kuṇḍamityanuvādaḥ | taddakṣiṇe āgneyakuṇḍadakṣiṇe śubhaṃ
kuṇḍamiti śeṣaḥ || 120 |

tadandhoḥ pūrvato liṅgaṃ puṇyaṃ viśveśvarāhvayam |
viśveśvarasya pūrveṇa vṛddhakāleśvaro haraḥ || 124 |
kālodo nāma kūpo'sti tadagre sarvarogahṛt |
yaistu tatrodakaṃ pītaṃ strībhiḥ puṃbhiḥ svakarmabhiḥ || 125 |
na teṣāṃ parivarto'tra kalpakoṭiśatairapi |
tatpītvā janmabandhotthād bhayānmucyeta mānavaḥ || 126 |
tatra kūpe tu yaddattaṃ dānaṃ śivaratātmanām |
saṃvarte'pi na tasyā'sti nāśaḥ kalaśasambhava || 127 |
khaṇḍasphuṭitasaṃskāraṃ tatra kurvanti ye narāḥ |
te rudralokamāsādya modante sukhinaḥ sadā || 128 ||
kāleśāddakṣiṇe bhāge mṛttvīśastvapamṛtyuhṛt |
liṅgaṃ dakṣeśvarāhvaṃ ca tataḥ kūpādudagdiśi || 12 9 |
aparādhasahasraṃ tu naśyettasya samarcanāt || 130 |

saptanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 35 9
mahākāleśaliṅgaṃ ca dakṣeśātpūrvato mahat |
mahākuṇḍe naraḥ snātvā mahākālaṃ tu yo'rcayet || 131 ||
arcitaṃ tena vai tatra jagadetaccarācaram |
antakeśvaramālokya tadyāmyāṃ nā'ntakasya | bhīḥ || 132 ||
hastipāleśvaraṃ liṅga tasya dakṣiṇato mune |
tasya pūjanato yāti puṇyaṃ vai hastidānajam || 133 ||
tatrairābatakuṇḍaṃ ca liṅgamairāvateśvaram |
talliṅgamarcayan martyo dhanadhānyasamṛddhibhāk || 134 ||
taddakṣiṇe śreyase ca liṅgaṃ syānmālatīśvaram |
hastīśvarāduttare tu jayanteśo jayapradaḥ || 135 | |
bandīśvaro mahākālakuṇḍāduttarataḥ śubhaḥ |
bandikuṇḍaṃ ca vikhyātaṃ vārāṇasyāṃ mahā'ghahṛt || 136 |
mahākuṇḍe mahākālakuṇḍe || 131 |

tatra snānena dānena śrāddhenā'kṣayamaśnute |
dhanvantarīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ kuṇḍaṃ tannāma caiva hi || 137 |
tasya liṅgasya nāmā'nyatkuṇḍanāmā'nyadeva hi |
tuṅgeśvaraṃ liṅganāma kuṇḍaṃ vaidyeśvarā'bhidham ||138 |
sudhāmayyo mahauṣadhyaḥ kṣiptāstatra mahādhiyaḥ |
tatkuṇḍasnānatastasmāttalliṅgaparivīkṣaṇāt
naśyanti vyādhayaḥ sarve saha pāpaiḥ sudāruṇaiḥ || 13 9 |
taduttare halīśeśaḥ sarvavyādhiniṣūdanaḥ |
śiveśvaraḥ śivakarastuṅganāmnaśca dakṣiṇe || 140 ||
jamadagnīśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ śiveśāddakṣiṇe śubham | |
tatpaścime bhairaveśaḥ kūpastasyottare śubhaḥ || 141 |
liṅgakuṇḍayoranyanāmanī evāha - tuṅgeśvaramiti | 138 |
sudhāmayyo yā mahauṣadhyo mṛtasañjīvinyādirūpā vartante , tā mahāmahauṣadhyastatra

tadudasparśamātreṇa sarvayajñaphalaṃ labhet |
tatkūpapaścime bhāge sukeśo yogasiddhidaḥ || 142 |
tannairṛtyāṃ ca vyāseśaḥ kūpaśca vimalodakaḥ |
vyāsakūpe naraḥ snātvā tarpayitvā surān pitṝn || 143 |
akṣayaṃ labhate lokaṃ yatra kutrā'bhikāṅkṣitam |
vyāsatīrthātpaścimato ghaṇṭākarṇo hado mahān || 144 ||
ghaṇṭākarṇahṛde snātvā vyāseśaparidarśanāt |
yatra tatra mṛto vā'pi vārāṇasyāṃ mṛto bhavet || 145 ||
ghaṇṭākarṇasamīpe tu pañcacūḍāpsaraḥ saraḥ |
pañcacūḍājale snātvā dṛṣṭvā devaṃ tamīśvaram || 146 ||
svargalokaṃ naro yāti pañcacūḍāpriyo bhavet |
gaurīkūpastato'vācyāṃ sarvajāḍyavināśanaḥ || 147 |
pañcacūḍottare bhāge tīrthaṃ cā'śokasaṃjñitam |
mandākinī mahātīrthaṃ tadudīcyāṃ mahā'ghahṛt || 148 |
tamīśvaraṃ pañcacūḍeśamityarthaḥ || 146 |
priyo bhartā || 147 |

svargaloke'pi sā puṇyā kiṃ punarmānave mune |
taduttare madhyameśo madhyakṣetraṃ svapityaho || 14 9 |
tatra jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā'śokāṣṭamyāṃ madhau naraḥ |
na jātu śokaṃ labhate sadānandamayo bhavet || 150 ||
muktikṣetrapramāṇaṃ ca krośaṃ krośaṃ ca sarvataḥ |
ārabhya liṅgādasmācca puṇyadānmadhyameśvarāt || 151 |
etadeva sadā prāhuḥ sarve vai prapitāmahāḥ |
kaścidasmatkule jāto mandākinyā jalāplutaḥ || 152 |
bhojayet prayato viprān yatīn pāśupatānapi | 尘
mandākinyāṃ naraḥ snātvā dṛṣṭvā vai madhyameśvaram || 153 |

ekaviṃśatkulopeto rudraloke vasecciram |
madhyameśādavācyāṃ ca viśvedeveśvaraḥ śubhaḥ || 154 ||
tadarcanādarcitāḥ syurviśvedevāstrayodaśa |
tatpūrve vīrabhadreśoṃ mahāvīrapadapradaḥ || 155 |
bhadradā bhadrakālī ca tasya dakṣiṇataḥ śubhā |
bhadrakālahado nāma tatrā'tīvaśubhapradaḥ || 156 |
āpastambeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tatyācyāṃ jñānadaṃ param |
taduttare puṇyakūpastatpaścācchaunako hṛdaḥ || 157 |
hradapaścimato liṅgaṃ śaunakeśaṃ sudhīpradam |
hṛde tatra naraḥ snātvā dṛṣṭvā vai śaunakeśvaram || 158 ||
jñānaṃ tatsaṃlabheddivyaṃ yena mṛtyuṃ taratyasau |
taddakṣiṇe jambukeśastiryagyoninivārakaḥ || 15 9 |
vīrabhadro'nyaḥ || 155 |

taduttare mataṅgeśo gānavidyāprabodhakaḥ |
mataṅgeśasya vāyavye nānāliṅgāni sarvataḥ || 160 |
munibhiḥ sthāpitānīha sarvasiddhipradāni ca |
brahmarāteśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ mataṅgeśācca dakṣiṇe || 161 |
talliṅgadarśanādāyurnāntarācchidyate kvacit |
tatrā''jyapeśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ pitṛliṅgānyanekaśaḥ ||
talliṅgasevayā sarve tuṣyanti prapitāmahāḥ || 162 |
taddakṣiṇe siddhakūpaḥ siddhāḥ santi sahasraśaḥ |
vāyurūpāstu ye siddhā ye siddhā bhānuraśmigāḥ || 163 |
taiḥ sthāpitaṃ tu yalliṅgaṃ tat siddheśvaramīritam |
tasya sandarśanādeva sarvāḥ syuḥ siddhayo'malāḥ || 164 |
tatpaścime siddhavāpī pītā snātā ca siddhidā |
prācyāṃ ca siddhakūpādvai liṅgaṃ vyāghreśvarā'bhidham || 165 |
talliṅgadarśanānnṛṇāṃ na bhayaṃ vyāghracorajam | |
jyeṣṭheśvaraṃ ca tadyāmyāṃ jyeṣṭhasthāneti siddhidam || 166 |

taddakṣiṇe mudāṃ dhāma liṅgaṃ prahasiteśvaram |
taduttare nivāseśaḥ kāśīvāsaphalapradaḥ || 167 ||
catuḥ samudrakūpo'sti tatrā'bdhisnānapuṇyadaḥ |
jyeṣṭhā devī tu tatrā'sti natā jyeṣṭhapadapradā || 168 |
avācyāṃ vyāghraliṅgācca liṅgaṃ caṇḍīśvarā'bhidham |
taduttare daṇḍakhātaṃ saraḥ pitṛmudāvaham || 16 9 ||
grahaṇā'nantare snānaṃ daṇḍakhāte'tipuṇyadam |
jaigīṣavyaguhā tatra tatra liṅgaṃ tadāhvayam || 170 |
trirātropoṣitastatra jñānaṃ labhyeta nirmalam |
mahāpuṇyapradaṃ liṅga tatpaścāddevaleśvaram || 171 |
śatakālastatsamīpe śataṃ kālānumāpatiḥ |
talliṅgā''virbhave kāśyāṃ kālayāmāsa kumbhaja || 172 ||
talliṅgadarśanādāyuḥ śatavarṣāṇyakhaṇḍitam |
śātātapeśastadyāmyāṃ mahājapaphalapradaḥ || 173 |
śatakālanāma nirvakti - śatamiti || 172 |

tatpaścime hetukeśo hetubhūto hetubhūto mahāphale |
taddakṣiṇe kṣapādeśo mahājñānapravartakaḥ || 174 |

snātvā kāṇādakūpe yaḥ kaṇādeśaṃ samarcayet || 175 |
na dhanena na dhānyena tyajate sa kadācana |

tatpaścime'ghasaṃhartṛ āṣāḍhīśvarasaṃjñitam |
durvāseśaśca tatpūrve sarvakāmasamṛddhikṛt || 177 |
tadyāmyāṃ bhārabhūteśaḥ pāpabhārā'pahārakaḥ |
vyāseśvarasya pūrveṇa dvau śaṃkhalikhiteśvarau ||
tau dṛśyau yatnataḥ kāśyāṃ mahājñānapravartakau || 178

tadīśāne'vadhūteśo 367
yogajñānapravartakaḥ |

talliṅgasevayā puṃsāṃ paśupāśavimokṣaṇam || 181 |
taddakṣiṇe gobhileśo mahā'bhilaṣitapradaḥ |
jīmūtavāhaneśaśca tatpaścālliṅgamuttamam || 182 |
vidyādharapadaprāptistalliṅgaparisevanāt
mayūkhārkaḥ pañcanade gabhastīśaśca tatra vai || 183 |
dadhikalpahado nāma tadudīcyāṃ mahāprahiḥ |
durlabhaṃ tavyahisnānaṃ durlabhaṃ ca tadīkṣaṇam || 184 |
gabhastīśottare bhāge dadhikalpeśvaro haraḥ |

uddiśya maṅgalāṃ gaurīṃ bhojayedvijadampatī || 186 |
alaṅkṛtya yathāśakti tatpuṇyānto na karhicit |
kṣitipradakṣiṇaphalā maṅgalaikā pradakṣiṇā || 187 |

vadanaprekṣaṇādevī - mukhaprekṣeśvarottare |

liṅge tvaṣṭrīśavṛtteśau mukhaprekṣottare śubhe | |
sahemabhūmidānasya phalaṃ darśanatastayoḥ || 18 9 |
taduttare carcikāyā devyāḥ sandarśanaṃ śubham |
revateśvaraliṅgaṃ ca carcikā'greṇa śāntikṛt || 1 9 0 |
