saptanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 36 9
jaimineśācca vāyavye liṅgaṃ vai rāvaṇeśvaram |
na taddarśanataḥ puṃsāṃ rākṣasānāṃ mahābhayam || 1 9 5 ||
taddakṣiṇe varāheśo varāheśo māṇḍavyeśastato yame |
taddakṣiṇe pracaṇḍeśo yogeśo dakṣiṇe tataḥ || 1 9 6 ||
taddakṣiṇe ca dhāteśaḥ someśaśca tadagrataḥ |
tannairṛtyāṃ kanakeśo mahākanakadaḥ satām || 1 9 7 |

saṃvarteśastadagre ca śveteśastasya paścime || 1 9 8 ||
tatpaścāt kalaśeśaśca liṅgaṃ kālā'bhayapradam |
kālena pāśite śvete mune kumbhāt ! samutthitam || 1 99 ||
citragupteśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ tadudīcyāmaghā'paham |

tadudīcyāmiti sthūlagatyoktam | anyadvā citragupteśvaramiti || 200 ||

kalaśeśādavācyāṃ ca graheśo liṅgamuttamam |

utathyavāmadeveśaṃ liṅgaṃ yāmyāṃ graheśvarāt || 202 |
kambalā'śvatareśau ca tasya dakṣiṇataḥ śubhe |
tatraiva nirmalaṃ liṅgaṃ nalakūbarapūjitam || 203 ||
tadyāmyāṃ maṇikarṇīśaṃ tadudak paliteśvaram |
jarāharaṃ ca tatraiva tatpaścātpāpanāśanam || 204 ||
tadyābhyāṃ nirjareśastannairṛtyāṃ pitāmahaḥ |
pitāmahasrotikā ca tatra śrāddhaṃ mahāphalam || 205 |
tadyāmyāṃ varuṇeśaśca bāṇeśastasya dakṣiṇe |
pitāmahamnotikāyāṃ kūśmāṇḍeśastu siddhikṛt || 206 ||
tatpūrvato rākṣaseśo gaṅgeśastasya dakṣiṇe |

vaivasvateśvarastatra yamalokanivārakaḥ |
tatpaścādaditīśaśca cakreśastasya cā'grataḥ || 208 ||
tadagre kālakeśākhyo dṛṣṭapratyayakṛt paraḥ |
chāyā saṃdṛśyate tatra niṣpāpastadavekṣaṇāt || 20 9 |
tadagre tārakeśaśca tadagre svarṇabhāradaḥ |
taduttare marutteśaḥ śakreśaśca tadagrataḥ || 210 |
taddakṣiṇe ca rambheśastatraiva ca śaśīśvaraḥ |

nāgagandharvayakṣāṇāṃ kinnarā'psarasāmapi |
devarṣigaṇavṛndānāṃ nānāsiddhikarāṇyapi || 212 |
śakreśāddakṣiṇe bhāge phālguneśo mahā'ghahṛt |

rāgadveṣavinirmuktāḥ siddhiṃ yānti ca pūjakāḥ |
teṣāṃ mokṣo mayā''khyāto na tu te devi mānavāḥ || 215 |
madhupiṅgaśvetaketū lāṅgalīśe ca tapasvinau |
anenaiva śarīreṇa jagmatuḥ siddhimuttamām || 216 ||

tatropavāsādekasmāt phalamabdaśatādhikam || 218 |
ekaṃ jāgaraṇaṃ kṛtvā prītikeśa upoṣitaḥ |
gaṇatvapadavī tasya niścitā mama parvaṇi || 21 9 |
devasya dakṣiṇe bhāge tatra vāpī śubhodakā |

tatprācyavācyuttarasyāṃ tāraḥ kālaḥ śilādajaḥ || 221 |
parvaṇi śivarātrau || 21 9 |

liṅgatrayaṃ hṛdabje yacchraddhayā pītamarpayet |
yaistatra tajjalaṃ pītaṃ kṛtārthāste narottamāḥ || 222 ||
avimuktasamīpe'rthyo mokṣeśo mokṣabuddhidaḥ |
karuṇeśo dayādhāma tadudīcyāṃ samarcayet || 223 ||
svarṇākṣeśastu tavyācyāṃ jñānadastasya cottare |
saubhāgyagaurī sampūjyā bahusaubhāgyasampade || 224 ||

sarvavighnacchidabhyarcyaścaturthyāṃ tu viśeṣataḥ |

taddakṣiṇe ca śukreśaḥ putrapautrapravardhanaḥ |
tadudīcyāṃ mahāliṅgaṃ devayānīśvarā'bhidham || 227 ||

bhavānīśau namasyau ca śukreśātpaścime śubhau |
bhaktapotapradau tau tu nijabhaktasya sarvadā || 22 9 |
alarkeśaḥ samabhyarcyaḥ śukreśātpūrvadik sthitaḥ |

raghuṇā raghuvaṃśodbhavena rāmākhyena viṣṇuneti yāvat | taduktamāraṇyake parvaṇi -

taduttare piśāceśaḥ paiśācyapadahārakaḥ |

tadagre ca dilīpeśo brahmeśātpaścime mune |

taduttare mātṛtīrthaṃ snāturjanmabhayā'pahṛt |

tatpaścime naiṛteśo'ṅgiraseśastato yame |

tadagre ca vibhāṇḍeśaḥ kaholeśastaduttare |

tatraiva kuṇḍaṃ vimalaṃ sarvayātrāphalapradam |

yātrayā sarvaliṅgānāṃ yatphalaṃ tadavāpyate |
tapasaścā'pi yogasya siddhidā sā'vanī parā || 260 |
mune śataṃ sahasrāṇi tatra liṅgāni siddhaye |
ekā diguttarā devi vārāṇasyāṃ priyā mama || 261 |
tatrāpi pañcāyatane ratirme nitarāṃ priye | |
utpattisthitikāle'pi tatrā'haṃ sarvadā sthitaḥ || 262 |
ānandā'raṇyavastidā avimuktavasatidā || 257 |
uttarā digiti trilocane sthitatvāduktam || 261 |

saptanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 37 9
evaṃ yastu vijānāti sa pāpairna pralipyate |
satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ trisatyaṃ nā'nyataḥ priye || 263 |
śīghraṃ tatraiva gantavyaṃ yadicchenmāmakaṃ padam |
uddeśamātraṃ liṅgāni kathitāni mayā mune || 264 ||
dvistriḥkṛtyaḥ sthāpitāni bhaktyā liṅgāni kānicit |
na tāni punaruktāni śraddhayā'rthyāni sarvataḥ || 265 ||
etāni yāni liṅgāni yāni kuṇḍāni ye'ndhavaḥ |
yā vāpyastāni sarvāṇi śraddheyāni manīṣibhiḥ || 266 ||
eteṣāṃ darśanātsnānātphalamatrottarottaram |
atratyānāṃ ca liṅgānāṃ kūpānāṃ sarasāmapi || 267 ||
vāpīnāṃ cā'pi mūrtīnāṃ kaḥ saṃkhyātuṃ prabhurbhavet |
ānandakānanasthāni tṛṇānyapi paraṃ varam || 268 ||
divaukaso'pi nānyatra yatpunarjanmabhājanam |
sarvaliṅgamayī kāśī sarvatīrthaikajanmabhūḥ || 26 9 ||

svargāpavargayordātrī dṛṣṭā dehāntasevitā
mama priyatamā devi tvameva tapaso balāt || 270 ||
svabhāvatastviyaṃ kāśī sukhaviśrāmabhūrmama |
ye kāśyā nāma gṛhṇanti ye'numodanta eva hi || 271 |
te me śākhaviśākhābhāḥ skandanandigajāsyavat |
ta eva bhaktā me devi ta eva mama sevakāḥ || 272 |
mumukṣavasta evā'tra ye cā''nandavanaukasaḥ |
tapastaptaṃ mahattaistu kṛtaṃ taistu mahāvratam || 273 ||
taiśca dattaṃ mahādānaṃ ye cā''nandavanaukasaḥ |
te snātasarvatīrthā vai te'khilā'dhvaradīkṣitāḥ || 274 ||
te cīrṇasarvadharmā hi ye cā''nandavanaukasaḥ |
surā'suroraganarā bhūmibhārāya te'khilāḥ || 275 |
vayasyapīha carame yenānandavanaukasaḥ |
antyajo'pi varaḥ kāśyāṃ nānyatra śrutipāragaḥ ||
saṃsārapāragaḥ pūrvastvantyaśvā'ntyajo'pyadhaḥ || 276 |

sa eva nūnaṃ sarvajñaḥ sa eva hyadhikekṣaṇaḥ |
yaḥ pārthivīṃ tanuṃ hitvā kāśyāṃ dhatte sudhāmayīm || 277 |
śrutvā'dhyāyamidaṃ puṇyaṃ puṇyaṃ sarvatīrtharahasyavat |
kāśīdarśanajaṃ puṇyaṃ prāpnoti niyataṃ naraḥ || 278 ||
yaḥ paṭhedimamadhyāyaṃ prātaḥ prātardine dine |
dṛṣṭāni tena sarvāṇi tīrthānyetāni nā'nyathā || 27 9 |
sarvaliṅgamayā'dhyāyaṃ yo'muṃ nityaṃ japetsudhīḥ |
na taṃ yamo na taṃ dūtā nainamaṃho'pi bādhate || 280 ||
brahmayajñaphalaṃ tasya jāyate sukṛtātmanaḥ |
yo japedamumadhyāyaṃ śucistadgatamānasaḥ || 281 |
sa snātaḥ sarvakuṇḍeṣu sarvavāpyambupaḥ sa ca |
sarvaliṅgārcakaḥ so'tra yo'mumadhyāyamājapet || 282 |
kimanyairbahubhiḥ stotrairatistokaphalapradaiḥ |
matpremavadbhiradhyāyo japtavyo'yaṃ mahāphalaḥ ||| 283 |
mahādāneṣu datteṣu datteṣu yatphalaṃ prāpyate'tra vai |
sakṛjjapānmahā'dhyāyādamuṣmāttatsamāpyate || 284 ||
śrutvā'dhyāyamidaṃ puṇyamiti | idaṃ puṇyamākhyānaṃ śrutvā | kiṃ tat ? adhyāya-

snātvā sarvāṇi tīrthāni dṛṣṭvā liṅgānyanekaśaḥ |
yatphalaṃ labhyate martyaistadetajjapanāddhruvam || 285 |
idameva tapo'tyugramayameva japo mahān |
kāśīliṅgāvalīnāmā'dhyāyo japyeta yanmune || 286 ||
mama druhe nāstikāya vedanindāratāya ca |
na dātavyo na dātavyo na dātavyo japastvayam || 287 |
adhyāyasyā'sya japanātpāpaṃ brahmavadhodbhavam |
agamyāgamanaṃ cā'pi tathā'bhakṣyasya bhakṣaṇam || 288 |
gurudārā'bhicārotthaṃ hemasteyasamudbhavam |
mātāpitṛvadhājjātaṃ gobhrūṇahananodbhavam || 28 9 |
mahāpāpāni pāpāni jñātā'jñātāni bhūriśaḥ |
upapāpāni pāpāni manovākkāyajānyapi || 2 9 0 |
vilayaṃ yāntyaśeṣāṇi niḥsandehaṃ mamā''jñayā |
putrānpautrān dhanaṃ dhānyaṃ kalatraṃ kṣetrameva ca || 2 9 1 |
manaḥ samīhitaṃ sarvaṃ svargaṃ mokṣaṃ sukhānyapi | |
japtvā'dhyāyamimaṃ vidvān prāpsyatyeva na saṃśayaḥ || 2 9 2 ||
japyata iti japo'dhyāyaḥ || 287 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ saptanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 7 |

iti yāvatsamākhyāti devo devīpuraḥ kathām |
tāvannandī samāgatya praṇamyeti vyajijñapat || 2 9 3 ||
jātā parisamāptiśca mahāprāsādanirmiteḥ |
sajjīkṛto rathaścā'yaṃ brahmādyā militāḥ surāḥ || 2 9 4 ||
tārkṣyagaḥ puṇḍarīkākṣo dvāri tiṣṭhati sā'nugaḥ |
pratīkṣamāṇo'vasaraṃ puraskṛtya munīśvarān || 2 9 5 ||
caturdaśasu lokeṣu ye ye tiṣṭhanti suvratāḥ |
te niśamyā'dya militāḥ prāveśikamahotsavam || 2 9 6 |
skanda uvāca-
iti nandivacaḥ śrutvā devo devīsamāyutaḥ |
divyaṃ rathaṃ samāruhya nirjagāma triviṣṭapāt || 2 9 .7 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe kṣetratīrthavarṇanaṃ nāma saptanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 7 |

|| athāṣṭanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
vyāsa uvāca-
śṛṇu sūta mahābhāga yathā skandena bhāṣitaḥ |
mahāmahotsavaḥ śambhoḥ pṛcchate kumbhasambhave || 1 |
skanda uvāca --
niśāmaya mahāprājña śambhuprāveśikīṃ kathām |
trailokyānandajananīṃ mahāpātakataṅkinīm || 2 |
mandarādāgataḥ śambhuścaitre damanaparvaṇi |
prāpyā'pyā''nandagahanamitaścetaścacāra ha || 3 |
aṣṭā'dhike navatyākhye'dhyāye tāvannirucyate |
śrīmuktimaṇḍape śrīmadviśveśvarasamāgamaḥ || 1 ||
viśveśvarasya mahāmahotsavaṃ vaktuṃ prastāvayati - śṛṇu sūteti | kumbhasambhave
kumbhasambhavāya kumbhātsamyag bhavatīti kumbhasambhustasmai iti vā || 1 |
prāveśikīṃ praveśasaṃsṛṣṭāṃ tatsambaddhāmityarthaḥ | taṅkinīṃ nāśinīm || 2 |
damanaparvaṇi damanatrayodaśyāṃ caitraśuklatrayodaśyāmityarthaḥ | prāpyā'pīti |
ānandavanasya prāptyaiva yadyapi paramānando jātastathāpītastataścacāretyarthaḥ || 3 |

mokṣalakṣmīvilāse'tha prāsāde siddhimāgate |
devo virajasaḥ pīṭhādantargehaṃ viveśa ha || 4 ||
ūrjaśuklapratipadi budharādhāsamāyuji |
candre saptamarāśisthe śeṣeṣūccagraheṣu ca || 5 |
vādyamāneṣu vādyeṣu prasannāsu haritsu ca |
brāhmaṇānāṃ śrutiravanyakkṛtānyaravāntare || 6 ||
pratiśabditabhūrlokabhuvarlokāntarādhyani
sarvaṃ pramuditaṃ cā''sīcchambhoḥ prāveśikotsave || 7 | ha
jagurgandharvanikarā nanṛtuścā'psarogaṇāḥ |
cāraṇāstu stutiṃ kuryurjahṛṣurdevatāgaṇāḥ || 8 |
virajasaḥ pīṭhāttrilocanaṃsthānāt || 4 |

vavurgandhavahā vātā vavṛṣuḥ kusumairghanāḥ |
sarve maṅgalanepathyāḥ sarve maṅgalabhāṣiṇaḥ || 9 |
sthāvarā jaṅgamāḥ sarve jātā ānandamedurāḥ |
surā'sureṣu sarveṣu gandharveṣūrageṣu ca || 10 ||
vidyādhareṣu sādhyeṣu kinnareṣu nareṣu ca |
strīpuṃjāteṣu sarveṣu rejuścatvāra rejuścatvāra eva ca || 11 ||
niṣpratyūhaṃ ca nitarāṃ puruṣārthāḥ pade pade |
dhūpadhūmabharairvyoma yadraktaṃ tu tadā mune || 12 ||
nā'dyā'pi nīlimā'nantaṃ parityajati karhicit |
nīrājanāya ye dīpāstadā sarve prabodhitāḥ || 13 ||
teṣāṃ jyotīṃṣi khe'dyā'pi rājante tārakācchalāt |
pratisaudhaṃ patākāśca nānākārā vicitritāḥ || 14 ||
ramyadhvajaprabhādhautā rejuḥ pratiśivālayam |
kvacid gāyanti gītajñāḥ kvacinnṛtyanti nartakāḥ || 15 ||
yadraktaṃ yena nīlimnā raktaṃ sambaddhaṃ taṃ nīlimānamiti sambandhaḥ | pratatamiti vā

caturvidhāni vādyāni vādyante ca kvacit kvacit |
pratyadhvaṃ candanarasacchaṭāpicchilabhūmayaḥ || 16 |
haritaśvetamāñjiṣṭhanīlapītabahuprabhāḥ I
pratyaṅgaṇaṃ śubhākārā raṅgamālāścakāśire ||17 ||
ratnakuṭṭimabhūbhāgā gopurā'greṣu rejire |
sudhojjcalā harmyamālāḥ saudhanāma saudhanāma prapedire || 18 ||
acetanānyapi tadā cetanānīva sambabhuḥ |
yāni kānīha kīrtyante maṅgalāni ghaṭodbhava || 1 9 |
teṣāmeva hi sarveṣāṃ tattu janmadivā'bhavat |
āgatya devadevo'tha muktimaṇḍapamāviśat || 20 ||
chaṭāḥ prakṣepā bindavo vā || 16 |
raṅgamālā utsavanimittakamālāḥ || 17 |
gopurāgreṣu bahirdvārasammukheṣu || 18 |
tattu janmadivā'bhavat yasmin divase viśveśasya praveśastadeva dinaṃ teṣāṃ sarveṣāṃ

athā'bhiṣiktaścaturānanena maharṣivṛndaiḥ saha devadevaḥ |
śubhāsanasthaḥ sahito bhavānyā kumāravṛndaiḥ parito ghṛtaśca || 21 ||
ratnairasaṃkhyairbahubhirdukūlairmālyairvicitrairlasadiṣṭagandhaiḥ
apūpujan devagaṇā maheśaṃ tadā mudā te ca mahoragendrāḥ || 22 |
ratnākaraiścāpi girīndravaryairyathāsvamanyairapi puṇyadhībhiḥ |
sampūjitaḥ kumbhaja tatra śambhurnīrājito mātṛgaṇairatheṃśaḥ || 23 ||
santoṣya sarvān prathamaṃ munīndrān svaiḥ svairhṛdisthaiśca cirā'bhilāṣaiḥ |
brahmāṇamābhāṣya śivo'tha viṣṇuṃ jagāda sarvā'maravṛndavanyaḥ || 24 ||
ito niṣīdeti samānapūrvaṃ tvaṃ me samastaprabhutaikahetuḥ |
dūre'pi tiṣṭhannikaṭastvameva tvatto na kaścinmama kāryakartā || 25 ||
tvayā divodāsanarendravaryaḥ sadūpadeśaiśca tathopadiṣṭaḥ |
yathā sa siddhiṃ paramāmavāpa samīhitaṃ me nikhilaṃ ca siddham || 26 |
kumāravṛndā gaṇeśakārtikeyasamūhāḥ sanakādayo vā || 21 |

viṣṇo varaṃ brūhi ya īpsitaste nā'deyamatrā'sti kimapyaho te |
idaṃ mayā''nandavanaṃ yadāptaṃ hetustu tatra tvamasau gaṇeśaḥ || 27 ||
na me priyaṃ kiñcana viṣṭapatraye tathā yatheyaṃ parasaukhyabhūmiḥ |
vārāṇasī brahmarasāyanasya khanirjaniryatra na dīrghaśāyinām || 28 |
śrutveti vākyaṃ jagadīśituśca provāca viṣṇurvaradaṃ maheśam |
yadi prasanno'si pinākapāṇe tadā padādūramahaṃ na te syām || 2 9 ||
śrutveti vākyaṃ madhusūdanasya jagāda tuṣṭo nitarāṃ purāriḥ |
sadā murāre mama sannidhau tvaṃ tiṣṭhasva nirvāṇaramāśraye'tra || - 30 |
ādāvanārādhya bhavantamatra yo māṃ bhajiṣyatyapi bhaktiyuktaḥ |
samīhitaṃ tasya na setsyati dhruvaṃ parā̭tparānme'mbujacakrapāṇe || 31 ||
hetustviti tuścārthe gaṇeśaścetyanena sambadhyate || 27 ||
dīrghaśāyināṃ tyaktaprāṇānām || 28 |
nirvāṇaramāśraye mokṣalakṣmyāspade muktimaṇḍapa iti yāvat | tava lakṣmīpati-
tvānmokṣalakṣmyāḥ sadmani sthātumucitamiti bhāvaḥ || 30 ||
varātparāditi kvacit || 31 |

sarvatra saukhyaṃ mama muktimaṇḍape saṃtiṣṭhamānasya bhavedihā'cyuta |
na tattu kailāsagirau sunirmale na bhaktacetasyapi niścalaśriyi || 32 |
nimeṣamātraṃ sthiracittavṛttayastiṣṭhanti ye dakṣiṇamaṇḍape'tra me |
ananyabhāvā api gāḍhamānasā na te punargarbhadaśāmupāsate || 33 ||
saṃsnāya ye cakrasarasyagādhe samastatīrthekaśirovibhūṣaṇe |
kṣaṇaṃ viśantīha nirīhamānasā nirenasaste mama pārṣadā hi || 34 |
smaranti ye māmapavargamaṇḍape kiñcidyathāśakti dadatyapi svam |
śṛṇvanti puṇyāśca kathāḥ kṣaṇaṃ sthirāste koṭigodānaphalaṃ bhajanti || 35 ||
upendrataptāni tapāṃsi taiściraṃ snātā hi te cākhilatīrthasārthakaiḥ | |
snātveha ye vai maṇikarṇikāhade samāsate muktijanāśraye kṣaṇam || 36 |
tīrthāni santīha pade pade hare tulā kva teṣāṃ maṇikarṇikāyāḥ |
katīha no santi śubhāśca maṇḍapāḥ paraṃ paro muktiramāśrayo'yam || 37 ||
niścalaśriyi niścalā śrīryasmiṃstasmin ||| 32 |

kaivalyamaṇḍapasyā'sya bhaviṣye dvāpare hare |
loke khyātirbhavitrīyameṣa kukkuṭamaṇḍapaḥ || 38 ||
hariruvāca-
bhālanetra samākhyāhi kathaṃ nirvāṇamaṇḍapaḥ |
tathā khyātimasau gantā yathā devena bhāṣitam ||| 3 9 |
devadeva uvāca-
mahānando dvijo nāma bhaviṣyo'tra caturbhuja |
agravedī samācārastyaktatīrthapratigrahaḥ || 40 ||
adāmbhiko'krūramanāḥ sadaivā'tithivallabhaḥ |
atha yauvanamāsādya pitaryuparate sa hi || 41 ||
viṣameṣuśaraistītraiḥ kāritastvapade padam |
jahāra kasyacid bhāryāṃ maitrīṃ kṛtvā tu tena vai || 42 |
tayā ca prerito'peyaṃ papau cā'pi vimohitaḥ |
abhakṣyabhakṣaṇarucirabhūnmadanamohitaḥ || 43 ||
agravedī ṝgvedī || 40 |

vaiṣṇavān dhanino dṛṣṭvā kṣaṇaṃ vaiṣṇavaveṣabhṛt |
śaivānnindati mūḍhātmā narakatrāṇakāraṇam || 44 ||
śivabhaktān samālokya kiñcicca pariditsukān |
garhayedvaiṣṇavān sarvān śaivaliṅgopajīvikaḥ || 45 ||
iti pākhaṇḍadharmajñaḥ sandhyāsnānaparāṅmukhaḥ |
viśālatilakaḥ sragvī śuddhadhautāmbarojjvalaḥ || 46 ||
śikhī copagrahakaraḥ sarvebhyo'satpratigrahī |
tasyā'patyadvayaṃ jātamunmattapathavartinaḥ || 47 ||
evaṃ tasya pravṛttasya kaścitparvatadeśataḥ |
samāgamiṣyati dhanī tīrthayātrārthasiddhaye || 48 |
snātvā sa cakrasarasi kathayiṣyati ceti vai |
ahamasmi dhanī ditsurjātyā cāṇḍālasattamaḥ || 4 9 |
asti kaścivyatigrāhī yasmai dadyāmahaṃ dhanam |
iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā kaiściccā'ṅgulisaṃjñayā || 50 ||

aṣṭanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ 3 9 3
uddiṣṭa upaviṣṭo'sau yo japeddhyānamudrayā |
eṣa pratigrahaṃ tvatto grahīṣyati na cetaraḥ || 51 ||
iti teṣāṃ vacaḥ śrutvā sa gatvā tatsamīpataḥ |
daṇḍavāṇipatyā'tha taṃ babhāṣe tadā'ntyajaḥ || 52 ||
māmuddhara mahāvipra tīrthaṃ me saphalīkuru |
kiñcidvastvasti me tattvaṃ gṛhāṇā'nugrahaṃ kuru || 53 ||
athā'kṣamālikāṃ karṇe kṛtvā dhyānaṃ visṛjya ca |
kiyaddhanaṃ tavā'stīha papraccha karaṃsaṃjñayā || 54 |
tacca saṃjñāṃ sa vai buddhvā provācā'tiprahṛṣṭavat |
santṛptiryāvatā te syāttāvaddāsyāmi nā'nyathā || 55 ||
iti tadvacanaṃ śrutvā tyaktvā maunamuvāca ha |
sānandaḥ sa mahānando niḥspṛho'smi pratigrahe || 56 ||
paraṃ te'nugrahārthaṃ tu kariṣyāmi pratigraham |
kiñca me vacanaṃ tvaṃ cet kariṣyasyuttamottama || 57 ||

yāvadastyakhilaṃ vittaṃ tanmadhye'nyasya kasyacit |
na stokamapi dātavyaṃ tadā''dāsyāmi nānyathā || 58 |
cāṇḍāla uvāca-
yāvadasti mayā''nītaṃ viśveśaprītaye vasu |
tāvattubhyaṃ pradāsyāmi viśveśastvaṃ yato mama || 5 9 |
ye vasantīha viśveśarājadhānyāṃ dvijottama |
kṣudrā kṣudrā jantumātrā viśveśāṃśāsta eva hi || 60 |
paroddharaṇaśīlā ye ye parecchāprapūrakāḥ |
paropakṛtiśīlā ye viśveśāṃśāsta eva hi || 61 |
iti tadvacanaṃ tadvacanaṃ śrutvā śrutvā prahṛṣṭendriyamānasaḥ |
uvāca pārvatīyaṃ taṃ so'grajanmā'ntyajaṃ tadā | 62 |
ādāsyāmīti cchedaḥ || 58 |

āyāhi darbhānā''dehi kurutsargaṃ tvarā'nvitaḥ |
tatheti sa cakārā''śu pārvatīyo mahāmanāḥ || 63 |
viśveśaḥ prīyatāṃ ceti procya yāto yathā''gataḥ |
sa ca . dvijo dvijairanyairdhikkṛto'pi vasanniha || 64 ||
bahirnirgatamātrastu bahubhiḥ paribhūyate |
cāṇḍālabrāhmaṇaścaiṣa cāṇḍālā''ttadhanastvasau || 65 ||
asāveva hi cāṇḍālaḥ sarvalokabahiṣkṛtaḥ |
itthaṃ tamanudhāvanti thūtkurvantaḥ thūtkurvantaḥ parito hare || 66 ||
sa ca tadbhayato gehāt kākabhītadivā'ndhavat |
na niḥsaret kvacidapi lajjākṛtinatāsyakaḥ || 67 |
sa ekadā sampradhārya gṛhiṇyā lokadūṣitaḥ |
jagāma kīkaṭān deśāṃstyaktvā vārāṇasīṃ purīm || 68 |
pārvatīyo yātaḥ svadeśaṃ gataḥ || 63 ||
dhikkṛtaḥ tiraskṛtaḥ || 64 |
pāde'kṣarādhikyamārṣam || 66 |

madhyemārgaṃ sa gacchan vai lakṣitastu sakāñcanaḥ |
api kārpaṭikāntasthaḥ sa ruddho mārgarodhibhiḥ || 6 9 |
nītvā te tamaraṇyānīṃ taskarāḥ saparicchadam |
ulluṇṭhya dhanamādāya samālocya parasparam || 70 ||
procurbhūridhanaṃ caitajjīryatyasminna jīvati |
asau dhanī prayatnena vadhyaḥ saparicārakaḥ || 71 |
sampradhāryeti te prāhuḥ smartavyaṃ smara pānthika |
tvāṃ vayaṃ ghātayiṣyāmo niścitaṃ saparicchadam || 72 ||
niśamyeti manasyeva kathayāmāsa sa dvijaḥ |
aho pratigṛhītaṃ me yadarthaṃ vasu bhūriśaḥ || 73 ||
kuṭumbamapi tannaṣṭaṃ naṣṭaścā'pi pratigrahaḥ |
jīvitaṃ cā'pi me naṣṭaṃ naṣṭā kāśīpurīsthitiḥ || 74 ||
kīkaṭān gayāpradeśān || 68 |
sakāñcanaḥ svarṇavān || 6 9 |

yugapatsarvamevā''śu naṣṭaṃ durbuddhiceṣṭayā |
na kāśyāṃ maraṇaṃ prāptaṃ tasmādduṣṭapratigrahāt || 75 ||
prānte kuṭumbasmaraṇāttathā kāśīsmṛterapi |
corairhato'pi sa tadā kīkaṭe kukkuṭo'bhavat || 76 |
sā kukkuṭī sutau tau tu tāmracūḍatvamāpatuḥ |
prānte kāśīsmaraṇato jātā jātismṛtiḥ parā || 77 |
itthaṃ bahutithe kāle gate kārpaṭikottamāḥ |
tasminnevā'dhvani prāptāścatvāro yatra kukkuṭāḥ || 78 ||
vārāṇasyāḥ kthāṃ proccaiḥ kurvanto'nyonyameva hi |
kāśīkathāṃ samākarṇya tadā te caraṇāyudhāḥ || 7 9 ||
jātismṛtiprabhāveṇa tatsaṅgena tu nirgatāḥ |
taiśca kārpaṭikaśreṣṭhaiḥ pathi dṛṣṭvā kṛpālubhiḥ || 80 |

tandulādiparikṣepaiḥ prāpitāḥ kṣetramuttamam |
te tu kṣetraṃ samāsādya catvāraścaraṇāyudhāḥ || 81 |
cariṣyanto'tra parito muktimaṇḍapamuttamam |
jitāhārān saniyamān kāmakrodhaparāṅmukhān || 82 |
prahāsān matkathālāpān lobhamohavivarjitān |
svardhunīsnānasaṃklinnasunirmalaśiroruhān || 83 ||
mannāmoccāraṇaparān matkathārpitasuśrutīn |
maddattacittasadvṛttīn dṛṣṭvā kṣetranivāsinaḥ || 84 |
mānayāmāsuratha tān kukkuṭān sādhuvartmanaḥ |
prāktanādvāsanāyogāt sampradhārya parasparam ||
krameṇāhāramākuñcya prāṇāṃstyakṣyanti cā'tra vai || 85 |
cariṣyantaḥ cariṣyanti paryaṭiṣyantītyarthaḥ | jitāhārānityādermānayāmāsuratheti

paśyatāṃ sarvalokānāṃ viṣṇo te madanugrahāt |
vimānamadhiruhyā''śu kailāsaṃ prāpya matpadam || 86 |
paśyatāmiti ślokadvayaṃ vākyam | he viṣṇo ! te catvāraḥ kukkuṭā ityanuṣajjate |
vimānamadhiruhya suciraṃ kālaṃ matpadaṃ prāpya bhogān nirviśya bhuktvā'tra kāśyāṃ kailāse
vā jñānino bhūtvā | tenaiva śarīreṇeti śeṣaḥ | śāśvatīṃ muktiṃ prāpsyantītyanvayaḥ | nanu
kāśīmṛtānāṃ kathaṃ vimānamadhiruhya kailāse gamanaṃ bhogo vā tatrāha - madanugrahāditi |
antakāle kāśīsmaraṇānmattoṣaṇājjāto yo madanugraha ete bhuktimuktī mayā prāpaṇīyā
iti yā mamecchā , tasmādityarthaḥ | idamatra tattvam - antakāle hi tasya smṛti-

nirviśya suciraṃ kālaṃ divyān bhogānanuttamān |
tato'tra jñānino bhūtvā muktiṃ prāpsyanti śāśvatīm || 87 |
tato lokāstadārabhya kathayiṣyanti sarvataḥ |
muktimaṇḍapanāmaitadeṣa kukkuṭamaṇḍapaḥ || 88 |
caritramapi vai teṣāṃ ye smariṣyanti mānavāḥ |
muktimaṇḍapamāsādya śreyaḥ prāpsyanti te'pi hi || 8 9 |
iti yāvatkathāṃ śambhurbhaviṣyāmagrato hareḥ |
akarottumulo nādo ghaṇṭānāṃ tāvadudgataḥ || 9 0 |
atha nandinamāhūya devadeva umādhavaḥ |
provāca nandin vijñāyā''gatya brūhi kuto ravaḥ || 9 1 ||
atha nandī samāgatya provāca vṛṣabhadhvajam |
namaskṛtya prahṛṣṭā''syaḥ prabaddhakarasampuṭaḥ || 9 2 |
tumulo nāda iti | liṅgarūpiṇo viśveśasya dhruvaṃ vidāryodbhūto ghaṇṭānāmiva nādo jāta

nandyuvāca-
devadeva trinayana kimapūrvaṃ bravīmi te | |
mokṣalakṣmīvilāso'tra kaiścitkaiścitsamarcyate || 9 3 ||
atha smitvā'bravīcchambhuḥ siddhaṃ no'stu samīhitam |
utthāya devadeveśaḥ saha devyā sumaṅgalaḥ ||
brahmaṇā hariṇā sārdhaṃ tato'gādraṅgamaṇḍapam || 9 4 |
skanda uvāca -
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ paramānandakāraṇam |
naraḥ parāṃ mudaṃ prāpya kailāsaṃ prāpsyati dhruvam || 9 5 ||
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe muktimaṇḍapagamanaṃ nāmā'ṣṭanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 8 ||
mokṣalakṣmīvilāsaḥ mokṣalakṣmyā vilāsa ullāsaḥ sphūrtismātsa padārthastathā || 9 3 ||
raṅgamaṇḍapaṃ śṛṅgāramaṇḍapam || 9 5 |
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmaṣṭanavatitamo'dhyāyaḥ || 9 8 |

|| athaikonaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
vyāsa uvāca-
śṛṇu sūta yathāproktaṃ kumbhaje śarajanmanā |
devadevasya caritaṃ viśveśasya parātmanaḥ || 1
agastya uvāca-
senānīḥ kathaya tvaṃ me tato nirvāṇamaṇḍapāt |
nirgatya devo devendraḥ sahitaḥ kiṃ cakāra ha || 2 |
skanda uvāca -
muktimaṇḍapataḥ śambhurbrahmaviṣṇupurogamaḥ |
śṛṅgāramaṇḍapaṃ prāpya yaccakāra vadāmi tat || 3 |
navā'dhike navatyākhye'dhyāye tāvannirucyate |
śrīviśveśvaraliṅgasya mahimā paramādbhutaḥ || 1 |
viśveśasya caritaṃ vaktuṃ prastāvayati - śṛṇviti || || 1 | |
senānīḥ he kārtikeya || 2 |

prāṅmukhastūpaviśyeśaḥ sahā'smābhiḥ saheśayā |
brahmaṇā'dhiṣṭhitaḥ savye vāmapārśve'tha śārṅgiṇā || 4 ||
vījyamāno mahendreṇa ṛṣibhiḥ parito vṛtaḥ |
gaṇaiḥ pṛṣṭhapradeśasthairghoṣaṃ tiṣṭhaddhirādarāt || 5 |
udāyudhaiḥ sevyamānaścā''vasan mānabhūribhiḥ |
brahmaṇe viṣṇave śambhuḥ pāṇimutkṣipya dakṣiṇam || 6 |
darśayāmāsa deveśo liṅgaṃ paśyata paśyata |
idameva paraṃ jyotiridameva parātparam || 7 |

idameva hi me rūpaṃ sthāvaraṃ cā'tisiddhidam |
ete pāśupatāḥ siddhā ābālabrahmacāriṇaḥ || 8 |
jitendriyāstaponiṣṭhāḥ pañcārthajñānanirmalāḥ |
bhasmakūṭaśayā dāntāḥ suśīlā ūrdhvaretasaḥ || 9 |
liṅgārcanaratā nityamananyendriyamānasāḥ |
sadaiva vāruṇā''gneyasnānadvayasunirmalāḥ || 10 ||
kandamūlaphalāhārāḥ paratattvārpitekṣaṇāḥ |
satyavanto jitakrodhā nirmohā niṣparigrahāḥ || 11 ||
nirīhā niṣprapañcāśca nirātaṅkā nirāmayāḥ |
nirbhagā nirupāyāśca niḥsaṅgā nirmalāśayāḥ || 12 ||
nistīrṇodagrasaṃsārā nirvikalpā nirenasaḥ |
nirdvandvā niścitārthāśca nirahaṅkāravṛttayaḥ || 13 |
sadaiva me mahāprītā matputrā matsvarūpiṇaḥ |
ete pūjyā namasyāśca mabuddhyā matparāyaṇaiḥ || 14 ||
ete pāśupatā ityādīnāṃ sadaiva me mahāprītā iti ṣaṣṭhenā'nvayaḥ || 8 |
pañcārthajñānanirmalāḥ pañcānāmakārokāramakāranādabindurūpāṇāmarthajñānena nirmalāḥ ,
catvāro vedā itihāsapurāṇaṃ ceti vā pañcapañcākṣarīvidyāvarṇānāṃ brahmaviṣṇurudreśvara-
sadāśivākhyānāṃ vā'rthajñānānnirmalā iti vā | bhasmakūṭaśayā iti bhasmakūṭe bhasma-
samūhe śerata iti | tathā ca śrutiḥ - " bhasmacchanno bhasmaśayyāśayāno rudrādhyāyī mucyate
sarvapāpaiḥ " iti || 9 |
āgneyamagnihotrajaṃ bhasma || 10 |
niṣprapañcā dehādyabhimānaśūnyāḥ | nirbhagāḥ tyaktaiśvaryāḥ | nirdambhā iti

arciteṣveṣyahaṃ prīto bhaviṣyāmi na saṃśayaḥ |
asmin vaiśveśvare kṣetre sambhojyāḥ śivayoginaḥ || 15 ||
koṭibhojyaphalaṃ samyagekaikaparisaṃkhyayā |
ayaṃ viśveśvaraḥ sākṣātsthāvarātmā jagatprabhuḥ || 16 ||
sarveṣāṃ sarvasiddhīnāṃ kartā bhaktijuṣāmiha |
ahaṃ kaṃdāciddṛśyaḥ syāmadṛśyaḥ syāṃ kadācana || 17 ||
ānandakānane cā'tra svairaṃ tiṣṭhāmi devatāḥ |
anugrahāya sarveṣāṃ bhaktānāmiha sarvadā || 18 ||
sthāsyāmi liṅgarūpeṇa cintitārthaphalapradaḥ |
svayambhūnyasvayambhūni yāni yāni liṅgāni sarvataḥ ||
tāni sarvāṇi cā''yānti draṣṭuṃ liṅgamidaṃ sadā || 1 9 ||
ahaṃ sarveṣu liṅgeṣu tiṣṭhāmyeva na saṃśayaḥ |
parantviyaṃ parā mūrtirmama liṅgasvarūpiṇī || 20 ||
he devatāḥ ||| 18 |
iyametatsthānādheyā || 20 |

yena liṅgamidaṃ dṛṣṭaṃ śraddhayā śuddhacakṣuṣā |
sākṣātkāreṇa tenā'haṃ dṛṣṭa eva divaukasaḥ || 21 ||
śravaṇādasya liṅgasya pātakaṃ janmasañcitam |
kṣaṇātkṣayati śṛṇvantu devā ṛṣigaṇaiḥ saha || 22 |
smaraṇādasya liṅgasya pāpaṃ janmadvayārjitam |
avaśyaṃ naśyati kṣipraṃ mama vākyānna saṃśayaḥ || 23 |
etalliṅgaṃ samuddiśya gṛhānniṣkramaṇakṣaṇāt |
vilīyate mahāpāpamapi janmatrayārjitam || 24 |
darśanādasya liṅgasya hayamedhaśatodbhavam |
puṇyaṃ labheta labheta niyataṃ mamā'nugrahato'marāḥ || 25 |
svayambhuvo'sya liṅgasya mama viśveśituḥ surāḥ |
rājasūyasahasrasya phalaṃ syātsparśamātrataḥ || 26 |
svayambhuvaḥ svecchayāptasthiteḥ | asya etatsthānāśritasya || 26 |

puṣpamātrapradānācca culukodakapūrvakam |
śatasauvarṇikaṃ puṇyaṃ labhate bhaktiyogataḥ || 27 ||
pūjāmātraṃ vidhāyā'sya liṅgarājasya bhaktitaḥ |
sahasrahemakamalapūjāphalamavāpyate || 28 |
vidhāya mahatīṃ pūjāṃ pañcāmṛtapuraḥsarām |
asya liṅgasya labhate puruṣārthacatuṣṭayam || 2 9 ||
vastrapūtajalairliṅgaṃ snāpayitvā mamā'marāḥ |
lakṣā'śvamedhajanitaṃ puṇyamāpnoti sattamaḥ || 30 ||
sugandhacandanarasairliṅgamālipya bhaktitaḥ |
ālipyate surastrībhiḥ sugandhairyakṣakardamaiḥ || 31 |
sāmodadhūpadānaiśca divyagandhāśrayo bhavet |
ghṛtadīpaprabodhaiśca jyotīrūpavimānagaḥ || 32 |

karpūravartidīpena sakṛddattena bhaktitaḥ |
karpūradehagauraśrīrbhavedbhālavilocanaḥ || 33 ||
dattvā naivedyamātraṃ tu sikthe sikthe yugaṃ yugam !
kailāsādrau vaseddhīmān mahābhogasamanvitaḥ || 34 ||
viśveśe paramānnaṃ yo dadyāt sā''jyaṃ saśarkaram |
trailokyaṃ tarpitaṃ tena sadevapitṛmānavam || 35 |
mukhavāsaṃ tu yo dadyāddarpaṇaṃ cārucāmaram |
ullocaṃ sukhaparyaṅkaṃ sukhaparyaṅkaṃ tasya puṇyaphalaṃ mahat || 36 |
saṃkhyāsāgararatnānāṃ kathañcitkartumiṣyate |
mukhavāsādidānasya kaḥ saṃkhyāmatra kārayet || 37 ||
pūjopakaraṇadravyaṃ yo ghaṇṭāgaḍukādikam |
bhaktyā me bhavane dadyāt sa vasedatra me'ntike || 38 ||
sikthe sikthe kaṇe kaṇe || 34 ||
ullocaṃ vitānam || 36 |

yo gītavādyanṛtyānāmekaṃ maṭhaprītaye vyadhāt |
tasyā'grato divārātraṃ bhavettauryatrikaṃ mahat || 3 9 ||
citralekhanakarmādi prāsāde me'tra kārayet |
yaḥ sacitrānmahābhogān bhuṅkte matpurataḥ sthitaḥ || 40 ||
sakṛdviśveśvaraṃ natvā madhyejanma sudhīrnaraḥ |
trailokyavanditapado jāyate vasudhāpatiḥ || 41 -
yastu viśveśvaraṃ dṛṣṭvā hyanyatrā'pi vipadyate |
tasya janmāntare mokṣo bhavatyeva na saṃśayaḥ || 42 | ||
viśveśākhyā tu jihvāgre viśvanāthakathā śrutau |
viśveśaśīlanaṃ citte yasya tasya janiḥ kutaḥ || 43 ||
liṅgaṃ me viśvanāthasya dṛṣṭvā yaścā'numodate |
same gaṇeṣu gaṇyeta mahāpuṇyabalāśritaḥ || 44 |
vyadhāt kuryāt || 3 9 |
madhyejanma janmano madhye || 41 ||
vipadyate naśyati || 42 |

nityaṃ viśveśa viśveśa viśvanātheti yo japet |
trisandhyaṃ taṃ sukṛtinaṃ japāmyahamapi dhruvam || 45 |
mamā'pīdaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ sadā pūjyatamaṃ surāḥ |
tasmātsarvaprayatnena pūjyaṃ devarṣimānavaiḥ || 46 |
yairna viśveśvaro dṛṣṭo yairna viśveśvaraḥ smṛtaḥ |
kṛtāntadūtaiste dṛṣṭāstaiḥ smṛtā garbhavedanā || 47 ||
yairidaṃ praṇataṃ liṃṅgaṃ praṇatāste surā'suraiḥ |
yasyaikena praṇāmena dikpālapadamalpakam ||
dikpālapadataḥ pātaḥ pātaḥ śivanaterna hi || 48 ||
śṛṇvantu devarṣigaṇāḥ samastāstathyaṃ bruve tacca paropakṛtyai |
na bhūrbhuvaḥ svargamaharjanāntarviśveśatulyaṃ kvacidasti liṅgam || 4 9 ||
na satyaloke na tapasyaho surā vaikuṇṭhakailāsarasātaleṣu |
tīrthaṃ kvacidvai maṇikarṇikāsamaṃ liṅgaṃ ca viśveśvaratulyamanyataḥ || 50 ||
smṛtā prāptā ||| 47 |
janeti tapaḥsatyayorupalakṣaṇam || 4 9 |

na viśvanāthasya samaṃ hi liṅgaṃ na tīrthamanyanmaṇikarṇikātaḥ |
tapovanaṃ kutracidasti nānyacchubhaṃ mamā''nandavanena tulyam || 51 ||
vārāṇasī tīrthamayī samastā yasyāstu nāmā'pi hi tīrthatīrtham |
tatrā'pi kācinmama saukhyabhūmirmahāpavitrā maṇikarṇikā'sau || 52 ||
sthānādamuṣmānmama rājasaudhāvyācyāṃ manāgīśasamāśritāyām |
savye'pasavye ca karāḥ krameṇa śatatrayī cā'pi śatadvayī ca || 53 |
hastāḥ śataṃ pañcasurāpagāyāmudīcyavācyormaṇikarṇikeyam |
sārastrilokyāḥ parakośabhūmiryaiḥ sevitā te mama hṛcchayā hi || 54 ||

asminmamā''nandavane yadetalliṅgaṃ sudhādhāma sudhāmadhāma |
āsaptapātālatalāt svayambhusamutthitaṃ bhaktakṛpāvaśena || 55 |
ye'smin janāḥ kṛtrimabhāvabuddhyā liṅgaṃ bhajiṣyanti ca hetuvādaiḥ |
teṣāṃ hi daṇḍaḥ para eṣa eva na garbhavāsād viramanti te dhruvam || 56 | |
yadyaddhitaṃ svasya sadaiva tattalliṅge'tra deyaṃ mama bhaktimadbhiḥ |
ihā'pyamutrā'pi na tasya saṃkṣayo yatheha pāpasya kṛtasya pāpibhiḥ || 57 |
sudhādhāma sudhāmadhāma sudhā'mṛtaṃ kaivalyaṃ tasya dhāma susthāneṣu dvārakādiṣu dhāmnaḥ
svaprakāśasya dhāma sphūrtiryasmāttat | yadvā sudhāmadhāma śreṣṭhaṃ sthānamityarthaḥ |

dūrasthitairapyadhibuddhibhiryairliṅgaṃ samārādhi mamedamatra |
mayaiva dattaiḥ śubhavastujātairniḥśreyasaḥ śrīrvasayet satastān || 58 |
śṛṇuṣva viṣṇo śṛṇu sṛṣṭikartaḥ śṛṇvantu devarṣigaṇāḥ samastāḥ |
idaṃ hi liṅgaṃ parasiddhidaṃ satāṃ bhedo manāgatra na matsakāśataḥ || 5 9 ||
asmin hi liṅge'khilasiddhisādhane samarpitaṃ yaiḥ sukṛtārjitaṃ vasu |
tebhyo'timātrā'khilasaukhyasādhanaṃ dadāmi nirvāṇapadaṃ sunirbhayam || 60 |
utkṣipya bāhuṃ tvasakṛdbravīmi trayīmaye'smiṃstrayameva sāram |
viśveśaliṅgaṃ maṇikarṇikā'mbu kāśīpurī satyamidaṃ trisatyam || 61 |
adhibuddhibhiḥ adhikabuddhibhiḥ | vasayettān sato'dhiśritya vasedityarthaḥ |
varayediti kvacit || 58 |

utthāya devo'tha saśaktirīśastasmin hi liṅge kṛtacārupūjaḥ |
yayau layaṃ te ca surā jayeti jayeti coktvā nunuvustamīśam || 62 |
skanda uvāca .. maitrāvaruṇe'vimuktasya mahāmate |
kṣetrasya |
prabhāvasyaikadeśo'yaṃ kathitaḥ kalmaṣāpahaḥ || 63 |
tavā'gre tu yathābuddhi kāśīviśleṣatāpinaḥ |
acireṇaiva kālena kāśīṃ prāpsyasyanuttamām || 64 ||
astācalasya śikharaṃ prāptavāneṣa bhānumān |
tavā'pi hi mamā'pyeṣa maunasya samayo'bhavat || 65 ||
vyāsa uvāca -
śrutveti sa muniḥ sūta sandhyopāstyai vinirgataḥ |
praṇamyaumeyamasakṛllopāmudrāsamanvitaḥ || 66 ||
rahasyaṃ parivijñāya kṣetrasya śaśimaulinaḥ |
agastyo niścitamanāḥ śivadhyānaparo'bhavat || 67 |
kṛtacāru pūjaḥ kṛtā cārvī pūjā yena saḥ | | saptamyanto vā pāṭhaḥ akhilalokakāmada
|| iti śrīrāmānandakṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāmekonaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ || 99 ||

ānandakānanasyeha mahimānaṃ mahattaram |
ko'tra varṇayituṃ śaktaḥ sūta varṣaśatairapi || 68 |
yathā devyai samākhyāyi śivena paramātmanā |
tathā skandena kathitaṃ māhātmyaṃ kumbhasambhave || 6 9 ||
tavā'gre ca samākhyātaṃ śukādīnāṃ ca sattama |
idānīṃ praṣṭukāmo'si kiṃ tat pṛccha vadāmi te || 70 |
śrutvā'dhyāyamimaṃ puṇyaṃ sarvakalmaṣanāśanam |
samastacintitaphalapradaṃ martyo bhavet kṛtī || 71 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe viśveśvaraliṅgamahimākhyo
nāmaikonaśatatamo'dhyāyaḥ || 99 |

|| atha śatatamo'dhyāyaḥ ||
sūta uvāca-
idaṃ skāndamahaṃ śrutvā kāśīkhaṇḍamanuttamam |
nitarāṃ paritṛpto'smi hṛdi cā'pi vidhāritam || 1 ||
anukramaṇikā'dhyāyaṃ tathā māhātmyamuttamam |
pārāśarya samācakṣva yathāpūrvamidaṃ bhavet || 2 |
vyāsa uvāca- jātūkarṇya niśāmaya |
sūtā'vadhehi dharmātman
śukavaiśampāyanādyāḥ śṛṇvantvapi ca bālakāḥ || 3 |
anukramaṇikā'dhyāyaṃ māhātmyaṃ cāpi khaṇḍajam |
pravakṣyāmyaghanāśāya mahāpuṇyapravardhanam || 4 |
athā'dhyāye śatatame sarvābhīṣṭaphalaprade |
anukramaṇikā nāma samyagatra nirūpyate || 1 |
pūrvā'dhyāyānte idānīṃ praṣṭukāmo'si kiṃ tat pṛccha vadāmi te ityuktaṃ
tatroktā'nuvādapūrvakaṃ tṛptimāviṣkurvannanukramaṇikātanmāhātmye pṛcchati - idaṃ skānda-
miti dvayena || 1 |

vindhyanāradasaṃvādaḥ prathame parikīrtitaḥ |
satyalokaprabhāvaśca dvitīyaḥ samudāhṛtaḥ || 5 |
agasterāśramapade devānāmāgamastataḥ |
pativratācaritraṃ ca prasthānaṃ kumbhasambhavaḥ || 6 ||
tīrthapraśaṃsā ca tataḥ saptaparyastataḥ smṛtāḥ |
saṃyaminyāḥ svarūpaṃ ca brahmalokastataḥ param || 7 ||
indrāgnyorlokasamprāptistataśca śivaśarmaṇaḥ |
agneḥ samudbhavastasmāt kravyādvaruṇasambhavaḥ || 8 |
gandhavatyalakāpuryorīśayostu samudbhavaḥ |
candralokapariprāptiḥ śivaśarmadvijanmanaḥ || 9 |
prathamā'dhyāyārthamāha - vindhyeti | dvitīyā'dhyāyārthamāha - satyeti | dvitīyo
tṛtīyā'dhyāyārthamāha - agasteriti | caturthā'dhyāyārthamāha - pativrateti
pañcamā'dhyāyārthamāha - prasthānamiti | kumbhasambhavaḥ kumbhasambhavasya | chāndaso

uḍulokakathā tasmāttataḥ śukrasamudbhavaḥ |
māheyagurusaurīṇāṃ lokānāṃ varṇanaṃ tataḥ || 10 ||
saptarṣīṇāṃ tato lokā dhruvasya ca tapastataḥ |
tato dhruvapadaprāptirdhruvalokasthitistataḥ || 11 ||
darśanaṃ satyalokasya tasya vai śivaśarmaṇaḥ |
caturbhujā'bhiṣekaśca nirvāṇaṃ śivaśarmaṇaḥ || 12 ||
skandā'gastyośca saṃvādo maṇikarṇyāḥ samudbhavaḥ |
tatastu gaṅgāmāhātmyaṃ tato daśaharāstavaḥ || 13 ||
prabhāvaścā'pi gaṅgāyā gaṅgānāmasahasrakam |
vārāṇasyāḥ praśaṃsā'tha bhairavā''virbhavastataḥ || 14 ||
pañcadaśā'dhyāyārthamāha - uḍḍuloketi | tasmāttadanantaramuḍulokakathetyanvayaḥ |

śatatamo'dhyāyaḥ 41 9
daṇḍapāṇeḥ samudbhūtirjñānavāpyuddhavastataḥ |
ākhyānaṃ ca kalāvatyāḥ sadācārastataḥ param || 15 ||
brahmacāriprakaraṇaṃ tataḥ strīlakṣaṇāni ca |
kṛtyā'kṛtyaprakaraṇamavimukteśavarṇanam || 16 ||
tato gṛhasthadharmāśca tato yoganirūpaṇam |
kālajñānaṃ tataḥ proktaṃ divodāsasya varṇanam || 17 |
kāśyāśca varṇanaṃ tasmādyoginīvarṇanaṃ tataḥ |
lolārkasya samākhyānamuttarārkakathā tataḥ || 18 ||
dvātriṃśadadhyāyārthamāha- daṇḍapāṇeriti | trayastriṃśadadhyāyārthamāha - jñānavāpīti | catu-
striṃśadadhyāyārthamāha- ākhyānaṃ ceti | pañcatriṃśadadhyāyārthamāha - sadācāra iti || 15 ||
ṣaṭtriṃśadadhyāyārthamāha - brahmacārīti | saptatriṃśadadhyāyārthamāha - tataḥ strīti |
aṣṭātriṃśadadhyāyārthamāha - kṛtyā'kṛtyeti | ekonacatvāriṃśadadhyāyārthamāha- avimukte-

sāmbādityasya mahimā drupadādityaśaṃsanam |
tatastu garuḍākhyānamaruṇārkādayastataḥ || 1 9 |
daśāśvamedhikaṃ tīrthaṃ mandarācca gaṇāgamaḥ |
piśācamocanākhyānaṃ gaṇeśapreṣaṇaṃ tataḥ || 20 ||
māyāgaṇapateścā'tha duṇḍiprādurbhavastataḥ |
viṣṇumāyāprapañco'tha divodāsavisarjanam || 21 |
tataḥ pañcanadotpattirbindumādhavasambhavaḥ |
tato vaiṣṇavatīrthānāṃ māhātmyaparivarṇanam || 22 ||
prayāṇaṃ mandarātkāśīṃ vṛṣabhadhvajaśūlinaḥ |
jaigīṣavyena saṃvādo jyeṣṭhasthāne maheśituḥ || 23 |
aṣṭacatvāriṃśadadhyāyārthamāha- sāmbādityasyeti | ekonapañcāśadadhyāyārthamāha-

tataḥ kṣetrarahasyasya kathanaṃ pāpanāśanam |
athātaḥ kandukeśasya vyāghreśasya samudbhavaḥ || 24 ||
tataḥ śaileśvarakathā . ratneśasya caṃ darśanam |
kṛttivāsaḥ samutpattistataścāyatanāgamaḥ || 25 ||
devatānāmadhiṣṭhānaṃ durgā'suraparākramaḥ |
durgāyā vijayaścā'tha tata oṅkāravarṇanam || 26 |
punaroṅkāramāhātmyaṃ trilocanasamudbhavaḥ |
trilocanaprabhāvo'tha kedārākhyānameva ca || 27 ||
tato dharmeśamahimā tataḥ pakṣikathā śubhā |
tato viśvabhujākhyānaṃ durdamasya kathā tataḥ || 28 |
catuḥṣaṣṭyadhyāyārthamāha – tataḥ kṣetreti | pañcaṣaṣṭyadhyāyārthamāha- athāta iti |
athaśabdo'tra liṅgaprādurbhāve maṅgalārthaḥ || 24 |
ṣaṭṣaṣṭyadhyāyārthamāha - tataḥ śaileśvareti | saptaṣaṣṭyadhyāyārthamāha - ratneśasyeti |
aṣṭaṣaṣṭyadhyāyārthamāha - kṛttivāsa iti | ekonasaptatyadhyāyārthamāha- tataścāyata-

tato vīreśvarākhyānaṃ vīreśamahimā punaḥ |
gaṅgātīrthaiśca saṃyuktā kāmeśamahimā tataḥ || 2 9 ||
viśvakarmeśamahimā : dakṣayajñasamudbhavaḥ |
satyā dehavisargaśca tato dakṣeśvarodbhavaḥ || 30 ||
tato vai pārvatīśasya mahimnaḥ parikīrtanam |
gaṇeśasyā'tha mahimā narmadeśasamudbhavaḥ || 31 ||
satīśvarasamutpattiramṛteśādivarṇanam
vyāsasya hi bhujastambho vyāsaśāpavimokṣaṇam || 32 ||
kṣetratīrthakadambaṃ ca muktimaṇḍapasaṃkathā |
viśveśāvirbhavaścā'tha tato yātrāparikramaḥ || 33 ||
etadākhyānaśatakaṃ krameṇa parikīrtitam |
yasya śravaṇamātreṇa sarvakhaṇḍaśruteḥ phalam ||
anukramaṇikā'dhyāye'pyasti yātrāparikramaḥ || 34 ||
dvyaśītyadhyāyārthamāha - tato vīreti | tryaśītyadhyāyārthamāha- vīreśeti | catura-
śītyadhyāyārthamāha - gaṅgeti | pañcāśītyadhyāyārthamāha- kāmeśeti || 2 9 |
ṣaḍaśītyadhyāyārthamāha - viśvakarmeti | saptāśītyadhyāyārthamāha- dakṣayajñeti |
aṣṭāśītyadhyāyārthamāha - satyā iti | navāśītyadhyāyārthamāha- tato dakṣeti || 30 |
navatyadhyāyārthamāha- tato vai iti | ekanavatyadhyāyārthamāha - gaṅgeti | dvinavatya-
dhyāyārthamāha - narmadeti || 31 ||
trinavatyadhyāyārthamāha - satīśvareti | caturnavatyadhyāyārthamāha - amṛteti |
pañcanavatyadhyāyārthamāha - vyāsasyeti | ṣaṇṇavatyadhyāyārthamāha - vyāsaśāpeti || 32 |
saptanavatyadhyāyārthamāha - kṣetreti | aṣṭanavatyadhyāyārthamāha- muktimaṇḍapeti |

sūta uvāca -
yātrāparikramaṃ brūhi janānāṃ hitakāmyayā |
yathāvat siddhikāmānāṃ satyavatyāḥ sutottama || 35 ||
vyāsa uvāca -
niśāmaya mahāprājña lomaharṣaṇa vacmi te |
yathā prathamato yātrā kartavyā yātrikairmudā || 36 || |
sacailamādau saṃsnāya cakrapuṣkariṇījale |
santarpya devān sapitṝn brāhmaṇāṃśca tathā'rthinaḥ || 37 |
ādityaṃ draupadīṃ viṣṇuṃ daṇḍapāṇiṃ maheśvaram |
namaskṛtya tato gaccheddraṣṭuṃ duṇḍivināyakam || 38 ||
navanavatyadhyāyārthamāha - viśveśeti- śatatamādhyāyārthamāha- tato yātreti || 33 |
sacailamiti ślokoktamekam || 37 ||
ādityamityakṣaracatuṣṭayādhikārdhoktaṃ dvitīyam | tato gacchediti sārdhapādoktaṃ

jñānavāpīmupaspṛśya nandikeśaṃ tato'rcayet |
tārakeśaṃ tato'bhyarcya mahākāleśvaraṃ tataḥ || 3 9 ||
tataḥ punardaṇḍapāṇimityeṣā pañcatīrthikā || 40 |
dainandinī vidhātavyā mahāphalamabhīpsubhiḥ |
tato vaiśveśvarī yātrā kāryā sarvārthasiddhidā || 41 ||
dvisaptāyatanānāṃ ca kāryā yātrā prayatnataḥ |
kṛṣṇāṃ pratipadaṃ prāpya bhūtāvadhi yathāvidhi || 42 |
athavā pratibhūtaṃ ca kṣetrasiddhimabhīpsubhiḥ |
tattattīrthakṛtasnānastattalliṅgakṛtārcanaḥ
maunena yātrāṃ kurvāṇaḥ phalaṃ prāpnoti yātrikaḥ |
oṅkāraṃ prathamaṃ paśyenmatsyodaryāṃ kṛtodakaḥ || 44 |
triviṣṭapaṃ mahādevaṃ tato vai kṛttivāsasam |
ratneśaṃ cā'tha candreśaṃ kedāraṃ ca tato vrajet || 45 ||
jñānavāpīmiti ślokoktaṃ caturtham || 3 9 |
tata iti pādoktaṃ pañcamamityeṣā pañcatīrthiketi | pūrvoktarūpā vā || 40 |
bhūtāvadhi caturdaśīparyantam ||| 42 |

dharmeśvaraṃ ca vīreśaṃ gacchetkāmeśvaraṃ tataḥ |
viśvakarmeśvaraṃ cā'tha maṇikarṇīśvaraṃ tataḥ || 46 ||
avimukteśvaraṃ dṛṣṭvā tato viśveśamarcayet |
eṣā yātrā prayatnena kartavyā kṣetravāsinā || 47 ||
yastu kṣetramuṣitvā tu naitāṃ yātrāṃ samācaret |
vighnāstasyopatiṣṭhante kṣetroccāṭanasūcakāḥ || 48 |
aṣṭāyatanayātrānyā kartavyā vighnaśāntaye |
dakṣeśaḥ pārvatīśaśca tathā paśupatīśvaraḥ || 4 9 |
gaṅgeśo narmadeśaśca gabhastīśaḥ satīśvaraḥ |
aṣṭamastārakeśaśca pratyaṣṭami viśeṣataḥ || 50 ||
dṛśyānyetāni liṅgāni mahāpāpopaśāntaye |
aparā'pi śubhā yātrā yogakṣemakarī sadā || 51 |
sarvavighnopahantrī ca kartavyā kṣetravāsibhiḥ |
śaileśaṃ prathamaṃ vīkṣya varaṇāsnānapūrvakam || 52 |
phira trilocana , mahādeva , kṛttivāseśvara , ratneśvara , candreśvara , kedāreśvara ,
dharmeśvara , kāmeśvara , viśvakarmeśvara , maṇikarṇikeśvara aura avimukteśvara kā

snānaṃ tu saṅgame kṛtvā draṣṭavyaḥ saṅgameśvaraḥ |
svalīnatīrthe susnātaḥ paśyet svalīnamīśvaram || 53 ||
snātvā mandākinītīrthe draṣṭavyo madhyameśvaraḥ |
paśyeddhiraṇyagarbheśaṃ tatra tīrthe kṛtodakaḥ || 54 ||
maṇikarṇya tataḥ snātvā paśyedīśānamīśvaram |
tataḥ kūpamupaspṛśya goprekṣamavalokayet || 55 ||
kāpileyahade snātvā vīkṣeta vṛṣabhadhvajam |
upaśāntaśivaṃ paśyettatkūpavihitodakaḥ || 56 |
pañcacūḍāhade snātvā jyeṣṭhasthānaṃ tato'rcayet |
catuḥ samudrakūpe tu snātvā devaṃ samarcayet || 57 ||
devasyā'gre tu yā vāpī tatropasparśane kṛte |
śukreśvaraṃ tataḥ paśyettatkūpavihitodakaḥ || 58 |
daṇḍakhāte tataḥ snātvā vyāghreśaṃ pūjayettataḥ |
śaunakeśvarakuṇḍe tu snānaṃ kṛtvā tato'rcayet || 5 9 ||
jambukeśaṃ mahāliṅgaṃ kṛtvā yātrāmimāṃ naraḥ |
kvacinna jāyate bhūyaḥ saṃsāre duḥkhasāgare || 60 |

samārabhya pratipadaṃ yāvatkṛṣṇā caturdaśī |
etatkrameṇa kartavyānyetadāyatanāni vai || 61 ||
imāṃ yātrāṃ naraḥ kṛtvā na bhūyo'pyabhijāyate |
anyā yātrā prakartavyaikādaśāyatanodbhavā || 62 ||
āgnīdhrakuṇḍe susnātaḥ paśyedāgnīdhramīśvaram |
urvaśīśaṃ tato gacchettatastu nakulīśvaram || 63 ||
āṣāḍhīśaṃ tato dṛṣṭvā bhārabhūteśvaraṃ tataḥ |
lāṅgalīśamathā''lokya tatastu tripurāntakam || 64 ||
tato manaḥprakāmeśaṃ prītikeśamatho vrajet |
madālaseśvaraṃ tasmāttilaparṇeśvaraṃ tataḥ || 65 ||
yātraikādaśaliṅgānāmeṣā kāryā prayatnataḥ |
imāṃ yātrāṃ prakurvāṇo rudratvaṃ prāpnuyānnaraḥ || 66 ||
aṃtaḥ paraṃ pravakṣyāmi gaurīyātrāmanuttamān |
śuklapakṣe tṛtīyāyāṃ yā yātrā viṣvagṛddhidā || 67 |
eṣa cāsau kramaśceti | etadāyatanāni pūrvoktaśaileśādyāśritāni || 61 |
viṣvagṛddhidā sarvasampattidātrī || 67 ||

goprekṣatīrthe susnāya mukhanirmālikāṃ | vrajet |
jyeṣṭhāvāpyāṃ naraḥ snātvā jyeṣṭhāṃ gaurīṃ samarcayet || 68 |
saubhāgyagaurī sampūjyā jñānavāpyāṃ kṛtodakaiḥ |
tataḥ śṛṅgāragaurīṃ ca tatraiva ca kṛtodakaḥ || 6 9 |
snātvā viśālagaṅgāyāṃ viśālākṣīṃ tato vrajet |
susnāto lalitātīrthe lalitāmarcayettataḥ || 70 |
snātvā bhavānītīrthe'tha bhavānīṃ paripūjayet |
maṅgalā ca tato'bhyarcyā bindutīrthakṛtodakaiḥ || 71 ||
tato gacchenmahālakṣmīṃ sthiralakṣmīsamṛddhaye |
imāṃ yātrāṃ naraḥ kṛtvā kṣetre'smin muktijanmani || 72 ||
na duḥkhairabhibhūyeta ihāmutrā'pi kutracit |
kuryātpraticaturthīha yātrāṃ vighneśituḥ sadā || 73 ||
brāhmaṇebhyastaduddeśāddeyā vai modakā modakā mude |
bhaume bhairavayātrā ca kāryā pātakahāriṇī || 74 |

ravivāre raveryātrā ṣaṣṭhyāṃ vā ravisaṃyuji |
tathaiva ravisaptamyāṃ sarvavighnopaśāntaye || 75 ||
navamyāmathavā'ṣṭamyāṃ caṇḍīyātrā śubhā matā |
antargṛhasya vai yātrā kartavyā prativāsaram || 76 |
prātaḥ snānaṃ vidhāyā''dau natvā pañcavināyakān |
namaskṛtvā'tha viśveśaṃ sthitvā nirvāṇamaṇḍape || 77 ||
antargṛhasya yātrāṃ vai kariṣye'ghaughaśāntaye |
gṛhītvā niyamaṃ ceti gatvā'tha maṇikarṇikām || 78 |
snātvā maunena cā''gatya maṇikarṇīśamarcayet |
kambalāśvatarau natvā vāsukīśaṃ praṇamya ca || 7 9 ||
parvateśaṃ tato dṛṣṭvā gaṅgākeśavamapyatha |
tatastu lalitāṃ dṛṣṭvā jarāsandheśvaraṃ tataḥ || 80 ||
tato vai somanāthaṃ ca vārāhaṃ ca tato vrajet |
brahmeśvaraṃ tato natvā natvā'gastīśvaraṃ tataḥ || 81 |
kaśyapeśaṃ namaskṛtya namaskṛtya harikeśavanaṃ harikeśavanaṃ tataḥ |
vaidyanāthaṃ tato dṛṣṭvā dhruveśamatha vīkṣya ca || 82 |

gokarṇeśvaramabhyarcya hāṭakeśamatho vrajet |
asthikṣepataḍāge ca dṛṣṭvā vai kīkaseśvaram || 83 ||
bhārabhūtaṃ tato natvā citragupteśvaraṃ tataḥ |
citraghaṇṭāṃ praṇamyā'tha tataḥ paśupatīśvaram || 84 |
pitāmaheśvaraṃ gatvā tatastu kalaśeśvaram |
candreśastvatha vīreśo vidyeśo'gnīśa eva ca || 85 |
nāgeśvarī hariścandraścintāmaṇivināyakaḥ |
senāvināyakaścā'tha dravṭavyaḥ sarvavighnahṛt || 86 |
vasiṣṭhavāmadevau ca mūrtirūpadharāvubhau |
draṣṭavyau yatnataḥ kāśyāṃ mahāvighnavināśinau || 87 |
sīmāvināyakaṃ cā'tha karuṇeśaṃ tato vrajet |
trisandhyeśo viśālākṣī dharmeśo viśvabāhukā ||
āśāvināyakaścā'tha vṛddhādityastataḥ punaḥ || 88 |
caturvaktreśvaraṃ liṅgaṃ brāhmīśastu tataḥ paraḥ |
tato manaḥprakāmeśa īśāneśastataḥ param || 8 9 ||
caṇḍīcaṇḍeśvarau dṛśyau bhavānīśaṅkarau tataḥ |
duṣṭiṃ praṇamya ca tato rājarājeśamarcayet || 9 0 |

lāṅgalīśastato'bhyarcyastatastu nakulīśvaraḥ |
parānneśamatho natvā paradravyeśvaraṃ tataḥ || 9 1 ||
pratigraheśvaraṃ vā'pi niṣkalaṅkeśameva ca |
mārkaṇḍeyeśamabhyarcya tata apsaraseśvaram || 9 2 |
gaṅgeśo'bhyarcyastato jñānavāpyāṃ snānaṃ samācaret |
nandikeśaṃ tārakeśaṃ mahākāleśvaraṃ tataḥ || 9 3 ||
daṇḍapāṇiṃ maheśaṃ ca mokṣeśaṃ praṇamettataḥ |
vīrabhadreśvaraṃ natvā avimukteśvaraṃ tataḥ || 9 4 ||
vināyakāṃstataḥ pañca viśvanāthaṃ tato vrajet |
tato maunaṃ visṛjyā'tha mantrametamudīrayet || 9 5 ||
antargṛhasya yātreyaṃ yathāvad yā mayā kṛtā |
nyūnātiriktayā śambhuḥ prīyatāmanayā vibhuḥ || 9 6 ||
iti mantraṃ samuccārya kṣaṇaṃ vai muktimaṇḍape |
viśramya yāyād bhavanaṃ niṣpāpaḥ puṇyavānnaraḥ || 9 7 |
samprāpya vāsaraṃ viṣṇorviṣṇutīrtheṣu sarvataḥ |
kāryā yātrā prayatnena mahāpuṇyasamṛddhaye || 9 8 |
tadanantara lāṃgalīśvara , nakulīśvara , parānneśvara , paradravyeśvara , pratigraheśvara ,

nabhasyapañcadaśyāṃ ca kulastambhaṃ samarcayet |
duḥkhaṃ rudrapiśācatvaṃ na bhavedyasya pūjanāt || 99 ||
śraddhāpūrvamimā yātrāḥ kartavyāḥ kṣetravāsibhiḥ |
parvasvapi viśeṣeṇa kāryā yātrāśca sarvataḥ || 100 |
na vandhyaṃ divasaṃ kuryādvinā yātrāṃ kvacitkṛtī |
yātrādvayaṃ prayatnena kartavyaṃ prativāsaram || 101 ||
ādau svargataraṅgiṇyāstato viśveśiturdhruvam |
yasya vandhyaṃ dinaṃ yātaṃ kāśyāṃ nivasataḥ sataḥ || 102 |
nirāśāḥ pitarastasya tasminneva dine'bhavan | |
sa daṣṭaḥ kālasarpeṇa sa dṛṣṭo mṛtyunā sphuṭam || 103 ||
sa muṣṭastatra divase viśveśo yatra nekṣitaḥ |
sarvatīrtheṣu sasnau sa sarvayātrāṃ vyadhāt sa ca || 1 04 |
maṇikartyāṃ tu yaḥ snāto yo viśveśaṃ niraikṣata |
satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ satyaṃ satyaṃ satyaṃ punaḥ punaḥ ||
dṛśyo viśveśvaro nityaṃ snātavyā maṇikarṇikā || 1 05 |

vyāsa uvāca-
sūta skāndamidaṃ śrutvā kāśīmāhātmyamuttamam |
naro na nirayaṃ yāti kṛtvā'pyaghasahasrakam || 106 ||
snātvā sarvāṇi tīrthāni yacchreyaḥ samupārjyate |
kāśīkhaṇḍasya śravaṇāttatsyāt sūta na saṃśayaḥ || 107 | '
datvā dānāni sarvāṇi kṛtvā yajñānanekaśaḥ |
yatpuṇyaṃ labhyate martyaistadetacchravaṇāddhruvam || 108 |
taptvā tapāṃsi cogrāṇi prāpyate yanmahatphalam |
śravaṇādasya khaṇḍasya labhate tanna saṃśayaḥ || 10 9 ||
adhītya caturo vedān sāṅgān yatphalamāpyate |
kāśīkhaṇḍaṃ samākarṇya tatphalaṃ labhyate naraiḥ || 110 |
gayāyāṃ śrāddhadānācca yathā tṛpyanti pūrvajāḥ |
tathaitacchravaṇānnṛṇāṃ tṛpnuvanti pitāmahāḥ || 111 |
taiśca sarvapurāṇāni śrutāni sthirabuddhibhiḥ |
kāśīkhaṇḍaṃ śrutaṃ yaiśca sarveṣāṃ śreyasāṃ padam || 112 ||

śrutāśva sarvadharmāstairmahāpuṇyaikarāśibhiḥ |
śrutaṃ yaiḥ sthiracetobhiḥ kāśīmāhātmyamuttamam || 113 ||
idameva hi devejyā paramā parikīrtitā |
japettatkhaṇḍamakhilaṃ śrotavyaṃ śraddhayā dvijāḥ || 114 ||
śṛṇuyādekamapi ya ākhyānaṃ kāśikhaṇḍajam |
śrutāni tena sarvāṇi dharmaśāstrāṇyasaṃśayam || 115 |
mahādharmekajananaṃ mahārthapratipādakam |
kāraṇaṃ sarvakāmāpteḥ kāśīkhaṇḍamidaṃ smṛtam || 116 ||
etacchravaṇataḥ puṃsāṃ kaivalyaṃ naiva dūrataḥ |
tuṣyanti sarve pitaraḥ śrutvaitat khaṇḍamuttamam || 117 ||
prīṇantyamartyāḥ sarve'pi brahmaviṣṇuśivādayaḥ |
munayaḥ parimodante mādyanti sanakādayaḥ || 118 |
hṛṣṭaḥ sarvo bhavedeva bhūtagrāmaścaturvidhaḥ |
mahimaśravaṇādasmādvārāṇasyā na saṃśayaḥ || 11 9 ||
jo parama puṇyaśīla jana sthiracitta hokara isa anupama kāśī - māhātmya kā

ya idaṃ śrāvayedvidvān samastaṃ tvardhameva vā |
pādamātraṃ tadardhaṃ vā tvekaṃ vyākhyānamuttamam || 120 ||
sa namasyaḥ prayatnena sampūjyastviṣṭadevavat |
tasmai deyaṃ prayatnena viśveśaprītaye sadā || 121 ||
tasmiṃstuṣṭe hi santuṣṭo viśveśo nā'tra saṃśayaḥ |
yatraitatpaṭhyate khaṇḍaṃ parānandasamāśrayam || 122 |
na tatra prabhavet kaścidamaṅgalasamudbhavaḥ |
ya idaṃ śṛṇuyādvidvān yaścedaṃ śrāvayet sudhīḥ || 123 ||
yaḥ paṭhedapi puṇyātmā te sarve rudramūrtayaḥ |
ya etatpustakaṃ ramyaṃ lekhayitvā samarpayet || 124 ||
akhilāni purāṇāni tena dattāni nā'nyathā |
atrā''khyānāni yāvanti ślokā yāvanta eva hi || 125 |
tathā padāni yāvanti varṇā yāvanta eva hi |
yāvantyapi ca mātrāṇi yāvatyaḥ padapaṅktayaḥ || 126 ||
guṇe sūtrāṇi yāvanti yāvantaḥ paṭatantavaḥ |
citrarūpāṇi yāvanti ramyapustakasañcake ||
tāvadyugasahastrāṇi dātā svarge mahīyate || 127 |

etaddvādaśakṛtvo yaḥ śṛṇuyāt khaṇḍamuttamam |
brahmahatyā'pi tasyā''śu naśyecchambhoranugrahāt ||128 |
aputraḥ śṛṇuyādyastu susnātaḥ śraddhayānvitaḥ |
tasya putro bhavatyeva śambhorājñāprabhāvataḥ || 12 9 ||
kiṃ bahūktena sūteha yasya yasya manorathaḥ |
yo yastaṃ taṃ sa sa sadā śrutyaitat prāpnuyāt kṛtī || 130 ||
śṛṇuyāddūradeśe'pi yaḥ kāśīkhaṇḍamuttamam |
sa kāśīvāsapuṇyasya bhājanaṃ syācchivājñayā || 131 ||
etacchravaṇataḥ puṃsāṃ sarvatra vijayo bhavet |
saubhāgyaṃ cā'pi sarvatra prāpnuyānnirmalāśayaḥ || 132 | |
yasya viśveśvarastuṣṭastasyaitacchravaṇe matiḥ |
jāyate puṇyayuktasya mahānirmalacetasaḥ || 133 |
sarveṣāṃ maṅgalānāṃ ca mahāmaṅgalamuttamam |
gṛhe'pi likhitaṃ pūjyaṃ sarvamaṅgalasiddhaye || 134 |
|| iti śrīskandapurāṇe kāśīkhaṇḍe anukramaṇikānāma śatatamo'dhyāyaḥ || 100 |
|| samāptaṃ cedaṃ kāśīkhaṇḍam ||

saccidānandasandohaparipūrṇaikabhānave |
bhaktecchopāttadehāya kṛṣṇāya haraye namaḥ || 1 | ||
vedānte satyavatyātmaja iva sunaye bhārgavo vā'tha jīvo
nyāye kāṇādavartmanyatha ca gurutaro gautamo vā'kṣapādaḥ |
sāṃkhye yo devahūtyātmaja iva hi tathā vāsukiryogaśāstre
prākkāṇḍe bhaṭṭatulyaḥ sa jayati paramaḥ śrīsurendro gururnaḥ || 2 ||
vedānte'tha purāṇabhāratavidhau śrīsatyavatyātmajaḥ
sāṃkhye śrīkapilaḥ kaṇāda iha yo vaiśeṣike gautamaḥ |
nyāye yoganaye patañjaliratho candraprabhāvallabho
bhaṭṭācāryacaturbhujo vijayate prākkāṇḍakaumārilaḥ || 3 |
sakośā ca vikośā ca dve ṭīke likhite mayā |
yatra yasyā'bhilāṣaḥ syāt sā tena parigṛhyatām || 4 ||
āsītkaśyapavaṃśabhūṣaṇaṃmaṇirmānyo mukundapriyo
viprodāragadādharasya tanayaḥ śuklāmbaraḥ sanmatiḥ |
gandharvījaṭhare tataḥ samabhavacchrīrāmanāmā suta-
steneyaṃ vihitā hitāya viduṣāṃ ṭīkā budhairvīkṣyatām || 5 ||
kāśyāṃ 1 śrīpuruṣottamena viduṣā bhaṭṭena śuddhātmanā
tantrādhyātmapurāṇabhāratavidopāsyopakaṃsāriṇā I
rāmānandamunīndravaryakṛtayā gūḍhārthayā ṭīkayā
samyak saṅkalitaṃ hitāya viduṣāṃ śrīkāśikhaṇḍaṃ mahat || 6 |
|| iti śrīmatparamahaṃsaparivrājakācārya bhagavatpūjyapādaśiṣya śrīrāmendravanaśiṣyeṇa caitanya-
vanā'paraparyāyeṇa rāmānandena kṛtāyāṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkāyāṃ śatatamo'dhyāyaḥ || 100 |
|| samāptā ceyaṃ kāśīkhaṇḍaṭīkā ||
dohā - kāśīkhaṃḍa punīta yaha , karata sumaṃgala vṛddhi |

sanpūrṇānanda saṃskṛta viśvavi
